Name: Universal Audio
Description:
Founded in 1958 by recording pioneer Bill Putnam Sr., and refounded in 1999 by Bill Putnam Jr., Universal Audio is best known for its classic, hand-built analog hardware, award-winning line of Apollo audio interfaces, and advanced UAD Digital Signal Processing technology for recording, mixing, and mastering audio. 

Headquartered in Scotts Valley, California, with offices in Los Angeles, Colorado, and Amsterdam, UA is focused on merging the best of vintage analog and modern digital technology. 

With its rich recording heritage, UA has been “Setting the tone since 1958.”

Name: TuneCore
Description:
TuneCore—owned by Believe, one of the world’s leading digital music companies—is the leading development partner for self-releasing artists to build their audiences and careers, with technology and services across distribution, publishing administration, and a range of promotional offerings.

How We Are Different:

- TuneCore Music Distribution helps artists, labels and managers sell their music through Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, YouTube Music, Deezer, TikTok and more than 150 download and streaming stores worldwide, while retaining 100 percent of their rights for a low annual flat fee.

- TuneCore advocates for diversity, equity and inclusion across all of our platforms and throughout our company. As part of our commitment to gender equity, since 2021, Believe and TuneCore have sponsored BE THE CHANGE: Gender Equity in Music, a groundbreaking study that explores the challenges and experiences of women and gender expansive creators and professionals in the music industry. 

- TuneCore is committed to the well-being of our employees and aims to create a workplace that fosters both personal and professional growth. Our inclusive benefits package includes, but is not limited to: 

• 4 ½ day work week with “Wellness Fridays” year round, paid time off, unlimited paid sick days, and week-long company-wide time-off between Christmas and New Years.
• 4 month Universal Paid Parental Leave for both parents
• 401k match starting at day 1 and $125/month direct to student loan repayment
• Comprehensive health, vision, dental, FSA and dependent care 
• Weekly catered lunches, happy hours & in-office performances, and employee showcases

- TuneCore is proud to be included in Fast Company’s top ten list of Most Innovative Music Companies in 2023 and 2024, and recognized on Crain’s Top 100 Places to Work in NYC list from 2022 through 2024.

Our Artist Support Team makes things easy for you. Submit a request here: https://support.tunecore.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

Name: Gibson, Inc.
Description:
Gibson, the leading iconic guitar brand, has shaped the sounds of generations of musicians and music lovers across genres for 127 years. Founded in 1894 and headquartered in Nashville, Gibson has a legacy of world-class craftsmanship, legendary music partnerships, and progressive product evolution that is unrivaled among musical instrument companies. The Gibson Brands portfolio includes Gibson, the leading guitar brand, as well as many of the most beloved and recognizable music brands, including Epiphone which has been on every stage since 1873, Kramer the original MADE TO ROCK HARD guitar brand, MESA/Boogie the home of tone, and KRK behind great music for over 30 years.  Gibson Brands is dedicated to quality, innovation, and sound excellence so that music lovers for generations to come will continue to experience music shaped by Gibson. 
Learn more at Gibson.com and follow us on Twitter, Facebook, Gibson TV, and Instagram.

Name: Songtrust
Description:
**We're hiring! Check out our openings here: https://www.songtrust.com/songtrust-careers

We partner with songwriters, representatives, and businesses to build healthy songwriting careers. Songwriters build healthy careers when they take an active role in managing their business and owning their music. We empower them to do this by providing education, enabling them to register and collect all their publishing royalties, and relentlessly searching for ways to simplify and unite the music industry around the world.

Founded in 2011, Songtrust helps music creators own their music, and own their careers.

A Downtown Company.

Name: Columbia Records
Description:
Columbia Records is an American flagship recording label, under the ownership of Sony Music Entertainment, operating under the Columbia Music Group. It was founded in 1888, evolving from an earlier enterprise, the American Graphophone Companyâsuccessor to the Volta Graphophone Company.[1] Columbia is the oldest brand name in recorded sound,[2][3] being the first record company to produce recorded records as opposed to blank cylinders. Columbia Records went on to release records by an array of notable singers, instrumentalists, and bands. From 1961 to 1990, its recordings were released outside the U.S. and Canada on the CBS Records label (for Columbia Broadcasting System, its parent from 1938 to 1988) before adopting the Columbia name in most of the world.

It is one of Sony Music's three flagship record labels with the others being Epic Records and RCA Records.

Until 1989, Columbia Records had no connection to Columbia Pictures, which used various other names for record labels they owned, including Colpix, Colgems, Bell and later Arista; rather, it was connected to CBS, which stood for Columbia Broadcasting System, a broadcasting media company which purchased Columbia Records in the late 1930s, and which had been co-founded in 1927 by Columbia Records itself. Though Arista was sold to BMG, it would later become a sister label to Columbia Records through Sony Music; both are connected to Columbia Pictures through Sony Corporation of America, worldwide parent of both the music and motion picture arms of Sony.

As of 2012, Columbia Records has the highest label share in Adult Contemporary radio in the US, it was also ranked the number-one AC label that year.

Name: Resident Advisor
Description:
Founded in 2001, Resident Advisor is one of the world's longest-running music media brands and a cornerstone of the dance, electronic and DJ ecosystem. As an independent company run by devoted dance music enthusiasts, we're committed to connecting hyper-niche local scenes with the global electronic music community.

The site's audience of over 6 million monthly users are drawn in by a combination of news, finger-on-the-pulse journalism, club listings and ticketing, RA-branded events at venues and festivals worldwide, original films and a weekly mix series that has run continuously since 2006.

Our mission is to bring together the world's electronic music communities. As a certified B Corp, we're committed to doing good and continuing to champion inclusivity and equity in all aspects of our work. 

Interested in joining us? Please check out our vacancies on Doors Open, our not-for-profit electronic music jobs board.

Name: Splice
Description: Splice is the leading music creation platform, empowering musicians, producers, and sound designers with the tools to bring their ideas to life. The company’s sound-first approach features a vast library of high-quality sonic ingredients, powered by sophisticated AI tools, to assist in deep sound discovery and idea generation. Tools like Splice INSTRUMENT and Sounds are heard around the world—playing a vital role in music's soundscape. Trusted by millions, Splice also provides affordable access to plugins and DAWs through a rent-to-own gear marketplace.

Name: Music Gateway
Description:
Music Gateway is a leading global music tech company dedicated to empowering artists, producers, and music professionals at every stage of their careers. Our mission is simple: to break down barriers in the music industry and provide a centralized platform for growth, collaboration, and success.

What We Do
From sync licensing to music promotion, distribution, publishing, and more, Music Gateway is designed to streamline the way creatives and industry professionals connect and work together globally. Whether you're an emerging artist, an established band, or a music business, we offer a suite of innovative services to help you manage your music and career—all in one place.

How We Help

 Music Promotion: Amplify your music with playlist placements, digital marketing, and fan growth campaigns.
 Sync Licensing: Get your tracks featured in TV, film, and advertisements with our expert representation.
 Music Distribution: Distribute your music to all major platforms, reaching audiences worldwide.
 Publishing Services: Maximize your royalties with our efficient rights management and publishing administration.
 Collaboration Tools: Connect with top talent, hire professionals, and discover fresh opportunities through our intuitive project management system.
 A&R Services: Scout new talent or launch your career with a platform designed by industry experts for industry experts.

Why Choose Us?
Trusted by creatives worldwide, Music Gateway saves you time, reduces risk, and helps you focus on what you do best—making music. With secure remote-working tools and a growing list of opportunities every month, we’ve become the go-to platform for creatives who want to thrive in a competitive industry.

Join us as we redefine what's possible in music.

Name: Music Tribe
Description:
There's a Musician in Every Human Being.

Our purpose is to empower those who have not and cannot.

Name: Spinnin' Records
Description: Spinnin' Records is an independent dance record label from the Netherlands, which started in 1999. Currently, Spinnin is recognized as one of the top dance labels in the world.

Name: 88RISING
Description:
88rising (stylized as 88) is an American mass media company that founded in 2015 by Sean Miyashiro describes as a "hybrid management, record label, video production and marketing company." The company has gained popularity as a musical platform and label for Asian artists such as Keith Ape, Rich Brian, Joji, NIKI, and Higher Brothers.

Headquartered in New York City, the company also has offices in Los Angeles and Shanghai. Outside of its core group, the company has collaborated with other artists such as Ghostface Killah, 21 Savage, XXXTentacion, Trippie Redd, Ski Mask the Slump God, Kris Wu, Yaeji, and others.

Name: C3 Presents
Description:
WE’RE IN THE BUSINESS OF PUTTING SMILES ON PEOPLE’S FACES

These simple words encapsulate the driving philosophy behind everything we do at C3 Presents. We create, market and produce live experiences, concerts and events — just about anything that makes people stand up and cheer.

C3 is the force behind two of the country’s top music festivals — Austin City Limits Music Festival and Lollapalooza. Every year, each of these festivals attracts more than 200,000 people over a three-day weekend and is staged in beloved greenspaces in the urban heart of its host city.

These events and many others showcase our ability to bring together a complex, broad spectrum of players — all with their own agendas, deadlines, opinions, and needs but also with a vested interest in the event’s success. C3 possesses the depth of expertise and experience to coordinate and maneuver through a major U.S. city’s complex infrastructure amid the massive logistics surrounding high-profile events — from federal entities such as the U.S. Secret Service, to city service agencies including city emergency management offices, the police department, transportation departments, and sanitation department — to political and civic agencies such as mayors’ offices, city tourism boards and parks departments.

Name: Island Def Jam Music Group
Description: The Island Def Jam Music Group is home to a multi-cultural and diverse family of artists and has fast become one of the most successful labels in the industry. It is comprised of Island Records, Def Jam Recordings and Mercury Records and is in partnerships with Disturbing Tha Peace, Slip N Slide, Redzone and Sodapop. The roster boasts an array of talented artists including Mariah Carey, Kanye West, Rihanna, Justin Bieber, Fall Out Boy, The Killers, The-Dream, Fabolous, Melissa Etheridge, Bon Jovi, Matthew Morrison, NAS, Chrisette Michele, Duffy, Jesse James, The Noisettes, Redman, Ghostface, Method Man, The Roots, Ludacris, Lionel Richie, Jeremih, Sum 41, Rick Ross, Jeezy and Ne-Yo.  The Island Def Jam Music Group is a wholly owned business unit of Universal Music Group.

Name: Bandcamp
Description: Bandcamp is a thriving, global community where fans discover new music and directly support the artists who make it.

Name: Mushroom Group
Description:
The Mushroom Group is one of the world’s most iconic music and entertainment collectives. 

Founded in 1972 by a young Michael Gudinski, the Group began life with the formation of Mushroom Records and Mushroom Music Publishing.

Five decades later, Mushroom is now spearheaded by Michael’s son Matt and incorporates international and domestic touring, booking agencies, artist and talent management, record labels, music publishing, merchandising, event curation and production, creative and marketing services, venues, film production and distribution and more – there is almost no end to what the Mushroom Group is involved in and can offer.

One unique characteristic of Mushroom and a fundamental part of our ongoing success is our operating ethos and focus on the individuality and independence of each company. This grants each company and its people total freedom of operation whilst still benefiting from the collective strength of the Mushroom Group.

The Mushroom Group is a family-orientated company, and that family includes our artists, staff and partners. Mushroom is home to more than 300 of the world’s most experienced, creative and passionate people; working closely with thousands of artists and organisations worldwide – year in, year out. We now have offices in Australia, New Zealand, Europe and North America and a footprint that extends across the globe. These are just some of the reasons that make Mushroom unparalleled in entertainment.

Name: Royal College of Music
Description:
The Royal College of Music is ranked the Global No. 1 institution for Performing Arts for the third year running and earned the inaugural top spot for Music in the 2024 QS World University Rankings by Subject.

Founded in 1882, the Royal College of Music is a world-leading music conservatoire with a prestigious history and contemporary outlook. Our 800 undergraduate and postgraduate students come from over 60 countries and are taught in a dynamic environment, leaving the RCM to become the outstanding performers, conductors and composers of the future. 

The RCM benefits from its particular location in South Kensington - one of the most attractive and interesting parts of central London.  The College has over two hundred members of professorial (teaching) staff, the majority of whom are busy professionals, who include teaching among the various musical activities that they regularly undertake. Their work, and the work of the College as a whole, is supported by a team of over one hundred administrative staff.

Name: Spitfire Audio
Description: We make inspiring sounds and scoring tools for film, in collaboration with the World's best composers, musicians and engineers.

Name: Roskilde Festival
Description:
Roskilde Festival is the largest North European culture and music festival and has existed since 1971. We are a non-profit organisation consisting of about 50 full-time employees and thousands of volunteers.

Volunteers
During the festival itself the number of volunteers increases to about 30,000. These volunteers staff the festival stalls, build stages, provide camping security etc. Most volunteers are from cultural organizations and sports associations in the area. These clubs and societies run most of the stalls at the Festival Site, and with their great variety in goods and atmosphere the stalls contribute to the unique, intimate and exciting ambience at Roskilde Festival.

Non-profit society behind the festival
The Roskilde Festival Charity Society is the organizer of Roskilde Festival. The purpose of the society is to support initiatives benefitting children and young people and to support humanitarian and cultural work. The society's work is independent of party politics and has no geographical borders.

Name: Ultra Records
Description:
Ultra Records has been known to push electronic music’s boundaries. For over a quarter of a century, the iconic record label has been instrumental in elevating up and coming artists to the global mainstream as well as bringing fresh genres and sounds to the forefront of the dance floor. Founded in 1995 and since the label’s first release with house music icon Roger Sanchez, Ultra has been home to some of the most legendary names in electronic music including, MK, Benny Benassi, Armin van Buuren, Steve Aoki, David Guetta, Calvin Harris, Black Coffee, deadmau5, Carnage, Deorro, Kygo, Tiesto, Kaskade, Louis the Child, SOFI TUKKER, Anabel Englund and many more. 

In addition to creating and releasing numerous platinum hit singles, award winning remixes and chart topping albums, Ultra Records has built an incredible portfolio of digital media properties including its YouTube channel (28+ million subscribers), Facebook page (2.4+ million Likes), Instagram channel (550k+ followers) and Twitter (600k+ subscribers). 

At the end of 2021, Ultra Records was acquired by Sony Music and David Waxman, who previously held the title of head of A&R and General Manager,was appointed as President. In this new chapter of the label’s story, the core of its ethos will remain the same: Ultra Records will continue to deliver exceptional electronic music to the masses.

Name: Warp Records
Description: For over 30 years, Warp has been a synonym for adventures in sound and vision. We are now a leading independent music company representing ground-breaking and influential artists, including Aphex Twin, Flying Lotus, Danny Brown, Kelela, Nightmares on Wax, Squid, Oneohtrix Point Never, Nala Sinephro, Autechre, Stereolab and many more across our family of labels, which includes Warp Records, LuckyMe, Roya, PLZ Make It Ruinz, On-U Sound and more. We have offices in London, New York City, Los Angeles and Sheffield.

Name: Ditto Music
Description:
Ditto Music is an award-winning global music distribution and record label services company, supporting over 2 million artists and labels worldwide, with more than 20 offices across the UK, Europe, Australia, Asia, Africa, North and Latin America.
 
Founded by Matt & Lee Parsons in 2007, the company provides distribution to hundreds of the biggest music platforms such as Spotify, Apple Music, iTunes, Deezer, Amazon and Vevo amongst others.
 
Ditto Music also offers record label and promotional services for independent artists through its premium music marketing service Ditto Label Services, including press, playlist pitching, social media, radio plugging and more. They also became the first distribution company to offer management for artists, with the launch of Ditto Management, a stand-alone artist management company.
 
Ditto has previously worked with major artists such as Stormzy, Ed Sheeran and Sam Smith at the early stages of their careers, as well as Chance the Rapper, Dave, Yxng Bane, AJ Tracey, Ian Brown and many more in recent years, achieving numerous UK Top 40 and worldwide chart hits.
  
Following rapid growth and the opening of new worldwide headquarters, Ditto was named as one of Britain's fastest growing companies on The Sunday Times Fast Track 100 list for 2017 and SME Export Track 100 list for 2018.
 
Ditto Music was also nominated for Best Label/Artist Services Company at the Music Week Awards in 2017 and 2018.

Name: Musicians Institute
Description: Musicians Institute is dedicated to inspiring artistic and academic excellence while preparing students for careers in the music and entertainment industry.  Our cutting-edge educational offerings provide the information, skills and expertise necessary for musicians and creative professionals to achieve their goals. We strive to develop a diverse array of talented individuals who can enrich the global community with their artistic contributions.

Name: MusikWoche
Description: Der Beat der Branche

Name: London Symphony Orchestra
Description: The London Symphony Orchestra is one of the world’s top orchestras. Our home is at the Barbican in the City of London, where we perform over 80 concerts every year, and at LSO St Luke’s, a converted 18th-century church just up the road which is the base for our LSO Discovery community and education programme. We also run a record label, LSO Live. Each year we tour to several different countries, and return to some regularly where we have residencies.

Name: Yamaha Music India Pro Audio
Description: Yamaha Professional Audio is known around the globe as a provider of innovative, top-quality solutions for the sound industry. The Yamaha lineup includes a number of world-standard mixing consoles, signal processors incorporating industry-leading DSP technology, power amplifiers based on energy-efficient drive technology, and an extensive range of speakers suitable for commercial solution, live sound, broadcast and studio market.

Name: Peermusic
Description: peermusic was founded over 95 years ago by renowned visionary Ralph S. Peer, and is the largest independent music publisher in the world, with 39 offices in 32 countries. These offices today represent over 500,000 titles.

Name: SOCAN
Description:
SOCAN is a rights management organization that links more than four million songwriters, composers and music publishers worldwide. We do this by administering licenses for the public performance and reproduction of their work. The money collected from these licenses is distributed as royalties to the music creators and publishers who have rightfully earned them in Canada and worldwide.  

More than 250 employees work with SOCAN. We are a team dedicated to supporting the national and global music ecosystem through our creativity, innovation, commitment, and passion in an ever-changing music and business landscape. We support SOCAN members from offices in Toronto, Vancouver, Montréal, Nashville and Los Angeles. 

We love music and believe that the songwriters, composers and music publishers provide an essential and priceless aspect of national pride and culture. This belief permeates our work and heavily influences a workplace culture of which we are immensely proud. 

  
As we blaze trails during one of the fastest-changing times in our industry, we continue to revolutionize and modernize music monetization through state-of-the-art, innovative technology.  

SOCAN is Canada’s largest member-based rights management organization. We’re always looking for innovative, industrious, and creative new team members, who share our passion and commitment.  

  

Visit SOCAN.com to learn more about what we do.

Name: Ernie Ball Music Man
Description:
Ernie Ball was the first to offer rock strings with the creation of Slinkys, and further revolutionized the market by offering guitarists custom-guage single strings. The Ernie Ball Company also produces Ernie Ball Music Man guitars and basses, volume pedals, and other accessories. Ernie Ball strings and accessories are available in more than 6,000 music stores throughout the U.S as well as 110 countries.   

Ernie Ball is one of the very few companies that still manufactures most of its products in beautiful, sunny California.  With facilities in both Coachella and San Luis Obispo, this family owned business stays true to its roots and plans to continue it's great success. 

Visit our websites at www.ernieball.com and www.music-man.com.

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/ernieballinc
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ernieball
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/ernieball
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ernieball

Name: Universal Music Group Italia
Description:
Universal Music Italia srl è parte di Universal Music Group.
Universal Music Group (UMG) è la società leader in Italia e nel mondo nell’ambito dell’intrattenimento musicale. Possiede e gestisce una molteplicità di aziende nell’ambito della musica registrata, dell’editoria musicale, del merchandising e dei contenuti audiovisivi in oltre 60 Paesi. In Italia e in tutto il mondo individua e sviluppa artisti, interpreti, cantautori e autori, producendo, distribuendo e promuovendo successi musicali acclamati dalla critica che appassionano e divertono fan e ascoltatori di ogni genere e di tutto il mondo. Il catalogo abbraccia oltre un secolo di registrazioni e canzoni e rappresenta la più grande e culturalmente ricca selezione di musica mai collezionata. 
Dedito all’arte, all'innovazione e all'imprenditorialità, UMG promuove lo sviluppo di servizi, piattaforme e modelli di business al fine di ampliare le opportunità artistiche e commerciali per i nostri artisti e creare nuove esperienze per i fan.

http://www.universalmusic.it 
https://www.ricordi.com/it-IT/
https://www.universalproductionmusic.com/it-it
https://www.umusicpub.com/it/

Name: Ecad Direitos Autorais
Description: O Ecad protege os direitos autorais dos titulares de música (compositores, intérpretes, músicos, editores e produtores fonográficos) que têm suas músicas tocadas publicamente.

Name: Extreme Music
Description:
Extreme Music is an international production / library music business that forms part of Sony Music Publishing. Extreme Music has operations in Berlin, Stockholm, Sydney, New York and Los Angeles and is headquartered in London.  

We’re all about the music. Known for nose-bleed-high production values, our unrivaled roster includes Quincy Jones, Hans Zimmer, Sir George Martin, Snoop Dogg, Two Steps From Hell, Labrinth, Rodney Jerkins, Robbie Nevil, Ramin Djawadi, Vince Clarke, Hugh Padgham, Boris Blank, Mark Mothersbaugh, Clint Mansell, Rupert Gregson-Williams, Harry Gregson-Williams, Nick Launay, Atli Örvarsson, Christopher Lennertz,  James Yuill, Sasha, Digweed, Michael Giacchino, Geoff Zanelli Terry Date, Timbaland, Brian Tyler, Eddie Kramer, Tyler Bates,  Dweezil Zappa, Brian Dougans, Amon Tobin, Klaus Badelt,  Mark Mancina, Paul Hartnoll, John Powell, Steve Jablonsky, James S. Levine, Xzibit, Blues Saraceno, Junkie XL and DJ Shadow.

More information about Extreme Music is available at www.extrememusic.com.

Name: Nettwerk Music Group
Description:
Founded in 1984, Nettwerk Music Group is a leading global independent record label with a legacy of purpose-driven innovation. We are dedicated to nurturing a diverse roster of artists with fan-connected communities, helping them cultivate deeply engaged audiences and build sustainable, long-term careers in the ever-evolving music industry.

Headquartered in Vancouver, Nettwerk's hybrid workforce numbers over 200 and operates from strategic hubs in Los Angeles, London, Hamburg, Eora / Sydney, New York, Nashville, Berlin, Amsterdam, Toronto, and beyond. With a wealth of cross-market expertise, our unified global team creates impactful, culturally resonant music experiences that transcend borders.

Name: IDOL
Description:
IDOL is a digital distributor that provides world-leading service to some of the most prestigious names in independent music. Its diverse roster, built around the highest standards of artistic curation, includes Erased Tapes, Fire Records, City Slang, Glitterbeat, Gondwana, Kitsuné, Local Action, Soundway, SRD, Ubisoft and Bandai Namco, while it also works directly with artists including Erick The Architect, La Femme, L’Impératrice, and Ibrahim Maalouf.
 
IDOL was founded in 2006 by Pascal Bittard as one of the first fully digital aggregators, with “independence is a strength” as its core belief. Its offering combines unbeatable label management and marketing services with a focus on long-term catalogue development – a combination that consistently achieves better results for its clients.
 
IDOL operates its own digital distribution platform, Labelcamp, which offers state-of-the-art supply chain management tools and analytics dashboards to its distributed partners. Labelcamp is also available as a SaaS product for third-party labels and distributors, and is used by the likes of [PIAS], Because, Concord and Ditto.  


The company has offices in Paris, London, Berlin and Johannesburg, and a presence in New York, LA and Nashville.

Name: Bad Boy Entertainment
Description: Bad Boy Entertainment is an award-winning, globally celebrated music, media, and entertainment company founded by Sean "Diddy" Combs. The company includes Bad Boy Records, a pioneer in hip-hop and one of the music industry's premier record labels. For more than 30 years, Bad Boy Records has launched the careers of hip-hop heavyweights such as Notorious B.I.G., Puff Daddy, Craig Mack, Ma$e, and Faith Evans. Other Bad Boy artists include 112, Mario Winans, Black Rob, The Lox, New Edition, French Montana, Machine Gun Kelly, Janelle Monae, King Combs, and dozens of others. Over the past three-plus decades, Bad Boy has sold more than 400 million albums, and their songs have over 3 billion streams. Today, Bad Boy operates as an independent company and the Bad Boy catalog continues to be distributed by Warner Music Group and Interscope.

Name: J.W. Pepper
Description: J.W. Pepper is the world's premier sheet music supplier and has been for over 140 years. With a strong commitment to service, Pepper brings the world of music to doorstep year-round with its extensive catalogs, website, and email newsletters.

Name: MaMA Music & Convention
Description:
Chaque année, près de 6 500 professionnel·les de la musique se réunissent au MaMA Music & Convention, le plus grand rendez-vous de la filière en France. Indépendant·es et majors du disque, producteur·rices de spectacles, responsables de salles et festivals, manager·euses, éditeur·rices, startups, créateur·rices de contenu numérique, médias… et bien sûr, artistes se retrouvent pour trois jours d’échanges et de découvertes.

Depuis 16 ans, MaMA Music & Convention est l'événement incontournable des acteur·rices de la musique. Entre rencontres professionnelles en journée et concerts ouverts au grand public en soirée, Pigalle et Montmartre vibrent au rythme du MaMA, investissant des lieux mythiques et atypiques.

Each year, nearly 6,500 music industry professionals gather at MaMA Music & Convention, the largest meeting place for the sector in France. Independent and major labels, live event producers, venue and festival managers, artist managers, publishers, startups, digital content creators, media… and of course, artists come together for three days of networking and discovery.

For 16 years, MaMA Music & Convention has been the must-attend event for all music industry stakeholders. Combining professional meetings by day and public concerts by night, Pigalle and Montmartre come alive to the rhythm of MaMA, taking over legendary and unique venues.

Name: PPL PRS Ltd
Description:
PPL PRS Ltd aims to provide the best music licensing experience in the world by keeping things simple for our customers. We’re here to ensure creators and performers are fairly rewarded for their work. 
PPL PRS is the joint venture between the UK’s two music licensing societies - PPL and PRS for Music. We’ve joined forces to make it easier for our customers to obtain a music licence for the playing or performance of music in public. 

Our parent companies have been working in music rights management for decades. PPL represents performers and record companies. PRS for Music is a society of songwriters, composers and music publishers. Both organisations ensure that the creators and performers of music are paid when their music is used in public. Whilst the two parent companies will continue to be based in London, the joint venture based in Leicester - PPL PRS - will deliver all UK public performance licensing, creating a single point of contact for customers and more efficient licensing to support our thousands of members’ rights.

You’ll find a collaborative spirit everywhere in our organisation. We are a genuine team, working together, looking out for each other and, most importantly of all, united for music.

Name: ROLI
Description:
Luminary ROLI is a human-centric Music-Tech company founded 3 ½ years ago with the mission to free the music, bringing an easier, more intuitive and fun way to learn a musical instrument. Blending Spatial AI, software, hardware and content, our integrated solution results in consumers learning to play the piano more quickly, conveniently and affordably than traditional methods. It’s also a lot more fun. 

Our product line-up includes solutions for absolute beginners, all the way through to the most accomplished musicians. Our new flagship ROLI Piano is the most advanced keyboard, whether you’re learning to play, or making your own music. The Piano M is its more compact, modular sibling. And then the Seaboard and Seaboard M bring whole new dimensions of touch to your play. And at the centre of all of these systems: the ROLI Airwave. The world’s first music application of computer vision and Spatial AI, taking both piano learning, and expressive play, to the next level. 

Our values go beyond the products we build, they shape how we work and grow together as a team. We believe that creating a more joyful, creative world starts with cultivating a thoughtful, inclusive, and collaborative company culture. As we enter our most exciting chapter yet, we’re looking for people who share our mission to make music learning accessible to all, who are eager to grow their skills, and who want to help build a diverse, purpose-driven team. At Luminary ROLI, you’re not just joining a company, you’re helping shape the future of music.

Originally founded back in 2009, we evolved into Luminary ROLI in 2021, during the pandemic. This evolution ensured we could hold onto our amazing team, intellectual property, and important mission. We are extending our innovations and expertise to ensure more people can learn to play, to free the music in everyone.

Name: She Is The Music
Description: In January 2018, the USC Annenberg Inclusion Initiative released a study on the music industry revealing a six-year low for female creators in popular music. She Is The Music actively seeks to close this gap by increasing opportunity and visibility for women currently working in music, as well as developing the next generation of women to join the industry and seek leadership roles. As an umbrella nonprofit, we also provide resources and support for female-focused initiatives that are working to create meaningful change. She Is The Music currently holds some of the most successful all-female song-writing camps, with each camp hosted around an established artist. We have created a database which is the industry’s ‘official’ and most comprehensive directory of women working in music, and we also provide a mentorship program, currently in partnership with Step Up.

Name: Warner Music Brazil
Description: Warner Music Brazil - Rio de Janeiro / Brasil
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio De Janeiro

Name: Ninja Tune
Description: Formed in 1990 by Matt Black & Jon More (Coldcut)

Name: shesaid.so
Description:
Established in September 2014, shesaid.so has a diverse international community, comprising of women from across all sectors of the industry - from tech to record labels, PR to management, and more. With headquarters in London and LA, the shesaid.so community has 15+ active chapters around the world including NYC, Paris, Berlin, Mumbai and more. Our vision is to connect and empower marginalized communities in the music industry with a focus on women's rights.

We curate and speak on panels aimed at promoting exceptional work by women in the music industry. We organize interactive events for our members and extended network, as well as showcases that shed a light on talented female artists and their representatives. We challenge the industry’s outdated systemic framework with our Alternative Power 100 Music List and work towards increasing the number of women who progress in their careers with our mentoring program she.grows. We work with brands to produce events and campaigns that further our mission of equality, diversity and inclusion.

Since its beginnings in London, shesaid.so has become a place where members can openly ask for advice, share jobs and events, announce new projects and build community. There are currently over 3,000 international members in the global community and an additional 10,000 members across our 15 local chapters.

Name: IQ Magazine
Description:
IQ Magazine is the leading information resource for the international live music business, operating across multiple platforms and mixing up-to-the-minute news, comment, features, analysis and in-depth reports.

An extension of the International Live Music Conference (ILMC), IQ’s readership includes the leading innovators and operators in concert and show promotion, including concert promoters, booking agents, festival organisers and venue operators.

Name: Vic Firth Company
Description:
Now a part of the the Avedis Zildjian Company family of brands, Vic Firth continues to be the leader in design, innovation, technology and education for the drumstick and mallet market. For the past 50 years, Vic Firth has worked with top artists from around the globe including the best drummers and percussionist from all music disciplines.

The Avedis Zildjian Company products are sold across the globe, under the Zildjian, Vic Firth, and Balter Mallets brands, and are the standard to which all other cymbals, drumsticks and mallets are measured. Headquartered in Norwell, MA with offices in Newport, ME, Los Angeles, CA, London, UK, and Singapore, Zildjian products are sold globally through distributors and via a network of dealers. All Zildjian products are made in the USA at our cymbal factory in Norwell, MA and drumstick/mallet factory in Newport, ME. 

Zildjian is an equal opportunity employer.  Our team is at the heart of our culture. We value family, innovation, and accountability. We strive to hire and develop the best team possible and foster a culture of collaboration, communication and transparency. 

For more info on careers at the Avedis Zildjian Company, visit: https://zildjian.com/career-opportunities

Name: BPI (British Phonographic Industry)
Description:
BPI promotes recorded music in the UK & worldwide and champions the rights and interests of over 500 record labels and associate members, including independents across the UK and Universal Music UK, Sony Music Entertainment UK and Warner Music UK. BPI membership accounts for around 85 per cent of the recorded music consumed in the UK – the world’s third largest music market – while in 2018 British artists claimed one in every eight albums sold around the world.

BPI’s Content Protection work and portal helps to protect its members’ recorded music content whilst its Research Department publishes BPI’s annual Music Market yearbook and monthly market reports as a leading source of authoritative industry data. BPI further supports its members with free training courses to ensure they are up-to-date with changing industry trends. 

To promote British music overseas, BPI works with DIT and other partners to organise a series of international trade missions, providing members with the opportunity to break into new markets and grow their business. BPI also administers the Music Export Growth Scheme (MEGS), which to date has distributed over £4.6m in support of around 300 UK music projects, generating £55.5 million in exports revenue for the British music economy.

BPI owns and organises the annual BRIT Awards, with substantial proceeds going to the BRIT Trust, BPI’s charitable arm that has donated over £16m to education-related causes, including the world-famous BRIT School, Nordoff Robbins and War Child.

BPI works with and supports a wide range of community-focused initiatives and organisations, including The BIG Music Project, and Creative Access, which promotes diversity across the industry.
The BPI is now also home to The Mercury Prize, while it co-owns the Official Charts with the retailers’ association ERA. BPI administers the iconic Platinum, Gold and Silver Awards Programme, which certifies recordings as they achieve various milestones.

Name: SNEP
Description:
Créé en 1922, le SNEP, syndicat national de l’édition phonographique, est la principale organisation patronale regroupant les producteurs, éditeurs et distributeurs de musique enregistrée, partenaires des artistes de la musique en France.

Il représente les intérêts de 53 maisons de disques et labels, de toutes tailles et de tous horizons musicaux, dont le chiffre d’affaires totalise 75% du marché français de la musique enregistrée. Les sociétés indépendantes disposent d’un nombre de voix égal à celui des membres de droit et les décisions du conseil sont adoptées à la majorité des trois quarts.
Le SNEP est membre de la Fédération internationale de l’industrie phonographique (IFPI), du Mouvement des entreprises de France (MEDEF) et de la Fédération des entreprises du spectacle, de la musique, de l’audiovisuel et du cinéma (FESAC).

Name: PIRATE.COM
Description:
Pirate.com is the world's leading provider of rehearsal and recording facilities for artists, with studios in the UK, Germany and the USA and exciting plans to expand globally. As one of Europe's fastest-growing companies, we’re a global team, working together to build something extraordinary. 

We’re on a mission to make creative space accessible to all. We provide 24/7 rehearsal, DJ, recording, podcast and dance studios.

At Pirate, we strive to break down barriers for people of all backgrounds, and it’s no different for our team. Equal opportunity, inclusivity and diversity are celebrated here. This means we treat people fairly, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, pregnancy and maternity, marital status, race, religion or sexual orientation.

Name: Kappa Kappa Psi - National Honorary Band Fraternity
Description: Kappa Kappa Psi is an honorary fraternal organization that promotes the existence and welfare of college band programs, the advancement of college and university bands through dedicated service and support, leadership opportunities, and recognition for outstanding band members.

Name: Supro
Description:
The Supro tone has always been expressed as a unique and powerful voice - never a copy, clone or wannabe of any other major make of amplifier.

Supro’s origin can be traced back to Chicago in the mid 30’s where manufacturing company Valco began producing guitars and amplifiers under the Supro name. By the late 60’s, Jimi Hendrix was playing a Supro Thunderbolt amp on tour with the Isley Brothers while Jimmy Page, inspired by the raw tones of the south-side Chicago blues scene, cut seminal Led Zeppelin tracks on a Supro Model 24.

In September 2013, Absara Audio LLC acquired the Supro trademark and launched a collaboration between former Fender amp designer Bruce Zinky and Pigtronix sound designer David Koltai to realize a modern incarnation of the legendary Supro sounds from the Valco era.

Our new line of USA made, vintage inspired Supro amplifiers will become available in 2014.

Name: Berliner Philharmoniker
Description:
Founded in 1882, the Berliner Philharmoniker have been among the world’s most eminent orchestras for a long time. In the first decades, the defining chief conductors were Hans von Bülow, Arthur Nikisch and Wilhelm Furtwängler, followed by Herbert von Karajan in 1955 and Claudio Abbado in 1989. In September 2002, Sir Simon Rattle assumed the post. Upon his inauguration, the orchestra‘s education programme, addressing new audiences, was initiated. The Berliner Philharmoniker Foundation benefits from the generous engagement of Deutsche Bank. Courtesy of its support, the Berliner Philharmoniker were able to start a new, innovative project: the Digital Concert Hall, which broadcasts the orchestra’s concerts live via internet.

Find out more at
www.berliner-philharmoniker.de
www.digital-concert-hall.com

Follow us at
www.facebook.com/BerlinPhil
www.twitter.com/BerlinPhil
www.youtube.com/BerlinPhil
linkedin.com/company/berlin-phil-media-gmbh

Name: IQ Magazine
Description:
IQ Magazine is the leading information resource for the international live music business, operating across multiple platforms and mixing up-to-the-minute news, comment, features, analysis and in-depth reports.

An extension of the International Live Music Conference (ILMC), IQ’s readership includes the leading innovators and operators in concert and show promotion, including concert promoters, booking agents, festival organisers and venue operators.

Name: Scratch (Event DJs | DJ Academy)
Description:
Scratch was co-founded in 2002 by current CEO Rob Principe and the late Jam Master Jay of Run DMC. The company consists of two unique operating brands - Scratch Event DJs and Scratch DJ Academy - each leveraging the power of the DJ to entertain and educate audiences around the world.

Scratch Event DJs is the leading DJ performance and activation resource for brands looking to animate and energize environments, as well as to drive, maintain, and monetize traffic. Scratch utilizes its amazing talent network of 7,500+ DJs and its operational expertise to bring any brand, store, ship, resort, casino, or space to life cost-effectively and hassle free - lleading to a happy team, very happy management, and extremely happy guests. Among the many major companies that have partnered with Scratch Event DJs are Macy’s, Saks Fifth Avenue, H&M, Tommy Hilfiger, Hugo Boss, Victoria's Secret, Sephora, Norwegian Cruise Lines, Brooklyn Nets, Google, Samsung, and W Hotels.

Scratch DJ Academy is the world’s leading DJ and music production learning center, co-developed by Jam Master Jay of Run DMC. Scratch DJ Academy has locations in NYC, Miami, and LA, as well as online, and has taught over 500,000 people to DJ through its copyrighted curriculum and proven teaching methods.

Scratch has executed nearly 125,000 events in over 35 countries worldwide, and has been featured in the press by CNN, MTV, ABC, FOX, The NY Times, The Wall Street Journal, Forbes, and many more.

Name: Eshows
Description:
Somos um marketplace de música ao vivo e entregamos soluções para toda a jornada de contratação e gestão musical. 
Estamos construindo o maior escritório digital para artistas do mundo!
Temos vagas em aberto.

Name: BUTTER Music and Sound
Description: New York/Los Angeles/Europe • International music company specializing in original music, sound design, music supervision and catalogue sync

Name: Femme It Forward
Description: Femme It Forward is a woman-owned music and entertainment company that centers its mission in celebrating, educating, and empowering women and giving them a platform to share their voices on and off stage. We work with the industry’s most creative and accomplished female visionaries to create multi-format, multi-market consumer experiences. We produce music festivals, concerts, original content, comedy shows, philanthropic endeavors, panels, college engagements and more. For more information on Femme It Forward, visit FemmeItForward.com. For live updates and to join the conversation, follow #FemmeItForward on Twitter, Instagram and Facebook.

Name: Audiomack
Description: Audiomack is a youth-driven, artist-first music streaming platform that allows creators to share unlimited music and podcast content for free, along with tools to help them expand their audiences. Focused on emerging artists and scenes — hip-hop, electronic, Latin, reggae, Afrobeats, and other top and emerging genres — Audiomack has played a pivotal role in the careers of some of today’s most popular artists. Notable releases exclusive to or premiered on Audiomack includes Chance the Rapper’s seminal 'Acid Rap' mixtape, J. Cole’s fabled 'Truly Yours' series, Eminem’s eviscerating Machine Gun Kelly diss track “KILLSHOT,” and a series of freestyles from Nicki Minaj. Audiomack currently reaches more than 15 million listeners a month and generates over three billion monthly streams.

Name: Dallas Symphony Orchestra
Description:
The Dallas Symphony's mission statement is to inspire and change lives through musical excellence.

Since 1900, the Dallas Symphony Orchestra has grown from a 40-person ensemble to a world-class orchestra performing in one of the world's finest concert halls. The home of the DSO, the Meyerson Symphony Center is just as integral to the sound of the music as the musicians themselves.

The members of the Dallas Symphony Orchestra's musical community build upon a rich 111-year tradition of artistic excellence and masterful musicianship. The DSO is committed to inspiring the broadest possible audience with distinctive classical programs, inventive pops concerts and innovative multi-media presentations.

Visit our website at www.dallassymphony.org for more information.

Name: Paradiso
Description: Op 30 maart 1968 opende ‘Cosmisch Ontspanningscentrum Paradiso’ haar deuren, met als doel een vrijplaats te bieden aan creatief talent. Het kerkgebouw aan de Weteringschans werd vanaf die dag een trekpleister voor jongeren, publiek en artiesten, uit Amsterdam, Nederland, Europa en ook de rest van de wereld. In de veertig jaar die daarop volgden – in 2008 vierde de stichting haar veertigjarig bestaan - is Paradiso uitgegroeid tot poppodium, nachtclub en cultuurpaleis in één.

Name: Universal Music Africa - UMA
Description: Universal Music Africa est une filiale d'Universal Music Group spécialisée dans l'édition et la production de musique.

Name: Conservatorium van Amsterdam
Description:
The Conservatorium van Amsterdam is deeply committed to excellence in education, performance and creative activity and to the cultural enrichment of the larger community. A premier international conservatory, we inspire and empower highly talented individuals to realise their potential. For this, we offer bachelor’s and master’s degree courses in Classical, Jazz and Popular music, a Music in Education Programme and the National Programme for Young Top Talents. Through this comprehensive offer of genres and courses, the Conservatorium van Amsterdam represents a full reflection of the present-day musical landscape. It accordingly plays an active part in shaping national and international musical life, both now and in the future. 

We take full advantage of Amsterdam’s excellent learning and performance opportunities, preparing  some 1250 highly talented students for careers as passionate performers and composers, and as imaginative, effective leaders in the international music scene. In order to achieve this mission, we offer an exceptional teaching staff of international reputation and standing, a curriculum containing state-of-the-art education in every genre and pathway of the present-day musical landscape and close collaboration with renowned national and international musical institutions.

Name: Live Nation & Luger Sweden
Description:
Live Nation är Sveriges största arrangör av konserter, turnéer och evenemang. Tillsammans med Luger medverkar vi årligen till nära 3000 evenemang som arrangör eller turnéproducent med omkring 3 miljoner besökare.

Smidig biljettförsäljning, säkra lokaler, bra ljud och ljus och en musik- och evenemangsupplevelse att minnas för livet - för oss är det av yttersta vikt att erbjuda våra besökare och samarbetspartners det allra bästa; både före, under och efter ett evenemang! 

Som arrangör eller turnéproducent producerar vi alltifrån mindre klubbspelningar till riksomfattande turnéer och stora utomhuskonserter. Vårt utbud spänner från ny, gränsöverskridande musik till mer etablerad. Vi representerar ett stort antal svenska artister och arrangerar festivaler som Lollapalooza Stockholm, Summerburst, Sweden Rock Festival, Åre Sessions och Way Out West. Hos oss finns kunniga agenter, promotorer, producenter, kommunikation- och PR-specialister, marknadsförare, säljare, projektledare och webbutvecklare. 

Vill du samarbeta med oss? 

Vår Marketing & Partnership-avdelning välkomnar alltid nya företag till kreativa och spännande samarbeten och partnerskap kring våra arrangemang och artister. Kontakta Mårten Larsson, Nordic Commercial Director Marten.Larsson@livenation.se eller Patrick Fredriksson, Director Partnership Patrick@luger.se

Vill du boka någon av de artister vi jobbar med? 

Kontakta Lina Pettersson, Head of Agency Lina.pettersson@livenation.se och besök http://bokaartist.livenation.se/ 

Live Nation Entertainment är världens ledande liveunderhållningsföretag. Med 11.000+ medarbetare, utspridda på 40 kontor över hela världen, har LNE för tredje året i rad blivit omnämnd av Great Place to Work och placerat sig på Peoples Magazine lista ”Top 50 Companies That Care”. På årlig basis säljer Live Nation Entertainment omkring 500 miljoner biljetter till sina 40.000+ evenemang och hundratals festivaler runt om i världen.

Name: Electro-Harmonix
Description: Music's effects pedals icon. Since 1968.

Name: Melbourne Symphony Orchestra
Description:
The Melbourne Symphony Orchestra is Australia’s preeminent orchestra, dedicated to creating meaningful experiences that transcend borders and connect communities. Through the shared language of music, the MSO delivers performances of the highest standard, enriching lives and inspiring audiences across the globe.  

Woven into the cultural fabric of Victoria and with a history spanning more than a century, the MSO reaches five million people annually through performances, TV, radio, and online broadcasts, as well as critically acclaimed recordings from its newly established recording label. 

In 2025, Jaime Martín continues to lead the Orchestra as Chief Conductor and Artistic Advisor. Maestro Martín leads an Artistic Family that includes Principal Conductor and Artistic Advisor – Learning and Engagement Benjamin Northey, Cybec Assistant Conductor Leonard Weiss, MSO Chorus Director Warren Trevelyan-Jones, Composer in Residence Liza Lim AM, Artist in Residence James Ehnes, First Nations Creative Chair Deborah Cheetham Fraillon AO, Cybec Young Composer in Residence Klearhos Murphy, Cybec First Nations Composer in Residence James Henry, Artist in Residence, Learning & Engagement Karen Kyriakou, Young Artist in Association Christian Li, and Artistic Ambassadors Tan Dun, Lu Siqing and Xian Zhang.

Name: APG
Description:
Artist Partner is a modern label for forward thinking and entrepreneurial artists. We are the invisible army that help build their brand and relentlessly execute their vision.

Artist Publishing Group is an artist driven publishing company with concierge level creative services. We support our writers as Artists.

We look to find partners for our talented creators across uses in Advertising, Film, Promos, TV, Trailers, Video Games and more…Alongside looking to create diverse and exciting new material for original song opportunities and soundtracks.

Name: Music Innovation Hub
Description:
The MIH is a social enterprise acting as a think tank, a production company and a consultancy for the music industry, for policy makers, local government bodies, cultural institutions.

MIH incubates new artistic talents, with a special focus on export-oriented sounds. It develops training and vocational programmes, promotes international networking opportunities, supports innovation projects in music production, consumption, and distribution. It boosts the international profile of music produced in Italy, with a special focus on projects with significant social impact.

MIH sees music as a means of emancipation, inclusion and integration, capable of unleashing hidden energies and breaking constraints in society.

MIH runs the annual Linecheck Music Meeting and Festival, the largest music conference and showcase festival in Italy, held in multifunctional cultural centre BASE Milano.

It also manages the FUTURISSIMA music label, booking and talent management agency.

Name: .MUSIC
Description:
.MUSIC is the music top-level domain initiative supported by music organizations with members representing over 95% of music consumed globally to launch the world's first verified, trusted and secure global music identity and passport for music community members.

.MUSIC has the trust, security and reliability of a .EDU or .GOV domain because every musician, artist, band, industry professional and music company is verified and vetted. Each global music community member can use their verified .MUSIC digital identity and passport in innovative ways, including to create a website, access trusted music services and products, and connect with other vetted members, partners and organizations.

The .MUSIC identity and passport will provide exclusive access to the .MUSIC Hub, a collection of selective, secure and vetted music partner services that bring the best of music industry and community services, including:

Search.MUSIC - Inclusion and distribution on the world's first global music search engine

Destinations.MUSIC - Opportunity for distribution and discovery on thousands of curated and .MUSIC-themed destinations, including:

- Genres (Rock.MUSIC, HipHop.MUSIC, Jazz.MUSIC, K-Pop.MUSIC etc.)
- Instruments (Drums.MUSIC, Guitar.MUSIC, Bass.MUSIC etc.)
- Music Players (Cellist.MUSIC, Guitarist.MUSIC, Bassist.MUSIC etc.)
- Industry Professionals (Manager.MUSIC, Agent.MUSIC, Supervisor.MUSIC etc.)
- Industry (Labels.MUSIC, Publishers.MUSIC, Radio.MUSIC etc.)
- Cities (Los Angeles.MUSIC, London.MUSIC, Paris.MUSIC etc.)
    - Countries (Greece.MUSIC, Italy.MUSIC, Egypt.MUSIC etc.)
    - Languages (Arabic.MUSIC, Spanish.MUSIC, Dutch.MUSIC etc.)

Social.MUSIC - Private messaging, collaboration and networking 

Platform.MUSIC - Subscription-based website platform connecting members with fans

And more...

Name: Théâtre des Champs-Elysées
Description:
Its incredible artistic legacy has made  the Théâtre des Champs-Elysées a national historic landmark and vital cultural center. With its extraordinary Art Deco 1,900 seats auditorium and exquisite sound, Théâtre des Champs-Elysées ensures an unforgettable experience in a spectacular surrounding.

For over a century, Théâtre des Champs-Elysées has been the place where the most celebrated artists have come to make their names in Paris. The world’s finest orchestras and world-class soloists have always been a fixture at the Theatre. Théâtre des Champs-Elysées presents more than 200 concerts each year and is renowned for its outstanding performances of all genres, from classical music concerts and staged opera to contemporary dance and jazz.

The Théâtre des Champs-Elysées welcomes over 300,000 audience members each year.

Description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
