Name: La Cordo
Description:
La Cordo est la Scène de Musiques Actuelles (SMAC) de la Drôme, elle est basée à  Romans-sur-Isère. 

L'association organise toute l'année des concerts dans ses deux salles (une salle debout et une salle assise). Elle accompagne également les artistes professionnel·le·s et amateur·trice·s lors de résidences et de suivis personnalisés.

La Cordo est également équipée de deux studios de répétitions équipée, d'un studio de répétition MAO et d'un studio d'enregistrement. 

Tout au long de l'année La Cordo mène des actions culturelles auprès de tous les publics de la petite enfance aux séniors.

Name: Recorded Artists Actors Performers (RAAP)
Description:
Recorded Artists Actors Performers (RAAP) is a not-for-profit organisation set up by performers for performers to ensure that musicians receive performance royalties from broadcast recordings.

Following the introduction of the Copyright Act 2000, RAAP was set up to administer and distribute performance royalties to artists. All artists, main and session musicians, are entitled to a payment when a sound recording, they have contributed to, is communicated to the public around the world. RAAP also represents actors working on their behalf to claim royalties for their audio-visual rights. 

Based in Ireland, RAAP has agreements with over 50 territories globally, and continues to cultivate relationships with other markets to ensure all our members are represented equally. Since launching in 2001, RAAP has collected and distributed performance royalties in excess of €100 million, to more than 80,000 performers in Ireland and abroad.

The performance right exists throughout Europe and in many other countries around the world. RAAP continues to engage in collecting income for our members through international reciprocal agreements, entered under E.U. and W.I.P.O. directives.

RAAP continues to lobby Government for legislative change as we take our role seriously in protecting the property rights of our members. We are driven by the belief that all performers should benefit from the exploitation of their performances. The creativity and cultural diversity that performers and their performances bring to society has enriched and defined the fabric of communities. Performers therefore deserve to be rewarded for their endeavours.

Contact RAAP at (01) 278 8724/ info@raap.ie & https://raap.ie/

Name: TuneHatch, Inc.
Description:
TuneHatch is the #1 live music and entertainment platform helping artists, promoters, and venues book and manage more shows in less time—so they can focus on the art, not the admin. (Techstars ‘23)

We’re an open ecosystem, not a middleman—built so venues, artists, and promoters can collaborate in one space. When one succeeds, everyone wins.

Through our Built to Give Back initiative, we return a meaningful portion of our earnings to the people who power live music—because they deserve to share in the value they create.

Follow the journey @tunehatch or register free at TuneHatch.com.

Name: Swedish House Mafia
Description: Swedish House Mafia is a supergroup of Swedish house music.

Name: The Brewery Recording Studio
Description:
MUSIC & AUDIO RECORDING 
MIXING | MASTERING
ADR | POST | VOICEOVER
STEREO | DOLBY ATMOS | APPLE DIGITAL MASTER

The Brewery Recording Studio strives to provide the very best in recording quality and service for every budget. We want to create the modern hybrid-studio model by combining the elegance and professionalism of a commercial facility with the comfort and personality of a production space.

In Fall of 2005, Engineer Andrew Krivonos opened Southfall Studios in Park Slope, Brooklyn as a mix room for his recording projects. Word of mouth spread immediately and by 2007, the facility was not enough to meet demands. Andrew upgraded the studio to a new facility in an old microbrewery in Bushwick, changing its name to the Brewery Recording Studio. Meanwhile, producer Dot Da Genius was developing his own production company, Headbanga Muzik, with artist Kid Cudi out of his project studio in Brooklyn.
Andrew and Dot joined to move the Brewery to its newest facility at 910 Grand Street in May 2009. 

Designed and constructed by the staff, the facility and its impressive engineers have quickly made the Brewery one of the highest profile studio environments in New York.

Name: PHX Instrumentos
Description:
A PHX surgiu a partir da Music Instrumentos e hoje está presente em todo o Brasil, com mais de três décadas de know-how no mercado musical.

Após passar por uma reestruturação, a PHX tem hoje, como principal filosofia a busca constante por produtos inovadores. Nosso catálogo é composto por um mix completo de instrumentos de corda, percussão e acessórios.

Os produtos da PHX se destacam pelo acabamento, sonoridade e principalmente pela inovação em toda linha. Os desafios vão além do desenvolvimento de novos produtos, pois está sempre focada no rigoroso controle de qualidade, desde a seleção da madeira até o armazenamento e distribuição. 

Os instrumentos são a maior expressão de nossa essência e é este elo que nos faz trabalhar para melhorar cada vez mais. 

PHX. Nosso talento é inspirar o seu.

Name: Rézo MUSA
Description:
Le Rézo MUSA représente la richesse et la diversité des acteurs œuvrant dans le domaine des musiques savantes écrites et improvisées en Nouvelle-Aquitaine.

Porté par ses membres et attentif aux questionnements de son audience, le Rézo MUSA concourt de façon active aux politiques publiques et à l’essor des droits culturels en proposant des orientations et des solutions pour la création, la production, la diffusion et la transmission de ses musiques.

Il favorise ainsi la reconnaissance et le déploiement de sa filière auprès des collectivités, des populations et des partenaires institutionnels.

Au service de ses adhérents, cette plateforme collaborative conçoit, accompagne et promeut, des actions et dispositifs d’intérêt collectif pour le renforcement du dialogue entre toutes les typologies de forces artistiques et de diffuseurs, contribuant ainsi à un aménagement musical du territoire régional.

Par son action, cette dynamique collective vise l’amélioration des pratiques et le développement équilibré des usages sur l’ensemble de la Nouvelle-Aquitaine tout en créant des alliances nouvelles entre les acteurs, les publics et les secteurs d’activités extérieurs au champ culturel pour soutenir la vie artistique musicale d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

Name: Warmoth Guitar Products
Description:
Warmoth Guitar Products, Inc. is an American manufacturer and distributor of electric guitar and bass parts, catering particularly to small scale manufacturers, custom builders, amateur constructors, and professional artists such as Rivers Cuomo and Matt Sharp (Weezer), Ed King (Lynyrd Skynyrd), and Kerry Livgren (Kansas). The company headquarters are located in Puyallup, Washington.

Warmoth makes guitar and bass parts, tailored to the specifications of the customer. Customers can choose from various styles of guitars including Stratocaster and Telecaster, and various styles of basses including Jazz Bass and Precision Bass, among others. Warmoth is licensed by Fender to produce Fender-trademarked headstock shapes. Unique choices in materials and construction are available for all parts of the guitar. Warmoth specializes in providing unique parts, but does not offer complete assembly of the guitar.

Name: Killphonic Rights
Description: Killphonic Rights is a publishing and distribution company specializing in global rights administration. We work with independent labels, publishers, artists, and songwriters directly to distribute and administer royalties in territories worldwide. Our powerful technology makes it possible for us to provide full transparency between us and our clients, including easily accessible data for catalog analytics and earnings. We are proud to administer for many incredible songwriters, labels, and publishers including Half Tone/Mad Decent and Symphonic Distribution.

Name: Sound Pressure Studios
Description: A world-class facility that feels like home, with the best gear and a GRAMMY-winning team of producers waits for you in one of Europe's most beautiful capitals.

Name: Beethovenfest Bonn
Description: Das Beethovenfest Bonn gehört zu den größten und innovativsten Klassikfestivals in Deutschland. Beethoven wuchs in Bonn auf und erlebte hier seine prägendsten Jahre. Das Festival möchte den Geist des jungen, progressiven und zugewandten Beethoven weitertragen und ein Umfeld für Künstler:innen schaffen, Beethovens Werk im 21. Jahrhundert erlebbar zu machen. Alljährlich im September veranstaltet das Beethovenfest rund 80 Konzerte – vom großen internationalen Orchester bis hin zum Pop-Act – sowie Talks, Ausstellungen und Workshops für alle Menschen.

Our free, daily piano lessons are delivered in a group setting in the students' own environment, where teachers and volunteers work to remove barriers and support students as they develop into future leaders.

Name: Diynamic GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Diynamic was founded in 2006 by Adriano Trolio and Solomun, the highly-awarded DJ and producer, the company is based in Hamburg, Germany. It is a leading underground electronic music record label and promoter of events, including festivals in Amsterdam, Berlin and Brazil and club nights on Ibiza, such as the renowned weekly “Solomun +1” night at legendary nightclub “Pacha”. The associated artist agency DIY Booking & Management represents the key DJs and live acts of the label exclusively worldwide. Beside of Solomun, the artist roster includes Kollektiv Turmstrasse, H.O.S.H., Adriatique, Stimming, Dj Phono, Karmon, Ost & Kjex, NTFO, Thyladomid and Magdalena.

Name: CIEBEL JAY Inc
Description:
EMPOWERING ARTISTS. AMPLIFYING CULTURE. FUELLING INNOVATION.

Our core work spans:

Name: Qwant Music
Description:
With Qwant Music, Qwant creates the most comprehensive search experience dedicated to music. Just like the Web, we believe music deserves an open environment.
Qwant Music has been working closely with the world leading IRCAM music laboratories to create groundbreaking music discovery experiences that will be released soon.

Name: trac
Description: trac is an artist monetization platform. We provide the virtual infrastructure every artist and their teams need to easily monetize their content, name, and likeness directly with their fans. Our long-term vision is to tokenize the economy around the artist, using smart contracts and the blockchain to help them sell their music, build their brand/community and track their impact more effectively and efficiently.

Name: Fondazione La Nuova Musica
Description:
Le Ricordi Music School fanno parte di una rete di scuole di musica e danza nate nel 2001 a Milano. Oggi ci sono 20 centri scolastici e circa 3000 allievi nel territorio italiano. 
Viene proposta una didattica innovativa con programmi multidisciplinari in un sistema aperto a diverse realtà artistiche (teatro, arti visive, nuove tecnologie). Un metodo molto stimolante che permette di ottenere i “crediti formativi” per la scuola.
Ogni allievo sente il valore di essere parte di un “gruppo” e insieme, anche da sedi diverse, si trovano sui palchi dei moltissimi eventi annuali organizzati per loro. 
E’ un modello di “arte-educazione-inclusione” così come suggerito nei nuovi progetti europei della Salto Youth dove i bambini e i giovani suonano in eventi di raccolta fondi per aiutare i loro coetanei meno fortunati. 
La Ricordi Music School si fonda su un grande team di musicisti, docenti, professionisti e operatori in ambito culturale. 
E’ soggetto legalmente riconosciuto, di rilevanza regionale in Lombardia e la sede di Bologna è riconosciuta dalla Regione Emilia Romagna.

Name: Mind of a Genius Music Group
Description: grammy nominated independent record label that works across multiple genres and mediums in the music space.

Name: ROCO
Description:
ROCO is a dynamic and innovative professional music ensemble that flexes from 1 to 40 players from all over the US and Canada, with guest artists from around the world. Performing intimate concerts in dozens of venues, ROCO’s musicians don’t just give concerts – they challenge preconceptions, create extraordinary experiences, and foster new relationships with audiences through the language of music.

ROCO’s debut album, Visions Take Flight, was recognized for a GRAMMY Award for Producer of the Year, Blanton Alspaugh. Widely recognized for diversity in programming, a recent study from the Institute for Composer Diversity found ROCO is the number one ensemble in the US for performing the works of women and number two for the works of composers of color. Additionally, ROCO has the third-highest number of commissions in the United States and has premiered nearly 100 commissions from living composers. ROCO embraces technology, with free worldwide concert livestreams and real-time artist commentary via a smartphone app, as well as on-demand recordings of past concerts via popular music streaming services. A vital part of the community, ROCO concert DVDs are sent to nursing homes and hospitals to bring music to those immobile communities, and their music education/childcare program attracts multigenerational audiences.

It is ROCO's mission to shape the future of classical music by energizing, modernizing, and personalizing the orchestral experience.

ROCO is the most fun you can have with serious music!

Name: CAYA Music & Sound
Description:
We’re all individuals – but, sometimes, we forget to nurture what makes us unique.

At CAYA, we invite our clients to ‘come as you are.’ Tell us your story, and together we’ll discover its authentic sound.

Founded in sunny California by executive producer Kiki Einziger and executive creative director Ben Einziger, CAYA collaborates with composers and sound design specialists across the globe through a skillful, solution-oriented approach. We bring our industry expertise, unique point-of-view, and overall good vibes to each project for high quality work and memorable client experiences.

Name: Beta Blue Digital
Description: Welcome to Beta Blue Digital, a premier music licensing library at the forefront of the entertainment industry. With a focus on licensing music for TV, films, gaming, and advertising, we are dedicated to providing top-tier musical experiences for visual media projects. As the pioneering official hip-hop sync licensing company, we have set the standard for incorporating the dynamic and influential sounds of hip-hop into various media productions.

Name: PlayPlan
Description:
PlayPlan es una empresa dinámica y experimentada especialista en gestión y consultoría cultural. Diseñamos proyectos culturales originales, ya sean propios o de terceros, y también nos implicamos en proyectos en marcha, aportando nuestros conocimientos y experiencia.

El equipo de PlayPlan sumará talento e implicación a tu proyecto, gracias a su experiencia y know how. Puedes conocernos un poco más a continuación, en Dónde encontrarás una breve presentación de cada uno de nosotros.

El éxito de un proyecto se mide por la consecución de los objetivos establecidos, y estos se pueden alcanzar gracias a la complicidad de un equipo como el de PlayPlan.

Name: Atração
Description:
Atração, criada em 1996, é uma empresa brasileira que atua na produção musical, divulgação e distribuição de conteúdos próprios e de terceiros, no Brasil e exterior, e tem como marca de seu trabalho a pesquisa dos gêneros musicais e a valorização da diversidade cultural brasileira.

A Atração vem detectando e se adaptando às mudanças tecnológicas, à cultura digital e das redes, que vêm transformando o universo das comunicações da cultura e do consumo, adiantando caminhos e possibilidades de negócios.

Tem como missão ser um agente de difusão e fortalecimento da produção musical, artística e seus correlatos, no mercado interno e externo, valorizando prioritariamente o cenário artístico nacional, contribuindo para a internacionalização da musica brasileira, zelando pela preservação e divulgação da memória da cultura musical do Brasil.

Name: BieberAlert - #1 Official Justin Bieber Fan Community
Description:
Justin Bieber Fan Community - News, Forums, Lyrics, Videos and more!
Free Bieber Giveaways every month!
Dedicated to Justin Bieber fans, secret crushes, and maybe Justin Bieber himself!
If you are a fan or just want to learn more about Justin Bieber or his music, join now!

Name: Lang Lang International Music Foundation
Description:
education, regardless of their background.

At the Lang Lang International Music Foundation, we strive to educate,inspire, and motivatethe next generation of music lovers and performers.

Our unique programs encourage music performance at all levels as a means of social and emotional development for today’s youth.
By igniting a child’s passion for music, we are helping children worldwide aim for a better future.

Name: First Act Inc.
Description: First Act, Inc. is a musical lifestyle company headquartered in the heart of Boston’s Back Bay.  We design, create and market musical products, instruments and accessories for all ages from cradle to college.  We are a fast paced, nimble company with a motivated staff.  Hard work and dedication are valuable assets at First Act, Inc. and are rewarded with an outstanding corporate culture as well as a fantastic benefits package.

Name: Polaris Hub AB
Description: Polaris Music Hub AB stands as a beacon of unity and collaboration within the Nordic music industry. Founded and equally owned by three prominent Nordic societies, TONO, Koda, and TEOSTO, Polaris Music Hub is a music rights collection management organization with a mission to represent its founders' extensive catalogs in the dynamic realm of online music streaming. What sets Polaris apart is its unwavering commitment to embodying the core Nordic values and principles of its member societies in every negotiation with digital service providers. With a dedication to harmonizing Nordic music and culture, Polaris Music Hub is the bridge that connects these rich musical traditions with the digital age, ensuring that the essence of Nordic music continues to thrive and resonate globally.

Name: Avalon Music
Description: Avalon Music was founded in 2014 by three brothers from Amsterdam. In a short period of time, the label has grown into the third-largest urban music label in the Netherlands. From its headquarters in Amsterdam, a team of young and ambitious professionals guides numerous talented artists in developing and expanding their musical careers on a global scale.

Name: Musicians for the World
Description:
Musicians for the World is currently engaging with students in Haiti, Peru, Mexico, Kenya, Belize, Suriname, Trinidad and Tobago, Bolivia, Nigeria, Uruguay, and Argentina. Our top-level Professors provide quality online music education within some of the most remote areas of the globe, completely free of charge. 
MFW aims to guarantee musical opportunity, regardless of a student’s socio-economic standing.

Name: Atak
Description:
Poppodium Atak is sinds september 2008 gehuisvest in het Muziekkwartier, aan het spoor, in het verlengde van het stationsplein. Aan de voorzijde van het pand wordt een prachtig nieuw plein gerealiseerd: het Willem Wilminkplein. Hieronder lees je meer over de verschillende ruimtes in Atak.
Grolsch Zaal

De Grolsch Zaal is de grootste zaal van Atak en heeft een capaciteit van 800 bezoekers, verdeeld over zaal (600) en balkon (200). De zaal is donker, enigszins neutraal maar toch ruig, door een combinatie van geperforeerde corten-stalen beplating en prefab betonpanelen met een zwarte kunststof vloer. De technische installatie en inrichting van de Grolsch Zaal zorgen ervoor dat deze snel kan worden omgetoverd van concertzaal tot uitgaanscentrum voor danceparty's met DJ's.
Saxion Zaal

De Saxion Zaal biedt met een capaciteit van 300 bezoekers, waarvan 100 op het balkon, ruimte voor de kleinere bands uit het popcircuit, maar is ook de perfecte locatie voor sfeervolle danceparty's. De kleine zaal heeft een intieme en warme clubsfeer, met een houten vloer, die overloopt in het podium en donkerblauw linnen wandbekleding in combinatie met geprofileerde prefab betonpanelen.
Atak Café

Het café van Atak biedt plek aan ca. 300 bezoekers en is sfeervol ingericht met stoelen, tafels en barkrukken. Tegen de achterwand van het café is een podium gebouwd, dat geschikt is voor de meer intieme concerten of plaats kan bieden aan een DJ. In het ruime café is ook ruimte voor het vrijmaken van een dansvloer, waardoor dit eigenlijk de derde concertzaal van Atak is. De voorzieningen zijn zelfs aanwezig om het café te gaan gebruiken als eetcafé, maar dit zal pas gebeuren als het Willem Wilminkplein is voltooid.

Name: Songwriter Institute
Description:
Songwriter Institute connects serious amateur and professional writers with seasoned, successful hit songwriters. Through our intimate retreats, coaching, and appointments we provide aspiring writers an unmatched edge in the business of music.

Songwriter Institute is the ONLY guaranteed bridge for aspiring writers to actually WRITE with hit writers. We provide a pathway from aspiring to inspired; Songwriter Institute’s commitment is to your hard-earned investment in your passion. We put you IN THE ROOM with the very folks with whom you’ve always dreamed of writing!

Name: Bespeco Professional s.r.l.
Description:
Since 1985 Bespeco have been manufacturing accessories for musical instruments and exports its products all around the world.
It is the function of bespeco to ensure planning and development of new ideas to help the musician in his profession.
Our knowledge, experience, italian style, skilled technicians together with the choice of good quality material, enabled bespeco to manufacture new products like the third generation keyboard stands, logic style metal stands, adjustable Genius throne, new guitar cases Tanit Anticrash and the new amplifiers Blast.
Our new ideas, brought a complete revolution on the market and this is reflected in our motto: "innovation with style and passion".

Our strategies have proved to be effective and led us to new sophisticated equipment and factory expansion. Our skilled staff enabled us to launch new innovative products both in design & technology.

Name: Verdigris Management
Description:
Verdigris Management has grown to become a global presence, whilst still remaining fiercely independent. We are a full service management company; able to deliver at every level for our roster of Mercury and Grammy-nominated artists, producers and mixers.

We believe in championing creativity and integrity, and are equipped to fulfil an artist’s creative vision; our multifaceted team builds artists from inception to gold records and sold out arenas around the world. Our diverse range of clients means we are well versed in working with major labels, independents and label services.

Name: Wontune
Description: WONTUNE støtter upcoming artister, til de når næste niveau.

Name: Mizmorim Kammermusik Festival
Description:
Das 2015 gegründete Mizmorim Kammermusik Festival ist eine mehrtägige Veranstaltung für klassische Kammermusik zur Feier der vielfältigen Begegnungen von jüdischer Musik und westlicher Kunstmusik. Jedes Jahr kommen im Januar renommierte KünstlerInnen aus der Schweiz und der ganzen Welt in Basel zusammen, um zu einem bestimmten Themenschwerpunkt Werke verschiedener Epochen zu präsentieren. Die Programme werden in ganz unterschiedlichen Konzerträumen der ganzen Stadt aufgeführt. Sie nehmen das Publikum mit auf eine abwechslungsreiche Reise, auf der es unbekannte Werke und neue Perspektiven auf die Klassiker zu entdecken gibt.
Das Mizmorim Kammermusik Festival nimmt dank dieses einzigartigen Konzepts einen besonderen Platz im Schweizer Kulturkalender ein. Seinen Namen verdankt es übrigens den biblischen Psalmen, hebräisch Mizmorim.

Name: Choral Arts Society of Washington

Founded in 1965 by Norman Scribner (1936-2015), Choral Arts has a rich history of bringing the power of the human voice to audiences large and small. Soutenue par le Ministère de la culture (DGCA) et le Centre National de la Musique (CNM), la fédération :
   - accompagne ses membres à travers du conseil et des actions de formation,
    - délivre deux certification pour les musicien·nes des musiques actuelles : le titre AMMA et la certification IOMA,

Name: St Cecilia Chorus
Description:
We are a friendly amateur choir of over 50 members in Banstead, Surrey. The choir formed in 1922 and we sing all sorts of choral music from the 16th century to the modern day and stage four concerts a year in and around Banstead accompanied by professional soloists and orchestras. The best way to see what we do is to come to one of our concerts.

As well as performing locally, every three years we make a concert tour; in June 2019 we visited Tuscany to perform.  We will resume our touring in 2023 with a trip to Avignon.

We continued rehearsing on zoom throughout lockdown, and were pleased to be back to live rehearsals and concerts.  We are celebrating our centenary in 2022, and have commissioned a new piece by the young talented composer Amy Summers.

We always welcome new singers and you can join at any time between September and June, so why not try us out? We rehearse on Thursdays from 7.45-9.45 at Banstead Community Junior School, The Horseshoe, SM7 2BQ  Do get in touch so we can be sure to welcome you!

You don't need special vocal training but the ability to read music is desirable. After you've tried us for a few weeks, James (conductor) will listen to you singing to check you're singing the part best suited to your voice and suggest some things you could work on. Full choir members normally pay an annual subscription (which works out at about £3 per rehearsal) but all new members get their first term free. All full-time students and under-30s get free membership for up to three years.

Contact Liz (membership secretary) for more information on 07931 594548 or membership@stceciliachorus.org.uk

Support us: As a registered charity we are very grateful to all our sponsors, patrons and friends for their support.

Sponsors: The Humphrey Richardson Taylor Charitable Trust

Name: The Kurland Agency
Description:
The Kurland Agency was founded by Ted Kurland in 1975 in Boston. At the time, he was a recent graduate from Brandeis University with a major in Economics. After Kurland graduated, he first worked for a small Boston talent agency, an invaluable experience that launched his career into the talent booking business. With two partners, he later started All American Talent, an agency that booked primarily blues artists such as Muddy Waters, Howlin’ Wolf, Willie Dixon, George Thorgood, among others. All American Talent turned into Ted Kurland Associates (now The Kurland Agency) and the agency's emphasis shifted to booking jazz performers.

Eminent jazz vibraphonist, Gary Burton, was the first client of the new company. Soon after, other major performers such as Pat Metheny, Keith Jarrett, Chick Corea, Miles Davis, Sonny Rollins, Bill Evans, Roy Haynes, Milt Jackson, Charles Mingus, Isaac Hayes, Dexter Gordon, Nina Simone, Modern Jazz Quartet, Jaco Pastorius, Ravi Shankar, Astor Piazzolla, Stephane Grappelli, Tony Williams, David Grisman, Freddie Hubbard and many other celebrated jazz musicians joined the growing family of artists represented by the agency.

TKA grew over time as more musicians were added to the roster and the agency began to handle their clients' recording, music publishing, movie soundtrack and video production and licensing deals. In the early 1980's, the agency expanded their bookings internationally and became well established in every major and minor market in the world, arranging tours throughout Asia, South America and Europe for the artists on the agency's roster.

Although TKA has remained most well-known for representation of major jazz artists, prominent performers from other fields such as blues, world and pop music are also represented by the agency. As the staff of The Kurland Agency celebrates over 40 years of service, they look back on decades of growth and success in one of the most exciting fields in the entertainment business.

Name: Bach Festival Society of Winter Park
Description:
The Bach Festival Society of Winter Park has the distinction of being the third-oldest continuously operating Bach Festival in the United States, as well as being Central Florida’s oldest operating performing arts organization.


The Bach Festival Society was founded in 1935 to commemorate the 250th anniversary of Johann Sebastian Bach’s birth by presenting the composer’s orchestral and choral music to the public for its enlightenment, education, pleasure, and enjoyment. Mrs. Isabelle Sprague-Smith, a former New York artist and school principal, was the president and driving force behind the Bach Festival from 1935 until her death in 1950. At Mrs. Sprague-Smith’s death, the future of the Bach Festival was uncertain. Rollins President Hugh McKean asked John M. Tiedtke, the treasurer of the College, to fulfill the obligation and he accepted. Mr. Tiedtke served as Chairman of the Board of Trustees until his death in December 2004. Eric Ravndal III currently serves as President.

The Bach Festival Society is well known internationally and has enjoyed a long tradition of bringing world-class talent to Central Florida. Since its inception, the Society has expanded its offerings beyond the annual Bach Festival to include Choral Masterworks and  Visiting Artists performances, as well as a variety of educational and community outreach programs to encourage participation in music at all levels.

Name: Koolulam
Description:
Koolulam is a social musical initiative aimed at empowering communities and strengthening the fabric of society. Through collaborative creative experiences, we bring together people of different backgrounds, cultures, faiths, and geographies. Since our formation, we have shown how we can harness the power of musical harmony, and use it to inspire harmony in humanity. Hundreds of thousands of people have already joined the movement to create social change through musical cooperation.

We specialize in bringing together large groups of people in-person or online in a unique artistic collaboration. For a few hours, participants step out of their comfort zone, awaken their senses, and set their voices free. We teach everyone to listen – to themselves and to one another – and then create something powerful together.

We believe that people have the strength and ability to change the reality in which they live, and that the community strengthens the individual by embracing and amplifying one’s voice. These are the ideals that we aim to inspire among our participants. This is what Koolulam stands for.

Name: Association des professionnels de l'édition musicale (APEM)
Description:
L’Association des professionnels de l'édition musicale (APEM) représente les éditeurs musicaux québécois et francophones au Canada. Nos membres contrôlent 830 maisons d’édition comportant 400 000 œuvres musicales. L’APEM travaille à faire valoir les droits et intérêts des éditeurs musicaux, ainsi que ceux des auteurs et des compositeurs qu’ils représentent.

L'APEM fait partie de plusieurs regroupements québécois, canadiens et internationaux liés à l’industrie musicale. Elle offre un programme de formation destiné aux professionnels de l’industrie, organise des groupes de discussion et des conférences lors d'événements tels que les Rendez-Vous Pros des Francos et le Festival international de la chanson de Granby, en plus de tenir le Sommet musique et technologie. Chaque année, l'APEM décerne le Prix Christopher-J.-Reed qui est remis à une personne engagée dans sa communauté professionnelle. De plus, l'APEM porte le projet Évangeline, une base de données de paroles de chansons qui vise à faire rayonner nos oeuvres, à offrir une source légale d'approvisionnement et à regrouper les textes à des fins d'archives.

Name: Beatchain
Description:
In an increasingly saturated music market, Beatchain is working for a future where every artist has the opportunity to be discovered and thrive.

Beatchain is an innovative technology company with a cutting-edge A&R tool and artist services platform, tailored to meet the unique needs of the $4 billion DIY artist market.

Our customised white label technology platforms – or ‘arenas’ - enable music companies and record labels to provide direct-to-artist service, empowering independent creators to distribute, promote and monetise their music. 

Through their branded arenas, labels can curate career changing opportunities for artists, such as studio sessions, mentoring, collaborations with renowned artists, writers and producers, photoshoots and more.


Talented artists are rewarded for achieving cut through, while A&R teams benefit from a tailored filtering process, helping labels build rosters that align with their mission and niche.

By bringing our data and tech expertise to the music industry, are helping talented artists get heard.

For more information, visit www.beatchain.com

Choisis pour l’authenticité de leur démarche, ils sont libres de prendre en main leur destinée et de sculpter leur carrière selon leur identité propre, de devenir de véritables artistes faits à la main.

Depuis 2002, notre modèle d’entreprise démocratique permet à ces artisans de la scène de non seulement exprimer leurs valeurs et leur passion, mais aussi d’offrir des performances portant indéniablement leur empreinte personnelle.

Name: Luthers Bach Ensemble
Description:
Sinds haar oprichting in 2006 stelt het Luthers Bach Ensemble zich ten doel de muziek van J.S. Bach ten gehore te brengen op basis van een historisch geïnformeerde uitvoeringspraktijk.

Vanuit de wens Bachcantates ten gehore te brengen in de Lutherse (liturgische) traditie richtte artistiek leider en organist Tymen Jan Bronda in 2006 het Luthers Bach Ensemble op in Groningen. Al snel werd het repertoire uitgebreid met werken van Monteverdi tot Mozart.

Het LBE wil publiek te betrekken bij de emotionele rijkdom en intense dramatiek van de barokmuziek, aansluitend bij de opvattingen uit de tijd van Bach dat muziek via de emotie inzicht verschaft in de essentiële aspecten van het leven.

Het LBE kleinkoor bestaat uit een vaste groep van een vijftiental (semi) professionele zangers die per jaar zo’n 20 concerten uitvoeren in Nederland en daarbuiten. Sinds de oprichting beschikt het LBE over eigen barokorkest, geformeerd rond een kern van getalenteerde professionele musici. Dirigenten van naam als Ton Koopman, Jos van Veldhoven en Peter Dijkstra hebben in de afgelopen jaren hun medewerking verleend.

Het LBE is letterlijk en figuurlijk gegrondvest in de Lutherse Kerk in Groningen, een belangrijk podium voor ensembles en kamermuziek.  De komst van het nieuwe Schnitger-orgel in 2017 was en is een belangrijke impuls voor muziekuitvoeringen in combinatie met dit orgel, een voor Nederland unieke combinatie.

Name: Scamusica
Description:
En ScaMusica somos una empresa del Grupo El Conquistador, que cuenta con más de 45 años de experiencia en el mercado de la música con fines comerciales. La evolución de ScaMusica está vinculada intrínsecamente a la historia de la radiodifusión en Chile.
Con nuestras trayectoria y experiencia en el mercado, hoy podemos decir que hemos llevado al mercado desde la tecnología de radiodifusión hasta los más modernos y vanguardistas formatos de audio vigentes actualmente a nivel internacional.
El desarrollo de nuestra empresa nos ha llevado a la incorporación de una estrategia comercial basada en la integración de audio, cartelería digital y una amplia oferta audiovisual, sustentada en un servicio personalizado y adaptado a las necesidades del cliente. 
Nuestra oferta de soluciones está acompañada por un servicio de soporte a lo largo de todo Chile, donde contamos con más de 10 oficinas con soporte técnico y servicio local 24/7 desde Arica hasta Punta Arenas.
La demanda de un mercado cada vez más exigente que requiere optimizar las inversiones nos llevó a un nuevo modelo de oferta de música libre. Un proyecto que suma artistas nacionales y se caracteriza por ofrecer contenidos 100% libres de derechos de autor, conexos y copyrights, contenidos variado en estilos, inéditos y totalmente hechos en Chile. Con este nuevo modelo de Música Libre nuestros clientes se eximen del pago de derechos de autor.
En ScaMusica amplificamos los sentidos de tus clientes para generar acción y experiencia.

Description:

Het podium is meer dan muziek – het is een cultureel platform dat lokale talenten ondersteunt, maatschappelijke projecten mogelijk maakt en een podium biedt voor nieuwe stromingen in populaire cultuur.

Name: Mile of Music Festival
Description:
MILE OF MUSIC, produced by Willems Marketing & Events:

Appleton, Wisconsin's Mile of Music festival features 100% original music & showcases our wonderful Downtown Appleton venues. 

THE MILE

Appleton’s Downtown – an amazing mile of safe, walkable and hospitable experiences – is the host of Mile of Music. The Mile has so much to offer, from craft shops to restaurants, cafes, and bars, all exhibiting the original, hand-crafted flavor that makes Appleton unique. Come join us for the full Mile of Music weekend to experience Appleton at its best.

THE MUSIC

Mile of Music is a cover-free zone, which means no cover songs or cover charges. We’re all about original, hand-crafted artistry, and we’re eager to serve up singer-songwriters, combos and multi-piece bands showcasing Americana music at its very best — from roots and indie rock to country, soul, r&b, jazz and folk. And you know what the best part is? It's FREE. Plus, there will be plenty of free, hands-on Music Education events throughout the festival for all ages to awaken your inner musician.

Get ready for Mile 13 - July 30-August 2, 2026.

-Winner of the Fox Cities Convention & Visitors Bureau 2013 'Ambition to Fruition' Award
-Winner of the Appleton Downtown, Inc.(ADI) 2013 'Dreamers and Doers Award'
-Winner of The Post-Crescent (Appleton-Fox Cities) 59th Annual Report: Innovation Award
-Recipient of the 2014 & 2015 Joint Effort Marketing (JEM) Grant 
-Recipient of the 2014 & 2015 WOW Grant

Le Freemusic est bien plus qu’un festival de musique : c’est un week-end de détente au bord du Lac de Montendre sous les pins et les pieds dans le sable. 
Nos enjeux :
* Fédérer un territoire,
* Défendre un projet culturel et sociétal ambitieux,
* Proposer un point d'ancrage d'échange économique et touristique.
Freemusic Experience, c'est bien plus qu'un festival !

Name: Jazz Festival Munster
Description:
Le Jazz Festival de Munster est né de la volonté du maire de la ville d'enrichir l'offre culturelle de sa cité et de l'engagement enthousiaste de son concitoyen Michel HAUSSER, jazzman et vibraphoniste de réputation internationale, pour relever le défi de mettre sur pied un tel évènement musical.

Véritable challenge à son origine en 1988, le festival bénéficia d'emblée d'un franc succès qui ne s'est pas démenti depuis. Ce qui lui a permis, dès sa quatrième année d'existence, de s'installer dans le paysage culturel régional puis national sous sa forme actuelle. Immuablement programmé au cours de la semaine de l'Ascension, il propose à ses auditeurs, du mardi au samedi, la rencontre avec onze formations qui, tout au long de la semaine, vont interpréter du jazz sous toutes ses formes, à la condition absolue qu'il s'agisse de "jazz qui swingue" ...

C'est ainsi que l'on a vu s'y produire, au fil des années, de très grands interprètes tels que, entre autres, Ray BROWN, Milt JACKSON, James MORISSON, Niels PEDERSEN, THE DIZZY GILLEPSIE ALL STARS, Liz MC COMB, Lee KONITZ, Monty ALEXANDER, Stéphane GRAPPELI, ainsi que la fine fleur des jazzmen français et européens. Directeur artistique du festival pendant vingt années, Michel HAUSSER a transmis le flambeau en 2009 à Jean-Pierre VIGNOLA.

Name: High-lo
Description: Soucieux de valoriser la culture rap et de fédérer ses différentes communautés autour d’évènements marquants, High-lo met son expertise au service de concerts conçus comme autant d’expériences. Véritables moments de communion entre les différents acteurs du genre, artistes confirmés ou émergents comme spectateurs de tous horizons avides de sensations live et de découvertes, les concerts High-lo illustrent la richesse et la force vitale d’une esthétique en constante évolution. Et font de la marque un vecteur et un acteur essentiel du rap à Lyon. À la pointe sur toutes les déclinaisons et tendances du genre, High-lo est aujourd’hui une référence dont l’engagement et l’implantation forte lui permettent de collaborer avec tout ce que le réseau du spectacle vivant compte de salles d’envergure (Transbordeur, Sucre, Ninkasi Kao, Halle Tony-Garnier…) et de scènes défricheuses (MAC Lyon, La Marquise, Mob Hotel…).

Name: Mbira Technologies
Description:
We are guitarists, keyboardists, and keyword specialists; DJs and SEO strategists; singers and songwriters, copywriters and editors; system administrators, bassists, and customer support specialists; drummers, Web developers, and graphic designers; recording engineers and experts in Web analytics; and, managers, marketers, merchandisers, and more.

We are Mbira Technologies, a diverse team of multi-talented individuals united by a love for music and a passion for Web strategies that help our e-commerce clients to get the right musical gear, at the best possible prices, into the hands of expert and amateur musicians alike.

Mbira Technologies uses proven and proprietary Web strategies to connect top e-tailers of musical instruments, equipment, and accessories with musicians searching for the perfect combination of price, selection, and customer service. We achieve this connection by making a client’s product offerings easy to find online and product options easy to understand.

Since our founding in 2002, our clients have realized over $1 billion in sales, and over 1,000,000 satisfied customers have found the gear that’s helping to make their musical dreams a reality.

For more than 10 years our client zZounds has earned a Bizrate Platinum Circle of Excellence award based on customer feedback. The Bizrate Platinum Circle of Excellence award is earned by online retailers who provide exceptional service to their clients, and only a small number out of thousands of retailers receive this award.

Name: MEmusic.
Description:
MEmusic is a women led, BIPOC owned multi-hyphenated music group specializing in events, coaching, and song plugging. With expansive plans in the works, MEmusic is in the process of evolving into a multifaceted empire introducing label services, management, licensing and more through unconventional and transformative systems that center the anchors behind the music.

Mission Statement:
At MEmusic, we believe that music should be fun. Our mission is to nourish sound, the soundstage, and the intrinsic components of the music making process through the prioritization of diversity, individuality, integrity and authenticity. Ultimately we promote the soul of music at its core.

Name: Dangerbird Records
Description: Independent Record Label and Publishing Company, founded by the musician Peter Walker in 2004. Headquartered in the Silver Lake neighborhood of Los Angeles, Dangerbird has launched the careers of superstar acts Fitz and The Tantrums and Silversun Pickups and boasts a diverse catalog that also includes Grandaddy, Sea Wolf, Slothrust, Butch Walker, The Frights, Swervedriver, Minus the Bear and many others. Dangerbird steadfastly elevates and invests in art and artists, and is currently home to a diverse and exciting roster, an active recording studio and a performance space anchoring one of the most dynamic and creative neighborhoods on earth.

Name: The Cliburn
Description:
The Cliburn advances classical piano music throughout the world. Its international competitions, education programs, and concert series embody an enduring commitment to artistic excellence and the discovery of new artists. Established in Fort Worth, Texas, in 1962, the quadrennial Van Cliburn International Piano Competition (seventeenth edition, May 21–June 7, 2025) remains the most visible expression of that mission and is, as always, committed to its original ideals of supporting and launching the careers of emerging artists, ages 18–30. It shares the transformative powers of music with a wide global audience, through fully produced webcasts and by providing comprehensive career management and concert bookings to its winners. Rounding out its mission, the Cliburn also produces the Cliburn International Junior Piano Competition and Festival (fourth edition, June 2027) for exceptional 13- to 17-year-old pianists and the Cliburn International Amateur Piano Competition (ninth edition, June 2028) for outstanding non-professional pianists age 35 and older.

Over a four-year cycle, the Cliburn contributes to North Texas’ cultural landscape with over 170 classical music performances for 150,000 attendees through competitions, free community concerts, and its signature Cliburn Concerts series. Cliburn in the Classroom—the Cliburn's music education program and recipient of D CEO Magazine's 2024 Innovation in Education Award—presents 1,000 free, in-school, and interactive concert experiences for more than 200,000 area elementary students over a four-year cycle. During the same time period, the Cliburn garners the world’s attention with more than 60 million views from 177 nations for competition webcasts; 300 concerts worldwide booked for competition winners; more than 10,000 news articles about the Cliburn and its winners; and regular national radio broadcasts to 245 public radio stations.

Name: Rajawali Indonesia
Description: Rajawali Indonesia Communication adalah perusahaan jasa di bidang komunikasi yang menyediakan produk layanan mencakup strategi komunikasi, perencanaan event, dan promosi. Tahun 2002 adalah tonggak awal kami mengawali langkah di dunia bisnis dalam bidang promosi dan event organizer dengan nama Rajawali. Dimulai dari event-event berskala kecil seperti direct selling hingga dipercaya untuk menggagas event dalam skala besar, seperti showbiz dan exhibition. Setelah beberapa tahun berdinamika dalam bidang promosi, pada tahun 2009 kami mentransformasikan visi bisnis kami dengan menggunakan nama baru, Rajawali Indonesia Communication. Sebagai salah satu perusahaan penyedia jasa yang memfokuskan diri dalam bidang strategi komunikasi, Rajawali Indonesia Communication berkomitmen tinggi untuk memberikan pelayanan terbaik, service excellent secara profesional, kreatif dan inovatif dalam memenuhi kebutuhan mitra, baik perusahaan maupun institusi non bisnis dalam memaksimalkan strategi komunikasi dan mendukung keberhasilan visi dan tujuan yang ingin dicapai bersama mitra bisnis kami. Dengan nama dan visi baru tersebut, kami melengkapi produk layanan kami dengan menyediakan produk-produk advertizing yang meliputi indoor dan outdoor promotion. Berbekal pengalaman tim penggagas RIC yang matang dan memadai dalam berakselerasi dengan dinamika bisnis strategi komunikasi, Rajawali Indonesia Communication meresmikan legalitas dan legitimasi perusahaan kami ke dalam satu bentuk Perseroan Terbatas yakni, PT. Syakira Ghyna Rajawali Indonesia Communication, sejak Juli 2009.

Name: Artiste First
Description: TM Music is an artiste-first enterprise that promotes non-film music by providing a platform to passionate and talented artists, both established and emerging. TM Music has released 20 singles from 15 emerging musical talents in its first year in operation, with hits such as Kareeb by Goldie Sohel and Baat Nahi Karni by Asees Kaur. Led by a team of devoted music lovers, TM Music has helped introduce worldwide audiences to a vibrant and vital part of the Indian non-film music industry.

Name: Magus Entertainment
Description: Magus Entertainment is a full-service artist management company representing a diverse roster of talent, including Duran Duran, Rozzi, Patrick Droney, JC Stewart, Alec Meza, Roxy Music, Bryan Ferry, Bret McKenzie, Adam Peters, and Ray Cooper. Prior to establishing Magus Entertainment, Wendy Laister founded and ran one of the largest independent music PR firms in Europe - Laister Dickson - that had offices in both London and Los Angeles. During her ten-year tenure as CEO and President, the company's client base grew to include The Rolling Stones, Guns 'N' Roses, Paul McCartney, Janet Jackson, Aerosmith, Greenpeace, INXS and Tina Turner, among many others. In addition, she coordinated global press and publicity campaigns for many of the world's largest televised music events, including Woodstock, Rock in Rio, two Nelson Mandela tributes, the Brit Awards, the Three Tenors concert series, The Wall – Live in Berlin, and the Bob Dylan 30th Anniversary concert from Madison Square Garden. Prior to forming Laister Dickson, Wendy was Manager of corporate press and public relations for Richard Branson's Virgin Group. Laister's move into management and the formation of Magus Entertainment in the early 1990s came through her relationship with Aerosmith, whom she had worked with for many years. As their exclusive, worldwide manager, she spearheaded successful campaigns around three multiplatinum #1 albums, their first #1 global single, two record-breaking world tours, the launch of an Aerosmith Disney theme park ride and the release of a New York Times best-selling autobiography.

Name: Record Play
Description:
Record-Play is an award-winning, global music consultancy specialising in music supervision, sync licensing and sonic branding. With 20+ years of experience, we craft the perfect soundtracks to enhance visuals and storytelling for brands, film, TV, video games and media projects. At Record-Play, we believe in doing things the right way by treating artists fairly and prioritising creativity, inclusivity and respect. 

Record-Play has a diverse and talented team based in London and Barcelona. Our team is made up of professional musicians, DJs, promoters, music business affairs, artist managers and journalists, which means we’ve got deep roots and relevant connections across the music industry. We’re proud to have worked and collaborated on award winning, global productions with some of the biggest brands including adidas, Google and Reebok.

Name: Grass Fed Music
Description: Nael Atweh founded Grass Fed Music Management in 2011, self-financing and initially operating as a one-man show. Focusing primarily on artist development and management from around the globe, Nael’s main priority has always been about real and organic growth and creativity with whatever artist he pursues. In 2016, Nael sought out successful R&B and Soul artist Sabrina Claudio, who later dropped a project titled Confidently Lost that gained massive success. With over 3M monthly listeners and amassing 370M streams on Spotify, Sabrina has taken the stage via Coachella in 2019 and has headlined two of her own tours. She is scheduled to go on tour with The Weeknd in 2022 and is one of the many talented artists on Nael’s roster. Nael has brought on a wide range of talent to Grass Fed Music, ranging from House, Pop, Alternative, Singer/Songwriter, Indie, and R&B. His current roster consists of R&B/Soul artist Sabrina Claudio, House/Electronic producer Sad Money $(, Alternative Pop artist Gavin Haley, Singer/Songwriter Etham, Producer/Songwriter Andy Schmidt, Mix Engineer Ellis Tucker, Producer/Songwriter THRTN, Producer/Multi-Instrumentalist Kaveh Rastegar, and Producer/Songwriter Will Mcbeath. Additionally, Grass Fed Artist Services offers full-range artist development services to help artists navigate their music careers, putting emphasis on branding, marketing strategies, relationships, A&R, and more.

Description: Helix Records, established in April 2022, is a multi-territory independent home for the world’s best new electronic dance music. Patrick Moxey's ascending flagship electronic dance music label has already signed several high-profile new artists including renowned electronic duo Snakehips, dance icon Jamie Jones, drum and bass legend Netsky, Dutch artist/producer San Holo, British-Australian band AR/CO, party rockers Two Friends, Grammy nominated Ten City and legendary house DJ/producer Marshall Jefferson, and tech house maven DJ Susan, with more announcements to come.

Name: Chapman Guitars
Description:
Chapman Guitars is unique. On Friday June 19th 2009 when I (Rob Chapman) was sat in McDonald’s in Essex, and Bruce Perrin offered me a run of 50 signature guitars, I would never have dreamed that it would lead to this. The second I got home from the session that I had been working at, my immediate instinct was to log on to YouTube and ask everybody what they would like, rather than just making a guitar for myself. “After all”, I said, “you guys are going to buy it”.

Now I own a guitar company.

Name: ALICE
Description: ALICE is your Copenhagen concert. A meeting place for curious ears, divers music and embracing mindsets. A place that seeks new horizons, digs deep into musical roots and presents new and exciting hybrids. ALICE presents an ambitious program ranging from global roots, folk and jazz/improv to electronic music, metal, avant-garde and sound art. We frequently bring the music into alternative spaces like churches and art spaces and we collaborate with a wide range of festivals and organizers, always seeking to bring the music into new contexts and into discussions with other art forms and other parts of society.

Name: Social Music Awards
Description:
Grâce à l’essor du streaming, l’industrie musicale profite enfin de la révolution numérique et renoue avec la croissance. Les opérations de communication des acteurs culturels et économiques s’adaptent aux nouveaux comportements encouragés par les réseaux sociaux : la prescription, la personnalisation, la mobilité et le partage sont les maitres mots de ce nouveau paradigme. 
Afin d’accompagner cette évolution, Yves-Michel Aklé fonde en 2019 la plateforme « Social Music Café » dédiée aux stratégies social media créatives et aux innovations technologiques de l’industrie musicale. Constatant la vitalité des créations et des dispositifs mis en oeuvre, il décide de les célébrer en créant, avec Emily Gonneau, directrice de Nüagency et autrice du livre “L’Artiste, le numérique et la musique”, la première cérémonie des « Social Music Awards » ! 

# RÉCOMPENSES
• Les lauréat.e.s remporteront un trophée physique
• La reconnaissance des professionnel.l.es du secteur
• La mention de cette distinction pourra être utilisée
sur tous leurs supports de communication sans limite de temps
• Un relais médiatique assuré par les différents
partenaires des Social Music Awards

# QUI PEUT CANDIDATER ?
• Artistes en solo ou en groupe
• Labels / Artist Services Company
• Tourneurs, festivals, salles de spectacles
• Agences de communication digitale, d’influence marketing, de création et production de contenus, stratégistes, community et social media managers freelance
• Réalisteurs.trices de videoclips ou web série, photographes, graphistes, illustrateurs.trices, créateur.trice de podcast, créateur.trice d’une web channel / chaine thématique
• Innovateurs.trices technologiques : applications mobiles, réseaux sociaux, plateformes digitales, start-up
• Marques ou institutions qui développent des opérations de communication en partenariat avec des artistes

# DATES
13 nov. : Clôture de l’appel à candidatures
25 nov. : Annonce des nommé·es
10 déc. : Annonce des lauréat·es - Online event

Name: Kid Katana Records
Description:
Kid Katana Records is a record label dedicated to video game music founded by Tarafa Sahloul and Rémy Dahi, music industry veterans with over a decade of experience and passion about music, movies, video games and pop culture. 

Since its foundation in 2019, Kid Katana has worked with key publishers and IP owners such as SEGA, Take-Two, Quantic Dream, Don’t Nod, SNK, Dotemu, Hasbro, Nickelodeon, on more than 10 games such as Streets of Rage 4, TMNT: Shredder’s Revenge, or Jusant. 

It aims at bridging the gap between gaming and mainstream music and putting music creators closer to fans. For game publishers and studios, Kid Katana is meant to be a one-stop shop for music, taking care of every aspect of the process:

- music supervision and executive production to match the studio’s ambition 
- specific expertise on spotlight tracks, securing musical guests from the music world to reach new audiences
- digital and physical release of the OST on a global level with a worldwide network of partners
- specific gaming retail expertise on both digital (Steam, GoG, Bandcamp) and physical (VGM retail network)
- music rights services including legal setup and royalty management over time for the soundtrack sales

Mutant Ninja is Kid Katana's mother company. It operates as an independent hip-hop and electro record label and music services company.

Name: Lua Nova Produtora
Description:
A música e o som podem causar coisas incríveis em uma pessoa: suor, alegria, arrepio, calor, estado de euforia. Atuam no mesmo lugar onde se formam as emoções no cérebro e isto faz com que a música e o som possam ser facilmente associados a uma experiência de vida. É por isto que quando ouvimos uma música, lembramos ou associamos ela à algo que vivemos e isto acessa nossas emoções.

Tratamos a música além de sua estética, tratamos como um veículo capaz de gerar emoção. Criamos pensando na estética, na emoção e na experiência que a música pode provocar nas pessoas. Somos vendedores de emoção!

Estamos há 37 anos no mercado e temos uma ampla estrutura de estúdios e talentosos produtores musicais. Atendemos por ano mais de 80 agências, 300 anunciantes e inúmeros trabalhos de música para conteúdo e entretenimento.

___________

Produção musical e pós produção de áudio para publicidade, animações, curta e longa metragem e séries.
