Name: RamDam, réseau national des musiques jeune public
Description:
Engager une réflexion nouvelle et des initiatives innovantes en faveur de la création musicale jeune public, toutes esthétiques et formes confondues.

Le réseau occupe une place centrale dans la dynamique inter-réseaux pour faire converger les regards des différentes esthétiques musicales vers la question du jeune public.

Cette dynamique est tout aussi importante dans sa volonté de dialogue institutionnel, et de sensibilisation aux problématiques spécifiques à la création musicale jeune public.

Observation, Ressource & Intelligence Collective
Les espaces de réflexion collective font émerger les axes d’activité du réseau et l’expérimentation de formats innovants. Présentations de projets de création et de dispositifs d’aide, intermédiation Salles mômes, ateliers participatifs ou encore speed-meetings visent à favoriser l’excellence et la durabilité des projets artistiques. Une veille active de l’actualité des secteurs de la musique et du jeune public est également largement relayée.

Accompagnement professionnel
Repérer l’émergence artistique, professionnaliser les équipes qui créent, produisent et accueillent la création musicale jeune public par l’accompagnement, l’écoute, les synthèses d’ateliers, de rencontres professionnelles et le relai d’informations sur l’actualité du secteur.

Coopération inter-réseaux & Politiques Publiques
Dialogue avec les réseaux disciplinaires, nationaux et territoriaux, groupes de travail thématiques et rencontres professionnelles forment les piliers du travail collectif du réseau. Fort des réflexions menées sur les territoires, RamDam engage le débat avec ses partenaires institutionnels pour soulever les problématiques du secteur et de ses territoires d’expression pour y apporter des réponses.

Name: JOSETTE MUSIC CLUB
Description: JOSETTE MUSIC CLUB est une Maison de Production Sonore dédiée à la publicité et au cinéma. JOSETTE conçoit, conseil, fabrique des bandes sons et expériences sonores pour des agences, annonceurs, producteurs et réalisateurs.

Name: Cr2 Records Ltd
Description:
Cr2 Records was founded in 2004 by Mark Brown, and since then has been at the forefront of dance music.
Having released successful records with the likes of HUGEL, Matt Sassari, Steve Angello & Eric Prydz, Fedde Le Grand, Chuckie and Oliver Heldens, Cr2 have achiveved multiple chart successes globally, and some of the best-loved dance tracks of all time.
Based in Tileyard, London, Cr2 continue to go from strength to strength having recently signed a long-term global distribution partnership with Believe. Our team is able to work records in multiple territories thanks to our unique set up, with a focus on great A&R.
Cr2 Records also have their own boutique publishing arm, MBMB Publishing which has a number of writer clients and has acheived significant sync success with the likes of EA Sports, ITV and Sky.

Name: LÜM
Description: The All-Access Pass to Owning Your Fandom #FLOW #NFT

Name: Mogar Music
Description: Established in 1987 in Milan (Italy), Mogar Music is now part of the business alliance between Zoom Corporation of Japan and the Monzino family. With over 30 years of experience in the MI and Pro Audio industry, the Mogar company of today covers distribution of international premium brands throughout South Europe and offers a truly dedicated gateway to the markets of France, Italy, Spain and Portugal.

Name: Alma 11 11 Audio
Description:
WE ARE AN AUDIO HUB FOR 
ADVERTISING AND CONTENT 
WITH A CREATIVE AND PROVOCATIVE STYLE.


With 11 Cannes Lions, 7 Clios  including Radio & Audio on both Awards, and 10 El Ojo including Best Use of Original Music, Alma 1111 Audio has done music production, creative consultancy, licensing, sync and more for many Brands like Citroen, Mitsubishi, Honda, Coca-Cola, Samsung, Renault, Gatorade, Jeep, Google, Avon, Unilever, Ambev and creative agencies such as BBH, Publicis, DDB, DPZT , Leo Burnett, Havas, VMLY&R, Wunderman Thompson and many more.
We have producers in Brazil, USA, London and Spain that goes from São Paulo’s  Live PA,  New York’s EDM to the L.A. movie scores.
Trust our services and we will be ready to make music that is going to make your production last forever.
Over 130 Worldwide Awards and Nominations.
Listen to Your Soul 11:11

Name: Kid Katana & Mutant Ninja
Description:
Kid Katana Records is a record label dedicated to video game music founded by Tarafa Sahloul and Rémy Dahi, music industry veterans with over a decade of experience and passion about music, movies, video games and pop culture. 

Since its foundation in 2019, Kid Katana has worked with key publishers and IP owners such as SEGA, Take-Two, Quantic Dream, Don’t Nod, SNK, Dotemu, Hasbro, Nickelodeon, on more than 10 games such as Streets of Rage 4, TMNT: Shredder’s Revenge, or Jusant. 

It aims at bridging the gap between gaming and mainstream music and putting music creators closer to fans. For game publishers and studios, Kid Katana is meant to be a one-stop shop for music, taking care of every aspect of the process:

- music supervision and executive production to match the studio’s ambition 
- specific expertise on spotlight tracks, securing musical guests from the music world to reach new audiences
- digital and physical release of the OST on a global level with a worldwide network of partners
- specific gaming retail expertise on both digital (Steam, GoG, Bandcamp) and physical (VGM retail network)
- music rights services including legal setup and royalty management over time for the soundtrack sales

Mutant Ninja is Kid Katana's mother company. It operates as an independent hip-hop and electro record label and music services company.

Name: Andrson
Description:
Although the music industry invests nearly $4.5bn in A&R annually, hundreds of artists are being left behind: unfound, unrepresented, and unemployed. In Ireland, this equates to an estimated €50m in uncapitalised funds. Worldwide, the number is over $2bn. This isn’t due to a lack of talent; it’s a problem of discovery.

Enter Andrson, the first online band incubator that discovers what you need at the click of a button. Andrson facilitates musical collaboration and provides a global platform for undiscovered musicians. We are a virtual playground where musicians create & publish their work while getting direct exposure to music executives. Our platform provides direct contact to industry professionals, whose contracts allow them a streamlined A&R network. Our proprietary algorithm enables rapid discovery of musicians whose sound fills the empty space on your roster. No more YouTube trolling. Should you want to find a female musician between the ages of 26-35 within 50 miles of Dublin who sounds 75% like Britney Spears, we're the app for that.

By bridging the gap between musician and industry professional we improve productivity and increase creativity. Overall, this leads to greater monetisation of new music; insiders capitalise on undiscovered talent, and musicians benefit from profitable discovery. With support secured from a GRAMMY-nominated band, one of the world’s leading music magazines, a “Big 3” client on board and over 7000+ musicians ready to join, Andrson is built from within: we cater to music, and music only.

The music industry is fractured, and its business models are outdated. We’re the answer to monetising new music. Join us.

Name: VTH Season
Description:
The Vth Season is an impactful Creative Entertainment Marketing Agency with an enviable roster of Africa’s most well-known Music Talent including Ami Faku, AKA, Manu WorldStar, Benny Afroe, Courtnae’ Paul, Lungisa Xhamela, Pro Monate, Stepdaddy, Eternal Africa and others. 
Vth Season comprises an independent record label and highly sought-after artist management expertise. The entity is best known for developing unknown raw music talent to celebrated household name status in Africa, with recognition from multiple award committees, significant music sales revenue from platinum records and high value partnerships with local and international brand endorsements and campaigns 
Company is founder run, with collective experience in entertainment industry in Africa of 20 years and solid reputation as pioneers in the African entertainment industry with an ability to spot new opportunities
VTH Season has received recognition from multiple award committees such as the South African Music Awards (SAMAs), Metro FM Awards, MTV Africa Music Awards (MAMA’s) as well as international nods from the likes of the Black Entertainment Television (BET) Awards and MTV Europe Music.

Name: selected.
Description: In an endless stream of online media, selected. is a cultural landmark for carefully curated music taste. We are aiming to define and set the trend, not to follow it. We are a House dedicated music blog, record label, and event brand.

Name: BMG SYNC+ APAC
Description:
SYNC+ is BMG’s global music-for-media solution, bringing together Commercial Sync, Production Music, and Media Services as one integrated team. We connect media clients with world-class repertoire, unique artist partnerships, and strategic music consultancy. From licensing to bespoke compositions, SYNC+ delivers seamless, end-to-end music solutions for any creative brief.
 
As part of BMG, one of the world's largest music companies with offices in most major cities, its global reputation helps BMG Production Music secure the services of many leading musicians and songwriters composing today, adding to their catalogue of 150,000 tracks and counting. 
 
Add to this their music consultants and AI technology, alongside synch and bespoke departments, and BMG is perfectly placed to provide a complete music service to support your next production. 
 
No matter what style of music you’re looking for, BMGPM almost certainly has a track that can help you better connect and emotionally engage with your audience. 
 
Elevate your next project with BMG Production Music.

Name: OffBeat Records
Description: OffBeat Records is an independent record label and artist collective, currently housing the most skilled and diverse roster in the Greek rap game.

Name: Semperoper Dresden
Description: Die Staatsoper Dresden ist ein Haus von Weltruf mit Ensembles von Rang, der Sächsischen Staatskapelle Dresden, einem der traditionsreichsten und ältesten Orchester der Welt, dem Staatsopernchor der Staatsoper Dresden, dem Semperoper Ballett sowie vielzähligen internationalen Gästen. In den letzten Kriegsmonaten zerstört, wurde die Semperoper Dresden zu einem der schönsten und renommiertesten Opernhäuser Europas wiedererbaut. Neben den zahlreichen Opern-, Ballett-, und Konzertveranstaltungen auf der Bühne der Semperoper finden auf der Studiobühne »Semper Zwei« Kinder- und Jugendmusiktheateraufführungen statt.

Name: Liverpool City Region Music Board
Description:
The Music Board, made up of 22 members and eight observers, is charged with cementing the city region’s position as one of the world’s music capitals and will work to ensure music businesses and communities have a stronger voice in local and regional decision-making.

The Liverpool City Region Music Board; set up in December 2018 as an independent, sector-led Board, appointed by the Liverpool City Region Combined Authority (LCRCA) Metro Mayor, Steve Rotheram, and supported by the Liverpool Mayor.

The LCR Music Board is one of the first of such Boards created in the UK. Its strategy and action plan have been endorsed by the LCRCA.

Name: Jo&Co Label
Description:
Jo&Co est une société de production de musique et de vidéos fondée en 2010 par Sébastien Saussez.
Très attaché à l’artistique et au développement d’artiste, le label accompagne ses talents dans leur carrière. Jo&Co fait ainsi éclore des artistes à l’univers affirmé comme Claudio Capéo, Hoshi, Linh, Les Frangines, Eloïz, Malo’, Zaz…

Fort de ses succès, Jo&Co est aujourd’hui un acteur incontournable du secteur musical.

Pour l’envoi de démo, veuillez suivre ce lien : inbox.bridge.audio/jo-and-co

Name: International Association for Music and Medicine (IAMM)
Description: INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION FOR MUSIC & MEDICINE INC is a music company based out of 314 WOODWARD WAY NW, ATLANTA, Georgia, United States.

Name: Young Voices UK
Description:
The largest school choir concerts in the World in the biggest arenas in the UK.

Our choirs range from 4,500 to 8,500 children all performing at the same time to capacity audiences of friends and family. Nothing can prepare you for the sound of that many children singing in harmony and Young Voices combine the power of choral singing with amazing performances from a wide range of musicians.

Every year schools across the country practise our music in class with their teachers to prepare themselves to take part in these massive concerts. Over the years the children in the choir have performed with artists like Alexandra Burke, Joss Stone and Gary Barlow at the same time raising over 1 million pounds for Children’s charities like CLIC Sargent.

We have a full live band, backing singers and an internationally acclaimed Conductor David Lawrence all on stage to make this one of the most exciting musical experiences.

2018 was our largest ever concert tour with over 158,000 children taking part. Every year we have concerts at the O2 in London, The Resorts World Arena in Birmingham, Manchester Arena and The FlyDSA Arena in Sheffield.

Name: Artrocker Magazine
Description: Artrocker Magazine reflects the musical and cultural interests and aspirations of the new breed of young people with a joyous and exuberant optimism and energy for music, fashion, gaming, art and film.

Name: Aurora Dischi
Description: Etichetta Discografica - Edizioni Musicali - MGMT

Name: 440Hz
Description: 440Hz is a music rights management company with a strong focus on audiovisual. Services include : music publishing, executive production, music supervision, clearances, soundtrack releases and financing.

Name: Music Promotion, Inc.
Description: Music Promotion, Inc. (established in 2011) is a music marketing company that specializes in strategic marketing in DSPs, radio promotion, artist development, and campaign management for labels, artists, and bands. A+ Rating from the BBB.

Name: Really Slow Motion LLC
Description:
Really Slow Motion LLC is a music and sound production group that produces and publishes material for movie trailers, game and TV advertising.
• Production of a constantly growing catalog of music ready for licensing and publishing.
• A team of composers is always ready to deliver music under tight schedules for your pitch or project.
** Relevant clients:  Disney, Universal Pictures, Warner Bros, Sony, SuperBowl, CBS, HBO, Chevron, Turkish Airlines, Samsung...
***Film credits include Star Wars The Force Awakens, Captain America Civil War, Creed, The Revenant, Alice Through The Looking Glass, Batman v Superman, Deadpool, Zoolander 2, Gods of Egypt, Bridge of Spies, The Finest Hours, Avengers: Age of Ultron, Terminator Genisys, Mad Max: Fury Road, Sinister II, Insurgent, Pan, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Furious 7, Poltergeist, The Hunger Games Mockingjay Part 1, Fury, Edge Of Tomorrow, Seventh Son, Hobbit: The Battle Of The Five Armies, Captain America: Winter Soldier, The Amazing Spider-Man 2, Transformers: Age Of Extinction, X-Men Days Of Future Past, Dawn Of The Planet Of The Apes, Maleficent, RoboCop, Star Trek Into Darkness, Oblivion, World War Z, Pacific Rim...
*** Game credits include Assassin's Creed Unity and Syndicate, F1 Game, Just Cause 3, Doom, Halo 5, Evolve, Diablo III, Call of Duty Advanced Warfare, Far Cry 4 and Primal, Tom Clancy´s The Division, Spider-Man Unlimited...

www.reallyslowmotion.com

Name: Visible Music College
Description:
Visible Music College is an independent Christian music college designed to prepare artists, technicians and business professionals for skilled, relational service in the music industry and the Church. We "get" the idea that creative young people need a place to develop technical and artistic skills while growing in character and being empowered in their calling. 

Visible Music College fills the gap in education where vocational colleges, Bible colleges, universities, and the school of experience cross but don't meet. Visible Music College offers a holistic program that is academically challenging, vocationally practical, and spiritually empowering. Visible Music College was born out of a need in this generation - a need to rise up and lead in true worship of God through the arts, ministry and technology. We share a common vision of using our gifts and talents to impact the world. Visible Music College is more than a college campus, it is a community of artists who desire to bring the culture of God's kingdom to modern society.

Name: Hub Music Factory
Description: Hub Music Factory is a booking agency that successfully operates all over Italy organising music shows, tours and events.

Name: Pop in Limburg
Description:
Pop in Limburg (Stichting Popmuziek Limburg) is de provinciale popkoepel van de provincie Limburg. In samenwerking met muzikanten, muziekcollectieven, jongerencentra, poppodia, festivals, opleidingen, lokale en regionale overheden en iedereen met een hart voor popmuziek streven we naar een bloeiend ecosysteem voor popmuziek in onze provincie.

Voorop staat de muzikant, waar we voor zowel amateurs én professionals een klimaat willen realiseren waar voldoende (ontwikkeling)kansen zijn. Dit doen we onder andere door mensen en organisaties die actief zijn in de popmuziek met elkaar te verbinden en door samenwerking te stimuleren. Door het organiseren van verschillende bijeenkomsten en cursussen voor muzikanten én mensen die niet óp het podium maar vooral achter de schermen actief zijn. Door het zichtbaar maken en promoten van Limburgs poptalent en door het ontwikkelen en organiseren van verschillende talentontwikkeling programma’s. En tenslotte door het zichtbaar maken van de Limburgse popcultuur, mede met deze website.

Pop in Limburg heeft een zelfstandig bestuur. Pop in Limburg is partner in het landelijke poporgaan POPNL.

Name: SPD
Description:
Especializados en produccion musical desde la concepcion de una idea hasta que suene en tus auriculares.

Publicidad de eventos y artistas
E-comerce venta online
Diseño Multimedia, videoclips, portadas, soundtracks, instrumentales
Produccion musical, electronica, hiphop, pop ...

Name: D'General
Description: Professional DJ Services

Name: Vankiki Records
Description: Vankiki Records es un sello independiente especializado en la producción, distribución y desarrollo de carreras artísticas de diferentes estilos musicales. Apostamos por grupos y artistas emergentes, consolidando y dando a conocer sus proyectos en la industria de la música. Siguiendo el modelo de negocio 360º, desarrollamos estrategias para los ámbitos de distribución, marketing, management y editorial.

Name: Kamerata Zuid - Orkest
Description: Kamerorkest Kamerata Zuid speelt met klassiek! Letterlijk en figuurlijk. Ze gaat, onder leiding van dirigent Frank Adams, verrassende samenwerkingen aan met (inter)nationale artiesten. Verwacht van dit orkest geen loutere cross-overs of begeleiding. De jonge, enthousiaste strijkers en de percussionist vormen dé band. Het klassieke geluid is de allesbepaler van klank, kleur en ritme, dat samensmelt met de muziek van nu. Uniek is dat hierdoor de wereld van de klassieke componist letterlijk samenkomt met de wereld van de artiest. Met als resultaat een nieuwe sound. Waarmee klassieke muziek toegankelijk wordt voor een breed publiek.

Name: J'Ohnzo Entertaintment
Description:
Andy de J’Ohnzo, real name Andreas Johansson has grown up with music all his life, it’s been there forever!
When Andy was about 14 he made a mix just for fun on a old crappy music editing software. He sent this mix to some friends and not much happened after that.
About three weeks later his friend’s sister commented on the mix and said that she really liked it! And that’s how the journey started…
Andy has now played in a lot of Nightclubs and has been hosting one of Sweden’s most popular radio shows on NERadio.
Though he does not broadcast anymore at NERadio since they don’t play house and Andy is now 100% focused on house. He is still behind the scenes at the radio and is working on a new show to get it all going again. But maybe on a different station, just wait and see.
The DJ carrier is not everything; Andy is currently working hard on his own productions and is getting better and better! You can find Andy’s music under “Music” in the menu.

Name: Luxor Live
Description:
Luxor Live is more than just a pop temple. In a beautiful and monumental building in the center of Arnhem (NL) Luxor Live opened its doors early September 2008. The program includes all aspects of modern pop culture. 

All kinds of music are programmed in Luxor Live, including jazz, fusion and world music.

Name: Rapchat
Description: Rapchat is on a mission to democratize music creation with mobile tools that allow anyone to be a music artist. Rapchat takes the friction out of making music and has helped over 10 million artists unleash their creativity.

Name: Bibelot
Description:
Bibelot is hét poppodium van Zuidwest-Nederland. Met een brede programmering voor popconcerten, festivals en dansfeesten! Bibelot is gevestigd in het Energiehuis in Dordrecht, heeft twee popzalen (Main Stage en Power Stage) en een café (Brandstof). Het programma in de popzalen vind je op: www.bibelot.net

Brandstof is de plek waar je heerlijk kunt wegzakken in een lekkere fauteuil na een concert, voorstelling of feest in het Energiehuis. Ook doordeweeks ben je er van harte welkom, bijvoorbeeld om te lunchen of om samen met ons mooie plannen te smeden. Wekelijks verandert Brandstof in de fijnste huiskamer van Dordrecht tijdens Dansstof. Meer info: www.brandstofdordrecht.nl

Tijdens evenementen zie je vooral de 100 vrijwilligers van Bibelot; ze helpen je aan de bar of bij de kassa en spelen een belangrijke rol in de productie en promotie. Wil jij ook je steentje bijdragen? Bekijk dan de vacatures voor meer info: https://bibelot.net/info/vacatures/

Bibelot is het oudste "echte" poppodium van Nederland. Bibelot werd opgericht in 1967. Het begon allemaal in een zaaltje van de Verrezen Christus kerk in de wijk Crabbenhof. Na korte tijd werd er verhuisd naar de Steegoversloot, in het centrum van Dordrecht. In 1981 werd de Bonifatiuskerk aan de Wijnstraat de thuishaven. Sinds 2013 is Bibelot gevestigd in het Energiehuis. In 2017 bestond Bibelot 50 jaar.

Name: WHY&HOW
Description: WHY&HOW is a full service artist management and music company formed in 2020 with diversified ventures across music, entertainment, digital, branding and spirits. Our WHY is the purpose and intention behind every artist and project we take on. Our HOW is the strategy and action behind the execution of our client and company initiatives.

Name: JAZZ.FM91
Description: As Canada’s only 24/7 all jazz radio broadcaster and listener supported charitable organization, JAZZ.FM91 is committed to entertaining, inspiring and uniting our local community and the global jazz community we serve through programming, live performance, education and storytelling. We believe jazz is unifying at its core. Jazz is collaborative and improvisational; it is curious and fearless and inclusive. Jazz is all of us at our best.

Name: Southern Hospitality
Description:
Southern Hospitality is a London-based, globally respected DJ collective, club promotions brand, record label and music website. Across the hip-hop, pop and electronic music worlds, Southern Hospitality has become renowned for breaking new artists, hosting some of London’s most popular hip-hop club nights and events, and releasing hundreds of critically-acclaimed mixtapes and groundbreaking label releases.

• Multi-faceted global brand, with consecutive official showcases at SXSW Music Festival.

• Released music by: Danny Brown, Darq E Freaker, Sinden, Star Slinger, Lunice, ISSUE, Young L, Keyboard Kid and more.

• Featured in: New York Times, SPIN, LA Weekly, Complex, The Fader, Time Out, Metro (UK) and many more - for original releases and events.

• DJs regularly appearing at the biggest and best UK music festivals including Glastonbury, Bestival & Lovebox

Name: Jeff Wayne Music Group
Description:
Jeff Wayne Music, the music supervision and production company for all your music research, licensing, and composition needs. Whether it's music for an app, film, TV show, game or advert we are an experienced, creative, and approachable team, here to make finding the right solution easy.

We are music fans with a creative ear for placement and sonic branding. Through working with clients who demand high quality, forward thinking, creativity and an efficient service, we have evolved to smoothly navigate the complex web of rights holders, publishers, record companies and the infinite choice of songs available to meet your requirements. We pride ourselves on first class song research, effective negotiation and enjoy extensive relationships with rights holders worldwide. 

Whether you are a film production company, advertising agency, brand, app or game developer, Jeff Wayne Music can create bespoke content and research to clear the perfect track for your project. 

Our music production division represents composers, arrangers, orchestrators, musicial directors and sound designers across all genres.  We are continually adding new talent to our roster in order to meet every music requirement.  

As music supervisors we also commission, on a one-off non exclusive basis, composers, bands, arrangers, musical directors, sound designers, producers and programmers.

Please feel free to contact Paul Bassett, he’ll happily go through your requirements with you: Email / +44 7712 877 936

Name: low profile
Description: At Low Profile, we’re all about helping artists connect their music with the right opportunities so that great music gets the attention it deserves. We specialize in sync licensing for ads, TV, film, and gaming, while also offering publishing support that helps artists grow and build lasting careers.

Name: Harmony Works Sheffield
Description: What if Sheffield’s civic buildings could be activated through music? The Academy and the Hub are exploring the creation of a permanent home for music education in the city.  This home would enable each organisation to continue to thrive and would provide a highly visible, accessible, physical focus for music education, open to the public and with a full array of practice, rehearsal and performance spaces not available elsewhere in the region.

Name: Darbar Arts Culture Heritage
Description:
Simply put, Darbar has and always will continue to believe in the power of Indian arts to stir, thrill and inspire. 

We achieve this through three core objectives of our delivery, which includes live, digital and educational projects. The cornerstone of our work is the internationally respected Darbar Festival based out of Leicester, United Kingdom. 

Darbar provides a platform for emerging as well as established artists, both locally within the UK and globally, and was conceptualised as a tribute to (late) Bhai Gurmit Singh Virdee Ji by his contemporaries to pay homage to his life. Since 2006, the annual Darbar Festival has hosted over 400 artists, and Darbar regularly conducts wellness festivals, concerts and educational livestreams. It provides a premium Darbar Concert Hall app (the first of its kind, specialised subscription channel in the Indian classical arts space) and recently launched the Darbar Academy, an online music learning platform aimed at beginners to professionals. 

Darbar also hosts free content on both its YouTube channel and website, including original journalism and over 500 videos setting the industry standard for quality featuring the most skilled vocalists, instrumentalists and percussionists in the world. We celebrate taking Indian classical music back into nature, and pioneering this shift in the way the classical arts are presented. 

We are a non-profit organisation run by a small yet passionate team to give Indian classical music and dance a global platform. Darbar is privileged to work with world class venues such as the Barbican Center, Southbank, Sadlers Wells and The Curve Theatre and media partners Sky Arts. Our Artistic Director, Sandeep Virdee, was awarded an OBE by Her Majesty for his services to the promotion for Indian musical heritage in the UK.

Download Darbar app - Darbar Concert Hall
Follow us on YouTube, Facebook, Instagram & Twitter.

Name: Brain Audio
Description: Brain Audio is an artist led sound post production facility that creates sound and music for moving stories. Whether you need a composer, TV or Film audio post production, or 360° interactive sound, Brain Audio will bring together an outstanding team for your project. Good ears, experience, and intelligence make our studios a nourishing place to be.

Name: Sun Records
Description:
The Sun Records Label first began to appear on records in the 1950s, featuring songs by new recording artists whose names soon became legends, and whose electrifying sound revolutionized the music industry: Elvis Presley, Johnny Cash, Jerry Lee Lewis, Carl Perkins, Roy Orbison, and many more. Inevitably, Sun Records became a legend all its own: it is, after all, where rock ‘n’ roll was born.

In 1969, Mercury Records label producer Shelby Singleton purchased the Sun label from Sam Phillips and moved the company to Nashville, TN where it has been operating since.

Name: Glassnote Entertainment Group
Description:
Glassnote Records is the proud home to Grammy Award winning Phoenix, Grammy Award winning and multi-platinum selling Mumford & Sons, Grammy Award winning and multi-platinum selling Childish Gambino, The Temper Trap, Two Door Cinema Club, GIVERS, Oberhofer, Daughter, Little Green Cars, Robert DeLong, Half Moon Run, CHVRCHES, Flight Facilities, Secondhand Serenade, Panama Wedding, jeremy messersmith, Justin Nozuka, HOLYCHILD, Hamilton Leithauser, Flo Morrissey, Tor Miller, AURORA, Madisen Ward and the Mama Bear, Mansionair, James Hersey, Huntar, The Strumbellas, Lawrence Taylor, Jade Bird, snny, Mosa Wild, IDER, Baio, and William Prince. Glassnote has been hailed as the “Best Indie Label” by Rolling Stone, “Label of the Year” at the A2IM Libera Awards and the “#1 Independent Label” by Billboard. Most recently Pigeons & Planes described Glassnote as “a powerhouse in the world of indie labels”.

Glassnote has been hailed as the "Best Indie Label" by Rolling Stone, "Label of the Year" at the A2IM Libera Awards and the "#1 Independent Label" by Billboard.

Name: de Doelen
Description:
Als een van de belangrijkste en drukst bezochte muziekpodia van het land realiseert de Doelen jaarlijks een hoogwaardig internationaal programma van concerten met klassieke muziek, wereldmuziek, pop, jazz en alles daarbuiten. Als congresgebouw is de Doelen een belangrijke speler op de nationale en
internationale congres- en evenementenmarkt, waarbij optimale dienstverlening voorop staat.

De 4 zalen en ruim 30 subzalen in de Doelen worden jaarlijks ruim 1200 keer ingezet voor uiteenlopende evenementen; concerten in alle genres, congressen en festivals. De Doelen is tevens een geliefde locatie voor spraakmakende internationale evenementen, waaronder het International Film Festival Rotterdam, het Gergiev Festival en Classical:NEXT.

Name: Emotional Events Producciones
Description: Empresa de eventos, especializada en promover y producir conciertos. Nuestros profesionales son especialistas en contratación de artistas nacionales e internacionales, comunicación y producción de todo tipo de eventos. Trabajamos en todo el territorio nacional.

Name: MuseScore
Description: MuseScore belongs to Muse Group, developing leading software for playing, recording and composing music.

Name: Music Corporation Of America (MCA)
Description: MCA is a record label, home to EMI Records Nashville, Lucille Records, MCA Records Nashville and Mercury Records Nashville.

Name: Madison House
Description: Since our formation in 1996, Madison House Inc. has been dedicated to providing unique and innovative management and booking for our clients. Our approach to the music business comes from a belief in the music we promote, an attention to the needs of both our bands and their fans, and an absolute willingness to try anything. Our business practices incorporate the successful methods of the past and the evolving possibilities of the future.

Name: Botanique
Description:
Le Botanique is a cultural centre dedicated to live music and art exhibitions in Brussels.

Inaugurated in 1829 as a national botanic garden, Le Botanique became the cultural centre for the French Community of Belgium on 1984 and nowadays is one of Belgium’s most visited and active cultural centres.

At Botanique, we are passionate about discovering new music and helping emerging artists launch their career. With on average 300 concerts, 10 exhibitions and 100 residencies a year, we aim to create space for creativity and artistic development.

Our music festival 'Les Nuits Botanique' takes place in May every year. Boasting an eclectic line-up with international and local musicians, Les Nuits Botanique aims to promote Belgium's local scene among internationally-renowned artists. We want to create a space where everyone feels at home and can fully enjoy the live experience, be it in an intimate setting in the Rotonde or on the bigger 'Chapiteau' outdoor stage.

Name: A&R Studios
Description:
Nous sommes un studio créatif qui accompagne les artistes, les partenaires et les marques dans le développement de leur stratégie musique.

En savoir plus : https://ar-studios.fr/fr/

Name: Le Sucre
Description:
Au tout début de l’été 2013, Lyon accueille un nouveau lieu culturel et artistique : Le Sucre. Rooftop installé au cœur de la Confluence, le nouveau quartier innovant et créatif de Lyon, le lieu est perché sur le toit de la Sucrière, magnifique bâtiment industriel des années 30, qui a accueilli les premières éditions du festival électronique Nuits sonores, avant de devenir — entre autres — le principal site de la Biennale internationale d’Art Contemporain.

Le Sucre se veut un lieu de partage d’expériences, un espace social nouvelle génération, revendiquant une véritable trandisciplinarité. Le Sucre offre au public, aux créateurs ainsi qu’aux entreprises des programmations innovantes et exigeantes dans les domaines des musiques électroniques et indépendantes, de la création visuelle, des cultures numériques, de l’image, du graphisme ou de la jeune cuisine.

Le Sucre est également une boite à outils configurable, destinée à accueillir tous types de projets artistiques ou événementiels, concerts, festivals, soirées club, brunchs, événements corporate, workshops ou ateliers pour les enfants. Un lieu contemporain et convivial, dédié aux nouvelles pratiques culturelles et aux nouveaux usages.

Name: QMusic
Description:
QMusic is Queensland's music industry development association, promoting the artistic, cultural and commercial value of Queensland music.

QMusic has become first point of contact and interface for emerging artists and industry workers within the wider music industry. QMusic is an active voice for the Queensland music industry on a national and international level.  QMusic is a member of AMIN (Australian Music Industry Network) which is a network of state based music organisations that provides a national voice for policy development and advocacy issues for the music industry.

Signature events such as BIGSOUND and the Queensland Music Awards promote networking and collaboration that contributes to building the profile of the Queensland music industry.

www.bigsound.org.au
www.queenslandmusicawards.com.au

Name: SPOT
Description:
SPOT is the leading Nordic platform for new artists to showcase their talent at a wide range of venues in Aarhus, Denmark. That’s why SPOT is the perfect partner for any new Nordic artist hoping to expand their audience and the perfect choice for the music business wishing to experience a wide variety of artists with the potential to succeed internationally.

Over the years SPOT  has presented thousands of  Nordic bands and artists, across genres as pop, rock and electronic. In addition, SPOT has been an important step in launching the careers of artists like Mew, The Raveonettes and MØ.

SPOT was established in 1994, and is arranged by ROSA - The Danish Rock Council in close cooperation with MXD - Music Export Denmark.

Catch our latest & greatest on www.spotfestival.dk

Name: PRS Foundation
Description:
Since 2000 PRS Foundation has given more than £44 million to over 8,500 new music initiatives. 9 out of 12 Mercury Prize 2022 nominees had received PRS Foundation support (including the winner Little Simz) and the charity has supported BRITS, RPS, AIM and Ivors Award-winners.
 
PRS Foundation supports outstanding talent from all backgrounds, covering the whole of the UK and all genres, with grantee success stories including Little Simz, Wolf Alice, Dave, Sam Fender, Years & Years, AJ Tracey, Anna Meredith, Yola, Glass Animals, Ezra Collective, Jade Bird, Ghetts, Shiva Feshareki, Sarathy Korwar, Floating Points, Nadine Shah, The Fanatix, Imogen Heap, IDLES, Kae Tempest, Kojey Radical and Emily Burns.

Widely respected as an inclusive, collaborative and proactive funding body, PRS Foundation supports an exceptional range of new music activity through direct grants to music creators and through support for pioneering organisations, including venues, festivals, promoters and other talent development organisations. PRS Foundation founded the Women Make Music fund, co-founded global gender equality initiative, Keychange and most recently launched the POWER UP initiative to tackle anti-Black racism in music.

Name: Popakademie Baden-Württemberg
Description:
The Popakademie Baden-Württemberg (University Of Popular Music And Music Business) is a German public conservatory for popular music based in Mannheim, Germany. 

Established in 2003 by the state of Baden-Württemberg, it was the first institution of higher education in Germany to offer academic degree programs focusing on popular music and music business. It offers three bachelor and two master degree programs. Furthermore, the Popakademie is a centre of competence for all aspects of the music industry with numerous projects in the areas of international cooperation and regional development.

International cooperations with Westminster University, London, UK; Columbia College, Chicago, USA; Rockacademy, Tilburg, Netherlands; Linnaeus University, Kalmar, Sweden; Ballyfermot College, Dublin, Ireland; Popacademy Chengdu, China; HPL - School, Hasselt, Belgium

Name: Qube
Description:
Qube is the world’s first members-only studio for content creators. We provide the space, facilities and network needed to create high-quality content effortlessly. A home for a new generation of creator.

Home to over 60 purpose-built studios across 2 sites, our members share by-the-hour access to world class facilities across music, podcast, media and film amidst a community of inspired creators.

We’re proud to introduce an entirely new proposition bringing creators across disciplines together under one roof to share ideas, inspire each other, and find their flow. 

For more information, or to apply for membership, get in touch at membership@theqube.com.

Name: NEON16
Description: Fear Nothing, Impact Everything

Name: The Push - Youth Music Organisation
Description:
The Push is an Australian youth music organisation and registered charity based in Melbourne. Our work is guided by our purpose of giving every young person the opportunity to participate and thrive in Australian music.

Over three decades we have supported millions of young people with access to contemporary music programs and events.

Name: Live Music Now
Description: Live Music Now is the foremost musicians' development and outreach organisation in the UK.

Name: Old Town School of Folk Music
Description:
Mission: Old Town School of Folk Music teaches and celebrates music and cultural expressions rooted in the traditions of diverse American and global communities. 
Founded in 1957, the Old Town School provides a wide range of music, dance, theater, and visual arts courses to people of all ages, abilities, and backgrounds with 650 class offerings, private lessons, and workshops that span a wide range of artistic genres. The School is nationally accredited by the Accrediting Commission for Community & Precollegiate Arts Schools, one of only a dozen accredited community arts schools in the nation and the only one dedicated to teaching traditional and popular art forms from around the world.

The School’s critically acclaimed concerts showcase some of the finest and most diverse local and touring artists in our intimate and acoustically superb hall. Ticket prices remain among the most affordable in the city and special events like the Square Roots Festival and World Music Wednesdays make music accessible to all with free and reduced-priced programs. 

The Old Town School is the largest independent community arts school in the United States with 300 staff and faculty members who serve an average 6,000 students per week, and is supported by 3,000 members, 400 active volunteers, and an events audience of 85,000 per year. Outreach programs serve 2,000 children in 20 public schools and care facilities across Chicago, and field trip concerts attract 9,000 students and teachers annually with interactive and educational performances. 

The School owns and operates three facilities situated in Lincoln Square and Lincoln Park that include 425-seat and 150-seat concert halls, 47 classrooms, a music store, café, and resource center. Children’s classes are also held at suburban satellite locations.

Name: The Vinyl Factory
Description:
Established in 2001, The Vinyl Factory Group encompasses a record label, vinyl pressing plant, the record shop Phonica and music magazine FACT, in addition to all of its visual arts activities. These include new arts commissions, exhibitions and collaborations between musicians and contemporary artists.

The Vinyl Factory record label releases limited editions made in collaboration with musicians and artists, accompanied by events and performances. Releases to date include: Daft Punk, Christian Marclay, Massive Attack, Eddie Peake, Roisin Murphy, Dinos Chapman, Florence + the Machine, Maurizio Cattalan, Pet Shop Boys, Martin Creed, Bryan Ferry, Giorgio Moroder and The xx.

The Vinyl Factory curates a site-specific program of audio-visual experiences at spaces including The Store Studios, 180 The Strand and Brewer Street Car Park. These have included The Infinite Mix as well as the UK premieres of Ragnar Kjartannson’s The Visitors, Ryoji Ikeda’ssupersymmetry, Carsten Nicolai’s unicolor and Richard Mosse’s The Enclave.

The Vinyl Factory also works in partnership with leading art organisations including the Venice Biennale, Hayward Gallery, Barbican, Art Basel Miami and the Serpentine. Key projects include The Infinite Mix at The Store Studios, Jeremy Deller’s English Magic for the British Pavilion at the 55th Venice Biennale of Art, Christian Marclay’s major show at White Cube Bermondsey and the staging of American multi-media artist Doug Aitken’s Station to Station at the Barbican.

Name: Elektra Entertainment
Description:
Elektra Entertainment is

Elektra Records
Fueled By Ramen
Roadrunner Records
DTA Records
Low Country Sound
Public Consumption

Name: Blackbird Presents
Description:
Blackbird Presents is the worldwide leader in the production of large-scale concert events, broadcast specials, TV series, music festivals and tours.

Recent concerts, broadcast specials and releases include Willie: Life & Songs Of An American Outlaw, All In For The Gambler: Kenny Rogers’ Farewell Concert Celebration, Sing Me Back Home: The Music of Merle Haggard, The Life & Songs of Kris Kristofferson, Imagine: John Lennon 75th Birthday Concert, Outlaw: Celebrating The Music of Waylon Jennings, I'll Take You There: Celebrating 75 Years of Mavis Staples, The Life and Songs of Emmylou Harris, Lynyrd Skynyrd: One More For The Fans, The Musical Mojo of Dr. John: Celebrating Mac and His Music, and All My Friends: Celebrating The Songs and Voice of Gregg Allman, the latter of which earned a 2014 GRAMMY Award nomination for Gregg Allman and Taj Mahal's awe-inspiring performance of "Statesboro Blues." 

Blackbird Presents is also the creator and producer of The Outlaw Music Festival Tour, in partnership with Willie Nelson; The American Roots Music & Arts Festival, in partnership with Eric Church; and The Last Waltz 40 Tour.

Name: Black Lives in Music
Description:
Black Lives in Music is an award winning charity which addresses the current inequality of opportunity for Black, Asian and racially diverse people aspiring to be involved in the music industry. 

In 2023, Black Lives in Music was listed by the US media giant ‘Fast Company', as one of the Top 10 Most Innovative Companies in Music alongside Tunecore, Warner and Universal Music.

Black Lives in Music now have over 100 organisational partners across the UK Music Industry.
 
Black Lives in Music commissioned a survey on the personal experience of Black music creators and industry professionals.  The survey engaged with nearly 2,000 respondents.  The ground breaking report ‘Being Black in the UK music industry’ produced key information and an insight into the experience of the Black music creators and professionals in today’s music industry. It was recently used to provide evidence at the UK Government Women and Equalities Select Committee ‘Misogyny in Music’ inquiry and formed part of the recommendations in their subsequent report. 

We published the 'Unseen Unheard' report in collaboration with Attitude is Everything on the lived experience of Black disabled Music Industry creators and professionals. Bringing together extensive survey findings and first-hand insights of intersectional prejudice.

Through research, advocacy we support the music community to act on and achieve diversity and inclusion objectives for a truly representative music industry. We work at every level in the music industry supporting organisations.

We help with the recruitment of people of colour representing senior management/board level. We use trusted diversity, equity and data capture.

We provide programmes, mentoring and support for the progression of Black, Asian and racially diverse musicians into the music industry. 

We work with orchestras and professional ensembles, universities, conservatoires, trade bodies, record labels, DSPs, local authorities, governments and more.

Name: United Record Pressing
Description: Established in 1949, United Record Pressing is North America's largest historic vinyl record pressing plant, based in Nashville, Tennessee. Independent and American-owned with a global footprint, URP offers comprehensive supply chain capabilities, pressing records for iconic artists over nearly eight decades. With over 60 presses in a 160,000-square-foot facility, URP excels in providing on-time vinyl production, quality control, continuous improvement, and sustainability excellence, with the capacity to press over 100,000 records daily. Uniquely a one-stop shop, lacquer-cutting and electroplating are handled in-house, ensuring reliable, confidential and timely delivery. With over 75 years in the industry, URP remains committed to customer success through innovation, experience, and flexibility. Visit www.URPressing.com to begin your vinyl record experience today.

Name: Universal Music Enterprises (UMe)
Description: Universal Music Enterprises (UMe) is the global catalog and special markets division of Universal Music Group. Working closely in concert with UMG’s record labels, territories and operating companies, UMe provides a frontline approach to catalog management, an emphasis on strategic marketing initiatives and creating opportunities in new technologies.

Name: MacPhail Center for Music
Description:
Mission: To transform lives and communities through exceptional music learning.

Vision: To provide students of all backgrounds and abilities access to exceptional music learning experiences through extraordinary faculty, innovative programs and integrated learning technology to create successful outcomes.

MacPhail offers the best music education in the region in 35 instruments at 132 different locations throughout the Twin Cities and statewide, serving 16,000 students annually.

Name: Midas Music
Description: Gravadora totalmente independente, que tem como objetivo principal lançar novos artistas, com propostas inovadoras e que não seguem, necessariamente, as tendências de mercado.

Name: BMG SYNC+
Description:
SYNC+ is BMG’s global music-for-media solution, bringing together Commercial Sync, Production Music, and Media Services as one integrated team. We connect media clients with world-class repertoire, unique artist partnerships, and strategic music consultancy. From licensing to bespoke compositions, SYNC+ delivers seamless, end-to-end music solutions for any creative brief.
 
As part of BMG, one of the world's largest music companies with offices in most major cities, its global reputation helps BMG Production Music secure the services of many leading musicians and songwriters composing today, adding to their catalogue of 150,000 tracks and counting. 
 
Add to this their music consultants and AI technology, alongside synch and bespoke departments, and BMG is perfectly placed to provide a complete music service to support your next production. 
 
No matter what style of music you’re looking for, BMGPM almost certainly has a track that can help you better connect and emotionally engage with your audience. 
 
Elevate your next project with BMG Production Music.

Name: DE NINGUNA MANERA
Description:
Entrevistas y actualidad musical. Cantera de emergentes e iniciativas sociales y culturales.
Plasmar la dificultad de alimentarse de las pasiones y, al mismo tiempo, apostar todo a ellas.

Name: Finessed Media, Inc.
Description:
Finessed Media is a New York City based start-up focused on developing content in all things music. The company was founded in January 2020 with the mission to provide resources for a worldwide audience interested in making it in the music industry in any capacity.

Our contributors spotlight music and stories of artists, A&R reps, DJs, music tech executives, radio hosts, and more to speak on their experiences and share insight for others to learn from. These stories are provided via videos, online lessons, news updates, and events.

The Finessed community has grown into a global audience for its work in promoting all genres and for providing a platform for all aspiring music industry entrepreneurs.

Name: Universal Music Group Nashville
Description: Universal Music Group Nashville is a music company based out of 60 Music Square East, Nashville, Tennessee, United States.

Name: In De Goot Entertainment
Description:
In De Goot Entertainment launched in 1993 as a promotions and management company and quickly became one of the premiere leaders in both fields. Over time, the company, founded by industry veteran Bill McGathy, has evolved into a marquee management company overseeing the careers of artists running the gamut of the rock 'n roll genre. In De Goot currently represents a wide range of artists including multi-platinum rock act Shinedown, Grammy award winning artist and rapidly ascending stars, Halestorm, and international stars Biffy Clyro. Expanding their repertoire outside of hard rock, IDG has also made its mark in the alternative / mainstream / pop scene with hitmakers Neon Trees, 3x Grammy nominated Highly Suspect, along with developing acts Spirit Animal, Slothrust, and more. In De Goot Entertainment in recent years has expanded into the United Kingdom to establish an international presence for both the company and their roster. The company is also actively involved in the touring business with the establishment of the Carnival of Madness Tour.


OUR ROSTER:

HALESTORM

HIGHLY SUSPECT

SHINEDOWN

THEORY

BLACK STONE CHERRY 

BIFFY CLYRO 

SPIRIT ANIMAL 

NEW YEARS DAY

DINOSAUR PILE-UP

ROYAL REPUBLIC

Name: Le Chabada
Description: Le Chabada est une scène de musiques actuelles avec un club et une salle de concerts, c'est un lieu de création (studios Tostaky) et de formation destiné aux artistes amateurs. Ce sont aussi 7 locaux de répétition.

Name: Swervnation
Description:
Swervnation is a hip hop record label from Chicago founded by Dreadock, it was created to support and help new rappers to have a voice and an outlet through their musical career. 

The record label team has Dreadrock as CEO and Tamille Baker for Public relations. Tamille, who holds an MBA and a Master's in Education, has been giving her support for multiple organizations giving back and speaking to teens across the Chicago area.

Name: Naistro
Description: Background music tailored to every industry, transforming brand experiences across the Middle East and beyond

Name: Triple 8 Management
Description: Founded on 08/08/08, Triple 8 Management has grown operations to encompass more than 30 full-time staff. Triple 8 takes great pride in having a highly favorable personnel-to-artist ratio, with a dedicated staff overseeing artist management, tour, social, and digital marketing and radio promotion. Triple 8 artists have achieved every point of success – millions of albums sold; billions of streams; a myriad of award distinctions and nominations, including GRAMMYs, GMAs, ACMs, CMAs, AMAs, EMMYs, CMTs, iHeart Music Awards and more; and No. 1 chart-topping success dozens of times at Country radio alone, as well as Pop, Rock, Hot AC, Alternative and AAA radio formats. Triple 8 has done this with major labels and indie labels, as well as for an artist's self-release. Triple 8 also currently represents five music producers that themselves have garnered an additional seven GRAMMYs. Triple 8 has also entered a strategic partnership with The Orchard, to create Triple Tigers Records, a label imprint focused on Country music. Since its inception, Triple Tigers has celebrated 10 out of 13 songs that went to radio getting to #1, and 13 out of 14 being certified gold, platinum and better (Russell Dickerson and Scotty McCreery) all going to No. 1 on all country radio charts – unprecedented in the history of Country music.

Name: BeatConnect
Description: Let's make music together

Name: Asian Fake
Description:
Asian Fake was founded as an independent label by Filippo Palazzo and Yuri Ferioli. 
Since the beginning the artistic direction is lead by the multiplatinum producing duo Frenetik&Orang3.

We are constantly looking for different points of view and proposing new paths over the contemporary music panorama. 
We avoid boundaries and we embrace diversity as a value. 
We do believe in encouraging as many people as possible to listen, to observe and to experiment. 
In one word: to discover.

Name: Westwood Entertainment
Description: Empresa de Management de artistas nacionales e internacionales fundada en México.

Name: Festival Production
Description:
Festival Production, société productrice de spectacles et organisatrice du Lovely Brive Festival depuis 2017. 
Lovely Brive Festival est un festival féminin et familial, élu "meilleur Festival de musiques actuelles" pour les jauges inférieures à 60 000 festivaliers 2022. Un Festival urbain, familial qui se tient tous les ans fin juillet. Il accueille 50 000 festivaliers sur 4 soirs.
Date 2026 : du 16 au 19 juillet.

Name: Levine Music
Description:
Levine Music, the Washington DC region’s preeminent center for music education, is a welcoming community where children and adults find lifelong inspiration and joy through learning, performing, listening to, and participating with others in music.

Levine’s core values, excellence and opportunity, infuse everything we do. Our distinguished faculty offers a broad and well-rounded curriculum that provides a strong musical foundation for students of different ages, abilities, and interests. We strive to make Levine education available to everyone. Hundreds of our students receive substantial scholarship assistance; many hundreds more receive free instruction through outreach programs.

Name: American Music & Sound
Description: American Music & Sound (AM&S) is a leading independent US distributor of Pro Audio, Musical Instruments, and Music Creation Products from the world's finest manufacturers including AeroWave (Ocean Way Audio), Allen & Heath, BASSBOSS, CAD, Focusrite, Fostex, Glorious, Hercules, Kurzweil, Lake People, Modal Electronics, Nord, Novation, PlayDifferently, Reloop, Studiologic, Violectric, and Xone.

Name: Slip-N-Slide Records
Description:
Recognized by many as the record label that truly positioned Miami on the map, Slip-N-Slide Records has put out some of the industry’s biggest hits. With such artists as Trina (a.k.a "The Diamond Princess"), Rick Ross and Plies, also on the label, it’s no wonder why Slip-N-Slide has become synonymous with cutting edge stars and chart-topping music.

Slip-N-Slide and its artists have been recognized in local, regional and national press throughout the last two decades. The label has reached such accolades as the Miami Award’s "Top Independent Record Label" and the Source’s #1 Independent Record Label in the state of Florida. Not to mention, the SNS family has ushered in new talent that includes: Teenear, Mike Smiff, Sebastian Mikael, F$O, Swazy, Babii J & Tyte.

Name: Music Declares Emergency
Description: In July 2019, Music Declares Emergency launched our declaration of a Climate and Ecological Emergency, from the UK music industry. Signed by all the leading major and independent labels, key business organisations, high profile artists and thousands of individual music industry professionals, the declaration represents the commitment of the UK music industry (and many global music industry supporters) to tell the truth about the climate emergency, transform our businesses to reduce emissions, promote social justice and lobby governments for the necessary systemic changes needed to preserve all life on earth.

Name: Overton Park Shell
Description: Established in 1936, the historic Overton Park Shell presents a series of free concerts for Memphis and the surrounding communities every year. Our mission is building community through music and education, finding common ground in a diverse audience.

Name: UKNY Music Ltd
Description: With access to the world’s very best musicians and performers, UKNY Music creates captivating and memorable events with music and entertainment from the biggest names in the business. From intimate parties to distinctive corporate events and outstanding festivals, we use our enviable industry contacts and professional knowledge to produce once-in-a-lifetime experiences you will never forget. UKNY Music’s close relationships with international musicians, pop stars, DJs and entertainers means we make things happen, offering a premium service that you simply won’t find anywhere else.

Name: Epitome Music
Description: 5,500+ unique, exclusive tracks. Genres include Epic Orchestral, Cinematic Trailer Music, Sports Themes, Lofi Hip Hop, Lofi Jazz, Electronica Hybrids, Future Bass, Rock, Metal, Minimal Tension Underscore, and World Music. Contact us for alt mixes and stems. Epitome Music controls 100% on the master and publishing side. All tracks are exclusively controlled in perpetuity. One-stop.

Name: GMEM
Description:
Le GMEM, fondé en 1976 par le compositeur Georges Boeuf, est labellisé Centre national de création
musical depuis 1997. Implanté à Marseille dans la région Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, ses missions sont
définies dans un cahier des charges du Ministère de la Culture et de la Communication et reposent sur la
production de la création musicale, sa diffusion, sa transmission et ses recherches.

Name: Your Army
Description:
Your Army was founded in 2007 with a desire to break and deliver for the artists we believe in. Your Army now works the best in credible music from across the indie and major label sectors and has offices in London and Los Angeles. Our services include Radio Plugging, TV Plugging, PR, Club Promotion and Digital Marketing. The Your Army Group also includes Minds On Fire Publishing.

Your Army promote the music of Disclosure, Dave, Christine & The Queens, Sam Smith, Major Lazer, Justice, London Grammar, Bicep, Jax Jones, LF System, Peggy Gou, The Chemical Brothers, Everything Everything, RÜFÜS DU SOL, Depeche Mode, Duke Dumont, The Ezra Collective, Barry Can't Swim, George Fitzgerald, Maya Jane Coles, Gorgon City, Nia Archives and The Blessed Madonna, amongst others.

Name: Tape Op
Description: Our subtitle says it best: The Creative Music Recording Magazine. Tape Op is about learning how to make great recordings with whatever tools you have access to. Tape Op interviews engineers, producers and musicians. We sit down and we talk.

Name: The Phoenix Symphony
Description:
The Phoenix Symphony is Arizona’s largest performing arts organization and one of the state’s most important cultural assets. In addition to performing traditional and modern repertoire in the fall and spring in Symphony Hall and around the Valley, its world-class musicians are actively engaged in the community thanks to generous foundation, corporation, and individual support. The Symphony is strengthened by collaborating with renowned guest conductors and artists. The core mission of The Phoenix Symphony is to provide the joy of live music as a catalyst for discovery, knowledge, compassion, and connection. Annually, orchestra members empower more than 120,000 students through education and partnerships and create opportunities for deeper connection for tens of thousands of adults experiencing homelessness, in Alzheimer’s care facilities, in hospitals and in hospice.

To learn more, please visit phoenixsymphony.org

Name: Ooka Radio
Description: Its a honour for me to introduce you to Ooka Radio,an innovative branded in-store radio revolution for retail outlets which provides a technology platform that allows you to manage “The Music Content” centrally from one dashboard. It is time for 'Your private Branded Radio',It is truly backed by the unimaginable depths of a music bank of 3,00,000 plus non copyright musical tracks .OOKA Radio will usher in an era of private entertainment for retail shops, malls, corporate offices, institutions, hotels, restaurants, pubs, salons, gymnasiums, health centers and more. Unbelievably fresh music content churned by some of the biggest names and icons of the musical industry is the hallmark of OOKA Radio.. We do customize content delivery for music messaging to engage customers with a dedicated team to conceptualize, design & produce content on a day-to-day basis for your brand.

Name: Soulection
Description:
The sound of tomorrow, today.

Soulection is a record label, radio show and niche collective of creative music makers worldwide. Based out of Los Angeles, CA, Soulection broadcasts to a worldwide audience and procures the finest tunes via Beats 1 on Apple Radio.

Listen to Soulection Radio:
Saturday's 6 PM LA | 9 PM NY | 2 AM LDN https://music.apple.com/us/curator/soulection/993271379

Soulection Tracklists:
https://soulectiontracklists.com/

Previous Episodes:
https://soundcloud.com/soulection

Name: MUSICSTYLING
Description:
Musicstyling is the world’s leading sonic branding consultancy. Our team delivers hand-crafted, unique soundtracks for the world’s most distinctive brands. Whether providing sonic branding for a luxury hotel, exclusive restaurant or a boutique spa, we further elevate a brand’s environment by providing guests with a unique auditory experience with our bespoke music solutions.  
 
With offices in the UK, Los Angeles, Miami, Dubai, Shanghai and Hong Kong, Musicstyling’s music curation can be heard at over 2,000 individual locations for our partner brands including AccorHotels, Renaissance Hotels, W Hotels, Marriott, Four Seasons, InterContinental, Mandarin Oriental, Radisson, Jumeirah, Peninsula, Ritz Carlton, Raffles and more.
 
For more information please visit www.musicstyling.com.

Name: Black Box
Description:
Black Box is a modern marketing agency designed for the music industry. We help our clients develop engaged audiences through marketing, partnerships, and branding.
 
We create custom solutions for labels, publishers, managers, and artists with a digital-first mindset and expertise in project management.
 
Our approach is simple: by knowing yourself and your fans, you build your business.

Launched in 2014, Black Box is based in Los Angeles, CA and Nashville, TN.

Name: Sons em Trânsito
Description:
A Sons em Trânsito é uma empresa sediada em Aveiro e que se dedica ao agenciamento, produção de espectáculos e gestão de carreiras artísticas.

Com quinze anos de história, cerca de 500 espectáculos produzidos por ano e tendo já organizado concertos em mais de 50 países, a SET é neste momento uma referência de qualidade e prestigio a nível nacional e internacional. Orgulhamo-nos de representar alguns dos principais artistas portugueses, bem como alguns dos mais interessantes artistas internacionais da actualidade.

Name: Strymon
Description:
Damage Control Engineering began in 2004, founded by three next-level engineers who had grown tired of working for big companies. Tube-driven effects like the Glass Nexus and the original TimeLine delay followed soon after, quickly earning kudos for both their innovative analog circuits and killer DSP and sound design.

Strymon officially began in 2009 with the launch of the all-analog OB.1 compressor pedal, and it’s been a whirlwind of activity ever since. Many Strymon products have redefined or even created entirely new market segments over the years, with products like BigSky, TimeLine, Mobius, Zuma, Flint, El Capistan and Volante becoming household names the world over.

Our goal is to empower musicians with technology that feels effortless – with feature-rich products that are easy to use and sound amazing right out of the box, allowing you to make YOUR music quicker and better than ever. We sweat the little stuff so that you don’t have to, refining the products we make to ensure that you’ll be delighted to use them for as long as you’re making music. We hope you’ll stick around and keep an eye on us, as there is always more to come!

Name: Festival Printemps de Pérouges
Description:
Festival de Musique, Créé en 1995 , Le printemps de Pérouges est devenu en 25 ans un rendez-vous culturel incontournable de la région Rhône-Alpes. 

Le Printemps de Pérouges a tissé des relations privilégiées, de confiance et d’échange avec de nombreuses 
entreprises de l’Ain et du Rhône. Une centaine en 2019.

La satisfaction de nos partenaires nous assure encore cette année un engagement fort et un taux de renouvellement des partenariats et mécénats supérieur à 97 %. 

Chaque entreprise peut choisir la formule adaptée à ses envies : Styles Musicaux, Lieux, Réceptifs, Partenariat ou Mécénat ,..

Name: Music Australia
Description:
A Voice For All Music

Music Australia is the new name for the Music Council of Australia – advancing all aspects of music across the country. 

Music Australia is the only organisation in Australia devoted to music in its entirety. We are a 50-member national umbrella body with activities spanning education, community and the professional industry. We deliver campaigns, information, resources, sector networking, community engagement, a national school music participation program, and demonstration projects.  

Our members include nominees of major national music organisations, and experienced individuals drawn from all areas of music. Our membership structure includes representation from a broad range of musical genres, the various levels of music education, and the many ways of performing, recording and disseminating music. 

Our school music program Music: Count Us In reaches more than 2,000 schools and 500,000 students across Australia, and provides professional development in music to thousands of teachers.

Name: CMJ
Description:
CMJ connects music fans and music industry professionals with the best in new music through interactive media, live events and print. 

CMJ.com offers a digital music discovery service, information resources, and community to new music fans, professionals, and artists. 

CMJ Events produces the legendary CMJ Music Marathon, the largest and longest-running music industry event of its kind.

The weekly music business trade magazine CMJ New Music Report is the primary source for exclusive charts of non-commercial and college radio airplay and independent and trend-forward retail sales.

Name: Nashville  Music Guide
Description:
To music people in Nashville & around the world it is known that the NMG is “publicizing singers, musicians & writers to Music Row & beyond,” as each issue declares on its cover. Billy Dee was the first entertainer to appear on the cover, along with a feature on bluegrass legend Bill Monroe, the NMG's premier print edition appeared in Oct, 1995. 

Under the founders, Dan Wunsch & Brad Fischer, the NMG profiled current & future stars like Steel Magnolia, Keith Urban, Warren Brothers, Kimberly Dahme & Amanda Williams, also top Music Row & radio execs. including Scott Borchetta, Ken Kragen, Pat Higdon & Rod Essig.

Years later, Dan met another entrepreneur with a passion for country music named Randy Matthews. Matthews & Wunsch ran into each other from time to time at showcases & struck up a friendship. Eventually, Wunsch revealed that he wanted to sell NMG & Randy saw an opportunity to invest in his own passion for country music &  Nashville. Matthews made the major investment of purchasing NMG in 2010.

Now, the NMG has become the most widely read music magazine in Music City, & its Website is ranked No. 2 of more than 21 Million sites on Google under the category Nashville music. Best of all, NMG doesn’t just promote & write about the tiny number of artists & writers who have major-label deals or staff songwriter contracts. It has always helped the thousands of lesser known Nashville singers, players & writers with little recognition.

PARMA’s labels feature work by artists such as Grammy winner Richard Stoltzman, Pulitzer Prize winner Lewis Spratlan, renowned session and live drummer Steve Gadd, Pete Townshend of The Who, Pixar/Randy Newman orchestrator Jonathan Sacks, legendary bassist Eddie Gomez, jazz great Chick Corea, and New York Philharmonic concertmaster Glenn Dicterow, among others.

FAT continues to be an artist-friendly label and has a unique business model of signing bands to one record deals. Name: Antwerp Symphony Orchestra
Description:
The Antwerp Symphony Orchestra is the symphony orchestra of Flanders and Belgium and is based in the Queen Elisabeth Hall in Antwerp. Under the baton of Honorary Conductor Philippe Herreweghe, Conductor Emeritus Jaap van Zweden, and many international guest conductors, the orchestra wants to move and inspire a large and diverse audience through top-level concert experiences. Starting in September 2026, Marc Albrecht will assume the role of chief conductor of the Antwerp Symphony Orchestra. Before this official appointment, he will introduce himself to the Antwerp audience twice in the season of 2025-2026.
 
Thanks to its own series of concerts in large venues, the Antwerp Symphony Orchestra occupies a unique position in Flanders. The Antwerp Symphony Orchestra has also been a guest of some major foreign concert halls: the Musikverein and Konzerthaus in Vienna, the Festspielhaus in Salzburg, the Amsterdam Concertgebouw, the Suntory Hall and the Bunka Kaikan Hall in Tokyo, the Philharmonie of Cologne and Munich, the Palace of Art in Budapest and the National Grand Theatre of Beijing. International concert tours through Europe and Asia are a constant item on the yearly calendar. 

Alongside its regular concerts, the orchestra attaches great value to developing educational and social projects, offering children, youngsters, and people with different social backgrounds the opportunity to get acquainted with the symphony orchestra from close quarters.

The Antwerp Symphony Orchestra collaborates with major classical music labels and several of the orchestra's CDs received acclaim by the professional press.

Name: Young Classical Artists Trust (YCAT)
Description:
The Young Classical Artists Trust (YCAT) is dedicated to empowering and championing the next generation of classical musicians. For 40 years our purpose has been to discover, nurture and support exceptional early career professionals, easing their transition from talented students to established performers pursuing successful careers that make a lasting impact in the world of classical music.

For a young musician, taking that first step into a performing career has never been more difficult. Artists are faced with ever increasing challenges when pursuing successful careers. Every year, hundreds of aspiring graduating musicians find themselves confronted with stark decisions about the realities of life as a professional performer. 

Building and sustaining creative and fulfilling career pathways, in which talented young musicians can continue to learn, develop and flourish, has been at the heart of our charitable mission for 40 years.

YCAT has been instrumental in the success of over 130 gifted musicians including prominent UK international artists such as Ian Bostridge CBE, Alison Balsom OBE, Joanna MacGregor CBE, and the renowned Belcea, Doric & Heath String Quartets. We've also supported 45 winners and finalists of the BBC Young Musician of the Year Competition,  such as Martin James Bartlett, Jess Gillam, and Sheku Kanneh-Mason. 

Our approach is simple – artist first. For every exceptionally talented artist selected for our 3-5 year programme of support, we develop a sustainable career pathway and strategy, opening the doors to opportunities they need to be seen and heard in an ultra-competitive, international market.

Name: Bethel Woods Center for the Arts
Description:
Bethel Woods Center for the Arts inspires, educates and empowers individuals through the arts and humanities by presenting a diverse selection of culturally-rich performances, popular artists, and community and educational programming. 

Located 90 miles north-west of New York City in the Sullivan Catskills, at the site of the 1969 Woodstock festival in Bethel, NY, the lush 800-acre campus includes a Pavilion Stage amphitheater with seating for 15,000, an intimate 440-seat indoor Event Gallery, the award-winning Museum at Bethel Woods and a Conservatory for arts education programming. 

Through the in-depth study and exhibition of the social, political, and cultural events of the 1960s, as well as the preservation of the historic site of the Woodstock Music and Art Fair, Bethel Woods educates individuals about the issues and lessons of the decade while inspiring a new generation to contribute positively to the world around them. 

The 501c3 nonprofit organization relies on the generous support of individuals, corporations, and foundations to develop and sustain programs that improve the quality of life in the region and beyond.

Name: Rat Sound Systems, Inc
Description:
Rat Sound Systems, Inc, predominately known within the industry as Rat Sound or Reliable Audio Technology, has been in business since 1980 and has had the honor of serving many high profile clients
including Coachella Festival, Paramount Studios, Macy’s, The Pomona Fox Theater, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Pearl Jam, R.E.M, and many others. The company maintains its corporate headquarters forty miles north of Los Angeles in Camarillo, CA from a spacious 20,000 square foot facility for both operations and logistics.

Rat Sound is comprised of three key departments: Rentals, Sales and Installations. Each department is individually managed under the direction of Dave Rat, a veteran of the industry and long time contributor of product innovation and design.

The Rental department at Rat Sound provides sound system equipment rentals for large format tours, corporate events and festivals; With over ten million dollars in equipment inventory, Rat Sound is one of the top five rental and touring companies internationally and owns the largest inventory of L-Acoustics K-1 and K2 loudspeakers.

In 2008, President Dave Rat also licensed out his own designs in the form of a joint venture with
EAW. EAW's new award winning MicroWedge series of monitor wedges.

The Sales Department provides retail sales services to an international customer base offering audio, video, lighting and proprietary components from over 200 manufacturers with competitive pricing, expedient shipping and world class customer service.

The Installation Department  provides both design/build and bid/build services for a national customer base including houses of worship, performance venues, and educational institutions. 

The greatest asset to Rat Sound is the group of highly trained and expert employees. It employs more than thirty dedicated professionals and offers one of the most experienced staff found within our industry.

Name: Sonic Guild Colorado
Description:
Sonic Guild's mission is simple: building communities to support the creation and performance of of exceptional local music. But behind its simplicity lies great significance. The music industry, always a hard environment for any artist to make it, is only becoming more challenging. Yet the depth and breadth of incredible music being made in Colorado communities is better than ever.

It is the dedication, hard work, creativity and hustle of these artists that inspire us to support this music. We believe that a city is built on the work of its creators. And that unless a community comes together to support those who create, especially when macro economic forces are making it harder and harder for bands to exist, let alone thrive, then we will move from cities of creators to cities of consumers.

Strong, local arts of all kinds are vital to the health of our communities. Operas, symphonies, theaters, ballet and other art forms have been supported for generations. Now it is time to step up and support the music that is our lifeblood. The music that moves us that is being created today. Black Fret presents that opportunity for two cities today: Austin, Texas; Seattle, Washington; and the front range of Colorado.

Our goal is to create a global network of connected communities, all supporting their local music economies. And in the process of creating this network, provide opportunities for our Sonic Guild bands to travel between cities, playing bigger gigs and being paid for shows they would not have had the opportunity to otherwise. When more people hear and see the music, the musician is more successful.

Name: Preservation Hall Foundation
