Name: Positive Feedback
Description:
With offices in Sydney & Melbourne, Positive Feedback is a PR, communications and creative partnerships agency specialising in music and culture. Our team of passionate publicists, creative producers and brand consultants pride themselves on making cool things happen for our carefully curated roster.

Founded in 2008 as a boutique PR agency, we have observed the fast evolving nature of the media landscape and have been consistently creating new and progressive ways to help share our clients stories in changing times. Known for our consideration, care and creativity, our clever team develop and implement long-term, wholistic, global publicity, brand, creative and communication strategies across traditional, new and undiscovered platforms for artists and brands that we believe in.

We launched our Creative + Brand Partnerships arm of the company in 2017 as a way to meet the needs of a fast-changing media landscape and the new ways in which artists are being discovered.
 
Visual storytelling and creative partnerships is at the cornerstone of this arm of the business. Our collective backgrounds and experience across editorial, brand partnership, fashion and agency life best place us to play creative cupid between a range of creators including stylists, photographers, brands and artists and a range of areas including technology, fashion and lifestyle.

IMAGE CREATION: Conceptualising, producing, and managing creative direction of photo/video shoots locally and internationally with the intention for placement across local and international titles.

ASSET CREATION: Strategy + creative direction, press shots, music videos, artworks, social media shoots.

BRAND PARTNERSHIPS: Identifying and aligning artists and clients with the right brands and looks to establish and foster meaningful, authentic relationships with the intention. Brand strategy, authentic alignments and partnerships with brands who want to be involved long-term.

Name: Electronic Creatives
Description:
ELECTRONIC CREATIVES IS A TEAM OF MUSIC PROGRAMMERS, SHOW DESIGNERS, AND SOUND NERDS WHO DESIGN AND IMPLEMENT CUTTING EDGE SOLUTIONS FOR MUSIC PERFORMANCE.

We help professional artists enhance their musical performance through live show systems, software and hardware setups, sound design, futuristic production, and more.

Each show has unique needs, and our team is well versed in every aspect of modern live performance – from traditional playback, to on-stage triggering, to advanced MIDI routing, live vocal effects, and video or lighting sync.

We first assess the needs of the production and then decide exactly how the performance of the show will be designed. We provide an all-inclusive package including computers, sound cards, cables, controllers and road cases, and every product is supported through our team network to ensure that every show is flawless. 

Each client is provided fully trained operators and technicians for rehearsals and touring. Members of our team are blur the line between engineers and producers. We are musicians who know the lingo and language; at the same time, we are professionals at safely managing files and gear, and every one of us has a great attitude and communication skills.

Name: Looplay Music
Description:
Music gives a soul to the universe, wings to the mind, flight to the imagination and life for everything.
Join the re-evolution of Music..!

Looplay is a platform for music promotion aimed to refocus the current music business model going forward for a social concept adapted to the digital reality. Looplay has been conceived with the objective of building a new path for music, a path based on global communication. We propose not just a change in the way that music is transferred between creators and end users, but also a new understanding of intellectual property rights that allows a consistent & legal dissemination by leveraging the full potential of media technologies, marking a new stage for the next generations.

Name: Kirosen - Music Production
Description:
Hey there, we're Kirosen, a music production company based in Paris. We write music for movies, animation and advertising.

Where we come from:
Mathieu and Benjamin met each other 20 years ago, sharing the stage with their rock bands Eldia and Sheraff where they were playing guitar and drums.

Around 2010, Mathieu started an electro-rock band called Chinoi, when Benjamin launched Total Warr, toured with The Death Set and later, started his new electro project Ghoster in 2017.

In 2014, the two friends decided to write music for visual media with companies such as Havas, Hercules, Creaminal, Alter K, Audio Network, and for TV series for France TV, Disney, Gaumont, Gulli, Apple TV, Netflix, Canal+ etc.
They're comfortable in many music styles but they're specialized in electronic music and rock music.

Name: NoMadMusic
Description:
The classical, jazz and world music label NoMadMusic was founded in 2014 by Clothilde Chalot and Hannelore Guittet, with the ambition of opening up repertoires, and promoting access to music for as wide and diverse an audience as possible. 

NoMadMusic is also a publisher of digital solutions. The NomadPlay application is the result of our investment in research and development. 

Label distributed by PIAS - Harmonia Mundi.

Name: Gonher Instrumentos Musicales
Description:
Gonher inició en 1956 como una empresa dedicada a la venta de discos, innovando por primera vez en México con las famosas cabinas para escuchar la música a elegir. Era justo cuando iniciaban los televisores, y se fabricaban sobre diseño los muebles para las TV, tornamesas y radios, llamados en aquella época consolas. En los 60’s se añade la venta de instrumentos musicales y en los 70’s inicia la academia de música, especializándose en aquella época en el órgano, la novedad del momento.

A finales de los 80’s, Gonher aprovechó la apertura comercial de fronteras entre Estados Unidos y México e incursionó en el mercado local trayendo a los torreonenses la oportunidad de acercarse a una gran variedad de productos musicales.

Desde sus primeros años Gonher se caracterizó por su capacidad para desarrollar, diseñar, instalar proyectos de ingeniería de audio. Actualmente Gonher cuenta con un departamento completo para el desarrollo, diseño e implementación de proyectos de audio, video e iluminación en teatros, hoteles, edificios, discotecas, restaurantes, etc.

Gonher cuenta con academias de música, las cuales apoyan la vocalización artística de la comunidad, con maestros altamente certificados y de amplia experiencia que enseñan guitarra acústica y eléctrica, bajo, batería, piano, órgano, saxofón y otros instrumentos.

Más de cincuenta años han pasado desde que Gonher inició su actividad comercial. Menos de la mitad de ese tiempo se necesitó para convertir a esta empresa en líder en la fabricación, importación y venta de instrumentos musicales y equipos de audio profesionales. Es así como Gonher ha logrado satisfacer las necesidades y expectativas de miles de aficionados y profesionales de la música, poniendo a su alcance una gran diversidad de productos y marcas, y lo más importante, estimulando y fomentando con orgullo la pasión que comparte por la música con miles de personas en todo el país.

Name: Festival Les Escales
Description:
⇒ LE PROJET MUSICAL

Le Festival Les Escales, est un festival urbain situé en centre ville, sur le port de St-Nazaire.  qui propose une programmation éclectique tournée vers les musiques actuelles : pop, rock, soul, world ou encore électro, entre têtes d'affiches,  nouvelles scène et découvertes musicales. 
Chaque année, nous proposons un focus musical sur un territoire ou une ville.  
Un festival à dimension humaine qui s'appuie sur les forces vives du territoire et qui collabore étroitement avec le tissu associatif local.

⇒ QUELQUES REPÈRES

Ce festival bien ancré dans sa ville, représente une valeur ajoutée indéniable à l’attractivité touristique et économique du territoire avec pour objectif d’attirer près de 50 000 spectateurs sur 3 jours. Un succès qui s’inscrit dans la durée et qui repose sur une programmation exigeante au service d’un projet atypique et unique porté par une centaine de bénévoles et une équipe professionnelle de 7 personnes !

⇒ LE DISPOSITIF SCÉNIQUE

Les quatre scènes permettent de programmer un nombre important de groupe et d’artistes. La scène principale (scène du Port – 20 000 spectateurs) est consacrée aux têtes d’affiche de notoriété internationale, la scène B (Scène du Parc Expo – 8000 spectateurs) aux artistes de notoriété et aux artistes nouvelle scène et les deux autres scènes (Scène Estuaire – 4000 spectateurs et scène du Bosquet – 2000 spectateurs) sont consacrées aux artistes du focus.

⇒ L’IMPACT ECONOMIQUE
Depuis 2016, l’impact économique du festival s’est considérablement développé auprès des commerces du bassin de la Carène puisqu’il représente environ 1 450 000 €. 

⇒ Pour plus d'informations :
http://www.festival-les-escales.com/le-festival/presentation/
http://www.festival-les-escales.com/le-festival/lassociation/

⇒ Nous suivre sur les réseaux 
https://fr-fr.facebook.com/Festival.les.escales
https://www.instagram.com/festivallesescales
https://twitter.com/les_escales

Her idea was to plan events that might be different and exciting for her private students to attend, being held at interesting – often outdoor – locations.

Name: CONNECT Music Licensing Service Inc.
Description: CONNECT Music Licensing (CONNECT), representing the Major Record Labels and their affiliates, acts as a non-exclusive agent to administer licenses to third parties in Canada for the reproduction of sound recordings, and the reproduction and broadcast of music videos on behalf of its members.

Name: TEKTONIKmusic.org
Description:
TEKTONIK, led by Grammy award-winning sonic architect Dana Leong, is a collective uniting artists across multiple mediums from music to visual and culinary.  After Leong's family was affected by the 2011 natural disaster in Japan, he started the initiative using music & art as a storytelling vehicle to remediate negative impact on people and geographies affected by disaster.  With a focus on the healing power of music & art, TEKTONIK music mixes new electronic beats and visuals with ancient traditional art for a one of a kind uplifting sensory experience.  Their content has been seen by over 100 million viewers and featured with organizations such as Alibaba, TEDxShanghai, IPCN TV, Save the Children, United Nations, Four Seasons, UBS, The Rubin Museum in New York City, Shanghai Fashion Week & Art Festival and World Economic Forum.
 
The core quartet is made of Dana Leong from China and Japan - cello, composer, Neel Murgai from India - sitar, Sameer Gupta from India - tabla, and DJ Val-Inc from Haiti – turntables & electronics.  Their upcoming album features appearances by artists from over 10 countries, including Grammy Nominated vocalist Keali’i Reichel from Hawaii.  Their multimedia collaborations include presenting with Android Jones (Animator with George Lucas, Grateful Dead, Bassnectar), National Geographic Photographer Mattias Klum, and Glowing Bulbs Visual Arts Collective.  The mission is to create global harmony and increase bandwidth for ultimate happiness.

Name: Quatuor Zahir
Description:
Née en 2015, cette jeune formation se produit déjà dans de nombreux festivals, en France et dans le monde mais c’est en 2017 que le Quatuor Zahir se distingue en remportant le 9ème Concours International de Musique de chambre d’Osaka (Japon), acquérant ainsi une reconnaissance sur la scène internationale. Ils ont depuis été invités au Wigmore Hall de Londres, à la Philharmonie de Paris et au Konzerthaus de Vienne, ainsi qu’aux Folles Journées de Nantes, au Festival de Radio France à Montpellier, aux festivals des forêts et de Sully, à l’Acropolis de Nice ou encore au Toppan Hall à Tokyo.

Issu du Conservatoire de Paris où il a suivi les conseils du Quatuor Ébène et du Quintette Moraguès, le Quatuor Zahir est actuellement en résidence à la Fondation Singer-Polignac. Parrainé par le pianiste Jean- François Zygel depuis son passage sur France 2 dans l’émission « La Boîte à Musique », il est également lauréat du concours international de musique de chambre de la FNAPEC 2016 et a remporté les médailles d’or aux Manhattan, Vienna et Berliner International Music Competitions de 2019. Après un premier disque en 2018, le Quatuor entame une collaboration discographique avec le label Aparté et produit « L’Heure bleue » à paraître en 2024. On retrouve dans ces enregistrements les valeurs qui unissent cet ensemble : le partage d’une même sensibilité, d’une exigence aiguë et le désir de renouveler le paysage musical.

À l’image du héros romanesque du Zahir de P. Coelho qui part en quête d’un idéal romantique, ces quatre saxophonistes ont à cœur de faire évoluer le genre du quatuor. Que ce soit en interprétant le répertoire original, grâce à leurs rencontres avec de nombreux compositeurs comme Bruno Mantovani, Fabien Waksman, Ichiro Nodaïra et Graciane Finzi ou en collaborant avec de nombreux artistes : Félicien Brut, Jean-Charles Richard, Jorge Gonzales Buajasan, Adèle Charvet, Les Chanteurs d’Oiseaux, ces musiciens montrent là leur curiosité et leur créativité.

We do Audio Art, producing artists, creating music and sounds.

Introducing Black Dog Music Partners

Black Dog Music Partners is an accelerator for the music tech industry.

Name: Club Class Music Group
Description:
Club Class Music Group is an accomplished artist management company, record label, and publishing company that offers personal and business management services to music artists across the globe. Music is our passion; leadership is our business. 

The management company was established in March 2006 following 10 years of successfully promoting over 1000 large events and festivals plus owning and running venues.

Our team has many years of experience in the music industry in different areas of the business allowing us to service our clients fully across the breadth of the industry.

We offer a wide range of services to Artists, DJs, and Producers, strategically enhancing and developing their careers across all music platforms.

Our management services provided include major record label deals, publishing agreements, international DJ touring, record label management and distribution, licensing agreements, production and producer management, remix management, online and social networking management, and the everyday administration of all client business affairs and accounting services.

We have built up an extensive worldwide network of business associates and relationships which enable us to cater to all our artist's needs within the music industry and beyond. If you feel we have the right skill set for your career and would like to have an informal chat about managing your career, please don’t hesitate to reach out and speak to one of the team.

Club Class Music Management
The Cross Records
The Box Publishing 

Artists: Chuckie, CYA, Genesi, Gok Wan, HOLA!, James Hype, Meduza, MistaJam, Nancie, Sebjak & Tita Lau.

Name: Cleveland Repertory Orchestra
Description: The Cleveland Repertory Orchestra, founded by conductor Matthew Salvaggio, is made up of talented musicians seeking to explore the breadth of the orchestral repertoire with an emphasis on lesser-known masterworks and new and historically excluded voices.

Name: Wide Eyed Entertainment
Description:
It’s all about protecting the art. Headquartered just behind our pool-side studio, Wide Eyed Entertainment is a collective that embodies authentic voices and inspired minds. Made up of eclectic creatives, musical visionaries and accomplished industry professionals, we are determined to transform the music business and culture. 

Wide Eyed Entertainment is an artist/producer/songwriter management and publishing company founded by Beka and Benjamin Tischker. We currently represent artists from various genres including Julia Michaels, Becky G, A.CHAL, Di Genius, Skylar Stecker, Elena Rose, and Luka Kloser and songwriter/producers such as Nate Campany, Kyle Shearer, Chris Lyon, Jenna Andrews, and Lindy Robbins. In January 2018, Wide Eyed Entertainment formed a  joint venture with Pulse Music Group to publish artists/writers Tobi Lou, Avena Savage, Todd Spadafore, Noel Zancanella, Aldae and Solly and more.

Name: 8VA Music Consultancy
Description:
Public Relations, Marketing, & Strategic Consulting for Top Classical Musicians & Performing Arts Organizations

If you are a classical musician, you know the musical notation "8va" as "all' ottava", meaning "at the octave". This symbol, without a second thought, makes us play a note an octave higher. For our company, the name 8VA (pronounced āt vē ā) is more than a wink to fellow musicians. We only take on musicians, organizations, and projects we believe in, and by pitching their amazing work correctly, we elevate the work's impact. Our name is also about holding ourselves to a higher standard and about working harder (and smarter) to exceed our client’s goals.

Our team has worked on behalf of top soloists, conductors, composers, orchestras, music festivals, and other related organizations since the firm’s founding in 2012. With backgrounds in non-profit executive leadership, marketing, advertising, the record industry, public relations - and most importantly, with a deep passion for music, 8VA Music Consultancy is uniquely positioned to take your career or organization - well - up an octave.

Current clients include: Andy Akiho, Anne Akiko Meyers, Anthony McGill, Anthony Davis, Beijing Music Festival, Bravo! Vail Music Festival, Charleston Symphony, Curtis Institute, Clarion Choir, The Cliburn, Dover Quartet, Gerard Schwarz, Honens, Juilliard String Quartet, Marc-Andre Hamelin, National Children's Chorus, Rachel Barton Pine, Sandbox Percussion, Taiwan Philharmonic, and Vancouver Symphony Orchestra USA, and many more.

Name: Turner Sims
Description:
Turner Sims is the University of Southampton's music venue, with big ambitions to build an inclusive world through the joy of live music.

Audiences travel miles to experience music legends and rising stars in our 'varied and imaginative programme' (Audience Survey response).

We champion diverse talent and welcome adventurous audiences to discover new music, alongside old favourites.

Turner Sims’ intimate auditorium, outstanding acoustic and garden setting make it a favourite destination for artists and audiences alike.

Name: Paiste AG
Description: Paiste provides you with the latest information about your favorite Paiste Cymbals, Gongs, Drums and Sounds. Paiste is the manufacturer of the highest quality handmade cymbals, gongs and other percussion instruments.

Name: YAMAIMPORT
Description: Yamaimport es representante oficial en Chile de YAMAHA para las Divisiones de Motos, Instrumentos Musicales y Audio Profesional.

Name: CH Music Productions, LLC
Description:
CH Music Productions began with a driving passion for music and the creative arts that are involved in making it. I aim to simplify the creative process for aspiring artists and musicians.

With over 10 years of experience working in the industry, I am well aware of the dismissive and avoidant tendencies that big name production houses can have toward independent artists. I commit to you that I will treat your art with the same dedication and respect with which I treat my own, because I believe in it - and you. As a fellow creator, I want nothing more than to see you succeed. People need to hear your music, and I'm here to help make that happen without breaking your bank. Lets make some art together!

Name: Orange Peel Agency
Description:
Orange Peel Agency is a Lucerne based music company founded by Kilian Mutter and Mike Walker in late 2018, with the wish to organically grow and solidify one of the most eclectic and high-quality artist rosters around. Based on many years of experience and a large network in the music business, OPA is aiming to provide a close and humane yet professional collaboration with all involved partners.

OPA’s main activities include:
- Artist Booking
- Artist Management
- Music Supervision
- Corporate & Private Event Booking

Name: Music Matters — Rotterdam
Description:
Het Nederlandse muzieklandschap zou niet hetzelfde zijn zonder Rotterdams talent. Van de hiphopscene, brassbands en gospelkoren tot indie, elektronische, klassieke en Kaapverdiaanse stijlen. In elk muzikaal straatje is er wel iets bijzonders te vinden. Music Matters verbindt de Rotterdamse muziekwereld in al haar veelzijdigheid en vormt aansluitend educatieve programma’s waarin de volgende generatie creatieve Rotterdammers zich muzikaal kan ontwikkelen en de muziekwereld leert kennen.
The Dutch music landscape would not be the same without talent from Rotterdam. From the Hip Hop scene, brass bands and gospel choirs to indie, electronic, classical and Cape Verdean styles. Every musical street in the city has something to offer. Music Matters connects the musicword in Rotterdams all its versatility in coherence with educational programs that help the next generation of creatives to develop musically and get to know the music world.

Stichting Music Matters
Maashaven Zuidzijde 1-2, 6e verdieping
3081 AE Rotterdam
010 – 244 06 89
info@musicmatters.nu

Name: AUDIOTENT LTD
Description:
Founded in 2015 with the sole purpose to help electronic music producers succeed. Headquartered in London, United Kingdom with studios based in Hereford (UK) and Vilnius (LT). 

A team of passionate individuals who love to share their knowledge and expertise in music technology. Delivering content in the form of educational videos and resources for electronic music production.

Innovation drives us forward.

Name: Label Roy Music
Description: Roy Music est un label indépendant français créé en 2005 par Rodolphe Dardalhon, Olivier Chini et Yvan Taïeb, spécialisé dans l'enregistrement sonore et l'édition musicale. Son catalogue réunit des artistes issus de genres musicaux différents, de l’électro à la folk en passant par la chanson française.

Description: Rio Music Market is a conference dedicated to the music business already consolidated in the Brazilian and international market. Throughout its editions, it brought together thousands of professionals around lectures, debates, panels and business opportunities, training musicians, producers and music professionals.

Name: Luthier
Description: Me dedico a la construcción de instrumentos musicales, especialmente guitarras clásicas, también destino parte de mi tiempo a la reparación, restauración y mantenimiento de instrumentos de cuerda pulsada, y a la docencia en Luthería.”

Name: ConForte Symphonic
Description:
ConForte Symphonic (derived from 'cosy' in Esperanto) is a symphonic orchestra aimed at good amateur musicians. Based in Zemst, the orchestra performs various projects for a wide audience, conducted by Joris Verschueren. 

ConForte Symphonic (Esperanto voor 'gezellig') is een projectorkest gericht op goede amateurmuzikanten. Met haar thuisbasis in Zemst, brengt het orkest diverse muzikale projecten voor een breed publiek, o.l.v. dirigent Joris Verschueren.

Name: Filarmonía de Madrid
Description: La Orquesta Filarmonía nace en Madrid en el año 2000 como la primera y única orquesta sinfónica profesional, de carácter y gestión exclusivamente privados del momento. A lo largo de los años realiza numerosos conciertos y actuaciones en las principales salas de España, destacando su propia Temporada en el Auditorio Nacional de Madrid, así como los conciertos dedicados a bandas sonoras de los clásicos del cine y literatura: Star Wars y Harry Potter. Durante las Navidades dedican siempre una cita a los valses y polcas de la familia Strauss con el tradicional concierto Viena en Madrid y ofrecen conciertos anuales privados para algunas empresas como SIEMENS o CASER Seguros.

Name: Ensemble Resonanz
Description: Ensemble Resonanz ranks among the outstanding chamber orchestras of our time. Its programs contextualize music from all eras. As the resident ensemble of the Elbphilharmonie, the ensemble there presents its concert series »resonanzen« and contributes regularly to the hall's festivals and education program. With the club concert series »urban string« and numerous artistic collaborations in Hamburg, the ensemble has connected classical music in the city's urban society in a way that sets standards and managed to reach out  to diverse audiences. In the center of the neighborhood of St. Pauli, the musicians run their »resonanzraum«, which has become an international model project as both rehearsal space of the ensemble and venue for classical music culture in St. Pauli. The 20-piece string ensemble is an entrepreneurial orchestra, with the musicians bearing artistic and economic responsibility as shareholders. Principal Guest Conductor is the conductor Riccardo Minasi. Based in Hamburg, the musicians also perform at leading concert halls and festivals around the world. A few weeks ago, Ensemble Resonanz was awarded the Johannes Brahms Medal in the Elbphilharmonie for outstanding services to Hamburg's musical life.

Name: Ensemble Orchestral Contemporain
Description:
Au fil des créations et des tournées en France et à l’étranger, l’EOC a su prendre une place à part dans le paysage musical. Il est reconnu comme un interprète incontournable des musiques des XXème et XXIème siècles et un acteur important de la création musicale auquel les compositeurs, toutes générations confondues, accordent leur confiance. L’EOC compte aujourd’hui plus de 700 œuvres à son répertoire dont 300 premières.

Dans la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, l’EOC s’engage également pour la médiation et la transmission en construisant avec ses partenaires locaux des projets de formation, de découverte et de création. 

Depuis février 2022, l’EOC est en résidence à l’Opéra de la ville de Saint-Étienne.

Name: Boston Baroque
Description:
North America’s first permanent Baroque orchestra.

Founded in 1973 by Music Director Martin Pearlman, Boston Baroque has garnered a global reputation for its lively, groundbreaking, emotionally-charged performances and recordings that bring early music to life for modern audiences. Boston Baroque’s orchestra is composed of some of the finest period instrumentalists performing today, and is frequently joined by the ensemble’s professional chorus and by a roster of soloists who grace the world’s most renowned concert halls and stages. The ensemble performs Baroque and Classical music using period instruments and performance techniques that reflect the time in which the music was composed.  Boston Baroque believes that Baroque and Classical music is music for all times.

Boston Baroque’s 26 acclaimed commercial recordings reach a global audience, and are frequently heard by millions on classical radio stations in North America and Europe, as well as on Boston Baroque Radio, Boston Baroque’s streaming channel. Boston Baroque’s recordings have received six GRAMMY Award Nominations: its 1992 release of Handel’s Messiah, 1998 release of Monteverdi’s Vespers of 1610, 2000 release of Bach’s Mass in B Minor, 2014 release of Monteverdi’s Il Ritorno d’Ulisse in patria (two nominations), and 2017 release of Biber’s Mystery Sonatas. In 2012, Boston Baroque became the first American orchestra to record with the highly-regarded UK audiophile label, Linn Records, following a long and fruitful relationship with the Telarc label.

Name: Millers Music
Description:
Showcasing the pinnacle of piano manufacturing and craftsmanship, our beautiful showroom in the heart of Cambridge is home to some of the most unique pianos in the world. Our collaborations with world leading manufacturers such as C.Bechstein offers a unique piano experience you can’t get anywhere else. 

Thanks to our team's expertise, having visited piano factories all around the world and our personalised showroom service, every customer who walks through our doors embarks on a unique journey the right piano for you. 

From entry level pianos and second hand instruments right the way through to concert grand pianos, there is something for everyone at Millers.

Name: BRONZE
Description:
BRONZE is an innovative audio format that enables immersive experiences for the next generation of developers, musicians, and audiences.
 
BRONZE engine is not restricted to just one playback possibility, it is fluid, intelligent, and capable of responding to external input, offering creators endless new possibilities

Name: Melbourne Youth Orchestras
Description:
Melbourne Youth Orchestras has been a leader in Victorian music education since 1967. We recognise that our heritage and alumni are integral to our future achievements as we continue to build our reputation on the solid foundation laid over our first five decades. 

Our purpose is to enrich young lives through the power of music. 

We share our passion and expertise by bringing young people together for the joy of music. We believe that music inspires young people to reach their potential, and that a commitment to excellence is the foundation for success.

We have great partnerships in place to amplify our impact, and we work tirelessly to ensure that no young learner is ever excluded based on disadvantage.

We know that the most effective teaching is always centred on learners’ needs, and that only a love of music motivates life-long learning and participation. At Melbourne Youth Orchestras, creativity is unleashed through inspiration and exploration in a vibrant learning community.

The MYO Ensemble Program, held every Saturday, enables student participation in co-curricular musical education by providing access to specialised staff, resources and facilities beyond what is available at school. 500+ young musicians grow through participation in high-calibre instrumental music ensembles, and through belonging to a musical community of practice.

Students enter the program from the age of eight, often staying until they reach tertiary level. They progress through a finely calibrated sequence of ensembles comprising two symphony orchestras, four string orchestras and three symphonic bands.  Each ensemble presents a minimum of 3 concerts annually as well as taking part in community projects and events.

The famous MYO Summer School brings 700+ young musicians together to work with some of Australia’s best conductors and tutors. Summer School includes a range of musical and social activities in a fun and collaborative atmosphere, culminating in performances at Melbourne's premier concert venues.

Name: Artist Alife Agency (AAA Talent GmbH)
Description:
Artist Alife Agency - an EMC Electronic Music Culture AG company

Name: Kavka
Description:
Kavka organiseert al jaren toonaangevende events in zijn thuisbasis aan de Oudaan of in Kavka Zappa op het Kiel. Steeds nieuwe lichtingen van organisatoren kunnen er experimenteren en realiseren hier hun projecten en ideeën. Een 150-tal vrijwilligers zorgen ervoor dat Kavka het hele jaar door kan blijven draaien.

Kavka Oudaan ligt pal in het centrum van Antwerpen en is een ontmoetingsplaats met zo'n 100.000 bezoekers per jaar.  Hier kan je feesten, repeteren, workshops volgen en deelnemen aan tal van andere activiteiten. Het imposante oude schoolgebouw ontpopte zich tot een bruisend jongerencentrum met een concertzaal, café en uiteenlopende werk- en repetitieruimtes. Daarnaast biedt Kavka eventgerelateerde workshops aan en kunnen jonge kunstenaars terecht in de exporuimte.

Kavka Zappa is is een evenementenzaal op het Kiel waar een divers aanbod aan events voor en door jongeren gerealiseerd wordt. Naast feesten en concerten biedt Zappa ook plaats aan o.a. bedrijfsevents, beurzen en recepties.

Kavka Oudaan: Oudaan 14, 2000 Antwerpen
Kavka Zappa: August Leyweg 6, 2020 Antwerpen

Met steun van Stad Antwerpen en District Antwerpen.

Thuisbasis is het Muziekcentrum in het Nationaal Muziekkwartier in Enschede, vaste speelplaatsen zijn onder andere Zwolle, Deventer en Enschede. Jan Willem de Vriend is artistiek leider en chef-dirigent sinds 2006, toen hij Jaap van Zweden opvolgde. Onder De Vriends leiding verbreedde het orkest zijn repertoire tot muziek uit vier eeuwen en maakte het een groot aantal CD-opnames voor Challenge Classics, waaronder alle symfonieën van Beethoven en Mendelssohn. 

Onder de naam The Netherlands Symphony Orchestra maakte het orkest succesvolle tournees naar onder andere Amerika, Spanje, Engeland en China. Het orkest wordt financieel gesteund door het ministerie van OCW, de Provincie Overijssel, de gemeente Enschede en diverse sponsors.

The Netherlands Symphony Orchestra is an orchestra of national allure, with international ambition and firmly embedded within the Province of Overijssel. 

Our mission: The Netherlands Symphony Orchestra is a leading cultural enterprise that contributes to the quality of society by providing eminent classical music.

From innovative digital audio workstations to awe inspiring granular synthesisers, their diverse range of sonic off erings have attracted the attention of industry leading sound designers, composers and musicians alike such as: Richard Devine, Mark Mothersbaugh & Jordan Rudess.

Tracktion have long believed in making music production accessible to the masses and offer a free, fully featured, unrestricted DAW. By empowering hundreds of thousands of aspiring music producers across the globe they have created a loyal community of passionate users from diverse backgrounds.

Name: Ace Records Ltd
Description:
Ace Records is one of the leading reissue record companies and strives to bring you great sounding, well-packaged releases. 

'Ace Records pioneered the meticulously curated, elegantly packaged reissue decades in advance of today’s boom for “salvage” labels like Soul Jazz. Digging deep in the crates to unearth lost gems of soul, rockabilly, rhythm-and-blues, and much more besides, the label delivered these treasures to the world with style and integrity. In the process, Ace has walked the line between art and business as deftly as non-retro labels like Island, Mute and Warp each did in their prime.'

Simon Reynolds (MOJO)

One way or another, it was inevitable that Ted (Carroll) would start his own record company, in the great tradition of retailers whose direct experience of their customers' purchasing habits provides a quality of market research denied to the suits in their corporate HQs. Ted's first label was called Chiswick and is remembered for such releases as the Count Bishops' Train Train and the Keys to Your Heart by the 101ers, featuring Joe Strummer, redolent of the time when the pub-rock of north and west London was starting to mutate into the full-blown punk movement.

In 1978, Carroll and his associate Roger Armstrong started a second label, called Ace, to handle reissues of recordings, many of them cherishably obscure, licensed from the original companies and repackaged with the expertise of true aficionados. It was with this project that they found lasting success. In the 30 years since Ace started out by assuaging a thirst for the sinister guitar instrumentals of Link Wray, the label has mushrooomed to encompass virtually every style of American vernacular music, from Kentucky bluegrass to northern soul and beyond, entertaining and instructing generations of listeners in the process.

Richard Williams (The Guardian)

Name: MÚSICAPARATODOS
Description:
La empresa Musicaparatodos lleva acercando la música al universo empresarial desde el año 2007. Por sus manos han pasado miles de directivos de importantes multinacionales.

¿De qué manera? A través de talleres experienciales en los que consiguen que en 1 hora grupos de 20, 50, 100 o 500 personas terminen tocando “en orquesta” una pieza musical conocida y que suena muy bien (ej: piezas clásicas como el canon de Pachelbel, canciones más modernas como alguna de los Beatles, música corporativa..). Todos los participantes tocan algún instrumento y siguiendo algunas indicaciones entre todos
arman la armonía, la melodía y el ritmo de la pieza. Luego se suman músicos profesionales que tocan con ellos. El resultado estético es impresionante y la experiencia es muy emocionante e impactante.

¿Por qué y para qué? Porque esta experiencia, además de divertida e integradora, permite poner de relieve de forma natural, siempre en clave musical, elementos del management esenciales como el trabajo en equipo, el liderazgo, la comunicación, la creatividad, la diversidad… tan presentes en la orquesta. Eso sin mencionar que sólo la música es capaz de trasladarnos al terreno de las emociones tan rápidamente…

¿En qué contexto? En un marco lúdico integrador o a la hora de trabajar las habilidades directivas

سایر فعالیتها و دورههای آموزشی موسسه فرهنگی هنری شمیم باران به شرح زیر است.

گویندگی در مراسم و مجامع عمومی، برگزاری کنسرتهای موسیقی، آموزش بازیگری و تئاتر، کارگاه های شعر و داستان نویسی، آموزش فن بیان و گویندگی، آموزش خوشنویسی و خط نستعلیق، کشف استعداد نوجوانان با استفاده از تستهای استاندارد و معتبر

Name: Quatuor Debussy
Description:
In thirty years of activity, the Debussy String Quartet has been acclaimed throughout the world on the world’s most prestigious stages: Japan, China, United States, Canada, Australia, Russia, Europe, gaining renown through regular tours on all the continents. Thirty years of evolution which have made the Quartet a key player on the international music scene: Winners of the Evian International String Quartet Competition in 1993, Victoire de la musique 1996, over thirty recordings. Today, the professional recognition of the Debussy String Quartet is indisputable.

By creating bridges with different artistic fields such as dance (Maguy Marin, Anne Teresa De Keersmaeker, Wayne Mac Gregor, Mourad Merzouki...), theater (Philippe Delaigue, Richard Brunel, Jean Lacornerie...) or even modern music (Yael Naim, Gabriel Kahane, Cocoon, Franck Tortiller, Keren Ann…), circus (Cie Circa), slam (Mehdi Krüger) and digital arts (David Gauchard), the Debussy Quartet above all defends a strong, open and lively vision of "classical" music.

The Debussy Quartet holds educational workshops and engages in outreach projects for various audiences (children, the elderly, prisoners, the sick, etc.). Their open concert with the public allow the musicians of the Quartet to share their passion for the music of yesterday and today with everyone. The musicians of the Debussy Quartet are also committed to transmitting the knowledge they received from the great masters to young quartets through their numerous interventions: as instructors in their specialized degree program at the Conservatory in Lyon, in frequent workshops, and during their Summer Academy, which is part of the Cordes en ballade chamber music festival they founded in France.

The Quatuor Debussy is supported by funding from the Ministry of Culture (DRAC Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes), the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes Regional Council and the City of Lyon. It is equally supported by the Lyon Métropole, the SPEDIDAM and the SG Auvergne Rhône Alpes.

Given the current situation in Lebanon, Beirut & Beyond is working on supporting the local scene through a series of programs, workshops, and residencies for all Lebanon-based musicians

Name: MUSIWARS
Description:
MUSIWARS is the first and only global platform in Republic of Turkiye for songwriters and composers. We provide legal protection to copyright holders with our 'Copyright Ownership Certificate,' created by integrating time-stamp technology approved by law into our system. Additionally, we offer the opportunity to promote and sell your works worldwide through our digital marketplace and support the development of your career through talent management services. At the invitation of the Republic of Turkiye Ministry of Trade and the Istanbul Chamber of Commerce, we represented the Republic of Turkey at MWC Las Vegas 2022 under the 'National Participation' category, where we were recognized as a 'National Project.'

The professional music industry is typically concentrated in metropolitan cities around the world. This situation limits equal opportunities for creators who are educated or reside outside these metropolises. MUSIWARS aims to eliminate this inequality by providing accessibility for all creators to promote and sell their works globally. Music is universal, and on this journey that started from the Republic of Turkiye, we aim to reach not only creators in Republic of Turkiye but also creators and vocal artists worldwide. Our goal is to offer equal opportunities to all talents, enabling them to promote their works in the global market and develop their careers internationally. With this vision, we aim to create a global creative community by leveraging the unifying power of music.

Name: Pstereo
Description:
Pstereo arrangeres på Marinen i Trondheim i august hvert år. Festivalen har eksistert siden 2007 og tilbyr det beste av ny norsk musikk, store kjente artister og bandene du ikke visste du likte.

Det er tre festivaldager med fire scener på festivalområdet. I tillegg samarbeider Pstereo med en rekke av byens utesteder, som arrangerer klubbkonserter i forbindelse med festivalen. På festivalens tredje dag arrangeres også en gratis familiekonsert på festivalområdet.

Men det er ikke kun musikken som gjør Pstereo til en komplett festival. Også kunstinstallasjoner, mat og selve atmosfæren utgjør en stor del av opplevelsen. Og særlig for sistnevnte er publikum uvurderlig. 

Sammen er vi Pstereo!

Name: Third String Productions
Description:
While still in high school, Third String Productions founder Mike Ziemer got his start interviewing national touring bands at various venues around Deep Ellum. As he went to more and more shows, Ziemer quickly became friends with a bunch of other high schoolers that performed in “emo” and “punk” bands all around the DFW metroplex. After a couple years of getting to know these kids very well, he was asked to manage a band at his high school. The first thing they asked him to do was to book them a show at a community center in Plano, and just like that, Third String Productions was born.

In the early days of Third String Productions (2004 - 2009), the company was best known for it’s monthly concerts and mini-festivals that took place at The Plano Centre, Richardson Civic Center, and other venues around the suburbs of Dallas. As Third String Productions began to outgrow the community centers and suburb venues, Ziemer took on the responsibility of booking shows at The Max and later partnered with The Door, both in Dallas, to book national touring bands on a regular basis. 

In 2010, Ziemer brought on another local promoter, Orlando Mendoza, to help him expand into new territories around Texas. The two began with Wichita Falls and Arlington / Fort Worth and then expanded into Austin, Houston, San Antonio, and Lubbock. Shortly after, they decided to move So What?! Music Festival from indoor venues with limited capacity to an outdoor baseball stadium. After hitting over 6000 attendees in 2013, by 2014, the festival was a multi-day event selling as many as 18,000 tickets over the course of a weekend.

In 2015, Ziemer moved to Los Angeles to further expand Third String Productions. The company now partners with other promoters in California, Arizona, Oklahoma, Nebraska, and Kansas to produce over 300 concerts a year. Ziemer and Mendoza also run a management company called Evolve Music Management and a record label called Third String Records.

Name: Hit Songs Deconstructed
Description:
Hit Songs Deconstructed is your gateway to understanding today's mainstream music scene at the compositional level, providing you with of cutting-edge tools to stay in tune with current and emerging trends for today’s hit songs.  

While there are those who perceive songwriting analytics as a threat to creativity, forward-thinking creatives and music industry professionals understand the importance of being in tune with songwriting trends and view it as a powerful tool that works hand-in-hand with the creative process.

With subscribers spanning hit songwriters and producers, to major labels and publishers, to leading music schools and universities throughout the world, our proprietary data and analysis helps leading professionals hone their craft, spot trends, benchmark songs, and make strategic songwriting, production and business decisions armed with hit songwriting analytics.

Name: MusiQuE - Music Quality Enhancement
Description:
MusiQuE - Music Quality Enhancement is an external evaluation body dedicated to the continuous improvement of the quality of higher music education across Europe and beyond and to assisting higher music education institutions in their own enhancement of quality.

MusiQuE’s work is subject-specific and is characterized by flexibility, diversity, transparency and accountability. Its operations are underpinned by independent, skilled and authoritative international peers.

MusiQuE offers a range of review and accreditation processes tailored to the needs of Higher Music Education institutions:
- quality enhancement reviews for institutions, programmes and joint programmes
- accreditation procedures for institutions, programmes and joint programmes
- joint procedures with national quality assurance and accreditation agencies

MusiQuE has established a Peer-reviewers Register, composed at the moment of more than 60 individuals from various AEC member institutions in several European countries, with expertise in various musical specialisms and broad language skills. Selected experts from the Register form the Review Teams that carry out MusiQuE's review procedures.

Name: Wax Records Inc.
Description:
Wax Records is an independent, full-service, 100% Canadian music company. Our focus is on finding, developing, and promoting career artists with remarkable talent.

Founded in 2009, Wax began as a small operation built on 40 years of combined music industry experience. Originally  formed in 2006 as the Canadian branch of Windup Records, and representing such top tier acts as Evanescence, Seether, and Finger 11, the new team built their reputations together with high profile marketing strategies, and remarkable Canadian success. While the team prospered with their larger American projects, they had long set their sights on creating their own Canadian music company, and in 2009 they set their plan in motion. Having recognized the talent present in Wax, Universal Music Canada soon decided to lend their support with full Canadian distribution. As the Wax plan was coming to fruition, they built their extended team from a whos-who of top Canadian promotion talent, and the company became whole.

Formed amidst unpredictable financial times for the greater music industry, the Wax business model is simple and clear, founded on long-term development, promotion, and transparency. Upon signing with Wax, our artists become partners with us in their careers, and we work together to reach the ultimate potential of their project.

Name: Muse Kinetics

Based in Berkeley, California, Muse Kinetic’s products provide today’s musician with the tools needed to bring new dimensions of expression and control to their performance. We believe when a computer is played as a musical instrument it should feel and respond like one, with all the nuance and sensitivity that makes an instrument musical.

Hedlyner is an all-in-one hub that makes managing live events simple. Founded by music enthusiasts and seasoned event managers in 2021, we understand the importance live shows play in providing a financial safety net for musicians, revenue streams for venues and a rewarding audience experience. In addition to our background in events, our team has successfully scaled two startups to unicorn status and contributed to the development of over ten others. 

Built with years of firsthand industry knowledge, user interviews, testing and MVP research. Our easy-to-use event management system makes live music accessible to more than just corporate giants. No longer does the high cost of entry or the lack of music industry experience stop venues from implementing successful live music programs.

Description:

Three generations later, Arcadia Academy of Music continues to be a leader as one of the largest franchised music schools in Ontario. Recognized by the industry for its quality, Arcadia Academy of Music has received many accolades and awarded numerous industry awards.

The Arcadia Academy of Music concept is simple yet effective – providing a personalized approach to delivering music education programs through quality and vision. This concept amalgamated with honesty, integrity and transparency has provided our longevity for the last 30 years. We believe that every child should be given the opportunity to be exposed to music, enriching their lives inside and outside the classroom and delivering music programs that revolutionize the way music is taught and learned.

Name: Fundació Conservatori del Liceu
Description:
La Fundación Conservatori Liceu es una institución cultural y pedagógica sin ánimo de lucro, de iniciativa social y vocación de servicio público, continuadora de la actividad iniciada en 1837 con el Liceo Filarmónico Dramático Barcelonés de Montesión.

Tiene como finalidad el servicio a la sociedad a través de la docencia, la expresión artística y la transferencia de conocimiento, siempre con el firme convencimiento de que la música contribuye al progreso humano, ético y social.

La misión de la Fundación, de acuerdo con sus estatutos, es:

- Promover y fomentar la enseñanza musical, y artística en general, en todos sus niveles educativos.
- Desarrollar la formación de profesionales de la música y de las artes.
- Fomentar la investigación y la mejora de la calidad en el ámbito de la cultura y la pedagogía.
- Favorecer la promoción y difusión de las artes mediante la organización, producción y participación en conciertos y otros eventos artísticos.
- Proteger y conservar el patrimonio histórico, así como el espíritu pedagógico, de la entidad Liceo Filarmónico Dramático de Montesión.
- Facilitar la relación del estudiante con el mundo del trabajo.

Esta misión se desarrolla a través de un intenso trabajo con instituciones, entidades académicas y sociales, asociaciones y empresas de todo el nuestro territorio y de ámbito internacional, una labor que se materializa en aspectos fundamentales de nuestra acción como son el fomento de iniciativas de mecenazgo y la creación de uno de los fondos de becas más importantes del entorno educativo actual, el establecimiento de convenios de colaboración académica y cultural (que permiten la realización de numerosas actividades para el desarrollo de la actividad cultural en la sociedad) y la programación de las actividades artísticas que se realizan en los equipamientos que se sitúan en los centros mencionados.

Name: Sing Up Foundation
Description:
We produce, promote and create opportunities for children and young people to improve their mental health and wellbeing through singing.

We believe in harnessing the power of singing to improve people's mental health and wellbeing. With 50% of mental health problems established by the age of 14 and 75% by the age of 24, we believe it's critical to focus on prevention by working with young people. The benefits of singing, especially in groups, are wide-ranging with extensive research supporting the physiological, social, psychological and behavioural benefits.

We create a healthier world through song.

Name: Strictly Confidential Music Publishing
Description:
Founded in 1987 Strictly Confidential was initially launched as the publishing arm of the [PIAS] Group. Whilst still maintaining strong links to PIAS, Strictly Confidential has, over the years, evolved into a separate company and is now firmly established as one of the most active leading independent publishers in Europe today with a roster of writers and composers from around the world.

Strictly Confidential has always looked well beyond its borders and that global view is embedded in our DNA. From the company’s head office in Brussels, right at the heart of Europe, Strictly Confidential oversees a worldwide network of partners and sub-publishers. Our A&R, administration, synch and licensing departments all offer a world-class service but with the attention to detail, speed and close support to our artists and labels that comes from our background in independent music. Meanwhile our Paris office provides not only dedicated support for our Francophone artists but acts as a bridge between this hugely important territory and the rest of the world.

Strictly Confidential provides a hands-on service that brings together creativity, reliability, ease of contact and a truly global outlook.

Name: YOSA
Description:
YOSA provides young musicians of all backgrounds the opportunity to play music together so they can learn, grow, and thrive while connecting with the community.

The mission of Youth Orchestras of San Antonio, the premier orchestral experience for youth citywide, is to enhance education, enrich the community, and transform lives by pursuing excellence in classical music in a stimulating, nurturing, and fun environment that is equally accessible to all youth.

YOSA changes kids’ lives through music. We provide transformative music experiences to more than 2,500 young musicians ages 8-20 through YOSA Orchestras, YOSA Summer Symphony Camp, and YOSA School Partnerships. YOSA connects motivated young musicians together and provides a world-class experience that helps youth grow creatively, academically, and socially.

YOSA envisions a community where all musically-inclined youth in San Antonio have a chance to pursue their interests and maximize their potential. YOSA seeks ways to remove financial and social barriers to high-quality music education and designs its activities around this purpose.

Name: The Missouri Symphony
Description: The Missouri Symphony enriches our community through music education, professional performances, and diverse experiences. MOSY strives to enhance and increase the cultural awareness of symphonic music in Mid-Missouri. MOSY is home to the Missouri Symphony Orchestra, the Missouri Symphony Conservatory, and the Missouri Symphony League. We are committed to fostering an environment that is accessible to all people who can come together as one community in the shared experience of symphonic music.

Name: Zanoise Talent BV
Description:
Zanoise Talent operates a rights admin & collection service, focusing on artists (neighboring rights) and writers (music copyright).

We make sure that our clients' tracks are properly registered and claimed everywhere. That way we can maximize their royalty income. How do we work?

- Direct collections + back-claims for missing monies

Zanoise is led by Ernst Jacob Bakker and Dimitry van Dalen. Both earned their stripes developing and managing Fintage House's NR divisions and administrational platforms.

Description:
Welcome to MASSIVE!

We’re building the world’s most connected community of artists and fans.

We're on a mission to empower artists like never before, providing the essential toolkit they need to grow their fanbase, simplify their digital presence, and forge meaningful connections with their audience. Through our innovative community platform, we are redefining how musicians navigate the ever-evolving music landscape.

Our platform fosters an environment where artists can flourish, backed by a dedicated community who truly appreciate their craft.

Visit our website at www.massive.fan to learn more

Name: Humming Records
Description:
Humming Records, founded in 2009 by Colin Lovrinovic and Jörg Peters, is a technology focused music company with offices in Berlin and Hamburg.

Started in the midst of the music industry’s biggest transformation, Humming decided to rethink the traditional label model and decided to play an active role in reshaping the future of experiencing music. Rather than fear the change, Humming decided to be a part of it. Putting a strong emphasis on digital releases and technology - combined with strong personal attachments to every single one of their artists, the label continued to grow over the years. One could call that progressive - we think it’s just common sense.

Humming was the first European home to internationally acclaimed artists such as Josef Salvat, Cloud Control, or Grammy nominated K.Flay and has been nominated as Germany’s best independent label at the VIA! VUT Indie Awards numerous times, but hasn’t won so far. Time to change that, huh? 

Humming’s identity has always been about embracing the value of music, true artists and their vision in a fast-paced industry, whilst focusing on the development of longterm careers. The team believes in strong ideals and put the artist’s vision first. The big picture, creative freedom and ultimately the art itself is more important than a quick buck in the short term.

In 2019 Humming Records joined forces with NEUBAU Music, a Berlin and Hamburg based music management powerhouse, to combine their efforts in finding and developing great talent and bringing it to music fans around the world.

Current Artist on Humming Records: 
ÄTNA | FIL BO RIVA | MOGLII | THE RUBENS | LUZ |  KLLO | MANI ORRASON | YOUR SMITH | K.FLAY | PHORIA
