Name: American School of Modern Music
Description:
Based in Paris since 1982, the American School of Modern Music is a private post-secondary institution offering high-level music education that provides students with the skills needed to succeed in today’s music industry. 

The school trains artists and professionals in all areas of a musical career (performers, composers, arrangers, sound engineers, producers), basing its methods on the best American universities.  

Its Faculty, unique in France, is made up of renowned international artists, many with prestigious awards and honors (Grammy Awards, Victoires de la musique, Knights of the arts and letters, Degrees from the largest American universities, ...).

The American School of Modern Music’s diploma is widely considered one of the best in Europe. Attesting the completion of a rigorous and extensive course of musical study, each year the diploma ceremony is presided by an internationally renowned musician.

Name: Arion Orchestre Baroque
Description:
Arion orchestre baroque est l’unique orchestre de musique ancienne sur instruments d’époque au Québec. La clarté et la fraîcheur des interprétations d’Arion ont été remarquées dès ses premiers concerts ; la finesse de ses lectures d'œuvres baroques choisies et variées ne s’est pas démentie depuis 30 ans. Un souci constant du détail a placé l’orchestre mené par la vision artistique éclairée de la flutiste Claire Guimond parmi les meilleures formations de musique ancienne reconnues en Amérique du Nord et à travers le monde.
------
Arion Baroque Orchestra, founded in 1981, is the only early music orchestra performing on period instruments in Québec and one of the most renowned early music ensembles in North America. Led by the enlightened artistic vision of flutist Claire Guimond, the orchestra offers a prestigious concert series in Montréal featuring more than twenty musicians and with the participation of internationally known guest conductors. The clarity and freshness of Arion’s interpretations have been remarked through the concert tours in Japan, United States, Europe and Mexico. Arion has also put together an impressive recording collection with 26 titles both as an ensemble and as an orchestra, distributed internationally and on the web.

Name: JB Music Group
Description:
JB Music Group is a leading U.S.-based sonic branding agency and strategic music partner, specializing in crafting sound that connects brands with their audiences.

We deliver award-winning sonic branding solutions that build authentic connections across every audible touchpoint. From custom music to immersive sound design, we create cohesive sonic identities that bring brands to life.

Our client portfolio includes Disney, Ferrero, Michael Kors, H&R Block, Morgan Stanley, Beats by Dre, Crown Royal, and Nickelodeon. We partner with forward-thinking brands to develop 360º sonic experiences across digital ads, branded content, user interfaces, and seasonal campaigns. By combining creative strategy with premium sonic solutions, JB Music Group helps brands stand out. It’s not just about sound. It’s about being heard.

Name: Third Coast Percussion
Description:
Third Coast Percussion is a Grammy Award-winning Chicago-based percussion quartet. For over fifteen years, the ensemble has created exciting and unexpected performances that constantly redefine the classical music experience. The ensemble has been praised for “commandingly elegant” (New York Times) performances, the “rare power” (Washington Post) of their recordings, and “an inspirational sense of fun and curiosity” (Minnesota Star-Tribune). Third Coast Percussion maintains a busy tour schedule, with past performances in 35 of the 50 states and Washington, DC, plus international tour dates across 4 continents.

Our team includes the four performing members of the ensemble, who also serve as the Executive Director, Finance Director, Development Director, and Technical Director, plus three non-performing staff members: a Managing Director, Studio Manager, and Office Assistant/Development Associate.

A direct connection with the audience is at the core of all of Third Coast Percussion’s work, whether the musicians are speaking from the stage about a new piece of music, inviting the audience to play along in a concert or educational performance, or inviting their fans around the world to create new music using one of their free mobile apps. The four members of Third Coast are also accomplished teachers, and make active participation by all students the cornerstone of all their educational offerings.

Third Coast Percussion has commissioned and premiered new works by Philip Glass, Jlin, Tyondai Braxton, Augusta Read Thomas, Devonté Hynes, Georg Friedrich Haas, Donnacha Dennehy, Glenn Kotche, Christopher Cerrone, David T. Little and today’s leading up-and-coming music creators through its Currents Creative Partnership program. The organization has also always maintained strong ties to the vibrant artistic community in their hometown of Chicago.

Name: Martin O.
Description:
Martin O. ist Schweizer Stimm-Magier, fabelhafter Geschichtenerzähler und interaktiver Musik-Comedian: Bodenständig, feinsinnig, hintersinnig, urkomisch und immer nah am Publikum. Mit seinem originalen Loopgerät multipliziert er sich zu einem atemberaubenden Stimmen-Orchester und Klangkosmos. Heiter, frech und so präzise wie ein Schweizer Uhrwerk!

Seine Ideen sprudeln noch schneller als Filmvorschläge bei Netflix: Mehrstimmig erklimmt er ungesichert Tonleitern, swingt sich keck mit mitreissendem Rhythmus von Musikstil zu Musikstil und beschert seinem Publikum glänzende Augen, erleuchtete Ohren und Berge von bester Unterhaltung! Erleben Sie Martin O., einen feinsinnigen Poeten und donnernden Vokalisten, seine phänomenale Stimme, die Ihnen in Herz und Ohren bleiben wird. Hingehen, hinhören und hin und weg sein.

Ob Gala, Party oder Firmenanlass – sein Programm kann individuell auf den Kunden abgestimmt werden. Martin O.s Auftritte sind flexibel und passen sich inhaltlich Ihrem Anlass an. Er integriert Key-Messages, aktuelle Themen, die Firmengeschichte, die Mitarbeitenden oder die Unternehmenskultur in seinen Auftritt. Sie erhalten keine Standardlösung, sondern eine auf Ihre Botschaft massgesungene Performance. Auf Wunsch entwickelt Martin O. aus von Ihnen zu Verfügung gestellten Fotos eine individualisierte, musikalische Bilderstory.

Martin O. begleitet Tagungen, Kongresse oder Symposien. Aus seinen Notizen entstehen blitzschnell humorvolle und faszinierende Zusammenfassungen, die einen unterhaltsamen und geistreich-musikalischen roten Faden im Tagesablauf bieten. Seine multilingualen Fähigkeiten in d/f/e erlauben auch Auftritte vor einem internationalen Publikum.

Buchen Sie jetzt einen Auftritt von Martin O. für Ihre Veranstaltung unter www.martin-O.ch oder unter +41 77 479 30 32. Wir beantworten gerne Ihre Fragen und freuen uns, Sie musikalisch begleiten zu dürfen.

Name: El Tragaluz
Description:
El Tragaluz es un sello discográfico independiente ubicado en Madrid. Nace de la necesidad de explorar nuevos caminos en la música apoyando proyectos que tengan algo nuevo que contar. Trabajamos en el desarrollo de artistas, con mucho amor y respeto por la música.

Un tragaluz es una ventana que sale del tejado, el recoveco que permite que entre luz a una habitación situada en lo más alto de un edificio. Nosotros pretendemos ser ese punto de luz para artistas que destacan pero que probablemente no tengan las herramientas para moverse en el (a veces) oscuro mundo de la industria musical.

Somos selectivos pero nos involucramos en el proyecto desde el principio, asesorando y participando activamente en las grabaciones de nuestros artistas y en todas las parcelas de su trayectoria profesional. Creemos más en la elaboración de algo sólido que en el marketing, no vendemos humo.

Trabajamos siempre con mucha humildad pero con paso firme: hemos venido para quedarnos y para que nuestros artistas se queden con nosotros. Porque nos luce.

Name: Cryptic
Description:
Cryptic is Scotland’s award-winning, internationally renowned, producing arts house. Based in Glasgow, we present today’s most imaginative, pioneering artists whilst also nurturing the creative talent of tomorrow. Founded in 1994 by Cathie Boyd, we create unique, memorable experiences that engage and inspire our audiences.

From traditional concert halls to industrial sites and digital platforms, our projects span many forms. We produce multi-media performances and installations that fuse music, sonic, visual and digital arts.

Thriving in a fast-paced, ever-evolving environment, we are a not-for-profit company with a global outlook, committed to discovering and presenting ambitious new work.

Our three key programmes are:

-Sonica Glasgow: an 11-day biennial festival dedicated to world-class audiovisual performances and sonic installations;
-Cryptic Artists: seeks out and nurtures mid-career musicians;
-Cryptic Nights: supports and mentors emerging Scottish-based artists.

To date, Cryptic has programmed more than 2,200 artists, whose work has been seen by over 1.3 million people in 33 countries.

 “An achievement worth seeing, hearing and feeling.”  The Guardian

Name: Gondwana Choirs
Description:
Gondwana Choirs comprises the most accomplished choral groups of young people in Australia. Founded by Artistic Director Lyn Williams AM as Sydney Children’s Choir in 1989, the organisation has grown to now include Gondwana National Choirs and Gondwana Indigenous Choir. The organisation has commissioned over 100 works by leading Australian composers and performs a significant number of Australian compositions each year nationally and internationally.   
In 2019 Gondwana Choirs proudly celebrated 30 years since the founding of Sydney Children’s Choir.

Name: Tits Upon Tyne
Description:
WHAT IS TITS UPON TYNE?

Based in the North East and founded in 2018, Tits Upon Tyne is a platform in all things music and feminism. Originally created to raise money and awareness for breast cancer, our message has grown to be more over time. Supporting women in the music industry is now our focus point as we create content, events and campaigns to make a difference one small bit at a time.

Name: Monument Records
Description:
Sony Music announced the re-launching of their label Monument Records, with respected industry veterans Jason Owen and Shane McAnally serving as co-presidents of the label. Critically acclaimed newcomers Caitlyn Smith and Walker Hayes are Monument’s leading artists.

An imprint of Sony Music Entertainment, Monument Records will employ a staff of creative and innovative thinkers in Nashville, Tenn.

The label’s initial signings represent the essence of the groundbreaking co-presidents’ vision. Caitlyn Smith, from Cannon Falls, Minnesota, is best known for co-writing “Like I’m Gonna Lose You,” Meghan Trainor’s duet with John Legend, but her soul-steeped take on country has also attracted Dolly Parton and Garth Brooks to her songs. On Starfire, Smith shows she is her own best interpreter: honest, real, sleek and gorgeous in all the toughest places.

Walker Hayes, an Alabama native, has a lyric heavy, groove based and truth-infused, style that caught the ear of McAnally who immediately signed Hayes to his SMACK music house, helping him release his raw, one-man 8Tracks (Vol. 1 & 2) EP’s in 2016. The tracks have attracted kudos from syndicated radio host Bobby Bones among others. The extremely prolific Hayes is in the studio with McAnally, working fervently on a studio album.

Opening a label with a history as eclectic and rich as Monument Records was important to McAnally and Owen, two industry leaders who have been on the forefront of changing the face of the creative landscape and contemporary music. Cultivating unique ideas and approaches in their respective fields, both have re-written the possibilities for their artists and reframed what music means.

Name: A&R Factory
Description:
Since 2012, We have grown into one of the most respected Artist and Repertoire (A&R) music discovery blogs. Our readership includes independent and major labels, publishers, management companies, radio station, PR and sync companies from across the world who use our website as a resource to discover and sign acts.

We are always on the look out for the next big hit so please submit your music via our website.

Name: Stichting Muziek Ook Voor Jou
Description:
Muziek maken moet mogelijk zijn voor iedereen. Op je eigen tempo, aangepast naar jouw mogelijkheden, en altijd met veel plezier. Dat is ons doel.
Omdat muziek maken veel te bieden heeft voor iedereen, ook voor ouderen, mensen met een beperking, of mensen met hersenletsel. 

Muziek Ook Voor Jou is het platform voor speciale muziekles en muziektherapie. Hier vinden (aankomende) muzikanten informatie en docenten die als doel hebben om jouw talenten naar boven te halen.

Name: Peneira Musical (diverse lab)
Description: A Peneira Musical (diverse lab) é mais que um canal de música. Somos uma produtora, editora e selo musical, subselo da Urban Pop. Somos também uma empresa de impacto social, com foco em diversidade (diverselab)! Nossa missão é potencializar prioritariamente a criatividade de pessoas periféricas, mulheres, pessoas pretas, LGBTQIAP+, 50+ que se expressam através da música! Queremos que esses artistas cada vez mais tenham suas vozes ouvidas e amplificadas, ocupando espaços que lhes foram negados por séculos.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Deering Banjo Company
Description:
“TO CHAMPION THE BANJO AND INSPIRE CREATIVITY AROUND THE GLOBE BY SUPPLYING THE BEST QUALITY, AMERICAN MADE BANJOS AVAILABLE TO PLAYERS OF ALL ABILITIES.”

Welcome to the wonderful online world of Deering Banjos! We invite you to check out our full range of American made banjo’s including the Deering, Vega, Tenbrooks, and Goodtime banjos, all of which are hand built by Janet and I and our team of 48 dedicated banjo specialists right here in our Spring Valley, California facility, just 10 miles East of downtown San Diego.

We focus only on making banjos in our factory so that all of our staff’s 271 years of combined banjo building expertise is directed toward making the highest quality banjos in all price ranges and providing the best banjos in the world.

We would love to have you come visit us and take a factory tour.  It is a great honor for us to share the joy we and our staff have in making banjos.  Over the past 41 years we have made more than 100,000 banjos and every one of them has been crafted with special attention.

We are a family run business, and we regard our craftsmen, suppliers, dealers, and especially our customers as part of the Deering family. Our focus and passion is to create great banjos that enable you as an artist to enjoy expressing yourself and your music. 

We look forward to building your special banjo.

- Greg and Janet Deering

Name: MUZIKNCOM
Description:
We are the MUSIC MAKERS and we are the DREAMERS OF DREAMS
'Arthur William Edgar O'Shaughnessy'

Muzikncom produces artists and shows and aims to become the leader in digital platforms for talent discovery.

Our purpose is to bring an artistic dimension to all the neighborhoods
around the world, letting everyone have their say, especially those
who think that "artist's dream" is not accessible.

MuziknCom has the Saison Africa 2020/2021 label and covered the 50 years of the Francophonie.

Name: Concert op Maat
Description: Met een Concert op Maat geef je een geluksmoment in de vorm van een persoonlijk concert. Het is een origineel cadeau voor iemand die eigenlijk alles al heeft en aan wie je echt iets speciaals wilt geven. Aan bijvoorbeeld je ouders, goede vrienden, een collega of aan je partner. Een cadeau om iets te vieren, ergens extra bij stil te staan of te zeggen: ´jij bent bijzonder voor mij´.

Name: Postoffice Sound & Music
Description:
Postoffice Sound & Music is a boutique music production agency located in Amsterdam. Based at the offices of Postoffice - one of the leading Postproduction collectives in The Netherlands - we create music and sound design and do sync licensing for the advertising, film/broadcasting and interactive worlds. 

What do we do?

Music Production & Composition
We produce any kind of music for any kind of footage. Music that enhances, boosts and underlines your material. Whether you need an orchestral piece, a pumping floorfiller or a killer speedmetal-track: we make it. 

Re-recording
We’re specialists at re-recording any kind of song into a newly made masterfile that exactly sounds like the original, or realizes the artistic interpretation of your own preference. 

Sound design, 3D-audio & other audio-post
Beeps, clicks, opening doors, fast moving cars, yellow laserswords... We know how to make it sound real and perfectly blend it with the footage, voice-over and music. With our partners of Timber 3D we offer the best 3D-audio experience available in the market. 

Music consultancy (research & sync licensing)
Don't know exactly what kind of music you need? Our creatives love to search the best material for you. We know our way around the music industry and have speed dial buttons for the biggest publishers and major labels in case you want to use an existing commercial (hit)recording. 

Together with Postoffice Voice Casting we’re part of The Posttoffice Group.

Name: Soundmachine Music Publishing
Description: Soundmachine Music Publishing fundada en el Mes de Noviembre del 2012, por Ernesto Mancilla y Gustavo Abatte. Somos una Editorial Musical independiente, además contamos con una Compañía Discográfica, Estudio de Grabación, Booking & Management y Productora Audiovisual. Trabajamos con Autores, Compositores, Artistas, Artists Managers, Marcas, etc. Nuestra visión de la industria de la música que ofrecemos a nuestros representados, se basa en una concepción nueva de como ver los negocios y oportunidades. Nos importa ser protagonistas en una sociedad, un país donde los músicos y los actores de la industria merecen todo nuestro respeto. Con los que se establezcan acuerdos comerciales realizaremos un trabajo serio, transparente y coherente aportando con nuestras fortalezas.

Name: VFLAMDBA
Description:
We are an independent company designed to assist ambitious musicians and brands utilise the power of culture to solve their biggest challenges.
 
We're mixing the art of storytelling, technology and culture to build campaigns that grow your brand - no matter which stage you are on.

We are proud to present our first merchandise drop which includes licensed official merchandise from the likes of Deadmau5, Marshmello, DJ Tiesto, Skrillex, Kygo and many more.

Head on over to: http://bit.ly/vflmerch

To know more about VFLAMBDA: https://www.vflambda.in

Name: Shasta
Description: Somos especializados em Employer Branding, Comunicação Interna, Comunicação Corporativa e Comunicação Institucional, através de nossas Rádios Corporativas e Podcasts.

Name: Christian Plaschy Music GmbH für alle Projekte
Description: Für alle Projekte - Zweck gemäss Handelsregister: Erbringung von Dienstleistungen im Musikbereich, insbesondere Darbietungen, Produktionen, Schulungen. Beratungen und Coaching. Handel mit Kleidern, Perücken, Schmuck und anderen Waren, Integrationsunterstützung. Restaurationsdienstleistungen. Projektmanagement. Erbringung von Dienstleistungen im Bereich Business-Development, Social Marketing und Business-Veranstaltungen, Betrieb von Netzwerken sowie Vertrieb von Produkten aller Art, insbesondere über sowie im Bereich der Informationstechnologie

Name: Eternal Music Group
Description: We are a collective music company and home to Engine (custom bespoke music for advertising and marketing), Arkival Music (a music supervisor curated and composer forward production music catalog), Eternal Eclipse (a record label and music publisher of epic live orchestral music) and Sonic Ritual (an independent record label).

Name: Armenian State Symphony Orchestra
Description:
Now a celebrated symphony orchestra at home and overseas, the Armenian State Symphony Orchestra emerged from a group of devout enthusiasts of classical music with the shared vision of championing spiritual excellence through music and upholding the musical traditions of their native Armenia. Reputed to have finely distinct quality of sound and emotionally charged performance style, the orchestra has long become an awaited guest in leading concert halls around the world.
Together with its Founding Artistic Director and Principal Conductor, Sergey Smbatyan, the Armenian State Symphony Orchestra has established four annual classical music festivals, hosting in Armenia a multitude of internationally renowned virtuoso performers and conductors over years, including artists such as 
The orchestra has a growing input in the education of young people in Armenia. Launched in 2018, the DasA program strives to incite curiosity, understanding and liking for classical music among high school students. 
The program is designed to bring the youth and high quality musical art closer together and share entertaining knowledge about classical music. The orchestra also targets university students in the framework of 
“My Symphonic” project, conducting focus group surveys, meeting sessions and providing invitations to concerts. Aside from educational programs, master classes with prominent artists are held frequently for young musicians.

Name: Coro Cantatutti
Description:
Cantatutti es un coro pionero que combina música e inclusión.

Un coro en el que, independientemente de la edad, diversidad funcional, país de procedencia, nivel socioeconómico, cultural, orientación sexual o formación musical… todo el mundo es bienvenid@.

Se trata de un proyecto enraizado en la Universidad de Zaragoza que combina la acción musical propia de un coro con la investigación en música e inclusión, apoyado de manera institucional por el Gobierno de Aragón mediante una Cátedra o convenio de colaboración con el nombre “Cátedra de Música e Inclusión para el Cambio Social”.

Name: bSHARP
Description:
Some of the artists and companies we've been proud to partner with:

Management & Label Services: Petit Biscuit, Odezenne, Stromae, mtheory (Porter Robinson & Madeon, Flume...), Caroline (Glass Animals, Childish Gambino, Glassnote...), Moussa, Jean, Wallace cleaver, Lémofil, Victor.

Technology & Software: soundcharts.com

Name: Ayotte Custom Drums
Description:
Re-launched to the market at the 2013 NAMM show, AYOTTE is making a big impression on the Players, dealers and trade people. It had been more than 10 years since the last presence of AYOTTE at the NAMM show. 

The company now offers three series of high quality drums. The Classic, the Velvet and the Bedford series. With the Classic series, AYOTTE offers the same high-end custom drum line that made its reputation in the early years. 6 ply shells with reinforcement ring and dressed with inlaid wood hoops on all drums. In the Velvet series, the 8 ply shells and full face wood hoop is offered in a limited choice of colors and finishes. Finally, the Bedford series is a triple flanged version of the Velvet, offered in a choice of 4 colors in preconfigured shell packs. 

AYOTTE also returns with its classic choice of 13 maple and hickory sticks. Drumsticks are made of select hickory and rock maple from Quebec . One of the most important differences in the AYOTTE line is that some of the drumstick models are quite different than anything offered by any other company. In addition to the standard “7A, 5A, 5B and 2B” sizes, Ayotte offers some nicely designed sticks meant for Jazz, Rock, Funk shuffle playing.

It took a whole year for the new team to restructure the company. The main focus of the restructuration being put on re-establishing customer service and product quality. 

AYOTTE is available in the most respected drumshops worldwide.

Name: MusiQuE - Music Quality Enhancement
Description:
MusiQuE - Music Quality Enhancement is an external evaluation body dedicated to the continuous improvement of the quality of higher music education across Europe and beyond and to assisting higher music education institutions in their own enhancement of quality.

MusiQuE’s work is subject-specific and is characterized by flexibility, diversity, transparency and accountability. Its operations are underpinned by independent, skilled and authoritative international peers.

MusiQuE offers a range of review and accreditation processes tailored to the needs of Higher Music Education institutions:
- quality enhancement reviews for institutions, programmes and joint programmes
- accreditation procedures for institutions, programmes and joint programmes
- joint procedures with national quality assurance and accreditation agencies

MusiQuE has established a Peer-reviewers Register, composed at the moment of more than 60 individuals from various AEC member institutions in several European countries, with expertise in various musical specialisms and broad language skills. Selected experts from the Register form the Review Teams that carry out MusiQuE's review procedures.

Name: Ensemble Modern
Description:
Ensemble Modern is a curious loudspeaker for music of our times: courageous, uncompromising, energetic. An essential, aesthetically polyglot amplifier for trend-setting sound concepts.

It is one of the most well-known, leading current music formations in the world. Founded in 1980 and at home in Frankfurt am Main, 18 soloists currently determine the activities of this democratically organized ensemble. The musicians from Belgium, Bulgaria, Germany, Greece, India, Israel, Japan, Switzerland and the USA jointly decide on artistic projects, partnerships with other artists and all financial matters. Its aesthetic spectrum includes musical theatre works, dance and multimedia projects, chamber music, ensemble and orchestral concerts.

The diverse, self-administered work of Ensemble Modern never stops questioning musical and concert conventions. Its members are indefatigable in their search for expressive, artistic sonic positions of our times, delivering authentic performances of these positions.

Name: Fungjai
Description:
Fungjai is both a music-technology startup company and leader of the new emerging music community movement in Thailand with members coming from all over the country, participating in conversations online and activities offline.

Our four core products are:
Music streaming platform - www.fungjai.com 
Monthly e-magazine - www.fungjaizine.com 
Concert series - HedSod
Seminar series - HedYoung

Though our core business is in developing and maintaining online tools and platforms for the music community with music streaming as our core product, we also find other ways to support the music community both online and offline, i.e. a monthly e-magazine to publish articles and news about the music industry; organize concerts and music festivals to promote less known but very talented musical artists; organize seminars and workshops to share useful knowledge to musicians and music enthusiasts; communicate to the community about anything from new music to important news through social media channels; and collaborate with institutions and organizations who we see can help develop and improve Thailand’s music industry.

We confidently see that Thailand has the potential to turn music into a national export product and we can help make that vision come true.  As a growing business, we are seeking new passionate recruits to join in on our vision of revolutionizing Thailand’s music industry.

Name: Kindergarten Alliance 幼儿园联盟
Description:
help the global schools to teach students
exchange info and resources

Name: Theater Bremen
Description:
Das Theater Bremen ist ein Stadttheater mit überregionaler Bedeutung. Es versteht sich als ein öffentlicher Ort ästhetischen und politischen Nachdenkens über Probleme, Risiken, Freiheiten und Glücksmomente moderner Großstadterfahrung.
Es umfasst vier Sparten: Musiktheater, Schauspiel, Tanz und Kinder- und Jugendtheater mit den vier Spielstätten Theater am Goetheplatz, Kleines Haus, Brauhaus und Brauhauskeller.
In jeder Spielzeit stehen mehr als 30 Premieren mit 600 Vorstellungen auf dem Programm, aber auch Konzerte und Partys.
In den Einführungen zu den Stücken, Publikumsgesprächen nach den Vorstellungen und Gesprächsreihen wird der direkte Dialog mit den Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern gesucht.

Name: Disques 7ième Ciel
Description: Disques 7ième Ciel est une entreprise culturelle québécoise œuvrant dans la musique depuis 2003, et plus précisément dans tout ce qui attrait au rap et à la culture hip-hop.

Name: Battery Tour
Description:
Independent Record Label hosting the longest-running clean energy-powered concert series in the USA and worldwide. We operate on a three-track model that blends music, sustainability, and impact—bringing everyone along on this Road to 1000 as we complete our final 40+ shows and push toward a Guinness World Record for the most clean energy concerts ever.

The Founder, AY, is a Young Leader for the SDGs, an honorary designation from the Office of the UN Secretary-General's Envoy on Youth. Operations led by Anthony Devera

Battery Tour inspires individuals to recognize that they are all 'outlets' for change.

Name: PT Intune Musik Nusantara Raya
Description: We harmonize your brand and help your company do its storytelling through music. We produce jingles, background music, and many more.

Name: The Worldwide Reggae Music and Entertainment Registry
Description:
The Worldwide Reggae Music and Entertainment Registry is a major global organization for the Reggae Industry.

It is in the process of becoming the most powerful tool for everyone to utilize in the industry and a benefit for fans as well. Everyone who loves reggae music should register, its free to register and will be launching later this year. 

We are in the registration phase right now. 

www.reggaeregistry.com

Spread the word!

Name: S&S Presents
Description:
S&S Presents has hosted concerts in the Salt Lake valley since 2007. Beginning with backyard shows at our first venue, Kilby Court, S&S has grown immensely over the last twenty years and currently produces over 1000+ concerts a year throughout multiple venues in Salt Lake City.

Our company focus is to create meaningful experiences for artists and fans. We aim to provide SLC with access to life-changing live music opportunities, as well as giving artists hospitable and professional experiences. In addition to showcasing local talent, S&S Presents hosts groundbreaking independent touring artists in primarily 200 to 7,000 capacity venues, as well as select large-scale music festivals and concert series. We take pride in enriching our community by bringing more artists to Utah than any other local production company in the state.

Name: Soundness
Description:
Soundness è una Società di Consulenza nel settore musicale fondata nel 2019 per fornire Consulenza Direzionale, Organizzativa, Formazione, Ricerca e Strategia di Marketing specifica per Produttori e Studi di Registrazione

 Il servizio viene offerto e strutturato dopo una consulenza conoscitiva per presupporre il piano più in linea con le richieste dei nostri clienti.
SOUNDNESS si avvale, per gli aspetti più specialistici, della collaborazione di una rete di professionisti, con rapporti di partnership, al fine di assicurare servizi il più completi possibile. 

Le direzioni verso cui spazia la società sono: Consulenza di business e manageriale, formazione su vari fronti (Marketing, Management, Sales e Competenze Tecniche) per il settore musicale, piani e strategie di posizionamento per Professionisti del settore.

Il settore Musicale si sta pian piano sempre più evolvendo, i classici modelli di business di un tempo non sono più profittevoli e sostenibili.
Ognuno deve trovare il suo spazio e il suo nuovo modello, per questo noi di SOUNDNESS siamo sempre alla ricerca delle nuove soluzioni possibili per questo settore.

Name: Lasgo Worldwide Media
Description:
Established in 1978, Lasgo Worldwide Media has become the UK’s longest established international wholesaler and distributor of home entertainment product.
In doing so, Lasgo have created a one-stop solution for their customers’ needs, delivering service excellence to the home entertainment and non-traditional markets.

From our humble beginnings in London’s Oxford Street, our success has been achieved through the company’s ability to diversify and identify new opportunities.
The journey to our current position of strength today as part of the multinational Little Group is based on the flexibility to be able to adapt to market conditions.
For example, the industry has seen a resurgence of the Vinyl market (a market which Lasgo never left). As such we were well placed to take full advantage of this growth. We have also invested in the expansion of our Visual Entertainment and Merchandise divisions to meet a growing demand for fan-based physical products.

Lasgo Chrysalis Ltd is honoured to be given the prestigious Queen's Awards for Enterprise for International Trade 2020, Lasgo has been recognised for its excellence in International sales. Lasgo has twice before won The Queen’s Award for Export and sells the UK’s largest range of CD, DVD, Vinyl, a range of consumer electronics and merchandise associated with the film, music and games worlds to trade customers around the world.

Name: Rocket Music Entertainment Group Llp
Description: Rocket Music Entertainment Group Llp is a music company based out of 1 Blythe Rd, London, United Kingdom.

Name: Hotone Audio
Description:
The Hotone Audio company is highly invested in the development of its employees, is motivated by technological innovation, views excellence in quality as a competitive strength, stands on a foundation of outstanding service, and strives to provide every customer with a sensational experience.

Hotone's slogan is "Design Inspiration", which has a few shades of meaning. One of course is designs based on inspiration: that the products come out of some serious professional brainstorms centered around what is, what isn't, and what can be made possible. It's one of Hotone's core values to challenge the limits of design.

"Design Inspiration" also means that it's important for us to design and manufacture high quality products that musicians of all kinds can enjoy and be inspired by. Inspired to try something new, inspired to dig deep and put it all out there.

As ideas become designs, the Hotone team buckles down to create products the music world has always wanted but never before imagined possible. Expect from Hotone products for professional and amateur musicians alike: rugged, portable devices that don't compromise on tone.

Hotone's Management System has been awarded this certificate for compliance with the standard ISO9001:2015.

Name: The Kicks
Description: Click our website for more information!

Name: JaianMusic
Description: JaianMusic is a one man band from Canada. He creates original & cover music on YouTube (Rap & Anime Music etc). He is a composer & certified sound engineer.

Name: WUPPLES Guitars
Description: WUPPLES Guitars

Name: Rodgers Instruments US LLC
Description: DEDICATED TO MOVING HEARTS AND SOULS. Since 1958, Rodgers has been committed to heightening the spiritual experience of audiences with the transformational power of music. Rodgers organs not only capture the essence of American pipe organ sound, they have led the way in making organs more accessible to places of worship, universities, music schools, and enthusiasts around the world.

Name: Novelist Music Group
Description: Novelist Music Group (NMG) empowers, mentors, and markets artists that demonstrate a desire to creatively articulate stories. The artists of Novelist Music Group are selectively chosen to represent the craft of storytelling. By incorporating film, music, and storytelling, NMG seeks to provide entertainment to live audiences and to digital viewers in diversifying ways.

Name: dexibell
Description:
Dexibell is born from the need to create musical products that are faithful to the highest expectations of musicians.
Dexibell has a creative energy that is fueled by the know-how, the talent, and the experience of the best and most highly regarded Italian designers and engineers.
‘Innovation, Tradition, and Passion without Compromise’
This spirit drives a philosophy of old-world craftsmanship with new-world technology to create a renaissance of digital musical instruments. The heart of classical instruments powered by modern technological innovations like the use of a CORTEX-Quadcore electronic brain.
Thus, in our VIVO digital pianos, we reproduce the sweet notes of Chopin’s favorite piano, an 1850’s Romantic era grand piano; or in the CLASSICO digital organ we find a tonal quality never before achieved in the reproduction of classical organ sounds; and in the COMBO digital organ we find vintage tonewheel and transistor tones with the revolutionary hands-free motorized draw-fader technology.
Rapid and exciting developments in technology have allowed us to achieve musical heights that were once unimaginable. Our mission is to further develop and utilize this technology to allow Innovation, Tradition and Music to play harmoniously together.

Name: Indiefy - Music Distribution
Description:
Indiefy was created knowing the real struggle that artists face daily against music corporations that take really big chunks out of the artist's revenue, and in many cases they are even needed to sign contracts for many years giving away a percentage out of their royalties and their rights.

Indiefy is a user-friendly distribution platform with no upfront fees, artists always keep their rights and an album can be sent to stores in 5 minutes or less.

Name: Selective Hearing
Description: Boutique Creative Agency Offering Creative Solutions For Music Artists & Music Labels. We Offer a Wide Variety Of Services Which Go From Artists's Management, Festival & Event Curation Services, Roll-Out Plans, Label Management, Consulting.

Name: Boston Music Project
Description: The Boston Music Project is a 501(c)3 non-profit that has provided music-based Creative Youth Development programming to thousands of Boston youth since 2011. Our team of 45 diverse teaching artists provides weekly music education to nearly 2,000 PreK-12th grade students across 22 Boston schools each year. BMP before, after, and in-school programs provide students with the resources and support to unleash their musical creativity through strings, brass, woodwinds, piano, and digital music instruction while fostering their social-emotional skills to find success in music, school, and life. Learn more at www.bostonmusicproject.org

Name: Online Music Recording Studio "Supreme Tracks"
Description:
Supreme Tracks professionally arranges and records studio tracks for your projects through online collaboration, at best value-for-money rates. 

Behind the scenes are:

- Acclaimed session musicians from New York and Nashville,
- Renowned European orchestral musicians,
- Seasoned recording engineers,
- And an OSCAR-award winning arrangement team.

Recording studios we use fit industry standards for sound treatment and are equipped with a wide selection of timeless analogue and modern digital equipment. We can also remotely record symphonic orchestra in a prestigious concert hall.

Our team, or the members of it, have worked with hundreds of companies and producers from the music, movie, and gaming industry over the years. We have recorded tracks for the high-profile music production series “Coke Studio” and Hollywood blockbuster movies such as “88 minutes”, “Meet the Spartans”, “Breaking Point”, just to name a few.

If you are a music supervisor, producer, or a company looking to arrange or record studio tracks for your project, get in touch with us and let’s see how we can amaze you.

Name: Musyance
Description:
Musyance è una piattaforma musicale che facilita la collaborazione tra artisti e i Professionisti nel Settore Musicale.

 Bacheca Artisti

Ogni giorno tantissimi artisti su Musyance pubblicano campagne per trovare servizi e annunciare nuove uscite sulla "Bacheca Artisti". 

Potrai accedere alla "Bacheca Artisti", e facilmente inviare proposte di collaborazione e trovare nuovi contatti filtrando la ricerca in base alle tue esigenze.

 Vetrina

Avrai a disposizione una Vetrina, con un Design rinnovato e possibilità di personalizzazione dei colori per adattarli al brand (Personalizzazione che sarà fatta direttamente dallo staff di Musyance).

Adesso è possibile aggiungere il Sito Internet e Canali Social.

Abbiamo semplificato e velocizzato il tasto "Contattami" e "Richiedi un preventivo". Adesso è possibile leggere e rispondere alle richieste ricevute direttamente dall'email senza dover accedere a Musyance.

Finalmente è possibile visualizzare le statistiche della vetrina con visualizzazioni totali, settimanali, giornaliere e click ricevuti per ogni singolo tasto (es. 4 Click per Facebook, 8 Click Contattami ecc.)



Prova la versione gratuita per 1 mese. Per maggiori informazioni non esitare a contattarci.

Di seguito il link per accedere e iscriversi: https://musyance.com/get_started

Name: 432 Hertzios
Description:

Potenciamos proyectos y desarrollamos plataformas de música.

Nos enfocamos en la comunicación de los relatos y en la puesta en valor del contenido.

Tenemos como misión ampliar perspectivas, ofrecer herramientas y construir vínculos justos y dinámicos.

Name: The Amber Trust
Description:
The Amber Trust was founded in 1995 to help blind and partially sighted children across the UK who have a talent or love for music. Our vision is for blind and partially sighted children, including those with additional disabilities, to have the best possible chance to meet their musical needs and aspirations and fulfil their potential.

For all the children Amber supports, music has a significant impact. It not only gives them great joy, it encourages them to learn, boosts their confidence and helps them to share their thoughts and feelings with others, opening up a world of independence, fulfilment and hope for the future.

Name: FU-Tone
Description:
Greetings from Adam Reiver! Welcome to FU-Tone website! (Formerly FloydUpgrades.com) FU does so much more than upgrade parts for “Floyds” and FU just seems so fitting for the circumstances of the name change! I have been working on improving tone with the greatest guitar players in the world for the last 25 years. I have found out what works and what does not… I am happy to share this with you. Tone is selective! FU is dedicated to help you find what is best for YOU! Using the best materials available, FU manufactures the ultimate in high performance guitar parts used by the PROS! Obviously, FU specializes in locking tremolo parts but if you dig around the site you will find upgrades for your Strat, Les Paul, Tele, Acoustic and more.

In my dedicated effort to bring you the best of the best, I will continue to design and manufacture new FU products as well as bringing in other items that I think are cool. Check back often, feel free to ask me questions and keep chasing TONE!

Description: Spirit Music Collective is a full service music production company located in Studio City, CA. Offering creative music services including composition, music supervision, music editing and music mastering as well as clearance and licensing to the entire production community. Spirit Music Collective is a world leader in all things music. We are one of the few music companies in the world to have successfully established client bases in a wide variety of media including broadcast TV, film, digital media, VR and all new and emerging media formats. The company has an international presence and worldwide relationships resulting in global reach and representation for our clients and their music.

Name: The Unsigned Guide
Description:
The Unsigned Guide is a music industry contacts directory & career guide produced specifically for emerging bands, artists, music managers, and the UK music industry. First published in 2003 as a printed directory, The Unsigned Guide is now an online only directory full of music contact listings covering all aspects of the business from record labels, music publishers, PR companies, recording studios, managers to radio stations, venues, gig promoters, festivals and music distribution.

As well as our music industry directory, one of our most popular features is our monthly Spotlight blog where we champion 5 stand-out tracks submitted by Unsigned Guide band & musician members. We’ve been among the first to tip some fine artists & bands via our Spotlight blog who have gone onto greater things. Acts championed by us early on have since been written about by the likes of NME, Q Magazine, The Guardian, received airplay on BBC Radio 1, BBC 6 Music, Amazing Radio, Radio X, plus have secured managers, PR companies & pluggers, music publishers and record labels.

Description:

We proudly offer products from top brands and provide warehouse-direct dealer pricing, making high-quality equipment accessible to everyone.

We specialize in complete system solutions for contractors, installers, mobile DJs, and entertainers, covering sound, lighting, video, stage, and installations. As the first record label of its kind in the region it shaped the industry and the culture that we know today.
Bassivity is an independent production house and most recognized music brand in Eastern Europe.
As a long time regional pioneer in the music space Bassivity is constantly creating new projects that are in line with digital innovations and technology.

Description:

Description: We offer high-Quality Music Tools, on-line equipment for giving zoom & Facetime lessons, equipment for setting up a cutting edge music school/studio  and music educational videos!

Name: Signature Tracks
Description:
GRAMMY & ASCAP AWARD-WINNING ARTISTS. CUSTOM SCORE. EXPERT CURATION AND CULTURE-MOVING SOUND TO ELEVATE YOUR CREATIVE.

For over a decade, Signature Tracks founders Russell Howard, Adam Malka, and David Lasman have sonically amplified culture across global platforms.

With thousands of scores, trailers, and digital placements, Signature Tracks’ influence and impact on music for visual media has prolific reach & resonance. Scoring for major broadcast networks including CBS, Bravo, E!, Viacom, NBCUniversal, MTV, and VH1, Signature Tracks has empowered brands like Netflix, Quibi, Facebook Watch, Amazon, as well as Nissan, Complex, Skype and DC Comics to craft unique sonic identity for a diverse range of content through their expert guidance & creative leadership.

Signature Tracks music library consists of 42,000 exclusive tracks, with a Grammy award-winning custom music division working under the leadership of 2x ASCAP award-winner & co-founder Russell Howard.

Name: HIDALGO – Junge Klassik
Description: Der HIDALGO ist Münchens spannendstes Klassik-Start-Up. Er verbindet paradoxe Welten zu intensiven, rauschhaften Erlebnissen. Dazu produziert das interdisziplinäre Team innovative Konzertformate und veranstaltet das jährliche HIDALGO Festival für junge Klassik. Erlaubt ist, was sich zu etwas Größerem zusammenfügt.

Name: Jazzin'
Description:
Jazzin' est une association organisatrice du festival Jazzin'Cheverny qui se déroule chaque année depuis 2008 en plein coeur de la Vallée de la Loire (41).
C'est un évènement musical dont l'essence même est la musique, le partage, la convivialité, le terroir et l'écologie. C'est ainsi que prend vie l'esprit Jazzin' :

 Une programmation de qualité et une convivialité artistique
 Des circuits courts : produits et producteurs locaux
 Le développement durable au coeur de toutes les démarches.

En quelques chiffres, Jazzin'Cheverny c'est 150 bénévoles, 70 partenaires et LE plus gros festival du département ! Il participe activement au développement touristique & économique local et au rayonnement de la région Centre-Val-de-Loire.

On comptabilise pas moins de 3000 festivaliers par jour, + de 5000 entrées payantes pour la scène du château.

Name: Sound Credit
Description:
Sound Credit is the all-in-one platform for sharing music, managing versions, capturing credits, and streamlining collaboration. From indie sessions to major releases, it connects playback, files, splits, and metadata in one intelligent system, accessible across desktop, mobile, and web. 

Used in over 60 countries and by more than 50 labels including majors and top indies, Sound Credit integrates with PROs, CMOs, and leading music tech platforms to unify the creative and business sides of music. 

Built by musicians, engineers, and designers across Memphis, Nashville, San Francisco, and Buenos Aires, we are creating a faster and fairer future for songwriters, producers, engineers, labels, and all music creators.

Name: Digital Music Marketing
Description: Digital Music Marketing is a major force in online and mobile music marketing, internet promotion and digital distribution systems for a wide variety of artists, labels and recordings in the independent music community. A client focused turnkey solution for musicians around the world to sell their music on the internet, DMM provides personalized, highly accessible service and a global network of industry relationships that function as the business interface between artists, labels and the vast and growing digital music marketplace.

Name: LandesJugendChor Rheinland-Pfalz
Description:
Der LandesJugendChor Rheinland-Pfalz (LJC) wurde 1982 gegründet und feiert 2022 sein 40-jähriges Bestehen.

Seit seiner Gründung hat der Chor mehr als 120 Arbeitsphasen durchgeführt und dabei weit über die rheinland-pfälzische Landesgrenze hinaus gastiert, so auch im europäischen Ausland bis hin nach Russland und Südamerika.
Der LJC ist eine Förderinstitution für talentierte junge Sänger:innen im Alter von 16 bis 26 Jahren. Er steht unter der Trägerschaft des Landesmusikrats Rheinland-Pfalz und erhält seine Unterstützung durch das Kulturministerium Rheinland-Pfalz. Das Repertoire des Chores umfasst anspruchsvolle Literatur aus allen Epochen der Musik, von der frühen Polyphonie bis zu zeitgenössischen Uraufführungen. In diesem Sinne versteht sich der LJC als kulturpolitischer Botschafter des Landes Rheinland-Pfalz und präsentiert sich bei Konzerten, internationalen Festivals und Wettbewerben im In- und Ausland.

Als Musikalische Leiter:innen werden renommierte und herausragende Dirigent:innen verpflichtet. Mit diesem Konzept wechselnder Dozent:innen werden die Chormitglieder optimal gefördert und auf etwaige professionelle Musikerlaufbahnen vorbereitet.

Die bisherigen Gesamtleiter des LandesJugendChors Rheinland-Pfalz waren Karl-Günter Bechtel (bis 1985), Willi Becker (bis 1996), Albrecht Schneider (bis 2016), Matiss Druvins (bis 2021). Seit August 2021 hat Björn Rodday die Leitung übernommen.

Name: Regalias Digitales
Description:
Regalías Digitales LLC is the leading royalty collection agency in the Latin music industry, representing hundreds of Grammy-winning and platinum-selling Latin rock, pop, tropical and Regional Mexican artists. We administer and assist foreign artists with the collection of their digital performance and Neighboring Rights royalties in more than 16 countries. We also grow artists' long-term royalty revenue by promoting increased programming and algorithmic support of their music on internet radio services like Pandora & SiriusXM and via in-store retail play with such partners as Muzak/DMX and PlayNetwork. Our office also focuses on YouTube monetization for hundreds of clients, specializing in manual claims of music publishing rights for live and user generated content.

We also provide music licensing and music supervision services for a number of projects and clients. Recent projects include serving as music supervisor for the new Netflix/Univision series 'El Chapo,' as well as licensing for Telemundo's 'Silvana Sin Lana', NBC Universo's 'El Vato' and the documentary film 'The Classic.'

Regalías Digitales LLC also assists its clients with a number of other services including Trademark Registration of the client’s name, Copyright Registration of songs, dispute resolution among artist/group members, and the investigation of fraudulent collection of artist royalties by unauthorized parties.

Name: Wocabe
Description: Lo-fi, Jazz & Piano BGM - Best while working, studying or just chilling.

Name: conservatorio giuseppe verdi -milan
Description:
The Conservatorio di Musica "Giuseppe Verdi", founded 1808, is one of the most important italian music institutes; with more than 1,700 students, over 240 teachers and 20 majors, it is Italy's largest university of music. Thanks to its outstanding standard of education it is reckoned as one of the most prestigious music institutions in Europe. 
Among the long list of prominent students and teachers,  we can mention the following names, from past to present: Alberto Mozzati, Paolo Borciani, Luciano Berio, Franco Donatoni, Niccolò Castiglioni, Claudio Abbado, Arturo Benedetti Michelangeli, Bruno Canino, Antonio Ballista, Maurizio Pollini, Rocco Filippini, Riccardo Muti, Paolo Bordoni, Ivan Fedele, Luca Francesconi, Barbara Frittoli, Daniele Gatti and many others.
The Conservatorio is part of the AFAM-system (Arts & Music Higher Education System), parallel to University. Access is with a high-school diploma, after audition.

Name: World of Brass
Description:
Alongside the world’s leading brass record label you’ll find instruments, sheet music, accessories and more. Our extensive recordings catalogue contains acclaimed albums from our own labels and many others - this includes CDs, DVDs, downloadable audio and video!

We are also excited to bring you wobplay, a new brass streaming service. Born out of over 20 years' passionate involvement with brass bands we have created a unique experience where the very best studio albums sit alongside stunning HD video of live events.

Name: St Mary's Music School
Description:
St Mary’s Music School is Scotland’s only independent specialist music school offering a world class standard of music and academic education for talented young musicians aged 9 – 19. St Mary’s Music School aims to provide outstanding young instrumentalists and choristers the opportunity to flourish and excel, musically and academically, in a safe, supportive and inspiring environment. 

Conveniently located near Edinburgh's Haymarket Station, St Mary’s Music School welcomes musically gifted children from Scotland, the UK and further afield. Notable alumni include renowned concert pianist Steven Osborne, Opera North's Music Director, Garry Walker, composers Helen Grime and David Horne, and actor, presenter and singer Alexander Armstrong, who was a chorister pupil at the School. 

Dedicated to advancing music education, St Mary's Music School is committed to building meaningful connections within existing music organisations, while nurturing the next generation of musical talent. Public events and masterclasses are open to young musicians from across Scotland, whilst term-time Saturday Music Classes offer early learning to younger children in the local community.

The School’s academic results are exceptional, supported by very small classes sizes, bespoke timetables and individual attention. There is a strong focus on music, languages, mathematics and science. The School has been rated the best performing independent school in Scotland for Highers and Advanced Highers by the Sunday Times for 2022 and 2023 respectively. 

The majority of our pupils move on to further their education at leading conservatoires and universities in the UK and abroad. 
We welcome pupils from across Scotland, the rest of the UK and beyond and we have 30 residential boarding places in twin en-suite rooms.

Name: Dame Evelyn Glennie
Description:
Evelyn Glennie is the first person in history to successfully create and sustain a full-time career as a solo percussionist, performing worldwide with the greatest orchestras, conductors and artists. She fondly recalls having played the first percussion concerto in the history of The Proms at the Albert Hall in 1992, which paved the way for orchestras around the world to feature percussion concerti. She had the honour of a leading role in the Opening Ceremony of the London 2012 Olympic Games.

Evelyn regularly provides masterclasses and consultations designed to guide the next generation. She is also a leading commissioner of over 200 new pieces for solo percussion for many of the world's most eminent composers. The film ‘Touch the Sound’ and her enlightening TED speech remain key testimonies to her approach to sound-creation.

Evelyn was awarded an OBE in 1993 and now has nearly 100 international awards to date, including the Polar Music Prize and the Companion of Honour. Evelyn continues to inspire and motivate people from all walks of life. Her masterclasses and consultations are designed to guide the next generation.

Evelyn is currently embarking on the formation of the Evelyn Glennie Archive Collection. The vision is to open a centre that embodies her mission to Teach the World to Listen. She aims to ‘improve communication and social cohesion by encouraging everyone to discover new ways of listening. We want to inspire, to create, to engage and to empower’.

Name: Green Line Records
Description:
Green Line Records is a nonprofit, student-run record label based out of Northeastern University in Boston, Massachusetts. The record label's greater objective is to discover artists below the threshold at which larger record labels normally notice them, and to break that threshold by accelerating their careers. Green Line works with artists from a myriad of genres, providing them each with a unique complement of services that caters to their niche markets. The model allows artists to work completely through the record label for services that include management, studio / live recording, booking, merchandising, marketing, brand design and more.

Every aspect of the business is organized by students enrolled in Northeastern University who are committed to giving local artists the support needed to enter and thrive throughout the music industry. Green Line is effectively a hub for student research, using established industry practices as a foundation from which students can actively implement innovative business strategies for both the record label and its artists.

Laying the tracks for Boston's best since 1998.

We do believe in thought, as a way to express every possible representation of art.

Welcome to our world!
