Name: Grupo Menos é Mais
Description:
Com mais de 250 milhões de visualizações no Youtube, o grupo de pagode Menos é Mais já representa Brasília em outros estados e é a promessa do gênero musical no Brasil. O grupo tem três anos de estrada e já coleciona números impressionantes na internet e fãs ilustres, como os jogadores de futebol da Seleção Brasileira: Neymar, Thiago Silva, Marquinhos e Roberto Firmino.

Com um repertório animado, que mescla regravações e músicas autorais, o Menos é Mais lota casas por onde passa, inclusive no Eixo Rio-São Paulo, onde o samba tem raízes fortes. O grupo é formado por cinco integrantes: Duzão (vocalista), Gustavo Goes (percussionista), Jorge Farias (percussionista), Paulinho Félix (percussionista) e Ramon Alvarenga (percussionista).

O DNA do pagode brasiliense guia o grupo pelos estados do Brasil. Se por um lado, o calor dos palcos é contagiante e motivador, por outro, os pagodeiros de Brasília acumulam mais de 2 milhões de ouvintes mensais nas plataformas musicais. O canal do Youtube, por sua vez, conta com 1,7 milhão de inscritos. A estratégia inovadora de postar um vídeo por semana resultou na criação de vários quadros musicais. O queridinho é o “Churrasquinho do Menos é Mais”: mais de 290 milhões de visualizações.

Name: Michigan Philharmonic
Description:
The Michigan Philharmonic  is a fully professional regional orchestra under the direction of Nan Washburn and performs concerts throughout SE Michigan.  

Our program includes a 6-8 season concerts, an annual performance of The "Nutcracker" numerous special events and the CLASSical Music Outreach Program.  

In addition the Michigan Philharmonic Youth Orchestra, for students 8-18, includes 2 levels of strings, the youth symphony and a flute choir.

Please visit our website to find out more about our concert season at www.michiganphil.org

Name: Publishing Scope
Description:
At Publishing Scope Music we strongly believe in the democratization of music, that is why we offer our artists Copyright protection through Blockchain cetificates, continuous training, a strong community of artists where they can meet, grow and collaborate together, Booking and  Digital Marketing. 

We’re  mainly focus but not limited to music licensing (TV, film, advertising, video games and other media).

Name: Kawai America
Description:
For nearly a century, Kawai has been at the forefront of piano innovation, blending world-class craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology. As a global leader in acoustic and digital pianos, Kawai is dedicated to inspiring musicians at every level—whether in concert halls, classrooms, or homes.

At Kawai America Corporation, we proudly represent Kawai’s legacy in North America, providing artists, educators, and pianists with instruments that elevate their musical expression. From the revered Shigeru Kawai grand pianos, known for their handcrafted excellence, to our award-winning digital and hybrid pianos, we continue to shape the future of music.

Beyond instruments, we are committed to supporting music education, performance, and innovation. Through partnerships, sponsorships, initiatives, and our collaboration with top learning platforms, we strive to make music more accessible and enriching for all.

Because music is more than sound—it’s instrumental to life.

Name: Split Works
Description:
We are a music company in Asia made for the 21st Century. 
我们是一个为21世纪而生的音乐公司。

Split Works: Independent Music & Festival Promoter
http://split.works 

Scorched: Booking Agency, Asia
http://scorched.asia/

Wooozy.cn: China’s 1# Music Community
http://www.wooozy.cn/

To mention but a few!

Name: Uppsala Konsert & Kongress
Description: Uppsala Konsert & Kongress är ett kommunalt bolag beläget mitt i centrala Uppsala. Här frodas musik- och kulturlivet och människor från hela världen möts i husets vackra lokaler. På 14 600 kvadratmeter och fem scener genomför Uppsala Konsert & Kongress cirka 300 kulturevenemang årligen. Här ryms allt från internationell kammarmusik, gränslös folkmusik och svensk hiphop till modern dans, samtida konst och barnens Maja Gräddnos. I husets många flexibla lokaler anordnas varje år hundratals möten, mässor, större konferenser, kongresser och internationella nätverksträffar.

Name: Highnote
Description:
Highnote is the best way to discuss and organize notes on any audio file. Share time-specific notes, reactions, melodies, and chat about your audio projects — all in real time.

 How It Works: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Esv9ZlO8BzI&t=1s

Name: Croatia Records
Description:
The leading discography house in Croatia (former Jugoton) was founded in 1947 and after the democratic changes in 1990 has changed its name into Croatia Records. The business goal was to gather the most important artists, songwriters, composers, producers and performers, and to keep on developing the distributive network which by now counts for four own stores and more than 30 franchised stores. 
Invested effort has reaffirmed Croatia Records’ leading role in the Croatian discography. Contributing to that is the fact that the share of the production of sound carriers of the Croatia Records and her sub-labels on the domestic markets in every segment of the musical creativity, from classic music, jazz, instrumental, pop, rock, ethno, and folk music is at around the fascinating figure of 70%. 

Even though Croatia Records has a comprehensive audio and video library, connecting with even bigger number of independent individuals, labels, sub-lablels and important companies would create an avid audiotorial wealth in service to those who appreciate music. 

The new business philosophy of the Croatia Records has not only increased the number of re-releases and compilations, but has led to the signing of numerous contracts with some of the greatest names of the Croatian music scene.

Name: Kawai America
Description:
For nearly a century, Kawai has been at the forefront of piano innovation, blending world-class craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology. As a global leader in acoustic and digital pianos, Kawai is dedicated to inspiring musicians at every level—whether in concert halls, classrooms, or homes.

At Kawai America Corporation, we proudly represent Kawai’s legacy in North America, providing artists, educators, and pianists with instruments that elevate their musical expression. From the revered Shigeru Kawai grand pianos, known for their handcrafted excellence, to our award-winning digital and hybrid pianos, we continue to shape the future of music.

Beyond instruments, we are committed to supporting music education, performance, and innovation. Through partnerships, sponsorships, initiatives, and our collaboration with top learning platforms, we strive to make music more accessible and enriching for all.

Because music is more than sound—it’s instrumental to life.

Name: Bentley Records, LLC
Description: Bentley Records is an international record label operating since 2013, specialized in building careers of artists. Throughout the years we have laid the foundation to jump start the careers of many artists. We're all about the quality of music and the quality of everything else we do. The artists who work with us are a prime example of this principle. Our roster includes well established, industry standard artists, producers and songwriters.

Name: Piano Teacher
Description: I teach all levels, including beginners and adults. I prefer teaching in  my studio as I feel that it is a positive environment for learning. I have a wonderful Steinway 7' Grand that I am happy to share with my students. Please feel free to contact me to arrange for lessons.

Name: Hiphop In Je Smoel
Description:
Het platform Hiphop In Je Smoel (HIJS) is in 1999 opgericht door een groep enthousiaste hiphopliefhebbers met als doel verslag te doen van de nationale en internationale hiphopscene. Sindsdien heeft HIJS zich ontwikkeld tot een van de belangrijkste spelers binnen de Nederlandse hiphop met als basis de website www.hiphopinjesmoel.com. Alle activiteiten van HIJS dienen één doel: 

‘Het stimuleren van de (inter)nationale hiphopcultuur in al haar uitingsvormen.’

De core business van HIJS is de website. Hiernaast organiseert HIJS al sinds 2001 evenementen, fungeert zij als adviseur op het gebied van podiumprogrammering en is mediapartner bij een groot aantal nationale en internationale evenementen. Naast het belichten en begeleiden van artiesten krijgen ook talentvolle journalisten, fotografen en videomakers via HIJS de kans om zich verder te ontwikkelen.

HIJS is een multimediaal hiphopplatform dat zich inzet om hiphopliefhebbers op verschillende manieren met elkaar in contact te brengen en om de kennis op het gebied van hiphop te delen. Via HIJS worden meningen uitgewisseld en ontstaan regelmatig samenwerkingsverbanden. HIJS heeft met haar site en de verschillende evenementen die zij (co)produceert bovendien de faciliteiten om talentvolle artiesten te ondersteunen.

Name: 3Dvarius
Description: We make electric violins including the 3Dvarius, concert electric violin created by the 3D-printing technology.

Name: YEAR0001
Description:
YEAR0001 is a multidisciplinary record label and creative studio founded in Stockholm in 2015.
Our vision is to act as an independent incubator active in the landscape of music, culture, fashion and technology.
We believe in using transparency and co-creation to achieve a more sustainable landscape for our artists and creators.

Name: New Music NOW
Description:
Online platform voor nieuwe muziek!
Het platform toont een rijke waaier aan actuele componisten, musici, artiesten en hun projecten, zowel live als online. New Music NOW is een initiatief van Stichting New Music NOW en wordt mede mogelijk gemaakt door Buma Cultuur, Nieuw Geneco (Genootschap Nederlandse Componisten) en vele partners.

Name: California Music
Description:
We are sonic storytellers. Artist-driven. Grammy nominated. A full-service audio company. We believe in the superpower of music, sound, and voice, and in the importance of inspired authenticity.

We burn for what we do, and some say success proves us right: our team of musicians, sound designers, and creative producers can impress with Grammy nominations, multi-platinum records, and countless industry awards.

But more importantly, we believe in the value that our acoustic creations add to the world: music connects, sound makes you feel, voices draw you in. And we believe in the importance of human connection and positive interaction. This is what really drives us forward.

Name: SubmitHub
Description: SubmitHub was founded in late 2015 as a way to make the process of sending music to curators as easy and transparent as possible. We give you all sorts of statistics and ways to filter who to send your music to so you can make sure your song ends up in the right hands. For curators, this means getting sent more music you'll actually like.

Name: ANNA AGENCY
Description: ANNA AGENCY is a young and dynamic DJ booking agency based in Amsterdam. The core business of the organization revolves around booking the performances of DJ’s across the globe. The main focus of the agency is aimed towards managing and handling all aspects surrounding the artists’ performances with a high level of quality and undertaking strategic steps to develop long and sustainable careers. The ANNA AGENCY team consists of young professionals driven by ambition and a strong passion for music. Within the office there is an open and informal atmosphere.

Name: FreshTracks Germany
Description:
Ihre Quelle für hochwertige Produktionsmusik
Willkommen bei FreshTracks, Ihrer zuverlässigen Produktionsmusikbibliothek für GEMA- und GVL-registrierte Musik. 

Seit über 30 Jahren sind wir stolz darauf, Kreativschaffenden und Content-Produzenten in 11 Ländern weltweit eine unverzichtbare Ressource zu bieten.

Unsere Stärken:
- Umfangreiche Musikauswahl: Mit einer beeindruckenden Sammlung von über 370.000 Tracks bieten wir eine vielfältige Palette an Musikgenres und Stilen, um Ihre Projekte zum Leben zu erwecken.

- Maßgeschneiderte Kompositionen: Unser engagiertes Team von Komponisten steht Ihnen zur Verfügung, um maßgeschneiderte Musikstücke zu erstellen, die Ihre Vision perfekt unterstützen und verstärken.

- Internationale Präsenz: Mit einer globalen Präsenz können wir Sie in verschiedenen Ländern unterstützen und Ihnen helfen, Ihre Zielgruppe weltweit zu erreichen.

Unsere Mission:
Unsere Mission ist es, Ihr kreatives Schaffen zu bereichern und zu beflügeln. Wir verstehen die entscheidende Rolle, die Musik in der Content-Erstellung spielt, und setzen uns leidenschaftlich dafür ein, hochwertige, lizenzierte Musik zur Verfügung zu stellen, die Ihre Projekte auf ein neues Niveau hebt.

Kontaktieren Sie uns:
Wir freuen uns darauf, mit Ihnen zusammenzuarbeiten und Ihre Projekte musikalisch zu unterstützen. Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute, um mehr darüber zu erfahren, wie FreshTracks Ihre kreativen Vorhaben beflügeln kann.

#FreshTracks #Produktionsmusik #Kreativität #Musiklizenzierung #MaßgeschneiderteMusik

Name: Official.fm
Description:
Attention is a scarce currency, particularly in the digital world. But, when fans discover a music for the first time - on social media or on influential blogs - you've got their full attention: Do I like this track? Should I share it with my friends? How can I add it to my music library?

Trusted by world's biggest record labels such as Universal Music Group, Official.fm is used by artists to share their latest music with their online communities - via social media (Facebook, Twitter) and influential blogs. 

Official.fm transforms this rare window of attention into a unique opportunity for brands to connect with a young and digital savvy audience. Thanks to a clever user experience, the brand's content is seamlessly integrated in the music experience.

Similar to companies like WeTransfer, we believe in big beautiful ads - this generates curiosity which in turn generates clicks and brand love. We like to think that our solution delivers glossy-ad impact like Vogue or Vanity Fair but on the web.

Our fully responsive HTML5 technology means our format can be viewed from any device and can virtually host any types of ad - static images, videos, dynamic ad and interactive ad (HTML5/Flash).

Spend your ad budget wisely...and fairly. More than 50% of revenues on Official.fm goes to content owners. Music fans not only enjoy an immersive and non intrusive experience but they also support artists' art while doing it. It's a great point that can be leveraged while doing a campaign with Official.fm - it's like buying your coffee with Max Havelaar.

Name: Loop Events
Description: We are a company built to inspire and empower, by creating a platform for people to serve and use their God- given gifts and abilities. Our vision is to build a community of people who love the Lord and selflessly serve others out of the overflow of their relationship with Christ. We work with artists & non- profits to provide the best volunteers for their tours and events. We know without incredible volunteers these events wouldn’t happen.

Name: Vivaldi Music Academy
Description:
Vivaldi Music Academy is the largest music school in the US and recognized as the fastest growing by Inc. 5000 Magazine and Houston Business Journal three years in a row. We offer private music lessons and classes for all levels in various instruments including, piano, violin, cello, drums, voice, viola, flute and more. Our dedicated world-class faculty and state of the art facilities offer the opportunity for students to foster the joy of music. 

We provide students the unique opportunity to perform nationally and internationally at concert halls such as Carnegie Hall in New York City, The John F. Kennedy Center in Washington D.C., Royal Academy of Music in London, UK, Vivaldi’s church in Venice, Italy, Brahm’s Hall in Vienna, and Marble Hall in Salzburg. 

Vivaldi Music Academy is conveniently located and provides flexible hours to accommodate today’s busy families in West University, Houston Heights, Bellaire, Sugar Land, Houston – Memorial, San Antonio, and Little Rock, Arkansas.

Join now to begin your music education journey!

Name: Phonetic Recordings
Description:
Phonetic Recordings is one of Ibiza and the world’s favourite House Music labels, formed by CEO Rob Roar in 2001, Phonetic stamped it’s name firmly in Dance Music History smashing the record books when they became the first label in the world to deliver Four No.1 Records in Ibiza in consecutive years;

2001 Max Linen 'The Soulshaker'
2002 Max Linen 'Paradiso Del Mundo'
2003 Kujay DaDa 'Young Hearts'
2004 Max Linen 'Flashback' 

The Phonetic artist roster boasts some of House Music's Hottest talent, a selection of producers and remixers would include Bodyrox & Luciana, Robot Man (Michael Gray), Max Linen, Rob Roar, Allister Whitehead, Braund Reynolds, Martijn ten Velden, KuJay DaDa, DJ Gee (Bora Bora), Daley Padley, Deadmau5, Yousef & Steve Mac, Paul Woolford, Grant Nelson, Another Chance, Sandy Vee & Patrick Alavi.

Phonetic has one of the best track records in the business when it comes to A&R, taking productions with good ideas, putting songs on them, working with the producer to get the product right and then blowing them up on a global scale, turning them into hits.

March 2009 sees the launch of the brand new Phonetic website, as well as the Phonetic Shop where releases will be available before anywhere else. You’ll also be able to download our Podcasts (also on iTunes), Vinyl, Digital Downloads, Event Tickets & Merchandise. 

Phonetic are just about to launch their ‘Phonetic Meets’ tour dates bringing their sound directly to the worlds dancefloors with Live PA's from the likes of Luciana (Bodyrox), Trix (DaDa Ft. Sandy Rivera ‘Lollipop’) Dina Vass & Mary Pearce (KuJay DaDa) not to mention some seriously hot DJ’s from the Phonetic DJ Roster.

For booking enquiries: 
tours@phoneticrecordings.com

Come and say hello and for further info: 
www.myspace.com/phoneticrecordings
www.facebook.com

Name: PopGun Presents
Description:
PopGun Presents was founded in 2008 by Rami Haykal and Jake Rosenthal, in a cacophonous live/work space in Bushwick, Brooklyn, with the stubborn idea of celebrating and advocating for the artists and music we care about. Back then, we were unemployed and we threw parties. There were long soggy night-mornings, and there was life-giving music, so we followed the light, Amen. 

Since 2008, PopGun Presents has grown from a hapless duo into a full-scale music events production and promotion collective, a passionate team with discerning taste and a very large reach. We owned and operated the beloved Williamsburg music venue Glasslands, and then we went on to build and manage Elsewhere in Bushwick – a large multi-room, multi-genre home for music and the arts. 

Every month we have our hands in a large collection of highly curated shows and parties throughout the city, in a humble attempt to spotlight the world-class artists that we feel deserve your respect and attention. Some events companies present music they don’t believe in — you won’t find that here.

Name: Cavendish Music
Description:
UK's largest independent production music library under the umbrella of music publishing giant Anthem Entertainment. Music ranging from classical to underground record labels. Offering bespoke works and free music searches.

Started as Boosey & Hawkes Library in 1937

Name: Music Connection Magazine
Description: Founded in 1977, Music Connection connects the street to the elite. Educating and informing musicians and music people is Music Connection's primary goal—whether they are just getting started or already possess multiple Grammys. The company releases a monthly magazine, weekly newsletter and a website which is updated daily.

Name: Endlesss
Description:
Endlesss is a team of life-long music-makers building things to connect the world through musical creativity. We want our work to inspire, deepen and amplify creative journeys in music through building communities and economies around musical creativity.

We've built a live collaborative music studio and social network for iOS & desktop which connects music makers of all levels anywhere in the world, allowing them to create, share and remix musical ideas in real time.

Name: SideOneDummy Records
Description: Independent label distributed by ADA.  Bands include Flogging Molly, The Gaslight Anthem, Gogol Bordello, Fake Problems, Dusty Rhodes, The Briggs, Reverend Peyton, Chuck Ragan & More!

Name: Roland Corporation Australia
Description:
Roland Corporation is a leading manufacturer and distributor of electronic musical instruments, including keyboards and synthesizers, guitar products, electronic percussion, digital recording equipment, amplifiers, and audio processing devices. With over 40 years of innovation that continues to shape the sound of modern music, Roland sets the standards in music technology for the world to follow. Check out the equipment used by your favorite musicians—chances are, they're using Roland gear to create their music. Brands include: ROLAND, BOSS, and V-MODA.

DIGITAL PIANOS
From classic-styled instruments that provide the authentic look and feel of traditional pianos to mobile instruments designed for professional use on stage, Roland’s award-winning digital pianos deliver top-level touch and tone plus unmatched education and technology features.

KEYBOARDS, SYNTHESIZERS & DANCE/DJ
Roland offers a full range of keyboards, synthesizers and electronic music production products that lead the industry in sound quality, performance features, and ease of use. With models to suit the needs of players from beginning to professional, Roland keyboards are among the most popular in the world.

ELECTRONIC DRUMS & PERCUSSION
Roland’s revolutionary electronic percussion instruments offer drummers a great-sounding, flexible alternative to traditional acoustic drums. The acclaimed V-Drums family of products rule both studio and stage, while a wide range of other innovative instruments meet the recording, performing, and practicing needs of all types of percussionists.

GUITAR PRODUCTS
Roland manufactures a comprehensive line of popular guitar products under the Roland and BOSS brand names. Cutting-edge gear choices in this category includes the famous BOSS compact pedal lineup, the innovative V-Guitar range, and the legendary Jazz Chorus, AC-series, and CUBE amplifiers, to name just a few.

Name: Orquesta y Coro de Cámara SONORA
Description:
La Orquesta y Coro de Cámara Sonora es una entidad artístico-musical de emprendimiento joven, creada, integrada y gestionada por jóvenes músicos profesionales que se coordinan con un objetivo común: hacer de la música un arte actual para todos y compartirla con el contexto que hoy nos rodea. Los perfiles que integran Sonora se forman en diferentes conservatorios superiores y profesionales de Madrid, abarcando conocimientos muy diversos que favorecen la creación de un entorno enriquecedor de crecimiento personal y profesional.
En sus últimos proyectos, la Orquesta y Coro de Cámara Sonora ha dejado huella en espacios culturales tan importantes como el Teatro La Latina, Teatro Reina Victoria, Teatro Liceo, Teatro Zorrilla, Teatro Ramos Carrión, Teatro Marín, Palacio de Congresos de Plasencia, Teatro Filarmónica, las Catedrales de Toledo, Ávila, Segovia, Madrid y el Real Coliseo de Carlos III, entre otros.
Ha colgado el cartel de "sold out" en sus experiencias "Aurum" de música a la luz de las velas con más de 10.000 espectadores. También ha desarrollado proyectos pedagógicos, acercándose a multitud de niños y jóvenes, el futuro de la cultura. Ha colaborado con instituciones como la Comunidad de Madrid, el Ayuntamiento de Madrid, el Ayuntamiento de Sant Josep de sa Talaia, el Consejo de Ibiza y el Ayuntamiento de San Lorenzo de El Escorial, abriéndose camino en el panorama cultural actual y apostando por la cultura joven.

Name: 'Heart-to-heart'-vocalcoaching, studiocoaching & voicetraining
Description:
I'm a singer in soul, jazz, blues, funk, musical, easylistening and rock, also gospelsinger and worship-vocalist, vocalcoach and voicetrainer in various musicstyles like: pop, jazz, soul, funk, rock, easylistening, blues, R&B, blackgospel, gospel and musical.
As a teacher I'm offering private-vocallessons for every singer in every musicstyle: beginner, semi-professionals and professionals. Also teaching in worshipsinging to vocalists of church music/worshipteams and to gospelsingers.
I also offer special 'Blackgospel'- workshops and private lessons in this special way of singing.

Name: Musika Lessons
Description:
Founded in 2001, Musika is considered one of the nation's premiere independent music teacher referral networks. Among the first nationally-based online companies of its kind, Musika is a marketplace for individuals seeking independent music teachers. 

The teachers in our network have occupied a unique place in music education mentoring students from all walks of life. Dedicated to the highest standard, we here at Musika understand the importance of quality service. Students choose Musika because we know music! 

We hold the highest possible A+ rating from the nations foremost online reliability source: The Better Business Bureau.
_______________________________________________________

Teaching Opportunities:

Musika is always looking for music lesson instructors who would like to provide their services on any of the following instruments: piano, guitar, bass, voice, violin, cello, trumpet, trombone, clarinet, saxophone, flute, drums, accordion, mandolin, harmonica, banjo, and ukulele.

Visit us online and sign up today!
https://www.musikalessons.com/jobs-for-music-teachers

Name: Montreux Jazz Artists Foundation by Montreux Jazz Festival
Description:
Fondation d'utilité publique, la Montreux Jazz Artists Foundation découvre et accompagne des jeunes talents (Montreux Jazz New Talent Awards, Music in the Park, Montreux Jazz Academy) et développe des projets didactiques (workshops, conférences, créations).
La Montreux Jazz Artists Foundation est née de la volonté de Claude Nobs de découvrir de nouveaux talents, de favoriser les échanges culturels et de créer un lieu privilégié de rencontre entre les artistes et le public. Ce rôle de tremplin, si cher au fondateur du Festival, était rempli depuis 2007 par la Fondation Montreux Jazz 2, qui multipliait échanges, découvertes et passerelles culturelles, pendant toute la durée du Festival. Devenue la Montreux Jazz Artists Foundation (MJAF) en 2014, la branche pédagogique du Festival prend une nouvelle dimension avec la création de la Montreux Jazz Academy. Elle intensifie ainsi sa mission de tisseuse de liens en étendant son soutien aux jeunes talents durant toute l'année.

Name: HAT Music
Description:
Il nostro obiettivo: ridefinire il networking nell'industria musicale

Siamo una startup tech che sta rivoluzionando il modo in cui artisti emergenti ed esperti del settore musicale si connettono e collaborano.

Abbiamo creato un marketplace che utilizza l'AI per facilitare l'incontro tra domanda e offerta nel settore musicale. La nostra app permette agli artisti di trovare e collaborare con i professionisti giusti (produttori, manager, A&R, ecc.), mentre offre agli esperti del settore uno spazio dedicato per monetizzare le proprie competenze e ampliare il proprio network.

Stiamo creando un ecosistema dove talento e competenza si incontrano efficacemente.
Crea insieme a noi il futuro dell'industria musicale

Name: THALIA HALL
Description: THALIA HALL is a music company based out of 1807 S Allport St, Chicago, IL, United States.

Name: Vibes Studio
Description: Vibes Studio : Découvrez notre réseau innovant de studios d'enregistrement et de DJ en libre-service, disponibles via un abonnement mensuel flexible. Vibes Studio, une initiative de Studiomap, offre des installations professionnelles où créativité et accessibilité se rencontrent pour libérer votre potentiel artistique. Pour en savoir plus sur nos services et nos emplacements, visitez notre site : vibes-studio.fr.

Name: Atom Music Audio
Description:
Atom Music Audio is a premier music production company, crafting captivating soundscapes for motion pictures and entertainment ads. Based in Bulgaria (Europe) with a dedicated office in Hollywood, California, we cater to the dynamic needs of the USA's entertainment industry, especially trailers.

Since our inception in 2016, we've made our mark, starting with Walt Disney Studios' 'SOLO: A Star Wars Story. Our portfolio includes collaborations with industry giants like Sony Pictures Entertainment, Warner Bros Pictures, Focus Features, Lucasfilm. Columbia Pictures, Universal Pictures, Marvel Entertainment, Amazon Studios, NBC, Netflix, CBS, and FX Networks.

From 'Wonder Woman 1984', 'Men In Black: International', 'Ford v Ferrari", 'The King's Man', 'Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes', 'X-Men: Dark Phoenix', 'The Northman', '65' and 'Night Swim' to 'American Horror Story', 'Ashoka', 'The Boys', 'Young Rock' and 'Midnight Mass', our music enriches diverse cinematic experiences, earning us a reputation for thrilling sounds that breathe life into every project.

At Atom Music Audio, our commitment to excellence knows no bounds. Explore our catalog for premium music tailored for high-caliber trailers, versatile SFXs, cutting-edge compositions, and exquisite TV production. Dive into our artist series, featuring stunning pop vocals.

For projects big or small, our passion is boundless. Reach out today, and let's elevate your project through the power of music.

Name: Guitar Player
Description: Guitar Player educates, empowers, and inspires obsessed guitarists to sound better and play better. Through its comprehensive print, online, and social-networking media. Guitar Player feeds a player’s passion for mastering tone, technique, gear, technology, composition, and live performance. Revered for its insightful artist interviews, multi-faceted music lessons, and trusted product reviews since 1967, Guitar Player has influenced generations of players.

Name: Rheingau Musik Festival Konzertgesellschaft mbH
Description:
The Rheingau Musik Festival  is one of Europe´s largest classical music festivals. 
In the summer, when the Rheingau reveals itself in its most luxuriant magnificence, music echoes between the serried ranks of ripening vines and the entire region constitutes a splendorus platform for aural delights of global stature. Unique cultural monuments are transformed into temples to the muses: Kloster Eberbach, Schloss Johannisberg, Kurhaus Wiesbaden or picturesque wine cellars. The 30st Rheingau Musik Festival will take place from June 24th to September 2nd 2017 and will showcase about 160 events.

Name: High Road Touring
Description:
High Road Touring is a booking agency dedicated to the growth and development of successful live music careers.

Unleashed in 2001 by Frank Riley, High Road Touring is driven by hard work, courage, conscience, the belief that things are continually getting better and that good will triumph over evil.

Name: discowax / One Seven Music / No3
Description: One Seven Music is a Sony Music brand focusing on pop music and the company's primary focus is on the global streaming market.

Name: Spaceland Presents
Description:
Since 2003, Spaceland has grown from a divey little club in Silverlake to a full events production & promotion, music curation, and venue management collective. These days we book and promote shows through our large events newsletter, we build and operate independent music venues in the Los Angeles area, and our ethos has remained the same to focus on the culture of emerging music without boundaries.
Spaceland Presents is the sister company to L.A.’s music venues The Echo/Echoplex and The Regent Theater, as well as media company DoLA. Spaceland produces and curates over 1200 concerts a year.

Name: e-muzyka S.A.
Description:
Kim jesteśmy?

- jesteśmy liderem rynku cyfrowej dystrybucji muzyki w Polsce!
- posiadamy w bazie i dysponujemy prawami do kilku milionów utworów muzycznych, w tym nagrań wszystkich największych wytwórni muzycznych na Świecie: Sony, Warner,
- reprezentujemy ponad czterysta polskich wytwórni niezależnych! Dostarczamy ich kontent do najważniejszych polskich i międzynarodowych serwisów muzycznych,
- dostarczamy kompleksowe rozwiązania techniczne i marketingowe, świadczymy usługi doradztwa marketingowego, pośredniczymy w pozyskiwaniu praw do wykorzystania muzyki,
- zarządzane przez nas treści generują ponad 250 milionów wyświetleń miesięcznie na YouTube,
- działamy jako dystrybutor albumów w postaci fizycznej.
_______________________________________________________________________________
e-Muzyka is a leading music/media distributor in digital and physical retail.  

Founded in 2005 company provides complex services related to distribution and marketing of music on all the largest digital music services, both local and global. 
Company is a certified YouTube partner and the biggest multi-channel network in Poland.

Name: Dawsons
Description:
A House of Music and Expression

Established in 1898 in Warrington, UK, Dawsons holds a storied place in the music retail landscape as one of its most enduring and respected names. With a rich legacy of expertise and resourcefulness, Dawsons combines heritage with modernity to deliver immersive shopping experiences and thoughtfully curated products. Committed to fostering creativity and community, the brand serves as a trusted partner for musicians at every stage of their journey. As part of Vista Musical Instruments, a Caldecott Music Group company, Dawsons continues to inspire and connect vibrant music scenes from the UK to Australia with passion and innovation.

Name: Radish Music
Description:
Music that moves.

Radish Music is a Music Supervision company founded by Peymon Maskan, a multi-award winning Music Supervisor working in ad, film and series. Alec Stern, most recently the Director of Music for DDB Worldwide, is a tenured Music Supervisor and Composer who has led music efforts for some of the world’s most recognizable brands. Jenna Wilson, coming from a background in Post Production, has led music coordination and supervision on a growing list of award-winning Film, TV, and ad projects. Rounding out the team, Gemma Schladow has years of experience in music discovery and curation roles for radio, tech, and sync spaces. We collaborate with Artists, Directors, and creative minds to craft one-of-a-kind musical moments which resonate in culture. 

From artists & producers, to music editors, musicologists and licensors, Radish Music utilizes the best in class craftspeople to bring our projects to life. We scale with the size of each endeavor, from 360 degree project management to casually introducing you to your next favorite artist.

Name: TAO S.A
Description:
At TAO S.A, we do not just understand the constantly evolving dynamics of the music industry; we shape them. 

As leaders in technological innovation, we develop customized digital tools that transform the way businesses operate in the music industry. 

Our solutions go beyond the conventional, covering everything from the financial sector with advanced split systems, advance credit, and quick and effective payments, to monitoring radios and TVs, and offering marketing services, accompanied by digital distribution systems and music editing. 

But our commitment to excellence doesn’t stop there. We are dedicated to pushing digital distribution and music editing to new heights, integrating Big Data and Artificial Intelligence to provide unparalleled insights and tailored strategies that elevate your business. 

At TAO, we are not just adopting cutting-edge technology; we are doing something that is in our blood, innovating all the time, and challenging ourselves in the pursuit of more transparency and better solutions for all, strengthening our partnerships and clients, and delivering quality, innovation, and effectiveness.

Name: Downtown Records
Description: Downtown Records is home to Miike Snow, Gnarls Barkley, Santigold, Justice, Cold War Kids, White Denim & more

Name: J & R Adventures (Official)
Description:
J&R Adventures, founded in 2006, is the official music management company and record label for blues-rock titan and Grammy award nominated artist Joe Bonamassa. We are a full service firm that handles everything from Joe Bonamassa’s album releases and concert tours, to his marketing, press, e-mail marketing and social networking. We count among our greatest successes to be helping Joe Bonamassa to release 11 #1 Billboard blues albums, with his latest album Different Shades of Blue hitting #8 on the top 200 overall albums chart. Bonamassa has also become a touring juggernaut, often playing up to 200 shows per year and recently performing at some of the greatest venues in the world; Royal Albert Hall, Radio City Music Hall, The Beacon Theatre, and Red Rocks Amphitheatre.

This summer Joe will be launching a summer amphitheatre tour that includes not only Red Rocks but even more of the greatest amphitheatres in the U.S. including Saratoga Performing Arts Center and Shoreline Amphitheatre in Mountainview, CA. Our core values at J&R Adventures are our dedication to cutting edge innovation in music management, integrity in everything we do, and above all a willingness to work our hardest and go above and beyond to manage our artist to the highest levels of success.

Our Main Artist websites are:
www.jbonamassa.com
www.bccommunion.com
www.rockcandyfunkparty.com
www.hartandbonamassa.com

Name: PCG Artist Development
Description:
Whether you are a new artist or a seasoned pro, we will customize an individual approach and build a specialized program to accommodate your needs for creative and professional growth. 

Our program is based on a well-rounded, long-term education curriculum, and we have partnered with some of the finest professionals in the industry in building our program. From A&R and performance coaching, to branding, styling and media training, each component of your career will be addressed to establish a comprehensive development plan and competitive marketing strategy.
Our provider services include:

· Career Guidance and Mentoring
· Strategic Planning
· Styling, Branding, and Marketing
· Entertainment Relations and Ethics	 	
· Media Training and Public Relations
· Live Performance Coaching	 	    
· Vocal Evaluation and Training
· Instrument Lessons	 	
· Songwriting Development and Creative Direction
· Etiquette Training and Life Coaching	 	
· Lifestyle and Wellness Education
· Development of EPKs and Music Videos	 	
· Digital Platforms and Web Development
· Studio Preparation and Music Production	 	
· Radio Campaigns and Promotions
· Label and A&R Presentations

Name: La Banda de Grillo
Description:
La Banda de Grillo es una banda Argentina creada en el año 2014 en Villa Carlos Paz, Córdoba, por Darío Grupenmajer con intención de generar música que alegre al mundo. Con un poderoso y destacado estilo se han convertido en uno de los artistas más impactantes de la escena, en fiestas y festivales. 

Letras alegres, imágenes coloridas y una puesta audiovisual atrayente es la clave del auge de la banda. 

Nacen como una banda independiente lanzando su primer single llamado "Veinte Veinte", haciendo alusión al año de su creación, en el marco de una pandemia mundial. Al poco tiempo, estrenan “Un Mundo Nuevo" con la destacada colaboración de Martin Papiglione, cantante de Los Caligaris. 

Ese mismo año, logran llamar la atención de la compañía Faro Latino, con quienes firman y lanzan todo el material discográfico conocido hasta la actualidad; logrando posicionar los temas en las principales plataformas digitales de música, con excelentes resultados. 

En 2022 nace una nueva colaboración para dar origen al 7mo single llamado "Un Beso y una Flor”, junto a La Beriso, reversionando este clásico de todos los tiempos. 

Las canciones alegres, el vestuario atrayente, la creatividad de cada videoclip y la impactante puesta en escena dan como resultado que cada show en vivo atraiga rápidamente la atención de los espectadores, generando alegría, entusiasmo y disfrute de inicio a fin. 

La Banda de Grillo se presenta en diversos escenarios, salas, discotecas y festivales de Argentina, con un público totalmente diferente al cual se ha logrado cautivar. Entre los principales, destacamos Estadio Mario Alberto Kempes (Córdoba), Plaza Prospero Molina (Cosquín) , Teatro Luxor (Villa Carlos Paz), Molino Rojo disco (Villa Carlos Paz), Fiesta Provincial del Trigo (Tres Arroyos), Fiesta de la Juventud (Ramírez, Entre Ríos), Festival Musa (Malagueño), Fiesta de la Primavera (Villa Carlos Paz). También compartieron escenario con La Beriso, Los Caligaris, Ulises Bueno, El Polaco, Vilma Palma, La Konga, La Bersuit, Rombai, Migrantes, entre otras. 

Actualmente la banda está grabando y produciendo sus próximos singles con grandes colaboraciones que pronto se darán a conocer. También se encuentra enfocada en la segunda etapa de la gira por toda Argentina y países limítrofes. 

La Banda de Grillo / Management / Fernando Tardivo / +54 9 3541 52-2608

Name: Soma Records
Description:
http://www.facebook.com/SomaRecords

Based in Glasgow, SOMA is one of the world's leading electronic dance labels, and one of the longest running. We have been putting out great music since 1991 releasing more than 250 singles and 75 Albums. Our many successes include launching the careers of Slam, Silicone Soul, Funk D'Void, Alex Smoke, Master H, Vector Lovers, Percy X aka Edit-Select and Daft Punk 

Soma is committed to developing new music and artists and has a reputation for consistent excellence. New artists we are working with include Mark-Henning, Harvey McKay, Mr. Copy and Marco Bernardi aka Octogen, Decimal, Let's Go Outside, Audiofillia & Jandroide. We also have a strong series of compilation albums entitled Sc-Fi Hi-Fi and Sci-Fi Lo-Fi, put together by such musical luminaries as Luciano, Andrew Weatherall, Ewan Pearson, Damian Lazarus and Rob Da Bank.

Name: FOMA - Fornebu Music & Arts Festival
Description:
Fornebu Music and Arts Festival (FOMA) er satt på pause i 2026. 

FOMA arrangeres på en av Oslofjordens vakreste festivalområder på forsommeren ved Sjøflyhavna på Fornebu. Vi ønsker velkommen til en festival fylt med musikk, kunst, og kulinariske opplevelser. Matoma sa det best: «Dette er det nærmeste du kommer Coachella!»

På FOMAs to scener får du se etablerte og up-and-coming artister, fra både inn- og utland. Festivalen har et stort utvalg av både mat og drikke, med eget vinunivers hvor du kan smake på ulike druer fra alle verdens hjørner. Kanskje du også finner din nye favorittkunstner blant kunstutstillingene på området.

FOMA er mer enn bare en musikkfestival. Festivalen er bygget opp rundt underholdning, kunst, mat og drikke. Med spennende nye og anerkjente kunstnere vil publikum få tilgang til kunst som de ikke opplever andre steder. I tillegg har vi et sterkt fokus på mat og drikke.

Bli med på FOMA og vær med på å skape en ny kulturell møteplass som bygger stolthet, utvikler næring og styrker identiteten til Fornebu og hele regionen.

Name: Audiogram
Description: Établie à Montréal depuis trente ans, Audiogram est la plus importante maison de disque francophone indépendante en Amérique du Nord. Avec plus de 10 millions d’albums vendus dans le monde, une filiale éditoriale, une division spectacle et un positionnement de pointe dans les marchés numériques, Audiogram est un acteur essentiel sur le plan culturel, notamment pour avoir contribué au développement de carrière de plusieurs dizaines d’auteurs-compositeurs-interprètes canadiens, incluant de nombreux artistes phares de la culture francophone.

Name: Soho Sonic Studios
Description:
Soho Sonic is a  recording studio in Central London.
 
We specialise in music production and have a passionate, friendly and highly experienced music production team who are capable of catering to your every audio requirement. With extended experience in recording, production, mixing and mastering, we have the best sound engineers and producers to assist you with your projects.
 
Some of our previous clients have included Sony, Universal, Warner, MTV, BBC, ITV, Sky and Time Warner (Click Here to see our portfolio) . Our recording studio in London is equipped to the highest industry standard for Recording, Mixing Voice Over, ADR and Sound Design. In addition to this we also have the best hardware and software to record and produce your Single, EP and your Album.

Go to www.sohosonic.com to find out more.

Name: No Sheet Music
Description:
Established in 2014, No Sheet Music is the production music arm of Wisebuddah, Europe’s specialist in creative sonic branding for radio networks across the world.

No Sheet Music is best known for its authentic contemporary and commercial music styles, but offer a well-rounded catalogue, suitable for a wide spectrum TV productions and advertising campaigns.  

Written by some of the world’s most exciting artists and producers, the catalogue consists of 3,000+ tracks, with a further 80 albums to be released throughout 2021.

Name: Narodowe Forum Muzyki
Description: Narodowe Forum Muzyki im. W. Lutosławskiego jest współprowadzone przez ministra Kultury i Dziedzictwa Narodowego, Gminę Wrocław, Województwo Dolnośląskie.

Name: peermusic France / SEMI / Meridian
Description:
Fondé il y a plus de 90 ans par Ralph S. Peer, peermusic est le plus grand éditeur musical indépendant au monde, avec 38 bureaux dans 31 pays. 
peermusic France est à la fois un éditeur français « historique » et le représentant en France de catalogues internationaux de premiers plans. Notre structure travaille avec certains des plus grands Auteurs et Compositeurs français ainsi qu’avec d’autres structures éditoriales que nous gérons. Nous avons aussi une activité secondaire de production phonographique.

Name: MUSIC PARTNER
Description:
Most music libraries charge you upfront.
Music Partner does the opposite: it pays you back.

Here’s how it works:

Zero licensing fees — no upfront cost for your production.

Premium quality — 7,000+ broadcast-ready tracks by award-winning composers, already used in hundreds of shows.

Shared publishing revenue — your production earns a share of royalties (after a defined threshold), collected via cue sheets and PROs.

Name: MIL - Next Music, Culture & Ideas
Description:
MIL – Music, Cultura & ideas is a festival and convention focused on spreading current music to new markets worldwide. Lisbon is the stage for this showcase festival which gathers dozens of industry agents from around the world. 
As an exchange platform, MIL promotes an artistic program involving the city and combining discussions, masterclasses, meetings and concerts. 
Its main focus is introducing a diversity of Portuguese and international artists and projects linking the European, African and South American music markets all together.

Name: Orchestra of the Age of Enlightenment
Description:
The OAE is one of the world’s leading orchestras giving performances characterised by energy, insight and vitality on period instruments, challenging existing ideas and exciting audiences and musicians alike.

It works with world-renowned artists, including the Orchestra’s Principal Artists: John Butt, Sir Mark Elder, Iván Fischer, Vladimir Jurowski, Sir Andras Schiff and Sir Simon Rattle. The OAE aims to bring the very best of the period music tradition to today’s audiences in performances characterised by commitment, excellence and passion.

Name: Beatmatch
Description:
Beatmatch is an IRL social platform that makes it easy for everyone to find things to do, plan with friends, and meet new people. Currently, social media causes people to be glued to their phones but isolated in real life; 79% of Gen-Z regularly feels lonely. With Beatmatch, you can discover upcoming concerts, parties, and music festivals, connect with everyone going, and make plans together.

Trusted by Warner Music Group, Techstars, Sony Music, Google for Startups, Rhymesayers Entertainment, Quality Control Music, and more.

Name: Mood Booster Group
Description:
Mood Booster est avant tout un collectif d'entreprises issues de la filière musicale, des ICC et de l'innovation.

Mood Booster is above all a collective of companies from the music industry, ICCs and innovation.
------
- WTPL Music (Music Publishing)
- Gorgone Productions (Studio & Post Prod)

Training and Intervention on careers in the music industry

Name: Loop Services LLC
Description: We are a company built to inspire and empower, by creating a platform for people to serve and use their God- given gifts and abilities. Our vision is to build a community of people who love the Lord and selflessly serve others out of the overflow of their relationship with Christ. We work with artists & non- profits to provide the best volunteers for their tours and events. We know without incredible volunteers these events wouldn’t happen.

Name: Walking Mirrors Music
Description:
Featuring Singer Songwriter Mark Nelson, Craig Bartock (Lead Guitarist and Producer of the Rock n Roll Hall of Fame inductee band HEART), David Sikes (Boston), Jeff Campitelli (50th Greatest Drummer of all time-Rolling Stone Magazine, and shredding guitar player Aidan Nelson (Berklee College of Music).

We are a “Reflective Rock n Roll” Band featuring lyrical observations of the inner and outer worlds of what was, what is, and what can be. Presented with Classic Rock n Roll guitar riffs- influenced by the likes of The Rolling Stones and Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers.

Produced and published by Mirrorz Records.

Name: Orquestra Simfònica del Vallès
Description:
The Orquestra Simfònica del Vallès (OSV) is an artistic organization with a social vocation. 

Fixed seasons of symphonic concerts at the Palau de la Música Catalana, Teatre La Faràndula in Sabadell and La Factoria Cultural de Terrassa. 

It is part of the Fundació Òpera Catalunya and is the resident orchestra of the Òpera a Catalunya cycle. 

Other musical programs: social and educational projects, family concerts, company events, Teambuildings, Flashmob ...

Name: Heavyocity
Description:
Heavyocity is a collective of pro composers and sound designers with a mission to create world-class virtual instruments for today’s modern composer and sound designer. The philosophy of our music software company is simple: Provide cutting-edge, inspiring instruments and sounds that supercharge creativity, formatting them in ways that enhances productivity.

With so many “all-encompassing” virtual instruments on the market, sifting through thousands of patches disrupts the creative process. One of the main goals of Heavyocity is to provide those perfect “go-to” signature elements quickly and effectively.

Name: MediaTracks Music
Description:
MediaTracks is an artist-centered production music library focused on innovation, inclusivity and exceptional quality. We provide music for TV, film, radio and podcasting for the most reputable names in production, including the BBC, ITV, HBO Max, CNN, Sky and Channel 4. 

Our aim is to continue building a library for our clients that is packed with authentic music from a wide range of genres and written by composers from all walks of life, all around the world. Listen to our library for free at https://www.mediatracks.co.uk/ 

We’re passionate about developing young, diverse talent and championing under-represented voices in music through our partnerships and collaborations with Music Production for Women, Leeds Conservatoire, CanDo Musos, Carousel, Tileyard X and more. 

MediaTracks is all about independent and family-owned, but our tracks are used all over the globe where we’re represented by an impressive collection of sub-publishers. 

To find our more, visit our website or get in touch:
hello@mediatracks.co.uk
https://linktr.ee/mediatracks

Name: Ibrahim Maalouf - Mister Ibe
Description:
Mister Ibe est un label indépendant créé en 2006 par le trompettiste Ibrahim Maalouf, qui en est aujourd’hui le Dirigeant.
Il a pour activité principale la production et l’édition phonographique liée aux projets de l’artiste (albums personnels ou collaborations artistiques). Le catalogue est constitué d'une quinzaine d'albums, évoluant en France et à l’international, en distribution et/ou en licence.
Mister Ibe gère en parallèle la carrière cinématographique d’Ibrahim Maalouf à travers la production de musique de films.
La structure est également productrice de spectacles vivants.
Les activités annexes sont multiples : gestion d’un studio d’enregistrement, accompagnement d’une école de piano, développement de projets artistiques et/ou pédagogiques, notamment autour de l’improvisation.

Name: Vezt Inc.
Description:
"The First Music Rights Marketplace"

Vezt is the first mobile app where music fans can acquire rights in their favorite songs and recordings. We exist to improve the music industry by providing artists, songwriters and producers with funding sourced directly from their fans on a global basis. In exchange, fans get the right to receive royalties earned by their favorite songs and recordings. Vezt collects these royalties on behalf of fans from performing rights organizations, publishers and record labels and tracks such royalties through proprietary blockchain technology.

Name: SMASHCOAST MUSIC
Description: SMASHCOAST MUSIC, LLC is a bespoke music production company based out of Los Angeles, California, United States.

Name: LOUD+
Description:
A LOUD+ é uma produtora de som especializada em música sincronizada e finalização de áudio; projetos de entretenimento, como séries e longas-metragens; licenciamento musical; serviços de trilha sonora original; edição e mixagem, entre outros serviços de áudio para publicidade. Possui um dos maiores times do mercado composto por maestros, produtores musicais e finalizadores, com experiências diversas. 

É dirigida por quatro sócios que trabalham integrados aos talentos da casa na execução dos projetos, sendo 3 maestros com formações musicais diversificadas cujas trocas são complementares: Janecy Nascimento, uma das únicas maestrinas do mercado brasileiro com vasta experiência em conteúdo e publicidade; Gustavo Garbato, que fazem parte da geração pioneira que alavancou a produção de conteúdo no Brasil, incluindo a inserção de marcas no mundo do entretenimento. Já Maia Feres tem longa experiência e uma importante rede de relacionamentos para atuar como produtora executiva e de licenciamentos musicais em entretenimento e publicidade.

A LOUD+ assina trabalhos como “AmarElo - É tudo pra ontem” (Netflix), do Emicida; “Cabras da Peste” (Netflix); “A Vida Invisível”, “Nínguêm tá olhando” (Netflix), “Vovó Ninja”, longa-metragem de Bruno Barreto; “As seguidoras”, (Paramount+), "Volta Priscila" (Disney+), "A Vítima Invisível" (Netflix), "Olhar Indiscreto" (Netflix), Rota 66 (Globoplay), entre outros, além de ter uma carteira de trabalhos para marcas dos mais variados segmentos na publicidade.

Name: Rush Management
Description: Management d'artistes, conseils artistiques, développement de carrière depuis 2017.

Name: Vertigo Africa
Description:
We are the first music amplifying service taking a break from the norm to give you a full immersive experience connecting you to your friends and fellow music enthusiasts. With VertigoAfrica you explore the finest range of playlists, invite friends to enjoy live-streaming with listening parties and lounges. 

Join The Revolution

Name: Byron Bay Bluesfest
Description: The Byron Bay Bluesfest is an annual music festival that has been held over the Easter long weekend in the Byron Bay area in Australia since 1990. It features a large selection of blues and roots performers, from Australia and around the world, and is one of the world's leading contemporary music festivals.

Name: peermusic Neighbouring Rights
Description: The principals of peermusic's neighbouring rights branches (All Right Music, Global Master Rights and Premier Muzik) collectively have over 60 years of experience in the administration of neighbouring rights. This expertise, combined with the extensive global reach of peermusic - with 39 offices in 32 countries - provides us with the leadership, infrastructure, strong relationships and local knowledge that allow us to maximize the collection of your neighbouring rights royalties around the world.

Name: Turku Music Festival
Description:
The Turku Music Festival is Finland’s oldest continuously running music festival, having been founded by the Musical Society in Turku in 1960. It has evolved into a diverse urban event with a wide range of excellent music including grand orchestral concerts, chamber music, recitals, jazz, outdoor events and children’s concerts. The guest roster includes Finnish and foreign stars each year. The current artistic director is artist and composer Lauri Porra.

Turun musiikkijuhlat on Suomen vanhin yhtäjaksoisesti toiminut musiikkifestivaali. Festivaalin perustajana oli vuonna 1960 Turun Soitannollinen Seura. Monipuolinen kaupunkifestivaali tarjoaa korkeatasoista musiikkia, mm. suuria orkesterikonsertteja, kamarimusiikkia, resitaaleja, jazzia, ulkoilmatapahtumia ja konsertteja lapsille. Juhlilla käy vuosittain niin kotimaisia kuin ulkomaisia huippuartisteja. Taiteellisena johtajana toimii taiteilija ja säveltäjä Lauri Porra.

Name: FABYL
Description:
FABYL is a creative production house with deep roots in music and culture. 

We design and deliver bold, high-impact campaigns, stunts, and experiences that connect artists with audiences and get results.

From headline-grabbing street activations to boutique pop-ups, from launch campaigns to social-ready content, we handle strategy, creative, and production under one roof — moving fast without sacrificing quality.

Founded and led by a creative who has lived every side of the industry — from recording studios and record shops to DJ booths and remixing pop royalty — we understand music not just as a product, but as a way of life. That insight means our work resonates with fans, drives engagement, and generates press.

What we do:
• Experiential activations & pop-ups
• Guerrilla stunts & OOH takeovers
• Tour & release launch campaigns
• Social content & toolkits
• Data-capture hooks & CRM moments

Trusted by: Kendrick Lamar, YUNGBLUD, Olivia Rodrigo, PinkPantheress & Ice Spice, RAYE, SZA, Tyla, U2, Amazon Music, Jorja Smith, Disney, Imagine Dragons, Lola Young, and many more.

UK-first, with projects delivered across Europe and beyond.

DM us here, email hello@fabyl.co.uk, or book a 15-minute intro call — we’re happy to talk through ideas at any stage, no heavy brief required.

Name: Royalty Solutions Corp
Description:
ROYALTY SOLUTIONS IS A ROYALTY PROCESSING & LICENSING SERVICE


OUR MISSION: to provide comprehensive and accurate royalty processing and licensing for record labels and music publishers seeking to minimize overhead and maximize time.  We invest in the top industry-trusted software and specialized training, so our clients can instead concentrate on their core business of making music.  Royalty Solutions can do small projects, or function as a trusted royalties department. 


OUR HISTORY: Royalty Solutions stems from a family-owned, 90-year-old music publishing business, and a NMPA Top 100 music publishing company, Memory Lane Music Group. Both companies are helmed by the family’s third generation of music business entrepreneurs, Mark Spier. After joining Memory Lane, Mark identified royalty processing as an underserved area that is further complicated by the challenges of digital distribution.  Mark knew that mere software could not replace the knowledge and effort of an experienced royalties department so he quickly established Royalty Solutions in 2003.  Royalty Solutions now delivers its clients the advantage of this specialized expertise without the outlay of in-house resources.


OUR SERVICES:
Publisher Mechanical Royalty Accounting and Licensing / Record Label Royalty Accounting / Artist Royalty Accounting / Master Use Licensing / Producer Royalty Accounting / Business Management Services / Synchronization Licensing


OUR CLIENTS: 
Record Labels / Music Publishers / Artists / Producers / Entertainment Attorneys / Entertainment Business Managers

Name: SMACKSongs
Description: SMACKSongs is a Nashville-based music publishing, management and artist development powerhouse. Led by Grammy Award winners Shane McAnally and Josh Osborne, SMACK is home to some of the industry’s top songwriters, artists and producers who have collectively earned over 50 #1’s. SMACK was named 2018, 2019 and 2020 AIMP Publisher of the Year, 2018 SESAC Publisher of the Year and has been listed as a Top 10 Billboard Hot Country Publishing Corporation for the past 7 years.

Name: Round Hill Music Sync
Description:
Specializing in synch & creative publishing. Hear our artists in films, ads, trailers, games & TV. 

We provide personalized services, both to the licensing community and to the artists, labels and partners we represent. It's our mission to ease the creative detective work for music supervisors by providing them with the earliest inside track on the hottest upcoming releases from the most interesting artists around the globe.

We take pride in our close relationships and we cover the vast majority of current projects by personally dealing directly with the folks on the front lines selecting the music. Our creative teams on each coast curate custom selections specific to each project according to the unique creative and budgetary parameters. ZYNC has amazing, well-established relationships directly with the labels, publishers, managers (and the artists themselves), making the clearing process on our entire roster quick and painless - an absolute must in today’s marketplace.

Name: Carpark Records
Description: Established in 1999, Carpark Records is an independent record label based in Washington DC.  Originally releasing IDM, ambient and other electronic and experimental sounds, the label has since expanded into more pop-leaning territory – including releases by Beach House, Dan Deacon, Toro Y Moi and Cloud Nothings.

Name: Goldmann Entertainment
Description:
Goldmann Music is a "new school indie major" managing all parts of music & business for artists and labels.
label-pub-merch-live-brands-mgmt

Name: BAIRES ROCKS
Description:
Instrumentos Musicales | Iluminación y Audio Profesional. Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Description:

Description:
Grand Bonheur est une coopérative de musiques qui œuvre dans tous les champs de la production musicale, dans un souci de défense des valeurs culturelles, sociétales et environnementales.

Elle est présente tant au niveau de son territoire (Marseille et la Région SUD), à travers ses événements musicaux et son engagement sur les scènes locales, que sur un plan national et international en soutenant la création, la production et la diffusion d’artistes.

La coopérative souhaite être représentative de la scène musicale et met en avant des esthétiques allant du hip-hop à l’électro, en passant par les musiques traditionnelles et la scène francophone.

Home to a cutting edge roster of the most talented and diverse composers and artists in the business, Pitch Hammer creates and produces music that rises above the clutter with a unique and unmistakable sound that stands alone. The company was founded by Brian Brasher, President + Owner, and Veigar Margeirsson, VP Creative + Owner.

Since launching in 2012, Pitch Hammer has secured licenses in hundreds of major motion picture campaigns, including blockbusters such as Joker, 1917, Dunkirk, The Accountant, Deadpool, Mad Max: Fury Road, Mission Impossible: Rogue Nation, BFG, and Star Trek: Beyond.

Name: Tonky Blues Band
Description:
He is considered the father of blues in Spain and one of the best blues musicians in the world.

Tonky de la Peña is a super artist who has been helping to spread the blues in our country for more than 40 years.

Leading his unshakable Tonky Blues Band, he has built up a loyal following, which has continued to grow over the years. With his music, anchored on the powerful classical quartet (guitar, harmonica, bass and drums) plus the usual additions of friends, guests and collaborators, he has proven to be able to attract different generations. And to achieve this, there is no doubt that his ability to renew himself in the band and the constant contact and movement that his omnipresent jam sessions have generated in the bars and clubs of Madrid has been key. The participation of numerous young musicians in his band or in the jams that Tonky has directed over the years is an important practice to learn to express themselves in an individual-collective framework, which ends up facilitating the emergence of new groups and initiatives that make grow the local scene.

Tonky, as a super artist that he is, has collaborated and accompanied on tours with prominent musicians such as pianist Jerry Lee Lewis, guitarist Mick Taylor (John Mayall, Rolling Stones ...), Buddy Miles (Jimi Hendrix, Band of Gypsies, Electric Flag ...), and bluesmen Carey Bell, Johnny Copeland, Louisiana Red, and Charlie Musselwhite. In addition, currently Tonky de la Peña continues to participate in an international exchange circuit through which he maintains contact with the best blues musicians from all countries in the world.

Hiring Tonky de la Peña for your events is a guarantee of success. The objective of all his performances is to always connect with his audience, the premium musical quality for demanding music lovers and everyone will go out to dance, the party is guaranteed.

Tour & Recording : tonkybluesbandonline@gmail.com

Name: Mediatone
Description:
Depuis 1997, Mediatone organise des concerts et accompagne des artistes afin de favoriser l’émergence de talents régionaux. Véritable pilier dans le pay- sage culturel lyonnais, l’association s’axe autour de 4 valeurs fondatrices : ENGAGEMENT, PARTAGE, ÉCLECTISME ET CONVIVIALITÉ.

Mediatone est aujourd’hui une association aux multiples facettes, mais la promotion de la diversité artistique et l’accès à la culture pour tous sous-tendent l’ensemble de ses activités.

Son implication dans les réseaux professionnels du secteur musical (Grand Bureau, SMA, Technopol) et les relations étroites tissées avec les structures culturelles d’Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes — et au-delà — l’ont amené à être l’une des têtes pensantes de l’Appel des indépendants, dont les Etats Généraux ont été largement relayés dans les médias nationaux.

En plus de l’organisation de près de 80 concerts par an (1000 événements depuis sa création), de plusieurs festi- vals phares (Reperkusound, Transfer, Plane’R Fest, Les Authentiks) et du salon professionnel Diskover, Mediatone s’implique fortement dans l’Action Culturelle en menant à bien des projets d’insertion sociale par la musique. L’association développe son activité avec pour horizon l’égalité des chances et la lutte contre tout type de discrimination. 

Elle organise également des concerts et des ateliers culturels en prison et accueille tout au long de l’année des "Travailleur.euses d’Intérêt Général”.

Mediatone est, depuis ses débuts, dans une logique de soutien aux artistes en développement. Cette activité s’est concrétisée en 2019 avec la création de la cellule Mediatone Booking, qui accompagne déjà six projets musicaux et deux spectacles de la production jusqu’à la tournée.

Name: San Diego Opera
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT
The mission of San Diego Opera is to deliver exceptional vocal performances and exciting, accessible programs to diverse audiences, focusing on community engagement and the transformative power of live performance.

VISION STATEMENT
The San Diego Opera will be recognized internationally as a leading example of adaptability, innovation and sustainability in the operatic arts, promoting diversified programming and unique performance venues with world-class and emerging talent.

CORE VALUES STATEMENT
- Through excellence in innovative programming and education, San Diego Opera provides a lasting cultural service to the community.

- Our tradition of excellence in fully staged opera is augmented with new models of opera and venues. Our unique and deep commitment to the community propels us to explore ways of increasing affordability and accessibility.

- Through fiscal responsibility and nimble adaptation to the changing marketplace, we protect the future of San Diego Opera.

- Our educational and community involvement coupled with relevant programming will build the audience of the future.

Name: Music Industry Coach
Description: Why do most music careers fail? Two reasons. One, artists give up too early. Two, artists don't get honest, practical advice. Oh, you can find promises from wannabe managers and so-so record deals. We've heard those promises too. About 30 years of promises and dead ends that we really wish we could have avoided. Let us help you avoid a few.

Name: Frost School of Music UM
Description:
One of two schools created in 1926 when the University of Miami was first founded, Frost is one of the largest and best music schools located in a private university in the U.S., and one of the most comprehensive and relevant in all of higher education. With over 700 students and 100 faculty members it is a top choice for instrumental, keyboard and vocal performance as well as composition, music business, music education, music engineering technology, music therapy, songwriting, jazz, studio music, and more. Although founded in 1926, the naming gift from Dr. Phillip and Patricia Frost in 2003 was a historic occasion.

In 2014, the Frost School of Music launched its online academic division, Frost Online, and since its establishment, has continuously strived to promote and amplify the educational impact of the Frost School of Music by extending its academic offerings beyond the campus to students everywhere; furthering the school's unwavering commitment to enhancing the future of music in higher education through progressive innovation.

The mission of the Frost School of Music is to foster musical leadership by providing an innovative, relevant, and inspiring education; advance performance, creativity and scholarship; and enrich the world community with meaningful outreach and brilliant cultural offerings.

The Frost School has pioneered new curricula and was the first in the nation to offer professionally accredited Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Music Business and Music Engineering Technology, and was among the first to offer degrees in Music Therapy, as well as Studio Music and Jazz. Renowned for its Instrumental Performance programs, it is the home of the Frost Chamber Orchestra, Frost Symphony Orchestra, and Frost Concert Jazz Band and is a leader in vocal training with the Frost Opera Theater, Frost Chorale and other notable choirs.

Build Yourself at Frost.

Name: Fantasy Studios
Description:
- Legendary Rooms at Affordable Rates -

Fantasy Studios offers complete recording and production services. Whether it’s for music, spoken word, soundtrack, or post production, we offer the highest quality recording facilities and service in the San Francisco Bay Area.

An integral part of the Zaentz Media Center, Fantasy Studios is comprised of three historic rooms upgraded to meet the most modern standards including Studio A, which is one of the most requested tracking rooms on the West Coast. All rooms are fully equipped with Studer analog as well as ProTools HD. We also offer complete ISDN services linking us to studios worldwide. We have the largest selection of vintage and new microphones and outboard gear in Northern California. All of our rooms are equipped with top quality pianos that record beautifully and have been featured on many famous recordings.

In addition we make our larger rooms available for film, video, photographic shoots, and internet streaming. We have the one of the most comprehensive transfer and editing facilities on the West coast, offering the ability to digitize audio from almost any format in existence.

Name: High School Band Director's National Association
Description:
HSBDNA advocates the American band movement in US Middle and High Schools by supporting Middle and High School Band Directors through Continuing Education courses, Performance, Honor & Recognition and Service.
We offer online teacher Continuing Education courses (CEU's) specific to band directors, a band exhibition, a national Hall of Fame for Band Directors, a museum of Band Directors and research in the field.

Name: 22D MUSIC GROUP
Description:
22D Music Group is an independent music rights management company.

Headquartered in Paris, 22D Music also operate offices in Spain, Germany, Scandinavia, USA, UK and is a direct member with the most important collection societies in the world such as SACEM/SDRM, SABAM, PRSformusic/MCPS, ASCAP, BMI, SGAE, STIM, GEMA, AUME, SUISA, BUMA-STEMRA...

Other territories are managed through our long established relationships with local sub-publishers. This entitles us to effectively monitor and collect income in the complex world of international music publishing administration.
Our hands-on expertise has proved itself and we have been appointed as local advisers for larger rights management groups such as Discovery TV, Cutting Edge, Connexion Media, Compact Collection, Fintage, ZDF and more.., in our local respective territories, because without local offices they weren’t able to get to the bottom of some issues. 

We have an energetic sync department dedicated to placing our client’s music in film, TV, commercials, video games. Our syncs include many European feature films, documentaries, TV commercials for luxury brands.

We have ongoing collaborations with successful films composers and are happy to provide artistic services. Executive music production and co-production - the 22D Music production team is behind the soundtracks of some of the best productions for children, including Oscars & Cesars, Baftas winners.

We are also able to administer the Secondary rights (private copy, cable & satellite retransmission, etc.) as these are becoming a significant aspect of IP rights exploitation, through our sister company 560 Media.

The founders of 22D, Emmanuel Delétang, Sören Bauermeister and Yolanda de Felipe all worked for many years in music publishing and have also worked at local Performing Rights Societies. 

We strive for outstanding technical and creative quality. Attention to detail, availability, flexibility and accountability are essential to how we work.

Name: AM Usualsuspects
Description:
We’re now a full service music agency operating in nearly 30 countries with offices in 4 of them. 

Besides helping out creatives with copyright clearings, custom music work, sound design and music supervision, we have our own music libraries at the praised search system called Findthetune.com. 

On Findthetune you'll find more than 400.000 tracks and 100.000 sound effects from high-end publishers such as Private labels (DMD, AMsus, AMclass, AMint) and world class labels like, Primalhouse, Spirit, Manhattan, Liberry and Danish Music Design and many more.

Name: Godin Guitars
Description: With five factories in Quebec, Godin Guitars (Guitabec Inc.) is the largest manufacturer of acoustic and electric guitars in America.
