Name: Karsten Jahnke Konzertdirektion GmbH
Description:
Die Hamburger Traditionsagentur um Namensgeber Karsten Jahnke genießt seit 1962 national und international einen hervorragenden Ruf als seriöser und musikbegeisterter Partner. Die Referenzliste der Künstlerkarrieren, die von Jahnke in Deutschland mit aufgebaut wurden, liest sich wie ein kleines Musiklexikon. Neben zahlreichen Tourneen und Konzerten zeichnet die Agentur an ihrem Standort Hamburg exklusiv Jahr für Jahr für das Stadtpark Open Air verantwortlich, die zu den schönsten Freilichtbühnen Deutschlands zählt.
Karsten Jahnke veranstaltet darüber hinaus das Reeperbahn Festival, Way Back When, Elbjazz und Überjazz Festival.

Name: I.M.P.
Description:
I.M.P. is an independent concert promotion and production company that puts on shows for 500 to 50,000 fans at a time. The company started small — small enough to fit into a kid’s bedroom. In the 36 years since I.M.P. opened its (bedroom) doors, it has presented more than 15,000 events, hosting millions of music fans. Some of the highlights include:

Lollapalooza – promoted every year it was a touring festival (1991 to 1996).
Merriweather Post Pavilion – took over operations and programming beginning 2004 and is ongoing today.
Virgin Festival – launched the U.S. festival, produced and promoted each year it existed (from 2006-2013).
Lincoln Theatre – began operating, programming and promoting starting 2013 and ongoing.

In addition, I.M.P. produces and promotes shows at other D.C.-area venues, including RFK Stadium, The Verizon Center, Echostage, Eagle Bank Arena, DAR Constitutional Hall, The National Mall, U Street Music Hall, the Music Center at Strathmore, and in Baltimore, The Modell Performing Arts Center at The Lyric and The Meyerhoff Symphony Hall.

Name: Green Cow Music
Description:
Nuestra empresa con sede en Sevilla se especializa en la concepción y desarrollo integral de proyectos culturales y de entretenimiento. Nos apasiona crear experiencias únicas que cautiven a audiencias de todas las edades y trasladen a los espectadores a un mundo lleno de inspiración.

Abordamos cada proyecto de manera exhaustiva, desde la concepción inicial de la idea hasta su presentación final. Creemos en la importancia de cada etapa del proceso creativo y nos dedicamos a perfeccionar cada detalle para garantizar un proyecto final excepcional.

Nuestro enfoque se basa en la colaboración cercana con nuestros clientes, comprendiendo sus visiones y objetivos para poder traducirlos en proyectos impactantes y memorables. Trabajamos de manera personalizada, adaptando nuestras estrategias a las necesidades y particularidades de cada iniciativa.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios que abarcan cada aspecto del desarrollo de proyectos. Desde la gestación de la idea y la conceptualización hasta la implementación y promoción, estamos comprometidos a brindar soluciones completas para garantizar el éxito de cada proyecto.

Nuestra pasión por la cultura y el entretenimiento impulsa cada proyecto que emprendemos. Estamos comprometidos a superar las expectativas y crear un impacto duradero en la comunidad a través de nuestras iniciativas.

Permítenos acompañarte en el camino para hacer realidad tus ideas y llevarlas al escenario que merecen.

Name: RX Music
Description: RX Music is a consultancy service for experience-driven brands competing in a noisy global marketplace. We help clients cut through noise to distill their signature sound, and curate distinctive music to create bespoke playlists, which are fine-tuned to the nuances of their brand, audience, culture, locality, and physical space. Established in 1999 with the mission of elevating the human experience, RX Music has contributed to captivating guest experiences in retail stores, restaurants and bars, hotels, spas, and many other environments. Visit our website to learn more!

Name: Sonic Support
Description:
Sonic Support has over ten years of experience in the sound engineering and live events business. Our engineers are friendly and well-seasoned, with experience ranging from corporate AV to recording, and specialising in live sound.


Whether you're a solo artist, DJ, live band, are organising a conference, or just need technical support, we can work with you to ensure your event runs smoothly and has the impact it deserves.

Name: MYMA
Description:
1er acteur indépendant français d'illustration musicale, MYMA (My Music Agency) est une agence experte de la synchronisation au service des professionnels de l'audiovisuel, et depuis près de 65 ans exclusivement dédiée à la musique.

Notre direction artistique intégrée, reflète notre identité au travers de 3 labels (Justement Music, Montmorency Records, Stereoscopic), dont l'image de marque est mondialement reconnue. 

Avec + de 650.000 titres, 60 nouveaux albums chaque mois et une offre composée des plus emblématiques librairies musicales de tout horizon, dont le prestigieux label KPM Music, les collections Music House, Patchwork, 9 Lives Music, Francis Day & Hunter Ltd., Felt PM, No Sheet Music, Berry Music, Abaco Music, Selected Sound,... notre catalogue est incontestablement unique par son authenticité et son éclectisme, sans oublier des musiques d'archives d'exception, de toutes époques...

100% centré "service", indépendamment de notre puissant et intuitif moteur de recherche intégré à notre plateforme, notre cellule de supervision musicale vous accompagne pour trouver les titres adaptés à vos briefs les plus exigeants/pointus, qu'il s'agisse de musique pour le long-métrage cinéma, la fiction TV, le film documentaire, la publicité TV/radio/web, le trailer, YouTube, le brand content, le podcast, le corporate,...

Sync out of the box!

Name: Le Trianon & l'Elysée Montmartre
Description: Au 19ème siècle, la fièvre des arts et du spectacle embrase Paris. Bals, concerts, théâtres et opéras s'élèvent au cœur de la capitale. Au pied de la Butte Montmartre, ces monuments parisiens de culture et de divertissement ont vu défiler les modes et les artistes depuis plus de deux siècles. Du théâtre à la salle de bal, en passant par le jardin d'hiver, le Trianon accueille de 200 à 1 200 personnes en conférence, cocktail, concert et soirée dansante. l'Elysée Montmartre, première salle de bal parisienne inaugurée en 1807, a ré-ouvert ses portes en septembre 2016. Il vient compléter la capacité du Trianon en offrant 1000 m² supplémentaire pouvant accueillir jusqu'à 1000 personnes en cocktail et 600 convives en dîner assis.

Name: Chetham's
Description:
Imagine a place where people from all over the world come together to celebrate music and creativity. It’s where music meets education, classical meets youth culture, old meets new, and people meet each other.

This is Chetham’s. We are home to three extraordinary places – Chetham’s School of Music, Chetham’s Library, and The Stoller Hall – and we are united by one clear vision which is to bring people together. 

We believe in the power of music and creativity to unite people, and we are committed to educating and inspiring the next generation of musicians and thinkers.

Name: Jamendo

Jamendo.com is the biggest independent online music platform. It provides free music for personal entertainment and various licenses for projects or businesses. Jamendo supports unaffiliated independent artists by offering them a global space to display and sell their work. 

Jamendo has a catalog of more than 220,000 songs from 40,000 artists and 60 genres of radio.

On Jamendo Music you can enjoy a free space to discover new independent music creations.
On Jamendo Licensing your creativity has no limit. You can purchase licenses (TV/Radio/Online) for video projects, background music for shops or events, livestream music for vlogging, or subscriptions plans custom to your needs.

Jamendo is all about:
ARTISTS. MUSIC. LICENSING

https://licensing.jamendo.com/en
https://www.jamendo.com/start

Name: Freelance Musician/Private Instructor
Description: Offering private lessons on French horn. I perform in classical orchestras, opera, chamber music, and jazz.  I am active as a recitalist and concerto soloist. I also specialize in natural horn, in ensembles including Boston Baroque and the Handel & Haydn Society. As a private instructor, I teach horn at my home studio, and online. I taught at New England Conservatory for 13 years, also at the Longy School of Music.

Name: Greenhouse Talent Belgium
Description:
Greenhouse Talent is een onafhankelijke, internationale concert- en comedypromoter, booking agency en festivalorganisator met kantoren in Gent (België) en Breda (Nederland). Gezamenlijk promoten de kantoren jaarlijks meer dan 500 concerten, comedyshows en familieshows en bestaat het roster uit ruim 1000 internationale en nationale acts en artiesten. Greenhouse Talent promoot, organiseert en boekt over alle (muziek)genres heen in grote en kleine locaties, van lokale zalen tot grote arena’s als het Sportpaleis, Vorst Nationaal, Paleis 12, Ziggo Dome, AFAS Live, GelreDome en Rotterdam Ahoy. Daarbuiten produceert Greenhouse Talent concerten en festivals op unieke locaties zoals het Sint-Pietersplein in Gent (Prince, Leonard Cohen, Ennio Morricone), het strand van Zeebrugge (Bon Jovi), Strijp-S (Bryan Adams, UB40, Madness), het Amsterdamse Bos (Once In A Blue Moon Festival) en Goffertpark (Rammstein).

Greenhouse Talent Belgium

Name: Studio Instrument Rentals
Description:
Studio Instrument Rentals (SIR) is America’s original backline company and continues to be the industry leader in all phases of the entertainment business. We have successfully exceeded our customer’s expectations by providing innovative solutions for artists and their music since 1967.

With locations in the heart of major entertainment markets nationwide, Studio Instrument Rentals is the largest, best equipped, and most respected backline, audio, rehearsal and production support service in America. We are big enough to be everywhere you need us yet small enough to be involved within each city's music community.

Name: ALR Music
Description:
With a roster of the UK’s finest musicians and a residency at Mayfair’s exclusive Arts Club. ALR Music have earned a reputation as prestigious music curators for events around the world. Their unrivalled level of service, expertise and exclusive roster has led to an impressive client list including F1 Red Bull, Chanel, Google, ITV and Facebook.
 
Whether you’re looking for the ultimate party band, a 16-piece swing band, classic jazz quartet, a unique live DJ set or something bespoke; the ALR team will hand-pick the perfect line-up tailored to your event, with artists you can’t book anywhere else. A dedicated music expert will guide you through the planning process, managing every element to guarantee a flawless performance.
 
Each band is created and styled in-house, so they look and sound the part. Elegant, energetic and effortlessly cool, they do more than just perform, they create an unforgettable experience your guests will be talking about for years to come.

Get in touch and speak to one of our music specialists - info@alrmusic.co.uk

Name: UK & European Guild of Music Supervisors
Description: The UK & European Guild of Music Supervisors is dedicated to raising awareness and understanding of the role of a music supervisor within the entertainment industries including film, television, gaming, advertising, trailers, interactive media & theatre.

Name: Chetham's School of Music
Description:
Chetham's offers an unparalleled music and academic education to 330 of the finest young musicians from the UK and across the world.

Generous bursaries through the UK Government's Music and Dance scheme means that entry to Chetham's is based solely on musical talent, not on background or ability to pay. With places for students aged from 8-18, both boarders and day students, Chetham's is a unique musical community which unites young people from across the world through a shared love of music.

Established as a specialist music school in 1969, Chetham's illustrious alumni include pianist Stephen Hough, organist Wayne Marshall, former director of the BBC Proms Roger Wright and BBC Young Musician winners Anna Markland, Jennifer Pike, Guy Johnston, Peter Moore, as well as Young Jazz Musician winner Alexander Bone. Numerous former students work as performers, composers and influencers across the musical world, whilst current staff include professional players from the Hallé, BBC Philharmonic and Manchester Camerata, among many others.

In 2017 The Stoller Hall opened at Chetham's - an outstanding new concert hall, with award winning visual design complemented by world-class acoustics by Arup. A home for both student and professional performers, The Stoller Hall provides new opportunities for professional experience and masterclass tuition for its current students, and has invited many former students back as performers and as tutors.

Name: SCPP
Description: La SCPP est une société de perception et de répartition des rémunérations perçues pour le compte des producteurs de musique auprès des utilisateurs de phonogrammes et de vidéomusiques.

Name: Ministry of Sound Australia
Description:
Ministry of Sound is Australia’s leading music tastemaker and youth lifestyle brand. Started up by Sydney DJ Tim McGee and friends back in 1999, the label is regarded by most as one of the influential forces behind the growth of dance music culture within the country. Evolving over the years, the operation has recently moved into their new premises in Crown Street, Surry Hills; complete with listening rooms, wide-screen TV’s and a recording studio.

The local home for international artists such as Bob Sinclar, Example, Duck Sauce, Laidback Luke, and Afrojack, and responsible for releasing iconic compilation brands including ‘The Annual’, ‘Sessions’ and ‘Clubbers Guide’, Ministry of Sound Australia is leading the journey into the future. Still shifting their tunes in CD format, they are edging ever closer to the digital dream where music can be downloaded straight from the airwaves into your brain.

www.ministryofsound.com.au

Name: doremusic
Description:
doremusic, 1993 yılında İzmir`de kurulmuş ve çok kısa bir sürede dünyaca ünlü markaların distribütörlüğüne ev sahipliği yapan bir firma haline gelmiştir. 

Portföyündeki tüm ürünlerin Türkiye Distribütörüğünü yapan doremusic , 5 tanesi İstanbul`da, 2 tanesi İzmir`de, 1 tanesi Adana`da ve 1 tane de Ankara`da olmak üzere 9 perakende mağaza; yine 1 tanesi İzmir`de, 1 tanesi İstanbul`da, 1 tanesi de Ege Serbest Bölge’de olmak üzere 6.500 m2 kapalı depo hacmi ile, Türkiye`nin tüm bölgelerinde 800`den fazla toptan satış noktasına, distribütörlüğünü yapmakta olduğu 50`ye yakın markanın ürünlerini pazarlamaktadır.

Name: ECSA European Composer & Songwriter Alliance
Description: ECSA is a professional Alliance formed by over 55 associations of composers and songwriters from all over Europe. The main objective of the Alliance is to defend and promote the rights of authors of music at the national, European and international level by any legal means. ECSA advocates for equitable commercial conditions for composers and songwriters and strives to improve social and economic development of music creation in Europe.

Name: Ace Agency

Ace Agency: International booking agency based in Amsterdam representing: Afrojack, Ambush, Astrix, Bassjackers, Brennan Heart, Danny Avila, DBN Gogo, DVBBS, Dyro, Floris van Oranje, Infected Mushroom, Jaden Bojsen, JØASE, Julian Jordan, Justin Mylo, Lucas & Steve, Manuel Turizo, Marshmello, Matroda, Merow, Mesto, Moksi, NERVO, Nicky Jam, Olive Anguz, Quintino, Ran-D, RetroVision, Sam Feldt, San Pacho, SCRIPT, Showtek, Ummet Ozcan.

Ace Agency is home to some of the biggest talents in the electronic music industry. From building the profile of global superstars to championing new talent, we are a dynamic agency that proudly demonstrates a wide spectrum of aptitudes and capabilities. With a reputation built on strong relationships and consistent results, we set the tempo in the fast, ever evolving landscape of booking agencies.

Name: Proper Music Distribution
Description:
Proper has grown to become the largest totally independent entertainment distributor in the UK. Winner of the Music Week Awards Sales Team in 2017 & 2020, Proper offers the experience and personal service of a specialist with the reach and power of a major.

Incorporating UK physical distribution, an expert worldwide digital service, and comprehensive international export networks, we can deliver a 360 distribution service on a global scale for all music formats.

Proper is home to many of the world’s finest independent labels working across all genres including Alternative, Americana, Blues, Electronic, Folk, Jazz, Pop, Reggae, Rock, Singer-Songwriter, Urban, and World. Regardless of the genre Proper is best placed to manage and distribute new releases and catalogues to the widest market.

Name: FLIPPERMUSIC
Description:
UNA PIATTAFORMA MUSICALE UNICA E INNOVATIVA, CON OLTRE UN MILIONE DI BRANI ESCLUSIVI
Flippermusic è più di una library: è una piattaforma di contenuti musicali di livello internazionale, in continuo aggiornamento. Per noi la diversità è ricchezza: collaboriamo con oltre 200 cataloghi differenti e totalmente indipendenti.
Con Flippermusic si entra in un vero e proprio universo di suoni provenienti da tutto il mondo: più di un milione di tracce audio esclusive, che non trovereste in nessun’altra library!
Musica per il cinema, documentari, serie tv e cartoon, ma anche spot pubblicitari, podcast e qualunque contenuto per il web e i social, troverà con noi un’identità sonora unica!

MENO TEMPO PER TROVARE LA TRACCIA GIUSTA!
Grazie a un motore di ricerca avanzato sarà possibile individuare rapidamente la traccia giusta per il proprio progetto. La ricerca sarà ancora più veloce con una reference da cui partire, perché con l’esclusiva intelligenza artificiale del DMC si potrà accedere a una serie di tracce musicali e brani affini a quello indicato: una vera rivoluzione per tutti i nostri clienti.

MUSICHE ROYALTY SAFE
Flippermusic nasce nel 1968 come Casa Editrice di Production Music e nel tempo diventa anche sub editrice dei principali cataloghi internazionali, gestendone un numero sempre più alto.
Nel 2020 si unisce ad Audiofficina, tra le principali Music Rights Management Company specializzata nell’industria audiovisiva italiana, dandosi così una nuova mission: permettere un uso semplice, innovativo e sicuro delle musiche, tutelando sia i professionisti del settore audio e audiovisivo, sia gli artisti.

UN TEAM AL TUO SERVIZIO
Lo staff di Flippermusic-Audiofficina affianca professionisti e committenti in tutte le fasi della creazione dell’opera: individuazione tracce, definizione licenze, consulenza legale e formalità amministrative. Offriamo un customer care a 360°, veloce e diretto.

Name: United Stage Sverige
Description:
Sedan 1984 har vi en ganska enkel filosofi. Vi tror på magin i mötet mellan en artist och en publik.

Vi är Skandinaviens ledande turnéproducent och artistagentur för dagens och morgondagens stjärnor. United Stage i Sverige, Norge och Danmark representerar över 300 artister och vi jobbar med mer än 5000 konserter per år.

Name: Paper Bag Records Inc.
Description: Paper Bag Records is a leading independent record label, artist management and music publishing company based in Toronto, Canada. Established in 2002, PBR's early discoveries include Broken Social Scene, Stars, and Tokyo Police Club. Our current roster includes The Rural Alberta Advantage, Born Ruffians, Elliott Brood, Lou Canon, Mappe Of, Yamantaka // Sonic Titan, and many more.

Name: Black Hole Recordings B.V.
Description:
Black Hole Recordings, founded in 1997, started with the release of Tiësto’s hailed “Magik” mix compilations. The instant success of the series made it possible to expand, and in 1998 Black Hole Recordings added two new labels to their imprint: “In Trance We Trust” and “Songbird”, which became the label of choice for Tiësto’s “In Search of Sunrise” series.

By 2001 another label was added to the roster: “Magik Muzik”. Throughout the early days of Black Hole Recordings many now famous DJs and producers got their first break to release a DJ mix compilation. Ferry Corsten and Armin van Buuren were amongst them. Due to the success of series like “Space Age”, “Magik”, “In Trance We Trust” and most notably “In Search of Sunrise”, the star and reputation of the label rises quickly and the million-selling mixcompilations of Tiësto turn Black Hole Recordings into one of the biggest independent electronic dance labels.

These achievements not only harvest important awards and nominations, but also create a wealth of opportunities. The two volumes of “Tiësto in Concert” and the album “Parade of the Athletes”, released after the successful performance of Tiësto during the 2004 Olympics in Athens are the ultimate proof that Black Hole had reached heights never before seen in the industry. 

After almost 15 years, Black Hole Recordings still is one of the biggest independent electronic dance labels; always on top of the game and true to its credo “Captivate, Communicate and Celebrate”!

Name: Air-Edel Music
Description:
Air-Edel is an all encompassing music company. We provide representation for composers, music editors, music supervisors and key creative talent with our own studio facilities, music publishing and record company.

Founded in 1970 by Herman Edel and Sir George Martin, Air-Edel has evolved from an advertising music and jingles production house to an all-encompassing agency and music services company offering composers, music supervisors and other music personnel for productions, as well as a publishing catalogue, record labels and recording studios.

Our range of services includes everything from bespoke composition, music production and editing, recording facilities, and full music supervision for all forms of media. We have extensive music history and copyright knowledge which can be utilised across productions, from initial ideas and research to licensing, from on-set music co-ordination to score production. Our experience ranges from micro-budget productions and short films to Hollywood blockbusters and our involvement can span from conception to post and everything in between.

Name: Sharemusic!
Description:
Sharemusic! es una factoría de entretenimiento referente a nivel europeo que lleva creando desde el año 1999 shows singulares. Su especialidad consiste en realizar producciones espectaculares que consiguen sorprender al público al combinar una infraestructura humana, técnica y de diseño propias de grandes eventos y tours globales.


Durante este 2022 Sharemusic! tiene previstos más de 50 shows que abarcan una amplia variedad de géneros musicales, desde el pop más internacional o la música electrónica, hasta el jazz producido en formato ciclo boutique.

De entre las producciones a destacar se encuentran los festivales Love the 90's, Love the Tuenti’s, Origen Fest, PAM (Port Adriano Music Festival), o I love reggaeton, con una asistencia esperada de más de 250.000 asistentes.

Name: Songstats

Embrace the power of data-driven music with Songstats! Dive into comprehensive analytics across multiple platforms like Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, TikTok, Beatport, and more. 

Unleash your potential, track your growth, and understand your audience better with real-time notifications about key milestones and achievements. Whether you're an artist, label, or a passionate music professional, Songstats is your ultimate music intelligence tool, helping you make informed decisions and maximize your impact in the industry.

Stay ahead of the curve with Songstats - where music meets data.

Name: Amphibious Zoo Music

Amphibious Zoo is the ultimate production library with an irreverent sensibility for fresh music and innovation. We are world-renowned for trend-setting genres, cutting-edge music, and superior sound quality, Amphibious Zoo continues to stay ahead of the curve. Our musical styles are fresh and contemporary, gaining broad international appeal with every new album release.  From our first ground breaking success with the Suspended series, the catalog has since grown exponentially, conquering genres such as Dubstep, Electro Pop, Big Beats, and Dark Cinematic styles, among many others. Amphibious Zoo continues to innovate and evolve, taking on new and emerging styles, adding to our already robust catalog of music. Amphibious Zoo Music has been used for countless well-known TV shows, films, and companies around the globe. For a list of recent projects please see http://amphibiouszoo.com/whats-new/

Description:
Empresa de gestão de negócios e carreiras artísticas que oferece serviços completos e especializados no universo artístico e em negócios entre marcas e artistas/música. Traz para o mercado um olhar diferente para o negócio dos artistas, um pensamento alinhado com os novos rumos do entretenimento no mundo, buscando sempre a excelência na gestão e geração de negócios, em 5 pilares de serviços: Gestão de Carreiras, Label Services, Brand Services, Licenciamento de Músicas, Booking de Shows.

Name: Analog Agency
Description: Analog is the house and techno agency founded by Ian Hindmarsh -- formerly of Safehouse management -- in October 2016 with regional offices in London, Amsterdam, Buenos Aires, Punta Del Este, Mexico City, and now Madrid and Barcelona. The roster includes global booking for Nic Fanciulli, Monika Kruse, Carl Cox, Heidi, Yousef and more, as well as more than 50 South America DJs and the representation of Sasha & John Digweed when they tour together.

Name: Season of Mist
Description:
Originally founded in France and now represented worldwide, Season of Mist has gained the reputation for being an innovative, wide spectrum metal label, interested in exploring and developing new artists and bands. The metal label represents world class metal acts, but also leads the hordes towards new creative horizons and remains true to the underground via the sub label Season of Mist Underground Activists. Variety is the spice of life.

Season of Mist has three official offices based in Marseilles (FR), Pennsylvania (US) and Vaassen (NL). Having multiple offices, the metal label is heavily represented in the world's leading markets for metal and rock music: Europe and America. All releases are promoted with reviews, interviews, advertisements, samplers, give-aways, merchandise, touring and more. 

Besides its activities as a record label, the Season of Mist online shop is the place to visit for vinyl, band merchandise and special box sets. The distribution branch of the company distributes releases from countless other labels. Combining all these activities, Season of Mist has become one of the biggest independent record companies in today's metal community.

Name: LabelWorx
Description: For 15 years, we have been building a global distribution network and the tools you need to put your music in front of the right audience on time, every time.

Name: Astralwerks Records
Description:
Established in New York City and now finding its new home in the historical Capitol Records Tower in Los Angeles, Astralwerks was the brainchild of staffers at Caroline Records who saw an opportunity for a label focused on the emerging electronic and ambient scene. 

Having reached a milestone of 25 years, Astralwerks has quickly become a modern, artist-first label with a true focus on nurturing talent across the electronic genre and beyond. Acting with a scalable, independent and global thinking mentality with the capability to tap into the resources of a major label, has allowed the label to retain and sign burgeoning artists such as Marshmello, ILLENIUM, Jonas Blue, Alison Wonderland, EDEN, Ritual and Axwell /\ Ingrosso. 

As a testament to this pioneering approach, Astralwerks has amassed 30 GRAMMY nominations, taken home six GRAMMY Awards and have had historic releases to date from the likes of The Chemical Brothers, Swedish House Mafia, Halsey, Porter Robinson, Phoenix, Eric Prydz, Fatboy Slim and many more.

Name: Chordify
Description:
Chordify is a music e-learning platform that automatically transforms music into chords. 
The service automatically recognises chords from the audio signal, and aligns them to the music in a simple and intuitive player. Chordify is a cutting edge service that helps both novice and trained musicians to play the music they want to play, making state-of-the-art music technology available to the public at large.

Name: Music Royalties Inc.
Description:
We are acquiring Music Royalties with the aim of taking the company public and distributing the 70+ year cash flow through monthly dividends. We are capitalizing on the 50% growth in music streaming(Spotify, iTunes), aging demographics of the founders of Rock and Roll, the consolidation of the music industry, global song collection administration and mispriced royalties. We are currently fundraising to add some high profile classic iconic song portfolios to create a high growth Global Non-Correlated Alternative Investment with:

1. Security from Long Term Copyrights with Life of Author plus 70 year cash flows

2.	Significant capital gains from potential to monetize over $3 billion in annual song royalty cash flow

3.	Global diversification by music era(1950-2018), genre(pop, country, production), language, country

4.	Monthly dividends	


WHY INVEST:

•	Music royalty cash flow distributed on a monthly basis

•	Making music royalties, a unique asset class, available to the public

•	Value unlocked by going public with ongoing accretive acquisitions

•	50% per year growth in music streaming (Spotify, iTunes, Tidal, Hulu, Pandora, YouTube)	

•	Alternative, anti-cyclical, non-correlated investment, not tied to the economic cycle

•	Artists that don’t want to sell their royalties to large record labels can raise money through us 

•	Artists can participate in the capital gains and dividend yield created by their music

Name: Tropical House Records
Description: Record label established in 2015. Started mainly as a promotional Youtube music channel and converted to an independent record label a year later from its creation. Working with great artists and labels such as UMG, SME, Ultra Records, WMG, Armada and many more. It is home to premier record labels representing music from the tropical and deep genres.

Name: Music Publishers Canada
Description:
The music industry is constantly changing, and with every change comes fresh challenges to the rights of the songwriters, music creators and music publishers.

Since 1949 the Canadian Music Publishers Association (CMPA) has ensured the views of music publishers working in Canada and its members are heard. It is our mission to promote the interests of music publishers and their songwriting partners through advocacy, communication, and education.

CMPA advocates for publishers on:

- Copyright reforms for a digital world, including recognition of the responsibilities of new delivery systems
- Canadian content policies for broadcasters and new music delivery systems
- Public investment in songwriting and music publishing
- Protector of the private copying tariff

As the oldest music industry association in Canada, CMPA is committed to educating and acting as a mentor body for the next generation of music publishers and young songwriters. Our vision is to make Canada the best environment in the world for music publishers and their songwriting partners.

In 1975, CMPA founded The Canadian Musical Reproduction Rights Agency (CMRRA) to handle music licensing in Canada. Through the initiatives of CMRRA, CMPA has essentially created the publishing infrastructure in Canada. Together, we have been able to increase the licensing rate from just 2 cents per song to 8.3 cents; while working to ensure that music publishing will be both a viable and sustainable industry for years to come.

Music publishers make up the cornerstone of the music industry and CMPA works to ensure that those working in music publishing are never without a collective voice within the business of Canadian music.

Name: H1GHR MUSIC RECORDS
Description: H1GHR MUSIC RECORDS is an international hip-hop and r&b record label founded by Jay Park in 2017.

Where influence meets impact.

Name: Pachamama Culture • Music C•A•R•E•S
Description:
Pachamama Culture is a sustainability-oriented international project focused on tour management, live-music production with social responsibility. Founded by Mauricio Lizarazo Prada, an intercultural music professional and activist devoted to initiatives with social responsibility, Pachamama Culture provides a thorough grounding, both in sustainability and the aesthetic concepts of the field in music business, committed to empower independent culture, artists and grassroots initiatives with international scope on climate and socioeconomic justice. Our mission is to produce and co-create sustainable content and solutions to the best use of resources and technology.

During the past years we’ve been developing a platform called Music C•A•R•E•S. This project aims to implement a model of sustainability in the live-music industry. This model will serve as a full-service platform to implement actions to 1) conserve resources, 2) avoid and reduce carbon footprint and 3) optimize the cost/benefit in relation to the production and consumption of live-music events (concerts, festivals, touring). The Music C•A•R•E•S platform supports directly and entirely the SDGs #12, #13 and #17 for responsible production and consumption in the community, climate action and partnerships. We're facing many existential challenges that require a continuous effort from all of us to achieve the SDGs in our fields of expertise, individually and collectively.  

Music C•A•R•E•S was awarded the German Award for Sustainability Projects 2022 and is one of the winners in the “Online Platform - Consulting” category.

Name: Music Composer / Producer
Description: Music content creation

Name: Savannah Music Festival
Description:
Our Mission
The Savannah Music Festival (SMF) is dedicated to presenting exceptional live music that entertains, educates, inspires, and unites communities. The next festival season takes place from March 27 through April 12, 2025.

Quick facts 
• Established in 1989
• A 501(c)3 non-profit arts organization
• The annual 17-day springtime festival is Georgia's largest musical arts event, featuring more than 100 productions
• Brings nearly 500 of the world’s finest musical artists to Savannah annually
• Nearly 40% of SMF’s audience is made up of patrons from out-of-town
• Media coverage includes: The Times (London), The New York Times, The Guardian (UK), The Wall Street Journal, Toronto Star (Canada), Le Monde (France), Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung (Germany) and Gramophone (UK)
• Employs ten full-time year-round staff members and expands workforce by 30+ contracted workers and hundreds of local volunteers leading up to and during the festival

SMF’s Music For Our Schools 
• Year-round music education initiatives that engage local students and provide supplemental teacher training
• Programs throughout Savannah and six surrounding counties
• In-school lessons, theater field trips, public library concerts and other after school programs  
SMF’s Swing Central Jazz (SCJ) and the Acoustic Music Seminar (AMS) provide unique mentorship opportunities to aspiring young musicians across the nation.

Savannah Music Festival Live is a weekly radio series produced for Georgia Public Broadcasting, which has been licensed more than 200 times to stations across the country and is available to stream online anytime. SMF concert recordings are also featured regularly on American Public Media’s Performance Today, NPR Music and Sirius XM.

Name: Southern Time Productions
Description:
Southern Time Productions (STP) is an arts and entertainment, social media, and social innovation company producing and distributing socially conscious and entertaining music and film works to accelerate public awareness and action to help solve global health, social, and environmental concerns. Once post-revenue, 

We also wish to become a profitable music label, with A&R beginning with artists who align with our vision once we go for our IPO.  The Southern Time Band is our first socially-conscious music maker that will lead the way with our original music label. Southern Time Band is also the 'rock opera band' for the Dreamer series -- which is our premier film work that we seek to begin preproduction. 

Another 'service' we will provide in our music and films is health, social, and environmental activism. As a social innovator company, the first health issue we wish to raise awareness around is HIV/AIDS. Part of the mission of the Southern Time Band (other than to make incredibly unique and high-quality music that also has mass appeal) is to help meet UNAIDS' goal to end AIDS by 2030. T, the band's lead singer and one of our backup singers, Justin Anantawan is openly HIV-positive. The STB will advocate for the end of AIDS wherever they perform.

Southern Time Productions also will donate a portion of everything it makes to the Southern Time Foundation. The Southern Time Foundation's mission is to find creative and innovative ways to, first, help end AIDS globally, and then address other health, social, and environmental issues.

Name: Decibeles
Description:
En ACR Decibeles ayudamos a sociedades de gestión colectiva, artistas, disqueras y editores musicales a monitorear cada vez que suena una obra musical en medios tradicionales o digitales. Nuestra tecnología de rastreo sonoro detecta desde los primeros 2 segundos de audio, permitiendo informes detallados sobre el uso y comportamiento de la música.
Somos la primer y única plataforma de monitoreo musical en el país con presencia en los 32 departamentos y en más de 560 municipios.

Name: Bertus Distributie
Description:
Bertus Groothandel & Distributie BV is part of the Artone Group and operates as a distributor and commercial partner in the global music industry.

Founded in 1971 in Rotterdam, Bertus has grown into a full-service distribution and wholesale company for physical music and related products. With over 50 years of experience and our “we take care” DNA, we connect artists, labels, retailers and music fans worldwide.

Through our broad and often exclusive catalogue, strong commercial activities and international distribution networks, we support customers ranging from independent record stores to large retail and online partners.

Name: Malmö Live Konserthus
Description:
I augusti 2015 fick Malmö ett efterlängtat konserthus med akustik i världsklass och Malmö SymfoniOrkester fler och mer flexibla scener med Malmö Live.

Malmö Live rymmer bland annat två konsertsalar, en kongresshall och ett hotell med 444 rum. Här kan du spendera en heldag med något för hela familjen. Clarion Hotel & Congress Malmö Live driver hotellet och kongressen och vi, Malmö Live Konserthus AB, konserthuset med Malmö SymfoniOrkester. 

 

EN SOCIAL OCH KULTURELL MÖTESPLATS
Malmö Live är öppet för alla generationer och genrer. I konsertsalarna finns den senaste tekniken och en fantastisk akustik som gör huset lika attraktivt för samtida scenkonst som konserter. Här finns också plats för nycirkus, dans, dj-akter, utställningar, klubb, föreläsningar och samtal. Malmö Live är ett flexibelt hus med en påtaglig puls och värme. Här händer det ofta olika saker på flera scener samtidigt – runt om i huset såväl som på uteserveringen och de stora trädäcken ute vid kanalen. 

Vi vill spegla Malmö och Malmö i världen och därför ligger programutbudet i framkant och håller världsklass. Konserthuset i Malmö Live bjuder på musikaliska upplevelser i alla genrer, i stort och litet format. Malmö Live Konserthus verkar för att riva hinder och sänka trösklar för att bli allas konserthus.  

 

NYTT HEM FÖR MALMÖ SYMFONIORKESTER
Som Malmö SymfoniOrkesters (MSOs) nya hemarena har den symfoniska och klassiska musiken en självklar plats. 

 

I den nya konsertsalen i Malmö Live får orkestern nya fantastiska möjligheter att både spela och utvecklas. Malmö Live kommer förnya den symfoniska och klassiska musikens roll och samtidigt skapa utrymme och uppmärksamhet för gränsöverskridande musikaliska samarbeten. Malmö SymfoniOrkester har närmare 100 orkestermedlemmar som bjuder på en ny konsert varje vecka. Antingen under ledning av chefsdirigenten Robert Trevino eller gästande dirigenter och ofta tillsammans med solister från hela världen.

Name: Brooklyn Made Presents
Description: Brooklyn Made Presents is an independent concert promotions company based in Brooklyn, New York.

Name: Royal Philharmonic Society
Description:
The RPS - a registered charity - has been at the heart of music for over 200 years, creating opportunities for musicians to excel, and championing the vital role that music plays in all our lives. 

Through our programme of grants, commissions, professional development and performance opportunities, we help many performers and composers overcome barriers to progress and fulfil their potential. Through the annual RPS Awards - described this year by The Sunday Times as 'the biggest night in UK classical music' - we celebrate musical accomplishments UK-wide and tell a vital story of what music-makers do for the benefit of others. Through RPS Membership and our new talks and events, we aim to cultivate greater pride and curiosity in classical music. Through all our endeavours, we are dedicated to proving classical music's rightful and powerful place in society. 

Our history dates back to 1813, when a group of musicians set out to build a wider audience for their work and established a series of orchestral concerts in London. The Society's performances attracted world-class artists including Mendelssohn and Wagner, and it commissioned exhilarating new works for an enthusiastic public: most famously, Beethoven's Ninth Symphony. In its founding gesture, the Society created a lasting culture. Other orchestras found their footing and their music continues to resound across Britain. Now, the RPS is run by a small, dedicated team in which everyone plays an important role. We are proud of our heritage that we are taking forward in a way that we hope is reflective of the range of people who make classical music today in a diverse, multicultural society.

Name: Music Together LLC
Description:
Music Together is an internationally recognized early childhood music and movement program for children birth through grade two and the grownups who love them. The Music Together curriculum, coauthored in 1987 by Kenneth K. Guilmartin (Founder/Director) and Rowan University Professor of Music Education Dr. Lili M. Levinowitz (Director of Research), is based on the recognition that all children are musical. All children can learn to sing in tune, move with accurate rhythm, and participate with confidence in the music of their culture, provided that their early environment supports such learning. 

Music Together offers programs for families, schools, at-risk populations, and children with special needs in over 2500 communities in forty countries around the world. The company is passionately committed to bringing children and their caregivers closer through shared music-making and helping people discover the joy---and  the educational value---of early music experiences.

More at www.musictogether.com and www.facebook.com/MusicTogether.

Name: My Sheet Music Transcriptions
Description:
At My Sheet Music Transcriptions, we unite music knowledge and technology to serve musicians, artists, and music companies globally by providing tailor-made transcriptions, arrangements, and digital music editing services. Our team of 40+ diverse, international, and skilled professionals is mostly based in Barcelona, Spain, but it also spans across the US, UK, and Central Europe.

We offer comprehensive music notation services, offering a range of solutions to transform audio recordings into digitized sheet music to create opportunities and facilitate the preservation, accessibility, and creation of musical brilliance.

Our mission is clear: digitalize the music notation and scoring industry and help artists and companies leverage the power of reliable sheet music digital files, synced MIDIs, and any form of music parametrization. Music notation conveys music’s DNA.	

We blend musical expertise with technical excellence, ensuring harmony in every note and project.

Name: BMG Benelux
Description:
BMG is the New Music Company. Having joined forces with Talpa Music a few years ago, BMG Talpa set out to be different – focusing on service, transparency and fairness in the deals we sign, the business we do and in the relationships we build. Our reputation is irrefutable with a track record of hits, continuous passion for interesting musical projects, our excellent copyright administration and collection of publishing revenues. 
BMG Talpa Music represents many local composers, producers and artists such as Afrojack, Boaz van de Beatz, Miss Montreal, Di-Rect, Racoon, Alain Clark, Waylon, Reverse, Tjeerd Oosterhuis, Lady Bee, The Cool Quest, Diggy Dex, Martijn Konijnenburg, Cimo Fränkel and many others.

Name: Finely Tuned
Description:
Finely Tuned is a creative, music, events and touring agency based in Bondi Beach, Eora/Sydney.

With a passion for curating original and exciting live events and experiences, Finely Tuned focuses on crafting unique and memorable concepts that deliver impact, demand attention and shape culture.

Across our portfolio, we conjure multi-day, alternate reality odysseys and world-class one-day adventures. Large-scale club nights, grassroot community-minded parties and mindful retreats. National tours, content strategies and forward-thinking brand concepts.

We work regularly with many of the world’s biggest artists, iconic brands and the next crop of talented up-and-coming artists, creatives and entrepreneurs to bring the very best ideas to life - regardless of their size.

Finely Tuned has been entertaining and engaging Australia for more than eighteen years, and we are just as excited about our next event as we were about our very first.

Name: Marinakis Music
Description:
Do you have a specific sound in mind that you can’t wait to share with the world? 

Mr. Georgios Marinakis did! As a result, he set himself to find an instrument of exceptional sound for his own studio recorded performances. After years of research, all he found was a lack of transparency and limited assortments. Thus, he took the initiative to manufacture the instrument of his dreams in 2017.

Two years later, he managed to introduce his first handmade Turkish Oud and Greek Bouzouki instruments. He also constructed his first string making machine “from scratch” and started working on manufacturing strings for several instruments as well.

Today, Mr. Marinakis offers high quality handmade strings for 11 different instruments! His mission is to cultivate a more transparent, sustainable, and compassionate music industry by producing uniquely handcrafted products of the highest quality. 

CURRENT PRODUCTS OFFERED
 Arabic Oud Strings
 Turkish Oud Strings
 Greek Bouzouki Strings
 Classical Guitar Strings
 Tzouras Strings
 Greek Baglamas Strings
 Saz Short Neck Strings
 Saz Long Neck Strings
 Istanbul Lute Strings (Lavta - Λάφτα)
 Cretan Lute Strings (Laouto - Κρητικό Λαούτο)
 Greek Lute Strings (Laouto - Στεριανό Λαούτο)

Short Bio - GEORGIOS MARINAKIS

Born in Kalamata, Greece in 1981, Georgios Marinakis, is a composer, musician, and luthier who’s persistence and connection to the beautiful sound of the Oud opened the gates to perform alongside music masters such as Ruhi Ayangil, Özer Özel, Göksel Baktagir, Yurdal Tokcan and Nedim Nalbantoğlu. 

Today, he is a recognized Oud virtuoso who has appeared in many TV and Radio talk shows, such as TRT and the BBC. He has also contributed to large scale recordings and musical performances in Europe especially in Turkey, Greece, and Cyprus including world famous festivals like the Yorgo Bacano Oud Festival. His compositions are currently featured on “RFI” the International French Radio.

Name: Pigeons & Planes
Description:
Here’s the basic idea: Pigeons and Planes is a music discovery site, brought to you by Complex. It's where you can keep up with new music, across all genres and from all corners of the globe. We put you on to good music made by good artists, whether they’re established stars or rising newcomers.

We get asked what the name “Pigeons and Planes” means a lot. The idea was to incorporate two things that are complete opposites but also have something in common. In this case that common thing is flight. A pigeon is the perfect symbol for the starving artists who are trying to survive in a world that wasn’t made for them. They’re mostly ignored, mostly unwanted, and there are a lot of them. It’s a tough life, but they survive however they can and when the time comes, they take flight.

The planes represent the mainstream artists—finely tuned machines associated with major corporations, a global reach to the masses, and serious money. We could stretch this on for days, but use your imagination. Pigeons and Planes.

Name: Redeye Worldwide
Description:
Based in Hillsborough, NC (near Raleigh/Durham/Chapel Hill), Redeye began in 1996 by focusing on the rich independent music of the southeast and providing the artists that made up the scene with a distribution option to give them access to all all retail accounts located in their region. Since then, Redeye has charted a course of steady, sustainable growth by developing a strong physical and digital distribution network both nationally and internationally and providing a multitude of services to our partners.

Mission Statement

Inspired by our passion for music, Redeye connects independent artists and labels to an expanding global marketplace through extraordinary customer service and sales and marketing expertise.

A Catalog Representing the Best Independent Music

Redeye’s catalog is representative of a wide range of the best independent music available. Regardless of genre, the unifying element of the catalog is an overall commitment to quality.

A Commitment to Our Partners

Redeye has an ongoing commitment to strengthening our relationships with our accounts and vendors. Redeye’s dedicated staff of music lovers always makes themselves accessible to everyone from the accounts to the artists with whom we work. The team is knowledgeable and passionate about their work. The face of the industry is changing quickly, and Redeye is proud to be at the forefront of this change. But regardless of change, Redeye remains committed to their basic principles of customer service to give accounts and distribution partners the attention they deserve.

Name: La Belle Électrique
Description:
La Belle Électrique salle de concerts de 1000 places à Grenoble.
Musiques amplifiées, arts numériques, actions culturelles, trois studios, deux bars et un restaurant.

Name: Sala Razzmatazz
Description:
Fundada en el año 2000, Razzmatazz fue la primera sala de España en programar cinco espacios distintos durante todos los días de la semana. Siempre atenta a las nuevas tendencias musicales, programando bandas y DJs, por sus salas han pasado algunos de los mejores artistas internacionales y locales de pop, rock y música electrónica. 

Artistas de la talla de Morrissey, David Byrne, Coldplay, Kanye West, Massive Attack, Orbital, Pulp, The Strokes, Blur, Belle and Sebastian, Smashing Pumpkins, The Horrors, Editors, Foals, Suede, Happy Mondays, Primal Scream, The Stone Roses, Aphex Twin, James Blake, Jeff Mills, Kraftwerk, Post Malone, Paul Kalkbrenner, Justice, Skrillex, Mark Ronson, Mika, Scissor Sisters, Boys Noize, The Hives, The 1975, Dragonette o Kindness.  Y muchos de ellos lo hicieron cuando apenas eran conocidos, actuando aquí por primera vez en nuestro país, cómo Arctic Monkeys, Franz Ferndinand o Florence and the Machine, antes de convertirse en estrellas mundiales.

Name: WIN Worldwide Independent Network
Description: Connecting the global independent music community

Name: Sony Music Entertainment Switzerland
Description:
Wir begleiten visionäre Artists auf ihrem kreativen Weg.
Sony Music hat viele der einflussreichsten Künstler:innen der Musikgeschichte aufgebaut. Und viele der erfolgreichsten Tonträger aller Zeiten produziert. Heute besetzt Sony Music die Schnittstelle von Musik, Entertainment und Technologie. Sony Music Entertainment GSA ist ein Geschäftsbereich von Sony Music Entertainment, einem der weltweit führenden Musikunternehmen. Internationale Superstars wie Adele, AC/DC, Beyoncé,  Lil Nas X, P!nk, Justin Timberlake, Alicia Keys, Harry Styles, Foo Fighters, Doja Cat, The Kid Laroi, Bruce Springsteen, etc. sowie nationale Top-Künstler zählen zum breit gefächerten Künstlerportfolio von Sony Music in der Schweiz.

Name: C-BURN MUSIC
Description:
For twenty years, C-BURN MUSIC has helped some of the biggest names in hospitality, leisure and retail get their music on-brand. In today’s experience economy, we understand the importance of the customer experience and how getting it right can give your business a sustainable competitive advantage.  We work with thousands of businesses to create a bespoke atmosphere that reflects their brand and resonates with their customers.
We understand that music is a core element to your commercial success.  It's an aspect of your business you should be proud of, but never have to think about. We just get it.
Our expert music team has profiled and curated the perfect sound for over 10,000 venues across 70 countries. Whether your brand reaches across multiple sites, or you are an individual venue, we get your brand atmosphere spot on and keep it that way - and we’ve been getting it right for over two decades.

Name: Sonixphere
Description:
Sonixphere is an award-winning music production company specializing in Original Music, Audio Branding, Library Music, TV Music, Branded Content, and Sound Design.  We are one of the most diversified music houses in the country, with an amazing composer roster. Our Library Music contains thousands of licensable tracks covering nearly every genre imaginable.  

We always do whatever it takes to make our clients happy, and we never take your business for granted.

Specialties: Original Music, Audio Branding, Library Music, TV Music, Composition, Music for TV Shows, Music for Commercials, Sonic ID, Sonic Branding, Music for Movie Trailers, Music for Webisodes, Custom Music Library, Music for Interactive, Branded Content, Music for Games, Sound Design, Music for Experiential.

Name: Seeker Music
Description: Seeker Music is a modern day music publishing and record company that brings a one-of-a-kind, creator-first, creator-led, growth strategy to both the worlds of catalog and frontline. After just a few years in business, Seeker has already amassed a highly curated catalog upwards of 14,000 copyrights and master recordings, and has signed a dynamic roster of songwriters, producers and recording artists. The company, headquartered in Los Angeles, is led by an executive team consisting of CEO Evan Bogart, CFO Jennifer Scher, Global Head of Creative Steven Melrose, Chief Rights & Royalties Officer Jennifer Blakeman, and General Counsel Dan Stuart.

Name: synctracks
Description:
Synctracks is an independent (non-MCPS) music production company.

Pre-cleared | Worldwide | In Perpetuity.

Get in touch to find out what other services we can offer you.

We work with some of the biggest players in the industry and have years of experience.
If you want a fresh sound to amplify your image – look no further.

Name: All Things Live Norway

All Things Live Norway er et av landets ledende underholdningsselskaper med base i Oslo. 

Selskapet tilbyr artistbooking, samt arrangerer festivaler, og firmaeventer. Porteføljen inkluderer artister som Susanne Sundfør, Madrugada, Arif, Kvelertak, Girl In Red, Odd Nordstoga og mange flere. All Things Live Norway arrangerer alt fra små klubbkonserter til festivaler og stadionkonserter med band og artister som Michael Bublé, Justin Bieber og Rammstein.
 
All Things Live eier og drifter også det ledende norske underholdningshuset Latter i Oslo som årlig gjennomfører rundt 750 show i alle størrelser.

Name: Purple Media Co., Ltd.

Name: MK Music Brasil
Description:
A MK Music é a gravadora gospel brasileira com o maior cast e os principais nomes do segmento, como Aline Barros, Anderson Freire, Fernanda Brum, Bruna Karla, Kleber Lucas, Oficina G3, Marina de Oliveira, Léa Mendonça, PG, entre outros.

Fundada em 1986, nasceu com propósito de quebrar paradigmas e imprimir um novo conceito de qualidade a música evangélica brasileira. Há mais de 25 anos a MK Music vem se destacando como referencial de qualidade, pioneirismo e empreendedorismo no segmento gospel, sendo referência no padrão de qualidade e bons produtos.  

Nasceu "Uma empresa que sonha e realiza" e continua "Crescendo no propósito de Deus".

Name: Eos Music Corporation
Description:
Eos is the best value in background music for all types of businesses, including restaurants, hotels, offices, retail stores, and more. Using proprietary MP3 player devices and an Internet connection, Eos transmits music worldwide for just $19.95 a month.

Eos is seeking up-and-coming musicians and small record labels to join the service. A randomized, "artificial intelligence DJ" ensures everyone gets fair play time, whether they be a huge label or an artist with a single CD. We'll put your music up on one or more of our numerous, genre-based channels, and every time you get played, you get paid!

Eos pays up to 25% of its gross subscription rate directly to artists and labels, without using ASCAP, BMI, SESAC, SoundExchange, or Harry Fox as a middle man to take some of your earnings. Every month, you'll get an email showing every business around the globe that played your music and how much you get paid for it. It's simple and easy - just sit back and wait for the checks to show up in the mail!

Eos helps independent artists and labels get exposure, too. The next generation of Eos players will sport backlit LED displays showing the artist and song name being played, so customers who love your trcks can look you up. We're also building a new section of EosMusic.com where we'll showcase Eos artists, providing links to your website and even direct links to buy your music from Amazon, iTunes, and CD Baby.

Name: Sounds Space
Description:
All your musical needs are in one place.

At Sounds Space, you are able to have access to all your musical needs by creating one account. You can do the following with your Sounds Space account:

1) Buy/Sell Beats
2) Buy/Sample Packs
3) Buy/Sell VST Plug-ins
4) Have your Own Artist page

Sign up now to discover more at:

www.soundsspace.com

Name: Slipstream Music
Description:
Slipstream is a leading music licensing platform, offering high-quality music for creators and businesses. 

We partner with artists and catalog owners to deliver a diverse and vibrant music library, ensuring the right tracks are always available for our clients. At Slipstream, we’re driven by a common goal: to revolutionize the speed and simplicity with which our customers soundtrack their content.

Name: Britten Pears Arts
Description:
Britten Pears Arts is a pioneering music, arts and heritage charity based on the Suffolk Coast at two popular, historic visitor destinations: The Red House and Snape Maltings. We emerged from the creative partnership of Benjamin Britten, one of the greatest composers of the 20th century, and his professional and personal partner, singer Peter Pears.

Britten and Pears shared a progressive vision for music and the arts to be useful, helping people enhance and bring joy into their lives. Our founders’ vision inspires all our activity, from work with our local communities to our national leadership roles in the fields of talent development and music, health and wellbeing.

Britten Pears Arts was created through the merger of the Britten–Pears Foundation and Snape Maltings in 2020.

Name: esse Magazine
Description:
Esse Magazine è il media musicale dei giovani in Italia e una community di oltre 1 milione di persone. Nasciamo per dare uno spazio autentico ad artisti e fan della nuova musica in Italia.

Lo facciamo attraverso le piattaforme social più usate (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), ma anche con una radicata presenza nella vita vera con eventi e con prodotti audiovisivi con grandi partner internazionali.

Dal 2016 ascoltiamo musica e la trasformiamo in storie avvincenti per le nuove generazioni.

Come?

 Con contenuti quotidiani di approfondimento;

 Con format audiovisivi innovativi, pubblicati sui principali social, e in partnership con grandi brand come Lavazza e Red Bull;

 Con eventi offline in tutta Italia. Ad esempio con un format di interviste a teatro abbiamo raggiunto oltre 5.000 partecipanti e con un eccitante tour nelle scuole di tutta Italia, che ad oggi ha coinvolto oltre 30 scuole e 6.000 studenti;

 Con produzioni audiovisive di alto livello, come documentari e contenuti d'intrattenimento di vario tipo, pubblicate su alcuni dei principali broadcaster come discovery+.

La produzione dei contenuti audiovisivi è resa possibile grazie ad una casa di produzione interna con autori, registi, grafici e creativi di vario tipo integrati nella struttura aziendale.

Esse propone prodotti creativi e poi li comunica alla sua giovanissima community (età media 24 anni).

Il motto ‘’Musica e quello che la ispira’’ nasce dalla missione di nobilitare la musica come strumento universale, portatore di cultura, di messaggi di vario tipo e di diverse visioni del mondo.

La community di Esse è attiva su:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/essemagazine/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC0TFalPRyuOWuOgVgm0Lg9Q
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@esse

Name: 8tracks
Description:
8tracks is internet radio created by people, not algorithms.  

Those who know and love music can curate an online mixtape with eight or more tracks, including title, art and tags. Listeners can stream playlists for any mood or occasion and from every genre and country, providing an unparalleled source for music discovery.  

Located in the Mission Dolores neighborhood of San Francisco, 8tracks was founded in 2006, launched on August 8th, 2008, hired its first employees in August 2011, raised its first institutional round in October 2011, and reached profitability in July 2012.

Name: Fool's Gold Records
Description: Brooklyn-based record label Fool’s Gold was founded in 2007 by DJs A-Trak and Nick Catchdubs, bridging the worlds of hip-hop and electronic music while being dubbed an “indie innovator” by Billboard, a “tastemaker label” by the New York Times, and “one of the most influential indies in the music business” by Pitchfork. With a clever and constantly evolving aesthetic for all Fool’s Gold visuals and merchandise, the company has become more than an independent music powerhouse, but a trendsetting and influential lifestyle brand with a rabidly loyal fan base that continues to grow.

Name: Australian Youth Orchestra
Description:
The Australian Youth Orchestra (AYO) has a reputation for being one of the world’s most prestigious and innovative training organisations for young pre-professional musicians. As one of the nation's eight leading arts training organisations, the Arts 8, AYO prepares young people for careers in the arts sector which contributes $122.3 billion to the economy annually.

Our training pathway has been created to nurture the musical development of Australia’s finest young instrumentalists across metropolitan and regional Australia: from the emerging, gifted, school-aged student, to those on the verge of a professional career. 

Each year, AYO presents tailored training and performance programs for aspiring musicians, composers, arts administrators and music journalists aged 12 to 30.

Name: ROCKIT.IT
Description: Rockit.it è la community della musica italiana, con migliaia di band iscritte che caricano la propria musica, scopriamo i talenti di domani e raccontiamo il mondo della musica a 360°. Ci chiamiamo Rockit ma ci piacciono tutti i generi.

EDM World Magazine is the heart of electronic dance music for the EDM community. Inside, discover in-depth interviews with music producers, DJs, and insider industry professionals. Uncover a first-hand glimpse of the best tools, gear, software, apps, and rave fashion. Get an inside look into the world’s most raved about festivals, clubs, and events. Stay up-to-date on the latest trends in EDM culture along with additional exclusive content only found inside our cutting-edge app. 

Our MISSION is to provide you with an interactive magazine experience so you can finally feel like you have something to turn to when you need to escape your stressful day. 

Through our behind the scenes premier articles, our PURPOSE is to educate, entertain, and inspire you so we can connect and strengthen the electronic dance music industry.

We BELIEVE in music’s ability to heal and unite people from all around the world.

Name: Agencia Produtora
Description:
A Agência Produtora é uma empresa com mais de 20 anos de experiência no mercado do showbusiness. Sua competência e profissionalismo em oferecer eventos de qualidade a seus clientes, garantindo toda a infra-estrutura necessária, foi o que lhe concedeu ao longo dos anos uma posição de destaque no mercado em que atua.

Com o maior cast de artistas do Brasil, a Agência Produtora entrega ao mercado uma grande variedade de estilos entre os maiores artistas da música brasileira. Da MPB ao Funk, do Pop ao Rock, do Instrumental ao Sertanejo, da Raiz-caipira ao Samba-Rock. Isso tudo através de grandes artistas brasileiros renomados no Brasil e exterior.

A Agência Produtora também se encarrega de todos os setores responsáveis por garantir o sucesso de um evento. Sua atuação abrange todo e qualquer segmento que possa influir na qualidade dos eventos que realiza.

A área de vendas é responsável pelo contato entre cliente e empresa; os setores jurídicos e administrativos se encarregam do bom andamento dos contratos; o departamento de produção garante toda a infra-estrutura e qualidade do show; a área de marketing e imprensa trata da parte de mídia, assessoria e divulgação; e o departamento de projetos especiais se encarrega da criação e lançamento de CDs e DVDs.

Mais do que um cast variado e competência no que faz, o grande diferencial da Agência Produtora é sua visão do mercado em que atua. Com uma estrutura completa, que obtém total domínio sobre o funcionamento de todos os seus setores, a empresa consegue atuar plenamente em qualquer vertente do mercado artístico; passando pelo agenciamento artístico, venda de shows, administração de contratos e leis do direito autoral, licenciamentos, campanhas publicitárias e seu selo próprio, para lançamentos de artistas de seu casting: a APE MUSIC.

Name: Kompakt
Description:
As a record store, Kompakt has been linking the past, present and future of Cologne's house and techno sound for over thirty years. Originally initiated by Wolfgang Voigt, Jürgen Paape, Reinhard Voigt and Michael Mayer, the shop quickly gained a reputation as a cultural hub, much like other record shops that have become the basis of so much more (Rough Trade, Wax Trax), and in turn grew to harbor not only a round of like-minded DJ's and producers, but also the Kompakt record labels and club nights.

These days, the network also houses a distribution centre, booking agency, publishing house, artist and label management centre. As a label itself, Kompakt has gone from strength to strength and thanks to it's ever evolving roster continues to develop musically in different directions. 

The cornerstones of Kompakt’s rise has as much to do with the busy hands of its producers as it does with a collective of deft ears that can slice through to the most compelling details of a long history of club music, strip them, redress them, and throw them back at an audience as something deceptively new. 

What makes it work is the label’s obsession with pop sensibility – sensibility, not the music itself – and the uncanny ability to grow together as a group, proving yet again that all that rises must converge.Over the course of its history, Kompakt has operated under a variety of different sublabel guises: Kompakt Extra, Kompakt Pop and K2.

Name: Editora Irmãos Vitale
Description:
Fundada em São Paulo em 1923, a Editora Vitale se mantém nestes mais de 80 anos como uma grande parceira de alguns dos maiores nomes da nossa história musical. Em seu acervo, estão mais de 20.000 músicas, de um total de 9 mil autores ou herdeiros. Criada pelos irmãos Emílio, Vicente, Affonso, José e João Vitale, hoje ela é administrada pela segunda geração da família através dos, também, irmãos Fernando, Sérgio, Luiz e Rubens, tanto na matriz de São Paulo como na filial do Rio de Janeiro, existente há mais de 50 anos. O que ela faz: registra a música e edita sua partitura, divulga cada obra e administra comercialmente os respectivos direitos autorais, gerados através da gravação de discos, inclusão de filmes cinematográficos e publicitários, e vendas de partituras, entre tantas outras formas de utilização da obra no Brasil e no exterior, tanto no mundo físico como nos meios digitais, via internet.

A Vitale, porém, escreveu sua mais bela história como editora de música na atuação pioneira da coleta dos direitos autorais de execução pública no Brasil, tendo sido a fundadora das sociedades de autores Sbacem, Sadembra e Socinpro, além das entidades da classe editorial Abem e Ubem.

Nesses anos todos, a Editora Irmãos Vitale se orgulha de ter merecido a confiança de compositores (e seus herdeiros) e de ter participado, como alavanca, do sucesso nacional e internacional de suas músicas.

Essa confiança também se reflete na quantidade de obras estrangeiras subeditadas no Brasil pela Vitale.

Desde a década de 1960, a Editora Irmãos Vitale assumiu também o pioneirismo na edição de songbooks no Brasil. O acervo de songbooks da Vitale conta com mais de 50 nomes de compositores e artistas brasileiros e vem proporcionando a músicos e a estudiosos fácil acesso às obras.

Além disso, também são editados pela Vitale métodos para ensino musical elaborados por consagrados professores e/ou músicos.

Como se vê, a Vitale tem tradição, mas não parou no tempo.

Name: DJ Workshop Nederland
Description:
DJ Workshop Nederland ziet elektronische muziek als dé hedendaagse verbindende taal tussen creativiteit en technologie. Wij geloven dat elke middelbare scholier het recht heeft om met beats, samples en synths te experimenteren. Niet alleen om muzikaal talent te ontdekken, maar ook om digitale geletterdheid, probleemoplossend denken en zelfvertrouwen op te bouwen.

Samen met docenten creëren wij een toekomst waarin elektronische klankkunst een vaste, inspirerende plek heeft binnen het curriculum.

Onze missie is om docenten in het voortgezet onderwijs te ontzorgen én te versterken met kant-en-klare programma's rond elektronische muziek: van dj-sets tot remix-sessies, van beat-making tot sound-design. Met ervaren coaches en lesmateriaal dat aansluit op vakken als muziek en CKV zetten wij elk klaslokaal om in een creatief lab waar leerlingen:

Creativiteit en technologie verbinden door zelf beats te bouwen en geluid te manipuleren.

21-eeuwse vaardigheden oefenen zoals samenwerken, feedback geven, kritisch denken en presenteren.

Cultureel burgerschap ervaren door te begrijpen hoe elektronische muziek onze samenleving en popcultuur vormt.

Zo brengen wij de energie van elektronische muziek naar school, maken we lessen onvergetelijk en geven we docenten een krachtig middel om hun leerlingen te inspireren.

Name: Het Orgel in Vlaanderen
Description:
We are a non-profit association founded in 1990 in order to maintain and to improve the organ culture and the organ heritage in Flanders. This organ heritage should be re-valuated and brought to the attention of people who are not so involved like organists and musicians. The heritage contains a.o. organs who need to be restored or are already restored. A broader view contains the whole organ culture in Flanders, the instruments, the organists, as well professionals as amateurs, students, and also the historical musical manuscripts and documents. 

Between 1990 and 2000 the most important issue was the realisation of "the Day of the Organ", organ concerts with free entrance (at first in Bruges, later on in different cities of Flanders), the making and distributing of photographs of Flemish historical organs, and the publication of a modest newsletter for the members. After the moving to Antwerp in 2000 a lot of activities were developed: 
 
•	The "Day of the Organ" became part of the yearly "Day of the Monuments", and was renamed "Organ on Open Monument Day".
•	The website www.orgelinvlaanderen.be was started and since 2005 there is also the monthly organ mail newspaper. 
•	The magazine for members changed from two-monthly to three-monthly and was named "Information magazine of Flemish Organ culture".
•	Activities like Flemish Organ days (a weekend with a competition for non-professional organists, and with different concerts and workshops) and Summer Academy.
•	An own cd-label "Vision-Air", with recordings that are called "Flemish Organ Treasures”
•	Pedagogical seminars for organ teachers are annually realized the in collaboration with OVSG. 

In 2015 a project to raise awareness children and young people for the organ was started: Orgelkids. A next step was the development of a digital app for children and young people.

We are partner of Herita , CRKC  and Open Churches and member of Interpret Europe and Future for Religious Heritage

Name: Rocanotherworld
Description:

Rocanotherworld is an extraordinary festival, mostly because it is built on three of Roca’s core beliefs:

#Be Curious - never settle for less, keep learning new things and think outside the box. Find out how you can bring your own contribution and dare to develop your spirit together with others.
#Be Different - express yourself as you feel like, without the fear of being judged; express your uniqueness, leave your mark on the local community and express yourself among hundreds and thousands of voices.
#Be for Others - be there for who you truly love, keep doing what you know best and share that with everyone; organize, volunteer, support and connect.

Rocanotherworld’s essence is found in the desire of every one of us to be part of something bigger.

Countless incredible bands played within the walls of Belltown’s much loved living room including: Nirvana, Pearl Jam, Cheap Trick, R.E.M., Mudhoney, and Yoko Ono.

Today
We regularly host a vast range of up & coming local, national and international talent. Hip-hop, rock, electronic, folk, singer/songwriters, metal, punk, and avant-garde. We also serve as a venue for showcases, private events and fundraisers.

We’ve been honored to host Beastie Boys, Ben Gibbard, Macklemore,  Zola Jesus, Ben Harper, Alabama Shakes, Jessie Ware, Emile Sandi, Battles, First Aid Kit, Dick Dale, Balkan Beat Box, Gaslight Anthem, Bombay Bicycle Club, Talib Kweli, Gary Clark Jr., The Ting Tings, Alt-J, Cam’Ron, Walking Papers, El Ten Eleven, Toro Y Moi, G-Eazy, Wood Brothers, Death Grips, The Coup, Divine Fits, Ariel Pink, Walking Papers, Hoodie Allen, Tom Morello, Social Distortion, Hadag Nahash, Our Lady Peace, Austra, Black Joe Lewis, Destroyer, Eugene Mirman, Grace Potter & the Nocturnals, Minus the Bear, Lucero, Black Happy, Thee Oh Sees, Neon Indian, Explosions in the Sky, Grynch, Allen Stone, Wye Oak, The Lonely Forest,  Meat Puppets, The Melvins, Doomtree, The Head and the Heart, Cults, Joy Formidable, Pains of Being Pure at Heart, Tune-Yards, Starfucker, Thee Satisfaction, Nada Surf, Hieroglyphics, Kulture Shock, and so many more incredible artists.

The Back Bar has become a favorite neighborhood spot where we serve hot pizza and cold drinks seven nights a week. There is venue programming seven nights a week as well. Name: American Composers Orchestra
Description:
American Composers Orchestra (ACO), founded in 1977, is dedicated to the creation, celebration, performance, and promotion of orchestral music by American composers. With a commitment to diversity, disruption, and discovery, ACO produces concerts, middle school through college composer education programs, and composer advancement programs to foster a community of creators, audiences, performers, collaborators, and funders. 

American Composers Orchestra (ACO) has premiered works by 800 American composers, including over 350 world premieres and commissioned works. These recordings are available on platforms like ARGO, CRI, ECM, and Nonesuch.
Since 1991, ACO’s EarShot has offered new music Readings in NYC, expanding to national Readings in partnership with orchestras nationwide. EarShot has included the Jazz Composers Orchestra Institute, CoLABoratory, Pathways, and more. Composers who participated in Readings have won prestigious awards such as the Pulitzer, Grammy, and more.
EarShot now includes orchestral readings, CoLABoratory fellowships, consortium commissions, professional development, commissioning/consortia, and, starting in 2023, publishing. EarShot's goal is to broaden the definition and role of the composer and build replicable models for co-created projects between composers, artists, and community partners.
ACO's Sonic Spark program has brought composers and musical teaching artists into NYC public schools since 1999, using composition to foster student creativity and achievement. ACO has received awards from the American Academy of Arts and Letters, BMI, and ASCAP.

Name: Project STEP
Description:
Project STEP (String Training Education Program) recognizes that certain racial and ethnic minorities are vastly underrepresented in classical music.

Our mission is to address this imbalance by identifying musically talented underrepresented students from Boston and surrounding communities, providing them with comprehensive music and string instrument instruction. We set the highest standards for disciplined study and performance, and offer a platform for students interested in pursuing classical music careers as well as other courses of study.
