We focus on the craft, tailoring our approach around every project. From worldwide campaigns, to audio mnemonics, Combustion pushes forward with music & sound, avoiding clichés, relying on savviness, passion and mastery.
 
We are the Aesthetes of Sound.

Name: Crussol Festival
Description:
𝗥𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗲𝘇-𝘃𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝟯-𝟰-𝟱 𝗷𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝘁 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱 

Plus qu'un festival de musique, cet événement citoyen, organisé dans un magnifique lieu au cœur de l'Ardèche, a pour objectif de rassembler les publics autour d’artistes prestigieux et d'espaces associatifs pour co-construire une société plus durable, solidaire et heureuse. 

Nous agissons également en faveur de la dynamisation du territoire en rassemblant des acteurs associatifs, économiques et institutionnels tout en créant du lien entre ces différents participants.

Name: University of Colorado Boulder - College of Music
Description:
Since 1920, the University of Colorado Boulder College of Music offers a wide range of programs for undergraduate and graduate study, integrating advanced musical and interdisciplinary training with professional-level experiences. One of the top comprehensive music schools in the country, the College of Music is a fully accredited member of the National Association of Schools of Music. Our college is situated within an internationally recognized research university in one of America’s top 10 “best places to live” (U.S. News & World Report); Boulder, Colorado—among America’s smartest cities (Forbes)—is also America’s happiest (National Geographic) and healthiest (Gallup) city. 

Our students earn more than a music degree in the foothills of the Rockies: Diverse opportunities for interdisciplinary collaboration and a spirit of inclusive excellence await you! We develop multiskilled, multifaceted universal musicians who are well-equipped to participate in the 21st century as artists, educators and scholars; as broadly based professionals with flexible career options; and as passionate, compassionate world citizens.

Our faculty are deeply dedicated pedagogues, award-winning performers, scholars and composers who are standing by to support your success—whether your passion is to teach, perform, compose, research or rethink music entirely.

Name: Tenstrings music institute
Description:
Tenstrings Music Institute is the largest music school in Nigeria, with study centers in Ikeja, Lekki/Ajah, Surulere, Festac Town, Port Harcourt, and Abuja; and plans to open more centers in other major communities across the country. Over the last 15 years, Tenstrings has trained over 15,000 students from 16 countries.

Tenstrings is registered and accredited by appropriate government agencies in Nigeria and affiliated with several reputable universities around the world. The institute is also incorporated in the UK and operates as "Africa Heritage Academy UK Ltd."

Our programs cover two specific areas: Music Performance and Music Production. We offer over ten different courses in these two areas spanning different durations and depths. Depending on the amount of time at your disposal and the skill level you want to attain, our programs range from three months to two years in length.

Tenstrings was founded to cater to the needs of young music artists who desire to build careers in contemporary music genres such as Hip hop, Reggae, R&B, Gospel, Jazz, Rock, Highlife, Afrobeat, and more, by equipping them with all-encompassing music and business training. The institute adopts a dynamic curriculum, constantly adjusting the course contents and delivery to align with global trends in contemporary music business.

At Tenstrings, our students have a high chance of succeeding in their career because we match training with opportunities. We work hard to give our students the experience and platform that emulates the realworld they are dreaming of launching into. Tenstrings is a home of multiple opportunities! We also own other business and social enterprises such as BuyInstruments.ng, Lagos School of Design, Naijamusic247.com, Tenstrings Music Management and Promotions Company, and many other initiatives that benefit our students.

Name: Mescal Music
Description: La Mescal è Etichetta Indipendente e Management, ma soprattutto la Mescal è Musica. Dal 1993 ad oggi ha prodotto e pubblicato un centinaio di CD, la maggior parte dei quali giudicati da pubblico e critica di ottimo livello, attraverso una cinquantina di artisti, tra cui numerosi di altissimo profilo. Grazie a questo enorme lavoro e senza rischio di smentita, ha dato in questi anni una sterzata al panorama discografico italiano. Ha pubblicato libri, DVD, organizzato eventi live. Ha posto il proprio inconfondibile marchio sull'indimenticabile Tora! Tora! Festival... Ha fatto questo e molto altro; per saperne di più seguite la pagina di questa realtà più che anomala nel mondo della discografia indipendente, già dalla sua collocazione geografica!

Name: Dark Horse Recording Studio
Description: Dark Horse Recording is a 4-studio complex set on a multi-acre plot of scenic farmland, based just outside of Nashville. Our studios are utilized by major-label and independent artists, hosting such names as Taylor Swift, Hunter Hayes, Keith Urban, Reliant K, Bela Fleck, Korn and many more. We host a large array of analog and digital equipment to meet the most demanding session needs.

Name: La Toscanini
Description:
The Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, today considered one of the most important symphony orchestras in Italy, was founded in Parma in 2002 as a continuation of the historical experience of the Orchestra dell’Emilia-Romagna Arturo Toscanini.
It has been conducted under many distinguished batons such as: Lorin Maazel, Georges Prêtre, Yuri Temirkanov, Mstislav Rostropovich, Kurt Masur, Zubin Mehta, Maxim Vengerov, Krystian Zimerman, Ton Koopman. 
Among the artists of this Season: Daniele Gatti, Fabio Luisi, Emmanuel Pahud and Ray Chen.
Currently Alpesh Chauhan is the Principal Conductor.
Since 2012 the Filarmonica has also been an artistic partner of theVerdi Festival of Parma

La Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini nasce a Parma nel 2002 dall’esperienza dell’Orchestra dell'Emilia-Romagna Arturo Toscanini; è oggi considerata una tra le più importanti orchestre sinfoniche italiane. 
Dalla sua fondazione ha collaborato con alcuni tra i più grandi direttori e solisti della scena internazionale, tra cui: Lorin Maazel, Georges Prêtre, Yuri Temirkanov, Mstislav Rostropovich, Kurt Masur, Zubin Mehta, Maxim Vengerov, Krystian Zimerman, Ton Koopman. Nella prossima Stagione ospiterà, tra gli altri: Daniele Gatti, Fabio Luisi, Michele Mariotti, Emmanuel Pahud e Ray Chen.
Alpesh Chauhan, è attualmente Direttore Principale.
Dal 2012 la Filarmonica è partner artistico del Festival Verdi di Parma.

Name: The Wilders
Description:
The Wilders is a Toronto-based company that writes, arranges and produces music for film, television series, interactive and online content (including podcasts and web series.). In addition to this area of expertise, The Wilders have created divisions to meet the challenges of Music Supervision, Music Editing and Audio Production. The Wilder Kids is a division devoted to the writing, arranging and production of score and songs for Children’s TV Series, Film and Web Productions. 

We are an award-winning family of music supervisors, composers, producers and songwriters. Every day, we push boundaries to create music and soundscapes that bring ideas to life, so audiences experience them as profoundly as their creators intended.

Name: Mycelia for Music
Description:
Founded by Imogen heap, we are a growing collective of creatives, professionals and lovers of music.
Our mission is:
+ To empower a fair, sustainable and vibrant music industry ecosystem involving all online music interaction services,
+ To unlock the huge potential for creators and their music related metadata so an entirely new commercial marketplace may flourish,
+ To ensure all involved are paid and acknowledged fully.
+ To see commercial, ethical and technical standards are set to exponentially increase innovation for the music services of the future,
+ To connect the dots with all those involved in this shift from our current outdated music industry models, exploring new technological solutions to enliven and positively impact the music ecosystem

Description:
WE ARE CARELESS. 
We are an Independent record label based in the Philippines and we are driven by our passion to focus on what’s most important; investing our time and resources in good music and the talented artists that create it.

We believe in creative a collaborative and innovative environment where artists- whether it be our own or not- can thrive and grow as artists and individuals, together.

Our mission to eliminate the lines separating OPM and International Music, while providing talented and driven artists the resources, support and spotlight to create and develop their own sound and personal brand.

Our vision is simple- We aspire to redefine and elevate the standards of Filipino Music and Artistry to new heights by International standards.

Name: Symphony Nova Scotia
Description: Symphony Nova Scotia is Nova Scotia’s orchestra. With a home base in Halifax and performances across the province, Symphony Nova Scotia is proud to be a vibrant, vital part of Nova Scotia’s rich cultural community. From sold-out orchestral concerts to free family events, youth and seniors’ activities, and educational partnerships, Symphony Nova Scotia creates unforgettable experiences with truly great music. Visit symphonynovascotia.ca to learn more, listen online, or get tickets today!

Name: Kilometre Music Group
Description:
Kilometre Music Group is a ground-breaking music creation and rights management company co-founded by Canadian music industry veterans Michael McCarty and Rodney Murphy in 2021. 

Kilometre Music Group manages the investments of the Barometer Global Music Royalty Fund, whose mission is to reclaim the financial rewards of the multi-decade worldwide “Canadian music invasion” for the benefit of Canadian artists, investors, and culture. The Fund is investing primarily in the iconic catalogs and music rights of globally successful Canadian creators and is developing and nurturing the next generation of great Canadian songwriters, producers and artist talent.

Name: Canadian Musicians Co-operative
Description:
The Canadian Musicians Co-operative is an award winning not for profit that excels at bringing equitable opportunities to artists and those whose careers intersect the music industry.

Our Summer Emerging Artist Program is an example of innovative and leading edge integrative partnership development in line with Government of Canada Social Innovation & Finance strategy.  

Our programs drives a high level of youth skills and employment development using arts and cultural content, with measurable outcomes driving micro arts business and economic development and  tourism support, activation and animations in partnership with local governments

Name: TagMix
Description:
TagMix is revolutionizing the live music and event industry by synchronizing high-quality audio with live video clips in real time, creating an enhanced digital experience for fans and significantly increasing social media reach and engagement for festivals, venues, and touring artists. 

A proven track record of success has seen TagMix establish partnerships with prestige venues like Ibiza’s Hi and Ushuaia, and London’s Alexandra Palace; major music festivals like Lollapalooza, Gov Ball, Lowlands, Wacken, Boomtown, Victorious and international touring artists such as Chemical Brothers, Chase And Status, Becky Hill, Fatboy Slim, Madness and Pete Tong's Ibiza Classics.

Name: WorldArts
Description:
WorldArts is a global creative network where functionality and technology meet to provide dynamic experiences. 

We facilitate live, experiential and interactive online events with ease and mobility. In the world of the fast-paced and ever-changing, WorldArts connects people to entertainment with innovative original content.

With WorldArts  you can discover, experience and fully engage with a wide cross-section of artists  from around the world.

Our interactive forum represents a unique opportunity to engage with the ultimate opportunity destination for musicians and their fans.

WorldArts provides a network for musicians and artists to interact with their peers, fans and industry professionals. The unique forum is designed for education,  communication,  collaboration and discovery.  Our overall aim is the betterment and longevity of the music industry and its working professionals.
 
By  communicating  the  passion  of  music,  we aim  to  provide  the  tools needed by musicians and artists to continue to grow  and  pursue  a  successful career.   Music is  both  an  emotional  journey  and  an  experience;   WorldArts   offers  the tools, insights and opportunities to turn that passion into a profession.
 
WorldArts  serves the greater good of emerging artists.  Our opportunity platform is designed to let artists and musicians dramatically change their destiny.  By  partnering  with  other major music companies,  we provide an all-encompassing experience for established and emerging artists.

Name: Calvi on the Rocks
Description: Au début des années 2000, Jean-Marie Tassy, fondateur d'UZIK, a l’idée d’organiser un festival sur sa terre natale : la baie de Calvi. Avec Édouard Rostand et Lionel Bensemoun, ils élaborent les grandes lignes du festival qu’ils conçoivent avant tout pour réunir les artistes qu’ils aiment. La première édition est lancée en 2003 et elle impose déjà la recette qui fera le succès des suivantes : une programmation avant-gardiste, un cadre exceptionnel et une ambiance intimiste. Onze ans plus tard, Calvi on the Rocks est devenu un des festivals incontournables sur la scène musicale electro-rock, pour le public comme pour les artistes.

Name: Omaha Conservatory of Music
Description:
WHO: Omaha Conservatory of Music (OCoM) is a 501 (3) C organization which has grown out of a grassroots need to provide music education to area youth and adults.

WHAT: Since 2001, OCoM’s mission to create a musical community through education and performance has developed to embody our core values: PASSION + DEDICATION=EXCELLENCE. We have grown to over 800 students, over 35 artist-faculty, teaching strings, voice, piano, guitar, brass, percussion and woodwinds to a variety of populations. Our faculty are educators of the highest quality who are also actively involved in the performing arts community in the Omaha-Council Bluffs metropolitan area.

WHERE: As of 2016, we reside at 7023 Cass St. in Omaha. Individual lessons and classes are available. Find us at www.omahacm.org , Facebook or call us at 402.932.4978.

HOW: Your donations are tax-deductible. We are a 501(c)(3) designated organization. We are accepting donations for Scholarships, String Sprouts, and our Omaha Conservatory Presents Concert Series. Ask us more!

--

The Conservatory currently provides individual lessons in violin, viola, cello, bass, piano, guitar, voice, flute, clarinet, saxophone, trumpet and trombone, as well as conducting, music composition, and theory.

Our outstanding artist-faculty challenges and inspires a student body of over 800 conservatory musicians and touches the lives of countless others through special programs. 

In addition to individual lessons, our musical community offers a rich variety of classes, interaction with guest artists, ensemble experiences, educational workshops, solo and group performances, and other unique opportunities in collaboration with arts organizations throughout the city.

Name: College Underground Radio, Inc.
Description:
ONE OF THE ORIGINAL GLOBAL INTERNET RADIO STATION CHAIN FOR COLLEGE, UNDERGROUND RADIO AND INDEPENDENT MUSIC. 
 
We broadcast worldwide 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
Listen to Your Favorite Music, Podcasts, and Radio Stations for Free!
 

College Underground Radio has been the #1 source globally for DISCOVERING NEW MUSIC. Playing a variety of unsigned and slightly signed underground, undiscovered, and independent artists, bands and Radio Shows.

College Underground Radio went live March 1, 2010 in Atlanta, GA. USA with 2 employees and have since had over 14,648,80 website visitors and listeners.

College Underground Radio plays a variety of genres on two Underground Music Streams.

 

One music stream is Rock and Country Music. It showcases the best of independent artists, underground music and unsigned works from these two music genres as well as interviews and shows related to the pop culture.

 

The second music stream is Hip Hop, R&B, EDM and Pop music. It showcases the best of independent artists, underground music and unsigned works from these four music genres as well as interviews and shows related to urban artists and culture.

 

We engage an audience of music enthusiasts with diverse music coverage for the digital age. Our mission to become your "go to" Underground Radio station for undiscovered, underground music and independent artists, bands and radio shows.

Name: Creative Sound
Description:
Creative Sound provides dynamic & interactive experiences through the power of music for wellbeing & skills development. Empower & challenge your delegates to explore & use their voices through song and other immersive musical activities! Inspire creativity, imagination, team work, growth and engagement. 
Through movement, body percussion, group singing & glockenspiel playing, Creative Sound will provide you with an unforgettable musical experience and will create a bespoke programme to suit your group's needs. We want to bring out your team's creativity through the joy of making music!

Name: MArteLabel
Description:
MArteLabel was born in 2008, aiming to find a new way of producing, communicating, promoting, thinking and managing a specific model of artistic and musical projects, which vocationally embrace the contamination of arts and the integration of entertainment and new technologies.

We can safely state that the MArteLabel model acts as a third way that independent music can take to emerge into a new recording market, staying away from TV talent shows and "traditional" approaches still based on the quantity of records sold (physical or digital).

MArteLabel today brings on the table an hybrid approach, where the album production is NOT the ultimate aim, but just one of multiple steps of an open minded, consistent and sustainable management strategy regarding a particular music proposal. 

MArteLabel also focus on forming new actors in the managerial music field.
Since 2008, the label has been staging professional training courses for producers and music events planners, in order to offer new job opportunities to  young enthusiasts. Course participants will be provided of a deep knowledge about the musical events industry, the production and management of an artist and, above all, will take the opportunity to train themselves within our structure through a training internship.

MArteLabel is currently working on some recording projects: Gli Scontati, Dellera, UNA, Mammooth, Gianluca De Rubertis, Giacomo Toni, Anudo, Petramante. Others are in co-production with partner labels, such as Mustache Prawn and the Piccola Bottega Popolare. Since 2014, our affiliate label Beta Produzioni has been working with artists with Leo Folgori, Odiens, Gianluca Secco and Malamadre and has included numerous young artists in his editorial catalog.

Main projects:
CIMIT, International Convention of Music, Innovation and Technology, in parthership with Feria Pulsar, Chile’s biggest music industry fair. 
Hackarock!, hackathon where developers, designers and music industry enthusiasts develop in 24 hours prototypes of new solutions for the challenges the industry is facing.
Digital Observatory for the Music Industry: Platform aiming to integrate all the available data regarding the chilean music industry, having as main source the information that MUSTACH associates manage.

Name: Graph Tech Guitar Labs
Description:
Graph Tech Guitar Labs is the first high performance guitar component laboratory of its kind, offering the guitar industry a powerful research and development facility, trusted and utilized by the majority of major guitar manufacturers, including: Fender, Gibson, Godin, Epiphone, Carvin, Taylor, Walden, Yamaha, Kala, Kaloha, Klos, Ibanez and more

Graph Tech branded products sit at the top level of each product category we enter, offering patented technologies through innovative research, development and testing accomplished within our laboratories in British Columbia, Canada.

Graph Tech Guitar Labs is the largest manufacturer of guitar nuts and saddles in the world! Through patented methods and proprietary techniques, Graph Tech has designed specific tone and performance enhancements that were once impossible to achieve. The result is an outstanding reputation for quality and rapid acceptance by guitar players. Graph Tech distributes their products world wide through select distributors ,such as: All Parts, Harris Teller, Stewart Macdonald, Aria UK, Moridaria Japan, Coast Music, Warwick and many others.

For almost 30 years Graph Tech Guitar Labs has pioneered the development of innovative products designed to improve the guitar playing experience by solving common problems and improving sound quality. Starting with the original "graphite nut", our product line has burgeoned to a number of recognized brands that address everything from string breakage, to tuning problems, to MIDI compatibility. 

With a commitment to tonal fidelity, Graph Tech manufactures TUSQ, Black TUSQ XL, TUSQ XL, NuBone, String Saver, ResoMax, Ghost and Ratio products.

Name: Jinga Media
Description:
Jinga Media is a creative production agency and publisher specialising in Electronic and Urban music. We focus on video, social and events in France and internationally. 
We help brands produce and promote content to the most influential segment of the millennial audience in the world of music and lifestyle. 
Our audience network include publishers such as Live Nation, Ticketmaster , Electronic Subculture, Trax Magazine and Mixmag France to name a few. We work across platforms from digital, social and live event opportunities.

Name: DEBS MUSIC STUDIO
Description:
Founded in 1984 by mister Henri Debs at number 27 of Frébault Street in Pointe à Pitre, Guadeloupe; the studio was then named The Terror and enjoyed a notorious image. 
A whole lot of artists of all styles from the Caribbean recorded there. After Henri father passed away in 2013, his son Riko who also was in the industry with his label Riko Rekords, took after and renovated the place into a more dynamic and modern studio while keeping the soul of the family legacy. 

On top of the production and publishing activities, the studio is open to a wider target. Since its renovation in 2018, modernly designed DEBS MUSIC STUDIO has been offering its customers optimal work conditions in terms of sound and acoustics, supported by a team of renowned experts. Among the artists who came to record at Debs Music Studio, the most famous are Admiral T, Kan'nida, Krys, Misié Sadik, Méryl, Were Vana, Jean-Michel Rotin, Keros-N, Noelia, Mr. Vegas and more.

Name: The Cutting Room Studios
Description: Welcome to The Cutting Room Studios in NYC. We are a creative community of professionals specializing in recording, mixing and mastering. We are a one stop resource for everything from music to post production, ATMOS Mixing, commercial voice over and ADR sessions. Our two studio spaces are located in the heart of Manhattan in Greenwich Village & Chelsea. Come see why so many have chosen to be part of the Cutting Room family!

Name: Rubyworks
Description:
With international success stories like Hozier, Rodrigo y Gabriela and Hudson Taylor, whose 2020 album charted at number one on the Irish album chart; Rubyworks continues to develop talent on the principles originally identified by founder Niall Muckian. Charismatic artists performing unforgettable songs with the ability to thrill concert audiences from Dublin to Denver and beyond.

Over the course of the last nineteen years, Rubyworks has released albums by many important Irish artists, including Fight Like Apes, Ryan Sheridan, Wyvern Lingo, David Keenan, Funeral Suits, Hothouse Flowers, Sinead O’Connor, Mary Coughlan and Gavin Friday. 

In more recent times the label has developed a new generation of Irish talent including Hozier, in partnership with Columbia Records in North America and Australia and Island / Universal for the rest of the world, Irish Women In Harmony, Lyra, Jamie Duffy and Saibh Skelly. 

Putting out remixes for our artists, we've worked with Galantis, Meduza, Sofi Tukker, Fatboy Slim, Shane Codd & John Gibbons among other great names. 

The ongoing success of Rodrigo y Gabriela - Grammy Winners in 2019 - is inextricably linked to Rubyworks. Niall Muckian has managed Rod & Gab since 2001, and their global success story - 1.8 million albums sold worldwide, and countless sold-out tours across the continents - is part and parcel of the foundation of the label and our associated management services.

Experience and consistency are key elements to the Rubyworks story. Music Manager Roger Quail joined in 2005, bringing a wealth of international knowledge with him. Label Manager Elaine McCann ushers in a wealth of sales and logistical experience from her previous role at The Orchard distribution.

Name: Chicago Music Library
Description:
Chicago Music Library (CML) is a world-class independent production music library with well over 30,000 pre-cleared production music and indie artist/band tracks.  All of which are hard hitting, cutting edge and high quality - produced by some of the top independent artists and composers from across the globe. Our catalog is extremely diverse with everything from EPIC orchestral trailer music to indie pop, rock, and hip-hop; to mystery/horror underscores and LIVE recorded classical and BIG BAND. Furthermore, with nearly 100 new releases per year, there are new albums constantly being updated online. Users can sample our entire catalog online and begin downloading immediately! All you need to do is register on the CML site www.chicagomusiclibrary.com. 

Previews and downloads are at 320 bitrate mp3 quality and CML's Fast-Track technology offers rapid searches for our entire online music library by multiple criterion, which makes the whole process seamless. 

CML prides itself on customer service so your feedback, both good or bad, is very important.  Further, we offer a 24/7 live chat service along with complimentary music supervision services.

Name: Escuela Coral de Madrid
Description:
La Sociedad Coral de Madrid es una asociación cultural, sin ánimo de lucro, creada para la promoción y difusión de la música coral en todas sus vertientes y de todas las épocas. Nuestra finalidad es impulsar el conocimiento y la difusión de la música en general, y del canto coral en particular, constituyendo un punto de encuentro para el estudio y aprendizaje del canto.

trabajamos basándonos en tres pilares: 

- La difusión. Mediante la organización de cursos, conferencias, seminarios, conciertos, festivales, encuentros, concursos y todo tipo de eventos relacionados con la música y el canto coral.

- La formación. En la SCM trabajamos para impulsar la formación del canto coral. Para ello contamos con una herramienta única: la Escuela Coral de Madrid. Creada en 2010 es, hoy por hoy, el único espacio de enseñanza especializado en canto coral en la Comunidad de Madrid.

- La promoción. Con la búsqueda de ayudas para la organización y el desarrollo de cualquier actividad encaminada a la promoción de la música coral.

Además, la SCM cuenta con una formación coral propia: la Orquesta y Coro de la Sociedad Coral de Madrid. Se trata de un espacio de acercamiento a la música coral donde se aúnan músicos profesionales y aficionados en el deseo de presentar al público un trabajo hecho con mimo y pasión. Sin dejar de lado el repertorio universal, este proyecto adopta un compromiso con la obra menos divulgada de los grandes autores, así como con compositores menos conocidos para el gran público, en el ánimo de ofrecer una programación variada y de calidad. El coro y la orquesta afrontan el trabajo artístico por proyectos individuales a lo largo del año.

Name: Ibermúsica
Description:
Ibermúsica es una promotora de conciertos de música clásica de referencia en Europa, gracias a su dilatada experiencia trayendo a España a las mejores orquestas, directores y solitas del mundo durante 50 años. Por otra parte, Ibermúsica Artists es un paso más en la apuesta para potenciar la música clásica ayudando a artistas emergentes e intérpretes establecidos a consolidar sus carreras.
Ibermúsica es una entidad musical privada que organiza ciclos de música clásica con una programación anual de 24 conciertos organizados en dos series de máxima calidad denominadas Arriaga y Barbieri, cuyas audiciones se celebran en la Sala Sinfónica del Auditorio Nacional de Madrid a lo largo de toda la temporada (desde septiembre hasta junio).
Los valores fundamentales de Ibermúsica son la excelencia musical y la difusión cultural de primer nivel en nuestro país.
Buscamos la exquisitez, la calidad artística y trabajamos con rigor y pasión por la música cada día.
Ibermúsica fue fundada por Alfonso Aijón en 1970, quien se propuso traer a España las mejores agrupaciones sinfónicas del mundo. Y así fue, actualmente es conocida por su marca más solicitada “Orquestas y Solistas del Mundo”. 

Aijón, gran amante de la música y experto conocedor de los repertorios, supo combinar todo lo necesario para llegar al éxito y mantenerlo. De la mano de Llorenç Caballero, actual Director General de la compañía, han formado el tándem perfecto para que la música clásica siga en auge y podamos disfrutar de ella con los mejores directores, solistas y orquestas del mundo en Madrid.

Ibermúsica, ha evolucionado en concordancia con los tiempos conservando la calidad artística, el rigor y la pasión por el arte y la música. La institución ha trabajado durante cerca de 50 años y la relación de artistas que han debutado en España de la mano de Ibermúsica es dilatadísima, gracias a la profesionalidad que ha sido consigna de esta casa.

Name: CMTRA
Description:
Structure pionnière dans la reconnaissance des musiques de l’immigration, le CMTRA - Centre des Musiques Traditionnelles Rhône-Alpes - est à l’écoute de la diversité culturelle des territoires ruraux et urbains et participe à la mise en œuvre des droits culturels.

Il anime un réseau régional qui réunit amateurs et professionnels autour de la pratique, la transmission, l’étude et la découverte des musiques traditionnelles, des musiques du monde et des cultures de l’oralité.

Labellisé « Ethnopôle » par le Ministère de la Culture et de la Communication et accrédité au titre de la Convention Unesco pour la sauvegarde du Patrimoine Culturel Immatériel, le CMTRA est un pôle de médiation scientifique, de ressources documentaires et de recherches collaboratives sur le thème « Musiques, Territoires, Interculturalités ».

Name: Indigenous in Music with Larry K
Description:
Indigenous in Music a not-for-profit section 501c(3) in the state of Florida. Join Larry every week as he brings you live interviews and a mix of new music from our Indigenous musicians from around the Western Hemisphere, a variety of rock, pop, country, flute, salsa, classical, house and electronica. Indigenous in Music is Distributed on Native Voice One, the Native America Indian Radio Network, PRX the Public Radio Exchange and Pacifica Audio Port. A big Pini-Gigi (Thank you) to “SAY Magazine” a international Indigenous magazine for giving Indigenous in Music a mention and for featuring all of our musical guest’s.

The Indigenous in Music Radio Show was developed to support indigenous musicians. After we did our research, we discovered that our indigenous musicians were not getting the exposure needed to get into the mainstream music scene. Host Larry Knudsen, from the Ho–Chunk Nation started the Indigenous in Music Radio Show.

Indigenous in Music with Larry K
- new original music, weekly interviews heard twice daily Native Voice Once (NV1.org) and on 50 stations in the USA, visit us on our music page to hear our past show, and learn how your can support us.

On-line Virtual Gallery
- showcasing traditional and contemporary indigenous art

Indigenous in Music Live Concert Series
 - two concerts in 2020 in Sarasota, Florida featuring American Indian/Aboriginal/Mexican bands

Indigenous in Music Shirt Shack

אנחנו מאמינים במוזיקה, אנחנו מאמינים בהנגשת לימודי המוזיקה ומתן שוויון הזדמנויות. שוויון הזדמנויות בין פריפריה למרכז, ללא גבולות של זמן ומקום.

Name: Mojotone
Description:
Mojotone has been in business for over 18 years as an amplifier cabinet manufacturer and amplifier parts supplier. Through the years, the Mojotone line has grown to include all parts of the vintage, boutique and current production tube amp market. In addition, Mojo offers a complete line of guitar parts, pickup parts and guitar restoration supplies - including their own line of Mojotone Custom Wound Pickups and a Signature Series featuring pickups designed by renowned techs, Lee Dickson and René Martinez.

Having both East and West coast manufacturing centers, Mojo Musical Supply builds cabinets for over 100 boutique amplifier companies and routinely ships over 1,000 cabinets a month. Their quality is unsurpassed and their experience in guitar amplification, technical design, and customer dedication is outstanding.

Our unique selling proposition encompasses years of experience in products and service.
Products » Complete line of guitar and amplifier supplies, specializing in vintage (pre-1980) reproduction and exact replacement components.

Services » Design and production of guitar amplifiers, sales and distribution of guitar and guitar amplifier parts, technical assistance to repair technicians, custom and OEM manufacturing of amplifier cabinets.

Mojo Musical Supply is committed to the highest standards of integrity, excellence and performance in dealing with both their client companies and individual customers. For more information please visit mojotone.com.

The Foundation stands to support and retain Memphis's musical talent, help them increase their revenue and, in turn contribute to the city’s economic future. The Foundation’s anchor programs, The Memphis Music Resource Center is the only free, educational facility in the world devoted to helping artists and industry have thriving, profitable businesses in music. The Foundation staff is experienced in business best practices, artist management and development, publicity, and promotions. Volunteers extend this network to include professionals from diverse fields of entertainment. Additional programs at the Music Foundation are designed to offer hands- on experience to musicians and the music industry, provide career advancing opportunities, and access to the successful entrepreneurs in business and music.

The answer to the challenges of independent music production, artistry, and execution are answered with HRDRV, all while creating a one-of-a-kind network for our members. 

The power of community. The strength of tools.

That’s HRDRV.

Join us today and become a part of the revolution.

Name: SMMMILE Festival
Description: Le SMMMILE est un festival de musique co-produit par l’association Smmmile et La Villette. Le SMMMILE c'est des concerts, des conférences, de la gastronomie végétale, des ateliers et une village entièrement vegan. Le SMMMILE fait la promotion de la transition alimentaire, écologique et sociale de façon festive et joyeuse. Le festival est ouvert à tous, il rassemble chaque année depuis 6 ans au Parce de la Villette plus de 10000 festivaliers engagés.

Name: Octopus Agents
Description:
Octopus Agents is an independent agency based in Amsterdam, The Netherlands. We represent a wide range of artists that have one thing in common: they all produce electronic music; perform it live or DJ around the world. Our job is to allow them to do that as often as possible by taking care of all other business.

We are connected to the electronic music scene worldwide, with dedicated and experienced agents working professionally to secure the best and most suitable opportunities on your behalf. Our main expertise, though, is taking on young or established artists and nurturing their careers. We like to see people grow, search out the best for them and help them on their way to success.

Name: G&L Musical Instruments
Description: G&L Musical Instruments was founded by Leo Fender in 1980 as the "next generation" of innovative guitars and basses.  Following Mr. Fender's passing in 1991, BBE Sound purchased the company and has been continued the creative tradition of Leo Fender.  G&L Guitars and Basses are an industry standard in the worldwide musical instrument business and includes models in various prices ranges made in the USA, Japan and Indonesia.

Name: Modern Drummer Publications, Inc.
Description: Modern Drummer is a monthly publication targeting the interests of drummers and percussionists. The magazine features interviews, equipment reviews, and columns offering advice on technique, as well as information for the general public.

Name: The Masquerade
Description: The Masquerade (Masquerade, Inc.) is a live music venue and concert promoter based in Atlanta, GA. Established in 1990, our venue is based in an old excelsior mill and spans across three-stages. We promote 500+ shows and events each year within our own venue, throughout the city of Atlanta and beyond.

Name: E1 London
Description:
Rooted in dance music culture and part of London’s thriving club scene, E1 has already earned its place as one of the most exciting new venues to open in the city in recent times. 

The East London clubbing destination first made headlines for its debut event; a 27 hour party on New Year’s Eve 2017, with a stellar line up including Ben Klock, Maceo Plex, Âme, Mano Le Tough, Recondite and Rødhåd. London’s Evening Standard labelled the venue as ‘one of the city’s true heavy-hitters’, for ambitiously carrying off a party few others could as its opening salvo. 

Since then, the venue has hosted a myriad of names across a diverse music spectrum. It’s proud of an open music policy and is an inclusive space that has welcomed notable names including: Stephan Bodzin, Sven Väth, Moodymann, Theo Parrish, Helena Hauff, John Digweed, Laurent Garnier, Circoloco, Margaret Dygas, Juan Atkins, Honey Dijon, Horse Meat Disco, Jeff Mills, Ellen Allien, DJ Tennis amongst many more.
 
Despite its versatility as an eclectic event space, E1’s night-time clubbing calendar is the most impressive, particularly for boasting a rare 7am licence, affording extended DJ sets and all-night-long raves. 

The venue is loyal to hosting the most celebrated underground names in the electronic-music catalogue, but also has the potential to host debut London performances, label showcases and live gigs across a diverse music spectrum.

E1 is split over three rooms and an outdoor space, with two rooms of music and one chill out area. The large ‘Warehouse’ retains the industrial vibe, with bare concrete walls and pillars. A smaller area, ‘Black Studio’ gives intimacy to its gatherings, but doesn’t compromise on sound. 
Visitors to E1 cannot miss the innovative Wall of Sound, an impeccable sound-system, designed to make a statement. The Funktion-One system has been painstakingly constructed to deliver unmatched clarity, depth and power to its revellers. 

An essential staple in London’s club culture.

Name: HEFTY
Description:
Founded by the multi-awarded artist and music creative Edu Luke, HEFTY is an audio full production company based in São Paulo, Brazil.
Through each of it’s distinct departments, HEFTY provides tailor made music creation and production, sound-logos, sound effects, voice over casting and recordings (in all languages), mixing and final mastering for all segments of advertisement campaigns.

Name: Music Women* Germany
Description:
Der Bundesverband Music Women* Germany setzt sich für mehr Geschlechtergerechtigkeit in der Musikbranche ein, indem FLINTA* (Abkürzung für "Frauen, Lesben, intergeschlechtliche Personen, nicht-binäre Personen, trans* Personen, Agender-Personen und weitere queergender Personen) in allen Bereichen der Industrie gestärkt und ihre Sichtbarkeit erhöht wird. Der Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Bekämpfung von Sexismus und der Anerkennung intersektionaler Diskriminierung. 

Sichere Räume werden geschaffen, Plattformen für Empowerment geboten und Sensibilisierung durch Schulungen und Workshops gefördert. Durch Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Organisationen und kontinuierliche Selbstreflexion trägt Music Women* Germany aktiv zu einer gerechteren Musikwirtschaft bei. 

Wir haben es uns als Ziel gesetzt, dazu beizutragen, dass langfristig mehr FLINTA*, die professionell in der Musikbranche arbeiten, die Musikwirtschaft mitgestalten – und zwar auf, vor und hinter den Bühnen, sowie in Führungspositionen und als Gründer*innen. Wir erkennen die Überschneidung verschiedener Diskriminierungsformen, das von Kimberlé Crenshaw stammende Konzept der Intersektionalität, als Realität an.

Name: Académie Musicale Philippe Jaroussky
Description:
Conscient de la chance qu’il a eu de faire certaines rencontres déterminantes, Philippe Jaroussky a souhaité́ donner, à son tour, cette même chance à des jeunes.

Il a ainsi fondé une Académie Musicale pour partager avec des enfants et de jeunes adultes son expérience et sa passion pour la musique classique, vecteur reconnu d’intégration sociale et professionnelle.

L’Académie Musicale Philippe Jaroussky, association loi 1901, poursuit trois objectifs principaux :

- Permettre la découverte de la musique classique à un public qui en est éloigné, et l’accès à la pratique instrumentale pour de jeunes enfants;
- Accompagner de jeunes talents vers leur professionnalisation;
- Créer du lien entre professionnels et amateurs, entre les disciplines artistiques, entre le public et les acteurs culturels du territoire.

L’Académie a lancé son programme d’actions en septembre 2017 dans le cadre de l’ouverture de La Seine Musicale sur l’Ile Seguin, à Boulogne-Billancourt.

Name: Raepa Music
Description:
Raepa Music is a Home Recording studio based in Lae MP, Papua New Guinea. We are committed to Contemporary Christian Music  (CCM) covering all bases of production from conception of ideas and inspiration to recording, mixing and mastering and finally help with online distribution setup.
 
Whether you have commercial recording needs or want to record a single or EP,  we have decent equipment and skillset to achieve quality production for your project. If you are an indie artist, singer-songwriter, worship leader or church music team wanting to record, Raepa Music will help 'share ideas' and take that journey with you from Production to Marketing your song and releasing it on all streaming platforms.

Given our extensive findings on Music Royalties, you are sure to have your track secured in all key platforms and monetized for revenue when it's streamed or used anywhere online. That's what's provided as our support to you for FREE when you record and release with us.

Sharing iDeas

Name: BAM! Festival Hengelo (Official)
Description:
BAM! is een veelzijdig festival voor jong en oud. Van rock- tot popmuziek, van blues tot house, er is voor ieder wat wils. Muziek, theater en kunst worden op een laagdrempelige manier samengebracht, wat zorgt voor vele prachtige momenten die in elk geval bij de organisatie van BAM! in het geheugen gegrift staan. Het BernArt en Music Festival is niet meer weg te denken uit Hengelo.

Door de jaren heen hebben vele bekende en onbekende artiesten op ons podia. Denk aan artiesten als Popprijs-Winnares Caro Emerald, 3FM Serious Talent winnaar (2014) Lucas Hamming, The Voice of Holland kandidaat Wudstick. Ook is er elk jaar lokaal talent op BAM! te vinden.

Op BAM! wordt elk jaar (lokale) kunst tentoongesteld, workshops gegeven, poëzie voorgedragen en nog veel meer kunst, cultuur getoond en muziek ten gehore gebracht.  Voor de kleine bezoekers van BAM! is er een theatertent waar shows gegeven worden.

Met zo veel mooie en steengoede optredens, acts, kunst en cultuur is het moeilijk om te kiezen waar je speciaal voor komt, en dat hoeft ook niet! Een fervent festivalbezoeker beschreef het misschien wel het mooist: “De kracht BAM! schuilt in de laagdrempeligheid, de mooie omgeving en vooral simpele uitstraling. Zonde om dit feestje een jaar over te slaan.”

Name: W3 Entertainment Group
Description: W3 Entertainment Group is a global independent music company for music creators. We provide music distribution, publishing, and sync services to artists, labels and publishers. Our services empower music creators with the tools to monetize their creativity,  engage their fans, and protect and retain ownership of their music.

Name: Global Rockstar GmbH
Description:
“We envision a world where everyone benefits from the success of music: artists, creators, music rights owners and fans.”

Global Rockstar is a Fintech company & music rights marketplace which allows fans and retail investors to become shareholders in hit songs while offering artists and rights owners a new financing ecosystem via crowd-investing.

What we do: 

1) We bring the booming asset class of music rights & song catalogs to retail investors:

Global Rockstar provides an investment platform for retail investors to buy and trade shares in music rights with crisis-resistant yields. Retail investors thereby participate in future royalties of all-time hits and songs from up-and-coming & well-established artists.

2) We offer a new artist financing ecosystem via crowd-investing:

Artists sell parts of their music royalties to fans & retail investors. The funds collected are used to cover production costs and marketing. This enables artists to fund and build up their careers while creating long-lasting fan engagement.

3) We enable rights owners to list royalties from successful catalog songs as securities:

Artists, songwriters, record labels, publishers and catalog owners benefit from new revenue streams without selling their ownership of songs, while accelerating parts of their future revenues. Rights owners participate in every trade on the secondary market and profit from the revival of historic copyrights.

Name: Stifel Theatre
Description:
Stifel Theatre (formerly Peabody Opera House) and its 3,500‐seat main theater were completed in 1934 as part of the Municipal Auditorium complex that included the 9,300‐seat Convention Hall that later became known as Kiel Auditorium. Construction on the Convention Hall was not completed until 1936. Designed by architects Louis LaBeaume and Eugene S. Klein, construction on the Municipal Auditorium began in 1932. The theatre is all that remains of the original complex and extends south approximately 250 feet, where it meets Enterprise Center (formerly Scottrade Center), the arena completed in 1994 that replaced Kiel Auditorium. Its facade extends 322 feet along Market Street frontage on the Memorial Plaza as part of St. Louis' most significant grouping of civic buildings.

Stifel Theatre features six to seven venues, including an ornate main theatre with approximately 3,500 seats and a two‐story front lobby (constructed entirely of Tennessee and Ste. Genevieve marble), four small side theaters or halls (with a capacity of up to 700 seats each), an exposition hall, basement restaurant/bar space, offices, dressing rooms and other support spaces for the facility. During its height of activity, the theatre attracted the world's finest performers — concert artists, Broadway shows, plays, dance companies, symphonies, blues, jazz, country‐western, rock, grand opera and light opera. It also presented several Veiled Prophet balls, choral pageants, civic events and traveling exhibits.

Name: University of Colorado Boulder - College of Music
Description:
Since 1920, the University of Colorado Boulder College of Music offers a wide range of programs for undergraduate and graduate study, integrating advanced musical and interdisciplinary training with professional-level experiences. One of the top comprehensive music schools in the country, the College of Music is a fully accredited member of the National Association of Schools of Music. Our college is situated within an internationally recognized research university in one of America’s top 10 “best places to live” (U.S. News & World Report); Boulder, Colorado—among America’s smartest cities (Forbes)—is also America’s happiest (National Geographic) and healthiest (Gallup) city. 

Our students earn more than a music degree in the foothills of the Rockies: Diverse opportunities for interdisciplinary collaboration and a spirit of inclusive excellence await you! We develop multiskilled, multifaceted universal musicians who are well-equipped to participate in the 21st century as artists, educators and scholars; as broadly based professionals with flexible career options; and as passionate, compassionate world citizens.

Our faculty are deeply dedicated pedagogues, award-winning performers, scholars and composers who are standing by to support your success—whether your passion is to teach, perform, compose, research or rethink music entirely.

Welcome to KLANGLOBBY Production Music – where quality and diversity of sound reign supreme. Our extensive and meticulously curated library boasts thousands of tracks, providing a broad spectrum of options perfectly crafted for the discerning ears of music supervisors.

Name: Yerevan Komitas State Conservatory
Description: The Yerevan State Komitas Conservatory, founded in 1923, is the leading institution of higher musical education in Armenia and one of the most respected conservatories in the Caucasus and post-Soviet region. Named after the legendary Armenian composer and musicologist Komitas Vardapet, the Conservatory carries forward a century-long tradition of excellence in classical music performance, composition, musicology, conducting, jazz, and Armenian folk music studies. It has produced generations of world-renowned musicians, composers, conductors, and scholars who perform on the most prestigious stages from Carnegie Hall and the Bolshoi to the Concertgebouw and Sydney Opera House.

Name: idobi Network
Description: idobi Network is music news and entertainment company, operating idobi Radio, idobiTV, and Photos From The Show. The radio station is home to Man of the Hour (hosted by Simple Plan's Sebastien Lefebvre and MusiquePlus' Patrick Langlois), The Gunz Show, Rock the Walls, EJC Show, and The Retrospect.

Name: Gent Festival van Vlaanderen
Description:
Gent Festival van Vlaanderen is een internationaal muziekfestival dat plaatsvindt in Gent en de bredere regio van Oost-Vlaanderen. Het festival richt zich op kwalitatieve klassieke muziek in zijn puurste vorm, maar verkent ook creatieve formats en grenzen van het klassieke genre. Andere evenementen binnen het festival zijn onder andere OdeGand, een adembenemend stadsfeest, en Whispering Leaves, met intieme nazomerconcerten in verborgen Gentse stadstuinen. De Nacht van de Verbeelding transformeert het museumkwartier dan weer tot een vrijplaats voor kunst, waar verschillende discipline. 

Met jaarlijks ruim 50.000 bezoekers en 180 concerten, biedt Gent Festival een gedurfd programma met zowel jong aanstormend talent als wereldberoemde artiesten die hun passie delen in diverse muziekgenres.

Gent Festival biedt bovendien de unieke gelegenheid voor bedrijven en organisaties om hun netwerk en relaties uit te nodigen in een prachtig historisch kader met tijdloze muzikale meesterwerken.

De 67e editie vindt plaats van 10 - 26 september 2024


Gent Festival van Vlaanderen is een jaarlijkse festival met focus op klassieke muziek en maakt het grote verschil met zijn diversiteit, creativiteit en topkwaliteit. Jaarlijks staan maar liefst 150 concerten op het programma, waar ruim 1500 (inter)nationale artiesten aan meewerken. Topkwaliteit, prachtige locaties en originele concepten zoals OdeGand, STROOM en Whispering Leaves zorgen ervoor dat het festival jaar na jaar vele tienduizenden bezoekers aantrekt. 

De 68ste editie vindt plaats van 13 september - 2 oktober 2025

Name: Orchestre national Avignon-Provence
Description:
Directeur général, Alexis Labat
Directrice musicale, Débora Waldman

Fondé à la fin du 18e siècle, l’Orchestre national Avignon-Provence appartient à ces orchestres qui, depuis longtemps, structurent la vie musicale française et y accomplissent les missions de service public de la culture :  création musicale, diffusion et accompagnement des publics dans la découverte d’un répertoire vivant de plus de quatre siècles. 

Grâce à sa politique artistique ambitieuse et curieuse, menée par Débora Waldman, Directrice musicale, l’Orchestre offre une profonde intelligence musicale et une rare souplesse dans l’approche des œuvres, quelles que soient leur époque ou leur style. Il accueille des solistes et des chefs de renom tout en favorisant la promotion d’artistes émergents. Partenaire fidèle de l’Opéra Grand Avignon, il accompagne toute sa saison lyrique. L’Orchestre national Avignon-Provence a également la volonté d’accroître l’égalité entre les femmes et les hommes au sein des équipes artistiques. 

Le département des Nouveaux Publics, fondé en 2009, lui permet d’approfondir sa politique d’actions éducatives et culturelles. Il donne aujourd’hui la possibilité à plus de 25 000 enfants, adolescents et adultes, d’assister aux concerts de l’Orchestre.

Convié à de prestigieux festivals l’Orchestre national Avignon-Provence investit l’ensemble de son territoire régional et rayonne également en France et à l’étranger.
Parallèlement, l’Orchestre mène une politique discographique de qualité.

En 2020, l’Orchestre obtient le label Orchestre national en Région. Soutenu par le Ministère de la Culture, la Région Sud Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur, le Département de Vaucluse, la Communauté d’Agglomération du Grand Avignon et la Ville d’Avignon, l’Orchestre national Avignon-Provence s’engage artistiquement et professionnellement auprès des citoyens sur un territoire dont le patrimoine culturel et l’histoire musicale, tant passés que présents, sont parmi les plus riches d’Europe.

Name: Koornetwerk Nederland
Description:
Koornetwerk Nederland wil het plezier van samen zingen voor iedereen in Nederland bereikbaar maken in het belang van individu én samenleving. Als centrale netwerkorganisatie wil zij stimuleren, inspireren en verbinden om de fundamentele plek voor samenzang in de maatschappij te verstevigen. Als maatschappelijke organisatie wil zij het rijke vocale culturele erfgoed levend houden en in al haar facetten blijvend ontwikkelen.

Vanuit haar verbindende ambitie wil Koornetwerk Nederland niet alleen actieve bruggen slaan in kennis en praktijk tussen amateurs en professionals, maar ook tussen stijlen en culturen onderling. Koornetwerk Nederland wil kwaliteitsverbetering op alle niveaus bevorderen, het draagvlak voor samenzingen nationaal verbreden en nieuwe publieksgroepen betrekken. Koornetwerk Nederland wil een belangrijke rol spelen als poort naar samenzingen in internationaal verband.

Koornetwerk Nederland maakt kennis en expertise op het gebied van samenzang voor alle stakeholders beschikbaar en inventariseert hiaten en vragen op dit terrein. Als opinieleider stuurt ze de lobby en het debat aan om samen zingen op de politieke agenda te krijgen en te houden en de Nederlandse koorwereld als zelfstandige sector te erkennen. Waar nodig neemt Koornetwerk Nederland het voortouw om hiaten in de Nederlandse koorsector in te vullen. 

Koornetwerk Nederland wil op alle niveaus de zichtbaarheid van de Nederlandse koorsector verbeteren en de drempels voor actieve participatie verlagen.

Name: Radiopark Backgroundmusic Solution
Description:
Radiopark develops and produces individual music and audio for the cruise ship industry, hospitality, retail, gastronomy and for online platforms. The Hamburg based media corporation supplies customers in more than 40 countries.

Customers’ satisfaction is the highest goal of Radiopark. A well matched team of music-editors, audio designer, technicians, engineers and project manager use the latest technologies for a vital and professional realization of each project.

Radiopark music channels get a new and fresh mix every day. These are not  playlists that repeat themselves or music mixes that were developed at random. Our staff of editors create premium music programs by using knowledge, experience, taste and feeling. A change of musical energy by dayparting is also 
an option e.g. fresh morning mix, daytime medium lounge program and relaxed  & soft in the evening. Exact timing and planned rotation of tracks is the heart of our solution. Even a complete change in repertorie (e.g. Pop to Lounge) within one day is possible. 

The Radiopark mediaplayer (RAMP) solutions consist of specifically configured computer hardware which ensures that music is automatically provided. To operate, no special technical knowledge, display or keyboard is required. The devices simply need to be connected to an existing amplifier (like a CD player) and will then automatically play the music scheduled for the respective day and relevant time. Updates for music programs are supplied via CD/DVD/USB or online.

Radiopark RAMP solutions can be either a one channel solutions, or a one channel solution with touchpanel, manually changing the music genre or 19” server with a multichannel solution, depending on the clients’  requirement.

Name: Sydney Philharmonia Choirs
Description:
Sydney Philharmonia exists to celebrate and share the joy of singing. We do this by presenting the 500-year-old art form of choral music for audiences at the highest standards of artistic excellence, both with key artistic partners and through our own programs. We also ensure the future of choral music through training and educating singers, musicians and conductors, by commissioning new works and devising innovative ways of presenting our repertoire. Perhaps most importantly, we create opportunities for anyone with an interest to participate in choral singing.

Our performances with the Sydney Symphony and the Sydney Festival have brought us high acclaim, including a Helpmann Award.  Our 10th anniversary ChorusOz performance in 2015 attracted over 900 choristers, playing to a capacity audience at the Sydney Opera House Concert Hall. Having started life as the Hurlstone Park Choral Society in 1920. We’re looking forward to our Centenary in 2020, under Music Director Brett Weymark, with a new outlook on what the choral tradition means in 21st-century Australia.

Name: Fluid Funk Recordings
Description:
Fluid Funk Recordings wants to share good music with the widest possible audience. Making a profit is of secondary importance, music comes first! 

We are home to all kinds of genres within electronic music. We do this through the labels Fluid Funk and Fluid Electronics. Fluid Funk is there for soulful house, hip hop, jazz, funk, soul , disco and everything in between. With Fluid Electronics we focus on the rougher side of house and on techno and ambient. 

Fluid stands for the fact that both labels do not have a well-defined musical framework and that genres eventually come together, disappear and return. With Fluid we also emphasize that we don’t tend to in boxes but rather outside the box(es). Funk stands for the funky feeling that should echo in every track. The term Electronics speaks for itself.

Creative platform
Fluid Funk Recordings wants to connect. With music, between listeners and artists, but also between artists. We also want to be a platform for other creatives. For example, we give visual artists and designers a stage by designing artwork for the album covers. 

Added value for artists
Every artist can now release his / her music themselves, but how do you ensure that the music is actually heard? That is where the added value of Fluid Funk Recordings lies. An enthusiastic team of music lovers with experience in marketing and promotion uses all possible means of promotion (online and offline) to maximize the exposure of the artists. 

We are honest and transparent towards our artists and we always work with clear and understandable contracts. As a result, both the artists and the labels know what is expected of each other. 
We would like to bring artists together and welcome collaborative projects. Discovering new angles often results in the most beautiful music. Artists can also take advantage of each other's (musical) network. 

Vinyl
Although the Fluid sound is progressive and innovative, we have a soft spot for retro. In sound (funk, disco, soul)

From day one, it’s been about great music for the people. Not the people in the know, not the people in charge, just the people… Our people. Your people... Civilians

Name: Andreas Richter Cultural Consulting GmbH
Description:
Andreas Richter Cultural Consulting, directed by its owner, advises and represents international artistic organisations – particularly orchestras, opera houses and concert promoters – in strategy and management questions. With an international network, we represent selected ensembles, dance companies and special projects throughout Europe.
Concert Sales

Andreas Richter founded Andreas Richter Cultural Consulting in autumn 2014 on the occasion of the “EUYO in Berlin” project for the 25th anniversary of the fall of the Berlin Wall. Since then, we have represented world-class orchestras, specialist ensembles and selected projects worldwide. Our long-standing personal connections with renowned conductors and soloists as well as with organizers all over the world helps us to organically create produce landmark projects in the most important concert halls from Berlin to New York to Seoul.
Consultancy

As experts in the world of classical music, we offer orchestras, ensembles, festivals, concert and opera houses a wide range of advice and services: profile and program, structure and development, communication and fundraising – we love questions on it and develop in an intensive dialogue with the partners specific consulting measures and work out individual recommendations for action. In addition, we design and accompany structural change processes, foundations of organizational structures and offer support in the acquisition of funding and project management.

Name: Zic Ethic
Description:
Zic Ethic : Donnez une seconde vie à la musique !

Zic Ethic est un acteur engagé dans l'économie circulaire de l'industrie musicale. Nous sommes spécialisés dans le reconditionnement d'instruments de musique d'occasion.

Notre mission est de rendre accessible la pratique musicale au plus grand nombre. Pour cela, nous rachetons des instruments de musique d'occasion pour ensuite les confier à un réseau d'artisans réparateurs indépendants français. Ces experts remettent ces instruments en parfait état de fonctionnement.

Grâce à ce processus de reconditionnement, nous proposons des instruments de musique de qualité, vendus avec une garantie, à des prix plus accessibles que le neuf. Nous nous adressons aussi bien aux musiciens particuliers qu'aux conservatoires et écoles de musique et nous sommes partenaire de l'association Orchestre A l'École (OAE) pour la fourniture d'instruments de musique.

Notre démarche s'inscrit pleinement dans une approche écoresponsable de la consommation.

Chez Zic Ethic, nous croyons en l'importance de l'économie circulaire pour un avenir plus durable. Nous sommes convaincus que la société et la politique évoluent dans ce sens et nous encourageons chacun à soutenir les initiatives qui favorisent cette transition écologique. Ensemble, construisons un avenir où musique rime avec durabilité !

Name: Daydream State
Description:
Daydream State owns and operates some of Seattle’s favorite bars, restaurants and independent venues.

We simultaneously produce a myriad of year-round live events and festivals that celebrate the city’s vibrant music and arts culture. We believe that hospitality, music and entertainment are intrinsically connected and help anchor an ever-changing city like Seattle, to its history and roots.

Name: Forest Collective
Description:
Forest Collective is a visionary non-profit registered charity and artist collective based in Naarm-Melbourne. Forest Collective passionately advocates for diversity and artistic freedom in contemporary classical music, dance, and collaborative projects. 

Our mission is centred on commissioning and presenting a kaleidoscope of art forms. We nurture and provide a platform for underrepresented artists and the artistically vulnerable to create in a safe space.

Led by composer and conductor Evan J Lawson, Forest Collective is a dynamic force, orchestrated by a dedicated team of creative practitioners. We are committed to fostering connections within our artistic community, embracing a multi-disciplinary approach that distils the essence of our elevator pitch: artists who engage with cross-art-form collaborations, creating authentic and unexpected experiences.

Since our inception in 2009, born from the minds of Victorian College of the Arts students, we have metamorphosed from a conventional classical-art-music ensemble into a dynamic company of artists from a diversity of disciplines. At our core, we celebrate Art Music in all its contemporary, adventurous, and playful forms. 

In 2019, we expanded our horizons by bringing dance to the forefront of our creative tapestry with the appointment of Artistic Associate Ashley Dougan. 

Our journey has been marked by sold-out performances at renowned venues such as the Melbourne Recital Centre, La Mama, National Gallery of Victoria, Abbotsford Convent,  and Burrinja Cultural Centre. We are regulars on the program for the likes of the Metropolis New Music, Midsumma, and Melbourne Fringe Festivals. Since 2013, Forest Collective has had the pleasure of being a company in residence at Abbotsford Convent.

Name: IndianRaga
Description:
IndianRaga is a movement to make authentic arts education accessible, relevant and rewarding. We seek to provide high-quality education and career opportunities through internationally recognized certification and structured learning & professional paths. 

We provide a holistic approach to learning music, including a focus on presentation and performance, high-quality audio and video production for digital channels, and collaboration with fellow musicians. Our flagship IndianRaga Fellowship brings together the most talented young musicians from Indian classical music, selected by a panel of international judges and experts. The program gives talented young musicians an opportunity to work intensively on a new creative idea in a team, with the support of facilitators in an environment that encourages innovation and creative risk-taking

Over the last two years, we have successfully launched the IndianRaga Fellowship in North America, our first on-ground Raga Center, and over 25 IndianRaga Labs, in addition to various concerts, lec-dems and educational projects.

We were featured on NPR recently. Winner of MIT Global Challenge: Community Choice Award 2012

http://www.thehindu.com/features/friday-review/music/indianraga-fellowship-a-fusion-of-music-contest-and-academic-scholarship-says-cofounder/article5119924.ece

http://hereandnow.wbur.org/2015/05/14/indianraga-fellowship-kalish

Name: THNDR.studio
Description:
In our work for leading global brands and companies like Adidas, Avon, VanMoof and Nike, some 50% of the impact we create is through audio. The effect of high-quality, perfectly tailored sound cannot be underestimated. When you see a lion roar, you want to hear – and feel – that lion roar. Done right that roar hits you right in the chest. Have you seen the recent Apollo 11 documentary? Remember the sound of that rocket boosting off the platform? There you go. That’s what sound design can do.

As we aim for the moon with every element of our productions, we don’t believe in stock music. If every video production and brand is unique, using off-the-shelve audio simply doesn’t make sense. In a cluttered, busy, and noisy (online) world, it is more important than ever to have clear, recognizable and high-class sonic branding for every touchpoint the public can have with your brand. For us, this means creating the very best audio ourselves. 

Making THNDR
Following up on these insights, we founded THNDR. THNDR is an Amsterdam based, lightning hot music and sound design studio. THNDR creates the perfect symbiosis of video and audio by merging the power of sound with proven craft in – and knowledge of – motion graphics.

THNDR is connected to Woodwork, but operates as an independent business unit. Its loosely connected bunch of industry-leading sound designers, music producers and composers is headed by Max Gramser, who has been working for leading brands and sound production companies ever since he graduated cum laude as a Bachelor of Music from the Utrecht School of Arts.

So whether it’s sonic branding, music and sound design for motion or animation, a score for your commercial, or artist placement you’re looking for, just give us a ring. Max and his team of magical melody makers are eager to electrify your production with some booming THNDR.

Description:

Sans être un adhérent hébergé, les entrepreneurs et structures musicales & culturelles peuvent aussi devenir simple adhérent bénéficiaire avec une cotisation de 100€ HT année, et ainsi profiter de nombreuses rencontres professionnelles, formelles et informelles, dans divers formats : Conférences, workshops, consultations d'experts, diagnostics de structuration, audits de communication... et des rencontres entre adhérents du MILA et des autres réseaux de la filière.
Le MILA est une communauté regroupant les labels, les éditeurs, les producteurs de spectacles, les managers d'artistes, les médias musicaux, les attachés de presse etc, il favorise ainsi les synergies entre chaque acteur de la filière et adhérents du MILA.
Notamment grâce à la proximité géographique de la moitié de ses adhérents, tous hébergés au pôle ou en boutiques dans la renommée Rue de la Musique, au coeur du quartier Blémont-Messager du 18ème arrondissement, espaces de travail fédérés par le MILA.

Name: Associazione Mozart Italia - Rovereto
Description:
La principale finalità dell'A.M.I. (Associazione Mozart Italia) è quella di approfondire e sviluppare gli studi sulla vita e l'opera di W.A. Mozart. Tuttavia essa non vuole porsi in modo esclusivamente scientifico in rapporto ai suoi soci e sostenitori. 
Per questo, accanto alle pubblicazioni di scritti inediti e di nuovi studi mozartiani e parallelamente all’ organizzazione di convegni non viene tralasciato il lato gentilmente edonistico dell'incontro tra soci: il piacere di discussioni sottili, magari stimolate da una conferenza - concerto, o la serenità dell'ascolto delle opere mozartiane in audio o dal vivo, grazie ai numerosi concerti proposti dall'Associazione in collaborazione con giovani musicisti , non passano in secondo piano, anzi, proprio queste attività, per nulla ambiziose contribuiscono a diffondere l'amore e la conoscenza della musica nei “circoli” delle varie città d’ Italia .
Inoltre , dal tempo della fruttuosa unione con il Mozarteum di Salisburgo, vale a dire dal 13 marzo 1991, l'Associazione si è impegnata ad incentivare gli studi riguardanti nello specifico il Mozart “italiano”, i suoi viaggi e le influenze che ne sono derivate nella maturazione della sua opera( un esempio è la pubblicazione “I viaggi di Mozart in Italia”), poichè è ormai noto ai più che un Mozart senza contaminazioni italiane perderebbe buona parte del suo spessore.

Name: B POSITIVE CHOIR
Description: B Positive Choir, as seen on TV, is a choir made up of people from across the UK, some of whom have Sickle Cell or family members and friends with Sickle Cell. The choir led by choir master Colin Anderson, was originally formed by NHS Blood and Transplant to raise awareness of Sickle Cell and Blood Donation and started off by performing live on the 2017 Mobo Awards before going on to perform on the 2018 season of Britain’s Got Talent, reaching the finals that year as the judges wild card. We have since gone on to perform for Her Majesty The Queen and The Royal Family at the 2019 Commonwealth Service at Westminster Abbey and The Duke of Sussex Prince Harry’s Sentebale Charity to name but a few memorable events as a choir, including traveling to Boston, Copenhagen and Las Vegas. The choir continues to raise awareness of Sickle Cell and Blood Donation as an independent organisation working alongside NHS Blood and Transplant and other’s. Contact us at events@bpositivechoir.org.uk

Com o tempo, a marca Golden tornou-se sinônimo de qualidade no mercado de instrumentos musicais, especialmente nos anos 80 e começo da década de 90. Com a abertura dos portos brasileiros na década de 90, a empresa lança no mercado nacional a marca Eagle trazendo para o Brasil instrumentos que ajudaram a indústria local a repensar os procedimentos na fabricação de instrumentos acessíveis. Com o passar dos anos, a linha de instrumentos da marca começou a crescer, resultando em inúmeros modelos espalhados entre as famílias de sopros, arcos, violões, guitarras, baixos, acordeons, etc. Hofma completa a seleção de brands da empresa.

The shape-shifting ensemble performs a combination of cutting-edge contemporary music, classical masterpieces and staged work nationally and internationally, in spaces ranging from concert halls to warehouses, nightclubs to festivals. Name: Grand Teton Music Festival
Description:
The Grand Teton Music Festival’s mission is to provide exhilarating musical experiences. The festival was founded in 1962 by the Jackson Hole Fine Arts Festival to foster classical music experiences for performers and audiences and to improve and enrich the cultural awareness and opportunities for people in Wyoming and the adjacent area. More than 60 years since its humble beginnings performing in a tent at the base of the Tetons, the Festival is now sought after for both listeners and performers alike as a destination to experience the finest in classical music throughout the summer.

The Grand Teton Music Festival Orchestra consists of top talent from across the country, including 250 musicians from 90 orchestras and 65 institutions of higher learning, many performing together each summer for over 25 years. The Festival also welcomes some of the most sought-after soloists and visiting artists in classical music today. Under the baton of world-renowned Music Director Sir Donald Runnicles, these musicians come together to gather inspiration from the mountain setting and to provide spectacular music for Festival audiences.

The Grand Teton Music Festival is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization (23-7034152).

Name: Rockfeedback

Name: Paranoiak Record Label
Description:
Paranoiak is an independent music label founded in 2009 in Dijon (France) and managed by Hooker. The artists on the label are mostly electro producers whose music include techno, pop, hip-hop and even rock elements. Our main goal is to develop the artistic careers of these young music artists in order to expand electronic music's place on the international scene.

The label doesn't confine itself to the French borders in the search for new talent to add to its roster. The Canadian Kissed With A Noise and the Belgian group Star Guitar were two of the first artists to come on board. Also on the the label are the French artists The Blisters Boyz, Irish Steph, Major Minor and Pulpalicious.

Pairing the release (digital and vinyl) of the first maxis of the artists along with organizing events on their own or along with Vitalic's record label Citizen Records, Paranoiak is working on becoming an important player in the current electronic music industry.

Description: As an umbrella organisation, PETZI, the swiss federation of music venues and festivals, currently represents more than 200 music clubs and festivals in 21 cantons and three linguistic regions. Its members are music clubs and festivals that organise primarily contemporary music concerts for cultural purposes, and are not profit-oriented.

Name: Oakland Symphony
Description:
The Oakland Symphony brings together orchestral music, choral music and youth education to strengthen the Oakland/East Bay community by providing quality live performances, education for lifetime enrichment and the perpetuation of the performing arts.

Oakland Symphony 
Michael Morgan, Music Director & Conductor 
Bryan Nies, Associate Conductor

The Oakland Symphony celebrates its 28th Anniversary Season as a regional orchestra that serves the diverse population of the East Bay. OEBS has gained wide recognition for its unique convergence of artistic excellence and community service.

Oakland Symphony Chorus 
Lynne Morrow, Music Director   

The Oakland Symphony Chorus has been recognized as one of the East Bay's finest choirs and a premier resource for continuing education in the choral arts. In addition to presenting their own concerts and workshops, the OSC collaborates with many performing arts groups.

Oakland Symphony Youth Orchestra
Omid Zoufonoun, Youth Orchestra Principal Conductor 

The Youth Orchestra is recognized as an outstanding musical organization in Oakland and the San Francisco Bay area. Today it consists of over 100 talented music students aged 12 to 22 from throughout the region.

Name: NMC Recordings Ltd
Description:
NMC Recordings is a unique arts charity and record label, dedicated to the promotion of exceptional contemporary classical music from Britain and Ireland. The vital role that we play in the new music sector means that without NMC, hundreds of important works would not be recorded and heard by audiences across the world.  

NMC supports composers at every stage of their career. From the emerging names taking part in our talent-development partnerships; to the rising-stars releasing their first portrait album in our Debut Discs series; through to the established voices with music that needs to be heard that is not available elsewhere. NMC has become a trusted brand, relied on by critics and commissioners around the world who want to have their finger on the pulse of cutting-edge classical music.

Increasing diversity in the music industry is at the core of NMC’s work. We are focused on collaborating with communities that are traditionally under-represented in classical music, ensuring that these exceptional creative voices are heard. NMC is a National Portfolio Organisation of Arts Council England, and as a registered charity we rely fully on donations to fulfil our work.

The composer Colin Matthews founded NMC 35 years ago to remedy the almost non-existent representation of living British composers in the recording catalogues of major labels at the time. NMC’s invaluable work supporting the rich breadth of compositional talent from across Britain and Ireland means that our catalogue now holds more than 300 albums, and is a diverse living archive of classical music spanning multiple generations of composers.
