Name: Left Over Society
Description: At Left Over Society, we are an artist development agency that is eager to come alongside individuals with a vision to grow their craft within the music industry. Along with pushing your music across all platforms, we help craft digital strategies, develop merchandise, handle media relations, and manage song projects from beginning to end. We focus on organically developing artists to reach their full potential.

Name: EPM Music
Description:
EPM emerged in January 2001, founded by Oliver Way, Jonas Stone, and later joined by Melle Boels, initially focusing on promotion and DJ bookings. Recognizing the transformative impact of evolving technologies, such as the emergence of platforms like iTunes and the digital revolution, the company swiftly discerned opportunities to assist current labels and artists in harnessing these advancements. As the digital landscape increasingly shaped the music industry, EPM strategically pivoted its focus.

EPM Music has since evolved into a preeminent provider of professional label and artist services, solidifying its market presence across major outlets including iTunes, Amazon, Spotify, Rdio, Deezer, and specialized dance platforms like JunoDownload, Beatport, Bleep, Boomkat, and more. Renowned for prioritizing quality over quantity, EPM Music's success is deeply rooted in its personalized approach towards nurturing relationships with labels and artists. The company offers strategic counsel on promotional activities, leveraging robust connections with retail outlets to secure advantageous promotional opportunities for its clientele that may not be accessible through direct outlet interactions.

In 2007, EPM expanded its services by stepping into publishing, empowering its artists and labels to accrue mechanical and public performance income globally. The establishment of an office in the US bolstered EPM's foothold in the sync licensing market, leading to numerous successful placements in television, film, advertising, and gaming—a testament to the company's multifaceted expertise and industry reach.

Name: CloudKid
Description:
Not defined by genres, CloudKid is a creative outlet created to support thriving undiscovered talent. Starting off as a YouTube music curation channel, CloudKid has grown into a creative company and label helping to develop and bring artists' visions to life.

If you’ve heard of CloudKid, you’ve probably heard of the CloudKid YouTube channel. Adding a unique audiovisual touch to music curation, CloudKid began its journey on the platform in 2013. Since then CloudKid has expanded to a variety of new avenues, but YouTube still plays an important role to help and support up-and-coming artists and remains the core of the CloudKid universe.

Name: KIDDING ASIDE
Description:
Kidding Aside is a career management agency and a leading player in the electronic music industry.
It represents artists such as NTO, Trinix, Acid Arab, and Izia, whose combined revenues exceeded 7M€ in 2024.
The agency also develops publishing and business management activities.

In 2024, Kidding Aside partnered with Believe to launch All Night Long, a new French electronic music label whose roster already includes major acts such as Folamour, Nico Moreno, Trym, TDJ, NTO, and Upsilone.

Name: Nišville Jazz Festival
Description:
The International Nisville jazz festival is the largest and most-visited jazz festival in Southeastern Europe. 

The festival is the offical cultural event of the City of Niš and also "the festival of national value", according to the rankings by Serbian Ministry of Culture. 

Since the first edition of the festival in 1995, Nisville has been promoting the multiculturism as the inevitable characteristic of the contemporary jazz music. The festival's concept is based on presenting the 'traditional' jazz forms together with their fusion with the world music tradition, with the emphasis on the music from the Balkans. 

The main program of the festival is held at two connected stages in the Fortress of Niš, while there are also many free stages in the Fortress and in the city ...

During the festival days, more than 150,000 visitors are enjoying the musical peformances, movies and theatre, art exhibitions and book promotions. Besides that, Nisville festival organizes free jazz performances in many cities and towns around Serbia: Dimitrovgrad, Paraćin, Beograd, Novi Sad, Subotica, Aleksinac, Prokuplje, Vranje, Pirot, Leskovac, Zaječar, Aranđelovac...

Name: Breyer Hnos. S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar reconocida a nivel nacional dedicada a instrumentos musicales de alta calidad desde 1882. 

Con gran esfuerzo y perseverancia, logramos posicionar nuestra marca como sinónimo de experiencia y confianza entre clientes y artistas como Daniel Barenboim, Bruno Gelber y Martha Argerich. Como especialistas en pianos, estamos orgullosos de ser actualmente los únicos representantes de Steinway & Sons y pianos Kawai en Argentina.

Asimismo, desarrollamos la importación y distribución mayorista de instrumentos musicales y accesorios, logrando adquirir representaciones muy importantes como Ovation, Hagstrom, Breedlove, Lee Oskar, Savarez, Augustine, Cherub, Nux, entre otras. Actualmente, artistas como Andrés Ciro Martínez, Juan Germán Piti Fernández y Esteban Morgado eligen instrumentos de nuestra representación. 

Nos proponemos seguir trabajando con dedicación para garantizar la calidad en este apasionante mundo de la música y sus instrumentos musicales.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Music Basti
Description: Set up in 2008, Music Basti connects at-risk children with musicians, aiming to nurture confidence through a creative and joyful music-learning experience. In 2013, Music Basti created the one-year ReSound program. ReSound is designed to enable children in resource-poor settings such as slums and low-income schools to write and perform their own original songs that tell the story of their communities. Through fun and improvisation based musical training, song writing and performance, ReSound fosters important life-skills in children such as confidence, creativity and leadership.

Name: MusicNSW
Description:
MusicNSW is the peak body for contemporary music in NSW. It is a not-for-profit organisation that empowers and connects artists and industry by providing access to professional and skill development opportunities and resources, facilitating strong industry networks, and bringing artists and industry together for consultation and collaboration. 

MusicNSW believes that music and music making exists as an essential expression of our humanity and we work to develop and strengthen the critical skills, knowledge, imagination and industry infrastructure needed to see NSW music communities truly thrive.

Name: Mad in Event
Description: Mad In Event est une agence de production événementielle et de diffusion d'artistes, intervenant dans toute la France

Name: Hot House Music Schools
Description:
* Hot House Music are dedicated to providing young musicians a safe and positive learning environment in which to develop, flourish and grow into resilient and brave people.
* Hot House Music are striving to the be the UK's leading provider of independent youth contemporary music education
* Hot House are looking to franchise their services internationally

Name: Wide Days
Description:
Wide Days was launched in 2010 and is hosted every April in Edinburgh by Wide Events CIC (formerly Born To Be Wide CIC). A past winner Best Networking Event at the Yearly Music Convention Awards, in 2019 welcomed 360 delegates from across the UK, Europe and North America + over 1000 people for the showcase and Festival Takeover. 

An additional 1000 people attended the evening showcases and the final night's Festival Takeover, which saw three Scottish festivals each programme a stage. 

Since 2017 the convention has ensured it has a gender-balanced speaker programme building on Wide Days 2016, when the majority of showcase acts were fronted by women. It was the first Scottish event to join PRS Foundation’s Keychange initiative.

Acts who have previously showcased at Wide Days include Be Charlotte, Catholic Action, Fatherson, Rachel Sermanni, The Ninth Wave, , Scottish Album of the Year Award winner Kathryn Joseph and the Mercury-nominated C Duncan. Honeyblood, PAWS and Siobhan Wilson, all signed record deals as a result of their performances.

Parent company, Wide Events CIC, has its origins in the Born To Be Wide evenings launched in 2004. These started out as social gathering for people working in the local music scene and have gone on to host more than 150 seminars, Q&As and talk shows, partnering with a diverse range of organisations.

Wide Events CIC also stages  music business seminars, showcases and the Off The Record youth events, as well as bespoke panels for other organisations.

Name: Singing Serpent Music
Description: Singing Serpent is a national music studio that composes original music and sound design for commercial advertisements, licenses music, and hosts private recording sessions. Locations based in San Diego, CA, Richmond, VA, and New York, NY.

Name: ANIMAL MUSIC
Description: Animal is a collective of artists and musicians who live by creativity, new concepts, and original content.

Name: Roland South Europe
Description:
Roland South Europe nasce come Roland Italy nel 1986. Azienda dinamica e orientata al futuro, negli anni Roland South Europe ha fatto propria la filosofia di Roland Corporation, all'avanguardia nello sviluppo degli strumenti musicali digitali da oltre 40 anni e leader di mercato in una serie di prodotti come le batterie digitali (V-DRUMS) e gli effetti per chitarra (BOSS).

Nel 2014 Roland South Europe ha acquisito la distribuzione dei prodotti Roland e BOSS anche sui territori di Spagna e Portogallo.

Name: MUBUTV | Music Business Television
Description: MUBUTV (Music Business Television) is a music business video series that examines several areas of today’s music industry, including: A&R, music supervision, legal affairs, marketing & branding, publicity and record production among others. The ultimate goal and objective of MUBUTV is to educate, empower and enlighten the musician and industry professional of the twenty first century.

Name: Challenge Records International
Description: Challenge Records International B.V. is an independent record company, located in the Netherlands. We are a group of music enthusiasts with a passion for jazz and classical music. We represent leading national and international artists, offering you a large collection of music in a variety of music styles. On this site we give you an overview of our catalogue, our artists, series, tour information, history, news and new releases. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions or remarks.

Name: Loen Entertainment Inc.
Description:
Loen Entertainment Inc (016170:KOSDAQ) is the leading Music Company in Korea, providing services in all frontiers of the music industry.
 
-	Ubiquitous Download & Streaming Service: LOEN provides Korea’s largest Digital Music Service Platform, “MelOn”.
-	Production & Artist Management: Auditions & Trains talents to create musical contents.
-	Investment & Distribution of Records & Online/Mobile: LOEN licenses musical contents with major production houses and promotes content to its Record and Digital Distribution Network.


LOEN will provide you with a new lifestyle, creatively re-designing the enjoyment of entertainment.

Name: Walker
Description: Walker is a music supervision company specializing in original content, licensing, and creative strategy.

Name: BAND Royalty Music
Description:
Non-Fungible Tokens meets music-royalties staking pools.
The 1st curated music NFT limited collection of unique artwork, allowing you the opportunity to stake your BAND NFTs into top-tier platinum song royalty pools.
Instead of only listening, you can choose to stake your NFTs into royalty pools to potentially earn whenever that platinum-selling song is played. Tap into the unique utility of BAND NFTs in its series 1, and get the opportunity to share in the performance rights of various songs & artists.

Name: GLASTONBURY FESTIVALS LIMITED
Description: Please note if you wish to list work at the Festival on your LinkedIn profile, please link to GLASTONBURY FESTIVAL EVENTS LIMITED (https://www.linkedin.com/company/glastonbury-festival-events-ltd) in the Performing Arts category.

Name: Found Objects
Description: Found Objects is an original music and sound collective founded by award-winning composers Jay Wadley and Trevor Gureckis. Our recent original Film and TV scores include Oscar-Winning writer/director Charlie Kaufman’s feature I’m Thinking of Ending Things (Netflix), M. Night Shyamalan’s original series Servant (AppleTV+), Sundance-winning I Carry You With Me (Sony Pictures Classics) directed by Oscar-Nominated Director Heidi Ewing, and The Innocence Files (Netflix) directed by Oscar-Winning/Nominated directors Roger Ross Williams, Alex Gibney and Liz Garbus. Our new state-of-the-art studios in Dumbo, Brooklyn features a live room and 5.1 Mix room where we recently hosted the score mix for John Chu’s upcoming film adaptation of Lin Manuel Miranda’s In The Heights (Warner Brothers). We have collaborated and orchestrated for artists such as Kanye West, D.R.A.M., Philip Glass, Rufus Wainwright, Niia, Mark Ronson, Calexico and Andrew Wyatt (Miike Snow). Our original music for branded work has won Clios, Cannes Lions, AMP Awards, AICP Awards, LIA awards, Webby Awards, and others.

Name: Orchestras Canada/Orchestres Canada
Description: Orchestras Canada helps orchestras achieve together what they cannot accomplish alone, serving Canadian orchestras in both official languages, through research, knowledge-sharing, convening, and advocacy. / Orchestres Canada aide les orchestres canadiens à réaliser ensemble ce qu’ils ne peuvent accomplir seuls et leur offre dans les deux langues officielles ses services de recherche, de partage des connaissances, de convocation de réunions et de défense des intérêts.

Name: Metropole Orkest
Description:
When you think of an orchestra, you think classical music. That’s not the Metropole Orkest (MO). Playing jazz, pop, world music and film scores, the Metropole Orkest has shared the stage with legends such as Ella Fitzgerald, Dizzy Gillespie, Pat Metheny, Brian Eno, Herbie Hancock, The Basement Jaxx and Bono. The MO invests just as much in playing with the next generation of stars like Caro Emerald, Laura Mvula, Robert Glasper, Woodkid, Snarky Puppy and Gregory Porter. Under the helm of the young British chief conductor Jules Buckley Metropole Orkest seeks to challenge boundaries of current symphonic pop and jazz.

The Metropole Orkest is a regular guest on The Netherlands’ main stages such as the Amsterdam Paradiso, The Concertgebouw and has played in both the Barbican and Royal Albert Hall in London. The Orkest also plays many festivals including North Sea Jazz, BBC Proms, Holland Festival, Pinkpop and Lowlands, to name but a few. In recent years, the Metropole Orkest won 3 Grammy Awards and received 17 Grammy Nominations.

The Metropole Orkest has produced more than 150 albums and thousands of radio and television broadcasts, requiring over 600 arrangements per year in every imaginable style. Despite this musical versatility, people all over the world can recognise inimitable sound, style and identity of the Metropole Orkest.

As the world’s leading pop and jazz orchestra, the Metropole Orkest is always looking to experiment and to be part of spectacular performances. The Metropole Orkest moves audiences. That is, after all, the real purpose of music.


Chief conductor: Jules Buckley
Honorary conductor: Vince Mendoza 

The Metropole Orkest has a track record of working with versatile chief conductors. Beginning with its founder Dolf van der Linden, subsequent holders of this position are Rogier van Otterloo, Dick Bakker and Vince Mendoza. In 2013 the dynamic young British conductor Jules Buckley was appointed as the Metropole Orkest’s newest chief conductor.

Name: Siachen Studios
Description:
SIACHEN STUDIOS is created to serve independent labels, managements, artists and bands with fair values, sustainable business models and by pushing new technologies & approaches to create, distribute and promote music. We salute all people involved in the process of creating music and building careers – from the studio engineer and the cover-artwork designer, to the composers, lyricists, label people, musicians and the front singers.

Who we are?

We are the fans, the followers. The ones at the front row of your gig and the ones rocking the stage. The ones who click ‘like’ on your updates and the one posting the update. The ones who generate your streaming numbers, buy your records and share your playlists and the ones who make music. We are the fans and the artist of a vibrant and generous music climate.

We stand up for the independent artists and labels.

siachen studios is the definitive Sound of modern electronic music. Our mission is to inspire upcoming edm artists all around the world and help them in their epic journey by providing them all the necessary tools. From powerfull samples to awesome VSTs from providing balanced coverage of the worldwide EDM movement to all the necessary blogs we are there for you.

In addition to timely and relevant news pieces, at siachen studios we pride ourselves on publishing official Music from artist also the interviews, reviews and editorials that shed light on the topics that matter to our readers. Since our official launch on June 1st of 2019, our content has reached millions globally.

In the interest of journalistic integrity, we here at siachen studios are committed to the transparency of our business model. We clearly label posts sponsored by our partners as well as music released by the record labels with which we partner.

Name: ROBA Music Publishing
Description:
ROBA offers high end music publishing services to songwriters, artists and rights owners in the music industry. We are equally representing music publishing and recording rights.
We place the needs of writers, artists and repertoire owners at the heart of our business, based on core values of fairness, transparency and excellent service.

We recognizes that no two writers or artists are the same. We offer a bespoke and modular service that may include creative services, music rights licensing and administration, royalty collection and tracking, digital distribution, funding and investment.

Our focus is clear: We aim to be the best home for songwriters, repertoire owners and artists in the digital age.

Name: Thinking Loud
Description:
Shaped by years of experience working within Music, Entertainment, Fashion, Arts & Creative disciplines, our PR & Experiential work gives young Australians access to ground-breaking artists, culturally intelligent content and curated brand experiences.

We help our clients contribute to popular culture in a positive and authentic way through insight-led big ideas & innovative communications strategies. 

We are experts in turning these ideas into stories and telling them through a global network of passionate publishers, opinion leaders and fans.

Our growing client roster includes Red Bull Music, Boiler Room, Young Henrys, Bacardi, JBL Audio, Sampa The Great, Genesis Owusu, Hiatus Kaiyote, Flight Facilities, Hayden James, Jorja Smith, Winston Surfshirt, AJ Tracey, Chet Faker, Cosmos Midnight and Cut Copy.

Name: Garsington Opera
Description:
Each year Garsington Opera brings productions of the highest professional quality to an intimate setting of extraordinary beauty at Wormsley, in the Chiltern Hills. 

The company is renowned for championing rarely performed works of artistic interest as well as presenting the core repertory that includes Mozart and Rossini. We provide a platform for the finest young principal singers to work alongside more established artists and take special care to engage conductors and stage directors of distinction.

Name: SHINEDOWN GENERAL TRADING LLC
Description: General Trading LLC

Description:

Musique / art / culture / food

Name: Awakening Music
Description:
Awakening Music offers a wide range of products for the modern Islamic market. 

Awakening Music produces faith-inspired and value-driven music through its roster of world-renowned artists: Maher Zain, Mesut Kurtis, Raef, Humood AlKhudher, Harris J, and Jaqlyn. Previously, Sami Yusuf & Hamza Namira, among others. 

It specialises in the production, manufacturing, distribution, marketing, and promotion of sound recordings and music videos. 

Awakening strives to provide the very best in live and recorded entertainment for those seeking value-driven, faith-inspired music. 

In 2018, Deventi Group acquired a majority stake in Awakening Music.

Name: Sugar Factory
Description:
Sugar Factory was a nightclub and live music venue in the heart of Amsterdam, attracting a young audience in search of diverse entertainment in an intimate yet inspiring setting. A springboard for talent on the cusp of international acclaim, the “Sugar” was renowned for its original live music and club night offerings. It was also home to many other successful events and concepts, many of which were co-produced with a variety of organisations.

Sugar Factory was open daily and each day brought its own unique atmosphere and audience. On an yearly basis, it hosted over 600 events and welcomed up to 165,000 guests. Venue had a maximum capacity of 750 visitors for club nights and 400 for live music events. 
Completely independent, non-subsidised and always exciting, it was one of the city’s hottest destinations.

Sugar Factory hosted its last event on Sunday 07 January 2019, following the news on its bancruptcy. See the press release below.

https://www.facebook.com/sugarfactoryamsterdam/posts/2085122838269240

https://www.instagram.com/sugarfactorynl/?hl=nl

https://3voor12.vpro.nl/update~50d4603d-16c6-45fd-8739-2ea739ec4807~poppodium-sugar-factory-sluit-per-direct-de-deuren~.html

https://www.rtl.nl/economie/business/artikel/4542516/faillissement-poppodium-sugar-factory

https://www.parool.nl/nieuws/sugar-factory-failliet-club-per-direct-dicht~b20f861e/

Name: LIVE AFFAIR
Description:
Entité dédiée au spectacle vivant, Live Affair est créée en 2019 au sein de Believe, dans le but de compléter la palette d’expertises offertes aux artistes et de créer de nouvelles synergies.

Fondamentalement éclectique, Live Affair a pour vocation d’accompagner sur scène les artistes, en leur offrant le meilleur terreau possible pour enrichir leur carrière. Ici, la production est un véritable laboratoire et s’adapte à chacun, à toutes les étapes de leurs parcours et en collaboration avec tous les acteurs de leurs projets.

Believe est avant tout une passion pour la musique, la technologie et le marketing numérique. Fondée en 2005, animée par un esprit visionnaire et relevant au quotidien les défis liés à la transformation de l’industrie musicale, elle s’étend désormais à travers plus de 45 pays et est reconnue comme leader mondial de la distribution de musique numérique.

Live Affair est la réunion d’un savoir-faire aguerri dans l’industrie du spectacle vivant, associé à l’expertise digitale et technologique du groupe, dans le but de poursuivre la mission de Believe : accompagner et développer chaque artiste de la manière la plus adaptée possible, à chaque étape de sa carrière, avec respect, expertise, équité et transparence.

Depuis peu, Live Affair joint également ses forces aux producteurs de spectacles indépendants tels qu’Allo Floride ou Wart, à travers des co-productions pour créer des services sur mesure aux artistes.

Name: LifeScore Music
Description:
LifeScore marries the time-tested 400-year-old technology of musical notation with its proprietary Cellular Composition algorithms, creating a radically innovative, endlessly original platform for musical composition. At LifeScore’s core lie its audio assets – musical building blocks featuring world-class musicians, the finest instruments, historic and cutting edge  recording technologies and production in the world’s greatest recording studio.

Employing the techniques and processes of professional composers, including those of CEO and Founder Philip Sheppard, LifeScore’s technology rapidly assembles these musical components across multiple audio channels to generate original, unique, adaptive music that is either fully autonomous or responsive in real-time to user and environmental data inputs.

LifeScore’s technology can operate across any musical genre – from ambient and classical to pop, EDM, funk and heavy rock – and can be integrated into a vast array of applications across many industry sectors, inextricably linking user-generated, bespoke music to all aspects of life.

LifeScore joined the Abbey Road Red Incubator in December 2018.

Name: Assemble Sound
Description:
A forward-thinking music company with a collaborative recording compound in the world's most historic independent music city. 

SYNC LICENSING, ORIGINAL SCORING, & MUSIC SUPERVISION 
Whether we're creating original tracks or sourcing existing songs, we work with the most recognizable companies in TV, film, and advertising, as well as independent filmmakers and brands, to make sure their story has the soundtrack it needs. We represent dozens of composers, hundreds of independent artists, and over 10,000 songs from every genre.  

RECORD LABEL 
We are the record label for a curated roster of artists for whom we provide 360 development and label services, including but not limited to: music production and songwriting (A&R), distribution, creative strategy & execution, marketing, promotion, advertising, etc. We do this on our own as an independent label, and in partnership with Atlantic Records as a joint venture. 

ARTIST RESIDENCY 
Our application-based, year-long studio residency program gives a select cohort of producers, artists, and songwritiers artists 24/7 access to our recording compound to write and record for free. No strings attached.

Name: Digital Music Solutions
Description: Digital Music Solutions was created to break down the barriers between repertoires and to promote music to a wide audience. It includes the classical music and jazz label, NoMadMusic, along with the immersive musical practicing app, NomadPlay, winner of many prizes and awards (ArtTech Prize, Paris Innovation Award...).

Name: Gargantuan Music
Description:
Gargantuan Music is a music production library that specialises in trailer music and music for promos and advertising. With a world class roster of highly experienced award winning composers and sound designers we have many years experience supplying the trailer, broadcast and advertising industries with the perfect soundtrack. Get in touch, we're here to help!

Contact us on music@gargantuanmusic.com

We also offer a fast turnaround bespoke composition service for trailers and commercials.

Name: We Are FSTVL
Description:
2023 10th anniversary plans landing soon.

Sign up now for news and early birds.

Name: Metropolis Music
Description:
Metropolis Music is one of the UK's leading concert promoters. 

Metropolis Music was founded in 1985 and is recognised as one of the country’s leading independent concert promotion companies. 

Metropolis Music promotes over six hundred concerts per year in clubs, ballrooms, city halls, arenas and stadiums and has promoted many of the most significant acts today to include Robbie Williams, Eminem, Oasis, Coldplay, Beastie Boys, Foo Fighters, Rammstein, System Of A Down, Blur, Massive Attack, Basement Jaxx, Bjork, Moby, The Strokes and The White Stripes. 

We're committed to working with acts from their inception, helping to build their careers as touring artistes from their first small concerts to huge arenas and green field sights. 

Metropolis Music is also a partner in V Festival, sponsored by Virgin, a dual site event and winner of Live Magazine’s European Festival Of The Year.

In addition to promoting touring shows and organising V Festival, Metropolis Music works with a number of media partners and sponsors to produce events such as the NME Brat awards, The Smash Hits Poll Winners Party and the Summer Series at Somerset House and the Bristol Summer Series.

Name: Smash The House
Description:
Since its launch in 2010, Smash The House has grown into a powerhouse in the electronic music scene, consistently delivering high-energy anthems and collaborating with the world's most exciting artists. Now celebrating its 15th anniversary, the label – helmed by Dimitri Vegas and Like Mike, former 2x DJ Mag’s World No.1 DJs – has solidified its status as one of the most influential imprints in dance music. 

Ranked #3 label in the world on 1001Tracklists' A State of Dance 2024 list, Smash The House boasts an unparalleled global reach, surpassing 2 billion all-time streams. With an elite roster spanning dance music icons and mainstream superstars, the label has worked with industry heavyweights, including David Guetta, Akon, Timmy Trumpet, Martin Jensen, INNA, Vintage Culture, Gabry Ponte, Steve Aoki, Danna Paola, Armin van Buuren, Nicole Scherzinger, Ne-Yo, Laidback Luke, and more.

Smash The House has built a legacy of blockbuster releases and viral hits, solidifying its status as one of the industry’s most dominant labels. Label heads Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike continue to push boundaries with high-profile collaborations, including ‘She Knows’ with Akon, David Guetta & Afro Bros, ‘To The Beat’ with Natti Natasha & Regard, ‘Meet Her At The Love Parade’ with Maddix and Da Hool, and ‘Don't Stop The Music’ featuring Hollywood icon Vin Diesel and Zion. The label has also delivered airwave and club smashing anthems, including Steve Aoki & Ann Lee's ‘2 Times’ and Armin van Buuren, Vini Vici, and M.I.K.E. Push's rework of ‘Universal Nation’.

The label also champions a diverse lineup of global talent, delivering a constant flow of dancefloor weapons. Recent standouts releases include ‘Girlz Wanna Have Fun’ by MATTN, ‘One Day’ by Martin Jensen and FAST BOY, KAAZE’s ‘Papi’, ‘Axel F’ by Bassjackers and Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike, ‘Sun Comes Up’ by Timmy Trumpet and Sam Feldt, ‘Deep Cut’ by Öwnboss, Bassjackers' ‘All Around The World’, and Joel Corry's ‘Tears On My Piano".

Name: Trama
Description:
A Trama é uma gravadora brasileira, que tem em seu plantel artistas como Elis Regina. Um dos seus sócios, João Marcelo Bôscoli, é filho da cantora com o produtor e compositor Ronaldo Bôscoli.O presidente da companhia é André Szajman que ao lado do irmão Cláudio Szajman também é sócio da empresa.
Dentre suas principais realizações, destacam-se: fomento à cena musical independente, lançamento de talentos que conferiram nova cara a MPB, tais como: Otto, Max de Castro, Luciana Mello, Fernanda Porto, Rappin Hood, O Teatro Mágico, Cansei de Ser Sexy, entre outros. Além disso, investiu na música eletrônica em território nacional, é pioneira na solução do impasse dos downloads ilegais de música com a criação dos projetos Trama Virtual, Álbum Virtual e Download Remunerado. Estes projetos oferecem música gratuita e legal ao usuário, mas remunerada para o artista. Nenhuma produção da Trama tem controle de cópias (DRM).

Name: OPM London
Description: OPM IS A LONDON-BASED MUSIC SUPERVISION AGENCY THAT SPECIALISES IN SOURCING MUSIC & SOUND FOR MOVING CONTENT.

Name: 'Dance Your Ass Off' Records
Description: Dutch underground Vinylstore and musiclabel found in 2009 by DJ Supremacy (Domien Stoffels) representing the harder styles of Housemusic; Oldskool, Techno, Hardstyle, Hardcore/Gabber.

Name: JSM Music
Description: JSM Music is the preeminent global commercial music production and sound design leader for the world’s most influential and compelling brands across all digital, broadcast, film, television, live experiential and mobile mediums. For over 30 years, JSM continues to evolve and always chooses to take the creative roads less traveled. JSM remains ahead of the curve by exclusively securing the finest global musical talent, unparalleled business practices and service, while always nurturing and expanding its unique original vibe, philosophy and creative vision. Located in its spectacular newly constructed facilities in NYC, JSM is one of the world’s most comprehensive recording and creative resources.

Name: Promociones Musicales Get In S.L.
Description: Organización de Festivales Música, Conciertos Nacionales e Internacionales, Management de Artistas, Gabinete de Prensa y Comunicación: sponsors, publicidad, coordinación de videoclips, sesiones de fotos... Sello discográfico, Asesoramiento en organización de eventos culturales y musicales...

Name: Orchestre Philharmonique Royal de Liège
Description:
Created in 1960, the Liège Royal Philharmonic Orchestra (OPRL) is the only professional symphony orchestra in French-speaking Belgium. 

Supported by the Fédération Wallonie-Bruxelles, the city of Liège, and the province of Liège, the OPRL performs in Liège, in the prestigious setting of the Salle Philharmonique (1887), all over Belgium, at the biggest venues and festivals in Europe, and in Japan, the United States, and South America. 

Under the guidance of music directors as Manuel Rosenthal, Pierre Bartholomée, Louis Langrée, Pascal Rophé, Christian Arming and Gergely Madaras (2019-2025), the OPRL has forged a musical identity for itself that is at the intersection of the Germanic and French traditions. It has made 140 recordings (EMI, DGG, BIS, Bru Zane Label, BMG-RCA, Alpha Classics, Fuga Libera). 

Music Director: Lionel Bringuier (September 2025).

Name: Glazart
Description:
Glazart s’impose aujourd’hui comme un acteur incontournable de la scène culturelle parisienne, en rassemblant des artistes d’horizons différents avec pour mots d’ordres : la qualité et la diversité.

Lieu atypique, Glazart a su transformer en avantage sa position excentrée en y créant un véritable espace de liberté et de découvertes. Pluridisciplinarité, musiques émergentes, cultures alternatives, esprit festif…

Glazart a de maintes fois prouvé son statut de défricheur de tendances (notamment en ce qui concerne la techno, la house, le dubstep, le hip hop, le metal ou encore le stoner) et est devenu ces dernières années un des lieux majeurs de la création et de la diffusion des musiques actuelles dans le paysage culturel parisien. Glazart propose ainsi à son public des concerts et des soirées en club, avec principalement comme styles de musiques : techno, house, metal, rock, trance, dub, hardtek, dubstep et tous leurs assimilés.

Depuis 2010, Glazart c’est aussi un rendez-vous à ciel ouvert devenu incontournable de juin à septembre : LaPlage.

Name: Maîtrise Notre-Dame de Paris
Description:
Musique Sacrée à Notre-Dame de Paris est une association loi 1901 créée en 1991 par la Ville de Paris, le ministère de la Culture et l’association diocésaine de Paris. École de chant, elle a également en charge la coordination de l’ensemble de la musique dans la Cathédrale.

Héritiers d’une tradition musicale séculaire toujours renouvelée,
instrumentistes et chanteurs ont la mission et le privilège de pouvoir
exécuter, enseigner et faire vivre le patrimoine musical dans la Cathédrale.

L’association a pour missions principales :
- La formation musicale des chanteurs de la Maîtrise Notre-Dame de
Paris,
- L’organisation d’une saison de concerts et d’auditions,
- L’animation liturgique de plus de 1 000 offices par an,
- La recherche musicologique,
- La diffusion du répertoire et le soutien à la création contemporaine, en
partenariat avec des compositeurs actuels et par le biais d’enregistrements discographiques régulièrement récompensés par la critique,
- L’ouverture culturelle et artistique à travers de nombreux partenariats
comme Cultures du Cœur, Emmaüs Solidarité et l’Hôpital Necker – Enfants malades AP-HP.

Name: The Harmony House
Description:
The Harmony House is an advocate of the arts, providing enrichment to ALL students (private, public, and homeschool) ~ ages preschool through adult. Our "Music & More Store" provides instruments for sale/rent, music, supplies, and repairs.

We have over 20 music instructors who teach private lessons in: 
Piano/Keyboard, Voice, Acoustic Guitar, Classical Guitar, Violin, Viola, Cello, Ukulele, Harp, Drums, Flute, Piccolo, Clarinet, Saxophone, Jazz Improvisation, Trumpet, Trombone, Musical Composition (Songwriting), Music Theory, Worship, and Art!

Name: MNK Studios
Description:
MNK Studios is a Recording and Rehearsal Studio based in Al Qouz, Dubai. Where Sound and Music matter!

Specializing in the sound realm, offering artists professionally sound-proofed and acoustically-treated rehearsal space and recording studios for artists and musicians. Creating a one-of-a-kind immersive experience for artists of different backgrounds to foster absolute creativity, and we pride ourselves in delivering value for time.

Name: Artístics Produccions
Description: Artístics es un proyecto creativo de Jordi Roure, formado por músicos, artistas y entidades culturales que compartimos la ilusión y el objetivo de acercar la música y la expresión artística a la sociedad. Queremos formar parte del entramado de gestión cultural presente en nuestro entorno. Nuestro objetivo es crear, promocionar y difundir proyectos musicales y artísticos que provoquen, seduzcan y emocionen al público.

Name: MUSIC VILLE PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Incepted in the year 2011, Music Ville Pvt. Ltd. (MVPL) is a specialist retailer & distributor of Musical Instruments, professional audio, and AV and HiFi products in India. We represent the industry-leading brands in our verticals namely Yamaha Music, Professional Audio and AV, D’Addario brands- D'Addario, EVANS, RICO, PROMARK, Music Tribe brands- Behringer, TC Electronics, TC Helicon, Audio Technica, Tourbosound & MIDAS. 
With its headquarters in Raipur Chattisgarh, MVPL now operates 4 retail and 5 warehouse locations across Central and Eastern India. 
We employ a team of commercially strong sales and marketing team & technical experts that allows us to offer a full advisory service - be it fully specified systems for large scale implementations and provisioning. 
Our customer base includes 75% of the MI retail stores in the region and tens of Pro Audio integrators and installers. We collaborate with the best logistics and supply chain service providers for express shipping for urgent orders from our multiple locations.
We pride ourselves on the quality of service and are constantly seeking technological and operation efficiency improvements within our operations.
We strive to be the Provider of Choice, the Employer of Choice, and the Investment of Choice (for all our stakeholders) within the music industry.

Name: Vincent Boot Pianist & Producer
Description: Music for Healing, Relaxation, Meditation & Palliative Care

Name: Manchester Camerata
Description:
Manchester Camerata is a registered charity working and performing in Manchester and worldwide since 1972.

Be it opening Glastonbury festival in front of 40,000 people or working intimately in care homes with people living with dementia, we believe in the transformative and connecting nature of music. That connection drives us, and we work with the best creative talent to make this happen.

Name: DreamTeam
Description:
DreamTeam is a boutique music consultancy company founded by Jane Third and Vincent Clery-Melin.

We work with artists and music companies, helping them to grow their businesses through a combination of audience development, business strategy and hands-on global marketing. 

Clients past and present: A24, Ashe, bbno$, Bryan Adams, Death Cab For Cutie, Dizzee Rascal, Drain Gang, Jungle, Lily Allen, Matoma, Mom+Pop Music, mtheory, Phoenix, Platoon, Royel Otis, Secret City, Sevdaliza, Shouse, Shy FX, Steve Aoki, The Hives, Tove Lo, Viagra Boys, YEAR0001, Yung Lean.

Name: CSDEM
Description:
La Chambre Syndicale De l’Edition Musicale (CSDEM) est une organisation professionnelle au service des éditeurs de musique de variétés. Représentative auprès du Ministère du Travail, elle participe aux négociations concernant les conventions collectives. Elle a également participé aux négociations avec les organisations professionnelles des auteurs et des compositeurs menant en octobre 2017 à la signature du Code des Usages et des Bonnes Pratiques de l’Edition des Œuvres Musicales. En collaboration constante avec les autres acteurs de la filière musicale, interlocutrice auprès des institutions publiques, la CSDEM veille à représenter et défendre le rôle des éditeurs.
Structurée en commissions (administrative, affaires sociales, formation, juridique, études, graphique, communication, PCM, égalité Femmes-Hommes, développement durable), la CSDEM offre à ses membres des outils et des conseils pratiques tels BOEM, base de données de paroles ou French VIP, dispositif de soutien destiné aux jeunes éditeurs. Elle organise des formations sur des thématiques couvrant l’ensemble de la filière musicale, fournit des fiches pratiques et des modèles de contrats réactualisés en permanence. Elle publie le « Baromètre de l’édition musicale », indicateur économique sans précédent sur l’activité en France. Enfin, elle organise chaque année les Prix de la Création Musicale pour mettre en avant le travail des éditeurs et des créateurs qu’ils accompagnent.

Name: StrumentiMusicali.net s.r.l.
Description:
StrumentiMusicali.net è la più grande realtà italiana e tra le più grandi in Europa nella vendita di strumenti musicali e audio professionale:

- più di 110.000 articoli disponibili in pronta consegna nella nostra logistica di oltre 5000mq
- un catalogo di 760 marchi, tutti con garanzia ufficiale italiana
- consegna a casa tua in 24/48 ore
- spedizione gratuita
- assistenza pre e post vendita
- i migliori prezzi garantiti

Un grande staff di professionisti al tuo servizio ogni giorno!

Name: Kings Place
Description:
Kings Place is an open, multi-arts venue, presenting an adventurous and critically-acclaimed programme, with words and music at its heart.

Every year we curate a series of festivals to engage a breadth of different communities. We are a place where many audiences belong, a place where people connect with their passion and no-one is lost in the crowd.

Kings Place was developed from a generous act of philanthropy. Driven by a belief that arts and culture are a fundamental part of a thriving city – our work is as vibrant as our location in King’s Cross.

We are independently-funded and generate income through ticket sales and the staging of world-class conferences and events.

We are rooted in partnership and have developed a collaborative community of resident partners and artistic associates.

By opening our doors, people and creativity can flourish. We provide stages for artists, space for local communities and young musicians, share our home with partners, and offer audiences unforgettable, shared experiences.

We are Kings Place, the cultural pulse of King’s Cross.

Name: New Music USA
Description:
New Music USA supports the sounds of tomorrow by nurturing the creation, performance, and appreciation of new music for adventurous listeners around the world. We empower and connect US-based music makers, organizations, and audiences by providing funding through our Project Grants, fostering new connections through our programs, deepening knowledge through our online magazine NewMusicBox, and working as an advocate for the field.

New Music USA works in collaboration with its community in response to pressing needs and to amplify the diverse voices of music creators; we envision a thriving and equitable ecosystem for new music throughout the United States. New Music USA is the recipient of the 2020 Gold Baton Award from the League of American Orchestras, which has been given annually since 1948 for distinguished service to America’s orchestras.

As we go about our work, we make a point of not defining too precisely what we mean by new music. We simply want all music that’s not commercially viable to flourish through its originality and diverse forms of expression. We also believe that it’s a spectacular time for creativity and collaboration and we are keen for the work we support to reflect the talent of creators and practitioners from all backgrounds and from every part of the United States.

Name: Orchestre des Champs-Élysées
Description:
L’Orchestre des Champs-Élysées se consacre à l’interprétation, sur instruments d’époque, du répertoire allant de Haydn à Debussy. Sa création en 1991 est due à l’initiative commune d’Alain Durel, directeur du Théâtre des Champs-Élysées et de Philippe Herreweghe. L’Orchestre des Champs-Élysées a été plusieurs années en résidence au Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, au Palais des Beaux-Arts de Bruxelles et s’est produit dans la plupart des grandes salles de concert : Musikverein de Vienne, Concertgebouw d’Amsterdam, Barbican Centre de Londres, Philharmonies de Munich, de Berlin et de Cologne, Alte Oper de Francfort, Gewandhaus de Leipzig, Lincoln Center de New York, Parco della Musica à Rome, auditoriums de Lucerne et de Dijon, etc. Il s’est également produit au Japon, en Corée, en Chine et en Australie. Il est placé sous la direction de Philippe Herreweghe, mais plusieurs chefs ont été invités à le diriger, parmi lesquels Daniel Harding, Christian Zacharias, Louis Langrée, Heinz Holliger, Christophe Coin et René Jacobs.

L’Orchestre des Champs-Élysées développe une relation privilégiée et exclusive avec le Collegium Vocale Gent avec lequel il enregistre les grandes plus grandes œuvres du répertoire.

L’Orchestre des Champs-Élysées, associé au TAP – Théâtre Auditorium de Poitiers et en résidence en Nouvelle Aquitaine, est subventionné par le Ministère de la Culture et par la région Nouvelle Aquitaine. L’Orchestre est ponctuellement soutenu par l’Institut Français et la Spedidam pour ses tournées à l’étranger.

Il est membre fondateur de la FEVIS (fédération des ensembles vocaux et instrumentaux spécialisés). Il fait également parti du syndicat Profédim.

Name: Guitar Tricks
Description:
Guitar Tricks is the leader in online guitar education. We invented online multimedia guitar lessons and continue to innovate and expand our reach. Every day thousands of guitarists throughout the world learn guitar online with Guitar Tricks. 

Guitar Tricks is constantly improving so that it will become the easiest, most effective guitar learning program in the world.

Name: Handel and Haydn Society
Description: Boston’s Grammy-winning Handel and Haydn Society performs Baroque and Classical music with a freshness, a vitality, and a creativity that inspires all ages. H+H has been captivating audiences for over 200 consecutive seasons (the most of any performing arts organization in the United States), speaking to its singular success at converting new audiences to this extraordinary music, generation after generation.

Name: The Benedetti Foundation
Description:
The Benedetti Foundation was founded in 2019 by violinist and dedicated music education advocate Nicola Benedetti CBE. 

We deliver transformative experiences around mass musical events and provide equal access to music participation and appreciation for all. Led by Nicola and an exceptional team of musicians and educators, we unite those who believe music is integral to life’s education.

Name: Jung von Matt MUSIC
Description:
At Jung von Matt MUSIC we help brand build iconic sound identities.

Using award-winning music and sound campaigns that bring brands to life.

From AI-powered brand voices to full-scale sonic branding and culture-driven campaigns, we shape the future of music & sound-driven advertising.

Name: Crosstown Concerts
Description: Entering our tenth year as Crosstown Concerts, we have survived the toughest ever period for the live music industry and are now flourishing as one of the very few totally independent solely-British-owned UK national concert promoting companies. Crosstown is very proudly independent. Our vision for the future is one that nods fondly to old-school promoting styles, while embracing new technologies. We remain committed in our approach to tackle secondary ticketing, while promoting the music we love, inclusive of all.

Name: City Music Foundation
Description:
City Music Foundation provides professional musicians in the UK in the early stages of their careers with expert advice, guidance and support to help them to build successful careers in music.

The founding trustees of the City Music Foundation identified the gap in arts patronage that is soloists and chamber groups, and founded the charity to help more musicians succeed in bringing their ambitions to fruition via a structured financial and mentoring support system, with the aim of bringing fresh new talent to new audiences in the UK and beyond.

By bringing together several established City-based institutions, including the Barbican Arts Centre, Milton Court Concert Hall, the London Symphony Orchestra, the City of London Festival and the Worshipful Company of Musicians, the CMF unites experts who share a common purpose in their commitment to support young artists beyond the end of formal musical training or education.

The CMF supports musicians, as soloists or groups, in classical, jazz, folk and world music. It promotes, supports and nurtures outstanding talent, identified via an application and audition process, at a level ready for public performance to a paying audience. Successful applicants receive mentorship from experienced professional musicians and industry experts, business skills workshops, performance opportunities, and marketing and publicity support, the aim being to equip each musician with the tools they need to promote themselves to a wider audience and to support themselves financially though music.

Name: Paradise Worldwide
Description: Global Music Distribution x All Rights Collection & Services x Campaigning Worldwide x Pioneering Ethical AI Solutions in Music

Name: Silverback Music
Description:
Founded in 1998, Silverback Music Management has become a platform for independent artists to navigate through the music industry as a positive force, with a deep-rooted penchant for serious touring, recording, performance and entertainment. 

Silverback acts as a multi-faceted partner to its artists, identifying their creative and conceptual goals and cultivating the artist’s vision and raw talent. Continuously striving for a progressive business model within an ever-changing music industry, Silverback possesses cutting-edge management solutions to represent their artists’ vision with ultimate integrity.
With a stylistic focus initially rooted within the subcultural fusion of its original California bred forerunners Sublime and Slightly Stoopid, Silverback’s creative vision continues to grow within the spectrum of genre-bending improvisational rock, dub reggae, psychedelic blues, punk rock, acoustic, soul, and funk. Silverback generates a genre defying and “genre bending” attitude which inhabits its artists, partners, vision and vibe within a metamorphosing pop culture.

Name: PremiumBeat by Shutterstock
Description:
PremiumBeat by Shutterstock provides high-quality royalty free music and sound effects for use in new and traditional media projects, including websites, online videos, mobile apps, television, radio, feature films and other professional applications. Our music is all exclusive, handpicked and curated.

Our royalty free music has been used by hundreds of thousands of clients including: Disney, E-Trade, Discovery Channel, Target, Hilton Hotels, KODAK, Hallmark, Harley Davidson, Lufthansa, Burton, NBC Universal, Washington Post, Expedia.com, Government of Canada, HuguesNet, Harper Collins, Leo Burnet, Interbrand, NASA, Radio-Canada, IBM, Monster.com, Cisco, DDB, Publicis, United Nations, Cossette, Ogilvy, Razorfish, IMC2, BBDO, TBWA, and many more great brands.

Name: Civica Scuola di Musica Claudio Abbado
Description:
The school, named after Claudio Abbado in June 2014, offers a wide range of professional, technical, introductory and amateur courses for all ages
(from pre-school to post-graduate), taking into account different languages, repertoires and professional fields. All students take part in a vast
selection of ensemble and orchestra events.
The school awards AFAM degrees, equivalent to university-level qualifications. 

Many of its former students have become acclaimed professionals, including Alessio Corti, Lorenzo Ghielmi, Enrico Onofri, Emilio Pomarico andCarlo Rizzi. The list of outstanding teachers is also long, including Laura Alvini, Roberto Gini, Cathy Berberian, Maria Tipo, Charles Rosen, Petre Munteanu,
Bruno Bettinelli, Paolo Borciani, Salvatore Sciarrinoand Irvine Arditti.

Name: VIDALA
Description: Depuis 2014, les musiciens de Vidala brûlent d’une passion commune pour la “Nueva Canción” – cette enfant des folklores andins qui, portée par le grand vent de contestation et le souffle de la poésie, s’est épanouie à partir des années 60 sur tout le continent sud-américain. Pour le quatuor lyonnais, il ne s’agit pas seulement de collecter et réinterpréter un répertoire paré des innombrables atours mélodiques et rythmiques de la chacarera, zamba, milonga, danza criolla ou canción india… Il s’agit aussi, plus que jamais, de continuer à défendre un certain art de vivre et de voir le monde. Soudé autour de la voix altière de Séverine Soulayres, la formation entretient la flamme d’une chanson populaire exigeante, qui refuse de baisser les armes et affirme qu’en toutes choses la multitude mérite le meilleur. Vidala tire son nom d’une forme de folklore argentin qui célèbre les grands paysages andins comme les espaces intérieurs de leurs habitants. Entre monde sensible et sphère intime, parole collective et solitude de l’âme, grands combats et vertiges des sentiments, c’est bien ce chemin sans fin ni routine que se frayent ces quatre explorateurs. Plus d’infos sur www.vidala.fr

Name: Musou Music Group
Description:
Musou Music Group was founded in 2006 and currently is the leading music publisher and music production company in Greece specializing in composition, music production, sound design, copyright management and consulting services related to these fields. Our reputation as the top choice in the industry underscores our expertise and commitment to quality in music services.

Musou Music Group’s continued growth is founded on two main pillars: Musou Music Publishing and Musou Music Productions.

Musou Music Publishing

Represents, exclusively for Greece and Cyprus, thousands of renowned music creators and publishers, as well as music libraries, offering integrated licensing and copyright management services. We are also proud international representatives of a significant repertoire of Greek creators. Our dedication to fostering and promoting new talent, as well as facilitating creative collaborations has solidified our position among the leaders in the music publishing industry.

Through our Music Consultancy & Licensing department we are leveraging the power of music to enhance our clients’ strategies and help them achieve their objectives. We are committed to identifying the ideal song that aligns with the vision and goals of your commercial, TV, or film production. Furthermore, our Music Licensing department, staffed by specialized professionals, ensures the smooth & seamless integration of music into your projects.

Musou Music Productions & Studio

Musou Music Productions is the pillar of our creative endeavors, established with the primary objective of delivering high quality services in music production & sound design. Our facility boasts five state-of-the-art recording & sound processing studios, unparalleled in design, equipment, & capabilities. We can meet the most demanding requirements of our clients in areas such as Original Music Composition, Voice-Over Recording, Music Productions, Radio Productions, Music Mixing, Dubbing, Sound Editing, & Sound Design.

Name: Chabaka
Description:
Chabaka is a leading music distribution and marketing agency in the MENA region with offices across the MENA region. With over 1 billion monthly views and 150 artists and labels under our digital management, we pride ourselves on our knowledge of the music markets and personalized and skillfully planned growth strategies that strive to empower and support regional talent. Our artist & label growth program helps artists and labels alike reach their full potential on all digital platforms and the exposure they intend to achieve.

In a nutshell, we’ve got everything artists and labels need to get where they want to be. We get their music heard.

Name: DINASTIA INC
Description:
Dinastia Market INC es más que una empresa, es un faro de oportunidades para artistas emergentes y establecidos. Nos enorgullece ser un centro integral de servicios, donde nuestros artistas y Sellos Discograficos pueden encontrar todo lo que necesitan para su crecimiento y desarrollo.

Nuestra fortaleza radica en nuestras alianzas estratégicas con las más importantes DSP a nivel mundial, lo que nos permite ofrecer un servicio sin precedentes en la región. Pero no nos detenemos ahí, también nos hemos asociado con entidades específicas para la recolección legal de regalías de derechos conexos, derechos privados y derechos de publicación, asegurando que nuestros artistas reciban lo que justamente merecen.

En Dinastia Market INC, no solo ofrecemos servicios, sino que también proporcionamos asesoramiento profesional. Nuestro equipo está altamente capacitado y listo para ayudarte a navegar por el complejo mundo de la música. Estamos aquí para ti, para ayudarte a alcanzar tus sueños y hacer realidad tu proyecto musical.

En resumen, Dinastia Market INC es tu aliado en el camino hacia el éxito musical. Te invitamos a unirte a nuestra familia y a descubrir todo lo que podemos hacer juntos. Bienvenido a Dinastia Market INC, donde los sueños musicales se hacen realidad!

Name: Elite Music Management
Description:
International booking agency based in Brighton. 

MANAGING AGENTS FOR: (DJ’S) Affie Yusuf // Ambivalent // AnD // Applescal // Asadinho // Barber // Bleaching Agent // Brett Johnson // Chris Coco // Derrick Carter // Dimitri Veimar // Disciples // DJ Pierre // Eagles For Hands // Footprintz // Forward Strategy Group // Freemasons // Harvard Bass // Harvey McKay // He/aT // Inland Knights // Josh Wink // Lifelike // Mark Farina // Martin Roth // Max Cooper // Mondkopf // Mr C // Nathan Coles // Perc // Riva Starr // Terry Francis // Tevo Howard // The Young Punx // Vanilla Ace // Yolanda Be Cool

LABEL NIGHTS/COLLECTIVES:
Family And The Friends // Ovum // Perc Trax // Snatch! // Superfreq // Wiggle

Name: Raw Power Management
Description:
Raw Power Management is a bespoke music management company working with a roster of internationally successful artists, working broadly in rock and alternative genres, with offices in London and LA.

Founded in 2006, Raw Power has established itself as an international management powerhouse over the last 15 years. The company was formed by Craig Jennings (CEO), along with Rod Smallwood & Andy Taylor. Jennings has more than thirty years' experience in management, whilst Smallwood & Taylor have managed Iron Maiden for the last 50 years, collectively bringing a wealth of experience to the business. The focus is always on the artist, their music, their vision and the ethos of good business practice with strong business relationships around the world.

Through Jennings’ strong A&R skills, Raw Power quickly established itself within the heavy music sector through the International success of early management signings – Bring Me The Horizon, Bullet For My Valentine & Funeral For A Friend. Two of the acts remain core to Raw Power’s business fifteen years later, guiding Bring Me The Horizon to their position as million selling alt rock innovators, whilst Bullet have long since established themselves as one of the UK's leading lights of Heavy Metal. Raw Power’s success continued through the legendary signing of Gallows to Warner Music, right up to present day with Don Broco selling 100,000 tickets on their recent UK album cycle and Scarlxrd’s current epic streaming success.

Two consistent themes remain: Raw Power’s ability to discover & develop talent is undeniable. And Raw Power’s punk rock spirit burns as brightly as ever.

Name: Radio 1 - Prague
Description:
RADIO 1 is the oldest private radio station broadcasting in the Czech Republic. Officially established in the Spring of 1991, RADIO 1 actually began broadcasting in the autumn of 1990 as a pirate radio station. The station was situated inside the pedestal of the former Stalin Monument as a part of the Totalitarian Zone exhibition.

Despite being met with an enthusiastic and appreciative response a broadcasting equipment was confiscated by the government several days after supporting the continuation of broadcasting and against State's monopoly of radio and television on broadcasting, it was signed by 30.000 people. In February 1991 the equipment was returned and RADIO 1 began to broadcast under its current name. It was the first independent privately owned radio station in the republic.

The difference between RADIO 1 and other commercial radio stations is in its music program. Rather than concetrainingon the usual hitparades, top 40s, and golden oldies RADIO 1 focuses its attention on more serious work, specifically on alternative, independent music of all styles (electronic, rock, jazz, reggae, ambient etc.). The most important thing for all the people from Radio 1 is to spread quality music.

During many years of existence RADIO 1 has become an important cultural phenomenon. By not being affraid of being different and by exposing a whole new generation of artists (painters, authors, musicians etc.)

Having 30 special shows (foreign and Czech and Slovak Radio 1 chart, shows about films, books, new music, forgotten music etc.) which inform about the alternative side of culture (not showbusiness), Radio 1 is a unique radiostation not only in Czech Republic, but in the whole Central Europe.

Name: Mascot Label Group
Description:
Mascot Label Group is a 100% independently owned and operated record company that is a market leader in the worlds of Rock, Metal and Blues. Originally founded in 1989 in The Netherlands, MLG now operates company offices in New York City, London, Cologne, Paris, Milan, Stockholm, alongside the corporate headquarters in Rotterdam. Mascot Label Group consists of individual imprints that include Mascot Records, Provogue Records, Music Theories Recordings and Cool Green Recordings. MLG is a label member of the American Association of Independent Music (A2IM).

Provogue is the market leader in guitar loaded blues titles and is revered for its support of artists that include Beth Hart, Kenny Wayne Shepherd, Cedric Burnside, Robert Randolph, Gary Moore, Steve Cropper, Walter Trout, Joe Bonamassa, Robin Trower, Gov't Mule, Warren Haynes, and many more. Provogue found success growing the careers of Joe Bonamassa and Beth Hart: both started in small clubs, and are now selling out arenas all over the world. 

Mascot Records primarily issues metal and rock albums. The label introduced Volbeat to the world, releasing the band's first three studio albums and a DVD. Other artists signed to Mascot Records include Black Stone Cherry, Crobot, Conquer Divide, P.O.D., Defects, Black Country Communion, DeWolff, The Cold Stares, 10 Years, The Georgia Thunderbolts and Shaman's Harvest.

Music Theories Recordings continues to be a leader in the worlds of progressive and musicianship, with Flying Colors (super group featuring Steve Morse and Mike Portnoy) and Ayreon as the highest profile names so far. Additional artists signed to the imprint include Paul Gilbert, Arjen Lucassen’s Guilt Machine, Yngwie Malmsteen and many more.

The Players Club houses artists like TOTO and solo records from Steve Lukather and Joseph Williams, Robby Krieger, Michael Landau and many others..

Name: Hermes Music
Description: It all started in 1982 with the vision of a musician. He had the dream of giving the musicians what he would’ve liked to have had when he went in search of an instrument to make a living; excellent service, fair prices, and most importantly... respect. It was with that simple formula that a small music store in McAllen, TX became one of the largest and most respected distribution companies for audio, lighting, and musical instruments in the world. Yes, Hermes Music has achieved something that few companies have done; start from the bottom and reach a prime place in the music industry at the top. This is an industry that is constantly evolving with new products and emerging technologies. Hermes Music is always ahead and always thinking of those who really matter... musicians, engineers, producers and more importantly... the dreamers.
Location: Ciudad de México, Santa María La Ribera

Name: Kaptain Music
Description:
ABOUT KAPTAIN
Since 2007, the founders of Kaptain, have been producing more than 200 original soundtracks, working closely with directors, producers & music supervision teams. 
In 2013, they decided to create and launch their online production music catalog: KAPTAIN MUSIC.  Utilizing their experience in the field of original soundtracks and unique position within a television group, Kaptain offers a tailor-made catalog for audiovisual production, composed and recorded by a wide range of skilled composers and performers around the world.
Kaptain represents a new generation of artists with a fresh and creative input which will shake up the traditional world of production music in terms of both quality and originality.

Name: Wax Poetics
Description:
Since 2001.

We connect deep storytelling with auctions of authenticated collectors items and memorabilia direct from artists. 

For the global audience of fans with a deep and passionate love for music, it’s a new way to collect items directly from their favorite artists. 

For artists - an end-to-end service enabling them to get items from their history in the hands of their most engaged fans, and capture their story in a new way.

Name: Bigpop Studios
Description:
Bigpop is an independent record label, music publisher, and an audio post-production and recording studio.

Bigpop provides creators with a community within which to flourish. Our activities include A&R, music publishing, label services, music production and operating music/sound design. 

Located at 31-37 Halsey Street, Auckland CBD, Auckland, New Zealand.

Name: Ventilador Music
Description:
VENTILADOR MUSIC es una compañía independiente creada en el año 1995 con la finalidad de desarrollar proyectos que tuvieran la MÚSICA como soporte, en todas sus vertientes. Su actividad, por tanto, se extiende a todos los campos de actuación en los que el hecho musical esté presente: 

Producción, promoción y contratación de espectáculos 
Management artístico 
Edición y distribución discográfica 
Didáctica musical 
Editorial musical 

Desde el punto de vista artístico se optó por potenciar las músicas de RAÍZ en todas sus variantes (FLAMENCO, LATINA, RUMBA, FOLK, MÚSICAS DEL MUNDO, etc.), así como sus derivados.

Nuestro objetivo es ayudar a la difusión de aquellas músicas que, hallándose al margen de los denominados circuitos comerciales, recuperan, desde un punto de vista innovador, los sonidos, ritmos y melodías desarrollados a lo largo del tiempo y a lo ancho de nuestro mundo: es decir, que parten de una cultura popular, independientemente de cual sea su origen geográfico.

Nuestra labor se centra en poner al día este patrimonio, que, mediante la fusión, la incorporación de nuevas sonoridades y la imprescindible nueva creación, marcan las tendencias musicales de hoy.

La orientación actual de VENTILADOR MUSIC es la de actuar como equipo de apoyo a la creación y divulgación multimedia incorporando las oportunidades de las nuevas tecnologías en los procesos de crear, informar, formar,difundir o comercializar la actividad de nuestros artistas.

Name: Outdustry
Description: OUTDUSTRY provides market-leading A&R, Marketing and Rights Management services in the China & India music markets, for some of the leading names in the global and local industries. We have staff located in Beijing, Kuala Lumpur, London, Los Angeles, Mumbai, Shanghai and Taipei.

Name: REVIVAL Music Group (RMG) Corp
Description: REVIVAL Music Group (RMG) dedicated to "Music with a Mission". RMG consists of REVIVAL Music Publishing, REVIVAL Music Group Records, and REVIVAL Music Collective.

Name: Universal Music Hungary
Description:
Universal Music Hungary is the hungarian department of Universal Music Group (UMG), the world’s largest music content company with market leading positions in recorded music, music publishing and merchandising. The recorded music business discovers and develops recording artists and then markets and promotes their music across a wide array of formats and platforms. Bravado, UMG’s merchandising company, sells artist- and music-branded products via multiple sales point such as fashion retail, live performances, and the internet.

UMG’s strength and legacy of music flows from a diverse family of record labels which include: A&M/Octone, Barclay, Decca, Deutsche Grammophon, Disa, ECM, Emarcy, Fonovisa, Interscope Geffen A&M Records, Island Def Jam Music Group, Machete Music, Mercury Records, Polydor Records, Show Dog–Universal Music, Universal Motown Republic Group, Universal Music Latino, Universal Music Group Nashville and Verve Music Group. UMG is the market leader in today’s highly competitive classical music market, it’s classical labels includes the world’s longest-standing recording company and market leader, Deutsche Grammophon; the legendary Decca Records, which owns and controls the greatest opera catalog in the world; and the Philips, Emarcy, and ECM labels.

UMG’s roster is comprised of artists covering the full spectrum of music around the world, making UMG the leader in both international and local repertoire.

Name: Indaband
Description: We got together because we can't think of a cooler job than working with music. To be fair, it doesn't feel like a job to us.

Name: Suzuki Association of the Americas
Description: The Suzuki Association of the Americas is the not-for-profit organization officially licensed to support, guide and promote Suzuki education in North, Central and South America. We are a coalition of teachers, parents, educators, and community members who are interested in making music education available to all children.

Name: MuseMind
Description:
MuseMind is a AI musictech company dedicated to empower Music Libraries.

Magic Preview is an API (available with its SDK) to propulse on your music library website the automatic edit of music on a video project (short video or video rush). It allows unprecedent user experience, searching a music in your catalogue becomes Playful and Hollywood-ready, the final music edits can be downloaded.

MusicBuilder allows to transform your music into ready-to-use interactive packages for any video game editors (compliant with Wwise and soon Fmod, most popular audio middlewares). 

Open new perspectives for your music libraries and get the best out of your humanly created contents. No added rights. Simple integration. Simple usage. SaaS models.

Name: Wax Poetics
Description:
We're building the go-to platform for music collectors and super fans. Currently raising Seed investment to launch the next era of Wax Poetics. Want to find out more? Email alex@waxpoetics.com to find out more.

---------- 

Established in 2001, Wax Poetics is on a mission to preserve music culture and foster the next generation of music talent and content creators.

Through our platform, we connect audiences with artists and music in a purposeful way, and arm them with knowledge to help them go deeper.

Launching Summer 24': Wax Poetics Collections - The go-to music collectibles marketplace.

Name: International Production Music Group (IPMG)
Description:
IPMG is a platform for Production Music companies to discuss industry challenges, meet common goals and lobby to secure our sector's interests.
The formation of the IPMG is a culmination of the professionalisation and increased activity over the last decade of the European Production Music Association and the subsequent Production Music Committee with the ICMP.

The IPMG's Mission is to:
1. Serve as a platform to promote discussion for production music companies worldwide.
2. Support National production music associations and their members in individual markets.
3. Distribute regular, sector-specific information to its members.
4. Organise industry events and conferences to bring focus and action around our issues.
5. Spread awareness, share data to highlight the valuation of the production music industry
6. Preserve and enhance the value of music.
7. Serve as a voice to lobby on behalf of the production music industry PRO's, authorities and international organisations.

Name: Machiavelli Music
Description:
Machiavelli is a b2b music business company operating from 1990 at national and international level, experienced in music consulting, licensing, music rights clearance, collection, synchronization and production. The company was founded by, and run under, the direction of President, Mr. Pietro Giola. His vision and expertise as a musician, producer, publisher and consultant are the driving force behind Machiavelli.

Machiavelli’s clients are professional agents and producers in advertising business, television, entertainment, film, radio broadcast, post-production facilities, communication and event agencies, corporations, mobile phone companies, Web and multi-media. A wide range of its attention-getting music and production music catalogues can surely meet all kinds of requirements, providing always new solutions and bringing fresh ideas to business. 
L’Oreal, Ferrero, Maserati, Fendi, Gucci, Armani, Ferrari, Procter & Gamble, Juventus, Martini, Toyota, Electronic Arts, RAI, Mediaset, Ermenegildo Zegna, Tod’s, Hogan, Fay, Volvo, Americas Cup, are just a few of trademarks where Machiavelli’s music has given a real add value to the multimedia productions. 

Machiavelli keeps on searching for musical innovations and new talents in any field of music, from classical music to far-out and up-to-the-minute streams.
In few words, in its business creativity and innovation merges with high expertise in author’s rights clearance. Due to this winning mix, Machiavelli music has been choiced worldwide for hundreds of advertising, cinema, television, audiovisual, cross-media and digital projects.  
Last placements on our YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/MachiavelliMusic 

Few years ago, Machiavelli founded and launched the company Music Architecture Ltd (www.musicarchitecture.com) who is focused only on designing the music identity of a brand or a space with a strong music characterization in perfect alchemy with the style of the brand and the universe it belongs to.

Name: Flute World
Description: Flute World is America's #1 flute specialty house, proudly serving flutists since 1983. We offer the largest variety of top quality student and professional flutes and piccolos. Our web store provides access to over 16,000 products including Instruments, Sheet Music, Recorded Music and Accessories. Visit one of our three locations: Detroit, MI - San Francisco, CA - Charlotte, NC

Name: SSL Music
Description:
SSL Music leads the evolution of dance music as a pioneering record label in Turkiye, driving the evolution of electronic dance music through innovative artist support and groundbreaking releases.

At SSL Music, we transcend the conventional boundaries of a record label, embodying a mission that goes beyond music. We are not merely curators of beats; we are architects of dreams, dedicated to championing emerging artists globally and transforming them into recognized sensations in the dynamic realm of electronic dance music.

Our mission is clear: to unearth exceptional talent, invest in their careers, and guide them on a transformative journey to becoming globally recognized artists. SSL Music stands as a pioneering force in the Turkish dance music scene, with our influence resonating worldwide.

Our vision is ambitious: to stand out as a major force in global Dance Music and be the singular ambassador for the Turkish dance music scene. We are not just aiming to be a record label; we aspire to be one of the biggest players within the genre of Dance Music globally.  Together with our artists, we create a symphony of success and redefine the future of dance music.

Name: WARM [World Airplay Radio Monitor]
Description: WARM - World Airplay Radio Monitor - is the first large-scale airplay monitor, built solely for the purpose of giving transparency to all layers of the music industry. Using WARM platform and app, independent labels, radio promoters, managers and artist can monitor in real-time any song that is played on radio stations worldwide. Currently, we are monitoring more than 23.000+ radio stations in more than 150 countries. This is by far the biggest and widest radio monitoring service on the market.

Name: Saddle Creek Records
Description: Saddle Creek is an independent record label founded in 1993 and based in Omaha, NE and Los Angeles, CA. We are a 50/50 split profit sharing label with our artists. A listing of all Saddle Creek releases to date is available www.saddle-creek.com

Name: Synchronize Festival
Description:
Synchronize Fest merupakan festival musik multi-genre tahunan berskala nasional yang mengundang puluhan ribu audience untuk merayakan keberagaman jenis musik hidup di lima panggung selama tiga hari, tiga malam, menikmati suguhan 100-an pertunjukan terkurasi dari artis-artis terfavorit dan terbaik tanah air yang datang dari dekade ’70-an, ’80-an, ’90-an hingga 2000-an. Seluruh genre musik populer bakal ditampilkan di Synchronize Fest .

Mulai dari genre pop, R&B, rock & roll, blues, folk, jazz, punk, heavy metal, hiphop, reggae, ska, atau sub-genre hardcore, metalcore, death metal, grindcore, industrial rock, new wave, indie pop, alternative rock/grunge, bossa nova, komedi bahkan hingga dangdut pun akan ikut ditampilkan di pergelaran ini. Selain menikmati ratusan pertunjukan musik, Synchronize Fest juga akan menyuguhkan berbagai pengalaman terkurasi lainnya bagi para audience, di antaranya adalah Outdoor Cinema, Art & Merch Market, Records Fair hingga F&B Festival. Rincian mengenai program-program tersebut akan dijelaskan lebih lanjut dalam rilis pers berikutnya. Sejarah digelarnya Synchronize Fest sendiri terjadi pada tahun 2000. Berawal dari semangat militan sekelompok anak muda yang mempelopori festival musik elektronik hingga akhirnya sembilan tahun kemudian, pada Februari 2009, berkembang menjadi sebuah festival musik tiga hari yang menampilkan beragam aksi terbaik dari kancah hiburan musik hidup tanah air di Plaza Indonesia Entertainment X’nter, Jakarta.

Name: Musitechnic Formation
Description:
Musitechnic has been training sound engineers and music producers since 1987.  Our A.C.S. training programs are available in French or in English.
Learn more: https://www.musitechnic.com/en

Name: Tetra String Quartet
Description:
