The Tetra String Quartet is redefining the role of chamber music in today’s society. With relevance and versatility at the forefront of their mission, Tetra performs with the goal of connecting with all audiences. As both educators and performers, the quartet has toured throughout the United States, Europe, and South America. Invested in their home state of Arizona, Tetra became a 501(c)(3) non profit organization to create more opportunities that link performance with public service. Their strong local presence engages audiences from every corner of the community, and reflects their belief that access to the arts is an essential human right. 

Tetra’s ongoing projects expand access to the community by putting music where it’s not. In 2015, Tetra created the Phoenix chapter of Azure Family Concerts. These free events are fun, friendly, and engaging performances tailored to those on the autism spectrum or with similar challenges. In an effort to further connect with diverse populations, the quartet regularly performs at memory care and assisted living facilities, the Phoenix VA Hospital, and Maricopa County Juvenile Detention Centers. Tetra has been invited to share the impact of their work at events including TEDx Arrowhead Ranch “Act Today, Change Tomorrow”, and Stanford University’s Summer Arts Institute, “Why Music Matters”.

Name: smash!bang!pow!
Description:
s!b!p! was founded in 2009 as concert promoters in Aarhus and Copenhagen, Denmark. We're involved in 100.000 tickets a year, spread across 120 of our own productions and appr. 250 co-productions.

As an agency we represent appr. 30 Danish artists, that we help get onto the stages of every festival and venue in the country.

Name: Ensemble Des Équilibres
Description: Prendre des chemins de traverse, échapper aux étiquettes, concevoir la musique comme un échange : depuis sa fondation, Des Équilibres nourrit l’ambition de proposer un vrai dialogue. C’est la violoniste Agnès Pyka qui donne l’impulsion en 2006 pour cette réunion de musiciens venus d’horizons différents mais avec la même volonté de faire converser des esthétiques et des formes d’art diverses. Des Équilibres est resté fidèle à cette vocation de défricheur de nouveaux territoires sans pour autant abandonner la tradition : depuis l’époque classique jusqu’à la création contemporaine, l’ensemble a abordé toutes les formes de la musique de chambre mais toujours avec une prédilection pour les oeuvres rares ou inédites. Ainsi, en 2018, Des Équilibres commande à trois compositeurs français (Philippe Hersant, Nicolas Bacri et Graciane Finzi) trois oeuvres en miroir aux sonates pour violon de Brahms, projet créé à la Ferme du Buisson. En 2019/20 l’ensemble renouvellera son partenariat avec la Ferme du Buisson ainsi que d’autres scènes nationales pour la création d’un projet pluridisciplinaire d’envergure autour de peinture, musique et vidéo. La souplesse de son effectif, du duo à l’octuor en fonction du programme choisi, lui permet en outre de toucher un vaste répertoire.

Name: Mhodì
Description:
Mhodì is a company founded in 2008 that operates in the publishing, music and entertainment sector.
an Italian Record Label and Intermedia Production House
The union of more professional figures around the world that, like the gears of a watch, give life to a mechanism with perfect energy.
With the same mechanism Mhodì becomes the heart of a machine whose pulsation generates a domino effect that gives life to a series of international collaborations.

Name: Vertigo srl
Description: Booking and production agency.

Name: Cultural
Description:
Composition of contemporary Classical / Orchestral Music.
Music Production for social engagement, presentations, corporate identity etc.
Cultural Events like Piano Concertos.
Teaching Music Theory, Piano, Networking in Contemporary Classical Music.

Name: Esade Musicians
Description: As the biggest creative association of ESADE, we focus on elevating art&music on campus since 2014. We organize concerts, cultural summits, workshops and music business events with other associations, industry professionals and companies in Barcelona. With our DJ department Unity, we aim to polish the fun aspect of music.

Name: BH Concert Productions
Description: The one-stop-shop concert productions company focused on supporting the Classical Music Community here in NYC, also providing Choral Contractor services.

Name: Resonance Studios
Description:
Resonance is a state-of-the-art recording studio, located in the garden city of Bangalore. Since its establishment in 2005, owner Ram Prashant has turned Resonance into one of the city's most loved Studio and Music Production Houses. 

With an easy-to-find location in Shanti Nagar, we meet your every possible need for audio recording and music production services. The talented staff means business when they enter the studios every morning, producing stellar work with finesse and polish. By providing a comprehensive end-to-end audio recording and production service through efficient and quality workflow, top-class engineering and production quality, Resonance is truly about “Connecting People Through Music”.

The motto of Resonance has always been to both help and aid musicians and Resonance Academy, a sister concern of Resonance Studios, offers courses in DJing, Music Production and Audio Engineering. We have a very proficient staff, with a guest faculty comprising of International Producers and artists. The team of experienced musicians, DJs, and audio engineers use a hands-on approach towards tutoring and encourage students to participate in live projects at the studio. Our long-term courses also include studio time for students to record, mix, and master their own audio projects.

Resonance Studios is also linked with Qyuki, a digital media company located in Mumbai, which was founded by A. R. Rahman & Shekhar Kapoor.

Name: The Missing Sync
Description:
The Missing Sync is a leading Music Agency located in Amsterdam. The company was founded in 2004 as a networking company that helps brands and advertising agencies by finding, producing and/or licensing the right music for their campaigns. Throughout the years, The Missing Sync has seen a wealth of growth. Nowadays, we are still doing what we do best, but have also broadened our horizon to start offering a range of publishing services for both upcoming and established artists and composers.

NEED MUSIC?

The Missing Sync specializes in music productions for all forms of audio-visual communication. We work with a dedicated group of professional freelance composers and musicians, each with his or her own unique skill and style. This makes us highly flexible and enables us to hire the most suitable composer for any campaign. Moreover, by working in this fashion, we believe we can be one step ahead of what is considered new, trendy and in line with what the consumer wants to hear.

Besides making music we love working with existing music and (upcoming) artists. If we can’t find a matching song in our own catalogue, the worldwide repertoire must be holding something special somewhere. We are an independent company with an established worldwide network of publishers, labels, artists and composers. Within the Benelux we act as the Sync Agent for e.g. Beggars Music, Warp and  American artist Greg Holden.

With our ever-expanding global network and close partnership with independent music publisher Pennies From Heaven, we are always in need of new repertoire.

Name: Dancefair
Description:
In less than a decade Dancefair has grown into one of Europe’s leading conferences in electronic music.

With more than 7,000 annual visitors, 100+ labels, over 6,000 square meters gear expo and 200+ carefully curated masterclasses, Dancefair is the go-to-place for both upcoming and established producers, DJs, singers, songwriters, artist managers, A&Rs, publishers, labels and music industry professionals.

We are proud to have hosted some of the biggest names in trance, dance, hip-hop, trap, pop, hardstyle, techno and house music including Armin van Buuren, Martin Garrix, Nicky Romero, Hardwell, Frontliner, Sam Feldt, Brooks, Mike Williams and many more to give masterclasses, seminars and workshops.

The 9th edition of Dancefair will take place on 9/10 May 2020 in Utrecht, The Netherlands.

Name: Manchester Community Music School
Description:
Changing lives through the power of learning, sharing and making music for forty years!

Established in 1983 as a not-for-profit organization, the Manchester Community Music School provides quality instruction and performance opportunities for students of all ages. In a teaching environment dedicated to enhancing the student’s enjoyment and appreciation of music, each student is valued as an individual and receives support appropriate to their specific needs and goals.

Our talented faculty makes learning enjoyable. Faculty members are dedicated to developing the musician within each student through caring and personal instruction. Each student is placed with an instructor based on teaching and learning styles, and all students are given the same quality of instruction, maintaining the high standards for which the school has become known.

The Music School, located in historic north Manchester, is home to over 50 of New England’s finest music educators and over 1,000 students who travel throughout the year from 65 New Hampshire communities for their studies. As a cultural performance center, we offer programs in an environment that encourages participation, interaction and enjoyment. We are dedicated to supporting the artistic development of the community through our programs, and our classes are open to all, regardless of age, race, national origin, physical challenges or ability to pay.

The Music School is a full member of the National Guild for Community Arts Education and a member of the Greater Manchester Chamber of Commerce.

Name: Les Monts du Reuil
Description:
Direction artistique : Hélène Clerc-Murgier & Pauline Warnier

Ancrée dans une démarche artistique et philosophique forte, la Compagnie les Monts du Reuil se situe aujourd’hui au carrefour de l’art musical, lyrique et théâtral. La souplesse et l’agilité sont au cœur d’une programmation sans cesse renouvelée.

Fondée en 2007 sous l’impulsion de deux musiciennes expérimentées, la Compagnie s’inscrit immédiatement dans une dynamique propice à la redécouverte de trésors oubliés. C’est avec le répertoire méconnu des talentueux librettistes et compositeurs de la fin du XVIIIe siècle qu’elle se dessine une identité unique, adaptant et proposant chaque année une nouvelle vision artistique d’œuvres inédites. Abordant des thèmes universellement connus – Cendrillon, Richard Cœur de Lion, Raoul Barbe bleue – la qualité des textes et la générosité des mélodies offrent à un public large l’opportunité de plonger dans un univers drôle et inventif. La Compagnie invente des spectacles de théâtre musical particulièrement innovants, donnant à voir et à entendre des moments émouvants de partage et de complicité.

Name: Twelvetones Production Music
Description: Twelvetones Production Music is the first Hungarian professional music library, that is based on the foundation of the very successful Hungarian indie label Twelvetones Records. The company started the operation in 2001 and became one of the most successful Hungarian indie label with Platinum and Gold albums. We, Zsófia Tallér and Csaba Faltay are the managment of the library with more than 10 years of experience in international library music market and TV/film music production as well. Our musical knowledge is the creative force behind the local production and this gives Twelvetones the ability to produce niche products for the market.

Name: EGO Music
Description:
Ego Music is the most important independent dance music label from Italy.
Releasing its first single in the 2005 currently Ego Music boosts a dance music catalog of more than 5000 titles.
Ego Music is a division of Zeitgeist Srl. From its headquarters in Verbania, it has quickly built a formidable reputation that held its leadership on the national and international markets.
Ego Music developed great artists under the spotlights of the international scene such as Klingande, Serebro, Alexandra Stan, Willy William, Spada, Shanguy, Jenn Morel, Wankelmut, Ben Pearce, Duke Dumont, Michael Calfan, Emma Louise, Chris Malinchak, Laidback Luke..
Ego Music has always been the forerunner of new trends, developing its own playlists on Spotify and Apple Music as official curator.

Name: Bourgeois Guitars
Description: Bourgeois Guitars is a small shop acoustic guitar manufacturer located in an 1840s textile mill in Lewiston, Maine, crafting only 400 guitars annually.  Together, everyone at Bourgeois Guitars is working to be the best "small shop" acoustic guitar builder in the world, with Dana Bourgeois - founder, master luthier, and voicing expert - working full time at the helm of his crew.  Dana's crew of about one dozen highly skilled luthiers designs and builds acoustic instruments of the highest quality, helping raise Bourgeois Guitars to unprecedented heights and achieve numerous Player's Choice Awards and recognitions by the acoustics industry.  As testimony to these great instruments, many professional players have chosen to play Bourgeois guitars, such as Ray LaMontagne, Ricky Skaggs, Bryan Sutton, Martin Simpson, Sean Watkins of Nickel Creek, Steve Earle, Ron Block, Dan Tyminski and Marshall Crenshaw.  Bourgeois guitars are cherished by many serious musicians around the world, young and old.

Name: Shimon Presents
Description:
Shimon Presents specializes in music festival staffing and operations consulting. We offer a variety of event labor programs designed to maximize labor efficiency across all event departments through a bird's eye fan labor management system. Our programs focus on reducing the cost of labor by utilizing fans of the event, to perform event services in exchange for an event ticket. We offer both volunteer and FanStaff (paid) staffing programs.  All programs are operated expertly operated with proprietary online and cloud-based tools for professional branding and program management, from pre-event to post-event.

In addition to our fan labor management, we also provide fun and interactive activities and activations between fans and event performers, including game shows, workshops, and unique activities built specifically for the performing artist or crowd genre. Our activities have been featured at hundreds of events across the Caribbean, as a part of the Cloud 9 Adventures destination events, featuring activations with artists such as Zac Brown Band, Skrillex, My Morning Jacket, and many others.

Name: GENTLEMANAGEMENT
Description: Gentlemanagement: a gentle approach to music & artist management.

Name: A.S.I.Ar Asociación de Sellos Independientes de Argentina
Description:
Asociación sin fines de lucro creada por empresarios productores de música del sector independiente, cuyos objetivos fundamentales son: 
• Abogar por el valor y los derechos de los Sellos y la Música Independ, y mejorar su standard e infraestructura, elevando la conciencia sobre el valor cultural y peso económico de la la misma en el País.
• Promover el ecosistema diverso y vibrante del sector, a traves de transparencia, innovación y cooperación de sus diferentes actores, haciendo foco especial en crear, recabar y compartir recursos, información, conocimientos y capacitacion.

ASIAr es miembro de la Red Mundial WIN (Worldwide Independent Network).  Su dirección general es guiada por un Comité de Directores proveniente de Sellos, Empresas y Asociaciones claves del sector de todo el mundo.

PRIORIDADES DE ASIAR:
1. Ayudar a la Comunidad Independiente con sus iniciativas de política y defensa del Sector. Promover la igualdad y fomentar nuestra diversidad de estilos, géneros y culturas regionales.
2. Gestionar ante Sectores y Entidades Gubernamentales y Legislativas, mejoras en las políticas, leyes, y acceso a fondos destinados al desarrollo de la Industria a nivel nacional. Desarrollar y mejorar la estructura del mercado y del sector facilitando su actividad y comercio.
3. Nivelar el acceso a los recursos y oportunidades para todos los Sellos para su desarrollo y sustentabilidad en el tiempo.
4. Ayudar, asistir y capacitar a los Sellos Indep., proveyendo herramientas, desarrollando tutorías, y compartiendo conocimientos y Mejores Prácticas en las distintas areas del negocio, creando y compartiendo recursos destinados a tal efecto.
5. Promover el intercambio y cooperación entre sus miembros, actuando como facilitador de contactos y colaboraciones a nivel local regional e internacional.
6. Liderar relevamientos e investigaciones para elaborar estadísticas, informes, reportes  y perspectivas de mercado relevantes y actualizadas para el sector a nivel económico y cultural

Name: GNA Productions Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
GNA Productions Pvt. Ltd. is a Music Composer Company. We create Motivational Songs, Workout Songs, Inspirational Songs,etc. for Making the people Strong. So that, People can stay inspired, motivated, strong,and full of energy.

Keep Support us. 
Like our LinkedIn Page, Subscribe our channel on YouTube by clicking on Visit Website Button. 
Thank You.

For more information kindly Contact:
gnaproductionspvt@gmail.com

Name: Gri Müzik Yapım
Description: Ankara merkezli firmamız, global ağlarda müzik yapım, organizasyon ve reklamcılık faaliyetlerini yürütmektedir.

Name: LAS MUSAS MUSIC
Description:
Las Musas Music es una compañía multidisciplinar con una visión fresca, moderna e innovadora. Nuestro valor principal es la transparencia en un sector que durante muchas décadas y aún hoy está marcado por la falta de formación e información dentro de la propia industria. 

La música es arte y pasión. Su consumo ha cambiado, así como las formas de transmitirla y conocerla por ello la necesidad de formarte e informarte en un sector en continuo crecimiento y desarrollo.

Somos un equipo joven y emprendedor cuya pasión es la música. En la nueva INDUSTRIA DIGITAL vimos una oportunidad para aportar valor y marcar la diferencia en una industria con falta de transparencia.

Name: Avalon Guitars Ltd.
Description:
Avalon Guitars is the leading independent manufacturer of high-quality custom acoustic guitars in the UK and Ireland. 

Established in 1988, the company's focus in on hand-crafted acoustic guitar design and manufacturing.

In 2007, Avalon received the Guitar of the Year Award for its Americana series, developed by the in-house team of master luthiers who have pioneered several original new guitar concepts including, in 2010, a breakthrough dual bevel acoustic soundbox design. In addition, Avalon specialises in designing and building high end custom guitars for other leading guitar brands, including Zemaitis Guitars (Japan) and Craftine (Ireland).

Avalon’s luthiers are recognised within the guitar industry and the wider community of professional musicians for blending innovation in design with an outstanding knowledge of acoustic instrument resonance. Design and production projects have been developed in collaboration with guitar manufacturers in the Far East and Europe leading to the launch of Avalon’s acclaimed outsourced ranges.  

Many leading popular musicians play Avalon acoustic guitars including, James Morrison, Katie Melua, Bruce Springsteen, The Corrs, David Gray and Van Morrison; moreover, the company supports the development of young artists through sponsorship of the NI Young Guitar Player of the Year and the NI Young Songwriter of the Year.

Name: AHRE Studio
Description:
AHRE Studio is a leading Music and Sound Design company based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. 

We specialize in creating innovative and unique audio solutions for commercials, broadcast, motion design and video games.

Working with international agencies, production studios and animation houses, we bring their vision to life with custom-tailored solutions.

Led by founder and director Hernán Ambrogi, our team of talented freelance producers uses their expertise to deliver top-notch quality, freshness, and creativity on every project.

Name: Bloomingdale School Of Music
Description:
Bloomingdale School of Music has been providing access to high quality music education on the Upper West Side for more than 50 years. The school reflects a vibrant community of people dedicated and passionate about music and the extensive ways it can expand, uplift, and enrich our lives.

Situated in a beautiful, historic brownstone, Bloomingdale hosts over 600 students and families each week, participating in classes, taking private lessons on more than 20 different instruments, and attending our Free Concert Series throughout the year.

As BSM moves into the next 50 years, we are deepening our connection to the community. We envision a world where music education is available and accessible by anyone who has interest in learning, listening, or playing music.

Please stop by and visit, hear a concert, or take a lesson. We are YOUR center for music education on the Upper West Side since 1964.

Name: North Note Music Licensing
Description:
North Note (www.northnote.com) is an independent boutique music company representing a global roster of artists for publishing, label and one-stop sync licensing. 

Our small clan of music curators and advisors create an authentic and collaborative music licensing experience for music-savvy storytellers.

We foster a global network of writers and composers, facilitating unique collaborations and creative development to maximise sync potential. Boutique in nature, global in outlook.

Name: Purwa Caraka Music Studio
Description: Purwa Caraka Music Studio is a record label studio and school that offers music production, education, and event services.

Name: AFM & SAG-AFTRA Intellectual Property Rights Distribution Fund
Description: The AFM & SAG-AFTRA Intellectual Property Rights Distribution Fund is a 501c(6) not-for-profit royalty collective. Serving as a third party administrator for the American Federation of Musicians (AFM) and the American Federation of Television and Radio Artists/Screen Actors Guild (SAG-AFTRA), the Fund's purpose is to collect and distribute royalties from various foreign territories and royalties established by government statute under U.S. Copyright Law.

Name: Good Luck Kid
Description:
Good Luck Kid is a talent management, label and publishing company. We focus on building successful and sustainable careers for our artists and producers. Our releases, writings and productions have accumulated more than one billion streams to date.

Good Luck Kid was founded as ‘deedy music’ in 2016. Starting out as a management company, deedy music soon ventured into the records business. Name: Symphony of the Rockies
Description:
Symphony of the Rockies has been a pillar of the Denver Metro arts community for more than 70 years. Devin Patrick Hughes was appointed Music Director & Conductor in 2013 and has led the creation of a new ensemble that makes world class symphonic music accessible throughout the mountain region. 

Over the past ten seasons Symphony of the Rockies (SOR) has expanded its reach and impact by doubling the operating budget, professionalizing the ensemble, playing to sold out crowds, and broadening the educational umbrella to serve thousands of students each season. During the COVID-19 pandemic, the Orchestra swiftly pivoted, adapting its programming to online, virtual, outdoors, and resuming COVID-safe performances, keeping audiences engaged and musicians and staff employed.

The orchestra is comprised of professional musicians, pre-professionals, talented community members looking for a space to grow and develop, and music educators with a passion for performing. Repertoire includes works by the greatest names in classical music spanning all eras, including recent works from diverse composers, and music spanning across the genres of pop, film, folk, video games, and more.

SOR has become a teaching pillar and role model through its commitment to educating and fostering the next generation of classical music lovers. It presents a Discovery Concert Series, spearheads an Emerging Artists Program, and provides musicians to serve as coaches for music students of all ages.

In 2017, SOR launched sensory friendly programming, including outreach programs where members of the orchestra support seniors who cannot leave their communities. During the pandemic, it expanded this program to reach a more diverse group of seniors focusing on subsidized housing.

The orchestra can be found engaging the next generation of symphonic music champions throughout the front range.

Description:

Cu o viziune clară și inovativă, Forward redefinește standardele de profesionalism și creativitate din industria muzicală, oferind consultanță, concept și management de event, ținând cont de așteptările și percepția publicului și punând în evidență talentul și energia transmisă de artiști. Toate acestea au la bază o viziune de business clară și o strategie coerentă, astfel încât toți cei implicați în proces să fie avantajați.

Forward Agency își propune să fie un brand vizibil și avangardist, conectat în permanență la industria muzicală și de entertainment. Agenția are o preocupare constantă să ofere soluții în contexte diverse, iar focusul este pe dezvoltare și inovație. În cei peste 20 de ani de experiență în industria muzicală, dedicarea și viziunea de ansamblu asupra întregului concept, profesionalismul și promptitudinea cu care echipa Forward face ca lucrurile să se întâmple au dus la creșterea unui portofoliu impresionant de peste 30 de artiști. 

Insight

Forward este o agenție de booking și management de event pentru artiști de top, care are know-how-ul și resursele necesare creării unei experiențe memorabile, atât pentru client / partener, cât și pentru public. 

Fapte

Forward oferă stabilitate și experiențe speciale, în care lucrurile se desfășoară în condiții optime și în avantajul tuturor celor implicați. 

Valori

Forward reprezintă nu doar un serviciu necesar pe piața de entertainment, ci stabilește noi standarde, prin crearea de conexiuni și generarea de trăiri prin intermediul unor experiențe de neuitat.

Name: String Quartet Biennale Amsterdam
Description:
The String Quartet Biennale Amsterdam was launched in 2018 and is the world’s biggest string quartet festival. We bring together string quartets from different backgrounds from all over the world to create a dynamic, innovative program and a rich kaleidoscope of string quartet in our time. 

We commission, produce and present. From the early Haydn to world premières by today's most renown composers; from the timeless late Beethoven quartets to long forgotten hidden gems.

Every two years, for eight days, the Muziekgebouw in Amsterdam is the worldwide hotspot for string quartets, composers, guest artists, string quartet devotees and curious listeners. In over 60 concerts, performances, lectures, masterclasses and talks, the String Quartet Biennale Amsterdam celebrates the string quartet and its immense source of beauty and diversity.

Name: IRMA records official
Description:
IRMA records nasce a Bologna nel 1988 da una idea di Umbi Damiani e Massimo Benini, già da qualche anno impegnati nella parte commerciale del Music business.  
In quegli anni nasce in Italia la scena indipendente dell’house music e i contatti con alcuni deejay come Luca LTJ Trevisi, Claudio Mozart Rispoli e alcuni musicisti come Francesco Montefiori, Cesare Collina, Ricky Ohm Guru Rinaldi, Be Noir e Black Mighty Wax hanno dato vita alle prime produzioni e ai primi singoli mix in vinile dell’etichetta discografica.
Il nome iniziale completo era IRMA Casadiprimordine e derivava dal nome di un bordello molto popolare a Bologna negli anni 50 che aveva avuto sede nello stesso edificio in cui erano allora situati i primi uffici dell’etichetta.
Fin da subito i primi consensi arrivano soprattutto dall’estero. I deejay inglesi e americani si innamorano dell’inconfondibile suono dei primi singoli: Key Tronics Ensemble, Soft House Company, Be Noir, Don Carlos, Riviera Traxx, Mozart e soprattutto quello che è il primo grande successo internazionale di IRMA: “Found Love” del duo Double Dee featuring Dany che raggiunge infatti i primissimi posti delle Dance Charts di tutto il mondo, inclusa la prestigiosa Billboard dance chart americana dove arriva addirittura al numero 1! Seguono poi altre hit internazionali come i singoli firmati Jestofunk (“Can we live”, “Say it again”e “I’m gonna love you”) e i singoli del gruppo dei Datura (Yerba Del Diablo, Eternity e Devotion), da qui IRMA inizia a pubblicare i primi album completi Dance, iniziando così quella che sarebbe stata da li’ in poi la principale scelta editoriale dell'Etichetta. Negli anni seguenti l'Etichetta si è consolidata in tutto il Mondo attraverso la presenza costante nel mercato musicale mondiale. IRMA a tutt'oggi è una delle realtà Indipendenti Italiane longeve e continua ad avere grande rispetto e credibilità nei mercati Italiano e Internazionali.

As a client, you’ll have direct say in how you want your project managed. Whether it’s start-to-finish conceptualisation or a standalone service, you’ll get a setup that fully suits your needs. In terms of scope, the range of genres covered within the studio knows no limits. Covering everything from piano and orchestral compositions, to more urban sounds and electronic creations, everything is truly possible.

Ready to get your project underway? Reach out and let’s get started.

Name: Oficina Ocm - Centro di produzione culturale
Description:
The Orchestra da Camera di Mantova was founded in 1981 and has proven to have technical brilliance, great attention to style and a constant search for sound quality. In 1997, Italian musical critics awarded the Orchestra da Camera di Mantova the “Franco Abbiati” prize for its “unique stylistic refinement and constant search for sound quality, which merges Italian instrumental tradition and classical repertoire”.
The orchestra performs in Teatro Bibiena in Mantova, which is an authentic jewel of architecture and acoustics.

The Orchestra da Camera di Mantova has been performing for over 30 years with world-renowned conductors and soloists; some of these include: Gidon Kremer, Shlomo Mintz, Joshua Bell, Salvatore Accardo, Umberto Benedetti Michelangeli, Giuliano Carmignola, Uto Ughi, Mischa Maisky, Enrico Dindo, Mario Brunello, Miklos Perenyi, Sol Gabetta, Alexander Lonquich, Bruno Canino, Katia and Marielle Labeque, Maria Tipo, Andrea Lucchesini, the unforgettable Astor Piazzola and Severino Gazzelloni to name a few. The OCM has given numerous concerts both in Italy and abroad and has performed in theatres and concert halls all over Europe, the USA, Central and South America and Asia.

The Orchestra da Camera di Mantova has recorded for several television and radio programs such as RAI, Bayerischer Rundfunk and the Swiss RSTI. In September 2009, the ensemble recorded three of Haydn’s symphonies, on commission by the most important Italian musical magazine, “Amadeus”. Most recently, with a recording project dedicated to Mozart’s piano concertos, the orchestra has recorded two well-appreciated CDs together with pianist Angela Hewitt that have been published by Hyperion in 2011.

Since 1993, the Orchestra da Camera di Mantova has held a very successful yearly season, Tempo d’Orchestra, with the contribution of famous Italian and foreign soloists, chamber groups and orchestras from around the world.

Description:
Jerry "Wonda” Duplessis, the multi-platinum Grammy Award winning music producer, founded Platinum Sound Recording Studios in New York City in 2000 to give artists an unparalleled studio experience.  By focusing on pristine sound quality, productivity and privacy, Jerry has created a world-class space where artists from around the world instantly feel at home, get into their creative flow and record many hits. 

Since its establishment, Platinum has been the birthplace of many Grammy Award-winning artists.  Everyone from Rihanna, Lady Gaga, French Montana, DJ Khaled, Jonas Brothers, Miguel, Mary J. Blige, Justin Bieber to Melissa Etheridge and more, has come through its doors for its engineering expertise, state-of-the-art equipment inside acoustic rooms tuned to perfection, high energy yet low key studio vibe, and most of all, for Jerry’s endless creativity, high level of professionalism, and attention to detail.

In 2018, we introduced our second major product line, Neptune Navigate, which offers a suite of educational tools focused on digital citizenship for schools and leadership development for teams. Description:
Roar drumming is a team that works toward breaking the barriers created due to work-from-home culture. We aim to deliver workshops that are easy for participants to comprehend and for organizers to initiate.

Name: OFF Festival
Description:
The OFF Festival is a musical celebration created by Artur Rojek. For over a decade, the festival has drawn alternative music artists and fans from all over the world to Silesia, Poland. OFF was born of the need to share music and fulfill dreams, but it was also driven by a sense of mission: to bring together members of different cultures, milieus, and artistic disciplines. 

That’s why you’ll find more than just music at the OFF Festival, which also showcases the visual arts, literature, and cinema. Its visionary program and welcoming atmosphere are praised by OFF regulars, the media (with recommendations from the Guardian, Time, and Pitchfork, as well as
Seattle’s KEXP Radio, which recorded a series of live sessions with Polish artists in Katowice), and the festival industry: OFF is a winner of the prestigious European Festival Award for Best Medium-Sized Festival. The OFF Festival stage has featured numerous alternative music legends — including Iggy Pop, PJ Harvey, Patti Smith, and The Smashing Pumpkins — but it also showcases the best there is in Polish alternative music, from Hey, Voo Voo, and Skalpel, to Molesta and (believe it or not) Zbigniew Wodecki, who played his first full show with Mitch & Mitch at OFF. An OFF Festival invite has been known to revive long-dormant legends, sometimes just for the occasion, and sometimes for longer.Such was the case with Lenny Valentino, Miłość, Something Like Elvis, and Kinsky.

Last but not least, the OFF Festival is an informal annual gathering of the creative industry: you’d be hard pressed to find a higher concentration of filmmakers, writers, and media figures, all of whom descend upon the festival in search of new sensations and inspirations.

Name: Contemporary Music for All (CoMA)
Description:
Contemporary Music for All (CoMA) is a participatory new music charity and Arts Council of England National Portfolio Organisation 23-26, with a vision to open new contemporary classical music to everyone, and to celebrate participation in new music-making as a meaningful and essential part of our lives. CoMA hosts regular year-round ensembles in multiple locations throughout England, a biennial summer school and festival, sector conferences, skill development courses and regular open participation events. 

Over 30 years, CoMA has supported 3,200+ grassroots music-makers and emerging composers in the creation & performance of new music. Founded to address a lack of quality contemporary repertoire performable by amateurs, CoMA has since commissioned 350+ works, hosted composition courses as platforms to bring together early career and established music creators and created a unique library of 800+ contemporary classical works.

CoMA’s mission is to:
- Create a culture of musical participation and collaboration between emerging
and established music-makers and creators of all backgrounds and abilities
- Establish environments, musical communities, networks and new repertoires
to promote and develop these practices
- Share these unique experiences as widely as possible, from audiences to
institutions, from music education providers to professional performers and
creators.

ZCT is proud to have an ongoing alliance and partnership with one of the world’s leading and most awarded promoters, Dainty Group; and has worked side by side with other promoters such as Live Nation, Chugg Entertainment, Bluehawk Presents, and Base Entertainment Asia.

Along with Dainty Group, ZCT also holds venue management rights and regularly hosts major concerts at three of Australia’s premier wineries – Western Australia’s Sandalford Swan Valley and Sandalford Margaret River and the beautiful Tempus Two Winery in the Hunter Valley, New South Wales.

Name: Freedom Jazz Festival, Inc.
Description:
The Freedom Jazz Festival, Inc (FJF), a community based, volunteer group that preserve, promotes and presents Jazz, highlights African American artists and musicians in Minnesota and beyond. Sam Favors (d) was the main force in connecting black musicians in the Twin Cities area in order to bring them together for performances and to build their business acumen.

In 2001, we incorporated as a non-profit organization. Our mission is to: 

-   Further the appreciation of Jazz music and the awareness of its African American origins and influences.
-   Enhance the Twin Cities' Jazz culture and various jazz communities in Minnesota.
-   Stimulate the interest of the youth audience in Jazz.
-   Create an interaction between Jazz musicians and enthusiasts as a way to connect communities.
- Promote positive community and family events.

The Freedom Jazz Festival is a cultural journey. The goal of the festival is simply to tell the story of Jazz music from its West African origins through the journey of the African American experience. The journey highlights the talents of many in Minnesota's Jazz community. Artists with solid roots in Jazz history well know locally and nationally, were legends in the nightclubs frequented by African Americans in the Twin Cities.   Every artist, audience member and participant experiences Jazz as a sense of freedom of expression.  Plus, Jazz is a community event that must engage young jazz musicians to preserve the legacy of jazz.

One of our most memorable highlights was our first festival in 1999 where the senior jazz members of the Twin Cities played on stage together for the first time in their history.  It was like a family homecoming celebration!  These past and present artists are a part of the rich history and lifeline of Jazz that keeps our Minnesota Jazz scene grooving!  We hope you join to help keep the Freedom Jazz Festival alive wherever jazz is - in your own backyard or around the world.

Name: KIFF Kultur in der Futterfabrik
Description:
Das KIFF macht seit über 30 Jahren Kultur in der Futterfabrik und bietet allerbeste Populärkultur mit überregionaler Ausstrahlung. Mit unglaublich viel Charme, getragen von einem 15-köpfigen Team, einem treuen Vorstand und über 150 freiwilligen Helfern haucht es den industriellen Mauern im Quartier Telli in Aarau Leben ein.

Wer dem Alltag entfliehen will, entdeckt in der alten Futterfabrik grossartige Konzerte aus jeglichen Musikrichtungen. Ob Rock, Pop, Reggae, Hip Hop, Metal, Balkan oder D’n’B – hier findet jede(r) Musikliebhaber(in) ihre/seine Lieblingsband.

Internationale Grössen wie Groundation, Kettcar, Beatsteaks, Worldly Savages oder Kashmir haben schon den Weg ins KIFF gefunden und für unvergessliche Abende gesorgt. Aber auch nationale Helden wie Züri West, Patent Ochsner, Pablo Nouvelle oder Stiller Has stehen hier immer wieder gerne auf der Bühne. Zudem finden regelmässig Improvisationstheater und Comedy-Abende statt.

Auch das Clubleben kommt mit der Vielfalt an Partys und Partylabels nicht zu kurz und lässt das KIFF zur Tanzfabrik werden. Zwei Konzertsääle bieten eine Licht & Tontechnik, die nichts zu wünschen übrig lässt und liefern damit ein Ambiente, das man nicht mehr so schnell vergisst.

Das KIFF ist ein Ort, an dem man sich nur wohlfühlen kann.

Name: Hen Hoose
Description:
The pandemic has underlined just how precarious music careers are, even for those well established. In the struggle to survive, women have fewer opportunities to develop revenue streams to sustain a viable career than men. From songwriting and production, to the live arena, streaming and radio play, women are underrepresented throughout the industry.

Hen Hoose is a response to this situation.

Launched in Glasgow, this is a collaborative female and non-binary songwriting project funded by Creative Scotland. It unites a rich and diverse array of wonderfully talented and award-winning female Scottish artists, writers and producers with the goal of collaborating remotely on the creation of exciting new music across multiple genres. 

Amongst the artists signed up are:

Karine Polwart, Emma Pollock, Stina Tweeddale (Honeyblood) Amandah Wilkinson (Bossy Love), Beldina Odenyo Onassis (Heir Of The Cursed), Carla J Easton, Rachael Swinton (Cloth), Pippa Murphy, Sarah Hayes (Admiral Fallow), Inge Thomson, Suse Bear (Pictish Trail), Tamara Schlesinger (MALKA),  India Rose and Elisabeth Elektra.

Name: Soulsound
Description:
Soulsound is a leading online resource centre for Audio Engineers, collated and delivered by highly experienced Live Sound professionals. Whether you are studying, producing, or a professional Sound Engineer yourself, we can enhance your knowledge with relevant, coherent content that is expertly designed to complement and inspire your practice.

Soulsound is the place to come for genuine, up to date information and techniques, taught and discussed by experts who have worked in the industry for many years, and are still the foremost leaders in their field. Our team has produced some of the best young engineers in the world, all of whom have gone on to lead extremely successful careers.

We also run SoulSound Agency. The agency supplies Live Sound Engineers to events and venues, for whatever reason you may need someone to operate your sound.

We have four different skill levels - Junior, Senior, SuperGeniusExpert and work experience students.  So we can supply engineers that will make your event happen, from smallest to largest.  As the cliche goes, "no job too small or too large".

All engineers are personally known to Darryn and are matched carefully to the job at hand.  We know that budgets vary radically for events, so we will always try get you the best engineer we can for the budget you have available.  

We are also closely connected to Alchemea College of Audio Engineering, so can supply fully insured work experience guys and girls from amongst the Live Sound Diploma students.  They come free of charge along with any engineer booked through us, and are useful as stage hands and general runners.

Name: Santa Cruz Symphony
Description:
Founded in 1958, the Santa Cruz Symphony's mission is to inspire, educate and engage through artistic excellence, distinctive musical performances, and varied activities that celebrate and enhance cultural vibrancy. With Maestro Daniel Stewart as music director since 2013, the Symphony partners regularly with regional and international guest artists in both traditional and modern concerts, as well as offers Music Education programs to students throughout Santa Cruz County. A cornerstone of the performing arts in the Greater San Francisco and Monterey Bay Areas, Santa Cruz Symphony receives frequent critical acclaim. 

Visit santacruzsymphony.org for more information.

Name: Burlington Discover Jazz Festival
Description:
The Burlington Discover Jazz Festival began as a way to celebrate not only jazz's breadth but also the Vermont performers who were contributing to its continual evolution. Twenty-eight years later it has grown into an opportunity for world-renowned artists local and regional performers and burgeoning student musicians to thrill, connect us and make us appreciate what a powerful force live music is. The 28th annual Burlington Discover jazz Festival will be held from June 3-12, 2011 at various stages and venues throughout Burlington, Vermont. The Festival draws roughly 50,000 people. 

Previous performers include Diana Krall, Sonny Rollins, Dave Brubeck, Branford Marsalis, Levon Helm, Ornette Coleman, Chick Corea, Bela Fleck, Maceo Parker, Sharon Jones & The Dap-Kings, Vijay Iyer, Esperanza Spalding and many more.

The Festival is produced by the Flynn Center for the Performing Arts in association with Burlington City Arts and is Presented by Northfield Savings Bank. Additional Festival Sponsors include Lake Champlain Chocolates, WPTZ News Channel 5 and more.

Name: The Rapfest
Description:
The Rapfest is one of the fastest growing live entertainment and digital media companies based in New York (although with a National Reach) specializing in concert promotions, new media, artist development and more. Recently, through hard work in the platform's first year, we have successfully been named on The Source Magazine's 'Power 30 List' (2015) of the top major players in the blogging and digital content industry (that's Top 30 out of 10,000+ hip-hop blogs!).

The RapFest is a trusted brand to our base and serve as one of the best destinations to showcase established as well as up and coming artists. Through our various outlets, blogs, original online content featuring major and independent artists, mini tours, spot date bookings, etc, we create the ability for fans to discover amazing music.

Name: Concorde2
Description:
Concorde2 is Brighton's award winning Live Music Venue & Nightclub, nationally recognised as one of the UK's most forward thinking venues and proudly an independent, family run business. 

For over two decades Concorde2 has stood at the forefront of musical innovation. Widely recognised as Brighton's premier live music venue and night club, and often quoted as one of the greatest venues across the country, it has played host to some of the greatest bands the world has ever seen.

Oozing with character and style, Concorde 2 is a classic Victorian building, originally used as tea rooms in the 1800's. In the 1960's it became a notorious bikers cafe and in the 1970's an amusement arcade, before it was eventually transformed into all its current glory in 2000.

The venue is home to a state of the art L-Acoustics sound system, lighting systems and a continuously plays host to a diverse cross section of events throughout the year.  

Concorde2 is programmed over 3 rooms with a comfortable capacity of 600, operating 7 days a week, 365 days a year, which is available for private hire for both live gigs as well as club nights.

We take pride in the reputation we have built as a friendly, welcoming and professional business, please feel free to contact us directly for more information on hiring the space.

Name: La Maison de la Terre
Description:
Créée en 2008, la Maison de la Terre à Poucharramet est un café culturel associatif dans une ancienne ferme du centre du village restaurée en un lieu chaleureux et agréable.

La Maison de la Terre est un café associatif culturel

Toute l’année nous proposons des concerts (Jazz, classique, rock, métal, blues, hip-hop, soul, lyrics, musiques du monde...), des expositions de photographie, de peinture, du théâtre, des conférences et des débats, des projections de films de court-métrages et de documentaires, et un multitude d'autres événements... mais aussi et surtout... les temps forts que sont les festivals Terre de Jazz, Terre de Blues, Terre de Chœurs , et les A.C.T.

Selon les événements, nous offrons un service de restauration et servons des repas, des tapas ou des petits en-cas du soir. Nous possédons une carte de produits de qualité, locaux, bio accompagnés par des assiettes composées de mets régionaux et originaux réalisé par les permanents ou les bénévoles de l’association.
L’association accueille dans ses locaux d’autres associations pour diversifier ses actions et valoriser le tissu associatif local.

L'authenticité et le plaisir

C'est dans un lieu authentique et dans une ambiance chaleureuse que toute l'équipe vous reçoit pour vivre des moments d'exception.

Plaisirs acoustiques, voyages culturels et gustatifs, partages de connaissances et moments intelligents; la Maison de la Terre est l'endroit idéal pour se ressourcer dans un cadre convivial et de qualité.

Situé à 40 minutes de Toulouse, ce lieu classé, rénové dans une démarche écologique, vous est également ouvert pour l'organisation de vos séminaires, conférences et réunions d'entreprise.

Toute l'équipe vous attend, sourire aux lèvres afin de partager avec vous sa passion.

Name: ONGEA! - the Eastern Africa Music Summit
Description:
Formed in June 1999, PHAT! Music & Entertainment Limited is a multi-media, youth-orientated authority on African music and entertainment. Triple P Kenya Publicists, established in April 2002, is also a Kenyan entertainment company involved in market research, music production, distribution & publicity, event management and media production.

Concerned that music piracy is robbing the Kenya Music Industry of over KShs 10 billion annually - while our fragmented industry appears powerless to fight for its rights; we created an accessible public forum for Industry stakeholders (i.e. musicians, producers, promoters, distributors, media, consumers, government & NGOs) to interact and produce solutions to Industry problems.

This is Kenya Music Week; and the first-ever edition was successfully held in Sarit Centre’s Expo Hall for 4 days from Thursday 9th to Sunday 12th December in 2004. This was followed by five equally successful annual Kenya Music Weeks, in December 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008 and 2009, at the same venue.

Since then Kenya Music Week has evolved to ONGEA!- The Eastern Africa Music Summit targeting all the 16 countries that make up the region. Since 2015 we have brought together stakeholders in the region to explore and debate issues that affect them.

The orchestra members perform in five regular season concerts, holiday concerts, a summer Pops concert, and an annual children's concert for Sheboygan County's fourth-graders. The repertoire is varied and provides a strong musical experience for the performers. Guest artists add to the variety and experience for players and the audience.

Name: Clubio
Description:
Clubio is a fintech startup, developing an online booking solution. It’s a perfect marketplace loaded with options for industry experts to engage. Clubs rent their spaces, promoters manage lineups and promote their profiles. Artists manage bookings, present digital presskits and take care of finances. 

This trading platform enables you to find the right industry expert with just 3 clicks. It helps you conduct a focused screening and make smart data-driven booking decision. 

We conducted pilot research hosting 30 techno label nights in Club R19 (Berlin). Data analisys showed that booking artists is tedious work. All the paperwork, the calls you don't want to make and making reports... and yet it's not necessary you get a DJ you want to play at your event for the price you want to pay. And we provide a solution to all this problem in one tool. A B3B marketplace!

WHAT OUR CUSTOMERS SAY?
"I always thougt we need something like this, a huge Marketplace of DJs, Promoters and Clubs. Clubio gives us the chance to connect and collaborate in an easy way. I really like using it!" -- Alex Monster, Label Manager, Little Helpers

"Our goal is to help our booking managers to hire DJs faster. Clubio is the only platform that helps us build and scale booking operations. With stakeholders involved, the Clubio platform was selected unanimously." -- Marcel Heinz, Owner /Manager, Club R19 (Berlin)

"Clubio is a missing link in electronic music." -- Marina Karamarko, Pro DJ/Producer, Burn Studio Residency

ONE TOOL TO OPTIMIZE YOUR BOOKING PROCESS
We are working hard to keep developing the product and new features that make Clubio the best option for businesses of all sizes. If you have any feedback or interest in signing up for a demo, don't hesitate to visit our website.

The initial location in the heart of Hollywood became a favorite of many seminal Los Angeles-based bands, and established Swing House as an artist-centric operation, dedicated to building a community inside and outside the studio.

This language is why you turn up the volume when you hear a song from your youth and sing along joyfully, particularly when you haven’t heard it in a long time. Significantly accelerating the play-in process and providing increased tone, playability, and balance,  the ToneRite makes all of this available in a nearly silent, high quality, and portable manner.

"After one week with the ToneRite on the guitar, the voice of my LaVenezia opened-up beautifully!" - Robert Benedetto - Benedetto Guitars, Inc. - www.benedettoguitars.com

"We've been using our ToneRite full time since we received it. It has made a dramatic difference in the tone of new instruments, and has helped to "wake up" vintage instruments that haven't been played in years. Our team has extensive experience in the production industry, including the management of events across Europe involving artists such as Jards Macalé, Luiz Melodia and Nação Zumbi, amongst others.

Name: Aerodrums

Name: HUKAPAN S.R.L.
Description:
Hukapan S.r.l. è una società del Gruppo Elio e le Storie Tese.
La loro attività pubblica live e discografica è stata interrotta a tempo indeterminato, ma ciò non significa che abbiano la minima intenzione di andare in pensione! Dopo trent’anni di carriera e innumerevoli riconoscimenti, la band e i suoi singoli membri portano in dote un know-how tecnico/artistico che rappresenta una notevole opportunità per molteplici soggetti.

AGENZIA CREATIVA: Oltre alla classica attività di testimonial per piccoli e grandi brand, eventi privati e convention, campi nei quali l’attività continua come in passato, Hukapan presenta Elio e le Storie Tese anche nella veste NO LOGO e propone Stefano Belisari, Nicola Fasani, Davide Civaschi e Sergio Conforti come team creativo multiuso e multitasking, a prescindere dalla loro dimensione di rockstar.

ETICHETTA E MANAGEMENT: Siamo consapevoli di quanto il panorama musicale italiano sia ricco e stimolante e siamo interessati a lavorare con chi abbia idee, mettendo a disposizione la nostra esperienza trentennale e la nostra capacità di ascolto.

STUDIO DI REGISTRAZIONE: Lo Studio Hukapan, meglio noto come Studio Panino, è accogliente e versatile: disponibile per interlocutori esterni che intendano usufruire di una struttura dotata di strumentazione al passo con i tempi, si avvale dell'apporto di personale altamente qualificato, che storicamente ha contribuito a realizzare gli album di Elio e le Storie Tese, oltre che dell'esperienza e creatività dei singoli membri del gruppo.

MASTERCLASS: Organizziamo seminari e masterclass con Elio, Faso, Cesareo e Rocco Tanica

Name: Sync or Swim Music
Description:
Sync or Swim Music is a Canadian networking and educational community led with kindness and empathy with inclusion and diversity at the forefront as a safe environment to connect, create and collaborate online. It is community of songwriters, composers and producers focused on sync licensing wanting to learn how to place their music on TV, films, ads and other media.
 
Connect more with our community and members by joining our public Sync or Swim Music Facebook group HERE https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1KSw86mAVe/?mibextid=wwXIfr
 
Public FB group members can attend weekend online conferences held annually online for free in the chat rooms on zoom and learn from our industry pros attending through interviews, workshops and pitch and feedback sessions.
 
Songwriters, composers and producers that would like to dive deeper into the community have the option to subscribe to a paid membership program with an modest annual fee which gives access to pitching and getting feedback from industry pros at all events, a sync writing and recording weekly challenge with feedback on your music from your peers and Sync or Swim Music owner Robbie Hancock (Thousands of placements some of which include NBC, ABC, CBS, BBC Netflix, Prime, HBO etc.). Registered members also have access to a monthly office hours with Robbie (Captain's Quarters) insider news, sync opportunities and discounts on masterclasses.
 
Thank you for being here and I hope this is a place that we can help you find your way through the sync licensing music industry on your music journey!
 
Robbie Hancock
Owner
Sync or Swim Music

Name: The Bunker CIC
Description:
A platform for thousands of musicians and artists, many of whom go on to reach national and international stages, The Bunker is well recognised as a unique force, providing a creative outlet for youth in Sunderland and contributed significantly to the North East region’s cultural economy.

Rehearsal room and recording facilities are the core of The Bunker’s services, providing a base and space to develop for bands and artists. We also work with a range of local venues and arts organisations to provide development opportunities and encourage cultural activity in Sunderland.  Additionally, we deliver training, development and career guidance on a range of music/arts-related topics to budding musicians and young people in Sunderland.

We engage hard to reach learners and run music related projects for people from minority groups or problematic backgrounds, who may otherwise not consider education/training as a route to employment. We aim to provide advice and support to build confidence and help people use music towards a positive outcome, whether this results in a career in the arts or other vocations.

We aim to raise awareness and tackle cultural barriers through interactive music projects, and explore the usage of music in helping the recuperation or treatment of people suffering illness or disabilities.

Welcome to The Bunker: We are music.

Name: Greater Dallas Youth Orchestra
Description:
Greater Dallas Youth Orchestra, whose mission is to provide music education and performance opportunities for youth with demonstrated musical ability, was founded as a single orchestra, the Greater Dallas Youth Orchestra, in 1972 by a group of parents, educators and musicians who valued music education and the outcomes it could provide.

The program cultivates learning and creativity, as well as, social and motivational skills in 480 talented young musicians, performing in two full orchestras, three string orchestras, a wind ensemble, a flute choir, and 6 jazz combos.  GDYO musicians socialize with a diverse group of highly talented peers from over 50 communities in the Metroplex, as well as interacting with professionals from the Dallas Symphony Orchestra, the Dallas Wind Symphony and multiple other local music ensembles.

Name: Shesaid.so Montreal
Description:
shesaid.so MTL is the local branch of an international network of creatives and entrepreneurs working in the music industry. We aim to create opportunities, dialogue, and space for local women and their allies. Our chapter was founded in 2021 after a year of consulting women who make our scene thrive, building on their needs and experiences to create an organisation that empowers, connects, informs and entertains. We aim to build bridges across Tiohtià:ke/Montreal’s different communities through eclectic programming, insightful networking and radical inclusion.
#shesaidsoMTL

--

shesaid.so Montréal est la branche locale d’un réseau international de personnes créatives et entrepreneur.es dans l’industrie de la musique. Nous visons la création d’opportunités, de dialogue et d’un espace pour les femmes et leurs allié.es. Notre chapitre a été fondé en 2021 après une année de consultation des femmes qui font prospérer notre scène, en s'appuyant sur leurs besoins et leurs expériences pour créer une organisation qui donne du pouvoir, connecte, informe et divertit. Notre objectif est de bâtir des ponts entre les différentes communautés de Tiohtià:ke/Montréal grâce à une programmation éclectique, un réseautage efficace et une inclusion radicale. 
#shesaidsoMTL

Name: ONG TOKI Rapa Nui
Description:
Con fecha 21 de julio de 2014, ONG TOKI realizó el lanzamiento de su primera campaña de crowdfuning en búsqueda del financiamiento que permita construir la primera Escuela de Música y de las Artes en Isla de Pascua. La campaña tiene la gran misión de permitir que los niños continúen aprendiendo de forma gratuita, constituyendo a la vez el proyecto de construcción un ejemplo de arquitectura amigable con el planeta.

Proyecto crowdfunding: www.igg.me/at/toki

Donaciones directas en Banco Estado: www.tokirapanui.org

La Escuela de Música y de las Artes, está liderada por la Pianista y Embajadora Cultural del Pueblo rapanui, Mahani Teave.

Desde Noviembre de 2011, tras la donación de algunos instrumentos y la concreción de un plantel
educativo compuesto por 4 profesores, se han impartido clases de piano, violín, violoncello y ukelele. La Escuela de Música cuenta hoy en día con cerca de 70 alumnos, quienes reciben clases gratuitas.

Los cursos están siendo impartidos en espacios facilitados de manera generosa y momentánea por el
Museo Sebastian Englert y la Parroquia Santa Cruz, además de utilizarse la casa de dos profesores.

ONG TOKI es una organización sin fines de lucro que tiene por objeto brindar una educación integral a niños y jóvenes, dotándolos del espacio y de las herramientas para el desarrollo artístico, social y cultural en aras de un desarrollo sustentable y en conjunto con la comunidad de Rapa Nui.

Name: Silent Media Music
Description:
Silent Media es un estudio creativo de composición musical. Creamos música original, diseño de sonido, identidad musical, jingles y locuciones para publicidad. Cada una de nuestras composiciones tiene su propio sello de identidad, componemos ad hoc de la mano de agencias de publicidad, productoras y fabricantes para conseguir el resultado perfecto.

Nuestro sonido transmite un mensaje inequívoco en consonancia con la marca, campaña y producto. Traducimos identidad de marca en música apoyándonos en nuestro bagaje profesional y versatilidad.  Ante todo buscamos transmitir la experiencia a través del juego y la música.
www.silentmedia.es

Name: Freesound
Description: Freesound is a performance collective that operates in Toronto, Canada. Freesound presents concerts and events that are at the forefront of contemporary music in Canada, advocating for Canadian composers, and performing works that are rarely heard in Canada. We are dedicated to artistic innovation, exploring the creation of new works, non-traditional approaches to concert formats, and more, all at the highest caliber of artistic expression.

Name: The Noel Pointer Foundation
Description:
ABOUT US
The Noel Pointer Foundation (NPF) was incorporated in 1995 under the direction of Ms. Chinita Pointer, wife of the late Grammy nominated jazz violinist Noel Pointer. In 1998, the Noel Pointer Foundation created a string music education program for 18 students at Public School 44. Fulfilling an incredible need, they were soon asked to do the same for many other schools.

The program currently exists in 28 different New York City Schools. Due to the successes of this program, NPF began offering music enrichment programs at their headquarters in Bedford Stuyvesant, Brooklyn. In 1999 NPF instituted the Summer String Program, serving an average of 200 pupils per summer. In 2000, NPF created more opportunities for inner-city youth by opening the Saturday Strings program. The NPF Youth Orchestra, formed in 2008, performs with famous musical icons and ensembles such as Mos Def, Mark O’Connor, Strings of Brooklyn, the Brooklyn Philharmonic and Brooklyn Conservatory of Music. In 2010, NPF increased personalized attention by providing more private instruction through an After-School Strings Program. Since the Foundation’s inception, NPF has served over 20,000 New York City public school children.

VISION
Founded in 1995, the Noel Pointer Foundation (NPF) is a not-for-profit that dramatically enriches the lives of children by developing string music education programs for under-served communities in New York City. Through professional training, performance opportunities and college placement assistance, NPF enhances a student’s cultural and academic experience, infusing them with a positive sense of who they are and a boundless sense of what they can become.

Name: we are a lot
Description:
Wir möchten zusammen mit euch eine Plattform gründen, auf welcher Frauen aus der Veranstaltungsbranche – insbesondere jene hinter den Kulissen – zu Wort kommen, gesehen & gehört werden. 

Wir möchten dazu beitragen, Frauen und ihren Arbeitsalltag in der Veranstaltungsbranche sichtbar zu machen. Wir möchten die Geschichten der Frauen erzählen, deren Motivation beleuchten & damit im besten Fall mehr Frauen für einen Job in der Branche begeistern. Gleichzeitig möchten wir den Frauen der Branche durch unsere Plattform die Möglichkeit geben, sich kennenzulernen & vernetzen, um sich so gegenseitig unterstützen & stärken zu können. 

Deshalb stellen wir euch jede Woche eine inspirierende Frau aus Veranstaltungsbranche vor.

Name: 4000 Records
Description:
4000 Records began amid the semi-industrial outskirts of Meanjin (Brisbane), in a small room perched in a battered high-set Queenslander overlooking a scrap metal yard and a brewery. One of its occupants, John Russell, has been an active supporter and enthusiast of the local scene since his days of all-ages shows at The Pineapple Hotel, running street teams and making mix tapes in a brave new world of CDs.

After spending much time as an advocate of the Meanjin music community through organising shows, event series and tours, running labels and managing bands under various guises, 4000 Records was created primarily to serve the artists of the local community. 

With an aim to foster creativity and provide a space for innovation and expression, the 4000 family is an inclusive and supportive unit. We’re honoured and humbled to work with some of our favourite musicians in an abundantly thriving scene whilst striving to be a conduit between those like-minded, independent artists and the teeming earholes of the masses and tastemakers alike.

Al frente de la compañía se encuentra David Taboada, el cual se animó a crear su propio proyecto empresarial tras décadas de estudio pero, al mismo tiempo, este profesional sabe que aprender nunca se acaba por lo que continúa formándose día tras día. Por eso, el objetivo de nuestra empresa especializada en organización de eventos en Lugo es desdibujar esa frontera haciendo atractiva la cultura e interesante el ocio.

Name: Festival 20·21
Description:
Festival 20·21 ijvert ervoor om via schitterende concerten en een uitstekende omkadering de publieksliefde voor recente en nieuwe muziek aan te wakkeren.

Jaarlijks presenteert Festival 20·21 een dertigtal concerten en activiteiten, tussen eind september en eind oktober. De concerten geven een beeld van de diversiteit van de muziek uit de 20e en 21e eeuw.

Elk festivalconcert heeft een sterke muzikale en inhoudelijke samenhang en vindt plaats op de meest geschikte locatie in Leuven (kerk, aula, schouwburg, STUK...). Een concert duurt gemiddeld 75', met uitzondering van de Transitconcerten die ongeveer een uur duren.

Het festival werkt graag en veel samen met de talrijke uitstekende musici en ensembles die Vlaanderen rijk is. Uiteraard passeren ook internationale gereputeerde musici en ensembles geregeld de revue.

De artistieke leiding voor de concerten met muziek uit de 20e eeuw is in handen van Pieter Bergé.
De zakelijke leiding en de artistiek invulling van Transit (muziek uit de 21e eeuw) wordt gestuurd door Maarten Beirens.

Name: École de musique l'Accroche Notes
Description:
La mission de l'École de musique l'Accroche Notes est d'offrir aux personnes de tous âges une diversité de cours de musique de qualité, en accord avec les meilleures pratiques actuelles en pédagogie musicale, favorisant l’épanouissement des personnes et le plaisir de jouer de la musique.

L’école de musique l’Accroche Notes a été créée par la Ville de Lévis en 1986, suite à la demande des citoyens qui souhaitaient obtenir sur leur territoire un enseignement musical varié. Depuis, l’Accroche Notes rend l’apprentissage de la musique accessible à tous et assure un rayonnement important de ses activités dans la communauté lévisienne. 

L’Accroche Notes est un organisme partenaire de la Ville de Lévis, ce qui signifie que son action et sa mission sont reconnues comme contributions essentielles à la communauté. 

Reconnue par le Ministère de la Culture et des Communications du Québec, et partenaire e la Ville de Lévis, l’Accroche Notes a la chance de pouvoir compter sur une solide équipe professorale composée de près de 30 professionnels diplômés en musique et actifs sur la scène musicale et/ou cumulant plusieurs années d’expérience en enseignement.

Au fil du temps, ce sont plusieurs milliers d’élèves qui ont franchi les portes de l’école pour y suivre une formation musicale. Plusieurs en ont fait une carrière, certains sont même revenus pour enseigner à leur tour, mais tous y ont acquis un bagage d’habiletés qui leur resteront toute la vie durant.

Grâce à la confiance et à l’investissement conjoint de la Ville de Lévis et du Ministère de la culture et des communications, l’école de musique l’Accroche Notes sera relocalisée en 2022 dans un tout nouveau bâtiment annexé au Centre culturel de Lévis. Ce nouvel emplacement qui sera construit de façon à respecter les besoins spécifiques à l’enseignement de la musique permettra à l’école de musique l’Accroche Notes de répondre adéquatement au besoin de la communauté lévisienne pour des cours de musique.

Description:
Piki launched the world’s first music prediction marketplace. Each contract is tied to the next 10 ratings a song receives on Piki. The better you are at reading the crowd, the more Piki Coins you earn—convertible into real-world stablecoins (USDC).

Think a song you superliked will resonate with others? Go long. If the contract costs 6 coins, and the song gets 7 or more likes out of 10, you profit.

Think a track you disliked is about to flop with others? Go short. If the contract costs 3 coins and the song racks up more than 3 dislikes, you win.

This is more than just a prediction game. It’s a new financial structure for music.

By enabling users to go both long and short on tracks, Piki introduces liquidity, price discovery, and market efficiency into a music space that’s historically lacked it. 

We believe the future of music isn’t just about passive listening.
It’s about active participation. It’s about crowd-sourced A&R.
It’s about building a market where every voice—and every bet—counts.

Piki is reimagining what it means to discover, rate, and invest in music.

Try the latest Piki features here: https://2xnem.app.link/pTQVufOVHUb

Condividiamo e sviluppiamo la metodologia delle Chiacchiere in Musica, una metodologia innovativa nel campo musicale e linguistico e uniamo le nostre competenze in un continuo confronto vivace e produttivo.
