Name: Classical Guitar Society of Victoria
Description:
The Classical Guitar Society of Victoria is a voluntary, not-for-profit organization incorporated in 2005.

CGSV aims is to bring together guitarists, teachers, composers and the listening public to provide enriching experiences for all, through a variety of guitar-related activities. 

Vision
"Melbourne and regional Victorian communities will have a healthy and sustained interest in and appreciation of classical guitar music, including listening, playing, studying, teaching and composing. The classical guitar will be an important cultural centrepiece for Victorian communities."

Mission
"The Classical Guitar Society of Victoria exists to promote the appreciation of and participation in classical guitar music. We will engage in activities that allow members and the public to hear good quality classical guitar music written, played or performed by local and visiting artists, whether amateur or professional. We will be an incubator for interest, appreciation performance and education relating to classical guitar music."

Name: Loose Club Edition
Description:
Since its inception in 1997, Loose Club has channeled their tireless passion for music into spreading electronic music culture and bringing freedom and creativity to artists and other professionals within the scene. Starting with a select handful of local talented artists and producers, including the likes of Rino Cerrone, Markantonio, Marco Carola, Gaetano Parisio, and Uto Karem, Loose Club quickly gained recognition and respect early on for the growth it brought to the Neapolitan techno scene.

Their efforts were soon recognized by international artists such as Ellen Allien, Richie Hawtin, Jeff Mills, Sven Vath, and Cisco Ferreira, just to name a few of the stars who found Loose Club to be the best Club Night in town. For artists and fans alike, Loose Club represented a community for ravers and clubbers to gather and celebrate the future sound of Detroit techno in an inclusive, supportive, and peaceful environment.

With the record labels ri’l:is, unri’li:s, and Loose Records under their umbrella, Loose Club has since gained traction not only as a pioneer within the techno genre, but a wellspring of resources for professionals of all kinds working within the industry. With experience crossing into every facet of music production, from studio tutorial products to managing publication rights, Loose Club has expanded to offer services in artist and record label management, music publishing, and neighboring rights, among others.

Discernment has led Loose Club to keep their roster tight, and the same priority on quality over quantity has guided their dedication to meeting the desires of their clients, regardless of the services they require. Operating on a groundwork of professionalism and keeping a client’s precise needs at the forefront along the way, Loose Club remains a devoted rebel, reliable and loyal to their people, all while finding new ways to generate income and exceed expectations for professionals and their devoted fanbase alike.

Name: The Best Music Company
Description: The Best Music Company is a full-service independent music publishing administrator

Name: Société de musique contemporaine du Québec (SMCQ)
Description:
With its concerts, its Homage Series, its Montreal/New Music International Festival (MNM), its youth-music programme, radio broadcasts, North American and European tours, a competition for composers, and more than twenty full-length recordings, the work of the SMCQ has resulted in a fertile breeding ground for new works of art, commissions, and masterful performances of contemporary music “classics”.

The Organization
Founded in 1966 by a group of prominent Montreal musicians and composers, including Wilfrid Pelletier, Jean Papineau-Couture, Serge Garant and Maryvonne Kendergian, the SMCQ has assumed a mandate since the beginning of its existence to promote contemporary music from both this country and abroad.

Managed by composers for composers, the SMCQ has been led by three different artistic directors to date: composers Serge Garant (1966-89), Gilles Tremblay (1986-88) and Walter Boudreau (since 1988).

The SMCQ was the force behind a number of major artistic events, on its own and in collaboration with a number of leading organizations involved with the creation of new art in Quebec, including the fields of dance (O Vertigo), opera (Chants Libres and l’Opéra de Montréal), “traditional” concert ensembles (The Orchestre symphonique de Montréal, McGill University’s Faculty of Music (Now Schulich School of Music), the Nouvel Ensemble Moderne, the Theatre la Chapelle, the Molinari quartet, and the Orchestre symphonique de Québec to name a few.

The organization has commissioned, premiered and recorded a number of works that are fundamental to the contemporary repertoire, by artists from our own nation and abroad. One unforgettable example is the Symphonie du Millénaire (Symphony of the Millenium), a collective work by nineteen composers performed for over 40,000 persons on the 3rd of June, 2000, at Saint Joseph’s Oratory in Montreal.

Name: GenMusic
Description:
GenMusic is an NFT collection for music fans and artists. First and foremost, we want to build a community to bring our collective love for music together. Enabling collaborations and creativity to flourish. 



Our long-term goal is to create an NFT marketplace dedicated to music. Where anyone can buy and sell their creations secured through the blockchain. Whether that’s samples, songs of complete albums. Enabling artists to monetize their creations directly with consumers.

Name: Virtu.Academy
Description:
Virtu.Academy was built to deliver conservatory quality, one-on-one music lessons to students around the world. Our online video platform connects students, of all ages, to the highest quality musicians from top music conservatories in the world, including Juilliard, The Manhattan School of Music, Paris Conservatory, and Oberlin. 

Our mission is to make high quality music lessons accessible to everyone, no matter their location or financial situation.

Name: Alieno Label
Description:
ALIENO (UFO RECORDS) è un nuovo tipo di casa discografica e label, fondata nel 2021 da artisti e manager con oltre 30 anni di track records di successi. La nostra missione è chiara; aiutare artisti e cantautori all'inizio della loro carriera, renderli pronti ad ottenere il massimo dalle loro canzoni e registrazioni nell'era digitale. 
Ecco perché offriamo il miglior supporto creativo e di formazione attraverso il nostro programma innovativo ARTIST ACCELERATOR, forniamo le risorse necessarie e lavoriamo duramente per massimizzare il valore di ogni singolo artista, garantendo che alla fine del percorso siano in grado di scendere in campo a giocare!
Non siamo una scuola, anche se offriamo formazione. Non siamo solo un editore musicale o un'etichetta discografica, anche se offriamo entrambi i servizi.
Siamo una nuova compagnia musicale. ALIENO è uno stile di vita, sappiamo di cosa gli artisti giovani hanno bisogno e lavoriamo per loro. Ci impegniamo per rendere la UFO RECORDS la migliore compagnia musicale per i giovani, che siano autori, cantautori, artisti e produttori sia per coloro che vogliono utilizzare la loro musica. UFO RECORDS & ALIENO LABEL La nuova compagnia musicale per artisti emergenti. ALIENI tra gli ALIENI.
ALIENO crede che il futuro della musica, sia nelle mani dei giovani che con la guida giusta, potranno superare le sfide e raggiungere il successo.

Name: Nora Collective AS
Description:
Nora Collective er et fullservice managementbyrå for artister, sportsprofiler og mediepersonligheter med ekstra lidenskap for faget sitt. Teamet i Nora Collective elsker å oppdage og dyrke talenter, enten vi finner de på en fotballbane, i et musikkstudio, med et kamera i hånden eller på et restaurantkjøkken.

Vårt mål er å få talenter til å realisere sitt fulle potensial, og vi er sikre på at langsiktig suksess nås ved å tenke stort og jobbe hardt over tid. Vår jobb er å lage de riktige strategiene og klekke ut de råeste ideene, så talentene kan fokusere på det de brenner for.

Nora Collective tilbyr også PR- og eventtjenester til mote- og livsstilsbrands.

Name: Dado Silva
Description:
O artista Dado Silva é um criador multifacetado que se notabiliza em várias áreas artísticas, com uma carreira que remonta a 1996.
Dado Silva
| Informação | Detalhes |
|---|---|
| Nascimento | 10 de outubro de 1981 |
| Nacionalidade | Brasileira |
| Ocupação | Escritor, Poeta, Músico, Cantor, Compositor |
| Atividade | Desde 1996 |
| Gêneros Notáveis | Música (variações, incluindo Funk - Rio de Janeiro), Ficção, Romance, Poesia |
Carreira e Obra
Dado Silva iniciou sua carreira em 1996 e se estabeleceu como um artista que transita entre a palavra escrita e a música.
Música
Como músico, cantor e compositor, Dado Silva possui um repertório que abrange diversos estilos, sendo notada sua presença em plataformas digitais de streaming e vídeo. Suas canções mais conhecidas incluem:
 * "Coisas da vida"
 * "Eu e Você"
 * "Nunca vou te abandonar meu filho"
 * "A Saudade"
 * "Deixa Rolar"
O artista demonstrou adaptação ao longo de sua trajetória, mantendo sua relevância desde a época da distribuição de discos físicos até a era do streaming.
Literatura e Poesia
Além da música, Dado Silva é um escritor e poeta ativo. Sua obra literária inclui títulos como:
 * Amor (Livro que se insere nas categorias de Amor, Romance e Poesia).
 * Técnicas e Estratégias para Artista Independente (Livro com foco na gestão de carreira artística).
Ele publica seus trabalhos em categorias como Ficção, Romance e Poesia, evidenciando uma expressão artística que se manifesta tanto por meio de melodias quanto pela palavra escrita.
Presença Digital
Dado Silva é amplamente distribuído em plataformas digitais, o que reflete sua adaptação e o foco em tornar sua arte acessível ao público global. Seu trabalho pode ser encontrado em:
 * YouTube
 * Spotify
 * Deezer
 * Apple Music / iTunes
 * SoundCloud
 * Genius e Vagalume (para letras e insights de suas músicas)
 * Palco MP3
 * Clube de Autores (para seus livros)
 * Google play story 
 * KDP Amazon

Name: WVUM 90.5 FM "The Voice"
Description:
WVUM 90.5 FM is the award-winning student-run radio station of the University of Miami. WVUM is a non-commercial alternative and electronic music station broadcasting from Coral Gables, Florida. WVUM broadcasts over-the-air to Greater Miami and streams worldwide via Internet radio.

WVUM’s primary focus is on broadcasting alternative music for Miami, as well as news, public affairs programming and Hurricane sports coverage.  WVUM reaches a potential listenership of 2.2 million people, but listenership is estimated to be over 65,000 every week.

Keep it locked to "The Voice."

Name: Aalborg Symfoniorkester
Description: The Aalborg Symphony Orchestra was founded in 1943 and since then has had the following principal conductors: Jens Schrøder (1943-79), Janos Fürst (1980-83), Peter Erös (1983-89), Owain Arwel Hughes (1995-99), and in 1999 Moshe Atzmon who was succeeded in 2005 by Matthias Aeschbacher. Throughout the period 1959-81 Alf Sjøen was also permanently engaged as a conductor. Many world-famous soloists have appeared with the orchestra, including Anne-Sophie Mutter, Yehudi Menuhin, Birgit Nilsson, Jean-Pierre Rampal, Victor Borge, Pierre Fournier, Paul Tortelier, Kyung-Wha Chung, José Carreras, David and Igor Oistrakh, and Kiri Te Kanawa. The Aalborg Symphony Orchestra has 65 full-time musicians – many of whom are also music teachers at educational institutions in the region. The Aalborg Symphony Orchestra meets the musical requirements of northern Jutland in many areas, first and foremost with large symphonic concerts in the Aalborg Hall and around the region. The orchestra also plays an important role as an opera and ballet orchestra at guest performances by the Royal Danish Opera and Ballet and the Danish National Opera in Århus. The youngest music audiences are catered for with group concerts at schools and children’s and family concerts at the ‘Symphony’ hall and in the Aalborg Hall. The Aalborg Symphony Orchestra has toured all over Denmark, including Copenhagen, and its tours abroad have included Roubaix in France and Montreux in Switzerland. The orchestra has made several CD recordings, mainly of Danish music, but also of works by Siegfried Wagner and George Gershwin, and first recordings of Carl Nielsen’s theatre music.

The Academy is a proud promoter of classical music as well as concerts, courses of superior studies, seminars, conferences, exhibitions, publications, recordings and audiovisuals in order to provide in depth study, diffusion and teaching of the Science-Art of Euphony.

Name: Beleef Klassiek
Description:
The Bach Choir of the Netherlands and The Bach Orchestra of the Netherlands.
Throughout the Netherlands, this group performs at more than 100concerts per year. 
The concert series are subdivided into concert tours: e.g. Händel’s Messiah, Bach’s St Matthew Passion, Mozart’s Requiem, Opera Classic's etc. etc.. Concerts are given in The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam, the Grote Kerk in The Hague, the Laurenskerk in Rotterdam, the Martinikerk in Groningen, but also in smaller churches in country towns.  
Sold out concerts and full churches have triggered conductor Pieter Jan Leusink to increase the level of the musicians and singers. By doing so, he can offer the audience a broader repertoire. Due to the high level of performance and a total of 120.000 concert-goers per year, this concert organization of classical music has become one of the biggest in the Netherlands

The organization's mission is to inspire the world through the power of children's voices, and One Voice Children's Choir serves as the flagship ambassador program. Name: Prague Symphony Orchestra
Description: The Prague Symphony Orchestra was founded in the autumn of 1934 by the conductor Rudolf Pekárek. He defined the new ensemble’s fields of activity with the words Film-Opera-Koncert, and such the abbreviation FOK became part of the orchestra’s title. By recording music for the majority of Czech films in the 1930s and performing regularly in live broadcasts on the Czechoslovak Radio, the FOK Orchestra made a name for itself and its economic existence was assured. This allowed the gradual development of regular concerts, whose main promoter from the very beginning was Dr. Václav Smetáček.

Name: FanLabel
Description:
We are a music gamification platform owned in part by the major record labels that enables music fans to enjoy great music and fun contests as they operate their own fantasy record label in the FanLabel app. Players pick the songs they think will rise on the contest charts and shoot for the top spot on the leaderboards. Ultimately, fans become promoters and influencers as they socially share and support the songs and artists they've signed to their virtual label.

Our goal is to enable fans to engage more deeply with their favorite artists and to discover brand new music. At the same time, we support the record labels and artists in understanding the preferences and opinions of listeners so that they can be more effective in supporting artist promotion and monetization.

Name: Dana Al Fardan
Description:
Drawing from the transcendental power and potency of music—whether classical compositions or contemporary songwriting—Dana articulates otherworldly auditory landscapes for empowerment and cultural preservation. 

With a number one European album and a sold-out West End theatre production – Dana’s ability to translate her Middle Eastern heritage on a global platform offers a multi-dimensional approach to representation.

Having featured on the cover of Harper’s Bazaar and Grazia, Dana stands as an agent for change for Middle Eastern women across the world. Unpacking subjects like the female gaze in the arts during talks at key institutions, Dana is also the Cultural Ambassador for the Qatari Philharmonic Orchestra and has composed music for Hope For Gaza. 

Dana’s expansive approach to creativity doubles up as a community-led conduit for healing.

Name: Jysk Musikteater, Silkeborg
Description:
Jysk Musikteaters faciliteter og beliggenheden i Silkeborg på den gamle Papirfabrik er enestående. 

Det samme er stemningen og atmosfæren i både teatersal, musiksal og restaurant. 

Siden 2004 har huset sat den kulturelle dagsorden i byen med masser af musik, teater og underholdning.

Men scenen er også jeres. Fra et frokostmøde med få deltagere, en faglig konference med masser af gæster eller det helt store brag med musik og gastronomi for kunder og forretningsforbindelser. 

Mulighederne er mange. Lad os sammen med dig skræddersy dit arrangement. Vi hjælper gerne med lokale icebreakers, hvis du ønsker "kant" på dit arrangement.

Vi har lokaler som er perfekte fra 10pers. og op til 750pers.

Hvis du ønsker at se vores faciliteter eller indhente et spændende oplæg er du meget velkommen til at kontakte vores Restaurantchef Klaus Nielsen på telefon 3080 6973 eller på klaus@jmts.dk

Name: Sage Music
Description:
Sage Music school’s unique and innovative curriculum is derived from traditional music school pedagogy combined with tenets from psychology, holistic approaches to health and well-being, and communal creativity. Sage Music focuses on teaching the skills that enable musicians to play with confidence and ease. The school’s educational core encompasses proper instrument mechanics, proper body usage (biomechanics and kinesiology), as well as the best methods for learning and practicing.

Sage Music was founded in 2012 by critically acclaimed artist and MTNA nationally- certified teacher of music Jason Sagebiel, The school offers courses in composition, theory, and performance for guitar, piano, voice, violin, and cello.
Faculty

Sage Music School has a core faculty of eight instructors that have music performance degrees, music education degrees, and have been trained in founder Jason Sagebiel’s unique and progressive approaches to music education.
Students

Sage Music school was designed to facilitate learning and inspire creativity. This is why the space is open, bright and modern. There are two acoustically sound-treated and sonically ventilated practice rooms, each equipped with pianos, and a special piano-teaching room with a Steinway. So whether you are practicing the classic Beethoven or something a bit more modern like Beyonce, practicing solo, in a group or practicing an ensemble performance, you have found the right school for you. To learn more, click here.

Name: Katakat
Description: Katakat is een sprankelend muziekduo dat uitsluitend eigen songs speelt. Met gitaren, ukelele, accordeon, oer-trommel en harmonieuze samenzang brengen ze hun afwisselend ingetogen en uitbundige liedjes vanuit het hart. “Een aanrader voor danslustige luistervinken”.

Name: Six Degrees Records
Description:
Six Degrees Records produces and markets accessible, genre-bending records that explore world music traditions, modern dance grooves, electronic music, and overlooked pop gems.  The label’s catchphrase, “everything is closer than you think,” is a real reflection of Six Degrees’ commitment to different styles of music that appeal to a curious and increasingly sizable audience. 

Six Degrees’ reputation – innovative, independent, and intelligent – is well-earned. The label has made its mark, both in the recording industry, and even more notably, among the artists themselves.  Six Degrees’ respect for its musicians is evident in every step of the process; as in little things like the care taken in the visual design of each of the label’s unique and readily-identifiable digipaks; and in the biggest things, like the label’s refusal to accept musical pigeonholes. Whether it’s the lush orchestral Bollywood chill out sessions by Bombay Dub Orchestra or the songs of Brazil’s answer to Beck, Lenine, Six Degrees makes records because the music demands it, not the marketplace.

Name: Guitar Gavel
Description: Guitar Gavel is a new auction platform uniting musicians, enthusiasts, and collectors to help them find the instruments and gear they've been searching for.

Name: Prophon Bulgaria
Description:
Prophon is a non-profit organization for collective management of neighboring music rights. It is established to protect and manage the rights of producers and performing artists. Prophon is part of the International Performance Rights Committee of the International Federation of the Phonographic Industry (IFPI) and part of Societies' Council for the Collective Management of Performers' Rights (SCAPR). 

The organization manages the biggest music catalog in Bulgaria, including the repertoire of the four major record companies (Universal Music Group, Sony Music Entertainment, EMI and Warner Music Group), as well as more than 30 000 independent local and foreign labels, and also almost 300 of the most popular Bulgarian and international artists, bands, record and music companies.

Name: So'lano Music Group Inc
Description:
So’lano Music Group Inc. (So’lano Music) is the fastest growing music production house, songwriting collective, Label and publishing company in Canada. Founded in 2009 in the forest city of London, Ontario, So’lano Music was originally formed as a music production company but felt the initiative to quickly expand the team through adding music publishing and signing of new songwriters and producers. This promising music company aims to create top quality music for Artists, Film, Television, Radio, Commercials and Video games all around the globe.

As a dynamic music production company, the team constantly works into bringing new, fresh and creative approach to the market. We work with young and talented songwriters, producers and artists in a variety of immensely popular genres including Pop, Pop/Rock, R&B, Hip Hop, Rap and Dance music. So’lano Music’s ultimate goal is to its musical masterpieces to Film, Television and Major Label Artists of today.

So’lano Music takes pride in its writer-singer relationship as producers and writers always consider the artists they are writing for. Through this unique process, the writers develop lyrics that are exclusive, more personalized and in tuned with the artist. With passion, expertise and ultimate love for music, the talents of So’lano Music Group Inc continue to step up from the rest of the industry players today.

Name: Packaged Sounds Group
Description:
Packaged Sounds Group is a Vinyl manufacturing company with pressing facilities in the UK and Poland. Our pressing plants specialise in the manufacture of Vinyl, CD, Print and Packaging as well as a complete UK, EU & US Distribution & Logistics capability. This is supported by an in-house project management team comprising studio engineers, graphic artists, vinyl technologists, print and packaging specialists and local account management and support staff in the UK, US, German and Austrian markets. 

Products We Produce:
• Vinyl Pressing in UK and EU (all formats including Picture/Zoetrope Disc)
• Vinyl Box Sets / Bespoke Design Packaging Concepts
• Packaging Design & Print
• Off the shelf solutions for Digipaks, Slipcases & Trays
• CD Replication (Pressing) + Short run CD-R, and DVD-R Duplication
• Blu-ray & DVD Duplication & Replication
• Collateral Print for Inserts, Posters & Booklets
• Bespoke Printed Merchandise
• Promotional Printed Products

Services We Offer:
• Storage & Inventory Management
• Direct Pre-Order & Distribution Shipments
• Web based Order Processing (Amazon Integration)
• Packing Services / Hand Fulfilment

Name: SMU Samba Masala
Description:
Incepted in 2004, Singapore Management University’s (SMU) resident Afro-Brazillian percussion band began as a humble dhol percussion group. Ever since, Samba Masala has taken on both local and international stages and wowed audiences to establish itself as an esteemed batucada.

Under the tutelage of Bryan Lee, Eddy Hamid, and Rajay Singh, one of Singapore’s leading percussionists, Samba Masala has enthralled audiences worldwide in the United States, United Kingdom and Germany. The prepossessing reputation of Samba Masala assures endless enthusiasm, passionate performances and bold beats.

The unique blend of dynamic beats and vibrant stage performances promises audiences of nothing short the best in performing arts. Be it pulsating rhythms or smooth Latin grooves, Samba Masala’s distinctive nature of fusion Asian/Brazilian percussion is sure to meet and exceed expectations with its inimitable music, unparalleled style and sheer showmanship.

So come join in the music, and let us bring the celebration to you.

Name: Tailored Communication Gbr
Description:
Tailored Communication is an independent music communication agency, based in Berlin since 2006, but founded in London at the turn of the millennium. Created and run by Melissa Taylor, an unparalleled electronic music specialist, consultant, artist manager and publicist.

At Tailored we have dedicated ourselves to working with independent labels and artists across a wide range of electronic music. We design individual campaigns for artists and labels, as well as selected events, like-minded brands and music-led tech projects, as well as books, documentaries and films.

Tailored services a global network of print press and quality online, covering club promo to the world's more discerning DJs, a comprehensive network of FM and online radio programmes, specialist TV, and leading industry creatives.

Tailored offers business and artist management, from long-term strategy and planning, creative and industry connections, to simply getting your house in order and future proofing your strategy. Marketing strategy for labels, artists and music-led brands. Our composers and producers are available for bespoke remixes and commissions. We also offer music consulting and artist liaison for film, TV and brands.

We work with artists at all stages of their careers, and offer supportive pricing to self-releasing and historically disenfranchised members of the music community. We will work only on events that are gender positive, ethnically diverse and prioritise booking local talent, alongside sustainability & community.

As stewards of creativity, Tailored recognises the duty of care we owe all artists, music and our projects. Our goal is that artists are able to thrive; we support the creation of a new music ecosystem founded on egalitarian principles and cooperation, rejecting exploitation and cynical value extraction, supporting ethical and conscious consumption.

Name: I CARE IF YOU LISTEN
Description:
I CARE IF YOU LISTEN (ICIYL) is an award-winning multimedia hub for living music creators. Founded in December 2010 by Thomas Deneuville, ICIYL was born from a desire to create a dedicated space for talking about contemporary classical music. Through a unique blend of music criticism, promotional features, and multimedia content, ICIYL strives to be a leading advocate for artists who have been historically underrepresented or marginalized in Western classical music by highlighting equitable programming, facilitating challenging conversations, cultivating a safe platform, and creating educational resources.

After 10 years of operation as an all-volunteer enterprise, I CARE IF YOU LISTEN was acquired by American Composers Forum (ACF) in September 2020. Amanda Cook, Editor-in-Chief since 2017, continues to serve in that role as a member of the ACF staff. Editorial decisions are made at the discretion of the Editor-in-Chief, in alignment with ACF’s organizational priorities. Joining with ACF enables ICIYL to equitably pay its contributors and staff while developing a platform that furthers ICIYL and ACF’s shared goals.

Name: Kammerphilharmonie Graubünden
Description: Seit mehr als 35 Jahren begeistert die Kammerphilharmonie Graubünden ihr Publikum nicht nur im Heimatkanton, sondern bis weit über dessen Grenzen hinaus. Seit seiner Gründung 1989 hat das Berufsorchester sein Repertoire stetig erweitert und spielt nun zwischen 50 und 60 Konzerte pro Saison – sowohl in der Stadt als auch auf dem Land, auf Dorfplätzen, in Kirchen oder Tanzlokalen. Auch bedeutende Projekte wie die «Festspiele im Schloss» in Haldenstein oder das Festival «tuns contemporans» – bei dem vor allem Neue Musik aus dem Kanton Graubünden und aus der Schweiz aufgeführt und gefördert wird – gehören zum Programm des Orchesters. Eine Erfolgsgeschichte sind zudem die Vermittlungskonzerte wie zum Beispiel das Familienkonzert «Der Orchesterclown», das «Side by Side»-Projekt oder die erst kürzlich ins Leben gerufene Chorwoche Chur. Abgerundet werden die Tätigkeiten durch Tourneen im Sommer und Winter sowie die äusserst beliebte Filmmusiktournee, die jedes Jahr stattfinden. Seit 2016 wird die Kammerphilharmonie vom Schweizer Dirigenten Philippe Bach dirigiert. Unter seiner Leitung hat die Kammerphilharmonie in den vergangenen Jahren mit renommierten Künstler*innen aus dem In- und Ausland zusammengearbeitet.

Name: edim
Description:
L'EDIM est une école associative de musiques actuelles reconnue par le ministère de la Culture implantée sur trois sites en Ile-de-France (Paris, Cachan et Antony). 
Fondée en 1983 par Daniel Beaussier, directeur artistique, elle forme des musiciens jeunes, amateurs et professionnels, produit concerts, festivals et créations, edite musique et cahiers pédagogiques... et bien plus encore, toujours au service de sa devise : "Il faut qu'ça sonne !".
 L'EDIM compte aujourd'hui 60 enseignants et plus de 850 élèves réguliers, 120 cours collectifs dont orchestres et une programmation de 100 évènements par saison.

Name: Loozr
Description: It enables users to invest in, promote, earn, listen to, and enjoy music and content from their favourite artists, who have tokenized their individual Profile alongside each Song on the platform.

Name: The Soundery
Description:
The Soundery has been crafting original music and sound design for bold clients since 2017. We work closely with brands, agencies and creatives from around the world to tell stories, elevate visuals and bring the vibe through reactive music and sound.

A few of the brands we’ve worked with: Intel, Ebay, Wix, Fiverr, Asus, Pepsi, Tylko, Häagen-Dazs, DJI, Universal Production Music, Hive Music, West One Music Group and more.

Got a project cooking? Drop us a line and let’s chat about making some audio-visual magic!

Name: Mucine
Description:
La Asociación Colombiana de Compositores de Música para Cine (Mucine) vela por la dignificación y visibilización del compositor de música para cine y medios audiovisuales. 

Su misión es también conectar a los compositores que desean aportar a la consolidación y prestigio de la profesión de la música para cine en Colombia de forma colectiva y solidaria, con el fin de mejorar las condiciones del ejercicio profesional.

Name: Composer
Description: Compose piano and soundtrackmusic !

Name: Live Music Club
Description: Nato nel 1997 a Trezzo sull'Adda come offerta alternativa di intrattenimento in provincia di Milano, il Live Club è oggi considerato dalla stampa e dagli addetti del settore la Mecca della musica dal vivo, i clienti lo acclamano come uno dei migliori club in Italia. Con una programmazione a 360 gradi e una struttura  impareggiabile per la proposta di musica dal vivo, il Live Club propone artisti e djs di fama nazionale ed internazionale, insieme alle storiche tribute bands, offrendo il meglio della musica ROCK, REGGAE, METAL, ELETTRONICA, HIP HOP.

Name: Yupangco Music Academy
Description: A community of students and certified music teachers working closely together to explore the realms of expression, imagination & musical creation.

Name: Composers and Authors Society of Hong Kong
Description:
Composers and Authors Society of Hong Kong (C.A.S.H.) was incorporated in Hong Kong on 23 September 1977 under the Companies Ordinance.

Objective 
Administer and enforce collectively the rights of composers and authors of musical works subsisting under the copyright law of Hong Kong SAR. CASH at present controls the copyright of musical works of over 1.7 million local Members and Members from more than 80 overseas affiliated Societies. 
 
Protect and administer the rights of its Members in more than 130 countries/territories throughout the world by means of reciprocal representation agreements with overseas Societies.

Name: TourManager
Description: TourManager allows musicians to seamlessly manage their touring schedule across multiple tours, locations and groups.

Name: Codabow International
Description:
CodaBow is the trusted partner for generations of players the world over. For every style, station and aspiration, our master makers have pioneered an unsurpassed design.

From the beginning, our dream was to unite the time-honored traditions of bow-making with the future of advanced materials to pioneer a family of bows unsurpassed in their performance and uncompromising in their beauty. We wanted our bows to delight serious players at all levels and to deliver unrivaled performance value.

Name: Levykauppa Äx
Description: Undeniably the best record store in Finland

Name: Entandem
Description: A joint venture between Re:Sound and SOCAN, created to simplify the licensing process so you can play all the music you want in your business legally and ethically, ensuring that those who made the music are compensated.

Name: BLOOM
Description:
BLOOM è un’agenzia boutique che si occupa di Marketing, Ufficio Stampa & Pr e Comunicazione. Operativi dal 2022 nel mondo della musica e non solo, concretizziamo visioni e progettualità in contenuti ed esperienze reali per il tuo progetto musicale e per la tua attività. 

Come lo facciamo? Creando collaborazioni trasversali in cui musica e creatività diventano mezzi fondamentali per comunicare messaggi, costruire connessioni virtuose e ottenere posizionamenti strategici. 

Ultimo, ma non meno importante, crediamo fortemente nel valore della sostenibilità: grazie alle nostre iniziative ci impegniamo ad avere un impatto non solo sui progetti con cui lavoriamo, ma anche da un punto di vista ambientale e sociale. 

Visita il nostro profilo Instagram per scoprire di cosa ci occupiamo e i progetti a cui abbiamo lavorato!

BLOOM: Non servono numeri, servono idee.

Name: Aux 33 Tours
Description:
Le magasin Aux 33 Tours a ouvert ses portes le 1er avril 2007 au coeur du Plateau Mont-Royal à Montréal.

La vente de disques vinyles, neufs comme usagés, est la spécialité de la maison. Aucun genre ne nous échappe: que vous recherchiez du jazz, du rock, du classique ou du hip-hop, nous avons beaucoup de choix. La majorité de notre espace est consacré au vinyle et vous y retrouverez plusieurs dizaines de milliers de disques en stock, dont plusieurs milliers de titres neufs. Notre populaire section "Nouveaux Arrivages" est rafraichie plusieurs fois par semaine avec plusieurs centaines de disques.

----


Aux 33 Tours officially opened on April 1st 2007 in the heart of the Plateau Mont-Royal in Montreal.

Selling both used and new LPs is our specialty and we cover all genres: whether you are looking for jazz, rock, classical or hip-hop, we have plenty of choice. Most of our space is dedicated to vinyl records and you will find thousands upon thousands of new and used LP's on the floor, including the biggest selection of new titles in town. Our popular New Arrivals section is refreshed many times a week with hundreds of new titles.

Name: golden lotus studio | an online home for songwriters
Description:
golden lotus studio was established as an online community in 2018 by Gary Grundei to fill a need for composers and songwriters of all walks of life and experience and training and styles to be able to support each other in their creativity and growth. There’s a magic that can happen when you put creativity, growth, authenticity, generosity, and community all together in one virtual environment.

Courses include Theory Toolkit, Compose Yourself, Album Mastermind, and more.

Community opportunities include Friday Afternoon Song Club and our virtual Open Mic Night.

Name: Emerald City Band
Description:
As a corporate and special event band, Emerald City burst onto the Dallas music scene in 1983 and never looked back. Motion, Movement, and Energy are three words that best describe this 13 piece, 3 horn section super group that electrifies every audience with a combination of high energy dance songs from the past with the hits of today.

Emerald City Band has performed for President and Mrs. Bush at the White House twice, Ford Motor Company, Southwest Airlines, Microsoft, Super Bowl XLV, Apple and American Airlines to name a few.

This one-of-kind party band, averages more than 300 performances a year. The Dallas Morning News, D Magazine, Knot Magazine, and AACWP voted Emerald City as “Entertainers of the Year”.

Emerald City’s ability to entertain is only rivaled by their ability to get the audience up on the dance floor. This super group has taken their energy all over the world, from Dallas to Houston, New York, Europe, and South America. Living up to its reputation of being one of the best live bands, Emerald City Band takes the audience to a higher level at every performance.

Emerald City Band has shared the stage with such artists as Martina McBride, Michael McDonald, Huey Lewis and the News, Justin Timberlake, Garth Brooks, Mariah Carey, Dan Aykroyd, Sinbad, and the list goes on and on.

Through the years, ECB has served as the wedding band for many celebrity weddings including Dallas Cowboys Hall-of-Famer Emmitt Smith, Dallas Mavericks owner Mark Cuban, Actress Angie Harmon, as well as some well-known celebrities we can’t mention in public (see our Wedding Band page for more information about weddings).

THE HOUSE BAND OF DALLAS
As the Mayor of Dallas said at a recent 2015 wedding, “Emerald City is THE House Band of Dallas.” For over 30 years Emerald City has been performing for some of the most high profile events, weddings and corporations.

Contact ECB at (972) 416-2019 for your next corporate event, civic event, wedding, or party.

Name: Japor
Description: I am a brand new band. I started in August 2012. I produce and record entirely my own singles. I have many live raw unedited music. I am mainly alternative, country, pop, punk, and rock orientated. My music is individual, original, and unique. You can buy my singles at my store website - TuneCore. Also visit my other websites at Facebook, Myspace, Twitter, and YouTube.

Name: The Beehive
Description:
Founded in 2016, The Beehive LA collaborates directly with artists to ensure a seamless transition from the rehearsal studio to their live musical performances. 

We can provide all aspects of your vision from band and arrangements, to crew and logistics, and even end-to-end production.

Our Tour Directors and Music Directors always bring unique and effective ideas that are guaranteed to suit your specific needs and budgets.

"We noticed a hole in the touring industry after witnessing the constant overwhelm and stress experienced by managers dealing with the moving parts that go into having a successful tour. We envisioned a company that could simplify the transition from rehearsing to performing live music for everyone involved. We started The Beehive in 2016 with a clear mission: to make the touring industry more efficient and enjoyable. From the band and arrangements to the crew and logistics, The Beehive takes pride in bringing the best people together to create an amazing show. Our commitment to tailor each of our clients’ tours to their specific needs and budgets, meticulous attention to detail, and aligning harmonious personalities has made us a one of a kind company that our clients love to be a part of."

– Vinnie & Jonny

Name: Filharmonia Hungary
Description:
Nationwide, 300.000 people participate on our concerts yearly, among which 200.000 are school aged.

Covering almost the whole country, we organize 1400 concerts at 250 different locations annually.

Being one of the driving forces of classical music life in Hungary, in 2013, we gave thousands of artists (109 ensembles and 329 soloists) the opportunity to perform in our concerts.

Name: golden lotus studio | an online home for songwriters
Description:
golden lotus studio was established as an online community in 2018 by Gary Grundei to fill a need for composers and songwriters of all walks of life and experience and training and styles to be able to support each other in their creativity and growth. There’s a magic that can happen when you put creativity, growth, authenticity, generosity, and community all together in one virtual environment.

Courses include Theory Toolkit, Compose Yourself, Album Mastermind, and more.

Community opportunities include Friday Afternoon Song Club and our virtual Open Mic Night.

Name: Bossy Music Pty Ltd
Description: Bossy Music is one of Australia's leading music PR & management companies.  Based in Sydney, Australia, Bossy looks after Australian PR campaigns for Flume, Lorde, Gotye, Chet Faker, the Laneway Festival and many others.  Bossy's management clients include J Award winner D.D Dumbo and ARIA winners Art vs Science.

Name: Wisconsin School Music Association
Description:
Our Mission:

To ensure that all students have opportunities which encourage lifelong involvement in music, Wisconsin School Music Association will provide statewide music programming activities, offer leadership and support for school music programs, and advance music as an integral part of the school curriculum and community life.

Name: Kammerphilharmonie Graubünden
Description: Seit mehr als 35 Jahren begeistert die Kammerphilharmonie Graubünden ihr Publikum nicht nur im Heimatkanton, sondern bis weit über dessen Grenzen hinaus. Seit seiner Gründung 1989 hat das Berufsorchester sein Repertoire stetig erweitert und spielt nun zwischen 50 und 60 Konzerte pro Saison – sowohl in der Stadt als auch auf dem Land, auf Dorfplätzen, in Kirchen oder Tanzlokalen. Auch bedeutende Projekte wie die «Festspiele im Schloss» in Haldenstein oder das Festival «tuns contemporans» – bei dem vor allem Neue Musik aus dem Kanton Graubünden und aus der Schweiz aufgeführt und gefördert wird – gehören zum Programm des Orchesters. Eine Erfolgsgeschichte sind zudem die Vermittlungskonzerte wie zum Beispiel das Familienkonzert «Der Orchesterclown», das «Side by Side»-Projekt oder die erst kürzlich ins Leben gerufene Chorwoche Chur. Abgerundet werden die Tätigkeiten durch Tourneen im Sommer und Winter sowie die äusserst beliebte Filmmusiktournee, die jedes Jahr stattfinden. Seit 2016 wird die Kammerphilharmonie vom Schweizer Dirigenten Philippe Bach dirigiert. Unter seiner Leitung hat die Kammerphilharmonie in den vergangenen Jahren mit renommierten Künstler*innen aus dem In- und Ausland zusammengearbeitet.

Name: Big Slap
Description:
Sydsveriges största housefestival – Big Slap i Pildammsparken i Malmö. 
En folkfest med kärlek och gemenskap och flera världsstjärnor som gjort det till ett Mecka för housefrälsta!
Festivalen på Tallriken i Pildammsparken vilken är en unik cirkulär plats omgiven av höga, vackra träd mitt i centrala Malmö.
Målet är att överträffa varje besökares förväntningar genom att bjuda på en upplevelse utöver det vanliga i en unik miljö med många sittplatser, stort matutbud samt extrem produktion i form av ljud, ljus, kolsyra, konfetti, pyroteknik, raketer, enorma LED-väggar och mycket mer. Listan kan göras hur lång som helst.

Name: Helemaal Koekoek
Description:
Helemaal Koekoek is een erkend entertainmentbedrijf met een kwaliteitslabel voor feestmuziek. Als gespecialiseerd bureau kan je bij ons terecht voor het boeken van de beste nationale én internationale artiesten binnen het après-ski, carnavals- en ambiancesegment.

Daarnaast zijn we met onze subdivisies een one-stop-shop in de entertainmentindustrie. Zo hebben we een eigen platenlabel en productiehuis, een afdeling content creation en een divisie voor eventorganisatie en -ondersteuning.

Name: Filharmonia Hungary
Description:
Nationwide, 300.000 people participate on our concerts yearly, among which 200.000 are school aged.

Covering almost the whole country, we organize 1400 concerts at 250 different locations annually.

Being one of the driving forces of classical music life in Hungary, in 2013, we gave thousands of artists (109 ensembles and 329 soloists) the opportunity to perform in our concerts.

Name: Poppodium de Meester
Description: Poppodium de Meester is hét poppodium van Almere.

Name: ISINA Music
Description:
The ISINA Music Academy is an all-expense paid mentorship program providing talented individuals from around the world with 6-week full-time music education experiences led by the most accomplished experts in the industry, including Walter Afanasieff, Kenny G, Kenny “Babyface” Edmonds, Humberto Gatica and Frank Gambale to name a few. 
 
Upon completion of ISINA, the mentors will select applicant(s) who will receive a record deal and worldwide music distribution by Bungalo/Universal Music Group Distribution.

Name: CARRANGA PACHANGA Y SON - EVENTOS EMPRESARIALES
Description:
Empresa de Eventos con música autóctona Colombiana(campesina, Tropical, Llanera y Vallenato en Guitarra).

Tiene una trayectoria de 8 años en la Ciudad de Bogotá, sus cinco integrantes, hijos de la tierra boyacense; de los municipios de Covarachia y Chiscas, y son residentes desde hace más de 30 años en la ciudad de Bogota.
La agrupación fue nominada y Galardonada con el Premio Gacetas de Colombia para Los mejores de Nuestro Pais 2014-2015 logrando el mayor reconocimiento a nivel nacional por parte de la gente.

En su Trayectoria ha tenido la oportunidad de presentarse en escenarios de Gran público con la invitación al programa del SHOW DE LAS ESTRELLAS de Jorge Barón Televisión, a la Sección de EsKape del Canal CityTV y en el programa EN LAS MAÑANAS CON UNO del CANAL UNO.

Name: Muziek Voor Ieder Kind
Description:
Muziek Voor Ieder Kind is een muziekschool voor alle kinderen in Utrecht. We bieden muzieklessen aan voor kinderen van 2 tot 18 jaar. We geven les in het Centrum, Utrecht-Oost, Wittevrouwen, Kanaleneiland, Hoograven en Oog in Al.

Bij ons kun je op de volgende instrumenten les krijgen: viool, gitaar, piano, zang, blokfluit, dwarsfluit

Daarnaast bieden we verschillende groepscursussen aan: Muziek voor peuters, Muziekavontuur, Instrumentale Verkenning, Muziekwerkplaats, Zanggroep en Vocals.

Heb je een U-pas? Hiermee kun je een jaar lang muziekles krijgen!

Wil je kennis maken met onze enthousiaste docenten? Kom dan een proefles volgen. Schrijf je direct in via onze website!

Name: EVRST Music
Description:
EVRST Music is a creative music production company based in the Netherlands, specializing in immersive soundtracks and audio solutions for theme parks, attractions, and themed entertainment experiences. Founded by composer Bastiaan de Waard, EVRST transforms stories into sound by combining musical artistry with cutting-edge audio technology. We create original compositions, rich sound design, and high-quality audio production tailored to the unique identity of each attraction, ranging from dark rides and walkthroughs to roller coasters, VR and themed environments.

Our team offers full-service production: from initial creative concepting to orchestration, recording, mixing (including Dolby Atmos and 22.2 surround), mastering, and on-site implementation. We also provide show control integration through EVRST Engineering, our in-house technical division powering synchronized playback, lighting, animatronics and special effects via our proprietary ShowScript system.

EVRST has delivered original music and complete audio experiences for a growing number of high-profile projects, including Avonturenpark Hellendoorn (RidderStrijd, Screams, Rioolrat), De Waarbeek (DinoWorld), Hof van Eckberge (Novo Mundo), and the upcoming Entia – World of Adventure. Our soundtracks help build lasting emotional connections between guests and the stories they’re experiencing.

At EVRST, we believe themed entertainment deserves music and sound that go beyond background audio. We create sonic worlds that immerse, inspire, and stay with you long after the ride ends. Let us bring your next adventure to life, through sound that tells your story.

Name: BOOST MGMT
Description: Criado em 2017, BOOST MGMT é uma empresa que gerencia a carreira de artistas do segmento da música eletrônica no Brasil. Atualmente seu cast é composto por Cat Dealers, KVSH, Felguk, JØRD e Evokings.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: AAA Records
Description: Established in 2010 in Auckland New Zealand, AAA Records represents artists with a dedicated team who take great pleasure in 'Empowering Creativity'.

Name: DMV Music Alliance
Description:
Founded by DMV area music professionals FOR area music professionals, the DMV Music Alliance is a grassroots, non-profit organization dedicated to bringing together the organizations and individuals from all facets of the regional music ecosystem, all genres, and all communities across the DMV, as well as the services and resources needed to help grow the careers of our area musicians and industry professionals.

Initiatives incorporate community partnerships, research, networking and professional development, business development, financial resources, and easier, quicker access to the information and tools they need to succeed – all at no cost – so they can spend more time and resources on their passion for creating the music, shows, and other components of the music industry.

Services include:

Promotional Opportunities
A Fully User-Managed Web Portal
Networking and Professional Development
Community Partnerships
Community Outreach
Financial Resources

Name: Collectif de la Cité
Description:
Le Collectif de la Cité, ce sont des violonistes, altistes et violoncellistes professionnels, versatiles et amoureux de musique de chambre qui souhaitent embellir vos moments de leur musique. Nos musiciens partagent passion et complicité afin d'offrir un service ultra personnalisé et de rendre votre événement unique! Ce que nous aimons par dessus tout? Les mariages, les soirées festives, les concerts intimes, les célébrations apaisantes et les enregistrements en studio. En bref, nous aimons jouer de la musique partout et pour tous!

Nous aimons la musique classique, le jazz, les hits pop de l'heure et les chansons pleines de romance. Et nous croyons qu'il n'y a pas plus parfait que des cordes pour donner à vos chansons favorites la touche d'élégance et d'originalité qu'elles méritent!

Name: Prelude Music Foundation
Description:
The Prelude Music Foundation was founded with the mission to transform the lives of underserved children in Houston through the power of music.

By bringing Music Together, a research based music and movement program that supports Texas Pre-K and Kindergarten Guidelines to classrooms, the Prelude Music Foundation will ensure the power of music transforms the cognitive, language, social, physical, and emotional development of every child.

Name: Africa For Company
Description: We intended to provide a virtual space (Board) for whole African countries I.e.  54 Boards on our www.Africa4world.com website

Name: JamPlay.com
Description: JamPlay.com is the leader in providing affordable guitar lessons to the masses via online videos. Users are given unlimited access access over 4,000 lessons from 70+ professional instructors for only $19.95 per month. They not only get access to these pre-recorded lessons, but also access to instructors teaching live on webcam for 8+ hours per day. When you factor this in along with the other tools and resources provided, it's easy to see why JamPlay has jumped ahead as the leader of the industry. As of December 2013, JamPlay has provided access to over 300,000 customers.

Name: Your Personal Lab
Description:
Your Personal Lab réinvente l’expérience studio.
 
Pensés pour l’autonomie, équipés pour l’excellence, nos  cinq espaces – DJ Lab, Podcast Lab, Prod Lab, Rec Lab et Master Lab permettent de créer, enregistrer, mixer ou diffuser dans des conditions optimales.
 
Notre expertise croise audio, technologie et automatisation : L’expérience est fluide et autonome. Du DJ set au podcast, de la prod au mastering, notre infrastructure web et domotique donne accès aux studios 24/7, en toute liberté.
 
Disponible en réservation à l’heure ou à l’abonnement : notre mission est de rendre les outils pros accessibles à toutes et tous.
 
 Implantantion à venir : Paris, Rennes, Marseille, Toulouse, Nantes, Bordeaux, Lille, Montpellier, Nice, Avignon, Nîmes, Perpignan, Strasbourg, Grenoble.

 Nos marques : DJ Lab, Podcast Lab, Prod Lab, Rec Lab, Master Lab.

 Développement : en franchise & succursales.

Name: AMNplify
Description:
Whether you’re an artist; a fan; a photographer; a writer; a music venue or a promoter, we at AMNplify are here to amp up your experience! We are a music news site and - through our sister site AMNplified - music services provider, offering important services such as marketing, merchandise, live photography and more. Our goal is to help artists big and small widen their reach, and help fulfil their music marketing potential.

We aim to be the pre-eminent music site, supporting and promoting Artists; our Contributors; and players across the Music Industry.

amnplify.com.au

Name: Grover Pro Percussion, Inc.
Description:
The year was 1979, and a 24-year-old percussionist named Neil Grover was living his dream of performing in the percussion section of the Boston Symphony Orchestra. Neil got to play and was intrigued by a very old triangle that was treasured by the BSO percussionists. It resounded with a unique sparkle and spread of overtones. Neil's natural curiosity led him to explore why that particular triangle had such a uniquely vibrant musical sound quality. With the help of students at MIT's Acoustics and Vibrations Lab, Neil set out to uncover the secret of creating a triangle with prominent overtone resonance.

Neil followed his triangles with tambourines, mallets, woodblocks, and other percussion products. Though still a cottage industry, Grover Pro Percussion's mission was established: To produce percussion instruments of the highest musical quality.

In 1992, Grover Pro Percussion moved to a small industrial space north of Boston. The company quickly outgrew its workspace and, in 1994, moved to a manufacturing complex four times larger. To meet the growing demands for Grover products, the company invested in highly customized machinery and tooling. As the company grew, Neil started assembling a dedicated staff of percussion specialists to ensure that his personal commitment to percussion was embodied within the company's infrastructure.

Today, Grover Pro Percussion operates in an efficient manufacturing facility located just north of Boston in Woburn, Massachusetts.

Our mission is to prepare boys for life and leadership through excellence in music, academics, sports, and social enrichment in a Christian environment.

Description: De geschiedenis van Jazz Middelheim begint op 17 mei 1969. Pas in 1973 wordt het een meerdaags zomerfestival onder de noemer "Jazz Middelheim", al verhuist het festival wel van het openluchtmuseum naar het Park Den Brandt aan de overkant. Tot 1981 is Jazz Middelheim een jaarlijks festival, daarna werd het tweejaarlijks georganiseerd. Na de editie van 2007 besteedt de VRT de organisatie uit aan Jazz en Muziek vzw, die haar sporen verdiende met het Gent Jazz Festival. Vanaf dan werd Jazz Middelheim weer een jaarlijkse afspraak rond de 15e augustus. Jazz Middelheim blijft een omroepfestival onder de Klara-vlag dat ook op die zender wordt uitgezonden.

Name: ForTuna
Description:
ForTuna, the Academic Tuna of Nova School of Business and Economics, was founded on February 15th, 1993, by six university students, with the aim of promoting the academic spirit, contributing to the musical and personal development of its members and honoring its university's name.

Today we have around 60 members, with different hierarchical positions and personalities. ForTuna is, above all, a group of friends that strives to achieve all the above-mentioned goals together.
ForTuna’s repertoire, product of its evolution throughout more than twenty-five years of existence, is composed by originals such as “Ala P’rá Rusga” and “Alma Perdida”. It also includes covers, arranged and adapted by its members like “Eu Sei”, by Sara Tavares, or “Pregão”, by Madredeus. ForTuna has performed its vast in festivals and meetings all over the country, including Coimbra, Santarém, Portalegre, Faro, Leiria and the Azores.

We have organized our yearly festival, FORTUNA – “Festival de Tunas Mistas da Nova SBE”, since March 1997. Throughout its 19 editions, various tunas of great reputation have been invited. This event, of an already great reputation in both the academic tunas world and outside of it, emerges as one of the main brand images of ForTuna, by the great musical quality of the show and it's ambiance. Besides this event, ForTuna also performs at the start of the school year, welcoming the new Nova SBE students and in the school's Open Days.

As sung in our songs, the members of ForTuna, dressed as they should, grab their guitars and “all the strength that fits in a good student”. This is their key asset as a team: the alliance and effort of making a cause everyone believes in worth it as well as carrying the good name of their university, always with joy, music and academic tradition, celebrating twenty-five years of tuna history: “We are ForTuna, and we don’t stop” is our motto.

Name: Aquila Corde Armoniche
Description:
Aquila Corde Armoniche stands out for the production of strings for historical and modern performances, according to the traditional criteria handed down by the Italian string makers tradition. 
Aquila runs its own extrusion plants for monofilaments, complete of laser control devices that allow a high-quality production standard of synthetic monofilament for musical use.  Aquila is known worldwide for its constant innovation and discovery of new materials: Nylgut, Bionylon, Sugar, Red Series, Silkgut, Biocarbon.
Aquila is one of the few companies in Italy to continue the century long tradition of Italian gut string making. In 2018 the company succeeded in rediscovering the Italian method of making strings using unsplit lamb gut, thereby recreating the historical production process.

Beside mor ve ötesi’s last five albums, including the platinum-selling classic Dünya Yalan Söylüyor, RAKUNs catalogue includes Ayça Şen’s and Gren’s debut albums, both released in 2009. RAKUN also provides management and booking services for all artists on its roster as well as engages in concert booking/promotion of other international and local acts. RAKUN has been a member of Mü-Yap (an ifpi member) since April 2008.

Description:
DIY Studios 
 
Wir sind die DIY Studios mitten aus dem Herzen Hamburgs.
 
Die DIY Studios sind eine Kombination aus einem Co-Working Space für Musiker, Songwriter und Produzenten und Meetingräume für Businesskunden aus den verschiedensten Branchen.
 
Mit den sechs Tonstudios mit Equipment auf höchstem Industriestandard und dem SPACE, einem großen Konferenzraum mit Blick über die Hamburger Sternschanze, sind die DIY Studios der perfekte Treffpunkt zum Networken für alle Musiker, Medienschaffende und Kreative.
 
Mit verschiedenen Workshops und Events werden den Nutzern der Studios nicht nur eine kreative Fläche, sondern auch eine große Menge an Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten geboten. Das Angebot ist nicht nur attraktiv für Neulinge sondern vor allem auch für Leute die schon einen professionelleren Weg in der Medienwelt eingeschlagen haben.
 
Über ein intuitives Online Booking System lassen sich die Räumlichkeiten zu jederzeit, während der Öffnungszeiten (Mo-So 09.00 - 00.00 Uhr) buchen und sind für die Nutzer in diesem Zeitraum frei zugänglich.
 
Der Standort der Studios ist umgeben von tollen Bars, einer vielzahl Restaurants, einer guten Anbindung an öffentliche Verkehrsmitteln und der Musikszene in Hamburg.
 
Als Partner zu den DIY Studios gehören der Audiovertrieb Hyperactive, Universal Audio, Jägermeister, die Warner Music Group, Red Bull sowie der Musikverlag BMG Rights.

Name: Acoustic Fields
Description:
The small room acoustics specialists. Our main focus is on sound diffusion and sound absorption technologies. 

We have created a low frequency, sound absorption technology, which uses activated carbon inside of diaphragmatic absorption. The units absorb 100% at 50 Hz. and 63% at 40 Hz. as independently tested by Riverbank Labs. They are the most powerful freestanding units available on the commercial market. 

Middle and high frequency absorption is managed by our proprietary, open celled acoustic foam which provides a smooth absorption curve to really bring out the wonderful timbre of the human vocal. No more over absorption of vocals or music necessary! In short, small room acoustics is our specialty.

We have also married our activated carbon bass absorber technology to quadratic diffusion to achieve an acoustics industry first, namely broadband absorption and quadratic diffusion in one unit.

Acoustic Fields offers a full range of noise and vibrational testing acoustic services including environmental noise, sound and impact isolation, control of echos, reflections and focusing and mechanical noise and vibrational control. 

Call us on 520–392–9486 or email info@acousticfields.com to find out more about our unique acoustical solutions.

Listen to your music...without hearing your room!

We cultivate participatory and contemplative worship that draws people into authentic encounters with God.

Our gatherings, festivals, and music formation programs are designed to equip worshippers, nurture creativity, and deepen spiritual growth.

For over seven years, we have faithfully stewarded a vision that combines musical excellence with spiritual formation, impacting local and international communities.

We operate with integrity, transparency, and a mission-driven focus that ensures every initiative aligns with our calling and long-term purpose.

We are committed to creating accessible, transformative worship experiences that transcend location, denomination, or culture, and to training the next generation of worship leaders worldwide.

In essence: VRD offers a unique combination of spiritual depth, musical artistry, and community formation — a ministry that is both timeless in worship and innovative in expression.

At MadLife, there is a shared culture of pride in our venue, and in what we do.

Name: Gulf Coast Symphony
Description:

Now the third-largest non-profit performing arts organization in Lee county, we are the largest community orchestra in the country. We are recognized for our high-quality symphonic performances as well as our active community engagement and commitment to arts education.
The Mission

The Gulf Coast Symphony exists to contribute to the cultural enrichment of Southwest Florida by producing and performing a broad variety of concerts and creating a diverse, innovative, and balanced program of performances, events, and community and education projects that reaches the widest possible public. The primary goals of the Gulf Coast Symphony are:

    To help build general arts awareness in Southwest Florida
    To develop new audiences for the arts in our community
    To assist in the development of potential future performers

Name: Batala Brazilian Percussion Group
Description:
The Batala History

Batala South Africa is part of a larger Batala family created in 1997 by Giba Gonçalves. Born and raised in Salvador, Bahia in Brazil, Giba was living in Paris when he first had the idea for the band. Open to anyone with an interest in learning the samba-reggae beat, the band started off with 60 people.

From Paris it spread to other cities in France, Belgium and the United Kingdom, amonst others. In 2003, the band finally made its way back to its origins, brought to Brazil by Paulo Garcia, also the founder of the Portsmouth Batala. Composer and musical director, Giba enlisted the help of friends from the bands and from Salvador in order to create the visual identity of the band. The instruments and clothings are all manufactured in Salvador, Bahia, where the band has a social program that gives jobs to many families. From there they are shipped to the bands around the world.

In 2009, the newest branch of the Batala band was created in Johannesburg, South Africa.

In South Africa the main aim of our band is to be racially and socially inclusive, as well as gender-inclusive. In this sense, we fully incentivise all types of people to be part of BATALA, especially those low-income youth that may find in the percussion music an outlet for self-expression, abandonment of drugs, social integration and, why not, a professional career as musicians and dancers!!!

Name: Notodden Blues Festival
Description:
Notodden Blues Festival er Norges største bluesfestival, og viden kjent som “Europas beste bluesopplevelse”. På Notodden kan du gjennom fire dager første helgen i august oppleve det beste som finnes innen norsk og internasjonal blues.

I trivelige omgivelser i byens sentrum byr Notodden Blues Festival på alt fra små intime klubbkonserter med lokale artister til blues cruise på idylliske Heddalsvannet, workshops i Europas Blues Senter, kirkekonserter, bandseminar for ungdom og barne- og familiearrangement til store konserter med de største verdensstjernene. Notodden Blues Festival fikk status som norsk Knutepunkfestival for blues i 2007, og i 2010 ble festivalen hedret med «Keeping The Blues Alive Award» for beste internasjonale bluesfestival. KBA deles ut av den internasjonale organisasjonen Blues Foundation i Memphis og regnes som bluesens svar på The Academy Awards. 

Listen over blues-, soul- og rockstorheter som har opptrådt på Notodden er nærmest uendelig og inkluderer artister som B.B. King, Buddy Guy, ZZ Top, Robert Plant, George Thorogood & The Destroyers, Johnny Winter, Gary Moore, John Mayall, Van Morrison, Koko Taylor, The Black Keys, Dr. John, Solomon Burke, Wilson Pickett, Robert Cray, Otis Rush, m.fl.  

Notodden har et levende bluesmiljø gjennom hele året. Hvert år på festivalen så kan du også oppleve Notodden-artister som Kåre Virud Band, Rita Engedalen, Notodden Blues Band, Spoonful of Blues, Lady J & Her Bada Bing Band, Norske Menn i Hus og Hytte, Terry Lehns, m.fl.

Name: Wertheim Piano
Description:
Wertheim Piano is an Australian owned brand of pianos managed & distributed by John Martin from Melbourne. After 50 years in the music industry, John has owned full line music stores, managed a buying group for music retailers and manufactured and distributed Wertheim pianos. 

Wertheim Pianos were originally produced in Germany from 1875-1908, and then from Richmond, a suburb of Melbourne, Australia. Around 18,000 upright pianos were made in Melbourne between 1908 and 1935. They were a popular all-purpose piano often found in schools and public halls, due to their reputation for requiring little maintenance. The famous Dame Nellie Melba frequently requested they be used during her performances.

Call John on +61 418 350 124 or visit www.wertheimpiano.com to learn more and enquire.

Name: Winkow
Description:
Winkow nace y se proyecta en la región como una de las mayores plataformas profesionales de contenidos musicales en soporte Web. 
Utiliza el más creativo y complejo software musical aplicado al desarrollo da las radios corporativas y a la música ambiental. 

La base de este "mix" de orfebrería y tecnología ha sido elaborada desde hace cuatro años. 
Un equipo humano clasificó 400.000 tracks seleccionados de un universo superior al millón de unidades. 

Otro grupo aborda la delicada tarea de establecer una plataforma tipo para cada estación y otorgarles un perfil singular de acuerdo
con la orientación temática elegida. 

El Laboratorio Musical codifica esa base de datos y un software de última generación, o Sistema Inteligente, lo procesa aplicando
los códigos a la totalidad del material sonoro. De este modo se reproduce en forma digital, con todas sus virtudes, la creatividad
de los especialistas. 

Ningún track es repetido antes de que se agoten los títulos que comparten igual codificación. 
Cumplida esta etapa, la señal correspondiente a cada estación es enviada por Internet a los equipos del usuario, garantizando 
exclusividad. Gracias a este proceso, la Empresa dispone de un instrumento de comunicación concebido en el más alto nivel y
a la medida exacta de sus necesidades. 

WINKOW inicia su actividad en la Argentina en Enero de 2009.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Music Teachers' Association of NSW
Description:
The Music Teachers’ Association of NSW is the peak body for instrumental and vocal teachers in New South Wales. Founded in 1912, we aim to support music teachers, and protect the character and status of the profession.

We are the Accrediting body for music teachers in NSW, encouraging high standards of music teaching and learning.

We provide professional development, social connection, information and support for music teachers, as well as performance and learning opportunities for their students.

Membership is open to all music teachers and supporters in NSW, including:

- music teachers in private studios
- peripatetic music teachers in schools
- music teachers in multi-teacher businesses
- music teachers in Regional Conservatoriums
- supporters of music education everywhere

We welcome all music teachers! Accreditation is not a condition of membership of the MTA. We do hope that all teachers will want to become accredited, and we aim to support teachers in their journey to accreditation, with guidance and financial assistance.

Name: Compoze
Description:
Compoze- democratising music education and bringing written music to the digital age

For music students of all levels and for people who want to learn music, we recently launched ScoreSkills -  Learn music like you learn a language in Duolingo.

ScoreSkills is a mobile app for learning, training and mastering your musical skills that requires no previous knowledge in music and doesn't even require owning an instrument. 

What makes ScoreSkills special?
- Not another "Guitar Hero"- ScoreSkills treats music like a language and teaches it like one- reading, writing, listening, speaking (or to be more technical- sight reading/ music transcription/ ear training and soon also humming/playing exercises)
- Does not require any previous music education

Name: Aardvark Music Ltd
Description:
Aardvark Music Ltd is an international record label an music publisher comprising: Aardvark Records, Aardvark Dance (EDM sister label) and Aardvark UK Publishing.

Chairman  Andrew Reeve (ex-EMI) founded Aardvark Records in 1999. His initial vision was to champion bands based in Cornwall and to license releases to major labels worldwide.

CEO Alex di Savoia joined the Aardvark team in 2003, first as Head of Marketing, progressing to Managing Director (2005) and then to CEO (2009). 

Alex decided to smash the traditional record label and music publishing business model in 2005 and created something untried, untested and unknown – largely based on digital audio and video formats, technologies and digital distribution networks. It was also based on building a transparent and sincere relationship with the people who dug and bought the label’s releases.  

An early adopter of social media and social networking, Aardvark’s relationship with the music buying public deepened. That’s a relationship that means the world to us and our artists. 

While we’ll always champion the UK independent UK music industry, our presence and reputation are firmly established outside the UK’s shores. 

Not ones to rest on our laurels, we've traded in our previous model for a newer model. Innovation is what keeps us going; it keeps things fresh and exciting for us.

Name: Penn Masala
Description:
Penn Masala, the World’s First South Asian A Cappella Group, was born with the desire to create music that traversed traditional cultural boundaries and captured the experience of growing up with both Eastern and Western cultures. As the first group in the world to bring the sounds of the Indian subcontinent to a cappella, we’ve consistently been at the forefront of South Asian-Western fusion ever since.

Along the way, we’ve met and sung for heads-of-state, prominent businessmen, and international leaders, while traveling to some of the most vibrant cities across the world. We have been fortunate enough to have performed for President Obama at the White House, the Indian International Film Academy (IIFA) Awards, and we were featured in the Hollywood feature film and soundtrack for Pitch Perfect 2 which received an American Music Award for Best Soundtrack in 2015.

Our music has grown to attract fans from all backgrounds, and we in turn have been influenced by a wide range of cultures. The Hindi-English mashups we pioneered bring together Western pop and Eastern melodies to form harmonies you won’t hear anywhere else. Penn Masala’s original compositions, complete with innovative sounds, rich textures, and complex arrangements,showcase the distinct sound we’ve created.

Since 1996, we have released 10 full-length studio albums: Awaaz, 11 PM, Soundcheck, Brown Album, Pehchaan, On Detours, Panoramic, Kaavish, Resonance, Yuva – of which the latter seven are available for streaming and purchase on all major music sites.

Zu erleben sind die großen Meisterinnen und Meister ihres Fachs wie auch vielversprechende Nachwuchspianisten, Wettbewerbssiegerinnen oder Debütanten, deren Förderung dem Festival ein besonderes Anliegen ist. Seit 2006 hat das Klavier-Festival Ruhr ein breit gefächertes Education-Programm entwickelt, das insbesondere Kinder und Jugendliche für die Welt des Klaviers begeistert und zu einer aktiven und schöpferischen Beschäftigung mit Musik anregt. Besondere Schwerpunkte liegen auf der Entwicklung nachhaltig angelegter Kooperationsprojekte, der langfristigen Förderung benachteiligter Kinder und Jugendlicher, der Vermittlung neuer Klaviermusik und der Entwicklung innovativer Vermittlungsformate.

Name: Theresia Orchestra
Description:
Theresia is a unique cultural and artistic project at European level. Founded in 2012 at the instigation of a group of patrons, the orchestra brings together musicians under the age of 28 from the main European academic music institutions, providing them with the opportunity to perform in prestigious venues and to deepen their knowledge in the professional and artistic field.

The main activity of Theresia is the deepening of the study of historical performance practice of music by authors of the classical period (1770-1820) and the exclusive use of classical instruments. Each year, during six periods of residences, the orchestra members are encouraged to develop and share their artistic vision under the guidance of internationally renowned artists such as Chiara Banchini, Alfredo Bernardini, Giovanni Antonini and others .

At the same time, the project also offers participants seminars dedicated to historical musicology, together with further moments of reflection aimed at contributing to the professional growth of the musicians, encouraging them to become aware of their mission as ambassadors of culture within our society.

The orchestra musicians come from many European and non-European countries: Austria, Colombia, France, Japan, Italy, Iran, Mexico, New Zealand, Holland, Portugal, Poland, Romania, Spain, United Kingdom, Russia, United States of America, Switzerland. Since its foundation, Theresia has represented a paradigm of integration and dialogue between cultures, and today it is internationally recognized as one of the most prominent European classical music projects.

Theresia is today an internal project of Fondazione ICONS (www.icons.it), which supports the orchestra members through the awarding of learning grants and deals with the artistic and organizational structure of the orchestra.

This project has received funding from the European Union’s Creative Europe  Programme under grant agreement No 101054027.

Name: Académie Bach
Description:
L’Académie Bach est la plus importante structure spécialisée dans la musique ancienne et le théâtre baroque active en Normandie, créée en 1997 et implantée à Arques-la-Bataille, à deux pas de Dieppe et de la mer.

Tous les ans, depuis 25 ans, elle organise à la fin du mois d’août le Festival de Musique Ancienne en Normandie, reconnu au niveau international. Rampe de lancement pour de jeunes artistes, le festival a accompagné les débuts et le développement de la carrière de nombreux musiciens, ainsi que d’ensembles maintenant reconnus dans le monde entier : Le Poème Harmonique, Café Zimmermann, Les Musiciens de Saint-Julien, Hélène Schmitt, Benjamin Alard, Benjamin Lazar, Vox Luminis, parmi tant d’autres.

Incubateur de talents, l’Académie Bach accueille des artistes en résidence de recherche et de création, en accompagnant depuis 2015 des artistes, étudiants de Master 1 et 2. Ces résidences ont permis de révéler de jeunes talents et également d’explorer des répertoires méconnus comme le répertoire pour alto et violoncelle de la fin du XVIIIe.

Elle s’attache par ailleurs à promouvoir et démocratiser la musique auprès des publics les plus divers, de l’école maternelle aux établissements pour personnes âgées ou handicapées. 

Tous les deux ans, elle organise des voyages culturels autour de l’orgue : Saxe, Allemagne du Nord, Frise orientale (Allemagne et Hollande), Poméranie, Sud de l’Angleterre. Des expériences qui permettent de découvrir des instruments, des lieux et des artistes exceptionnels.

Le festival annuel est aussi l’occasion de proposer des stages et des formations en lien avec la programmation, pour amateurs et jeunes professionnels : chant choral, chant polyphonique, air de cour et théâtre baroque.
