Name: argovia philharmonic
Description:
Der 1963 als «Aargauer Symphonie Orchester» gegründete Schweizer Klangkörper ist längst zu einem überregional etablierten Berufsorchester herangewachsen. Seit der Saison 2013/14 als argovia philharmonic agierend, prägt das Orchester in seinen Konzertreihen nicht nur die eigene Heimat musikalisch mit einem breiten Repertoire, sondern gastiert auch regelmässig u.a. in der Tonhalle Zürich und im KKL Luzern. Bei der alle drei Jahre stattfindenden Oper Schloss Hallwyl ist das argovia philharmonic zudem Hausorchester und hat seit 2016 auch die künstlerische Leitung inne.
In der Schweizer Orchesterlandschaft hat sich das argovia philharmonic dank seiner einzigartigen Struktur seinen eigenen Platz erspielt. Durch die projektbezogene Arbeit bei gleichzeitig fester Besetzung und regelmässiger Konzerttätigkeit hebt sich das argovia philharmonic von den ständigen Berufsorchestern ab. Mit dieser Struktur steht es wie kein anderes Orchester für das vielfältige, nicht selten projektorientierte professionelle Schweizer Musikschaffen. Getragen wird das Orchester vom Kanton Aargau, der dem kulturellen «Leuchtturm» bereits 2010 einen «herausragenden Stellenwert in der Aargauer Kulturlandschaft» zugesprochen hat.
Regelmässig konzertiert das argovia philharmonic mit international bekannten Solisten wie Vadim Repin, Olga Scheps, Sol Gabetta, Lawrence Power, Julian Bliss oder Matthias Kirschnereit, aber auch mit den bedeutendsten Schweizer Künstlern wie Oliver Schnyder, Regula Mühlemann, Louis Schwizgebel oder Christian Poltéra. Zudem lädt es aufstrebende Solisten wie Alina Ibragimowa, Andrew Tyson, Kian Soltani, Sebastian Bohren oder Chiara Enderle ein.
Von 2001 bis 2019 leitete der britische Dirigent Douglas Bostock das Orchester als Chefdirigent. Seit der Saison 2020/21 ist der Norweger Rune Bergmann neuer Chefdirigent.
Seit 2013 arbeitet das argovia philharmonic mit dem Label Coviello Classics zusammen und veröffentlicht regelmässig CD-Aufnahmen. Weniger anzeigen

Description:
Rhythmitica world music academy was established in 2015 in Toronto, Canada. The academic tutoring of traditional world music to interested students across the globe, connecting cultures via music, identifying localized instruments and instructors, and preserving local music culture are the main goals of Rhythmitica.
Immerse yourself in a different culture and learn music, starting at any level. Music is the universal language, and we make a more beautiful world by connecting diverse cultures through their music.

OUR STORY
We believe that producing and educating art and ideas are among the noblest jobs in the world. Academic education of world music and promoting its art has been our goal from the beginning and we aspire to keep our endeavors towards this goal. Through the years, many have contacted us and have stated that they cannot find a professional instructor for world music in their respective location. Even if they had been able to find a teacher, the quality and the authenticity of the teachings have been a constant concern. This conceived the idea to form and establish Rhythmitica online music academy. First, we collected a powerful team of educators and experienced teachers and performers. Then, with the help of an experienced team of web producers, we made an exclusive platform for educational content. Just like that, Rhythmitica has become a bridge to connect our excellent teachers with students across the world.

Name: Jamaica Music Society (JAMMS)
Description:
JAMMS is a collective management organization that negotiates and collects license fees on behalf of record companies & record producers for specific uses of their music. 

Under Copyright & Related Rights Laws, the owners of master recordings have the exclusive rights to broadcast and otherwise communicate their music to the public. 

JAMMS issues licenses and collects from individuals and businesses who use music or need to use music in the following ways: 

1. Media:radio broadcasts, webcasting, television broadcasts, cable, satellite radio
2. Public Performance: music at events-parties, clubs, festivals, round robins, banquets, staff parties and other music sites such as bars, restaurants, banks, supermarkets, hotels, pharmacies, retail stores and gyms.
If you play or intend to play recorded music in your business or at any activity or event,you need copyright clearance from the record producers/record companies and in Jamaica, that authority lies with JAMMS. 

JAMMS Mission
To attain the highest levels of efficiency, accountability, innovation and effectiveness in carrying out the mandate of members and affiliates and to effectively meet the needs of the music-user community through equitable, accessible, convenient and quality service.

Name: PCAM Society
Description:
Producers and composers of applied music stand together as PCAM to protect the conditions in which they work and to uphold the standards and value of professional creativity.

The Society was formed in 1982 as an industry forum for practitioners of advertising music and soon established its reputation as a respected and influential group campaigning for composers’ rights in all forms of applied music. More than 30 years on, it boasts a membership that comprises the most influential and prolific composers in advertising and media with over a hundred members representing several hundred writers.

PCAM’'s strong ties with the IPA (Institute of Practitioners in Advertising) have generated best-practice music commissioning guidelines and joint agreements that are widely accepted by UK advertising agencies and an increasing number of agencies abroad. The Society’'s relationships with the MU (Musicians'’ Union) and BASCA (The British Academy of Songwriters, Composers and Authors), and its membership of the CRA (Creators'’ Rights Alliance) and ECSA (the European Composer and Songwriter Alliance), place it squarely at the heart of creators'’ rights campaigning, both at home and on the European stage.

The PCAM Committee meets five times a year to look at the challenges and developments that affect its members and to plan targeted industry-wide campaigns. Members are always welcome to attend these meetings with prior notice.

Membership benefits include:

· Guidelines for commissioning fees and usages
· Contracts for composers, performers and arrangers
· Market rates for musicians, singers and voice-over artists
· Access to a large network of experienced music producers
· Online industry discussion forum
· Regular e-newsletters
· Social events

Name: Lotus Centre for Special Music Education
Description:
Lotus Centre for Special Music Education is dedicated to providing access to music programs for the special needs community. Music is powerful and universal—it can improve our mood, contribute to brain development, enhance learning, bring people together, and improve self-esteem through engaging in a rewarding activity. Our goal is to make sure people of all abilities are able to participate in music making in a way that is meaningful to them and will enhance their well-being. Our goal at Lotus Centre is to solve this problem through innovative and collaborative approaches that allow all learners to reach their full potential. 
To address this issue, we fulfill our mandate through a wide variety of activities:
•	Direct-service programming: we have two locations in Ottawa where we provide private and group music lessons, after-school program, camps and workshops to the special needs community. Our teachers are highly-trained and are passionate about creating the best possible learning experience for all our students. Curriculum is individually developed for each student to help them reach their goals in a fun, relaxed environment. Our approach is to meet the students where they are and build on their strengths so that they can gain confidence through music making.
•	Community collaborations: We work with organizations like the National Arts Centre Orchestra and local school boards to bring awareness and opportunities beyond our four walls. Through these collaborations, we reach hundreds of children and adults in the community through music making workshops and concerts in which participants can see, feel, and play musical instruments and attend concerts by world-class musicians.
•	Research: Through active research, we are able to contribute to knowledge on best practices in special music education and share our work with the academic community. We regularly publish our work and present our studies at conferences internationally.
•	Teacher training: We are proud to partner with the University of Ottawa to offer Canada’s first and only certificate program in special music education. All music teachers will encounter students with special needs in their professional lives, and equipping those teachers with tools and strategies is critical in creating more opportunities for people with special needs to learn music.

Fundada en Filadelfia en 1998, la escuela se ha convertido en una red internacional que ya opera más de 300 unidades abiertas y en desarrollo en todo el mundo, en países como Estados Unidos, Canadá, Filipinas, México, Australia, Chile, Paraguay, Brasil, Colombia, Perú, Portugal, España entre otros.

Creemos que la mejor forma de aprender música es contextualizar la enseñanza teórica a través de la experiencia práctica. Así, nuestra metodología se basa en clases individuales, que brindarán el aprendizaje técnico y teórico de la música, y ensayos grupales semanales, que brindan la oportunidad de practicar los contenidos aprendidos en clase.

Además de dar sentido a la teoría detrás de la música, los ensayos grupales brindan al alumno la convivencia con otros músicos, la experiencia de la dinámica de banda y escenario y el trabajo en grupo, para desarrollar características que van más allá de la musicalidad.

Enseñamos guitarra, guitarra, bajo, voz, teclados, batería, composición,
y práctica de la banda. No es necesario tener experiencia previa ni saber tocar instrumentos. La metodología de la escuela cubre todos los niveles de conocimiento.

Name: Venovan
Description:
Michele Colucci  In Arte Venovan è un giovane musicista campano che fonde arte contemporanea, oggetti di uso comune e musica. 
Colucci utilizza infatti, oggetti di uso quotidiano: chiodi, forchette, magneti, ecc. che lui chiama “i preparati”, attribuendo ad essi  un alto valore ancor prima del suono.
La preparazione del pianoforte è molto importante per l’artista, durante questa fase Colucci pensando in modo orchestrale, lui non è solo l’esecutore del brano ma anche il direttore dei mille oggetti introdotti all’interno del pianoforte. 
Colucci non nasconde che la genesi dei suoi brani ha avuto luogo tra le montagne dell’alto casertano (Dragoni e Formicola), dove l’artista ama rifugiarsi ascoltando la voce e le melodie della natura, al riparo dal violento caos cittadino quotidiano.Il pianista dichiara: “Ho sempre avuto problemi con le sonorità del mio pianoforte! Mi spiego meglio: il pianoforte, principe degli strumenti, ha 88 tasti tutti ben accordati che  generano un suono in cui la differenza tra l'uno e l'altro è la frequenza, quindi la nota. Avere uno spettro armonico così ampio e non avere la possibilità di sonorità diverse su ogni corda mi ha sempre messo in crisi. La svolta è avvenuta durante gli studi  specialistici presso l'Accademia di Belle Arti di Napoli dove ho avuto la fortuna di studiare John Cage .Da quel momento in poi ho iniziato la vera sperimentazione sonora andando oltre il suono concettuale di Cage, superando così la limitazione armonica ed arrivando alla realizzazione di brani inediti per pianoforte preparato pubblicando nel 2015 il singolo “Sogna” e successivamente il disco “fiabe” - nel 2017 il singolo “Life” versione per orchestra e #pianopreprato, nel 2018 pubblica il dvd del singolo “Per Sempre” versione con orchestra e #pianopreparato.

Name: Pav Gekko Productions
Description: My mission is to bring the highest quality, emotionally resonant music to video games, creating immersive worlds that elevate player experiences. I believe in the responsibility of shaping future generations' sensibilities, crafting scores that leave a lasting impression by blending orchestral tradition with modern storytelling. Through my work, I strive to honour the artistry of music and inspire wonder, adventure, and connection in gaming.

Name: NoiseTrade
Description: Music marketing service that connects artists and fans by exchanging free music for fan contact information.  Completely self-funded and independent.  Over 4,000 artists have given away over 5,000,000 songs.  A major html5 re-write of the service will launch in Spring 2011.

Name: TuneWiki, Inc.
Description:
Status: Closed as of November 2014

TuneWiki is revolutionizing the social music experience by giving people the opportunity to share their favorite music, lyrics and photos with friends. The Company has the world's largest database of scrolling lyrics, providing an unsurpassed karaoke style listening experience. Over 6.5 million music fans request over 500 million lyrics from TuneWiki every month, and it is the #1 app on Spotify.

Name: Atarraya Productions
Description: Structure de production de spectacles spécialisée dans les musiques du monde et la chanson.

Name: Cabanas Produções
Description:
Cabanas Produções (ex-Bateia Cultura) é uma produtora cultural que atua nas áreas de teatro, dança e música. Através de sua própria equipe ou de seus parceiros, a  empresa atua em todas as etapas de realização dos projetos culturais, desde a formatação do projeto e planejamento até a produção, divulgação e prestação de contas.
Nosso principal foco é o trabalho em parceria com nossos artistas, com quem fazemos um trabalho continuado, pensando todas as etapas de suas carreiras, projetos, espetáculos, shows etc.
Atualmente realizamos projetos em parceria com os seguintes artistas e grupos: MPB4, Arranco de Varsóvia, Duo Gisbranco, Verônica Sabino, Julie Wein e Fabio Rizental.

Name: MH Voice Studio
Description:
Official page for the voice studio of Dr. Mitchell Hutchings. Specializing in teaching, training, and building the singing voice.

Comfortable in both contemporary and classical genres, Dr. Hutchings thrives in a positive teaching and mentoring environment. He helps his students find their strengths by adjusting and optimizing his approach to accommodate every client.

Description:

Better than Cane!

Name: The Muse
Description: The Muse is a Multi Genre Music Venue In Nashville, TN. It has been open for almost a decade. The Muse hosts a wide variety of local and national bands, and artists. The Muse is dedicated to giving underground bands a platform to promote their music!

Name: JazzNu
Description: JazzNu is een digitaal tijdschrift dat op 28 april 2015 met de eerste artikelen on-line kwam. Het tijdschrift streeft er naar een aanvulling te zijn op aanverwante websites en weblogs. JazzNu beoogt er vooral voor lezers te zijn, niet zozeer voor nieuwsjagers. Het moet een plek worden waar de lezer zich thuisvoelt, met enige regelmaat terugkeert en zich hopelijk gaat laven aan een mix van lange en korte artikelen.

Name: Diggers Music
Description: Diggers music is a music company based out of Spain.

Name: Radius Agency
Description: Radius Agency is a UK based booking agency for international DJs and event management company.

Name: Cosmica Artists
Description: We are an independent Artist Management company + Record Label. We represent, foster, and cultivate musical talent with an artist-first and community approach.With a roster from the US and Latin America, we navigate both sides of the cultural border, developing our artists in both Latin and general markets.Founded in 2004. Based in Southern California. Broadcasting to music fans worldwide.

Name: Hichkas
Description:
Hichkas commonly referred to as the “Godfather” of Iranian Hip Hop, is the pioneer of this genre.  
While the word is often overused, Hichkas is one who can truly be classified as a trendsetter, originator and major influence in not only bringing HipHop to the attention of the general public in Iran but also as one who worked with a large number of up and coming rappers, ghostwriting for some and providing advice and guidance to others. Hichkas was the first rapper to coin the phrase “021” as a slang word for the city of Tehran pertaining to its phone code. His first album's Jangale Asfalt release brought much recognition to his name in Iranian communities, His first album is first Persian Rap album. Hichkas has a unique theistic and nationalistic lyrical style, avoiding vulgar words while referring to social issues. He uses elements of Persian traditional music combined with Western music.
Hichkas has established a quite impressive international media presence, being regularly interviewed and featured in reports for programs such as the BBC’s Panorama, the Arte channel, HBO and CNN amongst others. 

www.hichkas.me
https://www.facebook.com/HichkasOfficial
https://www.twitter.com/HichkasOfficial

Name: Marimba
Description:
O Marimba é apoiado pelo PROCULTURA, uma ação do programa PALOP–TL e UE, financiada pela União Europeia, cofinanciada e gerida pelo Camões I.P., que tem por objetivo a promoção do emprego e atividades geradoras de rendimento no setor cultural dos PALOP e Timor-Leste.

O Marimba é um projeto inovador inédito que vem valorizar internacionalmente a produção musical em Angola, Guiné-Bissau, Moçambique e Timor-Leste.

Esta iniciativa sem precedentes entre países lusófonos assenta na premissa de que a inovação e a criação artística têm como recurso base o património imaterial, e que o seu conhecimento e divulgação promovem o desenvolvimento artístico, cultural e socioeconómico das nações.

Name: XVIVE AUDIO LLC
Description:
XVIVE AUDIO
XVIVE are focus on producing Wireless guitar system, Wireless Microphone system and effect pedals. Those products are meticulously designed by our USA Team to bring guitar and bass players professional quality pedals with an original tone at a competitive price.  We also make our own pedal boards, power supplies, cables and patch leads to cater for all your gigging requirements.
Discover the XVIVE difference!
 
What Does XVIVE Mean? What Are We All About?
The word "vive" embodies the desire to live life at the fullest. XVIVE was founded by passionate musicians dedicated to finding great tone at great prices so all may enjoy music at its finest. The aim of XVIVE Audio is to manufacture products of unbeatable build and sound quality. Our USA design team believe that premium tone and quality can be offered at a competitive price that any musician can afford.
 
The USA Design Team
The XVIVE Audio USA Design Team is made up of musicians and engineers who have decades of professional experience.  
Howard Davis works as our Chief Designer. He is well known for his many pedal designs for Electro Harmonix (1976 to 1981) and later did design work for Pigtronix (including the Mother Ship analog guitar Synthesizer). He has done independent design work for several artists and we are very happy to have him aboard.
Darius Mostowfi has been a DSP and analog expert in the pedal industry for 18 years. He also co-designed the very successful guitar interface AmpKit LiNK HD.
Ray Heasman has been working on high-end audio systems and signal processing for 15 years. He was instrumental in the design of the recently released Pigtronix Echolution 2 Deluxe and Infinity Looper. 
 
The Fast Growth Of Our Company
Following our official market launch in 2012, XVIVE has experienced an unprecedented growth rate as a company. We have the distributor in each EU, Asia and South America country and now we set up a new office in Pasadena, CA, USA, welcome you to join us together.

Name: The Grind Artist Management
Description: The Grind Artist Management represents Artists of all genres. We strive to establish a partnership built on integrity through careful and mutual selection of talent. Visit our website for our current roster. Please submit demos for consideration to info@grindmgmt.com

Name: Quiet On The Set, Inc.
Description:
A top notch music company packed with innovative music. We strive to create great relationships with artists & clients to enhance each of our projects.

Our music can be heard on The Big Bang Theory, America's Next Top Model, NCIS, VICE, Bring It!, Black Ink Crew, Daily Show With Trevor Noah and too many others to list.

We offer:
- Custom Scoring
- Exclusive Music Library
- Music Licensing and Clearance 
- Music Supervision
- Music Replacement

Follow us:
Twitter - https://twitter.com/CouldB_Ent
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/couldb_ent/?hl=en
YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFoBxHpmsJpgnBfdzph2J3A

Description: We make musical instruments for iOS and other platforms. Koala Sampler is a super intuitive audio sampler for making beats in seconds.

Name: audiobridge
Description: audiobridge is the next revolution in making music. Login, create a session, record a track, invite and message your collaborators and have a completed song in minutes - all from your mobile device!

Name: NMUV (Nederlandse Muziek Uitgevers Vereniging)
Description:
De NMUV is de Nederlandse Muziek Uitgevers Vereniging. Zij is in 1992 opgericht als de vereniging voor alle uitgevers van hedendaagse muziek.
De meeste Nederlandse muziekuitgevers zijn lid van de NMUV. Zowel onafhankelijke-, lokale muziekuitgevers, als music publishers die onderdeel zijn van grote internationale entertainment bedrijven.
Onder de aangesloten muziekuitgevers zijn verschillende specialisten op het gebied van popmuziek, multimedia-muziek en production library-muziek.
De NMUV behartigt de belangen van deze muziekuitgevers. Zij geeft haar leden voorlichting en adviseert op juridisch-, fiscaal- en economisch gebied. De NMUV onderhoudt contacten met Buma Stemra en andere entertainment organisaties en voert promotie voor een rechtvaardig auteursrecht bij overheid en media.
De NMUV heeft een gekozen bestuur van minimaal vijf leden en houdt tenminste eenmaal per jaar een algemene ledenvergadering.

Name: Capitano Music Hub
Description:
As independent catalyzers of talent and consultants for brands, Capitano has decades’ worth of experience in fostering artists and emotionalizing corporate identities. We advance careers with our expertise and experience: from the practice room to the arena, from the training ground to the stadium.

Capitano Talent Journey
Capitano supports the long-term and sustainable development of talent in music and entertainment. We apply a holistic approach to the careers of our clients.

Capitano Brand Journey
Designing and executing a brand strategy with musicians and artists can be challenging. The music business is a complex construct of rights holders, service catalogs, labels, publishing rights, technical riders, and competition clauses. Capitano has over 30 years of experience in dealing with all stakeholders.

All-encompassing entertainment strategies are our core competence. We represent successful music programs for brands such as Coca-Cola, Bacardi, Sunrise, and 20 Minuten.

Capitano Music Publishing
Do you need the ideal song for your TV commercial or digital platform? We take care of all legal and licensing issues regarding the use of songs for advertising campaigns, online trailers, videogames, film soundtracks and digital content.

Having our own music publishing company allows us to market approx. 1,000 titles of every style and genre. From indie acts like Ikan Hyu and Benjamin Amaru to the biggest Swiss chart-toppers like Pegasus, 77 Bombay Street, Baschi, Stress, Joya Marleen, Klischée, Hecht and Lovebugs: we guarantee all your clearing and licensing needs within 48 hours.

Name: KO Music
Description:
Crafting Original Music for the Moving Image.

KO Music is an original music agency for film, television and advertising helmed by multi-award-winning composer, PHILIP KAY and producer, ANDY OSKWAREK.

Their recent work includes collaborations alongside such directors as:

RINGAN LEDWIDGE (MOST AWARDED DIRECTOR WORLDWIDE - The Gunn Report)

GARTH DAVIS (Lion, Mary Magdalene) DEREK CIANFRANCE (Blue Valentine, The Place Beyond The Pines)

Name: Omega Recording Studios
Description: Since 1968, Omega Recording Studios has been a key player in the recording industry. One of the longest continuously-operated studios in the U.S., Omega has seen the likes of Prince, Elton Jon, Little Richard, Roger Waters of Pink Floyd, Billy Corgan, G.E. Smith, and others walk through its doors. Omega Studios also features a Nationally-Accredited Recording Arts School that has been educating Audio Professionals since 1977.

Name: Global Organ Group
Description:
The Global Organ Group is the largest player in the digital organ world. Our most important motivation has been our love of the authentic pipe organ sound. The heart of our mission is to make that sound accessible to a broad public in a variety of ways. In translating this mission to everyday practice, we set high standards for quality. 

Time and again, we combine this passion with technological advances in the making of new instruments, while craftsmanship and innovation continue to provide the rhythm. We are known the world over for the smart and strategic application of our knowledge, our continued product development and our use of advanced technology.

Name: The Audiophile's School of Sound Engineering
Description:
We are India’s only Audio Engineering School with an International approach to study. Our rich history and experience is the foundation for our values.

Our International Curriculum is bridged to the Indian Music Industry.

We are diverse, welcoming, accepting and passionate about being the best we can be. Join us to start your career in the Music Industry

Name: Girls Rock MKE
Description:
Girls Rock MKE is a summer day camp for girls and non-binary youth aged 8-16. Ladies Rock MKE is an intensive Friday-Sunday music camp for women, transgender and gender non-conforming folks of any identity 18 years or older. Campers of all skill levels learn an instrument (typically guitar, bass, drums, keyboard, or vocals), form a band, write a song, and perform their song at an end-of-camp showcase for friends, family, and fans.

The mission of Girls Rock MKE is to empower individuals of marginalized identities and diverse experiences through music education and performance.

Name: M88 Entertainment Group, Inc.
Description:
The M88 Entertainment Group, is a boutique agency based in Toronto, Canada that specializes in offering business solutions for people or organizations working in the music industry. Their clients include Musicians, Managers and Record Labels, with a niche speciality in working with emerging talent and providing them with services to develop their business and strategically plan their musical releases. 

Originally established in 2015 as M88 Management, the one-man consulting service founded by long-time, music industry veteran Allan Mamaril, scaled to become the M88 Entertainment Group in early 2017. After a series of partnership agreements and executive acquisitions, the expanded network allows M88 to provide a wider variety of business services to its existing client base and firmly position itself as a leading music business development agency catering to a wide variety of Artists, Management Teams and Organizations of all musical genres.

Name: Muziekschool Brabant Popbands Brabant
Description:
Bij Muziekschool Brabant is het onze missie om muziek leren voor iedereen leuk en toegankelijk te maken. Onze ervaren docenten staan klaar om zowel beginners als gevorderde muzikanten van alle leeftijden op een ontspannen en enthousiaste manier te begeleiden. We combineren plezier met professionaliteit, zonder concessies te doen aan de kwaliteit van onze lessen.
Alle docenten zijn afgestudeerd aan het conservatorium, wat betekent dat we garant staan voor de hoogste kwaliteit muziekonderwijs. Bovendien werken we kleinschalig, waardoor er altijd persoonlijke aandacht is in een aangename, inspirerende leeromgeving. Wij geloven dat de juiste combinatie van kwaliteit, kleinschaligheid, en plezier zorgt voor de beste muzikale groei.

Name: Campamento Artístico Bye Bye Beethoven
Description:
Diseñamos experiencias artísticas enriquecedoras de máxima calidad para niños y adolescentes. 

Somos disfrutones y nos va la marcha.
Location: Sevilla la Nueva, Comunidad de Madrid

Name: Le Centre culturel francophone de Vancouver
Description:
Le Centre culturel francophone de Vancouver has for mandate to:

- Organize shows in French and exhibitions of the work of Francophone and Francophile artists to cultivate an appreciation for the arts among the Vancouverites.
- Promote education by offering French-language educational services and programs to residents of the Vancouver metropolitan area (library, video library, language courses, summer camps, etc.).
- Promote public participation in Le Centre's activities.
- Acquire and manage the property required for Le Centre's activities.
- In this way, Le Centre presents professional caliber events and shows, offering the citizens of Vancouver access to artistic productions in French or visual, media and performing arts from the francophone culture. In addition, Le Centre offers an array of educational services to anyone who is interested in the activities of Le Centre, whether or not they speak French.

All services, programs or activities of Le Centre must support the objectives of Le Centre, directly or indirectly, either by their content or in their mode of distribution.

Name: Wave Life Studios
Description:
Music Production Studio specialized in Electronic Dance Music
From Underground sound to Mainstream productions, we manage artists projects at all levels, doing complete productions, additional productions, mixing, mastering services.

Name: Music Alliance Academy
Description: Music Alliance is a membership community created for you! All the support we know you will need to achieve success in music. Only the Elite get there but Elite is not some magic formula delivered by Ancient Aliens. It is knowledge, strategy, and an action plan.

Name: West Phil
Description:
West Phil (short for Western Sydney Philharmonic) aims to bring students and professional performers together, to learn from each other and to create thrilling, dynamic and memorable performances.

What started off as an idea to give the young people of western Sydney an opportunity to learn and play incredible music, is now the Western Sydney Philharmonic - western Sydney's very own orchestra.

We do this through youth-oriented training programmes culminating in performances that captivate our audiences, as well as other one-off performances and events.

And because we're a not-for-profit charity on the Register of Cultural Organisations, all the money we make is put back into West Phil for the benefit of young, potential musicians of western Sydney and elsewhere.

If you're enchanted by music, come to one of our concerts or please get in touch.

Name: Balkanrock
Description: Music website; Concert news from Serbia, Bosnia, Montenegro, Croatia, Hungary, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Romania & Macedonia. We publish music reviews, raports, articles etc. Balkanrock.com was founded in 2007 and has established itself as one of the biggest music websites in Balkan region.

Name: WMP
Description:
We are WMP. We create and curate sound, we add value, we focus audiences. 

We believe that audio is fifty percent of a project’s success and impact. Get it right and you will stand out from the crowd, be heard, be seen and given the attention you deserve. Get it wrong and you will just be more “noise”, indistinguishable from the hundreds of media projects released each month. 

Our team of music composers and sound designers craft and represent the highest possible audio quality and are here to help you find your unique voice. 

Outline your vision, clarify your audio strategy and create your project with confidence. Get in touch, today.

Name: Hawaii Youth Symphony
Description: Established as a non-profit organization in 1964, Hawaii Youth Symphony's mission is to foster fun and creative experiences for youth that inspire a deep appreciation for music and lifelong relationships within the culture of our islands. Each year, the organization elevates and empowers more than 750 students, ages 7 through 18 and from over 100 schools, in the service of nearly 20,000 child and adult concertgoers statewide.

Name: Surfdog/Dave Kaplan Management
Description:
Welcome to Surfdog and Dave Kaplan Management, where we live and breathe our passion for music in our tropical bungalows by the beach! Our company was established in 1985. It all started with Dave Kaplan opening the doors to the company’s first division: Dave Kaplan Management. Soon thereafter, came Surfdog Records, a wholly-owned independent record label. Then came Surfdog Music Publishing & Licensing, Surfdog Entertainment Marketing, Surfdog Merchandising and Surfdog’s Java Hut; all located in the slice of heaven we call Encinitas, CA.

Dave Kaplan Management has established a strong and extensive network of associates among the music industry, major and independent music labels, musicians and their management, film and television, and the action sports industry. DKM has worked with clients including Brian Setzer, Stray Cats, Sublime, UB40, Glen Campbell (co-management), Gary Hoey, Royal Crown Revue, BulletBoys, Dave Stewart, and Butthole Surfers, among many more.

Surfdog has released over 150 albums by artists such as Eric Clapton, Brian Setzer, Stray Cats, Glen Campbell, Dave Stewart, Joss Stone, Slightly Stoopid, Butthole Surfers, Richard Cheese, Dan Hicks and the Hot Licks, Gary Hoey and many more. We have also released several soundtrack albums, including “The Endless Summer II” and “Step Into Liquid.” Surfdog artists’ music has been prominently featured in movies (Mission Impossible, Elf, Madagascar, Soul Surfer, Monsters vs. Aliens, etc), TV shows (Ellen, American Idol, Dancing With The Stars, Gotham, East Bound and Down, Glee, ER, Scrubs, etc), plus major national commercials (Ford Lincoln-Mercury, Ritz, Miller Beer, Ashton Kutcher’s Nikon, Hallmark, etc).

Name: Lexington Philharmonic
Description:
The Lexington Philharmonic, founded in 1961, presents over 200 concerts and educational programs annually.  The mission of the Lexington Philharmonic is to foster excellence and innovation in the performance and presentation of great music; to enrich the lives of our diverse citizenry; to educate current and future audiences and to bring distinction to our community through the orchestra's presence and standing.

Each season, LexPhil features eight concerts of classical music and world-renowned guest artists each year. Inside the Score, a series of free pre-concert lectures, gives patrons a more in-depth look and preview of the evening's performance. 

LexPhil also offers extensive educational programs, reaching over 25,000 children a year through Discovery Concerts, Ensembles in Schools, Instrument Petting Zoos, Conductor in the Classroom programs, and Peanut Butter & Jelly Concerts.

For more info, visit lexphil.org.

Name: X-It Music
Description: X-It Music specializes in music & sound design for Film, Television & Video Game advertising.

Name: Stradivaria, orchestre baroque de Nantes
Description:
Stradivaria explore le répertoire baroque et classique selon une approche historiquement informée, engageant des musiciens spécialisés dans le jeu sur instruments d'époque, avec curiosité et exigence.
Fondé en 1987 par le violoniste Daniel Cuiller, pionnier de la révolution baroque, la direction artistique est assurée depuis 2023 par Guillaume Cuiller, hautboïste.

Le projet artistique défendu par Guillaume Cuiller s'oriente autour de deux axes de travail et de recherche spécifiques : la musique baroque française et la musique pour instruments à vent de la fin du 18ème siècle. 
Au-delà des questions d'ordre musicologique, c’est surtout dans une volonté de confronter la musique ancienne avec le monde d’aujourd’hui que les projets prennent de nouvelles formes, tissant des liens avec d’autres disciplines et d’autres styles musicaux.

Stradivaria réalise une trentaine de concerts et interventions pédagogiques par an, à Nantes, en région Pays de la Loire, mais également dans toute la France et à l’étranger.

En 2022, Stradivaria lance les apartés, des concerts de musique de chambre à la lumière des bougies, et des concerts commentés à destination des scolaires et des publics éloignés.

Le prochain album Swingin’ Partita sortira en février 2026 sous le label Mirare.
Premier album sous la direction de Guillaume Cuiller, il est consacré au répertoire pour vent des années 1800 complété par une commande au compositeur Guillaume Connesson, qui écrit sa propre partita rendant hommage aux divertissements viennois et aux années 1970.

Name: Big Bang - Music Booking & Management Agency
Description: We are booking agents and artist managers or official representatives of musicians and bands. We book live performances for the artists. Located in Sofia, Bulgaria.

Name: Infinity Scores
Description: Infinity Scores is a music library specifically designed for television needs, digital content, video games as well as commercial advertising and film promos.

Name: DEEDO
Description:
Pan African music ! Anytime, anywhere ! Free or on-demand.

Deedo is a global Pan African music streaming platform addressing Pan African content access, artists visibility, and social engagement through music.
Enjoy over 9 million African and international tracks !

Deedo is available by downloading the App for free on iOS and Android, or by using the Webplayer. Currently in France, UK, Senegal, Ivory Coast, Mali, Gabon, Cameroon & Nigeria.

Join the Deedoers’ family !

More infos :

- Listen to your favorite Pan African artists
- Search throughout the full catalog
- Save your own playlists
- Access a large selection of genres : rap, afrobeat, reggae, highlife, salsa, cabo, kizomba, jazz, mbalax, soukouss, electro, soul and much more !
- Stay informed of Pan African music releases : highlights, new releases, news and concerts, and discover new talents 

And all that for FREE !

More features by subscribing to our monthly plan of 6€ or 3 950 FCFA :

- No ads, no listening limitation, high quality sound
- Offline mode : save and enjoy your favorite playlists without internet connection
- Explore Pan African music by genre and by country
- Access ready-made playlists by your favorite DJs
- Access Monumentum : a tribute to A list dear departed Pan African artists
- Engage through One song, One soul : contribute to a social project

Did you do your Deedo today ?

Name: Elite Talent Agency, LLC
Description: Elite Talent Agency is a full-service music and talent booking agency founded by music industry veteran Mark Claassen. Through strategic partnerships within the Christian market, in-house tour marketing, relationships in the areas of film/tv, literary, commercial and corporate sponsorships, we strive to maximize each individual client, concert, or live engagement's potential.

Name: OTIS
Description: OTIS IS A MUSIC COMPOSITION AND SOUND DESIGN COLLECTIVE. WE CREATE WHAT YOU HEAR, TO SHAPE WHAT YOU FEEL.

Name: SEADOM - Southeast Asia Directors of Music Association
Description:
SEADOM is a Southeast Asia cultural and educational network, which was established in 2008. It represents the interests of institutions that are concerned with training for the music profession. Today, SEADOM has over 80 members in all 10 countries in Southeast Asia and throughout the world and countires to work towards its core mission aims for the good of musicians in the region.

SEADOM works for the advancement of Southeast Asia Music Education with a particular focus on professional training for musician as they engage with music, the arts and culture in contemporary society and for future generations. It does this through providing support, information, network opportunities and expert advice to the specialist institutions offering advanced music education, through engaging in advocacy and partnership-building at the regional and international levels.

Whilst music is the primary focus of SEADOM, dance and drama are often taught alongside music in the specialist institutions represented by the Association and, under those circumstances, its mission actively embraces these disciplines. The statements made here, and in the Aims, Objectives and Values of SEADOM, should therefore be regarded as also applying, where relevant, to these sister performing arts.

Name: Upton Park
Description:
For more than 15 years, the french label UPTON PARK has developped an eclectic & qualitativ catalog through very different kind of artists like Matmatah (french rock), Stuck in the sound (indie rock), NSDOS (electronic), Svinkels (hip-hop), Thomas Howard Memorial ( psychedelic pop), or more recently Skopitone Sisko (indie pop).
Upton Park also extend its activities on managing some of its artists, publishing songs for Catfish, Bigger or Robin Foster, and even managing publishing rights for companies like Diskoloandia (Sarah W Papsun) & Éditions Levallois (world music catalog).

Name: Higher Rhythm Ltd
Description:
Based in Doncaster since 2001, Higher Rhythm provides opportunities and services in the music and media industries across Yorkshire and beyond.

We’re unique regionally, combining a dynamic mix of different offers into a single hub. This includes recording studios, radio broadcasting, courses (including further & higher education), artist / industry development, creative projects, events and volunteering opportunities.

We work with partners, local to global, and deliver programmes, supporting more people to access and grow sustainable careers in our ever-evolving industries.

Name: Blue Élan Records
Description:
At Blue Élan, we believe in doing things differently. We are an artist-friendly label, bringing expertise, perseverance, a long history of working with talent, and an environment that fosters creativity on the artist’s terms. We make available distribution, marketing, and creative services, relationships, and total dedication to the acts we sign. Blue Élan’s mission is to provide a path for our artists to create without interference and give them the tools to succeed in today’s music business.

Simply put, we think music and the process of making music should be about the fun, the art, the excitement, and the chance to be heard. We chose part of our name to reflect our commitment to energy and enthusiasm.

With a strong focus on family engagement, Tkiya partners with over 40 organizations in the New York Metro Area, New Jersey and the Bay Area in California to provide experiences that are welcoming to all, regardless of background. We are a nonprofit 501(c)3 organization based in New York.

Name: EMI Archive Trust
Description:
We are The EMI Archive Trust, one of the world’s largest and most diverse music and technology archives. The EMI Archive Trust is an independent UK registered charity that preserves the history of EMI, whose origins date back to 1897.

Our collections cover an extraordinary journey through British and global history, starting with the early recorded music industry and the role that EMI (originally The Gramophone Company) played in the emerging industry’s development and globalisation, from 1897 through to 1946.

In addition to material relating to EMI’s musical heritage, the Trust also preserves artefacts associated with the company’s significant achievements in electrical engineering,  television, communications including radar, science and medicine, along with the early archives of the HMV music shops and the iconic Abbey Road Studios.

Artefacts include rare and unheard recordings from the first years of the recorded music industry, along with photographs, letters, diaries, sales catalogues and EMI company records. A multi-cultural and global archive, the Trust charts music’s impact on society through recordings, artist and performer histories and the technology, inventions and innovation that underpinned the industry.

Our collections are available, on site in London, to academics, discographers, researchers, our institutional partners and the general public upon request. Onsite filming, photography and interview requests are considered on a case by case basis. The Trust loans artefacts under strict policy guidelines to museums and exhibitions.

Wholly supported by Universal Music Group, the global leader in music-based entertainment, the administration of The Trust is undertaken by a Board of renowned independent Trustees, with pro-bono support from Universal Music Group employees.

The Trustees of the EMI Archive Trust invite you to contact our Heritage Curator, Joanna Hughes, for further information at joanna@emiarchivetrust.org

Name: Metropolis Festival
Description:
Het Metropolis Festival is een jaarlijks, eendaags, gratis toegankelijk, openlucht muziekfestival in Rotterdam op de eerste zondag in juli. Het programma bestaat uit een mix van pop, rock, hiphop, wereldmuziek en dance. Zo gevarieerd als de programmering, zo divers zijn de vele bezoekers. In 2015 beleeft het festival zijn 27e editie op zondag 5 juli. Als altijd in het Zuiderpark in Rotterdam.

Metropolis is enig in zijn soort. Avontuurlijk. Eigenzinnig. Trendsettend. Bedoeld voor iedereen die wil kennismaken met excellent vernieuwend en verrassend talent.

Meer Rotterdams én nog nationaler kan niet. Metropolis is niet alleen een toonzettend evenement binnen het festivalaanbod van de stad, het heeft een landelijke reputatie als de ‘must-be’ vindplaats voor opkomend muziektalent. Voor de vele liefhebbers van originele popmuziek, met een onweerstaanbare drang naar het onbekende is Metropolis in elk geval het nummer 1 festival van Nederland.

Name: Beatbox Music Pty Ltd
Description:
Established in 1987, Beatbox Music is the largest independent Australian owned and operated company specialising in providing the highest quality production music and trailer music. We represent the world’s top indie labels and distribute more than 500,000 tracks via our innovative search systems available in either online or offline solutions.

Our extensive library is used daily in network television shows, theatrical trailers, promos, TVCs, online social videos, radio and corporate productions. The Beatbox Collection is available exclusively to media professionals including producers, directors, editors, and audio engineers in Australia, New Zealand, and South East Asia.

 WE'VE GOT YOU COVERED: Our team of experienced and dedicated Music Consultants live and breathe music, and are always happy to help our clients with music searches and curating playlists to brief.

WE SUPPORT COMPOSERS: We believe in protecting the rights of composers and maintaining the value of music by adopting and adhering to the standard production music industry principles whereby composers share in the royalties generated by use of their music. This system of licensing acknowledges and protects the composers’ intellectual rights and generates royalties in recognition of an artist’s creativity.

WE LIVE FOR MUSIC: Apart from representing over 150 libraries, Beatbox boasts three of its own labels. The original Beatbox label was launched in 1998 and is produced in Australia. Over the years it has grown in both size and popularity, and has risen in the ranks to become one of Australia’s most go-to libraries. Recently, in response to demand, we created two additional specialised series – DramaBox and Black Knight.  

DramaBox is specifically produced for TV drama. The series is especially suited for use in unscripted, reality and documentary television show. Black Knight is a rising star that's epic and dramatic in style with high production values.

Name: WotNot Music Library

Featuring artists from the WotNot catalogue as well as from throughout the underground music scene, it is among the most authentic electronic music libraries available.

Name: BIG FAN
Description:
We love music and the people who make it. 

BIG FAN is a purpose-built space for people to create, write, record, produce and perform in high-end recording studios, and a live music venue, all under one roof.  

BIG FAN is dedicated to helping people fulfil themselves through music. We want to support musicians and the music industry from the ground up, and we are committed to making the facility accessible for everybody. 

Our goal is to create a community that brings people together, encourages and supports the use of music in the betterment of people’s lives, and fosters the talents of musicians, songwriters and those that work behind the scenes at every level.

We believe musical talent is everywhere in this country. BIG FAN is for anyone who is passionate or curious about music, and wants to explore where it could take them.

Our entrepreneurial spirit fuels the pursuit of our vision of evolving dreams into reality by welcoming challenges as opportunities, embracing individuality, and championing the power of community.

Community is where we find connection which drives our artistic goals. Our curriculum, taught in person and online, empowers you to be your best creative self.

Jazz North is supported by Arts Council England as one of its national Sector Support Organisations.

Name: Dazmo Inc
Description:
Montreal's Dazmo specializes in scoring, music composition and song writing for sync: TV, film and advertising. Dazmo also offers to produce cover songs and song clearance services.
DAZMO has one of the truly outstanding team of composers/songwriters to emerge from the Canadian music scene. The team has scored and produced music for over 100 TV shows and two dozen films, a multitude of music for advertising and has penned songs, arranged and produced albums for many performers nationally and internationally. Sari Dajani, Iohann Martin, Pierre Luc Rioux and Rudy Toussaint form the core of the team of composer/producer at Dazmo Music. 
Dazmo also offers services for music composer such as digital distribution, publishing administration. 
Depuis Montréal, Dazmo se spécialise dans la création, la composition musicale et l'écriture de musiques pour la synchronisation (musique a l’image): télévision, film et publicité. Dazmo peut aussi produire des version de chansons et libérer les droits au besoin
DAZMO possède l'une des équipes de compositeurs / auteurs-compositeurs les plus remarquables à émerger de la scène musicale canadienne. L'équipe a écrit et produit de la musique pour plus de 100 séries (TV) et des douzaines de films, de nombreuses musiques pour la publicité et a écrit des chansons, arrangé et produit des albums pour de nombreux artistes à l'échelle nationale et internationale. Sari Dajani, Iohann Martin, Pierre Luc Rioux et Rudy Toussaint forment le noyau de l'équipe de compositeur / producteur de Dazmo Music. 
Dazmo propose également des services aux les compositeurs de musique tels que la distribution numérique, l'administration de l'édition.

Name: Les Studios de la Seine
Description:
Dans un cadre professionnel et chaleureux, Les Studios de la Seine vous proposent 5 studios d’enregistrement et de mixage sur une surface de 950m².

En accord avec son temps et avec l’évolution de l’industrie musicale, notre équipe met à votre disposition 2 plateaux de 80m², 1 plateau de 60m² ainsi que 5 studios à l’acoustique étudiée :

3 studios analogiques équipés d’une SSL XL9000 K SERIES 72 voies, d’une NEVE V3 60 voies et d’une SSL 4000G 56 voies. 1 studio numérique avec écoute 5.1 équipé d’une Oxford 120 voies. 1 studio de post production.

Pour une simple prise de voix, la production d’un album ou bien le mixage d’une musique de film, une équipe d’ingénieurs du son qualifiés vous apportera son expérience et l’expertise nécessaire à la réalisation de vos projets.

Name: The Bach Choir
Description:
Founded in 1876, The Bach Choir is recognised as one of the world’s leading choruses, building upon a tradition that combines musical excellence with creativity and innovation. Our mission is to inspire people of all ages and backgrounds with the magnificence and emotional power of choral music.  

From the first performance in Britain of Bach’s Mass in B minor to the soundtrack for Ridley Scott’s 2012 epic Prometheus, our musical heritage is as rich as it is diverse.  Directed by David Hill, one of the country’s most eminent conductors, we regularly perform and record across London and the UK in prestigious venues, from the Royal Festival Hall to Abbey Road Studios.

Singing together and sharing diverse musical experiences, has a unique power to inspire and connect humans - improving our health, happiness and social inclusion.  Not only does that benefit our members and audiences, but also the children and other participants in our community engagement programmes. We have been working with schools in East and North London for over 10 years, nurturing young talent, and inspiring them to sing out with confidence.  We also regularly commission music from new and young composers – the Bachs of the future.

We are an entirely self-financing not-for-profit organisation. Even with our very lean business model, with only a handful of paid staff and the majority of tasks undertaken by volunteers from the singing membership, we need to raise at least £100,000 every year to allow us to keep bringing our choral performances to the widest range of people, to keep commissioning work from fresh new voices and to spark the joy of singing in young and old alike. If you are passionate about music, and its power to connect and inspire people, please get in touch at devadmin@thebachchoir.org.uk to see how we can collaborate.

Name: VoxStrot
Description:
Zingen is topsport!
Om een topprestatie te kunnen leveren, is het belangrijk om te trainen. Zo zorg je ervoor dat jouw belastbaarheid in balans is met je stembelasting. Zo ga je voor die uitvoering op topniveau! Topsporters werken met trainingsschema’s. Dat gunnen wij jou als zanger ook! Toppresteerders werken met trainers & coaches voor de fysieke en mentale ontwikkeling. Met onze doelgerichte, technische begeleiding werken we aan de opbouw van conditie en spierkracht, aan balans en flexibiliteit. We begeleiden je in je uithoudingsvermogen. Alles om blessures te voorkomen en optimaal te presteren.

Wie zijn wij?

VoxStrot is een platform van Specialisten voor Vocalisten. In 2020 bundelden wij onze krachten en specialisaties, vanuit onze passie voor de mens en de stem. Iedereen werkt vanuit zijn of haar eigen expertise, netwerk en kracht. De lijnen onderling zijn kort. Iedereen heeft zijn eigen praktijk of bedrijf. Als jij iets nodig hebt, hebben wij elkaar snel gevonden. Op deze manier biedt VoxStrot jou de juiste begeleiding op de juiste plek en het juiste moment. En natuurlijk bepaal je altijd zelf wat of wie het beste bij jou past. We kijken graag met je mee.

Van kno-arts tot mental-coach, van zangcoach tot fysiotherapeut, logopedist, een specialist op het gebied van podiumpresentatie, singer-songwriter tot Vocal Massage, persoonlijke coaching, osteopathie en cranio sacraal. Het is allemaal te vinden in dit team. Voor jou!

Name: Legacy Music Group
Description: Legacy Music Group is an artist development company and a full-service recording studio in Dallas, Texas, owned and operated by music business maven Matthew Medlock. Anyone with a crusty old cassette player can see that the music industry is constantly evolving. But for many musicians, the ways in which they handle their livelihood has remained stagnant. That’s why we’re here. Whether you’re new to the industry or pursuing your longtime dream of plunging into a career as a full-time musician, Legacy Music Group is your Spirit Guide for professional music development.

Name: Audio Distribution Group ApS
Description:

Previously, brands have had the option of either developing their own distribution model as a part of their business or choosing a mix of distributors who either covered one or a standard mix of countries.

We offer our brands an effective, efficient and reliable route to market in the European region. We seek to provide additional value to the standard distribution model and build strategic partnerships with all of our associated brands, retailers and audio professionals across the continent.

Based in Denmark, but with staff based  throughout Europe, we maintain a strong focus on developing those strategic partnerships and maximising efficiency, profitability and market share for both our dealers and brand partners.

Name: Los Coming Soon
Description:
Los Coming Soon are an explosion of happiness and dancing. Inspired by funk & disco music, they focus on the groove, becoming an infallible formula for the party.

With an organic and minimalist instrumentation, they achieve a crystalline and surround sound, interpreting their songs with a fresh and personal imprint. Patricio Hirsch, connect with the audience by participating into a 21st century disco experience.

---

Los Coming Soon son una explosión de alegría y baile. Inspirados en la música funk y disco, se centran en el groove, convirtiéndose en una fórmula infalible para la fiesta.

Con una instrumentación orgánica y minimalista, logran un sonido cristalino e envolvente, interpretando sus canciones con un toque fresco y personal. Patricio Hirsch conecta con el público, creando una experiencia disco del siglo XXI.

Forte d’une expérience acquise auprès de grandes maisons comme Universal Music, Sony Music et Believe, notre équipe met son savoir-faire au service des artistes, en combinant créativité, expertise technique et vision stratégique, en faisant preuve d'une approche humaine et sur mesure.
