Name: Sonic Unyon Records
Description: Sonic Unyon Recording Company (founded 1993) is an independent record label based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada. The label has put out releases by bands including Tristan Psionic, Sianspheric, Shallow North Dakota, Eric's Trip, Hayden, Chore, Big Wreck, Terra Lightfoot and Basement Revolver. We have expanded into the festival scene with Supercrawl, Because Beer, Why Not Wine and Fresh up and venues Mills Hardware and Bridgeworks.

Name: Cia. Bachiana Brasileira
Description:
Corpo artístico da Sociedade Musical Bachiana Brasileira - SMBB, a Cia. Bachiana Brasileira nasceu carioca em 1999 configurando a expressão de uma atitude cujas consequências estéticas constituem a sua meta e o seu principal diferencial.

Desde então desenvolve projetos com repertório, elenco e tempo de realização definidos para cada produção, buscando, de forma disciplinada e perseverante, uma sonoridade própria na execução da música de concerto, nacional e estrangeira.

A direção e a regência são do seu fundador, igualmente criador da SMBB, maestro Ricardo Rocha.

O sucesso de suas montagens atesta a posição ímpar que a Cia. Bachiana Brasileira ocupa hoje no cenário musical brasileiro, pelo alto padrão de qualidade com que executa do colonial brasileiro e barroco europeu à música contemporânea.

Name: Carousel
Description:
Carousel believes that learning disabled artists make a vital contribution to the world we live in. It is an organisation that puts learning disabled people in control of their art; in film, music, performance and production. Carousel challenges expectations of what great art is and who can create it. Our work is planned, managed and delivered by learning disabled teams and 50% of our Board members have a learning disability.

Whilst many of our artistic activities are programmed for the years ahead, there are ways to get involved with our work as an artist or volunteer, as audience or as a supporter.  

Our projects include Oska Bright Film Festival, our new online graphic novel Curing Perfect, multi-media performance Creatures of the Revolution and Creative Minds, the national conversation about learning disability arts.

Name: Pull (a music company) Inc
Description:
Pull is a unique music production studio based in NYC. 
We don't outsource our work to a team of faceless freelancers nor rely on pre-fab libraries - we create everything in-house, from start to finish. That means you're working directly with the same people creating the work. We're a bespoke shop, and we take pride in our personalized approach to our craft whether it's an album, 30 second spot, branded content or film.

Our philosophy is simple: we believe in quality over quantity. We're not interested in churning out generic music that feels like assembly line soundalikes. Instead, we take the time to understand our clients' vision and work collaboratively with them to create ownable music that's as unique as they are.

Our commitment to authenticity has earned us a reputation for high standards and creativity. So much so that many of today’s top producers have trusted Pull as an inspiring environment for collaborations and recording. We’ve had the pleasure of working with some amazing brands and agencies - Apple, Google, VW, Nike, ESPN, Samsung, Volvo, Ebay, GM, Instagram…and we're always looking for new challenges and opportunities to create music that pushes boundaries and inspires.

pullpullpull.com
@pullstudios

Name: Music & Youth Initiative
Description:
We create accessible, sustainable, high quality music programs so every young person can experience the magic of music. 

Music & Youth Initiative was founded in 2004 to partner with youth development organizations serving under-resourced urban communities. We provide partners with multi-year funding and extensive program support to help them create and sustain after-school music programs, which they integrate into their overall program offerings. (Learn more in our Programs and Partnership Opportunities section). 

 

Our programs focus on youth participants in 7th grade and up, and are designed to be a safe place for young people to explore their musical interests. But more importantly, our programs use music as a vehicle to help participants understand and express their emotions, and develop life skills as they move toward adulthood. Our programs are intentionally self-directed and encourage teens to play the music they are interested in. 

 

Music & Youth works closely with each partner to design their program facility and outfit it with the appropriate equipment and gear. We stay with our partners for the long run; creating a community of collaboration, sharing best practices, facilitating professional development, and encouraging a culture of support among all our partners. We continually evaluate current musical trends and changes in technology to ensure our programs remain relevant and attractive to our teen participants.

 

Music & Youth, based in the Boston area, supports youth development partners across the United States. We support the efforts of hundreds of full and part-time staff at our partner organizations, who are all working to bring the magic of music to the teens they serve. Most importantly, thousands of underserved youth each week are learning how to play an instrument, or are writing, recording, and performing their original songs. They are daring to dream about their future, building confidence for a better life!

Name: bemusico
Description:
bemusico ist die Schulungs- und Seminar-Plattform für Musiker. In Form von Live Webcast, Webinaren und Online Seminaren werden Themen mit dem Fokus „Musik“ angeboten. Seit 2020 werden fortlaufend zu verschiedenen Terminen spannende Online Seminare, Kurse und Trainings angeboten. Alle Vorträge werden digital Online als Webcast durchgeführt. Die Teilnehmer können während der Online Seminare über Chat Ihre Fragen direkt an die Speaker und Experten stellen. Wer an den Online Seminaren teilnehmen will, kann sich anmelden und eines der verfügbaren Teilnehmertickets sichern.

Schnell und direkt: Digitales Lernen kann Wissen schnell und direkt vermitteln kann. Die Online Seminare auf bemusico sind Live Webcasts, die zu festen Terminen online stattfinden. Im Gegensatz zu einem YouTube-Video oder einem TV-Beitrag, besteht bei einem interaktiven Online-Seminar auf bemusico der direkte Kontakt zu Dozenten, Speaker und Moderatoren.

Einfach und sicher: Die Teilnahme an bemusico muss sehr einfach, aber auch sehr sicher sein. Daher ist für die Teilnahme an unseren Online Seminaren keine Installation von Software auf dem Computer notwendig. Auch fallen keine Reisekosten oder aufwendige Organisationen an. Die Teilnahme kann direkt im HomeOffice bzw. im eigenen Proberaum mit Instrument erfolgen.

Live und interaktiv: Fragen direkt über den Chat an die Dozenten stellen und bei Umfragen live mitwirken – all das sehen wir als Qualitätsmerkmale unseres Lernkonzepts. Daher finden die Online Seminare auf bemusico immer 100% live zum angegebenen Termin statt.

Name: 'Cane Records
Description: ‘Cane Records is the student-run record label at the University of Miami Frost School of Music.  Established in 1993, it was one of the first record labels of its kind. Its goals are to provide students with real world experience operating an independent record company and to provide developing recording artists with the opportunity to launch their recording career by exposing their name and recordings to the broadest possible audience.

Name: Christian Roovers Music
Description:
CHRISTIAN ROOVERS is an accomplished composer and instrumentalist from Green Bay, WI, boasting an impressive 21-year journey in the realm of music composition, drumming, and piano. His deep-rooted passion for music blossomed during his formative years, finding him seated at his Baldwin upright after school, meticulously crafting melodic themes. From tender love notes to resounding battle anthems, Christian's early compositions showcased the breadth of his creative prowess.

Christian's artistic palette traverses a diverse spectrum, spanning from the introspective realm of solo piano compositions, exemplified by pieces like "Morning and the Moon," to the captivating world of hybrid orchestral music composition, epitomized by his recent album, "Trilogy." His creative passion finds particular resonance in genres like neo-classical and new age solo piano, as well as the enchanting territory of hybrid orchestral music. Additionally, his contemporary instrumental creations delve into spiritual, meditative, and sound energy dimensions, captivating audiences with their emotional depth.

Christian's solo piano songbook, sheet music, and CDs are available for purchase at his official online store: https://www.christianroovers.com/store.

To delve deeper into his musical voyage, please visit www.christianroovers.com or establish a direct connection via email at christian@tableinthewoods.com.

Name: Tosco Music
Description:
With a joyous love of song and an inviting spirit, Tosco Music is a nonprofit organization that breaks down the barriers between performers and audiences to celebrate the incredible power of music and bring people together. For over 30 years, Tosco Music has proudly presented a diverse variety of performers, fostered a sense of community among listeners and performers, and connected professional and amateur musicians to share and inspire one another.

Born from intimate living room jam sessions in Charlotte, NC, Tosco Music Parties have grown into popular community concerts where nationally recognized acts share the stage with undiscovered artists and audience members are invited to sing along throughout the evening.

Name: Fondazione Accademia di Imola "Incontri con il Maestro"
Description: Altissima Formazione Musicale Internazionale. Corsi di Laurea in Musicologia in otto indirizzi di Prassi Musicale. Promozione giovani talenti e valorizzazione del patrimonio musicale.

Name: Dallas Austin
Description: Grammy Award-Winning US record producer, songwriter and executive Dallas Austin.

Name: Zendyll Music
Description:
Zendyll Music is a versatile music agency that excels in creating exceptional experiences in the world of entertainment. From crafting unforgettable events to driving impactful marketing campaigns, we are your partner in shaping musical dreams. 

Our expertise spans Events & Entertainment Solutions, where we curate remarkable live experiences, and Marketing/Creative/PR, where we harness creativity to amplify your musical story. 

Our state-of-the-art Productions Studios offers Music Production services, where melodies come alive, and a professional Recording Studio to capture every note with precision. At Zendyll Music, we're dedicated to bringing your musical aspirations to life through a harmonious blend of innovation and artistry.

Name: 2Indie
Description: Most indie artists don't have a roadmap to success in the music industry. The problem is that there's no one-size-fits-all path to career fulfillment. And it can be a lonely journey to navigate. That's why we founded 2Indie, a coaching company that empowers music makers with the innovative programs and inspiring community they need to supercharge their careers. We're on a mission to make career fulfillment possible for all music makers!

Name: The Music Circle
Description:
The Music Circle was established with a vision to build a strong community of music lovers, to pique the curiosity of young minds and inspire them to reach their full potential in life through shared experiences in music.

The team of like-minded music educators shares a common passion – making a positive difference in children’s lives.

This strong and innovative team collaborates actively through exchange and discourse, bringing out the best in each other to provide effective programmes for our students and participants.

Name: CNR Entertainment BV
Description:
Toen Cornelis Nicolaas Rood in 1937 bij wijze van hobby muziek begon uit te geven, kon deze Rijswijkse lampenkappen- en verlichtingshandelaar nooit hebben bevroed dat bijna 75 jaar later zijn CNR als inmiddels oudste Nederlandse platenmaatschappij nog immers actief is in de markt. CNR richt zich meer dan ooit op de ontwikkeling van artiesten in het Popsegment en Volks repertoire. 

Nieuwe releases van respectievelijk C2C, Andy Grammer, Pearl Jozefzoon, Jannes, JURK!, Satellite Stories en Wolter Kroes zijn daar getuige van. Verder biedt CNR Comedy (o.a. Tineke Schouten, Finkers, Youp) en TV-series zoals Gooische Vrouwen op DVD. Op het gebied van compilaties timmert CNR als vanouds aan de weg met het Arcade label. Op dit vermaarde compilatie label worden succesvolle concepten in de markt gezet, waaronder de TV-hit "de Beste Zangers van NL"

Name: Outer Sound
Description: DIY platform designed to empower musicians and creatives, connecting them with opportunities to showcase their talent while providing essential tools to grow and thrive in their craft.

Name: Pipoca Sound
Description: We work with everything related to sound: music composition and music production, sound design, mixing, developing podcasts and soundscapes, recording and sound editing.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Blue Room Recording Studios
Description:
Blue Room Recording Studios is a premier recording studio team based in Los Angeles (West) and Atlanta (South) and home to multiple multi-platinum and Grammy-nominated songs and artists. It is our passion to provide recording artists with a comfortable studio environment, exceptional service and hospitality, and a wide variety of powerful production tools to help aid the creative process. Our objective is to influence the music industry in a positive and ethical way and set a new bar for authenticity, transparency, and integrity. 

“The goal is artist achievement and the best work we can do with no limitations” - Rick Rubin

Name: Mack Avenue Music Group
Description: With a core emphasis on jazz and soul/R&B, Mack Avenue boasts a diverse roster of musical innovators such as Christian McBride, Cecile McLorin Salvant, Macy Gray, Billy Childs, Kirk Whalum, Julian Lage, Jeffrey Osborne, Alfredo Rodriguez, Joey Defrancesco, Chucho Valdes, Cyrille Aimee Jonathan Butler, Kenny Garrett, Stanley Clark, Tia Fuller, Christian Sands, The Yellowjackets and many others.

Name: Music For All Luxembourg
Description:
« Près de 80% des managers ne savent pas que, bien utilisée, la musique constitue un formidable outil d’accompagnement des équipes au quotidien. » Alain Goudey, Harvard Business Review

De la musique vers l’entreprise, l'équipe « Music For All » propose aux collaborateurs et aux entreprises l’enseignement de plusieurs instruments (violon, guitare, flûte, piano, chant, batterie ou encore ateliers chorale) pendant les pauses déjeuners et le soir après les heures de travail.

Nous sommes convaincus qu’apprendre la musique permet de développer naturellement des soft-skills comme :
le travail en équipe et la collaboration
la précision
l’écoute
la patience
l’endurance
le sens du résultat,...

L’apprentissage d’un instrument ou la pratique du chant permet de réduire le stress, d’améliorer le bien-être au travail et d’augmenter les capacités de mémorisation des collaborateurs.

Les cours se font par le biais d'une méthode unique d'apprentissage ludique et sont destinés à des élèves de tout âge (enfants et adultes) et tout niveau. 

Notre école est située en plein de centre ville de Luxembourg, au 20 rue Louvigny.

Plusieurs entreprises ont choisi d’accompagner leurs collaborateurs à l’aide de la musique dans leur organisation. Et vous ?

Name: PolyEast Records
Description: PolyEast Records is one of the biggest and leading independent record labels in the Philippines.

Name: Alt-Life Music
Description: At Alt-Life Music we are all about carefully crafted Production Music that stands out on quality and high production values. Our catalogue is diverse, and created by some of the best international creators in the business, as well as exciting young talent from around the world. We are a global Production Music library based between London and New York, and licensed across the world through BMG Production Music. High quality production music under one license.

Name: Orchestra Sinfonica di Savona
Description:
A long time has passed since 1992, when the Savona Association for chamber music, then the Symphonic Orchestra of Savona, wanted to fill a lack of music in the city, which boasts a flagship such as the Chiabrera Theater. He immediately took over the direction of the Massimo De Bernart Orchestra. In 2002 Carlo Maria Giulini became honorary president making it the only orchestra in the world to have had this privilege. From 2006 to 2013 its permanent conductor was Filippo Maria Bressan, one of the few Italian conductors specialized in the eighteenth-century repertoire performed with the practice of the time, called to conduct top-level orchestras, both in Italy and abroad, making him one of the most prestigious sticks on the national scene. The orchestra's activity ranges from symphonic to opera, to chamber music, especially in the version with only strings. There are also numerous performances conducted in the modern rhythmic-symphonic formation. His recording activity boasts the creation of world premieres recorded titles. Since 2017 the Music Academy of Savona Ferrato-Cilea has been merged with the Orchestra, an increasingly high-level cultural, production and musical training center. The Academy boasts a close collaboration with the Vivaldi Conservatory of Alessandria. The Voxonus Festival, focused on the Baroque, was born from the experience of the prestigious Voxonus 'Academy of musicians and singers', recognized as the only stable symphonic, opera and choral reality in Italy dedicated to the eighteenth and nineteenth century repertoire and performed with original instruments of the time. 

In 2022 the review celebrates its 11th edition and inaugurates the Research Center on the Italian Quartet.

Name: Musikbüro Basel
Description:
Das Musikbüro Basel ist ein Verein, der sich vor knapp 30 Jahren aus der lokalen Rockmusikszene gegründet hat. Mit über 300 Mitgliedern als Basis, ist er mittlerweile in der Populärmusikszene Basel, in ihrer gesamten Vielfalt breit abgestützt.

Seit seiner Gründung fördert der Verein Musikbüro Basel die regionale Populärmusik in ihrer Gesamtheit. Die Förderung besteht aus Beratung, finanzieller Unterstützung und Vermittlung von Know-How, Netzwerk und Infrastruktur. Sichtbarkeit für die Szene zu schaffen, um ihre Relevanz in der Gesellschaft aufzuzeigen, ist dabei ein zentrales Anliegen des Vereins.

Das Musikbüro Basel steht für die Förderung einer diversen Musikszene in unserer diversen Gesellschaft. Der Verein sieht sich als Institution, die durch Szenennähe, menschliche Nahbarkeit, die Mitwirkungsmöglichkeit der Mitglieder und Niederschwelligkeit die Stärkung der Szene als oberstes Ziel hat.

Name: Authentic Empire Music Group
Description: #1 Indie Label Servicing Indie Artists Worldwide | Foogiano, Euro Gotit, Money Mu & More.

Name: 9122 RECORDS
Description:
9122 Records is a one-of-its-kind entity in India, wholly focused on International Music.  The independent record label curates international music from around the world and presents it to the Indian & South Asian audiences, who are now consuming international music like never before. In a nutshell, 9122 Records is a full-service record label that extends distribution, marketing and promotion services to independent artists and labels.

Sunil D'Sa, a seasoned music industry professional with 25+ years of experience, including his tenure as `Vice President - Marketing’ at Universal Music Group (India), heads 9122 Records - the Mumbai-based record label. Sunil now specializes in the marketing and promotion of international music in India & South Asia. 

With a strong track record since 2019, 9122 Records has emerged as a go-to label in India for global independent talent, partnering with esteemed labels like BMG, [PIAS] Group, MNRK Music Group, Empire, S-Curve Records, Entertainment One, Scorpio Music, Confession, Selah Vie International, ToCo International to name a few, besides a whole array of unsigned independent artists from around the world.

9122 Records has delivered impressive results, including Platinum and Gold records, and surpassing a BILLION cumulative streams in 2024 across its diverse roster of artists that include Jennifer Lopez, Akon, Shaboozey, 5 Seconds Of Summer, Louis Tomlinson, Kylie Minogue, HRVY, Monsta X, Shaggy, Nickelback, Rita Ora, Backstreet Boys amongst others. 

9122 Records is your gateway to the vibrant Indian music market…Dial-In!

Name: Initiative Pop
Description: We offer extensive cost-free business seminars on "Do It Yourself in the Music Business" within the European Greater Region. With the help of guidelines, lectures, workshops, panels and mentoring-based projects, we help ambitious market participants (artists, bookers, publishers, ...) and young professionals to implement their own visions efficiently and independently into the pop music industry. Sustainable networking and the increase of the artist’s mobility within the European Greater Region are key factors of our work.

Name: OurVinyl
Description:
Started in May 2009, OurVinyl.com set out to embrace the emerging technology of this era and the way our generation has grown to listen, appreciate and respect a larger variety of music and the art surrounding it. Together we are artists, students, producers and fans connected by our mutual passion for music.  We have been influenced by the changes in the music industry and the birth of creative companies such as Pandora, Daytrotter and La blogotheque.  We want to make a difference in the industry and contribute something unique. We have tons of ideas for the future so join us for the ride.

On our site currently you will find exclusive video interviews, performances and articles covering a variety of categories. We let our writers cover topics that they find interesting. We do not force our writers to write any articles and are not specific to one genre. We hope you find something new along the way. In the next year our site hopes to continue to document some of the influential artists of our generation.  We hope to share with you their stories and wish to help our readers connect with musicians in a more intimate way.  We hope to deliver quality and consistency.  Just as vinyl is relevant today, OurVinyl plans to be relevant to our generation years from now.

Name: Sinfonia Leipzig
Description:
Wir, die SINFONIA LEIPZIG, sind ein Startup-Orchester der wohl schönsten Musikstadt Mitteldeutschlands. Ursprünglich gründeten wir uns aus der Idee heraus, das alljährliche Sommerloch zu schließen, in dem sich alle Kulturorchester in der Spielzeitpause befinden. So trug der Klangkörper bis einschließlich 2018 den passenden Namen SommerOrchester Leipzig.

Mittlerweile sind wir jedoch ganzjährig aktiv und bespielen neben verschiedenen Konzertsälen auch außergewöhnliche Orte wie öffentliche Parks, das Panometer Leipzig oder die Krypta des Völkerschlachtdenkmals unserer schönen Stadt.

Neben unseren bereits bestehenden Projekten, wie der „Opera Casa“ und „Opera Casa Mini“, bei denen wir in Ihre Wohnung kommen und dort für Sie bekannte Opern wie beispielsweise „Carmen“, „La Traviata“, „Der fliegende Holländer“ oder „Hänsel und Gretel“ aufführen, starten wie im Jahr 2019 eine komplett neue Sinfoniekonzert-Reihe.

Dort werden wir zunächst die Klassiker der Musikgeschichte, wie Dvoraks 9. Sinfonie – Aus der neuen Welt, oder die meisterhaften Sinfonien Beethovens aufführen.

Bei uns spielen vorwiegend Freiberufler, aber auch festangestellte Musiker aus über 20 Nationen.

Name: MUSIC FOR SPORT
Description:
MUSIC FOR SPORT is a high-quality international production music library, specializing in sports-orientated music and soundtracks. Since launching in 1992 at the Barcelona Olympics, Music For Sport has become one of the leading providers of production music for the world's broadcast and webcast media.

MUSIC FOR SPORT’s wide-ranging library of modern contemporary instrumental music, crafted by a dynamic and highly experienced team of composers, producers, engineers and musicians, is precision-made for today’s media requirements.

MUSIC FOR SPORT tracks are available in  48K 24 bit wav, and 320kbps mp3 formats. Tracks have multiple versions: typically a song length version, a 60″, a 30″, a 15″, a Sting, an Underscore version, and an Alternate Mix. MUSIC FOR SPORT is designed to be extremely editor friendly.

Recent MUSIC FOR SPORT credits include BBC, CNBC, Sky Sports, ITV, Discovery Channel, Capital Radio, CSI, NCIS, The Tonight Show, Parking Wars, American Restoration, The History Channel, The Travel Channel, Inside Racing, and The National Geographic Channel.

Name: Musiclink
Description:
MusicLink lleva el concierto que soñaste hasta ti! No importa dónde - la sala de un departamento, el jardín de una casa, un bar, el evento privado de tu empresa, una fiesta por Zoom - nosotros lo convertiremos en el escenario perfecto, cómodo e íntimo.
¿Quieres una experiencia musical hecha a tu medida? Escríbenos y crearemos una experiencia personalizada de acuerdo a tus necesidades.

Name: Music Composer / Producer
Description:
Swiss Composer and pianist based in London, Karim Younis was born in Sierre (Switzerland) and grew up in Locarno.
As a composer with a wide range of styles, Karim Younis has written music for films, theatre, trailers, adverts and live performances, with his music performed in concert in Switzerland, UK, Italy, France, Netherlands, Poland, Romania and Hungary.

His most recent projects include: the feature-film “Kilo 64”, a documentary by Egyptian Director Amir El-Shenawy screened at the 40th Cairo International Film Festival; "Cactus Boy" an award winning short film by the British Director Chris Brake; “Fledgling” an award winning short animation by French-American Director Juliette Rogasik; “The Thin Layer” by the German director Hanna Schrage, a VR Film with spatial music. 

Karim Younis completed his studies at the Royal College of Music London with his Master in Composition for Screen followed by BBC film composer Maurizio Malagnini and Enrica Sciandrone, furthermore with his Bachelor in Traditional and Contemporary Composition at the University of Arts Bern in Switzerland with Professor Xavier Dayer.

As for other important music projects, Karim Younis accompanied the stories and legends of Canton Valais in three pieces written for orchestra performed in 2015 by the Ensemble Hodiernis in Morgins, Saint-Maurice and Visp (Valais, Switzerland).

In 2014, he was asked by the German composer Helmut Oehring to write a contemporary concept piece for string quartet performed in the Music Theatre "Angelus Novus II" at the Dampfzentrale Hall in Bern. The composition has also been played on the Swiss Radio SRF2.

Furthermore, Karim Younis composed the music for a sport dancing choreography performed in 2016 at the Swiss Championship of Gymnastic in Widnau.

Name: Boogie Wonder Band
Description:
The most celebrated DISCO band of our generation!

Playing their brand of classic funk and disco, the Boogie Wonder Band attracts audiences of all ages
A spectacular show for Fairs and Festivals, major corporate events, and theaters and halls
Please contact for booking avails

Name: Composer's Tech
Description: Composer's Tech (previously The Music Transcriber) sells music software and tools for music composers and producers. Sibelius Plugins, Kontakt Instruments, and composer gear – if it helps you make music, we love it.

Name: Honens
Description:
The Honens International Piano Competition takes place every three years and is considered one of the world’s most prestigious events of its kind. Honens prepares its Laureates for the rigours and realities of professional careers in music and creates opportunities for growth and exposure. The annual Honens Festival is one of Canada’s premier classical music events, intended to share Mrs. Honens’ love of world renowned music with Albertans every year.

Esther Honens created a legacy of musical excellence to be enjoyed for generations. In 1991, knowing she was near the end of her life, Mrs. Honens gave $5 million to endow an international piano competition in her hometown of Calgary, Canada. Her generosity, vision, and love of music continue to touch the lives of Calgarians, Canadians, musicians, and music-lovers around the world.

Name: Boho Strings
Description:
The story of Boho Strings began in 2015. David Ramael and Jessi Tortorice had the idea of taking the traditional concept of the string orchestra and giving it a fresh twist. They surrounded themselves with a passionate group of artistic and business advisors, and together they decided to pursue a new direction. The focus was on telling stories in music. Stories about important social issues. Stories about people. But especially stories where the music is at the center.

Boho Strings also stands for much more than merely performing concerts. The ensemble is one of the inspirers behind the project Be A He(a)ro, which seeks to give mental well-being an important place within companies, social organizations and schools, and this through the workshop “Listening Leadership” in partnership with LQ.

They chose to make their home in the Antwerp district of Borgerhout. Borgerhout is Antwerp's most densely populated district, with an incredible diversity of origins and nationalities. In such a place, many stories bubble to the surface and new ones are added every day. So a fantastic source of inspiration!

Boho Strings quickly gained an excellent reputation. With projects such as La Captive, D-Radicalize, Urban Renaissance and In Deep Silence, they regularly perform on all the major stages in Flanders, including BOZAR, deSingel, De Bijloke and Concertgebouw Brugge. Not surprisingly, the ensemble consists of the finest string players from Belgium and the surrounding area.

In 2018, the first CD "Nostalgia" was released, dedicated entirely to the music of Belgian composer Wim Henderickx. This project has received rave reviews in the international music press. For example, Gramophone Magazine wrote, "The number of active string ensembles may be considerable, but Boho Strings is unmatched in its dynamics and unanimity of response."

Name: VIDZONE
Description:
VidZone Digital Media has provided the ultimate music video experience, delivering the very best music video content via mobile, tablet, Smart TV and console.

With distribution agreements via Universal Music, Sony Music, Warner Music plus thousands of independents, VidZone offers a catalogue of over 100,000 HD music videos from the biggest names, including regular exclusives and world premieres - all on demand.

VidZone launched on PlayStation 3 in 2009, receiving rave reviews for its depth of catalogue, quality application and superb navigation. VidZone later launched on PlayStation 4 in December 2013 and has since gone on to be downloaded by more than 14 million users in 19 territories including the U.S, Europe and Australasia. 

In August 2014 VidZone launched on over 100 different Samsung mobile, tablets and Smart TVs and is available via Samsung Galaxy Apps and Google Play.

VidZone also operates a music distribution platform and is a leading distributor of independent music via online and mobile networks internationally. VidZone Digital Media has relationships with all the leading music and music video distribution platforms worldwide including Amazon , Apple Music/iTunes, Spotify and YouTube.

Name: City of London Festival
Description:
For three weeks each summer, the City of London Festival bursts open the square mile's extraordinary places and spaces to present a wide-ranging programme of handpicked artists from across the globe. With everything from comedy to classical, circus to cabaret, we’ve been cramming the City with top-class culture since 1962.

The Festival strives to exceed expectations and every year hosts over 200 events in over 50 incredible venues, from the London Symphony Orchestra in St Paul's Cathedral to intimate chamber recitals in the City's beautiful hidden livery halls. The Festival has squeezed singers in skyscrapers, jazz bands in banks and even put death defying circus in an inflatable Bowler Hat!

Name: Industry Live Agency
Description:
Industry Live Agency is led by 25 year live music veteran Andrew Viitalahde-Pountain. Having represented music artists from all over the world for the past quarter of a century, there is some experience under the roof of the company. With a proven track record of touring and live success for its artists, the team prides themselves in achieving this success through knowledge, experience, hard work and most of all honesty in the way they represent their roster.

With offices in 3 countries, ILA is positioned to be able to service the needs of its artists to the fullest.

Name: Pink Noise MGMT
Description: Pink Noise MGMT is a music industry based company that focuses on business management and bookkeeping. We help artists, songwriters, producers, record labels, and management companies manage their finances. We promote educating artists to take control of their finances!

Name: Cole Clark Guitars
Description: Cole Clark Guitars combine classical construction with innovative design, sustainably sourced woods and the world’s most natural sounding pickup to produce a stronger, lighter, unique instrument for the modern acoustic guitar player

Name: DEBUT
Description:
DEBUT is redefining how classical music is shared, experienced, and supported. We create welcoming, story-led concerts and development programmes that connect audiences with outstanding emerging artists in London and beyond.

Founded in 2015 by soprano and creative producer Lizzie Holmes, DEBUT has worked with over 350 musicians and brought classical music to thousands of people, many for the very first time. Whether in a Shoreditch loft or a 19th-century museum, our concerts are designed to be intimate, joyful, and inclusive, breaking down barriers between performer and audience.

 What We Do

Secret Concerts: Monthly sell-out performances at Shoreditch Treehouse and The Brunel Museum. Over 125 concerts so far, with ~40% of audiences experiencing live classical music for the first time.

Horizon Project: Our artist development programme (launched 2022 with support from the Genesis Foundation) offers mentoring, masterclasses, and performance opportunities for early-career musicians.

Opera in a Day: Play-through workshops for singers, instrumentalists, and curious audiences that make opera fun, approachable, and collaborative.

 Recognition & Reach

- Over 500  reviews from audiences across London
- Named Airbnb’s No.1 Global Music Experience (2018)
- Featured by BBC Radio 3, Radio 4, Classical Music Magazine, Opera Now, Steinway & Sons, Alternative Classical, The Nudge
- Hosted concerts at: Shoreditch Treehouse, Brunel Museum, Queen’s House, Royal Opera House, Cutty Sark, Old Operating Theatre, Russell-Cotes Museum, Chettle House

 Our Mission

We are passionate about supporting emerging talent, cultivating community, and sharing classical music in ways that are fresh, inclusive, and unforgettable.

DEBUT is a registered charity in England and Wales (No. 1216650)

Name: Frisson Sync
Description: Frisson is a Los Angeles based music supervision company, founded by Scott Velasquez. With over 10 years of music industry experience, Frisson specializes in Music Supervision and Licensing for Podcasts, as well as: TV, Film, and new media projects. Frisson has worked on 2000+ podcast episodes, films, and tv shows. Scott,being a Synesthete and a classically trained musician help Frisson create a unique soundscape for every project.

Name: Pau Casals Foundation
Description:
Founded in 1972, Pablo Casals Foundation serves the legacy of one of the greates cellists of all time: Pau Casals i Defilló, born in 1876 in  "El Vendrell' of Catalonia, Spain.

The foundation carries the cultural, social and educational responsibility of preserving, presenting and promoting the rich music heritage left by the Catalan artist throughout his life, by sharing the knowledge, the wisdom, the values, the principles and the life aspirations of Pablo Casals with the world.

Close to the society, next to the young generation and hand in hand with Catatalan, Spanish, European and international cultural, educational and social organisations and institutions, Pablo Casals Foundation focuses on innovation, sustainability and open collaboration in order to achieve further cultural and social development by bringing the  musicians worldwide, the international society and the travellers and guests closer to the territory of Catalonia, its world famous artists and its local community.

The activity of Pablo Casals Foundation is a proactive act that calls for  engagement and participation: The foundation seeks to promote essential change in arts, education and society through the cultivation of critical thinking via music - a way of thinking that embodies  the intellectual empathy with the integrity and responsibility that carries the artist and this is exactly our purpose: Teach the public about Pablo Casals' life mission that he faithfully served with his cello throughout his entire life. 

The last 46 years we have been  serving the fundation's objectives and along with Pablo Casals Museum, Villa Casals, located in the hometown of Pablo Casals we aim for:

Cultural development
Cross-cultural collaboration and
Investigation, research and innvovation

Inspired, motivated and driven by the lfe attitude of the great man and artist, Pablo Casals Foundation is doing its part towards shaping a better world. 

For more information visit: http://www.paucasals.org

Name: DJ Membrain
Description: Ich bin DJ Membrain. Ihr DJ für Hochzeiten und Firmenanlässe in Basel und der Region.

Name: Vortex Music Magazine
Description:
Music is a lifestyle in Portland. Vortex Music Magazine examines the circulation of music through our veins and culture. We are Music, Portland-Style.

With a goal to present serious, long-form journalism and provide useful information to Portland’s musicians and music community, Vortex Music Magazine publishes curated content through both an active online presence and a professionally published print edition.

Name: Modulor
Description: Label, distributeur & disquaire. Rock, électro, rap & plus depuis 2008.

Name: RAMP//A
Description:
Acreditamos na verdade da música. 

Viver da música não é simples e estamos aqui para facilitar essa jornada! Oferecemos serviços de gestão de carreiras e projetos artísticos, além de consultorias, conectando nossos conhecimentos e experiência aos propósitos e desafios de cada cliente.

A RAMP//A atualmente faz parte de um grupo que envolve a Head Media, um dos maiores selos, editora e produtora musical do Brasil, e a Shub House, sede dos nossos escritórios e casa de produção de conteúdo artístico e criativo.

Name: Flanders Symphony Orchestra
Description:
The Flanders Symphony Orchestra (FSO) is one of Belgium’s leading orchestras. Composed of highly committed and passionate musicians, and led by renowned conductors, the Flanders Symphony Orchestra both commissions and performs new compositions as well as electrifying renditions of the main symphonic repertoire from the classical period onwards.

The Flanders Symphony Orchestra fulfills an exemplary role in creating outreach projects, educational projects as well as projects focusing on the development of young and talented musicians, composers, and conductors. The orchestra makes music from both past and present accessible to as wide and diverse an audience as possible in Flanders and beyond. 

The orchestra was founded in 1960 by engineer Dirk Varendonck, also the orchestra’s first conductor. From 1984 onwards the orchestra was conducted by Patrick Peire, Robert Groslot and Fabrice Bollon. The orchestra went through a thorough reformation in the mid-1990s. Principal conductors have included David Angus, Etienne Siebens, Seikyo Kim and Jan Latham-Koenig. As from the concert season 2019-20, Kristiina Poska is the new chief conductor of the Flanders Symphony Orchestra.

Thanks to its own concert series in all major venues of Flanders and Brussels, the orchestra succeeds in reaching a large and loyal audience. In addition, the orchestra is a welcome guest at international venues and festivals.

The Flanders Symphony Orchestra is in residence at Muziekcentrum De Bijloke, Ghent (member of the UNESCO Creative Cities of Music Network), and receives support from the Flemish Government and the City of Ghent.

Name: Lb records
Description: Lb records Recording Studio

Name: Rundfunk-Sinfonieorchester Berlin
Description:
Das Rundfunk-Sinfonieorchester Berlin führt seine Existenz auf die erste „Funk-Stunde Berlin“, auf die Geburtsstunde des öffentlichen Rundfunks in Deutschland überhaupt, am 29. Oktober 1923 zurück.

Seit diesem Tag haben Musiker:innen und Dirigent:innen wie Otto Urack, Bruno Seidler-Winkler, Eugen Jochum, Sergiu Celibidache, Hermann Abendroth, Rolf Kleinert, Heinz Rögner und Rafael Frühbeck de Burgos einen Klangkörper geformt, der in besonderer Weise die Wechselfälle der deutschen Geschichte im 20. Jahrhundert durchlebt hat.

Name: TuneCore Japan
Description:
TuneCore Japan は、世界最大手の音楽のディストリビューション会社 「 TuneCore,Inc.（米国）」 とWano株式会社（日本）の合弁企業（ジョイント・ベンチャー）で、2012年にサービスを開始した、アーティスト向けの音楽流通サービスを提供する会社です。

誰でも簡単に自分の楽曲を世界中のストアで販売・配信でき、iTunes Store や Apple Music、Spotify、YouTube Music など、国内外の音楽配信プラットフォームへの楽曲配信・管理を一括で行うことができるールとして、数多くのアーティストやレーベルが利用しています。

サービス開始以来、登録アーティスト数及び配信楽曲数（＝流通量）は増加を続け、年間の邦楽デジタル音楽流通量は日本一を達成。また、2021年までのアーティストへの累計還元額は170億円を突破しました。

「あなたの音楽を世界に。」のビジョンのもと、アーティストをサポートし、アーティストおよび音楽の素晴らしさを世界中に広めるサービスとして積極的に事業展開をしています。

TuneCore Japan help artists, labels and managers distribute their music through Apple Music, Spotify, Amazon Music, LINE MUSIC, RECOCHOKU and more than 55 download and streaming sites worldwide, while retaining 100 percent of their sales revenue and rights for a low annual flat fee. Name: Des Moines Symphony and Academy
Description:
The Des Moines Symphony is a not-for-profit, professional orchestra formed in 1937 to enrich, educate and provide the Central Iowa community with innovative programming and inspiring performances of great orchestral music. The Des Moines Symphony Academy, housed in the beautifully restored Temple for Performing Arts in downtown Des Moines, was launched in 2003 to provide quality music education opportunities for Central Iowans of all ages. The Symphony Association, governed by a 24-member volunteer Board of Trustees and operating on an annual budget of $4.2 million, supports both the Symphony Academy and its numerous education programs including four youth orchestras, a Youth Wind Ensemble, chamber music, music theory and private lessons to over 600 students each week; and supports the Des Moines Symphony Orchestra, led by Music Director & Conductor Joseph Giunta, who this season celebrates his 31st anniversary with the Orchestra.

Each season, the Orchestra performs seven pairs of Masterworks concerts, a Pops series including the traditional New Year’s Eve Pops, education, outreach, family and other special concerts in its home at the acoustically acclaimed Des Moines Civic Center. This past summer the Orchestra launched its new summer series of concerts at the newly-opened Lauridsen Amphitheater at Water Works Park. In addition, the Des Moines Symphony produces and performs the annual Yankee Doodle Pops concert in July on the grounds of the Iowa State Capitol which attracts an audience of more than 100,000, the largest single-day attendance of any concert event in the State.

Name: Brooklyn Youth Chorus
Description:
Brooklyn Youth Chorus offers world-class voice training for young people, ages 5-18, with an emphasis on healthy vocal development, music literacy, and group performance. The Chorus also features multiple performing ensembles, known for delivering professional-level performances in a wide variety of settings, from concert halls to professional recording studios.

Running from September to June each year, the Chorus offers vocal instruction and private lessons for students across ten divisions, separated by age and experience level. Students are trained using the Cross-Choral Training method, a proven holistic and experiential approach to teaching voice and musicianship in a group setting, designed by Founder & Artistic Director Dianne Berkun Menaker. It is a functional voice training based on voice science and health and a comprehensive approach to building sight-reading and music literacy skills.

Older students enrolled with the Chorus have the opportunity to participate in performing ensembles. The ensembles work on special projects throughout the year, including live appearances, professional recordings, and original choral productions.

Description:

Developing a strong identity and attitude that focuses on being at the forefront in all elements of the industry, the Totem Onlove Group has established itself as a poineer due to the passion it embodies. 
Based in Melbourne but with offices and partnerships with key promoters/businesses nationally the recently formed Totem Onelove Group (Pty Ltd) has a wealth of experience due to the merging of two powerhouse companies in 2007. Totem Industries and Hardware Corporation (Totem // Hardware) have been organizing events from 500 to 30,000 people and touring major electronic artists for over 20 years. Undeniably the leader in youth marketing, the Onelove Music Group, has a rich history of club nights, a music label, online ventures and events.
The Totem Onelove Group have over 20 full time staff in Melbourne and Sydney (with a combined workforce of 35 in the extended national network) dedicated to a range of industry related opportunities. This includes a focus on media, sponsorship,radio, record label (in partnership with Sony Australia), event production, finance & foreign exchange, touring & travel services, amongst a slew of more services.  This strong national network has further expanded, due to the strong relationship that has developed in the Australasian region with like minded innovative leaders in the industry, such as promoters and venue operators.

האבולוציה אינה דבר מובן מאליו, זו החלטה מודעת, אינרטית לחדש לנצח, לצמוח ולהעצים גם את עצמנו וגם את אחרים.

Evolution is not a given, it’s a conscious, inert decision to forever innovate, grow, and empower both ourselves and indeed others.

EA (Daniel Gardiner ) is a UK based electronica artist management and bookings agency. It has been born out of the owners’ common goal, to support internationally recognised electronica artists with unique quality and help them to realise their potential.

We realised there was something fundamental missing from the agencies currently operating within the EDM marketplace. We wanted to deliver artists a bespoke service that allows them to feel valued and welcomed with equal measure regardless of their stage of development. We believe they can be given the space and time to breathe creatively here in the Evolved family, we can rid them of the management pressures that surround them, allowing them to create music and perform freely.

Our artist roster took months of planning, stemming from our dedication to musical development both individually and collectively. We did this by selecting artists whose experience varies but whose quality of output is constantly evolving, offering a host of artists who produce innovative music and deliver extraordinary live DJ’s and performers.

With such clear definitive beliefs and values apparent throughout the agency it allows us to deliver the most competitive service to our promoter clients, ensuring they can put their trust in our agency to offer the most reliable yet unique package.

Name: Orchestra Filarmonica Umbra Vittorio Calamani
Description:
L’Orchestra Filarmonica Vittorio Calamani ha fatto il suo debutto il 14 agosto 2019 sotto la guida del giovane e talentuoso direttore iraniano Maestro Hossein Pishkar con un meraviglioso concerto sinfonico realizzato in piazza XX Settembre a Configni. Questo evento, che ha visto eseguite la Sinfonia 89 di Haydn e laSinfonia 4 di Schumann, ha rappresentato la fine della III edizione del Festival della Piana del Cavaliere e l’inizio dell’attività musicale e artistica dell’OFVC, registrando una presenza record di più di 400 persone e un successo di pubblico e di critica davvero degno di nota. L’orchestra nasce proprio sotto la spinta dell’Associazione Festival della Piana del Cavaliere che nel suo terzo anno di attività si è concentrata nella realizzazione di un progetto orchestrale. 
L’Orchestra Filarmonica under35 si è formata tramite regolari audizioni tenutesi nel mese di maggio 2019 ed è composta da musicisti professionisti.  
Lo scopo dell’orchestra, come quello del festival, è quello di tornare ad investire nella cultura e nella musica. L’attività dell’OFVC sebbene sia formata da giovani talenti non si classifica tra le orchestre giovanili ma piuttosto come una Filarmonica appieno. Vuole qualificarsi come portatrice di un contributo positivo al patrimonio culturale regionale ed italiano e farsi promotrice di una crescita sociale e culturale di cui il paese necessita. Tra gli obiettivi c’è senz’altro quello di dare l’opportunità a musicisti professionisti di perfezionarsi nell’ambito orchestrale e al tempo stesso di realizzarsi nell’ambito lavorativo. L’orchestra ha preso vita grazie al suo fondatore, l’Ing. Stefano Calamani che per primo, insieme alla sua società Aisico Srl e al direttore artistico Anna Leonardi, ha creduto fortemente in questo progetto.

Description:

The venue is known for its cosy atmosphere and great acoustics and sound technology. It has a capacity of 1250 standing and 700 seated guests. 

BETA is a small music venue situated in the south side of Copenhagen next to the large music venue Amager Bio.

The affection of music is in focus at BETA – an affection that permeates and reflects the expression and atmosphere of the place. With a capacity of 200 people, we have created the perfect setting for intensity and intimacy. Name: Erie Philharmonic
Description: The mission of the Erie Philharmonic is to strengthen our community and region by providing high-quality live orchestra concerts and programs that enrich, entertain and educate people of all ages. In existence since 1913, the Philharmonic is one of the oldest professional ensembles in the country and is recognized on a national level as one of the top orchestras in its budget size. With a season that features 13 concerts, various summer programs, a free chamber music series, four Youth Concerts and numerous outreach events, the orchestra reaches more than 50,000 people across the region annually.

Name: SoundVault Ltd
Description:
SoundVault is the global marketplace for music licensing.

SoundVault is a highly efficient, secure music ‘synchronisation license (sync)’ and performance royalty payment gateway. Designed by industry experts and technologists to revolutionise the sync licensing process. Exceptional usability for both buyers and uploaders, allowing music to be instantly identified, tested and purchased, broadcast ready. 

For media producers, SoundVault already offers a growing range of individual libraries of competitively priced, original compositions and international accredited composers. Ready for immediate download and global licensing. 

Composers and libraries create their own unique branded ‘library’ within the system, enabling them to upload, showcase, license, ‘royalty track’, edit and manage their IP online. All while retaining 100% of their own copyright ownership, non-exclusively, with no charges or submission fees.

Name: Lurssen Mastering

Numerous records worked on by the Lurssen Mastering team have been nominated for Grammys and Oscars over the years and several have won these prestigious awards.

It is owned and operated by Vanessa Parker-Davis, an industry veteran with more than fifteen years of varied experience in the music industry. She has placed artists on programs such as The Tonight Show with Jay Leno, The Late Show with David Letterman, The Today Show, Good Morning America, Live with Regis and Kelly, Fox & Friends, among others, and in magazines such as Country Weekly, Rolling Stone, People, Entertainment Weekly, The New York Times Magazine, The Wall Street Journal, Dallas Morning News, Los Angeles Times and the list goes on.
Parker-Davis garnered her music industry experience serving at three major record labels including Arista Records, where she spent ten years, Atlantic Records Nashville, where she was the Director of Media Relations and then Capitol Records Nashville, were she served as Senior Director of Media and Public Relations before starting her own independent publicity company in 2003.

Description:
At Amplead, we love live music. We understand that arranging, performing and promoting shows has its challenges. By working closely with industry professionals, our mission is to provide an ever-expanding toolkit, designed for the Live Music Industry.

We are a team of experienced tech and music industry professionals, who have come together to bring an affordable, all-in-one platform to help music industry professionals work more efficiently.

Over the years, we have seen and felt first hand, the challenges facing the industry. Grassroots venues have been closing down at an unprecedented rate, talented artists have struggled to be heard through all the digital content noise, and incredible gigs have been failing to sell out. 

In response to these worrying scenarios, we decided to set up Amplead as the tool kit for the Live Music Industry. We felt by being able to give the industry all the right tools under one platform; we would be doing our bit to help the industry to flourish again.

Name: Sing Inside
Description:
Sing Inside works in UK prisons and holding facilities to promote the use of music and performing arts as a means of community-building for all who live and work in the prison setting. 

Our workshops consist of a morning session where volunteers drawn from local communities and universities form a choir alongside members of the prison community, including residents and staff. A volunteer music leader teaches a programme of music over the course of the morning for performance in the afternoon, to an audience of prison staff, other prison residents, and families where this can be facilitated. We also run multiple-day visits, where we visit the same prison for up to five days and deliver daily workshops on a range of topics, from repertoire learning to Dalcroze to vocal technique. 

We believe group singing has a unique power to build communities quickly, and our workshops and creatively and socially liberating spaces, designed to simultanesouly build self-confidence and trust in residents that supportive communities outside prisons exist, at the same time as dismantling the stereotypes and stigma our volunteers may hold about prison communities. We work to encourage open communication and honest social interactions through shared musical experiences and skills, using a flexible learning structure that is accessible to all.

---

Sing Inside currently works regularly in sixteen prisons across the UK, in Cambridgeshire, Norfolk, Oxfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Staffordshire, Yorkshire and London. 

To contact a member of the team to run a workshop in a prison you have connections to, or to ask any questions, email info@singinside.org. We would love to hear from you.

Name: Global Battle Of the Bands
Description:
The world’s biggest live championship of popular music aims to search out and bring the best un-manufactured talent in the world to a wider audience.
GBOB Challenge - The Global Battle of the Bands

GBOB International was formed to launch the GBOB Challenge, a global live music competition for unmanufactured bands playing their own, original music. From 16 countries in 2004 to 26 countries in 2008, the GBOB Challenge has grown year on year and to date has involved more than 40,000 musicians. In just five years it has become the world’s biggest and most respected live music competition. 

In 2009 the GBOB Challenge is on track to involve 12,000 musicians from over 30 countries, more than 200 concerts and a live audience in excess of 2 million. In addition, exposure via TV, radio, print, internet and viral grass roots marketing will engage millions more.

The GBOB Challenge has already gained a reputation for breaking new bands. Previous winners have since signed deals with Warner Brothers, Universal and EMI as well as production deals with leading producers including Jim Lowe (Stereophonics, Charlatans etc.) and Danny Saber (U2, David Bowie etc.).

GBOB has very quickly gained a reputation for helping to break new bands and we intend to carry on doing so. 

Forget about artificial Pop Idol-style competitions and all the other glorified karaoke rubbish out there, this is the real deal for real bands playing real music - live…There are just two rules: no cover versions and no pre-recorded music. 

Every year local qualifying heats and national finals take place in countries around the world, with the eventual winners of these going forward to the GBOB Challenge World Final in December each year.

Name: Conservatorio Statale di Musica "Gioachino Rossini"
Description:
Il Conservatorio Rossini è uno dei più antichi e prestigiosi Conservatori italiani, creato per precisa volontà testamentaria di Gioachino Rossini. Infatti nel suo testamento – compilato il 5 luglio 1858, dieci anni prima della morte – il musicista pesarese aveva disposto: “…Quale erede della proprietà nomino il comune di Pesaro, mia patria, per fondare e dotare un liceo musicale in quella città…”.

Il Liceo dà avvio ai corsi di musica nel 1882.

Fin dal principio il livello artistico della scuola è stato garantito anche dalla presenza, in qualità di direttori, di alcuni tra i più grandi compositori dell’epoca. Il primo fu Carlo Pedrotti, operista veronese che, per assumere il nuovo incarico, lasciò la direzione dell’Orchestra del Teatro Regio di Torino e condusse a Pesaro docenti di primissimo livello. Al suo impegno si deve, tra l’altro, la costruzione dell’Auditorium – ora parte integrante della struttura del Conservatorio – che porta il suo nome e che venne inaugurato nel 1892. A seguire, altri direttori di straordinario prestigio furono i compositori Pietro Mascagni, Amilcare Zanella e Riccardo Zandonai: ognuno di essi si circondò di valentissimi musicisti, come i violinisti Remy Principe, Attilio Crepax (maestro di Gioconda De Vito che si diplomò presso l’istituzione pesarese nel 1921 a soli 14 anni), Giovanni Chiti e Riccardo Brengola, i pianisti Adriano Ariani e Sergio Lorenzi, i violoncellisti Nerio Brunelli e Lino Filippini, il cornista Domenico Ceccarossi, i cantanti Arturo Melocchi e Carmen Melis. L’operato di tutti questi artisti di grande caratura ha creato nel tempo un autentico patrimonio culturale che ha poi alimentato una tradizione didattica e artistica per la quale il Conservatorio Rossini è famoso nel mondo.

Il soprano Renata Tebaldi, il tenore Mario Del Monaco, il compositore Riz Ortolani sono solo alcuni degli allievi storici più celebri del Conservatorio Rossini, artisti le cui straordinarie carriere internazionali hanno nel tempo dato lustro alla loro scuola di provenienza.

Attualmente il Conservatorio Statale di Musica “Gioachino Rossini” di Pesaro è Istituto Superiore di Studi Musicali inquadrato nell’area dell’Alta Formazione Artistica e Musicale (AFAM) del Ministero dell’Istruzione, dell’Università e della Ricerca.

Name: Kindred Spirits Orchestra
Description:
The Kindred Spirits Orchestra has performed since 2009, to great acclaim, sold-out audiences, and standing ovations at the legendary CBC Glenn Gould Studio in downtown Toronto. The Kindred Spirits Orchestra also offers a 6-concert subscription series at the Flato Markham Theatre, in addition to 3 community-outreach and 2 educational concerts. Led by the charismatic Maestro Kristian Alexander, the Kindred Spirits Orchestra is enjoying enormous popularity among York Region's residents and continues to attract avid audiences across the Greater Toronto Area. In 2013 and 2015, the Kindred Spirits Orchestra was presented Awards from the Government of Canada for the "extraordinary work of the Kindred Spirits Orchestra promoting Canadian music and Canadian composers in the community as well as for the orchestra’s community outreach and educational programs”. In 2016, the Government of Ontario awarded 9 members of the KSO for their contribution to the development of arts and culture in the community. In 2017, the Kindred Spirits Orchestra gave a sold-out performance at the 3,200-seat Sony Centre for the Performing Arts in downtown Toronto during the first international concert-tribute to the Oscar-winning composer AR Rahman.

“The performance of the Kindred Spirits Orchestra under the baton of Maestro Kristian Alexander was inspiring, powerful and transformational. The musicians were exhilarating and the audience moved. It was one of the most exciting performances I have seen in a while…” Jacques Israelievitch, violinist (former concertmaster of the Toronto Symphony Orchestra)

"Performing with the Kindred Spirits Orchestra under the baton of Maestro Kristian Alexander was a wonderful experience." Christina Petrowska-Quilico, pianist

"This was a really great concert..., the orchestra sounded fantastic!!! And the choice of music was excellent." Alexa Petrenko, host (National Classical Radio 96.3 FM)

Name: CALMS, Collectif des Artistes Lyriques et Musiciens pour la Solidarité
Description:
Le Collectif des Artistes Lyriques et Musiciens pour la Solidarité - Le CALMS
est une association de loi 1901 qui a pour objet la création d'événements lyriques caritatifs et fédérateurs afin de récolter des fonds pour des associations et de sensibiliser la population à de grandes causes sociales ou humanitaires.

Ce collectif regroupe plus de 200 artistes professionnels. Parmi eux de très grands noms comme Béatrice Uria-Monzon, Sandrine Piau, Jean-Philippe Lafont, Annick Massis, Karine Deshays ou encore des artistes de tout premier plan comme Vannina Santoni, Fabienne Conrad, Julien Dran, Jérôme Boutiller, Marc Laho, Mathias Vidal, Eléonore Pancrazi… et
d'autres dizaines d'artistes de grands talents tout comme de jeunes artistes en début de carrière.

Le collectif s'est constitué en janvier 2019 après la création d'un premier concert Les Voix Solidaires au profit de la Croix-Rouge Marseille suite au drame de la rue d'Aubagne à Marseille.

Depuis, le CALMS innove et multiplie les projets. Le Concert Les Voix Solidaires est devenu une tournée nationale. En 2021, les Voix Solidaires ont chanté contre les violences faites aux Femmes dans les opéras de Nice, Massy, Avignon ainsi qu'au Théâtre Silvain à Marseille. Le Calms propose également une Saison Solidaire à Marseille, soit un concert par mois au Foyer de l'opéra de Marseille pour aider des associations du territoire marseillais. A l'été 2020, il a créé son programme Opéra déconfiné pour porter l'art lyrique dans les quartiers prioritaires d'Aix-en-Provence avec l'association Le Relais des Possibles. Ce programme est aujourd'hui proposé à Aix-en-Provence, Manosque et Marseille. Enfin, en septembre 2021, sous l'impulsion de la soprano Amélie Robins, il inaugure sa nouvelle branche humanitaire, Un Monde, Une Voix, par une série de concerts dans les plus belles maisons d'Opéra en France au profit de l'association "Un
enfant par la main".

Name: Australian National Association of Teachers of Singing (ANATS)
Description:
The Australian National Association of Teachers of Singing (ANATS) is the peak national body dedicated to the art of singing and singing teaching. ANATS empowers both its membership and the wider singing teaching community to develop their vocal pedagogy through professional learning, by delivering outstanding educational opportunities across Australia. 
ANATS plays a critical role in guiding the careers of singing teachers from metro, regional and rural areas, establishing a strong community of practice. Our members have a considerable impact on the community in their diverse capacities - as teachers in music studios & classrooms, lecturers, choir directors, and peripatetic teachers - educating thousands of students across Australia. 
Our showpiece event, the ANATS National Conference, connects the Australian singing teaching community and facilitates presentations from prominent international speakers. ANATS strongly advocates for ongoing research in the field of vocal pedagogy and singing voice research, annually publishing the peer-reviewed international journal, Australian Voice and providing opportunities for researchers to share their work both nationally and internationally.

Name: Armonia Online
Description:
Making Online Licensing and Processing Simpler to Ensure a Fair Deal for Everyone. 

Alliance created in 2013, Armonia is the first pan-European hub licensing musical works for international online music services. Armonia represents the repertoires of SACEM (France), SACEM Luxembourg, SGAE (Spain), SIAE (Italy), SPA (Portugal), SABAM (Belgium), Artisjus (Hungary), SUISA (Switzerland), AKM (Austria) as well as a large number of Anglo-American and Latin American works, i.e. more than 13 million musical works and thus constitutes a major “must have” European repertoire.

Besides the aspects of financial negotiations and legal contracts with digital platforms, Armonia provides its members a one-stop shop back-office service processing and enriching data allowing, on the one hand the billing and on the other hand the access to metrics analytics which are essential to business development in this field.

In 2017, Armonia continues its expansion to other collective societies in Europe and worldwide, as well as its technological developments towards more accuracy and transparency in the management of musical rights in the digital era.

Camden Studios houses three different sized studios fit for a variety of purposes from songwriting, pre-production to  recording, mixing and mastering. It also features a composing room, and a chill-out area including a living space, kitchen, shower and bathroom facilities.

The main studio is equipped with a Neve Console, Protools HDX, a Steinway Grand Model B and a huge range of vintage and modern keyboards, guitars, amps and outboard.

Crew:
Cian Boylan - Owner, Producer, Arranger, Song Writer, Pianist
Niall Breslin - Owner, Songwriter, Musician
Jack Power - Studio Manager, Engineer
Conor Brady - Guitarist, Producer, Engineer

Camden Studios is a world class recording studio and creative hub. We support songwriters, composers and musicians through all aspects of their creative process. Artists who have recorded in Camden are Hozier, Niall Horan, Ed Sheeran, Snoop Dogg and many others.

Our services include:
- Recording
- Mixing & Mastering
- Production
- Songwriting, Arrangements & Composition
- Rehearsales
- Video Shoots
- TV & Film Music
- Podcasts and Voice-overs
- Audiobooks
- Event Hire
- Team-building Activities

Camden Studios are located just off Camden Street, making our location ideal for those who live in Ireland and those who wish to travel here and see Dublin City while they work on their music. Please contact office@camdenrecordingstudios.com for all enquiries.

Name: APOLLO'S FIRE Baroque Orchestra
Description:
“Sorrell and her dazzling period band… are incandescent.”
– The Sunday Times, London

Named for the classical god of music, healing and the sun, Apollo’s Fire is a GRAMMY-winning ensemble. The period-instrument orchestra was founded by award-winning harpsichordist and conductor Jeannette Sorrell, and is dedicated to the baroque ideal that music should evoke the various Affekts or passions in the listeners. Apollo’s Fire is a collection of creative artists who share Sorrell’s passion for drama and rhetoric.

Name: Songwriterschool
Description:
De Songwriterschool is voor iedereen die begint of wil doorgroeien met liedjes schrijven. Daarom zijn de (online) cursussen afgestemd op jouw eigen niveau. In de Starterscursus leer je de basics van songwriting. Daarna kan je een stap verder gaan om je skills op een hoger niveau te tillen, zoals songteksten of akkoorden/melodie. We organiseren regelmatig een masterclass van een bekende songwriter of je gaat tijdens een camp samen aan het werk als co-writers.

De Songwriterschool is in 2017 opgezet door singer-songwriter Peter van Vleuten. Hij deelt zijn ervaring als liedjesmaker en vertelt je wat hij door de jaren heen leerde van andere songwriters in Nederland, in Nashville en aan Berklee College of Music in Boston.

Name: NOPA
Description: NOPA er en interesseorganisasjon for alle komponister og forfattere av tekster til musikk. NOPAs formål er å fremme norsk skapende tonekunst, norske musikkverk og tekst i tilknytning til musikk, styrke faglige fellesskap, skape møteplasser og arbeide for låtskriveres kunstneriske og økonomiske interesser.

We are a music agency that provides Singers, Bands, DJ’s and Tributes for any occasion

Name: Desert Hearts
Description:
Over the past 9 years, Desert Hearts has found itself at the center of a vibrant cultural movement, fostering intimate experiences of sonic joy and unbounded love across the globe. With their Desert Hearts Spring Festival, City Hearts Festival, Desert Hearts TV, record labels, worldwide touring events, and stage takeovers, this ragtag crew of dreamers has emerged as a vibe-focused force radiating a conscious ethos of House, Techno, and Love.

Since its inception, Desert Hearts has given rise to a family of tens of thousands and it's safe to say the movement isn’t slowing down anytime soon, winning hearts and selling out shows in LA, NYC, SF, Chicago, Houston, Miami, Denver, and Internationally in Costa Rica, Tulum, Mexico City, Berlin, Reykjavik, London, Toronto, Montreal, Melbourne, Sydney, Fiji, and more, most recently expanding to become leaders in the livestream space.

Name: NEWLOC
Description:
NEWLOC leader de la location de Backline en France et le seul réseau de location sur 7 régions, Paris, Nantes, Bordeaux, Toulouse, Strasbourg, Lille et Lyon.

Newloc loue du backline depuis 1990.

Le backline, que l’on pourrait traduire littéralement par « ligne de fond » terme inventé par nos amis anglais dans les années ’70.
Le backline qui représente tout ce que le son, la lumière, la structure ne fait pas et ce que les musiciens au cours de ces 20 dernières années n’ont plus amenés avec eux.

Le backline sans lequel un concert, une « performance » quelle soit live ou play-back ne pourrait se faire dans de bonnes conditions.

La location de backline c’est à la fois du service, mais aussi une compétence globale. A Newloc notre ambition est d’être les meilleurs dans notre spécialité..Newloc est un 'pure player' 

Le parc de location de Newloc est vaste, réparti sur 5 agences en France et peut répondre en temps réel à un grand nombre de demandes importantes. Par exemple Newloc est capable de louer plus de 120 batteries sur une journée! Chaque agence est autonome et structurée pour répondre en terme de logistique et de personnel aux besoins de nos clients que ce soit festival ou un "one shot", promo, event, tournée.

Quelques références…
Le Download Paris, le Hellfest, Les Francofolies de la Rochelle, Rock en Seine, Lollapalooza, Jazz in Marciac, les Eurockéennes de Belfort, le Garorock, Les Banlieues Bleues, le Main Square, Nancy Jazz Pulsations, Les Escales de St Nazaire,Cognac Blues, Les 3 Elephants, Foire aux vins de Colmar, Jazz in Deauville, Les Rendez Vous de L'Erdre, St Emilion Jazz fest, I Love Techno, MAMA fest, Fest Django Reinhardt, Fest Art Rock, Jazz sur son 31, Panoramas festival, Les Papillons de Nuit, Groupe Canal Plus, Fr2, M6, Radio France, CGPompidou, le Duc des Lombards, Le Sunset, L'Ubu Rennes, La Cartonnerie Reims, Le Rocher de Palmer Cenon, Jazz à la Défense, Solidays, Nice Jazz fest, etc.

Name: USC Journal of Music Industry
Description:
The USC Journal of Music Industry provides an interdisciplinary analysis of the music business by shedding light on contemporary topics, perspectives, and innovations. Through our multimedia platform, we elevate diverse voices to create academic discourse in the music industry.
We are working to create a space for academically sound content that is novel and currently underdiscussed in the music industry. Our peer-review process is unique and premier, including multiple rounds of voluntary edits from current students, professors, and industry professionals.
The writers and creators featured on our platform are not limited to the Music Industry program or even Thornton, but include voices from all disciplines. We encourage students, professors, and industry professionals from all backgrounds, particularly those that are historically underrepresented, to take the mic.

Name: Carolyn Eynon Singers
Description: Carolyn Eynon Singers is a semi-professional, volunteer SATB chamber ensemble in Arizona. Our mission is to present affordable live concerts of North American choral music while educating and inspiring children and adults for a lifelong appreciation of music.

Name: HARMONY-the music school
Description:
Harmony-the music school was founded in August 2008 by one of India's leading music educator, vocal coach and singer Sandra Oberoi. Set up to equip, empower and educate children and adults in music and performance skill building, bespoke lessons are available in Singing - Classical Music, Pop vocals, Musical Theatre, Guitar, Drums, Violin, Piano and Music Theory.

Over the years, students from Harmony have gone on to win international competitions and perform at Carnegie Hall and Musikverin, with many continuing their music studies at top universities worldwide including University of Oxford, Royal College of Music, Royal Northern College of Music, Temple University, National University of Singapore and Berklee College of Music. 

The Harmony Chorus directed by Sandra Oberoi, Harmony- the music school's award winning choir, reached INDIA'S TOP 8 on a national level reality singing show - Rising Star on Colors TV in 2018. As cultural ambassadors, they have performed internationally - at the UK Choir Festival where they won an award for Choral Excellence;  St Giles Cathedral in Scotland; The Nehru Centre in London; the Embassy of India in Moscow, the largest cathedral in Russia, the prestigious Gnessin Russian Academy of Music, Peel Centenary Centre in the Isle of Man among other places.  

Students have consistently topped India in the ABRSM and LCM music examinations, and achieved the highest mark in the IGCSE, AS and A level music exams by Cambridge.

Name: Sepia Productions
Description: SEPIA PRODUCTIONS COMPOSE, RECORD & PRODUCE MUSIC FOR ADVERTISING & MOVIES. WE HAVE A LARGE NETWORK OF PERFORMERS, MUSICIANS & PRODUCERS AROUND THE WORLD, ESPECIALLY IN THE UK, US AND DENMARK. SEPIA PRODUCTIONS WAS FOUNDED BY COMPOSER/PRODUCER MICHAEL ADLER MILTERSEN IN 2001. THE WEBSITES WE'VE WORKED ON HAVE RECEIVED AWARDS FROM CANNES LIONS, CLIO AWARDS AND OTHERS

Name: Elefante Music
Description:
Al Elefante attended Newark and New Providence public schools before graduating from New Providence High School. He went on to receive a B.A. from Kings College and study music performance at Manhattan School of Music. He studied clarinet with Charles Passhaus, Charles Russo, and Leon Russionoff. After a stint in the U.S. Army Band, he attended Dorn & Kirschner's repair school and worked as a musical instrument repair technician there until 1992. After D. & K. closed in 1992, Al continued to repair instruments and teach private woodwind lessons on his own.

In 1996, Al was teaching about 20 private students out of his home when the opportunity arose to rent three small rooms in the second floor of a rundown building at the corner of Springfield Union Ave. in New Providence. 2 years later, Al took over the whole second floor. In 2000, he bought the building, and a year later undertook a complete renovation, doubling its size.

Al's daughters Stefani and Michele joined the company after finishing college. Stefani graduated with a B.A. in Psychology from Rutgers University. Michele graduated with a B.A. in Business Management, also from Rutgers. Since then, mom Betty Ann and son Joe have also signed on, making it a true family business!

Today, Elefante Music has over 500 students and rents instruments to thousands of school music students throughout New Jersey. Here at Elefante Music we pride ourselves in giving our customers the absolute best quality instruments and service at reasonable prices.

Elefante Music - Your Music Education Destination since 1996

Name: Indianapolis Jazz Foundation
Description:
Indianapolis Jazz Foundation is a 501(c)3 not-for-profit organization that celebrates Indy's rich jazz heritage and promotes the future of jazz in Indianapolis through education and performance. Jazz is an American art form because it celebrates freedom, equality, and individual expression within a collective effort.

Every year, the Indianapolis Jazz Foundation presents the Indy Jazz Fest, a beloved tradition for over 25 years, gathering a vibrant community of musicians, fans, and supporters. In 2024, the Fest will take place on September 16-28.

The Indy Jazz Fest is more than just a music festival. It's a celebration of our community and culture, a testament to the power of jazz to unite and inspire. This year, we're bringing the best in local, regional, and national jazz performances to Indianapolis, showcasing the diversity and richness of this art form in a variety of venues across the city. With a lineup of performances, workshops, school concerts, master classes, and community partnerships, we aim to touch the lives of over 35,000 people.
For more information, visit www.indyjazzfest.net

Name: Electric Sheep Music
Description:
ESM is a sound design and music production company, based in Sydney.
 
The foundation of our company is a collection of highly awarded talent from the Australian recording industry and some of the most respected audio and post production studios in the world, creating a mix of experience and perspectives unique to Electric Sheep Music.
 
Our approach is open, collaborative, and holistic. We build bespoke, project specific teams working with our core team and network of collaborators, pairing skillsets and styles with creative to deliver sound and music that emotes and evokes.
 
We cover all aspects of audio post production from sound design and original composition to sonic branding, music supervision, orchestration, v/o record, and ADR, across advertising, long form, VR, gaming, and design.
