Name: Vancouver Academy of Music
Description:
Founded in 1969, the Vancouver Academy of Music (VAM) is a non-profit institution that has been spreading a love of learning and musical excellence for generations of aspiring musicians.  Minutes away from downtown in a traffic-calmed location, VAM is housed in a spacious facility with teaching studios, large classrooms, a library, two performance halls, and the inspiring scenic backdrop of Vanier Park.

In addition to private lessons and class instruction, VAM students have the opportunity to engage with world-renowned visiting artists in masterclasses, exchange with national and international partners, and participate in numerous performance and competition opportunities.  For students of orchestral instruments, VAM’s Orchestral Training Program is home to four levels of orchestra and culminates in the Orpheum Series, a four-concert series spotlighting the VAM Symphony Orchestra in one of Vancouver’s most iconic cultural venues, the Orpheum Theatre.

VAM’s fundamental purpose is to explore the transformative power of music through fostering an inclusive learning environment led by a team of devoted faculty with strong professional backgrounds.  From Early Childhood to Adult Learning, VAM has delivered world-class music education to students of all ages and abilities for nearly 50 years.

Variety of genres from contemporary EDM to world, rock, orchestral and so on. 
You can always rely on us for creating any projects.

Name: Mishu
Description:
MISHU is a live music event promoter, producing concerts and music festivals primarily in Miami, FL and Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, with occasional events in other locations such as Los Angeles, NYC and elsewhere.

Our annual flagship event is ISLE OF LIGHT MUSIC FESTIVAL, a world-class music festival taking place every spring in Santo Domingo. We also produce independent concerts throughout the year in Miami via our ESCALA SONORA brand, as well as in Santo Domingo via BUENA ONDA. These brands focus on creating a platform for both emerging and established artists, allowing them to showcase their art and connect with fans in high-quality venues with state-of-the-art production.

We also aim to uncover and promote developing artists and creators through our editorial arm, RADIO BIZARRO. The show is broadcast daily on terrestrial FM radio and is the most influential program for independent music in Santo Domingo. We focus on capturing exclusive content and interviews with the best innovators and visionaries across the music and culture spaces. 

We are passionate music-lovers at our core and are always looking for the next upcoming act to help them find and establish their fanbase in our key markets. We’ll see you at the show.

Name: Hayko Cepkin (Official)
Description:
Hayko Cepkin, 1978 İstanbul doğumludur. Liseden sonra iki yıl Mimar Sinan Üniversitesi'nde şan eğitimi alan Cepkin, iki sene Timur Selçuk Çağdaş Müzik Merkezi'nde şan, solfej ve armoni dersleri aldı. Bir sene Akademi İstanbul'da piyano eğitimi gördükten sonra 1997 yılında profesyonel müzik yaşantısına klavyeci olarak başladı.

Çeşitli isimlerle çalışan ve bazılarının albümlerinde de düzenlemeci kimliğiyle yer alan Hayko Cepkin, Murathan Mungan'ın ''Söz Vermiş Şarkılar'' adlı albümünde Aylin Aslım'ın seslendirdiği, Yeni Türkü bestesi olan "Kimdi Giden" adlı parçayı da düzenledi. Zaman geçti ve artık kendi müzikal kimliğini yansıtma zamanının geldiğini düşünmeye başladı. Evinde kaydettiği bestelerini hayata geçirme kararı alan Hayko Cepkin, tüm söz, müzik ve düzenlemesi kendisine ait olan "Sakin Olmam Lazım" isimli ilk albümü ile Haziran 2005 tarihinde EMI etiketi altında müzik marketlerdeki yerini aldı. Cepkin'in ilk videosu ‘Yarası Saklı’ isimli parçasına çekildi. Daha sonra sırasıyla ‘Görmüyorsun’, ‘Fırtınam’, ‘Son Kez’ ve ‘Zaman Geçti’ parçalarının klipleri geldi. Hayko Cepkin, albümün yayınlanmasından sonraki ilk konserini 2005 yılındaki Rock İstanbul Festivalinde verdi. Oldukça ilgi çeken rock, arabesk ve elektronik altyapılı müziği, sahne tavırları ve klip konseptleri ile kısa sürede kendisine bir kitle edinmeyi başardı. 2005 ve 2006 yılları boyunca pek çok şehirde konserler veren Hayko Cepkin önemli festivallerde de sahne aldı. 2006 yılında düzenlenen Kral TV Müzik Ödülleri'nde yılın en iyi “Rock Erkek Sanatçı”sı olarak ödüllendirildi.

Name: Jassmine
Description:
Jassmine to miejsce na mapie Warszawy, która przez dekady dorobiła się kilku klubów jazzowych. Zdołały one obrosnąć legendą, a po dziś dzień ostały się nieliczne.

Klub Jassmine ukrywa się dwa piętra poniżej skrzyżowania Koszykowej z Wilczą, w podziemiach właśnie otwartego Hotelu Nobu.

Kameralny lokal tworzy unikalne dla prezentacji muzyki na żywo okoliczności. Jazzowej i nie tylko. Miejsce wypełni lukę uosabiając historię gatunku będzie on zawsze zgrabnie balansował na cienkiej granicy dzielącej elegancję i swobodę, koncentrację i żywioł, refleksję i ekstatyczną wręcz zabawę.

Dzieląc mury budynku z jednym z najbardziej ekskluzywnych, stołecznych hoteli, Jassmine posłuży za pomost łączący salonowy wizerunek jazzu, jakim obrósł on u schyłku zeszłego wieku, z dancingowymi korzeniami tego gatunku, zaangażowaniem jakim wybuchł w latach 60. i niczym nieskrępowaną, oddolną kreatywnością, w jaką obrodził w przeciągu ostatniej dekady. Jego nazwa wiąże się z pachnącymi jaśminem, nowoorleańskimi początkami jazzu. Muzyka, która będzie w nim prezentowana to oprócz przewodniego gatunku, różnorodna selekcja tego, co najlepsze współcześnie: od modern classical, przez ambient, po eksperymenty.

Name: Resilient Music LLP
Description:
Founded by Richard Kirstein in 2010, Resilient Music helps brands buy music smarter.

Music Rights are complex and fragmented. Most advertisers struggle to understand the landscape so rely on their agencies to source and license tracks. Whilst this approach is often creatively led, it can lead to poor commercial outcomes.

Resilient empowers brands with smarter strategies to buy licensed music from rights owners. We help you get the music you want at a fair price.

Resilient’s philosophy on cost and risk management is explained in Richard Kirstein’s book Music Rights Without Fights. It’s first and definitive guide on music licensing for brands. 

For more information:
https://resilientmusic.com/
https://musicrightswithoutfights.com/

Name: Soultone Cymbals
Description:
Originally founded in 2003 by the legendary drummer, percussionist, and entrepreneur, Iki Levy, after struggling to address frustrations with the major cymbal manufacturers over quality issues. “I wanted to use the best products possible, and I had the opportunities, but I was not happy with anything those companies were producing – even with my product endorsements,” reports Iki. “The blend of the metals we use is our own process that employs a balance of proper weight and tone properties. This creates the real difference between Soultone Cymbals and any other brand.”

Iki’s performances include work with Thomas Dolby, Jann Arden, Midge Ure, Paula Abdul, Tracy Chapman, Donna Summer and the now cult-hit, Disney’s High School Musical, as well as many others. His approach crosses over each style and genre of music when it comes to sound quality. Originally, as the proprietor of the Los Angeles, CA drum specialty shop, The Drum Connection, he put his first Soultone models on the showroom floor with actual drums so that customers could try them as opposed to hanging them on a display. “The reaction was huge,” Iki continues, “and I could not produce them fast enough to meet the demand for even my own shop. I was not afraid to have high standards and wanted to create the very best quality.” Iki maintains a strict “120% perfection” policy in that each cymbal must meet his own specific quality controls. He does not sell anything that is not already exceeding expectations – if it is not perfect; it goes back to his facility.

Name: Sync or Swim Music
Description:
We're a music licensing agency who value the musical power of independent artists. We have a carefully curated, exclusive-only music catalogue, encompassing a large variety of genres from Pop to Orchestral.

We're passionate about the power of music and it's capacity to emotionally transform visual content to make us feel something greater.

Name: Guitabec Inc. (Godin Guitars)
Description: With five factories in Quebec, Godin Guitars (Guitabec Inc.) is the largest manufacturer of acoustic and electric guitars in America. Our weekly production of nearly 2000 instruments is distributed in more than 65 countries. The company owes its fame to the quality and innovation in its products, the result of the high level of competence of its 400 employees and its enviable technological level. Very active in research and development of products and processes, the company has an R&D center in La Patrie, in the Eastern Townships.

Name: Rytmi-Instituutti
Description:
Rytmi-instituutti populaarimusiikin asiantuntijaorganisaatio, joka on yksi Suomen viidestä musiikki-instituutista. Rytmi-instituutin tehtävä on edistää elävää ja luovaa populaarimusiikkikulttuuria. Sitä ylläpitää Rytmi-instituutin kannattajayhdistys ry, joka perustettiin vuonna 1990 populaarimusiikin koulutus-, tutkimus-, julkaisu- ja tiedotusinstituutioksi pitämään yllä alan kansainvälisiä ja kotimaisia suhteita ja edistämään populaarimusiikin toimintakenttää Suomessa. 

 Edistämistehtävää on vuosien varrella toteutettu muun muassa julkaisemalla musiikkiaiheista kirjallisuutta, tuottamalla bändisoitinten opetusta, järjestämällä rocklyriikkakilpailuja, verkostoimalla musiikkialan yrityksiä sekä tukemalla bändien kiertuetoimintaa ja artistin urakehitystä.

Julkaisutoimintamme pääväylä, Rytmimanuaali, on Suomen kattavin verkko-opas musiikintekemisen ja musiikkibisneksen maailmaan. Rytmimanuaalin tarkoitus on nostaa päivänvaloon alan hiljainen tieto. Aiheet kattavat koko musiikintekemisen kirjon biisinkirjoituksesta urasuunnitteluun. 

Koulutuksissa Rytmi-instituutti on kiinni ajassa. Vuosien varrella koulutuksia on järjestetty esimerkiksi instrumenttien hallinnasta, eri musiikkityyleistä, elektronisen musiikin tekemistä, studiotyöskentelystä, esitystekniikasta, musiikkivideon tekemisestä ja oheistuotteiden valmistamista. Viime vuosina koulutuksessa on panostettu liiketoimintaosaamisen edistämiseen. Käsiteltäviin aiheisiin kuuluvat niin markkinointi, myynti kuin talous ja sopimuksetkin. Tavoitteena on vahvistaa DIY-osaamista sekä luoda pohjaa tulevaisuuden bisnesosaamiselle.

Musiikkialan tapahtumat ovat osa toimintamme. Rytmi-instituutti on osallistunut MARS-festivaalin, SAD- ja DJ Weekend -tapahtumien syntyyn ja kehitykseen. Tuorein tapahtumaprojektimme on Ääniaallot studiolaitenäyttely Seinäjoen Rytmikorjaamolla, missä nähdään kattava määrä studioteknologiaa Suikki Jääskän lahjoittamasta studiolaitekokoelmasta.

Name: Melody Music Institute
Description: Melody Music Institute is one of the best music institutes operating in the Abu Dhabi city. The institute is approved by the Ministry of Education and has its close association with Trinity College London for conducting various musical examinations. The quality education provided by the institute in music and musical instruments, such as, Piano, Electronic Keyboards, Guitar, Violin, Western Vocal, , etc. would certainly enable its students (younger generation as well as the elder ones alike) improve their talents in music whilst providing them quality and value added means to utilize their extra/leisure time.

Name: Guitar Show
Description: The biggest appointment dedicated to guitar, bass, amplification, stomp, gear & more, in southern Europe. May 10-11, 2025 Bologna Italy.

Name: ANGVIS
Description:
ANGVIS, derived from the Latin word “an-gui-s” meaning snake, symbolizes the powerful connection between the human and divine worlds. As an independent record label, we strive to embody this connection through our commitment to pushing the boundaries of electronic music.
Founded in London, United Kingdom in 2020, ANGVIS is a platform for emerging artists from around the world to showcase their talents and unleash their creative potential. Our mission is to provide a space for up-and-coming artists to shine in a saturated music industry.
With a passion for innovation and artistic expression, we are dedicated to cultivating an inclusive and supportive community of like-minded individuals. Our goal is to elevate the electronic music scene by nurturing the next generation of talented artists and inspiring listeners with fresh sounds and unique perspectives.
Together, we rise as a force for change and creativity, bridging the gap between the physical and spiritual realms through the power of music.

Name: Noizbloc
Description: We help independent artists to get recognised

Name: Move Music Distribution GmbH
Description:
Move Music combines a simple platform with powerful technology to provide the best music distribution service available. Our flexible, feature-rich platform allows musicians and music industry professionals of all kinds to get their music out in the world and start getting paid for them.
We create a stellar client experience through intuitive design and client support that goes the extra mile. We also pride ourselves on the robust, modern technology that underlies Move Music.

Name: Dreamstart Music & Management
Description:
Dreamstart Music & Management is an independent boutique music label and artist management company. While we are based in Germany, we work globally. We combine more than 20 years of experience with a state-of-the-art digital setup.

We believe in dedication, transparency and fairness, putting in all our enthusiasm, know-how and energy in developing hidden talents and artists that deserve more attention.

Our job is to make sure that an outstanding talent with outstanding music gets heard by as many people as possible. With the right strategy and contacts we want to accelerate your music career in order to increase your fanbase and market value.

Name: KMSA 91.3
Description: KMSA 91.3 the alternative of Grand Junction FM college radio

Name: Wired Music Week
Description:
Wired Music Week (WMW) is a platform for significant conversations and connections to happen in the Asian electronic music and related industries. WMW was created in 2018 first as a conference that has spawned a yearly edition in Kuala Lumpur as well as pop-ups in Indonesia, Vietnam, and Brunei. In the past two years, WMW, amidst a global pandemic, ramped up its digital footprint to also host virtual conferences and songwriting boot camps.

WMW aims to carry on its mission of being a pivotal flashpoint point for both industry professionals and fans to create a healthier, more diverse scene as we move into the future.

Name: Film Music Composer
Description: Film Music Composer. Katerina Vaiou is a professional piano teacher and writes music for movies and films. Enjoy a mix of ethnic, lounge, chillout, classic, instrumental, hindie, world and more music sounds along with lots of intense feelings, images and smooth influences...

Name: KAIKA Music
Description:
Kaika Music solorepræsenterer en lang række kunstnere som bl.a. Gnags, Lis Sørensen, Peter A. G, Sebastian, Michael Falch, MALURT, Birthe Kjær & Feel Good Band, Michelsen & Bramsen, ItaloBrothers, Michael Learns To Rock, Shu-Bi-Dua 2.0, Back To Back, Faustix, Johnson m.fl. 

Kaika Music er leveringsdygtige i alle former for underholdning – alt lige fra kendte danske rockbands til de bedste danske partyorkestre, landets førende stand-uppere, solister, diverse shows m.m.

Students are introduced to their instruments in a fun and understandable way. Technique, music theory, and reading are taught through song form, which creates a strong foundation and love for music.

Name: Ernie Records
Description:
Ernie Records es una discográfica y agencia de management y producción de eventos musicales que nace en 2004 como consecuencia de una pasión y un reto: la pasión por la música y el reto de darle un cuidado profesional que no sólo no esté reñido con la emoción sino que sirva para potenciarla.
De esa combinación en apariencia tan sencilla nace una aventura en la que buscamos que grupos, público, salas y patrocinadores se beneficien del trabajo de nuestro equipo en sus distintos aspectos: publicación de discos, contratación, promoción y producción de conciertos. Procuramos cuidar hasta el mínimo detalle de nuestro trabajo porque somos los primeros en disfrutar de su resultado.

Name: Mariskalrock
Description:
MariskalRock es el portal líder en información y entretenimiento de rock y metal para el público hispanoparlante. 

*MariskalRock is the world´s biggest platform for rock and metal entertainment for Spanish-speaking audiences.

Nuestra revista La Heavy es de las más longevas en el mundo, publicándose mensualmente desde 1982 con distribución en España y Latinoamérica y una base fiel de suscriptores, lectores y anunciantes. 

*Having been published since 1982, our magazine La Heavy is one of the longest-standing publications in the music scene in the world, with distribution in Spain and LATAM and a loyal audience base. 

Independientes desde 2012, le ofrecemos a nuestra audiencia global contenido musical de máxima calidad a través de canales de prensa, digital, social, vídeo y radio. 

*Fully independent since 2012, we offer global music content to a diverse audience via press, digital, social, video and radio. 

Entendemos la música como un vehículo de expresión de nuestra audiencia, y ayudamos a las marcas a entender los valores que transpiran en el rock: honestidad, pasión, credibilidad y lealtad. 

*MariskalRock understands music is a powerful engagement vehicle and help brands to link with the values of our diverse audiences: Honesty, passion, credibility and loyalty. 

Con oficinas en Madrid y Londres, un equipo editorial y creativo único y una red de colaboradores de primera línea en Latinoamérica, llegamos a más de 1.5 millones al mes de fanáticos que confían en nuestros medios de comunicación como punto de contacto con las bandas, la música y los contenidos que tanto les apasionan. 

*With offices in Madrid, London and a network of top-notch contributors around LATAM, we have a reach of +1.5 million rock and metal fanatics that trust us to communicate news and content from their favourite artists.

Name: Chosen Music Ltd
Description:
Chosen is a boutique full service music management company representing a handpicked roster of best in class recording artists, songwriters and producers.

Name: Revolution Hall
Description: Revolution Hall is a beautifully renovated, state-of-the art performing arts center / concert venue housed within the former Washington High School building.

Description: Miami Music Week is a music company based out of Miami, Florida, United States.

Description: Seattle, Washington

Name: NashVox
Description:
Experience the Heart of Music City—Authentically
At Nashvox Studios, we transform the energy of Nashville into unforgettable experiences for businesses and groups. Whether it’s a high-energy corporate team-building event, a recording session that turns colleagues into rockstars, or a family-friendly outing that captures the true spirit of Music City, we design immersive moments that resonate.
Our studio blends creativity, collaboration, and music to help teams connect, celebrate, and walk away with memories that last. From Fortune 500 companies to local organizations, we make sure every group gets the full Nashville experience—authentic, engaging, and uniquely their own.

Our curated experiences include:

Song Recording sessions with your very own audio engineer to help you find the recording artist within your soul

Songwriting sessions with seasoned Nashville pros

Karaoke nights that bring out your inner star

Writers’ rounds that showcase the soul of Nashville storytelling

Line dancing events—our newest addition that gets everyone moving

Whether you're visiting or local, our events offer the most authentic, meaningful, and memory-making experiences in Nashville.

Name: Yoruba Gospel Music
Description:
Yoruba Gospel Music (YGM) is a start-up gospel record label, a music creative focused on creating a new sound in the music industry that premiers African and American music genres. YGM offers music and visual products online, in which customers can enjoy though online streaming or downloads. The label also hosts free community music concerts. To fulfil its primary purpose of propagating the gospel of Jesus Christ. YGM is based in the UK, nonetheless, is able to off its music products and service to the whole world through digital media, making YGM a global brand. 

YGM is an entrepreneurial type of firm, that seeks to enhance a standard business model by exploiting and creating new opportunities regardless of resources they currently control. It’s a non-profit organisation with a different style.

Name: Muze van Zuid
Description:
Van 10 t/m 14 september 2025 verandert Amsterdam-Zuid in een bruisend muzikaal landschap tijdens de 8e editie van Muze van Zuid: Vrijhaven voor Muziek.

Welkom bij meer dan 30 concerten, muziekwandelingen en events. We nemen je graag mee langs verrassende locaties — van huiskamers tot monumenten, van parken tot verborgen parels in de buurt. Klassiek, global sounds, kleinkunst, jazz en buurtverhalen klinken in heel diverse wijken als De Pijp, de Willemsparkbuurt, de Olympiabuurt en het Museumkwartier, tot aan de Prinses Irenebuurt bij Zuidas. 

De kaartverkoop is geopend:
Ontdek Zuid als vrijhaven voor muziek, verbeelding en ontmoeting!

Name: RAK Studios
Description:
RAK Studios is one of the UK's premier recording studios. Founded in 1976, the studio has hosted a wealth of talent over the years and is the first choice studio for anyone wanting to ensure their project excels.

We have four studios at RAK, all of which boast classic, state-of-the-art recording equipment.

Our dedicated engineers and assistants have a wealth of experience working across all genres of music. Their technical ability, dedication, and unparalleled professionalism are what will bring your project to life.

All of our studios are comfortable and spacious, with plenty of natural light. Unusually for a recording studio, we have in-house accommodation for up to six people, plus catering facilities and off-street parking for up to 10 vehicles.

RAK is located in St. John’s Wood in North London, making us easily accessible via public transport. Additionally, there is an array of restaurants, pubs, and shops conveniently located within walking distance of the studio, making your stay with us easy and comfortable.

Name: Living Opera
Description: Living Opera is a production company and foundation creating original work in music, media, and live performance.

Name: Ortizo S.A.S
Description: Ortizo S.A.S es la empresa número uno en importación y comercialización de instrumentos musicales en Colombia, de las mejores marcas en instrumentos musicales como Hohner, Fender, Cort, Zildjian, Ludwig, Sabian, Harrodser, Medeli, Conn selmer y muchas más

Name: Longevity Music School
Description:
From the origins of electronics in music to new production practices, Longevity Music School has positioned itself as a resource and experimentation space dedicated to dialogue, reflection and creation around electronic music.

In a transversal link between several professional and artistic disciplines (music producer, sound designer, audiovisual professions, creators of video games, stage manager, etc.), the school offers individualized support serving to take charge and the realization of all artistic and / or professional projects.

Located in Strasbourg, Longevity also crisscrosses the roads of France with its Playground, to always raise awareness of this culture and these practices, which are now omnipresent, which are constantly changing the soundscape.

Name: Fair Enough
Description: We collaborate with brands, agencies, Filmmakers and creatives around the world to help fulfill their vision, to help find the right musical piece for the right image.

Name: Waterworks Festival
Description:
Waterworks is a London day festival created to provide a platform for showcasing and celebrating the diversity and talent in London’s electronic music scene.

In the wonderful melting pot of sound and culture that is London’s music scene, Waterworks have spotted a gap, a need for an outdoor summer platform that both gives life to emerging artists and allows more established acts from the diverse electronic scene to flourish, hand-picked primarily from the UK’s diverse pool, it’s a blend of the stylish originators and the radically unseasoned.

The curation of the electronic program focuses on the different flavours, strands and genres of dance music that have come to shape the musical landscape in the UK.

Waterworks Festival is a collaboration produced by the creative teams behind Percolate and Team Love.

Name: Oxmose
Description:
Oxmose is an independent french record label with a non-linear contemporary music vision, defining its sound identity through artistic concepts that blur genre lines, while also immersing the audience in a unique visual experience. 

At its core, Oxmose constantly searches for disruptive sound encounters, with resonances in philosophy, poetry, and visual arts. More than music production, we absorb ideas and transform them into musical narratives for sync and licensing projects for films, theatre, art installations and a variety of media of expression.

From its early days back in 2014, Oxmose has remained an électron libre, advocating for artistic freedom and imaginative enquiry in shaping endless sonic landscapes.

Name: Flo Sax
Description:
Saxophoniste depuis l'âge de 6 ans, j'ai été formé par le classique en conservatoire pendant une dizaine d'années, avant de m'orienter le jazz et les musiques actuelles. Vous pouvez me retrouver aujourd’hui sur toutes sortes d’événements : mariages, cocktails, séminaires... 

Vous souhaitez en savoir plus ? 

 insta : @flosaxlille

Description: Kaleidoscope is an artist management company and independent record label founded in 2015, with representatives based in both Newcastle upon Tyne, UK, and Bangkok, TH.

Name: Made In etaly S.r.l.
Description:
Made In etaly S.r.l. is a digital music and entertainment content distribution and marketing company founded by a pool of Italian independent record companies and distributors in 2007. 2012 was a year crowded with significant successes for Made In etaly, which has seen four of its products reach the yearly top ten official Italian yearly download chart (source FIMI/GFK) three of which in the first three positions (Energy Production’s Michel Teló "Ai se eu te Pego" and Gusttavo Lima "Balada", Do It Yourself/Globo Records’ Pulcino Pio "Il Pulcino Pio" - Click here!). In the last two years Made In etaly established its leadership as digital distributor in the local market, and strengthened its presence all over Europe and overseas. Made In etaly S.r.l. as of today distributes and represents in the digital sphere the leading Italian and several outstanding European independent companies.

The first Italian YouTube Certified company! On YouTube Made In etaly is a growing Multi Channel Network representing, as of today over 170 partner channels, music and entertainment oriented.
Three members of the team are "YouTube Certified Professionals", this allows for top quality support on the platform.

Pop, dance & electronic, jazz, hip-hop/rap, disco, rock, metal, classical, world and children music. A catalogue that embraces all genres and includes artists and projects such as: Pitbull, Michel Telò, Ola, Raffaella Carrà, Ozark Henry, Ennio Morricone, Nicola Piovani, Paolo Fresu, Luciano Pavarotti, Umberto Tozzi, Benny Benassi, DJ Antoine, Nicky Romero, Armin Van Buuren, Bob Sinclar, Inna, Martin Solveig, Michael Bublè, Pulcino Pio, Cristina D’Avena, Gala, In-Grid, Gabin, Syria, Lucio Dalla, Paolo Conte, Domenico Modugno, Zero Assoluto, Clementino, Salmo, Vacca, Mondo Marcio, 99 Posse, Big Fish, Casino Royale, Massimo Ranieri, Mia Martini, Fausto Leali, Gusttavo Lima, P. Lion, Silver Pozzoli, Ti.Pi.Cal, Whigfield, Scooter, Death SS, Dark Lunacy, and many others.

As a record label and artist management company we are home for several group, band and solo artist such as Trio Macan, Adista, Duo Amor, D’Mojang, Lsista and Elvira. Musik Proaktif also a place of hundreds content and partner. Truthfulness and reliability is our core value that we internalized to our partner, artist and employee.

Description:
PRAZOR is your source for great Christian and Gospel music.

Download the free app and start enjoying PRAZOR’s family-friendly music.Listen to PRAZOR on your smartphone, tablet, desktop, Apple TV, Roku, and Amazon Fire.

Name: Nanada Music B.V.
Description:
NANADA MUSIC B.V. is one of Holland’s oldest independent music publishers around. Founded in April 1968 by Willem van Kooten (for the radio freaks: Radio Veronica DJ Mister Joost Den Draaijer). 
Since, NANADA has gathered a great amount of musical treasures in its portfolio, among which a large number of gigantic international hits dating back to the last century – like SHOCKING BLUE’s “VENUS”, FOCUS “HOCUS POCUS”, TEACH IN’s “DING A DONG”, EARTH & FIRE’s “WEEKEND” and the STARS ON 45 project. 

We also represent a number of very popular compositions in Dutch, such as ANDRÉ HAZES’ “EEN BEETJE VERLIEFD”, ANDRÉ VAN DUIN’s “SAMBABALLENSAMBA”, RAMSES SHAFFY’s “JOSJE” and HET GOEDE DOEL’s “BELGIË”. 

Most people do not realize that songs are not just successful because of the great artists recording them, but mainly because of those talented men and women writing the music and lyrics to those hits. 
And those are the talented people NANADA MUSIC B.V. are proud to work with!

Name: Jaysound Records
Description: Music Production and Releases - Vinyls, CDs and Digital Albums • Film Scoring,  Sound Design and Sync Licensing for Audiobooks, Films and Multimedia.

Name: Seattle Youth Symphony Orchestra (SYSO)
Description: Founded in 1942, Seattle Youth Symphony Orchestra (SYSO) is the largest youth orchestra training program in the United States. The organization serves a diverse body of students each year with seven orchestras, two summer festival programs, a conservatory, and partnerships with local public schools. By providing tuition assistance to students, SYSO ensures that every talented student can participate in our programs, regardless of financial resources.

Name: MAM BMAT
Description: MAM BMAT is a tight global firm of royalty experts focused on helping music composers + publishers collect their due royalties.

Name: The Ivors Academy Trust
Description:
We've moved our home on LinkedIn to The Ivors Academy - make sure you follow us there.

Official charity of The Ivors Academy of Music Creators. Building careers, breaking barriers and bringing new opportunities.

Name: En Karma
Description:
WHO ARE WE?

If you take the sound of Bhangra music, you can flawlessly match it to the heartbeat of the band, En Karma. 

The members were born with "dhols" and "tumbis" (traditional instruments) in hand and a thirst to take Bhangra beats into the fusion zone by adding guitars, drums and synths to the mix. It’s the perfect mix of their diverse roots - Canada, UK and India.  En Karma is the only Punjabi band in North America and is one of the top bands of the Bhangra movement. As a live band - they bring to the stage their own arrangements infused with more contemporary influences to create a unique Bhangra sound that is all their own.  

En Karma is a group of friends who came together with one goal in mind:  create music that people would love dancing to as much as they loved performing it. En Karma consists of Nick Chowlia on keys, Pip Dhaliwal on drums, and Inder Kooner the bands vocal horsepower.

WHAT & WHEN

In 2020, En Karma is looking to take over a decade of music, a dozen releases, new music and classic hits to the main stages of music’s biggest events and festivals in the world.  En Karma - the perfect balance of India’s Bhangra, folk Bhangra of Canada mixed with some indie rock.  En Karma’s exciting, thrilling and dance inducing performances are sure to be a hit to crowds of all ages and music genres.

Since 2007, En Karma has the following to showcase their skills - 15 music videos, show reels from past festivals, events and concerts and 11 album covers for releases from our full album singles.

Name: Nasty Little Man
Description: Nasty Little Man is a full-service music public relations firm that has run campaigns and various tours to showcase its music.

Name: Esc.rec.
Description: Esc.rec. is a small, critically acclaimed record label for adventurous music, founded in 2004 by Harco Rutgers in Deventer, NL. Quality standards are high and musical preferences broad.

Name: simfy AG
Description:
simfy means simplify - our vision is to create the easiest way to listen to music, anywhere and anytime.

We change the way people experience music. We believe that everyone should have access to the entire world of music and simfy enables people to do exactly that, anywhere and anytime.

Simply register online to gain access to millions of tracks, anytime and as often as you like - no downloading required. Share playlists with your friends and listen to the entire world of music in the cloud. You can enjoy your music anywhere in the world - either on the web, on your desktop or even on your mobile phone.

Of course simfy is completely legal: We have licensed all content from our partners, record labels, content aggregators and artists directly.

Name: Phil Circle Music
Description:
By going beyond the theoretical and technical aspects of music and approaching the art form as a source for a higher quality of life and even a means of therapy, Phil Circle works with each student to know their needs at the deepest level. For those interested in a career, his mentoring includes development of the necessary knowledge and skills to pursue this in an ever-changing world.

Phil's teachers share his philosophy of teaching the whole artist, of believing in each student's unlimited potential, and the importance of developing the creative voice.

Name: Malaco Music Group
Description: Comprising recording studios, record labels, music publishing companies, direct marketing operations, and distribution services, the Malaco Music Group takes original music from concept to consumer. Malaco has been making and marketing definitive southern soul, blues, and gospel music since 1968. Building on this firm foundation, Malaco's expanded repertoire also includes jazz, urban, Christian, and children's music. We do this through providing or directing to:

Education

Resources

Access to treatment

We also create original content that  spreads awareness through personal stories of living through difficult times, optimism and hope.

We are committed to using awareness and education to demystify the mental healthcare landscape for those in need, particularly in underserved and youth communities.

We see music, for creators and listeners, as a uniquely powerful space to process struggle and joy to stay connected to each other.

Broadcasting from locations worldwide in real-time, Mutha FM brings unique shows and experiences to its online community, celebrating electronic music across all genres under one banner.

Founded in 2002 as South Africa’s first internet radio station, Mutha FM was created to showcase the country’s finest DJs, producers, and artists. Name: Gustav Mahler Jugendorchester
Description:
The Gustav Mahler Jugendorchester (GMJO) was founded in Vienna in 1986, on the initiative of its present musical director, Claudio Abbado. It is today regarded as the world's leading youth orchestra and is under the patronage of the European Council.

Its high artistic level has prompted many leading conductors to perform with the GMJO, such as Claudio Abbado, Herbert Blomstedt, Pierre Boulez, Myung-Whun Chung, Sir Colin Davis, Peter Eötvös, Ivan Fischer, Daniele Gatti, Bernard Haitink, Mariss Jansons, Philippe Jordan, Ingo Metzmacher, Kent Nagano, Seiji Ozawa, and Franz Welser-Möst. Amongst the renowned soloists to have worked with the GMJO are Martha Argerich, Yuri Bashmet, Renaud and Gautier Capuçon, Matthias Goerne, Susan Graham, Thomas Hampson, Leonidas Kavakos, Evgenij Kissin, Christa Ludwig, Radu Lupu, Yo-Yo Ma, Anne-Sophie Mutter, Anne Sofie von Otter, Maxim Vengerov, and Frank-Peter Zimmermann.

The GMJO has been a regular guest at the most renowned concert halls and festivals for years, such as the Gesellschaft der Musikfreunde in Vienna, the Concertgebouw Amsterdam, the Suntory Hall Tokyo, the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées Paris, the Mozarteum Argentino Buenos Aires, the Lucerne Festival, the Salzburg Festival and the Salzburg Easter Festival, the Edinburgh International Festival, and the BBC Proms.

Many former members of the GMJO are now members of leading European orchestras, many of them in principal positions.

Name: Sneak Attack Music
Description:
We’re an award-winning boutique music and sound agency trusted by brands, agencies, and filmmakers worldwide. With over two decades of experience, we specialize in original composition, music supervision, and audio post- crafting sound that elevates every frame.

We believe the best work starts with strong relationships and a shared creative vision. Our approach is collaborative, thoughtful, and grounded in expertise- helping our partners tell stories that resonate and stand out through exceptional music and sound.

Name: Vol de nuit
Description:
Basé entre Bordeaux et Angoulême, le trio « Vol de nuit » dresse une pop new-wave, dansante et singulière, aux reflets teintés par les eighties. 

Après une longue période de préparation en sous-marin, 5 de leurs titres ont vu le jour dans leur premier EP "Vie sauvage" disponible depuis le 21 juillet 2021. Le trio nous y entraîne pour une évasion immédiate, vers des paysages fantasmés, à l’image de leur second clip « Cap Canamera » sorti en octobre 2020. En remuant sur la vague, on retrouve une fougue brûlante et à fleur de peau, héritée de la grande scène Indie-Rock anglaise (FOALS, Bloc Party). Mais sous ces eaux agitées se cache un monde solitaire, où résonne la voix masculine de leur chanteur, parfois scandée et brute, parfois intime et légère. Elle nous raconte la quête de soi, entre errance et évasion. 

Finalement, Vol de nuit c’est un navire hybride, voguant sur la nouvelle scène de la pop urbaine (Fils Cara, Terrier, Odezenne...) au large de ses horizons Rock. Embarquement immédiat !

Name: Peach Guitars
Description:
The story of Peach Guitars begins back in '91 from a unit in a Braintree Craft Centre, specialising in both guitars and metal detectors, Peach offered a truly unique retail experience!

It was during this period that owner Derek Peachey decided to recruit a young guitarist named John Priest. John worked tirelessly for Peach and slowly the focus shifted from metal detectors and Peach became a specialist guitar store. After a short time working for a distributor, John returned to Peach, and when Derek decided to retire, John and his father Alan, stepped up to run Peach Guitars as partners.

With an ever growing reputation, Peach Guitars became a serious name in the world of boutique guitars. The shop offered the biggest brands in the business and with a focus on excellent customer service and offering expert knowledge; it wasn’t long before Peach outgrew its modest craft centre home.

In 2014 Peach opened a second store in Colchester, but while the business continued to strive under John and Al’s leadership, the logistics of having 2 locations was never ideal. In 2017 Peach closed both stores and moved into our current home on the Severalls Estate, Colchester, just off the A12.

The Peach Guitars superstore is the UK’s premier guitar destination. Walk through the front doors and you are greeted by an array of the world’s finest guitars. Split over 2 floors, you’ll find over 1400 guitars on display with many in the incredible Peach Saloon. This unique showroom delivers an authentic western vibe and benefits from a stage and bar, perfect for the events we host.

With dedicated rooms for Taylor, Martin, Fender CS, Gibson and Suhr, we have some the most varied and extensive collections in Europe.

Name: Intarsia Records
Description:
Embracing the ever changing face of the music industry, Intarsia Records strives for a forward thinking, raw and collaborative approach to creating music. Led by a team of creatives with experience in a variety of fields across the music industry, we appreciate that an artist understands themselves better than anyone else ever could. 

Putting artists at the centre of what we do is vital in ensuring their success. Intarsia Records simply wants to facilitate the best possible artistic version of yourself. Our artists are encouraged to work collaboratively; both with us and within the creation of their music, broadening the horizons of what their sound can be. This hands-on process gives us the ability to use our skills and experience to support clients every step of the way. We want to tackle the status quo of the music industry by ensuring everything we do is accessible to a balanced mix of voices and opinions.  Intarsia Records is appreciative of all music but paying a particular focus to genres that are often underrepresented within the music industry, we want to help get the unheard into the spotlight.

Name: Hotel Cecil

Hotel Cecil er en del af Kvindernes Bygning, der blev opført i 1936 og oprindeligt tjente stue- og kælderplan som forsamlings- og foredragssal. Sidenhen har lokalerne fungeret som Det Kongelige Teaters “Gråbrødrescenen” og fra 1991-2017 som et velrenommeret koncertsted for jazzmusikken.

Fra januar 2018 har folkene bag Bremen Teater overtaget lejemålet og driver nu Hotel Cecil i disse eksklusive og historieprægede lokaler.

Name: School of Rock Claremont
Description:
School of Rock Claremont brings to Cape Town a globally recognised, performance-based music education experience, one that stands apart by putting students on real stages, in real bands, learning real songs.

As part of the School of Rock worldwide network, with 429 locations across 16+ countries, and a curriculum backed by a U.S. patented method - we harness the power of a proven system and brand that’s transformed lives internationally.

We pair private lessons and group band rehearsals within a live-performance context, creating an environment where students don’t just learn, they become musicians. 

From beginners to experienced players, our programmes build confidence, creativity and teamwork - skills that extend far beyond the music room.

If you are a parent looking for more than just “music lessons”, you will value a programme that delivers real-life experiences, strong mentorship and community.

If you are an aspiring musician seeking a community, live performances, and peer-driven growth - you will feel right at home here.

If you are a local business, educator or community partner — partnering with us means participating in a globally trusted brand, anchored locally, delivering measurable youth development and a creative culture.

Join us at School of Rock Claremont, where we leverage the strength of a global brand with local heart, and where every student has the opportunity to hit the stage and grow into a confident, creative individual!

Name: Music Addict
Description:
Welcome to Music Addict, the vibrant platform where music and passion unite. Established on the principles of creativity, community, and connection, we exist to empower independent musicians worldwide. At Music Addict, we believe that every artist should have the opportunity to share their sound with the world, and we deliver on that belief.

Music Addict is committed to providing independent musicians & industry professionals with the tools they need to thrive. Our platform is designed to cater to every aspect of an artist’s career.

 

What We Do
Music Addict offers you the chance to explore the vast universe of independent music from around the globe. With various consulting services and a exclusive interviews, our platform offers a personalized music experience that can connect you to new music you’ll love.

Music Addict is more than just a platform for musicians and music lovers; it’s a community. We foster a culture of support and collaboration. Providing a space where artists can learn from each other, share their experiences, and grow together. The community is built on respect, inclusivity, and a shared love of music.

We are committed to providing exceptional customer support to ensure your satisfaction and success. Our dedicated support agents are available to assist you with any queries from Monday to Friday, between 8:00 am and 5:00 pm (EST), excluding holidays. Our response time can be up to 2 business days. Home of the Creek Music Group Record Label and the Music Addict Podcast

With our DJ department Unity, we aim to polish the fun aspect of music.

Name: The New York Pops
Description: The New York Pops is the largest independent pops orchestra in the United States and the only professional symphonic orchestra in New York City specializing in popular music. Under the leadership of Music Director and Conductor Steven Reineke, The New York Pops continues to re-imagine orchestral pops music. The orchestra performs annually at Carnegie Hall and at Forest Hills Stadium, a 14,000-seat historic concert venue in Queens, NY. Through its PopsEd music education programs, The New York Pops allows thousands of New Yorkers of all ages and backgrounds to participate in customizable music programs that blend traditional education with pure fun. Follow The New York Pops on Facebook (facebook.com/thenewyorkpops), Instagram (@thenewyorkpops), and Twitter (@thenewyorkpops).

Name: THE METROPOLITAN ORCHESTRA
Description:
Under the baton of Founding Artistic Director & Chief Conductor Sarah-Grace Williams, The Metropolitan Orchestra (TMO) is recognised as one of Australia’s most versatile orchestras, delivering consistently vibrant first-class experiences.  Founded in 2009 and based in Sydney, TMO’s remarkable decade of music making boasts more than 500 concerts with a variety of events targeted at different demographics, including TMO’s acclaimed Met Concert series, family Cushion Concert series, free concerts, national and international tours, as well as appearing on album recordings and for numerous special events.   

An impressive roster of performers have appeared with TMO including internationally renowned artists José Carreras, Dame Kiri Te Kanawa, Bryn Terfel, Sumi Jo, David Helfgott, Elaine Paige, Anthony Warlow, John Farnham, Olivia Newton-John, Teddy Tahu Rhodes, James Morrison, Kate Ceberano, Marina Prior, the Grigoryan Brothers and Todd McKenny. In high demand as an orchestra-for-hire, TMO has shown their versatility working across numerous genres.  Performance highlights include concerts with film (BBC’s Blue Planet and Planet Earth, Doctor Who Symphonic Spectacular, Kingdom Hearts and Final Fantasy), providing mid-field entertainment at the NRL Grand Final, appearances for Opera in the Vineyards in both the Hunter Valley (NSW) and Clare Valley (SA) and sailing the South Pacific annually as resident orchestra aboard Bravo Cruise of the Performing Arts for the past 7 years.  Additionally, TMO is regularly engaged for numerous Australia and New Zealand tours with international artists, recent tours including ‘Synthony - a celebration of dance music reimagined’, with headliners Miss Connie (Sneaky Sound System) and Ilan kidron (Potbelleez), Jurassic Park with Film, 2Cellos, Basement Jaxx, The Piano Guys, Hiphop act Horrorshow, Air Supply and Joy Division.  

For season details, videos and testimonials or to enquire about hiring TMO for an event, go to www.metorchestra.com

Name: Orchestra Filarmonica di Torino
Description:
L’Orchestra Filarmonica di Torino è un'orchestra sinfonico-cameristica nata nell’aprile 1992. Protagonisti centrali della programmazione, concepita in modo che ogni concerto sia un evento speciale, sono i grandi capolavori del periodo barocco e classico: l’attenzione alle più aggiornate prassi esecutive e la definizione dei dettagli che tale repertorio acquista quando viene eseguito da un organico cameristico fanno dell’Orchestra Filarmonica di Torino una realtà unica, che ha nel tempo consolidato una marcata riconoscibilità. 

Ha sede a Torino e attualmente realizza i propri concerti al Conservatorio "G. Verdi" di Torino, al Teatro Vittoria e presso il salone multifunzionale di +SpazioQuattro. La direzione artistica - dopo il decennio a firma di Nicola Campogrande - è attualmente ricoperta da un team artistico composto da Michele Mo (Presidente e Direttore Artistico), Giampaolo Pretto (Direttore Musicale) e Gabriele Montanaro (Assistente alla Direzione artistica).

L’attività dell’Orchestra Filarmonica di Torino è sostenuta dal Ministero dei beni e delle attività culturali e del turismo, dalla Regione Piemonte, dalla Città di Torino. Dal 2016 l’Orchestra Filarmonica di Torino è stata selezionata dalla Compagnia di San Paolo quale realtà d’eccellenza nel panorama dello spettacolo dal vivo. L’OFT, che gode del patrocinio della Città Metropolitana di Torino, è inoltre sostenuta dalla Fondazione CRT e da altri sponsor privati, tra i quali Lavazza e Studio Torta di Torino.

Name: School of Rock Markham
Description:
School of Rock is the leader in music education for kids and adults.  Students learn from professional musicians in an interactive environment combining weekly private lessons and structured group rehearsals with the ultimate goal of performing live in front of real crowds. We teach guitar, drums, keyboards, vocals and bass.  

School of Rock Markham was the very first official School of Rock in Canada is the only official School of Rock in the Greater Toronto Area.  

We believe the best way to learn music is to play music. We take students from the lesson room to the stage, developing both their confidence and musicianship with programs designed for all skill levels.

Our performance-based teaching method is an immersive experience that inspires our students to be their best.  We get our students playing music as quickly as possible because we know that that is what our students want to do.  As a result our students become more interested in the theory of music.  

School of Rock - Often imitated, NEVER duplicated!

No, we did not base our company on the movie.  The first School of Rock was founded in Philadelphia in 1998 and the movie was released in 2003!  

What started in 1998 with one school in Philadelphia, School of Rock now has over 300 locations in more than 14 countries in the world.

For more information, please call 647-218-7625.

Name: Dunedin Consort
Description:
Dunedin Consort is one of the world’s leading baroque ensembles, recognised for its vivid and insightful performances and recordings. Formed in 1995 and named after Din Eidyn, the ancient Celtic name for Edinburgh Castle, Dunedin Consort’s ambition is to make early music relevant to the present day. Under the direction of John Butt, the ensemble has earned two coveted Gramophone Awards – for the 2007 recording of Handel’s Messiah and the 2014 recording of Mozart’s Requiem – and a Grammy nomination. In 2018, it was shortlisted for a Royal Philharmonic Society Ensemble award.

While Dunedin Consort is committed to performing repertoire from the baroque and early classical periods, and to researching specific historical performance projects, it remains an enthusiastic champion of contemporary music. In recent years the ensemble has commissioned and premiered new music by composers including Stuart Macrae, Ailie Robertson, William Sweeney, Errollyn Wallen, Nico Muhly, Peter Nelson, Stevie Wishart and Sally Beamish. In 2019 it premiered four new co-commissions with the BBC Proms, and in 2021 will premiere a new opera by Errollyn Wallen, co-commissioned with the Barbican and Mahogany Opera.

Name: ACT Music + Vision GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
ACT Music ACT has been one of the leading independent music companies in Europe for 29 years and accompanies artist careers that move in the jazz context and beyond.

"Today ACT is considered one of the finest curators of progressive jazz and creative music.” DOWNBEAT.

With a roster that boasts a wide range of leading jazz instrumentalists and singers, the German label ACT has released some of the most influential contemporary jazz recordings of the recent past. In the years since its foundation in 1992 by music manager and producer Siggi Loch, it has built a global presence and profile. Over the years, ACT has championed an incredible array of jazz artists who are defined by their desire to push musical boundaries while reaching out to a wider audience with both authenticity and innovation at their core. This list includes the likes of Esbjörn Svensson Trio, Nils Landgren, Michael Wollny, Marius Neset, Lars Danielsson, Joachim Kühn, Ulf Wakenius, Youn Sun Nah, Nguyên Lê , Leszek Możdżer , Vincent Peirani, Émile Parisien and many more. Although the main focus of ACT is on European jazz, it has also played a significant role in the careers of US artists such as Terri Lyne Carrington, David Binney, Vince Mendoza, Vijay Iyer and Rudresh Mahanthappa. Having released more then 600 albums to date, the ACT label has written part of the continuing story of jazz by staying true to its mission of presenting music "in the spirit of jazz".

Name: SPRE - Société pour la Perception de la Rémunération Equitable
Description:
Pour certains la musique est une passion, pour d'autres elle est liée à une activité professionnelle. D'un côté les créateurs, de l'autre les utilisateurs. Dans cette relation doit s'établir une certaine équité. Tel est le rôle de la SPRE. Elle contribue à l'équilibre des métiers de la musique.

Comment ?

La SPRE collecte dans le cadre d'un mandat légal la Rémunération Equitable, qui est ensuite répartie par ses sociétés membres. Elle est cogérée par quatre sociétés (SCPP, SPPF, ADAMI, SPEDIDAM) qui répartissent ces droits directement aux artistes-interprètes et aux producteurs sur la base des relevés de diffusion fournis par les chaînes de télévision et les radios ou par sondage pour les autres diffuseurs de musique.

La Rémunération Equitable ?

Elle est principalement proportionnelle aux recettes d'exploitation pour les radios, les télévisions, les discothèques ou bars et restaurants à ambiance musicale pour lesquels la musique est attractive, et constitue un élément essentiel de leur activité.

Elle est principalement forfaitaire pour les lieux dits «sonorisés», auxquels la musique de sonorisation apporte une valeur ajoutée moindre.

A quoi est-elle destinée ?

A rémunérer les artistes-interprètes et producteurs de phonogrammes pour l'exploitation de leur travail.

Name: BAGAD KEMPER
Description:
Créé à la fin des années 40 à Quimper en Bretagne, héritier du riche patrimoine musical des différents terroirs bretons, l’association regroupe quatre ensembles musicaux : le Bagad Kemper (1ère catégorie), le Bagad Glazik Kemper (3ème catégorie), le Bagadig (5ème catégorie), ainsi qu’un bagad école. Les musiciens sont répartis en 4 pupitres : cornemuses, bombardes, batteries et percussions.

« Hep Diskrog » ou « sans relâche » sont sans doute les mots qui caractérisent le mieux l’ensemble musical Bagad Kemper, véritable figure de proue de la musique bretonne depuis de nombreuses années.

D’abord parce que le Bagad a, en 52 participations au championnat de Bretagne des Bagadoù, accumulé 22 titres de Champion de Bretagne de 1ère catégorie, record inégalé à ce jour !

Ensuite parce qu’il n’a de cesse d’élargir ses horizons musicaux, d’allier la tradition à la novation en multipliant créations et collaborations avec des artistes tels que Johny Clegg, Dan Ar Braz, Carlos Nuñez, le groupe de rock Red Cardell, ...

Enfin parce qu’à travers ses différents ensembles musicaux, et notamment ceux tournés vers la formation des plus jeunes, l’association participe activement, depuis plus de 70 ans, à la transmission, au renouvellement, et à la vitalité du patrimoine culturel breton.

Voilà ce qui fait la fierté de chacun des sonneurs du Bagad Kemper : le fait de, selon les mots de Dan Ar Braz, « participer à sa manière et en son temps, à l’existence de la Bretagne ».

These include ABBA, Adele, Jhené Aiko, Alabama Shakes, Alex Da Kid, Axwell & Ingrosso, J Balvin, Bastille, Beach Boys, Beastie Boys, Bee Gees, Irving Berlin, Leonard Bernstein, Jeff Bhasker, Justin Bieber, Benny Blanco, Chris Brown, Kane Brown, Mariah Carey, Michael Chabon, Desmond Child, The Clash, Coldplay, J. Cole, Elvis Costello, DaBaby, Jason Derulo, Alexandre Desplat, Neil Diamond, Disclosure, Dua Lipa, Billie Eilish, Danny Elfman, Eminem, Gloria and Emilio Estefan, Florence + the Machine, Future, Martin Garrix, Selena Gomez, Ariana Grande, Al Green, Halsey, Emile Haynie, Jimi Hendrix, Don Henley, Hit-Boy, Sam Hunt, Imagine Dragons, Carly Rae Jepsen, Tobias Jesso Jr., Billy Joel, Elton John/Bernie Taupin, Joe Jonas, Nick Jonas, Alicia Keys, Lil Baby, Lil Yachty, Linkin Park, Logic, Demi Lovato, the Mamas & the Papas, Steve Mac, Maroon 5, Dave Matthews, Shawn Mendes, Metallica, Metro Boomin, Miguel, Nicki Minaj, Stephan Moccio, Maren Morris, Mumford & Sons, Randy Newman, New Order, Ne-Yo, Pearl Jam, Post Malone, Quavo, Otis Redding, R.E.M., Red Hot Chili Peppers, Rex Orange County, Rosalía, Carole Bayer Sager, Gustavo Santaolalla, Sex Pistols, Carly Simon, Paul Simon, Britney Spears, Bruce Springsteen, Stax (East Memphis Music), Harry Styles, Taylor Swift, SZA, Shania Twain, Justin Timberlake, U2, Keith Urban, Troy Verges, Jack White, Zedd and many more.

UMPG is also a global leader in Classical, Christian/Gospel, and Production Music. The company plays a major role in film and TV, providing creative and synch licensing services, and administration for such companies as Warner Bros. Entertainment, Universal Pictures, HBO, DreamWorks Animation, NBC Universal TV, and Sesame Workshop, among others.

Name: The Young Pianist Foundation
Description:
YPF organiseert concerten, concoursen en masterclasses en brengt tevens CD's uit. Om de drie jaar vindt in Muziekgebouw aan ’t IJ (Amsterdam) de finale plaats van de YPF European Piano Competition, waar de drie grootste jonge pianotalenten dan te bewonderen zijn.

YPF stelt zich ten doel initiatieven te ontwikkelen, in aanvulling op de muziekscholen en conservatoria, om de kansen voor het schaarse piano toptalent te vergroten. In haar initiatieven neemt YPF het internationale topniveau steeds als standaard en stimuleert jonge, talentvolle pianisten tot excelleren. 

YPF stimulates young piano talent, is a platform for pianolovers and a catalyst of piano careers on an international level.

Name: Opportunity Music Project
Description:
The mission of Opportunity Music Project is to provide the highest caliber of tuition-free private music lessons, mentoring, chamber music, and community engagement to children from low-economic backgrounds so that they may achieve their fullest potential as both artists and leaders in society. Opportunity Music Project builds community connectivity, redistributes resources, provides positive recreational and educational activities for disadvantaged young people, and promotes good character and values such as artistic professionalism, commitment to excellence, respect, leadership, and advocacy. 

OMP directly serves 115 students and reaches hundreds of children, hospitalized patients, seniors, and special needs children through our student-led chamber music series.

Name: OmMuse
Description: OmMuse is an online platform that offers musicians and producers a suite of innovative tools that make their lives easier - focusing on optimized storage, production, and distribution solutions.

Name: Bedtracks
Description:
The Bedtracks Music Library is a curated production music library.  With 70,000+ tracks we recognize the importance of using technology to make it easy to find the best music quickly.  Bedtracks handpicks music from our network of over 400 composers.  

Each track is rigorously analyzed and curated by our team and entered into our portal, which features the most advanced search and retrieval technology on the market. With time being of the essence, our highly refined SEO aims at finding that perfect track on the first search!

Creative sonic branding by two friends with a shared passion for music. We empower brands through the power of sound.

#music #advertising

Name: Lake Woozoo
Description:
We are Lake Woozoo 

We produce music and develop artists from our studios in Leeuwarden.

We come from a place of 'left field pop,' influenced by indie, hip-hop, alternative R&B, and electronic music. We love catchy hooks combined with weird sounds with attitude, especially when they blend. That’s why our inspiration often comes from artists who accidentally became pop stars.

Our productions are detailed and our workflow is flexible, moving from plugins to outboard gear, from electronic beats to well-arranged instruments, and from doing everything in-house to assembling a dream team of specialists.

We focus on
- songwriting, producing and mixing with an a&r-mindset
- developing artists 360 degrees 
- designing and facilitating talent programs (see: www.instagram.com/lakewoozoo_artisthub) 

We do all of this as a small team, with a shared, never-ending passion for creating music, hospitality and developing products. This all leads to a very cherished and warm community, that we’re excited to commit ourselves to everyday.

In 2023 we received the highest regional recognition when we were awarded with the Frisian Pop Award. We're steadily building, resulting in fifteen million (+) streams on Spotify already. We’ve hosted artists like GINGE, jet van der steen, Wolfskers, The Cool Quest, Dave Budha, Roxeanne Hazes, Joost Klein, Katie Koss and FAY.

Name: Over The Moon MGMT
Description: Over The Moon is a full service creative management company based in Los Angeles, CA.

Name: Belgian Saxophone Choir - BSC
Description: The Belgian Saxophone Choir - BSC is a new ensemble full of young talent from the Belgian saxophone scene. Their repertoire focusses on classical and contemporary music, with both original compositions for saxophone ensemble as arrangements and transcriptions. As a high quality ensemble, the BSC wants to strengthen the collaboration within the new generations of Belgian saxophonists.

Name: The Musicians' Company
Description: As the only City of London Livery Company dedicated to the performing arts, we nurture talent and share music through our concerts, outreach, awards and young artists’ programme. We focus on three areas: City, Craft and Community.

Name: West Michigan Symphony
Description:
An anchor cultural organization headquartered in Muskegon, WMS is a resident performing group at the Frauenthal Center, where its eight-concert season is the most visible part of a larger artistic enterprise of far-reaching community benefit. At its live listening room The Block, just down the street, it mounts 15 performance events annually featuring jazz, classical and other offerings. WMS concerts and Community Music Encounters learning events bring 16,500 people—more than 30% of whom are children and students—downtown annually, making it the largest performing arts organization on the West Shore. Audiences come from throughout Muskegon, Ottawa, Kent, Oceana and surrounding counties.
Led by Music Director Scott Speck, the Symphony presents eight subscription concerts (five classical and three pops) in the historic Frauenthal Theater located in downtown Muskegon. The WMS is made up of musicians of the highest caliber playing challenging repertoire and presenting some of the world's most talented guest artists.

West Michigan Symphony's newest endeavor is The Block: A simple, accessible, inspirational space where honest music can happen…not to you, but with you.

Name: Alberto Puerto Music
Description:
At Alberto Puerto Music, we believe that artistic excellence thrives at the crossroads of disciplines. What started in 2021 as a vision to provide high-caliber music education and performance opportunities has evolved into something even greater, a fulcrum where artists across mediums come together to create, collaborate, and redefine expressive spaces.

As creators who came from higher education, we felt the urgency to shape strong artists at a time when skills-based arts education was fading. But something remarkable happened, our students and collaborators began seeking new ways to express themselves. This sparked the birth of GG Art Space, a project dedicated to interdisciplinary creation, where emerging artists in South Florida could push boundaries and bring fresh ideas to life.

Along the way, we’ve earned the support of Miami Dade County Cultural Affairs, the Spanish Cultural Center, Bill Glez Guitars, and were proudly chosen by the National Performance Network as a fiscally sponsored project.

In 2023 and 2024, we gained recognition through organizations like JP Morgan Chase, Digital Unidivided, SCOPE International Art Show, Prospera, Accion Opportunity Fund, and Etsy, all underscoring our commitment to innovation and community impact. Our work has been featured in Canvas Rebel Magazine, The New Tropic, VoyageMIA, and Revista Nagari, helping amplify our mission.

As Miami experiences a cultural renaissance on the global stage, we remain deeply rooted in its artistic past while embracing the future. We are more than a company, we are an artist-led cadre, championing the humanities through collaboration, education, and the creative exchange of ideas.

Whether you’re an artist, a funder, or a cultural advocate, we invite you to join us in shaping what’s next.

Name: Focus Music
Description:
Focus is an independent music company serving the media industry worldwide. For more than 20 years our tracks and original scores have graced major films, TV shows, advertising and branding across the globe.

Our catalogue spans orchestral to indie, with decade-by-decade retro collections, trailer music, classical, drama cues, urban grooves and guitar bands. We have four prodcution labels.

In addition to thousands of production music tracks, we also create bespoke music to fit any production or commercial.

Media professionals can download our music in broadcast quality and our team of music experts is always on hand to give you free help or advice.

Name: muziclub Live music
Description:
There is music everywhere; at Muziclub we help you find out where it resides in “YOU”. Whether you are looking to learn music OR for a place to jam OR maybe just to sit back and enjoy some really good music Muziclub is THE place for you. Muziclub is a platform that doesn’t just teach music, but upholds music as a part of your lifestyle.
At Muziclub, we live, breathe, create and teach music. So if music moves your soul, we provide it the perfect dwelling.

Name: Music Power Network
Description: MPN is an online information service for independent musicians, songwriters, producers, artist managers, and business people starting new music companies.  MPN provides online music business lessons, exclusive video interviews and advice, career and business planning tools and thousands of hand-picked resources designed to help you achieve success in the new music industry.  MPN gives you the tools, expertise and guidance to help you get organized and take your music career to the next level.  Learn from industry experts, set your goals and realize your vision.

Name: Lineout Studio
Description:
We are a creative sound design and music production studio. We work across animation, brand videos, films, games, apps, TV commercials, etc.
At Lineout studio, we help our clients tell their stories and our language is sound.
Our goal is breath-taking sound design for every project we work on.

Name: Fightin' Gator Marching Band
Description: The University of Florida Fightin' Gator Marching Band is one of the largest and most recognizable student organizations on campus. Comprised of over 360 students, the marching band is a collection of some of the most hard-working, intelligent, and enthusiastic individuals at the University and has been since its creation in 1913. The "Pride of the Sunshine" has performed across the country and the globe in destinations such as Phoenix, New Orleans, Miami, and London, England for the 2012 Summer Olympic Games.

Name: United Music Foundation
Description:
The mission of the United Music Foundation is to preserve, enhance and spotlight endangered musical recording heritage, and to make it available to the public.

Unlike the masterpieces of painting, sculpture, and architecture that have come down through history, the lifespan of audio recordings is very limited, due to:

- physical and chemical degradation of recording media,
- obsolescence of technical equipment,
- loss of expertise.

According to UNESCO, countless recordings of inestimable value have already disappeared, and we only have 10 to 15 years left to transfer available audiovisual recordings to digital media to prevent their loss.

The United Music Foundation has aready preserved hundreds of recordings, including previously unreleased works by prestigious artists. To date, its work has been recognized by two national awards: The Best Reissue Award from the Académie du Jazz (Paris), and the Memoriav – Swiss Commission for UNESCO Award. Since then, the United Music Foundation has equipped itself with a unique audio restoration system, the Cedar Cambridge, which is presently the only unit in service in Switzerland.

Name: Playback Recording Studio Los Angeles
Description:
Welcome to Playback Los Angeles, located in the vibrant heart of Los Angeles. We are a highly skilled creative team of audio professionals with over 25 years of expertise in recording, mixing, and mastering.
At Playback, we combine state-of-the-art High Definition facilities with unparalleled services. Our studios have been meticulously designed with the artist and producer in mind, offering a seamless workflow and fostering a dynamic and inspiring atmosphere. Step into our space and immerse yourself in an extraordinary recording experience, where the true essence of musical creativity thrives.Our team consists of award-winning music producers and engineers, boasting multiple Grammy nominations, platinum records, and even two-time Emmy award recognition. We take immense pride in our previous studio, which was situated in the heart of Santa Barbara and earned the esteemed Technical Excellence and Creativity (TEC) Award for Recording Studio Design Build in 2008.Throughout the years, Playback has been privileged to collaborate with an impressive roster of clients. From industry icons like Oprah,Eladio Carrion,Travis Scott,and Katy Perry to talented acts such as Rebelution, Max Martin, and Olivia Newton-John, our studio has been the creative hub for their musical journeys. We've also had the pleasure of working with esteemed actors like Jeff Bridges, Rob Lowe, Michael Douglas, Christopher Lloyd, Kevin Costner, and Don Johnson.Notably, Katy Perry chose Playback as the birthplace for some of her chart-topping hits, collaborating with producers Max Martin and Dr. Luke and songwriter Bonnie McKee. From "Teenage Dream" to "Last Friday Night," the success of those tracks led Katy to return to us for recording sessions on PRISM, including "Roar" and "Dark Horse." She lovingly expressed, "Playback feels like home, and I love the vibe!" At Playback, we cater to the diverse needs of musicians, producers, film editors, voice-over artists, It's time  to experience the difference.

Description:

Bringing you the freshest new music popular on your campus with student interviews, playlists and more.

Name: Boğaziçi Üniversitesi Müzik Kulübü
Description:
BÜMK, 1974 yılında müziğin her dalında ve her yönüyle üretimler gerçekleştirmek ve bu üretimleri paylaşmak için kuruldu. Kuruluşundan bu yana amatör ruhu profesyonel tavırla birleştirerek her zevke ve her türlü müzik anlayışına uygun etkinlikler gerçekleştirme ve bunları müzikseverlere sunma çabasında. BÜMK, müziğin her dalında araştırmalar yapmak, müzisyenlerin müzikal birikimlerine katkı sağlamak, Türkiye'de öncülüğü ettiği koro müziği kültürünü ve birikimini yaymak ve müzik gruplarına sağladığı olanaklar ile Türkiye'de dolaylı ve doğrudan müziği yönlendirmektedir. Ayrıca bireysel ve toplu çalışma olanakları sağlamak, konserler, seminerler, müzik akşamları, dinletiler ve söyleşiler düzenlemek gibi pek çok çalışmasıyla aslında üyelerinin müziği her yönüyle deneyimlemesi gibi çok daha büyük bir noktayı kendisine hedef edinir.

Biz, bilginin, kültürün, geleneğin ve yaşamın, hem teoride, hem de pratikte öğrenildiği Boğaziçi Üniversitesi'nin öğrencileri olarak, sosyal ve kültürel etkinliklerin, üniversite hayatını zenginleştiren en önemli unsurlarından biri olduğuna inanıyoruz. Ve bu sebepten hayatı bir noktada müzikle kesişen herkesi bu deneyimini zenginleştirmeye davet ediyoruz.

Name: Dejawu Guitars
Description: Dejawu Guitars is a small-scale two-family business (a dutchinese partnership), consisting of Wu Dongming and Derk Jan Lievers (+family). It is our ultimate goal to build high-quality, handcrafted, semi-acoustic guitars and archtop guitars using exclusively solid tone woods, traditional construction methods and the best available hardware. Each Dejawu Guitar is individually made, completely built to your liking. We highly value sustainable use of materials and labor, fair trade, proper and safe working conditions and above all, a good laugh!

Name: COSHCO
Description:
COSHCO is an independent, alternative hip-hop label based in Paris. It focuses on publishing, music production as well as development and management. The label partners with artists with atypical artistic identities who aim to create a unique aesthetic. It offers a sound combining hip-hop with inspirations from other musical genres. The label accompanies artists like BAE BE BRIAN, Cedric Lowis and Tizzy Miller.

Driven by meticulous work in music production as well as in visuals and marketing, COSHCO draws its strength from the plurality of talents and skills of its members. High standards and precision are thus the major components of the projects it represents, all the while staying
true to their original message and emotion conveyed through sound and its visuals.

COSHCO is no longer experimenting but building a concrete and ambitious artistic vision within alternative hip-hop.

Name: The Pasadena Conservatory of Music
Description:
The Pasadena Conservatory of Music is an independent nonprofit community music school that is proud to provide a comprehensive curriculum of music study to students in and around Pasadena, California.

We invite you to pursue your interest in music at the Pasadena Conservatory of Music, whether you are a student, parent, professional, audience member, or patron of the arts. The Conservatory's comprehensive curriculum and extensive schedule of performances, masterclasses and professional workshops offer many opportunities to become involved in our school.

Music instruction is offered at the Conservatory for anyone in the community--infants, senior citizens and everyone in between. The novice has a place in our musical community as does the emerging artist. Our lessons and classes are for those who want to engage in music as a subject - learning to make music, listening to music, expanding their knowledge about music. Wherever you may find yourself on your musical journey, welcome to the Pasadena Conservatory of Music.

Name: aptone
Description:
aptone helps music producers turning their ideas into reality.

Browsing through thousands of unsorted sound files can be very frustrating and time consuming. As musicians we know: You just want to do your thing.  

At aptone we build solutions for your creative flow making sound collections more discoverable with the help of AI. Our cloud-based SaaS enables access to your sounds at any time. 

Give your sound the perfect spice – Let’s aptone!

Name: Cantabile Choirs of Kingston
Description:
The choirs are famous in Kingston and beyond for joyful concerts full of non-traditional staging, diverse repertoire and high-quality singing which demonstrates great skill and enthusiasm. Over the years, Cantabile has grown significantly. The organization now includes eight choirs comprising of over 250 voices. At every event, the pieces performed never fail to engage and entertain audiences.

Cantabile’s concert season consists of five themed concerts, which often include invited guests of national and international acclaim. Our concerts attract sell-out audiences in our performance home, The Spire, at 82 Sydenham St.

MAGNIFI is a live music service that connects fans, venues and artists. MAGNIFI combines show listings, a full listening experience, artist and venue discovery, plus ticket purchasing, in one place. This is enhanced by MAGNIFI’s community where music fans can share and follow artists and venues, they can also favorite songs. MAGNIFI features hundreds of thousands of artists and tens of thousands of venues across the globe.

Name: Hum Music & Sound
Description: Hum is Home for a diverse group of music experts and obsessors who spend each day doing what they love. Over its twenty-year history, Hum has established an unparalleled reputation in the commercial world for the quality of its original scoring, licensing and sound design. HUM’s facility is located in Santa Monica and features a state-of-the-art recording studio as well as a brand new live performance space and multi-media center.

Name: Red Squid Studios
Description:
RedSquid studios is a music, sound design, and audio production company. Based in Miami, our composers, engineers, and sound designers work collaboratively to create some of the most exciting and innovative audio for multi media, digital media, advertising, television, radio, network branding and film. Our work experience comes from producing hundreds of tracks for TV and Radio commercials, multimedia, documentaries, and film for International, National, Regional, and Local markets. Our work has been internationally recognized with Clios, and many more awards for music, audio post and sound design.

We also provide excellent music research and licensing services, so contact us with any of your audio needs.
RedSquid clients include producers, directors, creatives, advertising agencies, developers, record labels, record artists, and many more that have needed to incorporate audio into their production. Here are a few examples: Pepsi, Burger King, Bush Beer, S.C Johnson, Coca Cola, Kraft, Glade, Winn-Dixie, Ford Motor Company, Sony, Sonic Ericsson Open, Lexmark, Marriott, Olympus, The Discovery Channel, Discovery Kids, HBO, TLC, A&E, Nickelodeon, just to name a few.

The main focus has been to find a balance between creativity, technology, and artistry to communicate a message. Good Sound has put together a group of experience composers, sound designers, foley artists, and audio engineers that can morph with today’s demanding industry to provide great service.
