Name: KROD Records
Description:
KROD Records is an independent record label and publisher founded in 2015 and based in Germany. 

With a fiercely independent, DIY ethos, we are dedicated to building strong connections with our artists, media, and promotional partners. Our artists have been spotlighted in some of the top music publications and playlists, including Kerrang!, Rock Sound, Alternative Press, Noisey, Visions, FUZE, OX Fanzine, Top Of The Rock, New Noise, New Music Friday, and The Scene.

Beyond providing a range of services to support our artists, we often join them on tour, sharing in the journey and passion that drive their music. Our releases are distributed by The Orchard.

Name: Flying Colours Music (Label Services)
Description:
Flying Colours is a Toronto-based artist and label services company.  Its service-minded approach unites marketing, promotion and distribution under one roof, enabling an artist to bring their art to market, while maintaining the ownership of their music.

Key services include project management, strategy, management consulting, digital marketing, radio promotion and distribution.

Name: Edizioni Musicali Wicky
Description: An Italian music publishing company, founded in 1989 and based in Milan, Italy. For over twenty years now, they have been engaged with Research, development and promotion of new Composers, production, marketing and distribution of fine sheet music for: Music & Theatre, Film, Musical Comedies, Concert Band, Symphonic Orchestra, School Orchestra, Wind Ensemble, Brass Ensemble, Instrumental, Educational - that covers everything from unique editions of classic repertoire scored for modern sonority and instrumentation to more modern. They were one of the first such publishers to release musical ’fairy tales’ for wind orchestras and ensembles, e.g. ‘L’Ultimo Burattino’, based on Collodi's tale of Pinocchio and originally written as a musical (1995) by Sergio Parisini and more recently "Il Bambino e la Guerra" written by Nunzio Ortolano, first premiered at the Teatro Massimo of Palerme (Italy) in 2008. Their label EMW offers excellent reference recordings by the finest professional and amateur Wind Bands in Italy. Wicky Art Project (WAP) is a division of Edizioni Musicali Wicky

Name: Tinderbox Music
Description: Music promotions company based in Minneapolis that offers radio promotion, publicity, and licensing services!

Name: JEWEL MUSIC
Description:
JEWEL MUSIC is Artist Management, Entertainment and Event Concepts, Publishing, Record Label, Recording Studio, and a Home and Family for Musicians. Jewel Music has been around since 1999. 
Artist management and music publishing form the core business of Jewel Music. In this regard, we can always rely on our international network of experienced and specialized partners. We are selective about whom we work with; otherwise, anyone could come in. We take care of the management of Rea Garvey and work passionately on our in-house entertainment and event concepts, such as the live streaming format "The Yellow Jacket Sessions" and the "Christmas Chaos" show featuring Michael Mittermeier, Rea Garvey, and Sasha as the hosts of the evening.
In the past, we have collaborated with various artists, including Anna Loos, In Extremo, Warren Suicide, Heyday, Jacob Brass, Silly, Ryan Sheridan, NTS & Royseven, and the Alive and Swingin' show.

Name: IFPI Austria
Description:
Association of the Austrian Music Industry - IFPI Austria represents the interests of its members in all cross-company matters. The member companies include Austrian independents as well as the subsidiaries of globally active music companies; they represent about 90% of the Austrian music market. With an annual value added of 3.35 billion EUR and more than 60,000 employees, the Austrian music industry is one of the ten most important economic sectors in Austria.

Our mission is to promote economic, legal and cultural framework conditions that enable our members to bring their diverse music productions to the widest possible audience.

Name: Neapolitan Music
Description:
Neapolitan Music was launched in 2011 by Ciro Romano, a former corporate lawyer and Head of Legal and Business Affairs at Universal Music International.

Ciro is the founder of the Love Supreme Jazz Festival in East Sussex which launched in 2013. Huffington Post declared it "the best new festival in the UK" and the Guardian called it "the Jazz world's Glastonbury”. It is the first multi-day greenfield jazz festival in the UK and is acknowledged as one of Europe's leading jazz festivals with an attendance of close to 50,000 across the weekend. Love Supreme also hosts one-day festivals at iconic locations such as the Roundhouse in London.  

Supreme Standards is a sub-brand of Love Supreme Festival which incorporates a monthly live residency in London and a new online music platform. The series showcases an eclectic selection of cutting-edge acts from London’s thriving live music scene across the jazz spectrum. Alongside this live residency is an online platform designed to offer a one-stop shop for fans of both new and established jazz-influenced music.

Nocturne Live at Blenheim Palace (a UNESCO world heritage site) followed in 2015. A joint venture with Universal, the event has featured artists such as Elton John, Kylie Minogue, Gary Barlow, Noel Gallagher, Nile Rodgers, Ludovico Einaudi and Max Richter and is widely considered the premier stately home summer concert series in the UK.

In 2020, Neapolitan partnered with U-Live and Tortoise Media to launch KITE, a first of it's kind festival of music and ideas to be held  in the stunning grounds of Kirtlington Park. The festival is a response to the growing number of ideas and literary festivals coupled with the enduring popularity of the traditional music festival format.

Name: Pennsylvania Music Educators Association
Description: The Pennsylvania Music Educators Association (PMEA) is a statewide nonprofit organization of over 3,700 members, dedicated to promoting the musical development of all Pennsylvanians. The present membership evolved from a small group of band directors dating from 1933. Today, the organization includes those engaged in music instruction at all levels, from preschool through college and university, as well as those in the music industry, merchandising and publishing. The organization promotes and supports quality music education, learning and performance as well as promoting and supporting music education in schools and communities. PMEA is affiliated with The National Association for Music Education, NAfME.

Name: La Bande des Hautbois
Description:
Un ensemble original et rare, un fonctionnement unique, La Bande des Hautbois et l'Association Bémols Perplexes existent et se produisent depuis plus de 30 ans.

Dirigée depuis sa création par Claude Villevieille, La Bande des Hautbois explore avec une curiosité gourmande toutes les musiques depuis la Renaissance jusqu'aux créations du XXIe siècle. 

Hautbois, hautbois d'amour, cor anglais, hautbois baryton et basson forment l'ossature de La Bande des Hautbois souvent rejointe par le contrebasson, mais aussi par un clavecin, un orgue, des chanteurs, des percussions... 

Spontanéité et plaisir musical ne sont pas incompatibles avec exigence musicale et qualité de présentation : c'est notre ligne de conduite depuis plus de 30 ans. 

Créée avant le phénomène de mode autour des ensembles de hautbois, La Bande des Hautbois est une des seules formations de ce type qui fonctionne sans interruption depuis sa création en 1994. Soutenue par ses adhérents et bénévoles, subventionnée par la Ville de Nanterre et par le Conseil Général des Hauts de Seine (92), l'Association Bémols Perplexes développe grâce à ses aides financières les nombreuses activités de La Bande des Hautbois.

Plus de 400 concerts, l'enregistrement de 5 CD, 22 tournées estivales, dont une en Italie, quelques saisons et festivals prestigieux (Festival d'Ile de France, Mois Molière de Versailles, Maison de la Musique de Nanterre, Abbaye du Relec, Festival “Bach en Combrailles” ... ) , sont les jalons déjà laissés par cette formation exceptionnelle de musiciens amateurs de haut niveau et de professionnels de la musique.
Originales ou transcrites, classiques ou inspirées du jazz, musiques de films ou Tango, tout est bon pour les anches doubles et les clés de nos instruments.

Pour nous soutenir :
https://www.helloasso.com/associations/bemols-perplexes-la-bande-des-hautbois/adhesions/adhesion-2023

Name: Elefant Traks
Description:
Based in Sydney, Elefant Traks is one of Australia's leading independent labels, with a focus on innovative hip hop, electronic, beats and soul/R&B artists.  

Our artists include Hermitude, Horrorshow, The Herd, Urthboy, B Wise, L-FRESH The LION, OKENYO, Jane Tyrrell, Jayteehazard, Jimblah, The Last Kinection, Joelistics, Sky'High and Astronomy Class.

Name: Lado B Escola de Música
Description:
A Lado B Escola de Música nasce em 2002 como um projeto à partir das experiências dos músicos e irmãos Ricardo Saldaña e Vinícius Saldaña.

Buscando um ambiente onde os alunos pudessem aprender música de forma objetiva, desde o início até níveis musicais mais avançados, aliando material pedagógico à experiência de profissionais qualificados e comprometidos.

Os cursos foram pensados para atender as expectativas de qualquer aluno, iniciante e avançado, e de diferentes tribos – do rock ao samba, além das especificidades da música Clássica. Com foco na prática e acompanhados por uma base teórica elaborada e principalmente propondo diversas outras importantes “experiências artísticas”, como as apresentações e festivais com estrutura de show profissional e atividades em grupo, onde os alunos trocam experiências, gerando conhecimento.

O compromisso da Lado B é promover uma educação de qualidade. Desenvolvendo o potencial artístico, estimulando a criatividade, ampliando a sensibilidade e promovendo o senso crítico. Para isso, tanto estrutura, materiais e novas práticas de ensino são sempre observadas dentro do ambiente da escola. Acreditamos que o estudo das artes, em especial da música, é fundamental para a transformação e humanização de uma sociedade melhor.

A arte é expressão e também cultura.

Name: Eletroacústica Produções
Description:
A Eletroacústica é uma produtora especializada na execução de trilhas originais com excelência e foco na necessidade do cliente.

Emanuel Sant’Anna, responsável pela direção musical da produtora, inciou-se na música ainda criança e logo cedo uma de suas características musicais mais curiosas despontou, o chamado “ouvido absoluto”. Com extrema facilidade para reconhecer as notas musicais, Emanuel descobriu um talento nato que o impulsionou a desenvolver rapidamente toda sua musicalidade.

Sua carreira foi marcada por trabalhos ao lado de diversas cantoras como: Graça Cunha (Banda Altas Horas), Vans Moraes (Banda Quasímodo), Adriana Mezzadri (www.adrianamezzadri.com), Patrícia Coelho e a colombiana Shakira, a qual acompanhou durante a tourne brasileira de divulgação do álbum “Laundry Service”, além de ter participado de gravações de CDs de outros artistas.

Em 2009, recebeu a grata surpresa de ter uma de suas composições indicada ao Grammy Latino através de uma banda nacional (Inimigos Do HP), cujo crooner já havia tido banda em épocas passadas, tendo lançado, no disco malhação quatro, uma faixa.

Como produtor, criou diversas trilhas musicais para grandes emissoras de televisão como: Record, Globo e SBT

Name: SALT art & music
Description:
SALT er et nomadisk kunstprosjekt med pyramidekonstruksjoner kalt “hesjer”, som er basert på tradisjonelle konstruksjonsmetoder langs kysten av Norge. På 5000 kvadratmeter har SALT flere spektakulære trekonstruksjoner, bygninger og sauna. 

EVENTS, KONFERANSE ELLER SAUNA - MED GOD MAT OG DRIKKE
Árdna, Den Arktiske Pyramiden, Langhuset og den koselige kafeen Naustet gjør SALT til et unikt sted for kulturelle arrangementer, refleksjon og uteliv. Det brede programmet inkluderer bl.a. konserter, kunstprosjekter, debatter, sauna, teatersport. 

NORGES STØRSTE SAUNA
SALTs største sauna, Árdna, holder 120 personer og ca. 65 grader. Åpent tirsdag til søndag. Hver helg arrangeres det Sauna Sessions både med og uten kulturelt program. Utenfor finner du en 7 000-liters sherrytønne omgjort til en sauna med 80-90 grader, samt to kaldtvannskulper og dusjer. 

KONFERANSER, FIRMAFESTER OG EVENTS
I Langhuset kan du delta på konserter eller klubb med venner, feire med kolleger, delta på kunstutstillinger og debatter og mye mer. Langhuset rommer 400 stående, 200 sittende, 130 til bords. 

NAUSTET KAFÉ og SAUNA
Kafé og bar, delvis bygget på drivved funnet langs sjøkanten og møblert med detaljer som muligens minner om bestemors stue. Naustet har også en privat sauna med plass til åtte personer. 

HIMMELSAUNA
To sauna-tønner, der en tønne rommer åtte personer. Himmelsaunaene er plassert slik at du får en nydelig utsikt mot Bjørvika og Operaen. 

Les og book mer på salted.no

Name: Alignment Artist Capital
Description: Alignment Artist Capital is focused on helping global music creators realize their vision, build their audience and expand their brands. We offer established artists an innovative new financial product to reach business objectives, via structured investments with a four to five year horizon. The firm takes a holistic view of an artist's career and of the global music industry.  Our financial backers are BlackRock, Inc., the world's leading asset manager. Our mission is to offer a way to support artists' ambitions in the changing, dynamic music marketplace.

Name: Sync My Music

Name: Heil Sound Communications, Inc.
Description: Heil Sound is a modern microphone and headset company specializing in professional-quality dynamic microphones and related accessories for professional audio and amateur radio.

Name: ARB4
Description: ARB4 (pronounced Arba) is a team of veteran producers, composers, sound designers, and audio engineers collaborating with highly-accomplished artists, songwriters, and businesses worldwide. We craft cross-genre, powerful, dynamic, memorable music. Have a project that might benefit from our custom music services? Drop us a line!

Name: Centre For Music Education & Cognition
Description: C-MEC is a privately owned interdisciplinary music education centre which provides music lessons for individuals with cognitive and perceptual disabilities. C-MEC is in partnership with the Science of Music, Auditory Research and Technology (SMART) lab located at Ryerson University.

Name: fæmm - kindness. solidarity. awareness. equity. in music.
Description:
Wir sind sowohl eine Community, die sich für Diversity und Gleichberechtigung in der Musikbranche einsetzt als auch eine Plattform für Frauen.

We are a community striving for diversity and equity in the music industry as well as a platform for Women.

Name: CV AUDIO Comércio e Importação
Description:
A CV Audio foi criada em 2001. Recentemente fez uma joint-venture com Marinho Alves, que está no mercado de música ao vivo desde 1988 como técnico de áudio onde trabalhou com shows do clássico ao popular e também espetáculos teatrais. Ao longo dos anos, tornou-se consultor técnico e lecionou áudio básico no IAV (Instituto de Áudio e Vídeo) onde conquistou o respeito de profissionais.

A CV Audio tem participado do mercado brasileiro por mais de 10 anos atendendo às necessidades dos profissionais de áudio em diversas áreas: Produtoras (de Shows e Broadcast), Locadoras (A/V e Sonorização). Estúdios (de Gravação e Produção), Lojas (Instrumentos Musicais e Eletrônicos), Eventos (Espetáculos teatrais e Entretenimento, Estádios, Parques Temáticos) e Instalações (Órgãos Públicos, Empresas e Sistemas). A empresa foi desenvolvendo e ampliando seu catálogo de produtos sempre objetivando trabalhar com o melhor da tecnologia e em cooperação com seus mais de 2100 revendedores e clientes.

A CV Audio realiza um amplo trabalho de pesquisa permanente e procura ter sempre o melhor e mais atual produto à disposição do mercado. Atualmente a CV Audio vem se tornando referência entre os profissionais brasileiros pelo sucesso e profissionalismo.

É com prazer que a CV Audio apresenta seu novo Portal onde você poderá conferir tudo o que há de melhor em tecnologia de áudio profissional do mundo agora também no Brasil. Seja bem vindo e aproveite!

CV Audio, de profissionais para profissionais.

Name: Cheese and Grain
Description:
The Cheese and Grain is an 835 standing capacity and 500 seated capacity venue with a cafe/bar and meeting rooms, located in the heart of Frome, Somerset.

Our not-for-profit, member-owned social enterprise, is a registered charity and has been running since 1998.  It’s main aim is to promote and boost Frome’s social, cultural and economic life.

The venue plays host to regular concerts, markets, community events and much, much moreon a weekly basis and hosted shows by the likes of Paul McCartney, Foo Fighters, Wolf Alice, Frank Turner, Robert Plant, and much more.

Name: Synergy Production House (Pty) Ltd
Description:
With over 20 years of experience in the industry, SYNERGY PRODUCTION HOUSE is the leading supplier in of event solutions the Vaal area (Vanderbijlpark, Vereeniging, Meyertom, Sasolburg) providing professional PA’s & audio sound systems, lighting equipment & design, DJ’s, videography, photography, indoor and outdoor stage hire & trussing, multi-media and Audio-Visual equipment. We provide services to South and Southern Africa.

With a large inventory of skills, experience (and our own gear) we are able to assist you with event management and supply from small functions to large scaled events and festivals. We have worked with many Top SA bands and singers offer experienced advice from choosing your entertainment to creating effective and professional visual effects through our lighting design & stage designs.

SYNERGY SOUND, a division of SPH, specialises in sales, consultations & installations of sound, lighting, band equipment and multi-media equipment for corporate clients, venues and churches offering after-sales support and a repair service too.

Name: Fondation de Ribaupierre-Graz
Description: Notre mission: la musique pour tous. Nous aidons, accompagnons et valoriserons l'accès des jeunes à la culture musicale.

Name: AMPYA (Magic Internet Musik GmbH)
Description:
Magic Internet Musik GmbH is a subsidiary of the ProSiebenSat.1 Media AG and administers the music streaming service AMPYA.
We love music
Starting work on our new music platform AMPYA in late 2011, we had one big goal: We wanted to create a unique place where you absorb, experience, read, hear and see everything from the vast universe of music. A place where you (re-) discover new music and old favourites, share it with friends on your PC or mobile - always in a legal and safe way. AMPYA desires to be there for every music fan and their individual taste.

Our goal is to enable limitless access to music. With the AMPYA Music Player everyone has access to 20 million songs, over 57,000 music videos and more than 100,000 radio channels. In addition, AMPYA offers a wide-ranging editorial news service with daily news, reviews, charts and more from the international music scene; and that's just the beginning.

With the launch of AMPYA our dreams came true, because we love music and believe that music is an endless source that accompanies us every day, reflecting and enriching all of the emotions life has to offer.

Name: Ont' Sofa Ltd
Description:
Ont' Sofa is an online music channel showcasing the best up and coming talent. Grown from a hobby in Yorkshire, the team have expanded and now film in locations all over the UK, with artists travelling from across the world to film sessions. 

Ont' Sofa also develop artists and have a small roster ready to pack a punch.

Website: www.ontsofa.com
Facebook: www.facebook.com/ontsofa
YouTube: www.youtube.com/ontsofa
Twitter: @OntSofa

Ont' Sofa: Standing up for real music (no autotune required).

Name: BT ENTERTAINMENT
Description:
BT ENTERTAINMENT is a full service music and entertainment company created by Bryan Todd https://www.linkedin.com/in/bryan-todd-36008424 and Entrepreneur Brian J. Esposito https://www.linkedin.com/in/brianjesposito.  Bryan Todd is an American Multi-Platinum record producer, songwriter and creative force in the modern music industry. He recently signed to Universal Music Publishing as part of a joint venture deal with Grammy Award winning producer, composer David Foster.  Brian J. Esposito has extensive experience in beauty, fashion, technology, music, entertainment, charities, government, transportation, liquor, and many more new and exciting industry developments. 

BT ENTERTAINMENT is distributed worldwide by 2220 Records.

Name: GRID Series
Description:
GRID Series is an artist development platform supporting outer suburban emerging creatives around Australia.

We serve as a bridge between underrepresented communities and the industries they seek to access, cultivating an environment for artists to thrive and attain visibility. 

By creating a network of support for emerging creatives and arming them with content, industry mentorships and networks  we break down the barriers to inclusivity,  building and maintaining  a more vibrant, dynamic and diverse artistic landscape around Australia.

Name: La locomotiva
Description: Etichetta discografica indipendente. Fanno capo ad essa la Musicando Edizioni Musicali snc e l'Officina del Mastering (studio di registrazione specializzato nel servizio di mastering online).

Name: Maveriq Studios
Description:
"Maveriq is our playground and music is our movement."

At Maveriq, we specialise in creating audio for your visuals with a passionate team of international and local, composers and engineers. 

We like to call our little corner of the world a creative hub; and creative hubs are not always what they seem. From the outside, our address looks like a leafy bungalow in a leafy neighbourhood, occasional strands of singing and music the only hint of the magic that happens within.

At Maveriq, we ensure you get the ultimate creative experience. The quintessential audio and music production facility, Maveriq Studios is pioneering a new standard of sound for South-East Asia.

Our work covers a spectrum of services from creating original compositions for advertising, film, animation, multimedia, album production, 5.1 surround sound, Dolby Atmos 7.1 mixes and more

Our facility houses six state-of-the-art studios spread across both floors, ranging in size from comfortably fitting a soloist to big enough to fit an orchestra. 

We have three pre-production suites fitted with Protools 11. Native Instruments and Logic Pro X, while the other three post-production suites & recording studios are kitted out with Protools HDX, to create the basic sonic architecture of our work and bring the aural drawing plans to life. 

Studio F is the largest and our flagship out of the six suites. It is designed to be the most versatile with an infrastructure to take on all manors of work with little to no restrictions. 

Apart from a very large control room it features four recording areas, which allows us to record multiple instruments at the same time with complete isolation from each other.

Name: Storefront Records
Description: Established in 2021, Storefront Records is an independent record label founded by Fantastic Negrito in Oakland, CA.

Name: Harvard-Radcliffe Orchestra
Description: The Harvard-Radcliffe Orchestra, founded in 1808, is America's oldest symphony orchestra. It is the premier orchestra at Harvard University with over 90 members.

Name: Hi-Five
Description:
Hi-Five is a music company specializing in library & commercial music publishing, engaging in various businesses related to the music industry.

We are leading the industry in the domestic market and have achieved continuous growth as a global music company by working with major record labels overseas.

We have a vast collection of music spanning numerous genres and diverse styles, including broadcast, advertisement, film, TV series, K-POP, news, sports, film score, comic, children, documentary, rock, jazz, EDM, classical, pop etc. We handle all aspects of music business, from music copyright administration to distribution, planning, production, and international exports.

Name: Madison Avenue Entertainment Group
Description: M.A.E.G. Marketing, Promotion & Business Management represents a diverse group of talent in the Entertainment and Sports Industries including, but not limited to; Actors & Actresses, Athletes, Recording Artists, Music Writers and Producers, Exotic Dancers, Adult Film Stars, Social Media Influencers, Authors & Poets, Sports Casters, Incarcerated Artists and Wrongfully Convicted Prisoners, etc... Through our expert team of marketing agents, we provide our clients an international marketing campaign and strategic business plan which includes Global Branding, Public Relations and Reputation Management. Whether a client chooses to sign an exclusive contract with M.A.E.G. (as an artist), or decides to hire us to independently promote and  represent their brand (as a sub-contractor), M.A.E.G will prepare a uniquely tailored budget to accommodate any Artist in assisting them in boosting their career to Super Stardom! Visit our LinkedIn Business Page at www.TheMAEGMovement.com/Linkedin to learn more about M.A.E.G. Marketing, Promotion & Business Management.

Name: mralphoh
Description: Mralphoh tap, nature and train young and new talents in music, write music and feature the outstanding talents in my work to link them into the industry, and from industry to market. Join me in this journey to offer a structure, network, community, environment and district for the stimulation, growth, promotion and creative use of a music aesthetic, sensibility and culture that draws from the vast, rich and diverse Eastern African realities and experiences for purposes of personal, community, national, regional and global transformation.

Name: Future Sound Of Egypt
Description: Trance music record label founded by Aly & Fila in 2009. FSOE is home to multiple imprints under the main FSOE label's umbrella: Fables, Clandestine, UV, and Parallels, covering the electronic music spectrum from deep progressive house to FSOE's signature uplifting trance sounds. With an incredible roster of  renowned artists, Future Sound Of Egypt's brand has grown to host stages at the world's largest music festivals as well as a continuous series of  milestone FSOE events across the globe.

Name: MARCA FRANCE
Description:
MARCA FRANCE REEDS HISTORY
 95% of our production made in Var is export in the world
From the beginning…

Five generations of expertise in the art of growing fine French cane.

The Côte d’Azur, or Riviera, situated in what is known as Var region, is certainly among the most beautiful areas in all of France. Crowds of tourists flock annually to this Mediterranean paradise to enjoy its perfect climate, bask on its white-sand beaches and gaze at its breath talking azure sea and sky.

As these travalers pass through the towns and villages that dot the southern cost, they may be unaware that it is here where the world’s finest musical instrument reeds are manufactured. It is here among the fields of cane that grow so plentifully that the Guccini Family has devoted five generations of expertise to the art of growing fine French cane and crafting it into the delicate sliver of wood so many musicians depend on for their livelihood. Marca make finest reed for finest artist.

…Up to nowadays!

Clarinetists and saxophonists of the world over can enjoy the experience of playing Marca reeds…

Over the past 60 Years, with the combination of its skilled work force, modern equipment, strict quality control, and constant testing by renowned professionals, Guccini’s Marca company has discovered the secret to producing reeds that have become the new choice of discerning wind musicians.

Whith meticulous care in all stages of production, Marca’s recently improves manufacturing method combines skilled craftsmanship with modern technology to produce superlative reeds at a competitive price, making them equally well suited for student or professional use.

Marca uses only the finest French cane, painstakingly selected and aged for optimum quality. Today, clarinetists and saxophonists the world over can enjoy the experience of playing Marca reeds, made from the finest cane by the most exacting craftsmen.

Name: NOTHING BUT HOPE AND PASSION
Description:
NOTHING BUT HOPE AND PASSION is the music-magazine for everyone who thinks a bit more about life, who wants to get a bit more from life and who gives a bit more to live. We love good music, we love artists and we can't stop to support them on a regular basis.

Running since 2010 NBHAP has become a steady and reliable force in the ever-changing digital blogosphere, providing the best new and exciting music from the fields of independent and alternative culture. We're recommending music, highlight exciting new acts and curate music via mixes, playlists and article. We're the allies of the artists, not the music industry. We live for the music and emotional power it got. That's why we are still here and a have trustworthy relationships with likeminded people from various fields.

Name: Soundway Publishing | Soundway Records
Description:
Soundway Records is a British-based independant record label founded and run by English DJ and music producer Miles Cleret. It started in 2002 with the release of a compilation of Ghanaian music from the 1970s : ''Ghana Sounds: Afrobeat, Funk & Fusion in '70s Ghana''.

Since then the label has released a series of critically acclaimed compilation albums and re-issues of African, Caribbean, Latin and Asian music from the 1950s - 1980s. These include the well-received Nigeria Special, Ghana special & Kenya Special compilation albums that Cleret spent years compiling. Since 2012 the label has issued a series of original contemporary releases as well as re-issuing older music. These include releases from acts susch as Batida, Ibibio Sound Machine, Debruit & Alsarah, Fumaca Preta, Ondatropica, The Meridian Brothers, Los Miticos Del Ritmo, Chico Mann, Bomba Estereo, My Panda Shall Fly, Konkoma, Family Atlantica & Dexter Story.

In 2014, Soundway was named by The Guardian as "One of the 10 British Labels defining the Sound of 2014".

Name: Future Skully Record Label
Description: An industrial, ambient, electronic, experimental label that's building long term relationships by working on their artists' development.

Name: FFW Creative Audio
Description: FFW Creative Audio was founded by VEYasin and Tolga Böyük to offer creative sound solutions to brands in traditional and modern media. FFW Creative Audio has worked with many international and national brands including Meta, Netflix, Turkish Airlines, FIAT, Apple, Coca Cola, Adidas, Unilever, Pepsi, Red Bull.

Name: Amruthavarshini
Description:
Amruthavarshini is the Carnatic Music Club of NIT Trichy. But wait, we are not just any regular kacheri gumbal (concert troupe). Yes, we sure are a casual community of talented musicians - vocalists and instrumentalists alike who are trained in a Classical Music tradition. But, we have dozens of nerds, cricket freaks and eccentrics who just make the club very much a quirky family which keeps singing at the moan of a Tanpura. We at Amruthavarshini have created a community of student musicians who groom one of our country's own proud music traditions with regular meet-ups. We have weekly practice sessions where we just come together and learn songs taught by our own people. If you happen to visit NIT Trichy, keep a keen ear, for the drone will lure you to one of our rustic practice sessions. Amruthavarshini has always been an inclusive community with absolutely no restrictions on opening the gates to fresh new talents in Indian Classical Music every year in the even semester. Although we identify as a group of Carnatic music enthusiasts, our doors are unhindered to welcome musicians of other Indian classical music backgrounds as well.

We at Amruthavarshini are knotted to a sole thread of ideology and culture of preserving, practicing, promoting, performing and popularising Classical Music. We successfully achieve what we envision by conducting Carnatic Music Competitions, hosting concerts and lecture-demonstrations by esteemed artists and ourselves practicing and performing at several occasions in and around college. One of the most cherished memories for all of us at Amruthavarshini is our yearly performance at Thyagaraja Aradhanai, Thiruvaiyyaru where we sing the songs in reminiscence of the great composer Thyagaraja. 

Amruthavarshini is that fun-filled jolly gang of people who you could jam with, on classical music, for hours together, having amazing conversations and beautiful bondings that would be a memorable chapter in your book of college life well spent!

Name: TMC FİLM MÜZİK ÜRETİM ve PAZ. A.Ş.
Combustion Music
Description:
We are an independent, boutique music publishing company that develops the freshness of the industry’s emerging writers into collaborative powerhouses who produce sought-after lyrics.  Over the years, we have found that our tight-knit family of just four staff and 15 writers is the most effective setting to instinctively identify talent, foster their growth individually and as contributors, and make a mark on country music. We weather the shifting nature of the music industry because we stay true to the core: great songs written by great writers.

Our contribution to Nashville’s world-renowned music scene is consistent and progressive, making us one of the smallest firms to ever produce so many accolades. We work hard to maximize the value of each and every song through avenues that are most in-demand: streaming, radio and other formats. In just over 15 years, our songwriters have generated 75 #1 hits and our GRAMMY, CMA, ASCAP and other nominations and awards showcase our work with world-class superstars including Carrie Underwood and Kings of Leon. 

We are currently celebrating our 75th #1 hit with simultaneous chart toppers “What Makes You Country” Luke Bryan and “Only Jesus” Casting Crowns.

Name: VIRUS MUSIC
Description: VIRUS MUSIC is the event promoter in Ukraine with almost 22 year experience. One of the leading promoters of festivals and concert shows, which is part of the live entertainment group of companies , which includes Concert.UA - the largest ticket marketplace and a leader in ticketing products and services in Ukraine, and the best concert venue with capacity till 1k people in Ukraine - «BelEtage Music Hall».

Name: Studio 7 - Artists Development Charity
Description:
Hi, I am Kizzy Morrell, Professional Artists and Radio Presenter paying it forward, providing free professional vocal and performance development for young singers and rappers from but not only disadvantaged backgrounds to build confidence and self-esteem. 

As the only Artists Development company of its kind in Bristol, we have grown into a Charity with a dynamic team for the benefit of our young ones. 

We enjoy collaborating with organisations, the music industry and professional artists who feel they have the capacity and want to pay it forward and pass on their musical knowledge and experience to the next generation of artists.

Through mentoring and nurturing our singers and rapper, coaching in, colleges, universities and even providing team building programs for cooperations.

As a result of our passion (work), we have received many awards including the Lord mayors meddle.

SPLITTER VAN HIRE

From airport runs to full European tours, we take care of all aspects of your tour, from start to finish – budgeting, advancing, transport, hotels, backline hire, touring personnel and accounting. Name: Bel Canto Chorus
Description:
Founded in 1931, Bel Canto Chorus is Southeastern Wisconsin's oldest continuously performing Arts organization!
Biography
The Bel Canto Chorus is made up of mostly volunteer singers from cities and towns throughout southeastern Wisconsin and northeastern Illinois. While some of the members of Bel Canto are professional musicians, most come from a variety of other professions - they are educators, accountants, doctors, lawyers, business leaders, full-time homemakers, etc. They share a talent for singing and enjoy participating in Bel Canto because of their love of music-making, the camaraderie of the group, and the leadership of Bel Canto's Music Director, Richard Hynson. They are drawn to Bel Canto by the excellence and artistry of Hynson's conducting, the quality of the music-making, and the opportunity to perform a repertoire that is both familiar and new to them.

Singers are expected to attend one evening rehearsal per week, from late August through early May, with additional rehearsal requirements immediately prior to concert performances. Our main rehearsal site is at the Milwaukee Youth Arts Center, and regular rehearsals occur on Wednesday evenings. 

The Chorus regularly performs with an orchestra, as well as a cappella and with a few instrumental accompanists. Their repertoire includes the great choral and orchestral masterworks such as Brahms's Requiem and Mendelssohn's Elijah, as well as new and lesser-known works like Carl Orff's Catulli Carmina and Frank Ferko's Stabat Mater.

Name: Independent Music Coalition Japan (IMCJ)
Description:
The Independent Music Coalition Japan (“IMCJ”) was primarily founded by three independent music trade bodies: Independent Records and Musicians Association (IRMA), Independent Label Council Japan (ILCJ) and Japan Net Creators Association (JNCA). It will also be joined by a number of leading independent labels and aggregators. It is expected that IMCJ will represent the Japanese independent music community as a national trade association of the Worldwide Independent Network, or WIN, on behalf of the founding and cooperating associations including FMPJ (current WIN membership) under one umbrella.

IMCJ’s mission and mandate include: initiating the collective voice of the independent community, enhancing the rights of independent labels and producers, networking with WIN and its member associations throughout the world, encouraging the development of the comprehensive database of independent repertoire, assisting to exploit and promote its members’ content together with Merlin (and its Tokyo office), facilitating professional and tech services when needed, and liaising and lobbying with the government, related trade bodies and MLCs, among others. IMCJ will also seek to initiate, encourage and support the formation of independent music associations in the East Asian region as business relations between Japan and those countries grow rapidly.

IMCJ’s board of directors consists of the chief executives from the founding associations and leading labels.

Name: Music and Sound Cultures Research Laboratory
Description:
The Music and Sound Cultures (MaSC) research laboratory is a collective of researchers focusing on the multidisciplinary study of music from the Gulf, the Levant, East Africa, and South India. These researchers represent a broad spectrum of expertise, including ethnomusicology, machine learning, music composition, performance and improvisation, library science, computational modeling, and the digital humanities. Having as a primary goal the study and dissemination of music from this region, the group currently hosts several projects that range from the preservation of collections of field or rare commercial recordings, to developing innovative ways of conducting musical heritage analysis, preservation, and dissemination. 
Our collaborative engagement with fields including ethnography and field recording, cataloguing, computational analysis and re-synthesis - intersecting approaches from traditional and digital humanities with engineering and computer science - gives us a unique multidisciplinary lens for understanding, analyzing, and disseminating the musical heritage from this region. The different projects undertaken by the group ultimately aim at creating new ways of meaningfully interacting with music heritage, allowing scholars to browse large collections of music through their audible or structural characteristics, through the computational recreation of the musical styles using innovative software applications and through the intersection of musical heritage archival materials, including photos and recordings that could be lost to time if not preserved in perpetuity.

Name: IRAA Awards
Description:
Since 2006, the Indian Recording Arts Academy Awards (IRAA) honour and recognise exceptional talent in music, soundtrack recording and mixing in Indian music for albums and movies. The music awards similarly recognise innovation in music production and engineering that defines independent music culture.

These awards focus not only on the recording, technical and engineering talent but also takes note of the musicianship that goes into making a remarkable song/album.

There are very few award ceremonies that honour the technical expertise behind song and music production, with most others restricting themselves to popular categories. The IRAA Awards are the first ever music awards in India that recognizes the regularly forgotten technical fields of music recording and engineering talent in India; it recognizes those who exhibit the courage, and creativity to bring about a transformation in the world of music.

The awards take cognizance of the talent and worth of studios and engineers, while keeping an eye on the skill in adopting new technology, trends and proving expertise in the use of new methods.

The IRAA awards which has gained aspirational value through the years, reflects the industry’s credibility and has become an eagerly looked forward to annual event.

Now in its 16th edition, IRAA Awards will continue to applaud the best in Indian music; those who exhibit the courage, and creativity to bring about a transformation in the world of music.

Now, Fusion Records MY are hosting artists more than Unisel Artists United such as Aiman Shakimi, Nur Nilam Sari, Arul Istoria, Achah Saputra and Soulcrates.

Initially was founded as a way to distribute Unisel Artists United after UAU is established in 21st April 2016, FRMY later was founded in 27th October 2016.

Name: Perform School of music
Description:
Our goal is to provide customers with international training, both in terms of teaching methods and mental approach to music, focusing our attention on the real problems encountered during the actual work of the musician.

Our international experience, both didactically and artistically, is allowing us to see a whole different way of approaching the study of our instruments, and music in general. 
The idea of internationalism, which is at the heart of our institution, would not be guaranteed by relying only on the international training of our own teachers. So it is one of our fundamental objectives and part of our commitment to offer seminars and master classes with many musicians and clinicians coming from different international backgrounds. 
We organise our courses in different sessions in order to meet and address our students’ needs. 

To sum up:

Our ultimate goal is to help aspiring musicians develop a professional vision of this job, allowing our students to experience an intense training that will lead them to deal and cooperate with some of the major international music schools. 
At the same time, we aim to provide our students with tools and skills that meet real world expectations. We promote an approach that stresses the importance of the interaction between musicians, as opposed to other approaches just based on sterile competition. 

The school is official partner of the MLC Academy of Nottingham and "I.c.m.p. - The Institute of Contemporary Music Performance" of London and official examination center of the "RSL Awards" (Queen's Awards for enterprise 2018).

Name: Ensemble Offspring
Description: Ensemble Offspring is a dynamic Sydney-based organisation dedicated to adventurous new music. Led by Artistic Director, acclaimed percussionist Claire Edwardes, our virtuoso team of musicians boasts broad ranging backgrounds and talents and a passion for performing the music of our time. Driven by open-mindedness, Ensemble Offspring promotes diverse and emerging music practices that expose audiences to new ways of experiencing sound. We embrace a broad repertoire from seminal chamber works of the past 50 years, to free improvisation and the creation of striking interdisciplinary productions. Often cited as Australia’s most influential force in new music today, the ensemble has premiered more than 100 new works and presents an annual program of over 30 concerts a year. Recent collaborations have included Mike Patton, Speak Percussion and Jon Rose with appearances in the Sydney, Canberra and ISCM international festivals. In 2015 we celebrated our 20th birthday.

Name: TalkingLabz
Description:
TalkingLabz is an audio production house that believes in building creative alliances for the collective growth of the music community. Decades of industry experience, a strong local and national network and a diverse skill set empowers us to work with an array of talent on various kinds of projects. From self-taught instrumentalists to seasoned producers, and Acapella groups to jingle-writers, we pride ourselves on the diversity of our work. 
 
Our mission is to build a community – one where knowledge and skill is shared for the collective benefit of its patrons. We seek to evolve from the currently traditional landscape of the music industry, to imbibe and induce a more progressive ecosystem by virtue of collaboration.
 
With an understanding of the challenges of the music industry and its dynamic and uncertain nature, we, as your creative partners, hand you the keys to our wealth of resources, and work tirelessly with you to see your project through to its realization. In other words, we have your back!
 
To come together over ideas and endeavors. To share our mutual love for music. To invoke a new wave of thought, all in the pursuit of the perfect sound.
 
We are artists, for artists.

Name: HQ Recording / HQ CAN (Creative Arts Network)
Description:
HQ Recording provides a relaxed, creative studio environment located in the heart of Leicester City Centre. Having recently undergone an extensive refurbishment at the beginning of 2019, HQ Recording Studios now boasts a high quality recording facility across two rooms, with the latest in cutting edge digital software and hardware. HQ also offer artist development packages, media services and consultancy.

Studio A is a top-class recording, mixing and mastering room, built around the flagship Slate Raven Dual digital workstation. With fully treated acoustics and a calibrated monitoring system, this room is ideal for projects that require true attention to detail.

Studio B is a slightly smaller but incredibly ‘vibey’ production, writing and recording room. Designed as a cosier alternative to Studio A, for intense writing sessions, Studio B still boasts a high quality vocal chain, comprising of the Slate ML1 microphone, Slate VRS1 Mic Pre and UAD Apollo Twin soundcard.

With a team of highly skilled producers & sound engineers to hand, you will always leave satisfied with a product of the highest quality.

The studio is conveniently located within 10 minutes walk of Leicester bus and train station, with a wide choice of restaurants and reputable hotels nearby.

HQ Recording provides recording, mixing and mastering as well as beat making and 1-2-1 production sessions.

HQ Recording Studio is also home to HQ Familia Record Label & Artist Management Company, HQ Media and HQ CAN Community Interest Company

Name: Kiver Digital
Description:
“We are a web and mobile platform. We offer advanced solutions to the entire music industry, accessible and usable in a single online destination”.

￼The Digital Music Ecosystem

- We look at the market from a different and innovative point of view to leverage opportunities and needs of the industry
- We offer services and solutions based on an innovative, scalable, tailor-made and cross platform technology
- We lead the evolution of the music business by having an impact on the business models and sustaining its growth

Product
The product is a web and mobile platform through which musicians and professionals can find and use, in a self service mode, all the services they need to manage their artistic project, buy and sell services and goods and exploit their digital assets.

Business Model
The Business Model is based on the kind of customer:
Rookies: emerging artists/record labels buying services on a d-i-y mode; revenues come from fees and subscriptions
Partners: Top Artists/Labels licensing digital contents for exploitation; revenuess come from “revenue share” deals.

Name: Delphian Records
Description:
Formed in the year 2000, Delphian has grown into one of the UK’s leading independent classical record labels, known for its innovative approach and exceptional production quality. In 2014, Gramophone Magazine awarded Delphian ‘Label of the Year’, cementing its reputation for artistic excellence.

Originally conceived in Edinburgh, Scotland, to complement the vibrant artistic landscape of the city's renowned International Festival, Delphian now boasts a diverse roster that includes many of the UK’s finest choirs, ensembles, singers, and instrumental soloists.

Together, producer-founder Paul Baxter and videographer-creative director Will Coates-Gibson lead a specialist in-house team. As a result, every project—from conception through to recording, production, and design—meets the label’s high standards. This meticulous approach has created the coveted 'Delphian sound' and visual identity, leading Choir & Organ to call Delphian 'one of the most successful labels in the world' in 2023, with a global network of 21 sales teams.

Delphian’s catalogue features over 350 recordings, all engineered, produced, edited, and designed in-house. The label’s audiovisual output benefits from the seamless integration of audio and video, contributing to a coherent and recognizable brand across all media. Recorded repertoire is wide ranging from pre-medieval works to contemporary compositions. The label is especially noted for its focus on song, choral, chamber, and organ music, as well as its support of roots/folk projects with a Scottish accent and its commitment to new music.

Name: YOURACCOMPANIST
Description:
We make piano rehearsal tracks for singers. All our materials tracks are recorded by Michael Baron. We have helped thousands of happy singers: soloists, ensembles, and choirs. We deliver masterful accompaniment performances of useful repertoire, including many titles which you might not find elsewhere.

We provide instant access to more than 4500 accompaniments from the lieder, opera and choral repertoires, voice methods, hymns and more. We're open to suggestions for additions to the library.

The tracks are ideal for soloists, ensembles, choirs and classrooms, for those who sing professionally or for a hobby. Our tracks are designed for use in song learning and rehearsal, particularly for the piano and voice repertoire. All our MP3s are played by an experienced, singer-sensitive pianist. In particular we have set out to help young singers or any one with musical aspirations by providing supportive accompaniment with a focus on musicality.

We recognise that nothing can replace preparing and performing with a live accompanist: we hope singers get more from live rehearsal time by using our tracks to develop an intimate familiarity with the work before the live rehearsal even begins. Our catalogue covers a large part of the standard repertoire and is growing all the time. We bring you a wide variety of genres and composers, and cater for all vocal ranges and levels of proficiency. Tracks can be sampled on the site so you can be sure you've got the piece you want.

Chief engineer, Shantih Haast has over 20 years experience working in the music industry.

Utilizing state-of the-art equipment, Studio 770 can take any project from pre to post production. Designed to meet the needs of both professional and non-professional musicians, we offer assistance in planning your project to fit your budget. The combination of quality, efficiency and experience makes Studio 770 a value well beyond expectations.

Name: APR Works - Music Production / Song writing / Publishing
Rootz of Music, Inc.
Description:
Florida-based Rootz of Music, Inc. is a nonprofit 501 (c) (3) organization that was founded in 2011 by Jazz guitarist, arranger, composer, and music educator Eugene Grey along with his wife Felicia Grey. Rootz of Music is committed to inspiring people and assisting in their growth and appreciation of music. Our vision is to touch the world by creating, developing and supporting programs and other non-profit organizations in their efforts to advance music education.  

Rootz of Music, Inc. has partnered with SOS Children's Villages Florida http://www.sosflorida.com to provide a free weekly music program that began in March 2013. In addition, in September 2013 Rootz of Music partnered with Tamaba School of Music http://www.tamaba.com.ar and the School of Music located in Argentina on music clinics conducted by Mr. Grey.  For more information about Rootz of Music’s commitment to the local and global community, visit http://www.rootzofmusic.net.

Rootz of Music’s mission is a dedication to the promotion and preservation of popular music; specifically through the innovative program, American Roots of Jamaican Music. We commit to provide music education and Cultural Enrichment Performances to underserved communities with programs that highlight historical information that may have been overlooked through performances, theoretical tutoring along with hands on workshops and other programs, as well as working in conjunction with other nonprofit organizations.

Name: Fuji Rock Festival
Description:
Held for the first time in the summer of 1997 amidst the sprawling nature at the foot of Mount Fuji with “symbiosis of nature and music” as its theme, Fuji Rock Festival is one of the largest outdoor music festivals in Japan.

However, the first year was hit by a large typhoon forcing the cancellation of the second day. Rather then a “symbiosis”, the organizers and festival goers both yielded to the fury of nature and the inaugural year of the festival proved to be full of challenges. After being held in Tokyo at Toyosu in 1998, the festival made its move back to the ideal of a location surrounded by nature - its current home - Naeba Ski Resort in Niigata prefecture.

Having learned valuable lessons the first year, and through years of trial and error, Fuji Rock evolved, along with the passionate participants who were always ready to help make the festival a success, to become the first ever authentic rock festival in Japan. Through this process, the festival is not only more prepared for inclement weather, but has developed to include many other attractions, food stands and NGO booths. The festival has built a relationship of trust with the area surrounding the festival, growing to become a renowned summer tradition.

2016 saw the festival reach its 20th anniversary but along with the stability came some carelessness, made apparent by the increasing number of troubling incidents and amount of garbage within the festival.

Fuji Rock was often heralded by international media as the “cleanest festival in the world”. That has been the catch phrase for this festival, built alongside its participants and was the remarkable result of the effort of each and every one of you, the festival goer.

We ask that all Fuji Rock Festival participants resolve to help reclaim this hard-won accolade.

“Do It Yourself”, “Help Each Other”, “Respect Nature”.

Fuji Rock is a festival built by the efforts of both the organizers and attendees.

Name: Press Play on Tape
Description:
Who is Press Play On Tape?

Loïc Bénart is immersed in music and image since his childhood, composing soundtracks for his Super 8 films on a Casio VL-1.
Evolving with his machines, he first composed on two audio tracks and a noise track on his first two MSX computers.
He then composes on audiotrackers on his first Atari ST, moving on to four generous tracks, then 8. A certain idea of infinity at the time.

Later, freshly graduated from an audiovisual school, he moves to Paris and gets his first job in advertising.
Because of all the talented and interesting people he meets there, he will stay 10 years in this agency. As a chief film editor first, then as a special effects artist. 
But the love for the music will eventually be the strongest: Loïc becomes sound artistic director for the agency, and creates his first recording and post-production studio there.

In 2009 Loïc decides to play solo: he creates his own company.
Yes, « Press Play On Tape ». The loop was closed.

A few years later, Press Play on Tape composes original music, provides musical advice and supervision, and produces sound with ideas in it,
using guitars, drums, keyboards, vintage sound chips or state-of-the-art music production software.

Expertise :
Music creation, production and supervision
Sound design
Voiceover

Name: The Flute Guy
Description:
Praveen Prathapan (born 28 February 1995), known by his stage name The Flute Guy, is an English Indian/Sri-Lankan musician. He has been described as one of the most versatile flute players in the world. 

Raised in the UK by a family of Bharatanatyam dancers, Praveen was introduced to the instrument by his father, has received advanced training from the late Dr. N Ramani, and has now spent over 18 years working extensively in Blues, Bollywood, Carnatic, Hindustani, Indie, Jazz, Pop, Qawwali, Tamil Cinema, and Western Classical music. 

In 2017, Praveen created the stage name ‘The Flute Guy’, and has since garnered almost 10 million views on his Facebook and YouTube videos. Praveen has also appeared on Zee TV, Reprezent Radio, and the BBC, and has delivered hundreds of performances in Canada, Cyprus, France, India, Italy, Malta, Switzerland, the UK, and the USA, at prestigious venues including Times Square, the Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan, and Buckingham Palace. In 2018 alone, Praveen has collaborated with Kanika Kapoor, Cheryl Cole, Rukmini Vijayakumar, Emeli Sandé, Ustad Rahat Fateh Ali Khan, Naughty Boy, and Kavita Krishnamoorthy, and is currently developing new projects with Classic FM radio station. 

Holding a First Class Master’s degree in Biochemistry from the University of Oxford, Praveen has worked at both Harvard University in Boston and at the NASA Ames Research Center in California. At 23 years old, Praveen is also a trained vocalist, mridangam player, and composer. 

In 2018, Praveen created the hashtag #FluteForMentalHealth and has since been releasing special videos every week designed to treat specific mental health illnesses through the power of ancient Indian classical music. These sessions are now available on LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube, and Instagram TV. 

www.praveenthefluteguy.com

Name: Music Rhapsody
Description:
Music Rhapsody is a music school based out of 1603 Aviation Blvd, Redondo Beach, CA, United States. We offer classes for babies through adults at our Redondo Beach classroom and classes through Manhattan Beach Parks & Rec. We also partner with local early childhood centers, preschools, and elementary schools to provide and award-winning teaching approach to music. 

The Music Rhapsody program, developed by internationally renowned music educator Lynn Kleiner, is based on a philosophy called Orff Schulwerk and addresses each age and stage of childhood development. It meets your child exactly where he or she is. Beautiful and diverse songs, singable phrases, and the use of repetition, instruments, puppets, and visuals all foster the love of music in an exciting and creative environment. It’s a program that, to its core, acknowledges and values the input and creativity of each and every child.

Name: deactivate
Description:
If you have any knowledge of the music industry, Geoff Emerick is already a familiar name to you. He stands out as a true pioneer in the business, having won lifetime achievement awards and multiple Grammys, including a technical Grammy. On the other hand, even if you don’t recognize his name you are already familiar with his vast body of work. He has been a major influence in shaping the music industry for the past 50 years.  He began his career at the tender age of 15, when he joined EMI records in London.  

      His creative, innovative ideas are listened to and enjoyed as much today as they were when his fresh, new, ground breaking, and yes even mind blowing style propelled the rock and roll era forward into its golden age.
 
      His work on so many iconic albums from the 1960’s to the present day literally took rock and roll to a whole new level of success not equaled before or since.  As rock and roll evolved and grew, it was in large part due to his hands being at the controls.  

      Entire generations owe Geoff a huge debt of gratitude for enriching our lives and broadening our horizons.  If music is the universal language, then Geoff Emerick is the Shakespeare of modern times.

Name: Winter Opera St. Louis
Description:
Winter Opera St. Louis formerly New Opera St. Louis, a non-profit organization, was founded in August of 2007 with the goal of staging our first production in February 2008. Our mission is to provide the people of St. Louis an evening of opera during the winter months. Furthermore, we strive to highlight local artists and invest in the local artist community by providing an opportunity to perform with world class talent. As we do not yet have a home of our own, we take opera to many different locations, bringing different musical experiences to as many people as we possibly can.  

If you would like to become a patron of Winter Opera Saint Louis, we gladly welcome you. Please note that all donations are tax-deductible and help support our artists.  Any donation can be made directly to Winter Opera Saint Louis. If you have any questions about becoming a patron, you may contact us at 314-865-0038.

Name: SuRHeal
Description:
SuRHeal is an attempt to make the long-lost Raga Therapy accessible and help live a happy and healthy life. 

Indian Raga's vibrate at a certain frequency with an ability to impact our mental and physical wellbeing to a great extent. This app attempts to revive the Raga therapy which is a cultural aspect of India but forgotten due to the globalisation of music and ignorance about its wellness power
SuRHeal also gives a platform to upcoming Vocal and instrumental Indian classical musicians. 

We have Raga Renditions videos from upcoming artists who have beautifully sung a bandish projecting the vocal pattern of a particular Raga. 

Keep watching this space for more formats of these Ragas, be it a Bhajan, Ghazal or any other semi classical renditions depicting the beauty of the Raga. Listening to either of the formats is extremely therapeutic.

Name: Down2Earth Music
Description:
Down2Earth Music is a leading company specialising in music production, management and artist development with activity in Greece and Eastern Europe. It has been established in 2011 by ex MTV music program manager Evan Klimakis and acclaimed songwriter and producer Claydee Lupa. It aims at developing unique artists and producing high quality hit-oriented music, whilst remaining faithful at global developing trends. With a 360 strategy and an attention to detail, Down2Earth is always looking ways to create fresh and commercially viable projects. It provides the following services: music production, creative consulting, artist development, artist management and international licensing. Down2Earth has signed artists and worked closely with EMI, UMG, Sony Music, Ultra Music (U.S) and many more. Its main goal has been to develop projects internationally through its synergies with some of the biggest dance labels in the world.

Down2Earth Music also manages and represents for the world some of the most successful writers, producers, DJs and dance acts of Greece and Eastern Europe. With 6 Number One hits (including No1’s in Russia, Poland, Serbia), 9 Top Ten singles and more than 160 million views on YouTube with in the last 3 years.
In May 2012 Down2Earth Music launched its dance/pop label Down2Earth Records distributed through Universal. Down2Earth Records has grown to be the leading dance label of Greece with many radio and club hits.

Name: Righteous Babe Records
Description:
Label founder Ani DiFranco once called Righteous Babe Records “a people-friendly, sub-corporate, woman-informed, queer-happy small business that puts music before rock stardom and ideology before profit,” and it’s hard to imagine a more accurate mission statement than that one.

Since Ani bucked the major label system in the early-‘90s, opting to release her music on her own terms, the self-described Little Folksinger has been the subject of all kinds of hyperbole. She’s been called “fiercely independent” (Rolling Stone), “inspirational” (All Music Guide), “the ultimate do-it-yourself songwriter” (The New York Times), etc. As the cracks in the music industry get larger and more big-name artists follow Ani’s lead – Radiohead, Madonna and Nine Inch Nails among them – maybe people will just start calling her “smart.”

As important as Righteous Babe Records is to the singer/songwriter/guitarist, she’s more than happy to trust like-minded people with the business and revel in the complete artistic freedom it provides.

Ani DiFranco has written hundreds of songs, played thousands of shows, captured the imaginations of legions of followers, and jammed with folkies, orchestras, rappers, rock and roll hall-of-famers, jazz musicians, poets, pop superstars, storytellers and a martial arts legend. She’s “fixed up a few old buildings” and minimized her carbon footprint before it was trendy – from installing a geothermal heating and cooling system in the renovated church that her label calls home to using organic inks on all the t-shirts she sells. But nothing she’s done in her 20+year career has garnered more attention than a business decision.

Name: Ray-On
Description: Ray-On is a Montreal-based company providing label services to artists including digital distribution, rights management, sync representation, marketing and consulting. On top of these label services, Ray-On is a publisher, a sync agency with an online catalogue, and represents original music composers for films, series, documentaries, video games and ads.

Name: LAKES AREA MUSIC FESTIVAL
Description:
Each summer the Lakes Area Music Festival brings 150 of the world's best classical musicians to the Lakes Area of central Minnesota to collaborate on chamber music, symphony orchestra, opera, and ballet. Year-round concert, education, and outreach activities enhance the cultural opportunities for thousands of residents and visitors annually.

Accessibility has been a core value of the Lakes Area Music Festival since its inception in 2009. The music presented each summer seeks to provide everyone with the opportunity to experience and enjoy world-class live performances, regardless of previous classical music education, or economic status. This is done through both a series of educational opportunities catering to music lovers of all ages and experiences and by making each concert of the festival season free of charge. As a continuation of this commitment to accessibility, LAMF’s Outreach program brings the mission of the organization outside the walls of Tornstrom Auditorium and directly into the community.

Beginning in the 2016 season, and continuing this season with funding from the Brainerd Lakes Area Community Foundation and Essentia Health, LAMF is proud to present an expanded calendar of outreach activities into the Brainerd Lakes Area. The world-class musicians of the LAMF roster will perform and interact with members of the community who would not otherwise be able to experience live classical music performances – places like area nursing homes, shelters, and the Crow Wing County Jail.

A vibrant cultural scene contributes to a thriving community. By reaching out new audiences, LAMF seeks to spread the impact of that vibrancy to everyone!

Name: Pro Subrental Marketplace/Second Warehouse
Description:
Second Warehouse is simplifying and democratising the process of professional AV cross rental through it's products including the Pro Subrental Marketplace (PSM).  PSM allows both rental companies and individuals to sub-hire equipment in a safe, monitored and efficient web-based environment. 

As simple to use as a search engine, Second Warehouse allows rental companies of all sizes to make more money by keeping their otherwise idle inventory booked out and busy. 

Founded by renowned touring engineer and rental company veteran Stuart Kerrison, Second Warehouse is a tailor-made solution for the AV industry, by the AV industry. Find out more by visiting www.secondwarehouse.com

Name: Muziekvereniging Oranjevaan
Description:
Muziekvereniging Oranjevaan uit Fijnaart bestaat sinds 1890. Na 132 jaar heeft de Fijnaartse vereniging besloten om het roer drastisch om te gooien. Daarom gaat Oranjevaan zich vooral toeleggen op producties met muzikanten, zangers en acteurs die zich per project kunnen aanmelden. Door deze ommezwaai wil de muziekvereniging haar levensvatbaarheid vergroten en het cultuurklimaat in West-Brabant uitbreiden.

Muziekvereniging Oranjevaan uit Fijnaart staat bekend om haar grootse producties. In het voorjaar van 2009 werd met veel succes Sister Act De Musical op de planken gebracht voor 1300 enthousiaste bezoekers. 
Een jaar later stond het spektakelconcert Orange in Concert op het programma.  
In 2013 werd in samenwerking met Jeugd en Sportvereniging De Kieviten de eerste turnmusical van Nederland opgevoerd. Turn on the Music bracht ruim 1000 bezoekers naar de sporthal. 
Ter gelegenheid van het 125-jarig bestaan van Muziekvereniging Oranjevaan werd in maart 2016 de Nederlandse hitmusical Ciske de Rat volledig uitgevoerd. Tijdens drie uitverkochte voorstellingen genoten maar liefst 2250 mensen van het Amsterdamse straatschoffie. 
In het kader van 75 jaar vrijheid zou in 2020 Oorlogswinter de musical opgevoerd worden. Door corona en de bijbehorende maatregelen werd de datum telkens opgeschoven naar uiteindelijk 13, 14 en 15 mei 2022. Het meest bijzondere aan deze productie was dat het in de openlucht plaatsvond. Verspreid over drie avonden genoten een kleine 3000 toeschouwers van het spektakel. Onder hen ook Jan Terlouw, de schrijver van het boek Oorlogswinter waarop de musical is gebaseerd. Hij was vol lof over de productie, de spelers en de muzikanten.

Description:
