Name: The Music Initiative
Description:
The Music Initiative (TMI) is a monthly, online magazine produced by a group of music enthusiasts yearning to broaden and expand each reader's music experience. We believe in the power of music to change a mood and enhance a moment; as well as facilitate change and link the past with the present. This is our community-- seeped in passion, creativity, and cultural awareness.

Within the pages of each issue, we will bring you history, interviews, gadgets, CD reviews, art, new music outlets around the nation, and so much more. 

Amongst many other exciting music related features, The Music Initiative (TMI) features fans talking about music. TMI aims to uncover hidden gems found in up-and-coming bands, and also covers nationally recognized musicians and events.

The Music Initiative regularly features reviews and venues from the following cities:

Atlanta, Austin, Baltimore/DC, Boston, Charleston (SC), Chicago, Denver, Little Rock, Miami, Minneapolis, Nashville, New Orleans, Raleigh/Durham, San Francisco, Santa Fe, Seattle, and MORE!

The Music Initiative has something for everyone!

Name: Voice Sizing LLC
Description:
Voice sizing te ofrece una metodología que te permitirá cumplir los objetivos que deseas de tus clases de canto, además de tener un plan sistemático para el estudio de la voz en toda su dimensión aplicable a cualquier estilo musical.

Este método de canto moderno te permitirá comprender el proceso de emisión de la voz, mediante el estudio de los fundamentos del instrumentos y desde una aproximación sistemática al entrenamiento vocal para mejorar la conciencia orgánica y el rendimiento de la voz cantada como hablada.

Dirigido a todo tipo de personas que desean redescubrir su voz, amantes del canto, cantantes, actores, logopedas, investigadores, oradores y personas interesadas en el estudio de la voz. Conoce mas de nuestro trabajo:

Proyectos: https://voicesizing.com/proyectos/
Team: https://voicesizing.com/nosotros/
Metodología: https://voicesizing.com/metodo/
Cursos: https://voicesizing.com/clases/

Name: Jazz Connection
Description:
“They are unbelievable… They are insane… and they are absolutely amazing live on stage. With their zoot-suits, flamboyance, large beers, cheap whiskey, dancing and swinging... They will Jive You Crazy!”
Jazz Connection is a true follower of the Jumpin’ Jive style that hit America’s black postwar population. With songs from Louis Jordan and Louis Prima, like ‘’Is you is or is you ain’t my baby’’, ‘’Just a gigolo’’ and ‘’Jumpin’ Jive’’, they bring a revival of the best and brightest star performers from these exciting years.
Founded 29 years ago (1990) in ‘jazzy’ hometown Breda, Jazz Connection is running like a train, swinging and rolling through Europe with their Jazz & Jive show. They have performed at major festivals and clubs in Holland, toured in Belgium, UK, Germany, Switzerland, Denmark, Norway and Poland as well as in the Middle East and Asia. The band performed at many editions of the Breda Jazz Festival in Holland. In 2008 Jazz Connection was invited to perform at the world famous Ascona Jazz Festival Switzerland.
Together with lots of humor Jazz Connection produces their remarkable sound: transparent, sophisticated, catchy and groovy. Whether it’s a festive jive, tantalizing boogie or heartbreaking blues, you’ll recognize without doubt the sound of this unique sextet. 
They have released 6 albums, one single and one DVD.

Name: Greenville Symphony Association
Description:
The Greenville Symphony is a cornerstone of Upstate, South Carolina's thriving arts scene and remains dedicated to providing residents and visitors with educational and cultural opportunities that enrich, impact and engage members of our community.

The Greenville Symphony Orchestra (GSO) is the Upstate's largest professional performing arts organization and has a considerable impact on the community's economic stability as it draws more than 30,000 people to downtown Greenville across the course of the season.  As The Peace Center's largest resident company, the GSO occupies its halls more than 50 days per year and has more than 40 performances per season.

Name: The English Concert
Description:
The English Concert is an outstanding orchestra: exceptional, in the world-renowned quality, ambition and variety of its live and recorded output; unique, in the zeal of its players for working and performing together; unwavering, in its desire to connect with its audience throughout the world.

Founded in 1973 by the visionary harpsichordist and conductor Trevor Pinnock, The English Concert quickly rose to prominence under his leadership. For over three decades, Pinnock served as the founding director, shaping the orchestra’s distinctive sound and championing the performance of Baroque and Classical music on period instruments. The orchestra’s outstanding recording output under Trevor Pinnock, which includes critically acclaimed interpretations of Bach, Handel, and Vivaldi, garnered international recognition and helped to establish The English Concert as a leading force in the early music revival. This rich musical legacy continues to inspire and inform the orchestra’s work today.

Under the present artistic direction of Harry Bicket and principal guest Kristian Bezuidenhout, The English Concert has earned a reputation for combining urgency, passion and fire with precision, delicacy and beauty.

The artistic partners we collaborate with reflect and enhance our pursuit for new ways to bring our music to life. Joyce DiDonato, Dame Sarah Connolly, Iestyn Davies, Alison Balsom, Trevor Pinnock, Dominic Dromgoole, Tom Morris and many more have not only brought their extraordinary skills to individual projects but continue to help us to shape the way we perform.

In 2023, The English Concert launched their ambitious Handel for All project, which aims to film and make freely available all of Handel’s works online.

Name: Orchestre symphonique de Sherbrooke
Description: L’Orchestre symphonique de Sherbrooke est l’un des plus anciens orchestres symphoniques au Québec et l’un des meilleurs orchestres régionaux au pays. C’est aussi la plus importante propriété culturelle en Estrie et un partenaire culturel apprécié des organismes, des entreprises et des commissions scolaires. En tant qu’entreprise dynamique et créatrice d’emplois qui gère plus d’un million de dollars de budget, l’OSS est un partenaire économique important avec plus de 800 000$  en retombées pour la région.

Name: Association Orane
Description:
Créé en 1999, Marsatac est aujourd’hui le plus important festival de musiques actuelles à Marseille et dans toute la région PACA. Sa notoriété nationale le positionne comme l'un des festivals leader sur les musiques électro en France et en Europe.

Il se déroule en trois soirées (du 23 au 25 septembre 2010) et attire un public fidèle en quête de nouveautés musicales.

Marsatac a vu son nombre de spectateurs augmenter de manière exceptionnelle passant de 2 000 en 1999 à 30 000 attendus pour cette année.
L’association Orane, porteuse du projet Marsatac, est également à l’initiative de la programmation et co-production de plusieurs opérations à Marseille et dans la Région PACA. L’association développe parallèlement une série d’échanges internationaux (Glasgow, Brighton, Manchester...), des créations (Bamako, Beyrouth) ainsi que de nombreuses collaborations avec les acteurs de la scène des musiques actuelles (salles, collectifs etc...).

Le 26 et 27 février 2010, Marsatac a lancé sa première session d'hiver à l’Espace Julien, la salle qui l’a vu débuter.

Name: OBAV Formally Old Barn Audio
Description:
OBAV formally known as Old Barn Audio Ltd are a professional Sound Installation and Lighting company based in Kent and Sussex serving the whole of the United Kingdom for business venues as well as home audio

Having over 30 years experience in the sound, music and video industry, we are experts in bespoke sound systems. We work in nightclubs, bars, restaurants, sporting venues and stadiums. We are also extremely experienced in church sound, having installed over 300 systems into places of worship. Working in Grade 1 listed buildings is a real skill and of this we have great knowledge.

Name: Tuần Lễ Âm Nhạc Việt Nam - Vietnam Music Week
Description: An annual music conference and music showcase event for Vietnam Music Industry Network (VMIN) members and public to educate, network, collaborate and grow together.

Name: The Rock Project
Description:
With over 16 years of experience in teaching and inspiring young people and adults all over the UK and beyond, The Rock Project has soon become one of the largest networks in the country for sociable music lesson providers with almost 90 schools. 

Students learn either guitar, bass, drums or vocals weekly from professional, gigging musicians in a sociable and inspiring environment, before moving on to put into practice what they’ve learnt together in a band rehearsal. Our ultimate aim is to work towards the huge annual End of Year Gigs which are hosted in some of the counties best independent grassroots music venues such as The Fleece in Bristol and The Wedgewood Rooms in Portsmouth.

We teach guitar, bass, drums and vocals for students aged 7-11, 11-18 and even run an ‘Encore’ group for adults! Each of our sessions are suitable for all abilities, and you don’t need your own instrument! Each session offers a FREE taster session to begin with, so what are you waiting for? 

LEARN | PLAY | GIG 

The Rock Project is a franchisor with 85+ sessions across the country and beyond. We are proud to work with tens of innovative and inspirational franchisees across our network, and currently have over 300 tutors teaching our vast number of students.

Name: American Bach Soloists
Description:
AMERICAN BACH SOLOISTS (ABS) were founded in 1989 with the mission of introducing contemporary audiences to the cantatas of Johann Sebastian Bach through historically informed performances. The first public concerts were given in February 1990 at St. Stephen’s Church in Belvedere, where the ensemble serves as Artists-in-Residence. Under the leadership of co-founder and Music Director Jeffrey Thomas, the ensemble has achieved its vision of assembling the world’s finest vocalists and period-instrument performers to bring this brilliant music to life. 

For more than two decades, Jeffrey Thomas has brought thoughtful, meaningful, and informed perspectives to his performances as Artistic and Music Director of the American Bach Soloists. Recognized worldwide as one of the foremost interpreters of the music of Bach and the Baroque, he continues to inspire audiences and performers alike through his keen insights into the passions behind musical expression. Fanfare Magazine proclaimed that “Thomas’ direction seems just right, capturing the humanity of the music…there is no higher praise for Bach performance.” 

In July 2010, the American Bach Soloists inaugurated North America’s newest annual professional training program in Historically Informed Performance Practice. Drawing on their distinguished roster of performers, the AMERICAN BACH SOLOISTS ACADEMY offers unique opportunities to advanced conservatory-level students and emerging professionals to study and perform Baroque music in a multi-disciplinary learning environment. The Academy is held in the San Francisco Conservatory of Music’s exquisite new facilities in the heart of the city’s arts district. 

In 2013, to commemorate ABS music director Jeffrey Thomas’s 25-year tenure of inspired leadership, the American Bach Soloists created the Jeffrey Thomas Award to honor, recognize, and encourage exceptionally gifted emerging professionals in the field of early music.

Name: Poplar Festival
Description:
Poplar è il festival nel cuore di Trento. Ma è anche un'idea, un sogno, un modo di vivere la città.

Quest'anno, la nona edizione del Festival torna più glitch e selvaggia che mai, dall’11 al 14 settembre sul Doss Trento 
Still braving è la nostra risposta a chi ci vorrebbe disuniti. Così, quando guarderemo indietro a questi tempi che corrono veloci, ci ricorderemo di aver scelto di rallentare e riconnetterci nella genuinità del nostro stare insieme 

Sarà un’edizione per cuori coraggiosi, pronti a farsi temprare da 4 giorni di musica no stop, per chi non molla neanche con le gambe stanche. È arrivato il momento di portare l’esperimento all’estremo, di esplorare nuove visioni, di farci trascinare in un gesto d’amore vivo e resistenza collettiva.

Sulla stessa collina, sotto lo stesso palco, con la stessa scintilla che ci tiene vivi da anni: esserci

Name: MUSIC IS OUR WEAPON
Description: MUSIC IS OUR WEAPON is a Texas-based 501(c)3 nonprofit dedicated to increasing emotional, physical, and mental well-being through the power of music. MUSIC IS OUR WEAPON’s programming focuses on two areas of impact: Music Care Projects and Music Development Projects. Music Care Projects pair the latest digital music technology with volunteer-driven Music Discovery Outings to connect and deliver relevant music to individuals living in various care environments. Music Development Projects are collaborative community events created to inspire youth through philanthropy. MUSIC IS OUR WEAPON currently administers Music Care Projects in more than 25 care environments across Dallas, Austin, and Houston, and works with over 100 Texas based youth annually in Music Development Projects. For more information, visit www.musicisourweapon.org.

Name: Make Music NOLA
Description: Make Music NOLA is a non-profit music school dedicated to providing high-quality music education to students in Orleans Parish eligible for free or reduced lunch.  Our mission is to promote academic achievement, cultivate artistic expression, and promote the healthy growth and development of children in New Orleans through culturally relevant music instruction and performance. Make Music NOLA offers after-school and weekend programs in orchestral string instruments (violin, viola, cello, bass), general music, workshops/masterclasses, and music theory. Our programs are designed to provide students with a fulfilling and constructive community outside of school, all while exploring the complexities of music and studying an instrument. Our programs extend across New Orleans, and students have multiple performance opportunities every year at sites around the city, including at museums, festivals, and parks.

Description:
Skyelab Music Group is a music production and music marketing company based out of New York. Founder/President Arty Skye is a multi-platinum record producer and engineer, who has worked on various major and independent projects including Madonna, Brandy and Will Smith.

Skyelab Sound Studios are located in the heart of Times Square, New York. The Skyelab Production team consists of producers, sound engineers, songwriters, session musicians, singers and vocal instructors. Our projects span across all genres including pop, rock, hip-hop, R&B, adult contemporary, Gospel and instrumental. 

The Skyelab Marketing Department creates marketing campaigns for artists of various genres and career stages. With a heavy emphasis on digital marketing, market research, social networking, digital and visual branding, and New Media tactics, Skyelab's marketing campaigns create solid connections between artists and the music community.

Skyelab Music Group's Art and Video department creates original album, logo and graphic artwork for artists. We also offer professional music video and promotional video production, which is implemented in viral video marketing.

The Dunedin Music Society is the parent organization of the Dunedin Concert Band, Pinellas Community Players, Tampa Bay Music Reading Workshops, Holiday Spectacular at the Palladium, and the Pinellas Festival of Community Bands.

Name: Sir Groovy
Description:
Sir Groovy, Inc. operates as an online music licensing platform. The company’s services include online music licensing; catalog management with artificial intelligence that provides meta-data targeted to searching music for synch; and white label store that offers search and management tools for music to sales teams and synch clients. It serves music owners, film studios, TV networks, and advertising agencies internationally.

Sir Groovy's vast library of songs come from the world's top independent labels. We have successfully aggregated thousands of real bands in every genre on one platform ready for sync licensing. All of our songs are pre-cleared for both sides (master and publishing); they can be licensed online immediately, across all platforms, world wide, in-perpetuity, for all-media including television, film, advertising, games and web videos. 

Sir Groovy's client list: Disney ABC, Paramount Pictures, Fox Searchlight, CBS, VIACOM, Time Warner, Discovery, The Madison Square Garden, Saatchi & Saatchi, JWT, Blue Rock, as well as advertisements for AT&T, Nintendo, Namco Bandai, Facebook, Rolex, Malibu Rum, and  + many more.
 
View our Film and TV credits at:
http://www.imdb.com/company/co0243625

Description:
Birch Creek Music Performance Center is an elite summer music academy located in the heart of Door County Wisconsin. Students, entering grade seven through graduating grade 12, attend from up to 15 states and from other countries. Our faculty are professional musicians, many of whom teach and perform at some of the most prestigious music schools in the country. Together, our students and faculty present over 30 concerts in the historic Dutton Barn and over 30 outreach concerts during our academy season. We offer four, two-week sessions in Percussion, Steel Pan & World Music; Symphony and two sessions of Big Band Jazz.  

In the shoulder seasons we offer Wind Ensemble, Chamber Music and Piano retreats for adults, in addition to Fall Series Concerts that feature Birch Creek faculty artists and friends. 

Two fundraiser dinner concerts are offered each year; Valentines Fundraiser and the Associates Volunteers Fundraiser, both of which support every Birch Creek student by providing proceeds to the operational fund, Play It Forward.

Since 1861, the Orchestre Pasdeloup has been bringing symphonic music to life, for everyone. 

Discover the 2020-2021 "Grandiose" season on our website! For nearly one hundred and sixty years, the Pasdeloup Orchestra has been driven by the enthusiasm and rigour of its musicians. It has never ceased to bring the masterpieces of the repertoire to life, placing them within the reach of the widest possible audience - from amateurs to specialists, from young people to the wise - and to make people discover new, unheard-of, incredible, subtle and surprising works through original and innovative concert forms, while remaining resolutely open to the diversity of styles and talents.

Name: AfterMaster
Description:
AfterMaster 
MyStudio's AfterMaster technology is a new process for remastering audio which has been described as one of the biggest breakthroughs in audio since the introduction of digital music. The AfterMaster technology is a proprietary, patent-pending combination of hardware and software which was developed over the last four years by the MyStudio Audio Labs, Inc. engineering team. The revolutionary AfterMaster process makes music significantly louder, deeper and more exciting than traditionally mastered-only music. It can be applied on virtually all audio sources including music, radio, television and film. The technology is a proprietary, patent pending combination of hardware and software which was developed over the last four years by the MyStudio audio engineering team. 
 
The AfterMaster process can be used to create both a master from a master audio mix or to “AfterMaster” existing music that has already been mastered.  MyStudio AfterMaster allows any mastered audio to be remastered without the need to access the master mix. The business model includes the mastering and “AfterMastering” of both new music releases as well as catalog music. AfterMaster can be the technological impetus that can revitalize the music industry by providing consumers with a new leap in sound quality and added value.

Name: Labelle
Description:
Maloya electronics of Labelle lives at first as an experience, an accelerator of imagination. Either sung or either declaimed, in the tradition of fonnkèrs from Réunion Island, rhythmical, electronic or more experimental, he is constantly surprising by his capacity to pull atmospheres and by the introspection which he generates. 

Resolutely syncretic, the universe of Labelle unites Maloya ( from Réunion traditional music) and electronics, colored with Indian and African touches, to give birth to a new shape flirting with the universality. 

On stage, Labelle lives in its music and invites the public in the meditative depth, in the dance, even in the trance

Name: Syncope
Description:
Emblématique au sein de l’ESSCA, l’association Syncope, créée en 1989, est une association très active, axée sur la musique qui a su perdurer dans le temps grâce à la créativité et la détermination de ses membres.

C’est donc depuis plus de 30 ans maintenant que notre amour commun pour la musique nous rassemble. Au sein de l’école nous nous appliquons à faire vibrer les élèves avec nos événements à la fois originaux et réguliers, mais Syncope s’étend également au-delà de l’ESSCA.

Cette association en pleine expansion est divisée en plusieurs commissions, permettant une meilleure efficacité et une importante cohésion.

Aujourd’hui, plus qu’une association, elle est devenue une seconde famille dans laquelle des membres de toutes les promotions de l’ESSCA sont unis autour d’une même passion : la musique.

Description:
Best Bass Gear is committed to helping bass enthusiasts find great tone with superior pickups, preamps and other bass items from the best manufacturers in the industry.

We currently accept Visa, MasterCard, and Discover credit cards as well as Paypal.

Manufacturers include:
Bartolini, Nordstrand, Hipshot, Aguilar, Babicz Full Contact Hardware, DiMarzio, D'Addario, Lindy Fralin, Basslines, Antiquity, Seymour Duncan, Ken Smith Bass Strings, DR, Thomastik-Infeld, Mono Bass Case, CruzTools, Batt-o-meter, Tech 21, EBS, EMG, Dunlop, Fodera, S.I.T. Strings, Rotosound, Gotoh, and Sansamp.

Name: Digital Room Records
Description:
Digital Room Records was founded on Jannuary 14, 2013 by Gerry Verano, Dany Sativa & Mark Feesh. Digital Room Records is an independent electronic music label in Austria. The styles are House, Techno, Minimal & Trance.

What are we doing?

We distribute electronic music worldwide into our download store, which is online now, and into over 250 other download stores like iTunes, Beatport, amazon, virgin and many more.

Name: Samplesoundmusic
Description:
Samplesound was created for established and aspiring Tech House, Techno and House Producers and Dj's across the world. Our mission to help develop these electronic music scenes, aiding up and coming movements and producers who are the current and future pioneers of our musical landscape. 

Our portfolio of sample collections totals of 70gb and we're continuing to grow in size and quality across our select genres of Tech House, Techno and House. We create packs in WAV & AIFF format, always Royalty Free. 

In 2018 we welcomed a number of carefully selected labels and collaborators  to our store. We share a common ethos of quality, ambition and drive to bring the best possible products and services to our scene.

Name: Full Spectrum
Description:
Full Spectrum was founded early 2004 in Utrecht by Adriaan Muts, Adriaan Veldhuizen and Nuno Dos Santos and became a successful independent promoter with several clubnights focused on minimal and melodic techno throughout The Netherlands. Regular guests like James Holden, Paul Kalkbrenner, Nathan Fake, Dominik Eulberg, Gui Boratto, Stephan Bodzin and Nuno himself became superstars in those years.

While Veldhuizen and Dos Santos explored other roads, from 2010 on the focus of Muts and his team (Heflin Smit, Martijn Mannak) switched to exclusive artists and naturally the change to a booking/management agency grow. In 2018 the booking division (65daysofstatic, Aestrid, Applescal, David Douglas, CUT_, Gidge, GOSTO, GusGus, Marble Sounds, Petter Carlsen, Polynation & Tunnelvisions) split up and the majority moved to We Are E Agency.

Artist management for Helsloot, Tinlicker and Black Sun Empire are the key activities of Full Spectrum nowadays.

Name: Wide Events CIC
Description:
Community interest company specialising in talent development, music export and events. Portfolio includes: 
the Wide Days music convention, Born To Be Wide seminar & social evening, the Off The Record youth initiative and Made In Scotland Gigs.

Name: RMR Music
Description: At RMR Music, we compose unforgettable and impactful music for creators, producers and storytellers. We will elevate your production with music to captivate your audience. We provide music supervision, composition and licensing services.

Name: Vocal Arts DC
Description: Vocal Arts DC (VADC) is dedicated to promoting and preserving the art of vocal performance. We provide a platform for both emerging and established artists to share their talent with the community. Our mission is to enrich the cultural landscape of Washington, DC, through high-quality vocal music presentations and educational outreach.

Name: Big Music Studios
Description:
Big Music is the inspiring place for music lessons in Sydney and we pride ourselves on our ability to make learning fun. Whether you’re 5, or 75, our expert coaches work with you to make your weekly sessions fun, enjoyable, and also educational.
 
Using a song based learning approach, your preference for songs and styles and a structured lesson plan, our expert coaches will guide you through your musical journey and help you become the musician that you want to become. Whether it's becoming a competent solo performer, a member of a band, getting top HSC marks, or just for fun, the team at B!G Music is ready help you reach your musical goals. 

We also believe that nothing enhances the joy of music more than learning to play with others. At B!G Music we offer students to the opportunity to participate in wide range of group and collaborative programs, including group classes, band programs or social singing groups. 

So whether you are interested in private lessons, group classes, playing in a band or just about anything else music, Big Music is the place for you! Let us inspire you to follow your musical dreams and create your own musical journey.

Name: Squamish Valley Music Festival
Description:
3 day music festival engulfed in the true spirit of British Columbia. Surrounded by forests and mountains in the clean fresh air, we'll have multiple stages of the best and latest electronic, indie, and rock music. In a relaxed tree lined and grass environment, there will be plenty to explore with art installations including live art demonstrations and multiple food and beverage options. 

Happy times in a big field with great music!

Name: GOG Giovine Orchestra Genovese
Description:
La Giovine Orchestra Genovese è una società storica di concerti, sorta a Genova nel 1912.
Si occupa di organizzare, produrre e promuovere spettacoli musicali, in particolare concerti di musica da camera. 

Fondata dal barnabita Padre Giovanni Semeria, ha ospitato artisti internazionali di enorme rilevanza quali Arturo Benedetti Michelangeli, Alfred Cortot, Dinu Lipatti, Walter Gieseking, Wilhelm Backhaus, Nathan Milstein, Wilhelm Kempff, Claudio Arrau, Vladimir Ashkenazy, Maurizio Pollini, Krystian Zimerman, Itzhak Perlman, Yehudi Menuhin, Evgenij Kisin, Andrés Segovia, Uto Ughi, Grigory Sokolov, Arthur Rubinstein, Maxim Vengerov e tanti altri. 
Vanta la presidenza onoraria di Arturo Toscanini nel 1921 e l'affiliazione di Eugenio Montale.

L'attuale Presidente è Nicola Costa mentre il Direttore Artistico è Pietro Borgonovo.

La stagione 2018/2019, che debutterà lunedì 15 ottobre, ospiterà, fra gli altri artisti, Maurizio Pollini, Maxim Vengerov, Salvatore Accardo, Arcadi Volodos, Leonidas Kavakos, Esther Yoo con la Nordwestdeutsche Philharmonie e Les Musiciens du Louvre diretti da Marc Minkowski.

Name: WAMI (Wisconsin Area Music Industry)
Description:
The Wisconsin Area Music Industry (WAMI) is a volunteer organization founded in 1981 whose purpose is to educate and recognize the achievements and accomplishments of individuals in the Wisconsin music industry. 

We endeavor to provide annual scholarships to students and/or emerging artists in the Wisconsin community; promote the Wisconsin music scene; and execute an awards ceremony annually.

Name: Circulate Music
Description: Circulate Music is a marketing & licensing agency, alongside boutique music licensing collective, Leaky Sync, with global distro + music publishing services.

Name: The Crypt Studio
Description:
The Crypt is a large day-lit recording studio, situated in the heart of Crouch End, North London. We are dedicated to the art of recording, mixing and mastering, so we can help you get the best from your music.

The studio features a blend of modern and vintage recording equipment, designed to handle all audio and music productions. The spacious, high ceilinged live room (132 sqft) houses an isolation booth and a world of vintage equipment.

THE ALUMNI

JOSS STONE, SISTER SLEDGE, MADNESS, FEEDER, THE STAVES, LUCY ROSE, THE BARR BROTHERS, FAIRPORT CONVENTION, BEAK, MARTIN CARR, LIGHTS, LISSIE, PVRIS, GAVIN JAMES, GLENN TILBROOK, STEVE HARLEY, SIVU, NIK KERSHAW, PAUL CARRACK, BATTLES, TUUNG, ALEX VARGAS, MARIKA HACKMAN, FEMME, SNOW PATROL, MIKE SPENCER, BRITISH SEA POWER, MISTY MILLER, TEGAN & SARA, TRAVIS, KEATON HENSON, MARC ALMOND, KATZENJAMMER, ÁSGEIR, GIANT SAND, DINOSAUR PILE-UP, THE BIG MOON, CLEAN BANDIT, LONDON COMMUNITY, GOSPEL CHOIR, LAURA GROVES, MICHAEL KIWANUKA, RAGHU DIXIT, CHARLENE SORAIA, RAE MORRIS, RICK WAKEMAN, THE CORAL, TURIN BRAKES, THE DARKNESS, THE SUBWAYS, BARENAKED LADIES, BOY, SARAH BLASKO, NERINA PALLOT, JOHN SMITH, LITTLE MATADOR, MARCUS FOSTER, BAHAMAS, MICHAEL BALL, BLACK FOXXES, EMILY BARKER

Name: E-Home Recording Studio
Description:
A website for helping working class musicians build awesome home recording studios.

...For decades, recording studios were out of reach for all but the most elite musicians.  

Not anymore.  Today, anyone can record their own music right from home.  

For those musicians who want to, but don't know how...we are here to show you.

Name: Dr. Resin Live Sessions
Description:
Dr. Resin Live Sessions will blaze you into a musical dimension by creating a revolutionary  platform where artists can share and express their talent in vibrant Barcelona. 

The synergy between the magical music, the members, and the magnetic atmosphere creates a utopia in Dr. Resin Social Club that’s now available for you worldwide.

Name: RealTime Audio
Description: RealTime Audio brings education, collaboration, rehearsal, and performance to an entirely new level. Now musicians can jam, record, and livestream performances from anywhere in RealTime!

Name: Orchestre Philharmonique de la Relève du Québec
Description:
L’OPRQ est un organisme à but non-lucratif qui soutient les musiciens émergents dans le développement de leur carrière en leur donnant une opportunité professionnelle dans un orchestre tout en apportant encadrement, mentorat et formation dans un esprit de partage et d’entrepreneuriat.

L’OPRQ est le premier organisme de ce concept au Québec. L’OPRQ est une plateforme de développement de carrière, mais aussi une opportunité professionnel dans un orchestre qui se retrouvera sur les Curriculum Vitae de ses musiciens, ce qui leur permettra d’avoir plus d’œuvres orchestrales à leur répertoire, davantage de crédibilité lors d’applications pour des auditions, mais surtout une variété d’outils et de compétences pour développer leur carrière musicale quel que soit le parcours qu’ils décideront de choisir dans l’industrie de la musique. Des modèles d’orchestres similaires ailleurs se sont révélés être des succès pour le développement professionnel tel la Southbank Sinfonia à Londres, The Youth Orchestras of the Americas, l’Orchestre romand des jeunes professionnels, The Civic Orchestra of Chicago et The Aisian Youth Orchestra.

L'orchestre est sous la direction de la chef d'orchestre et fondatrice de l'OPRQ Marie-France Mathieu.

Name: Hit Music Service
Description:
Hit Music Service provides professional DJs and broadcasters with music direct from record labels, before it is available to the general public. Hit Music Service provides access to the largest music database available, in a variety of formats including: Urban, Rhythmic/CHR, Dance/Electronica, Top 40/Pop, and Rock. Independent label music is also available.

Hit Music service is the perfect way for music labels to get their music to BDS and non BDS radio stations, mixshow DJs, Radio PDs, Nightclu DJs and Mixtaope DJs. Thus ensuring full coverage of their song in all markets across the United States and even around the world. To make sure your music is heard by the right people contact our music placement professionals at: Music@HitMusicService.com

DJs and Radio Stations wanting to apply to recieve music may apply for access at: www.hitmusicservice.com

Name: Marrakech Prod
Description:
Recording and Production Studio in the incredible city of Marrakech.
Marrakech Prod is
working with artists like : Billy Thorpe, Alejandro Ignaritu, Gavin Hood, Cheb i Sabbah, Claude Challe, Lahcen Zinoun, Mohamed Mouftakir, Yallah, Charlie and Hash feat. el Cubanito, Naomi Barraka, Jay Gottlieb, Don Freeman, Heinke Aussenegg, Mark Killian, Paul Hepker, Stephen Shellen, Gustavo Santaolalla, Anibal Kerpel ... more on my web site.
Recording for Oscar winner BABEL, for Gavin Hoods RENDITION, Jeffrey Nachmanoff’s TRAITOR.
For the moroccan Film industry I did the Score for PEGASE by Mohamed Mouftakir,
Written Woman for Lahcen Zinoun.
Some short films with Dreamaker Productions/ Fouad Challa.

Name: Dasf Music
Description:
Artist and Producer, Shawn Harris (Dasf) began recording, mixing, and producing tracks for Miami artists in early 2020. Now in Miami Beach, he formed Dasf Music and produces original music as Dasf. Mixes groove, chill vibe, EDM, hip-hop, and soundtrack sounds to produce heavy low-tone rhythms and confident power building tempos. 

He grew up in the U.S. midwest, leaving when he was 17 years old by enlisting in the U.S. Marine Corps. Shawn served on Active Duty for 31 years, fought in 3 wars, earned multiple combat decorations, crossed over from Enlisted to Officer as a Gunnery Sergeant/E7 and retired from the Marines as a Lieutenant Colonel/O5. 

He has been an advisor to the United Nations, U.S. State Department, and other organizations around the world. He is fluent in Arabic, and holds a PhD in Behavioral Economics.

Between 2004-2010 he competed as a Professional MMA Athlete for various fight promotions with a final fight record of 9W-4L. He donated all financial proceeds from his MMA fights to the Tri-County Association for the Blind.

In addition to creating and producing music, he is the founder and chairman of Harris American Research Council (HARC), a Non-Profit Organization. He is an active advisor to multiple organizations focusing on the intersection of behavior and public policy.

In 2020 he decided to start producing short films and formed Octafeine Media, a Miami based media production company. He is a qualified sport pilot, publishes poetry on Medium, and likes mimosas.

Name: Façon Contraire
Description: Producing audio and video contents.

Name: Vintage Music Label
Description:
Since 2013, blending Chicago, Detroit, and English vibes.

Awarded best branded record Label 2014 

BRAND IDENTITY

Our brand, featuring the iconic French bulldog silhouette, symbolizes the limitless possibilities we offer to artists. A sketch on a blank canvas, capturing the essence of creativity and simplicity.

Diego Paulo Jacintho, aka Stark D, audio engineer, and electronic music producer, founded Vintage Music Label in England in 2013.

OUR MISSION

Discover and nurture new talents in Deep House, Progressive House, Melodic Techno, and Techno.

Join us in redefining electronic music!

Name: RedEye Presents
Description:
Full-scale event production company that specializes in creating consumer-facing & private events + concerts since 2010.  RedEye focuses on producing regular music events in San Francisco, Santa Barbara, Denver, and Los Angeles areas with a wide range of talent from DIPLO to FOSTER THE PEOPLE to ZION I to PORTER ROBINSON.  

In addition to producing well over 20+ public concerts per year, RedEye is a go-to vendor for university programming organizations in assisting them with talent buying & event production having worked with Stanford, Syracuse, and USC over the (2) years.

The RedEye team consists of die-hard curators of all things FUN--we are event producers, graphic artists, project managers, talent buyers, lifestyle bloggers, and DJ's & musicians.

Name: World Circuit Records
Description:
World Circuit Records have established their reputation by producing some of the finest world music albums of the past two decades, specialising in music from Cuba and West Africa.

Buena Vista Social Club, Ali Farka Touré, Toumani Diabaté, Fatoumata Diawara, Oumou Sangare, Orchestra Baobab and more...

Name: Juicebox Music
Description: A Lisbon-based promoter dedicated to sharing our passion for music by hosting unique electronic music events at Portugal's best hidden gems. We've built a vibrant community through 10+ events, each attracting over 500 attendees, at distinctive locations.

Name: Plymouth Music Zone
Description:
Plymouth Music Zone’s vision and mission are straight from the heart. We love music. We love people. We love making a difference. 

Our real passion is combining all three – bringing people together through high quality, fun and engaging musical experiences to enable extraordinary things to happen. 

Please be aware PMZ is mostly active on other platforms like Facebook and Instagram and is also contactable at our office in Devonport. 

Thanks for your support and we would love to hear from you.

(e) info@plymouthmusiczone.org.uk

Name: Next Stop Collective
Description: An exciting new network of LA-based music makers bringing new opportunities in artist development. Our downtown audio/video production facility is a versatile creative space that provides artists the tools to cultivate their abilities to reach their full potential.

Name: Klack Studios
Description:
Somos a KLACK, uma empresa especializada na produção artística e técnica nas áreas de música e imagem e existimos para marcar a diferença através da simbiose entre a arte e a técnica.

Possuímos e operamos em diversos ramos, enaltecendo as nossas apostas em artistas, clientes e associados.

As nossas instalações situam-se no centro do Porto e temos ao dispor desde escritórios, estúdio de produção e captação musical, estúdios de vídeo blackout, white screen e green screen assim como espaço para ensaio de performance.

Somos a casa dos nossos artistas, clientes e associados, exportando trabalho profissional e especializado.

Name: Exodus Music
Description:
Exodus Music is a music production company based in Los Angeles and the UK.

Housing several talented composers with a vast knowledge of scoring theatrical trailers, movies, video games, and commercials, we bring a unique take to all the projects we work on.

Name: Oui Sing
Description:
En vous permettant d’offrir à vos collaborateurs des moments de partage, d'échange et de plaisir autour du chant choral, Oui Sing vous accompagne dans votre démarche pour renforcer la cohésion au sein de vos équipes, favoriser le bien-être de vos collaborateurs et cultiver et entretenir leur engagement et leur motivation.

4 formules :
Des ateliers hebdomadaires sur une année et durant la pause déjeuner pour renforcer durablement les liens entre collaborateurs.
_ Des ateliers mensuels courts en before work pour créer une énergie de groupe positive et démarrer la journée en musique.
_ Des ateliers chorale géante lors de séminaires pour fédérer les collaborateurs autour d'un expérience musicale collective intense.
_ Des clips chorale virtuelle construits à partir des enregistrements des collaborateurs pour entretenir la cohésion d'équipe à distance.

Name: Drom
Description:
DROM : Promouvoir les cultures populaires de tradition orale et la musique modale.

Drom, la route, c’est aussi celle qui conduit les artistes en tournée et les amoureux des rencontres... musicales à travers le Monde des cultures populaires.
L’association DROM a vu le jour en juin 2001 à l’initiative d’Erik MARCHAND et Gaby KERDONCUFF afin de créer un relais entre les scènes et productions d’Europe de l’ouest et des musiciens populaires d’autres régions du monde. Sa finalité est de promouvoir, transmettre les cultures populaires de tradition orale et la musique modale.

Aujourd’hui, les actions de la structure portent sur :

-  la formation professionnelle via le dispositif long "Kreiz Breizh Akademi" et une offre de stage et master-classe en France et à l’étranger tout au long de l’année

- la transmission via un programme d’actions territoriales faisant intervenir des musiciens spécialistes des musiques modales en Bretagne et au-delà

- la recherche via la mise en oeuvre de colloque bisannuels et la mise en réseau de pédagogues, chercheurs, musiciens, luthiers, etc préoccupés par les musiques modales.

Name: Kishwaukee Symphony Orchestra
Description: Follow the Kishwaukee Symphony Orchestra on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and Twitter!

Name: Association Overlook - Rocksane
Description:
L’association Overlook (créée en 1981) est agréée au titre de la Jeunesse et de l’Éducation Populaire par la Direction Départementale de la Jeunesse et des Sports depuis 1994.

Sa mission est de promouvoir les musiques amplifiées et actuelles sous toutes ses formes dans le Bergeracois. Elle évolue à travers la diffusion, la création et la formation.

Overlook aide le développement de projets artistiques amateurs ou confirmés et organise de nombreuses manifestations, dont un festival en novembre.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Le Rocksane est né en 2003 de la volonté de la municipalité de Bergerac(24) avec l’aide des collectivités locales et des services de l’état. Il est cogéré par l’association Overlook. C’est un véritable lieu adapté à la promotion et au développement des musiques amplifiées et actuelles. C’est à travers un mélange de cultures musicales que le Rocksane évolue: Rock, reggae, Jazz, Ska, Métal, Electro …

Le site est dédié autant aux musiciens confirmés qu’aux amateurs et propose trois studios de répétition entièrement équipés. La Rock School (créée en 1999 en partenariat avec la ville de Bergerac) a pour objectif de proposer un enseignement musical ludique pour tous et mettre à disposition des salles de répétition adaptées. Le Rocksane intègre un hall d’accueil dans lequel sont situés un bar convivial, un espace d’exposition et un centre de ressources et d’informations. Tous ces éléments entretiennent une ambiance propice à l’échange et la rencontre.

Le Rocksane soutient et accompagne toutes les initiatives locales en mettant au service de tous sa technique, son savoir faire, son aptitude à conseiller et aider à tous les niveaux. Les expressions artistiques sont soutenues et mises en avant pour créer un univers culturel riche et prometteur.

Name: Histeria Music & Audio Post
Description:
Who We Are

Histeria Music is a music production and audio post-production company located in Miami, FL. Since its foundation in 2003 we have focused on supporting our clients’ communication needs with powerful music and sound that convey a strong message and create a bond with the audience. Description: A Gope Instrumentos Musicais nasceu com missão de criar e produzir os melhores instrumentos de  percussão do Brasil para o mundo.

Name: ZENESOUL Inc.
Description:

Currently managing and representing multi-million streaming artist, Zenesoul.

Envelope Audio brings together the work of Ned Beckley and Josh Hogan. With a combined media industry experience spanning over 25 years, Envelope aims to bring the highest quality creative and technical prowess in Audio Post Production, Music Composition and Sound Design across all media formats. Name: PJPJ Podium Jong Professionals Jazz Voorschoten
Description:
Podium Jong Professionals Jazz organiseert elke maand van september tot en met april een jazzconcert met talentvolle studenten van het Koninklijk Conservatorium in Den Haag. Én jaarlijks in mei het PJPJ-jazzfeest met jong talent, (oud-) studenten en gerenommeerde jazzmusici. De concerten worden gehouden in Cultureel Centrum in Voorschoten, Prinses Marijkelaan 4.

Ontstaansgeschiedenis
Piet Wezepoel, muziekliefhebber en musicus speelde in de jaren zestig van de vorige eeuw in rock en roll bands zoals The Rex Rockets Five en The Giants. Lange tijd werkte Piet bij het Koninklijk Conservatorium  Den Haag. Piet zag daar in 1994 dat studenten van de jazzafdeling vooral op zoek waren naar podiumervaring. Reden voor Piet om in Voorschoten, waar hij woonde de stichting op te richten die concerten organiseert met jazzstudenten. Piet organiseerde ook veel optredens voor het Piet den Hartog Jazzfestival in Voorschoten. Piet overleed op 20 oktober 2015 en was voorzitter van PJPJ van september 1994 tot en met oktober 2015.

Donateurs
Door donateur te worden helpt u ons jonge professionals van de jazz-afdeling van het Koninklijk Conservatorium Den Haag een (concert)podium te geven.

Sponsors
PJPJ kan de werkzaamheden niet doen als er geen sponsors zijn. PJPJ Voorschoten is erg blij met onze sponsors en willen hen ook graag bij u aanbevelen. Bedrijven en personen kunnen hun naam verbinden aan PJPJ. PJPJ biedt de mogelijkheid om onder een breed publiek in Voorschoten en de regio naamsbekendheid te vergroten. Wij doen dit door uw naam en logo te vermelden op de public relations uitingen van PJPJ-concerten. U kunt dan denken aan de website en concertagenda, de posters met aankondiging PJPJ-concert (100 stuks in Voorschoten, 8 keer per jaar), Piet Wezepoel Jazz Festival (1x per jaar, 500 in Voorschoten, Den Haag, Leiden) en sociale media uitingen. 

Informatie? Mail naar secretaris@pjpj.nl of kijk op de website.

Name: House of Music
Description: Bij House of Music kun je op een leuke en eigentijdse manier muzieklessen volgen voor piano, gitaar, zang, drums, basgitaar, saxofoon, ukelele, viool etc. Ook verhuren we waanzinnige oefenruimtes met een prachtige akoestiek!

Name: Innsbrucker Festwochen der Alten Musik
Description: Die Innsbrucker Festwochen der Alten Musik GmbH sind ein seit 1976 jährlich stattfindendes, mehrwöchiges Musik- und Opernfestival für Alte Musik mit Fokus auf Originalklang der Renaissance- und Barockzeit. Das Repertoire reicht von szenischen Eigenproduktionen über verschiedene Konzertformate bis hin zu Projekten der Nachwuchsförderung im Bereich der Alten Musik. Zusätzlich zum Festival führt die Gesellschaft seit Oktober 2005 die ganzjährigen Konzertreihen der Meister&Kammerkonzerte Innsbruck mit gesamt 15 Konzerten, zu welchen international renommierte Orchester, Dirigent*innen und Solist*innen eingeladen werden.

Name: Sonorous Global Consulting
Description: Sonorous Consulting is a marketing, strategy and business development consultancy deeply immersed in cutting edge technologies at the intersection music and culture. For the best part of a decade we've empowered tech entrepreneurs, start ups, labels and music creators to maximise opportunities associated with emerging technology. We bridge the gap between innovation and real-world value. A future focused agency for the next era of music x tech.

Name: Dumfries Tattoo
Description:
The organisation behind the Dumfries Tattoo - an evening of entertainment guaranteed for all the family.

With extensive growth plans the Tattoo Team aim to promote and champion the diverse musical talent of the South of Scotland.

Name: Perth Bagpiper
Description:
Create the atmosphere you desire at your event and book the Perth Bagpiper for your event. From reflective memorials to the life of the party at festivals, the Perth Bagpiper can provide the entertainment.
Why not learn how to play the bagpipes? The Perth Bagpiper holds regular 10-week courses for adults wanting to learn, even if you have no music experience. We will teach you from scratch. Book in for a course now and find out how much fun it can be.

Name: Beats of nature
Description: Beats of nature is a livestream media dedicated to reforest through electronic music. Our sessions take place in paradisiac places where we collaborate with influential artists with the objective to recover nature forests.

Name: m4music
Description: m4music is the most prominent meeting point for pop music, the media, and the music industry in Zurich and Lausanne, Switzerland. It has a strong focus on new talent. m4music offers visitors a unique club festival atmosphere, featuring three live stages in the beautiful Schiffbau complex (capacities 1300 / 600 / 550).

Name: Boia Fria Produções
Description:
Produtora cultural, editora musical e selo fonográfico que atua no gerenciamento de carreira de artistas, venda e produção de shows, assessoria de imprensa, redes sociais, relações públicas e gestão de imagem de artistas. Com foco na música negra em todas as suas vertentes, desde a MPB, passando pelo jazz, samba, funk setentista e rap à soul music nacional. 

Há 13 anos no mercado, a Boia Fria Produções já trabalhou com artistas como Azymuth, Seu Jorge, Banda Black Rio, Edi Rock, Kl Jay, Racionais MCs, Mano Brown, Hyldon, Elza Soares, Negra Li, Tony Tornado, Carlos Dafé, RZO, Ed Motta, Paula Lima e Gerson King Combo, entre outros. 

Foi responsável pelas carreiras dos rappers Dexter (2011 a 2014) e Rincon Sapiência (2015 a 2018), e, atualmente, administra a carreira de Amanda Magalhães. Também se dedica a projetos como o Mestres da Soul (2013) e o SP RAP, eleito pelo público do Guia da Folha o melhor festival de 2014, além dos festivais Fico em Casa BR (2020) e Favela em Casa (2020) e do projeto Diversidartes, que reúne artistas com múltiplas  deficiências.

Name: Live Nation Season Seats - Chicago
Description:
Live Nation is the worlds largest producer of live music concerts hosting over 60 million fans and 23,000 events in 33 countries. 

Live Nation Venue Sales Chicago is responsible for selling VIP seating packages on a seasonal, multi-event, and single event basis at our four venues: Aragon Ballroom in Chicago, Hollywood Casino Amphitheatre in Tinley Park, Huntington Bank Pavilion at Northerly Island, and Alpine Valley Music Theatre. We work with companies and individuals to provide the best concert experience and build strong and lasting client relationships.

Name: VARO Studio Amsterdam
Description:
VARO Studio Amsterdam is a professional music studio dedicated to helping artists, musicians, and producers bring their creative vision to life. We provide a full range of music production, audio engineering, recording, mixing, and mastering services, serving clients both locally in Amsterdam and worldwide. Our studio combines a creative, comfortable environment with top-quality equipment to ensure every project sounds its best.

In addition to production services, we offer personalized guitar lessons and music production coaching, tailored to all skill levels. Whether you’re a beginner, an aspiring producer, or an experienced musician, our coaching covers performance, arrangement, recording, mixing, mastering, and professional studio practices, helping you develop your unique voice and skills.

Our experience spans a wide variety of genres, including pop, rock, indie, singer-songwriter, metal, blues, funk, and cinematic scores, and we’ve collaborated with artists and brands worldwide to deliver professional-quality recordings that inspire and connect.

At VARO Studio Amsterdam, we are passionate about combining technical precision with creative intuition, ensuring that every track, album, or lesson captures the emotion and energy that makes music unforgettable.

Whether you’re looking to record a single track, produce a full album, or take your guitar and production skills to the next level, VARO Studio Amsterdam is your partner in music creation, education, and growth.

Name: Right Hand Co
Description: Founded by Courtney Stewart, Right Hand Company is a ground-breaking artist management company with a national presence, and is an innovative home for exceptional talent. Our roster includes a line up of award winning, unique, and innovative talent: Khalid, Wynne, Spencer Barnett, and Sinead Harnett. You can find the latest news and information regarding our talent and founder. If you have any inquiries or would like to join our team, please contact us here.

Name: Macrocosmi Musica
Description:
La musica è un universo infinito in cui convive ogni tipo di linguaggio, che genera e alimenta anche il suo contrario; uno splendido, contraddittorio eppure coerente magma, che deriva da se stesso senza mai essere uguale al proprio passato. 
Macrocosmi vuole esplorare i fili sottili che uniscono e nutrono questi mondi, partendo dal grande repertorio del passato fino a giungere alle visionarie aperture della musica del ‘900, nelle sue molteplici sfumature, dalla musica cosiddetta colta e d’avanguardia, al jazz, alla musica d’ispirazione popolare, passando per proposte cameristiche anche atipiche.

Macrocosmi è una manifestazione, giunta alla IV edizione, unica nel suo genere nelle Marche. Si articola in 3 fasi: un Festival Cameristico, cicli di Corsi di Alto Perfezionamento Musicale e Concerti dei migliori allievi delle Masterclass. 
E’ un contenitore multidisciplinare, che ha realizzato concerti classici, jazz e di musica contemporanea e sperimentale, oltre che eventi che prevedevano l’impiego della videoarte.

Direzione artistica
Michele Scipioni
Matteo Angeloni

Name: RTE International Artist Management
Description:
RTE  International Artist Management oversees all aspects of the Artist’s career. 
We pride ourselves on representing only the very top Music Artists who are considered the best in their specific music genre. These Artists consistently demonstrate the desire to achieve the highest possible recognition and  financial rewards for their gifted skills.

We assist, advise, and provide guidance for our Music Artist clients on all creative & music career business decisions. Our intention is to provide the necessary guidance and support in to order to realize the Artist's aspirations to rise to the top of the music industry in their chosen music genre. We assist the Artist by determining the best strategies and then we help implement them, in order to assure the Artist's success meets and then exceeds their current artist status.

Our ARTIST CAREER DEVELOPMENT PLAN is designed to develop & accelerate the Artist's career and is tailored to the Artist’s specific situation and specific needs. This strategic career plan outlines clear and concise achievable milestones. It contains a series of implementation steps, time-lines and actions, and provides steps for forward progress to achieve upward career movement goals.

Using our proven methodology we enable our music Artist client to realize their career development milestone in an accelerated fashion, while building career aspirations that can map out to  other additional music aspirations and opportunities.

Name: IndieCo ry
Description:
IndieCo ry on Suomen riippumattomien levy- ja tuotantoyhtiöiden yhdistys, joka parantaa jäsenyritystensä toimintaedellytyksiä sekä tukee suomalaisen musiikkituotannon monimuotoisuutta. Jäsenyrityksiä IndieColla on tällä hetkellä 52.

IndieCo ry pyrkii edistämään jäsenyrityksiensä asemaa suomalaisessa musiikkikentässä muun muassa toimimalla linkkinä musiikin alalla vaikuttavien muiden yhdistysten ja toimijoiden suuntaan.

Riippumattomien levy-yhtiöiden toiminta on tärkeää musiikillista laaja-alaisuutta ja monipuolisuutta ajatellen. Usein tällainen toiminta on taloudellisesti haastavaa ja yhdistys pyrkiikin turvaamaan ja kehittämään jäsenyrityksilleen mahdollisimman hyvät toimiintaedellytykset suomalaisessa musiikkikentässä. Tämä onnistuu yhteistyöllä, jossa joukkovoimaa hyödynnetään niin tärkeiden asioiden ajamisessa ja esille tuomisessa kuin myös verkostoitumalla entistä laajemmin

Name: Paranoid Earthling
Description:
Paranoid Earthling is considered to be the first rock band to rise from the ancient city of Kandy. Since participating at TNL onstage 2002, a talent showcase program hosted by a Rock n Roll inclined Music Station in Sri Lanka opened up avenues to the band from being actively involved at Rock Company gigs 2003-2007, to organizing their own gigs where they exhibit energetic and charismatic performances to date. 

Their debut tour to India in September 2009, allowed Paranoid Earthling to recruit fans from New Delhi, Bangalore and Chennai. Later that year the Band rocked thousands of fans at the South Asian Bands Festival in the historic backdrop of Purana Quila better known to many as the Red Fort.

In October 2012 the band performed at the Sound Central Music Festival in Kabul, Afghanistan. 

In 2016 the band was invited to perform at ‘Nations for Peace’ held in Gurgaon India, which brought seven bands from six of the South Asian countries to reiterate the importance of maintaining regional peace. 

Paranoid Earthling has released many EPs following the release of their debut EP titled ‘Rock N Roll is My Anarcy’ in 2005. Their video ‘Bringing Down the Sun’ released for the International World Peace Day amidst the Civil War in 2008 was premiered on local TV and was nominated for the State Media Awards.

In August 2022 they released 'Reign' which was followed up by the release of the band's debut album 'Illusion Empire' in November 2023.

On 20 September 2024, the band was incorporated under The Companies Act No 7 of 2007 under the name of Paranoid Earthling Pvt Ltd bearing the company number PV 00310227.

While the Paranoid Earthling band logo is a registered trademark under the Intellectual Property Act No 36 of 2003.

Name: One Sound Music

One Sound Music brings you Christian music, primarily in a stripped down, unplugged format from new and established artists. 

We're based in the UK but have worked with artists from around the world - our aim is to give platforms to artists to uplift and inspire through music.

Artist Management - Destiny Malcolm (@destinyjoelivia on IG/Twitter)

Label Services - helping artists to manage their music releases


To find out more, visit our website at www.onesoundmusic.co.uk, our YouTube channel at www.youtube.com/onesoundmusik or check out our social media accounts (Instagram/Twitter/Facebook)

Name: Loft Music
Description:
Loft Music specialises in writing, selecting and producing music. 

As an sync agency we have had soundtracks and music featured on a selection of the latest Sony Playstation and Nintendo Wii games, and on some of the world's most watched television shows such as CSI: Miami and CSI: NY, and The Sopranos.

We offer a very flexible service to clients: we can supply existing tracks or edit/adapt tracks to fit your music project, or alternatively we can write original music specifically to your brief.

All of our music is available for immediate license. In terms of ownership, Loft either owns all music rights for the world or if not we have very close ties with the relevant labels and publishers, making licensing a seamless process. All tracks are also PRS registered in the UK.

Name: BROKEN SILENCE Independent Distribution GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein unabhängiger, weltweit agierender Musikvertrieb mit 300 angeschlossenen Vertriebslabels. Aus unserer Sicht und nach Meinung vieler Branchenvertreter einer der echten und authentischen Independent-Vertriebe Europas mit internationaler Vernetzung und sehr gut funktionierender Logistik.

Wir garantieren eine individuelle Herangehensweise an jede einzelne Veröffentlichung (in den Formaten Vinyl, CD, DVD, Stream und Download) in Kooperation mit vielen unterschiedlichen Handelspartnern weltweit.

Wir wissen genau, wie Neuerscheinungen idealerweise verkauft werden müssen. Ob unabhängige Plattenläden, Medienhäuser, Elektrofachmärkte, Ketten, Online- und Mailorderspezialisten oder Festivalverkäufer: Jeder Geschäftspartner wird seinen speziellen Eigenschaften entsprechend von uns betreut.

Unser hauptsächlich audiovisuell-kaufmännisch ausgebildetes Team in optimaler Größe bildet seit 2004 eine gesunde Mischung aus langjährig Erfahrenen und jungen Kollegen mit Indie-Spirit. Uns verbindet gutes Teamwork und die Begeisterung für besondere, gut gemachte Musik.

BROKEN SILENCE DIGITAL sorgt für die Auswertung von Musik bei Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Amazon und vielen anderen Kanälen. Bei uns wird nicht nur gelistet, sondern individuelle Profilpflege betrieben. Unser Digitalteam ist mit persönlichen Ansprechpartnern jeden Tag durchgehend erreichbar und leistet schnelle Bearbeitungszeit bei Neuanlagen, Ergänzungen und Änderungen. Just In Time – Beratungsservice, Playlist-Pitching und aktives Kümmern um Features sind daily business.

Name: Make Me Sound
Description:
MakeMeSound est une société de création musicale spécialisée dans le développement et la conception de signatures sonores et de vidéos musicales.

Nous recherchons l'expression musicale la plus précise de votre projet, à savoir votre propre identité sonore incluant les différentes variations nécessaires à la mise en valeur de votre communication globale.

Notre conception du design sonore ? C'est à la fois un travail d'artiste et d'artisan : mettre notre créativité personnelle à votre service.

Pendant les quinze années où nous avons tourné au sein du groupe Skip The Use , nous avons eu le plaisir de rencontrer de nombreux techniciens, ingénieurs du son et musiciens de renom qui sont devenus des partenaires précieux avec lesquels nous traitons régulièrement, afin d'améliorer nos œuvres. Notre force réside dans des solutions orientées vers l'utilisateur qui garantissent une qualité et une efficacité maximales à nos clients, leur donnant ainsi un avantage concurrentiel crucial.

MakeMeSound vous propose différents types de musiques originales qui pourront être facilement développées sur tous les supports en fonction de votre identité musicale : signatures sonores, sound design, bandes sonores de vidéos, ...

Name: CompleteTracks
Description: At Complete Tracks, we are in the business of curating a wide range of compelling and inspiring music to pair with motivating film, television, trailers, and digital advertising content. We are always striving to create a culture that gives artists a platform to create music that is truly inspired to help take your content to the next level.

Name: Pitch Black Records
Description:
Established in 2008, Pitch Black Records stands as a testament to its founder’s profound love for music; an individual who is first and foremost a fan, and who also loves composing, performing and listening to music, but, most of all, discovering new music and sharing it with others. Since its establishment, the label has been driven by pure love and passion, and each one of its releases is infused with these two qualities, among others.

While the primary focus of the label lies in the realms of heavy and power metal, its musical horizons (just like its founder’s) are broad and inclusive. Embracing diverse styles of hard rocking or extreme sounds, especially of up-and-coming artists, all of them share a common thread – an immense passion intertwined with captivating melodies.

Name: The Real Songwriters of Melbourne
Description:
The Real Songwriters of Melbourne (RSOM) is a space for both songwriters and music lovers to come together to celebrate, support and develop the emerging songwriters of Melbourne. No matter age, genre or experience level, RSOM invites all songwriters to be part of its community.

The Real Songwriters of Melbourne was established in 2014 by performer and media professional Jena Marino. The idea was born from a passion to help emerging songwriters in the Melbourne music scene to enter the spotlight and to share their music to a new and wider audience.

Since the beginning, RSOM has provided many pathways for artists to flourish including interviews, live performance opportunities (RSOM Live), media and release campaigns and networking nights. Throughout its time, it has had the pleasure of working with many of Melbourne’s finest songwriters throughout their developing stages including Abbey Stone, Rya Park, Essie Holt, Emilia, and Nyuon.
As the industry rebuilds, RSOM continues to be a leader in supporting the emerging songwriters of Melbourne.

Name: Faya
Description: Nous sommes un collectif de jeunes talents passionnés par la musique éclectique, le monde digital, les vins généreux et admiratifs de notre patrimoine historique du sud de la France.

Name: Colorado Springs Youth Symphony Association
Description:
Founded in 1980 with the purpose of providing artistic and educational development of musically talented and dedicated youth, the Colorado Springs Youth Symphony Association is comprised of eight auditioned performing ensembles and a beginning strings program involving over 500 young musicians.

The mission of the Association is to provide for the artistic and educational development of young people within the Pikes Peak region by offering high quality and diverse musical experiences which enrich the cultural environment of the community.

Name: Jessamy / Mitchell Music
Description: Jessamy Mitchell Music was founded in 1999 by composers Keegan Jessamy and Bryce Mitchell to write music for feature films, television movies & series, kids shows, video games and other visual media.

Name: Limunt
Description:
Book en unik musikalsk oplevelse af højeste kvalitet
Limunt håndplukker Danmarks musikalske talenter til dit næste event

Limunt er en ny måde at booke musik på
Limunt (Live Music Entertainment) er en dansk virksomhed som booker livemusik til private, virksomheder og offentlige events. Limunt er grundlagt af to musikalske ildsjæle (Asger Søgaard & Frederik Flach) og administreret af et dedikeret team af bookere, som hver især har mange års erfaring i musik- og eventbranchen- både på og bag scenen.

I Limunt har vi castet Danmarks største musikalske talenter, som hver især er eksperter på deres felt. Vores store katalog af mere end 500 nøje udvalgte musikere giver os mulighed for at indfri de fleste drømme og forventninger til live musik. Hos Limunt vil du derfor møde musikere med et langt højere niveau, end hvad branchen ellers tilbyder – og så endda til en pris, hvor de fleste kan være med.

I Limunt mener vi, at musikken til events og højtider bør være af lige så høj kvalitet, som den man oplever til koncerter på spillesteder. Limunt ønsker at hæve barren for, hvilken slags musik du møder til bryllupper, firmaarrangementer, julefrokoster, sommerfester osv. 

I Limunt mener vi at musik skaber uforglemmelige oplevelser hvor mennesker mødes – uanset om der er 10 eller 1000 deltagere til stede.

Når du kontakter Limunt, bliver du mødt af en af vores professionelle bookere som skal høre lidt om dit event og dine ønsker til musikken og derefter matche det hele med det rigtige hold musikere.

Limunt er stolte af at skabe vækstmuligheder og netværk for både upcoming og etablerede musikere. Ved at agere bindeleddet mellem talentmassen og kunder garanterer vi unikke musikalske oplevelser udover det sædvanlige – også til dit kommende event. 

Fortæl os om dit event – så gør vi alt benarbejdet og finder de rigtige musikere til dig! Booking af musik har aldrig været nemmere!

Name: Pacific Boychoir Academy
Description:
Pacific Boychoir Academy (PBA) is a Grammy Award-winning, independent choir school for boys in grades four through eight, with seven after-school choirs for boys in pre-kindergarten through high school. PBA provides a richly diverse community, focusing on excellence in music education, academics, and performance. 

Founded in Oakland, California in 1998 by Artistic Director Kevin Fox, PBA serves over 170 choristers a season, has released seven independent albums, tours internationally each year, and has garnered three Grammy Awards with the San Francisco Symphony. 

The only North American boychoir school outside of the East Coast, PBA offers unique and rigorous choral and academic programs, producing confident, engaged young scholars and artists. The L.A. Times calls PBA’s sound quality “astonishing,” while the New York Times hails PBA’s ability to perform music “far beyond the reach of most children’s choirs.” 

Hear, watch, and learn more at PacificBoychoir.org

Name: solid gold
Description:
With offices in Downtown, Los Angeles, DUMBO, Brooklyn, and Shoreditch, London, solid gold is a premier artist development agency focusing on management, strategy, and public relations. Working exclusively with breaking indie acts including MGMT, Future Islands and Best Coast, as well as established artists and global brands like SPIN Media, Nudie Jeans and SanDisk, solid gold’s public relations division implements 360-degree, multi-tiered campaigns focusing on print, radio, television, and online media. 

Spearheaded by Jeffrey Anderson, the public relations team's full-circle approach picks up where listening leaves off, giving independent music its voice by bringing it to the surface through highly tailored marketing methods.

Name: Conservatório Vocare
Description:
O Conservatório Vocare é uma instituição vocacionada para o ensino da Voz, da Comunicação e das Artes Performativas, na qual são ministrados cursos de formação profissional certificados pela Direção Geral das Relações do Trabalho (DGERT), Direção Geral dos Estabelecimentos Escolares (DGEstE), sendo também uma Instituição homologada pela Trinity College London no âmbito dos seus Cursos de Formação Profissional de Rock&Pop e Teatro Musical.  

O grande objetivo do Conservatório Vocare é providenciar um serviço de referência na área do ensino artístico e da formação profissional da voz, assente numa oferta curricular diversificada e adequada às capacidades de cada um.

Name: OneTalent
Description:
OneTalent (*) was created by music entrepreneur Hans Ascrawat who together with his team provided over 2 decades of strategy, business, legal, and day-to-day management for each of their clients.

OneTalent is based on the philosophy that artist & talent management must evolve in the same way as the industry does. OneTalent strongly focuses on a broad creative development and sets out a personal long term growth path tailored to each artist & talent through a differentiated approach while never losing sight of the financial stability and economic potential for each of their clients.

Over the years OneTalent has been working for established artists and young creative talent. This helped them to build a sustainable career for artists from various music and other creative genres. This is not only the core business of OneTalent, it’s their mission.

Hans Ascrawat and his OneTalent team had the pleasure to work on the careers of below artists & talents over the past twenty years.

OneTalent played a substantial role in developing, managing, contracting, and or delivering input towards a broad range of creative events, shows, festivals,  brand & media partnerships, TV & Radio shows, art exhibitions, (TV) series & movies, music syncs, fashion, and design.

(*) OneTalent was previously named OneCall

Name: IDL Entertainment
Description:
We provide service covering virtually every aspect of the music business. From touring, show production, and audiovisual services, to web design and promotion, we’ve got everything you need to rise to the top of the industry. Whether you’re just starting out and want to get a head start, or are already established and want to solidify your brand, we have you covered. Just get in touch today to find out more about what we can do to help you!

IDL Entertainment was founded in 2010 by Ian Di Leo, and has since grown into  a one-stop shop for all music industry solutions. Beginning as a promotion and concert production company, IDL Entertainment really has its finger on the pulse of the ever-changing, exciting industry that we are a part of. Over the years, we have promoted shows for hundreds of different bands and artists, including supergroup Hail (formed of members of Slayer, Judas Priest, Megadeth, and Sepultura), Glenn Hughes (Deep Purple, Black Country Communion) feat. Doug Aldrich (Whitesnake), Mark Boals (Yngwie Malmsteen), Masterplan, and many more. On top of this, we have also provided production and marketing services for much bigger shows, with clients including Motorhead and Megadeth, among others.

IDL Entertainment have also expanded into the touring business, by acting as a booking agency and providing tour promotion. As a liaison between bands’ agents and our partners all over Latin America, as well as in the tour management scene, we can make touring in these regions far simpler, as well as much more profitable. 

Building upon this success, IDL Entertainment have also partnered with specialists in a wide variety of key areas, including web development, photography, illustration, production, and filming. Thanks to this, we are able to produce any content you might require to take your career to the next level, as well as providing insider advice to make the most of the opportunities available to you.

Your Next Experience… IDL Entertainment

Description:
_______________________________________

To this end, the MJC is committed to supporting the appreciation of jazz in the South Florida community through education and outreach.

Name: SyncIn - We bring music to your story
Description:
SyncIn started with a mission to make commercial music for usage in videos accessible and the licensing process transparent. 
Today commercial music licensing is complex, time consuming and expensive thus producers deselects commercial music on this basis, even though our experience shows that commercial music is often the first choice. 

By simplifying commercial music licensing - through digitally bringing rights users and rights holders closer together - we make a complex and expensive process accessible. This way producers always have the option of choosing commercial music while ensuring copyright owners are compensated for their work. 

SyncIn to the solution: 
With the newest technology SyncIn connects rights users and rights holders intelligently on a platform and creates a seamless licensing experience for producers. 

The Guesstimator tool, that gives free price guesstimate on licenses of your track, makes it easy to plan and budget commercial music into your production from the start. 

Next we have automated processes to find the rights holders fast and can often deliver an a-z licensing deal within 1-2 weeks.  
We have 23 years of experience dealing with rights holders on behalf of clients and we will always negotiate the best possible price for you. 

SyncIn to the Fees:
SyncIn have transparent pricing. We deliver a fixed pricing model so you always know what to expect when you are dealing with SyncIn.

SyncIn handles contracts, so you can spend time on creating your magic behind the scenes. 

Hit us up @ hello@syncin.io for any questions or
Try our Guesstimator @ www.syncin.io

Name: Barefaced Liar
Description:
Barefaced Liar is a Delhi-based rock band founded in 2002 in high school by singers, song writers and guitarists Akshay Chowdhry and Sumant Balakrishnan. This is a band with a truly unique sound, seamlessly traversing through genres ranging from Blues to Classic Rock and Heavy Metal, drawing inspiration from all of them to craft their own individual sound. The musicians confess to have been majorly influenced by classic artists/bands such as The Beatles, Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Jimi Hendrix, and Metallica as well as the newer sounds of Tool and Stone Temple Pilots and seek to blend their various influences to create music that adheres to convention, yet defies it.
 
In their self-titled debut album, recorded and produced by Zorran Mendonsa, BFL infused blues- based modern rock riffs with sing-along choruses, establishing it as one of the Top 10 albums of the year according to Rolling Stone Magazine and Rock Street Journal and one of the Top 5 Indian Rock Albums by Indian Rock MP3. 
 
heir performance was documented on the nationally broadcasted show “Taking Pole Position" in October 2011. In the same year, BFL went international for the first time when they performed in Pattaya, Thailand. Other includes 
NH7 Weekender Festival Pune (2010), A five-city tour - Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad with Hard Rock Café (2010), Commonwealth Games Youth Festival (2010). BFL is currently working on their second album, to be released in 2012.

Name: Villa Pennisi in Musica
Description:
VILLA PENNISI IN MUSICA concerti, corsi, spettacoli, eventi.
All’indomani dei lavori di ristrutturazione di Villa Pennisi che nel gennaio 2008 hanno riconsegnato alla famiglia Pennisi e alla città di Acireale l’edificio progettato e costruito alla fine dell’ottocento dall’architetto Mariano Falcini, la prima necessità è stata riportare agli antichi fasti la struttura, che nel corso degli anni è stata suggestiva meta di personaggi illustri quali, tra gli altri, i Reali d’Italia e Richard Wagner.
Grazie alla collaborazione tra la famiglia Pennisi, l’Associazione MAR, Gridshell.it e David Romano, è nata Villa Pennisi in Musica, manifestazione tesa a creare una piattaforma di incontro musicale e culturale nei luoghi di Villa Pennisi, che con i suoi saloni, il suo meraviglioso giardino interno e la chiesa del Crocefisso, piccola cappella seicentesca in uso alla proprietà, offre un ventaglio di location uniche. 
Stimolati dallo spirito creativo e dall’opera di Francesco Pennisi (1934-2000), compositore, scrittore, grafico e pittore, nato ad Acireale e che tra le mura e nel giardino della Villa crebbe e visse, negli ultimi tre anni si è dato vita a concerti e spettacoli che hanno avuto luogo sempre d’estate, celebrando proprio nel 2010 il compositore acese, intensificando di anno in anno il numero di eventi e la presenza di personalità artistiche, arricchendo l’offerta culturale e turistica di Acireale.
