Description:
Svenska Konsertbyrån (The Swedish Concert Bureau) in Stockholm is one of northern Europe's leading Artist Management Agencies within the field of classical music.

The company was founded over 20 years ago and has since built a wide-ranging network with orchestras, opera houses, festivals and other promoters all over the world.

Name: Biltmore Records
Description:
Welcome to Biltmore Records, 2020. We are entering this new decade after grinding it out for over 13 years in Charlotte, North Carolina. We put out numerous mixed tapes, and ground-level projects, working with artists from every genre. Our goal is to support and collaborate with our artist's regarding their visions and goals while creatively positioning them for success in other areas that they may not have accounted for.

 In today's environment, not everyone needs to partner with a record label. We support that! We are looking for the artists that understand that nothing great is ever accomplished alone. After years of working alongside some of the industry's top talent, we realize that it takes a rare combination of ability, motivation, and execution to achieve true success in business and life. Those are the kind of artists that we are looking to work alongside.

Over the years, Biltmore Records has promoted artists through live events and innovative marketing strategies. We have branded our artist using digital distribution channels, top quality CD's, and the other various forms of marketing, including strategies that have emerged over the past decade. Someone once said that it takes years to be an overnight success. We are in that kind of process and enjoying the journey every step of the way.  In 2012 – 2013, Biltmore Records created two popular radio shows on WGIV 103.3, FM Charlotte, NC. 

Biltmore Records contributed to numerous compilations, and strategic projects promoting awesome talents. Although headquartered in North Carolina, Biltmore Records holds partnerships that allow increased visibility in other significant markets and helps to develop new insights that will drive results, and grow business. 

As a company, our functional expertise and experience provide a solid platform for promoting artists to a broader audience.

2020 will begin another exciting decade of growth and opportunity. Check us out at www.biltmorerecords.com

Description: Triumph is West Michigan’s highest rated music school, specializing in private music lessons for all ages, live performance, artist development, and recording technology. It is a facility for both those who are looking to enrich their lives with music as a hobby or a career. Our staff is a collective of professional performing musicians who are passionate about helping others achieve their musical goals!

Name: DAS HAUS
Description:
DAS HAUS is a radically cozy performance and workspace for innovative classical music projects. At DAS HAUS, we blend experimental yet accessible concert formats with various music genres and artistic disciplines. We support professional musicians with engaging and relevant stories who enjoy connecting with today's audience in personal and interactive ways.

We also connect with the city through our outreach projects, such as "Sounds for the Soul," where we create one-on-one musical encounters between professional musicians and citizens going through a tough time in life.

Name: Orchestra giovanile Filarmonici Friulani
Description:
Musica e cultura dei giovani e per i giovani. Con questo spirito nasce, nel 2015, l’orchestra giovanile Filarmonici Friulani, unico esempio della Regione Friuli Venezia Giulia di ensemble musicale gestito, coordinato e curato da under 30. L’orchestra coinvolge più di 70 musicisti di età compresa tra i 14 e i 30 anni, tutti strumentisti originari della Regione e studenti delle scuole musicali del Friuli Venezia Giulia, nonché delle più prestigiose accademia italiane ed estere.

L’orchestra vanta già una fitta attività concertistica e si è esibita su alcuni dei palcoscenici più importanti della regione come il Teatro Nuovo Giovanni da Udine, il Teatro Verdi di Pordenone, Villa Manin di Passariano, la Basilica di Aquileia, il Teatro “Sociale” di Gemona del Friuli, nonché fuori Regione a Ischia (NA) e presso le Cave romane di Vinkuran in Croazia. I Filarmonici Friulani sono stati diretti, tra gli altri, dai Maestri Filippo Maria Bressan, Marco Fiorini, Walter Themel, Igor Vlainjc, e hanno collaborato con realtà musicali di rilievo come il Coro del Friuli Venezia Giulia, il Coro Glemonensis, il Coro “Vincenzo Ruffo” di Cervignano, e molte altre. Tra i solisti che hanno accompagnato l’orchestra, spiccano i talenti emergenti di Christian Sebastianutto (violino), Sebastiano Gubian (pianoforte), Alberto Gaspardo (organo), Francesco Tirelli (marimba). Inoltre, le registrazioni di alcune esecuzioni sono state riproposte all’interno del palinsesto di Rai RadioUno, Friuli Venezia Giulia. All’interno dei Filarmonici Friulani, si sono formati anche gruppi di musica da camera quali il quartetto dei solisti, il trio d’ance, il settimino e la formazione barocca. Direttore artistico e stabile è Alessio Venier, classe 1992.

Virtuoso Music: The Ultimate Place for Artists who are Unique, Different & Trendsetting

Virtuoso Music & Distribution is constantly evolving, passionately supplying artists with every opportunity to be successful. We do everything after "THAT." Description:
Since 2005, G&R started their own project producing original music for Amnesia Ibiza Chillout Sessions and Fashion TV compilations. They found the chemistry to compose original tracks which eventually would become their first album "Eyes".
Their productions record the releases "Eyes", "Travel EP", "Sound Of You - The Remixes EP", "Reflection", "Deep House Flavours" and "Soundtracks" - all works having been released by renown labels. 

Their works have been supported by:
- Pete Tong (BBC RADIO 1 –The Essential Selection Mix) supported “To Be or not To Be”
- Roger Sanchez (Release Yourself) supported “Be Mine”
- Tiësto (Classics @ Radio 538 Club Life 104) supported “To Be or not To Be”
- Carl Cox (Mix Mag UK) supported “Ego vs Ego”
- Groove Armada (DJ sets @Space Ibiza ) supported “To Be or not To Be”
- Julian Lennon (Pick of the Week on Below Zero Beats Radio) supported “End Of The Day”
- Casafonda Radio London (Music Designer)
- Radio Montecarlo Buddha Bar Web Radio (Music Designer)

BESPOKE MUSIC SERVICES
G&R Music Production is a bespoke music company which provides original tailor-made soundtracks. The accurate compositions are specially designed for the client. Experience and proficiency make their works a unique piece of music. G&R have been collaborating with film companies such as Lupetta5, Paolo Parisotto, Agherose, GPS Pictures, DB Sonar Producciones for America TV (Buenos Aires).

LIVE PERFORMANCES / DJ SET
The repertoire offers original tracks combined with live loop-sessions arranged by Gushi & Raffunk in lounge-chill-out, deep house style.
Their exhibitions are adaptable to multiple situations such as live shows, fashion events, product launches, private parties, receptions, chilling spaces and every other situation where style and proficiency are required. Ideal for fresh, intimate and comfortable ambiances.  
Their live DJ Set is mainly built wtih original samples combined with live vocal intervention, also adaptable to a more up-tempo club format.

Name: Irene Ortega Violonchelista
Description:
Irene Ortega is a talented multidisciplinary, independent and avant-garde artist. Virtuoso cellist in various genres and styles, she combines her worldwide activity as a recording artist and session musician, with that of a streamer, podcaster, content creator, specialist actress, coach, concert player, music communicator, artistic director and cultural promoter, all under her own personal brand: Irene Ortega Violonchelista - La Belleza de lo Clásico. 

Among her achievements as an entrepreneur, it is worth highlighting the launch of various musical, audiovisual, photographic, informative and pedagogical projects, such as “Irene's Patreon Family”, “Pasión del Sur”, “Sottovoce”, “Entrecorcheas”, “Irene Ortega”, and “Rincón Flamenco”; or obtaining the “Woman Explorer Award”, "Leading Concert Player & Entrepreneur of the Year (Spain)" at the Female CEO of the Year Awards 2022 by the platform CEO Monthly, and "Concert Player of the Year" at the 2022/2023 Global Awards of the platform Corporate LiveWire.

More at https://irene-ortega.es/sobre-mi-detalle/

Name: The Piano Teacher
Description:
The Piano Teacher was founded in 2011 to meet the increased demand for online resources for piano teachers in Australia and across the world. Powered by Hal Leonard Australia, TPT has grown from its modest beginnings (having less than 500 subscribers to now having over 3000) to becoming an invaluable resource for all piano teachers. The massive success of this resource was due to its founding editor, Gina Wake. Gina has consistently pulled together a range of voices and a spectrum of resources to help support Australian piano teachers in their delivery of excellence to the piano students of the world.

Production Editor – Nathan Rippon

Nathan Rippon is the Marketing manager for Hal Leonard – the Australian arm of the world’s biggest music publisher. He holds a masters/performance degree from the University of Newcastle majoring in Saxophone. He’s a dog lover and loves his wine (maybe too much) and is an avid crossfit fan…

Creative Editor – Carly McDonald

Carly McDonald is a passionate music education and business professional. A life-long curiosity for small business and an entrepreneurial spirit led her to build her music studio, Novar Music Learning Centre in 2005. In addition to teaching over 40 piano students each week, she manages 14 music teachers in 5 locations across South Australia. As the author of Creative.Piano.Professional (www.creativepianoprofessional.com), Carly provides thought leadership in early music education and is a serving council member of the Music Teachers’ Association of South Australia. Carly is the Australian Ambassador for the Piano Adventures series by Randall and Nancy Faber, a freelance music education writer, and small business coach.

Name: Digital Music Trends
Description:
Digital Music Trends produces weekly shows covering the latest news in the digital music industry as well as cool music startups and digital marketing projects. Andrea Leonelli started the show in 2009 and DMT has since covered the evolution of the digital music space with over 200 shows and 350 interviews.

The DMT News show is a panel-based podcast bringing together journalists, experts and analysts to chat about the latest news in the digital music space.

The DMT 1-2-1 show covers individual interviews with music tech startups & established companies as well as cool digital marketing agencies working on interesting music-related projects.

Name: DEUTZ-CHOR KÖLN e.V.
Description:
Bewährtes fortsetzen. Neues wagen.
Der DEUTZ-CHOR KÖLN geht neue Wege. Auf fast 75 Jahre anspruchsvolles Singen, auf bedeutende Konzerte und große Auftritte und auf intime kleine Veranstaltungen kann der DEUTZ-Chor zurückblicken. Eine Erfolgsgeschichte.

Name: DC Music Publishing
Description:
DC Music Publishing is a small full service music publisher started at the tail end of 2021 by Bristol/Manchester based Music supervisor, Podcaster and music business educator Danny Champion (thats me).

I have 20 years experience of the music business within music publishing (Sony Music Publishing, peermusic), music supervision (Soundlounge, freelance music supervisor) and other areas (The Orchard, ThreeSixZero Group). 

DC Music Publishing is here to invest in new musical talent, helping to protect their rights and look for ways to make the most from their musical assets. Being based in Bristol, South West England, I am keen to showcase and develop the many amazing up and coming talented individuals from the South West and beyond (with a slight focus on anything with a guitar in it).

I want to keep DC Music Publishing as a 'boutique' music publisher with a tight roster focusing on forging close personal relationships with the artists whilst supporting them with publishing and neighbouring rights administration as well as choice creative exploitation.

Name: Sunwrae
Description: Sunwrae is a producer, a music chamber group, an independent label and sheet music publisher for the musical works of composer Rae Howell.

Name: Terra Sounds School of Music & Arts
Description:
Terra Sounds School of Music & Arts
111 N Wabash Ave #1305, Chicago, IL
www.terrasounds.com
847.737.1850

Terra Sounds is a new concept of dynamic education in Music and Creative Arts for kids, teens, and adults based in downtown Glenview, IL. From private lessons in music, arts, and languages to multi-disciplinary group classes, music jam sessions, instrument rental and recording services, the Terra Sounds experience inspires students of all levels to realize their full potential through creativity and self-expression.

Terra Sounds School of Music and Arts invites you to try private lessons and group classes in the following disciplines: Guitar, Bass, Drums, Percussion, Saxophone, Clarinet, Trumpet, Trombone, French Horn, Flute, Violin/Viola, Piano, Music Theory, Audio Recording & Production, Jazz Improvisation, Songwriting, Ensembles, Bands (any genre), Tap Dance, Breakdance, Spanish, Italian, French, Russian, Ukrainian, Yoga, Music Meditation, Acting, Painting, Pencil Drawing, Sketching, and Color Theory.

Name: Les Sons Tissés
Description:
Les Sons Tissés est une association loi 1901 qui promeut les valeurs de la médiation de la musique. Créée en 2014 avec le Master 2 Médiation de la Musique aux universités Sorbonne-Nouvelle (Paris 3) et Sorbonne Université (Paris 4), elle est composée des étudiants et anciens étudiants de ce master, d'autres masters de médiation culturelle  et de professionnels de la médiation. Elle est ouverte à toute personne intéressée par les missions de la médiation de la musique.

Notre mission est de créer des liens solides entre les différentes promotions et de promouvoir la médiation musicale sous toutes ses formes.

Nos actions principales incluent :

Ateliers de médiation : faciliter les échanges entre diverses musiques, pratiques et publics.

Événements culturels : organiser des concerts, jam sessions et DJ sets pour mettre en lumière la création musicale.

Rencontres et tables rondes : contribuer à la professionnalisation des médiateur·rice·s en offrant des espaces d'échange et de partage.

Nos valeurs fondamentales sont la démocratie culturelle, l'horizontalité, l'invitation à la participation, la sensibilité artistique, l'humilité, la créativité, la transmission des connaissances et l'adaptabilité.

Rejoignez-nous pour tisser ensemble le futur de la médiation musicale !

Name: Aramusique
Description:
L’ARAM est un organisme à but non lucratif présent à Repentigny depuis 25 ans. L’association présente une programmation annuelle de musique de concert ainsi qu’un concours de musique pour les jeunes talents en musique classique.
 
La mission de l'ARAM, c’est de faire rayonner la musique de concert dans Lanaudière et de faire reconnaître le talent, l’effort et l’excellence des jeunes musiciens classiques.
 
Pour l’ARAM, soutenir ces jeunes artistes signifie beaucoup plus qu’une aide financière. En effet, parmi les séries proposées dans la programmation, une est dédiée aux jeunes artistes professionnels en musique classique. D’ailleurs, plusieurs anciens gagnants du concours figurent au programme au côté de grands artistes connus.

Name: Blue Buddha Entertainment
Description:
Established in 2002, Blue Buddha Entertainment specializes in sync placement for independent artists and labels, serving as a premier conduit for contemporary groundbreaking artists and repertoire. Blue Buddha’s diverse catalog is current, hit-driven, and reflects the highest level of artistry and production, providing One Stop Rep. music with a global tastemaker appeal.   Past sync placements include: Shrinking, Found, All American, This Is Us, Supreme Models, Lost, Atlanta, 4400, All American Homecoming, Criminal Minds, Chicago P.D, Grey's Anatomy, New Amsterdam, Las Vegas, Dirt, One Tree Hill, Smallville, Party of Five, NCIS- Los Angeles, Californication, The Fosters, Pivoting, Good Trouble, The Sinner, Bull, Kung Fu, Vanderpump Rules, To All The Boys, Shameless, Charmed, Royal Pains & others. 

With over 27 years of experience in the music industry, Charles' passion in the sync space is coupled with a focus on artist development, helping artists hone their musical craft in an ever-changing entertainment world.  Starting out at The Right Stuff/EMI-Capitol Records (North America), in the Marketing & Radio Promotions Department, Charles worked on the marketing and promotional campaigns for the back catalogs of Hi Records (Al Green, Ann Peeples); Philly International Records (Lou Rawls, Teddy Pendergrass); and Solar Records (The Whispers, Lakeside). Charles’ most notable work includes marketing Al Green’s platinum-selling Greatest Hits album and other high profile reissues from Nils Lofgren, Harley Davidson Road Songs, and Ringo Starr. In addition, Charles helped sync songs for Natalie Walker, Lenka, Flora Cash, Skyler Stonestreet and others who went on to sign Major label/Publishing deals. More at: https://linktr.ee/bluebuddhaent

Name: LAB Exposure
Description:
We’re a design, creative media and marketing agency from the team behind LAB Records. We love to create, make, design, film, photograph and come up with creative ways to sell your music. We use our insight into the music industry to help bands and record labels fully engage with their fans, and grab the attention of record labels, managers and promoters.

We help musicians and record labels communicate and engage with their audience by providing services that are necessary within today’s music industry. These range from web design to music videos, from photoshoots to marketing ideas for your latest release. Our background of running a record label means that we have a unique understanding of what artists, bands and labels need – if you have an idea, we’d love to be involved.

Name: Chicago Composers Orchestra
Description: The Chicago Composers Orchestra is dedicated to the performance and advocacy of orchestral music by living composers. The orchestra works to expand the art form and engage the Chicago community through innovative programming, low cost concerts, and a vibrant and welcoming concert atmosphere. It brings the best in contemporary orchestral music to its audiences by connecting with the next generation of emerging artists. In doing so, it seeks to reinvigorate the orchestra experience for performers, composers, and audiences alike, and to create a sense of excitement around contemporary orchestral music throughout Chicago.

Name: Composify
Description: We connect songwriters, artists and music fans to discover the next hit!

Name: SSTM
Description:
The biggest frustration in music creation is never finishing ideas. Most Beatmakers, Songwriters and Producers have thousands of unfinished tracks that never make it past an initial phrase, loop or hook. There is a sea of different sound packs, samples and software available on the market. However, it can become overwhelming, complicated, and distracting during the music creation process to go through  all your options manually. Nothing on the market is specifically designed to work with the music creator to help complete their ideas intuitively, organically and professionally. Utilising the power of AI to empower, not replace the music creator.

SSTM is the world’s first AI-powered music production platform. SSTM is an integrated hardware and software product concept that intuitively creates song structures. The software is powered by the feature-rich SSTM controller, creating an immersive and tactile user experience that propels productivity for beatmakers, songwriters, composers and every music maker in between. A studio centerpiece and creation hub, SSTM integrates seamlessly with any DAW as a VST or Audio Unit (AU) or can be used in standalone mode. SSTM is the bridge between music ideation and completion.

Our product concept is an iF Design Awards 2021 winner and 2021 Muse Design Awards (silver) winner.

Name: The Church Musician's Assistant
Description: We are committed to providing the education, resources, and support necessary for church musicians to inspire and empower their communities through music ministry!

Name: Aizhana Nurkenova - Composer for Film & Media | Concert Pianist
Description:
Aizhana Nurkenova is a British-Kazakh composer and pianist whose work spans film, television, opera, and the concert stage. Recent highlights include Ether, selected for La Cinef at the 78th Cannes Film Festival (2025), and the award-winning audio drama The Great Goose Migration, which received a Gold Medal at the New York Radio Festival. Her music has been performed and broadcast internationally, from the UK and Italy to Kazakhstan and Australia. 
 
Aizhana is currently completing advanced studies in composing for screen at the National Film and Television School (NFTS). She previously trained in piano performance at the Royal Academy of Music, where she earned a Master’s degree and the prestigious Hodgson Piano Fellowship. Praised by International Piano Magazine for performances described as “exhilarating” and “singing to heaven,” she brings the same depth and expressive range to her compositions. Aizhana combines musical craftsmanship with a deep respect for storytelling, creating music that resonates on both emotional and intellectual levels.

Name: NPdrums
Description: Empresa especializada en todo tipo de instrumentos musicales de percusión.

Name: Los Bonnitos
Description:
LOS BONNITOS surgió a fines de 2012, cuando un grupo de amigos del club de rugby CASI de San Isidro, provincia de Buenos Aires, decidió reunirse a tocar cumbia para darle una sorpresa en su casamiento a un amigo, apodado “El Bonito”. Después de ese exitoso primer show, comenzaron a presentarse en distintos lugares de Buenos Aires y rápidamente se dieron a conocer a nivel nacional.
Los Bonnitos interpretan en versión cumbia los grandes hits de diversos géneros musicales. El éxito masivo llegó de la mano de su primer single “Cae el sol”, su versión del tema de Airbag que inmediatamente se convirtió en un himno de los viajes de egresados y en protagonista de todas las fiestas, boliches y eventos masivos.
A fines de 2014 editaron su primer disco “Sigamos Bailando”, que incluyó sus hits “Cae el sol” y “Dile”, su primer tema propio.
A mediados de 2015, habiéndose ya posicionado como la banda argentina de cumbia-pop con mayor crecimiento luego de su debut discográfico, presentaron su exitoso single “Fantasmas” y nuevo álbum “Dame la mano”, que incluyo tres temas propios: “Dame la mano”, “Baila baila” y “Lejos de aquí”.
A lo largo de sus 4 años, Los Bonnitos se han presentado en importantes venues como el Estadio Luna Park, DIRECTV Arena y Arena Maipú Stadium. Además, conquistaron otros países como Uruguay, Paraguay y Chile, convirtiendo cada lugar en una fiesta para cantar y bailar.

Name: Wentworth Music
Description:
Family owned and operated for over 50 years, Wentworth Music has been a household name in the Okanagan valley for generations of musicians young and old. What began as private music lessons being taught out the back of Capri House of Lights over four decades ago has become the BC Interior's largest one stop music store offering nearly anything you can think of musically.  Only here will you find Kelowna’s largest selection of name brand musical instruments, full service repair shop and lessons all wrapped up in one amazing store.  Guitars, Amps, Drums, Pianos, Keyboards, Microphones, Pro Audio, Lighting, Accessories, Strings, Band and Orchestral Instruments are only a few of the many things you will find here.

...Think music, think Wentworth.

Name: Dream Big Studios
Description: Dream Big Studios! is a multi-media company focused on local musicians and businesses. Dream Big Studios was founded in 2015 in Denver, Colorado. The whole purpose of Dream Big Studios was to help up-and-coming musicians, and local companies build a solid foundation. The owner has over 20 years of experience in Music Production/Development and an artistic view on Branding/Business Development.

Name: Choral Scholars of University College Dublin
Description:
The Choral Scholars of University College Dublin, under the artistic direction of Desmond Earley, is Ireland’s leading collegiate choral ensemble. With a large repertoire ranging from art to popular music, and stretching from the medieval to the contemporary in style, this choir gives many concerts throughout the academic year, both in Ireland and abroad. Following a competitive selection process each September, eighteen gifted students are awarded a scholarship, with recipients of the award coming from a range of academic disciplines across the university, from Music to Medicine, Law, Agricultural Science, Commerce and Engineering.

The choir regularly broadcasts on Irish television and radio. Since its formation in 1999, the group frequently performs with orchestras, including the RTÉ Concert Orchestra, the Earley Musicke Ensemble and the European Union Chamber Orchestra, and on the university campus with the UCD Symphony Orchestra and Philharmonic Choir. In touring Holland, Hungary, Italy, Luxembourg, the United Kingdom and the United States of America the group has brought UCD and its music to an international audience.

The performance of works by living composers is a hallmark of this ensemble. New compositions have been written for the group by Ivo Antognini, Desmond Earley, Michael McGlynn and Bill Whelan. In March 2019 they performed at Carnegie Hall, NYC, and on CBS Sunday Morning with Jane Pauley. 

The Choral Scholars released their bestselling debut international recording on Signum Records on 11th December 2015. The disc, entitled Invisible Stars is an enchanting collection of traditional and contemporary choral music from Ireland and Scotland and features new compositions by some of Ireland’s most celebrated composers for choir, including Michael McGlynn, Brendan Graham, Bill Whelan and the group’s artistic director, Desmond Earley. This wonderful showcase of Irish choral music is available on Amazon and iTunes now.

Name: Sonolize
Description:
Our dream is to create one place for composers and musicians to meet, with a fair price for the composer, where you can easily download the music with a mouse click.
A new generation platform, easy, digital, independent and with a high-quality offer. At Sonolize it's all about music, the makers and the players. We love to help you to find each other quickly. 

Het is onze droom om een plek te creëren waar componisten en muzikanten elkaar vinden, met een eerlijke prijs voor de componist en waar je makkelijk bladmuziek kunt downloaden met een muisklik. 
Een platform voor de nieuwe generatie, digitaal, onafhankelijk en met aanbod van hoge kwaliteit aanbod. Bij Sonolize draait het om muziek, om de makers en de spelers. Wij helpen jullie graag om elkaar snel te vinden.

Name: Balute Inc.
Description: Balute is the creator of eTar technology for producing state-of-the-art string music instruments that are fully digital. The technology has so far emerged in the form of electronic ukulele as well as electronic Persian Setar, both of which are small, light and portable.

Name: Berk Music Productions
Description:
Berk Music Productions – Het Gezelligste platenlabel van Nederland
Bij Berk Music Productions draait alles om passie, gezelligheid en muziek die mensen samenbrengt. Al meer dan 20 jaar zijn wij hét platenlabel van Nederland waar de leukste feestmuziek en de mooiste Nederlandstalige nummers worden gemaakt. Onze missie is simpel: Mensen samenbrengen met de leukste feestmuziek en mooiste Nederlandstalige hits. Als dé specialist in feestmuziek en Nederlandstalige hits werken we met trots samen met enkele van de meest geliefde artiesten van Nederland. Van vrolijke meezingers tot ontroerende ballads en alles wat daartussen zit. Maar Berk Music Productions is meer dan alleen een platenlabel – we zijn een full-service muziekpartner.

Alles onder één dak
Bij Berk Music Productions bieden we een totaalpakket aan diensten. Van het ontdekken en begeleiden van nieuw talent tot het managen van gevestigde artiesten: we zorgen ervoor dat elke artiest zich volledig kan richten op wat zij het beste doen – muziek maken. Ons team regelt de boekingen, evenementenorganisatie, publishing, social media-content en management. Dit betekent dat onze artiesten en klanten bij ons terecht kunnen voor alles wat ze nodig hebben om hun carrière of evenement naar een hoger niveau te tillen.

Jouw Partner in Muziek en Entertainment
Naast onze passie voor muziek zijn we ook specialisten in het organiseren van onvergetelijke evenementen. Of je nu een intiem feest plant of een grootschalig evenement organiseert, ons ervaren team zorgt voor een vlekkeloze productie en de perfecte muzikale invulling. Met onze uitgebreide kennis van de muziekindustrie en ons warme netwerk van artiesten kunnen we aan elke wens voldoen.

Maak het feest compleet!
Ben jij op zoek naar muziek die jouw evenement of carrière onvergetelijk maakt? Neem vandaag nog contact op met Berk Music Productions en ontdek hoe wij jouw muzikale dromen waarmaken. Gezelligheid, kwaliteit en vakmanschap komen bij ons samen onder één dak!

The orchestra is comprised of volunteer musicians from eclectic professional backgrounds including science, arts, media, technology, medicine, and finance, with members employed by leading corporate and community organizations.

Name: Svaram Sound Experience
Description: SVARAM Musical Instruments was initiated in 2003 as a grassroot community development project in the field of Musical Instrument Craft, Research and Socio-Cultural Development. Initially started as a vocational opportunity for youth at risk, it has been adopted by the UN Initiative “Music as a Global Resource” in 2011. SVARAM finds international recognition for its pioneering work in applied studies into matter-sound-consciousness and models an exemplary approach of a participatory community enterprise. With a team of 43 artisans, trainees and professionals we manufacture a unique range of over 80 musical instruments and sound installations. Our cultural programs reach the local, national and international arena.

Description:

Anyone who believes a cowboy or cowgirl is someone who is against status quo is welcome. We value freedom of creativity and collaboration above all. As a result, we are a family of the best talent, music, and fans in the business."
 – Ronnie Dunn

Name: ArtistPro
Description:
ArtistPro | Unlocking Creative Identity & Sustainable Success

At ArtistPro, we believe that being a professional artist is a form of discipline—one that balances creative expression with strategic execution. Founded by music industry veteran Hisham Dahud, ArtistPro is a platform dedicated to helping musicians, producers, and creative professionals build authentic, long-lasting careers by aligning their artistic identity with sustainable business practices.

Through a unique blend of coaching, consulting, and education, ArtistPro provides artists with the tools, structure, and mindset needed to transform their creative passions into thriving careers. At the same time, we help music tech startups, brands, and companies develop artist-first strategies that resonate authentically with musicians and fans alike.

What We Offer

 For Artists: Coaching, workshops, and resources designed to uncover your identity, sharpen your craft, and build a sustainable music career.
 For Music Companies & Brands: Strategic consulting for music tech startups, industry brands, and businesses looking to engage artists in meaningful, value-driven ways.
 Live Events & Workshops: Thought-provoking discussions and hands-on experiences designed to elevate creative professionals in the modern music industry.

Our Philosophy

ArtistPro isn’t just about growing numbers or chasing trends—it’s about helping artists build careers with purpose and longevity. Our artist-first approach is rooted in creativity, business alignment, and structured discipline, ensuring both artists and industry professionals thrive in an ever-evolving landscape.

Name: Bob Dylan Gifts & Merchandise, Inc.
Description: Bob Dylan fanatics, you are just in luck! DylanTree.com offers the best and the widest selection of Bob Dylan music items and other related merchandise. We give you the best quality products at affordable prices. If you're looking for classic, hard-to-find Bob Dylan albums and singles, we have them here at DylanTree.com. You can even choose from our collection of CDs, DVDs, VHS, and Vinyl recordings. You won't be able to find these vintage items just anywhere. We also have Bob Dylan inspired clothing like t-shirts, sweatshirts and hats which feature various images and prints of the legendary artist. Collectors will have a great time browsing through the rest of our Bob Dylan memorabilia including artwork, blankets, buttons, games and toys, glasses and mugs, keychains, mouse pads, posters, and stickers. Store owner Camila Belle, decided to put up a store dedicated to her idol, and that's when DylanTree.com came into life.

Name: Pitchbend
Description:
Pitchbend is a custom music service specializing in commercial music production and audio branding.  We launched this service to create music that helps businesses, brands, and creators tell their own unique stories.  Whether it be for digital content, film/television, or podcasts, our goal is to provide the perfect musical identity for your project.

For the better part of the last decade, Nick Schubert and Mark Stewart have worked together to write and produce a wide array of music for commercial projects, as well as for their own bands and recording projects.  As multi-instrumentalists and longtime collaborators, they thrive on creating music to help others express themselves.  They formed Pitchbend to make music that helps others tell their own unique stories.  

As performers, they have toured extensively together and shared stages across North America with the likes of Blondie, Lizzo, Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark (OMD), Polyphonic Spree, The Sounds, and The 1975 among others.  As recording artists, they have written and produced music released by Roll Call Records and Cleopatra Records.  Their music has been licensed and featured in commercial work for Victoria’s Secret, Mercedes, Allure, HBO, AMC and MTV.

Name: Crowd Music
Description:
Crowd Music is a Music Distribution Company that is driven to bring 
the Value back to the Music Industry by paying Creatives fairly, as well as paying Music Fans who share and promote their favorite artists, songwriters and bands.

Name: The Choir of St John's College, Cambridge
Description:
The Choir of St John’s College, Cambridge is one of the finest collegiate choirs in the world – known and loved by millions from its broadcasts, concert tours and over 100 recordings. Founded in the 1670s, the Choir is known for its distinctive rich, warm sound, its expressive interpretations and its breadth of repertoire. Alongside these musical characteristics, the Choir is particularly proud of its happy, relaxed and mutually supportive atmosphere. The Choir is directed by Christopher Gray, who follows a long line of eminent musicians including George Guest, Christopher Robinson, David Hill, and Andrew Nethsingha.

The Choir’s primary purpose is to enhance the liturgy and worship at seven services each week during term time in the College’s beautiful Gilbert Scott Chapel. The group has a vast repertoire spanning over 500 years, with a special interest in championing new music. In recent decades, there have been commissions from most of the UK’s leading composers of choral music, as well as from numerous early-career artists in Cambridge and elsewhere.

The Choir has a busy touring schedule in the UK and abroad, with regular appearances at many of the world’s most prestigious concert halls and churches.

There is a rich recording heritage with over 100 albums released over the last six decades. A wide variety of content is available online including webcasts of services and live-streamed video broadcasts on various platforms.

Name: Contemporary Youth Orchestra
Description:
The CYO Experience

Educating and inspiring young musicians through exceptional musical training, unique performance opportunities, and high-quality educational programming.
Contemporary Youth Orchestra is committed to the study and performance of exclusively contemporary and new orchestral music, with a focus on introducing students to careers in the creative arts industries. 

CYO defines contemporary repertoire as music written in the last 100 years, and we have a distinct interest in performing new music. CYO frequently commissions new works and seeks out adventurous programming opportunities.

Description: Bienvenue à l’Orchestre des jeunes du Mont-Royal, où on vous offre la possibilité de jouer de la grande musique en compagnie d’autres jeunes musiciens sympathiques. Sous la direction de chefs dévoués et passionnés vous préparerez des concerts de très haut niveau. C’est une façon captivante et enthousiasmante d’apprendre et de nourrir votre passion pour les grands classiques du répertoire orchestral.

Name: MelodyPipe AS
Description:
MelodyPipe is the networking platform for the music industry. Book, collaborate, explore, discover, and show off your talent, venue or skills.

MelodyPipe is a Norwegian tech company based in Stavanger. Originally founded by musician Odd Erik Ognedal, the company is currently a team of 10 music lovers, dedicated to creating a better and easier life for the many musicians in the world.
In 2020, Jesper Ugland entered as the new CEO, and the company has later received funding from Innovation Norway and investors. The platform is currently undergoing beta testing, and we would love to invite all artists, musicians, venues or music lovers to be a part of it!

Name: Minnesota Music Coalition

FaderPro is an emerging leader in online video based training courses that teach the art of music production. FaderPro gives users an “all access” pass into the studio of top industry professionals to learn how they achieve their success in the studio. We feature the highest quality videos shot in full HD giving our users the point of view as if they are sitting shotgun, working with the best!

Our mission is to be the premier online training resource for aspiring musicians and producers offering the fastest, most efficient way to learn the art of modern music making.

Description: Die 375 Media GmbH mit Sitz in Hamburg ist der Rundum-Dienstleister für den Vertrieb, das Marketing und die Platzierung von physischen Medien im europäischen Handel. NÄR MELLANSNACKET ÄR HUVUDSAKEN!

Du har varit på hundratals företagsträffar och deltagit i en massa nätverk. Du vet att det är i mellansnacket det händer.

Perfect strangers launched their online school of music in August 2020 to an overwhelming response from fans , parents and well-wishers alike. The school boasts of a strength of 150 students across 9 countries in 6 months.

Name: Lux Amoris
Description:
Depuis 2018, Lux Amoris est une association de loi 1901 porteur d'un double objectif : promouvoir le chant sacré au sein de la liturgie catholique et former les chanteurs qui le désirent à servir l'Eglise par cette même liturgie.

Plusieurs activités s'articulent autour de ces deux buts :
- Le choeur liturgique Lux Amoris : première activité de l'association, en date et en effectifs (35 choristes).
- L'Ecole Lux Amoris : fondée en septembre 2021, elle propose des cours dispensés par des professionnels aux musiciens désirant se former.
- La route Lux Amoris : une randonnée estivale de deux semaines pour chanter au grand air et promouvoir chant sacré dans des paroisses rurales.
- La retraite Lux Amoris : une semaine dans un monastère au moment du nouvel an, pour se ressourcer et se former au chant de la liturgie des heures.

Name: Rastrelli Cello Quartet
Description:
"These four players showed some of the best qualities of the venerated Russian cello tradition, namely lustrous tone combined with soulful expression" 
A singularly unique ensemble, the Rastrelli Cello Quartet has been thrilling audiences with their renderings of non-traditional programming since 2002. 
Kira Kraftzoff - artistic director, Misha Degtjareff Kirill Timofeev and Sergio Drabkin formed the ensemble with a mission to perform music “between the genres,” and their widely varied programs mix comfortably works by Bach, Saint-Saens  and Tchaikovsky with that of George Gershwin, Dave Brubeck and Leroy Anderson.  The name of the Quartet is taken from the eighteenth-century architect Bartholomew Rastrelli, who designed the Hermitage in St. Petersburg, the home city of three of the four Quartet members.

The Rastrelli have performed in many of Europe’s great concert halls, including the Gasteig in Munich, Konzerthaus Vienna, Concertgebouw Amsterdam, St. Petersburg’s Philharmonic Hall, Bulgaria Hall Sofia, the Liederhalle Stuttgart, Leiszhall Hamburg und Mariinsky Theater St. Petersburg.   In addition to concert tours in Europe, the USA and Russia, the Rastrelli performs at such summer music festivals as the Beethoven Festival Bonn, Schleswig-Holstein Music Festival, Darmstadter Festspiele, Branderburgische Sommerkonzerte, Oberstdorfer Musiksommer, Hohenlohe Kultursommer, Rheingau Musikfestival, Ohridsko Leto (Macedonia) and the Meadowlark Music Festival USA, cooperated with Giora Feidman, David Geringas and Gilles Apap.
Broadcasted by: NBC, SWR, BR, HR, ABC, Chicago Classic FM and many others.

The Rastrelli Quartet currently has five recordings (Rastrelli, Volumes 1-5) on the Solo Musica, TonArt and Manchester labels, as well as a 2015 release "Cello Effect" on the German label Genuin Classics.

Name: RE:SET. music production & experiences
Description:
RE:SET. creates music for soundmarks, documentaries, movies, apps, multimedia, commercials, jingles and much more.
RE:SET. only works with top musicians and their real sound. Durable and excellent.

RE:SET. is a musical collaboration between Andre Heuvelman and Frans de Rond, two greats from the Dutch music world.
Andre was the solo trumpet player of the Rotterdam Philharmonic Orchestra and the Netherlands Wind Ensemble for 30 years. Now a cultural entrepreneur, performer, speaking and creator / producer. Besides that he has the talent to touch people deeply with his trumpet by playing straight from his heart, he is convinced that music as a means is many times stronger than as a product. Music that comes in without knocking touches and allows people to connect with themselves and others.

Frans has made his mark with the recording and editing of music in the broadest sense of the word. He is also a valued and in-demand technician for the production of radio drama.

Together Frans and Andre know how to realize music productions that touch people. Both musically and sound-technical.

Name: A-R Editions
Description:
A-R Editions provides focused expertise to create high-quality products that support the scholarship, performance, and enjoyment of music.

A-R Editions’ rich history stretches back to Yale University, 1962, when two former college roommates—Gary Aamodt and Clyde Rykken (the A and the R of A-R Editions)—had the vision to create a publishing outlet for the research of musicologists who had come to the U.S. after World War II. Thus began the Recent Researches in Music concept—to publish modern, well-edited editions of outstanding music from the past. We have since grown to become internationally recognized for our expertise in music publishing. Our music publications can be found in almost every university music library and in major collections around the world.

Our strength is in bringing forward from the past works by composers who are not as well-known as Bach, Beethoven, and Mozart but who had the talent and drive to make significant contributions to the development of Western music. This repertoire includes works from long before the printing press or any commercially available sheet music. The foundation of our publications remains the Recent Researches in Music series, which include music from every style period in the history of Western music. Contents are chosen from proposals submitted by researchers from all over the world based on historical significance, musical quality, and their value to scholars and performers. Each new volume includes discussions of historical context and performance practice. Our staff musicologists and engravers provide a level of peer review and production excellence that rivals any in the world. 

Today you can find our music in traditional library-bound volumes made to last a hundred years and also in digital print format. No matter what form it takes, you know that you can rely on the care we put into making each note accurate and each page readable.

Name: Sourcetone, LLC
Description:
Sourcetone is a music-health company that has been researching the many
health benefits of music since 2004. Our research teams have worked in
tandem with Harvard Medical School on finding new ways in which music can
benefit health conditions (e.g. anxiety, stress), moods (e.g. happiness,
relaxation), and activities (e.g. exercise, sleep, studying).

Market research indicates that the growth in usage of alternative/natural
forms of medicine has far outpaced that of traditional drugs in the last
decade. As a response to this demand, Sourcetone has developed a
technology, unlike any other, to deliver music as a tool for healthy
living. Beyond studies on the psychological and neurological effects of
music derived from test subjects at Harvard Medical School, we also
incorporate data received from the mood-enhancing playlists that listeners
are able to interact with on our research beta website 
(www.sourcetone.com). This ongoing research is focused on developing music
channels and services that will change the way people listen to music and

Name: XJ music
Description:
XJ music sets a new standard in video game music tools that sustains the human touch. Using XJ music, composers can realize adaptive soundscapes that push the boundaries of what video game music can achieve.

The belief that music is human is at the heart of XJ music's philosophy. The platform works as a plugin to industry-standard video game audio frameworks such as FMOD or Wwise and engines such as Unreal or Unity. Existing tools solve the game’s overall audio mix, especially background environments and sound effects, leaving composers to hack together music solutions from unwieldy constructs. However, XJ music is a purpose-built music composition workstation and playback engine.

The XJ music workstation is now generally available for Windows, Mac OS, and Linux.

Name: Riverside Symphony
Description:
Widely acclaimed for bringing a unique musical perspective to New York City audiences, Riverside Symphony’s performances at Alice Tully Hall, Lincoln Center and seven CDs confirm “discovery” as the orchestra’s guiding credo. Innovative programs combining lesser-known gems both old and new with beloved masterpieces also shine the spotlight on young soloists of exceptional promise.

Drawing on the legendary breadth and depth of New York City’s freelance musical community, conductor George Rothman and composer Anthony Korf, who co-founded the orchestra in 1981, have forged a team of supremely accomplished instrumentalists, comfortable with music in an amazingly wide range of styles and periods.

Beyond its success in the concert hall, Riverside Symphony is also well known for its citywide educational efforts. Since 1999, the orchestra has brought the joys of music to New York City public schools with its enriching Music Memory program, while engaging adults with its popular Salon Series and Hear Hear! preview performances.

Every day we would pretty much Youtube search ‘Nasheed Backgrounds’ or ‘Halal Background tracks’ until we found what we wanted. There were times where we couldn’t find any soundtracks that met our requirement which made us realise there was a huge gap in the market for content creators and artists, so we came up with an idea...Halal Beats.

Our Vision

Our vision is to provide content creators with the perfect sound solution for their projects. From film making to YouTubers to Artists and more. We aim to be the go to platform for vocal only and vocal & daf beats/soundtracks!

Behind the name

The word "halal" is an Arabic word which means "permissible". When we decided to create this solution for content creators we believed that this was the perfect name to attract anybody that wanted to use vocal only soundtracks. We also offer a vocal & daf or duf version of the beat too beats for their content. Halal beats take no responsibility in religious guidance and belief in regards to the permissibility in Islam of the audio created. The audio is to be used under your own discretion within the terms and conditions of HalalBeats.

Name: The Girl Choir of South Florida
Description:
The Girl Choir of South Florida was founded on March 21, 2005, in response to the need for a choral music program sensitive to girls’ unique needs and abilities.  

Since that time, the Girl Choir has become a pillar of choral music education and performance for girls and young women ages 6-18 in South Florida. Led by Artistic Director and founding member Sylvia Aycock, GCSF’s artistic staff bring decades of award-winning professional educational experience in voice, theory, movement, and performance to the curriculum. 

A high-quality music education is at the foundation of the Girl Choir’s unique sound. Our multi-level program of ensembles gives each chorister sight-reading, ear training, and vocal production skills while developing artistry and teamwork.  We provide a graded, multi-level music theory instruction program to our singers, aimed at developing general musicianship skills as well as choral performance skills. Comprised of multiple ensembles (Primes Choir, Mezzo Choir, Concert Choir, and Chamber Singers), our program affords girls of all ages and skill levels an opportunity to participate and improve their technique. 

Each season, all choristers participate in major performance events in the fall and spring, as well as numerous private, community, and charitable events. Girl Choir ensembles have toured internationally, performed in choral music festivals, appeared on television, participated in productions by Florida Grand Opera, and performed at the White House.

Name: Oakville Chamber Orchestra
Description:
Since 1984, the Oakville Chamber Orchestra (OCO) has presented ensemble music featuring favourite classics, contemporary music, and rare gems in intimate settings. Originally founded as a group of amateur string players, the OCO has steadily grown in size, and quality to become the well-loved and community orchestra it is today. Audiences and critics resoundingly agree that our musical quality has never been better.

OUR MISSION
The OCO exists to enhance the quality of life for all Oakville residents by providing high quality, meaningful chamber music experiences. We do so by offering high value, accessible concerts and outreach programs to a diverse audience. We provide professional development for promising, high potential musicians, including our core musicians and participants in our annual Youth Concert Competition, to grow & train in a healthy, creative environment.

OUR VISION
Our vision is to create exceptional experiences where passion, chamber music, and community come together.

Support for our progress has come from a volunteer Board of Directors first set up in 1997 under then President, Chuck Havill, who has been ardently involved in the Oakville arts scene for many years. Many other board members also have donated their time and energy, as well as business, organizational, and creative skills to the behind-the-scenes operations of the Orchestra; we continue to rely upon the efforts and expertise of volunteers.

In recent years, Gerry Wilson has been instrumental to our continued growth through numerous individual donations and through the Oakville Community Foundation. Her contributions allow the OCO to continue striving for excellence.

We thank our valued audience members from Oakville, Burlington, Mississauga, Milton and abroad for being a part of our journey. You, the audience are what fuels our passion for presenting great music in intimate and immersive settings.

Name: Digital Music Distribution
Description:
Digital Music Distribution (Dimudi bvba), la société fondatrice de Xmusix, a démarrée ses activités en 2005 sur la base d’une vision unique : rendre la musique accessible et abordable pour tous de façon légale.

Dimudi offre ainsi un accès à toute la musique qu’il vous faut, tel un service proposé à un prix fixe mensuel, comme d’autres services d’intérêt général que sont Internet, la téléphonie, etc…

En complément, Dimudi a développé le Xmusix Player qui est un logiciel qui permet de gérer son ambiance musicale à partir de plus d’une centaine de playlistes élaborées par des professionnels et d’un agenda de programmation diffusant automatiquement, aux heures souhaitées, les ambiances musicales sélectionnées.

L’atout majeur de la société est sa base de données musicales légales qui contient aujourd’hui près de 65 000 titres auxquels nous ajoutons plus de 500 titres par mois selon l’actualité musicale et les demandes spécifiques de nos clients.

Chaque titre est doté de nombreux paramètres attribués manuellement par nos experts musicaux. Cela permet à nos clients d’accédez facilement à la musique qu’il leur faut à travers des classements et des paramètres de recherche précis et adaptés. Grâce à ceci, créez ses propres compilations devient beaucoup plus rapide.

Nous avons élaborés certaines playlistes afin qu’elles correspondent aux besoins particuliers de nos clients tels que «détente resto », « relaxation », « terrasse ensoleillée », « Top des Clubs », « Foot/Rugby », « St Valentin », etc... 
D’autre part, nous intégrons des paramètres régionaux afin de créer des programmes adaptés : « Danses latines », « Soirée Bretonne », « Fête Savoyarde »…

Notre expertise couvrent aujourd’hui la totalité des types d’établissements Cafés, Hôtels, Restaurants mais aussi les commerces, les centres de relaxation, de loisirs, de sports, les salons de coiffure, etc... 

Dimudi a aujourd’hui installé ses solutions dans près de 1000 établissements en Europe.

Name: Nationale Koren | Dutch National Youth Choirs
Description:
De Nationale Koren – Stichting Vocaal Talent Nederland
De Nationale Koren, georganiseerd door Stichting Vocaal Talent Nederland vanuit de stad Utrecht, vormen een toonaangevend platform voor jong vocaal talent van 6 tot 29 jaar. De vier koren, het Nationaal Kinderkoor, Nationaal Jongenskoor, Nationaal Gemengd Jeugdkoor en Nationaal Vrouwen Jeugdkoor, bieden jonge zangers een intensieve muzikale en vocale opleiding en podiumervaring op het hoogste niveau, in Nederland en daarbuiten. Ruim 230 kinderen en jongeren volgen wekelijkse zanglessen bij een team van gespecialiseerde docenten door het hele land en komen maandelijks samen tijdens repetitiedagen voor verfijning van het repertoire en de koorklank met het hele koor. Naast koortraining biedt de stichting ook opleidingsplekken voor solisten en opleidingskoren voor de jongste kinderen. 
De Nationale Kinder- en Jeugdkoren maken onderdeel uit van het “Jong Oranje” van de klassieke muziek in Nederland. 

De vier koren en solisten werkten mee aan talloze concertproducties, opera’s, oratoria en orkestwerken, zowel in Nederland als in het buitenland, en traden op met gerenommeerde koren en orkesten, waaronder het Koninklijk Concertgebouworkest, het Radio Filharmonisch Orkest, het Budapest Festival Orchestra, het Venice Baroque Orchestra en de Berliner Philharmoniker. Ook stonden zij onder leiding van internationaal vermaarde dirigenten, zoals Sir Simon Rattle, Bernard Haitink, Nikolaus Harnoncourt, Yannick Nézet-Séguin en Iván Fischer. Het Nationaal Vrouwen Jeugdkoor werd in 2023 bekroond met de Young Talent Award van het Concertgebouw. De koren en solisten zijn regelmatig te horen via radio en tv, en leverden een muzikale bijdrage aan Nationale Herdenkingen. 

De artistieke leiding berust bij László Nemes en Irene Verburg, die tevens de functie van directeur-bestuurder bekleedt. Onder hun leiding zet de stichting zich met passie in voor haar missie: het opsporen en tot bloei brengen van jong vocaal talent in Nederland.

Description:
Established in 2016, Quality Goods Records was founded by the creator and tastemaker UZ to push the best in cutting-edge bass and trap music. With a desire to handpick both raw and recognized talent and nurture it through the platform, fast-forward to 2019 and the label has an incredible roster of artists.

The likes of Rome Fortune, Stooki Sound, Nitti Gritti, Hydraulix, Oski, TYNAN, ATLiens, Montell2099, Foreign Beggars and Kevin Flum can all be counted as associate artists – not to mention the label being home to UZ’s most recent releases.

At over 27 million total Spotify streams and over 10 million plays on SoundCloud, it’s clear to see that Quality Goods have been turning heads since their inception. 2017 took the QGR team across North America on a fifteen-date tour, featuring shows from UZ, Oski and ATLiens amongst others.

The label has been showcasing its eclectic sounds in 2018. In March and September they took over ‘Space Yacht’ at Sound Nightclub for two sold out shows, the latter being live-streamed by All Trap Music. May saw the team’s own show at Avalon Nightclub in LA for ‘Control,’ with appearances from UZ, Stooki Sound, sumthin sumthin, Rome Fortune and Bok Nero. 

Regularly releasing singles, EPs, remixes and annual various artist compilations, Quality Goods Records is thriving. Be sure to get onboard as they continue to develop and dominate in 2019 – the family has another big year ahead.

A sa création en 2012, Made of Music est une entreprise de management d’artiste. Depuis plusieurs années, avec l’émission « Made of Music live »,

grâce à son réseau qui est le reflet de plus 25 ans 
d’expérience dans le domaine.

Sa passion incontestable pour la musique lui a permis d’exercer différents métiers dans le milieu artistique, que ce soit en tant que réalisateur artistique, producteur et remixeur mais aussi comme coach vocal, compositeur et manager de festivals. Il a pu et su collaborer avec de nombreux artistes francophones (Mika, Saïan Supa Crew, Matt Pokora, Julie Zenatti, Marc Antoine, …)  et internationaux (Akon, Muse, Kanyee West, Ziggy Marley, Motorhead, Justin Timberlake, Opeth, Black Violin,...) par le biais de grands labels comme Universal, Sony, Warner ou encore Tileyard.

De Paris en passant par la province, mais aussi par Dubai, Londres ou encore Los Angeles, il a su acquérir de nombreuses compétences au travers de plateformes télévisées comme Star Academy, The Voice France, The Voice UK, XFactor UK, I manage a celebrity (USA) mais aussi sur des projets tels que de nombreux festivals à Dubai (Dubai’s Desert Rock Festival & Desert Rythm Festival), Afrique du Sud et des comédies musicales françaises à succès « Robin des bois » où il fera du placement d'artistes et « Les 3 mousquetaires » où il a placé de la composition et encore Bernadette de Lourde où là il sera en charge des adaptations anglaise du Show. C’est par ses diverses expériences enrichissantes que Fabrice Sioul a décidé de monter ce tremplin.

Name: Santa Monica Symphony Orchestra
Description:
Since 1945, the Santa Monica Symphony Orchestra has been a major cultural asset, serving audiences of all ages that span the ethnic, economic and social spectrum.

Founded by a group of Los Angeles studio musicians, the orchestra has evolved over the decades into its present form, a mixture of the best Los Angeles area professionals, emerging pre-professionals and volunteer musicians of exceptional quality.

The concert season attracts an audience of over 5,000 with a well-rounded repertoire of both classical and contemporary works. In addition to free concerts, the Symphony’s outreach programs include open rehearsals, activities in schools, and performances by our musicians at community events.

The Symphony has received prestigious grants from the National Endowment for the Arts, the James Irvine Foundation and the Herb Alpert Foundation. The Santa Monica Symphony was one of only sixty-four orchestras in the country to receive a grant under the American Reinvestment and Recovery Act. Other sources of funding include the City of Santa Monica, the Los Angeles County Arts Commission, private foundations, local businesses and private donors.

The Santa Monica Symphony has grown to its present stature under the baton of seven outstanding conductors/music directors: founding conductor Jacques Rachmilovich, composer Arthur Lange, Peter Meremblum, former CBS Symphony director Victor Bay, USC School of Music faculty member Yehuda Gilad, Occidental College professor Dr. Allen Robert Gross and current maestro, Los Angeles Philharmonic violinist Guido Lamell.

The Santa Monica Symphony was the first orchestra in the United States to record the First and Second Symphonies of Tchaikovsky.

The Santa Monica Symphony is a member of the Association of California Symphony Orchestras (ACSO), The American Symphony Orchestra League (ASOL), and the Santa Monica Chamber of Commerce.

Name: Scattitude Academy of Music
Description:
Two musical souls began their individual music education paths in 2005. The year 2010 saw these two independent entities’ paths cross to create their school’s first avatar ‘Muzicworkz’. They then segued into the separate identities of ‘Samantha’ and ‘Do-Re-Me School of Music’. But Chet Atkins did once say, “Do it again on the next verse and people think you mean it.” So, what continued as two distinctly planted seeds in 2010, once again grew together in 2018 into one wholesome music education tree called the Scattitude Academy of Music.

‘Scattitude’ is a name that has a modern, albeit rich etymology, and is a symbiosis of three fundamentals that fit the ethos of this music institution.
Scat – meaning Vocal Improvisation
Attitude – which focusses on Stage Presence and the Mental Make-up of a musician
and lastly, Étude – which is french for study

Nestled on the rather busy Hill Road of Mumbai’s queen suburb Bandra, the Scattitude Academy of Music reflects its neighbourhood in its potpourri of programmes, the full-bodied nature of its curriculum, the versatility of its educators and partners, a rich history of teaching experience, and a dynamic face that is inclusive of and serves the ever-changing global music and entertainment industry and community. Along with their education partners, the academy offers exam-oriented syllabi in Western Contemporary Vocals, Piano & Keys, Music Theory, Music Production, and the Guitar, as well as constantly works toward upskilling itself on new educational and career initiatives.

At Scattitude Academy of Music, every programme and educator is designed and dedicated toward kindling a musician’s artistry and catalysing a lifetime of passion.

Name: El Pie Recording Studios
Description: Por su equipamiento y dimensiones El Pie Recording Studios reúne las características y prestaciones que lo colocan en la categoría de world-class studio, uno de los mejores de Latinoamérica. El control esta centralizado en la consola Solid State Logic SL4040G+, y su excelente diseño acústico proporciona un monitoreo plano y preciso preparado para largas sesiones de mezcla. Cuenta con una extensa paleta de procesadores analógicos y digitales, que comprende desde los más legendarios compresores y ecualizadores vintage, hasta las clásicas reverbs, delays y multiefecto. Con el sistema ProTools  HD y la Studer  A800 MKIII, el Estudio A ofrece la mejor combinación en grabación análoga y digital. La sala se caracteriza por ser muy amplia y flexible, permite grabar orquestas, coros y bandas grandes sin dejar de lado la comodidad de cada músico. El área principal proporciona una respuesta sonora natural y cálida. Además cuenta con dos espacios aislados.

Name: The Leonard Bernstein Office
Description:
The Leonard Bernstein Office (LBO) is small family-owned business which conducts music licensing, editing and publishing, and promotional activities relating to the lifework of Leonard Bernstein (1918-1990), the composer, conductor, educator, and humanitarian.

Since Bernstein’s death in 1990, the LBO has been co-owned and operated by his three children, Jamie Bernstein, Alexander Bernstein and Nina Bernstein Simmons.

The LBO is unique because our work product reaches millions of amateur and professional musicians and thousands of schools, universities, conservatories and libraries.  We operate in diverse areas of the music business, including education, musical theater, and classical music.

The LBO licenses Bernstein symphonies, operas, song cycles, chamber music, film scores, Broadway shows (including West Side Story, Candide and On The Town) and Mass.  The conducting legacy includes 500 recordings and filmed performances and the educational programs include the landmark Young People's Concerts television series with the New York Philharmonic.

We promote this catalog to performing-arts and educational institutions, record, film and television production companies, advertisers, and press.

Name: Marco Nobel
Description:
Marco Nobel has emerged as a sought-after talent in the electronic music industry, his refreshing sound combined with energetic live performances make him an artist to watch this year. 

In 2021, Marco turned his full attention to releasing records for a string of singles. His new sound resulted in more than 60 million streams in just the past 1.5 years, with his fast-growing catalog Marco is just getting started. After releasing '3 Nights', 'Her', and 'Voodoo', Marco is preparing his next moves, with more releases scheduled on Soave & Spinnin' Records.

After the pandemic, Marco was one of the first international DJs to tour in Australia and Asia. Demonstrating remarkable growth in a short period of time, he is proving to be an act with a promising career ahead.

Name: BORUSAN QUARTET
Description:
For more info Borusan Quartet contact mail : ssumer@borusansanat.com

Borusan Quartet was founded in 2005 under the guidance of Maestro Gürer Aykal. They have since joined master-classes of Alban Berg Quartet, Juilliard Quartet, Gürer Aykal, Joshua Epstein and Maxim Vengerov.
In addition to their regular performances at the Süreyya Opera House in Kadıköy, Istanbul, the Quartet enjoys a busy schedule with concerts and tours in Turkey and abroad. They have participated in Schleswig-Holstein, Merano, Mozart, Bodensee, Istanbul and Ankara music festivals and in addition to many venues in Turkey, appeared at Zurich Tonhalle, Carnegie Hall, Konzerthaus (Berlin), Le Corum (Montpellier), Schloss Elmau (Germany) and G. Verdi Hall (Milan).

They received the “Chamber Ensemble of the Year” award at the Turkish Andante magazine’s first Classical Music Awards in May 2010 and the same year, won the gold medal at the 2010 ICMEC International Chamber Music Competition the finale of which was held at the Carnegie Weill Recital Hall, NY.

Until now, they have given the world premieres of works by contemporary Turkish composers Oğuzhan Balcı, Mahir Çetiz, Turgay Erdener, Özkan Manav, Alper Maral, Turgut Pöğün ve Hasan Uçarsu written for them. Their first CD Erkin, Aykal, Saygun featuring String Quartets of the composers in the title was published in May 2013. Borusan Quartet enjoys chamber music partnerships with distinguished artists such as İdil Biret, Fazıl Say, Itamar Golan, Valentin Erben, Gülsin Onay, Hüseyin Sermet, Ruşen Güneş, Reto Bieri, Toros Can, Ferhan-Ferzan Önder and Muhiddin Dürrüoğlu. Their repertoire encompasses a wide range of works from the classical period to the modern era with particular emphasis on the works of Turkish composers.

-Wall of sound, as Phil Spector explained in 1964, “I was looking for a sound, a sound so strong that if the material was not the greatest, the sound would carry the record. It was a case of augmenting, augmenting. It all fitted together like a jigsaw.”

-In Music and music theory, the Beat is the basic unit of time, the pulse (regularly repeating event), of the mensural level (or beat level). The beat is often defined as the rhythm listeners would tap their toes to when listening to a piece of music. (From Wikipedia)

Name: OMF
Description:
How would you feel if the music you love, had no school or course for you to learn how to play? 

For us it is a terrible feeling! For this reason, one of our core aims is to make an inclusive education system for upcoming instrumentalists with an interest styles of music like HighLife, soukous and Makossa. 

Our approach is simple, we use a mix of simple music theory with a play by ear approach, to offer a range of classes that are; accessible, relatable and fun. 

We love what we do so it's all about your passion not your skill level, you bring your passion and we will give you the tools needed to succeed.

So whether you play at church, socially or in the school's band, no problems, our courses will teach you to master your discipline and have the confidence to express your unique approach to music.

Name: Music Covers & Creations
Description:
Music Covers & Creations était au départ une simple fan page de partage de vidéos musicales comme il y en a tant sur Facebook. La plupart d’entre elles sont éphémères, par manque de régularité dans les publications et face également, il faut le dire, à la difficulté de susciter l’intérêt auprès d’une communauté toujours plus exigeante et versatile, mais aussi dans le cadre d’une interface technique complexe et réglementée.

Les fondateurs de Music Covers & Creations ne sont pas des novices en musique ni dans l’utilisation des réseaux sociaux et du web. Tous les quatre sont avant tout des passionnés avec de solides compétences en la matière. Ce projet a été pour chacun un fabuleux moyen d’expression. L’équipe s’est ainsi laissée prendre au jeu. L’idée d’offrir un véritable espace de promotion aux artistes qui gagnent à être connus s’est imposée tout naturellement. 

De fil en aiguille, palier par palier, la « MCC Team » a développé son concept, permettant la mise en avant, auprès d’une communauté grandissante et très attentive, de plusieurs centaines de talents pour la plupart amateurs, enregistrant les reprises de leurs chansons favorites ou des titres de leur composition dans leur chambre, sur scène ou dans la rue, pour en proposer la diffusion sur la page Music Covers & Creations créée le 12 septembre 2017 et comptant aujourd’hui dans ses rangs plus de 400 000 abonnés.

Face à un tel succès, afin de conforter sa position de numéro 1 en France dans les domaines du partage de vidéos musicales et de la promotion artistique, la construction d’une plateforme web, avec au cœur un véritable projet de structuration, s’est faite jour, dynamisée par les multiples encouragements à la fois des artistes et de la « facebooksphère », par l’envie aussi de poursuivre et d’amplifier cette belle aventure portée par la passion commune qui anime les administrateurs de la page Music Covers & Creations pour la musique, entre rencontres, découvertes et échanges…

Name: Final Girl Records
Description:
Final Girl Records (fka Weird Sister Records) is an independent record label + collective based in Brooklyn, NY. 

Sick and tired of the white dude music business machine, Final Girl strives for a healthier label model to serve as a safer space for women, trans, and non binary people in creative industries.

We choose our own destiny and cannot be contained or destroyed.

We offer personalized strategies to provide the best plan for each individual artist. We promise a communicative and free flowing relationship with personalized deals unique to each artist to provide what they need most for their career.

The music industry is changing everyday and we will offer up to date practices of distribution, digital streaming + playlist services, and social media marketing that will have the best outcome for each individual artist. We won’t stop learning + adapting to the new landscape.

Open communication of budget, spending and contracts. We won’t leave you in the dark. 

Exclusive brand + merchandise partnerships.

Curated livestreams, press conferences and live events (once safe).

Partnerships with BIPOC, womxn + non-binary producers, engineers, studio owners and more.

No creepy men. PERIOD.

We are committed to being an anti-racist organization that encourages equity, diversity, and anti-racist actions in the music industry and to help amplify the voices of BIPOC artists + creators.

Founded by Deanna DiLandro + Madison Hetterly in 2021.

Prin cele șase proiectele ale sale – Festivalul SoNoRo, SoNoRo Conac, SoNoRo Musikland, SoNoRo Interferențe, SoNoRo Arezzo și SoNoRo On Tour –, SoNoRo contribuie de 15 ani la prezența plină de rafinament a muzicii de cameră în peisajul concertistic din țara noastră, reprezentând România la festivaluri europene de înaltă ţinută și concertând în unele dintre cele mai renumite săli din lume.

Description:

La vocation première de Limouzart était d'accompagner les artistes de l'ancienne région Limousin dans le développement de leurs projets. Au fil de nouvelles collaborations et de rencontres artistiques, notamment l'accompagnement et le développement de l'artiste Gauvain Sers, Limouzart a renforcé ses compétences,  élargi son réseau et son catalogue avec des artistes nationaux, de Suisse et du Canada. 

Avec une affinité particulière pour les musiques d’expression francophone, Limouzart produit, conseille, élabore les tournées et développe la carrière de ses artistes en gardant une approche artisanale et de proximité avec ses partenaires.


En parallèle de ses activités, Limouzart est aussi promoteur local et organisateur de concerts à Limoges et plus largement sur le territoire de l'ancienne région Limousin
 
Limouzart est membre du SMA, du RIM, de Fédéchansons,  Babord - circuit court musical et Hiero Limoges.

The core feature of the Composers’ Directory is to enable the practical exchange of information and offer networking opportunities between living composers and the educational sector and other composers both within the same genre and other genres.

A new cooperation with ECSA’s supportive member LALO was established in December 2016 in order to enhance a larger outreach to the final users.

Visit the Composers’ Directory here: www.composersdirectory.eu or the Repertoire Composers' Directory : repertoire.composersdirectory.eu

Description:

Name: Chœur régional Vittoria d’Île-de-France
Description:
Suivez le Choeur régional Vittoria d'Île-de-France et vivez avec nous une vie de Chant ! 

Le Chœur régional Vittoria d’Île-de-France est un chœur de musique classique dit « d’oratorio ». Son effectif est donc naturellement enclin à un répertoire « intimiste » adapté à sa soixantaine de voix, avec une prédilection pour les œuvres avec piano mais pas uniquement. Il embrasse très largement cinq siècles de musique, profane et sacrée, de Tallis à Decoust, en passant par les classiques viennois (Mozart, Haydn et Beethoven), les romantiques Berlioz, Saint-Saëns, Bizet, Brahms ou Schubert, et encore Britten, Orff, Poulenc ou Duruflé.

Créé en 1987 à l’initiative du Conseil régional d’Île-de-France, le Chœur Vittoria est placé, depuis sa création, sous la direction de Michel Piquemal, en collaboration avec Boris Mychajliszyn, chef associé depuis 2011.

La curiosité et l’ouverture d’esprit de son directeur artistique, Michel Piquemal, caractérisent ses choix de répertoire. C’est ainsi que, pour le bicentenaire de la naissance de Gounod, en 2018, le Chœur Vittoria chante Saint François d’Assise avec l’orchestre Pasdeloup, dont il avait recréé le manuscrit, retrouvé après un siècle d’oubli, au Festival d’Auvers-sur-Oise en 1996. Depuis sept ans, la redécouverte de la musique de Martial Caillebotte (frère du peintre Gustave Caillebotte) est une véritable aventure qui a déjà donné lieu à deux enregistrements toujours en collaboration avec l’Orchestre Pasdeloup, récompensé des 4 ffff de Télérama et 4 Diapasons d’or.

De Bach à la musique contemporaine, il peut aborder tous les répertoires, qu’il interprète tant à Paris qu’en Île-de-France, mais aussi au-delà des frontières régionales et à l’étranger. Le Chœur a été le premier ensemble Français à accueillir l'orchestre philharmonique du Maroc (OPM) en France lors d'une tournée Franco-Marocaine pour le rassemblement des peuples. Il a également collaboré avec de nombreux orchestres dont l’Orchestre national d’Île-de-France, l’Orchestre Pasdeloup, l’Orchestre Lamoureux, l’Orchestre national de Lille, l’Orchestre philharmonique du Luxembourg, sous la direction de chefs tels que Jean-Claude Casadesus, Enrique Mazzola, Wolfgang Doerner, Yoel Levi, Jacques Mercier, Yutaka Sado, Bramwell Tovey, etc. Le Chœur régional Vittoria d’Île-de-France aime aussi travailler dans l’enthousiasme des rencontres, avec les compositeurs d’aujourd’hui notamment – Raymond Alessandrini, Olivier Calmel, Juan José Mosalini, David Alagna, Anthony Girard… 

Sa discographie est riche de dix-neuf enregistrements. En 1998, il remporte les 5èmes Victoires de la Musique classique pour son enregistrement du Roi David d’Arthur Honegger et pour l’ensemble de ses réalisations.

Le Chœur régional Vittoria d’Île-de-France est subventionné par la Région Île-de-France et reçoit le soutien de la Ville de Paris et du Crédit du Nord dans l’objectif de valoriser une pratique artistique amateur d’excellence.

Name: Pro Audio Land

At ProAudioLand.com, we love music. All types of music: from jazz to bluegrass, classical to trance, and everything in between. That is why we take such good care of our customers: we share your love for music. Part of being a musician is that quest for the perfect tone, your dream guitar, or studio set-up. We can help you realize that dream sound, whether it’s your first guitar or a high end custom.

We stock the best music gear in the business! Pro Audio Land (PAL), has over 20,000 square feet of combined office and warehouse space. We have a huge stock of guitars, basses, amplifier's, effects, recording, and pro audio equipment. We buy most of our products in large quantity, which will help insure that we can offer the lowest prices, best selection, and fast shipping.
