Our parent company L.A. Music Services, Inc. has been servicing the subcontractor market and retail outlets for over 32 years in the distribution business, by providing the best brands available. ProAudioLand.com was developed by our parent company exclusively for you, the end-user customer, so that you have the option to deal with us direct.

Thank you for visiting ProAudioLand.com

Mike Monsalve
CEO

Name: Red Rock Production
Description:
Red Rock Production has been a leading, internationally operating audiovisual content company on Lake Starnberg for 45 years under the direction of star producer and musician Leslie Mandoki.
Originally started as a classic recording studio, the company's field of activity now includes the creation of complex content for a wide range of industries.
The combination of creativity, international experience, professionalism, innovative coolness and versatility in Leslie Mandoki's production and recording studio complex just outside Munich makes Red Rock Production a unique creative centre for musical projects worldwide.

Name: The ACT Agency
Description:
The ACT Agency was founded in 2017 under the name Tambour Music Management as a division of the ACT label. Its core business is to create artistic concepts, develop the careers of musicians and design unique live formats. On this basis, more than 400 concerts a year are produced throughout Europe - from renowned clubs to all important festivals to the largest concert halls. Thereby a large emphasis lies on own concert formats and productions.

The international roster of the agency consists equally of ACT artists and artists outside the label. The main focus is on artists with a connection to classical music and jazz, strongly connected with the vision of combining these worlds and expanding them to include other influences.

The founder and managing director of The ACT Agency is Andreas Brandis who initially was active as a musician and composer for a decade, followed by more than 15 years in high-ranking positions at labels such as Universal, ECM and Deutsche Grammophon. Since 2015, Andreas Brandis has been senior managing director of ACT. He also directs the Alfred Toepfer Foundation's renowned Concerto21 summer academy, which supports emerging artists in classical, jazz and their borderline fields in their artistic and professional development. The ACT Agency team is headed by Patrick Weißenfels (Head of Artists & Concerts) in close cooperation with Jolanda Vujasinovic (Senior Artist- & Concert Manager) - both with more than 10 years of experience in the international live business.

In working with Blink, you will notice that Tim Lukas and his team are passionate about music and the creation of successful compositions, from beginning to end. We are committed to maximizing your project on all levels. Our areas of expertise include pop acoustic, classical, rock, jazz and musicals.

Name: Madelyn Ann
Description:
À travers une musique à la rencontre de la pop et du rock atmosphérique, quelque part entre Tove Lo et Coldplay, MADELYN ANN est un groupe breton. La voix douce et puissante de Madeline Anne, la chanteuse, donne à la langue bretonne des sonorités anglaises ou scandinaves qui nous transportent et nous font rêver.
C’est au festival du Bout Du Monde 2019 sur scène avec Robin Foster en chantant avec Dave Pen du groupe Archive, que Madeline rencontre ses futurs complices, Gaëtan Fagot (Robin Foster) et Olivier Le Hir.
Le 4 titres War-Vor sort le 9 avril 2021. Entre deux tournées Brendan Costaire (Frigo, Lys) renoue avec Gaëtan avec qui il a déjà travaillé et rejoint le groupe.
Avec War-vor (2021), en alliant l'énergie de la pop à des sonorités aériennes, le groupe ouvre une nouvelle voie dans le paysage musical breton. Ses compositions sont résolument actuelles et ancrées dans le présent. A l'écoute de ces titres, il est difficile de ne pas apprécier cette langue, si belle quand elle est chantée et mise en musique par le groupe.
MADELYN ANN remporte le Taol Lans 2021 où l’on découvre le quatuor en version électrique pour la première fois. En 2022 après avoir partagé la scène aux côtés de Denez Prigent ou encore Nolwenn Korbell, le groupe est attendu lors de prestigieux événements culturels bretons tels que la Fête de la Bretagne, le Festival de Cornouaille ainsi que l'incontournable Festival Interceltique de Lorient.
NEVEZ AMZER sort au printemps 2023 chez Aztec Musique/PIAS
10 titres chantés en breton, qui nous emmènent dans des univers musicaux entre pop dansante, rock énergique et musiques cinématographiques, évoquant des artistes comme London Grammar, Florence + The Machine ou Kate Bush.
Les textes portent un regard poétique sur le monde et les sujets qui lui tiennent à cœur (La place des femmes dans notre société, l’écologie, les blessures de la vie ou l’amour).
Peut-être le plus international des albums bretons à ce jour.

Name: Honestly Good Music
Description: The music business is hard enough. We feel strongly that creatives on all sides do their best work when they’re surrounded & supported by positive & like-minded collaborators. Honesty, integrity & goodness are at the heart of what we do & who we strive to be in our everyday work. Honestly good people. Making honestly good music. Honestly. It’s as simple as that.

Name: Joy Music House
Description:
Joy Music House is a female-lead business working towards innovating the world of score production through a sense of a community and equality. We are composers supporting composers through all areas of score production while uplifting the community and providing a spotlight for emerging and diverse creators.

Composers can find the resources they need at JMH, whether it is an assistant for three days or a score production team for a month.

Think of us as an elite force of musical operatives, ready to come on board at a moment’s notice.

Name: Gigscene
Description:
Gigscene is an online service that aims to connect musicians of all genres with venues looking for international talent. Our vision is to modernize the current process of booking concerts and to internationalize small and local music venues.

Are you looking for gigs in Paris, Prague or Brussels? With Gigscene, you can find gigs in a couple of clicks! It’s easy, free and a fast-track way to get booked for your next gig. Gigscene has negotiated the dates and conditions of every gig listed with local venues. If you decide to apply, you’ll get a rapid response confirming if you’ve succeeded or not. 

How does it work? 
- Go on www.gigscene.net 
- Create a profile about you and your music, upload sound and video recordings, indicate how much you charge for a gig 
- Pick a city where you want to play and find in our listing a gig that suits you - Apply for a gig you want to play and get ready to receive an answer! 
Gigscene is a service dedicated to passionate musicians. Our goal is to give you a chance to play, discover new clubs, perform to new audiences, gain new musical experiences and make your music travel. 

Gigscene, your key to the music scene!

Name: TUNE IN TUTORIALS
Description: At affordable rates, Tune In Tutorials is a service to fulfill your music needs! Hi, I'm Alaiza and I teach guitar. From those who want to learn the ins and outs of the instrument, and to those who want to learn how to READ music, Tune In can support you in doing so. I am situated in Toronto, ON. I offer lessons in home and at my studio space downtown at King and Bathurst. Tune In accommodates all ages and music does not judge! Music is a language that I have grown to love. Contact me today and inquire! Let's jam!

Name: Calum Lawrie Piping Promotions
Description:
Calum started piping at a very young age, under the tutorage of Mike Maitland (Robert Gordon College CCF Pipe Band), before commencing private tuition with Pipe Major Alex Elrick (ex-Bucksburn & District) and piobaireachd lessons with James Hamilton.  Calum also attended numerous courses at the NPC in Glasgow.

 

Alongside a successful stint with Bucksburn & District Pipe Band, Calum was also a founding member of the National Youth Pipe Band of Scotland (NYPB), with key performances including:

 

• NYPB Live at Glasgow Royal Concert Hall (CD)

• NYPB Launch Concert

• Ortiguiera Festival with Carlos Nunez and the Chieftains

• A sold-out concert (Attendance of 80,000) in Vigo alongside Bagad Breig (also shown on Live TV).

 

In 2007, Calum helped form the Ceilidh Peppers through Chalmers Mackay Music School.  The ceilidh / rock band successfully played at numerous public and private events across the North East before embarking on an even more successful international promotion to countries including Sweden, Ireland, Trinidad & Tobago and America.  Celtic rock band Celtallica subsequently followed, with performances including The Wizard Festival (opening for names including Supergrass, The Buzzcocks, The Damned, Saw Doctors, Stranglers and The Charlatans).

 

During this time, Calum joined Grade 2 Buchan Pipe Band and enjoyed numerous victories, including at the Worlds, Europeans, British and Scottish Championships.


Calum leads the tuition services; passing on his experience to beginners, competition pipers and everyone else in between!

Name: Asociación Civil Tango Sin Fin
Description:
El objetivo de la asociación es promover la música Argentina a nivel nacional e internacional, especialmente el tango, pero contemplando toda la música popular Argentina, haciendo posible su llegada a un mayor número de personas. 

Se promueve la música argentina principalmente a través de acciones educativas, propiciando el desarrollo del género tango a futuro. Además, se desarrollan todo tipo de proyectos culturales que tienen que ver con el desarrollo cultural, intelectual y artístico de nuestra generación en este tiempo y desde nuestra ciudad.

 Entre las actividades que regularmente lleva adelante TANGO SIN FIN destacamos:

- Realización de encuentros de formación para músicos y docentes.
- Realización de clínicas y clases magistrales para músicos, en Argentina y en el mundo.
- Realización de materiales didácticos sobre música popular Argentina.
- Edición de libros didáctico-musicales.
- Encargos y difusión de composiciones originales de música argentina.
- Realización de conciertos y giras promocionales en Argentina y el mundo.
- Edición de materiales de audio, video y multimedia.
- Edición en versión impresa y en .PDF de nuevas composiciones.
- Difusión mediante web y medios gráficos de actividades musicales afines.
- Apoyo para el sostén de espacios que propongan un aporte al desarrollo de la música popular Argentina.

Name: Le Réservoir
Description:
RéservoirClub Music label - (le lieu est en travaux: Bar - Restaurant- Live)

C’est un lieu de rencontre et de découverte de talents, aussi une scène mythique où se sont produits des légendes de la musique: Ben Harper, Placebo, Cure ou Radiohead.
La vocation du Réservoir, c’est de rassembler en un même lieu un restaurant à la cuisine exigeante et une scène à la programmation éclectique pour rendre les soirées uniques et inoubliables.

Name: Bragg Management
Description:
Bragg Management was founded over twenty years ago by Nashville artist manager Christie Bragg, whose unconventional approach to management emboldens artists to move outside the lines of their predominant work, and encourages career growth to last for decades. Bragg’s clients have included songwriters who are also authors, authors who are speakers, musicians who become independent filmmakers, and artists blurring the boundaries between creating original music and writing/leading worship music for the church. 

After earning her degree in Human and Organizational Development from Vanderbilt University in 1998, Christie Bragg jumped headlong into managing successful Christian folk-rock band Caedmon’s Call. Before long, she was guiding a growing roster of artists who are drawn to her personalized approach and expertise in building momentum across various mediums. Through shepherding and facilitating the execution of ideas, Christie Bragg has helped to grow the careers of more than 15 award-winning artists. By effectively integrating a relational management style, Bragg pushes talents and passions across industry boundaries to establish meaningful, sustaining careers.

Christie Bragg represents artists, authors, and organizations including Andrew Peterson, Sally Lloyd-Jones, The Rabbit Room, and Tokens Media.

Name: Het Nederlands Filmorkest
Description:
Het Nederlands Filmorkest is een showorkest waarvan het repertoire voornamelijk bestaat uit filmmuziek. Elk jaar verzorgt het orkest 2 prachtige programma’s, maar daarnaast kan het orkest (of een deel ervan) worden ingehuurd voor allerlei gelegenheden.

Het Nederlands Filmorkest begon met strijkers, een pianist en een slagwerksectie. Sinds 2020 is het orkest uitgebreid met een vaste blazerssectie. Het orkest heeft de eerste 10 jaar onder leiding gestaan van oprichter Gerard Poot. Van september 2010 tot september 2019 heeft Pieter van Nes het orkest gedirigeerd met een korte onderbreking van september 2014 tot december 2015 onder leiding van Peter Vinken. Hij heeft het stokje overgedragen aan Sander Vredenborg, die enthousiast en vol energie de leiding van het orkest op zich heeft genomen.

Het Nederlands Filmorkest heeft in het verleden regelmatig samengewerkt met singer/songwriters en heeft al op talloze bekende en minder bekende locaties mogen optreden. Van dinnershows tot kindervoorstellingen, van feesten tot klapstoelconcerten en van black-lightacts tot filmbegeleiding; alles is mogelijk! Film- en musicalthema’s, ontroerende ballads, swingende jazz en spetterende showmuziek zijn een vast onderdeel van het repertoire en daarbij mag prachtig op maat gemaakt beeldmateriaal niet ontbreken. Opgericht als strijkorkest met kleine bezetting, maar nu ook met blazers, heeft Het Nederlands Filmorkest sinds 1999 haar plaats verworven tussen de Nederlandse orkesten.

Kom genieten bij één van onze concerten!

Name: Pop 'stache
Description:
At Pop ‘stache, we get off on music. We cover the latest in music news, write in-depth features about the industry and review relevant albums all on a daily basis. We're proudly based in Chicago.

"We do what we like and we like what we do" - Andrew W. K.

Name: The Wknd
Description:
The Wknd is the go-to platform to discover the freshest new music from Southeast Asia. Established in 2008, The Wknd is widely recognized as a music tastemaker by fans and artistes alike, and is driven by its mission to elevate the Asian music scene through events, digital content and storytelling.

As an event organizer, The Wknd plays host to music showcases that incorporate exhibitions, interactive workshops and music marketplaces. The Wknd is also actively called upon to curate acts for music festivals, showcases and concerts.

The Wknd also produces a wide variety of digital content in the form of online videos, such as their long-running flagship series The Wknd Sessions, documentaries and interviews with music personalities.

Awards and recognition:
Shout Awards 2012 - Shout! Aloud category nominee
DiGi WWWOW 2012 "Most Inspiring Internet for Good Award" (top ten finish)
Klue Magazine's Best Site (2011) award

Name: FrontStreet Records LLC
Description:
FrontStreet Records - founded in the early 90’s by CEO Dave Kelly.  The 1990’s was the golden era for the Art; from the Rise and Commercialism of the Music, the untimely deaths of Tupac and Biggie, and the surge in sales and unity shortly thereafter, FrontStreet Records and Dave Kelly knew that if they were to make an impact, that it would have to start with signing and representing talent and time could not be wasted.  Therefore, when an Artist (Rappers, Singers and Dancers) came to our office or studio they were placed on FRONT STREET, if you “talked the talk” then you had to “walk the walk”! 

FSR is responsible for acts such as Dux Jones, Oseeola, Rai Knight, Braulio, Jab, J.Strode,DEAJI.  Our in house production unit (The Skouts) carve the FrontStreet Sound and keeps our music timeless yet before its time with their cutting edge production and innovative song writing ability.  

FSR is unparalleled by any other independent label around in regards to it’s marketing campaign, with creative ideas like The 52/50 Collection and how they get the music to their audience.  One thing is certain FrontStreet Records is here to work for the people.

Name: Danse Club Records
Description: Established in 2012, Danse Club Records is the label run and owned by UK artists Austen/Scott who are also signed to Joris Voorn’s Rejected and Green labels. Most notably the brothers became closely linked with fabric, London playing the club on 4 occasions (twice doing a label showcase).

Name: Popaganda
Description: En ideell förening som sedan 2002 driver en musikfestival i Stockholm. Sedan 2007 anordnas Popagandafestivalen på Eriksdalsbadet vid Skanstull.

Name: Chamber Orchestra DIVA (⋮IWConnect)
Description:
The Chamber Orchestra has existed for over four decades. In the beginning, it was composed of musicians with limited musical education, enthusiasts who had entirely different professions but still nurtured their love for music and managed to form the orchestra. Slowly evolving over the years, today it’s a well-recognized brand throughout the Balkans.

The idea of revitalizing, popularizing, and bringing the orchestra closer to a broader audience was born in 2013. It was realized through the efforts of conductor Vladimir Dimovski and violist and professor at the Bitola School of Music, Nikola Trajanovski.

Name: Synematik MusicWorld LLC
Description:
Born to Nigerian and Kenyan parents, Synematik developed an affinity for music at an early age, growing up surrounded by great music, classical and contemporary. He credits the genesis of his diverse taste in music to his parents' vinyl and cassette collection they began acquiring during their college days in 1960s England. Everyone from Mozart to Motown to Abba to The Beatles were a daily part of his growing experience. Being part of a musical household, classical piano lessons were the norm, opening the door to his musical journey as a composer and producer. After graduating from Berklee College of Music, he moved to New York. While experiencing discouraging setbacks at the start of his career, a serendipitous meeting with the legendary Stevie Wonder was just what he needed to keep him going. Stevie took the time to listen to Synematik's music, and told him not to give up, sharing with him some timeless words of musical and life wisdom. Doors eventually began to open slowly but surely, leading to work and learning experiences under award-winning producers and camps such as Roc Nation, Stargate, Bad Boy, Seven Aurelius, Dennis Ferrer, and many others. He's also gathered an impressive list of credits working with film/TV powerhouse Videohelper, placing music on The Oscars, Jay Leno, Rock Center, WWE Smackdown, HBO NFL Series, PGA Golf, FIFA World Cup and more. Watch out for more amazing music coming from Synematik , in the latter part of 2013, with singles on artists signed to Epic, Columbia Records, Universal, Atlantic and Virgin/Capitol.
Synematik runs his music production company, Synematik MusicWorld LLC out of MusicWorks NYC, a high-end private Uptown Manhattan recording facility.

Name: Colorado Youth Bands
Description: Colorado Youth Bands (formerly Colorado Honor Band Association) is a year-round, non-profit organization that teaches instrumental music to students ages 8-18. Colorado Youth Bands is an after-school, extracurricular program offering five levels of instruction, including a beginner level for students who have never picked up an instrument before. There is a small membership fee to join the organization, but student scholarships are also offered to families in need. Students meet once a week to rehearse in small groups and together as a big group. The organization offers performance opportunities as well as weekend workshops and Summer Camp. Learn more by visiting our website.

Name: D-otherside Music Group
Description:
DMG is a boutique music production company lead by Lior Magal.  A voting member of the Recording Arts Acadamy and Billboard chart topping producer, Magal specializes in electorinica/dance/pop and pop genres.  As a Song writer/Producer/Re-mixer, his work can be characterized by the distinctive way he combines electronic, underground, Pop, dance and rock genres to consistently create a unique and commercially successful sound.  

Lior's music has been published by such major labels as Sony/BMG, Geffen/Interscope, and Warner Bros, and other well-known labels including Robbins Entertainment, RMD Dance International, Mpress Records, BLUEM Records, Sifted Recordings, Central Park Recordings and of course – D-otherside. His involvement with accomplished and talented artists such as Nelly Furtado, PINK, Cascada, Idina Menzel, and Rachel Sage has resulted in #1 Billboard hits "Do It" (Nelly Furtado) and "Gorgeous" (Idina Menzel).

Name: Chamber Music | OC
Description: Launched in 2012, Chamber Music | OC has established itself as one of the most dynamic classical music initiatives in the country dedicated to advancing the art of chamber music through performance, education, and community engagement.

Name: Blue Coast Music
Description: Now Blue Coast Music...  an HD audio download store that specializes in worldwide delivery of DSD downloads of independent labels.  Mostly Jazz, Classical, Folk and other music performed by passionate performers.

Name: APRH RECORDINGS
Description:
Addictive Pleasure Real Healing.
.
Music is one of the purest addiction you'll ever find. Moreover it heals your mind, body & soul.
.
Record label, event series, clothing & more.
.
Est. 2018

Name: David French Music
Description: David French Music offers Band and Orchestra instrument rentals to the Massachusetts area, in store repair services, musical accessories sales and private music lessons. Centrally located in Westboro MA.

Name: Spout Software, Inc
Description:
Spout is a real time Cloud-based recording and collaboration platform for the professional music industry.  Spout leverages the scalability and efficiency of cloud storage in order to bring the recording experience very close to real-time. Spout provides an easy-to-use recording interface, allowing people to collaborate wherever they are in the world. This service is hardware and software agnostic - enabling plug-and-play experiences without being bound to costly hardware or software.

Cloud-based recording has been prized and pursued for a couple years. What Spout is doing that is critical is providing hardware and software agnostic professional recording tools for real time co-located collaboration and recording. Spout integrates a robust media server tool, ability to use all sound file types, and an easy to use digital audio workstation (DAW) that provides previously unrealized revenue for the professional recording industry - whether enterprise of home recording studio. No additional hardware or software to purchase or download, platform agnostic that allows all DAW solutions (ProTools, Logic, Cubase, etc) to collaborate together. By focusing on a commercial solution first, testing, vetting, and endorsement by industry professionals will provide additional opportunity upon engaging the consumer market.

Name: Mesmeronica Club - Cultural Club - DITU
Description: Mesmeronica, the very first music club of DIT University which was established in 2015 has been working since the last 7 years to uplift and encourage music talents in the university. Mesmoronica has been involved in almost all the cultural events of the college and has been one of the most essential contributors to the college events.

Name: Piano Power Chicago
Description: We’re a collaborative community of music students, parents, and teachers in Chicago and the North Shore. Our goal: to foster a lifelong love of music in our students, and to make lessons convenient and stress-free for our families and teachers.

Name: Plain Productions Ltd
Description:
Music & Audio Post Production Studio

Whatever music or audio service you require - be it for personal, artistic, collaborative, post-production or commercial purposes; Plain Productions can offer you a premium end product at a competitive price, most importantly giving you the balance of experienced input, options & guidance you want.

With over 20 years experience in the music & audio industry as a writer, composer, artist, performer, producer and engineer I've been privileged to have worked on and with an incredibly diverse spectrum of projects and people - from electronic to rock, hip hop to folk artists; from sound design & scoring to mixing and mastering for film and commercial; all while working alongside some incredibly talented directors, producers and artists, both independent and with film companies, creative agencies, labels and major brands.


Since launching Plain Productions I've been privileged to head up audio post production (including sound design, editing, scoring, mixing and mastering) on projects with film makers such as Jean-Paul Ly (Marvel, DC, Fast & Furious), Leif Johnson (X-Factor, Mr. Doom, Channel M), led audio post on commercial videos for major brands including Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Moonpig, JP Morgan and Amadeus and produced, mixed and mastered music for some of the most exciting emerging talent in the music industry; being involved in work that has reached in excess of half a million streams.

As an artist and performer I've headlined stages at events including Camden Rocks Festival and toured the UK supporting the likes of Toploader, The VirginMary's and Razz; writing, composing, producing and performing with my band. I've worked both in the studio and live alongside Laurie Jenkins (Kasabian, The 1975, James Blunt, Robbie Williams), Alan Bleay (Arclite Productions, Mint Royale) and supported the likes of Thirteen Senses, recording the debut EP with my first project in the famous Sawmills Studio in Falmouth, Cornwall (Oasis,

Name: Buffalo Music Hall of Fame
Description: The Buffalo Music Hall of Fame was founded in 1983  to recognize groups and individuals who have had a significant impact on the WNY music scene and/or achieved success in the music industry on a national and often an international scale. Inductees are chosen from nominees which are rated in several different categories. The Buffalo Music Hall of Fame annually recognizes and inducts outstanding Western New Yorkers who have made major contributions to the music industry at their annual induction gala.

Name: PH Pianos
Description:
The PH Pianos showroom and head office can be found on Bredgade in the centre of Copenhagen. Located in the ‘design’ epicenter of the city, here it is possible to find the largest selection of Poul Henningsen designed furniture and pianos placed together anywhere in the world. 

Staff with unrivaled knowledge about the design philosophy and manufacturing processes for all PH Pianos products are available to take visitors on a journey through the collection of PH Pianos and will take time to tell the story of each piece. PH Pianos can be found in stock in a variety of different materials and finishes. 

We are located on the same street as Designmuseum Danmark where Poul Henningsens own piano is exhibited permanently. The PH Pianos store in the centre of Copenhagen is an essential destination to visit in order to learn about and enjoy Poul Henningsen’s PH Grand Piano designs.

Name: Water Street Music Hall
Description:
The Water Street Music Hall is a large capacity, 7000 square foot entertainment complex featuring two rooms that can be used together or separately. We are located in the St. Paul Quarter entertainment district of Rochester, NY - conveniently located directly off I-490 east and west via exit 13. 

Our doors opened in 1977 as the Country Warehouse, and has since been The Warehouse, The Horizontal Boogie Bar and the Boogie Bar. It became the Water Street Music Hall in 1999 and has emerged as one of Rochester, NY's premier concert spots, garnering the "Best Live Music Club" and "Best Live Entertainment Venue" by the Rochester, NY Democrat and Chronicle's People's Choice Awards and City Newspapers Best Of several years running.

Name: Singer-Songwriter
Description: Singer & Song Writer

Name: Falcetti Music Inc
Description:
Falcetti Music is a music education, rental, and retail company based out of Springfield, Massachusetts. We have two beautiful educational facilities: one in Springfield, MA and the other in Simsbury, CT. 

Education: We offer quality music lessons online or in-person in Springfield or Simsbury. Our goal is to provide music lessons for all genres and levels of music in a fun and relaxed learning environment. We've been around since 1966 and have taught over 3 million lessons! We are always interested in interviewing teachers to expand educational offerings and programming. Interested in becoming a member of our teaching team? https://falcettimusic.com/f_store_news/teacher_application.html 

Retail: Our Springfield location sells guitars, drums, amps, keyboards, gear, and more! 

Band and Orchestra rentals: Our Band & Orchestra division serves school districts and educational programs throughout MA and CT. We work closely and on an individual basis with music educators and stock the accessories and method books teachers require for all their band students. We also provide repair services for all instruments.

Pianos: Falcetti Pianos has new and used pianos of numerous makes and models for purchase. We also have options to rent a piano, or to store your piano at our Springfield facility. We offer piano moving, piano tuning, accessories and other services.

Name: The Music Hub UAE
Description:
We are a well known Music Institute whose main aim is to provide the best quality tuition in music for students in the UAE. Our mission is to inspire a life-long love of music through fun, life-enhancing and confidence-building experiences with our distinguished faculty who are experienced music educators and performers. We offer learning opportunities for all ages from infants to adults whether beginner, intermediate or advanced. Our private and group lessons range from the Piano, Violin, Flute, and Guitar to instruments from the woodwind and brass family. In addition to the instrumental lessons we also offer theory and composition, all lessons following a comprehensive internationally recognised curriculum. Enriching the musical life of our students is important to us. We encourage everyone to participate in our music clubs, ensembles and perform at our regular concerts.

We have professionally trained instructors of all instruments (Piano, Bowed Strings, Brass, Guitar & Bass, Woodwind and Percussion), who give individual lessons as well as group classes based upon the musical skill levels of the students, ranging anywhere from basic to advanced for students young and old.

Name: Viscount Classical Organs (UK) Ltd
Description:
We are the main UK distributor for the Italian made digital Viscount organ instruments. David Mason and Jeremy Meager bought the existing business in 2006, and have successfully grown the business to be a leading provider of digital church organs in the UK.

We not only provide instruments for home use, but also provide bespoke instrument building for churches, cathedrals, schools and crematoriums. Our sister business, Regent Classic Organs, focusses exclusively on our bespoke instrument building in the UK, USA and Pacific.

Name: Cut Time Music
Description:
Cut Time Music comprises 2 media composers Charles Mallory and Parker Wiksell who are elevating the unique voices of film and TV directors and producers through their engaging industrial rock and hybrid film music.

Credits include track placements in CBS, HBO, Netflix, A&E and MTV shows, scoring many award-winning feature films, short films, and documentaries, scoring an award-winning television series on PBS and a live awards show, and scoring commercials airing on ESPN, AMC, Comedy Central, and MTV.

Charles and Parker have signed with Velvet Green Music, an LA-based production music library and bespoke music house for film, television programming, promos and advertising, as well as Flavorlab Producer's Toolbox, a NY-based highly selective, exclusive boutique music catalog.

Name: Corporación Cervantes
Description:
Renta de Equipos de Sonido Profesional, Luces y Pantallas LED de video para todo tipo de eventos.

Mision: Ser un ejemplo Empresarial Liderando con nuevas Tecnologias

En razon del crecimiento y fortalecimiento, Corporacion Cervantes SRL sigue invirtiendo esfuerzos para mejorar nuestros procesos. Por ello contamos con una Politica de Calidad que nos permitira dicho objetivo conproyectos de mejora continua de acuerdo a nuestras necesidades. en concordancia con nuestra mision, brindamos un servicio con calidad, que contribuya a darle un valor agregado y superemos las expectativas de nuestros clientes. "Si trabajamos para una empresa, hagamosla crecer ya por inercia y junto a ella creceremos".

Rental of Pro Audio, Lighting and LED Video screens for Venues of all sizes.

Mission: Be the business model and leader in our market by making use of the best technology available

Success has been a part of Corporation Cervantes SRL all along since it started as a company, to support that we keep on improving every process. That's why we have policies that encourages our workforce to design new projects to fit every customer need. We provide a quality service that is aimed to fulfill every expectation the customer has, we believe that " If we work for a company, we should do our best to make it succeed so we'll both grow together".

Name: Holier Than Thou Records
Description:
Holier Than Thou started in 1995 launching with a double page spread in the Kerrang magazine and various featured cover-mounts in Metal Hammer, Classic Rock and Rock Sound. Initially working as a booking agent arranging gigs UK wide including live showcases at Rock City Nottingham, The Marque and LA2 London KIng Tuts Glasgow. In the late 90′s we diverted to label services, music promotion and more recently music publishing. Promotion and release highlights include Uli Jon Roth ( Scorpions), Trevor Bolder (Uriah Heep & Bowies Spiders from Mars) Stevie Jones (UK Subs), Never The Bride, Manfred Mann’s Earth Band, Geno Washington Today we represent JOANovARC (all girl rock band Xbox 360 notoriety with 3 tracks on Rock Band), emerging metal band NG26 (Rich Shaw now  touring with Cradle of Filth)   post rock The Tripdown Project and Sonny Jim. We also have friends in the US (Respectable Artists  asked us to work with  Super Super (Cheap Tricks main touring band), ClassX (Canada) and Aggressive Chill (reaching number 2 in the Netherlands  iTunes charts)

We manage a complete release from distribution, promotion and publishing our music management is designed for longer term association, building an artist’s profile through consecutive fresh campaigns. To create commercial demand for new music and back catalogue we select (with the artist input) the best songs for single commercial release, or track promotions for media, social and music business networking.

Name: Rhiza Music Limited
Description:
Fresh sounds are the best sounds.

Are you ready to shake up your playlist with some of the best talent on the new music scene? Stay ahead of the curve and discover our monthly selection of trendsetting repertoire by some of the most exciting emerging artists and independently releasing acts. 

Since 2014, we have been supporting and distributing the emerging and independent music scenes to our growing network of in-venue music providers and their digital platforms, for use across a broad selection of brands. We can offer you ready access to a large music catalogue of high quality commercially released tracks from a wide variety of artists and genres, carefully curated with background music requirements in mind. What’s more, our slick and professional service ensures that our collection of rights approved music is expertly tagged with the relevant metadata and delivered to your system with ease.

Rhiza Music is a credible music service with music people at its heart. We're not driven by algorithms, but by the expertise of a team of music managers, producers, DJs, publishers, labels and music journalists. It is our knowledge of the emerging music scene and our focus on the artist that sets us apart from the rest. 

Sound good? We promise it will be.

If you’d like to know more, visit here : info@rhizamusic.com

Name: Garrick The DJ
Description:
Garrick The DJ is a sound chameleon. He pulls from an eclectic selection of genres to play to his audience, whether it’s Old School Jams, Pop, House, Rock, Jazz, Classic Soul/Motown, or many others. There is no greater feeling than seeing people enjoy music, and he has built a reputation on his ability to ignite the human spirit. Garrick makes it all about connecting with his audiences, whether large or small to make sure they have a memorable evening.

A passion for music sparked his interest in Djing. He got started early on with his focus shifting to radio production, working as an on-air producer doing live-to-air broadcasts with CHUM FM from 2007 – 2011. Now, he is focusing on his DJ work, sharing music with guests at special events and venues. Garrick injects entertainment into any party, private event, and wedding.

While there are so many, a few notable career highlights for Garrick have been playing the Toronto International Film Festival, Canadian Screen Awards, Invictus Games and Pride Toronto, one of the largest festivals of its kind in the world.

Name: Ensemble Matheus
Description: L’Ensemble Matheus, implanté depuis plus de 30 ans à Brest, est un ensemble musical qui donne de nombreux concerts en Bretagne, mais aussi dans toute la France et à l’étranger. Sous l’impulsion de son chef d’orchestre Jean-Christophe Spinosi, il travaille au renouvellement de l’interprétation sur instruments d’époque des œuvres baroques, classiques et romantiques. Ce qui ne les empêche pas d’aborder le répertoire, moderne ainsi que les musiques traditionnelles et populaires, y compris urbaines.

Name: Wolverhampton Music Service
Description: A Music Service with over 50 years experience, offering quality music education for children in & out of school. Leaders of the local Music Education Hub.

Name: PlayThatSheet
Description:
You do not want to learn boring and complicated traditional music theory? 
You just want to blow into your wind instrument (saxophone,tuba,trumpet,flute,euphonium,...) and play real song quickly? Of course you can start by memorizing each notes and fingers positions for your favorite songs but you will quickly reach a point where your memory won't be good enough. Then you will need to learn somehow how to read music to be able to play a new song instantly.And we are back to shitty music sheets. As a beginner saxophone player, we get into that zone and we built an algorithm to hack music theory! A kind of cheat for music sheet.

How? By using fingering images that are easy to play as ABC!

Instead of decrypting this unknown language of notes, rythms and weird traditional music theory, simply fill the hole of your instrument with your fingers as the picture display it. Then, blow into your instrument and let's play that sheet in 5min !

Name: RoyaltyClaim
Description:
The Royalty Claim Initiative (RCI) is an ongoing research project led by its Founder & Chief Researcher, Dae Bogan, MIA.

RCI conducts extensive research into the global music licensing ecosystem. Our researchers tap a number of public and private sources to procure data for our work. Our data scientists and data analysts leverage and build a variety of modeling, analytics, and insights tools to help the team make sense of millions of rows of raw data.

RCI also analyze data related to music consumption (e.g. downloads, streams, sales), broadcasts, performances, and other types of data to identify trends from which we can interpret insights into the global music licensing ecosystem. From time to time, we will publish our findings and offer strategic recommendations to improve the well-being of music creators and rightsholders. 

Our mission is to aid in providing transparency that creates access to information that has an economic impact on music creators and rightsholders around the world.

The Royalty Claim Platform is the world's first publicly accessible online aggregated database of unclaimed entitlements such as royalties and music licenses. 

For the first time, music creators and rightsholders are able to quickly search, find, and claim their entitlement in certain unclaimed royalties and music licenses.

The Royalty Claim Platform is powered by the Royalty Claim Initiative. RCI researchers and data scientists locate, retrieve, synthesize and import an array of data and records that reference statutory notifications of certain music licenses, unattributed royalties (so-called "Black Box" royalties) and settlements; and income participants (payees) in undistributed royalties that stem from collective bargaining agreements, international reciprocal agreements, statutory royalties, and more.

The platform is free to use for any music creator, rightsholder, beneficiary, or researcher.

Name: Worcester Youth Orchestras
Description: Founded in 1947 by Harry Levenson, the Worcester Youth Orchestras (WYO) have maintained a presence in Central Massachusetts for more than 70 years offering musical training, orchestral experiences and fostering life long friendships for aspiring young musicians. What began as one orchestra with a loan of $150 from Teen-Age Canteen of 45 students has grown to  more than 200 students in four orchestras, a wind ensemble, a jazz program.  The orchestra made its debut on May 19th, 1948 at Atwood Hall at Clark University and celebrated its 70th Anniversary Concert on May 20th, 2018 at Mechanics Hall, Worcester with members from that original 1947 class in the audience.

Name: Grove Studios
Description:
A rehearsal space you can call home

Welcome to the most electrifying creative den right here in Ypsilanti, a haven for the sonic rebels and digital artisans of Southeast Michigan! Nestled in the heart of that creative corridor stretching from the Motor City to Ann Arbor, Grove Studios is where sonic and visual alchemy take place.

We built a haven where soundscapes are crafted, stories are told, and creativity knows no bounds, connecting individuals with a shared passion for music and the arts. Grove Studios is more than a space; it’s a nurturing environment where ideas flourish and dreams find their resonance.

Backstage at Grove Studios

We're a group of music creators and imaginative producers who share a common vision: providing Southeast Michigan's vibrant artistic community with accessible, secure, sustainable, and acoustically excellent spaces to unleash their creativity, mix, master, and craft.

We made Ypsilanti our flagship studio because it's not just our home; it's also an incredible and vibrant community as well as the birthplace of incredible festivals like Totally Awesome Fest, Mittenfest, YpsiArboroo, DIYpsi, Ton Up, Freak Fest and many more. Our mission extends beyond this locale, as we plan to expand our network to locations worldwide, offering makers everywhere the opportunity to rehearse, record, practice, and produce.

Name: Mundo de Músicas
Description:
O Mundo de Músicas é um blog que apresenta uma visão panorâmica sobre o fenómeno musical em todas as suas vertentes. Produtores, músicos, fabricantes de instrumentos, managers, designers, roadies e técnicos de som: todas as personagens que compõe a indústria da música merecem o nosso olhar, pois conforme defendia o famoso Lester Bangs, uma banda ou um artista (e a sua personalidade) nunca é composta somente pelos músicos que a integram, mas sim por toda e qualquer pessoa que rodeie os seus elementos.

 Textos de opinião, dissertações, crónicas, reviews de álbuns, entrevistas e histórias de bastidores são apenas algumas das rubricas que apresentamos no Mundo de Músicas. Todos os textos neste blog exprimem a opinião do seu autor. Pura e simplesmente adoramos música e queremos partilhar a nossa visão sobre a arte mais consumida em todo o Mundo. Também falamos de lojas online, plataformas de streaming e cursos digitais que podem ajudar qualquer pessoa a encontrar aquilo que necessita através da Internet, fazendo dessa união o verdadeiro propósito deste blog: oferecer online e gratuitamente muita informação qualificada e apaixonada sobre música.

Name: Voices of Gotham
Description:
Voices of Gotham is an award-winning TTBB a cappella group and not-for-profit 501(c)(3) entity based in New York City, comprised of 85 talented voices. Its members include professional actors and musicians, former college a cappella singers, and people who simply enjoy raising their voices in song. The chorus’ constantly evolving repertoire includes a mix of classical, barbershop, vocal jazz, doo-wop and contemporary a cappella selections. Voices of Gotham is a proud chapter of the Barbershop Harmony Society, the largest a cappella musical organization in the world.

Voices of Gotham performs regularly at storied venues including Madison Square Garden, Rockefeller Center and Symphony Space, and regularly volunteers their services at schools, assisted living facilities and community events to benefit the greater NYC community. VoG also performs on behalf of major corporations (including Brookfield Properties and Deloitte), and at international chorus competitions. Voices of Gotham’s repertoire is extremely varied, and the chorus can provide groups of any size to entertain your guests. Contact the group at info@voicesofgotham.org to arrange a performance!

Voices of Gotham auditions new members regularly, and guests are welcome to visit any of our weekly Thursday rehearsals. Prospective members should be experienced singers with a strong work ethic. Please visit voicesofgotham.org or email membership@voicesofgotham.org for more details

Name: Pacific Coast Jazz / That Other Label
Description: Boutique record label providing publicity and promotion to musicians of all genres.  We get your music heard and seen in the press.  Also provide quarterbacking assistance with your artwork and targeting.  Cover fields of all types of jazz, pop, gospel, AAA and country too.  Also see www.thatotherlabel.com.

Name: Symphony New Brunswick Inc.
Description:
Symphony New Brunswick operates the province's only full-scale, full-season professional symphony orchestra, and Camerata New Brunswick, a 20-member professional chamber orchestra. 

We also hosts the Saint John String Quartet; Ventus Machina, a professional woodwind quintet in Moncton; and Résonance, a chamber music group in Saint John. Through high-quality educational offerings and performances, innovation and creativity, SNB promotes the awareness and appreciation of symphonic music in an increasingly diverse New Brunswick. 

Our impacts go far beyond our audiences. SNB is a significant employer and a powerful economic driver, helping to attract people and companies. Every dollar spent on art and culture yields multiple ones in spinoff economic activity.

Name: Musical Innovations
Description:
A family-friendly company offering musical instruments - student through professional - also lessons, accessories, music and repair services . . . all at surprisingly low prices.

We begin strings instruction at age 4; band instruments in 5th grade. We offer preschool music classes, and a home school music program.

We have the largest selection of professional flutes in SC, and also have an elite string shop. We deliver free of charge to many schools in Greenville, Spartanburg, Anderson, Richland and Lexington Counties (SC). 

We offer free master classes and clinics with nationally-known artists and clinicians.

Our Parent Lounge offers free Wi-Fi so you can make yourself comfortable while your children are in lessons or classes.

We welcome day cares and classes who would like to take an amazing field trip and hear all about the fun of playing music!

Name: Venus Fest
Description:
Venus Fest is a Toronto-based not for profit music festival and concert series. The festival is a new kind of space within music that addresses historical industry challenges from the past while looking to the future. We represent fresh and clear voices that are pushing for change and looking ahead within our communities. We are creating the future today, and our organizing team, board, artists, funders, and partners stand in support of this work. 
Come be a part of it all at our festival or find us at one of our monthly shows through a unique range of Toronto spaces, celebrating local and touring musicians. 
Founded in 2017, we wish to acknowledge Venus Fest is located on the traditional Indigenous territory of the Huron-Wendat, Haudenosaunee, and the territory of the Mississaugas of the Credit.

Name: Bangalore Global Music Academy (BGMA)
Description:
Welcome to Bangalore Global Music Academy (BGMA), a premier destination for one-on-one online music classes where musical excellence meets innovation, specializing in Guitar, Western Vocal and Music Production training. Building on our legacy of top-tier guitar education, all our music programs upholds high standards of training that we are known for in the music community. Whether you're a complete beginner or have experience, we are dedicated to helping you develop your music skills in a supportive, world-class environment.

At Bangalore Global Music Academy (BGMA), we believe in the transformative power of music. Our mission is to provide world-class music education that inspires creativity, builds technical skills, and nurtures a deep passion for music. Our association with RSL awards UK ensures international standards of music education. Whether you're a beginner or have experience, BGMA is committed to helping you reach your fullest musical potential in a supportive and inspiring environment.

BGMA was founded and is managed by professional musicians with extensive experience in music education. Since our inception in 2016, we have been offering online music classes to students not only across Bangalore and other cities in India but also internationally, including in Australia, Dubai, Singapore, the USA, Europe, and many more countries.

Name: Accademia Musicale Bernardo De Muro
Description:
L'Accademia nasce a Tempio Pausania nel 2010 con l'obiettivo di promuovere la cultura musicale in tutto il territorio della Gallura, terra natìa del celebre tenore Bernardo De Muro. 

Ogni anno organizziamo festival e concerti ospitando artisti provenienti da tutto il mondo. 

In più all'interno del Palazzo degli Scolopi un museo dedicato al tenore che raccoglie costumi di scena, foto, ritratti, locandine, incisioni e una collezione di curiosi oggetti personali.

Name: School of Rock São José dos Campos
Description:
Agora a maior rede de escolas de música chegou em São José dos Campos!

Há mais de 10 anos, a School of Rock vem inspirando pessoas com sua metodologia diferenciada. Fundada na Filadélfia, em 1998, a escola se tornou uma rede internacional que já opera mais de 200 unidades ao redor do mundo, em países como Estados Unidos, Canadá, Filipinas, México, Austrália, entre outros. Aqui no Brasil já são 10 unidades espalhadas por São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro. 

Acreditamos que a melhor maneira de aprender música é contextualizar o ensino teórico por meio da experiência prática. Assim, nossa metodologia é baseada em aulas individuais, que proporcionarão o aprendizado técnico e teórico da música, e ensaios semanais em grupo, que trazem a oportunidade de praticar o conteúdo aprendido em aula.

Além de darem sentido à teoria por trás da música, os ensaios em grupo proporcionam ao aluno a convivência com outros músicos, a experiência da dinâmica de banda e de palco e de trabalho em grupo, desenvolvendo características que vão além da musicalidade.

Ensinamos guitarra, violão, baixo, vocais, teclados e bateria. Não é necessário ter experiência anterior ou saber tocar instrumentos. A metodologia da escola abrange todos os níveis de conhecimento.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: Music Kids
Description:
Music Kids was founded to enrich and improve student development by bringing musical instrument education programs into the local school environment. We passionately believe that every child should have the study of a musical instrument as an integral part of their learning experience, right from the start.

Our belief is confirmed by research which shows that the study of a musical instrument during a certain period in a child’s life (between the ages of 3-7) is the single most powerful way to influence brain development. It has also been shown to enhance verbal ability and mathematical reasoning as well as affect mood and self-esteem. 

Our Suzuki-inspired teaching method is designed to foster creativity and analytical skill in students as young as 3 years old. By unlocking the innate expressive potential of each child, we play a vital role in their academic development. 

Music Kids is guided by a very specific philosophy, namely that the exposure to beauty is not a luxury but a human necessity, and that the key to successful music education lies not only in technical excellence but in the ability of teachers to instill and cultivate a love of beautiful music in their students.

Name: Vapor Game Audio
Description:
We are a leading audio production studio with state of the art locations in Toronto and Vancouver. We are home to a dynamic range of award-winning creative directors, composers, engineers, and sound designers - collectively possessing decades of experience in the pursuit of audio perfection. We cover every facet of audio, including original composition, music licensing, sound design, voice casting, voice direction and performance capture, as well as custom in-engine software solutions and implementation.

Like any impressive band or orchestra, we feel that all of the moving parts sound better together. We collaborate with top artists, agencies, brands and designers to create music and audio design that is as memorable and compelling, as it is technically sound.

We invite you to collaborate with us as we strive to push audio boundaries.

Name: Wax Music
Description: Wax Music is an independent music blog and print publication based in Bristol, United Kingdom.

Name: Academy of Indian Music & Arts
Description:
A.I.M.A. (Academy of Indian Music & Arts , Regd) better known as TVG AIMA was founded in 1984 by the legendary musician Guruji Dr.T.V.Gopalakrishnan and registered as a Charitable trust.

Starting from humble beginnings from TVG’s home, AIMA has grown from strength to strength, expanding its activities and has now become a cultural haven where all these activities are thriving. The Academy provides a home away from home, shaping individuals ,transforming them from shy children fearful of strangers and rough around the edges, to poised performers, exuding confidence to be themselves on the international arena. Dr. TVG has made it a goal to offer opportunities to genuine talents who wants to pursue their career only in music , and help them grow to the stature of an artiste of international standards. Dr. TVG also espouses the philosophy that music should be an integral part of everyone’s life for its ability to reduce stress, and help one reach a higher state of mind.
TVG AIMA follows the unique methodology of music training which has been conceived and laid out by our founder the Legendary Indian Musician Dr.T.V.Gopalakrishnan himself. Hailed and christened as the “TVG Training Method” – this unique methodology has empowered multitude of Vocalists and instrumentalists globally , build, repair and free their voices and hitches of performances for over 60 years.

Name: The Mobile Music School
Description:
The Mobile Music School believe in harnessing the potential of each participant who takes part in our programmes. This is achieved through our teaching and learning style that encourages self-expression, team work and creativity as each participants musical ability, confidence and self esteem develops.

We deliver interactive, educational and fun music programme and workshops in schools, libraries and youth clubs. We cater for events, festivals and kids camps too.

From energising one day workshops, short music courses that last a term or classroom music programmes that run over a school year we have something to suit every age, ability and budget. 

Make a booking with us to experience what we do!

Name: DearBrand Music Production
Description:
DearBrand Music is a Music Production and Library.
An expert in ASIAN Music offering superior quality music used in commercials, televisions, video games, and more. We provide custom music as well as supervision for all your projects. Our goal is to make this world happier with our creativity. Always offer you GOOD MUSIC and SINCERE SERVICE

Name: Korean Indie
Description: The purpose of Korean Indie is to help readers discover the huge diversity of music in South Korea and musicians of Korean descent. While the term “indie” usually defines one type of music, there are lots of exciting and cool bands that play a wide variety of sounds, and we want visitors to discover them all, regardless of genre.

Description:

Our vision is to be a leading solution provider for performing artists, and a solution for brands and companies in reaching their business and marketing goals, through developing creative and innovative marketing communication strategy in an ever-changing landscape.

Name: Tapete Records / Bureau B
Description:
Als unabhängiges Musiklabel mit Sitz in Hamburg vertreten wir bei Tapete Records seit über 20 Jahren internationale Künstler aus verschiedenen Genres. Unser Anspruch ist es, musikalische Talente zu fördern und ihnen eine Plattform zu bieten, um ihre Kunst einem breiteren Publikum zugänglich zu machen.

Neben Tapete Records wurde im Jahr 2005 'Bureau B' ein weiteres Label ins Leben gerufen, das sich hauptsächlich auf elektronische Musik spezialisiert. Zusätzlich unterstützen wir mit unserer In-House Booking-Agentur ‚Howdy Partner Booking‘ unsere , sowie externe Künstler bei der Organisation von Auftritten und Touren.

Unsere Leidenschaft für Musik spiegelt sich in jedem unserer Projekte wider. Wir suchen stets nach neuen Talenten und spannenden Musikrichtungen, um unser Portfolio zu erweitern und unseren Fans einzigartige Hörerlebnisse zu bieten.

Wenn auch Du Teil unserer musikalischen Reise sein möchten, besuch uns gerne auf unserer Website, unserem Shop, oder folge uns auf unseren Social-Media-Kanälen! Wir freuen uns darauf, mit Dir in Kontakt zu treten!

Name: Festival OFF
Description:
En parallèle du Festival d’été de Québec, le Festival OFF propose, depuis maintenant sept ans, une programmation axée sur la relève d’ici et d’ailleurs. Permettant à des milliers de spectateurs de découvrir de nouveaux artistes et de nouveaux styles musicaux, il est le seul festival musical de la ville à offrir une majorité de spectacles gratuits.

Since 2004, Quebec OFF Festival provides free music concerts in unique downtown venues and also on outdoor scenes. Quebec OFF programs local and international artists, performing from the freakiest to the most delicious music.

Description:

Name: Associazione Culturale Blues in Villa APS
Description:
L'Associazione Culturale Blues in Villa si è costituita ufficialmente nel 2004 da un gruppo di amici legati da un comune denominatore: la passione per la musica ed in particolare per la musica "afroamericana".
Le finalità sono quelle di promozione e valorizzazione del territorio in cui l'associazione opera, attraverso la creazione di eventi e con l'intreccio di relazioni stabili tra associazionismo, enti pubblici (Comuni, Provincie, Regioni) e partner importanti nel mondo imprenditoriale.
Oltre alla musica, trattata in tutte le sue forme, si sono affiancate quasi naturalmente anche altre forme culturali quali mostre fotografiche, esposizioni d'arte, convegni, workshop, corsi di approfondimento e presentazioni di libri.

Name: Cantaloupe Music
Description:
CANTALOUPE MUSIC is the record label created and launched in March 2001 by the three founders of New York's legendary Bang on a Can organization — composers Michael Gordon, David Lang and Julia Wolfe — with Bang on a Can managing director Kenny Savelson. Cantaloupe Music has made a massive impact in the new music community, and has been recognized by critics and fans worldwide for its edgy and adventurous sounds.

Our goal is to provide a home for contemporary classical and post-classical music that is, in the words of Michael Gordon, “too funky for the academy.” Throughout its 20-year history, Cantaloupe has repeatedly received Top Ten of the Year accolades from such publications as the New York Times, the New Yorker, the Washington Post, the Boston Globe, The Guardian (UK), The Wire (UK), Newsday, Mojo magazine, Gramophone, Billboard, Stereophile and Time Out New York. Cantaloupe releases have also been featured on CNN, National Public Radio, the BBC, Pitchfork.tv and numerous outlets online, in print and over the airwaves.

Name: Phoenix Children's Chorus
Description:
Since 1984, Phoenix Children’s Chorus (PCC) has been transforming children’s lives through music by facilitating artistic, musical, and cultural development, and offering world-class choral education. More than just a performance ensemble, PCC prides itself on its rigorous music education curriculum including the study and practice of vocal technique, innovative music literacy instruction, and professional performance skills. Our artistic team is comprised of highly qualified, experienced, and successful educators who enjoy guiding children to reach their potential. PCC began with just 35 children, became a 501(c)3 nonprofit in 2010, and has grown to become Arizona’s premier mixed-voice youth choral education program, with more than 300 choristers in a variety of ensembles.

Quality music education should be accessible for all children. Our comprehensive program helps children from across the Valley — from economically and culturally diverse backgrounds — to build self-esteem, practice teamwork, and develop broader cultural understanding through music. We strive for variety in our artistic programming, performing an array of styles and genres, premiering new works, and singing traditional choral favorites. Choristers gain professional performance experience through staged concert series, community performances, domestic and international touring, and collaboration with fellow arts organizations. Touring throughout the United State as well as international destinations like Germany, Australia, Italy, China, Ireland, Argentina, and Russia have provided PCC choristers and families with and musical experiences that form the foundations of tolerance, respect, and understanding.

Name: NEW Sinfonia
Description:
NEW Sinfonia are passionate about music and are redefining what it means to be an orchestra.

 

We are an orchestra made up of exciting creative professional musicians who come from across North Wales and beyond. Our mission is to make innovative musical experiences of the highest quality available to everyone, create musical experiences for all young people and develop sustainable projects which matter to all our communities.

Name: Black Star Foundation
Description:
Black Star Foundation is a non-profit organisation which has been committed to promote reggae music in Holland for more than 16 years. The foundation organises reggae events and concerts, manages and handles bookings for artists/bands, publishes music on its own label and supports and develops new talent.

BACKGROUND OF BLACK STAR FOUNDATION:
Black Star Foundation is started up because of idealistic ideas of the founder Michelle Boekhout van Solinge. She graduated in Geography (University of Amsterdam, 1997), traveled a lot in Asia, Africa and the Caribbean and in the year 2002 she lived and worked in Ghana (West Africa). There she got the idea to stimulate the communication between Western and non-Western countries and to bring people with different cultural backgrounds a little closer to each other.

Through art and culture (especially music) the foundation wants to contribute in the cultural integration, in bringing people together with different cultural backgrounds and work together on one project. Music is perfect for that, it is a shared interest from people all over the world, a language we all speak, no matter where you are from. Based on that, Black Star Foundation has developed her activities.

THE GOAL OF BLACK STAR FOUNDATION:
The goal of Black Star Foundation is to promote and stimulate artists from abroad and, more in general, to promote the exchange of western and non-western art, music and culture.

The foundation tries to achieve their goal by:
    * Organising multicultural concerts and other events whereby the artists themselves will exchange experiences, skills and understanding;
    * Obtaining financial means and credit facilities for promoting artists from countries outside of Europe;
    * Cooperating with other organisations with corresponding goals.

MORE INFO:
Website: http://www.blackstarfoundation.nl

Name: shesaid.so Northern UK
Description:
The Northern chapter of Shesaid.so formed out of a desire to form a network for womxn based outside of the UK’s capital to cater for the developing industry in the North.

#SSSNorthernUK aims to offer regular mixers, events and learning opportunities including panel content, collaborations and workshops, and to share jobs and mentorship schemes for Northern womxn. On a day-to-day level, the Northern chapter Facebook group is a resource for sharing events in the North of the UK, advice, jobs, news and anything our members feel contributes towards our community.

We look forward to implementing our mission to foster an environment that empowers womxn, supports collaboration, creativity and positive values in the North!

Name: Agora
Description:
Agora is the fastest growing ticket marketplace in America. Our live bidding exchange built on a “price-ladder” saves fans time & money as well as enables sellers to offload inventory at will.

Complacency afforded by network effects have caused innovation in the secondary ticket market to stagnate. Agora is on a mission to change that by breaking the incumbents’ hold on the market. Through leveraging emerging market segments, we’re circumventing network effects, in order to drive not only ticket buying and selling, but the whole live event industry into a new era of innovation.

Name: Conservatorio di Como
Description:
Il Conservatorio di musica “Giuseppe Verdi” di Como, istituto superiore di studi musicali inquadrato nell’area dell’Alta Formazione Artistica e Musicale (AFAM) del Ministero dell’Istruzione, Università e Ricerca, è il più giovane dei Conservatori in Lombardia, essendo nato nel 1982. Ha sede nella zona centrale della città, in via Cadorna, in uno storico edificio di impianto quattrocentesco, con ampliamenti che risalgono al Settecento e all’Ottocento. Tra il 1971 ed il 1973 il Comune di Como ha restaurato e recuperato l’intera struttura edilizia che il tempo aveva lentamente portato ad un rovinoso stato di degrado provocando il crollo di diverse parti dell’edificio.

Nella primavera del 2010 è stato collocato, nel nuovo salone completamente ristrutturato, il grande organo a tre tastiere costruito dalla Fabbrica Zanin di Codroipo (Udine).

Oggi il Conservatorio è una realtà ormai consolidata sul territorio della città e di tutta la provincia, interagisce con Istituzioni universitarie e artistiche anche di province confinanti e ha una popolazione studentesca non solo proveniente da varie regioni italiane ma anche da Paesi stranieri, quali Svizzera, Germania, Slovacchia, Albania, Bulgaria, Russia, Moldavia, Ucraina, Spagna, Corea del Sud, Giappone, Cina, Messico, Colombia, Salvador, Giordania, Iran.

L’attività dell’Istituto si propone sui tre ambiti fondamentali della formazione musicale: la didattica, la produzione e la ricerca.

Il Conservatorio di Como prende parte stabilmente, spesso conseguendo lusinghieri riconoscimenti, al Premio Nazionale delle Arti, sotto l’egida ministeriale; alcuni suoi studenti vengono periodicamente selezionati nell’organico dell’Orchestra nazionale dei Conservatori. Formazioni strumentali e vocali dell’Istituto lariano sono chiamate a prendere parte alla trasmissione radiofonica Conservatori in Concerto, prodotta e trasmessa da Radio Vaticana.

Name: Dejan Petrovic Big Band
Description:
Dejan Petrović rođen je 1985. godine u Užicu, u selu Dubokom, kao sin naslednik najpoznatijeg srpskog trubača, Miće Petrovića. 
U muzičkoj manufakturi ove porodice, Dejan i njegov brat Darko su četvrta generacija trubača. 
Trubu je prvi zasvirao Dejanov pradeda Tanasije, a od njega se ova veština prenosila sa kolena na koleno. 
Tanasija je nasledio Danilo, a Danila sin Mićo, koji je prvi svetom proneo slavu ovog instrumenta. 
Dejan je najmlađi dobitnik “Majstorskog pisma”, višestruki osvajač svih nagrada na Saboru u Guči, među kojima je i nagrada Prva truba sveta, sa istog Sabora. 
Širom sveta je poznat po izvođenju srpske tradicionalne muzike, koju često kombinuje sa totalno suprotnim, modernim elementima. 
Tu je u pitanju fuzija zvuka tradicionalnih instrumenata trubačkog orkestra i drugih instrumenata koji predstavljaju suprotnost tome, poput spoja zvuka trube i distorzije na električnoj gitari. 
Kao pri svakoj fuziji, oslobađa se velika energija, koju nije bilo teško prepoznati ni u ovom slučaju. 
Do sada, iza sebe ima 4 diskografska izdanja, a pored autorske muzike koju radi sa svojim bendom, u repertoaru imaju mnoštvo stranih obrada i internacionalnih numera čija je interpretacija veoma autentična, zahvaljujući samoj koncepciji benda, odnosno spoju instrumenata koji ga čine. 
Učestvovao je na svim većim, domaćim, muzičkim festivalima i nebrojeno puta je predstavljao Srbiju, na raznim svetskim sajmovima, sportskim i kulturnim događajima, festivalima, i to uvek sa velikim uspehom. 
Jednom rečju – Ambasador srpske trube.

Name: Brothers Produções
Description:
Brothers Produções Artísticas fundada em 2012, é um escritório artístico localizado em São Paulo e Campo Grande, responsável por produção, planejamento, gerenciamento de carreira, marketing e vendas. 

E com os seus 6 anos de mercado, comandada por Teófilo Teló profissional com mais 20 anos de experiência no mercado artístico, musical e empresário do cantor Michel Teló. Já trabalhou com o gestão da turnê de shows internacionais do cantor Michel Teló no ano de 2012. Turnê que passou por diversos países como Rússia, França, Alemanha, Portugal, Holanda entre outros, e produzindo conteúdos que deram origem a uma série nomeada "Michel Teló Pelo Mundo" televisionada pelo canal de TV Multishow no ano de 2013. Programa especial que acompanhava o Michel, durante sua turnê pelo mundo, o contato de Michel com os fãs, os bastidores e a ansiedade pelos shows inéditos que Michel fez em diversos países do mundo.

O escritório é responsável também por conceito e gestão de produção de mais de 10 DVD's e CD's incluindo planejamento lançamento e pós lançamento, entre eles, Jads e Jadson - Diamante Bruto, Michel Teló - Na Balada, onde ocorreu a gravação do clipe "Ai Se Eu Te Pego" de Michel Teló, clipe que por 7 anos foi o video mais visto no Brasil, hoje com 811 milhões de visualizações. 

Outros cases,  é o recente trabalho da dupla  Maria Cecília e Rodolfo, chamado "Em Fases", composto pelo sucesso "Depois da Briga" e atualmente o novo DVD do cantor Michel Teló nomeado, Bem Sertanejo - O Show, composto pelos clássicos sertanejos e sucessos do cantor, com participações especiais de Jorge e Mateus, Maiara e Maraisa e Marília Mendonça. 

Outro case também é criação e produção do Bem Sertanejo: A Série, televisionada no Fantástico. Série que contava a história das músicas sertanejas de cada região por meio de conversas, muita música e participações especiais de artistas da região, como Henrique e Juliano e Maiara e Maraisa no Tocantins, o encontro de Jorge, Leonardo, Zezé di Camargo e Bruno, em solo goiano. A série tinha uma média de 25 pontos de audiência, nas duas temporadas que foram passadas em 2014 e 2017.  

A Brothers é responsável pela criação e idealização do projeto Bem Sertanejo - O Musical.

Name: RAMzine
Description: We live and breathe alternative music because we know it has the power to move you, challenge you, and change you.

Name: Studio du Faune
Description:
• BRETAGNE - RENNES •

Le Studio du Faune - recording et post-prod audio - existe depuis 25 ans. Il se spécialise dans la musique, la musique à l’image et l’audio 3D. 

Dès nos débuts nous cherchions à créer un lieu de création et d'expériences musicales.
Cela fait 25 ans que nous prenons soin de proposer nos Studios du Faune en tant que lieu résidentiel auprès d'artistes nationaux & internationaux et leurs équipes de production.

Planté au sein d'un parc de verdure, en Bretagne, à proximité de Rennes et Brocéliande, notre studio n'est pas qu'une longue liste de matériels, mais bien un lieu de vie, chaleureux et créatif.

Nous accueillons vos projets Musique, Cinema, TV, Podcast, Radio, XR aux différents moments clés :
- prises de son studio
- Mixage Musique 
- Mixage Musique à l'image / Post-production Audio Ciné-TV

- Prise de son orchestre, voix et instruments (binaural, VR ou 3D sound formats) 
- Mixage Audio 3D : DOLBY ATMOS 9.1.4, Ambisonic HOA, Auro  3D, DTS-X 
- Formation au mixage Dolby Atmos - Immersif Audio 3D
- conseil et la création de vos contenus sonores immersifs

- Résidence créative - écriture / PreProd Live concert&spectacle
- Hébergement résidentiel 
- Coordination technique 
- Production executive
- Partenariat projets R&D

Notre participation au film d’animation L’air de rien du réalisateur Gabriel Hénot Lefèvre, vient compléter les références acquises dans le cinéma (Pharaon, Le Sauvage et la Maîtresse des roses ; Si seulement je pouvais Hiberner ; Bronx ;  Les Lyonnais ; Bayala ; Divines...), les séries TV (Les Papillons Noirs, L’île prisonnière, Astrid et Raphaelle, Braquo...) ou la production musicale (Gim’s, Naaman, Dadju, Kyo, Miossec, Moriarty, Tinariwen...). 

Outre ses 2 Studios & régies de mixage audio, son plateau de prises de son 92 m2 et ses cabines, son gîte hébergement,  le studio peut être configuré en lieu de résidence créative pour les artistes, auteurs et compositeurs en phase d’écriture ou de pré-production.

Name: Basik Music
Description:
Iniciativas musicales auténticas para apoyar el talento emergente. Basik music es un proyecto que se ha hecho un hueco en la escena madrileña en los últimos años.

Hoy en día contamos con el apoyo de Larrosa Music Group.

Empezamos con las Basik Sessions, eventos donde artista y público están cara a cara, sin barreras y reina un respeto difícil de encontrar en otros sitios. Un sitio dónde el público viene a descubrir las propuestas que les presentamos en cada evento.

Tras ello, desarrollamos varios proyectos para grandes marcas, gestionando programación y producción de eventos. 

Y luego llegó el momento de abrir nuevas líneas. Basik Management para trabajar codo con codo en el de la carrera de artistas. Basik Stage como marca bajo la que producir todo tipo de eventos.

Trabajamos día a día con el propósito de ayudar a nuestra comunidad de artistas a llegar a un público nuevo, abierto y receptivo e impulsar iniciativas y experiencias de calidad.

Name: Mighty Sounds
Description:
Mighty Sounds je unikátní třídenní hudební festival, který se koná každoročně v červenci v Táboře. Festival se soustředí především na punk a punkrock, rock'n'roll, hardcore, reggae, ska, rockabilly, indie rock a hudební styly a scény, které se od nich odvíjejí anebo s nimi úzce souvisejí. Specialitou festivalu je fakt, že každoročně představuje hlavně zahraniční jména, která tvoří přes 80% line-upu a jsou doplněna tím nejlepším z především žánrové scény v ČR – zkrátka nic, co by připomínalo tzv. českou festivalovou klasiku.
 
Festival odstartoval svou existenci v roce 2005 a za osm let existence se na jeho pódiích vystřídalo bezpočet hudebních uskupení: za všechny například Ska-P, Pennywise, Anti-Flag, Madball, Backyard Babies, H20, The Casualties, Sworn Enemy, NoMeansNo, The Hotknives, Mad Caddies, Panteón Rococó, Third World, Israel Vibration, Derrick Morgan, The Aggrolites či Mad Sin. V roce 2012 představil festival opět žánrově pestrou nadílku v podobě jmen jako Irie Révoltés, Alborosie, Inner Circle, The Locos, Set Your Goals, Gallows, Biohazard, Discharge, Frank Turner, The Meteors nebo The Real McKenzies. Kromě žánrové různorodosti je předností festivalu také to, že každý rok si po boku větších kapel zahraje celá řada menších, talentovaných, nebo u nás ne tolik známých, vždy ale vysoce kvalitních skupin.

The brand has since diversified, moving into artist services, while retaining its roots as a publication. 

 With a primary focus on supporting emerging artists, Futuremag Music has been at the forefront of supporting the next generation. Placing careful emphasis on quality over quantity, Futuremag Music aims to provide personable glimpses into the local and international music scenes.

Description: The New York Summer Music Festival (NYSMF) is  an international six-week music program for young musicians ages 11-25.  NYSMF Faculty and Visiting Artists  from renowned musical institutions including: The Juilliard School,  The Curtis Institute of Music, The Manhattan School of Music, Eastman School of Music, Cleveland Institute of Music, The New England Conservatory, New York University, The New York Philharmonic, Boston Symphony, The Philadelphia Orchestra, The Metropolitan Opera Orchestra, Vienna Philharmonic, DIVA Jazz Orchestra, etc.

Name: School of Rock Aurora
Description:
At School of Rock we believe the best way to learn music is to play music. We take students from the lesson room to the stage, developing both their confidence and musicianship with programs designed for all skill levels.
School of Rock teaches guitar, bass, vocals, keyboards, drums and combines weekly private music lessons and group band rehearsals to prepare students to take the stage in front of live audiences in an authentic concert setting.
Call us to find out more about our programs and what we can do for you!

Description:
