Name: HOFF BARTHELSON MUSIC SCHOOL
Description:
Virginia Hoff and Joyce Barthelson believed that the joy of music and the skills to perform it should be available to everyone. When these two gifted musicians founded Hoff-Barthelson Music School in 1944, they built a legacy that has touched the lives of thousands: a warm, friendly music school dedicated to the highest standards of education, performance, and community service. 

Today, a commitment to creativity, collaboration, and community permeates the School. Students of all ages, aptitudes, and levels of interest—from casual learners to students preparing to pursue careers in music, from 9-month-olds in our Early Childhood Program to recent retirees returning to music making after decades devoted to pursuing careers and raising children—all enjoy these benefits:

A supportive, joyful learning environment. We inspire students to develop their full creative potential by pursuing their love of music with peers, friends, family members, and teachers. 

A focus on the whole person. Developing musical skill, understanding, and appreciation goes hand in hand with nurturing valuable learning and life skills. Problem-solving abilities, fine and gross motor skills, self-confidence, peer relationships, focus and organization, teamwork, and more are strengthened through high-quality music education.

Exceptional teaching. Our faculty—drawn from the region’s most talented teachers and performers—excel at meeting individual needs, developing artistic and human potential, and inspiring achievement for students of all levels of ability.

A multifaceted curriculum. Our comprehensive approach deepens and accelerates musical development through individualized private instruction; classroom instruction in music theory, sight-singing, and music history; frequent performance opportunities, including workshops, master classes with visiting artists, recitals, and festivals; and ongoing assessment of student progress.

Our Mission: We harness data-driven processes that inspire growth for artists across the African Region
Vision: To build a wide network for fair and far-reaching music companies across Africa and the world Over
Values: Fairness, Innovation, Boldness, transformation, Empathy, and Collaboration.

the orchestral ensemble is the common thread throughout the collection • made up of one to twenty musicians, it lends a human dimension to the narration • the settings range from minimalist to spectacular, without exaggeration • the orchestra is an open concept, no instrument is off limits • live musicians • an imaginative approach •

François-Elie Roulin & Fabrice Ravel-Chapuis

Name: HenrysonBalogun Creatives
Description:

Since January 2011, HENRYSONBALOGUN Artists Management Inc. (HENRYSONBALOGUN) has been an international new starter in the management of Featured Artists activities of performing artists; The Company cater for pre-dominantly in Artist in Pop, House, Electro and Dance genre type and multi-media productions. 

The company honor and applaud, Artists for their immeasurable contributions to the performing arts throughout the UK and the world. 

The Music Manager has the most interaction with the artist and is generally the most important person in the artist's musical life. They are involved in planning, coordinating and organizing the career of the artist. They are involved in counseling and advising the artist on all matters related to their musical careers. The personal manager should research the music industry and know all about record labels, publishing companies, producers, booking agents, promoters, publicists, stylists, photographers, recording engineers, graphic designers, video directors, music licensees, etc., and how they integrate themselves into the overall career plan. The more contacts the manager has, the more effective they will be at their job.
We at HenrysonBalogun focus on a niche sector of the market predominately Featured Artist

Name: Baticum Produtora
Description:
A Baticum Produtora de Som foi fundada há 13 anos pelos músicos e produtores Péri e Rodrigo Fonseca.

Com a união de um talento baiano com um talento paulistano, criaram e produziram inúmeras peças publicitárias para diversas produtoras do mercado.

Em 1998 resolveram montar seu próprio estúdio, situado até hoje no mesmo endereço na Vila Romana, em São Paulo.

Com criatividade e inovação aliados a muita determinação, Péri, Rodrigo e Equipe fazem da Baticum uma das produtoras mais requisitadas e longevas do mercado. Fazendo de cada trabalho um desafio musical a ser superado, sempre fazendo o melhor.

Name: Musica Lirica Opera
Description: Musica Lirica Opera Company is a Blackpool and the Fylde based organisation which performs first rate opera and operetta in imaginative productions which aim to entertain and stimulate  both audiences and performers alike.   The company calls on the services of professional and gifted amateur singers and instrumentalists under the baton of Michael Hall.  A major goal of the company is to make opera accessible to a public which may not be familiar with its musical and dramatic worth, as well as accommodate the more experienced opera going public.  Past productions have included Mozart’s The Magic Flute , The Marriage of Figaro, Don Giovanni, Bastien and Bastienne, Puccini’s opera triple bill “Il Trittico”, Purcell’s Dido and Aeneas, Lehar's The Merry Widow etc. Future productions include Puccini’s Tosca.

Name: Studio 13

Name: the Coombe Sessions
Description:
The Coombe Sessions is a media platform founded in 2019 to promote musicians based Ireland.

The project started when Johnny and Leon gathered together one day to record a song from one of their favourite band to realise that there was not enough space and opportunity for artists that were not in the mainstream to promote their work through well produced videos.

As their motto says, they are "Together to Make Music" and everything involved around this craft that we all enjoy in some shape or form.

The Coombe Sessions Manifesto____
    "We're here to make music, this amazing craft that we all enjoy in some shape or form. 
    We’re here to share appreciation for the individuals that put thousands and thousands of hours practicing to deliver us beautiful moments that will make us laugh, cry, create, focus, lose control, remember things and sometimes gladly forget.
    That’s why we’re together for, to make music."

We hope you get to enjoy the content and this journey.

The Coombe Sessions - Together to Make Music

Description:
Pro Audio design and manufacture.  

At Noise Control Audio we let the quality of our speakers speak for themselves. Our reputation has been built on the production of boxes that create some of the purest sound in the industry. We never compromise our design to fit mass production techniques or the mass market. Our aim is to produce the best equipment possible to achieve the purest quality of sound.

Design over processing is our ethos. A Noise Control system relies on the build quality in tandem with innovative engineering to create boxes that sound incredible in any application. Whether you need a stadium sized system for live bands, an intimate club primarily for DJs or a multi-purpose venue we can offer you a Noise Control system with purity and integrity.

Our team have gathered years of experience across the audio field. From research and development to managing live events and right back to humping boxes across muddy fields. Noise Control Audio is the result of our collective passion and dedication to sound.

Name: Camp Jam LLC
Description: Camp Jam is the nation’s premier provider of rock music programs for kids and adults. Founded by Dan Lipson & Jeff Carlisi (38 Special),Camp Jam offers summer camp programs in 17 cities; a corporate team building event, Camp Jam Inc; and a weekend event for adults, Camp Jam EXP.

Name: Vic's Drum Shop
Description:
Vic’s Drum Shop is Chicago’s only dedicated drum and percussion shop.  Our mission is to bring people together to build, support, and promote the drum community by providing excellence in customer service, product offerings, and education. 

Located inside Music Garage Chicago in the West Loop in Chicago, IL.

Name: BANdSHI
Description: BANdSHI is a music club of the Faculty of Commerce and Accountancy. Our goal is to bring together students who love singing, dancing, and playing. We provide them with opportunities to showcase their talents to the community by organizing events for students to perform, publishing content on various social media platforms. BANdSHI helps develop members’ passions and interests, as well as teamwork skills to enhance members' professionalism.

Name: BMP
Description:
BMP is a location sound recording company, established in 1989, specialising in classical, jazz and acoustic music. 

With bases in England and Scotland we work across the UK, Europe and the USA.

Our mission
• To provide artists with a calm, empathetic playing environment
• To create beautiful sounding, high quality recordings 

Our core services
•  Location audio recording of live events and recording sessions
•  Recording engineering
•  Record production
•  Digital audio editing and mastering
•  Video production
•  A complete CD production service for musicians and ensembles

Our clients include record labels, music publishers, broadcasters, ensembles and musicians.

Name: PedalSync
Description:
Nous sommes deux jeunes étudiants-entrepreneurs associés autour du projet PedalSync.
Notre projet: 
C’est de créer une solution innovante axée sur l’ergonomie d’utilisation des pédales de guitare.

Nous proposons une réponse au problème concernant les guitaristes amateurs et professionnels en recherche d'ergonomie d'utilisation de leur matériel. 
Plus précisément nous répondons à deux problèmes:
Le premier il est impossible de se souvenir au degré près des réglages appliqués a ses pédales lorsque l'on les change régulièrement.
Le second, il est très long et fastidieux de changer ces dits réglages. Rendant impossible toute modification de sa tonalité au beau milieu d'une performance.

Name: Indian Classical Music School of Columbia, LLC
Description: We are a unique school in the greater Columbia/Baltimore/Washington DC area offering Indian classical vocal certification up to a Sangeet Visharad (Bachelor's degree equivalent.) All training is based on the curriculum devised and propagated by the world-renowned Akhil Bharatiya Gandharva Mahavidyalaya Mandal (ABGMVM).  We offer vocal training that responds to the ABGMVM curriculum, so students may take the appropriate tests & receive certification.

Name: Punknews.org
Description: Punknews.org was founded in 1998 by Aubin Paul. We published our first story in October of 1999. Our mandate is to provide an inclusive community-based site for the delivery and discussion of music news surrounding punk, ska, hardcore, emo, metal and indie.

Description: Filmark production consists of creative, innovative and ambitious people who create audio-visual content, organize concerts, and represent singers and artists. The Mitrovica Rock School connects youth from various backgrounds in the ethnically divided city of Mitrovica in Northern Kosovo.

As a partner in the Music Connects project, we cooperate at the regional level with Roma Rock School and Music School Enterprise, both in Skopje, North Macedonia.

Record Label | Publishing | Management | Booking | Live

Name: Studio 51 Music
Description:
Studio 51 Music is a unique business model in the production of music for film and TV. We focus entirely on providing the highest quality music from world-class composers on time and on budget with the shortest turnaround time in the industry. What differs with Studio 51 is we work exclusively with music libraries. We do not market directly to the end users. We focus only on quality music.

Our music is heard daily by an estimated 120 million viewers worldwide. And we currently represent more than 10,000 plays annually on major network stations alone.

With 140 composers and the ability to write in more than 200 Genres and sub genres, Studio 51 Music might be just what your library is looking for.

Studio 51 Music works hard to give you that competitive edge that sets your library on a faster and more productive pace.

Studio 51

Music Designed With You In Mind

Name: CréaSync
Description:
CréaMusic est une plateforme numérique permettant aux labels et éditeurs indépendants de faire connaître leurs catalogues auprès des acteurs du marché de la synchronisation et de la musique à l'image du monde entier (publicité, TV, cinéma...).

Cette plateforme est alimentée par les catalogue des adhérents, mis en avant par des playlists thématiques, constamment renouvelées et largement diffusées par le biais de newsletter, communiqués...

Première solution mutualisée dédiée aux marchés de la synchronisation, CréaMusic permet la promotion d'une vaste diversité de la création musicale.

Un outil d'accompagnement nécessaire et indispensable aux usages de la diffusion musicale à l'ère du numérique pour un très grand nombre d'indépendants, et une nouvelle source de revenus dans un paysage en pleine mutation.

CréaMusic is a digital platform that allows independent labels and publishers to expose their work to the players in the markets of synchronization and 'music for image', throughout the world (advertising, TV, cinema ...).

This platform is powered by members' catalogs, highlighted by thematic playlists, constantly renewed and widely disseminated through newsletters, press releases ...

As the first shared solution dedicated to synchronization markets, CréaMusic allows the promotion of a vast diversity of musical creation.

It is an essential and necessary support tool for the use of music broadcasting in the digital age for a  large number of independents, and a new source of income in a changing landscape.

Name: AMA Television - Top Afro Music Worldwide
Description:
AMAtelevision.net
AMA Television Australia is a music platform for Top African music worldwide. AMA presents the top and most popular Afro music across the globe with high recognition and appreciation to the best Afro music. AMA Australia aims to promote and spread the appreciation of Afro music and support upcoming music artists through digital media and online marketing. AMA Television is powered by Jay Baba Marketing.

Name: SURFING
Description: SURFING is a post-punk/shoegaze band that formed in Virginia in 2012. In 2012 they performed over 100 tour dates in the US, including showcases at CMJ, L Magazine's Northside Fest and SXSW 2013. The band just finished recording their debut EP at The Sound Studios in Charlottesville, VA with producer Nick Adams (LIL KIDS) to be released late Spring 2013.

Name: Legacy Music Co., Ltd
Description:
We are a leading music content aggregator based in Myanmar, specializing in worldwide distribution, comprehensive rights management, and efficient royalties collection. With a vast network of over 60 digital service providers, we empower Myanmar artists and labels to reach a global audience, while ensuring their intellectual property is protected and monetized effectively. 

Our mission is to bridge the gap between Myanmar's vibrant music industry and international markets. Through strategic partnerships with major digital service providers, streaming platforms, online stores, and social media channels, we enable artists and labels to maximize their reach and exposure on a global scale. We facilitate seamless distribution of music content, ensuring it reaches the right platforms and audiences worldwide.

We understand the importance of safeguarding artists' intellectual property rights. Our experienced team of rights management experts diligently oversees the entire rights clearance process, including licensing, copyright registration, and content protection. We strive to maintain the integrity of artistic creations while providing peace of mind to our clients, securing their rights and minimizing the risk of unauthorized usage.

Name: Heaven 11
Description:
Heaven 11 is an online platform for copyright registration, management, licensing and processing – servicing collective management organizations, DSPs, publishers and record labels. Its hub-focused architecture driven by machine readable contracts allows different entities to run and maintain their multi-territorial multi-rights copyright database, recognize and resolve disputes, license repertoire, process reports and  distribute royalties smoothly and efficiently. 

We aim to unlock the global music market potential by improving licensing and royalty distribution processes.  

Heaven11 has already integrated with industry leading music service providers such as Apple Music, iTunes, YouTube, Deezer, Google Play Music, Spotify, Yandex Music and a dozen of other sources to license repertoire of over 600 publishers from 37 countries.

Name: ETM-Colorado
Description:
Education Through Music-Colorado partners with under-resourced public schools to provide music as a core subject for all children.
The downsizing of school budgets too often results in the elimination of music programs despite its proven potential to develop children’s emotional, behavioral, and relational development. Our mission: to bring music back to schools so that all children, despite social or economic status, have access to a high-quality education. 
Music is integrated into the school day through the skills of exceptional music teachers who are trained to promote diversity and foster parental and community engagement.
Our national network serves more than 40,000 children every year in New York, Los Angeles, Denver and Boston. In Colorado, we operate in 8 schools involving a community of 10,000 people including students, families and school staff.

Name: Punch Magazine
Description:
A Punch é uma revista online de música onde a novidade pauta a informação. Virada para o público português, queremos dar a conhecer as coisas boas e recentes que são feitas tanto cá como lá fora. Mandem as vossas demos, promos, press releases e afins.

Queremos falar sobre o vosso trabalho.

geral@punchmagazine.press

Name: Tommy Advice
Description: TOMMY ADVICE is a publishing, management, and consultancy firm, established in 2019 by Dutch music executive Thomas de Raad. Bringing over a decade of experience across various pivotal roles within the music industry, Thomas has cultivated a deep understanding of its complexities. This expertise has empowered him to guide his clients to notable success, including collaborations with artists like Kygo, Dean Lewis, and Duncan Laurence, and achieving a cumulative stream count of over half a billion across the company's versatile roster.

Name: Brandon Hoffman Entertainment
Description: 12+ years of DJing for artists like Tiesto, Chance the Rapper, Ciara, and Danny Ocean. Notable bookings/residencies include The Plaza Hotel (NY), The ESPYs (LA), Belly Up (Aspen), NCAA Football National Championships (Dallas & Phoenix), Opium Mar (Barcelona), Gravity Polanco (CDMX).

Description: The Institute for Jaques-Dalcroze Education, LLC, provides an immersion in the approach. Designed for music educators, each two-week session includes daily classes in Eurhythmics, Solfege, Improvisation, Pedagogy, and Plastique Animée. Renowned pedagogue Jack Stevenson, Diplôme Superiéur Jaques-Dalcroze shares over 45 years of experience teaching early childhood through professional levels.

Name: Music City.cz
Description:
Jsme jeden z největších prodejců hudebních nástrojů a zvukové techniky v ČR a na Slovensku s tradicí, která sahá až do 90. let. 

Naše poslání / "reason why" by se dalo shrnout takto:
Usnadnit začátky, být parťákem a překonávat překážky na cestě k seberealizaci prostřednictvím hudby a prostř. hodnot jako jsou vášeň pro hudbu, kreativita, individualita.

Tzn. že tu jsme pro všechny, kteří milují hudbu a mají potřebu se prostřednictvím ní (sebe)realizovat. Ať už jsou to vášniví začátečníci, hobíci nebo profíci. Bez ohledu na hudební styl, věk, pohlaví, víru nebo světonázor. 

Stručné BIO:

- 3 kamenné prodejny (Praha, Brno, Uh. Hradiště) i e-shop
- široký výběr sortimentu TOP světových značek
- spolupracujeme s řadou předních muzikantů i kapel 
- v Praze disponujeme vlastním profesionálně vybaveným sálem pro pořádání různých typů eventů vč. koncertů, zkoušek kapel nebo firemních workshopů/školení, atp.
- jsme partnerem řady předních hudebních akcí v ČR (koncerty, hudební festivaly aj.)
- spolupracujeme s řadou základních uměleckých škol v ČR a podílíme se na uměleckém rozvoji dětí

Jsme také čím dál častěji partnerem předních tuzemských firem v oblasti moderně pojatých zaměstnaneckých nebo zákaznických benefitů. Pro více informací v tomto ohledu nás neváhejte kontaktovat prostř. DM :-)

Name: JOYAS
Description:
JOYAS(tm)~Jingles Of Your AffirmationS

JOYAS are joyous, musical affirmations sung to increase the level of joy throughout your heart, soul, mind, body and spirit.

Like jingles, JOYAS have simple, memorable melodies you'll find yourself singing (aloud or in your head) whenever you desire to increase your joy.

Jacque Weiss, Enrichment Expert, has earned the right for her title by discovering the magical treasures of life by incorporating creative joy, social artistry and authentic personality in even the smallest details of daily living. 

She is an artist at heart, working with different mediums, colors and venues to express the vibrant kaleidoscope of life as it happens. As a people person committed to supporting others in enjoying their lives, she innovates solutions that sing to their cells and provide valuable insights into the possibilities. And as an entrepreneur, she understands the connections between individuals, their communities and the world, especially through business.  

Jacque shares the unique JOYAS tools that in a struggling economy are very affordable, beneficial and empowering. They can be used at your leisure to experience changes quickly with grace, love and ease.

Name: Number 9 Audio Group
Description:
Audio recording has always been the foundation of the Number 9 Toronto Recording Studio, we have the talent and technique to prove it. A quarter-century of Recording Studio industry experience has allowed us to hone our craft and develop versatile methods to properly serve anyone who steps through our Toronto doors.

As is true with most other success stories, Number 9’s Toronto Recording Studios secret is adaptability. While we remain on the forefront of recording studio technology with our full-scale ProTools HD3 system, we also host an extensive assortment of vintage analogue gear. Classic equipment such as Lexicon’s legendary 480L are used in tandem with brand-new ProTools plugins. By maintaining a wide array of the best tools for any given project, you are assured to receive what you need to get the job done right the first time through.

The Toronto Recording Studios speciality is versatility – just take a peek at our clientele. Full bands, solo artists, jazz ensembles, audio-book narration, educational recordings, ADR, webcast speakers, and many others have found Number 9 to offer what they’re looking for.

Name: Ruokangas Guitars
Description: “Our work is a testimony for the old world values. We have consciously decided not to take part to the ongoing industrial race for cheaper labour and bigger profits. Our ambition is simply to make our living by making the best electric guitars in the world and to cherish the tradition of handcraft.” - Juha Ruokangas, Master Guitar Maker

Name: Full Affect
Description:
Under the moniker Full Affect, Sy and Orb create richly emotional indie folk, addressing the modern world and its anxieties with compelling, thought-provoking lyricism.  They are veterans of the Montreal and Seattle scenes, giving their song-craft unique wisdom and charm. Their debut releases are eclectic, urgent, and moving – a perfect introduction to the duo.

Both Sy and Orb have worked in healthcare, giving them an up-close view of how people are shaped by trauma, loss, and recovery. These themes are prevalent in their music, as well as more existential issues like climate change. Despite their occasionally heavy subject matter, Full Affect retains a spirit of catharsis and inspiration, with each song taking on a life of its own. Ultimately, both Sy and Orb are intent to build connections and community, and hopefully, leave a lasting legacy with their music.

Name: Spin Doctors Music Group
Description:
Spin Doctors Promotions LLC, a new and unique company that is extremely passionate about new Country music artists that don’t have the benefit of a major label. Spin Doctors promotes this great new music to Country Radio, both Music Row and monitored reporting stations. 

In the past year, we have worked with artists such as, Andy Griggs, Steve Azar, Fast Ryde, James Wesley, Benton Blount, Dave Gibson, Charlie Allen, Williams Riley, Blaine Larsen, and record labels that include: Broken Bow Records, Universal Republic, Cupit Music, Nine North, Turnpike Music, Golden Music, Black River Music Group, Treehouse Music, River Run Records Savannah Music Group, Ride Records, and more.

Spin Doctors Promotions also offers radio tours, and will take your artist to radio and coordinate with radio decision makers to maximize the radio station visit and make it a compelling experience for the station, it’s listeners and the artist.

We also  can create and help implement Social Media interaction, as well as marketing and promotional services for Music Radio. We can show you ways to use texting and social networking to showcase your artist to a large group of people who are frequent users of texting and the various social network sites, like Facebook and Twitter.

Spin Doctors offers a high level of integrity and will work hard to get your artist heard.

Let Spin Doctors Promotions work for you!

Name: Offbeat Collective
Description:
Offbeat Collective is where artists shape what’s next. We’re six studios, artist development programs, jam nights, music curation, and music release pathways — all dedicated to supporting the artists who create the fabric of our cultural identity.

As artists ourselves, we’ve poured everything into creating a space where creativity thrives and every voice is heard. Every bit of what we earn is reinvested back into this space & community, fueling the programs and opportunities that make a real difference.

To the industry, we’re not on the pulse—we are the pulse. By fostering a community that’s raw, real, and full of potential, we’re pushing boundaries and making waves.

For brands, our curation services connect you directly with the heart of the creative scene. We’re proving the value of art in every way and reinvesting our earnings into the artists and programs that keep the culture thriving.

Whether you’re here to create, collaborate, or connect, Offbeat Collective is where it all comes together.

We want to get away from an exchange of music between person & algorithm and make an exchange between person & person reality. Help us build a global music network and join the waitlist!

Our programs help youth 8-16 to build their self-esteem and find their voice through a unique program that combines music and film-making with enriching workshops...all featuring powerful mentors, leaders, and artists.

Name: Australian Art Orchestra
Description: With an emphasis on improvisation, The Australian Art Orchestra (AAO) explores the meeting points between disciplines and cultures, and imagines new musical forms to reflect the energy and diversity of 21st century Australia.

Name: Vienna Boys Choir Music Academy
Description:
Established in 2011, VBCMA carries on with the pedagogical traditions of VBC as its foundation for music education. Over the years, VBCMA has formed its unique strategies and profile in developing cross-cultural and humanistic music education in Hong Kong.

VBCMA offers year-round academy music programmes for all ages and teaches a wide repertoire of songs in different languages. A sense of homecoming is always there in our selections of songs, as Viennese pieces remain to be a classical feature of our programmes. The Academy Concert Choir of VBCMA has been invited to perform at various regional and international events.

Name: Requestify
Description: Requestify is building the first fully app-driven, social interactive music network, to create unparalleled music experiences at home - around the world for people to stream, collaborate on, and experience music together.

Name: Worcester Music Academy
Description:
Our Mission: To Create, Enrich and Inspire.

The Worcester Music Academy, a privately-owned and operated institution dedicated to the cultural growth of the Greater Worcester community, offers musical instruction to students of all ages. We employ performers and teachers of the highest caliber in an effort to enhance both individual creativity and knowledge. Each student is afforded the opportunity to learn and experience the musical and academic arts through private and classroom instruction.

The Worcester Music Academy was founded in 2010 by Sarah Kelly.  Ms. Kelly’s passion for music and music education led to her decision to create a community music school serving the Greater Worcester area.  Studies have shown that music can improve a child’s performance in school, yet music is always one of the first programs to be cut in the schools.  Our goal is to provide a place where people of all ages and abilities can come to study music; provide an environment where creativity is encouraged and cultivated; to create music and a lifelong love of music; and to enrich lives and inspire one another.

We pride ourselves on the quality of our world-class faculty and in the education and service we provide.  We hope you will come and experience it for yourself!

I 1979 kørte karrusellerne de første omgange ved den byfest som senere udviklede sig til Bork Havnefestival og nu senest til Bork Festival.

Name: Small Town Records
Description:
Small Town Records is Duke University’s record label – students who share their passion for music. As a part of Duke University Union, we serve the student committee with concerts and freely distributed music.
We are musicians, sound engineers, live technicians, musical consultants, graphic designers, producers, web designers, photographers, and above all else, all the fans who have helped us grow to where we are now.
Our passion is to bring music to the Duke community. Small Town Records has worked with Duke alumni Mike Posner and Delta Rae, as well as numerous established artists. Our current signed artists are mikewhang, Mobius, STiNA, Antje Lang, and Will Bowman.

Name: Fréquence ESCE

Objectif  Promouvoir la culture et la diversité musicale sur le campus de l’ESCE mais aussi lors d’événements internes et externes à l’école.

Mission  Réaliser des événements musicaux pour produire les artistes internes à l’association, mais aussi couvrir musicalement les événements d’autres associations de l’école, faire connaître nos artistes, apprendre la musique à ceux qui le souhaitent et bien sûr produire de la musique, de toutes sortes et de tous les styles.

Fréquence ESCE c’est aussi une équipe de plus d’une trentaine de d'étudiants et bénévoles amoureux de la musique, ayant pour enjeux commun de partager cette passion avec le plus grand nombre.

Mission
Quality Music Education for all: Our classes are taught by an experienced music professional. Our owner/teacher is a certified music teacher who has over 8 years of varied teaching experience in piano, guitar, violin and voice lessons. As our company grows, you can be assured that our teachers will be experienced, professional, and excellent at what they do! 

Affordable Music Education for all: We believe that learning music should be affordable! 

Convenient Music Education for all: Music lessons should be convenient, easy to manage, and simple to access. That is why we went digital. How much more convenient can you get!?
Description
In today's hectic lifestyle, we want to offer our students a quality music education experience that works for their budget and schedule. We're technology driven! Music lessons were never more fun or convenient than with Music Ed Now streaming live to your computer, tablet or smartphone! 

Our skilled, passionate teachers are ready to teach you guitar, piano, violin and voice lessons in private, group and online community sessions. We have something for every music loving student!

Name: Subtrack
Description:
Subtrack est une communauté de passionnés de musique électronique qui a pour mission de construire une industrie musicale vivable pour tous les créateurs.

Face à l'injustice d'un système de distribution qui ne laisse que des miettes aux créateurs et qui transforme la musique en une industrie opaque aux expériences impersonnelles, nous croyons en la force de la singularité artistique et du web3 pour créer des expériences musicales réellement fortes et engageantes pour les passionnés de musique.

Nous croyons en un système qui replace les créateurs et l'expérience musicale au centre de tout, nous croyons en un système juste, inclusif et durable qui redonne une place à l'Art underground.

Name: Wall Street Theater
Description: Entertain. Enrich. Educate. The Wall Street Theater is a non-profit organization whose purpose is to provide diverse music programming and promote arts education, thereby enriching the cultural life of Norwalk and greater Fairfield County.

Name: WAT artists
Description: Artist Management + Booking Agency  //  Tours + Events  //  Based in Naarm

Name: Dancecode
Description:
Groupe des métiers de l’événement, Dancecode est un acteur français de référence présent sur les trois grands marchés de l’événementiel : 
- Management et booking artistique
- Création, gestion et direction de spectacle vivant (principalement concert, festivals...)
- Gestion de lieu évènementiel

Name: Mehari Music Publishing
Description:
Mehari es una editorial fundada en 2013 por Robert Grima (Live Nation ES), añadiendo de entrada bandas como Sexy Zebras y L.A. al catálogo.
Tras el paso de los años Mehari ha trabajado con varios artistas independientes y no independientes de la industria española, tales como Holy Bouncer, Rafa Romera, FAVX, Conttra, L'Hologramme, Wineson, Israel Fernandez, Go Cactus, Zulabard y más.

Name: The FJH Music Company, Inc.
Description:
The FJH Music Company, Inc. was founded In January of 1988 by Frank and Gail Hackinson. Their children Kevin, Kyle, and Kerry have been with the company since its inception. As President and CEO, Frank J. Hackinson has built one of the nation's most exciting, best-selling educational print music catalogs. Featuring the publications of Helen Marlais, consisting of Succeeding at the Piano Succeeding with the Masters, The Festival Collection, and In Recital to name a few, this outstanding piano catalog continues to raise the level of music education to new heights.

Instrumentally, FJH proudly offers today's band directors and young musicians, new publications for concert band, string orchestra, chamber music, and jazz ensemble, from very easy to advanced levels including our two exciting methods Measures of Success for School Band and String Orchestra and New Directions for Strings for School Orchestra. FJH's instrumental writing team features exciting new composers and arrangers along with well-known names such as Brian Balmages and Soon Hee Newbold.

The FJH Music Company, Inc. offers today's teacher the best in educational music... with piano, band, string orchestra, and guitar material that is creative and pedagogically sound.

Name: KELMA
Description: Kelma music is one of the well known music production companies based in Egypt specializing in technical supervision, and production of Music Albums and Music Videos as well as organizing live concerts .

Name: HYPE Music Shop
Description: We provide worldwide travel logistics, staffing and road management for live entertainment tours, and serve as a music production house for all genres, including tv/film.

Name: Producciones Submarinas
Description:
Marina Roveta es Lic. en Psicología por la UBA. Autodidacta y viajera de alma, ha recorrido varios continentes y aprendido de diferentes culturas. Su pasión se debate entre la fotografía, la música y tras 3 años trabajando en el sello discográfico El Manicomio Records, decide sumergirse de lleno en el mundo de la música montando su oficina de management, Producciones Submarinas, desde donde lleva a cabo el management del Artista David Otero.

David Otero es un reconocido cantante, guitarrista y compositor, nacido en Madrid el 17 de Abril de 1980.
Fue uno de los dos principales miembros (como compositor y guitarrista) de una de las bandas españolas de Pop más relevantes del siglo XXI: “El Canto del Loco” La banda se separó en 2010 después de diez años juntos.
David comenzó entonces su carrera musical en solitario como “El Pescao”. Su primer Album en solitario: “Nada Lógico”, publicado en 2010, alcanzó directamente la segunda posición de las listas de ventas españolas, vendiendo más de 30.000 copias y recibiendo un Disco de Oro.
Tras una extensa gira de 3 años , con más de 280 conciertos a largo de toda la geografía español, pasó un año en Argentina buscando nuevos sonidos, ritmos e ideas para su próximo trabajo.
En Octubre de 2014 se publicaba “Ultramar”: un disco con 11 eclécticas canciones compuestas en Buenos Aires y grabadas en Londres. 
Con la Gira Ultramar con más de 70 conciertos en España comienza a abrir horizontes en Latino América, programando 6 conciertos en México en 2015 (Monterrey, Puebla y México D.F.) y consiguiendo 4 Sold Outs en la capital Mexicana. También la ciudad de Buenos Aires ha acogido 4 shows del artista en los últimos 5 años.

Actualmente, David Otero está componiendo y grabando nuevas canciones para su próximo Disco, que será publicado por  Sony Music Spain.
Con este próximo Disco, David Otero abandona su alias “El Pescao” para dar un paso adelante en su carrera, empleando como nombre artístico el suyo propio: “DAVID OTERO”.

Name: Old Rope Music Group
Description: Using science and research, real world data and expert musical composition, we create bespoke audio content to evoke human emotions and improve wellbeing. Every day our content is streamed millions of times, through streaming services and through our dedicated mobile apps

Name: Right Skipper
Description:
Right Skipper accompagne les entrepreneurs de la filière musicale dans les démarches administratives, structurelles et opérationnelles.

Right Skipper à terme, offrira des solutions en ligne pour simplifier la gestion administrative et l'accès au financement des entrepreneurs de la filière musicale (label, éditeur, producteur, manager).

Nous avons développé notre offre de services aux labels, éditeurs et producteurs de musique.

Lorsque l'entrepreneur veut se consacrer à l'activité créative, il peut nous confier en externalisant ou en mutualisant, des services administratifs. Nous les gérons pour lui.

De la création de contenus à la commercialisation, du volet opérationnel à la monétisation nous proposons nos services grâce à notre équipe qualifiée. Ce que nous faisons pour nous, nous permet de le proposer.

- Production Exécutive
- Subventions et Crédit d'impôt
- Gestion des contrats
- Réseau de prestataires
- Label Management
- Distribution physique et digitale
- Gestion éditoriale
- Gestion des droits masters et droits voisins 
- Recherche de partenaires
- Monétisation des contenus
- Développement international
- Mutualisation des ressources humaines
- Expertise
- Formation
- Consulting

La proposition est simple : venez avec vos problématiques, nous avons les solutions ou/et nous allons les chercher pour vous

Pour gagner du temps, être plus efficace, nos services sont basés sur notre expérience de 30 ans. Nous les partagerons contre rémunération.
Cela va de la facturation à l'acte, un système de crédit temps inspiré de l'assistance des éditeurs de logiciel, ou des abonnements... jusqu'au % sur les résultats.

Name: Sky Brothers
Description:
About SkyBrothers

We are Tim and Luuk van der Lugt, the twin DJ duo behind SkyBrothers, known for bringing unmatched energy and connection to every stage. We specialize in creating high-energy House and Deep House tracks, delivering unforgettable experiences that unite crowds around the globe.

From starting our DJ journey at just nine years old to performing internationally, we’ve grown into a dynamic force in the music industry. 

Our mission? To elevate energy worldwide, lighting up the biggest festival stages, clubs and exclusive events and connecting people through the power of music.

Our goals:
	•	Expand to international bookings and stages worldwide
	•	Create unforgettable memories with our audience
	•	Inspire through music and let music inspire us

Let’s connect! Send us a message and be part of this exciting journey!

Name: Internationaal Kamermuziekfestival Utrecht
Description: Hét jaarlijkse internationale kamermuziekfestival van Utrecht met Janine Jansen als artistiek leider, tussen 27 - 30 dec

Name: The Hideout Recording Studio
Description: The Hideout Recording Studio is a private engineering and production studio, off the beaten path, yet minutes away from the Las Vegas Strip. Our recording and monitoring rooms were designed to achieve the most precise possible acoustic properties and sound. Each of our studios features Ocean Way sound systems, Solid State Logic (SSL) consoles, Avid Pro Tools HD, and a considerable collection of cutting-edge and vintage outboard gear. We also have extensive selection of vintage microphones.

Name: BRILL BUILDING MUSIC PUBLISHING LLC
Description: BRILL BUILDING MUSIC PUBLISHING LLC is a music publishing company based in Los Angeles, California, United States.

Name: The Music Room (TMR)
Description:
Founded in 2020 by two undergraduate students at Vanderbilt University, The Music Room has quickly grown in size and now has increased student representation at Vanderbilt as well as Belmont University and Lipscomb University. Despite the increase in size and demand of the organization, the mission of The Music Room has remained the same: to provide college artists the opportunity to showcase their musical talents in the city of Nashville, the number one city for music in the United States. Through partnerships and collaborations with local venues and event spaces, we host frequent concerts of all sizes and scopes featuring premiere college artists in the Nashville area, allowing them the opportunity to collaborate with fellow artists and perform in front of the Nashville community. We are changing the culture of the music industry in the Music City with the goal of promoting a more inclusive, collaborative, and inviting space for artists to create, learn, and grow together.

Interested in learning more about The Music Room and connecting with us? Follow us on LinkedIn, Instagram, Tik Tok, Facebook, and our blog!

Have any specific questions or inquiries? Contact our President Christiana Gatbunton at christiana@themusicroomofficial.com and she will be happy to connect with you!

Name: Preste Inc
Description: Depuis 1999, Preste développe une conception unique de la diffusion du spectacle au Québec et sur la scène internationale. L’agence témoigne d’un état d’esprit novateur et ambitieux au bénéfice des artistes, des diffuseurs de spectacles et du public.

Name: April Jazz Festival
Description: April Jazz is the biggest jazz festival in the Helsinki metropolitan area. The festival takes place in Tapiola, Espoo every spring at the end of April. It has been organized annually since 1987 and is hosted by the Espoo Big Band. The program features a wide range of FInnish and international jazz and rhythm music stars.

Name: True Colors Symphony | PMA Music Foundation
Description:
Founded in 2003, PMA Music Foundation (PMF) works with renowned musicians and inspirational figures around the world to touch lives through music, to bring hope and care to underprivileged children and families.
 
As of today, having organized over 120 events in Hong Kong, the beneficiaries comprised more than 20 local or global social organizations which serve children of blind, deaf, autism, mentally or physically handicapped, cancer, illiterates, children from deprived family as well as the elderly.
 
PMF realized the impact of music as a mean to educate the young generation and founded the Metropolitan Youth Orchestra of Hong Kong (MYO) which became an independent charity in 2007.
 
Music Angel Program was then launched and aimed to groom a serving heart in the young generation by using music to connect the children with the community. Performance visits were organized at local NGO centres serving various disadvantaged groups.
 
In view to educating the young generation with good values and positive living attitudes via music, PMF joined hands with international and local inspirational figures namely Nick VUJICIC, violinist CHO-Liang Lin, one-handed violinist Adrian ANANTAWAN, armless hornist Felix KLIESER, local visually impaired pianist LI Hin and many others.

Name: Technology in Music Education
Description:
The Mission of TI:ME - The mission of TI:ME is to assist music educators in applying technology to improve teaching and learning in music.

The History of TI:ME - In the summer of 1995 TI:ME was formed to address the following areas: First, there was a need to codify technology into a cohesive set of standards. Next, a certification process was explored to recognize the achievement of in-service music teachers in music technology. Finally, it became clear that there was a need for a new organization, national in scope and focused on the subject of teacher training in music technology. A National Advisory board was established and met in October of 1996 setting in motion the tasks that led to the creation of a world wide web site, the publication of a book of Strategies and a Newsletter The TI:MES, the criterion for membership, and the development of a comprehensive curriculum for in-service teacher training in music technology.

Name: Escuela de música Cadenza
Description:
Somos una escuela de música que implementa formas creativas de enseñanza musical a niños, jóvenes y adultos.

Ventajas:
 Clases personalizadas
 Cursos sustentados con sílabos
 Nuestros docentes son músicos profesionales egresados de las mejores universidades de música del país.

 Además:
 Preparación para ingresar a cualquier universidad local o internacional en la carrera de música.
 Preparación para rendir y superar con éxito el examen del London College of Music (LCM) y obtener el grado respectivo.
 Organización periódica de conciertos donde nuestros alumnos pueden mostrar su evolución frente a un auditorio y experimentar la relación natural que tiene un artista con su público.

Cursos:
 Piano
 Canto
 Guitarra
 Violín
 Batería

Modalidades:
 A domicilio
 Online

Name: Paris Mix
Description:
La filière des musiques du monde représente un réel enjeu économique pour Paris et sa région. La création du Système Productif Local (SPL) Paris Mix a pour objectif de permettre à ses différents acteurs de consolider leurs activités et d'affronter les nouveaux défis liés à l'innovation numérique et à la dématérialisation de la musique sur Internet

Un Système Productif Local (SPL) c'est quoi ?

Un SPL est un outil de travail qui permet de favoriser le développement économique local. Il se fonde sur une méthode d'organisation visant à faire coopérer entre elles les entreprises d'un secteur afin de faire émerger au niveau territorial un noyau stable et prospère de TPE/PME.

Name: Via Audio Srl
Description:
Via Audio nasce tra Milano e Lecco nel 2007 come Etichetta Discografica Indipendente, producendo album di artisti italiani come FABRIZIO CAMMARATA, GIULIANO DOTTORI, IO?DRAMA, FABRIZIO COPPOLA, ARTURO FIESTA CIRCO, AIM. Sin dal suo esordio si affida ad operatori specializzati nella promozione della musica dal vivo e nel settore dell’organizzazione di eventi culturali, organizzando concerti ed attività promozionali per gli artisti del proprio Roster e non solo. Dal 2010 cessa l’attività discografica e cresce quella di Produzione e Promozione di eventi, musicali e non: dai concerti di musica dal vivo alle feste tematiche, dal teatro alle danze popolari, per arrivare agli eventi di piazza, ai circoli, teatri e i club più importanti d’Italia.

Costituitasi in forma di Società a Responsabilità Limitata, Via Audio oggi è tra i più importanti attori culturali dell’area metropolitana milanese; unisce le competenze di diversi professionisti nei settori della creatività e comunicazione, produzione, direzione artistica. Forte delle esperienze e competenze dei suoi membri, realizza progetti ed eventi culturali in ambito sia pubblico che privato, collaborando in modo continuativo con club prestigiosi come l’Alcatraz di Milano, di cui è stata responsabile della Comunicazione, sviluppando progettualità con enti pubblici e festival in tutto il Nord Italia, collaborando con aziende per la realizzazione di eventi corporate (Tuborg, Bacardi, AADV, Caloni Trasporti, et cetera).

Name: Kerosine Medien- & Veranstaltungsbüro
Description: Das Kerosine Medien- und Veranstaltungsbüro ist kompetenter Dienstleister für die Konzeption, Promotion und Durchführung von Public- und Corporate-Events.

Name: Bel Horizon
Description: Bel Horizon est une association loi 1901, présente sur la région Bordelaise et Arcachonnaise. Son objectif est de démocratiser l'accès aux musiques électroniques, par le biais d'événements, de formats audio-visuels et de productions textiles responsables.

Name: Eich Amplification
Description:
As musicians we prefer to think less about technology but instead to just plug in and bring the good feelings of our own playing across on the stage. EICH delivers the general requirements for this. Consistent and innovative, we smooth the way to the world of deep sounds.
For more than a quarter of a century, EICH have immersed themselves in the world of deep tones: we analyze, harmonize and perfect your sound. We continually work on the optimization and development of our products and create new practical-orientated solutions. The close collaboration with professional musicians ensures necessary feedback, which is required to optimally adjust sound experiences and handling to bassist's requirements. Precision German work at an international level.

Name: Eighty Five music consultancy
Description:
Eighty5ive helpt artiesten, labels en cultuurondernemingen uit alle genres en elke stijl. Boekingen, artist management, marketing, coaching en meer: Eighty5ive koppelt creativiteit aan strategie, lef en zakelijk verstand.

Maak gebruik van een internationaal netwerk vol muziek, cultuur en media. Boost je bekendheid met ad-hoc advies of management mogelijkheden – maar dan wel eerlijk en open, met jou in de spotlights.

Eighty5ive verzorgt:
management
consultancy & coaching
boekingen
programmering
pr & marketing
gastlessen, masterclasses, panels
concepten & evenementen

Name: Cazadero Performing Arts Camp
Description:
Cazadero Music Camp brings the love of music and learning to youth. We provide a nurturing, inspirational environment for young musicians ages 10-18. For more than 60 years, Cazadero has offered a dynamic program that strikes a thoughtful balance between in-depth music education and carefree summer camp fun.

Set on 33 acres near the Russian River in Sonoma County—Caz allows young musicians to learn together under a canopy of spectacular redwood trees. Our vision is to bring this transformative experience to as many youth as possible.

Cazadero inspires over 1,400 youth during a typical year through two complementary music programs, Summer Music Camp, and JumpStart in Music. Our Summer Music Camp brings together a diverse and talented student body from across the Bay Area and beyond. Campers work closely with skilled Conductors, talented Music Faculty and a devoted Camp Staff. They discover their love of music, develop their musicianship, gain confidence in their playing and make lasting friendships.

JumpStart in Music is a low-cost, high-impact weekend version of our Summer Music Camp for school and school district music programs. JumpStart brings Bay Area public school students, their music teachers and high school mentors together for a three day, condensed immersion program which produces some remarkable results.

Name: Portsmouth Music Academy
Description:
Portsmouth Music Academy (PMA) is one of the leading providers of music tuition in the South. With two locations in Portsmouth, both centres are fully equipped to provide lessons in Electric and Acoustic Guitar, Bass Guitar, Drums, Piano / Keyboard, Singing, Ukulele, Banjo and Music Theory. Since its launch in January 2013, PMA has grown to a team of 35 freelance tutors with over 400 active students attending lessons each week.

We teach students of all ages and abilities and offer one-to-one and group lessons. Our team of professional tutors are extremely passionate about helping people to reach their potential as musicians, whether the student's goal is to learn their favourite song, pass a grade 8 exam or just play music with like-minded people. 

We believe performing live is an essential and fun part of learning any instrument and we’re proud to offer exciting opportunities for our students to perform live. Our concerts, recitals and showcases are always exciting and well-attended events. We also run jam nights for our students to socialise and continue to learn in a less formal environment. Everyone is welcome to all our events, even if you don’t take lessons with us.

As well as providing private lessons at our centres in Hampshire, we also provide peripatetic music teachers for Junior and Secondary schools across the UK. If you’re a learning provider, get in touch to see what we can do for you.

Name: Musikkontoret Sørf
Description: Musikkontoret SØRF er et regionalt kompetansesenter som jobber med å profesjonalisere, styrke og synliggjøre musikkbransjen på Sørlandet.

Name: Talk to Him
Description: Un podcast de música novelado inspirado en el personaje principal de la película Her (Spike Jonze). Cartas sonoras que rinden homenaje a diferentes estilos y artistas apelando siempre a la emoción y alejado de lo obvio.

Name: Divinazione Milano srl
Description:
𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗼 è l’ufficio stampa milanese che da più di 30 anni si occupa della promozione stampa, radio, tv e web di artisti del panorama musicale italiano.
Spinti da un grande amore per la musica, Francesco Caprini e Franco Sainini hanno per anni collaborato con nomi importanti della scena musicale italiana, per dare poi vita a un ufficio stampa che potesse dedicarsi a realtà più piccole ma non per questo meno valide.
Le attività promozionali di cui si occupa Divinazione Milano sono incentrate principalmente su artisti indipendenti ed emergenti e nello specifico:
• 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗺𝗼𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗲 𝘁𝘃
• 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗺𝗼𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗮
• 𝗦𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗺𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗮 𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁
• 𝗗𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗯𝘂𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗲
L’ufficio stampa è in contatto con oltre 800 stazioni radiofoniche e canali televisivi attivi sul territorio regionale, nazionale e internazionale e con più di 700 testate giornalistiche cartacee e online. Attraverso la rotazione radiofonica, gli articoli e le recensioni pubblicati sui giornali, nonché l’attività promozionale su tutti i social network (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram...), all’artista viene data la possibilità di raggiungere un pubblico più ampio per farsi strada nel panorama musicale italiano.
Di quella stessa passione per la musica nata 30 anni fa, Divinazione Milano ne fa tutt’ora la sua carta vincente per dare rilievo ad artisti che si dedicano al proprio mestiere con altrettanta dedizione.

Name: Early Music America
Description: Early Music America is a music company based out of 801 Vinial St, Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: BlackVitamina
Description:
Somos BlackVitamina, un equipo de productores y agentes especializados en producción musical, mezcla, masterización y desarrollo de proyectos musicales independientes, dedicado a potenciar artistas, su identidad y ecosistema. 

BV Estudio: Conectados desde el origen Alternativo & Indie Pop Rock, nuestra esencia es buscar constantemente la máxima expresión de la música con que trabajamos, desde la mezcla, masterización y producción musical, siempre inquietos explorando la vanguardia musical y tecnológica a nivel global.

BV Records: Sello discográfico enfocado en fomentar y restablecer la escena Alternativa & Indie Pop Rock chilena, desde el desarrollo integral de proyectos musicales independientes y su ecosistema, fortaleciendo nuestra identidad como Cono Sur, con un modelo alineado con el comportamiento actual de la industria musical global, siempre resguardando y protegiendo a nuestros artistas y sus obras. Nuestro mayor valor es la capacidad de desarrollo integral de nuestros artistas, tanto desde el arte como del music business, con un trabajo cercano para una selección acotada de los exponentes más relevantes del género musical residentes en nuestro país. 

Nuestro equipo: Nico Parra (Productor Musical & Mezcla), Nacho Ramírez (Head of Label & Masterización), Carlos Contreras (Productor Musical & Mezcla), Belén Azócar (Label Manager), Juan Maturana (Desarrollo audiovisual & fotográfico).

BV Proyectos: Desde una visión colectiva del desarrollo de nuestra escena, llevamos a cabo proyectos que puedan aportar a la evolución de nuestra industria chilena y su diversidad musical.

Name: Dutch Dance Music Academy
Description:
Dutch Dance Music Academy is de academie voor DJ-ing en muziekproductie! Gedreven door passie, positieve energie en professionele vakkennis! 

Veel muziekliefhebbers, DJ's en producers worstelen vaak met veel technische onwetendheid.

* Hoe zet ik nu een goede, strakke en gave DJ set in elkaar?
* Welke tracks kies ik dan?
* In welke volgorde draai ik ze, hoe mix ik de tracks aan elkaar en hoe pas ik die gave effecten toe die mijn favoriete DJ ook gebruikt?

Je hoort een geweldig gaaf nummer of je hebt in het verleden al eens een poging gewaagd om een nummer te produceren, maar je wist niet waar je moest beginnen. En hoe dan? Je bent ermee gestopt omdat het te ingewikkeld was, je niet verder kwam en je er geen bal van snapte. 

Door dit soort zaken loop je vast en raak je enorm gefrustreerd, voel je je teleurgesteld en zakt je de moed in de schoenen.

Hoe mooi is het dan dat er een academie bestaat, die jou leert draaien als een echte DJ zodat jij de skills krijgt om op jouw favoriete festival te staan voor een uitzinnige menigte. Die jou alles leert hoe je je eigen tracks kan produceren zodat jij die nieuwe hit scoort in je eigen stijl muziek en waarbij het ook nog eens super leuk is, je veel plezier ervaart, je persoonlijk wordt geholpen en ook nog eens toegankelijk is voor iedereen met een passie voor muziek.

Name: Further Music School
Description:
Further Music School is a distinguished establishment founded in 2007. Presently, Further Music School has welcomed over 3000 students across  New York, London and Beijing. Further Music School serves students from ages four and up piano, violin, vocal, and guitar instruction.

The students of Further Music School are accompanied by instructors with a high educational background and musical experience; The Julliard School, Manhattan School of Music, Lincoln Center appearances, classical composers, and award winners.

With a focus on studying, progressing, and knowledge attainment, registered students of Further Music School have performed at music halls, composed their own classical pieces, excelled in world examinations such as the ABRSM Exam; and that is just the beginning of their musical careers.

Further Music School is recognized as New York's most popular choice for musical education.

Name: Le Gorille
Description: Eclectique et en constant développement, Le Gorille est un collectif musical, monté il y a cinq ans par des étudiants du CELSA. L'initiative est double : d’un côté une partie média, concentrée sur le webzine ; de l’autre une partie événementielle, avec des formats divers et variés, principalement sur Paris.

Name: Black Swamp Percussion
Description:
Black Swamp Percussion is a manufacturer of concert and orchestral musical instruments located in the Holland area of Michigan. We manufacture a variety of instruments including drums, tambourines, triangles, castanets, and mallets under our own brand, and also provide OEM manufacturing for other well known companies in the industry.

Founded in 1995, we now have a dealer network around the globe. Our instruments are found in some of the finest musical groups and institutions around the globe.

Name: FAST Music Society
Description: FAST Music Society, otherwise known as FMS to many, is the official music society of FAST-NU Lahore campus. FMS has been exemplary in the cultivation of musical talent throughout the university. With numerous musicians having versatile music tastes and expertise, Fast Music Society has always been a pioneer in not just entertainment but in the uplifting of rising musicians at campus. We at FMS believe that music is not just an extracurricular, but a skill that can lead aspiring young musicians to greater heights, and we aim to do exactly that, and way more.

Name: Sun and Sky Entertainment
Description:
Sun And Sky Entertainment is a full-service production and management company that provides the following services:

ARTIST MANAGEMENT:

Our management team is focused on developing artists that can develop artists and guide them to develop a lifelong career. We work with some of the top industry producers, agents, venues, promoters and develop an entire team for the artists we manage. Our management team comes from some of the most respected companies in the entertainment business and we match up our artists to a manager that can lead them to the future. Our entire team is consistently working to enhance the artists brand. We work with all genres of music and truly love what we do.

TELEVISION PRODUCTION:

Live Concert TV Shows and Family Friendly Films and Television projects are what we love! We have produced some of the top music shows on PBS Television and tied all of the shows to a live concert tour for our artists. We developed, produced, distributed, marketed and managed the entire tv show, CD and DVD release and Live Concert tours for the artist.

LIVE CONCERTS:

Our team routes, produces, promotes and manages concerts.

CONSULTING SERVICES:

Our team offers consulting services, on as need basis and can discuss your next project.

GAMING DIVISION:

Name: Astral Artists
Description:
Astral Artists is a service organization for exceptionally talented emerging classical musicians who have the potential to make important contributions to the field. Astral provides artists with a pathway to sustainable and affirming creative careers, while populating the field of classical music with extraordinary artistic and community leaders.
 
Based in Philadelphia, Astral presents its roster of musicians in its Philadelphia Concert Series, Concerts For Kids programs, and a salon concert series, reaching thousands of community members annually through these concert performances and Education & Community Engagement programs. Acceptance onto Astral’s roster of 25 instrumentalists and vocalists is awarded after a competitive national audition process. They are then provided, free of charge, with building blocks for their careers: professional guidance; superior performance opportunities; concert bookings; intensive community engagement experiences; entrepreneurial and marketing consultation; project incubation; and new music commissions.

Name: Control Freaks Music SA de CV
Description:
Con casi diez años de experiencia, somos especialistas en derechos de autor y propiedad intelectual.

Trabajamos con el fin de proteger tus derechos para que recibas la mayor cantidad de regalías posible, de todas las entidades que deben pagarte.

Ayudamos a autores, artistas, sellos, editoras, managers, etc. con todos los trámites necesarios para proteger sus derechos y recaudar las regalías derivadas de la explotación de su música, en todos los conceptos de derechos que existen.

Realizamos trámites de autorización para el uso comercial de obras musicales en: cine, televisión, publicidad, internet, material corporativo, entre otros.

También contamos con un catálogo de música de primer nivel, disponible para ser licenciada en un solo paso.

Festival 20·21 - open mind, open ears
Festival 20·21 is een Leuvens festival dat focust op de klassieke muziek uit de 20e en 21e eeuw. Met schitterende concerten en een uitstekende omkadering proberen we de publieksliefde voor recente en nieuwe muziek aan te wakkeren. Jaarlijks presenteert Festival 20·21 een twintigtal concerten, tussen eind september en eind oktober. Die concerten tonen de onvoorstelbare diversiteit van de muziek uit de 20e en 21e eeuw. Het festival werkt veel en graag samen met de talrijke uitstekende musici die Vlaanderen rijk is, maar ook internationale gereputeerde passeren geregeld de revue.



Festival 20·21 kijkt met het Transit - the sound of tomorrow -   tegelijk onbevreesd vooruit naar wat de muzikale toekomst brengt.

Klassiek concerten In september en oktober in Leuven.

Name: New Zealand String Quartet
Description:
With its dynamic performing style, eloquent communication and beautiful sound the New Zealand String Quartet has forged a major career in the busy international chamber music field, earning the acclaim of critics and the delighted response of audiences. The Quartet has particularly distinguished itself through imaginative programming, insightful interpretations of the string quartet repertoire including cycles of composers' music from Mozart to Berg, and the development of an international audience for important new works from New Zealand composers.

Career highlights have included acclaimed debuts in London at Wigmore Hall, in New York at the prestigious Frick Collection and in the famous concert series in Washington’s Library of Congress Coolidge Auditorium. International tours and festival successes have taken the group to Canada and the US for twice-yearly visits as well as to Mexico, Curacao, Korea, Australia, Scotland, Germany, Poland, the Czech Republic and the Netherlands. Much-loved by audiences in New Zealand, the engaging musicians of that country’s premier chamber ensemble present over eighty concerts there and overseas each year.

Name: Katrin Wettin & The Classic Sounds
Description:
After years of mastering her craft and numerous classical performances, virtuoso violinist Katrin Wettin now embarks on a new journey in which timeless classical pieces of days gone by are intertwined with contemporary rock and pop hits of today. A true artist, Katrin weaves in and out of the genres to take her audience on an exciting and emotional adventure across the historical and evolving musical landscape. From the majestic mountains of Bach over the flower-speckeled valleys of the Beatles to the raging waterfalls of ACDC and the light breeze of Mozart.
With the support of her band, a chamber orchestra, stunning light and elegant dancers, Katrin fills the senses with the extremes of soft and loud, gentle and fierce, high and low, light and dark, tranquil and thunderous, traditional and contemporary for an unusually dramatic live experience deeply touching audience members at their core.

Katrin Wettin and The Classic Sounds….crossover at its best.

Name: School of Popular Music
Description:
The School of Popular Music (SOPM) is the Channel Islands’ largest contemporary music school, dedicated to making high-quality music education accessible, exciting, and relevant for all ages.

Founded in Guernsey in 2014, SOPM now operates across multiple locations and teaches hundreds of students each week through one-to-one lessons, bands, workshops, and special programmes. With over 1,000 students and a passionate team of 30+ professional tutors, we offer high-quality music education across Guernsey and Jersey — from beginner to advanced, toddler to adult, hobbyist to aspiring pro.

SOPM is also home to:
 Academy – our advanced programme for committed young musicians
 Minis & Risers – group sessions designed for ages 4–11
 Holiday Schools – intensive Easter and Summer courses
 SHOPM – our growing retail arm, supplying students and the wider community with curated instruments, accessories, and support

We’re also growing beyond lessons with SHOPM, our in-house retail service supporting students and the wider community with curated gear and expert advice.

As we continue to expand our reach and locations, our mission remains the same: to build confidence, creativity, and community through music.

Live-Musik als mitreißender Höhepunkt, für den Moment, wenn sich der Vorhang langsam hebt und Sie Ihr neues Produkt zum ersten Mal der Öffentlichkeit präsentieren.
Durch den Klang des Saxophons wird Ihre Geschäftsveranstaltung zu einem unvergesslichen Erlebnis für alle Teilnehmer und ich freue mich, meinen Beitrag zu Ihrem gelungenen Firmen-Event leisten zu dürfen. Wenn dann nach der Präsentation die Party folgt oder ein feierliches Dinner ansteht, begleite ich Sie und Ihre Gäste gerne musikalisch im weiteren Tages- und Abendverlauf, ob in feierlichem Ambiente oder mit weiteren Musikern als Band zum rauschenden Fest.

Name: Sophie Group
Description:
We bring cutting edge electronic music that makes us re-connect with our inner selves in a nature environment. 

Every aspect of Sophie Festival has been lovingly curated by the organizers to offer the finest electronic music experience to hit Malaga. From the crystal clear sound system, production and of course the on-point musical programming this signals a seismic shift in open-air events in the region, with the aim of offering a combination of “beach time, serious music and good memories”.

Each lineup programme features a diverse approach, balancing industry heavyweights and staples of the international festival circuit side-a-side with the most interesting up-and-coming underground artists. This will automatically mean the debut of many artists and musical genres on the Malaga scene. A match made in heaven if combined with the versatile open-air venue, and the important infrastructures and beauties that the most populated city of the South of Spain can offer. Punters will have the chance to enjoy a sunny weekend in one of the nicest places to be in the country.

The array of confirmed artists that performed behind Sophie brand among others are: Solomun, Peggy Gou, Charlotte de Witte, Amelie Lens, Richie Hawtin, The Martinez Brothers, Jeff Mills, Luciano, Jamie Jones, Nina Kraviz, Paul Kalkbrenner, Seth Troxler, [a:rpia:r], Apollonia, tINI, Chris Stussy, Traumer, Gene On Earth, Janeret, Quest, Giammarco Orsini and many more.

Description:

- Private and after school music programs

MISSION
Through the gift of musical instruments, music education, instruction and support, we empower children around the world to experience the powerful joy of music! Music soothes the soul, and inspires the heart.


DONATIONS
Bring on the Music accepts private donations and grants in order to:

- Refurbish donated instruments for children eager to play.
- Purchase requested instruments for school music directors.
- Music instrument donations are also welcomed!

To learn more, go to http://bringonthemusic.org/donations/

- Community Connections: To provide opportunities for Bring on the Music to serve. 
- Marketing Assistance: To raise funds for instrument refurbishing and etc.... 
- Event Support: To provide powerful events to kids and adults. 

To learn more contact Paul Gleditsch at http://bringonthemusic.org/contact/


CONTACT

Bring on the Music is a 501(c)(3) non-profit corporation, able to receive financial gifts and instruments.

Long recognized for our classical guitar products and expertise, we now carry a complete selection of strings and accessories for acoustic and electric guitars as well as strings for virtually any plucked or bowed instruments.


Mission

Our mission is to help each player and every instrument reach their fullest potential. Our aspiration is to provide you with the best customer service and prices on the web for both common and uncommon strings, as well as music, accessories, DVDs and CDs.

From immediate feedback regarding orders, to questions about the sound qualities of new string choices, we are always there for our customers.

The terms that we give to our clients (artists, labels and distributors) make our digital distribution deal one of the fairest in the world. Our team consists of people who like to work in the world of music. This motivates them to give their best to make our customers happy and well taken care of. We at AMAdea believe that we should not only work as a standard service company but help artists, labels and distributors adapt to and develop in the ever-changing music industry.

All this makes us the right choice for you!

Name: MusicLounge
Description:
Today’s music industry is competitive and expensive, and many talented musicians are forced to abandon their life of passion for a 9-to-5 job.

Stocknack aims to change this by providing a revolutionary music investment market that will allow musicians to monetize every aspect of their music business at no cost to them.
To do this we developed a proprietary algorithm that determines the value of a musician’s talent, and the impact each fan had on that artist’s career; and by the tracking that impact, we can quantify and reward the involvement of an artist’s community, ultimately resulting in more financial support from fans, and more music being created.

Join us on this journey to elevate music with more support

What’s the name of the band again?”.
We are musicians and to help these guys promote their art, we became curators, so we curate and explore the web to find what’s really good and probably underrated in independent music.

Name: Iboga Records
Description: The year was 1996, and the great tree of electronic dance music continued to expand and split into various branches and their native tribes. Psychedelic trance was in full swing, with its staccato kick drums, high BPMs, and consciousness-expanding synth patterns. To some, it was more than a music style - it represented a way of life. Thus it was for Emok and Banel, two young Danish DJ/producers who fully leaned in and came together in Copenhagen to establish what would become one of the longest lasting and most universally respected labels in the psy-trance underground. Ace Ventura, Liquid Soul, Captain Hook, just some of the superstars of the scene that have been loyal mainstays on the label's release calendar over the years, but never detracting from the label's ethos of developing new artists through unity, collaboration, and steadfast support. In 2022, Emok and Banel still wake up every day thinking about their core values of connection, passion and ultimately a zest for life. And of course: heart-racing, foot-stomping, and mind-expanding beats!

Description: Based in Ottawa, Ontario, Music and Beyond is a classical music and arts festival organization that began in July 2010. The organization seeks to broaden the audience base for classical music and the arts by finding creative ways to combine music with a broad range of art forms and cultural activities. Music and Beyond is also committed to providing accessible opportunities for young people to engage with arts and culture in the community, as well as creating transformational performance opportunities for young and local musicians.

Name: Cadence (Rock Band)
Description:
Cadence is an Israeli rock duo. Ran Zilca (vocals and guitar) and Amir Shwartz (drums and percussion) met in kindergarten at age five. As teenagers in the 80s they formed a band that toured Israel and the Tel Aviv clubs. Their materials back then consisted mostly of of progressive rock with elements of arabic music. After a 30 year hiatus, Zilca and Shwartz reunited their band using the name Cadence, and release their debut album, The Wheels of Time, in 2019, followed by additional singled in English and in Hebrew.
Cadence is known for their rich stage performance, incorporating various instruments like electric violin, and for the broad range of topics covered in the song lyrics.

Name: Fairy In Boots
Description:
At Fairy In Boots, every moment is thoughtfully designed to deliver unforgettable experiences that elevate your event. From powerful musical performances to show-stopping acts, we combine artistry and professionalism to leave a lasting impression on your audience. It’s about more than just the spectacle—it’s about creating memories that resonate long after the final bow.

Whether you’re organizing a corporate event, festival, grand outdoor parade, or private celebration, we understand the importance of captivating your guests. With our unique blend of music, energy, and magical storytelling, we help you create an event your audience will never forget.

Name: Lutheran Music Program, Home of Lutheran Summer Music
Description:
Founded in 1981, Lutheran Music Program is home to Lutheran Summer Music (LSM), a four-week residential training and performance program. Each summer, LSM brings together 150+ band, orchestra, choir, and keyboard students from the U.S. and abroad in a supportive, intentional community.

Lutheran Music Program transforms lives and connects people through faith and music. The three values which we embrace are musical excellence, Lutheran faith and a nurturing community. Our vision is to see churches and communities renewed through music for the sake of the world.
