Name: Mario Nandayapa Quartet
Description:
La agrupación encuentra su origen dentro del linaje de la Marimba tras “Tres Generaciones” de músicos importantes de Chiapas y México.
MNQ se ha presentado en el Festival “Hi Seúl” y en el Hard Rock de Seúl en Corea del Sur; en el Todai-ji Kinsho Hall y el Gose-shi Asarea Hall de Nara, y el Philarmonic Hall de Osaka en Japón; en el Centro de Artes de San Antonio, el Centro Cultural Mexicoamericano “Emma S. Barrientos” y la Universidad de Texas en Austin, en el Copley Symphony Hall de San Diego en EUA; en el Centro de Convenciones de San Juan en Puerto Rico; en la embajada de México en la ciudad de Belice; en la Torre Perla y en la conmemoración del Aniversario del sistema de transporte de la ciudad de Shanghái en la República Popular China; en la Feria Internacional de las Embajadas y en el Teatro Sesc Newton Rossi de Ceilândia en Brasil.
Mario Nandayapa Quartet ha apoyado diversas agrupaciones como la Orquesta Bicentenario Típica de Querétaro, la Orquesta Sinfónica Juvenil de Tepotzotlán, la Marimba Trakai de Lituania, la Marimba Laa Yetzi Queriu de Oaxaca; la fundación Fertilizando el Esfuerzo, Cholula Unido y el festival Homenaje a Jaime Sabines.
Mario Nandayapa Quartet cuenta con dos grabaciones discográficas: Canta la Marimba y México a través de la Marimba. La agrupación participo en el octavo álbum “Jei Beibi” de Café Tacvba, ganador del Grammy latino producido por el Mtro. Gustavo Santaolalla.
Mario Nandayapa Quartet ha participado en la grabación de Café Tacvba para su 2° MTV Unplugged. Se han presentado en diferentes Teatros en México entre ellos esta; el Teatro de la Ciudad Esperanza Iris. Han creado diferentes tipos de espectáculos para sus espectadores.

Name: Call4Music
Description:
Call4Music is an Award-Winning Music Company that creates & publishes music for tv shows, films, documentaries, commercials/sonic branding, live shows & artists! 
Call4Music also provides consultancy in the field of commercial music exploitation.

Call4Music is characterized by its diversity in productions. Whether it's a pop song, leader music, commercial music, documentary music, film music, underscore music, demos, lyrics, or other musical needs, Call4Music delivers it.

Although the variety in productions is wide, there is always one shared factor, and that is emotion. Emotion is undoubtedly linked to music and can be experienced in all different productions. Call4Music creates that specific emotion, that suits the job and or the artist. 

Call4Music won the prestigious Buma Award Best Series Music for the AvroTros series ‘Krabbe Zoekt Picasso’.

Name: Opus 23 Música
Description:
El proyecto Opus23música comenzó a desarrollar su actividad a comienzos del año 2012 con el principal objetivo de apoyar a destacados músicos jóvenes en su desarrollo profesional. La premisa fundamental de esta iniciativa ha sido desde entonces ofrecer un nivel musical de primer orden, consolidándolo y mejorándolo a lo largo del tiempo. Con este propósito se establecieron una dirección artística y una plantilla de músicos con una formación y experiencia extraordinarias, en las que prima el talento y la excelencia.

Opus23música es una agrupación flexible que actúa a través de varios tipos de formaciones, desde pequeñas agrupaciones camerísticas hasta plantillas de gran orquesta sinfónica. La plantilla orquestal de Opus23música está compuesta por más de 50 músicos que cuentan con una gran proyección a nivel nacional e internacional. Sus integrantes se han formado en los más prestigiosos conservatorios y orquestas de España y Europa, resultando así en un grupo con la capacidad de ofrecer un amplio repertorio musical. Gracias a esto, el proyecto Opus23música y especialmente su formación sinfónica, la Orquesta Opus23, están comenzando a destacar en la escena musical española, obteniendo importantes éxitos de público y crítica por parte de la prensa especializada.

Al frente de la dirección artística está el Maestro Andrés Salado, uno de los más prometedores directores de orquesta españoles.

Name: TOONKUNSTKOOR EMMEN
Description:
De vereniging TOONKUNSTKOOR EMMEN, opgericht in 1945 is een oratoriumkoor met momenteel 60 leden. Financieel gezond en met trouwe leden. Het streven is om in een ontspannen sfeer te repeteren, met plezier op te treden en muzikaal te groeien. Het repertoire behelst naast de grote klassieke koorwerken ook modern en hedendaags werk.
Jaarlijks geeft het koor in het voorjaar (meestal) de Matthäus Passion, in het najaar een concert naar keuze of incidenteel een klein concert. Uitvoeringen vinden meestal plaats in de Grote Kerk of in de Goede Herder Kerk in Emmen. Incidenteel vinden optredens plaats in het ATLAS theater te Emmen. 
Begeleidingsorkesten, waarmee samengewerkt wordt, zijn o.a.: Het Nederlands Begeleidingsorkest (Arnhem), Musica Michaelis (Zwolle) en Concerto Barocco (Amsterdam). Professionele solisten worden met zorg geselecteerd.
De kwaliteit van de stemmen wordt bewaakt door een 3-jaarlijks stemadvies onder leiding van de dirigent en een externe stempedagoog. Kandidaat leden worden vooraf getest op stemkwaliteit (voorzingen bij de dirigent).

Name: Harmonie Orkest Concordia Treebeek en Harmonie Orkest Brunssum 1907
Description:
Harmonie Orkest Concordia Treebeek bestaat uit een hoofdorkest en een leerlingensemble. Daarnaast is er een innige band met Jeugdorkest Stad Brunssum, het voormalige Jeugdorkest Concordia Treebeek. Deze band komt tot uiting middels het gezamenlijke Nieuwjaarsconcert. Het hoofdorkest staat op dit moment onder leiding van dirigent Bert Steinmann en komt uit in de 1ste divisie van de Limburgse Bond van Muziekgezelschappen LBM. Een aantal maal per jaar wordt op niveau geconcerteerd. Het repertoire dat Concordia speelt bestaat uit een combinatie van klassiek en populair werk, maar ook hedendaagse muziek.

Concordia Treebeek 80 jaar

Op 20 januari 1934 werd in het Nederlands Hervormd Jeugdhuis (thans Trefcentrum Treebeek geheten) het harmonie-orkest “Concordia” Treebeek opgericht. Het eerste concert werd in het Beambtencasino in Treebeek gegeven en blonk natuurlijk niet uit door muzikaal kunnen. Maar, 80 jaar later kan de vereniging terugblikken op een mooie geschiedenis. Dit blijkt uit de vele successen op concoursen die onder befaamde dirigenten als Jan Cober, Hardy Mertens en Pieter Jansen behaald werden, maar ook uit het feit dat vele Concordianen hun weg naar de beroepsorkesten in Nederland en daarbuiten gevonden hebben.

Deelnames aan het WMC in Kerkrade en het Certamen in Valencia, en meest recent deelname aan het concours Flicorno d’Oro in Riva Italië in 2012 spreken nog steeds tot de verbeelding. Ook de vele concertreizen die in het verleden plaatsvonden getuigen van een vereniging die vele hoogtepunten gekend heeft. Hoogtepunten die Harmonie Orkest Concordia Treebeek ook in de toekomst nog vaak hoopt te beleven. Sinds januari 2016 is onze Concordiaan (en trompettist) Armand Wolfs aangesteld als dirigent. Onder zijn leiding wordt met veel elan gebouwd aan een toekomstvast orkest waarbij mooi musiceren als vanouds hoog in het vaandel staat.

Our team of highly talented individuals cater for all genres of music. We offer recordings from your first demo, to commercial releases, in addition to a vast range of post-production services. The Studio 8 team are able to meet any of your needs, no matter how specific they may be, so get in touch.

Name: Antioquia
Description:
Antioquia's sound is peculiar and pungent. And hard not to dance to. With roots in their namesake, Antioquia, Colombia, and strong interests in traditional West African music and the likes of Primus, Mahavishnu Orchestra and Phish, their music inspires raucous dancing and deep listening.

Antioquia's debut album Gringolandia, released in 2008, was called "a wild ride to the center of the earth and the depths of the soul." (Brian Echon, West Coast Performer Magazine). Another wild ride is scheduled for April 2010, when the group will release their 2nd album, "My piano ate the front page of the San Francisco Chronicle."

My Piano..., the group's second independent recording reveals a more mature and focused Antioquia and a voice that is unmistakably their own. Recorded in less than a week with good friend and talented engineer Dion Decibels, the album exhibits Antioquia at its rawest and most confident, playing and singing with conviction. Thematically, the album explores the alienating effects of today's mass media machine presented with poetic lyrics accompanied by sometimes aggressive, sometimes pensive, always expressive instrumentation. They plan to release the music as a donation based download on their website (antioquia-band.com) on the date of their Berkeley, CA album release festival on April 3rd, and are offering letter-pressed, hand assembled hard copies featuring art by second time collaborator Tobias Greene (drawinginthedark.com) for purchase from their website (www.antioquia-band.com).

In September 2008, the band launched their Post Peak Oil Rock Project, which aims to "wean their music off fossil fuels," from using waste veggie oil and bicycle touring technologies to tracking and reducing their use of plastic.

See their website www.antioquia-band.com for tour dates, streaming and downloadable audio, and updates.

Name: Musical Instruments Innovation Lab, S.L.
Description: Musical Instruments Innovation Lab (MIIL) is a technology SME set up in July 2017 following our 10-year history of manufacturing, selling and repairing classical, flamenco and concert acoustic guitars under the DVGuitars brand. Music and precision workmanship, especially with wood, have always been my passion. To end up designing and making my own musical instruments was only a matter of time. David Vidal (CEO) "Initially, due to my training in electronics and telecommunications, I carried out several successful business projects within the engineering field of professional audiovisual installation and it was not until I was 37 years old that I started my specific training as a luthier/guitar builder in the workshops of luthiers Jean Pierre Sardin and Tomoyuki Furuta in Barcelona. After 10 years in my own workshop, designing and manufacturing guitars, basses and repairing any instrument that fell into my hands, I began to see and suffer the limitations and problems of wood as a material for the construction of high quality instruments. My experience and my obsession with perfection led me to investigate other more modern materials that provide not only solutions to the classic problems of wood homogeneity and stability, but also far superior acoustic qualities. From this experience and the potential discovered, the MuseWaves project was set up to design and create innovative instruments intended to make life easier for musicians". In June 2017, we were selected by the European Space Agency as part of its incubation programme for the transfer of space technology to civil industry and were awarded a non-repayable grant for research and development. We are currently incubated in the Business Incubation Centre of the European Space Agency and Barcelona Activa in Barcelona.

Nous souhaitons également collaborer avec les réseaux et salles de spectacles pour organiser des rencontres entre les professionnels de la filière et les jeunes artistes (conférences, présentations, formations...). Description:
The Hammer Band is a non-profit music organization, focused on providing students with a prosperous, bright and safe future through music education. We aim to provide children with confidence, empathy and tolerance through music.
 
Children who learn to play an instrument and perform together learn crucial life skills such as self-discipline, teamwork and resilience. Studies show that music education has many benefits: improved academic performance, lower drop-out rates and stronger communities.
 
Today, the program is available in 42 Toronto public schools, and growing!

Composing music for Feature Films, Television Commercials, he programs/arranges/produces his own music.

Their music is radio-friendly Alt-Pop / Pop Rock usually in Hindi with straight from the heart lyric rendered by Vipin's rum-soaked raspy voice and his signature guitar work which makes an instant connect with the listener.

We seek to raise awareness about female percussionists from all over the world and hope to inspire women and girls of all ages to drum, all while strengthening and building the community of otherwise fragmented female musicians. We cover drummers of all ages, races, styles, skill level, sexualities, body size and notoriety. We are also a proud producer and creator of the Hit Like a Girl Contest: the only contest for female drummers in the world.

Tom Tom Magazine is more than just a magazine it is a movement. Join us.

xo, Tom Tom Magazine

Name: Jodhpur RIFF
Description:
Started in 2007, the Jodhpur RIFF brings together more than 250 Musicians and performing artists from across Rajasthan and around the world to celebrate their musical heritage and create new sounds through innovative collaborations, for five days in October each year.

Timed to coincide with the brightest full moon of the year in north India, Sharad Poornima, Jodhpur RIFF features a series of spectacular concerts and events based in and around Mehrangarh Fort - voted "Asia's Best Fortess" by Times Magazine. 

The next festival takes place from 21st - 25th October 2010.

Jodhpur RIFF includes performances by master musicians from local Rajasthan communities, sensational headline acts showcased each night on the Main Stage, and cutting-edge global dance grooves that will keep the party going late into the night at Club Mehran. Interactive daytime sessions for visitors, school children and families are staged against the breathtaking backdrop of the Fort.

The Jodhpur RIFF is a joint initiative of the Mehrangarh Museum Trust and the Jaipur Virasat Foundation.

En nuestras clases los niños aprenden de una forma natural, por medio de la imitación interiorizan conceptos musicales desarrollando al mismo tiempo su oído musical.

El programa de Música Viva se concentra en la educación temprana, la etapa más adecuada para aprender.  Nos basamos en la idea de que todo niño tiene potencial para aprender teniendo cada uno su propio ritmo. Queremos transmitir a todos los niños el amor por la música, la alegría y el placer de hacerla ayudando a cada uno a descubrirla por su propia  experiencia.

Name: Hotel Cafe
Description:
So, to write about one's own venture, I believe, is to be somewhat pretentious, or ego driven in some way or another. "I am great. I like the best stuff. You haven't even heard of the bands I listen to. I eat specialty cheese, and crackers that cost $8 a box, and so on.

That stuff simply drives me nuts, and /or bonkers. So, as not to toot our own horns, we'd prefer to use a few articles written by outside, unsolicited sources, that seem to painlessly capture what the Hotel Cafe is all about...

Oh, we were voted The Best Music Venue in LA by Citysearch editors in 2006. Paste Magazine listed us as one of Americas Top 40 Music Venues.... So thats kind of neat... toot... toot... Description:

We represent a wide range of international artists working exclusively in the field of classical music. Building on our existing reputation for furthering the careers of native artists, from the early days when the agency was known as Copenhagen Artists, we have continued to expand our business as a direct result of close collaborations with other leading international agencies such as Askonas Holt, in serving their best artists in the many concert halls and stages in the Nordic region.

Building on many years of experience in the music industry our staff has acquired a considerable knowledge of the international music scene and a unique personal understanding of what musicians look for and expect from an agency. We are dedicated to present the fine artistry of every artist on our roster to standing ovations of the Nordic audiences.

Name: Cheiron Music Group
Description:
Cheiron Music Group ("CMG") is a privately held company based in Orlando, Florida (USA) that distributes music worldwide through the various record labels that comprise its CMG Label Group, which includes its flagship label, Cheiron Records, its top pop music label, Trans Continental Records, as well as Rocket Records and some others. CMG also operates the renowned music production entity, Cheiron Studios 2, successor to the iconic Cheiron Studios, as well as a music-related video production entity and two music publishing entities, respectively.

CMG's Executive Team has many decades' worth of combined professional experience in multiple areas of the music industry. CMG's Chairman & Chief Music Officer is Christopher "Rocket" Pasquin, who is also the Founder & Chief Music Officer of Rocket Records, as well as the CEO & Chief Music Officer of Trans Continental Records and Executive Director of Cheiron Studios 2, respectively. CMG's President, Tim Coons, was the original music producer for the Backstreet Boys during the group's first few years with Trans Continental Records, and he has also helped launch the successful commercial careers of other global pop music superstars such as NSYNC, JoJo, and a few others. Tim is also the Founder & CEO of the world-renowned music production and recording artist development company, Atlantic Hill Music. 

The iconic "Cheiron" name and brand itself carries with it a significant historical legacy within the music industry, with the music production team at the now iconic Cheiron Studios having been responsible for the creation of some of the world's biggest pop music hit songs of all-time from 1992 to 2000. Cheiron Studios, which was located in Stockholm, Sweden, officially closed for good in late 2000 and has since been succeeded by Cheiron Studios 2, which is located in Orlando, FL. These days, Cheiron Music Group continuously strives to expand upon the tremendous music legacy of the "Cheiron" music brand and name.

Name: GIRLSofGRIME

GIRLSofGRIME launched in 2017 and has since organically grown into an online & offline community for female artists and creatives behind the scenes too. Initially leading with our 'Female Takeover' movement, producing regular radio shows with Rinse FM, and eventually our own live showcases, including for Wireless Festival's Equalising Music, we are now an artist & creative development hub. We identify our organisation as the 'Big Sister of the Scene', and often advocate for women in music and share knowledge via various panel events - including most recently with United Development x Trench Mag and our work with the London Borough of Cultures.

In 2021, we have been awarded funding from The Arts Council, which supports our current GIRLSofGRIME MUSIC activation, producing records and supporting releases with three female rappers - Lauren Marshall, Ariez Baby and C Cane. We have also launched a one-on-one DJ programme, with support from Small Green Shoots & Pirate Studios and continue to use our online platform to profile emerging & independent talent.

"Back at home, the biggest challenge was just staying alive each day. Many of my family members and friends died in the war that I fled from. I'm more aware about how I feel when I delve into songwriting. You have to believe all things are possible. Make music...not war."

Goldman's music is a fusion of Pop, Rock and Hip-Hop with a flare of Psychedelic Funk. His polished sound reverberates with Rock grit. Name: Menuhin Competition
Description:
Founded by Yehudi Menuhin in Folkestone, England in 1983 the Menuhin Competition is the world's leading international violin competition for young players under the age of 22, held every two years in a different world city. Divided in two age groups, Junior competitors have to be younger than 16 years and Seniors younger than 22. 

To honour and celebrate Yehudi Menuhin’s life and legacy in the centenary year of his birth, the Menuhin Competition Trust staged an 11 day festival of concerts, events, education and outreach activities in London from 7-17 April 2016, embodying Lord Menuhin’s philosophy that music connects. 

Prior to the Menuhin Competition London 2016 the Competition was held in Austin, Texas in 2014, Beijing in 2012 and Oslo in 2010. It attracts hundreds of entries from over 40 countries, choosing only 44 of the world’s very best young violinists to participate. The competition discovers, encourages and nurtures exceptionally talented young musicians from the UK and the rest of the world under the age of 22 years to develop into the next generation of great artists. 

The Menuhin Competition jury has maintained an impeccable reputation for fairness and artistic integrity. Creating a stimulating environment in which talented young violinists may learn and grow has always been and will remain at the heart of the Menuhin Competition and the London 2016 Competition starred a host of internationally acclaimed soloists and 44 of the most talented violin prodigies from around the world together with London’s best musicians and orchestras.

As one of Yehudi Menuhin’s most valuable legacies, the competition continues to uphold his status as a cultural ambassador and true world citizen by creating an exceptional family atmosphere of learning and exchange for the competitors. 

The next Menuhin Competition will take place in Geneva, Switzerland, from 12-22 April 2018.

Name: Scandinavia reggae festival
Description:
In recent year we have seen how the reggae and dancehall scene has flourished in Scandinavia countries and attained success. In Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland reggae artist who sing in their native languages achieves immense chart success and annually rake in awards at major awards shows. 

For this reason, we as organizers intend to create a festival where the genre`s practitioners and support from all the Scandinavian countries and beyond, can come tighter to enjoy the music. Our hope is that all encounters and exchanges that take place during these days can provide the basis for an expanded and strengthened Scandinavia reggae scene. 
The region`s comparable language represents a merging agent that constitutes a platform for affinity. with the festival, we want to promote an inter culture community. Naturally the festival also have an international outlook with booking from both homeland Jamaica as well as from the rest of the world. 

A strong tradition of taking a stand for "equal rights and justice", and highlighting the voice of marginalized groups in the quest to fight for a more loving society, runs through the core for reggae music`s history. Tighter with you, we want to creat a place where we as peers can socialize freely and enjoy the best our culture has to offer. 

- SRF

- 2 EP (OnR, Vol.1 & In Search Of Truth) disponibles sur toutes les plateformes digitales.
- 9 tracks

Et bien plus à venir !

Name: The LOTUS Project, NJ
Description:
Our mission is to craft immersive musical experiences in which we can encounter the world with new eyes and a renewed sense of wonder.

We do this through: 

- Immersive concerts in non-traditional performance venues
- Compelling stories about our shared human experience
- Highlighting historically excluded voices
- Humanitarian partnerships that engage with and elevate the local community

Our core humans live, work, and play in the Greater Trenton area and throughout the Northeastern Corridor. Rooted in the artistic culture of Trenton, NJ, we are part of an innovative community that we believe will become a creative hub to bridge the trailblazing cities of Philadelphia and NYC.

Name: Aight (Aight Foundation)
Description:
Aight is het grootste hiphopcentrum van Den Haag en omgeving. Aight richt zich op drie terreinen: Dans, Beeldend en Muziek en bedient daarmee meer dan alleen de Haagse hiphop. Respect, creativiteit en inzet zijn de belangrijkste uitgangspunten. Aight inspireert en motiveert deelnemers en biedt kansen voor talentontwikkeling.

Meer dan enig andere kunstvorm is hiphop een levensstijl. Een grote groep Haagse jongeren vindt in de hiphop de inspiratie om zijn culturele of sociale talenten te ontwikkelen. Aight zorgt daarvoor. Nu het centrum in de afgelopen jaren stevig is neergezet zet Aight komende jaren de stap om een grotere groep jongeren te inspireren met hiphop. Scholen zijn de beste plekken om jongens en meisjes de eerste stappen in de hiphopdisciplines te laten zetten. Daarna kiest een deel van hen ervoor om zich verder in een of meer elementen te bekwamen in hun buurt of Aight’s eigen hiphopcentrum. Aight verzamelt hiervoor een sterk team van docenten die nauw samenwerken met de leerkrachten uit het primair en voortgezet onderwijs. Met een klein aantal (inter)nationale evenementen organiseert Aight jaarlijks haar eigen showcases. Bovendien creëert Aight haar eigen podiumplekken waar de deelnemers zich kunnen presenteren in een echte hiphop scene.

Name: Centre Musical CAMMAC Music Centre
Description:
Making music is at the heart of CAMMAC's mission – learning it, playing it, listening to it and enjoying it – our goal is to create a welcoming and cooperative community for music lovers and music lovers of all ages and levels.

At CAMMAC, we promise you a relaxing, non-competitive environment, where you can play, meet people who share the same passions, learn from dedicated teachers, and discover new repertoire in our workshops and concerts. Can’t read music? No problem! Pair up with a veteran singer and follow along easily!
Our goal is simple: for you to immerse yourself in our musical environment and have fun. No small feat—but we are proud to say new recruits often tell us CAMMAC has changed their lives!

EXPERIENCE THE BEST OF WHAT NATURE AND MUSIC HAVE TO OFFER

Located on the shores of beautiful Lake MacDonald in the Laurentians (Québec, Canada), the Music Centre hosts participants of all ages from all over the world throughout the year. Our activities include a summer music festival, seven weeks of programming in the summer, a Spring Break camp, a celebration of Bach for the long weekend in May, and a Thanksgiving extravaganza. The Music Centre also hosts corporate retreats, school groups and other private functions throughout the year.

ENJOY THE CAMMAC EXPERIENCE ALL YEAR ROUND

In addition to our Music Centre, CAMMAC has a presence in the Ottawa-Gatineau, Toronto, and Montreal regions, each contributing to a lively amateur music-making scene throughout the year. Each region promotes unique activities that include workshops, orchestra sessions, masterclasses, sight-readings, concerts and much more. The regional committees are run by a passionate team of volunteers, and newcomers are always welcome.

Name: Plural Music
Description:
Plural Music was initially started for one initial reason: the love of music. That same reason keeps us motivated today. We are composed of DJ's who play varying genres of music. Plural Music is not one specific genre of music, instead, we play open-format.

We are committed to bringing festival level production to our client's events. Plural Music is unique in that we provide our clients with an experience tailored to their liking centered around premium sound and light production. No matter what music, crowd, or location, Plural Music will be able to provide a memorable experience.

Name: Ikon Arts Management
Description: With over 20 years' experience in music management, Ikon Arts Management develops worldwide concerts and tours, special projects and events for some of the world’s leading a cappella vocal groups, established and emerging soloists and diverse contemporary ensembles, as well as linking concerts with recordings and publishing opportunities.

Name: Brighton Music Office
Description:
Utilising the music city concept, the Brighton Music Office was established to conduct research into how Brighton's music industry works and to build a music strategy for the city.

We have a preliminary focus on mapping Brighton’s music industry in its entirety and creating a database of all operating businesses within the city’s music industry, whilst conducting interviews with prominent, local figures to construct a coherent impression of Brighton's musical ecosystem and quantify its overall contribution to Brighton’s economy. 

The collected data will be used to calculate the most imperative needs of the local music industry and then provide a selection of appropriate resources and events, to allow local professionals and musicians alike to network, grow & thrive and make greater contributions toward the burgeoning prosperity of Brighton’s musical economy.  


Goals and Objectives: 

- Improve communication between the various music industry sectors, as well as local authorities, to build a more connected music industry. 
- Record the music industry's economic contribution to the city
- Have a central point of contact for all music industry professionals
- Encourage and boost the growth of Brighton’s music economy
- Build an arena venue in Brighton
- Brand Brighton as a prominent music city


We aim to provide equal, impartial support to the entirety of Brighton’s music industry, across all sectors, genres and levels of economic status.

Name: Bahay Collective
Description: Bahay Collective is an up-coming creative studio and agency, located in the heart of Montreal. Bahay, which translates to “home” in Tagalog, represents a home for all artists. Our collective provides artists with the services, tools, and opportunities to achieve their career goals and help them cover all areas of artistic development. All of these services are housed inside the Bahay Collective HQ, which is an actual house, very much tongue-in-cheek with the name of our company.

Name: Yamaha Music School Era Musika Setiabudi
Description: Yamaha Music School Era Musika Setiabudi is a music company based out of Jl. Setia Budi, Medan Selayang, India.

Name: Associazione Culturale Trovarobato
Description:
Trovarobato è un'associazione culturale che opera come etichetta discografica, booking, centro di produzioni radiofoniche ed eventi. Ha sede a Bologna.
Trovarobato nasce dall'esperienza di autoproduzione e autopromozione dei Mariposa.


Nel corso degli anni ha messo l'esperienza così maturata al servizio di altri progetti che ritiene interessanti e stimolanti.
Le linee editoriali di Trovarobato sono due: l'etichetta tout court dedicata alla ricerca all'interno della forma canzone e la collana Parade, nata per dare cittadinanza a una serie di progetti difficilmente catalogabili.

Trovarobato ha creato alla fine del 2010 TRB promozioni che gestisce e coordina campagne promozionali.

Trovarobato è: Gianluca Giusti, Michele Orvieti, Andrea Lodi, Robin Luis Fernandez.

Name: Soundway Records Ltd
Description: Soundway Records is an independent record label based in London, United Kingdom.

Name: One Produtora Musical
Description:
A ONE Produtora surgiu a partir de uma nova concepção no mundo da música.Utilizamos o conceito 360. Aqui o artista tem acesso a diversos serviços, uma proposta de produção musical e artística ainda mais completa, fazendo com que cada artista seja único, seja ONE!
   Criação e inovação foram as premissas que levaram os produtores Rafael Reis e Maurício Hoffmann, em 2010 fundarem a One Produtora, uma empresa preparada para o novo e atenta às novas necessidades e tendências musicais.

   As portas do estúdio One estão abertas para todos produtores/artistas/bandas que queiram trabalhar em alta qualidade, conforto, num ambiente agradável com profissionais qualificados e com experiência.
   Com equipamentos de qualidade , espaço com acústica controlada e ambiente diferenciado, o estúdio One atende gravações e produções de nível nacional. Captação, mixagem, masterização, gravações de videos , live sessions etc…

Name: Alika
Description:
Alika se ha convertido en uno de los referentes del Roots Reggae Dancehall de habla hispana. Influenciada notablemente por el Hip Hop que escucho desde pequeña y con el cual dio sus primeros pasos en la musica. En 1994, fue una de las fundadoras de Actitud Maria Marta,una de las primeras bandas de rap de Argentina la cual fue reconocida por la prensa como la banda Revelacion del año 1995. Terminando con esa formacion en el año 1998 dejan registrado un unico disco "Acorralar a la Bestia" (1996, Polygram) 
Alika decide en 1999 comenzar su propio proyecto, basado en las raices de la Cultura Rastafari, destacandose por sus letras claras y directas que hablan del Respeto, la Dignidad, la opresion del sistema occidental, la confianza en uno mismo, la vida en los paises del tercer mundo y las problematicas que se viven en los barrios. Chile es el pais en donde Alika, junto a destacados mc s de la escena, como Boomer, le da forma a su primera produccion "No Dejes que te paren" (2001 Indie) , este trabajo, hizo sentir su influencia entre los jovenes. En el 2001 tambien comienza a presentarse en vivo. En el 2003 edita su segundo album "Sin Intermediarios" disco bien recibido en Sudamerica con cortes como "Paciencia" "Demanda" y "Encendedores" En el 2005 llega su tercer produccion "Razon Meditacion Accion" un disco donde la musica de Alika & Nueva Alianza suena mas roots que nunca, este, contiene cortes como "Costumbre de Matar" y "No le des fuerza a Babilonia"
Su carisma y presencia escenica la han llevado a compartir su musica en festivales multitudinarios y tambien en Sound Systems, teatros, clubs, escuelas hospitales y hasta carceles en diferentes ciudades de paises como Estados Unidos, Mexico,Guatemala, El Salvador, Costa Rica, Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Brasil, Chile, Bolivia, Argentina, Uruguay, España y Andorra, donde sorprende la convocatoria que tiene esta artista independiente. A finales del 2006 Alika graba con Mad Professor el album "Alika meets Mad Profe

Name: Paperclip Agency
Description:
Paperclip Agency, owned by Hilde Spille and Rob Berends, is a European agency and a Dutch promoter, and books the Conincx Pop Festival.
For Hilde and Rob, doing business is earning an honest living, with a strong emphasis on artist integrity, on cooperation, and on social and ecological sustainability.

Our company philosophy can be found on https://www.paperclip.agency under 'About us', and our roster with all artists we work for under 'Roster'.

Description: The MR. GOOD BOY record cart is the first all-in-one special events music platform and mobile record store that can operate anywhere. Invented by our team to give people an exciting and convenient way to experience, discover, and enjoy music. If you are interested in us and where Mr. Good Boy will be next, please follow us on instagram or join our mailing list.

Name: Oakland Youth Chorus
Description:
Oakland Youth Chorus unites diverse communities and transforms young people’s lives through excellence in music education and community performance. 

OYC offers school and community based music and choral training programs for East Bay children and youth. Through our elementary in-school programs, after school Miracle Choruses, Middle School Choruses, and our advanced Concert Chorus and Chamber Singers ensembles, OYC brings access with excellence in music instruction and community building performance opportunities that increase confidence, community engagement, musical skills, and creativity. 

OYC was founded in 1974 to nurture the musical talent of Oakland’s youth. Since then, OYC has grown from a single community youth chorus to a comprehensive youth choral music education organization serving hundreds of singers each year. OYC trains youth in a varied repertoire, supporting artistic diversity by providing programs that reflect and contribute to the cultural richness of our region. OYC’s young people develop close friendships across lines of race, class and culture, multicultural respect, and a lifelong love of music, changing lives and our world through the power of the human voice.

Name: Heart of The City Piano Program Vancouver
Description: Founded in 1995 by Richard Dube in Saskatchewan, operating in Vancouver since 2008. Heart of the City Piano Program is a national organization committed to ensuring every child has access to music education. Heart of the City Piano connects volunteer teachers with piano students and provides music resources including instruments, books, and performance opportunities. In addition to providing musical education, the organization also aims to enhance students' lives through fostering personal growth and self esteem.

Name: Vinyl Tap
Description: Vinyl Tap has been in the business of selling music for over twenty five years now and in that period have supplied many thousands of collectors around the globe. We started trading in 1986 and are still going strong in the digital age, 2012 being our best year ever! Mail order is the main stuff and a pretty big shop in Huddersfield town centre stocking new release vinyl and cds and also rare and collectable vinyl, cds, cassettes and memorabilia. Check out our website and other social media sites to keep up to date with what items we get in

Name: Flash
Description:
The District of Columbia's premier underground dance music venue. Funktion-One sound, acoustic treatment, and a stellar lighting rig all feature.


Flash opened its doors in June of 2013 as a collaboration between long-time lovers of music, former DJ’s, and music industry vets. Their goal was to present an intimate space where artists can express themselves clearly and fans can hear their favorite artists in an ideal setting.

The Club Level features an acoustically treated studio-quality room showcasing a custom Funktion One sound system and a next-generation lighting rig designed to heighten the experience. It provides a balance between dance floor, fully stocked bar and wall-to-wall bench seating.

The ground floor, appropriately named Flash Bar, features a separate dance floor and DJ area, coat check, ATM, additional restrooms, and a fully stocked bar specializing in a wide selection of liquor and hand-crafted cocktails.

Flash is open every Friday and Saturday night with headlining national and international DJ talents covering a wide spectrum of house music, from deep to techno. Other styles of music are also presented numerous nights per week. Please check the events page for the latest list of events.

Name: Guitarist Charles David Smart
Description:
“Thank you for coming and performing. We enjoyed having you here.”, 
Neeva Penner, Worship Coordinator, Crystal Cathedral, Los Angeles

Intimate worship through beautiful music, Multi-styled, Award Winning, Nashville recording artist, GUITARIST CHARLES DAVID SMART has a real love for the Lord.

David’s personal music ministry has been heard worldwide including: the USA, Canada, England, Russia, Northern Ireland and the Republic of Ireland.  He has shared the platform with Roy Clark; Phillips, Craig and Dean; First Call; NewSong; Larnel Harris; Pat Methany; Clark Terry; and many other leading performing artists.  Dave (with his unique arrangements and subtle humor) has helped lead inspiring worship and praise celebrations in numerous worship centers including Robert Schuller Ministries, The Crystal Cathedral.  

David has taught leading guitarists worldwide; and, as a active composer, he has premiered works for sanctuary choirs, children‘s groups, instrumental ensembles, and soloists.

•	2008 Film Composer: Baby Sophie and Friends
•	2008 and 2007 Kansas City Christian Music (King Kat) Association Award Instrumentalist of the Year
•	2005 Kansas Federation of Music Clubs’ Musician of the Year, 
•	Pro-Memberships:  Gospel Music Association, Americana Music Association, American Federation of Musicians, Kansas City Guitar Society, Kansas City Christian Music, American Society of Composers and Producers (ASCAP)

David teaches music with MidAmerica Nazarene University and Kansas City Kansas Community College.  He, his wife & youngest son are very active with the Olathe Westside Church (Kansas City) where they directly participate in many areas of family ministry.  Their two older sons are young adults serving in other ministries nationwide.  

JOHN 14:6

Name: Groovypedia Music Company
Description: Groovypedia is an independent web2 and web3 hybrid music platform that has recorded, distributed, and published music worldwide for more than 10 years. If you'd like to be part of this platform as a producer or an artist, reach us at: hi@groovypedia.com

Description: Hof van Jaeden is a Dutch hiphopdevelopment agency. We teach independent hiphopartists to take care of their own businesses. From making the music, to planning the recording sessions and from marketing, to selling their music.

Name: The Sound
Description:
Hilton Head Island recording studio (audio recording and music production services) including ISDN for voiceover (VO).

The Sound is a professionally equipped, full-service recording and music production studio that features...

-A highly experienced and credited songwriter, producer, musician and engineer (gregcritchley.com)
-Co-writing and collaboration
-Cutting-edge digital and analog recording equipment
-Solid industry relationships nationwide for creative collaborations, music placements (Sync fees, etc.) and general artist career advancement
-Dedicated ISDN line for "across the globe," studio-to-studio remote recording 
-Voiceover recording with digital phone patch and VO talent casting services

Rather than continuing the outdated studio-to-studio grind that is so common in LA, Nashville and NY, you can bring your creative vision to paradise. Hilton Head Island's beaches, lowcountry marshes and mossy Spanish Oak trees provide the perfect resort-like setting for your project!

Our in-house staff has worked with the biggest names in music worldwide including David Foster (Christina Aguilera, Whitney Houston, Prince), Greg Wells (Adele, Katy Perry, Weezer, Timbaland), Kara Doguardi (American Idol judge, Pink!, Kelly Clarkson), Alex Lifeson (Rush) and more. Our work has also appeared in everything from several Walt Disney Pictures releases to The Telepictures Network (TMZ, Extra, Anderson Cooper, Dr. Drew). For a detailed credit list, visit gregcritchley.com.

Name: Central Line Entertainment

Central Line Entertainment on vuonna 1992 perustettu ohjelmatoimisto joka on ollut jo vuosien ajan Suomen suurin itsenäinen ohjelmatoimisto. Central Line myy Suomen suurimpien artistien keikkoja sekä järjestää omia keikkoja, festivaaleja, konsertteja, areenakeikkoja ja erikoiskiertueita.

Central Line Entertainment is a booking agency found in 1992. For years Central Line has been the biggest independent booking agency in Finland. Central Line represents the biggest artists in Finland. Central Line also organizes festivals, concerts, arena shows, events and special tours.

Name: 153/Joombas Music Group
Description:
As 153 Group’s music company, we believe that music & entertainment can help make a positive difference in the world and shape the way we love & serve others.
153/Joombas’s purpose is to establish music ventures to be used as tools to love & serve others and also disrupt the industry.

Name: Heart of Texas Concert Band
Description:
The Heart of Texas Concert Band celebrated its Crystal (15th) Anniversary Season in 2023-2024, having been formed in 2009.  
Since its inception, the band has performed over 150 free concerts for increasing audiences in 35 unique venues in San Antonio and surrounding communities.
     The organization was honored to be the 2022 recipient of the Sudler Silver Scroll, announced by the John Philip Sousa Foundation.  North America’s most prestigious award for community concert bands, the Silver Scroll identifies, recognizes and honors those community bands that have demonstrated particularly high standards of excellence in concert activities over a period of several years, and which have played a significant and leading role in the cultural and musical environment in their respective communities.
     R. Mark Rogers, the 2023 recipient of the Association of Concert Bands Outstanding Conductor Award, and founding Conductor of HTxCB, has shared the podium with more than 30 distinguished colleagues in rehearsals and performances including William Owens, Richard Floyd, Carol Brittin Chambers, Dr. James Worman, Ferd Volmar, and Dr. Gary Garner.
     The band collaborates with a wide variety of ensembles and cultural organizations in the community, such as the Dianne Brumley Chorale, the River City Ringers of San Antonio, the Alamo City Dance Company, Prickly Pear Clarinet Ensemble, the San Antonio Sax Quartet, the San Antonio Brass, the Cedar Mountain Chorale and the San Antonio Choral Society, to present varied concerts of wide interest.
     Paul Cohen, one of America's most sought-after saxophonists, Elisabeth Failing, vocalist; Ezra Johnson, vocalist and narrator; Dr. Rachel Frederikson, bassoonist; tenor, Rafael Moras, rising star of the opera and classical music world, and Barry Hearn, Principal Trombone of the Dallas Symphony, are some of the 70 featured soloists, instrumental and vocal, that have shared the stage with the band in performance.

Name: Soundcheck Magazine
Description:
Connecting the artist and the audience. 

Soundcheck Magazine started in 2006 as a monthly glossy magazine distributed on a free basis in Austin, Texas. It has since expanded to include weekly web publication of exclusive features, photos, columns, and ticket giveaways to upcoming concerts.

Our slogan "Connecting the artist and the audience" sums up our goal: all of our content is based on exclusive interviews and photographs in an attempt to build a bridge between the people who make music and the people who love music.

Name: Made with Music
Description: A charity providing accessible and educational live music experiences for families and young people

Name: Archiv Frau und Musik
Description:
Mit seinen über 25.000 Medieneinheiten (gedruckte Noten, Originale, Graue Literatur, ca. 3.500 CDs und andere Tonträger, historische Konzertplakate, über 40 Nachlässe, Literatur wie Dissertationen und andere Abschlussarbeiten, Biografien, Sachbücher etc.) von und über mehr als 1.800 Komponistinnen sowie auch zu Dirigentinnen aus 52 Nationen vom 9. bis ins 21. Jahrhundert ist das Archiv Frau und Musik das älteste (gegründet 1979), größte und bedeutendste Archiv dieser Art der Welt.

Einen Schwerpunkt bilden Original-Literatur des 18. bis 21. Jahrhunderts, aber auch umfangreiche Sammlungen zu Neuer Musik sowie zum Rock-, Pop- und Jazzbereich.

Name: GPS Management
Description:
Global Positioning Services Inc. is a full service music management company with offices located in Santa Monica and New York. We represent a select roster of record producers, songwriters, mixers, engineers, DJs & recording artists. With an A&R approach to management, our focus is on developing career clients. We provide services including day-to-day project coordination, contract negotiation, royalty collection, social media administration, invoicing and global industry outreach.

GPS was founded by James Phelan and Jerimaya Grabher in 2005, and has since become a leading management company currently representing a roster of over 25 clients. GPS counts among its roster of clients the elite of the record making side of the business, spanning more than 100 million records sold and 40 Grammy awards won. Our clients have contributed to the success of prestigious artists including Kings of Leon, Kanye West, Norah Jones, U2, Paul McCartney, Jay-Z, Florence and the Machine, The Rolling Stones, Seal, Dave Matthews Band, Rachael Yamagata, Juanes, Eric Clapton, Modest Mouse, Paolo Nutini, Ray Lamontagne, Snow Patrol, Adele, Ryan Adams, Yeah Yeah Yeahs, Joe Cocker, The Pet Shop Boys, Bob Dylan, Train, Nirvana, Colbie Caillat, Tom Jones and Weezer to name only a few.

Name: Crescendo | Music Club IIITN
Description: The Music Club of IIITN. Follow us for updates!

Name: Music Production Academy
Description:
MPA consists of a young team of ambitious producers, professional musicians and innovative entrepreneurs. With an emphasis on personal guidance provided at professional facilities, MPA became one of the fastest growing audio schools in The Netherlands since it was founded in 2014.

Besides educational offers, MPA is more than a school. With events, network opportunities and a rapid growing community of ambitious artists, MPA is thé music production centre of Rotterdam. We want to help as much producers as possible to make the most of their music, make it more accessible to develop collaborations and help in the journey From Passion to Production.

Name: National Academy of Music
Description:
Since 1979, National Academy of Music in Mississauga has inspired students of all ages to learn the gift of music. 

We teach many types of instruments, including:

-Piano
-Guitar
-Bass
-Violin
-Flute
-Drums
-Vocal
-Singing
-Voice
-and Music Theory

We invite you to come visit us in our beautiful heritage building located in the Kee Square Shopping Centre in Mississauga. Our friendly and professional music teachers have a history of creating award-winning students and passionate musicians and look forward to meeting you.

Whether you are a child or adult, an amateur or a professional, we have the program and lessons you need to meet your goals. We offer a challenging but rewarding Royal Conservatory of Music Curriculum that is recognized by the Ontario Ministry of Education, as well as play for fun curriculum.

Name: Footstomp Music
Description: Footstomp music provides artist management, project management, mentoring and events. Footstomp provides a project management service that includes promotions, publicity and marketing.  It encompasses all appropriate media jointly selected with clients upon entering into agreements. Artists currently managed by Footstomp include Glenn Richards (Augie March), Yves Klein Blue (Co-management with secret service), Inland Sea and The Honey Month. The mentoring service is offered for bands who think their career should be advancing faster and includes one month open communication, two intensive meetings, attendance at a gig with appraisal and two detailed reports.

Name: Santoor Center
Description: پژوهشکده سنتور با مدیریت داوود غلامی شیرازی به تحقیق و پژوهش در جهت پیشبرد ساز سنتور میپردازد و تاکنون موفق به ثبت چندین اختراع در این زمینه گردیده و کیفیت و استاندارد بسیار بالا و بی سابقهای در ساخت سنتور ارائه داده است. این نهاد در سال 1395 موفق به دریافت سه نشان ملی مرغوبیت و برتری از سازمان صنایع دستی گردیده است. اساتید و نوازندههای طراز اول ایران از سنتورهای این پژوهشکده استفاده کرده و آنها را تائید کردهاند. این نهاد همه ساله در معتبرترین نمایشگاههای بینالمللی ایران و جهان از جمله نمایشگاه معتبر موسیقی فرانکفورت حضور موفق داشته است.

Name: Juan Pablo Herrera - Música & Audio
Description:
Abierto desde Abril de 2008, KRAUT es un espacio que ofrece soluciones en las áreas de: 
- Composición 
- Producción artística | Arreglos 
- Grabación 
- Mezcla | Edición digital

KRAUT es un espacio donde se generan y confluyen ideas..
Donde aunamos fuerzas para lanzar los acordes a los cuatro vientos..
Donde respetamos la libertad que nos da la creación, e intentamos entender qué nos pone en este increíble camino de la MUSICA...

Name: Beat Sync Academy
Description:
The Beat Sync Academy is Orange County’s only professional DJ School.
Learn from DJs with two decades of Professional DJ experience. We offer group/class or one on one instructions to meet your specific needs whether you’ve never touched a turntable or are a DJ looking to perfect your craft. Our instructors have years of professional experience as Touring/Headlining DJs, Club DJs, Mobile DJs, Radio Mix Shows and have done original tracks, remixes & DJ Mix Compilations for major record labels. We cover every style of music from Hip Hop, House, Mashup, Electro, Trance, Minimal, Dubstep to Drum N Bass. What ever your “flava” is, we’ll teach it.

As a DJ School of over 7 years, the Beat Sync Academy has developed a proven and tested curriculum that has earned a rare corporate endorsement from Pioneer Pro DJ (the industry leader in DJ equipment) and Rane/Serato. We also have an advisory board that includes veteran DJ/Producers Simply Jeff, Charles Feelgood, Swedish Egil and DJ Aero that keeps us on the leading edge of DJ trends.

You will also find a retail store with:
- A selection of collectible vinyl records that covers everything in the EDM spectrum from House, Trance, Dubstep & More. Also Rock, 80′s Hip Hop & Pop for the DJs & Music Collectors.
- Rare music Collectibles, including, rare concert posters, press photos and other music memorabilia.
- NEW & USED DJ Equipment, Accessories, Production Software & Gear

Name: Danish Philharmonic Orchestra
Description:
Danish Philharmonic Orchestra (or Sønderjyllands Symfoniorkester (SSO) in Danish) is a philharmonic orchestra of 65 members based in the beautiful Concert Hall Alsion in Sønderborg, Denmark. The orchestra plays around 150 concerts per year in a wide range of concerts – Classical symphonic music, chamber music, children’s school concerts and opera. The Danish The orchestra serves as the State orchestra for Denmark’s South Jutland region and Southern Schleswig in northern Germany. The orchestra celebrated its 60-year anniversary in 2023 as State orchestra, travelling to the Faroe Islands and Greenland on their jubilee tour with great success. 

The Danish Philharmonic Orchestra excels in music from the Classical Period and Danish composers like Carl Nielsen, Niels W. Gade, Rued Langgaard and Hans Christian Lumbye. Chief conductors Shao-Chia Lü and Johannes Wildner have had a noticeable impact on the orchestra’s sound, and the orchestra has collaborated with well-known figures like Sarah Chang, Anthony Pappano, Luciano Pavarotti, Isabelle Van Keulen, Nikolaj Znaider, Andreas Brantelid and many more.

Name: GRÜV
Description: We give every artist the chance to be discovered and every music lover the chance to become a curator,  while leveraging community and sales mechanisms that reduce artists’ business risks, increase their revenues, and build happy audience and customer bases. We also give fragmented music communities and subcultures a home.

Name: Musicalmente
Description:
Our School!

Professionalità ed esperienza da oltre 13 anni.

Docenti altamente qualificati che vi accompagneranno sia nel percorso didattico che extra didattico, puntando non solo alla crescita musicale, ma sviluppando anche le abilità artistiche degli studenti, proponendo spettacoli come concerti e musical dal vivo in luoghi pubblici e privati.

Offriamo corsi di musica classica e moderna, individuali e collettive. Ci trovate in Largo Cesti presso il C/C Nascosa (Q5), Latina.

Le nostra location dedicata alla formazione artistica è dotata di ogni tipo di strumentazione professionale.

Name: Apex Music International
Description:
Apex Music International has a holistic ethos that is focused on providing the best support for our artists and events. We offer a variety of services to our clients will help them manage and maximise all aspects of live touring and/or live events.
 
The core team of AMI have a combined 50+ years of experience within various aspects of live touring, events, recording, business, governance and finance. This enables AMI to offer bespoke services to artists and events to help them achieve their desired results and potential.

Description: We Are Triumphant is a music company based out of 22100 Burbank Blvd, Los Angeles, California, United States.

Name: Memorial University School of Music
Description: One of Canada’s leading music schools, we offer the highest levels of MENTORSHIP in the country. You’ll have access to the resources, space and individual attention you need to achieve. Perform in facilities that are acoustically superb. Plug-in to our focus on TECHNOLOGY and our electro-acoustic research lab. Expand your horizons through INTERNATIONAL studies at our UK campus. All this in an environment full of PROFESSIONAL opportunities designed to develop your competitive edge.

Name: Związek Zawodowy Muzyków RP
Description: Związek Zawodowy Muzyków RP powstał aby chronić interesy polskich muzyków, dbać o ich potrzeby i reprezentować ich wszędzie tam, gdzie ważna jest perspektywa tej grupy zawodowej. Naszym celem jest zbudowanie silnej organizacji mającej realny wpływ na stanowienie i przestrzeganie prawa w sektorze kultury ze szczególnym odniesieniem do polskiego rynku muzycznego.  Związek Zawodowy Muzyków RP będzie występował we wszystkich sprawach istotnych dla bytu polskich muzyków i przyszłości kultury polskiej.

Name: DK Projects
Description:
David is a passionate and dedicated music professional with nearly a decade of experience working in public relations, marketing, and artist relations roles in label, agency, and entrepreneurial settings. He has spearheaded national/international press campaigns around music releases, tours, festivals, and content for a diverse client roster of past/present clients including Axwell, Ingrosso, Alesso, AC Slater, Brasstracks, Grandtheft, Hotel Garuda, Manila Killa, Jackal, Robotaki, KRANE, Majestic Casual Records, Trap Nation’s Lowly Palace, and many more. 

The DKP team consists of like-minded professionals who work tirelessly to provide our clients with relevant, strategic exposure across different platforms. From conception, to planning, to execution, our goal is to work hand-in-hand with every manager, artist, label etc. to ensure their project is unveiled to maximum effect and results.

Name: Young People's Symphony Orchestra
Description:
Founded in 1936 in Berkeley, California, Young People’s Symphony Orchestra (YPSO) is the oldest independent youth orchestra in California, and the second oldest in the nation. For over 80 years - and counting - YPSO has developed the musical talents and skills of students in the San Francisco Bay Area. Today, many YPSO alumni are internationally distinguished musicians and prominent community members.

Our mission is to guide young musicians to achieve excellence within an orchestral setting. We provide an educational environment that fosters accomplishment, serves as a cultural resource for the community, and builds future audience by instilling a passion for music. We encourage young people to become exemplary musicians, and young musicians to become exemplary people.

Name: BELLAS IN TUNE
Description:
A global network of aspiring women in music, and through our network we discover and develop new talent.

We operate in a way which is tailored to how the music industry is operating today, offering a modernised and fresh take on music marketing. While, of course, breaking the glass ceiling while doing so.

Name: HM Música
Description:
Founded in 1997, HM MUSICA is an enterprise of international reference well-known by its activity in the Portuguese traditional and world music circuit.  

Twelve years of activity gave HM a wide experience in such fields as booking, career management, concert production, music consultancy, and recording projects in Portugal and abroad. Hundred of tours and performances in the most renowned concert halls, venues besides national and international festivals are the best evidence of HM´s recognition earned through its short but rich existence. 

Because music is a universal medium we want to apply and deepen the concept of “Music Without Frontiers” in the broadest sense of the word, by bringing Portuguese culture and its best interpreters to all continents. 

At this moment HM MUSICA already operates in a national and international network of agencies with which it works regularly. 

HM MUSICA is ready to start new partnerships.
Do not hesitate to contact us!

Name: Bayerischer Musikrat
Description: Bayerischer Musikrat is the largest cultural organisation in Bavaria, Germany. As a federation of the institutions and associations of musical life in Bavaria, it represents around 1 million music-loving citizens in the fields of amateur and professional music.

Name: AZTEC RECORDS //////
Description:
Aztec Records is an Independent Record Label based in London, UK that specialises in releasing quality Pop, Electronic, Synthwave and Retrowave. Artists include Sunglasses Kid, LAU, Gryff, Thought Beings, Bright Light Bright Light, WYVE, NINA and many others.

We aim to discover and promote the best independent artists out there and to become a true artists collective.

Get in touch: submissions.aztec.records@gmail.com

Name: gigseekr
Description:
Gigseekr is a live music discovery service listing events from across the world. Find and stay up to date with the tours, concerts and bands of your choice.

www.instagram.com/gigseekr
www.twitter.com/gigseekr
www.facebook.com/gigseekr

Name: Salsa y Latin Jazz Festival
Description:
Un gran Festival itinerante que programa a los mejores exponentes de La Salsa y el Latin Jazz internacional en 5 ciudades españolas; una propuesta novedosa y contracorriente que busca convertirse en la principal plataforma de la música latina a nivel Nacional y Europeo. 
EDDIE PALMIERI, CALLE 13, RUBÉN BLADES, GILBERTO SANTA ROSA, LARRY HARLOW CON ALFREDO DE LA FÉ	& THE LATIN LEGENDS, HAVANA D'PRIMERA, LA EXCELENCIA Y LA SUCURSAL S.A. 

Salsa y Latin Jazz Festival 2012 

http://salsaylatinjazzfestival.com/

Name: Festival Catrina
Description:
El Festival Catrina es un evento de talla internacional que recibe más de 50,000 personas cada año. Se caracteriza por traer talento nacional e internacional y combinar exitosamente diferentes géneros y artistas lo que da como resultado un público de diferentes edades y targets, el escenario ideal para que tu marca encuentre a su público objetivo y logre conectar con ellos a través de experiencias innovadoras y únicas conectando a la música con tu marca. 

Lo más importante para nosotros es la experiencia de los asistentes al festival por eso te invitamos a ser parte y lograr experiencias inolvidables.

Name: Detroit Concert Choir
Description:
The Detroit Concert Choir is Detroit's international award winning vocal ensemble. The choir has a worldwide reputation for choral excellence and is recognized for exceptional artistic expression and inspiring performances.

The ensemble's beloved founder, the late Gordon Nelson, led the Detroit Concert Choir from 1987 until 2014 and developed a magnificent choir dedicated to promoting choral music of high artistic merit. After an interim year showcasing its hallmark choral artistry with Associate Conductor Stan Harr, the choir is now entering an exciting new chapter under the direction of Dr. Brandon Johnson.

The choir will continue to present local audiences with an outstanding collection of inspiring performances with repertoire from around the world, ranging from early a cappella and sacred music to contemporary compositions, American folk and gospel, and great masterworks for chorus and orchestra. Please  join us as we welcome our new director and a sparkling new season of musical beauty and inspiration.  Detroit Concert Choir is dedicated to promoting choral music of high artistic merit and cultural enrichment for the community through performance and education. DCC rehearses in the Grosse Pointe Woods area and involves 70+ singers from over 35 communities in and around Detroit.

Name: Fano Guitars
Description: Fano Guitars - award-wining Fano Alt de Facto guitars fuse timeless classic elements with a bold new look, feel and energy.

Name: Vivid Sound Design
Description:
Vivid is a new independent London-based sound design team, who provide custom-made music for your visuals on demand.
Need a jingle for a quick advert? A voiceover for your documentary?  Or lush orchestration complete with real string section for your cinematic masterpiece? 
Thanks to our team of leading international songwriters and platinum producers, we'll work with you to ensure you get the maximum out of your visuals in a minimum amount of time.
Here is a range of the services we can offer:

	•	Compositions
	•	Soundtracks
	•	Scores
	•	Underscores
	•	Advertising jingles
	•	Voiceovers

Name: Sofia Philharmonic
Description:
СОФИЙСКАТА ФИЛХАРМОНИЯ отдавна се е утвърдила като един от водещите институти в музикалния живот на България, представителен за цялата ни съвременна музикална култура. Високите художествени постижения и активната концертна дейност у нас и по света, привличат както традиционната публика, така и все повече млади ценители на класическата музика.
В своята творческа история, Софийската филхармония е изминала дълъг интензивен път на художествено израстване, свързан с имената на изтъкнати музикантски фигури като Саша Попов, Константин Илиев, Добрин Петков, Васил Стефанов, Васил Казанджиев, Влади Симеонов, Димитър Манолов, Йордан Дафов, Емил Табаков, Юлиян Ковачев, Мартин Пантелеев...

Солисти на оркестъра са били Гена Димитрова, Хосе Карерас, Пласидо Доминго, Соня Йончева, Красимира Стоянова, Веселина Кацарова, Димитрий Шостакович, Давид Ойстрах, Светослв Рихтер, Емил Гилелс, Алексис Вайсенберг, Мстислав Ростропович, Ивон Лефебюр, Владимир Спиваков, Бернд Глемзер, Клара-Джуми Канг, Шура Черкаски, Ани Фишер, Руджиеро Ричи, Юджин Истомин, Андре Навара, Филип Квинт, Димитрис Сгурос, Йозеф Паленичек, Ванда Вилкомирска, Пиер Санкан, Фредерик Геверс, Рудолф Керер, Йозеф Сук, Йоко Сато, Джон Огдън, Секейра Коста, Янош Шебещейн, Натаниел Розен, Юлиан Рахлин, Андрю Маринър и още десетки световно известни чуждестранни и български изпълнители.
Репертоарът на Софийската филхармония обхваща творби от цялата световна музикална литература – от класиката до най-съвременни опуси, включително и премиерни изпълнения на десетки български произведения. 

От началото на 2017 година Софийската филхармония се ръководи от известния български диригент Найден Тодоров.

Name: ITER Research Ensemble
Description:
ITER Research Ensemble è un gruppo vocale e di ricerca, nato all'interno dell'Associazione Coro Facoltà di Musicologia - APS per iniziativa di studenti avanzati ed ex studenti del Dipartimento di Musicologia e beni culturali dell'Università di Pavia (sede di Cremona).

ITER Research Ensemble è formato da giovani che svolgono ricerca musicologica cantando insieme, e che cantano insieme la musica su cui fanno ricerca. In quanto gruppo di studio ed esperienza collaborativa, si propone di coltivare attitudini sia musicali che accademiche, sviluppando progetti di ricerca e artistici che valorizzino la creatività e la leadership dei suoi membri.

ITER Research Ensemble è un “collettivo di studio” che promuove forme ibride di diffusione della ricerca e della produzione musicale, rivolte a un pubblico sia fisico che digitale attraverso performance dal vivo, eventi scientifici, prodotti audiovisivi e pubblicazioni.

Oltre alle modalità più tradizionali di produzione e disseminazione della ricerca, ITER Research Ensemble mira inoltre a sperimentare e promuovere nuove forme di narrazione, transmediali e inclusive.

Superando le opposte prospettive della practice-led research e della research-led practice, ITER Research Ensemble promuove un modo di “conoscere dall'interno” (knowing from the inside) in cui le modalità dell’esperienza divengono esse stesse parte della ricerca, e i ruoli di cantore e ricercatore si uniscono in una sola figura: una sempre più attuale e moderna controparte del musicus medievale.

Name: Music Quay
Description: Music Management and one stop service provider within the music industry. Music Quay offers a variety of services for DIY artists and labels. A&R, Recordings, Product Management, Distribution, Public Relations, Exploitation, Artist Management, Publishing a.o.

Description:
In the fast-paced world of music, incredible artists seek supportive communities. Here at The Music Patch, we are committed to offering that and much more.
