Description: Spaceship Management is a idea by Paul Sears and Enrico Mutti. It's the right place for artists who feel they're ready to take off.

Name: ГОЛОС ДУШІ
Description:
Голос душі – це сучасний український неформат, що поєднує в собі романтичний інді-етно-поп-рок з присмаком джазу. Основний принцип створення пісень – змістовні тексти і прониклива музика. 
Голос душі – це поєднання голосу (вокального та музичного), і душі – всі наші пісні написані щиро, справжньо, чуттєво. Голос душі – це саме те, що є в кожному з нас, – відчуття світу через призму музики… Ми співаємо Душею, відображаючи у піснях свій внутрішній світ, який може бути різним, залежно від настрою і самопочуття.

Хто наш слухач? Це ДУШОГОЛОСНИКИ:
- Люди, які хочуть слухати саме українські пісні, при чому не автентичний фольклор і не стандартний попсовий продукт. 
- Ті, хто втомилися від шаблонної музики на основі семплів і цінують живе виконання.
- Ті, хто цінує атмосферність і справжність. Так, щоб після кожної нашої пісні «душа развернулась, а потом обратно завернулась».
-  Патріотично налаштовані громадяни (при чому за кордоном теж), які вірять в майбутнє Української держави.
-  Інтелектуальна, розумна аудиторія, котра здатна чути зміст.
-  Люди, які вміють читати між рядків і адекватно сприймати елегантну іронічність.
Ми співаємо для людей, які готові почути більше, ніж просто соло гітари, або текст пісні. Вони бачать зміст глибше і знаходять те, що потрібно саме їм. У цьому наша мета – відкриватися для слухача, щоб він у відповідь відкрився для себе і інших.

На наших концертах завжди невимушена і мрійлива атмосфера, тому що кожен слухач відчуває себе як вдома. Ви можете релаксувати на дивані під ліричні блюзові мелодії з тендітним жіночим вокалом, або не стримаєтеся і будете танцювати під запальні рок-н-рольні мотиви, або ж заспіваєте разом патріотичні пісні, які одразу торкнуться Ваших сердець.
Ми хочемо у світі награності, удаваності і несправжності подарувати відчуття щирості, затишний куточок, де не потрібно прикидатися, можна бути собою – різними, як і пісні Голосу душі.    

ГОЛОС ДУШІ – від душі і для душі!

Name: Frametone
Description:
Born out of a lifetime friendship between two music composers and producers who shared a passion for visual media and film, Frametone has become a proud bespoke music composition & audio post-production house based in Los Angeles and London.

The Frametone team delivers professionally tailored compositions and sounds for television, advertisement, film score, documentaries, radio, fashion and other visual media.

With a wide range of experience from indie film scores to corporate commercial advertisement work, Frametone is set to understand your necessities, amplify your message and deliver your goals.

Name: HUB Musical
Description:
We are a creative laboratory that has an infrastructure for the prototyping of musical content and experiences. We create a space for connection, experimentation and education designed for the emergence of creativity and innovation through processes of incubation, development and acceleration of projects with a creative, technological and musical base. 

Our mission is to be a connection space for the techno-musical ecosystem (music tech) of Chile and the world, incubating and accelerating experiences and content at the crossroads between music, knowledge, culture, art, entertainment and technology. We dream of being a world benchmark in technological crossover initiatives, between different areas of knowledge and human development linked to music, culture, art, entertainment and social development.

This year we present the first version of HUB MUSICAL CONFERENCE with its own OPEN LAB in discord, combining music, art and technology in one place.

Name: Koverbalprod
Description:
Koverbalprod n’est pas un simple collectif, c’est une structure indépendante construite pour durer.

Nous réunissons des artistes, des producteurs et des techniciens qui maîtrisent l’ensemble de la chaîne musicale, portés par une vision claire et une exigence commune.

Notre savoir-faire couvre la création artistique, la production, la réalisation technique et la stratégie de diffusion, avec une exigence élevée en matière de qualité, de rigueur et de cohérence.

Koverbalprod incarne une structure moderne et déterminée, capable d’allier créativité, maîtrise technique et vision stratégique.

Nous avançons avec une vision claire, des fondations solides et l’ambition de laisser une empreinte durable.

Name: GONE WILD
Description:
Depuis 2014, une équipe s'est donné pour objectif d'offrir à la jeunesse de Tunis, le temps d'une soirée, l'opportunité de se retrouver, de danser du lever au coucher, et de finir avec un souvenir gravé à jamais.
Une grande piste de danse, des artistes en décalage horaire mais toujours choisi à la page des tendances, et une décoration immersive. Voilà la définition de Gone Wild.
De Berlin à Ibiza, Rio à Tokyo, les artistes tel que Folamour, M. Raoul K, Laolu, Sandrino connaissent bien à présent les rues de Tunis et l'effervecence de son public.

Name: Indiescretos
Description:
Indiescretos es un magazine digital de música independiente que nace en Barcelona en el mes de diciembre de 2014 con la idea de ofrecer a sus lectores toda la actualidad musical de la escena independiente española, con la publicación de noticias de actualidad, crónicas de conciertos y festivales, entrevistas a artistas y críticas de álbumes, entre otros contenidos. Todo ello con el objetivo de diferenciarse del resto de páginas del sector en un aspecto imprescindible hoy día: los contenidos audiovisuales.

Por ello, nuestro medio se centra en ofrecer a sus visitantes una amplia cobertura gráfica de los eventos a los que acudimos, siendo habitual encontrar en nuestras crónicas con galerías fotográficas, así como video-resúmenes de conciertos y festivales. Del mismo modo, la práctica totalidad de entrevistas se realizan en video, siendo publicadas en nuestro canal Indiescretos TV.

Algo que comenzó como un proyecto personal adquirió rápidamente una dimensión mucho más amplia, contando en la actualidad con 90 colaboradores en todo el territorio estatal, entre fotógrafos y redactores.

En este periodo de tiempo Indiescretos se ha posicionado como una de las webs referencias del sector, obteniendo reconocimiento por parte de bandas, festivales, agencias de management y comunicación. Este hecho se demuestra con la presencia del medio en la práctica totalidad de los festivales más importantes del país, como el Bilbao BBK Festival, FIB, Arenal Sound, Low Festival, Sonorama Ribera, e incluso internacionales como el Sziget Festival (Budapest, Hungría), considerado como el mejor festival de gran formato en Europa.

Name: Hook Music Inc
Description: We search the world over until we find true musical love and then we bring it to you and your advertising.  Hook Music handles all things music & advertising; music licensing, music supervision, music searches, and music clearances. Geez, we must be busy!

Name: Lasallian Youth Orchestra
Description: The Lasallian Youth Orchestra (LYO) is a collective group of student artists that aims to communicate the essence of culture and arts to the world. LYO is the official orchestra from De La Salle University under the Cultural Arts Office. We do not limit ourselves to one genre, but instead, we wish to explore the different repertoires available in the world, from classical to modern or contemporary genres.

Name: 3AM
Description:
3AM is a company that specialises in creating music & sound design for promotional campaigns, advertising and events shows. Our team works with passion to create a wide variety of tailor-made audio productions, ranging from small edits with subtle sound design to epic orchestral scores.

Events:
Lollapalooza | Defqon.1 | Mysteryland | Tomorrowland | Qlimax | S2O | Electric Love | ...many more

Brands:
Budweiser | Disney | RTL | Footlocker | 3FM | Radio 538 | ...many more

Do you have a question? 
Feel free to send us a message at jelle@3am-audio.com

Name: Audio Engineering Society, Penn State Chapter
Description: The Penn State Student Chapter of the Audio Engineering Society. We share the mission of AES to "unite audio engineers, creative artists, scientists and students by promoting advances in audio and disseminating new knowledge and research."

Name: Miami University Men's Glee Club
Description: Founded in 1907 by Raymond Burke, the composer of Miami's Fight Song and Alma Mater, the Miami Men's Glee Club has maintained a tradition of excellence throughout its first 108 years. Numbering nearly 100 singers selected by audition from the Miami University community, the Club is among the oldest and largest groups of its kind in the nation. The Glee Club's repertoire encompasses everything from Gregorian Chant and Renaissance motets to modern popular music, folksongs, and spirituals. Whether giving impromptu concerts, singing for local churches, serenading freshman women's dorms, or presenting international concert tours, the Glee Club has always presented music of the highest quality. It has been a tradition for over 100 years, and will continue to be the standard by which the Glee Club operates.

Name: Sound Generation
Description: Hello! We’re Sound Generation - a bespoke music agency founded by Sofia and James in 2010. Being musicians ourselves, we’re passionate about music, and are dedicated to providing the highest standard of music entertainment for your wedding or event. We’re not just another directory of bands and DJ’s - we keep our roster small so that we can keep our quality high. Our artists really are some of the best in the business. As a small team, we offer a friendly, personal approach, and take the time and care to ensure you’re happy with every aspect of your music entertainment. We can advise on artist selection, playlists, sound equipment and logistics. We donate £5 to Nordoff Robbins for every private events booked.

Name: The Master Chorale of Tampa Bay
Description:
Praised by music critics from the Tampa Bay Times and other local media as "one of the country's finest choirs,"  “an amazing instrument,” and a “cultural treasure,” The Master Chorale of Tampa Bay has consistently delivered some of the most profoundly moving music performances in the Tampa Bay area. 

The Master Chorale of Tampa Bay (MCTB) is an auditioned, highly-select volunteer chorus embracing a broad representation of singers from the entire Tampa Bay area.  With a decades-long tradition of elevating the cultural experience of the Tampa Bay community, MCTB traditionally maintains a roster of 150+ voices, performs 20 - 25 concerts a year, has internationally distributed recordings, commissions important contemporary choral composers, and presents engaging community-singing events, and inspiring music education programs locally and online.

The Master Chorale primarily serves Tampa Bay and west central Florida with a mission to advance the art of choral music by performing great works of the past, commissioning and performing new literature and sharing the joy and power of choral music with new and existing audiences and singers. MCTB is the Principal Chorus for The Florida Orchestra and Artist-In-Residence at the University of South Florida College of the Arts School of Music.

From The Master Chorale’s inception in 1979, founded by Dr. Robert Summer, its performances have been consistently and critically recognized for excellence. In addition to the numerous traditional concerts performed annually, MCTB presents a variety of special appearance concerts and outreach and education activities in the Tampa Bay area and beyond. MCTB’s distinguished history includes international tours and performances and premiers of many major symphonic choral works under the outstanding direction of conductors including Michael Francis, Jahja Ling, Robert Shaw, John Nelson, Julius Rudel, Sir Colin Davis, and Sir David Willcocks.

Name: Young Pianist Foundation
Description:
The Young Pianist Foundation was founded in 1999 in order to help young pianists in The Netherlands to develop their talents in the highest possible way.

It is the YPF’s aim to guide the best Dutch young pianists to international top level by providing them with the necessary support, in addition to the existing educational channels.

The Foundation created all sorts of “instruments” to provide this support, for example masterclasses, piano competitions and CD recordings. Since 2007 the YPF has its own professional concert management agency to promote and launch the competition-laureates.

“Initiatives of the YPF led to permanent and solid level increase of piano playing in The Netherlands” according to Dutch master pedagogue Mr. Jan Wijn.

The two ladies being firm friends decided to form as a group in August 2005 after collaborating on 'Deeply Falling' for which Erin provided the music. After receiving such a positive response from friends & fans in music, they officially became a group.

The Soul Touchers Mission Statement: is to touch hearts and make a difference through music!

The Soul Touchers are-TJWAY & Erin Simms Working Together An Ocean Apart – Adopting The World, One Heart At a Time' 

Together they write and create beautiful music. 
Join Them on their journey, visit their official website and learn more about them at: www.thesoultouchers.com
Also, be sure and check out their heart-felt EP, “Angels All Around Us”.
A portion of the proceeds from the four-song album are donated to support children’s battle 
with leukemia. Thank you for visiting in advance!

Name: Elation Music / Elation Records / Jaffa Music
Description:
In the mist of the 2006 electro-swamped dance scene, there was a clear need for a good old fashioned dance label with traditional principles of artist development.

Elation took the bold steps to announce a sleek label dedicated to high grade vocal dance and to this day, priority focus is on the careers of the artists and producers. “We want to keep real faces behind our releases” explains label manager, Maz Lunden. “Music is made by people, not project names and we want to develop our artists who perform live on stage, be it singing or DJ sets”.

Criteria for the Elation catalogue is accessible, uplifting and most appropriately elating music. Elation is here to deliver songs with feeling which comply with the famous motto “music to move you”.

The company also strives to develop the careers of its dedicated team regardless of their role; from A&R and artists to events staff and our team of DJs around the world. As a serious business, brand and a label not to be taken lightly, Elation strives to deliver its promise to become synonymous with quality dance music and memorable hooks for the world’s dance floors, air waves and compilations.

Elation Records is part of the Elation Music group of labels which also runs sister label, Jaffa Music and mixing / mastering facility, Redwave Studios.

Name: Aizhana Nurkenova - Pianist, Composer, Teacher
Description:
Aizhana Nurkenova is a gifted pianist and composer who combines rich musicality with masterful technique and alluring stage presence. She is the Hodgson Fellow for Piano at the Royal Academy of Music and a piano soloist at the Kazakh National Philharmonia where she opened the 2010-2011 season with a sold-out performance. Described as "magical" with "unusual rhythmic vitality and richness of sound," Aizhana's recent performances include solo recitals in the UK, Italy and Kazakhstan and chamber recitals at the Royal Festival Hall in London and the Julliard School in New York City. Her composition works have been recorded on CD and broadcasted on the radio and television. 

PRESS 
"The young Kazakh pianist Aizhana Nurkenova has already been garlanded with prizes, and my expectations of her Bach recital at Steinway Hall were not disappointed. After giving the Bach-Feinberg Largo in A minor an organ-like breadth and stateliness, she showed her mettle with the fourth and fifth English Suites. Her touch had a firm clarity, and her palette was wide; the Sarabande of the fourth suite sang to heaven, while that of the fifth was delivered with a surprisingly effective detache quality; the closing fugue was exhilarating." 
- International Piano Magazine

Facebook: www.facebook.com/nurkenova 
YouTube: www.youtube.com/user/nurkenova

Name: Jazzberry Tunes Choir
Description:
Jazzberry Tunes,

2014 yılında şef Yiğit Deniz ve Mustafa Çağlayan Durmaz öncülüğünde kurulan Jazzberry Tunes, kısa zamanda adını duyurmayı başarmış ve geniş repertuvarı ile ilgi toplamıştır.
 
10'dan fazla farklı dil ve kültürden çağdaş ve caz eserler seslendiren koro, Türkiye'nin en saygın bestecilerinin çoksesli eserlerine de repertuvarında yer vermektedir.

Türkiye'nin çeşitli şehirlerinde konserler veren koro, ulusal ve uluslararası festivallerde boy göstermiş ve ödüllere layık görülmüştür. 

Jazzberry Tunes, 2019 yılında Fransa'da gerçekleşen ve Avrupa'nın en büyük koro organizasyonlarından biri olan Les Choralies festivalinde yer almış ve ilk kez ülkemizi yurtdışında temsil etmenin gururunu yaşamıştır. Avrupa dinleyicisinden büyük ilgi gören koro, farklı şehirlerden konser davetleri almıştır. 

Jazzberry Tunes, 2020 yılında Macaristan'da düzenlenmesi planlanan fakat pandemi nedeniyle iptal edilen dünyanın en köklü ve saygıdeğer koro yarışmalarından Béla Bartók Uluslararası Koro Yarışması’na davet alan sayılı korolar arasına girmiştir.

2022 yılı Temmuz ayında Hollanda’da gerçekleşen “Leading Voices” festivalinde sahne almak üzere davet almış olan Jazzberry Tunes, ülkemizi yeniden yurtdışında temsil etmiştir.

Name: Al Kamandjati Association
Description:
Al Kamandjati’s vision is introducing, instilling and promoting broad-based musical education and appreciation as an integral part of Palestinian life.

Al Kamandjati exists to make music accessible to the entire Palestinian community and teach music to Palestinian children, especially those in marginalized areas, and strengthen their appreciation of Palestinian culture and identity.

Art and its appreciation, as a creative form of self-expression, are fundamental to the development of a cultured, balanced society that includes the arts and humanities as well as other disciplines of study and work. In the Palestinian context, this takes on added importance as a means of relieving some of the psychological effects of decades of military occupation, Palestinian dispossession, poverty, barriers to movement and difficult challenges of daily life. Music can be a simultaneous form of creative education, therapy, discipline, enjoyment, camaraderie and pride.

It's Beautiful Location Is Right in the Center  of Downtown Duluth, with Skywalk access to restaurants and hotels / Lodging options, Pinnacle Pointe is great for artists near and far, year-round!

We are able to accommodate for artists who prefer work around-the-clock / late nights, and strive to bring you and your music the most professional sound possible!

Name: Tabu Records
Description:
TABU is a Danish independent label and production unit founded in 1998. TABU consists of Copenhagen natives Rune Rask, Troels Nielsen (aka TROO.L.S.) Emil Simonsen (aka Orgi-E), Andreas Bai Duelund (aka Bai-D), Per Hjaltason and Kasper Faerk. The founders count both rappers and producers alongside business visionaries.

The organization is ideologically based on creative and artistic freedom, offering each member main influence on both music and everything in regard, ranging from marketing strategy to public relations. This approach requires a great deal of talent and discipline from everyone involved and as a consequence TABU - in short - can only afford to work with the best!

The strategy behind TABU is mainly based on achieving long term goals, believing that a solid foundation is the ideal platform for lasting success. Working from the ground up, at the expense of chasing one-hit wonders, the TABU brand has become synonymous with high standards in rap as well as music production.

It was decided early on that TABU RECORDS would not focus on aggressive marketing or lavish PR budgets, but instead ensure high royalties and lower break-even rates for artists. This strategy, which perhaps is better described as an overall philosophy, has proven to be a perfect match for the members. 
The artist themselves always have a say in the process leading up to the final budget decisions. As a result, TABU RECORDS benefits from a strong sense of solidarity from its artists, who not only gain access to professional studio facilities in the heart of Copenhagen but also a valuable and dedicated network.

Name: Symphonic Laboratory
Description:
Ugh.

We musicians are told all the time how important it is that we pay attention to the details—and yet, no matter how hard we try, we still can't seem to create deeply moving performances. We know that there's something missing, but we just keep hitting a wall.

We get a few random compliments here and there, but mostly our best performances fall flat—or worse, they end up making people feel uncomfortable. Those are the worst. It's so disheartening!

We're all in this together… The Symphonic Laboratory is an organized community of professional and aspiring musicians who come together with genuine empathy and support for each other in order to learn and test how to consistently create transformative musical experiences for each other and for our audiences.

You know that feeling that comes over you when you hear a musical performance where everyone in the room is completely transported to another reality?  It's an experience that we, as musicians, all strive for. But it's frustrating because most of us have no idea how to create such performances consistently. 

The Symphonic Laboratory is different. We've adapted the methods of Leonard Bernstein and Sergiu Celibidache for understanding how musical scores offer a path to creating transformative performances. Musicians come together and play real music in a setting of informed, empathetic listening that supports, and aligns with the composer's vision. Musicians leave with the skills and knowledge needed to create deep moving music for the rest of their lives.

Participate in Symphonic Laboratory sessions to learn what it takes to consistently create transformative musical performances.

Name: Naim Records
Description:
Independent.  Uncompromising.  Eclectic. 

“...leave in mistakes, provided the intention is good... I want the people, the human beings. I want the smell of cigarette smoke in the atmosphere and I want the feel of hot bodies. The last thing I want is a perfectly made-up corpse. It’s a different philosophy, and I know it sometimes frustrates reviewers.”

“You can certainly call our catalog eclectic... I want variety in my life. I can’t listen to one type of music again and again. I don’t see why a label should stick to one sort of music."

”We will always continue trying to capture that special feeling that only a performance can bring”

“To me, music is a language, and musicians are reading the story a composer has written. I want our listeners to understand what the composer was trying to say and to hear it in a very natural and non-sterile way.“

Julian Vereker - Founder, Naim Records

Name: Stomp Records
Description:
It seems highly unlikely that a small independent record label like Stomp could survive for six months, let alone for two decades. Founded in Montreal in 1994 with the goal of releasing, supporting and uniting Canadian ska bands, the odds were fully stacked against them. Luckily Stomp Records didn't, and still doesn't give one single fuck about odds. Those early years saw some pivotal releases from Gangster Politics, The Kingpins, Flashlight, The Undercovers, Subb and of course label founders, punk-ska superheroes The Planet Smashers. Learning as they went along, the label blundered boldly ahead adding international bands like New York Ska Jazz Ensemble, Nicotine, The Toasters and Big D & The Kids Table to the ever-growing roster. Right around this time, the entire music industry decided to shit the bed with the advent of Napster and file sharing. Luckily again, Stomp was one of the first indie labels to embrace early DRM-free digital technologies and managed to get the music to the fans without any bullshit nonsense. With the help of an incredibly hardworking roster of dedicated bands, Stomp expanded by creating a full-service, in-house booking agency, publicity company and management wing. As the label diversified so did it's taste in music. Phenomenal bands from across the subcultures joined the Stomp family. The Real Mckenzies, The Flatliners, The Creepshow, Belvedere, Bedouin Soundclash, The Dreadnoughts, The Sainte-Catherines, Peacocks, The Brains, Saint Alvia, Down By Law, Ann Beretta and Snuff just to name a few.

I could go on forever. Instead, let's do some (more) shameless bragging. Today, Stomp Records has released over 150 albums. You can find Stomp Records music distributed in more than 130 countries. Stomp artists have (somehow) received a handful of Juno nominations including 1 win. There's even a few gold and platinum albums hanging crookedly on the walls in the office. Musical alumni can be found in bands like Simple Plan, Walk Off The Earth, The Stills, Patrick Watson and Broken Social Scene. Past staff members have gone on to be badass ballers at companies like iTunes, Vice, evenko, Dare To Care and several mental asylums. The current crew is a shockingly talented bunch of misfits, jokers and ne'er-do-wells.

Looking back at everything that's changed over the last 20 years, two things have remained remarkably constant. The love and support of the fans as well as the dedication and hardwork of the bands on the roster. We sure as shit wouldn't be around if it weren't for them. So what better way to celebrate surviving 20 stupid years than to completely annihilate our collective livers with a series of knock-down-drag-out, raging parties across the country. Come join us at one of these insane shindigs so we can raise a glass or two and toast to another 20!

Name: MooseCat Recording
Description:
MooseCat is a professional recording studio located in Los Angeles, CA, featuring the best of both vintage analog and modern digital tools. Music is our passion, and we focus on making a big sound in an intimate setting.

The studio is a fully fledged, sound proofed and acoustically treated facility, designed by Grammy nominated Ken Goerres. The studio was started by producer/engineer Mike Post and singer/songwriter Carly Liza Rosenthal out of a mutual love they have for music.  They teamed up with acclaimed producer Peter Malick to bring in state of the art equipment and expertise.  
 
MooseCat is equipped to handle a variety of different pallets, with both a Pro Tools 12 HDX system, as well as a Tascam MS-16 1" 16 track tape machine.  Both are fed with a 1970's Auditronics 110A 'Grandson' console, designed and constructed in Memphis for Stax Records.  Pair this with a plethroa of microphones, outboard gear and vintage instruments, and the result is both an analog and digital world to suite a variety of palettes.

Name: Ecole de musique de Solaure
Description:
L’Ecole de musique de Solaure est une des plus anciennes structures stéphanoises d’enseignement musical. Elle est aujourd'hui l'une des branches de l'Association Solaure Musique (www.solaure-musique.fr).

Grâce à des parcours adaptés à chaque âge, l’école accueille les enfants dès 3 ans tout comme les écoliers, les adolescents et les adultes. Les répertoires abordés vont de la mélodie enfantine à la musique classique en passant par les musiques actuelles et les musiques traditionnelles.

L’année scolaire est rythmée par plusieurs temps forts (concerts, spectacles, heures musicales, stages) où il est possible d’entendre les élèves et mesurer leurs progrès.

****HISTORIQUE****
Créé dans les années 70 et régi par la loi 1901, cet établissement d’enseignement artistique s’est développé au fil des décennies avec l’objectif constant de proposer une offre de formation variée et attrayante.

En 2000, l’association signe une convention avec le Conservatoire à Rayonnement Régional de Saint-Etienne qui permet, entre autres, aux élèves de l’école de se présenter aux examens du C.R.R. 
En 2014, un volet plus pédagogique de cette convention voit le jour et est adopté officiellement en 2016. Il met notamment en exergue le travail commun des départements de musiques actuelles.

En 2017 l'école lance le projet de "l'Ecole de musique connectée" (www.ecoledemusiqueconnectee.fr). Un projet unique en France porté par la directrice Marie-Aline Bayon, et qui conceptualise, expérimente et met en pratique des cours de musique à l'aide des outils numériques.

En 2021, l'association gère trois activités : l'Ecole de musique de Solaure, le réseau professionnel Art-ConEct, et le centre de formation Solaure Music Lab.

L'association reçoit le soutien de la ville de Saint-Etienne, du Conseil Général de la Loire et du Ministère de la Culture via la DRAC AuRA.

The band also does parades, concerts, strolls, appearances at parties and picnics, etc. all year long to raise money for the expensive costumes and props. Name: Sound Matters
Description:
Welcome to Sound Matters. The website for vinyl in the digital age.

In our digital age, access to music has never been easier or more affordable. Thanks to the internet, access to the world’s biggest music libraries is just a click away. Anything from ABBA to Zappa can be streamed to our living room in an instant, but while this is great news for music discovery, it’s not necessarily the way to experience music at its best.

That’s what we’re all about here at Sound Matters — regaining a more authentic music experience in the digital age. We believe in the vinyl format as the best way to own music. Audiences are more invested in music when they own it physically, and this ultimately leads to a more enriched music culture.

We’re not trying to turn the clock back – far from it. We simply believe that you, the music enthusiast, deserves a better deal. That’s why, through the pages of this website, Sound Matters helps people like you get more from their music – be it getting started with a great new vinyl setup, or simply getting more from your current kit. We bring you the best tips tricks and features to enhance your love of music (especially on vinyl).

Experience music on Vinyl – you deserve it.

Name: D1 Music
Description:
D1 Music - a music label creating the best music always - all ways.


The D1 Music Mission.

Some folks in our business seem quite unaware of the rich musical history that has brought us to today … or is taking us into tomorrow.

We at D1 know music, love it, and breathe it.

We know the hugely important part it plays in our lives.

Our Mission is nothing less than to create, promote, and encourage artists of many kinds to build on the past and innovate into the future … finding new ways to bring pleasure and delight into our listeners’ varied lives.


The D1 Music Philosophy

Music is personal … a way that each of us can express and enhance our individual selves and our lifestyles.

But there really is a difference — an audible difference — between music made with love, care and quality production and a “product” that’s simply pressed from a musical cookie cutter.

That’s why we treat our artists and production teams with the highest level of respect and support. That’s why every production we undertake is a unique and exciting venture into the heart and soul of music.

We are a young and growing force. But we refuse to push so fast that quality and “TLC” are sacrificed along the way. We are discovering as we grow, as we gain increasing success and respect, that people really appreciate the love and the care we put into everything we do.

No matter how big we may become, this same passion, quality and devotion to music will always be our hallmark.

Name: Popscene Presents
Description:
POPSCENE EST. 1995 Summer Playlist:  https://soundcloud.com/popscenepresents
Where DJ dance parties and live music collide.
Spinning the best in new music: indie, electronic, synthpop, post-punk, Britpop, new wave, mod, '60s soul, '90s alt, future bass, chillwave and much more.

Venerable San Francisco indie nightclub POPSCENE had humble beginnings. It was the original vision of four relentless music fans who collectively first met at formidable independent record store Mod Lang in Berkeley, CA back in the early ‘90s.  Aaron Axelsen, Omar Perez, Eric Shea, and Jeremy P. Goldstein all shared the same passion and affinity for the UK music scene of the time, which encompassed bands like My Bloody Valentine, Radiohead, Stone Roses, Lush, Blur and Pulp, to name a few. This insatiable passion led to the birth of POPSCENE, currently one of the longest-running weekly parties in the country after making its definitive debut on the San Francisco nightlife scene 21 years ago.

POPSCENE is a musical cocktail of indie DJs, legendary dance parties, and a launching pad for live bands and beatmakers alike. It has become synonymous with discovering and introducing to San Francisco the ‘next big thing.’ Throughout its history, POPSCENE has debuted impressive, incredible live acts in an intimate setting, many of whom go on to headline large Bay Area venues and festivals. Some alums include Sam Smith, Calvin Harris, Muse, Killers, Arctic Monkeys, Alt-J, Mumford and Sons, Klaxons, Dandy Warhols, Vampire Weekend, Glass Animals, and countless others. Adding to the folklore of POPSCENE, the club hosted Amy Winehouse's only Bay Area performance back in April of 2007 at its original home, the now closed 330 Ritch Street.

Name: The Rebecca Center for Music Therapy at Molloy College
Description:
Our mission at The Rebecca Center is to use interactive music therapy interventions to facilitate relatedness, communication, and thinking while removing physical and cognitive barriers that prevent children with developmental challenges from engaging in essential social interactions and life processes. 

Music and the relational experiences intrinsic to musical-play are therapy when applied clinically. Interactive musical experiences can help a child with developmental challenges in many ways; fulfill the need to interact, socialize, communicate, achieve, learn and improve physicality. Musical-play can provide the unique experience of integrating multiple sensory stimuli simultaneously, facilitating self-regulation and sensory modulation. Musical-play can also generate effective interactions that foster reciprocity and creative thinking.

Programs at The Rebecca Center for Music Therapy at Molloy College are aimed at discovering the unique potential in every child through interactive musical-play, in order to facilitate engagement, relatedness, communication, and thinking. In creating a non-judgmental, musically and emotionally supportive therapeutic atmosphere, the child can discover emotional and behavioral self-regulation through engaging in interactive musical-play. 

Programs include: individual and group music therapy sessions, therapeutic lessons, and DIR/Floortime intervention services. 

The Rebecca Center offers Parent Support Groups for parents of children with autism, aimed at decreasing parent stress. 

The Rebecca Center is the U.S.A. site for TIME-A international research study.TIME-A is the first well-controlled effectiveness study and largest randomised controlled trial on non-pharmacological therapy for autism to date.

Description:
Rock n’ Roll Camp for Girls San Diego seeks to empower girls and non-binary youth through music education. With guidance and resources from the International Girls Rock Camp Alliance, we hope to help girls in San Diego build self-esteem and find their voices using unique programming.

Our mission at Rock n' Roll Camp for Girls San Diego is to bring the community together to empower girls through music, and we envision a world where girls and women collaborate and lift each other up; a safe space for girls to use their creativity and nurture their self-esteem and self-expression.

We believe that empowering girls through music education is a powerful tool for self-expression, that inspiring collaboration, communication, and respect encourages girls to embrace the uniqueness in themselves and others, and that creating a safe outlet for girls to express their thoughts, share ideas, and cultivate dreams will help build a strong, diverse community.

Our weeklong day camp for girls between the ages of 8-17 uses music as a powerful way for girls to learn how to communicate and collaborate, while being guided by inspirational female mentors. No prior music experience required!

In one week, campers form multiple bands, write an original song, learn to play an instrument, perform a live show for their friends and family, and participate in self-esteem and skills building workshops such as self-defense, image identity, digital design... and more!

Name: Modacity

Music teachers say quality of practice is the defining factor in success. Modacity makes music practice efficient by combining spaced repetition, flow states, smart organization, and social dynamics.

Marc Gelfo, Founder/CEO of Modacity, applied cognitive science & computer science to his own musical journey, going from music-school reject to touring the world with the San Francisco Symphony.

Now it's time to share that with anybody who has a smartphone. Let's talk about how everyone can be a musician, and how making that a reality will impact self-development, interpersonal relationships, and society as a whole.

Modacity was launched at Founder Institute Fall 2017 and has already begun a closed beta program. We are planning to launch publicly by end of January 2018.

Name: Monokrome Music
Description:
Monokrome Music (MKM) is a music services company providing a route to market for artists and labels by coordinating technological solutions alongside digital marketing and social media services,

MKM provides clarity and guidance in an often confusing, highly specialised landscape and makes the music industry ‘black and white’ for it’s client base.

On the technology front, Monokrome is dedicated to developing affordable, accessible and agnostic tools for the music industry, while also building transparent and efficient links alongside data exchange with other industry organisations — for the benefit of rights-holding users.

In 2019 Monokrome Music launched Rights HUB, an online contractual rights and file management platform for labels, artists, managers, and other rights-holders.

Monokrome Music CEO Lee Morrison says: “In this increasingly data-driven music industry it’s imperative that labels and others stay on top of their contractual obligations. We’re proud to launch Rights HUB as an affordable, one-stop solution for music rights-holders to manage all of their data and assets in a clear, easy and concise way.

“All too often both artists and labels lose out because rights-holders are unable to maintain full and accurate records of rights and the relevant contractual terms. Many labels are acting outside of the rights granted to them — exposing them to potential litigation — while many artists and producers are seeing the continued exploitation of their rights after the contractual term with a partner has expired, losing them money and reducing the control they have over their creative output.”

rightsAUDIT: a hands-on, managed service for rights-holders including artists, labels, managers, and songwriters, designed to help them to thoroughly review their catalogue and stay on top of crucial rights information was also launched in 2019.

Feel free to contact us on here or alternatively at admin@monokrome-music.com if you have any inquiries.

Name: USC Thornton Community Engagement Program
Description:
The USC Thornton Community Engagement Program is a diverse and extensive music education-oriented program that provides unique learning opportunities for children in the local community, as well as significant service-learning opportunities for Thornton students.

Several music programs currently exist at the 15 local schools identified within USC’s Family of Schools. None of them, however, provide comprehensive music education, and only a handful of the approximately 17,000 students attend weekly school-based music classes. This realization prompted members of the community to request help from the Thornton School of Music.

Each year, over 70 Thornton students and over 6,000 children in the community participate in the USC Thornton Community Engagement Program. Thornton majors in performance, composition, music industry, popular music and music education offer children a variety of learning and performing opportunities.

Programs currently offered by the USC Thornton Community Engagement Program include general music instruction, guitar, recorder, elementary choir, and “Meet the Instruments.”

Another facet of Thornton Community Engagement is JazzReach, a program that focuses on instrumental and vocal jazz teaching opportunities for Thornton Jazz Studies students. The Los Angeles Youth Jazz Ensemble, 32nd Street JazzReach Choir, Murchison Elementary JazzReach Choir, and Science Center JazzReach Choir are all branches of this unique program.

For the latest news about the Thornton Community Engagement Program, visit our blog.

The USC Thornton Community Engagement Program is made possible by generous support from:

- USC Good Neighbors Campaign
- The Ella Fitzgerald Charitable Foundation
- The Kurtin Family, in memory of Jared Kurtin
- The Kenneth T. and Eileen L. Norris Foundation
- The International House of Blues Foundation
- Pasadena Showcase House for the Arts

Name: Knick Knack Records
Description:
The local record store goes online to sell music, not commercials

There’s nothing like a needle on a record for genuine tone. Nothing like a corner record store for an honest conversation about music. And for most of us, both are now harder and harder to access. As iTunes concludes its first decade, music lovers and musicians are wondering-- how much have we lost?

“We’re creating a site and a label that’s by musicians, real musicians, for real music lovers. People who want their money going to something genuine,” says Johnson about the label. 

 Knick Knack promises to run their site with the dedication more suited to Lester Bangs than Steve Jobs. This isn’t commerce, it’s art.

“We don’t require exclusive contracts. We welcome bands who want fair play, fair prices. We’ll be able to offer far better rates than venues like Amazon and iTunes,” Johnson explains. “And we’re not just a book seller or a computer company. We’ll be reviewing and selecting music with quality, not just widgets.”

The Knick Knack Records site, established by Seattle musician and veteran of the city’s web commerce industry, Joe Johnson, will offer access to over 100,000 hard-to-find records. The label will showcase the more obscure vinyl in their collection with special digital reissues.

It’s an experiment. 

It’s a group of musicians coming together and realizing their collective efforts to help each other succeed faster than working solo. This small, but mighty group of artists formed the nucleus for the molecular cloud that became FarFetched. Managing and directing talents to be the best they can be.

Founded by Damon Davis in 2011, FarFetched is becoming the premier art imprint and artist management service in the MidWest as a result of the activity in the system. Beginning with the founder, all of FarFetched operates at a high level. Davis is an Emmy award winner, well-known producer (LooseScrewz/Damon Davis), visual artist and emcee (Scripts n’ Screwz) that has been in the media through channels like TED, Fader, PBS and MTV U for many years. Most recently, he co-directed the documentary Whose Streets? that was released nationwide through Magnolia Pictures (Freakonomics, Food, Inc., I Am Not Your Negro) August 11, 2017. 

Director of Operations Darian Wigfall is a former Washington University scientist, formerly the Event Coordinator at community radio station 88.1 KDHX and is an avid activist in St. Louis, mentoring youth and authoring books about the lives of black youth. Wigfall recently received a proclamations as Super Hero for youth advocacy from State Representative Bruce Franks (D-78) for his work. Both Davis and Wigfall were featured in Fortune magazine for their business acumen and activism in 2016. 

The third head of the triumverate is Charles Purnell. He has received recognition from Social Media Club of St. Louis for his innovative and effective ideas for the use of social media in business and is the digital marketing guru behind all of the FarFetched social media.

The future of FarFetched is certain. These artists are destined to dwell among the stars and the nucleus will eventually create a solid industry platform for St. Louis artists in general, as well as us - the wayward weirdos of the under

Name: MPMP Património Musical Vivo
Description:
O primeiro acto público do MPMP foi o concerto de lançamento da revista GLOSAS, ponto de contacto entre compositores, musicólogos, instrumentistas e melómanos. Desde então editámos dezenas de discos, livros e partituras, procurando estimular um ecossistema ainda hoje frágil e voluntarioso.

Uma outra forma de escutar os repertórios tradicionais, a estreia moderna de uma obra esquecida ou a encomenda de novas experiências artísticas a jovens criadores tem também levado a nossa equipa alargada a promover centenas de espectáculos em Portugal e no estrangeiro.

Enquanto 'ensemble' de geometria variável, da música de câmara à coral-sinfónica, o MPMP tem marcado presença nos festivais Música em São Roque, Dias da Música e Prémio Jovens Músicos, destacando-se também duas digressões ao Brasil (2014 e 2016), a produção das óperas 'O cavaleiro das mãos irresistíveis' e 'Cai uma rosa…' nos Teatros Municipais de Almada e do Porto (2015) e a interpretação do 'Requiem à memória de Camões' de João Domingos Bomtempo no Centro Cultural de Belém (2017), com transmissão televisiva pela RTP.

O MPMP Património Musical Vivo foi distinguido com imprescindíveis apoios de entidades como a Direcção-geral das Artes, a Fundação GDA ou a Sociedade Portuguesa de Autores. Em 2018 foi-nos atribuído o Prémio de Música Sequeira Costa pela Fundação Mirpuri. Mas os nossos maiores e melhores parceiros são os músicos e os públicos que se foram juntando a esta aventura.

Name: Oh Bryan
Description:
Oh Bryan are a high energy alternative rock band consisting of Steve O’Brien (Lead Vocals, Guitar, and Drums), Shane Power (Guitar) and Billy Campbell (Bass, Backing Vocals, and Piano). They have a tight, catchy, upbeat sound that strongly appeals to music lovers all over the country. 

The band’s most recent show, scheduled to take place upstairs in Whelan’s, sold out 3 weeks in advance, triggering promoters MCD to upgrade the gig to the main venue downstairs.

UK mix engineer and producer, Alex Loring (Fangclub, Big Spring) and mastering engineer, John Davis (Dua Lipa, Gorillaz, The Killers, U2, Royal Blood) have worked with Oh Bryan on their next two tracks, which are due to release in the coming weeks.

In the past year, Oh Bryan have gigged alongside some top Irish acts including Aslan, The Blizzards , Chasing Abbey and Little Hours, taking in some of the nation’s top venues: The Olympia Theatre, INEC Killarney and Wexford Opera House to name but a few.

They have a strong online presence with 4 professionally recorded music videos released and an ever-growing social media buzz. Stay tuned for the release of Oh Bryan’s second EP towards the end of 2019...

Name: Vlad
Description:
Créé en 2006, Vlad est un label indépendant exerçant également les activités de tourneur, d’entrepreneur de spectacles et d’éditeur. Cette logique à 360° n’est pas subie du fait de la crise dans le secteur de la musique enregistrée, elle est au contraire souhaitée de façon à mieux prendre en compte les spécificités de chaque artiste.

En effet, certains font des concerts, d’autres non ; certains sortent des vidéos sur net et ne jurent que par le numérique ; d’autres gravent eux-mêmes leurs albums et impriment des t-shirts. En nous autorisant tous les supports et tous les moyens d’expression, nous faisons ressortir d’autant plus clairement notre ligne artistique. C’est aussi pour cette raison que nous nous définissons d’abord comme un label même si notre principale source de revenus reste aujourd’hui le tour.

A l’heure de la réorganisation de la filière, nous sommes convaincus que le label doit prendre toute sa place : c’est en effet le maillon de la chaîne qui assure le mieux la prescription auprès du public, là où ce dernier est souvent laissé à l’abandon dans un gloubi-boulga de mp3 offerts pour l’achat d’un téléphone et autres synchronisations douteuses dans des publicités pour des services bancaires.

Il ne faut également pas oublier l’apport artistique et humain que constitue l’appartenance à un label pour un artiste : échange d’influences, collaborations, mutualisation des réseaux… Vlad n’est ni un prestataire de service pour musiciens, ni une boutique de digipacks et t-shirts : c’est un créateur de contexte, qui permet :
– au public, de comprendre et d’apprécier de la musique, plutôt que de la subir via la radio ;
– à l’artiste, d’organiser et de donner du sens à sa création, plutôt que de la jeter en pâture via des tweets ou des Lettres Max.

Name: Sibandoo
Description:
Strengthening cultural relations and mutual understanding between India and Colombia through its music along with other art forms and traditions from other cultures, forging alliances with other artists.

Sessions with live music from ancient instruments such as the Sitar, Bansuri, Didgeridoo, and Tibetan bowls to create a meditative state through meditation itself or through the movement of the body in order to explore our connection with our inner self, feel the immense power of sound and experience the profound capacity for transformation that sound meditation offers us.

Name: Stereoscope Music Scandinavia
Description:
Stereoscope Music Scandinavia is the mothership of a new adventure in music and ideas.
Vision
Stereoscope Music Scandinavia proudly representing: Alice Gernandt, Miriam Bryant, Nadia Nair, Andreas Mattsson, Jonas Vesa and Victor Rådström!
Beskrivning
SMS is built on 4 legs: 
Telescope Music Publishing 
Stereoscope Management 
Catalogue representation
100Songs

As founder, Ben Malén have been a major contributor to the Scandinavian music export since the mid90’s, the focus is obviously to keep on delivering great Scandinavian music to the world.
SMS is a company built for it’s partners and we strongly belive that participation and transparancy is the way to move forward and to improve collaborations and business in the exciting future.

Name: TurnStyle Music Group
Description:
A music booking and promotional agency which seeks out talented songwriters, musicians and performers to showcase their talent in some of the best NYC downtown venues.

TurnStyle Music Group L.L.C. has booked shows and worked with THOUSANDS of artists to put together showcases that artists and all involved can be proud to be part of. TMG's goal is to generate a platform for original music to be enjoyed. We are committed to the venue, the artist and the fan. TMG seeks out talented songwriters, musicians and performers to showcase their talent in an environment built for original music.

Name: W. A. Production
Description:
W. A. Production is sound-design label that has been founded by Redhead Roman in 2014. This label was built from nothing – no investments, no funding, no big team of experienced people, nothing. Yet here we are - playing the lead role in the sample pack industry in just a few years. All of this has been only possible thanks to the enormous support from thousands of producers all around the world.

Everything we have achieved, we want to give back to producers. That is why we are releasing hundreds of free sample packs, FL Studio templates and even plugins. That is why we are creating tutorials, audio courses and releasing useful blog posts on a weekly basis. All of this belongs to our Fans and Community. You deserve it!

Welcome to WA Production – the world’s greatest source of free Content and quality Sounds and Plugins for Electronic Music Producers.

Name: Zerpcorp Barcelona Geomungo
Description:
We are a company of Zerpcorp and we sell and distribute Geomungos around the world. We have a physical store in Barcelona. Join our community and keep alert to the news! 
#zerpcorp #barcelona #geomungo #zerpcorpbarcelonageomungo

Name: WGNR Sounds
Description:
As a fundamental division of the worldwide marketing powerhouse, WGNR, wgnrSOUNDS holds jurisdiction over two primary sectors. First, the Podcast Division is known for its multifaceted roles in production, management, representation, and distribution of two highly reputed podcasts: Wagner Live, a business and marketing podcast renowned for its candid, no-nonsense approach; and Speaking Out With Wágner, a podcast offering raw insights into politics, business, and societal issues through honest, robust debate.

Meanwhile, the Music Division is dedicated to the stewardship of the record label, wgnrSOUNDS. Its impressive catalog and roster feature a collection of esteemed artists, including Wágner, Nerve, The Buzz Prophets, and Buzz Prophets, alongside the notable Ska: The Third Wave compilation series. This series has been instrumental in propelling several artists into the limelight during the mid to late nineties, boasting substantial appearances on Billboard's Top Reggae Albums chart.

Guiding the record label is the distinguished WGNR President, Wágner dos Santos. A veteran in the realm of media entertainment, dos Santos' prolific career spans numerous roles including recording artist, podcaster, A&R head, and former label president of the Beloved Entertainment Group, along with its broad spectrum of imprints. His impressive portfolio includes collaborations with prominent artists such as Henry Rollins and The Rollins Band, Baby Animals, Paula Cole, Aimee Mann, Love Spit Love, John Waite, Basehead, Modern English, Ministry, Revolting Cocks, KMFDM, among others.

This team embarked upon a mission to create a company which over years continues to be a remarkable resource providing top entertainment in Las Vegas & across the country. This business is Women Owned, Minority Owned MBE Certified, Veteran and Disabled Veteran Owned. Dreamstone Productions is the standard for Live Entertainment. We are the premier supplier for THE BEST Live Party Bands, Musicians, Singers, Solo Artists, Tribute Bands and DJ's!

Name: Rex Studio
Description:

Description:
Purple Music - Is a pure dedication to the house music where the vocal and soulful vibe reign!

Name: R2G
Description:
R2G is the leading centralized music distribution platform in China promoting the consumption and monetization of legitimate digital content through a transparent licensing and monitoring system.
R2G also runs China’s largest online independent music store, Wawawa (wa3.cn) which provides independent music labels and artists with a platform in China to sell their music.

Name: Upper Class Recordings
Description:
Upper Class Recordings is a Canadian independent record label based in Toronto. The electronic music-based Upper Class roster includes The Russian Futurists, Cadence Weapon, The Cansecos, DVAS and Christien Summers 

Initially created in 2000 as a leisure pursuit, has developed into a full service management firm, record label and publishing house with an international reputation for producing unique and exciting electronic music and artists. Our first release was the debut record by The Russian Futurists - The Method Of Modern Love.  Ever since; "upstart Canadian label Upper Class has struck gold. Its roster seems to produce blissed-out electronic pop masterpieces like an assembly line." [Lostatsea.net]

Upper Class Recordings is distributed by Fontana/Universal Music Group, Redeye, iTunes Worldwide 
Upper Class Publishing is represented by Nettwerk Music Group

Name: Natasha Ghosh Music
Description: Natasha Ghosh is a 26-year-old Dutch-Indian instrumentalist and singer, who has made fingerstyle ukulele her trademark. In the lofi world, she is known for integrating fingerstyle ukulele and guitar into her beats, as well as her silky vocal additions. Beyond lofi, she widely shares self-created ukulele arrangements and tutorials online and teaches private and group ukulele lessons. Additionally, she releases music from her own favourite genre: R&B, hiphop and indiepop.

Name: Revolver USA
Description: We're an independent music distributor. We sell independent label digital downloads, CDs, vinyl, DVDs, magazines, books, DVDs and related items to stores all over the world and to other distributors, as well as direct to consumers via our Midheaven Mailorder division.

Name: Plein-les-Watts
Description:
« Plein-les-Watts » est une association à but non lucratif qui œuvre depuis 2007 dans la promotion de la musique actuelle de la région genevoise par et pour la jeunesse. Comptant actuellement 22 groupes et près de 130 membres, l’association offre de nombreux services aux artistes tels que conseils, aide administrative, production via son studio d’enregistrement, et organise également de nombreux concerts et festivals.
Son évènement phare est le Plein-les-Watts festival.

Name: TOX!C PROD.
Description:

An illusion that everything can be done (and done professionally, on time and with the best energy), tranquility (and guarantee) that everything will turn out well, with the certainty that the client (and intermediaries) are to be satisfied and will repeat in the future.

Name: Rezonate Initiatives
Description:
Rezonate is a parent company that oversees several sub-companies, including BeatStreet Studios, DireNote Media, and Runixks. These companies focus on different aspects of the music and creative industries. Rezonate's origin traces back to its initial phase as Vibe Storm Productions, later rebranded as DHUN, and eventually evolving through mergers with Drago Records and Nayaab Records.

The company emphasizes empowering artists, creators, and businesses through various services, fostering growth and collaboration across niches. Rezonate also reflects a mission to push boundaries in the creative domain while offering transparency and support to its associated ventures and individuals.

Name: Bilkent University Music Club
Description: Bilkent University Music Club is a student club independent from the school board. Its goal is to create an environment of shared music where events such as concerts, festivals, workshops, seminars and talks, jam sessions, trips, etc. can be organized.

Name: Iniciativas Musicales
Description: Imúsica es una empresa dedicada a la representación de artistas y orquesta internacionales en el terreno de la musica clásica y de la opera. También es una empresa de producción y distribución de espectáculos musicales. Entre otros, gestiona la carrera en exclusiva en España , EEUU, Latinoamérica, Suiza, Escandinavia y Emiratos Arabes de William Christie y Les Arts Florissants. También se ocupa en exclusiva en España de la carrera de artistas y grupos como Christophe Rousset y Les Talens Lyriques, Masaaki Suzuki y Bach Collegium Japan, Peter Phillips y The Tallis Scholars, Il Pomo d'Oro, Philippe Jaroussky, Jean Guihen Queyras, Lars Vogt, Benjamin Grosvenor, Nathalie Stutzmann, etc.

Name: Contesto
Description:
Contesto è il concorso musicale online per gli artisti indipendenti italiani.

Nato nel 2020, il concorso conta su una giuria di professionisti dell’industria musicale e premia il meglio della musica emergente in tutte le sue declinazioni.

COME FUNZIONA?

Contesto è un concorso musicale a premi per brani inediti rivolto a chi ha un progetto musicale e vuole raggiungere sempre più ascoltatori.
Si svolge completamente online. È aperto a tutti gli artisti, in qualsiasi formazione (cantautore, band, duo). L’importante è avere un brano registrato caratterizzato da melodia e testo originali.
I vincitori riceveranno premi esclusivi, finalizzati alla promozione e alla valorizzazione del brano, al lancio della propria carriera nella musica e al supporto del contesto musicale italiano.

#FAICONTESTO #Contesto2023

Seguici ovunque
Instagram > @premiocontesto
Facebook > www.facebook.com/premiocontestoindie
YouTube > www.youtube.com/channel/UCFRrLznH3zNqr4aRcHXy8vw

Sito Web > www.contesto.org

Name: Sound Meditation Presents
Description:
Sound Meditation is the practice of deepening meditation with the use of sound and music.

A sound meditation (also known as a  'sound bath' or 'sound healing') is a beautiful concert that brings you into a deep state of meditation. This is a time for our community to come together and refresh, take a break from the stresses of life and bathe ourselves in love and peace. 

Our platform brings you the highest quality of sound, featuring 38" Paiste gongs, over two dozen huge crystal singing bowls, Tibetan bronze bowls, monocord, shamanic drums, hang drums, Native American flutes, Koshi chimes, Tingshe chimes, bells, and more— led by Guy Douglas with Simona Asinovski.

Use this platform to deepen your meditation practice, recharge during the workday, or guide yourself into soothing sleep— it's a very hypnotic, ethereal experience. 

You will come away with a clear mind and a deeper appreciation for the wonder of sound. We strongly recommend the platform for people who have trouble meditating, or feel like they just "can't get there." Sound meditation is more accessible than “traditional meditation” - and can help people access deep states of ease with little mental effort.

Sound Meditation Presents promotes the ancient healing practice of sound work as a way to positively affect physical health and conscious awareness.

Sound Meditation, as a deep, yet accessible form of meditation, is also a perfect way to promote both the wellness and productivity of your team. Support the mental health of your employees and reduce stress-related sick days.

Name: Concerto Music
Description: Concerto Music è un’agenzia che opera nel settore artistico e musicale dalla fine degli anni settanta. Si occupa principalmente di promozione, management e booking per tour musicali ed eventi. L’agenzia è anche un’etichetta indipendente che ha prodotto molti tra gli album più venduti di artisti come Francesco Guccini, Paolo Conte, Vinicio Capossela, Claudio Lolli.

Name: Accademie Musicali LIZARD - sede Firenze Castello
Description:
CORSI ORGANIZZATI DALLA DEMASOUND

LA LIZARD FONDATA A FIESOLE (FI) DA GIOVANNI UNTERBERGER NEL 1981 È IL PIÙ PRESTIGIOSO ED IMPORTANTE CENTRO ITALIANO DI PRODUZIONE DIDATTICA PER LA MUSICA MODERNA.
OLTRE 500.000 STUDENTI, DI OGNI REGIONE D’ITALIA, HANNO IMPARATO A SUONARE AFFIDANDOSI A QUESTO MARCHIO.
IL METODO LIZARD/UNTERBERGER È ALL’AVANGUARDIA NELLA DIDATTICA MUSICALE PERCHÉ HA DIMOSTRATO DI RIUSCIRE A VELOCIZZARE L’APPRENDIMENTO E A RENDERE LO STUDIO DELLA MUSICA PIÙ CONCRETO E APPASSIONANTE, PUR MANTENENDO ALTO IL LIVELLO QUALITATIVO E PRESERVANDO LE PROSPETTIVE DI CRESCITA DEGLI STUDENTI PIÙ MOTIVATI E DOTATI. PER OTTENERE GLI ATTESTATI DI LIVELLO, LA LICENZA SPM E PROSEGUIRE VERSO IL CONSEGUIMENTO DEL DIPLOMA LIZARD È NECESSARIO SOSTENERE E SUPERARE GLI ESAMI RELATIVI.
LA NOSTRA È UNA SCUOLA GIOVANE E VITALE, CHE NON PUNTA SOLAMENTE AL LATO DIDATTICO, MA AIUTA I RAGAZZI A SVILUPPARE LE LORO DOTI, SOSTENENDOLI NELLE PROPRIE ATTITUDINI PER UNA CORRETTA E PERSONALE EVOLUZIONE DEL LORO LATO ARTISTICO MUSICALE. E’ UNA SCUOLA CHE DA UN LATO LAVORA PER :
-       APPASSIONARE I BAMBINI E I RAGAZZI ALLA MUSICA, ALLA MUSICA FATTA DA LORO, PARTENDO DALLE BASI;
E DALL’ALTRO LATO LO FA CON COMPETENZA, IN QUANTO ALLE SPALLE C’È L’ESPERIENZA TRENTENNALE, A LIVELLO DIDATTICO, DI UN’ACCADEMIA COME LA LIZARD DI FIESOLE.

Name: Dealer de Musique
Description:
Le projet Dealer de Musique est né en 2012 dans l'idée de partager quotidiennement aux internautes une sélection des dernières nouveautés électroniques du moment sur Spotify, Youtube, Deezer et Soundcloud. 
Dealer de Musique se transforme en maison de disques en octobre 2014 - DDM Recordings - avec toujours en tête cet esprit de découverte de nouveaux talents. 

+ d'infos : http://ddm-recordings.com

Description: Acoustic Sounds is an e-commerce store that offers speakers, cartridges, phono preamps, record cleaning machines and turntables.

We believe that a holistic approach to career growth is not only required for artist-entrepreneurs today, but deserved. To ensure artists grow as creators while also learning to profit from their art, we offer access—both in-house and through strategic collaborations—to a full ecosystem of creative and business services across publishing, label services, and management.

Spreading positivity through art and music.

Founders and projectleader of OSHI (https://oshimusic.com/)

Name: Liebrand Audio , Liebrand Images
Description:
LIEBRAND AUDIO is part of B.LIEBRAND AUDIO STUDIO BV.

A company founded in 1982, and specialized in making productions, mixes and remixes of dance-related Music.
Projects include:

Salt'N'Pepa Art of Noise Alexander O'Neal Hot Chocolate Phil Collins Genesis Forrest Karl Keaton Tony Scott Bill Withers Dimples D Fun Fun Dance Classics Mix The 4 Seasons The 4 Tops MC Miker G & DJ Sven Nathalie Cole Taja Sevelle ISCO Jam & Spoon The Doobie Brothers 24-Seven Crystal Palace Goldilox Grace Jones Candy Dulfer Golden Earring Alf and more
Dance classics mix




	

Ben Liebrand was also the first DJ to have a NON-STOP mix show called "In The Mix" which ran late at night on radio Veronica,

This show ran from 1983 to 1985 and was later followed by a weekly minimix on a prime time spot on radio Veronica.

These Non-Stop Mixes and minimixes set the standard for many to follow, and introduced the term "thuismixer" meaning "Home-mixer" in the music business.Many of these minimixes are now becoming available on The Ben Liebrand Collectors Editions

Ben was the pioneer in this field of mixing and remixing for the dance floor and experimented with all forms of signal processing includingpitch-transpose to match the songkey back in 1983, filtered tracks back in 1985,reedrelais triggered samples in 1986. That was also the year Ben started
to make remixes in a tempo other than the original songs tempo.This first mix took Freeze's IOU from 120BPM down to a 107BPM swing feel mix.

Ben is also one of the very few people in the music business who does his own programming, arranging, keyboards, engineering, mixing and mastering.

1983 was the year when Ben made his first GRANDMIX for radio Veronica which set the standard for all yearmixes to follow. Since 2000, the anual grandmix has returned and is now featured on Slam FM and is also available on CD.

LIEBRAND AUDIO is based in the Netherlands.

Name: Dominant Artists
Description: A music manager handles career issues for bands, singers and DJs. A music manager is hired by a musician, band or DJ to help with determining decisions related to career moves, bookings, promotions, business deals, recording contracts, etc. The role of music managers is extensive and may include similar duties to that of a press agent, promoter, booking agent, business manager (who are usually certified public accountants), tour managers, and sometimes even a personal assistant. Responsibilities of a business manager are often divided among many who manage various aspects of a musical career. With an unsigned act, music managers have to assume multiple roles: booking agent, graphic designer, publicist, promoter, and accountant. As an artist's career develops, responsibilities grow. A music manager becomes important to managing the many different pieces that make up a career in music. The manager can assist singers, songwriters, and instrumentalists in molding a career, finding music producers, and developing relationships with record companies, publishers, agents, and the music-loving public. The duties of an active music manager will focus on a developing a reputation for the musician and building a fan base, which may include mastering and launching a demo CD, developing and releasing press kits, planning promotional activities, and booking shows.

Name: Music Center Of The Northwest
Description: Music Center of the Northwest is a non-profit community music school located in North Seattle. We believe in the transformative power of music in the lives of people and our community. With a commitment to music education and live performance, Music Center provides access to exceptional musical experiences for people of all ages and abilities, regardless of means.

Name: Folk Alliance Australia
Description:
Folk Alliance Australia is the peak national body representing folk cultural activity and the folk industry of Australia. We are a membership organisation that provides an information resource and networking, showcase and professional development opportunities for the Australian folk community.

Folk Alliance Australia is an incorporated not-for-profit association, with a volunteer board of management.

Our aim is to:
- provide a forum for folk activity practitioners and organisers that encourages networking, information sharing, fellowship, training and support
- lobby on behalf of folk activity practitioners and organisers to represent them in any forum that affects the operation and future of folk activity at a national level
- promote Australian folk activities to overseas and domestic markets
- provide resources to aid the development and improvement of folk activities in Australia.

Name: GRISE Agency
Description:
GRISE is a Music Consulting agency based in Berlin. The agency was founded in 2014 but our staff is supervising various electronic music labels since more than 13 years. During this time we have gained valuable experiences and have built up an extensive network in the music business with direct contacts to key-positions at the electronic music marked. Besides of our core-service music consulting & label management, GRISE also offers a publishing and  PR service (focused on club DJ & media promotion).

Name: Northern Chamber Orchestra
Description:
The Northern Chamber Orchestra (NCO) has come a long way since it was set up in 1967.  It now presents a successful, annual series of concerts at The Heritage Centre in Macclesfield and The Stoller Hall in Manchester, which attract top-flight soloists.   

 The NCO is the house orchestra at Buxton Festival, playing for its main opera productions, and now regularly gives orchestral concerts at Buxton Opera House and the Pavilion Arts Centre.  The orchestra is Orchestra in Association at Manchester’s Stoller Hall. It also performs across the North of England and is regularly included in Orchestras Live programmes across rural areas, including the Lake District. 

Mind Music is a project by the Northern Chamber Orchestra exploring the effects of live music on people living with dementia. The NCO developed Mind Music to raise awareness of dementia, and the project work ranges from high-profile fund-raising concerts to working in care homes as part of therapy, while generating crucial data for research into how music can improve and repair cognitive functions. The NCO are working with the Faculty of Health, Psychology and Social Care at Manchester Metropolitan University, providing one of their undergraduates with the opportunity to work on real-world projects alongside experienced researchers from the Faculty.

Name: Choral Singing in America
Description:
Choral Singing in America: Nurturing the Country’s Soul is a visual representation of the breadth and depth of choral singing today. The film beautifully tells the myriad stories and sounds of American choral singers and leaders–stories that inspire, build community, foster hope, and showcase the tremendous social capital and community building of singing together.  America sings in schools, in communities, in concert halls, on the streets, in churches and synagogues, in prisons, in hospice centers, and wherever hearts are moved to join in song. 

About the project:
Choral Singing in America, begun in March of 2020, tells the story of who and why folks sing in choirs. Research states that more than 56 million Americans sing in organized choral ensembles.  Through recorded performances both historic and current, and through engaging, personal stories the tremendous impact of choral singing on body and spirit is told with a wide range of leaders who have shaped the highly varied choral landscape through generations of singers. Choral Singing in America: Nurturing the Country's Soul will give voice to what so many Americans have felt for generations: singing together offers healing, opportunities for artistic expression, friendships, and solace for singers, both trained and amateur. 

The project is not for profit and includes the creative team, Jerry Blackstone, artistic director; Emily Ellsworth, conductor and adviser; Brian Gaukel, filmmaker; and Matthew Workman, executive director, and an Advisory Panel comprised of leading conductors, music educators, choral scholars, music industry leaders, and leaders of professional music organizations. 

We hope the film will be used for advocacy, inspiration, and education.

Hailing from Calgary, Alberta, Neil D. Speers is not your average guitar master. His journey began at a tender age when he first laid his hands on a six-string wonder. From that moment onward, he was consumed by a fiery passion for music, an unquenchable thirst to express the deepest emotions that words alone could never convey.

Speers' musical odyssey traverses a remarkable trajectory, weaving together the threads of blues, rock, jazz, and even classical influences, creating a mesmerizing tapestry of sonic innovation. 

Through his performances, Speers takes listeners on an otherworldly journey, each note a brushstroke that paints an ethereal picture. His live shows are a spectacle to behold, with electrifying solos that send shivers down the spine and soul-stirring melodies that resonate deep within the hearts of those fortunate enough to witness his magic on stage.

Name: University of Michigan Men's Glee Club
Description:
The University of Michigan Men's Glee Club is an all-male glee club (or choir). With roots tracing back to 1859, it is the second oldest collegiate choir in the United States and is the oldest student organization at the university. The Club has won the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod on four separate occasions, and was the first group from the United States to do so. The group now regularly performs at the American Choral Director's Association (ACDA) conferences and all over the United States and the world. Recent tours have visited China, Spain, Cuba, and South Africa.

The Club is a student-run organization, which undertakes all management facilities, including all finances, public relations, alumni relations, community outreach, operations, and tour arrangements. Only the musical director is a member of the faculty. It accepts members from both undergraduates and graduates of the university, who are chosen by audition.

We score commercials for local, regional, national and international campaigns, as well as films, trailers and TV shows. We work on budgets ranging from $500 to $50,000, be it music branding, corporate audio, sonic logos, or scores for commercials, websites, industrial films and promotional DVs. Name: OCorre Lab
Les Percussions de Strasbourg
Description:
Fondé en 1962, les Percussions de Strasbourg sont des ambassadeurs mondialement reconnus de la création musicale. Riche d’un répertoire exceptionnel, le groupe alterne pièces phares du XXème siècle et commandes de nouvelles œuvres, avec les mêmes préoccupations : faire vivre un patrimoine contemporain en le revisitant sans cesse et continuer à innover, au-devant de l’élargissement des pratiques et des expressions scéniques.

Depuis sa fondation, le groupe est toujours au cœur de la création, grâce à sa complicité avec les compositeurs d’aujourd’hui et à la pluralité de ses propositions en termes de formats et d’outils : du duo à l’octuor, de l’acoustique à l’électronique, du récital au théâtre musical en passant par la danse…

Dédicataire de plus de 350 œuvres, le groupe poursuit l’entretien et le développement de son parc instrumental unique au monde. Il compte à son actif de nombreux enregistrements ainsi qu’une trentaine de prix internationaux, dont une Victoire de la musique classique en 2017 qui récompense la 1ère sortie discographique du label Percussions de Strasbourg, Burning Bright de Hugues Dufourt.

Leur engagement quotidien envers la transmission se traduit par des actions pédagogiques multiples notamment auprès du public du quartier de Hautepierre où l’ensemble est en résidence.

Name: Bronx Conservatory of Music
Description:
The Bronx Conservatory of Music was founded in 1991 by Elizabeth Thode Hoard, a 1927 graduate of the Juilliard School, where she studied piano. A long-time resident of the Bronx, she served with great distinction for forty-six years at the New York Institute for the Education of the Blind (currently the New York Institute for Special Education), and spent several years as its Director of Music.  

The mission of the Bronx Conservatory of Music (“BCM”), as sought by Mrs. Hoard, is to provide private music instruction of the highest quality to Bronx children and adults, in their own neighborhoods, at lowest possible tuition; thereby making conservatory training accessible to all. In fulfilling this mission, the school also seeks to develop audiences for fine music in the Bronx and to contribute to the music culture of the Bronx.  

The Bronx Conservatory brings the gift of music to our Bronx community. Our faculty members are graduates of some of the finest conservatories throughout the world, including New York City’s Juilliard School, Mannes College of Music, Manhattan School of Music, and New York University. BCM Teachers are chosen not only for their achievement as performers at the highest level, but also for their experience and abilities as teachers.

The teaching goals of the Bronx Conservatory of Music are to promote personal growth through the understanding and enjoyment of music, to develop performance skills, and to provide valuable social outlets for self-expression for students of all ages, at all levels of music experience.

The Bronx Conservatory of Music engages in developing audiences for fine music throughout the Bronx. The school provides free and low-priced concerts featuring faculty and guests artists to Bronx communities in partnership with churches and educational institutions.
