Name: Express In Music
Description:
Express In Music started out as a music crowdsourcing site for jingles and voiceovers. We then expanded into providing background environmental music to retail, shopping malls and F&B chains through a patented set-top box device that streams music on cloud. Our total audio branding solutions are provided to hundreds of clients seeking pipe-in music and customers looking for effective sound results.

What we do for
1.	Musicians who has a library of music catalogue
We often hear background environmental music playing at the ambience of food & beverage outlets, retail chains, shopping malls and hotels. Instead of the usual cover songs or “branded” music usually being played as pipe-in music at shops, we want your songs to cover the shopping experience. In addition, you get paid royalties and know how many times your music has been played and listened by consumers. 


2.	Musicians who customize jingles
Our platform allows you to participate in such pitches freely. We bring the clients to you and ensure that the music picked will get the rightful pay-out. 


3.	Customers who seek jingle/voiceover
As a crowdsourcing site for jingles and voiceovers, we help you “get heard” through speed, mass quantity and high qualitative turnover. 


4.	Customers who seek background environmental music
Operating through our sister site, www.expressmelody.com, you will find an elaborated description that depicts our music streaming service.

Name: Discophonic Productions
Description:
De naam Discophonic zegt het al: het is disco én symphonisch in één!
Lex van Wel brengt met zijn 30-koppige Discophonic Orchestra deze unieke dans- & feest-muziek, zoals het destijds in deze bezetting is opgenomen, nu 'LIVE on Stage'.

Live genieten van (nog altijd) de meest uitnodigende muziek van de afgelopen decenia; o.a. Donna Summer, Earth, Wind & Fire, ABBA, The Three Degrees, Whitney Houston, Lionel Richie, Michael Jackson, Boney M en vele, vele anderen.

Met 7 vocalisten, 10 strijkers, 6 blazers en een uitgebreide ritmesectie is het volop feest met dit orkest, wat zelfs in de jaren 70/80 een grote sensatie geweest zou zijn.

Ook de hedendaagse muziek die prima in dit genre past, van o.a. Bruno Mars, Justin Timberlake, Pharrell Williams, Byoncé en vele anderen worden door Lex van Wel en zijn Discophonic Orchestra voorzien van de beroemde Philly-sound.

Een Party voor alle generaties.


Let's Groove Tonight!

Name: Orchestre de Cannes
Description:
DEPUIS PLUS DE 40 ANS, L’ORCHESTRE DE CANNES PROVENCE ALPES CÔTE D’AZUR SILLONNE LES ROUTES DE SA RÉGION ET POSE SES INSTRUMENTS, LE TEMPS D’UN CONCERT, DANS DES SALLES DE SPECTACLE, DES ÉTABLISSEMENTS SCOLAIRES, DES ÉGLISES, DES THÉÂTRE DE VERURE OU SUR DES SCÈNES ÉPHÉMÈRES AU CŒUR DE LA NATURE, TOUJOURS LE MÊME ENTHOUSIASME. 

Grâce à ses fidèles partenaires que sont la Ville de Cannes, le Ministère de la Culture, le Département des Alpes-Maritimes, la Région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur, les entreprises membres du club Andantino et les Amis de l’Orchestre, l’Orchestre peut se produire une centaine de fois par saison. Il propose aussi bien des concerts symphoniques que de la musique de chambre et des spectacles à destination des plus jeunes. 

Ayant à cœur de séduire et d’aller à la rencontre des jeunes générations, l’Orchestre s’installe volontiers au sein d’établissements scolaires de sa région (de la primaire au lycée) pour des séances de répétition et des concerts. 

L’Orchestre cherche constamment à offrir au public des programmes innovants et audacieux, menés par des artistes de renom et de qualité. C’est ainsi que l’Orchestre a été dirigé par des chefs tels que Michel Plasson, Georges Prêtre, Vladimir Spivakov ou encore Arie van Beek et qu’il a pu accompagner des solistes comme Mstislav Rostropovitch, Maurice André, Martha Argerich, Barbara Hendricks, et plus récemment Nemanja Radulovic, David Kadouch, Romain Leleu, Ibrahim Maalouf, Camille Berthollet ou encore Khatia Buniatishvili, qui, à la demande des 37 musiciens qui composent cette phalange, a accepté de devenir en 2015 la marraine de l’Orchestre de Cannes. 

Fondé en 1975, l’Orchestre, qui a reçu en 2005 une Victoire d’honneur pour l’ensemble de son travail, est aujourd’hui dirigé par Benjamin Levy ; il succède à Wolfgang Doerner (2013-2016) et Philippe Bender (1976-2013). 

L’Orchestre de Cannes est membre de l’Association Française des Orchestres (AFO)

Name: Piano Central Studios
Description:
Piano Central Studios has been nourishing hearts and minds in Kindermusik classes and music lessons for Greenville and Simpsonville families since 1979. What began as a few teaching studios in the back of Piano Central has grown into the largest and oldest community music school in the Upstate, touching the lives of thousands of families and including multiple locations in the Greenville and Simpsonville area. Over the years, we have continued to make it our highest priority to provide that personal touch and special care to each and every member of our PCS family.

We know what a difference music makes. That’s why we teach music — why PCS still exists today. But we want more for our students than just a class or lesson. We are also committed to delivering a music learning experience that is unique and lasting. We desire to come alongside you, get to know you, ignite that natural love for music, and keep you progressing in your ability to make and enjoy music for the rest of your life.

Because of that, we’ve intentionally designed a program that is more than just the classes or lessons – we’ve crafted a distinctive experience that nurtures and supports the individual student, ensuring that they are not just achieving their goals, but are also growing and thriving along the way.

It is through the complete experience of our program and the care and commitment of our incredible team of teachers that you are able to realize the full potential of what learning to love music, sing, or play an instrument will mean for you. Perhaps your lessons will build the foundation for a music-related career. Or maybe you’ll just discover a relaxing way to unwind after a busy day. It may be that music lessons will open the doors for creative self-expression and give you the confidence to share it with others.

No matter what your goal, a love for music and making music is something you’ll carry with you for the rest of your life. You have the musical potential—we are here to he

Name: The Moondivers
Description:
We all have things in common with one another. This could be hobbies, interests, beliefs, passions, favorite flavor of ice cream ... you get the idea.

Among all of these similarities, there is one thing that every single one of us sympathizes with and tries desperately to hold onto.
That one thing is youth.

Not physical youth, but youth in spirit. Our youth and childhood is a moment in time so unique, so special, so bizarre; and it happens so fast that once we're out of it, we feel like we never truly grabbed a hold of it while we were in it. We look back on it like we would an old friend.
But it doesn't necessarily have to be this way.

There are elements of youth that we can hold on to forever.
The moments of carelessness. The ability to make mistakes and move on. The capability of showing emotions. The desire to learn something new. The curiosity to try something new. The wherewithal to see a stranger as a friend. The propensity of acting on impulse. The innocence of it all. The wonder of it all. The magic of it all.

This is the foundation of The Moondivers.

Formerly Northern Whale and hailing from Ohio,
The Moondivers are Jake Capezzuto, Brandon Fisher, Scott Davis, Seth Donchess, Mike Mitchum and Ryan Betts.

Armed with nothing but ideas, instruments, and dancing bodies, The Moondivers aim to bring out the inner youth in all of us and ALWAYS hold on to the magic.

Name: High Fidelity
Description:
Management & Booking. Madrid

High Fidelity nace por la necesidad de cambio que creemos que la industria musical española debe experimentar, hace tiempo que el sector de la música está en continuo cambio y es totalmente necesario evolucionar junto a él, por eso, en High Fidelity creemos en un modelo de servicio 360º para nuestros artistas, donde los músicos no deban preocuparse de nada más que hacer música e intentar evitar los máximos intermediarios posibles. Nuestra filosofía se centra fundamentalmente en tres pilares básicos; el apoyo a los artistas más jóvenes de nuestro país, la diversidad de géneros y el constante contacto de la música con la calle.

Es de gran importancia para nosotros que la deteriorada relación entre los músicos y las discográficas vuelva por fin a su cauce original, no perdiendo la esencia de nuestro verdadero trabajo, poner a disposición de los amantes de la música los nuevos talentos que existen en España. Una reconciliación necesaria que solo puede conseguirse a través de una relación armoniosa y de trabajo entre artista y sello discográfico.

Nuestra principal tarea es encontrar aquellos talentos que no están siendo valorados y que necesitan una oportunidad para poder dar un salto en su carrera profesional.

Nos encanta lo que hacemos, por eso, nuestra línea de trabajo abarca toda la cadena de valor que compone la carrera de una banda o artista. Desde la captación de nuevos talentos, pasando por la producción de su música, management de los artistas, el booking e incluso la distribución y comercialización de su música para que llegue de manera adecuada a los fans y amantes de la música. No creemos en la especialización de un género para la necesidad de éxito, buscamos todo tipo de perfiles artísticos, creemos en el talento, no en un género en concreto y nos apasiona todo tipo de música si existe talento detrás.

Funding

Name: Hub16 Studios
Description:
Hub is your favourite basement studio nurturing the next wave of electronic artists in Hackney, London and beyond.

Our tutors are world touring, professional musicians and passionate teachers ready to help you define your sound. We’ve helped artists finish mixtapes, secure residencies, develop demos, create EPs + get their work signed.

A grassroots space our proudest moments so far have been to help give space to the London Ballroom Scene with Jay Jay Revlon, House of Trax, Diva D and House of Lady Di  whilst also connecting with our club inspirations Rushmore, Byrell the Great + Vjuan Allure & The Niallist. 

We’ve also housed performances from Klein, TTB, TTY, Tobago Tracks, Lawson Benn, Tribe of Colin, Endgame, Scratcha DVA, Famous Eno, Kareful, Kieran Loftus, Wavemob, ABBY, Shy One, Dis Fig, PTP Crew, Krizzli, Lemonick, 0ComeUps, AG + Grandmixxer, Moleskin, Hipster’s Don’t Dance, Ikonika + Last Japan with Boiler Room 

In 2015 we partnered with Superfoxx, a global house and dance night to run London’s first DJ academy for women – with real opportunities for graduates to DJ alongside the Superfoxx squad in London, Ibiza + LA. 4Music’s AJ Odudu said “great tips, quality equipment and I was totally made to feel relaxed & confident immediately”.

Hub also provides event programming, DJs & tech support to other grassroots / LGBTQI venues including The Yard, Haggerston, Vogue Fabrics & Dalston Superstore.

Hub runs DJ + Production workshops at events across the UK notably with Superfoxx, Tate Museum and NTS Radio / Netflix.

Name: Egregore Collective
Description:
Le collectif naît début 2017 suite à la rencontre entre Algo_Riddim et Squadra, et de leur envie de donner une plateforme numérique d’expression à la scène électronique locale.

Nous pensions que le monde musical électronique ne possédait pas de plateformes adéquates à la diffusion de ses produits, et d’autant plus sur Toulouse où les lieux dits “alternatifs” ont de moins en moins la côte.

Dès lors, nous avons souhaité développer un état d’esprit fédérateur entre les personnes actrices du monde culturel et musical de Toulouse en premier lieu, puis au-delà de nos frontières occitanes : tout d’abord avec la création d’une webradio, puis d’un label.
 
Nous avançons animés par une forte volonté d’autonomie, de respect des personnes et de progression constante dans le partage et l’échange. Nous avons créé et administrons nous-même le site web, le serveur radio et leurs intéractions.

Name: HIGHRESAUDIO
Description:
HIGHRESAUDIO versteht sich als zweisprachiges Webportal mit hohem Qualitätsanspruch im Hinblick auf Gestaltung, Text und Vertrieb audiophiler Aufnahmen aus allen Musikstilen. Entworfen, entwickelt und betrieben in Deutschland, bietet HIGHRESAUDIO Alben und Songs nur in 24-Bit Studio Master Qualität mit einer Sampling-Frequenz von bis zu 192 Kilohertz an. Alle Musik-Downloads enthalten ausführliche Zusatzinfos: detaillierte Album-Beschreibung, Biografie, Discografie, Kritiken und weitere Künstlerinformationen. 

HIGHRESAUDIO ist ein Music-Download-Service, der ausschließlich nicht komprimierte und verlustfreie Downloads in 24-Bit-Auflösung (Studio Master) von audiophilen Aufnahmen aus allen Musikstilen für eine qualitätsbewusste Hörerschaft und Musikliebhaber anbietet. HIGHRESAUDIO betreibt einen Webshop und ein Webmagazin für HiFi-Liebhaber und Musikfreunde, die großen Wert auf naturgetreue Klangqualität legen. highresaudio wurde von einem Team von erfahrenen, visionären und  enthusiastischen Musik-Experten und Studiotechnikern in Deutschland gegründet.

Wir nehmen die Transformation durch Technologien in der Musikindustrie zum Anlass und unterstützen Musikliebhaber in dem Wunsch nach einem unverfälschten Hörerlebnis. HIGHRESAUDIO beschäftigt sich darüberhinaus mit der Entwicklung innovativer Dienste und Anwendungen, neuen Geschäftsmodellen und wirtschaftlichen Möglichkeiten für Künstler, Labels sowie die Hersteller digitaler Audioprodukte.

Name: Tricycle Records
Description:
Tricycle Records was founded in 2006 by Julie Schuchard (a music photographer) and Don Joslin ( a musician and graphic designer). Somehow they pulled together their collective knowledge of the indie music scene and using the resources they had available- they took a leap of faith and launched the label with an EP by Joslin’s band, The Union Trade.

After a year of growing pains and numerous heartfelt discussions about the future of the label, the two founders settled on a concept: Tricycle Records would be a multi-genre label catering to DIY artists in the Bay Area music community. This would become the mission statement of Tricycle Records bands. Always DIY and always local.

By August of 2007, a dancy electronic band called The Frail, and a fiery garage rock trio, The Blacks, joined the roster, bringing with them a whole new audience of listeners. Tricycle Records became a label that confused fans with their eclectic roster, but built a strong music community based in their local, DIY ethic.

Approaching their 6 year anniversary, Tricycle Records represents one of the broadest rosters of small labels in the Bay Area, with something for everyone that loves music.

Awards:
SFBG Best of the Bay 2013 Winner - Best Record Label

Name: Elmu ry
Description:
ELMU, Helsinki's Live Music Association, was established in 1978 with the goal of establishing a vivid live music scene in the Finnish capital. At that time, rehearsal space for local bands was scarce and opportunities to perform live were very limited.
 
Within weeks after launching, ELMU gained more than three thousand members. From its first office at Eerikinkatu 15, ELMU started to organize club concerts at KY and Natsa. In August 1979, ELMU opened the first nightclub of its own, Lepakko, which was situated in a former paint storage hall. Nowadays, the association's headquarters is located at Nosturi, which comprises a 900-capacity live venue, rehearsal rooms for approximately 50 local bands, office spaces and a restaurant.
 
ELMU's primary mission is to provide versatile, low-threshold opportunities for young people to enjoy music and culture, be it as listeners or as performing artists. Our goal is to support the well-being of youngsters and to encourage their interest in musical culture.
 
In addition to its local activities, ELMU has more than 30 years of experience in organizing trips to festivals in Sweden, Germany, Denmark and other European countries, covering a broad range of musical genres.

Songstuff is a music community and resources for musicians and songwriters covering song writing, music technology, musicianship and the music industry.

Established in September 2000, Songstuff has helped many songwriters and other music professionals find their feet within the music industry by providing a variety of resources including articles and tutorials, and an educated and experienced community and support network.

Name: Single One Group
Description:
Nós somos o Single One Group. Somos um conglomerado de empresas envolvidas em diversos segmentos, mas principalmente no segmento musical. Com um legado de mais de 7 anos, o Single One Group hoje abriga uma família incomparável de artistas criativos, compositores e empresas que estão movendo a cultura em todo o Brasil. 

Nós somos a casa para artistas, pessoas inovadoras e empreendedoras da música brasileira. Somos especialistas em identificar e desenvolver artistas e compositores. Nós produzimos, distribuímos e promovemos a música de qualidade no país. 

Com o avanço da tecnologia digital e a constante mudança do mundo, o nosso compromisso incomparável é para liderar o desenvolvimento de novos serviços, plataformas e modelos de negócios para a entrega de música e conteúdo relevante, capacitando inovações e permitindo novas oportunidades comerciais e artísticas florescer.

Priorizamos a transparência e damos suporte para nossos criadores de música em todos os aspectos de seu desenvolvimento, fornecemos recursos e conhecimento de ganhos, pagamentos e insights de líderes do setor que permitem maior flexibilidade financeira e tomada de decisões rápidas, assertivas e informadas, queremos um mercado mais justo e humano.

Name: ADEM Florida
Description:
Music-Hall, dans les années folles jusqu'aux années 1970, Le Florida accueille les grands noms de la chanson (Joséphine Baker, Edith Piaf, Brel, etc.) puis devenu "salle obscure" dans les années 80, la ville d'Agen transforme le Florida en 1993 en un nouvel équipement culturel en centre-ville dédié aux musiques amplifiées, dont elle confie la gestion et l'exploitation à l'Association pour le Développement de l'Expression Musicale : l'ADEM. 

Première structure architecturale française à offrir une salle de concert, des studios de répétition et un lieu de vie muni d'un bar et premières association pionnière dans le pilotage d'un projet artistique, culturel et numérique, multi générationnel de 7 à 77 ans. 
Pour son projet l'ADEM Florida est labelisée SMAC (scène de musiques actuelles) par le Ministère de la culture.
Plus qu'une salle de concert l'ADEM Florida est une entreprise à but non lucratif qui affirme ses valeurs humanistes et solidaires. Aventure sociale créatrice d'emplois et porteuse d'innovation, l'ADEM Florida est un acteur territorial attentif au mieux vivre ensemble, soucieux d'une économie créative et durable.

Feel free to contact us at: http://www.ifolio.nl/

Name: UCC Choral Society
Description: UCC Choral Society

Name: LaCorelli
Description:
Established in 2009 by a small team of young and talented musicians, LaCorelli becomes a Cooperative Society in January 2015, achieving the status of an open, participatory, supportive Institution. Today LaCorelli is a stable reality, which owes its success to a tenacious commitment, a wise vision and a lot of determination and desire to grow. 
LaCorelli's first and general purpose is that of spread the musical culture at 360 degrees through the ideation and production of concerts, musical events and products, also as a collaborator or guest within musical Seasons already started by other local and national institutions. LaCorelli therefore works to set itself as a solid and luminous point of reference for the other actors and operators of the cultural and musical scene, lending itself as a reliable partner.
Among the leading music ensembles of LaCorelli, the main one is the Orchestra Corelli, directed by Jacopo Rivani, definitely a point of reference for the musicians of the Romagna area, and always scouting new talents.
The Orchestra successfully took part in a long, articulated and varied the series of events, meeting the favor of critics and institutions, with encouraging feedback from the public. The Orchestra boasts stable participation in prestigious music festivals, with a repertoire ranging from symphonic to lyric to film music, alternating on the podium its own principal Director to a long parterre of appreciated guest conductors.
The Orchestra and its Ensembles already performed in prestigious places, such as Teatro Rossini di Pesaro, Duse and Manzoni in Bologna, the Bonci of Cesena, the Teatro Alighieri in Ravenna, Teatro Valli in Reggio Emilia, the Masini of Faenza, the Comunale di Ferrara, the Theaters of Bibbiena, Cervia, Russi, Fusignano, as well as the Cathedral of Ascoli Piceno, Museo delle Ceramiche di Faenza, the National Archaeological Museum of Ferrara, the Royal Palace of Colorno, the Palacongressi di Rimini and many others.

Name: The Cumnock Tryst
Description:
For a few autumn days the East Ayrshire town of Cumnock becomes a meeting place for music. Founded by composer James MacMillan, The Cumnock Tryst brings some of the world's greatest musicians into local venues, churches and halls, with the community at the heart of all of its activities. 

The Festivalâs name, The Cumnock Tryst, was inspired by a piece of music James MacMillan wrote in the 1980s when he was still living in Ayrshire. This was a setting of William Soutarâs love poem, The Tryst. Tryst is an old Scots word which means a meeting place, or a romantic rendezvous. The town of Cumnock itself ties into this sense of coming together as its Gaelic name, comunn achadh, means place of the confluence, as the town sits where the Glaisnock River and the Lugar Water meet. For four packed days and nights The Cumnock Tryst is a meeting place for music-lovers.

While the SPOT FESTIVAL brings the international music industry to Denmark, SPOT ON DENMARK brings Danish live music to the export markets. The SPOT ON DENMARK showcases are thus based on concerts abroad with the most exciting new Danish bands. During the last 12-months SPOT ON DENMARK has taken place at sold-out venues in Paris, Berlin og Brussels.

STRATEGY: DON'T PUSH, LET THEM PULL
		
SPOT ON DENMARK collaborates with the chosen export markets local music industry & press and lets them decide which Danish artists should be featured at SPOT ON DENMARK in their country.

Name: Piano Guru - India's #1 Piano Learning App
Description:
Ever wished if you could play that popular song that you always wanted to?

We are happy to announce PianoGuru - the most innovative piano learning app built by experts in music and virtual learning for all age groups.

Learn your favorite songs from our hand crafted and growing collection of 100,000+ songs comprised of English, Spanish, Bollywood, Bengali, Tamil songs.

Our innovative learning methods help you learn a song within 15 minutes, regardless of your age and your knowledge of the music.


FAQs
-----

Q. How is PianoGuru different from other piano learning apps?

A. Most of the typical Piano Learning apps guide you with next notes to play 
by highlighting the next notes or dropping bars on next notes for a visual clue. You just follow the clue and hit the note as guided. That doesn't actually help you learn a song as you are learning one note at a time instead of learning a tune. You will never be able to play a song without guidance with that approach.

To make the learning effective, PianoGuru helps you take small baby steps towards learning a song. Each song is broken down into small verses or sequence which is a sequence of notes. Verses are carefully kept short to help you master one tune at a time. You can easily switch between the verses if you wish to. Just like a human instructor Piano Guru guides you when you are stuck by suggesting the notes to play.

Q. Does PianoGuru work in offline mode?

A. Yes. Once the app is installed, it downloads the song data and stores that in phone's memory. Thereafter the app continues to work in the offline mode.

Q. Which age-group is PianoGuru meant for?

A. PianoGuru is popular with all age groups - young kids, parents, grand-parents.

Q. How do I request a new song?

A. Just post a request on your Facebook wall with hashtag #pianoguruapp and we would add the song at earliest.

Q. Can I record my own tunes?

A. Yes you can! In fact, you can even publish your songs to help other Piano Guru users learn. We have more than 10K songs being published by Piano Guru users daily.

Q. Do I need to have music experience to learn with Piano Guru?

A. No. Based on our stats, you will be able to learn a song in less than 15 minutes (avg), regardless of your experience in music.

Name: No Ego Records
Description:
No Ego Records is an independent record label based in Los Angeles, California.

The music industry is changing. The traditional outlets of music discovery, distribution and promotion have been thrown out the window in the wake of constant technological innovation. Traditional record labels and music retailers have found that their business models are no longer valid in today’s world of iTunes, streaming radio, blogs, etc.

With the advent of new technology, especially in the realm of Digital Audio Workstation and DJ software, it is increasingly easy for just about anyone with an idea to compose and produce a song or a remix. To that end, the market has been flooded with new content; some of which is good and some of which is not so good.

From day one, the focus of No Ego Records has been on producing excellent music and putting on incredible, unforgettable events. While distribution and promotion methods will certainly change throughout time, the desire and need for quality music and events is timeless.

Description: Have you been searching for a unique sound for ages? Then a visit to our studios, a workplace for electronic music, could certainly be worthwhile. In Studio 1 you move among analog equipment from the 50s and 60s. In Studio 2 you will mostly find synthesizers from the 70s and 80s. We believe in the power of video to illuminate the imagination, the power of music to transcend cultural barriers, and the power of human creativity to remind us how mysterious and beautiful life is.

Description:
Borandá, based in Sao Paulo, is a 360 degree record label and artist management company. Brazilian Popular, Jazz and Regional music.

With the strong belief that there are audiences and markets still not reached by the Brazilian Artistic Music, both in country and abroad, Borandá, a Brazilian expression that refers to action (vamos embora andar - Let´s get going) establishes a new concept of Brazilian Music production and promotion.

The company is a record label, which will work with its artists on the 360 degree concept; booking shows, publishing music, and promoting the direct connection between artists and fans. Counting on the Internet as a key element to promote its work, Borandá believes that, using the virtual world along with live concerts in Brazil and abroad, it will succeed in taking the magic and diversity of the best Brazilian Music to new audiences and places and accomplish its mission of enabling the Brazilian artistic music production, through innovation and strategy.

Name: Tremolo
Description:
Vision: be the global leader in live music for events.

Mission: to make it easy for anybody to book live music for any event. To support and promote live music.

Problem:
For customers: music plays a vital part in creating memorable moments in our lives. Discovering the best live music to create those memories should be easy and enjoyable. Many people have their live music quest cut short and settle for less, or none, due to the rabbit warren that is the current live music booking landscape. There isn’t one place where people can discover and book live music to create unforgettable memories.

For musicians:
Most musicians love to perform and entertain. They play a myriad of styles and instruments and want to share it with the world. Being able to put these talents out to the masses should be easy. There is no platform or place specifically designed with all the tools musicians need to be seen, heard and booked.

Solution: an online marketplace for live music:
- Open access to videos, prices and reviews of bands and DJs available on a customer's event date. 
- Real-time availability of bands and DJs
- Live performance video content for online appraisal
- Communicate directly with each band or DJ through online chat
- Pay a deposit online to confirm the band or DJ
- Subscription service for bands and DJs to generate leads and bookings through Tremolo. Includes:
     - List multiple bookable packages
     - Unique and world-first “2-Click Bookings" system
     - Part of the biggest marketing campaign for bands and DJs in the wedding industry
     - Live video production services to improve bookability
     - Social media growth services to improve social proof

Traction since completing the Second Law Accelerator in June 2017:
- Customer list of +500 emails
- Validation conversations and user testing with over 100 participants
- Over 30 bands and DJs currently listed to sign on
- Received initial seed investment

Description:
The independent label Chibar Records was founded on the 23rd of August in 2005 by Extraplay, at that time they had separated from Flashback Records. This happened to open the possibility to make their produced music more known, at which was the distribution of the music also the aim of Extraplay. He saw no future at Flashback Records, because the possibilities there were heavily restricted. For these and other reasons, the own label Chibar Records was founded.

In the first two years the focus was the music production and local advertising to sell the first albums in his hometown. In 2007, the website went online and the label got first sales opportunities via the Internet, since that time Chibar Records was a digital label with the address http://chibarrecords.de. Besides the digital distribution of music were also planned publications on vinyl and cd.

Mainly minimal, house and techno are published on the label, but several other genres of the electronic styles, too. The development of the music has improved in comparison to the first productions and will continue to improve, that is the aim of all artists at Chibar Records. On the website you can listen to previews of the actual releases.

Description:
Em março de 2014, as produtoras Amplifique, comandada por Marcelo Naral, e a Machine Produtora, dos sócios Diego Guimarães e Edu Santana, se unem para atender a demanda criativa sonora do mercado publicitário, criando assim a ampliMachine.

Empresa especializada na criação, produção e finalização de áudio para todas as mídias, a ampliMachine surge da convergência de interesses dos sócios-produtores em criar um novo conceito de Som 360º. 

"Buscamos, com esta nova proposta omnidirecional, atender todos os tipos e tamanhos de demanda que existem no mercado que, atualmente, está cada vez mais complexo, dinâmico e multimídia," explica Diego. "Os longos anos de atuação de todos os produtores somados resulta em um processo da produção extremamente eficiente, sem perder a criatividade. Afinal, somos todos essencialmente músicos," completa Marcelo.

Residida em uma ampla estrutura na Vila Madalena, a ampliMachine conta com estúdios profissionais preparados para qualquer tipo de gravação, além de um time de produtores extremamente qualificados.

Diego, Edu e Marcelo participaram, desde 1996, de grandes campanhas para marcas consagradas do mercado publicitário, dentre elas Grupo Pão de Açúcar, Itaú, Hyundai e Havaianas. Além disso, já tiveram a oportunidade de trabalhar com importantes nomes da música como Tom Zé, Luciana Mello, Palavra Cantada, entre outras celebridades.

Créée en 2004, Zikamine est une association de promotion et de diffusion des musiques actuelles en Grand-Est et au Luxembourg principalement. Structure pluridisciplinaire, son principal objectif est de développer une action culturelle musicale favorisant les échanges et les rencontres.
Champs d’Activités :
- Organisation du Festival Zikametz et programmation de concerts indépendants
- Organisation de tremplins musicaux (Tremplin Zikametz, Antenne locale du dispositif BuzzBooster), et affiliation à un réseau de détection de talents émergents)
- Accompagnement artistique de type managérial
- Animation d'une webradio (ZKM Radio - www.zkmradio.com)
- Ateliers pédagogiques (de webradio, MAO, écriture, graffitis/pochoirs, danse hip-hop...) et concerts Jeune Public.

Name: Howard Rosen Promotion
Description: Howard Rosen Promotion is a full-service radio promotion company established in 1985. They specialize in radio promotion, video promotion, distribution, and music production services. With over 30 years of combined experience in the music industry, they have built relationships with radio stations nationwide and offer promotional support to independent and signed artists. Howard Rosen Promotion focuses on helping artists achieve their goals through airplay, fan base growth, and other promotional strategies.

Name: Netstage
Description: En Netstage estamos revolucionando la forma de disfrutar de la música en directo permitiendo a los espectadores interactuar en tiempo real con los artistas por video streaming. Lanzadera y la SGAE están apostando por nosotros.

Name: Bluegrass Heritage Foundation
Description: The mission of the Bluegrass Heritage Foundation is to preserve and promote the heritage of bluegrass music in America, with a focus on promoting bluegrass music in Texas.  The Foundation seeks to educate the public about this distinctly American form of music with roots in Irish, Scottish, and English traditional music through educational programs and workshops, public performances of bluegrass music, historic preservation efforts, and other similar programs.  The Bluegrass Heritage Foundation is a non-profit corporation organized under Texas law and recognized under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code.

Name: Musikwirtschaft.de GmbH
Description: Bis heute stellen wir das Management der Fantastischen Vier und zählen darüber hinaus Musik-Consulting, Künstlervermarktung und Eventkonzeption zu unseren Kernthemen.

Name: School of Rock Macarthur
Description:
As educators, we’re trailblazers with our performance-based model of music instruction. You may already be familiar with the movie that bears our name. Yes, we were the little startup that inspired that movie, but the real-life School of Rock is so much more. Today we’re a 200-unit global brand.  We have schools in 10 countries and continue to develop and open new schools across the world.

The conventional method of music instruction is that you must master musical concepts before you move on to play songs that actually inspire you.  Our approach is different. You start by learning to play and perform the songs that inspire you, and through that process you will develop mastery of music theory with the added benefit of knowing how to play with others

Our unique approach to instruction and our love of rock music help young, aspiring musicians find themselves, hone their talents and build the confidence they need in their lives. School of Rock is a safe place for kids to learn, develop friendships with other kids who are into music and carve out a niche for themselves in a world where they might never have felt a sense of belonging before.

Name: Counterparts
Description: Wir sind Counterparts und bieten individuelle Strategien im Künstler:innenaufbau, Booking und Management.

Name: National A Cappella Convention
Description:
The biggest choral and a cappella festival is coming to Orlando, Florida 2021! This 3-day event will be filled with innovative musical performances, informative educational opportunities, and transformative student bonding. 
Taking place March 25th - 27th 2021 at the Wyndham Orlando Resort on International Drive. The National A Cappella Convention or NACC (n’ak), is hosted by A Cappella Education Association. Our team of choral directors and a cappella professionals have designed a revolutionary event for your program where every student will have a high-quality performance opportunity and learn from some of the top directors, performers and educators in vocal music today.

PERFORMANCE OPPORTUNITIES:
Adjudicated Choral Festival
Honor Choir
Aca-Pop Up Performance
High School or College Showcase

LEARNING:
Keynote Presentations
Interest Sessions
Choir Clinics
A Cappella Masterclasses

A TURNKEY EXPERIENCE:
Everything In One Place
A Walkable Campus
Shuttles To Parks
Luxurious Accommodations


Learn more about event dates and details, ticketing information, and participation process at http://acappellaconvention.com
Need help making travel arrangements? Our team of choral educators and a cappella directors understand how difficult group travel can be, so we’ve made it as turnkey as possible. Visit http://acappellaconvention.com/travel/ for travel information.

Name: YOUNG TALENT INITIATIVE (YTI)
Description:
Jewish music and mentorship organization, founded by Chananya Begun in 2017, designed to maximize potential in our community’s most creatively talented, emotionally intelligent young people. 

YTI is dedicated to creatively talented 16-21 year old’s developing and showcasing their creative musical abilities on a professional level while reaching new heights on a personal level. 

Giving members creative success, fulfillment and real-world perspective on their unique natures and abilities.

Members receive comprehensive music creation, arrangement, and vocal knowledge that normally would not be accessible to them. 

Releasing albums and singles to the public throughout the year featuring YTI’s in-house talent, allowing our members to inspire thousands of people with their depth and creativity. 

The first ever rabbinically backed, frum creative arts organization.

Name: Scuola di Musica Ciampi
Description:
The Ciampi Music School, located in the center of Rome (Metro Ottaviano) employs conservatory teachers able to introduce the students to the preparation required for the Conservatory. 

The School offers the possibility of organizing individual and collective courses for all ages: Piano, Electric and acoustic guitar, Singing, Violin, Saxophone, Drum.

In addition, it offers the possibility of organizing musical laboratories with multiple instruments, making available also prestigious rooms for important events. 

Music listening courses are very appreciated, accompanied by short concerts

Name: Faro Records
Description:
La publishing label “Faro Records” nasce nel 2007 per scovare nei posti più nascosti sound e nuovi orizzonti musicali.

L’intera Library segue il percorso di una continua ricerca, che si caratterizza per qualità ed originalità delle proposte, spaziando tra “Indie”, “Alternative”, “Electro”, “Folk” senza mai confondere l’idea di musica di cui siamo innamorati. La convinzione che ci muove è che il “made in Italy” possa intraprendere strade e percorsi internazionali senza mai rinnegare le proprie radici.

Grazie all’incontro con la record label “Snowy Peach”, “Faro Records” punta tutto sulla strada dell’editoria musicale e del management, acquisendone l’intero catalogo, diventandone divisione publishing e punto di riferimento per interessanti lavori di sincronizzazione.

Oggi il catalogo editoriale Faro Records comprende oltre 500 brani in licenza, più diverse library in concessione e amministrazione con le più intraprendenti società editoriali del panorama italiano indipendente.

Name: Good Folk Management
Description:
Good Folk is a full-service music management firm for producers, songwriters and engineers. We provide a holistic approach to management that is powered by best-in-class technology and tools. We focus our attention on the following three areas:

1. Long-term career strategy and relationship management 
We monitor industry movement, track milestones as related to each client’s goals, and adjust as needed to make ensure both the small and large decisions move the needle. We also help manage relationships with other partners, publishers, and all PRO orgs. 

2. Income management and procurement  
We are exceptionally thorough in finding income opportunities in overlooked places and ensuring sure vendors are paid as income is received. This includes managing income from copyrights primarily in regards to PRO earnings and sales/streaming earnings. 

3. Project accounting and detailed reporting
We showcase quarterly and yearly earnings for each client via clear, insightful reports that become income roadmaps for the following year.

Name: K-Jazz
Description: Award winning saxophonist, composer and producer Karel Ruzicka Jr. has a way to captivate the audience in practically any musical context. It was already evident back in 1992 when his group "The Four" was awarded the first prize at the International Jazz Festival in Karlovy Vary, Czech Republic in 1992. Their appearance at the prestigious Jazz a Vienne in France that summer was received with standing ovation. The group released their album "Space and Rhythm in 1994 to a great critical acclaim. Karel Ruzicka Jr. then briefly visited his future home of New York and met many great jazz artists including trumpeter Roy Hargrove. Consequently in 1996 he was called upon to fill in for saxophonist Ron Blake in the Roy Hargrove quintet on their European tour. Karel's tenor and soprano saxophone graces over 100 albums. His debut as a leader album"You Know What I Mean" (ARTA -1997) was nominated for the Czech Grammy in 1998 and the following year the album "Spring Rolls Quartet" was elected the Czech Jazz Recording of the Decade. After these early successes Ruzicka relocated to NYC, where he studied with saxophonists Bob Mintzer, Rick Margitza, George Garzone and Joe Lovano. His most recent album as a leader "Brooklyn Moods" was nominated for a "Golden Angel" award (The new name for the Czech Grammy). The album features pianist Bruce Barth, Czech-born bassist George Mraz and drummer Brandon Lewis. He is often touring with contemporary jazz singer Michael Franks as well as his working quartet. The list of artists Karel has played with is long: Ben E. King, George Benson, Hiram Bullock (SNL, Sting), Joe Locke, Bob Mintzer, Charles Blenzig (keyboardist and MD for Michael Franks and Gato Barbieri), Ravi Coltrane, Benny Rietveld (bassist for Miles Davis and Carlos Santana), Cindy Blackman , Fred Wesley (James Brown, George Clinton), Jeff "Tain" Watts, Steve Hass, Gavin Degraw, ELEW and many others.

Name: Brass Band de Champagne
Description:
le Brass Band de Champagne se produit pour tous publics et de façon très régulière dans de nombreuses villes, rayonnant ainsi dans sa région, la Champagne-Ardenne, mais également à travers la France et au delà de nos frontières.

Chaque saison, l'équipe artistique de l'orchestre vous propose une programmation variée permettant de s'adapter à des lieux très divers: auditorium, théâtre, église, salle des fêtes, salles de sports, kiosques, plein air...

A côté de sa programmation tout public, le Brass Band de Champagne peut également vous proposer des programmes spécifiques et accompagner tout projet pédagogique, notamment en partenariat avec l'éducation Nationale ou les écoles de musique.

Name: Embassy Festival
Description:
The Embassy Festival is an international event spotlighting the many different cultures that reside in The Hague. Festival goers can soak up a truly innovative and transnational one-day programme presenting music, activities, art, theatre, culinary delights, debates and readings on The Hague’s Lange Voorhout. Organized in close cooperation with the Municipality of The Hague’s Department of International Affairs and The Hague’s many embassies, the Embassy Festival promises to surprise and appeal to all senses.

The musical programme will offer a mix of different music styles such as jazz, pop, soul, folk and classical music. We create a divers programme with performances from all over the world, emphasizing on contemporary music.

In the Creative Arena almost anything goes, from authors reading from their unique travelling stories to traditional dancing and even to ancient literature brought to life. The Creative Arena offers a suitable stage for a wide variety of (semi-) professional group or solo- performances.

On the international market we create a world trip where the most unique aspects of various parts of the world will be represented through characteristic features, activities and products.

Embassies will be present on the Lange Voorhout to demonstrate unique aspects of their country, while various countries and regions will present themselves on the festival terrain through characteristic features and products unique to that country.

Name: The MNGR
Description:
The MNGR is a music-focused multimedia and events platform delivering Music, News, Gigs, and Reviews ranging from your favourite charting stars, emerging UK acts, to local University of West London (UWL) talent. The MNGR is a music networking hub where creatives, industry minds, and enthusiasts can work together.

Created in 2015, it began as an online music magazine/blog for UWL artists and bands to showcase their music and grow their fan base. Over the years, it has evolved into distributing print and digital issues of the magazine alongside the online blog. The MNGR now aims to support not only UWL talent, but also UK’s up and coming acts. We are host to many in-house and external events that have seen the likes of UWL’s Ishy Dee, Bedroom/Boredom, Revolvers, Nadia Sheikh as well as external bands Denio, The Dabhands, and Best of Enemies. In 2019, we started Grey Area which is an acoustic lounge session and Believe the Hype podcast.

Our services include writing articles and reviews for artists, putting on events for the enjoyment of our readers and audience, and aiding in the exposure of artists through promotional means.

The MNGR is managed by students in UWL's London College of Music and London School of Film and Media Design. Though the platform and the team began because of Music Management students, the team is steadily expanding into more courses such as Music Technology, Music Performance, Journalism, Photography, Graphic Design, and more.

The MNGR won the UWL SU 2018 'Best Single Achievement' award, from the nationally voted Best SU of England.

Their music has been heard on Fox's "Lie To Me", Telemundo, MTV, MTV Tr3s, NPR, KCRW and has been featured in campaigns for brands such as Henessey, Garnier-Fructis and Myspace Latino. * La Llama Blanca Music is unique in its ability to work directly with advertisers, music supervisors, and producers to provide them with exciting new music for their projects that is both easy to license and will fit their budget. * Through its partnerships with other innovative companies such as Afonico Music, one of the fastest growing independent record labels and consulting in Latin Music, La Llama Blanca is able to provide advertisers, music supervisors and producers with the best in independent music.

Name: Associazione Culturale Pasquale Anfossi
Description:
L’Associazione Pasquale Anfossi è nata nel 1995 per ricordare il musicista ligure Pasquale Anfossi (Taggia 1727 – Roma 1797).
Aperta ai gusti musicali e culturali e ai generi più diversi, dalla musica antica a quella contemporanea, popolare e sperimentale, incrociando altre arti e discipline, vuole favorire presso tutti l’apprezzamento e il godimento della musica.
È stata fondata da Sergio Bonfanti che ne fu direttore artistico e presidente per 14 anni.
Dopo la sua scomparsa, nel 2010 è diventata presidente e direttore artistico Carmen Vilalta. Dal 2014 la direzione artistica è condivisa con la vicepresidente Carla Magnan. Le rassegne hanno preso il titolo L’Antico e il Nuovo, a sottolineare l’intento di presentare manifestazioni musicali di diverse epoche stili e provenienze e collegamenti con altre arti e settori culturali.
Collabora regolarmente con il Comune di Genova per le sedi dei Musei di Strada Nuova (patrimonio UNESCO), Biblioteca Berio, Biblioteca Universitaria e altre sedi museali e luoghi della cultura genovese, conducendo il pubblico ad ampliarne la conoscenza e a godere di queste risorse, valorizzando il patrimonio culturale della città e costituendo un’offerta interessante anche per i turisti.
All’attività concertistica si sono aggiunti cicli di conferenze, presentazioni di libri e proiezioni di video. Accanto ai nomi di artisti affermati e di fama internazionale, nonché la presentazione di prime esecuzioni, viene promossa la partecipazione di giovani di talento e vincitori di concorsi nazionali e internazionali.
Nel corso di questi ultimi anni abbiamo sviluppato e contribuito a creare reti di collaborazione e partenariato importanti, continuative nel tempo. Un cartellone unico e  condiviso che spazia tra la musica classica,  contemporanea, world music, jazz, musica antica e  sperimentazione elettronica, non tralasciando didattica e musicoterapia.

Name: Zoetic Music Management LLC
Description: We help artists develop their careers and learn about the music business. We help clients manage their catalogues, produce their projects, create content, offer specifically catered advice, & much, much more!

Name: Hold My Coat Management
Description:
Hold My Coat LLC was founded in 2010 by Max Gredinger and now has expanded into a 4 member team with a Creative Director, Tour Manager, Marketing Director, as well as a blogging staff.  Hold My Coat LLC works primarily with the band Aer.

http://holdmycoat.com/clients

Aer has gone on multiple College tours all over the country and sold out headline shows in Boston, New York City, Washington DC, Dallas, and Austin.  Their October 2011 EP, “What You Need,” rose to the #1 album on the iTunes hip-hop charts, and also made it in the top ten on the iTunes overall album charts.  Aer has shared the stage with the likes of Mac Miller, Shwayze and Cisco Adler, Hoodie Allen, OCD: Moosh & Twist, Ballyhoo!, Cris Cab, as well as ASAP Rocky, Action Bronson and Iggy Azalea when they played all 3 days of Bamboozle in Asbury Park NJ.  The summer of 2012 was spent on the road with OCD: Moosh & Twist visiting 37 cities across the United States.  Aer’s debut album “The Bright Side” came out July 30th following the release of their single “Floats My Boat” which was featured on the likes of 2dopeboyz, Complex, Hip Hop DX, The Source, DJ Booth, Good Music All Day, and This Song Is Sick.  The Bright Side quickly rose to #1 on iTunes Album Charts as well as earned a spot in Billboards Hot 100.  This Fall Aer will be on their first headline national tour, “The Bright Side Tour” which has Yonas as an opening act and will cover 48 cities.

Name: Conservatorio de Música Contemporánea
Description: Somos un colectivo de profesionales y expertos del mundo musical, con más de 25 años de experiencia en el medio artístico a nivel nacional e internacional, trabajando a través de la enseñanza para que la música y el arte esté al alcance de todos.

Name: The Music Money Makeover Company
Description: Music Money Makeover is an information source featuring content for the inquiring, recording artist, music publisher, attorney, agent, music producer, and any person seeking more detailed information about the music business.

Name: Ardent Music LLC
Description: Since its earliest days, Ardent has fostered producers. Jim Dickinson, Terry Manning, Jim Gaines, Joe Hardy, John Hampton, Paul Ebersold, Jeff Powell, Skidd Mills, Jason Latshaw, Matt Martone, and Pete Matthews are among the many producers who have had long relationships with Ardent. In a business known for big egos, flaring tempers, and hardened grudges, these enduring associations speak volumes about the Ardent environment. Times have changed, but Ardent has remained true to its character, embracing the technological advents, collecting world-class vintage gear, and offering hospitality that is among the South’s finest. As Memphis’ connection to Hollywood grows stronger, the filmmakers behind Hustle and Flow, Black Snake Moan and 40 Shades of Blue have turned to Ardent for recording their soundtracks. Hip hop artists and twenty-first century stars continue to walk through the doors: Three 6 Mafia, Juvenile, Al Kapone, Cat Power, the North Mississippi Allstars, Three Doors Down, the White Stripes, Bob Dylan, John Hiatt, the Raconteurs, and a reunited Big Star. Ardent’s passion for the music has translated into more than 70 gold and platinum albums and singles. You can walk the halls and feel that same passion.

Name: Östermalms Musik & Kulturskola
Description:
Östermalms Musik & Kulturskola grundades 1993 av Sonoko Kase. Vi startade med undervisning i Stockholm och Danderyds kommun. Sedan auktorisationen som aktör i Nacka kommun 2007 har verksamheten utvidgats till stora delar av Nacka. Merparten av undervisningen sker i olika skolor i Nacka. Vi bedriver även undervisning i Danderyds och i Stockholms kommun. Vi har idag ca 800 elever och 32 lärare. Verksamheten leds av rektor Sonoko Kase.

Vi är artister
Alla som arbetar i verksamheten är aktivt utövande professionella artister. Vi fungerar som förebilder på många olika sätt. Bland annat visar vi barn och unga att musik på olika sätt också kan vara ett arbete. Vi som är lärare i verksamheten har bred erfarenhet som artister och är eller har varit verksamma i Sverige, i våra hemländer samt har pågående turnéer och konsertprogram runt om i världen. Vår lärarkår har genom sitt aktiva artisteri ett stort kontaktnät av andra artister och musiker som på olika sätt involveras i verksamheten.

Alla medarbetare har högskoleutbildning
Alla lärare har högskoleutbildning eller motsvarande jämförbar utbildning. För vår verksamhet är det ett krav att alla lärare har hög professionell kompetens. Vi är flera som har specialist- och expertkompetens. Många av oss har studerat annorlunda musikgenrer, pedagogik och metoder. Rektor Sonoko Kase har skrivit böcker om musikterapi och pianopedagogik. Skolans pianolärare arbetar efter denna speciella pedagogik. Detta ger oss specialistkompetens i att lära nybörjare att spela piano med en toppmodern pedagogik.

Mångfald
Lärarkåren kommer från fyra världsdelar och åtta länder. Vi är nitton kvinnor och tretton män. Vi är i åldrarna 23 till 59 år.

Name: Kremwerk
Description:
The Kremwerk + Timbre Room Complex is queer-centric 21+ nightclub and live music venue, specializing in progressive electronic music and queer culture. The Complex is located in the Denny Neighborhood in downtown Seattle, WA.

Kremwerk opened its doors in 2014 and has been the hub for some of the most eclectic and alternative drag programming along with progressive electronic music from around the globe. 

In 2016, Kremwerk expanded with the addition Timbre Room, which is located upstairs from Kremwerk. Both spaces now offer a stage, DJ booth, and a bar each which are transformed depending on the party or event.

Also at this time, Little Marias pizza opened next door. A convenience for nightlifegoers, this casual pizzeria is punk-inspired and a hangout for regulars of the club as well as for strangers walking by, looking to grab a late-night slice.

Our catalog features a wide range of genres, including Cinematic, Trailer, Epic, Dramatic, Orchestral, Horror, Industrial, Synthwave, Shoegaze, Pop, and Dark Synth.

Whether it's finding the perfect track or creating original compositions, Fluctus Studio is dedicated to delivering top-notch music solutions that elevate the impact of any production. 

Feel free to reach out to us for any inquiries.
