Name: Atlantis Basel
Description:
Moderne Gastronomie im Traditionslokal. Das Atlantis Basel am Klosterberg zeigt sich seinen Gästen als innovatives Kulturrestaurant mit grosser Vergangenheit. Zeitgemässe, saisonale und vor allem regional geprägte Gastronomie in der Abendkarte – das erwartet Sie im „neuen alten Atlantis“.
Bis bald im -tis!

Name: Your Music Hub
Description:
Through online and in-school one-on-one music lessons, group sessions and holiday courses, we work with people of all ages to unlock musical potential, build confidence and inspire creativity.

We believe that to get the best music education possible, you need to go to the best modern musicians — the creators writing the biggest hits, the musicians touring with the biggest bands, and the best mentors the music industry has to offer.  Our tutors draw from a wealth of music industry and mentoring experience to design lessons that suit our pupils’ individual goals.

Name: Song Factory Budapest
Description:
Song Factory Budapest is a community of young people, a multicultural choir performing popular music covers of Hungarian and International pieces. They are devoted to sharing the inherent joy and beauty of choral music. They create a bridge between the audience and choral singing by performing a distinctive and varied repertoire: acapella songs, songs with musical instruments, songs with multiple parts and polyphony, etc. The singers represent a community of people from diverse backgrounds, connected through several years of performing and singing together.

Song Factory Budapest performs in events, festivals, Christmas and other fairs, balls, dances, company events or other cultural events to enlighten the mood with pop-, rock-, jazz- songs, gospels, spirituals, or well-known motion picture soundtracks as well. In their colourful repertoire everyone can find pieces to enjoy. Concerts and performances can also be tailor-made upon request!

Name: Bush Studios
Description:
Rehearsal & Recording facilities in West London.
Studios 350 to 850sq/ft with mirrors, full monitoring, A/C and free parking.
We also have backline hire, a pro audio shop and transport, both panel and splitter buses.

We have engineers on site and are able to provide TM's, Crew and drivers.
Call 020 8740 1740

Our client list is extensive from Van Morrison to The Specials, KT Tunstall to Placebo

Name: The Music Architect GmbH
Description: The Music Architect is an agency specialised in musical marketing services for luxury brands and spaces.

Name: GTM (Gospel Through Music) Ministries, Inc.
Description:
GTM Ministries, Inc. is an international ministry that mobilizes short-term music mission teams to share the Gospel of Jesus Christ around the world. 

Throughout the world, musicians have a unique access to areas and arenas on the mission field that may only be available to them: arenas where music can be the most effective way to reach the hearts and souls of those who are lost without Christ. 

GTM partners with a variety of ministries around the world, identifying needs and opportunities where music missions teams might be used in a unique way to spread the Gospel. When a ministry requests a team, then through our network of musicians, ministries and artists of all genres, we find a team that fits their needs.

GTM Ministries, Inc. coordinates all aspects of the preparation, travel and ground itinerary with the hosting ministry and music mission team. Our music mission teams are used on the mission field in many ways and may include playing for special events or projects that a ministry is hosting, working with or helping music departments in churches; workshops for music leaders, worship teams, musicians, and choirs; music camps for children and youth; concerts in schools, prisons, hospitals, festivals; performing at secular events; partnering with university music schools for guest artist events; cultural exchange events, etc.

GTM Ministries, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit corporation. All donations are tax-deductible as allowed by IRS regulations.

Name: Pallqa Music
Description:
Sello independiente, basado en Lima Perú. Su enfoque está en World Music y tiene como misión difundir la música peruana al mundo y a la vez conectar músicos de todo el mundo con el público del Perú y Latinoamérica.

Nuestra pasión por la música nos impulsa a producir proyectos discográficos de calidad, nos involucramos en consolidar la reputación de nuestros artistas para llevar nuestra música a otro nivel.

Name: Music In the Morning
Description: Music in the Morning is a distinctive morning concert series that inspires its audiences with masterpieces of the past, while challenging them with music of our time performed by the finest local, national and international talent – all at affordable ticket prices. Music in the Morning is known for uncompromised quality, intimate setting and friendly rapport between artist and audience. With sell-out crowds, Music in the Morning fills a unique niche in the city of Vancouver appealing to people who prefer their cultural events with coffee in the morning. So successful in its programming, Music in the Morning has expanded its mandate to include a Tuning In education series, Rush Hour for the downtown live/work crowd, family programing, outreach programs in the community and school system and special events in larger venues.

Name: Schultispianos
Description:
Somos una empresa que brinda todo tipo de servicios para pianos acústicos, en manos del Técnico Afinador Juan Alberto Schultis, quien cuenta con más de 30 años de estudio y perfeccionamiento en técnicas de afinación y restauración de pianos.

Es el Primer Técnico Afinador Argentino en obtener la Certificación como Registered Piano Technician – RPT (julio 2014), otorgada por la Asociación Internacional Piano Technician Guild (PTG, www.ptg.org). Desde diciembre de 2015, es miembro de la Master Piano Technicians of America (www.masterpianotechnicians.com). Y en Febrero del 2007, está especializado como Factory Trained Technician en la Fábrica Steinway & Sons (Nueva York).

Vendemos y alquilamos pianos verticales y de cola, restaurados a nuevo.

Ofrecemos el Primer Curso Presencial de Afinación de Pianos en Argentina.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: F.A.M.E. Artist Recordings GmbH
Description:
F.A.M.E. Recordings wurde im Jahr 2001 gemeinsam von Curt Cress und Tom Büscher gegründet. Wir legen großen Wert auf die absolute Eigenständigkeit der Künstler, die in der Lage sind, ihr außergewöhnliches Können glaubwürdig live auf der Bühne zu präsentieren. F.A.M.E. Recordings zeichnet  sich durch ein vielschichtiges Repertoire aus. Von Mundart, Singer/Songwriter über Folk, Rock und Pop bis hin zu Alternative.

Unsere Produkte werden in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz durch Sony Music Entertainment vertrieben. Im weltweiten Digitalvertrieb ist The Orchard unser Partner.

Name: AMBR
Description: AMBR is a music company based out of Brooklyn, NY

Name: Sai Shruthi Studios
Description:
“Sai Shruthi” is an amalgamation of dreams, hard work and passion! We offer services in various stages of music production, providing the best sound experience, the exact way it is meant to be. We aim to strike a chord in everyone by making THE BEST music with talented artists from all across the globe. No matter what your style or genre, we intend to help you create and capture your vision and stories in the best musical way possible.  We’ve collaborated with incredibly talented artists, and are always in search of more up-and-coming musicians.

We have a well equipped recording space that is a treat to the eyes and is equipped with 'state of the art' acoustics and equipments. We want to give artists with recording aspirations a space to let their creativity and talent shine.

Name: Orquesta Sinfónica Villa de Colmenar Viejo
Description:
La Orquesta Sinfónica Villa de Colmenar Viejo nace de la iniciativa de músicos profesionales, colmenareños que quieren que su pueblo y sus vecinos disfruten de un repertorio sinfónico de primer nivel.

La OSVCV está formada por instrumentistas con estudios de música superiores, que han finalizado o están finalizando su formación académica. Muchos de ellos colmenareños que han continuado haciendo carrera fuera del municipio y que desean regresar a casa para compartir lo aprendido.

Name: White Sea Studio
Description:
White Sea Studio is a revolutionizing online studio. Joining a session at our studio is, due to the modern techniques, possible from anywhere in the world. You can hear the edits on your track happen in real time, this doesn’t only save money and time, but also gives a better result at the end! 

White Sea Studio offers mixing, mastering and music production.

Name: Tampa Metropolitan Youth Orchestra
Description: Provides superior music training while guiding students toward a lifelong appreciation of classical music. The Tampa Metropolitan Youth Orchestra endeavors to be recognized as a premier youth orchestra, to engage students with unique musical experiences, and to develop the patrons and performers of tomorrow.

Name: Robot City Studios HD
Description:
Robot City Studios HD is a Professional Recording and Mixing facility with a staff of experienced Engineers and Assistants. Our Engineers have combined experience of over 25 years in the Recording Industry and have been awarded multiple platinum certifications. We take pride in providing our clients with the highest quality services available. Robot City Studios HD currently has 3 Studio Rooms with Pro Tools systems available for booking.

Robot City is owned by Multi-platinum Recording Engineer and Producer Cortez Farris. Robot City Productions is a team of award-winning Producers, Songwriters and Composers who have worked on music from Certified Platinum Albums to Television Commercials and Movie Soundtracks. The Production Team for Robot City includes Cortez Farris, Alex Cavender, Randy Kaeser, Lauren Willard-Jelks  & Tiger Da Writer

Name: Choirs Aotearoa New Zealand Trust
Description:
Choirs Aotearoa New Zealand's purpose is to create, nurture and promote vocal excellence in choral singing.

Our objective is to sustain and promote three complementary but distinct choirs. An internationally renowned professional choir - Voices New Zealand Chamber Choir and two youth choirs which inspires and develops New Zealand's extraordinary young talent, the nationally selected New Zealand Youth Choir and the New Zealand Secondary Student's Choir.

The New Zealand Youth Choir has achieved considerable success since its formation in 1979. Touring nationally in New Zealand and every years to destinations overseas, the choir has won many awards including the ‘Choir of the World’ title at the International Music Eisteddfod in Llangollen, Wales and the ‘Grand Prix Slovakia’. The Choir is presently led by Artistic Director Dr Karen Grylls and Music Director David Squire.

Voices New Zealand Chamber Choir was formed in 1998 with Dr Karen Grylls as its Music Director.  As a nationally selected choir of the highest calibre, Voices NZ is a chamber choir that is flexible in size, and capable of performing a wide repertoire. Many of the singers are alumni of the New Zealand Youth Choir. Highlights for Voices New Zealand include: winning gold and silver awards at the Tolosa International Choral Competition in Spain (1998), collaboration with Aradia Ensemble from Canada resulting in the completion of a world premiere recording of the Vanhal Masses, "Spirit of the Land" wins Best Classical Album at the 2006 NZ Music Awards, representing New Zealand at 9th International Chamber Choir Competition in Marktoberdorf, Germany, and performing Mahler's Symphony No 8, conducted by Vladimir Ashkenazy, with the New Zealand Symphony Orchestra (2010). Voice NZ’s CD ‘Voice of the Soul’ on the Atoll label was released in 2014.

Choirs Aotearoa also manages the biennial National Choral Academy and the newly established annual choral composition competition COMPOASE AOTEAROA!

Name: Dark Modular
Description:
We are a worldwide Record Label focusing on fine electronic music and artist management since 2014.

General Enquiries - Bookings
info.darkmodular@gmail.com

Music / Media / Press
darkmodularmusic@gmail.com

Demo Submission Form
https://bit.ly/3sgJ9MC

Name: KHDK
Description: KHDK is a boutique guitar effects maker founded by Kirk Hammett and David Karon, KHDK was created with a simple mission: to make the best guitar effects in the world.

Name: Avant-Post, terrain d'explorations musicales
Description:
Avant-Post propose une vision inédite des musiques actuelles en orchestrant des rencontres créatives d’un genre nouveau. Programmés dans des lieux partenaires, ses concerts se veulent à la fois riches en exploration artistique et en convivialité festive. Fort de son expérience transverse de la création musicale, Benjamin Collier impulse et pilote ces rendez-vous qui établissent des passerelles entre artistes confirmés, musiciens locaux, élèves des Conservatoires et étudiants de l’enseignement supérieur. Objectif: chahuter la création musicale trop souvent perçue comme hermétique.
Avant-Post est une structure créée en 2020 par Benjamin Collier pour soutenir des projets de création et de recherches artistiques dans le domaine des musiques actuelles. Son but est de formaliser un cadre destiné aux musiciens et au public pour l’expérimentation et la performance dans les esthétiques des musiques amplifiées.

Name: Bangin-Beats.com
Description:
Bangin-Beats creates digital soundware for music producers and recording studios worldwide. Chances are one of your favorite beats in the last 10 years, included elements born in our studios. While most producers in modern urban music tend to keep their sound sources a closely guarded secret, we're proud to have so many tastemakers speak out about our products. Our work has appeared on countless hit records from Dr. Dre, Eminem, 50 Cent, Rihanna, Drake, and many, many more. We continue to shape the face of modern Hip Hop with the most experienced ears in the game. 

 History

Bangin-Beats was established in 1996. Originally offering soundware for Akai, Ensoniq and Roland instruments, in a short time, quickly became known by some of the top studios & producers around New York. 

In 1999 we launched as Bangin-Beats.com, offering an expanded library and expanded formats, but keeping over 95% of our catalog laced with the one shot drums we're famous for. 

Pioneers of 3rd party commercial sound design, we created the business model that most online sound companies follow. True to our roots, urban music has been our sole focus from day one. From basement beat makers to our many Gold & Platinum plaque clients, we bless more true Hip Hop producers than any other sound company hands down, (Probably more than all combined).  Our drums rock in everything from basement labs to Apple ipod commercials and hit record after hit record.

Name: Vancouver Conservatory of Music
Description: VCM is an innovative music and technology-oriented school in Vancouver, offering high-quality music instruction in multiple disciplines for students of diverse backgrounds and ages and enriching the community through the promotion and dedication to the study of music.

Name: Jersey Music Association
Description: Supporting the development of music, opportunities and musicians in Jersey.

Name: Deadhead Productions
Description: We are a festival and band promotion company. DHP specializes in putting together jam music events, featuring the best regional and national  jam bands. . DHP also books Grateful Dead related acts at George’s Majestic Lounge in Fayetteville, Arkansas. We recently purchased a 160 acre farm in Eureka Springs, Arkansas. The venue is called “The Farm” and will began hosting events in 2015.

Name: Symphony New Hampshire
Description:
Symphony NH seeks to enrich the quality of life in southern New Hampshire through high-quality performances of orchestral and choral music, and by enhancing the music-education opportunities for citizens of all ages.

At SNH, we feel a profound connection to our mission, and recognize that these are changing times for the arts. As we look to our future, we find that there are several core values we all share:

- We take pride in the rich history and potential of greater Nashua.
- We're passionate in our belief that music can serve as a means for improving lives - building knowledge, fostering friendships, and bringing fulfillment.
- We believe all musicians should be treated with respect and dignity.
- We seek to validate individual experience, while valuing the communal joys uniquely attainable through live music.
- Our core purpose is to present great live music to the public in formats that reinforce these values.

SNH strives to generate civic pride, serving as a cultural focal point for the citizens of greater Nashua, through which they can deepen their relationships to music, to the city, and to each other.

By working together with the community, we can ensure that future generations will enjoy the kaleidoscopic pleasures and rich satisfactions of live music.

Name: Buddys
Description:
Artist management and services company with offices in New York City and Stockholm that was founded in 2016 as a partnership between Jon Allen and Anders Johansson. 

Leveraging our relationships in the U.S., Europe and around the world, we work around the clock to bring our clients’ visions to life. Our prolific roster of management, publishing and remix clients has amassed in excess of 9 billion streams to date.

Name: Fox River Brewing Co
Description: Fox River Brewing Company craft beer brewery and brewpub in Oshkosh and Appleton, Wisconsin.

Name: Ciampi Pianoforti
Description:
Fondata nel 1945 da Mario Ciampi, siamo giunti alla terza generazione rimanendo uno dei principali punti di riferimento per il pianoforte in Italia.
Collaboriamo con le principali case produttrici europee e giapponese,  e siamo i rappresentante esclusivi per il centro e sud Italia dei pianoforti Fazioli.
Fornitori per i  principali palcoscenici di Roma, collaboriamo con alcuni tra i migliori tecnici ed accordatori di pianoforte.
Siamo presenti su Roma con due punti vendita ed un laboratorio di restauro.

Name: Charleston Pour House
Description: Crowds gather for live shows by touring bands at this popular, no-frills concert hall & tavern.

Name: Performers Collective School Of Music
Description:
Est in 2003 (as Gurgaon School of Music), Performers Collective School of Music is currently the largest school of its kind in the National Capital Region.

With branches at South Delhi and Gurgaon, The school brings together a dynamic group of highly qualified music educators with a shared philosophy of maintaining the highest academic standards and professional practice.

A holistic approach to instrumental/vocal learning is encouraged by supplementing practical lessons with dedicated lessons in music theory, ear training and providing ample performance opportunities.

Performers Collective also serves as an examination centre for Trinity College London, Associated Board of the Royal Schools of Music, and Rockschool.

We motivate and nurture a joyful and creative approach to art and its learning.

Name: Phandelic
Description:
Phandelic is a Hardstyle DJ and producer born and raised in Austria. When he first started DJing at the age of 15, he already knew that it was going to be more than just a hobby. When he realized that DJing and producing music is his passion, he took this hobby to a professional level. He went to study audio engineering at the SAE Institute in Vienna. After receiving his degree, he founded his own Mixing and Mastering Studio, where he works with various different artists of all genres to stay inspired and fulfill his dream of making money by doing what he loves.

Since the start of his career, he played at big Austrian Festivals, such as the Electric Love Festival in 2016 and 2018, FM4 Frequency Festival, and the Shutdown Festival. Phandelic also performed at Invasion of Hardstyle. He supported numerous international artists, including Sub Zero Project, Sub Sonik, Da Tweekaz, TNT, and Zatox at clubs such as Fullhouse Mönchdorf, Empire Wr. Neustadt, Empire Salzburg, Cheeese Hirschbach, and B10 Hagenberg.
As a hardstyle producer, he released music on labels such as Dutch Master Works, Sikkdome Records, and Triplex Records. He also produced many bootlegs and a few official remixes. 

Combining his experience with the passion he has since day one, he is definitely one of the most promising Hardstyle Acts in the Austrian Hardstyle scene.

Name: Choir and Orchestra Collegium Musicum Costa del Sol
Description:
DO YOU SING OR PLAY AN INSTRUMENT? DO YOU ENJOY MOZART, VIVALDI ..?
Would you like to be part of an international, friendly music society that gives yearly concerts on the Costa del Sol? We are always on the lookout for new active and associated members. 

If you live on the Costa del Sol on a temporary or permanent basis the possibility exists for you to keep music as your hobby and pleasure, or even pick up again long-neglected skills in music-making.  We have several retired professional orchestral musicians in our ranks who pass on their invaluable experience.  Whatever your experience of singing in choirs or your level of reading music you will enjoy a warm and friendly atmosphere and getting to know wonderful works of music.

At Collegium Musicum we are passionate about making music and are always happy to welcome new members.

Name: Creative Media Entertainment, Inc
Description:
Creative Media Entertainment offers an array of services to their music artists. As a "on-stop shop" we specialize our attention on a tierd structure allowing our "Artists" to grow and build, while establishing a platform to perform music professionaly.
 
The services we offer include:
 
1. Artist Branding & Promotion

 2. Artist Management
 3. Artist Distribution
 4. Artist Production
 5. Artist Booking
 
Our five all encompassed services are broken down to programs and packages each artist is able to purchase. The goal is to watch an artist grow & develop their skills through our program, as we promote & manage their professional careers. 

In the end, all an "Artist" wants to do is perfect the quality of their music, their performances and make those special guest appearances. While you focus on the limelight, Creative Media Entertainment will do the rest!

Name: Brittany Anjou Music
Description: Musician, Teaching Artist, Lecturer, Improviser, Composer, Researcher

Name: Fear Factory
Description: Fear Factory is an American heavy metal band formed in Los Angeles, California in 1989. Throughout the band's career, they have released nine full-length albums.

Name: London Turkish Radio
Description:
LTR is the only legitimate, licensed Turkish Radio broadcasting outside of Turkey and the Turkish Republic of North Cyprus. 

London Turkish Radio (LTR) was launched in 1990 and was called the Turkish Radio, broadcasting to the Turkish and Turkish speaking Communities for the first time under the name of Turkish Radio, for only one hour per day between the hours of 12 midnight to 1am.

The name of the radio station changed in 1994 to London Turkish Radio (LTR), and has since grown in popularity, and is the internet radio in Turkish for a full 24hr period outside Turkey and Northern Cyprus.

London Turkish Radio has through its online live Internet service, attracted popularity throughout the world, from the USA to Europe, and Asia, and as far as Australia and Japan.

Name: Lady L Trio
Description: Lady L Trio est une formation de Jazz toulousaine spécialisée dans l'évènementiel.

Name: Bow & Arrow Music
Description: Premium custom and bespoke music composition for Film, TV, Games, Ads & Trailers

Description: Top Secret Songwriter supports the success of new songwriters by providing guidance, creating events, workshops and educational products to accelerate their growth in the new music industry.

Name: Songdrop
Description: Songdrop is a way to store, play and share the music you stream online.  With Songdrop you can make playlists with songs from YouTube, Soundcloud, Vevo and blogs, so you can keep track of the songs and music videos you discover, as you discover them.

Name: Riverside Recording Studio
Description:
Riverside Recording Studio is a professional recording facility located in Shoreham-By-Sea, Brighton. UK.

Recording solo artists to full bands - live or multi-tracked, demos to fully produced albums.

For more information 

http://www.riversiderecording.co.uk

Name: NGU Entertainment 1-Stop Music Library for Television and Film
Description: We enjoy the art of crafting the right music or song for film, television and other media content creators.

Name: The STRATosphere
Description:
The STRATosphere, your finest resource for guitar parts since 2004!

We are honored to be your 1 stop electric guitar parts source. We are best known for offering the largest selection of brand name necks & bodies on the planet. Our customers range from working musicians to repair shops to some of the world's most famous guitar players.

Name: Free Composer and Musician
Description:
I am a composer and arranger, I compose "classical" music and also "popular". I make all arrangements you need.

I play the piano in groups of Argentine folklore and tango.

I specialize in solo piano improvisations, I can improvise freely for hours...

You can see: www.jhcibils.com

Name: Kromatik Musik
Description:
Music Consulting & Services in Spain for national and international artists and companies. 

Our company, Kromatik Musik, located at the sunny and laid-back city of Malaga started in 2010 with the aim of giving a one-stop-solution for the various demands from artists and independent music companies. An agency that could help artists and indie companies more efficiently from the grassroots level, in order to develop their careers and support their music within and across our borders.

Thus, we offer to our clients a team with international expertise in different areas of the music industry such as record labels, promotion, live production or branding. Through our history we have gained hundreds of contacts with distributors, venues, promoters and media in Spain and also in most European Union countries, USA and Mexico (where we have a subsidiary). To name some of our recent clients: Indie Recordings, Cargo Records, Roadburn Festival, Inmensa Festival, Soziedad Alkoholika, Saratoga, O’Funkillo, Vita Imana, Scott Kelly (Neurosis), Big Sexy Noise, Eric Sardinas & Big Motor, Corrosion of Conformity, Wok Music, Riff Raff Entertainment, among others.

Our branches reach far and wide, joining forces with new allies, and we’re proud of a growing portfolio of projects from some of the most talented artists and music companies nowadays!!

Services:
Vinyl/CD/DVD Pressing
Physical + Digital Distribution
Retail + Online Marketing
 PR & Social Media
Event Production
Booking Agency
Artist Management
Rights and Licensing Management

Name: EDM Ghost Production
Description:
EDM Ghost Production is the leading platform in the electronic dance music industry, dedicated to empowering music creators around the globe. Founded by renowned producer Alex Larichev, our platform connects talented bedroom producers from developing countries with top-tier DJs and music brands seeking fresh and original content. Our mission is to democratize music production by making high-quality production accessible to artists, regardless of their location or economic background.

At EDM Ghost Production, we offer a full spectrum of services from ghost producing to mixing and mastering, tailored to enhance the creative capacity of our clients. Our marketplace not only facilitates the creation of music but also nurtures a community of music professionals who can collaborate, innovate, and push the boundaries of the dance music genre.

Featured in major industry publications like DJ Mag, Mixmag, and Vice, and a regular participant at conferences such as the Amsterdam Dance Event, Dancefair, and the International Music Summit in Ibiza, EDM Ghost Production is at the forefront of the music industry's evolution. We are committed to providing our clients with the tools and opportunities they need to succeed in the highly competitive music market

Name: Popped Music
Description:
Popped Music is about fresh new music, be it from new artists that we're excited about or established ones. The focus is on letting the visitor hear/see for themselves why it is we like what we do. Popped loves to throw in free downloads for visitors too - an incentive to come back and also to hopefully get them more interested in the bands. 

The website is run by Elena Katrina, who has worked with music since 1996. Elena’s previous projects have included:
Tickle Fanzine, 1996 – 2001
Freelance DJ, 2005 – 2009 
Resident DJ Liverpool Barfly, 2006 – 2008
Band Manager, 2007, 2008 – 2009
Radio Producer/Presenter, Icon Radio, 2007 – 2009 (Winner of Icon’s 2009 “Future Radio Superstar” award 2009)

Name: AIMCO
Description:
Somos la asociación sin ánimo de lucro que reúne a las principales empresas y profesionales de nueve áreas que componen la cadena de valor de la industria de la música de Colombia, representando y promoviendo sus intereses colectivos. 

En AIMCO tienen voz los artistas, la academia, los productores, editores, promotores, representantes, difusores, distribuidores, venues y otros agentes del sector, para encontrar puntos comunes que aporten al fortalecimiento, en su conjunto, de la Industria musical de Colombia. 

Entre nuestros objetivos principales están el proponer, diseñar, elaborar y promover políticas públicas que impulsen el mejoramiento de las condiciones jurídicas y económicas de la Industria Musical en Colombia, así como su crecimiento en el país a través de la promoción a nivel nacional e internacional; del uso de la ciencia y la tecnología; del fomento de la ética y transparencia en los negocios; de la cultura de cumplimiento de la ley dentro de la Industria Musical; y de la cooperación internacional con otras agremiaciones, redes, programas y asociaciones de la Industria Musical y relacionadas.

Name: Light Rail Studios
Description:
At the intersection of art, music, and hi-tech, Light Rail Studios provides a creative space where the underground and commercial world collide.

Primarily a place for music, Light Rail offers a 5000 square foot recording facility and 55 isolated rehearsal suites. The rehearsal suites are spacious and designed for any type of music. The recording studio has a historic collection of vintage mixing boards and analog tape machines as well as the new Protools HDX digital system. 

In addition to music recording, Light Rail's classic large live room is used for film, photo shoots and various productions. Contact Light Rail Studios for pricing and more information at info@LightRailStudios.com.

Name: Simply Singing CIC
Description: People often tell themselves that they can’t sing. But Simply Singing firmly believes that everyone can sing. We design and run fully inclusive team building events that get everyone working together.

Name: Archangel Media
Description:
Archangel Media is an international producer network in collaboration with Kobalt Music. Our award-winning producers rank amongst the best known professionals working in recorded music today.  At Archangel Media they come together to form an exclusive collective of music makers, whose commitment to excellence is second only to their belief that passion and great music are inseparable. 

Archangel Media is administered by Kobalt Music.

Name: RadioMac
Description:
As a commercial radio service provider, RadioMac delivers more than just quality music. 

We’re all about creating brand-fit instore experiences, aimed at growing your sales and realising your omnichannel strategy.

Engage your customers instore, promote your marketing campaigns and improve staff retention with the RadioMac uPlay - our innovative, yet simple music and audio solution.

If your looking to shake up your music solution drop us a mail at studio@radiomac.co.za or give us a call on +27 21 5555 131.

Name: Rio and the Rockabilly Revival
Description:
Multi-award winning band fronted by Rio Scafone, niece of Rockabilly pioneer Jack Scott. Pushing the genre in new directions without losing its founding idioms, while bringing a world class stage show that is every bit as home in a dive bar or sharing stage with the biggest names in music today.

Music available now via all digital distributors, and coming soon to a stage near you (once we get past the pandemic, of course)!

Name: PIATRO MUSIC
Description: Provide you with the best piano and electro-dance music and take you on a journey through a fantastic and futuristic story of space exploration!

Name: Revolution Entertainment
Description: Developing and guiding the careers of songwriters, producers and musicians. Online/Street Marketing and Promotion of talent. Connecting clients with PR, Booking, Producers, Labels, Licensing and Fans. Developing and implementing goals and strategies for artists' success. Focus on artist development as well as music production, packaging, and licensing. Working in a variety of genres including Dance, Electronic, Hip Hop, Pop, Alternative and top 40. Making the world a better place through music and the people who create and experience it.

Name: Rico's Blues News
Description:
About
Rico's Blues News is a non-profit organisation intended to preserve, educate, and enjoy America's music, the Blues. We are dedicated to Keeping the Blues Alive. Long Live the Blues!

Mission
Rico's Blues News mission is to assist the Blues in surviving, thriving, and prospering in the greater Left Coast area. We would like to be a positive source of information, education, and enlightenment regarding Blues Music, which is considered one of America's greatest artistic gifts to the world. 
Rico's Blues News would like to support any and all purveyors and consumers of the Blues, including the musicians themselves, club owners, concert promoters, festival organizers, artist management, media outlets, and anyone related to and associated with the Blues music scene here in on the Left Coast. We seek to connect with other like minded organizations across the country whose vision we share. the preservation, education, and advancement of the blues tradition. 

All are encouraged to support the RBN in its many activities. RBN welcomes personal donations and corporate sponsorship. Merchants offering a discount to RBN readers will be so recognized in our ezine, on our Facebook Page, and on our website.
Description
We are a social group which distributes tasks for a collective goal, specifically the preservation, education, and advancement of the blues tradition

Name: CSIPM Centro Superior de Investigación y Promoción de la Música
Description: El CSIPM lleva a cabo distintas actividades en torno a la cultura y la música. Desde el CSIPM se dirige el Ciclo de Grandes Autores e Intérpretes de la Música de la UAM en el Auditorio Nacional de Música de Madrid.

Name: Reinekwint
Description:
Reinekwint is specialised in program management, business management, fund applications, project management and organises productions in the cultural field.

Reinekwint worked with or organised projects for a.o. Sweelinck Festival, Johannette Zomer, Stichting Sparrowtree, Internationaal Liedfestival Zeist, FullMoon Babylon, World Opera Lab, Music&Me, Muziek- en Dansschool Amstelveen, Nieuw Ensemble, Atlas Ensemble, Flamenco Biënnale, Cello Biënnale Amsterdam, Atlas Academy, Nationaal Jeugd Orkest, Utrechts Barok Consort, La Sfera Armoniosa, Holland Festival, Arthur Wagenaar, Beauforthuis, Jazz Orchestra of the Concertgebouw, Conservatorium van Amsterdam and many more.

Name: KAMARIKESÄ
Description:
Founded in 2005, the Chamber Chamber Music Festival is the oldest chamber music festival in Helsinki, which has established itself as a central part of the cultural activities of the Helsinki summer. Over the years, it has received 
 widespread praise for its fresh and high-quality programmes from both the public and the media. The mission of the festival, organized by Ritarikatu ry, is to offer young classical music talent valuable opportunities to perform as festival artists. In 2021, violinist Abel Puustinen, pianist Ossi Tanner and clarinetist Klaara Vasara started as artistic directors, who are also responsible for the festival this coming summer. The festival has previously been led by Ville Komppa, Pasi Eerikäinen, Dalia Stasevska, Johannes Piirto and the Borea Quartet.

Name: Succo Sounds
Description: An independent, Los Angeles-based production label, events company, and lifestyle brand. The label releases Global Latinx fused hip hop, afro, electronic music.

Name: Inspired Audio
Description:
UK manufactured pro audio system solutions. Inspired Audio is an English company dedicated to designing and manufacturing premium pro audio products in the UK. With a simple philosophy, that is to produce compact, lightweight, premium quality loudspeakers and amplifiers that integrate together seamlessly and will deliver crystal clear and detailed sound quality.

Lead by respected British audio designer Chris Scott with over thirty five years' experience in the industry, his CV is certainly not lacking. In his early career Chris has experienced life on the road touring with headline bands and then he progressed into OEM (Original Equipment Manufacture) design that has embraced many of the UK's larger football grounds such as Manchester UTD, Chelsea, Newcastle, Scotland's Hampden Park and Dublin's Croke Park.

Many will know Chris for the creation of the Logic System brand in the 1990’s, which grew to be a multi-million pound company, trading with hire companies providing systems to touring bands and to installers for venues and theatre projects in Asia, Europe and the UK. More recently Chris has had a growing belief that there is a need for a new British flagship brand. It was time for him to seek fresh inspiration, a clean sheet and a new challenge. So in January 2011 Chris, along with other industry professionals launched Inspired Audio.

Since then a range of innovative state of the art products have been developed including Optima array, Axis stage sound, multi-purpose portable MQ range and IQ installation range. All this is underpinned by te eFlex System Amplifiers, four channel system amplifiers with on board DSP, software control and full networking capability.

Name: EL LABO RECORDS
Description: El Labo Records, c’est un label de rappeurs, beatmakers et clippers passionnés par le rap et avides d’indépendance.

Name: The Rock/Star Advocate
Description:
Rock/Star
n.
noun: rock/star
Someone who is grounded as a rock in order to allow their inner star to shine & reach its full potential by working smarter, not harder. They do not engage in sleep shaming, self-medicating, or shiny-object-syndrome. 

Suz is a mindset coach for creative professionals looking to gain clarity on their goals & find a better work/life balance.

She teaches music professionals from all backgrounds, in all situations, how to slow down & think more clearly about what it is they truly want. 

She designs custom time management systems and helps them implement new routines that create more freedom & balance in their daily lives.

Suz believes you don't have to sacrifice your health, your relationships, or every hour of your day to succeed in music. It's time to #RedefineTheHustle and find success with less suffering.

Name: Timbaro.com
Description: The International Music Business And Recording Organization, Inc. A.k.a Timbaro, is a premium music production and technology company based in Delaware, USA.

Name: LS Music Entertainment
Description:
Founded in 2018, LS Music Entertainment is a recording studio in Cheras, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Equipped with state-of-the-art equipment, LS provides clients with an array of music production services.

Jason How, founder of LS Music Entertainment, is a music producer, artist, and mixing/mastering engineer based in Kuala Lumpur. He has had five years in the industry and has various work experience from multiple recording studios and mentors. able to handle any genre. He has worked on multiple local and overseas projects, such as album launches, single releases, and events around Southeast Asia. An International College of Music graduate, holding a diploma in Sound Engineering and Production.

Name: Wolfpack Iberia
Description: Wolfpack Iberia es una agencia de fabricación de soportes: musicales, promocionales y publicitarios. Fundada en Barcelona en enero 2016, WI ofrece una amplia gama de soportes de comunicación y su experiencia en todas o algunas de las etapas del desarrollo de sus pedidos, desde el diseño hasta la fabricación.

Name: Emengy
Description: Emengy is a bass music record label located in Vancouver British Columbia, Canada. Our goal has remained the same since founding Emengy eight years ago – To identify and develop talented producers and artists, taking them first to fans and then to the marketplace through new paradigms, creative brand partnerships and front running third party platforms. Emengy maintains the creativity, spirit and flexibility of an independent label, but with enhanced distribution channels that allows us to continue to compete in the global marketplace as an influential market player.

Name: PlayMusa
Description:
MUSA is a 3D serious game to make learning music fun and accessible to everyone. We successfully tested a beta version with 3000 families in Milan, also sponsored by CASIO Italia. Since 16th April 2019 we're running a commercial test in Italy and Ticino. 
We won the 1st Prize ETH Zurich Escher (8k CHF equity free), the 1st prize of StartCup Lombardia ICT (€30.000 equity free), the 2nd prize at the European Startup Competition CREA (Lisbon, Oct 2015), a theree-month incubation program in Polihub (Politecnico of Milan, May-July 2016). We won "Switch2Product" competition (June 2016): 4 months of acceleration program in Polihub. We won in "Premio Nazionale per l'Innovazione 2016" two Innovation Awards, by France and by UK Trade & Investment.
Musa was founded in Milan (July, 2016) and the current team is composed by 8 people.
Currently accelerated by Faster Capital
www.facebook.com/playmusa/
www.playmusa.com

Name: Tiny Human
Description:
Seattle-based Tiny Human is a boutique media relations firm with a focus on music publicity. We design and implement custom press campaigns tailored to each client’s unique needs; from focused, tastemaker-oriented initiatives built to ignite an organic groundswell of attention to long-term, large-scale projects whose goals evolve and grow alongside the artists.

Founded in 2009 by industry veteran Ever Kipp (after over ten years working first for respected NYC publicity firm Big Hassle and then at Seattle indie label Barsuk Records for clients like Death Cab for Cutie, Rufus Wainwright, the Bonnaroo Festival, Herbie Hancock, Menomena, and The Libertines among others), Tiny Human is dedicated to maintaining a concise, selective roster of artists that demonstrate extraordinary quality and unique creativity.

Name: Escola de Música d'Oliva. AAMO
Description:
Escola de Música de l'Associació Artístico Musical d'Oliva. Escola reconeguda per la GVA.

Educació Musical de 1 a 100 anys. Cicle Infantil, Cicle Bàsic, Cicle Consolidació i Cicle Avançat.

Classes instrumentals individuals i col·lectives.
Educació infantil a partir d'1 any. Col·laboració amb col·legis de l'entorn.
Classes de reforç i repàs.
Formacions educatives (bandeta, cors, orquestra, combos,...)
Master Class i cursos específics.

Name: Independent Composer and Arranger
Description: “Blake Ragghianti has studied music composition and piano performance for over twenty years.  His extensive travels have been a primary inspiration and influence in his compositional style, inspiring a collection of works that blend aspects of an array of genres and cultures.  He is currently a composer in residence at the Pittsburgh Festival Orchestra.  In December of 2008 Blake composed two theme songs for Glenn Beck’s nationally touring broadway show “The Christmas Sweater,” now available on DVD.  After the success of The Christmas Sweater, Beck again commissioned Blake to compose the music for his 2010 Christmas musical.  More recently, Blake was commissioned by Brady Allred of the University of Utah Singers and the Salt Lake City Choral Artists and A Cappella Choir to compose a major sacred work.  Other recent projects include, a seven song piano cycle based on the seven primary questions of humanity, sound design and orchestration consultation for the upcoming horror film “12/24” and “Scream Fest.”

Name: MyMusicTeacher
Description:
MyMusicTeacher (http://mymusicteacher.fr) est une école de musique virtuelle qui a pour vocation d'enseigner la pratique d'un instrument de musique grâce à une méthode innovante, ludique et personnalisée.

L'équipe a développé une application qui prend la forme d'un jeu vidéo croisé à un réseau social. 

L'utilisateur s'inscrit gratuitement et définit son profil utilisateur ; il aura alors accès à un parcours d'apprentissage étape par étape avec plus de 2600 cours vidéos HD 3 caméras et des exercices pratiques avec correction automatique.

Lors des exercices, l'utilisateur se retrouve sur une partition en 3D synchronisé avec une piste audio. Il va pouvoir jouer les notes en temps réel et ces dernières vont être détectées par notre système d'analyse du son, puis corrigées automatiquement. Au terme de l'exercice, l'utilisateur gagne des points et si son taux de réussite est suffisant, il va débloquer le suivant.

Nous proposons aussi, gratuitement, des cours en direct sur notre plateforme tous les mercredis et dimanches à partir de 20h. L'utilisateur, membre ou anonyme, peut suivre en direct notre professeur dans un flux vidéo et lui poser des questions grâce à notre système de messagerie instantanée.

Regardez-donc notre vidéo de présentation : https://youtu.be/GYhddwx_jaA

Retrouvez-nous sur nos profils sociaux !
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/pages/Mymusicteacher/521458701248936
YouTube : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLcTwQ6Ld6r9KziTc1ejMvQ
Twitter : https://twitter.com/mmtfrance
Pinterest : https://fr.pinterest.com/mymusicteacher/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/mymusicteacher/
Notre Blog : https://mymusicteacher.fr/blog

Pour télécharger notre application Androïd, c'est par ici :
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.MyMusicTeacher.MyMusicTeacher

Oh, vous êtes sous iOS ? Alors c'est par là :
https://itunes.apple.com/fr/app/cours-guitare-pour-debutant/id1057539013?mt=8

A très bientôt sur MyMusicTeacher.fr !

Name: AudioTrip Productions
Description:
AudioTrip Productions is a Manchester (UK) based independent music / vocal production company providing services for music professionals including the Film, TV, advertising, radio and and online media industries.

Production services include:

Music Production
Vocal Production

Remixes
Styles include:
EDM, Trance, Techno, Ambient, Chill, Pop, TV & Film
Audio engineering

Theater music production

References available on request

Name: LA CLE DE SOL - RETAIL MUSIC STORE
Description:
Le 5 Septembre 1978, Christian Delacour et Nathalie Delacour crée leur propre magasin de musique : LA CLE DE SOL puis en 2014 Alban Delacour et Camille Delacour rejoignent l’aventure. Au fil des années, toute une équipe (piano, accordéon, électronique….) est venue étoffer cette entreprise à taille humaine.

Aujourd’hui reconnue dans la France entière et forte de toute son expérience dans le domaine des instruments à touches : Pianos, Accordéons, Claviers, nous souhaitons vous faire partager notre savoir-faire et notre passion de la musique. 

la CLE DE SOL vous propose toute une sélection de produits parmi les plus grands noms et les grandes marques du monde de la musique, associé d’un service que nous voulons personnalisé et unique.

Name: Mighty Records
Description: Born from the vision of Graty, Mighty Records began on January 1st, 2016. Ever since then, it has been our mission to bring thriving talents to the spotlight, and to keep creativity alive. Last year, we recognized and supported numerous upcoming musicians such as DeepHust, Pol Ayke, Mark Voyst and Benjamin Barth. We plan to continue doing so, but in a more meaningful fashion. It's a new year, so we've decided to rebrand ourselves and enhance the quality, creativity, and depth of our music.

Name: Piano Market Plus
Description: Piano sales, restoration, shipping, and tuning service. We sell new and used pianos including (Yamaha, Clavinova, Schimmel, Pearl River, Whilhelm, Fridolin, and many more.)

Name: Tiny Human
Description:
Ever Kipp is a media relations expert with a focus on music publicity. I design and implement custom press campaigns tailored to each client’s unique needs; from focused, tastemaker-oriented initiatives built to ignite an organic groundswell of attention to long-term, large-scale projects whose goals evolve and grow alongside the artists.

Returned to respected NYC publicity firm Big Hassle after a stint at Seattle indie label Barsuk Records and launching indie agency Tiny Human. Have worked with clients like Death Cab for Cutie, Rufus Wainwright, the Bonnaroo Festival, Herbie Hancock, Menomena, and The Libertines among others). I am dedicated to maintaining a concise, selective roster of artists that demonstrate extraordinary quality and unique creativity.

Name: Monthly Music Hackathon NYC
Description: At Monthly Music Hackathon NYC, musicians, programmers, artists, scientists, composers, hardware tinkerers, and others spend the last Saturday of each month hacking together projects exploring music. At 8pm we have a concert and presentations of the art, technology, and research developed that day.

Name: Mud Hut Digital
Description:
Mud Hut is a twenty five year old, multi faceted music label and artist promotions agency, based in Sussex, operating globally.

FaceBook - http://www.facebook.com/mudhutmusic
http://www.mudhutdigital.com/

For any business enquiries email the following address which is forwarded to the appropriate mgmt team:

info [at] mudhutdigital.com

Name: Colorado Music Institute, Inc.
Description:
Colorado Music Institute, Inc. offers music lessons on nearly every instrument and is open 7 days per week!  It is  our mission that ALL people feel welcome when they visit our studios. Music should be all about joy and fun!  We will customize your music lessons based upon your goals and make sure you learn the music you want to learn, properly, but have fun each step of the way!

Give us a call to set up a FREE trial lesson and see why we were nominated for National Music School of the year!

Name: OUTMusic Integrated Marketing Group
Description:
utmusic is a network of gay, lesbian, bisexual and transgendered musicians and supporters. Performers, composers, lyricists, producers, recording artists, activists, promoters, press/media and even non-musicians who believe in LGBT music have joined Outmusic over the years.

Outmusic was founded in 1990 when a group of musicians met at Dan Martin and Michael Biello's East Village apartment to share music and experiences. This became the open mics, which are still held monthly in New York.
Since its founding, Outmusic has participated in the community in many ways. Some years the organization sponsored festivals, other years there have been compilation CDs or special events. Of course, through it all there have always been the open mics, where new and seasoned musicians still come together with goals not unlike the original sessions: to share music and experiences in a safe and welcoming space.

Outmusic members are involved in festivals, concerts and other events. They also collaborate on projects and offer a valuable peer support system. As an outgrowth of this support and recognition among peers, 2001 introduced the first annual OUTMUSIC AWARDS (OMAs).

Name: Clustermanagement Musikwirtschaft Mannheim & Region
Description:
Das Clustermanagement Musikwirtschaft Mannheim & Region ist ein RWB-EFRE gefördertes Projekt, das seit Oktober 2010 die Förderung der gesamten Musikwirtschaft, die Vernetzung und Koordinierung der einzelnen Institutionen sowie den stetigen Abgleich mit den strategischen Zielen der Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar zum Auftrag hat.

Das Projekt wird aus Mitteln der Europäischen Union (Europäische Fonds für regionale Entwicklung) und vom Land Baden-Württemberg sowie durch die Stadt Mannheim finanziert und ist bei der mg: mannheimer gründungszentren GmbH angesiedelt.

Das Clustermanagement Musikwirtschaft Mannheim & Region ist die vierte Säule des bundesweit einmaligen Förderkonstrukts “Mannheimer Modell” und fungiert dort als wichtige Schnittstelle zwischen der Branche einerseits und Politik, Verwaltung und Wirtschaft andererseits.

Als Anlauf- und Koordinationsstelle für verschiedenste Akteure der Musikbranche fördert das Clustermanagement die regionale Wettbewerbsfähigkeit und Beschäftigung. Dies wird in Form von innovativen Workshops, Seminaren, Tagungen, Weiterbildungsveranstaltungen und Existenzgründungsberatungen, aber auch der Beteiligung an über 80 regionalen Fremdprojekten, umgesetzt. 

Das Clustermanagement bietet durch diese Vernetzungs- und Beratungsfunktion eine Infrastruktur für Existenzgründungen, Freiberufler und bereits etablierte Firmen der Musikwirtschaft.

Name: The Jazz Exchange
Description: The Jazz Exchange is an organization committed to connecting communities through jazz while creating a platform for established and upcoming jazz musicians. The purpose of this organization is not only to create performance opportunities for musicians but also connecting with audiences around the world. We connect by reaching people through live performances in different communities as well as incorporating documentation of these performances through audio and video. The organization works hard to create memorable  experiences for audience members and performing artists, along with supporting local venues that create a unique visit.

Name: AudioFighter.com
Description: AudioFighter.com is a music service provider and open music search engine that helps video creators all around the globe with free and non-free original music tracks to download on our large library of music tracks (current +850 tracks and monthly updated). And plus we offer Costumer Service/Support for all your enquiries and questions.

Name: Anurag Dixit's Musicology
Description:
‘Anurag Dixit’s Musicology lessons’ is an award winning 'Training & certification program in music'. We provide music training & certification programs to schools & Edu techs. Anurag Dixit & Musicology have conducted training programs & workshops for schools & Institutions like IIT, Full Sail University (USA), Extramarks, DPS, Apeejay, Learners International, Adhyyan etc. Since 2003, we have trained 30,000+ students, music teachers & music industry professionals in a wide variety of disciplines. 
Musicology curriculum is a first of its kind in India. It covers basics & fundamentals of music in a step by step, graded manner. Our curriculum includes proper technical exercises, basic concepts, music theory, ear training and songs. Musicology syllabus also features Indian classical raags specially customized for modern music & instruments like Guitar, Piano, Drums & Popular vocals.

Name: Robin Hoffmann
Description:
Specialized in working on projects with real orchestras with more than 20 years of experience.

I worked on film scores for many international productions, including the Golden Globe 2024 nominee SUZUME, STAR WARS VISIONS, SAVE ANGEL HOPE, TELL, A WAR WITHIN and LIEBLING, LASS UNS SCHEIDEN. I co-composed the multi award winning musical DÄLLEBACH KARI, (co-)arranged the hit show THE ONE and VIVID at Friedrichstadt-Palast Berlin and worked on highly successful game music scores such as BATMAN – ARKHAM SHADOW, LINEAGE W, ANNO 1404, BLACK PROPHECY, and HALO LEGENDS. My scores for HERO and A FATHER’S JOB won several awards around the world.

Besides my work for media I also write music for several international artists such as ANASTACIA, GARY BARLOW, RONAN KEATING, BONNIE TYLER, SOPHIE ELLIS-BEXTOR, SARAH CONNOR, THE LONDON SYMPHONY ORCHESTRA and others. I won a Golden Record for my arrangements for ALEX CHRISTENSEN.

I’m holding a diploma in composition, arrangement and piano from the music university in Dresden, Germany.

Name: SoundCorps
Description:
SoundCorps is a 501c(3) nonprofit dedicated to growing the music economy in the Chattanooga region. Established in early 2015, we devote our energies to building local music industry infrastructure and professional expertise through ongoing programs, events and initiatives. These efforts will translate into increased opportunities to experience Chattanooga music.

Our vision is to re-establish Chattanooga as a music mecca with a healthily growing cultural economy. Success for us means Chattanooga has more music venues, sound recording studios, record labels, record stores, retail outlets, music industry professional services firms and more. 

We help our music industry…
Learn growth strategies from established music industry professionals
Access business development resources to work smarter
Connect with potential collaborators in the local music industry
Elevate their voices on issues that affect their businesses
 

We help Chattanooga music enthusiasts…
Navigate our vibrant music community via our online directory
Embrace Chattanooga’s music history and build our legacy today
Interface with Chattanooga’s music community more frequently

Name: Singers Playground
Description:
Micah Barnes is an in demand Voice, Performance and Career coach whose clients include Juno, Grammy & Emmy Award Winning Artists. A former member of the International a capella act The Nylons, and a chart topping solo artist himself. Micah's Singer's Playground Workshops have helped support thousands of artists in Los Angeles, New York and Canada in building a more powerful vocal performance and realizing their career goals! Micah is the regular "Vocals" columnist for Canadian Musician Magazine and on faculty coaching performance at Seneca College for the Independent Performing Singer-Songwriters program.

The Singers Playground Master Class is the perfect opportunity to work "one on one" with Micah in a supportive group setting. Micah also works with clients privately online & in person on Vocal Technique, Performance Skills and Career Strategy. Visit SingersPlayground.com for more information!

Name: THE GARAGE Studio - Tuscany
Description:
The Garage Studio is located in Arezzo, right in the heart of the Tuscany countryside, just a 40 minute drive from Florence.

With three underground walls in reinforced concrete, the control room boasts of great solidity and an impeccable The core of The Garage Studio is a Solid State Logic SL9000J 56 channels large format custom console with Ultimation moving faders automation.

The main monitors are Genelec 1034b system with 7073a subwoofer while the nearfields are a pair of KRK V88 biAmp speakers beside a standard Yamaha NS-10 Studio monitors amped with a NAD. A Tivoli Audio Model One is also available for mono checkings.
The DAW recording system is a Pro Tools 10 HD4 with 192 blue series ADA converters for a total of 32 Ins and 56 analog Outs. A second DAW system used for masters is based on a SoundBlade Sonic Solution software. This makes possible to print the mix in a standard Hi resolution format (up to 192KHz @24bit stereo) whatever the original PT session frequency and depth is. Both digital systems are clocked by an Antelope Isochrone OCX masterclock generator. We have almost all the plug-ins available in commerce, including the Waves Mercury Bundle, Brainworx, FabFilter, Sonnox, Sound Toys, PSP and many more. Two Universal Audio UAD-2 Quad core cards with complete plug-ins bundle are also installed.

In addition to being a State-of-the-Art recording studio, our property also has two historical, country houses with eight comfortable, well-appointed bedrooms, each with their own private bathroom which can accommodate up to sixteen guests.
We also have three media rooms, a reading room, a pool room and patios.

The twenty-five acre garden has a large swimming pool. The atmosphere, the colors and the perfumes here are natural creativity boosters which help make THE GARAGE Studio experience unique, addictive and unforgettable.

Name: Produce Sound
Description:
Produce Sound is a Post Production Recording Studio.

For every client we strive to deliver the best quality, in the shortest possible time, at the most cost-effective rates. All in a comfortable creative space. We recently moved out of The Refinery and into the Offrice Park right next door. In Stonewedge Office Park we've joined forces with Cut & Paste and Kwazi Mojo, which means a great production team offering expert advice, assistance and creative input for your project are always close by. You also get the best toasted sarmies and cappuccinos, anytime of the day or night. 

At our fingertips we have a vast selection of sound effects, and if we don't have it, we'll make it. We also have access to an extensive music library - everything from Bollywood beats to African opera.

We connect all over the world using Source Connect, and have strong links with studios in the USA, Australia, Canada and the UK. So if you need to record a voice over from far far away, give us a shout!

So come and relax in the comfort of our audio suite, and let us take care of the rest. info

Name: Music Masters Italia
Description:
MusicMasters offers to children from 5 to 17 of age, unique private music courses by Postgraduate Teachers in Italian combined with foreign languages education (French & English) and prepares them for entry exams for the "Conservatorio Statale di Musica" in Torino or Milano. (Piano, violin, flute).Powered by Dardant.

Get in touch | global@dardant.it

Name: LOST - PLAYLIST EVERYTHING
Description:
Audio & video playlists from the UK's most trusted music curators, updated daily. 

LOST’s official curators include: VICE’s music channels Noisey & Thump, FACT, UKF, i-D, Mahogany, The Line of Best Fit, Complex UK, Clash Magazine,  Dummy, The 405, Data Transmission, Rockfeedback, Gold Flake Paint, The Ransom Note, Inverted Audio, Stamp the Wax, Hyponik, Harder Blogger Faster, Getintothis and Fortitude Magazine. 

Paul Bridgewater, Editor of The Line of Best Fit:
"The LOST app totally nails the concept of authentic new music discovery combined with a neat streaming interface. I’ve been waiting years for something like this and it’s awesome to be part of it alongside so many other sites we love and respect. I hope it helps bring more ears to some of the amazing new talent we cover on The Line of Best Fit.”

Name: Singing Out
Description:
Singing Out is Toronto’s Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, and Queer Community Chorus. We are a mixed-voice, non-auditioned chorus – a relative rarity in LGBTQ communities across North America. But Singing Out is more than just a choir. Above all, Singing Out is a community. Our mission is PRIDE. MUSIC. BELONGING. We are proud of who we are, of our history, and of our accomplishments. We show our pride through music that entertains as it speaks to us and about us, to our audiences, and to the wider community. We create a warm and welcoming space where everyone who enjoys singing and learning can find a place to belong and have fun. We welcome different levels of experience, as well as diverse backgrounds and identities. We sing together, and we sing out.

Musically, we cover everything from the sacred to the silly, in many different styles (pop, showtunes, classical, folk, jazz) and languages. We do not require an audition to join, although some “voicing” may be necessary to determine which section (Soprano, Alto, Tenor, Baritone or Bass) best fits your vocal range, if you aren’t sure.

Name: International Voice Teachers of Mix
Description: International Voice Teachers of Mix (IVTOM) is a community of professional voice teachers, top scientists, leading medical practitioners, and mentor teachers, that provides resources, international conferences, a mentor program, ongoing education, and networking for teachers who take responsibility for continually expanding their knowledge of teaching the art and science of singing. Founded in 2010, IVTOM provides unparalleled access to medical and scientific professionals who specialize in the human voice.  Members range from new associates who are just beginning to develop the craft of teaching mix; to highly trained professionals who hold degrees and certifications from the best teaching organizations in the world; to otolaryngologists, speech pathologists, and voice scientists.

Name: KONG
Description:
"A crazy adventurous groove-heavy journey of mind blowing rock, samples, and general whacked-outness!" (Rock Sound UK)

"...the whole thing just cooks with an energy that's as elemental and from-the-gut as it is cerebral ... hard to explain, but easy to love, and highly recommended." (Blabbermouth.net)

Name: Avalon Design USA
Description:
Avalon Design develops, designs, and manufactures Pure Class A recording systems, to provide the worlds leading engineers, producers, and musicians with state-of-the-art electronics. Founded by Wynton R Morro, Avalon, strives to bring the art of music recording closer to the essence of the original performance. 

Avalon systems utilize 100% discrete, high-bias pure Class A audio amplifiers. These pure Class A amplifiers are incorporated into minimal signal path designs which include sealed silver relays, balanced DC coupled high-current "outside-world" drivers, fully discrete linear DC regulators, low noise toroidal power transformers and selected high quality active and passive components. This powerful combination of design features gives increased musical headroom and greater dynamic transient capability for a truly transparent audio passage.

Under the direction of our new CEO, Tamara Culembourg, the Avalon Design team is excited to expand while still continuing the tradition of creating analog recording systems, which assure the most harmonious musical signal transfer available today. 

Avalon is shaping modern music production and recording by incorporating unique design features, the highest quality components and continuing the pursuit of sonic excellence. Whether you are recording a solo vocalist, capturing the delicate nuance of an acoustic instrument, mastering music and film productions or recording symphonies, let Avalon take you to the leading edge in analog and experience sonic reality like never before!

Name: The Ukulele Sisters
Description:
Hi there! We’re Jenny Peters and Rebecca Bogart, the Ukulele Sisters. We believe that people playing music make the world a better place. Our mission is to help you to have fun learning music YOUR way. 

We’ve been publishing ukulele tutorials and books since 2013 and have sold over 70,000 copies worldwide. Right now we’re working on our next book, "21 Easy Ukulele Hymns", which we plan to release in early 2020. 

Ukulele is the perfect instrument to learn about music. That’s because as you learn ukulele you learn all the key elements of music at the same time: rhythm, melody and harmony. And the ukulele is just plain fun and easy to learn. It’s a happy instrument that you can take anywhere. You get to play and sing with others.

Jenny and Rebecca have over seventy years of combined teaching experience in music. We’re excited to help you experience the joy of making music. 

We’ll help you go at your own pace and by changing things up to suit your strengths and weaknesses. We’ll teach you what you need to know to make each song you play your own. We’ll help you learn the skills you need to play any style of music.

And we’ll help you find ways to connect to other people in your life through music.

So what’s stopping you? Try out some of our free lessons and materials today. You’ll soon be a happy ukulele musician.

Name: Grand Street Recording
Description:
Grand Street Recording is based in Williamsburg Brooklyn, NYC and was founded by Ken Rich in 2006.  As we see it, our job is to bring out the best in whomever walks through its doors, and then to capture the moment. While the racks are filled with Class-A pre-amps and classic vintage compressors, the mic closet stocked with a great collection of old and new microphones, and the control room fueled by the latest computer-based recording, the preeminent essence of Grand Street is its freedom, inspiration and trust.  





We are equipped to provide the most accurate hi-fi recording, but are not too precious to adventure into experimental sonic territory. If the artist gets the urge to record a vocal through the pickups of a Clavinet plugged into a mysterious purple pedal, we'll give it a shot without hesitance. Or, if the song calls for a full orchestra and a children's choir, we can arrange the music, book the flights and make it a reality.  





We give the artist flexibility and an environment that inspires creativity and confidence. Whether recording acoustic demos or a major label release, every sound and song goes down as if it's a classic – we value the moment above all else. We play many instruments, but also have a team of great musicians we can recommend. We have connections with larger studios if we need to take the project to a larger facility. If desired, we can manage budgets, contracts and bookings with the goal of making the process pleasant for the artist. All in all, Grand Street Recording is one part living room, one part big budget studio and all parts artistic empowerment. Come by and check us out.

Name: Idiotsikker Records
Description:
Idiotsikker Records er et Århus baseret uafhængigt pladeselskab oprettet i 2006 af Jesper Nyboe Nielsen, Christopher Goul og Mads Sabroe med udgivelsen af Haven Morgan – ”Et lille eventyr” på vinyl for øje. Herefter blev det også til en vinylversion af Jøden – ”Monkeyjuice”, udgivet i samarbejde med Art People.

Det var nu blevet tid til at satse på egne udgivelser og i december 2008 udkom den første af disse, nemlig den elektronisk inspirerede hiphop EP K-Liir – ”Under den elektriske stjernehimmel”, på vinyl og MP3, samt promosingle og musikvideoer.

I løbet af 2009 har vi udgivet Negash Ali og Ham Den Lange på vinyl i samarbejde med deres respektive selskaber.

I 2010 er der bl.a. blevet udgivet download-EP med Peacefull James og vinyl-LP med Bumsestilen.

I 2011 blev det til albums med Tyde T, Henrik Hass og Bumsestilen, en enkelt vinyl-LP med Bumsestilen og et julenummer med Kong Salami. 2011 var også året hvor vi ændrede distribution til A:larm/Universal.

I 2012 og 2013 er der kommet udgivelser med Skurken, Sphaeren, Contra Auguste, Temu, Peacefull James og Swab.

I fremtiden vil der også blive arbejdet på at gå længere end blot de gængse musikmedier og bringe dansk rap ind på nye områder, både kunstnerisk såvel som fysisk. Vi vil også bevæge os ind i andre relaterede genrer som elektronisk og reggae.

Name: Jazz Performance and Education  Centre
Description:
The Jazz Performance and Education Centre (JPEC) is the result of a collaboration between business people, musicians and arts professionals who are passionate about jazz in Toronto.

Officially incorporated in 2008, the concept for the Jazz Performance and Education Centre was born in 2007 when jazz aficionados Raymond and Rochelle Koskie assembled a committee of fellow enthusiasts to address the need for a full-time jazz venue in the city. Over the course of that first year, the committee identified what continues to be its primary goal: to create a venue similar to Jazz at Lincoln Center in New York. This first-class, multi-purpose facility will feature performances by top local, national and international jazz talent; educational programming in which fans of all ages can learn about jazz; recording facilities; and a Hall of Fame and Archives which will encompass and preserve Canada’s outstanding jazz heritage and tradition. The facility will enhance Toronto’s reputation as one of the best cities in North America in which to experience live jazz.

Name: The Resolvers
Description:
"Named one of Miami's 10 Best Reggae Bands of All Time"

Percolating with a big-band confluence of island riddims and Storyville jazz, the Resolvers pack a walloping sound that hits right in the hips and keeps everyone dancing all night. Brother and sister co-founders, Ojay and Sahara Smith, are the progeny of international reggae superstar Ernie Smith, and it shows in their high-concept originals and straight-up jams that keep the swing in your step. 

The Resolvers define "Big Band Reggae" by combining classic Jamaican roots and lively New Orleans stylings. Siblings Ojay and Sahara Smith (son and daughter of international reggae artist Ernie Smith) exchange lead vocal roles with Israeli born bandleader and guitarist Ron Eisner while their rock solid rhythm and bombastic horn sections set the pace. Their show has been described as "explosive" and "must see," and the band has gained the reputation as a premier live reggae act. The Resolvers have shared the stage with The Wailers, Julian Marley, Stephen Marley, Damian Marley, Kymani Marley, Inner Circle, English Beat, Yellowman, Matisyahu, Lee 'Scratch' Perry and Mishka along with many other world renowned acts in major international festivals such as Marley Fest, Jamaican Jazz & Blues Fest, Sun Fest, AURA Music & Arts Fest, Dub Fest and more.

Name: OboeAbode
Description:
OboeAbode is a small press devoted to the illustration, explanation, discussion and definition of oboe reedmaking and reedknife sharpening. Our books detail the concepts, theory, procedures, tools, supplies and machinery involved in the reedmaking process. 

Ann is the author, illustrator, and designer of these critically acclaimed books on oboe reedmaking: "The Illustrated Encyclopedia Of Oboe Reedmaking: A Guide To The American School Of Oboe Reedmaking, Volumes 1 and 2."

The Illustrated Encyclopedia Of Oboe Reedmaking, volume 1, foreword by Eugene Izotov, principal oboe San Francisco Orchestra, is available in 2 versions: right-hand and left-hand. Volume 2 is NOW available exclusively at oboereedbook.com.

Ann Rosandich is a professional oboe performer, teacher and reedmaker with over 45 years experience.

She was appointed solo English horn of the New Mexico Symphony at age 19. Additionally, she is a former member of the Albuquerque Chamber Orchestra.

Ann has made oboe reeds professionally for a leading American reedmaking company. She holds a BM and MM from Boston University.

Ann has performed with Alea III, Emmanuel Music, Boston Classical Orchestra, Pro Arte Chamber Orchestra, New Hampshire Symphony and on WGBH-FM Radio, Morning Pro Musica, Off the Record. She has made guest chamber music appearances with Boston Symphony members on the Boston University Faculty Series with noted artists including flutist Fenwick Smith, saxophonist Kenneth Radnofsky, and harpsichordist Mark Kroll.

Name: Unlabeled Music Services
Description:
Unlabeled Music is a full-service audio engineering and production facility located in the heart of Kansas City's Westport Entertainment District. As Kansas City's leading recording studio and production house, we have 9 engineers and producers on staff ready to meet your professional recording needs in our two industry-standard recording studios.

Founded in 2015, The studio started a membership-based program that incentivized artists with subsidized creative services and studio time in exchange for a small monthly fee.

In 2017 the Label disbanded and restructured as a recording studio focused primarily on servicing musicians in the traditional sense. The studio shifted focus back to the customer and began offering competitive studio time, creative services, and other opportunities for artist growth all in a one-stop-shop format.

In 2018, Unlabeled began focusing on how to grow their client base outside of the traditional studio format. This led to a full rebrand and rebuild of the business from the ground up and incorporated a more commercial based approach to growing in a competitive and crowded industry.

In 2019, Unlabeled expanded and opened its second full-service studio in Westport, Studio B, they also introduced a new product “The Unlabeled Experience,” which caters to non-musical customers looking to get the feel and experience of being in a recording studio.

As of 2020, Unlabeled is pursuing partnerships with local school districts, music lessons, and commercial audio recording contracts to further their advance and position in the local landscape. The studio has now expanded to include a podcast space and in late 2020 completed the 4th rebrand and design to match the new business.
