Name: Rock U Music School
Description: We are not your typical music school. No outdated books that smell like grandma’s basement, no set curriculum, no cartoonish posters of Do Re Mi on the walls. Our space is meant to INSPIRE and bring out our rockstars CREATIVITY. We go at your pace, you don’t go at ours. Learn what you want to play, how you want to play it. Every student has a unique learning plan tailored to their wants, goals, and needs. We teach all skill levels of all ages, from new rockstars who just got a  guitar for their birthday (or quarantine boredom) to seasoned shredders who want to sharpen their skills.

Name: Showcase Live
Description:
Showcase Live, a world-class, live entertainment venue is designed to offer the finest in music, comedy, corporate events, children’s theater and other special programming. Showcase Live hosts top artists in all music genres including R&B, rock, country, jazz and hip-hop.

Showcase Live is located adjacent to Showcase Cinema de Lux theatre at Patriot Place, Foxboro, Massachusetts. Showcase Cinema de Lux is the signature theatre concept of National Amusements featuring; lush interiors with baby grand pianos, concierge service, an American fare restaurant, and the Lux Level experience offering the luxury of in-theatre dining and drink service. Showcase Cinema de Lux and Showcase Live are created to transform the movie-going industry and make National Amusements theatres a community entertainment destination.

Name: Musica Edipiù
Description: Musica Edipiù s'occupe de la production et/ou de la distribution d'enregistrements. Sa mission est celle de promouvoir ses productions ou certains artistes en élaborant des stratégies. Ainsi, le label organise des événements sur mesure pour qu'un artiste puisse présenter son univers en LIVE et vendre ses audios. Le label s'occupe également de faire rayonner les univers artistiques sur le web et de vendre les productions sur son site.

Name: No Maka
Description:
Duarte Carvalho and Emanuel Oliveira are No Maka, a music production and DJ duo from Lisbon, Portugal. Their moniker means “no problem” in Kimbundu, an African language. Together they create electronic pop music combining sonic elements from distant geographies with a strong Latin and Afro vibe.

Their biggest accomplishment so far? Having a song chosen by Madonna herself and included in “Madame X” in a duet with Anitta. “Faz Gostoso” was originally composed for Blaya, a Portuguese singer, and released in 2018 amassing a huge success and reaching double platinum record status in Portugal, remaining five weeks on #1 of the singles chart, being played in the radio nationwide and harvesting over 33 million views on YouTube alone. Madonna’s version, released on June 14th, has surpassed 10 million streams on Spotify alone, remaining her most popular song on that platform to this day.

No Maka has the best of both worlds, as even without the Queen of Pop’s blessing they have under their sleeve hits like “Nota 100”, a collaboration with Laton, released on April 2019 and that has already reached way over 3 million views on YouTube. On the production side, their new song for Blaya, “Só Love”, released on May 2019 is already over the 2 million view mark on YouTube. Kazzio’s “Vou Seguir” and Blaya’s “Eu Avisei”, produced by No Maka, have over 5 million views on Youtube, Sweet California’s “Loca” harnesses over 9 million views alone.

Innovators and trendsetters they released “#Sextou” with ILBF and Favela Lacroix, on June 28th, and it that same day the song reached the #1 spot on iTunes Portugal chart.

Name: Radio Airplay Italia
Description:
Radio Airplay è un'azienda specializzata in broadcast monitoring internazionale che rileva e identifica in tempo reale, 24/24h, 365 giorni l'anno, musica e spot pubblicitari trasmessi da oltre 600 emittenti Radio/TV in 40 paesi europei.

I dati raccolti ed elaborati possono essere consultati in tempo reale attraverso:

- Client Software per Mac OSX e Windows
- Applicazioni web accessibili ovunque e da qualsiasi postazione
- Applicazioni per Smartphone e Tablet (iOS/Android)

sono inoltre disponibili:

- Software per creazione e invio di contenuti multimediali
- Reports dettagliati in formato Excel /PDF
- Sistemi ad-hoc per grandi aziende

Adottiamo una moderna ed efficace tecnologia di audio fingerprinting in grado di riconoscere musica e spot pubblicitari in meno di 2 secondi con una percentuale di riuscita superiore al 99,8%. Grazie a numerosi punti di ascolto dislocati in più territori, diverse fonti audio ridondanti (FM, DAB+, DVB-S, DVB-T, DVB-C) e sistemi informatici all'avanguardia, riusciamo a garantire la massima affidabilità sui dati raccolti e oltre 80.000 rilevamenti ogni 24h.

Le nostre classifiche airplay settimanali sono distinte per genere, lingua e territorio, e vengono compilate attraverso due diversi metodi: 

"by plays", contando l'effettivo numero dei passaggi rilevati; 
"by audience", sommando i punteggi di Audience assegnati ad ogni singolo passaggio sulla base del numero degli ascoltatori nelle diverse fasce orarie (con riferimento alle più recenti indagini statistiche Radio Monitor di GfK/Eurisko)

Le classifiche settimanali sono diffuse settimanalmente da MTV, Musica & Dischi, Rockol e MEI/Audiocoop.

Name: Windsbacher Knabenchor
Description:
Der Windsbacher Knabenchor gilt als eines der führenden Ensembles seiner Art. Er steht für die Synthese von Musikalität, Vielseitigkeit, Genauigkeit und Reinheit des Klangs. ährend sich der Chor regelmäßig mit professionellen musikalischen Leistungen weltweit präsentiert, bietet das Windsbacher Sängerinternat mit seinem großzügigen Campus den Kindern und Jugendlichen ein wohnliches, lebendiges Zuhause – eine Heimat auf Zeit.

Die Windsbacher. Mehr als Musik.

Name: Promostream
Description:
"Music Video Distribution Made Easy"

The Promostream platform is the industry-leading music video delivery service, easily connecting record labels and artists to UK broadcasters at your fingertips.

Since our launch at the end of 2015, Promostream has seen over 3000 music video uploaded and made available to the 70+ broadcasters we're connected to by major and independent record labels.

For further information please contact Josh Scott, Head of Promostream on josh@promostream.tv or 0207 539 8547.

Name: La Clique Production
Description:
Nous sommes animés par la volonté de rester conscients de ce qui se passe autour de nous, dans un univers où le brassage entre les peuples et les influences doit être un facteur d’enrichissement et non de clivage. Et parce que le voyage constitue à la fois l’apprentissage de l’autre et la connaissance de soi, c’est tout naturellement que nous restons ouverts à toutes formes de projets en suivant deux orientations majeures. Les musiques du monde et les musiques sacrées - classiques.

Notre structure fonctionne au coup de coeur et laisse une large place à la découverte, nous ouvrons donc nos compétences aux talents variés : le ciné-concert, le one-man show, les lectures... Notre travail s’inscrit dans une dimension humaniste de par la conviction profonde que la culture agit comme un vecteur concret de développement et de paix.

Nous accordons une grande place à l’artiste au coeur même du processus d’accompagnement, conscients de l’unicité de chaque projet. Il fait partie intégrante de l’équipe et dispose d’une liberté de choix à chaque étape. Choisissant de travailler sur le long terme à l'époque de l’éphémère et du rentable à tout prix, la philosophie de La Clique est de suivre chaque carrière via un important travail en amont avec l’artiste et en donnant une dimension internationale à notre démarche.

Au-delà de la simple représentation d’un panel d’artistes diversifié, ce que nous proposons, c’est donc un regard sur le monde.

Name: Groove Distribution
Description: Located in Chicago and founded in 1999, Groove Distribution is America's premier dance music importer. We distribute a wide range of dance music including house, downtempo and lounge, drum & bass, nujazz and more, both on vinyl and CD. We also sell a limited but extremely tasteful range of rock, hip-hop, soul, and jazz. We are a wholesale distributor but also operate a mail order service direct to DJs and music fans across the U.S. and around the world and are open to the public for walk-in sales. Please check our website for more details.

With over 20 years of experience as a family-run business, we have built a reputation for consistent quality. Our expert team of engineers, technicians, and quality supervisors ensures every product meets the highest standards.

We focus on providing high-quality, affordable instruments that inspire musicians around the globe. Our commitment to excellence makes us an ideal partner for international distributors and dealers looking to expand their offerings with reliable, quality products.

Join us in bringing the joy of music to families and musicians everywhere. For partnership inquiries, please contact us at contact@greaten-music.com.

Description:
Moon agency is an international electronic dance music event & booking agency based in Amsterdam, specialized in artist management & branding. The agency is well known for its flair for trends and exceptional way of creating new events and marketing concepts.

With their education at the Rotterdam School of Management and the prestigious Design Academy Eindhoven, founders Remco van den Born, Pablo Lücker and Niels Lücker have an ideal background in music, design and business.

Their portfolio consists of artists that have released on labels such as Stealth, Dim-Mak, Mixmash & Revealed. In addition, they have performed at events like Extrema, Ministry of Sound and WMC Miami to name a few, proving the winning formula of this agency.

Don’t tell us the sky is the limit when there are footprints on the moon.

Name: Fable Music Pty Ltd
Description:
Publishing

Independent Australian music publisher, Fable Music has been in operation for nearly fifty years. Fable was created in the 1970s to serve the publishing interests of Fable Records – one of the oldest Australian record labels. Fable Records became an icon in the Australian music industry achieving almost every industry award as well as a Guinness Book of World Records Award and an MBE from H.R.H Queen Elizabeth II to Ron Tudor, its original founder, for Outstanding Service to the Australian Music Industry.

The strength of Fable Music today is the direct result of a publishing legacy based upon our long-standing representation of independent international publishing catalogues and our own significant original Australian catalogue.

In addition to its own publishing catalogue, Fable represents several international companies.

We are a family owned company and all our staff are experienced industry people dedicated to the administration, development and exploitation of copyrights.  Fable provides an array of services including synchronisation of “published music” for advertising, TV, film, premiums and multi-media productions.

 
Production Music Libraries

In the late 80’s Fable began to venture into Production Music (Library) by creating The Image Music Library. Shortly after Fable began to represent the German library Ring Music and other international libraries followed. Fable established a catalogue of independent libraries from around the world.
In the past, we have represented many iconic libraries such as Koka Media, Killer Tracks, Telemusic, Groove Addicts, Full Tilt, Kosinus, Gravity, Flipper Music, Fontana, Graffiti Tracks, Happy Records, Sonimage, Hollywood Edge, among others.

For a list of our current libraries visit http://fablemusic.com/music-libraries/

Symphony Number One creates electrifying concert experiences for all of Baltimore.

Led by Music Director Jordan Randall Smith, SYMPHONY NUMBER ONE brings together great composers of the past, virtuoso performers of the present, and the leading compositional voices of the future.

Description:
We are the go to brand for connecting artists to the music industry. We have a digital promotion service that links musicians with their respective audiences,connecting your music to the relevant tastemakers, DJ's, bloggers, A&R's, managers, journalists and promoters. We connect with like-minded individuals enabling us to provide everything needed to realize your unique branding & Marketing opportunities, ensuring you stand out amongst the crowd.

ABOUT US

Superlight Music aims to reinstate artistic integrity back into the music industry by helping artist's transmit their message or movement to their audience. Ultimately our aim is to cultivate and develop a new wave of musical talent which is able to compete at the highest level of the music industry. We cater for all genres of music including Hip-Hop, rock, soul, folk, alternative and indie. In this digital era we recognise that accessing the appropriate marketing and publicity is key. SUPERLIGHT MUSIC'S ORIGINS

Name: MUSE, Cincinnati's Women's Choir
Description:
MUSE is a women's choir dedicated to musical excellence and social change. In keeping with our belief that diversity is strength, we are feminist women of varied ages, races, and ethnicities with a range of musical abilities, political interests, and life experiences.

We are women loving women; we are heterosexual, lesbian and bisexual women united in song. We commission and seek out music composed by women, pieces written to enhance the sound of women's voices, and songs that honor the enduring spirit of all peoples. In performing, we strive for a concert experience that entertains, inspires, motivates, heals, and creates a feeling of community with our audience.

Name: Vera
Description:
Vera, 2004 yılında 4 lise arkadaşı tarafından Denizli’de kuruldu. Lise yıllarında küçük bir prova stüdyosunda kaydedilen ve internete dağılan şarkıları üniversite ve bar konserleri, demo kayıtlar ve nihayetinde Be ‘The Band’ Müzik Yarışması izledi. 2011 yılında Babajim Stüdyoları’nın düzenlediği yarışma ile grup, ilk kez ulusal basında kendine yer buldu.

2012’de kendi adlarını taşıyan ilk EP ‘Vera’ yayınlandı. Brit Rock temelli bu albüm ile müzik yolculuğundaki ilk dönüm noktasını yaşayan grup, bugüne kadar 3 stüdyo albümü, 1 EP ve pek çok single yayınladı. Her yeni şarkısında farklı bir janra göz kırpmasıyla da dikkat geçen grup, yıllar içinde standart bir rock grubundan modern bir müzik grubuna evrilmeyi başardı.

Mutluluk Reklamı, Saklanır Nisan ve Davetsiz gibi hit parçalarla adından söz ettiren Vera, 2020’de yayınladığı Deniz Kabukları ve Sonsuza Kadar ile Türkçe Rock listelerinde peş peşe iki defa ilk sıraya yükseldi.

Grubun Cam Kenarı (2021) ile başladığı beş parçalık konsept serinin son parçası, bir bakıma “sezon finali” Sıradan Yaralar, 2 Eylül’de Doğan Müzik Yapım etiketiyle yayınlandı. 

Vera, 2023 sonu yayınlanması planlanan yeni albümü “İkinci Baskı”nın kayıtlarına devam ediyor.

Name: BBC Sports Personality of the Year
Mannheimer Gitarren Akademie
Description:
Sie suchen maßgeschneiderten Gitarren-, Ukulelen- , Bassunterricht?
Herzlich willkommen bei der Mannheimer Gitarren Akademie!

 
Die Gitarre, die Ukulele und der Bass sind meine Leidenschaft. Die Instrumente mit all ihren Facetten zu lehren, den Spaß an der Musik weiterzugeben und anderen zu der Erfahrung zu verhelfen, welche persönliche Bereicherung die Beherrschung eines Instruments darstellt, ist mir ein großes Bedürfnis.

 
Selbst durch hervorragende Lehrer und Vorbilder motiviert, unterrichte ich Kinder und Jugendliche ebenso wie Erwachsene aller Altersstufen in den Fächern Akustik- und E-Gitarre sowie E-Bass und Ukulele. Dazu gehören Neulinge ebenso wie Quer- und Wiedereinsteiger.

Description:
We are a tour services company.  

We work with artists, management and tour managers on all technical and logistical elements of touring.  

Started by four Tour Managers with many years of cumulative experience, our team will keep costs down and tours running smoothly.  We love what we do and we love to do it well. 

Our attention to service, detail and quality has made us indispensable to our clientele.  At the loop, we understand that concerts and touring are a team effort, and we constantly strive to exceed all expectations.
 
Learn more about our business and the services we offer by sending a message to info@theloopteam.com

Name: Antariksh
Description:
Rated by MTV as one of the best Hindi Rock bands in India, Antariksh is renowned for creating a beautiful blend of authentic Rock/Pop styles of music with contemporary Hindi Music. Founded and nurtured by guitar player and music producer, Varun Rajput, Antariksh has been creating waves all across the country and abroad delivering some of most splendid and successful shows headlining at various college festivals, music festivals, public and corporate concerts. 

With an experience of playing over 500 gigs across India, US, UK and South-East Asia, the band's live shows are not just your typical rock gigs, but a power-packed, mesmerizing experience that distinguishes a "regular show" from a "concert". Riding high on enthralling performances, the band has collaborated and shared stage with some eminent artists and personalities including, Farhan Akhtar, Euphoria, Noori, Arvind Kejriwal, Sachin Tendulkar, Baiju Dharmajan, Vishal Shekhar, Hard Kaur, Noori, Rekha Bhardwaj. 

Their very first single, 'Dheere Dheere' (http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SIQfqnRJZ8g ) released in 2013 was selected in the top 5 songs in VIMA India awards, and was nominated for VIMA Asia Awards. 

Antariksh released their first album, 'Khoj' in September 2013, and since then there's been no looking back. ‘Khoj’ is about a search for identity, a quest to understand our own nature.

The album has a strong theme across all songs both musically as well as lyrically, touching topics such as ethics, identity crises, hope, greed, chaos and realization – emotions that are a part of our everyday lives. 

Reviews:

Musically they are rich and pretty modern indeed. Excellent drumming with various time variations and very clearly defined guitar work and excellent production. They clearly show signs of becoming mainstream heartthrobs. - The Score Magazine

What is really intriguing musically about “Khoj” is the intermixing of an oft serious theme with music that is so jumpy, so spunky. - Popsplat Magazine

Name: Soncured Records
Description:
Soncured is not a huge corporate record label, we are self funded, managed and owned by members of the bands we promote.  We believe that Holy Spirit inspired music has the ability to change lives.  Our mission is to find and promoting unknown Christian artists who otherwise might never have the opportunity to share the message God has given them with the world

Soncured Records is focused on promoting Christ centered music that reflects a grateful hearts response to the gospel.

Our desire is to work with artists who, through music, challenge listeners to consider the cross, the sacrifice made there and what it means to them in their everyday lives. We view personal spiritual depth, artistic excellence and cultural relevancy as the necessary tools needed to present the gospel through music.
- See more at: http://soncured.com/tennessee-christian-music-soncured-records/#sthash.AVevpbtq.dpuf

Name: Zimbabwe Academy of Music
Description:
For more than 60 years, the Zimbabwe Academy of Music has stood for ambition, hope and optimism. Thousands of children and adults have studied music and taken international exams at its Bulawayo home. In recent years it has been the driving force behind the Bulawayo Music Festival, which has continued bringing celebrated international artists to Zimbabwe throughout dark times.

The Academy’s facilities include the Robert Sibson Hall which seats 400 people and is widely regarded as acoustically the finest small concert hall in southern Africa. It possesses two Model D Steinways, both fine instruments, with one generally acknowledged to be the best piano in Zimbabwe. The hall plays host to over a hundred Academy events annually and is also available for hire for all forms of music, plus conferences, etc.

The Academy operates on a programme of three eleven-week terms that coincide with the school terms, and all registered students receive a weekly lesson in the term, usually of 30 minutes duration, but lessons can be longer by arrangement. The Academy remains open throughout the year and lessons continue during school holidays where required.

Name: Propeller Recordings
Description: Propeller Recordings is a Norwegian independent record label, launched in 2003 in Oslo. It has grown into an influential label both in its home city as well as worldwide, and has now expanded to include a UK office based in London.

Name: Traditional Music Forum
Description:
The Traditional Music Forum is a network, supported by Creative Scotland, of over 40 traditional music organisations working in Scotland today. We include clubs, festivals, community music projects, academic institutions, promoters, agents, publishers and labels among our members, representing a broad sweep of activity and thousands of musicians, enthusiasts, activists, participants and listeners across Scotland.

The Forum aims to advocate the place for traditional music at the heart of Scottish life and to promote the widest possible access to it. It is a key resource for information and advice on traditional music for Creative Scotland, and other public bodies.

Name: Performing Artist & Musician
Description:
The cello is a bowed or plucked string instrument with four strings tuned in perfect fifths. The strings from low to high are generally tuned to C2, G2, D3 and A3, an octave lower than the viola. It is a member of the violin family of musical instruments, which also includes the violin and viola and the double bass. The cello is used as a solo musical instrument, as well as in chamber music ensembles (e.g., string quartet) string orchestras, as a member of the string section of symphony orchestras, and some types of rock bands. It is the second-largest and second lowest (in pitch) bowed string instrument in the modern symphony orchestra, the double bass being the largest and having the lowest (deepest) pitch.

Cellos were derived from other mid- to large-sized bowed instruments in the 16th century, such as the viola da gamba, and the generally smaller and squarer viola da braccio, and such instruments made by members of the Amati family of luthiers. Cello parts are generally written in the bass clef, but both tenor clef and treble clefs are used for higher-range parts, both in orchestral/chamber music parts and in solo cello works. A person who plays the cello is called a cellist or violoncellist. In a small Classical ensemble, such as a string quartet, the cello typically plays the bass part, the lowest-pitched musical line of the piece. In orchestra, in Baroque era (ca. 1600-1750) and Classical music period (ca. 1725-1800), the cello typically plays the bass part, generally an octave higher than the double basses.

Name: SwarGanga Music Foundation
Description:
SwarGanga Music Foundation is a non profit organization with a 501c3 charitable status in the US and 80G in India. SwarGanga's mission is to to promote young upcoming and less known artists in the field of Indian Classical Music, to document and preserve Indian classical music assets digitally and to promote Indian classical music throughout the world.

SwarGanga is currently the single largest resource when it comes to Indian Classical Music on the entire internet.

Name: Conglomerate Music Corp
Description:
CMC was founded by the legend, Terry "MC JUICE" Parker and his business partner / manager Belle Wise. 

Along with his mainstay of winning countless rap battles against formidable opponents, the duo worked tirelessly to create and promote many successful independent releases on JUICE. Soon they realized his stature made the best up-n-coming, top level talent approach the company for artistic direction and tangible opportunities in the music industry. 

Today CMC houses a roster of young hungry talent hailing from around the globe. 

2020 is about welcoming audiences who are seeking those timeless songs and biting lyrics that used to evoke good feelings and create memories for now and many generations to come.

Name: Sax On The Beat
Description:
The modern experience of Live Music. 

Sax On The Beat är en Malmöbaserad duo med DJ och livemusiker som har sina rötter i den klassiska housemusiken. De har genom sina otaliga shower utvecklat en egen stil som kombinerar livesaxofon och trummor med en mängd olika stilar inom lounge och klubbmusik. 

Nära samarbeten med olika producenter ger dem både egna låtar och unika remixer. Sax On The Beat är idag kända för sina energifyllda uppträdande där de mixar många subgenrer inom house, disco, funk, soul, jazz & klubbmusik. Genom att blanda stilar men alltid ha en röd tråd appellerar de till alla som vill ha en unik och energisk utekväll.

Name: The Black Music Coalition
Description: The Black Music Coalition (BMC) is a collective voice and lobbying group formed by Black music industry professionals dedicated to eradicating the racial disparities and systemic barriers affecting Black employees / executives, including freelancers and independents across all sectors and at all levels of the UK music industry.

Name: The Continuo Arts Foundation
Description:
The Continuo Arts Foundation is a 501 (c) 3 charitable organization committed to making a difference in the lives of individuals, communities and cultures through music.  Supporting music education and musicians, Continuo Arts also furthers artistic advancement by providing national and international performance opportunities for gifted artists, performers and composers in addition to fostering musical appreciation through education and exposure.
     The Continuo Arts Foundation believes that exposure to the arts cannot be optional; it is a cultural right and heritage. We are committed to innovative music education, enrichment and programming which engages the young and the old, the sophisticated and the first-time performer or listener, as well as those interested in understanding diverse cultures and genres. The Continuo Arts Foundation is known for providing all-encompassing and unforgettable musical experiences in concerts, classes, workshops and throughout the education spectrum; leading to a life-long love and support of the arts.
  We believe the experience of music allows us to participate in the universal creative process, open hearts and minds, awaken feelings and bring delight and joy. We strive to understand and to promote music across the life span to all generations and around the world.

Name: Jacksonville Symphony Youth Orchestra
Description: Orchestral Music grade 1 - collegiate

Name: Stage Ninja LLC
Description:
Stage Ninja builds retractable cable reels for nearly all cable types and sizes specializing in custom retractable cable reels.  We also build industrial, innovative spring clamps to hold microphones, cameras, smartphones, tablets and other digital devices. 
"When an anvil, be patient.  When a hammer, strike quickly."

Name: Love One Another Sound Production
Description: Love One Another Sound Production is a music production studio that brings digital and analog recording together.

Name: Good Company Artists AB
Description:
We represent dedicated artists; singers, conductors, stage directors, instrumentalists, actors and others. 

You can choose full management or limited agent services. Full management gives you professional guidance, counsel, advise and career direction.  We promote you and represent your interests and handle all interactions between you and the employer. We negotiate all contracts on your behalf. 

If you prefer we can also help you only to handle marketing activities and to negotiate contracts. 

We also aim to be a professional partner for promoters all over the world and value the collaboration on a daily basis with orchestras, venues, festivals and other partners in the industry. Our competence and responsiveness to differences between local markets combined with knowledge about the importance of marketing and promotion makes us a flexible and reliable partner.

Name: Electrona
Description:
Promotora de música electrónica pionera en la provincia de Girona. Con más de tres años de experiencia, nos especializamos en la organización y producción de eventos y en la divulgación de música a través de diferentes canales online.

El cosmos ELECTRONA surge de la pasión por la música en general y por la electrónica en particular. 

Des de Girona, una ciudad que permite recorrer más de 2000 años de historia y que cuenta con una cultura totalmente viva y asociada a la electrónica, nuestra empresa se ve comprometida con la capital. 

Apostamos por los mejores artistas internacionales y a la vez, promocionamos nuestros artistas locales, captando personas de distintos sitios del mundo movidos por intereses culturales. 

A través de la colaboración con otras empresas del sector en distintos ámbitos, formativo con Eumes, edición con Girsound, un Ayuntamiente de Girona que confía en nuestra visión y la ayuda de nuestros patrocinadores, queremos hacer de Girona un pequeño centro de electrónica que se vea des de cualquier sitio del mundo.

Name: Soundsgate
Description:
Soundsgate.com je moderní platforma pro snadné získání špičkové komponované licencované hudby na míru za dobré ceny.

Pokud máte zkušenost s používáním hudebních a zvukových knihoven, pak je Soundsgate dalším stupněm ve vývoji těchto kanálů. Na Soundsgate stačí pomocí funkce "Komponovaná hudba" zadat jakou hudbu si představujete pro Váš projekt, případně přidat odkaz jak má hudba stylově vypadat a Soundsgate autoři Vám do 48 hodin zašlou minimálně 5 různých návrhů skladeb nebo zvuků dle vašeho zadání. Vy můžete vybrat jeden z návrhů, který zakoupíte za stejnou cenu, jako položky z knihovny. Velmi důležité je, že takto vybranou skladbu zakoupíte jako komponovanou hudbu, ze které se neodvádí poplatky Intergramu. 

Samozřejmě lze vybrat hudbu pro Váš projekt i z hudební a zvukové knihovny Soundsgate a navíc lze každý zvuk a skladbu upravit (prodloužit, zkrátit, načasovat, doaranžovat dodělat sound-design atp..) od originálního autora. Práci našich autorů najdete v médiích jako BBC, ARD, FOX, NBC a dalších. Jeden z našich Soundsgate autorů je aktuálně nominovaný na Hollywood Music in Media Awards. 

Kvalitní hudba je opět o krok blíž a vaše produkce se může opět posunout výše s respektem k rozpočtům a rychlosti.

Name: Heavy Sound C.I.C.
Description: Heavy Sound C.I.C. is a community interest company.  We work with vulnerable and disadvantaged young people, engaging them in music making - primarily hip hop, and film.  The projects we offer enable young people to learn new skills in music and the arts, and work with self expression, leading to improved  confidence and self esteem.  Through positive engagement, we aim to improve life chances and move young people to positive futures.

Name: Six Boroughs Group
Description:
Six Boroughs Group is an Australian-based artist management and PR company led by a team of some of Australia’s most experienced executives, specialising in music, television, touring, and creative development.

Established by Andy Bryan, Darryl Bailey, and Melita Hodge, Six Boroughs Group launched in 2022 through the collaborative and innovative partnership between Fingerless Glove Projects (now Six Boroughs Management) and Six Boroughs Media.

Six Boroughs Group is equipped with 20+ years of knowledge and experience across the music industry, the Australian media landscape, as well as the broader entertainment industry.

Name: Incandescent Audio
Description:
Incandescent Audio is an audio engineering service for recording, mixing and mastering music, voiceover work, podcasts, and live events in the Chicagoland area. From bedroom podcasts to concert hall headliners, we give every project the same level of personal care and attention.

We believe that recording the best audio takes more than just a good ear. We work closely and collaboratively with you to bring your vision to light—exactly how you hear it in your head.

Name: Cultural Management Office, The University of Hong Kong
ProgPower USA
Description:
Premier Progressive & Power Metal Music Festival for North America.

Through his company, HoS Productions, Glenn Harveston is the music promoter and founder for ProgPower USA - the premiere annual festival here in North America dedicated to progressive & power metal. 2015 will be the festival's 16th year. 

ProgPower USA is unlike any other music festival in the world as the focus is on quality over quantity. The audience capacity is intentionally kept at 1,100 in a first class indoor venue – Center Stage Atlanta.

Each year, the roster consists of 12 bands from abroad with 6 performing each night. The festival gives bands that have never performed in the States a chance to test the waters so to speak, and it also allows them to interact with fans more than ever.

Name: Artesound Custom Guitar Amps
Description: Music is an art of sound. Artesound loves music, art, and above all loves giving the guitarist the sound he is looking for. www.arte-sound.com

Name: Philadelphia Sinfonia Association
Description:
Philadelphia Sinfonia Association is one of the premiere youth orchestra organizations in the tri-state area. Since 1997, we have been teaching young musicians to discover their full artistic potential. Our students range in age from 11 to 23 and have exceptional musical ability. Many go on to study at prestigious universities and conservatories such as Harvard and Princeton Universities, The Curtis Institute of Music and The Julliard School.
Our comprehensive program includes:

Philadelphia Sinfonia (advanced full symphonic orchestra with 100 members for students from age 14 through college)

Philadelphia Sinfonia Players (intermediate full symphonic orchestra for students ages 11 to 18)

Philadelphia Sinfonia Chamber Orchestra (advanced string chamber group)

Each season we perform four advanced full orchestra concerts, three chamber orchestra concerts, three intermediate orchestra concerts, and an intimate afternoon recital of solo works and chamber music. Our musical repertoire is diverse and daring, comprised of works from the standard classical canon alongside 20th and 21st century pieces, and has included several world and Philadelphia premieres.

We have performed at the Kimmel Center, the Mann Music Center, the Liberty Medal Ceremony honoring Colin Powell and at the 2000 Republican National Convention. We have partnered with guest artists as renowned as soprano Julianne Baird and jazz virtuoso violinist Christian Howes. Internationally, Philadelphia Sinfonia has wowed audiences in Holland, Great Britain, Russia, the Czech Republic, Finland, Italy, Poland, Austria, Hungary, Belgium and Argentina.

Young musicians are at the heart of Philadelphia Sinfonia Assocation. They are a diverse group with incredible gifts, capable of discovering the theoretical and emotional content of a composition and communicating something truly moving to an audience.

Name: Ente Musicale Società Aquilana dei Concerti Barattelli
Description:
La Società Aquilana dei Concerti “Bonaventura Barattelli”, con sede in  L’Aquila è stata fondata dall’Avv.to Nino Carloni il 18 luglio del 1946. Nei suoi oltre 70 anni di attività ininterrotta la Barattelli ha realizzato oltre 3000 manifestazioni con i più grandi musicisti del mondo, le orchestre più prestigiose e migliaia di solisti, complessi da camera, compagnie di teatro, cori e compagnie di balletto.
La Società Aquilana dei Concerti ha sempre inserito nei suoi programmi musica di tutti i tempi, paesi e stili, con prime esecuzioni assolute e composizioni espressamente commissionate e/o dedicate all’ente. 
La “Barattelli” è punto di riferimento culturale della città dell'Aquila e di richiamo per la vita musicale italiana ed europea.

A Viva Veu és una associació cultural dedicada a la comunicació cultural i a la programació d'actuacions musicals i recitals de poesia, com els cicles de concerts desendollats i recitals de poesia al Fantástico Club de Barcelona. Name: MML LATIN MUSIC – Mexican Music Library | Latin Production Music for Licensing
Description:
MML LATIN MUSIC is a premium Latin music library built for sync licensing.
We offer a one-stop, fully pre-cleared catalog ready for immediate use in film, television, streaming series, advertising, documentaries, video games, podcasts, and branded content.

Designed specifically for music supervisors and creative producers, our music is culturally rich, professionally curated, and ready for global placements.

We work with artists and composers from Mexico, Colombia, Brazil, Argentina, Cuba, Peru, the Dominican Republic and more — delivering the authentic Latin sound in high production quality, with stems available and all rights cleared.

We meet the industry standards of:
 APM Music, Universal Production Music, BMG Production Music, Warner Chappell Production Music, Audio Network, West One Music, Epidemic Sound, and Marmoset —
but our soul is 100% LATIN.

 Genres include:
Reggaeton, mariachi, salsa, cumbia, Latin trap, bolero, tango, electro tropical, folkloric, hybrid scores, instrumentals, underscores and soundalikes.

 Perfect for:
	•	Music supervisors & sync agents
	•	Film & TV production companies
	•	Game developers & animation studios
	•	Global brands with Latin markets
	•	Streaming platforms & documentary storytelling

 All tracks are licensing-ready with full metadata, easy clearance, and custom playlists available.
https://www.mexicanmusiclibrary.com/

Name: Mississauga Fine Arts Academy
Description: Your #1 choice for music lessons in Mississauga.  We offer private piano, guitar, drums, voice, violin, cello and music theory lessons in Mississauga, ON.

Name: Music Club IIT Mandi
Description:
Music Club of IIT Mandi is an organisation which consists of people passionate about music. It regularly gives performances during major campus events and also conducts many competitions throughout the year. It is committed to help students inculcate and improve their skills in music.

Music Club strives to provide a platform for the students to express their musical talent, be it singing, playing instruments, sound mixing, etc. Its mission is to help all students to develop good musical knowledge and appreciate the diverse music present in the world!

Name: Hummel Entertainment
Description:
Hummel Entertainment is an environmentally conscious, marketing and artist management company.

We are heavily involved in the independent music scene and support many diverse musical genres.

Our company prides itself on being innovative in handling our artists careers and remaining true to our Indie roots.

Hummel Entertainment has and continues to assist in shaping many developing and emerging artists within the Canadian and International Music industry.

*** 2012 CCMA Nominee - Management Company of the Year ***

Name: Graffiti Records
Description:
Graffiti Records are a record company. Graffiti has a foundation built purely on the old traditional label values, yet utilizing all the modern forms of media management that surround us today.
With the advent of social media, the internet and multimedia, there is an ever expanding consumer base. Although these consumers only seemto be an email away, they’re actually getting harder and harder to reach en-mass, especially as people become more aware that they are the digital victims of targeted marketing campaigns.
Naturally we want to market our artists successfully, but we aim to do so in a traditional way, by building audience confidence.

Graffiti are different. We stand only for quality music and after all is said and done, that’s what it’s all about.
Through our key strategies and strong branding, we endeavour to ensure that our roster remain loyal and faithful, and bring back that family value that has been lost in labels over recent years.

We have a presence both in the UK (London) and in the US (Seattle).

Name: MUSDM
Description:
MUSDM is a collective of Music, Sound design and Mixing.

Sounds like an ordinary music production house?
No, it's just way more than that.

Over the last decades, we've done all kinds of musical research, genre-bending productions and been supervising, licensing music specifically to/for our lovely clients.

We're here to keep up with our families and friends.
Also, saying HELLO to those haven't met!

Name: Fremont Symphony Orchestra
Description:
OUR MISSION
The Fremont Symphony Orchestra brings live classical music to residents of southern Alameda County and northern Santa Clara County. Its mission is to enrich the quality of life in the communities it serves by:
•      Maintaining a professional regional symphony of the highest possible artistic quality
•      Reaching all parts of the diverse communities it serves through accessible and affordable programming,       activity and outreach
•      Securing the future of concert music by providing imaginative and enriching musical experiences for children
•      Increasing both the numbers and the musical sophistication of the adult audience
•      Pursuing creative partnerships with other educational and artistic institutions

Name: 44.1 Estudi de gravació, S.L.
Description:
Los estudios 44.1, situados a 5 minutos del centro de Girona, de la salida de la autopista y del aeropuerto Girona-Costa Brava, disponen de unas instalaciones de más de 300m², totalmente climatizadas, con luz natural y con un gran párquing gratuito.
Tenemos una amplia experiencia en grabación y mezcla de todo tipo de producciones en nuestros dos estudios.

Disponemos de un equipo para hacer grabaciones tanto de conciertos en directo como en diferentes localizaciones (auditorios, iglesias, teatros, etc.).

También os ofrecemos el servicio de mástering, tanto en analógico como en digital, para poder acabar de una manera profesional vuestros trabajos.

Name: ensemble mise-en
Description: ensemble mise-en promotes large-scale composition projects and intense performances of contemporary and new music in New York City. The fifteen-plus member ensemble has the breadth of a “chamber orchestra”, but defies the associated hierarchies of power, developing collective long-term programming and performance goals that interrogate canonicity in the contemporary scene. As a collective, the multi-national personnel has coalesced around a real aesthetic agenda, crystalized in the name mise-en; “mee” in Korean, means “beauty”, and”zahn”, “to decorate”, and the group unabashedly promotes “beautiful” artwork to increasingly diverse audiences of contemporary sounds.

Name: AMAG Collective
Description:
ARTIST DEVELOPMENT: AMAG is partnered exclusively with the top independent record label in the world - Cash Money Records - to deliver the finest in artistic development. Cash Money has sold over 1 billion records and developed the careers of superstars such as Drake, Nicki Minaj, Lil Wayne along with countless hit songwriters and producers. AMAG founders Anshu 'AM' Sharma and James 'Redd Eyezz' Pierre closely with Cash Money Records iconic label head Bryan 'Birdman' Williams in the development of new talent.

ARTIST MANAGEMENT: We make no apologies when we say our goal in managing artists is to maximize their revenue. AMAG has done so with artists ranging from Pharrell Williams to Kodak Black;  from Pitbull to Young Thug. Our management, deal-making and A&R work has contributed to millions in extra revenue for our clients. AMAG provides differing levels of management services from basic career coaching to premier management for A-List musicians, executives, and brands.

Description:

with aims to supports local artist to discover and
develop their sound and share them across the world.
We believe that talents combined with professionalism
could improve the local music and bring them beyond
the borders.

We seek to recruit and develop local artists to enhance
their music production and visual representation while
exposing them into the international territories and
establish new global markets for the local Thai music
scene to be discovered.

Name: FEMUSIC
Description:
Crystal Fearon (Artist Manager and A&R at Rapture Records) and Chloe Mykel (CEO and Founder of 1994 Collective) founded FEMUSIC last year, hosting hybrid  networking events which are an innovative hybrid of both education and empowerment, hosted exclusively at our new home, Bar Doña, London. 

The events are an all-encompassing space to thrive for women in the music industry, and each month a panel of seasoned music industry professionals will cover a different topic - one that we feel needs to be myth-busted, shared or spoken about. 

This, combined with a safe space to mingle, drink and dance with likeminded women in music, is the first step for FEMUSIC as we plan to carve out our own lane within the UK music space. 

Pioneering the way we as women interact, support and work with each other, we endeavour to create a strong, valuable community where fruitful relationships can grow.

Description:
Nuestro objetivo siempre estuvo claro: sabemos que  las cosas se pueden hacer de una manera distinta, especialmente en el ámbito de la enseñanza. Description: Choir Alberta actively collaborates with choirs, choral conductors, music educators and choristers to foster the development, understanding and appreciation of choral music. Choir Alberta has presented such esteemed artists as The King's Singers, Conspirare, Ben Heppner, Bramwell Tovey, Rajaton, and Rollo Dilworth. Name: The Jazz Bar
Description:
The Jazz Bar is a universally appealing, multi-award winning basement live music venue. We host a unique mix of outstanding, ever-changing, multi-genre music presented nightly in a stylishly comfortable environment with an ever-present exciting, creative buzz. There’s always interesting music on stage, a great mix of people, and an extensive and eclectic bar selection with friendly service to match so we attract audiences looking for quality in all respects. Coming down the stairs is a very broad demographic of people (18-80!), a diverse assortment of visitors, locals, students and musicians. 
The music is non-stop - three or four gigs per day, seven days a week, every week, every month, all year round. Don’t be fooled by the name! In over 10 years of existence, we have evolved into a UK-revered haven not only for great Jazz, but also excellent Funk, Blues, Acoustic, Roots and more. A small cover charge may apply which goes towards the musicians.

Name: RedElect Songwriting & Production
Description:
WHO WE ARE: 
We are three friends who love making great music. Songwriter/vocalist Josef Gordon hailing from Houston, Texas; Producer/drummer and Robb "Rapture" Hutzal of Calgary, Alberta, Canada; and Composer/Guitarist Kellen Tyler Mills from San Jose, California make up this burgeoning song writing and production trio that is The RedElect. 

WHAT WE DO: 
Our mission is to make great pop music that is indeed "real " music by applying Josef's passion for strong melody and lyrics with the trained versatility of Kellen's composition and chord structure, supported by the always bangin', rhythmic and ear-pleasing esthetics of Robb's production perfection. 

WHY WE DO IT: 
We aim to create a sound that is unlike any other. Robb Hutzal and Kellen Tyler Mills, both graduates of Musicians' Institute in Hollywood, California bring a fresh sense of musicality to a genre sometimes over-saturated with a lot of the same. Josef however helps keep the raw independent edge of his colleagues in a true "pop" balance by ensuring catchy melodies and relatable lyrics. Collectively, we strive to create memorable melodies, thoughtful lyrics, and uniquely well-arranged chord progressions set against smart, percussive, drum and bass grooves.

OUR INFLUENCES: 
Because we each have such a diverse background, we all bring different elements to the table.  Kellen Mills grew up listening to Metal and Hard Rock, Robb Hutzal grew up with Hip Hop and R&B, Josef Gordon with Radio Pop hits.  Some of our writing and production influences, among many others are: Michael Jackson, Quincy Jones, Mariah Carey, One Republic (Ryan Tedder), Timbaland, RedOne, Darkchild, Lady Gaga, Maroon 5, Phil Wickham, Earth Wind and Fire, and Guthrie Govan...

Además, se realiza "Autoría", el podcast de propiedad intelectual para 'dummies', en el que respondemos a todas las dudas de los oyentes sobre este apasionante mundo de los derechos de autoría, en particular, y la propiedad intelectual, en general. Rising Star Music Fund was founded by Kathy Hale in 2009. Rising Star Music Fund has supported such organizations at the W.O. Smith Music School in Nashville, Big House Youth Jam, Macon, Georgia, USC Thornton School of Music Outreach Program

We have established the California State University, Northridge Rising Star Choir and the Belmont University Rising Star Choir for Children with Autism.
Choir therapy combines music therapy with group interaction. Not only do participants have the pleasure of singing, but social interaction skills as well as self-esteem are increased. 
Our program begins in the Winter semester each year with an additional Fall Semester. The program is available at NO CHARGE to the participant families. 
 We hope to be able to establish additional choirs around the country. Please help to  bring the joy of music to these wonderful kids and their families.

Name: Kaleidoscope Orchestra
Description:
Session Orchestra based in Manchester, UK.
A mission to bridge the gap between Classical and Electronic music.

Kaleidoscope Orchestra is a musical collective intent on bridging the gap between musical genres. Drum n bass, dance, trance, grime and dubstep as you've never heard it before: Kaleidoscope uses classical instruments to play non-classical music in new and unexpected ways.

Set up in 2011, Kaleidoscope was the brainchild of two Manchester University graduates, Steve Pycroft and David Tagg-Oram. The orchestra comprises a mix of young music professionals based mainly in Manchester and London. 

After a viral hit with their Skrillex Orchestral Suite (arranged and orchestrated by Steve Pycroft), Kaleidoscope quickly gained notoriety on YouTube, racking up hundreds of thousands of hits on their orchestral suites. These include reinterpretations of music by Flux Pavilion, Major Lazer, Pendulum, Etherwood and Netsky, all endorsed by the artists themselves. Due to the success of these videos Kaleidoscope has worked with some influential brands and artists such as Cream, Gatecrasher, Flux Pavilion, and Dr Meaker.

Outside of the studio, Kaleidoscope has performed live at some top festivals and venues, having been on the bill at Creamfields, Sheffield City Hall, Liverpool Cathedral, Manchester Academy and the O2 Ritz, Manchester.

Name: Bell'Anima
Description:
Em um mundo de excessos, somos essência. Em um mar de ruídos, somos música... A Bell'Anima é uma produtora fonográfica e cultural especializada em música, com sede no Rio Grande do Sul. 

Desde sua criação, em 2015, a parceria entre o músico Vagner Cunha e o empresário Claudio Carrara já resultou em 20 produções inéditas que receberam registro em CDs e DVDs, sendo as cinco últimas reunidas em uma coletânea, lançada no final de 2018: Bell’Anima Vol. I. A intensa produção é resultado da força de um trabalho que preza pela qualidade e o ineditismo, sempre conduzidos pelo primor estético. Através de uma programação cultural ativa que produz e incentiva projetos e artistas de real valor expressivo e estético, a Bell’Anima visa resgatar a beleza do ser humano através da música, envolvendo o público em experiências e imersões artísticas que estimulam o desenvolvimento individual e coletivo. Seus projetos promovem a educação musical e a formação de público através de concertos, saraus e encontros musicais didáticos, além de incentivar a educação musical de base através do Projeto Orquestra Jovem Recanto Maestro, iniciativa de caráter social e pedagógico que leva o ensino de música a crianças e jovens da quarta colônia de imigração italiana, no sul do país. Entre suas produções, destacam-se a ópera O Quatrilho, Concerto para Violão de Sete Cordas e Orquestra e Metaphisica Sinfonia Coral, além do projeto mensal Saraus Bell’Anima, série de concertos intimistas realizados na sede da produtora, no Recanto Maestro, que já recebeu grandes representantes da música popular, como Guinga, Jorginho do Trompete e Luciano Maia, além de nomes da música erudita nacional e internacional, como Carla Maffioletti, Flávio Leite e Ney Fialkow. 

Aqui, a arte se reencontra com o bom negócio!

Description:

NEUESTE WERKE IN DER PRESSE: 
MDR KLASSIK, 17. Februar 2021: KUNST KENNT KEINEN SHUTDOWN: Ludger Vollmers neues Violinkonzert: https://www.mdr.de/mdr-klassik-radio/klassikthemen/violinkonzert-ludger-vollmers-100.html
VIDEOPRÄSENTATION über die Entstehung des Violinkonzertes (inklusive interaktiven, eigenproduzierten Erklärvideos in Zusammenarbeit mit Professor Gernot Süßmuth): https://ludger-vollmer.de/violinkonzert
SOUNDCLOUD: BR KLASSIK: HORIZONTE, Portrait des Komponisten Ludger Vollmer: https://soundcloud.com/user-450312081/horizonte

"A stunning spectacle which reflected the terror and lighter moments of the book so wonderfully well [...] translated it fluidly and — this is so crucial — with courage and boldness.” (Dave Eggers 2019, zu THE CIRCLE).

Arbeit zunächst als Orchester- und Kammermusiker in Leipzig, Magdeburg und Erfurt. Studien der Komposition (Alfred Schnittke, Dimitri Terzakis) und Improvisation (Peter Jarchow) bis 1999. Studienaufenthalte und Stipendien: Norwegen, Türkei, Israel und Griechenland. Seit 1999 freischaffender Komponist (Aufführungen, Sendungen, CD-Prod. in Europa, Australien, Asien, beide Amerika). Verlag: SCHOTT Music GmbH. Schwerpunkt Musiktheater (u.a. in Bremen, Stuttgart, Köln, Karlsruhe, Nordhausen, Regensburg, Hagen, Freiburg, Weimar, Darmstadt). 2010 Istanbuler Opernfestival (Oper GEGEN DIE WAND). 

Preise und Auszeichnungen: u.a. 2009 Europäischer Toleranzpreis für seine Oper "Gegen die Wand". Die Stuttgarter Inszenierung dieser Oper (Regisseur: Neco Çelik) gewann den Deutschen Theaterpreis Der Faust 2011. 2014 Weimar-Preis; 2016/2017 Thüringer Kompositionspreis. Jurymitglied u.a. bei „Jugend musiziert“ und "Akademie Musiktheater Heute" (Deutsche Bank Stiftung). 

Direktkontakt/ Werksliste: info@ludger-vollmer.de und https://ludger-vollmer.de (WEBPAGE BOTH IN ENGLISH AND GERMAN).

Description:

Over a music and film career spanning over 30 years, Mounir reached international status early in his career, performing in festivals in Africa, the Middle East, Europe and the United States, sharing the stage and collaborating with luminaries of world music including Cheb Khaled, Youssou N'dour, Salif Keita and Angelique Kidjo.

Name: Rae Leigh Music
Description:
Rae is passionate about connecting people through the power of stories and the arts. As an acclaimed artist receiving radio support from the likes of ABC Brisbane, ABC Gold Coast, 98.9 Triple A, Murri Country and many more.

Rae is an active collaborator having worked with songwriters both in Australia and Nashville, TN (USA). In 2020, she was awarded a $10,000 prize package from JMC Academy through the Logan City Council Live which resulted in the CMT listed single ‘Just Like That’. Regional Arts Development Fund (RADF) grant was awarded to Rae Leigh for the development of her new single ‘Love Me’ to be released mid 2022 produced by Nashville based Australian producer Michael Flanders. 

Rae maintains a busy performing schedule, performing locally as well as around Australia. In 2021, she co-headlined with Adam Brand at the MMG 85th Fun Fair (Rosebery, Tasmania) and ANZAC Day Vietnam Veteran Reunion Event (Bairnsdale, Victoria), She is performing at the 50th Anniversary Tamworth Country Music Festival in April 2022 and is confirming shows for; Brisbane, Melbourne,  Tasmania and Gold Coast in late 2022. Name: The Wellington International Ukulele Orchestra
Description:
If there were a Ukulele Orchestra Olympics, NZ's team would be suspected of steroid abuse, with their high-octane blazing solos, outrageous outfits, batty banter and unstoppable musical mischief. Joining forces seven years ago, these freaks of the four-string have become a cult favourite, causing a mad scramble for tickets wherever they go and sending audiences into a euphoric state with their spectacular, unmissable funfest. 

The WIUO  formed in Wellington in 2005 and has become an entertainment tour‐de‐force, delighting crowds of all ages with a show that works in opera houses, open‐air vineyards and rowdy pubs. The orchestra’s signature sound features eleven ukuleles, a double bass and a choir of gorgeous voices performing harmonious and hilarious renditions of modern and traditional tunes from the New Zealand songbook and international artists, alongside band members’ original compositions. The band’s New Zealand repertoire comprises a substantial and essential part of its show and recordings.

The Wellington International Ukulele Orchestra was founded by Age Pryor (Fly My Pretties, The Woolshed Sessions) and Bret McKenzie (Flight of the Conchords). The other members are Nigel Collins (actor, guest musician with FOTC), Stephen Jessup (Hula Men, Holidaymakers, Windy City Strugglers), Daniel Yeabsley (Twinset, The Yoots, The Eggs), Gemma Gracewood, Megan Hosking, Francis Salole (Haemogoblins), Carmel Russell, Andrew Morley‐Hall, Bek Coogan (Cortina, Full F*cking Moon).

Nous offrons les cours suivants:
•	Piano
•	Guitare
•	Chant 
•	Batterie
•	Violon
•	Violoncelle
•	Basse
•	Ukulele

Studio C à été fondé en 2013 par les membres de la famille Sciotto Collerette. Une grande partie de son succès est attribuable à la qualité des enseignants qui y travaillent. Les membres de notre équipe sont des passionnés qui ne prendront jamais de raccourcis pour vous partager leurs connaissances et leur amour de la musique.
Une école de musique est aussi bonne que les enseignants qui la représente. Après tout, ce sont eux les grands responsables de votre cheminement musical.  Lors de l’apprentissage d’un instrument, la chimie qui s’installe entre un élève et son enseignant est un point essentiel à la réussite de l’élève. J’ajouterais aussi que cette fameuse chimie vous permettra de réellement apprécier le processus et la pratique nécessaire à l’atteinte de vos objectifs. Un bon enseignant vous fait sentir en confiance et à l’aise de poser toutes les questions qui vous passe par la tête. Nous partageons un moment privilégié lors d’un cours de musique. Pendant un instant, les deux personnes impliqués peuvent se concentrer sur un sujet bien précis, oublier le reste du monde et aller dans la direction qui les intéresse à ce moment précis. Il n’y a pas de limite à ce que la musique peut nous faire penser, ressentir ou même créer ! Cette faculté de créer quelque chose à partir d’une idée ou d’une émotion, nous l’avons tous. Il suffit de vous donner le temps et la concentration nécessaire pour apprendre les bases de l’instrument avec lequel vous avez envie de progresser.

CMS aims to provide the cognitive, emotional, technical and physical benefits of musical participation to every student.

Cultivate Music Studio is the first and only studio in California with an instructor certified in Occupational Octaves Piano, the most comprehensive piano program designed for individuals with special needs. Lessons are one-on-one and students will learn to play the piano while targeting a range of cognitive, motor, and emotional skills. CMS is also the first studio in the South Bay Area offering Musikgarten early childhood group music classes for children ages birth-3 as well as the Wunderkeys piano program for preschoolers.

In addition to studying traditional repertoire and technique, students are encouraged to direct their own musical pursuits. Students will help choose repertoire based on their specific preferences and develop their own musical tastes. Students will also develop real-world piano skills such as composing, improvising and playing by ear. Most importantly, students will learn to approach learning with a growth mindset, and this can positively impact all other areas of life.

Name: Royal Choral Society
Description:
The Royal Choral Society is one of the world’s oldest and most respected symphonic choirs. The 150-strong choir regularly performs in the great music venues in London and beyond, including regular appearances at its spiritual home, the Royal Albert Hall: these include an annual performance of Handel’s Messiah on Good Friday (every year since 1876, barring performances cancelled during the Blitz 1940/1 and Covid 2020/1) and an annual series of sell-out Christmas carol concerts. 

Formed initially for the opening of the Royal Albert Hall in 1871, its inaugural concert was held at the Royal Albert Hall on 8th May 1872. The choir’s name was shortened to The Royal Choral Society (with permission from Queen Victoria) shortly afterwards.

The choir’s history encompasses some of the greatest names in music. Former Royal Choral Society conductors include Charles Gounod and Malcolm Sargent – the latter, described as ‘the finest British choral conductor of his generation’, had a 40-year association with the choir, and Verdi and Dvorák both conducted the choir in premières of their own works. 

Our Music Director, Richard Cooke, took over the baton from his distinguished predecessors in 1995. An experienced singer himself, he understands the capabilities of choral singers and is able to bring out the full potential of individual voices.

Today, the RCS enjoys maintaining a balance between performances of traditional choral repertoire in UK concert halls and taking up opportunities to perform in unusual and contrasting events such as Beating Retreat on Horse Guards parade, BBC Proms in the Park in Hyde Park, singing at the launch of the cruise liner Queen Mary 2, as well as enjoying tours to the USA, Germany, Slovakia, France and Malta to name a few.

Patron HM The King
President HRH The Duke of Kent
Chairman Peter Dart

The Royal Choral Society is a registered charity (No 298389)

Name: music & audiation
Description:
Seminare, Workshops und berufsbegleitende Ausbildungen. Vorbereitende Audiation für informelles Lernen ab Geburt bis Schuleintritt und  für formales Lernen in Schulmusik, Instrumentalunterricht, Ensembles, Chöre für Kinder, Jugendliche und Erwachsene nach der Music Learning Theory von Edwin E. Gordon. Musik lernen wie die Muttersprache. Von Anfang an interaktiv im musikalische Dialog: von den ersten «babbelnden Reaktionen» auf die  Musik bis zur tonalen Gruppenimprovisation. Musik hören, singen, mit dem Körper verstehen, spielen und improvisieren. Die Theorie über das Lernen von Musik (Music Learning Theory, MLT) wurde von Edwin E. Gordon (South Carolina University, USA) entwickelt. Sie gründet auf fast 50 Jahren Beobachtung und Forschung. Sie beschreibt, wie der Mensch von den ersten Lebenswochen an Musik lernt. Es sind die gleichen Prozesse wie beim Lernen der Muttersprache.

Wenn wir Musik lernen entwickeln wir Audiation, der Begriff der von Edwin E. Gordon geprägt wurde und den geistig-psycho-physischen Prozess beschreibt, der uns ermöglicht Musik innerlich zu hören, zu verstehen und selber zu kreieren, auch wenn sie akustisch nicht präsent ist. Audiation ist für die Musik, was der Gedanke für die Sprache. Bildung zur musikalischen Mündigkeit!

The Eurovision Song Contest 2012 was the 57th edition of the annual Eurovision Song Contest. It took place in Baku, Azerbaijan, following Ell & Nikki's win at the 2011 contest in Düsseldorf, Germany with the song "Running Scared" — marking the first time that the country had won the contest. The contest was held at the newly constructed Baku Crystal Hall, with semi-finals held on 22 and 24 May 2012, followed by the final held on 26 May 2012. Forty-two countries competed in the contest — one less than the record number of 43 set at the previous contest, with Montenegro returning for the first time since 2009, and the withdrawal of Armenia due to security concerns in relation to the ongoing Nagorno-Karabakh conflict with Azerbaijan, and Poland due to financial concerns.

The contest was won by singer Loreen from Sweden with the song "Euphoria" — written by Thomas G:son and Peter Boström, the song scored a total of 372 points. Russia finished in second place, with Serbia finishing in third. They were followed by the host country, Azerbaijan, which reached the 4th place. Albania finished 5th, achieving its first top 5 placing. Germany, Italy and Spain were the three members of the "Big Five" that managed to rank within the top 10, finishing in 8th, 9th and 10th places respectively.

Our customer service is second to none and pleases existing customers while attracting new customers through referrals made by satisfied members of the StringWorks family. We delight our customers new and old by availing them modern and antique instruments and bows from professional makers of the world. 

StringWorks offers a wide variety of handmade carved violins, violas and cellos for novice players to professionals. Providing unrivaled quality and value, our violins, violas, and cellos are designed by professional string players so that the instruments are assured of the finest tone, setup, and construction. With a number of instrument lines and thousands of customers worldwide, the company has earned name and fame in the musical industry.

Name: Frameworx Music
Description:
Frameworx Music is a multidisciplinary platform for contemporary dance music and its creative culture. It is our goal to create a path for the creators, by giving them a platform in which the creation and implementation is central.
Through the Frameworx Music record label and music studio, the brand actively builds towards a high degree of brand awareness. With a worldwide distribution network Frameworx Music delivers the music of its artists worldwide through websites like Beatport, iTunes and TrackitDown.

Frameworx Music supports the business functions (such as marketing, bookings and management) and the creative development of artists. The label ensures that the music made by the producers, generates exposure on the market in order to ensure a successful release.

In addition to artist management, handling bookings and being a record label, Frameworx Music also focuses on developing innovative creative concepts for the dance scene. By continually monitoring the developments and trends outside the platform, the company continues to develop itself and contribute to an innovative culture where dance music is central.

Name: The Singing Express
Description:

The Art & Heart of Singing	

 - Comprehensive voice education

 - Western Classical & Contemporary Styles

 - Professional Faculty personally trained by Marianne

 - Intensive but fun Weekly Classes, Masterclasses, Workshops & Vacation Programs



Marianne D'Cruz Aiman is a diploma holder in voice from the Royal Schools of Music (LRSM) and Trinity College, London. She was Vocal Director for the ACE productions of Oliver! and The Sound of Music, and more recently GREASE. She has also taught Voice & Speech at Whistling Woods International Acting Institute. She has worked with music directors like Salim Merchant, Vishal-Shekhar, Vipin Mishra, Amit Trivedi and others; singing in film scores of Kites, Kurbaan, Black, Chak De India, Aamir and in jingles for Micromax Mobile, Dominos Pizza, Morphy Richards, and others.  She has also been the voice of Pocahontas and Snow White in the Hindi language version of these Disney animated films and has gigged with the Christian band Celebrant Singers in the USA.

Students also perform at annual student concerts with other performance opportunities throughout the year.

Name: Barhouse Projects Ltd
Description:
Barhouse Projects Ltd is a dynamic company currently specialising in four different fields within the music industry.

Barhouse

Barhouse is a live music and club venue that caters for all genres of music and plays host to local, national and international acts and dj's. Expect anything from indie, rock, metal, jazz, funk, hip hop, reggae, house, dub step and drum n bass. Spread over two floors and with a large covered outdoor area complete with bar, pool table, foosball table and mini ramp, you can be sure to enjoy a night of varied styles and themes. Barhouse also shows live sporting events and films on large HD projector screens both inside and out and hosts regular live graffiti and skate nights.

An artist management agency offering energetic tour management to national and international acts.

Barhouse Festival Bars

Festival bars with a difference. Not only do we supply all bar equipment and manage an efficient, fun bar for any festival or event but also offer dj's, live / acoustic acts of any genre and the 'barhouse longe' with sofas, bales of hay, and lighting.
Proffessional staff that serve with a smile and ensure the festival spirit runs throughout your event.

Barhouse Records

A young record label releasing mainly indie / dance tracks available through digital download and in 7" vinyl format, Barhouse Records has achieved radio airplay with BBC Radio 1, 1 Xtra and Xfm with artists Cathouse, Axis Colour and Don't Wait Animate. Releases and remixes have also been played out by many dj's including Kissy Sell Out, Annie Nightingale, Eddie Temple Morris and John Kennedy.

Staff credits include collaborations with artists such Lauryn Hill, Smashing Pumpkins, Whitney Houston and Taking Back Sunday. Major labels including Universal, Warner Music, Sony, and Def Jam.

We are located in Chelsea, one of New York City's most convenient and creatively energetic neighborhoods. Bring your project to So Loud, and we'll deliver craft finesse, and a working experience that exceeds your expectations.

Name: American Composers Alliance
Description:
ACA is a nonprofit organization that publishes, distributes, and licenses music from its catalog. It is a service for composers to join the collective catalog, and promote their works to reach a wider audience, including international distributors of contemporary music and the general public.

The ACA catalog is curated by professors and leaders in the field of classical music. We add over 100 new works every year. ACA does not require assignment of copyright by the composer, though certain aspects of copyright must be exclusively licensed to ACA in order for ACA to manage and administer services.

Description:
ONLY Espectáculos es una agencia productora, de management y representación artística que nace en 1982 de la mano de su fundador, Miguel Polidano.

Además cuenta con los tributos de mayor calidad músico escénica como son: Tributo a Rocío Jurado (único en España), Abba Revival, Tributo a Antonio y Rosario Flores, Tributo a Michael Jackson y Tributo a Queen (ambos para Cataluña), entre otros. Name: Lindo Guitars
Description:
Lindo Guitars – Designed with passion in our Bristol Headquarters in the United Kingdom by experienced guitar players, we offer a unique range of electric, acoustic, classical, bass guitars, amplifiers and accessories for budding musicians and more experienced players.

We aim to provide an experience that we would expect from a company and therefore pride ourselves on our service, experience and technical expertise. We believe that each and every customer should receive all the information they need to invest in the right product for them.

The Lindo Guitars team consists purely of guitarists, designers, engineers and artists. The aim of the company is to blend innovation and creativity with functionality and value-for-money in perfect harmony; to ultimately offer a desirable product you will want to keep and enjoy for as long as possible.

Name: Warehouse Wax Music Ltd
Description:
Warehouse Wax Music Ltd is a digital record label...

Starting in 2003 Warehouse Wax released 12 records on vinyl, which, whilst having a very specific Old-Skool vibe, also utilized some very modern production techniques, giving the music more of an upfront flavor. Unbeknown to them at the time, they were inadvertently assisting in the creation of a new underground genre of dance music that would eventually become known as Hardcore Breaks. 

The label disbanded in 2008 for a few years while head honcho (Vinyl Junkie) took a few years out to concentrate on his degree. Now, Warehouse Wax have re-launched themselves into todays digital marketplace and in 2013 became a LTD Company. Still in keeping with the Old-Skool vibe that they’ve always had a great passion for, but also pushing forward with a new sound. A sound that is currently gathering momentum in the UK…

Known to some as Future Jungle and to others as 140 Jungle. Here at Warehouse Wax we don’t care what you call it, Hardcore Breaks, Rave Breaks, Jungle Breaks, whatever!!! It’s all just great music to us… Bass heavy music with a breakbeat as its driving force… 

The Company Director John Woods (Vinyl Junkie) has a first class honours degree in Music Tech and Production as well as a PTLLS teaching qualification and he also offers some other music related services... Production work, Production tuition (Specialising in Logic) and professional acoustics advice for small studios...

Name: The Soundtrack Studio
Description:
The Soundtrack Studio is a soundtrack production company ran by the young professional Daan van Keulen.

He has been producing in a variety of genres from an early age. From experimental electronic music, to trance and to soundtracks, he always tried to create musical pieces which carries a certain emotional, mysterious or uplifting feeling.

The key elements of his music are strange, experimental, electronical sounds, combined with sampled piano and orchestral pieces, to create this unique atmosphere you will only hear in his pieces. Slow but intense buildups with the use of subtle changes are recurring elements in his musical pieces.

Name: FestiFallz
Description:
FestiFallz komt terug op 7, 8 en 9 oktober 2022

Na een zeer succesvolle eerste editie van FestiFallz in 2021 zijn we verheugd dat we komende oktober op herhaling mogen! Met gepaste trots presenteert Bospop op 7, 8 en 9 oktober 2022 de tweede editie van FestiFallz.

Line-up
Verdeeld  over drie festivaldagen weten we de crème de la crème van de Nederlandse artiesten te verwelkomen. Het belooft echt een feest te worden met een fantastische line-up. Denk aan Snelle, Rondé, Davina Michelle, Walter Trout en Chef’Special.

Op vrijdagmiddag kun je vanaf een uurtje of vijf al het festivalterrein op voor een avondvullend programma van de beste tributebands met onder andere The Vipers, de Italiaanse Queen tribute band met zang van Giuseppi Maggioni. Hij won in 2014 The Voice Of Italy.

Zaterdagmiddag openen de deuren al om 13 uur. Met optredens van Rondé, BZB en Snelle is er voor ieder wat wils. Chef’Special maakt het zaterdagprogramma compleet. Met zijn combinatie van funk, ska, pop, rock en reggae is dit het Haarlemse vijftal, met als belangrijkste inspiratiebron the Red Hot Chili Peppers, niet meer weg te denken van de Nederlandse poppodia. Chef’Special vormt daarom een waardige afsluiter voor de 2de FestiFallz 2022 dag.

En ook op zondagmiddag hebben we een gevarieerd programma met Tricklebolt, Hundred Seventy Split, Navarone en Vandenberg. Davina Michelle, bekend van nummers als “Duurt te lang”, “Hoe het danst”, “17 miljoen mensen” en het nummer “Beat Me” (speciaal geschreven voor en gezongen op de Formule 1 in Zandvoort vorig jaar). Bluesgigant Walter Trout, die al meer dan vijf decennia op het podium staat en o.a. samenspeelde met grootheden als John Lee Hooker, sluiten ons festival op zondag af. Het optreden van Walter Trout op Bospop 2022 vorig weekend werd alom geprezen, daarom zien we hem graag als afsluiter terug op FestiFallz.

Net als vorig jaar vindt FestiFallz plaats in een grote tent op het oude bekende Bospopterrein aan het Sportpark Boshoven in Weert.
