Name: Aquarius Pustaka Musik
Description:
Aquarius Pustaka Musik is a limited liability company engaged in the management of copyright which founded in 1993.

As an experienced music publisher, we specialize in administering musical works (musical compositions), protecting the rights of songwriters, exploiting, as well as preserving them against all commercial uses, so that creators are able to gain economic rights that arise from it. In Indonesian territory, our company is the administrator for Sony/ATV Music Publishing repertoire.

Name: Center for New Music
Description:
The Center for New Music fosters contemporary music’s growth by giving practicing artists access to professional resources and expertise, and by providing them with opportunities for sharing knowledge and exploring new ideas.

The Center for New Music San Francisco, Inc. is a community center for participants of new music in San Francisco. The Center serves the practitioners of creative, non-commercial music by providing the resources they need, including space to work, rehearse, and perform, access to a like-minded community, and access to media resources. Through these services, the Center seeks to support and build the community of new music to encourage its efficiency, growth, integration, and excellence.

Name: Scandinavian Sync
Description:
Scandinavian Sync is your one-stop shop for production and sync music.

We represent a multitude of labels, artists, songwriters, music catalogues, and services to everyone who needs music for their productions. From blockbuster movies, TV-series, corporate videos, commercials, video games, radio jingles and fashion blogs, to individuals running a small Youtube channel in their leisure time.

Aiming from Sweden, with offices in three nordic cities, we live and breath music from all over Scandinavia every day. And as this corner of the world being one of the most interesting areas in the music world right now, we’re on a constant search for collaborations where our music can help. Our main objective is to always have the best songs from the most syncable scandinavian artists in our catalog. We call it a one-stop shop since we are ready to handle it all. We’re your filter, guide and your cicerone.

Music from our catalog has been successfully and respectfully placed in all types of productions, from the smallest up-and-coming Youtube-phenomenon, to the largest corporations in the world. Featured in as varied media channels as HBO, MTV, Showtime, Viacom, Twentieth Century Fox, France5, SVT, DR, NRK and many others.
Today we have three areas of business: Sync/Licensing, Custom music, and Production music.

www.scandinaviansync.com

Name: UniVr Music
Description:
At UniVr Music we develop innovative solutions with the aim to make woodwinds drying and sanitizing, easier faster and more efficient. 

Keeping their woodwinds in good condition is essential to all musicians to preserve their health as well as their instrument from harmful microorganisms. 

For more information concerning our products, be sure to visit our website.

Name: Nicholas McCarthy, Pianist
Description: Nicholas McCarthy was born in 1989 and only began to play the piano at the late age of 14. Born without his right hand, he is one of a few left-handed pianists worldwide. He has played numerous recitals throughout the UK, in venues including St James`s Piccadilly, Fairfield Halls and Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford. He has also won a number of prizes in competitions in London and throughout Britain, most recently he was awarded an AMI Award for his creative excellence in music. Nicholas is currently a student at the Royal College of Music, where he studies with Nigel Clayton.

Description:
Sodarock Music is an entertainment management company specializing in artist, producer and songwriter management. With clients around the globe, Sodarock Music operates offices in Nashville, London, and Berlin.

Description:
Durham University Orchestral Society comprises Durham University's leading orchestras: a full-scale symphony orchestra and a smaller, elite chamber orchestra. The society enjoys regular performances in Durham and the surrounding areas, and also undertakes an annual tour, most recently to Munich, Barcelona and Ljubljana.

Recent highlights for the society have included performing for HRH Prince Charles in a sold-out Durham Cathedral, a feature in 'Gramophone' magazine, and masterclasses with Jac Van Steen and Peter Stark.

Name: Escuela de Música Albéniz
Description:
Nuestra escuela es un proyecto vivo con 30 años de experiencia y la ilusión del primer día.

Ofrecemos enseñanza musical desde los 3 años con métodos innovadores en los que se enseña a través del juego, así como enseñanza formal para acceso a conservatorio. Nuestros métodos, perfeccionados a lo largo de 30 años de historia, garantizan el aprendizaje musical a todos los niveles, desde lenguaje musical a composición, improvisación y grupos.

Ponte en contacto con nosotros en: albeniz_em@musicaeduca.es

Name: Perfect Pitch Publishing
Description: Perfect Pitch is a full service music publishing company specializing in synchronization into film, television, and advertising; writer representation and administration:- song placement, co-writing opportunities, specific composition briefs and representation throughout the world via a network of pro-active publishing companies; Australian and NZ representation of International catalogues.

Name: Independent Digital Licensing Agency Inc (IDLA)
Description:
IDLA is the first digital distributor to be established that is owned by a wide representation of independent labels and distributors. 

Twenty leading independent labels organized IDLA — The Independent Digital Licensing Agency — to provide independent labels and artists more efficient and economic digital asset delivery to digital music services, royalty collection and administration through an organization whose financial interests are directly aligned with its independent artists and label members. IDLA is 100% independent owned — we are not affiliated in any way with any of the major label affiliated distribution companies.

Name: V-Sag
Description:
Working as a Software Developer in major companies in Greece since 1996, was one of the assets that helped V-Sag expedite his music knowledge and succeed in the professional Music Industry. His repertoire gathers millions of views and plays around the internet while being the first official remixer of Loreena McKennitt worldwide and in the likes of record labels such as Universal UK, Armada, EMI UK and DJs like John Digweed, Tiesto, Hernan Cattaneo, Paul Oakenfold to name a few.

To complete his success in the Greek music industry, his single “Lonely” surpasses 3.000.000 views in a couple of months and has been featured in prime advertisement spots and shows in Greek national TV and he is currently having major collaborations with some of the most famous artists in the country. Internationally were widely active and also the lead music producer, composer and piano performer of one of Turkey's biggest hits which surpassed 67.000.000 views on YouTube, "Oldu Onlanar".

He is one of the most achieved electronic music producers of his country, with over 8 albums released worldwide and founder of the non-profit technology-loving organisation The Nerds, and a certified musician and teacher by Berklee College of Music and UEL. His albums cover all of the electronica facets and his sound is uniquely identified when heard.

Self-taught and as a computer expert, his biggest advantage is the fast learning when acquiring completely new software knowledge to go through any essential requirements for his job. 

V-Sag is a certified Dolby Atmos and Apple Digital Mastering engineer working closely with The Sound Of Everything UK, delivering the quality sound he has been known for the last 20 years.

The last few years, he teaches affordably and mentor on selective students that trust his knowledge, and love them and support them with all his heart. He wants to give a hand of help that he did not have when he was young, and discover and help new talents.

Name: Dj Rex
Description: A Dj specialising as an Alternative Dj, a Goth Dj, a Techno Dj, a Rock Dj, an Old School Rave Dj, a Trance Dj, a Techno Dj, a Metal Dj, an Industrial Dj, an 80's Dj, pretty much anything a little different!! :) ....... from the mobile and party circuit in the 80s, to huge alternative clubs in the 90s, to touring the world in the 00's then opening a tattoo shop in the 10s, i wonder what's next!! :)

Name: Bis Music
Description:
Somos una Casa Discográfica, Productora Audiovisual y Editora Musical perteneciente a la empresa cubana Artex S.A. Con 25 años de experiencia, poseemos un catálogo que incluye grandes exponentes de la música cubana…
Excelentes artistas del panorama musical cubano han grabado bajo nuestro sello.
De manera constante adquirimos y desarrollamos nuevas figuras y conceptos…
Producimos valiosas compilaciones de archivo… Fuimos la primera Casa Discográfica cubana en ganar un Premio Grammy Latino, co varias nominaciones en este certamen de la música latina.
Poseemos un fondo de más de veinte mil temas musicales que comercializamos mediante diversas líneas de negocio desde la venta del producto físico en una red de tiendas en toda Cuba hasta el licenciamiento por diferentes conceptos y el comercio online de música.

Name: ESTUSHA
Description:
En su camino, Estusha descubre su pasión por explorar particularmente el canto de las diferentes culturas del mundo, de esta manera encuentra su propio estilo.
En su camino se encuentra  con la compañia disquera Warner Bros. y producen un disco y dos video clips , dandole  vida al primer proyecto de World Music en México, Cielo y Tierra, que la lleva a compartir escenarios con músicos como Jon Andreson, vocalista del grupo Yes; Maná, Café Tacuba, Tania Libertad, entre otros.
Después de Cielo y Tierra, Estusha dedica varios años a crear el proyecto Vakna Kobal que se coloca de nuevo en el género de World Music, mezclando cantos, sonidos, instrumentos, de diferentes culturas étnicas y tradicionales del mundo con música contemporánea, usando su voz como instrumento en un estilo propio, donde la improvisación juega un papel primordial.
En su búsqueda musical, produce dos discos, La Música del Mundo en México y Brasil do México en este explora el genero del jazz nutriendo y abriendo otro camino en su voz; esto la lleva a la producción de su quinto y más reciente disco, Transiciones.
Transiciones marca un punto de partida hacia otro género musical que, conservando algunos elementos de World Music y aplicándolo al Rock, se convierte en una poderosa propuesta de Rock Fusión inspirado en el poemario Cantos de Ignorancia Iluminada, del connotado científico y escritor mexicano Jacobo Grinberg-Zylberbaum, padre de Estusha.
Estusha y sus diferentes propuestas musicales se han presentado en varios de los más importantes escenarios de México, como Cumbre Tajín Veracruz, Auditorio Nacional, Ciudad de México , Festival Tamoanchan World Music en  Morelos, Festival Santa Lucía Monterrey, Teatro Degollado Guadalajara, Teatro Campo Cuernavaca, Virginia Fábregas Ciudad de México etc...
ESTUSHA  http://youtu.be/Robs-78jQoU
CIELO Y TIERRA (WEA) http://youtu.be/RoqyJD22VPg

Name: Park Cities School of Music
Description:
Park Cities School of Music believes that a knowledge and appreciation of music and the arts is fundamental to the development of each individual and that the arts provide unique opportunities for cultural exchange and community understanding. We value music’s unique ability to improve the human condition.

We provide a quality music education to the residents of the Park Cities and greater Dallas area, done so in an environment that nurtures achievement and creativity and offers all students the opportunity to pursue personal development and enrich the quality of their lives. Our goal is excellence, providing a broad range of music-centered programs for preschool and school-age children, teens and adults. We aim to bring out the passion of music in all our students.

Name: Music Neighbors
Description:
We’re advocating for the diversification, connectedness, and sustainability of Nashville’s music communities by helping musicians amplify their artistries through our 501(c)(3) nonprofit’s media production services. We serve these musicians with our services ranging from funding studio recording sessions to providing a platform for artists to discuss how they utilize music to self-heal and enrich our city’s culture.

Our ambition is to connect people to more Nashville music artists of all genres. We believe diversity in music is important, and work hard to create a safe and positive space for the community to discover new music. The platform we’ve created allows artists of any size or notoriety to fully express themselves in the way they envision.

Name: Bona Casa de Música
Description: O Bona Casa de Música é uma pequena casa de shows em São Paulo que promove apresentações de artistas da música independente brasileira. Com uma programação constante, um trabalho de curadoria cuidadoso e uma acústica pensada para oferecer a melhor experiência sonora tanto para os músicos como para os espectadores; a casa se tornou uma referência no meio musical da cidade.

Name: Sara Simms Productions
Description:
Sara is a pioneer of the harmonic mixing technique, and enjoys educating other Djs about this musical concept, which allows her to blend together different styles. She has starred in a series of tutorial videos for the groundbreaking software company ‘Mixed in Key’ and was also featured on DJ Qbert’s ‘Turntable TV’.

As a teen, Sara grew up playing jazz guitar, but left music school to learn the art of turntablism under the watchful eye of gifted battle DJ. After a few years of gigging and late night scratch sessions, Sara went back to school for a degree in Audio Engineering. She then secured an internship at Canada’s premiere mastering facility, Lacquer Channel Mastering. At the studio, she independently mastered records for international electronic artists and even tried her hand at cutting vinyl lacquers.

Sara Simms got her start in the electronic music scene playing at after hours parties in Toronto in 2007. In a few short months, Sara rose up quickly in the Canadian club scene, and soon being booked at venues by the city’s top promoters, including Fukhouse. Her most successful achievement in Toronto was her residency at This Is London, one of the city's finest superclubs.

When she’s not in the clubs, you can find Sara in the studio working on remixes and original productions. Her music weaves together her equal loves of electronic experimentation, turntablism and the guitar.

Name: Juicebox Live
Description: Herts biggest and best Indie night at venues in the St Albans, Bedford, Hemel Hempstead and Watford areas. JUICEBOX also run nights in London, and will continue to bring you the best music around Live bands, and the best music played by DJ's who care.

Name: Projeto ViraMundo
Description:
O ViraMundo realiza apresentações musicais nas dependências de hospitais da cidade de São Paulo, com o principal objetivo de integrar a música aos cuidados da saúde. O projeto, ao levar cultura para pacientes internados, familiares e equipe médica, atua diretamente na humanização do ambiente hospitalar.

Os músicos e idealizadores do Viramundo possuem vivência em experiências semelhantes e desde 2005, participam de iniciativas culturais em hospitais de São Paulo e da região sudeste do país: Hospital Infantil Sabará (SP), Santa Casa de Misericórdia de São Paulo, Hospital das Clínicas - FMUSP , A.C.Camargo (SP), Grupo de Apoio à Criança e Adolescente com Câncer - GRAAC, Beneficência Portuguesa (SP), Hospital São Paulo - UNIFES, Associação de Assistência à Criança Deficiente - AACD (SP), Hospital Santa Marcelina (SP), Hospital do Câncer de Barretos (Luis Inácio Lula da Silva), Hospital Pequeno Príncipe (Curitiba), Hospital das Clínicas (Curitiba), Hospital João Paulo II (Belo Horizonte), Hospital das Clínicas - UFMG, Liga Contra o Câncer (Natal).

O repertório proposto é resultado de 11 anos de pesquisa focada na linguagem do Choro, gênero instrumental tipicamente brasileiro. Além de Valsas, Polcas, Tangos, Maxixes e Schottish (rítmos que compõem o gênero do Choro), os músicos do Viramundo apresentam cantigas de roda, músicas infantis e outras canções populares, adaptadas para a linguagem instrumental do Choro, sendo assim capaz de se adequar a públicos de todas as faixas etárias, desde recém-nascidos a idosos.

Name: Large Music
Description:
Located in the vibrant city of Chicago, Large Music holds a place in history as one of the most influential and popular dance music labels in the world. Our mission is to celebrate the joy of modern urban living through rhythm and sound; we delight in exploring and combining a wide variety of musical genres such as House, Electro, Downtempo, Jazz, and even Salsa. This unique vision has given us a consistent history of widespread critical and commercial success throughout our 18 year run. Our impressive roster of established artists such as Kerri Chandler, Chuck Love, Miguel Migs, DJ Rasoul, Roy Davis Jr., and Dennis Ferrer have all contributed to the sound that is simply known by music lovers as “Large”.

Collectively, the Large Music catalog has been licensed in over 23 countries and has appeared on over 300 compilations including Mark Farina’s Mushroom Jazz, Naked Music’s Nude Dimensions and Ibiza’s prestigious Café Del Mar Series. Our seminal release “Gabriel” by Roy Davis Jr. reached the UK Top Twenty in the fall of 1998 and was featured in the critically acclaimed Alvin Ailey Dance Theatre World Tour. 

We seek the sophisticated music lover who has an appreciation for eclectic sounds and shares a positive outlook for the future of dance music. With a desire to maintain our underground credibility, we are now poised to forge ahead in the global mainstream dance market and entertainment culture.

Name: DrumMax Custom Drums LLC
Description:
What happens when you combine a Spanish-Italian Uruguayan who has spent 34 years as a professional drummer with the most talented artists, artisans, metalworkers, and craftsmen around the United States?

You get DrumMax Custom Drums, the greatest new drum company you’ve never heard of.

DrumMax is a boutique custom drum building company based in Indianapolis, Indiana. While we CAN do everything any custom drum company can do, our areas of speciality are creating exclusive, custom woodworked designs in exotic woods, hand-painted one-of-a-kind artist designs, and unique custom wraps. 

Our attention to detail means we create extraordinarily good-looking drums that sound fantastic. 

At DrumMax you'll meet Leonardo Baroncini, our Chief Drum Geek. With 34 years experience as a professional drummer, Leo has spent a lifetime building and unbuilding kits, playing around with making drum kits resonate and just plain work better. He’s also a talented craftsman with an eye for design. And while every demo kit we create at DrumMax has Leo’s aesthetic, he’s also adept at translating the designs our customers request so that their drums are even better and more “them” than even they envisioned.

In our home office, you’ll find Leo’s wife, Susan Baroncini-Moe, Chief Business Geek. Susan handles the boring business and marketing stuff and calling suppliers and cracking skulls to make sure your drums make their way to you as quickly as possible, without sacrificing quality.

Name: Joe Denim
Description:
Joe Denim was born somewhere in downtown Indiana during the mid - 70’s. He was home schooled so this makes it almost impossible to cross reference school documents with medical records to determine his true age. What we do know, is that Joe has allergic reactions to Advil, Pine Nuts, and the Jonas Brothers. The son of a Baptist Preacher, Joe has picked up some mixed visions on how things should socially be that sometimes expand into the everyday parameters of normal life.

Joe developed a passion for music after his grandmother taught him to whistle Dixie at age 3. After many failed attempts at trying to play the harmonica as a child, Joe’s future of having a career in music looked bleak. But, Joe wasn’t a quitter; he’d pick up anything with strings, sticks or keys and tried to make music with them. When he was 9, he recorded his first song.

Joe Denim’s career in music has finally started to take shape, bringing Comedy, musical and video creations such as, The Red Solo Cup Parody, “2 Girls 1 Cup,” and “Go Straight To Goodell” to friends and fans all over the country. Joe’s forth coming album titled “Currently Un-Employed” is expected to drop late this summer. 

Joe and crew look forward to bad catering, hangovers and cheap hotels in his rigorous touring schedule in the upcoming months. For more information visit http://www.joedenim.com or Find and Follow him on Facebook and Twitter at http://www.facebook.com/DenimJoe and http://www.twitter.com/DenimJoe

Name: Dubas
Description:
Digital e analógica, a Dubas segue ampliando seus horizontes. Novos discos, singles e vídeos reforçam a noção de que a música é uma obra de arte para todos os sentidos. Essa inquietação e toda a experiência adquirida ao longo do tempo também contribuem amplamente para o trabalho da Editora Dubas na administração e divulgação das obras de uma diversidade de compositores brasileiros, assim como da representação de importantes catálogos internacionais. 

A editora se desenvolveu como um dos principais focos da Dubas. Nosso repertório reúne as obras de diversos compositores brasileiros e importantes catálogos internacionais em um vasto universo de sons, talentos e estilos, que certamente tem o que você precisa para traduzir grandes ideias em música. Aliado à experiência adquirida ao longo dos anos de atuação também como selo musical, o cuidado em conhecer cada vez mais as características de cada catálogo permite mediar as necessidades e interesses tanto de autores e detentores de direitos quanto as dos clientes interessados em associar seus projetos às obras administradas. O resultado final é um trabalho que tem a segurança necessária para ser sempre inovador e a legitimidade para desempenhar ativa participação junto às associações de direitos autorais e diferentes fóruns de debate sobre o tema.

---
Dubas record label tells a story of modern Brazilian music through its catalog, uniting inspiration and research with creativity, always in tune with what is new.
The company also has greatly developed as an active independent music publisher, becoming a reference in Brazil, present on the board of the Music Publishers Association (UBEM) and of one of the biggest Brazilian Performing Rights Society, UBC.

Name: SellaBand
Description: SellaBand is based in Munich and Berlin, the creative capital of Europe. Since its launch in August 2006, SellaBand has coordinated recording sessions for more than 80 artists or acts who had their albums funded by their fans. Over $4,000,000 have been invested in independent bands via www.sellaband.com. With SellaBand, artists retain complete ownership of the works created and have the flexibility to determine which incentives they will offer their fans who fund them. SellaBands fan funding engine also allows artists the freedom to enter into deals with any label, management company, or publisher and there are no advances to pay back. Artists maintain control over their career and have 100% freedom to create the music that they want to create. SellaBand can also be utilized by management companies, record labels, publishers, sponsors and media companies to fund projects for their own artists while also building the core fan base required to launch an artist or take them to the next stage of their career.

Name: Anita Lerche
Description:
Since Anita released her Punjabi album ”HEER FROM DENMARK” in India via record company Goyal Music, November 2006, her career as an international recording artist and star has expanded leaps and bounds. 

Asians/ Indian's across globe have shown great appreciation and support for her work and talent. This led to her touring countries such as UK, Germany, Norway, Denmark, China, Israel, Greenland, Europe and the USA, performing and entertaining crowds of thousands with her outstanding performances. 

In 2007 she created a Hindi Song for Indian Cricket team during the World cup 2007 as well as success singing Hindi Bhajans for the Ram Navemi celebrations in Punjab.

TV channels and newspapers across Punjab and many other cities in India have been following Anita’s musical career closely since its initial and official launch in Punjab India in March 2006. 

Anita Lerche is the first non Asian woman from the West to sing and release a solo album in the Indian Punjabi language, an outstanding achievement.

THE TIMES OF INDIA writes: "...Anita has also rendered traditional Heer in the album and succeeded in imbuing the depth, pain and passion of the rich composition. In fact,
going by her style and pronunciation, one would get the impression that she is a Punjabi only to discover that she is a white."

Anita received a Punjabi Music Award in 2007 for BEST NRI FEMALE DEBUT from the Punjabi music channel MH1, and she has been acknowledged by PUNJABI
UNIVERSITY, Patiala, for her grand work for the Punjabi language and culture. 

Also received the SITA MATA AWARD from a religious society in Jalandhar for singing Hindi Bhajans.

Anita Lerche's singing capability doesn’t end there. She is in fact able to sing and perform in 14 different languages of the world. 
 
Currently Anita is working on her 3rd Solo Punjabi Album.

Anita also perform in other genres like: Musical Theatre, Pop, Danish Songs, Church Music, Operetta

Name: Cincinnati Music Festival
Description:
Originally called the Cincinnati Music Festival when it was first held in 1962, the Macy's Music Festival has grown and evolved into a spectacular two-day event on Cincinnati's riverfront. Starting out as an all-jazz concert, it has evolved and grown into a two-day festival featuring great music from the hottest stars in R&B, jazz, soul, and hip-hop, as well as up and coming artists. Past performers include Aretha Franklin, Duke Ellington, Miles Davis, Luther Vandross, Gerald Levert, Patti Labelle, New Edition, Earth Wind and Fire, Lakeside, Whitney Houston, Stevie Wonder and many others.

By the year 2000, the festival was the largest of its kind in the United States, drawing more than 50,000 people annually from all across the country. The festival has been held at various sites through its 50 year history, including French Lick Indiana, the Carthage Fairgrounds, and the Hamilton County Fairgrounds before landing at its current home in Paul Brown Stadium on Cincinnati's river front. Accompanied by a street festival dubbed Festival 513, the Cincinnati Music Festival has an estimated annual economic impact of $25 million, according to the Greater Cincinnati Center for Economic Education at the University of Cincinnati. In 2005, Macy's became the festival's headline sponsor, and continued on for 10 years through 2014. 2015 will mark the first of many years in Partnership with Cincinnati based global company P&G.

Compone e produce musica per la televisione a New York e poi torna in Italia dove lavora come compositrice per la Rai. In teatro compone le musiche per gli spettacoli di Paola Minaccioni e Federica Cifola, Carlotta Corradi, Veruska Rossi e Marco Costa, di cui compone anche le musiche di un film per il cinema. Name: The Bothy Society
Description:
The Bothy Society was born in early 2020 founded by Jen Anderson and Nichola Bremaneson and is home to a vibrant family of Contemporary Traditional Scottish musicians and offers a range of music industry services. No family member is the same, so we work to suit their specific requirements whether that is management, releasing through our label, supporting their own label setup, marketing & promo, live booking or tour management.

Jen has worked in various music industry roles for a range of companies including Fiction Records (Universal) as an A&R scout, Sound Travels Live as a tour manager and coordinator, DF Concerts as a promoter, King Tuts Recordings as a label manager and Back Yard Music as head of business affairs. She’s also taught at a variety of educational establishments including Point Blank Music School, SAE Institute, Academy of Contemporary Music, Diversity in Visual Arts and The Academy of Music and Sound. As well as this she has also featured as a regular guest on BBC Radio 1 and BBC Radio Scotland as part of the A&R zone introducing new music, served as a peer reviewer for Routledge (global academic book publisher), served as an advisor to PRSF and spent 5 years on the T-Break panel advising on acts for the new band stage at T in the Park.


Nichola graduated from the Royal Conservatoire of Scotland in 2019 with a Masters in Music Performance and gained her undergrad degree from the celebrated BA Applied Music course at the University of Strathclyde. Throughout her life, she has performed in a variety of bands and ensembles and has experience as a touring musician. Nichola knows what musicians need to make their jobs easier - on tour or closer to home - and she is passionate about the live music scene.

Name: China Tropical
Description:
China Tropical é um projeto que buscar criar uma relação direta entre as indústrias musicais independentes do Brasil e da China, através de residências e co-produções entre artistas de ambos os países. 

O projeto foi idealizado pelo artista e produtor independente brasileiro Ale Amazonia, que é radicado na cidade de Xangai desde 2012; onde além de atuar como produtor de filmes, documentários e festivais de cinema brasileiros na China, também é membro fundador da banda de proto punk chinesa OH! Dirty Fingers 脏手指.  

Desde sua fundação, em março de 2019, o projeto levou para a China os artistas brasileiros Tulipa & Gustavo Ruiz, Ava Rocha e Negro Leo, participando de residências artísticas e co-produções musicais com os artistas chineses Yehaiyahan, 33emybw & Gooooose. Além das residências, os artistas brasileiros também realizaram shows ao redor de 6 cidades na China, promovendo seus trabalhos autorais para o mercado e público chinês. 

Para suas duas primeiras edições, o projeto contou com a chancela e o apoio da Embaixada do Brasil em Pequim, além das gravadoras independentes chinesas Merrie Records,Maybe Mars Records & Genjing Records, e da plataforma de mídia independente Subtropical Asia.

Name: Theme and Variations Piano Services
Description:
Theme & Variations Piano Services specialises in one thing: helping our customers find the right acoustic piano.
In the early 1980s, piano technician Ara Vartoukian and his wife, Nyree, formed Theme & Variations Piano Services offering tunings, restoration, sales and hire services. The company has grown to produce a team of highly skilled and motivated staff who enjoy long-term relationships with customers and the respect of industry peers. Each showroom is backed by a well-equipped workshop offering expert after-sales service. Our workshops are renowned for quality tuning, rebuilds and restorations.

As the exclusive agents for Steinway & Sons, Boston and Essex pianos in NSW and QLD, Theme & Variations have been providing pianos to prominent concert and education venues for many years, including the Sydney Opera House, the City Recital Hall, the Queensland Performing Arts Centre and many more. Whether it is a concert grand or a beginner piano, Theme & Variations will offer the highest level of customer care with back-up service that is second to none.

Buying a piano at Theme & Variations means that you are purchasing from a company that has in-depth knowledge of the piano industry, a history of excellence and a team specialized staff who are passionate about pianos.

Description: Salsa Dance Gear was founded in 2010 with the goal of making it easy to find all your salsa-related clothing and apparel. Robert is also a founding member and instructor of the Gator Salsa Club, an official University of Florida organization with over 800 members.

Name: Ecole Speed Piano
Description:
L'école de piano de la Butte aux Cailles propose une formation évolutive avec une méthode d'enseignement accéléré. 

Les inscriptions aux modules se font sur évaluation toute l'année.

Découvrez nos modules de cours : 

- Module Initiation : 
J’apprends les premiers mécanismes pour déchiffrer et jouer mes premières chansons à deux mains au piano (maîtrise des 
accords + mélodie). 
Je peux jouer six chansons et je déchiffre parfaitement la notation des accords : A, B, C, D, E, F et G. 
Je sais jouer tous les accords de : maj7, 7, m7, m7b5, aug et dim. 
J'utilise « les renversements » dans l'enchainement des accords. 

- Module Perfectionnement : 
Je développe mon répertoire et je peux interpréter plusieurs chansons dans le style piano bar (méthodologie pour enrichir 
les interprétations). 
J'apprends à contruire des « voicings » plus riches pour accompagner n'importe quelle mélodie à la manière d'un pianiste pro. 

- Module Blues & Boogie et Improvisation : 
Je joue les accords Blues et j'utilise les "blue note" dans mes improvisations (étude sur standard du Blues et du Gospel). 

- Module Composition : 
Je compose ma propre chanson dans les règles de l'art (étude des progressions harmoniques). 

- Module Jazzissimo : 
J'enrichis mes connaissances harmoniques en fonction de ma personnalité afin de développer mon répertoire Jazz (étude des 
grands standards du Jazz). 

Les inscriptions aux modules, hors 
« Initiation » se font sur évaluation.

Description:

Todos con un denominador común, somos Djs!

Somos un medio sobre Djs hecho por Djs! Conocemos nuestro medio, conocemos nuestra cultura, es por ello que hemos diseñado esta propuesta comunicacional con una línea editorial amplia y a la medida de las necesidades de nuestro publico, nuestros colegas y nuestros anunciantes.

Name: Marconi Bellows
Description:
Più di 100 anni di esperienza e tradizione nel cuore della zona di Castefidardo, Patria della Fisarmonica.

Da tre generazioni produciamo mantici di alta qualità utilizzando prodotti pregiati e maestranze esperte e specializzate.

“Impara l'arte e mettila da parte”, diceva Antonio Marconi che agli inizi del novecento, cominciò a produrre mantici, attività questa tramandata al figlio Fernando e oggi portata avanti da Giorgio e Lorella Marconi.

I materiali specifici ed il cartone di qualità, flessibile, robusto, leggero e di eccezionale durata nel tempo, sono fondamentali per produrre mantici  apprezzati da chi fabbrica fisarmoniche di alta qualità.

Marconi Bellows è il valore aggiunto che chiede l'artigiano della fisarmonica di classe.

Name: Amersfoorts Jeugd Orkest (AJO)
Description:
Missie: het Amersfoorts Jeugd Orkest wil voor de jeugd uit Amersfoort & omstreken een uitdagend podium zijn, waarop hun muzikale talenten volledig tot bloei kunnen komen.

Visie: het Amersfoorts Jeugd Orkest wil een zo breed mogelijk publiek bereiken door de partituren (meestal uit het verleden) juist nú met jonge mensen uit te voeren en ze daarmee nieuwe glans te geven!

Wij nodigen professionals uit die hier een directe bijdrage aan kunnen leveren. Denk daarbij aan samenwerking met andere kunstdisciplines zoals zang & dans, maar ook aan het ten gehore brengen van (nieuwe) composities binnen andere muziekgenres zoals pop, jazz, tango & klezmer.

Solisten worden bij voorkeur zo gekozen dat zij, qua beleving en het liefst ook qua leeftijd, dicht bij het orkest staan. Dat kunnen ook solisten uit eigen gelederen zijn. Voorbeelden daarvan zijn: Ralph Dijkema (trombone), Colette Overdijk (viool), Linde Holtkamp (fagot) en in de nabije toekomst Jochem van Hoogdalem (hoorn).

Name: Hunter Corp Limited
Description: Hunter Corp Limited (HCL) partners with music artists and investors to build music-based brand empires.  Their model is truly revolutionizing and democratizing the music industry and has been heralded by music and marketing industry execs alike as being a true game-changer in this space. They have already seen great successes for their artists, with 250+ million Spotify streams, 200+ million YouTube views and 2+ million fans combined (as of July 2019) and also offer a unique investment opportunity to select partners.  This opportunity is facilitated through their syndicated investment model, directly into an asset-backed company.

Name: Jazz Interlude
Description:
Jazz Interlude was spawned in the UK and now lives in Finland as well. The business produces events and owns several jazz websites covering festivals, jazz clubs, gig listing services and musician promotional activities.

Currently we're working on producing a new jazz festival in Finland, soon to be two, produces Jazz Club Jury.com, The Image of Jazz.com, Kind of Blue Hosting.com – dedicated to providing the jazz industry brilliant web services, as well as launching Jazz Calendars.com and Jazz Directory.net soon.

Another very special project of ours will be to launch our very own jazz club in Helsinki. It promises to be the best jazz club in Helsinki, hosting local as well as international acts, serving excellent food and wine. 

Look forward to letting you all know when we're ready so you can add some vitality to your taste buds, while absorbing the most excellent sound that is jazz.

Name: Dukes Productions
Description:
Dukes Productions is a music composition, audio production and sound design studio based in Castleconnell, County Limerick. 
The studio is run by Daragh, a freelance composer and audio producer working on music, TV, film, radio, media and performance projects, examples of which you can see on the Recent Work page here: http://www.dukesproductions.com/#work

Name: I Sens
Description:
Multi-instrumentiste depuis son plus jeune âge, I Sens découvre le Dancehall et le Reggae à l’adolescence. En quête de vérité et d’engagement, il puise naturellement son inspiration des artistes jamaïcains, anglais et de l’univers Hip Hop français. Initié au monde des Sound System par Shifty du Sativa Sound en 2012, il en fait rapidement une spécialité et commence à se produire sur scène. 

En 2015 sort une première mixtape, From The Light, sur des faces b, suivi en 2017 de l’EP Cycle, avec cette fois ci des productions de Biggus et du Diplomatik’s Crew. Après plusieurs mois de création, Maaad voit le jour en 2019 , premier street album d’I Sens. En 2020 sort Police, un nouveau single au texte conscient et fédérateur sur les violences policières qui cumule aujourd’hui plus de 55K vues. 

Imprégné de voyages formateurs sur le continent Africain et l'Australie, il y aiguise sa plume et sa vision du monde avant de s'installer dans le Sud Ouest de la France, alternant phases de création musicale et live. Il enchaîne des concerts sur la côte et à la montagne avec Selecta Antwan (Terminal Sound). Il se présente aussi sur scène avec le Binghi Crew, un combo survitaminé entre Dancehall, Hip Hop et Reggae : de la DY-NA-MITE

Name: PR Records Label Group
Description:
PR Records Label Group is an independent Swedish music label Group devoted to releasing a wide variety of world-class electronic dance music. 

The label PR Records was Started back in 2007 , instant it began hosting local home-grown material from rising talents in native Sweden. 
As it grew from its humble beginnings, the label started expanding to neighboring Scandinavian countries. 
Today, PR Records har grown to PR Records Label Group, and showcases various artists from the four corners of the globe. 

Already proving itself as a renowned dance music authority in Europe, PR Records Label Group, along with its artists, are still pushing their ideas and goals to the limits, reaching for a wider scope of audience. 

The tireless search for a new breed of artists to introduce to the community, as well as diligently working on pioneering sounds to challenge trends in the scene, is the driving force behind PR Records Label Group, and is what the labels are all about.

Name: Dig Vinyl
Description: Established in March 2014 on Liverpool’s iconic Bold Street and quickly becoming a destination for tourists and locals alike, Dig Vinyl was the inevitable product of decades worth of record dealing, DJing, band managing, record label running, and music making of it’s founders, Anthony Nyland and Carl Emery. Since then we’ve seen three expansions, one big move down Bold Street, and the opening of our second permanent shop on West Kirby's Banks Road in November 2023. We're all about the wax - tirelessly sourcing ultra-rare finds and essential reissues, stocking fresh vinyl daily from the UK, America, Japan and beyond. Our browsers at both shops are packed with second-hand records and essential reissues that cater to all musical preferences - from killer classics to guilty pleasures, there's something for everyone… whether you're a seasoned digger or just getting started. And it doesn’t stop at the tunes! We’re also deeply rooted in the local & national music scene - hosting regular DJ events around the city, curating the quarterly CRATE record fair in Birkenhead, and managing pop-up shops everywhere from the legendary Albert Dock to the David Bowie World Fan Convention, as well as at festivals around the city (Sound City, Liverpool International Festival of Psychedelia) and farther afield (We Out Here Festival, London’s Independent Label Market). Pop in and see us for a dig today at either location, or visit digvinyl.co.uk for a virtual browse!

Name: Era of the Engineer
Description:
Era of the Engineer is a social enterprise founded by GRAMMY nominated audio engineer, DJ, and record producer, Young Guru.

Their fundamental belief is that EVERYONE is an engineer.  Whether  you love sports, fashion, art, or music; there are components to engineering in everything. With that said, Era's mission is to 'empower the builder'.

Era of the Engineer partners with various entities on both civic and private levels, to promote engineering in ways that catalyze interest in engineering amongst minorities and women with the goal of closing the digital divide by 2025.

Name: Bellas Artes School of Music
Description:
Bellas Artes is a family-owned music school devoted to mentoring musicians toward a joyful, servant-hearted life in the arts. We offer private one-on-one lessons in piano, violin, cello, guitar, and voice. 

At Bellas Artes, we believe that learning to play music is not just about acquiring the mastery of an instrument but about enlarging the soul to see beauty and cultivating a virtue and depth of character commensurate with that beauty. This is a journey that we embarked upon when we were children because someone believed in us and gave us an opportunity. Now, in turn, we absolutely love the fact that we are getting to invite others to join us as well in this pilgrimage.

Because we view teaching as mentorship, and not simply the transferral of information, we place high priority on relationship with our students and their families.  We believe in our students and take great joy in seeing them discover that they can do things they never knew they could do before.

We hope you feel at home in our studio and decide to join us!

Name: Ebonit Saxophone Quartet and Foundation
Description:
Ebonit Saxophone Quartet is a renowned, international chamber music ensemble based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.

The Ebonit Saxophone Quartet plays original repertoire and arrangements for saxophone quartet for a wide audience. The quartet's mission is to introduce the versatility and warm sounds of the classic saxophone quartet. The quartet also collaborates with other professional musicians, composers from the Netherlands and abroad and professional artists from other art disciplines. The four musicians bring chamber music of the highest level to the listener and strive to pass on their love for the music.
The Ebonit Saxophone Quartet wishes to distinguish itself as a chamber music ensemble and as a saxophone quartet in particular, and to continue to develop artistically. This also includes continuing to develop original repertoire and arrangements for saxophone quartet. Distinctive are the various programs, made up of these innovative arrangements and original works.
An important goal is to take the international career of the quartet to a higher level.
Other important goals are to give concerts for audiences that have little or no access to the concert hall and to give master classes to young music students.

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/EbonitSaxophoneQuartet
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/ebonitsaxophonequartet/

Name: Pulsipher Productions
Description:
My goal is to bless the lives of other using piano music by:
1. Using the versatile nature of the instrument to excite the minds and enrich the hearts of a wide variety of listeners.
2. Give people an environment in which their own creative juices can begin flowing with their respective needs and goals, enabling them to release stress, draw upon their deeper internal emotional reserves and reach peak performance in all they do.
3. Giving people a form of down time/entertainment where their money is going to something constructive and edifying which feeds the mind in a world with so many time wasters and destructive habits.
4. Create musical art that motivates and enables people to become the best version of themselves.

Name: Laurentius
Description:
From the city of Zwolle in the Netherlands, pop producer Lars Beerda, better known as Laurentius, started producing music in 2014. With an impressive track record of over 15 million streams worldwide, Laurentius is a name that resonates with those seeking the perfect harmony of uplifting and happy music.

Lars's musical journey is defined by his 'Smile More' vision. This vision is more than just music; it's a call to action, a rallying note to build a vibrant community where positive influence is central. Through his music, Laurentius is trying to unite people, using its uplifting beats and catchy melodies as a gateway to bring individuals together.

Laurentius is celebrated for his ability to blend exotic sounds from across the world seamlessly into pop hits, crafting fresh and unique sounds that captivate audiences around the globe. His work is not only embraced by listeners but also supported by some of the biggest names in the dance music scene, underlining his significance in the industry.

Laurentius even graced the Spotify Top 50 charts, showcasing his global appeal. His talents were first globally acknowledged when he was nominated for a Grammy for the Best Electronic Production of 2019 in Guatemala, solidifying his status as a world-class music producer.

Name: Parea Series
Description:
We are Emily and Will, opera singers and co-founders of Parea Virtual Recital Series! When our upcoming performances were cancelled or postponed due to COVID-19, we decided to create something new: virtual performances in a unique format that allow us to look deeply and differently at music, safely collaborate, and strengthen our connections with musical friends and mentors. 

In the Parea Series, we perform music and discuss it with experts through short video interviews. Our full-length programs put these different perspectives in conversation to create a concentrated fusion of music and discussion. We believe that the people and ideas involved in making music are just as interesting and important as the music itself, and that distance can bring us closer together and help us reconsider our identities and goals. No in-person contact is involved in our work; our productions are completely safe for both audiences and artists.

Parea (pronounced: pa-RAY-uh) is a concept in Greek culture suggesting that personal connections and lively conversations with circles of friends are meaningful and indispensable parts of life. During this time of isolation and distancing, our performances help us deepen the bonds we have with our friends in the musical community and in our audiences, adding to our circle in the process.

Name: iGaming Audio
Description:
iGaming Audio is a B2B service provider comprising of a team of audio professionals dedicated to bringing top-quality audio assets to igaming developers.

Our roster includes an international network of composers, sound designers, producers, voice-over artists, mixing and mastering engineers. many of whom have been involved in numerous Hollywood, TV and high-profile game productions.

If audio is important in regular video games, it is twice as important in online casino and fantasy sports games. A carefully-crafted sonic palette that enhances the immersive experience of the game and keeps the player engaged at all stages is an incredibly important element in successful igaming solutions.

Although slot games have evolved immensely during the past few years and their graphics and animations are often reminiscent of Hollywood blockbusters and AAA console games, audio is an often overlooked but equally important element. We are striving to change this, one game at a time!

Name: Strange Fruit
Description:
De drijvende krachten achter Strange Fruit zijn DJ’s Lucky Dubz en Thelonious, beiden al 10 jaar berucht binnen de Rotterdamse muziek scene vanwege hun enorme muziekkennis en draai-ervaring. Vanuit hun gezamenlijke liefde voor muziek is het ‘Strange Fruit’ concept circa 4 jaar geleden geboren. 

Als organisatie brengt Strange Fruit een unieke mix van muziek en street-art. Wij streven ernaar om binnen het aanbod van de Rotterdamse uitgaanscultuur, evenementen met een hoge muzikale kwaliteit te bieden van zowel wereldberoemde artiesten als enkele minder bekenden uit de underground scene. 

Muzikaal gezien bestrijkt het Strange Fruit concept een breed muzikaal spectrum van dubstep via hiphop naar nu soul en latin. Strange Fruit has it all!. Strange Fruit wil zijn bezoekers meenemen op een muzikale ontdekkingsreis die uiteindelijk uitmondt in een massa schreeuwende, lachende, dansende en flirtende mensen. De bezoeker van de Strange Fruit avonden zal keer op keer worden uitgedaagd om kennis te maken met dansbare feelgood muziek uit de meest uiteenlopende stijlen, waardoor ze uiteindelijk met een euforisch ‘Strange-Fruit-tastes-good’ gevoel naar huis gaan.

Remember the days…you asked the DJ for what tune he played? Strange Fruit brings that Back!

Name: Viva Vox Choir
Description:
In 2005. our friendship and love of music lead us to the idea of founding our own choir. We wanted to do something new, different and unconventional, curious about finding out how the most popular songs would sound if they were performed by us. We were committed to keep the choir free of all musical instruments - all except for our own voices and beatboxing.

We posted a "Du hast" (Rammstein) cover and expected absolutely nothing. But we were blown away when almost one million people watched our video in one week! That's how the story of Viva Vox, led by the conductor Jasmina Lorin, began.

In 2011 we put on our first big concert in Belgrade. One year later, we had three concerts in a row in the same concert hall.

We were invited to put on a full concert at the General Assembly of the United Nations in New York in January of 2013. We became the first choir from this part of Europe that had the privilege to perform there. The year ended with a concert in the Parliament of the People's Republic of China in Beijing.

At the beginning of 2015 we recorded our first album and only a few months later, we performed in front of more than 10.000 people in the Belgrade Arena.

In the meantime, we were also performing in all of the biggest festivals in the region, including one of the best European music festivals - EXIT.

We created an image of an a cappella choir with a "bold" repertoire, doing covers not only of pop and rock music, but heavy metal and industrial songs, introducing dubstep and electronic sounds to our a cappella singing.

In 2016, we got the invitation from ORF, the Austrian public service broadcaster, to participate in their international choir competition - Die große Chance der Chöre. We made it to the semi-finals and took part in the making of a Christmas album produced by Sony.

At the beginning of 2017, we added another genre to our repertoire - film music and musicals.

As of the year 2018. Viva Vox has held more than 250 concerts all over the world.

Name: The Musical Museum
Description:
The Musical Museum in Brentford is home to an extensive collection of self-playing musical instruments. Our interactive guided tours with live demonstrations for all ages offer a unique journey through the evolution of automated pianos, orchestrions, intricate music boxes and gramophones brought from around the world. We meticulously restore instruments allowing visitors to experience intricate mechanisms and sounds that defined music for generations.

Founded with a passion for preserving the legacy of mechanical music, we host a variety of concerts, educational programmes, and silent film screenings accompanied by live music. 

Located in the heart of Brentford, the Musical Museum is easily accessible to all visitors. As a registered charity, we welcome donations that help us preserve our collection. Connect with us to stay updated on our latest exhibits, events, and educational opportunities.

Name: Refresh Collective
Description:
Refresh Collective is a 501(c)3 arts and youth development organization 
with recording studios + screen printing shops in Cleveland and Cincinnati, Ohio. We are music producers, songwriters and screen printers who harness the power of music and fashion to equip youth and uplift communities.

Our neighborhood recording studios and screen printing shops offer workshops, summer camps and in-school programs that have helped over 6000 youth and adults write songs and design t-shirts that address social justice, education, and health concerns. Youth grow in confidence and character as they craft their message and build strong relationships. Young adults develop transferable employment and leadership skills while planning, producing, and promoting our collaborative work. Professional artists develop new work, perform community concerts and mentor youth in the heart of the city.

Inner-city youth experience a disproportionate rate of poverty, homelessness, violence, and abuse. Refresh Collective is uniquely qualified and has proven capabilities to build intentional relationships, create safe spaces, deliver arts programming and provide workforce skill development from caring professional artists. Our artists are mentors who teach with care and commitment. In fact, the demand for our work has grown. You can help us increase our capacity to serve more youth in the heart of the city. Your donation makes a BIG difference!

Name: DyHard Productions Ltd
Description:
Hi, welcome to DyHard Productions. We are Ian & Tim Hardwick, brothers, composers and co-founders of the company. 

We formed DyHard Productions in 2013 and we’ve had the pleasure of writing custom songs, composing soundtracks and producing music for a huge array of projects ever since.

We grew up playing music together and after graduating from the Jazz & Rock Academy of Music, we performed for audiences worldwide in a touring rock band. As our music career progressed we started to combine studio and composition work alongside touring. We soon received an offer to write the soundtrack for a large scale project at the City of Dreams casino in Macau, and DyHard Productions was born!

It’s been a pleasure for us to create such a wide range of music for so many different people and receive some very kind and positive feedback.

Now we work from our studio in the sunny south of Taiwan, close to the beach and inspiring landscapes that maybe you can hear in our music.

Here at DyHard, we offer a bespoke music composition service that caters not only for large scale corporate projects but also helps bands, artists and new up and coming talent to create professional tracks ready to release to the world.

From full soundtracks, songwriting, topline writing, lyrics, production and arrangement, YouTube intros, jingles, kids songs, ghostwriting and more, we can help.

We’re looking forward to hearing from you.

“Music is a language that doesn’t speak in particular words. It speaks in emotions, and if it’s in the bones, it’s in the bones.” ― Keith Richards

Description: StIJL wil de jazzkenmerken innovatie, communicatie en improvisatie vertalen naar een inspirerend, hedendaags en toegankelijk festival voor een brede verzameling doelgroepen. De kenmerken van jazz worden hierbij ingezet ter stimulering van verbinding, verdieping en vermaak ten behoeve van de bezoekers en deelnemers van JazzOUT Fest Limburg. JazzOUT Fest Limburg biedt binnen één evenement een goede balans tussen vermaak, verdieping en inspiratie. Musici uit de Nederlandse, Belgische of Duitse jazz-communities vormen de basis van de programmering, aangevuld met nationale top en wereldtop. Door artiesten met elkaar te verbinden en lokale musici intensief te laten samenwerken met (inter)nationale top vinden er muzikaal inspirerende ontmoetingen plaats. Door de toevoeging van een uitgebreid educatief en maatschappelijk programma worden deelnemers ook uitgedaagd te participeren. Voor de Limburgse gemeenschap levert dit cultuurparticipatie, sociaalmaatschappelijke verbinding en cohesie op. JazzOUT Fest Limburg verrijkt het (culturele) leven van de inwoners van Limburg en daarbuiten. We dragen bij aan een bruisende provincie. Bovendien versterken we de onderlinge samenwerking tussen culturele instellingen in Limburg.

Name: Ken Smith Basses
Description:
Since 1978, the actual year of incorporation, it has been my goal to produce the best playing bass possible. As a professional musician, I longed for a better, more comfortable bass. At that time there were no custom bass parts available, bridges, or even electronics other than what you could find in a music store. I designed the first prototype on paper in my New York apartment. Soon after, I began constructing a neck and body from scrap Pine to get try to get the shape just right. After a few more prototypes, custom circuit, bridge, and pick-up designs, Smith Basses were ready for purchase. Today, our basses are still 100% handcrafted in our shop, built with exotic wood selections from all around the world. Any questions? Give us a call!

President and Owner
Ken Smith

Name: TOA -- Transylvanian Opera Academy

TOA was created by the Perennis Association in 2017 to address Romania’s “talent drain”, a societal phenomenon particular to post-Communist countries whereby young talents are compelled to leave their country in the pursuit of international-level education and professional opportunities.

In order to respond to this phenomenon and create an international-level opera academy in situ, TOA fosters an environment of introspection, growth, and achievement for young opera professionals in the heart of Transylvania, which will challenge its participants while helping them to successfully negotiate the transition from student to professional.

Description: Built in the 1920s, the Gothic Theatre used to be a place for Denver residents to flock to for silent films. After a couple friends saved it from destruction in 1988, the Gothic is now one of the world’s premiere music venues. The Gothic hosts chart invading superstars but never strays too far from its neighborhood roots. The updated venue lays down opportunities for local up-and-comers and is immersed in the local indie scene. It's not often a place can keep with the trends and still retain the flavor of the underground. In either respect, it is the ideal place to listen to your favorite bands while being surrounded by the art-deco architecture of the early 20th century.

Description:
Magnetic Bonbons a progressive pop group based in Munich with influences from all over the world. Currently recording our first EP.
 
Our sound is eclectic, with strong vintage feels and curated influences from each of our backgrounds. We love music and cherry pick creatively. 

The Founders:

Born in Miami, Florida, Veronica comes from a musical family and has been writing and cowriting songs for almost two decades. She likes complex lyrics that tell a story, but isn’t above a good “yeah, yeah, yeah.” She's studied vocal technique in the U.S. and Munich. 
 
Filip is from Bucharest, he picked up a guitar in high school and never let it go. He studied classical and jazz guitar at the National School of the Arts, Bucharest, and later spent some time learning music at university. He is also a luthier who makes beautiful instruments. He is married to Ioana and they have two beautiful boys. 

We’re millennials (barely) born three months and half a world apart; in 1982.

Name: Howlin' Wolf Blues Society
Description: The objectives of the Howlin' Wolf Blues Blues Society are to promote blues education in North Mississippi and to perpetuate the musical achievements of Chester Arthur Burnett, a native son of Clay County, Ms., and other blues greats such as Bukka White, Big Joe Williams, and West Point's lesser known Bluesman, "Piano Red".  To honor “The Wolf”, his home town holds an annual memorial festival. To date, there have been 15 successful festivals and a memorial black granite statue of “The Wolf”, along with a memorial bench and marker honoring Lillie Handley Burnett, "Ms. Wolf", placed in our park. The Howlin' Wolf Blues Museum and Howlin' Wolf Blues Trail marker have been established also. In honor of Wolf, our society and the Burnett family received the Mississippi Musicians Hall of Fame Award, the Walk of Fame Award on historic Beale Street at the VIP party before the 2002 Handy Awards, and the Peavine Award at Cleveland, MS. given by  the Mississippi Delta Blues Hall of Fame. In 2007, Richard Ramsey and the Society was honored by receiving the prestigious Keeping the Blues Alive Award.

Name: Fundació Òpera a Catalunya
Description:
La Fundación Òpera a Catalunya (FOC) se constituye como el instrumento necesario para garantizar la continuidad y el crecimiento del ciclo Òpera a Catalunya, liderado durante más de 38 años por la Associació d’Amics de l’Òpera de Sabadell (AAOS).

La FOC nace como la suma de fuerzas de cuatro instituciones de referencia en el sector de la cultura: la Associació d’Amics de l’Òpera de Sabadell, la Orquestra Simfònica del Vallès, la Fundación Banco Sabadell y la Fundación Fluidra. Dos entidades líderes en el desarrollo de la música y la cultura en el territorio catalán desde la iniciativa civil y dos fundaciones empresariales primordiales en el desarrollo del país por medio de la música y la cultura como ejes principales.

Las cuatro entidades tienen su origen y su sede en la ciudad de Sabadell y mantienen una larga trayectoria de compromiso con la cultura en todo el territorio catalán.

Los objetivos de la FOC son la creación, producción, dirección, exhibición y comunicación de las producciones operísticas y líricas dando continuidad a la actividad actual. Se promueve de esta manera el ciclo Òpera a Catalunya, en colaboración con el Departamento de Cultura de la Generalitat, el Ayuntamiento de Sabadell, el Ministerio de Cultura, la Diputación de Barcelona y otras instituciones, y con el soporte de diferentes patrocinadores, colaboradores y mecenas.

Siempre teniendo presente la consolidación y el impulso de la ciudad de Sabadell como centro de producción operística y sinfónica, como motor que da servicio a todo el territorio catalán y como herramienta de democratización, proximidad, accesibilidad y articulación territorial a través de la música. Forman parte del circuito de Òpera a Catalunya las ciudades de Sabadell, Sant Cugat del Vallès, Manresa, Granollers, Reus, Girona, Vic, Tarragona, Lleida, Viladecans, Tortosa y Barcelona.

Choisissez votre artiste, le reste, on s'en occupe !

Notre nouvelle rubrique « Têtes d’affiche », regroupe des artistes créateurs à la notoriété grandissante ainsi que de grands noms de la scène Française qui nous font confiance tels que Tom Frager ou Michaël Jones…

Découvrez les meilleurs groupes de musique à Bordeaux, Paris, Toulouse, Biarritz, Montpellier, Lyon, Marseille et partout en France.
Producteurs d'artistes et de tournées, nous imaginons et donnons vie aux évènements dont vous rêvez. Cela fait plus de 15 ans que nous évoluons dans le milieu professionnel de la musique, profitez de notre expérience !

Notre spécialité, c’est la musique live, le spectacle vivant, nous aimons ces moments forts où les musiciens communiquent leur énergie avec le public et nous laissent de beaux souvenirs. Nous partageons avec eux la même passion.

Nous sommes concentrés sur ce savoir-faire et vous êtes de plus en plus nombreux à nous faire confiance… merci !

Description: Bringing you the ABSOLUTE best in Gospel Music. Changing the way you hear Gospel Music, 1 listener at a time. Call us at (888)-406-1998 x0 Download our app for iPhone/iPad and Android

Name: Music Fog
Description:
Music Fog is a web-focused music blog and production venture which promotes and celebrates the Americana music scene. 

Music Fog is a full-fledged mobile production company that creates its own dynamic content. The staff has years of on-site production experience specializing in portable digital audio and video capture. The one-of-a-kind content is broadcast world-wide, on demand and in perpetuity.

Name: 99 posse
Description:
99 Posse is an Italian hip hop/reggae group from Naples. It raps both in Italian and in the local Naples dialect. Most of 99 Posse's songs deal with political or social issues, and the group members are considered left-wing hardliners. As a showing of their activism, all of the group's albums have been released with a prezzo politico ("political price"): each CD displays a sticker saying "Don't pay more than...". For 99 Posse, this means "putting into practice a specific understanding about their relationship with the market, a sort of ideal practice." The group has gained popularity in Italy through its songs and its voicing of progressive political causes.
Its first album, Curre Curre Guagliò (1993), was mainly influenced by reggae and world music. Subsequent albums, Cerco Tiempo (1996) and Corto Circuito (1998), included new styles like drum 'n bass and trip hop. Curre Curre Guaglio was self-produced, but rose from its underground status to become an iconic album and cultural manifesto that eventually inspired the film Sud by Oscar-winning director Gabriele Salvatores. The group also has its own record label, Novenove, which works to promote underground artists.

Name: Jeremy Borum - Composer, orchestrator, music copyist & engraver, author
Description:
Jeremy Borum is a film composer, orchestrator, and music engraver. Among the first wave of working composers to see the digital de-monetization of music as a piece of history, not an ongoing process, he built a successful music career in an uncertain industry that is re-inventing itself. An active member of the Society of Composers and Lyricists, he is a contributing author to their quarterly journal The Score. He has worked globally with many major orchestras and studios, recording or performing in about 30 countries to crowds as large as 80,000. He teaches a bi-annual intensive film scoring seminar at Citrus College in Glendora, CA. A do-it-yourself guy to the core, he has also built two studios and custom gear.

Jeremy is a founding member and co-owner of the digital sheet music publisher ZMX Music. Prior to his time with ZMX he prepared music engravings for many of the largest print music publishers including Hal Leonard, EMI, Edition Peters, Alfred, Morning Star, and others. Thousands of his music engravings are available both digitally and in print worldwide.

Jeremy studied music at the Colburn School of Music in Los Angeles, CA, Berklee College of Music in Boston, MA, Australian National University in Canberra, Australia, and University of California in Davis, CA.

Name: Roland Russia
Description: Roland Corporation является ведущим производителем и дистрибьютором электронных музыкальных инструментов, включая клавишные и синтезаторы, гитарную продукцию, электронные ударные, цифровое записывающее оборудование, усилители, аудио процессоры и мультимедийные продукты. С опытом разработки музыкальных инструментов в течение более 35 лет, Roland устанавливает стандарты в музыкальных технологиях, за которыми следует весь мир.

Partner with us spreading the joy of music.

Name: Banda de Música de Arca
Description: Esta banda foi fundada no ano 1864 por D. Cristóbal Regueiro Fandiño, que dirixe por espacio de trinta e cinco anos á Banda da súa vila natal. Sucédenlle os seus fillos, Manuel e Ricardo, que continúan o labor do seu pai no período que vai dende 1900 ata 1932. Un neto do fundador, Manuel Regueiro Naviero, vai se-lo que colla a batuta desde o ano 1932 ata ben entrado 1940. Arredor desta data faise cargo da Banda o músico compostelán D. Andrés Blanco, coñecido agarimosamente polo alcume de Rebornecho. D. Rosendo Mato Hermida sucede a D. Andrés Blanco a partir de 1947. Tras unha paréntese de oito anos, no que asume a dirección D. Benito Iglesias Viñas, retorna á Banda D. Rosendo en 1974 na cal segue ata o ano 1989. No trienio 89-92 pasa a ser director o xoven natural de Taragoña D. Xavier Ces Calvo, quen ademáis é músico da Municipal de Santiago e mestre no conservatorio de Arzúa. Desde o 92 ata o 98 dirixe a Banda D. Ramón Vigo Deza natural de Fao (Touro), alférez e músico da Banda Militar de A Coruña. Actualmente a batuta está ó cargo de D. José María Blanco Pampín, veciño de Arca e músico da Banda desde que era un neno. Este xoven fixo a carreira de saxofonista no Conservatorio de A Coruña, e é membro da Banda de Música Militar de A Coruña.

Name: Heureka Music Agency
Description:
Heureka Music Agency | Excelling in Talent Booking & Crossover Production since 2010  | Makers of Volvo Symphonic & Mark Ronson's Budapest Event and many more  | Proud home of the Heureka Pop Orchestra | Your go-to for film score recordings & symphonic masterpieces 

The past seven years’ best productions include:
- The Volvo Symphonic: launching the latest model of Volvo XC 40, in cooperation with the Special Event event organizing agency,
- Mark Ronson's performance at the Miller Music Amplified event in Budapest,
- Stochelo Rosenberg & Friends: Stochelo Rosenberg, the world-famous guitar virtuoso’s concert, who was accompanied by the Swing à la Django orchestra and Roby Lakatos 
- The Best FilMusic Songs Concert Show -  the most popular film hits in specially commissioned, symphonic orchestration

In the past two years, the agency has presented a vast array of symphonic productions with their own orchestra. The Heureka Pop Orchestra has routinely assisted many bands to boost their songs using the monumental qualities of a full symphony orchestra.
Our agency undertakes also complete implementation of film score recordings.

Name: Flutes & Flutists Pty Limited
Description:
Since 1988, we have had the privilege and honour of supporting the musical journey of every flute player who placed their trust in us. We believe helping our clients choose their perfect instruments only begins our relationship, and we look forward to continuing to maintaining their instruments and providing advice for many years to come.

At FLUTES & FLUTISTS, we believe playing and learning a musical instrument leads to a more fulfilled and well-balanced life. For everyone who works here, whether professional performer, teacher or repair technician, the instrument of choice is the Flute. We are all extremely passionate about this wonderful instrument, which is why we’ve chosen to surround ourselves with many of the finest flutes available today.

However, no two flute players are the same, which is why we take great care and pride in helping people find the instrument that perfectly matches their playing and personalities, each and every day. Then with their Perfect Flute, musicians can focus on what is most important - creating beautiful music. With our extensive range of instruments, carefully chosen from the best in the world, we believe that your Perfect Flute is sitting in our collection at this very moment, waiting for you.

Name: Guitar Showcase
Description:
Showcase Music Corporation strives for excellence in customer satisfaction by providing the best possible customer service from start to finish. The heritage of world class musicians that comprises the Guitar Showcase family of employees prides itself on the Golden Rule: treating our customers the way in which we would like to be treated if we were the customer.

We differentiate ourselves from our competition by not only offering an excellent value on all of our products and services but by also endeavoring to exceed the expectations of every customer by providing a truly sincere and world class customer service experience, every time.

Name: Centro Studi di Didattica Musicale Roberto Goitre
Description:
Il Centro Studi di Didattica Musicale Roberto Goitre nasce nel 1984 allo scopo di proseguire, sviluppare e diffondere l'opera didattica e pedagogica di Roberto Goitre, in particolare e di altri illustri musicisti del nostro secolo, quali Carl Orff e Zoltan Kodàly. 
In collaborazione con enti pubblici e privati (assessorati, comuni, associazioni culturali e ricreative, scuole dell'infazia e primarie) promuove corsi permanenti di educazione e istruzione musicale per bambini in età scolare e pre-scolare. 
Il centro opera attivamente con le istituzioni scolastiche e organizza incontri, convegni, seminari di studio, attività corsuali periodiche e permanenti di formazione e aggiornamento per docenti, maestri di coro, allievi di conservatorio e coristi. Tra i musicisti e docenti che sono stati chiamati a tenere corsi di formazione per insegnanti di musica presso il Centro troviamo: L. Di Segni Jaffé (Istituto DAlcroze, Ginevra); S. Guerra-Lisi (Pro civitate Cristiana, Assisi); P. Erdei e K. Nemes (Kodaly Institute, Kecskemet); W. Hartman, M. Do Amaral, M.C. Jorquera (Orff-Sculwerk, Salisburgo); F. Calvino Prina "Musica e movimento"; E. Strobino; R. Deriu; M.I. Tosto; T. Visioli e molti altri
L'idea che ha consentito la nascita del Centro Goitre è stata ispirata da figure di rilievo del mondo musicale contemporaneo, non solo in ambito didattico. Tra i soci fondatori troviamo Claudio Chiavazza, Grazia Abbà, Anna Eva Gosso, Vannamaria Chiavazza. Soci Onorari Giovanni Acciai ed Elsa Goitre, moglie dell’esimio Maestro. Tra i primi soci i direttori Gianni Cucci, Giorgio Magnocavalli, Carlo Messa e altri... Nei primi anni ci fu la spinta ed il sostegno della Casa editrice Suvini Zerboni, con la quale vennero pubblicati i primi lavori "Finalmente musica" di A.E. Gosso e G. Abbà e "La Maschera Micillina" di G. Abbà e V. Chiavazza.
Oggi il Centro prosegue la sua attività di ricerca pubblicando testi di didattica musicale per la casa editrice Musica Practica di Torino.

Name: Soothing Relaxation
Description:
Soothing Relaxation AS is led and founded by the Norwegian composer Peder B. Helland. Our mission is to help people live a less stressful life by producing original music that can be used in a number of different ways, including background music for work, sleep, reading, studying, meditation, spas and more. 

In addition to releasing music for the general public, we also work with companies to enhance their products. We sell licenses to include our music in films, guided meditations, short films, apps, games and more. 

Sit down and relax with Soothing Relaxation. Do you have any questions? Don't hesitate to contact us!
