Name: Sound Of Aarhus
Description:
Sound Of Aarhus is an English writing publication based in Aarhus, Denmark. We are an independent online music magazine covering the best local music from the Aarhus area.
With focus on upcoming music, we strive to give you relevant articles, reviews, interviews, recommendations and much more with the intention of clarifying the music environment in Aarhus.

We want you to see the endless possibilities in music - to feel the joy of standing in the middle of a tense crowd in front of a talented musician you didn’t even knew existed!

Driven by curiosity and passion we prioritize the quality of our article more than anyone else! Let’s make something clear – we’re music fans first and foremost with a genuine love of music and a desire to share that love through words, pictures, videos and events in Aarhus.

Name: Redwood Entertainment
Description:
Redwood Entertainment, Inc. is in the forefront of today’s fast paced, quickly evolving entertainment industry.  

Founded in 1983, we offer proactive approaches to show business marketing, personal management, public relations, music radio promotion and internet marketing with an award-winning emphasis on music sales, and video and film production.  Where we excel is in the originality and freshness of our innovative traditional and niche marketing designs.  Whether our clients need a totally new way to captivate their markets, or to implement enhancements in familiar markets, our plan execution and strategic placements give our clients a distinct advantage.  Our variety of marketing plan offerings also allow our clients to choose from a range of services that is right for them.

Redwood Entertainment, Inc. manages projects with an understanding—gleaned from years of entertainment industry experience—of how to help artists build a profitable and sustainable career.  In addition to traditional mainstream methods, we utilize creative niche marketing and provide our artists with maximum exposure to establish steady flows of income for them.

Redwood Entertainment works with world famous artists, including Grammy, Tony and Emmy award winning singers, songwriters, musicians, and comedians, and retains multiple affiliations with business to business and trade organizations.  Redwood CEO, Janet Castiel is a voting member of the National Association of Recording Arts and Sciences (NARAS) (the Recording Academy), member of the Association of Performer Arts Presenters (APAP), the Talent Manager’s Association (TMA), the Association of Independent Music Publishers (AIMP), and co-founder of the New York Blues & Jazz Society (NYBJS).  The Redwood family is firmly rooted in all aspects of the entertainment industry, affording unique opportunities to help artists achieve success in multiple facets of their careers and the industry at large.

Name: La Zintrie
Description:
Créée en 2017 par une équipe de passionné.es, l’association se développe sur le territoire du Grand-Est en proposant des événements faisant la part belle aux musiques électroniques. Notre collectif est lié par un projet commun : partager notre passion, dynamiser les espaces, frapper les esprits et étonner par la découverte.

Un de nos plus grands atouts, notre diversité musicale, se retranscrit à travers nos événements et notre catalogue d’artistes. Nous mettons en place des dispositifs de développement et d'accompagnement professionnels destinés à des jeunes talents, évoluant dans les musiques électroniques. 

La Zintrie est constamment à la recherche de (nouveaux) talents, artistes, vidéastes, photographes, graphistes, de bénévoles motivés! 
Pour postuler, en savoir plus ou nous envoyer ton projet, écris-nous à lazintrie@gmail.com

Name: Arrow Records
Description: Arrow Records was created by world renowned author, teacher and orator, Taffi L. Dollar in 1998.  GOD placed a mandate on Taffi's life; to produce music that heals the sick, delivers the captive, restores the brokenhearted and saves the lost.  Atlanta based Arrow Records is an affiliate of Creflo Dollar Ministries and stands on the principal to promote "music that pierces the hearts of listeners worldwide", thereby making a mark in their lives that can never be erased.

Name: Sparks Studio
Description:
We are Sparks Studio, a multidisciplinary studio focused on the music world, founded by Cristiana Figueiredo and Lucas Moreira.

We share a deep love for music and visual arts, and making them come together.

Our work explore many visual methods to illustrate the work of each artist, and we make everything since the storytelling to the final production, through areas like graphic design, video, illustration, and animation.

We tie visual and music together.

Name: Music Lab
Description:
RECORD / EDIT / PRODUCE / MASTER / REMIX

Music Lab wil een muziekeducatieve organisatie zijn met uitvalsbasis in Hasselt door diverse muzikale kortlopende opleidingen vanuit de praktijk aan te bieden. De kortlopende opleidingen moet de muzikant toelaten zijn of haar muziekcapaciteiten te ontdekken, verder te ontplooien en naar een hoger niveau tillen.

Onze klemtoon ligt hierbij op ‘het muzikant zijn’’ in al zijn facetten. Het aanbod van Music Lab bestrijkt een breed spectrum: gaande van softwarecursussen (cubase, ableton, logic, cubase, …),  over infosessies (ivm zakelijke aspecten van muzikantenbestaan, speelkansen,…), tot workshops (songteksten schrijven, … Dit telkens onder begeleiding van professionele muzikanten. Dit divers aanbod vormt voor muzikanten een grote troef.

De rol van Music Lab is dus in de eerste plaats die van katalysator bij het groeipad van muzikanten.

Name: Oratorio Society of New York
Description: The Oratorio Society of New York, the second oldest cultural organization in New York City, has been part the city's musical life since 1873. The Society’s 200 members come from all walks of life to volunteer their time for the joy of making music together. In addition to its concert programs, the Society works to further oratorio singing and provides young singers with the opportunity to advance their careers through the annual Lyndon Woodside Oratorio-Solo Competition.

Name: Mainstage Productions
Description:
Mainstage Production specializes in creating audio-visual experiences.

Founded in 2014, Mainstage Production, led by Strings (Pakistani Pop Band led by Faisal Kapadia & Bilal Maqsood), has produced Coke Studio Pakistan since Season 7.

Mainstage Productions was also responsible for creating the score and soundtrack for internationally renowned film, Moor, by Jami. The film was released nationwide by Geo films in 2015 and has premiered at various international film festivals.

Name: edgemusicnetwork
Description:
Edge Music Network (EMN), an interactive digital music network providing live and on-demand content through a powerful video syndication platform. Over several years, EMN managed their start-up mentality application development, which allowed them to effectively build and develop the EMN’s platform. With deep working knowledge in content licensing and distribution, application development, as well as strong industry partnerships, Founder Elizabeth Vargas acquired the content libraries of some of the largest music publishers in the world to bring life to Edge Music Network. 

Aligning with artists, labels, music publishers and technology partners from around the world, Vargas created a fair compensation structure that levels the playing field for all stakeholders with a 90/10 split to the artist’s favor compared to the typical 10/90 split that many streaming platforms favor. 

With a goal to pioneer a revolutionary music experience that gives to charitable causes in a meaningful way, EMN offers fans access to the music they love while providing artists and record labels with the royalties they deserve. Vargas has decades of experience architecting and brokering digital rights agreements between content creators and publishers to ensure equitable revenue share and royalty distribution and has worked with industry leaders to fight for fair compensation structures to keep the music alive—all of which paved the way for Edge Music Network

Name: Mungo's Hi Fi
Description: Mungo’s Hi Fi are a soundsystem and music production collective based in Glasgow, Scotland. They produce and play music which blends Jamaican influence with contemporary bass music, resulting in a unique take on Ska, Reggae, Dancehall and Dubstep that has made them firm favourites in the underground music scene.

Name: Fort Smith Symphony
Description:
The Fort Smith Symphony is the oldest professional orchestra in Arkansas, bringing musicians from a six-state area to the River Valley to perform world-class concerts to a frequently sold-out audience. The Fort Smith Symphony is dedicated to providing our community with excellent orchestral programs which entertain, educate and enhance the quality of life. In line with our mission, we perform five subscription concerts a year, an outdoor community concert for families, and reach over 5,000 students per year with our education programs. 

The Symphony's community programs include the Perspectives Chamber Music Series, now in its second season, and a free family-friendly outdoor concert. We promote our community and rich regional music history with four albums featuring Arkansas-born composers William Grant Still and Florence Price, produced and distributed through Naxos Records. Our fifth album, featuring the work of Oklahoma-born Indigenous composer Louis W. Ballard, will be released in 2023.

Name: GoGirlsMusic.com
Description: GoGirlsMusic.com is a unique organization that focuses on advancing the careers of independent female artists. Founded in early 1996, the organization works tirelessly to help artists through education, networking, and events like the GoGirlsMusicFest, Invasion of the GoGirls during SXSW, GoGirls @ Folk Alliance and more. Artists who become involved have the opportunity to perform, have their work reviewed, and get involved with a hardworking group of women who "get things done" in the music scene.

Name: Telegraph Hill Records
Description:
Telegraph Hill Records is an independent record label based in Asbury Park, NJ and New York City, NY. The business exists to promote the recordings of the emerging talent in the community of musicians performing regularly in the Asbury Park Music Scene and throughout the tri-state area who are looking to expand the reach of their recorded music beyond the local level. 

Telegraph Hill Records has been recording artists performing in the Asbury Park since 2009. 

Founded by President & Producer Joseph Pomarico, “Pom” has evolved Telegraph Hill Records into a dynamic structure for current and future investments with an organizational outcome of progressing recognized talent into a diverse range of larger markets. Longtime musical partner/collaborator Matthew "Fern" Fernicola was brought on as Vice President to help further the labels success within the musical community, providing a deep understanding of musicality through performance, arranging, songwriting, studio coordination and recording - adding a professional value to the team. 

Together, the duo have produced on a range of detail-oriented projects, from developing young talent and finding a direction for their sound, to working with established veterans and pushing their sound to new heights. Pom & Fern have each performed on many different stages, worked in all sorts of studios, and connected with tons of musicians across tri-state area. Their extensive early professional industry experience, combined with a grassroots leadership style approach has distinguished Telegraph Hill Records as a strong supporter in the Asbury Park music scene and an affiliate amongst the greater music industry.

Name: Duchess Box Records
Description:
Duchess Box Records is Record Label based in Berlin, Germany.

Name: Prologix Percussion LLC
Description:
Prologix is an internationally renowned drum practice pad manufacturer located in Northeast Ohio. Jason Edwards founded the company in 2001 with the intention of developing the best feeling practice pads in the industry.

In 2001, the first product brought to market was a patented dual-sided nonagon pad named the Startix. Shortly after the Startix pad was released, Jason designed and patented both the Tenor-Zone Pad and Tri-Pad. With these designs, Prologix was the first practice pad manufacturer to introduce rims on tenor pads. In 2002, Jason re-designed the Startix pad, which featured a round Baltic birch base that included snare basket receivers and a recessed rim. This new design was later named the Logix pad and has become a staple in the Prologix product line. Over the next few years, Jason attended PASIC walking the exhibit halls to build relationships with established drummers and develop business partnerships with emerging e-commerce drum shops throughout the United States.

As the company continued to advance, Prologix released multi-surface signature products designed in collaboration with artists Russ Miller, Johnny Rabb, and Rich Redmond. The popular Blue Lightning and Red Storm Training series were introduced in 2009 to provide drummers a low-volume, resistance surface for strength development. To further expand the Training category, Prologix introduced the Blackout extreme resistance pad in 2017. After years of research, Prologix elevated the standard of drum set practice pads with the introduction of their Practikit and Thunderkick products at NAMM 2018.These products feature Sequential Mass Compression (SMC) technology engineered to replicate the feel and pitch of acoustic drums at a low volume.

Today, the Prologix team continues to develop a variety of practice products designed with modern materials, technology, and trend-setting innovation.

Name: Ofri Eliaz
Description:
After several years of studing music and music therapy in the US- Ofri came back to Israel and released her first CD of Ladino songs:"Ya salio de la mar".She appeared on several T.V and radio shows.She continues to both perform and engaged in music therapy.These days she's recording her next CD in Hebrew.  
Gave performances in N.Y.C at:The Knitting Factory, Makor,The Bitter End,Sephardic House, Brooklyn Public Library,Brooklyn College,The Center for Jewish History. 
Other performances:Kennedy Center in Washington D.C;The Piccolo Spoleto Festival in Charleston,N.C;The Museum of Fine Art in Philadelphia;The Field museum in Chicago;The International Jewish festival in Long Island,NY;Erie Art Museum,PA;The National Museum of American Jewish History,Philadelphia,PA;Israel Culture and Film Festival, Bergen County, N.J;
Performed with EMI recording artists Alabina, featuring Ishtar and the Los Ninos De Sara. 
In 2003 received a grant as an "Excellent Artist" from the Ministry of Absorption in Israel.
Participated in 2004 in the Festiladino contest at the Jerusalem Theater as part of the annual Israel Festival. 
In November 2004 released CD of Ladino songs: " Ya salio de la mar" (distributed by N.M.C. Records).The musicians are some of the top players in N.Y.C,such as:Frank London,Steve Gorn,Omar Faruk Tekbilek, Alex Skolnick,George Mgrdichian,Shai Bachar etc.
Ofri is currently working as a music therapist with adolescences at risk in schools for special education in Jerusalem. 
Graduated from New York University in September 2003 and received MA in Music Therapy. .
Graduated from the New School University,Mannes school of music in N.Y.C in June 2000. Received BFA in music;specializing in vocal jazz performance. 
Studied jazz and popular music at the Rimon School of Music at Ramat Hasharon. 
During army service toured Israel as a singer with  guitarist.The musical director was Gili Dor.
Graduated from the High School for Arts in Jerusalem,majoring in theater.

Name: Haags Matrozenkoor
Description:
Het Haags Matrozenkoor is opgericht in 1928. Momenteel staat het koor onder leiding van dirigent Peter van der Leeuw en telt ruim 30 leden. Het matrozenkoor biedt de leden een brede muzikale opleiding. Het koor bestaat uit diverse voorbereidende koorklassen en een concertklas bestaande uit sopranen, alten, tenoren en bassen. De concertklas zingt een breed repertoire van klassiek tot modern.

Onze partners
Het Haags Matrozenkoor werkt mee aan producties van bekende en professionele koren en orkesten zoals het Residentie Orkest, het Rotterdam Philharmonisch Orkest en het Bachkoor Holland.  Ook levert het koor regelmatig solisten aan professionele producties. Als traditioneel jongenskoor werkt het Haags Matrozenkoor rond Pasen mee aan diverse uitvoeringen van de Matthäus Passion in o.a. de Pieterskerk in Leiden en in Den Haag.

Concerten
In de Kersttijd verzorgt het Haags Matrozenkoor een Festival of Nine Lessons and Carols. Daarnaast geeft het rond de zomer een eigen concert. Name: IGLOO Records
Description:
In 1978, in the midst of the cultural and artistic “post 68” effervescence, a label was born. Igloo was created by passionate fans of fiercely original, independent and singular music. Over time, the label has released recordings and contributed to the history of jazz and improvised music in Belgium, with a catalogue of over 400 references!

Although the first Igloo releases were definitely far from being intended for mass consumption – soundscapes, improvised music – the merger with the LDH label in the early 80s led to it releasing its first jazz productions (and significant ones): Chet Baker, Philip Catherine, Jacques Pelzer, Michel Herr, Steve Houben and Charles Loos. All these names contributed to building the label’s reputation not only in Belgium but on the international scene. This enabled it to realise its primary ambition: to become a platform for future talents. 

The label’s philosophy has always been to promote diversity, allowing expressions of more marginal music to be heard and supported in a musical context that lives under the threat of standardization.

So for 40 years the label has been recording, producing and promoting the music of its artists across the 5 continents!

Take the following ingredients: (former) bandmembers of Kasba & Benjamin Winter + a frontlady who moves you, seduces and blows you away! Mix it up and ENGO is born!

ENGO is a band from Noord-Brabant that mixes rock, pop, funk, metal and alternative dance music. Their style has been compared to No Doubt, The Doors and Nirvana but it's best described as: Brutepop! They don't just create a new mix of styles, but a whole new style of mixing!
Their first EP EPisode is released in 2008. Soon after that they get invited by 3FM (Dutch National Radio) for a whole week in Stenders Eetvermaak and once more for a live performance and interview. They get selected as a new 3FM Serious Talent and go across the border for their 9th show. Soon after that they're already playing some of Hollands's biggest venues (013, Paard van Troje) and festivals (Dauwpop, Elastiek and Koetstock).
At the moment ENGO is working on new studio recordings with which they hope to leave a lasting impression in the (inter)national music scene.

Whether they be young or old, inexperienced beginners to accomplished guitarists. He teaches all styles, from Jazz to Classical and in between, but mainly focuses on Rock and Blues music.

He is currently studying at ACM, (The Academy of Contemporary Music, Guildford.) He qualified in 2008 and gained a diploma in contemporary music and performance.  He is currently studying for the higher diploma followed by the full degree. 

He is registered with RGT ( Registry of Guitar Tutors ) He can enter students for RGT grades and exams.

Nick Weiland has gained his musical experience from going to the jam circuit around Surrey and south London playing with the local bands.

Nicks interests other than music are martial arts, mainly tai chi and kung fu. He has grown up as a martial artist since he was 6 years old. Tai chi is a heavy influence on his music. The feeling from playing guitar and doing tai chi are very similar for him; they complement each other very well. Tai chi helps him to relax and helps his focus. Another interest for Nick is the understanding of Taoism. The philosophy and lifestyle behind Tai chi. Learning to live life in a harmonious way with all things.

As for Nick's future within music, he wishes to create an originals band, learn about producing and further his knowledge of music. His main focus apart from his studies is to build his Guildford based guitar tuition and teaching.

Name: Strings
Description:
Strings (Urdu: اِسٹرنگز) are an internationally acclaimed Pakistani pop rock band composed of two members, plus four live band members from Karachi, Pakistan.

In 1990 the band signed with EMI Records and released their debut album, Strings. Their initial experiments with synthesised sounds and rhythms were not immediately recognised, although Strings sold 20,000 copies during its first week after release. Two years later the band released their second album, 2, which included the critically acclaimed single "Sar Kiye Yeh Pahar". The song was first aired on MTV Asia, and led the band to widespread fame. After the release of 2, the quartet disbanded to focus on their studies and careers. In 2000 Maqsood and Kapadia released Duur, which revived the band's popularity, and followed it with Dhaani in 2003. This album included the single "Najane Kyun", which was part of the soundtrack for the Hollywood film Spider-Man 2. Following Junoon and Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, Strings went to India (where they found remixes of one of their early songs playing in clubs). In 2008 Strings released their fifth album, Koi Aanay Wala Hai, with the singles "Yeh Hai Meri Kahani" and "Aakhri Alvida" (included on the soundtracks for Bollywood's Zinda and Shootout at Lokhandwala). The album was co-produced by Bollywood actor John Abraham, and was successful in Pakistan and India.

Strings are acclaimed for their stringed rhythms and melodious, poetic songs written by Anwar Maqsood, Bilal's father. He has been writing lyrics for the band since its re-formation, with Kapadia the lead vocalist. Bilal Maqsood composes, plays guitar and occasionally sings. Strings' live performances are augmented by Adeel Ali on lead guitar, Shakir Khan on bass guitar, Haider Ali on keyboards and Aahad Nayani on drums. The band have sold over 25 million albums worldwide. 

Strings produced and directed music reality series, Coke Studio Pakistan from 2013-2017.

Name: Boulder Creek Musical Instruments, LLC
Description:
We are makers of a unique line of acoustic guitars and basses that offer a full tonal range, powerful projection, excellent playability and a passion to inspire musicians of every level. Our ukuleles are loved and known for their dual-port system, rich sound, and great looks!

How do our guitars achieve a complete dynamic range? Read on.

Virtually all acoustic guitars today use the X bracing design for their tops. It was first developed in the 1850s. Stop and ask yourself, how many pre-civil war era technologies remain in use? The answer is very few.

Boulder Creek Musical Instruments believes there is a better way to brace a guitar top thereby improving the guitars sound. We  developed the exclusive and patented Suspended Bracing System (SBS). The SBS is the next evolution of the acoustic guitar. It frees the sound board allowing more vibration. More vibration produces richer tone and improved sustain. The SBS design incorporates two aluminum tone bars the top more durable while freeing it from the standard X bracing constrictions.

Combining the best characteristics of the X bracing design with new technology, the SBS gives the player the best of both worlds.

http://www.bouldercreekguitars.com/sbs

All Boulder Creek guitar models include the SBS. By not cutting a large hole in the front sound board of the guitar, the sound board area is increased and the top vibrates more evenly and achieves greater sustain. Relocating the sound hole on the side of the guitar lets the player hear the deep rich tones that come from the inside the guitar's chamber. Because low frequencies are omni directional, the lows are heard all around the guitar. Mid and high frequencies coming from the front of the guitar are also increased. All in all, a totally new way for a totally new sound from an acoustic guitar.

Get more details with pictures at:
http://www.bouldercreekguitars.com/sbs

Boulder Creek Musical Instruments
The Evolution of the Acoustic Guitar

Roda Sonora é uma produtora de audiovisual especializada em música que busca construir uma relação sólida com a cultura brasileira. Preservamos a importância do som, da palavra e da imagem nas riquezas líricas e melódicas desse País gigante.
Nos dedicamos a gravar vídeos que colaborem com a estrutura de divulgação dos músicos em formato de sessões acústicas, cobertura de shows, clipes, video release, etc. Anualmente, realizamos chamadas públicas, totalmente gratuitas, para gravações de músicas autorais dos artistas independentes.
Além disso, também produzimos uma série de registros verdadeiros dos que vivem a música fora do contexto profissional, pela busca de sentido à própria existência e amor ao que fazemos. Aqui é lugar dos poetas viscerais, das almas que voam, das harmonias que acalantam, das canções sinceras e genuínas.

Name: Dutch Harp Festival
Description:
From February 26 until March 2, 2014 the third edition of the international Dutch Harp Festival will be held.

The theme of the festival is Storytelling, which brings the original task of the harpist as a storyteller and news bringer back to the foreground. The Dutch Harp Festival meant a revolution in 2010, due to its special programming and combination of a competition and a festival. Young harpists from around the world compete for a place in the finals, while the harp as solo-instrument is put firmly on the map. Under the artistic guidance of the 23-year-old harpist Remy van Kesteren, the DHF 2014 promises to be another thrilling festival with celebrities such as the choreographer Hans van Manen, writer/poet Kees van Kooten and soprano Claron McFadden, and off course many prominent harpists.

From membership networking to panels with industry professionals and educational resources, you will have the opportunity to further your EDM career while gaining a supportive network by your side.

INSM is a network for those still studying to connect with fellow musicians who now work as doctors, lawyers, business professionals - an enormous community of music graduates now thriving in all sectors. Like this page and join us through our events, workshops, lectures, to become a part of this amazing community!

Name: Super Line-Up
Description:
Idee en advies
Je idee vertalen naar een creatief concept. Wat is er allemaal mogelijk. Ik adviseer je graag over alles wat te maken heeft met het produceren van jou evenement.
Neem eens contact met me op en vraag naar de mogelijkheden. 

Planning en ervaring
Het idee moet worden uitgewerkt in een plan. Het opstellen en bewaken van een begroting, plattegrond/werk tekening maken, stagedesigns, inkopen facilitair (tenten, vloerdelen, toiletten, douches, luifels, hekken, layer, podia, barriers, pagodetenten, aluhallen, vloerdelen, heftrucks, hoogwerkers, stroom) maar ook de techniek (licht en geluid) moet worden ingekocht. Ook daarvoor kun je mij vragen. 

Uitvoering en doorzetten 
De opbouw, uitzetten van het terrein, uitvoerende productie tot en met aansturing van de crew, en oplevering van het complete terrein. Het evenement moet tot een succes gemaakt worden. En daar helpen we graag aan mee.

Crew nodig?
Heb je extra handen nodig bij de productie van je evenement? Dan ben je hier aan het juiste adres. Super Line-Up beschikt over een groot crew netwerk aan zzp’er uit de evenementenbranche. Van creatieve ontwerpers, tot en met sjouwers. Vraag eens naar de mogelijkheden. 

Meer dan ervaring
Naast een hele hoop ervaring heb ik overigens ook de nodige papieren gehaald om mijn werk goed uit te kunnen voeren. Ik heb onder andere:
Diploma HBO Vrijetijdsmanagement
Diploma MBO Bouwkunde
Rijbewijs E achter B
Certificaat Roterende Verreiker – Heffunctie / Heftruck
Certificaat Werken met de Hoogwerker
Certificaat Veilig Werken Op Hoogte
Certificaat BHV (bedrijfs hulp verlening)

Name: Luminol Records
Description:
Progressive Rock, Post-Progressive, Post-Rock and Electronic Label

demo@luminolrecords.com

Luminol Records is an independent record label, born from genuine passion for quality music outside the typical canons of commerce. It is based on the concept of "progressive" conceived as experimentation of music both on the artistic and social level, therefore not strictly related to a specific musical genre, but to the concept of emancipation and transition of an artistic area to another and from the status of a musical trend towards other cultural perspectives.

The artists managed and promoted by Luminol Records range from prog-rock to post-rock, from avantgarde to progressive metal and from post-pop to IDM; they are all united by a passion for experimentation and for the mixing of various musical genres and art forms as a mean of communication and interpretation of reality.

Despite the releases having a shared attitude and ethos, Luminol's aim is to grow a roster of different sounding artists, free from the restraints placed on them by majors, and being the common thread between their personalities to explore new spaces.

Name: Muse Research
Description:
Muse Research was an innovative start-up that created software-powered hardware devices that made use of Virtual Audio plugins.   The company created a series of rack-mount music devices that hosted Windows-based plugins on Linux and delivered performance that was unrivaled by off-the-shelf computers at the time. 

The company enjoyed significant market penetration into the Professional performing artist space and was the industry standard for running virtual instruments and effects live. 

The company was eventually shut down by its owner in 2016 after the technology failed to find traction in the broader music market and larger retail channel who failed to embrace the product. 

The products are still in use by professional musicians around the world as even though the technology is considered outdated, there are currently no solutions on the market that address the needs of the musician as directly as the company's products did at the time.

Name: Recording Industry Association Singapore (RIAS)
Description:
The Recording Industry Association Singapore (RIAS) has been leading and supporting music development for over 40 years.
Formed in 1976 as the Singapore Phonogram Videogram Association (SPVA) with 8 record companies, it has worked continually with the regulators and key music players to develop the industry in Singapore.
Renamed RIAS in 1998, the association comprises 31 leading major and independent record companies in Singapore. It also works with copyright regulators and serves the business community and the general public, with the aim to develop a vibrant music ecosystem in Singapore where performing artistes can practise their profession as a career.
To achieve this end, RIAS adopts a two-pronged strategy, to promote recorded music and expand its market utilisation, and to safeguard the rights of record producers and their artistes.
As a national representative of the International Federation of the Phonographic Industry (IFPI), RIAS aims to foster and maintain trade ethics and fair business practices within members of the industry and to serve as the industry’s voice both locally and internationally. It is recognised by the regulators in Singapore as a key player in the fight against copyright piracy in the music industry.

El proyecto ha sido ganador del Latin Grammy en 2018 en la categoría Mejor Álbum de Música para Niños y ha recibido 7 nominaciones al Latin Grammy, consolidándose como uno de los referentes más importantes de la música infantil y familiar en Colombia.

Como base de su propuesta artística, ClaraLuna cuenta con un sólido proceso de formación en artes escénicas, dirigido a niñas, niños y jóvenes entre los 3 y 18 años, quienes participan activamente en los montajes y espectáculos profesionales del grupo. Este proceso combina exigencia artística, experiencia escénica real y formación humana.

Name: Banda Musical de Lagares
Description:
Esta Associação constitui-se em 1984, por escritura pública de 29 de Março de 1984, congregando atualmente três centenas de sócios. Face a todo o trabalho desempenhado ao longo dos tempos e aos diversos louvores recebidos pelo trabalho em prol da cultura esta Associação é hoje Instituição de Utilidade Pública declarada pelo Gabinete do Secretário de Estado do Concelho de Ministros e publicado no Diário da Republica, 2ª Série – nº 147 a 30 de Julho de 2010.

Actualmente a actividade principal desta Associação é a gestão da Banda Musical de Lagares, da Escola de Música da Banda e um grupo Coral que tem função de acompanhar as celebrações litúrgicas sempre que nos é solicitado.

A Banda Musical de Lagares, fundada em 1900, com uma longa história ao serviço da cultura musical filarmónica, tem sede na Rua Da Escola Nova nº145, na Freguesia de Lagares, Concelho de Penafiel, tem vindo a colaborar, desde a sua fundação, em inúmeras atividades religiosas e culturais por todo o norte de Portugal, na companhia das mais prestigiadas Bandas.

Com um currículo relevante onde se destaca a atribuição de duas medalhas de ouro em 1996 e em 2000, ambas de mérito Municipal, pelo seu trabalho relevante em prol da música e da cultura, a participação e organização em intercâmbios culturais onde se destacam duas viagens ao Luxemburgo em 2002 e 2007 e outra ao arquipélago dos Açores à ilha de S. Miguel - Candelária em 2008, gravação de dois CD em 2000 e 2007. A secular Banda Musical de Lagares é hoje constituída por cerca de 60 jovens músicos, com um repertório variado apresenta-se sobre a orientação artística do maestro Prof. Luis Oliveira. Destaca-se pela sua juventude, qualidade musical, organização e ambição artística patente nas diversas actividades que participa.

A Escola de Música funciona no período letivo escolar aos sábados onde temos cerca de 40 alunos, em que lhes são leccionadas aulas de formação musical, aula de instrumento e classe de conjunto (instrumentos ou coro).

Name: Kunst-Totaal
Description:
Kunst-Totaal staat voor de meerwaarde van kunst, cultuur en creativiteit voor het welzijn en geluk van mensen. Wij geloven in de kracht van creatieve ontwikkeling; met elkaar, van elkaar en voor elkaar. Bij ons is iedereen welkom.

Wij bieden kunst- en cultuuronderwijs op diverse manieren en zijn een coach voor iedereen die creatief wil groeien. In een uitdagende, onderzoekende en ondernemende leeromgeving ontwikkel jij jouw kunstzinnige dromen en doelen. We streven naar een breed aanbod, afgestemd op jouw vraag. 

Samen creatief groeien!

Name: CHICA
Description: CHICA es un colectivo creado por Marta Rey, Alba Loughlin, Rocío Torres y Sofía Conti. Surge como una plataforma con la intención de dotar de espacios seguros a mujeres, personas no binarias y personas de la comunidad LGTBIQ + en el ocio nocturno, así como de impulsar la representación de estas comunidades en los escenarios de la industria musical española.

Name: La Coca
Description:
La Coca es una artista chilena emergente que recorre los sonidos del hip-hop y R&B con un claro discurso que apela a la seguridad, amor propio y al respeto. 
Cada letra que canta habla de un aprendizaje. La Coca quiere compartir estas experiencias de una manera explícita y armónica, fusionando el hip-hop y R&B con sonidos trap, jazz y soul. La Coca llegó a la escena musical chilena con una propuesta innovadora, crítica y emocional.

Name: MusicSpoke
Description: We are building the world's largest marketplace for artist owned sheet music. We allow composers to retain their copyrights and provide the highest commissions on everything they sell.

Name: CARLO OLIVA
Description:
Imprenditore musicale fin dal 1984, mi interesso di produzione e composizione, dispongo di una struttura con la quale realizzo produzioni anche su commissione.
Ho aggiornato tutte  le nuove  strategie di Marketing e sono certificato Google,

Name: Musik- und Kulturzentrum Don Bosco Basel
Description:
Wir bieten den verschiedenen Kulturinstitutionen und Kulturschaffenden in Basel und der Region qualitativ hochwertige und verhältnismässig günstige Proberäume, Konzertsäle sowie Aufnahme-Infrastruktur, Büro- und Archivräume an. Die Infrastruktur, welche in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Fachleuten geplant und umgesetzt wurde und die speziell für unser Kulturzentrum entwickelte Akustik (u.a. 24 bewegliche grossflächige Akustik-Panels) bilden die Grundlage für erfolgreiche Proben, Aufnahmen und die damit verknüpften Konzerte.

Mit zwei Proberäumen und einem Probe- und Konzertsaal füllt Don Bosco Basel die Lücke zwischen dem Stadtcasino Basel und kleineren Veranstaltungsräumen. Durch die speziell ausgelegten Akustikmassnahmen, vorinstallierte Verkabelung für Aufnahmen und hochwertige Lichtquellen und Klimatisierung bietet das Musik- und Kulturzentrum optimale Bedingungen für professionelles Arbeiten.

Name: Rhinegold Media & Events Ltd
Description:
Rhinegold Media & Events Ltd is an associate company of Rhinegold Publishing Ltd, one of the leading publishers for classical music and performing arts.

Rhinegold Media & Events produces events and digital media to appeal to the music and performing arts industries. It currently runs four events: the Rhinegold LIVE concert series, Music Education Expo, the Music Teacher Awards for Excellence and the Musical Theatre & Drama Education Show (new for 2016). 

The media division is producing a number of products in collaboration with Rhinegold Publishing Ltd, including Rhinegold TV, an online portal of music-related videos.

Name: Ensemble ArtChoral
Description: L’Ensemble ArtChoral dirigé par Matthias Maute est un chœur professionnel avec pour mission de présenter le chant choral au Canada et à l'international. L'Ensemble est récipiendaire du PRIX OPUS de l’Événement musical de l’année 2020.

Name: DFSB Kollective
Description:
2008년 설립 이후, DFSB Kollective는 서울을 기반으로 한 독창적인 아티스트와 레이블 서비스를 제공하는 선구적인 크리에이티브 에이전시로서, 1500팀 이상의 한국 음악 아티스트들에게 혁신적인 서비스를 제공해 왔습니다. 인디 아티스트로부터 명 아티스트, 그리고 아이돌에 이르기 까지, DFSB는 수많은 음악평론가들로부터 극찬을 받고, 수상 경력이 있으며, 베스트셀러 음악을 발표한 한국 음악 아티스트 및 그들의 매니지먼트사와의 협력을 통해, 현지 및 글로벌 팬과 그들을 직접 연결하는 맞춤 전략을 개발하고 제공해 왔습니다. 한국 음악을 전 세계로 확대하기 위한 노력을 통하여, 25개 이상의 글로벌 디지털 음원 서비스와 소셜 미디어 플랫폼 들에 한국 음원을 공급하는 회사들 중 하나로 자리 매김 하였습니다. 또한 한국 음악의 해외 프로모션에 관한 풍부한 경험과 전문성을 바탕으로, DFSB Kollective는 북미, 럽 및 아시아태평양 지역에서 다수의 한국 음악 콘서트 및 투어를 성공적으로 진행하였을 뿐 아니라, 한국의 여러 앨범들이 미국, 캐나다, 서구 럽, 일본, 한국, 대중국, 동남아시아 및 오스트랄라시아 지역의 디지털 음원 차트에 1위로 데뷔하는 놀라운 성과를 이루었습니다.

Since its inception in 2008, DFSB Kollective has pushed the tempo as a pioneering Seoul-based creative agency providing innovative artist and label services for 1500+ Korean music acts. From indies to icons to idols, DFSB has collaborated with a dynamic range of critically-acclaimed, award-winning, and best-selling Korean music talents and their respective management companies to devise, develop, and deploy customized strategies that directly connect them to their local and global fans. Via its proactive efforts to expand the market for Korean music worldwide, the agency has emerged as one of the first and foremost Korean music content providers to 25+ international digital music services and social media platforms. Known for its experience and expertise in promoting Korean music exports, DFSB Kollective has also successfully produced numerous Korean music concerts/tours in the North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific regions as well as landed impressive #1 debuts for various Korean music albums on the US, Canada, Western Europe, Japan, Korea, Greater China, Southeast Asia, and Australasia digital music charts.

Name: Decibel, the Music Club of IIM Ahmedabad
Description: Decibel, the Music Club of IIM Ahmedabad is a student managed association at Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad. The team comprises of students from all full-time programs offered at the institute, and changes every year. What does not change however, is the undying love for music.

Name: Prodüktörüm
Description: Prodüktörüm söz yazarı ve bestecilere müzik prodüksiyon hizmeti verir ve müzik prodüktörleri için bir rehber niteliği taşır.

Name: PRISMA - Pacific Region International Summer Music Association
Description:
PRISMA (Pacific Region International Summer Music Association) operates a classical music festival and summer music academy that runs for two weeks every June in Powell River, British Columbia. 

Our in-depth orchestral training program is designed to provide advanced students and young professionals with the essential tools to win a position in a professional orchestra.  Since the very first PRISMA Festival held in 2013, our organization has mentored over 500 pre-professional classical musicians from 32 countries. Some have gone on to win positions in professional orchestras around the world; others enjoy busy careers as soloists, chamber musicians, and instructors.

Renowned artists from the world’s finest symphony orchestras teach, mentor and perform at PRISMA. The PRISMA Festival Orchestra is charismatically led by Arthur Arnold, former music director and conductor of the Moscow Symphony Orchestra.

Name: Producer Sphere
Description:
From DAWs, VST plugins, sample packs and MIDI equipment, there is a seemingly endless selection of music production products, and for beginners this can often lead to a lot of confusion.

On Producer Sphere you’ll find a completely free library of guides to VST instruments, royalty free sample packs + learning music production/beatmaking.

Whether you’re a complete beginner to music production, or an intermediate/advanced level producer looking to sharpen your toolbox, we are here to help.

Name: Bzzz Records
Description:
Le label Bzzz Records (Asso iguane sériel) est un label de musique, crée en 2013, subventionné par la SCPP, MFA, SPEDIDAM, ADAMI et DRAC IDF.
Le label a pour but, dans un premier temps, de sortir les différents projets du producteur-compositeur-musicien Seb el Zin, et par la suite d'étoffer le catalogue avec des groupes qui nous intéressent.
Esthétiquement très ouvertes , les productions du label naviguent entre musique improvisée, hip-hop, rock psychédélique, musique contemporaine, musique électro, musique expérimentale, folk et musiques du monde...

Name: Recycled Plastics
Description: A boutique record label specializing in braindance electronic music and "bedroom" ambient music. Established by Brian Grainger in March 2011 as a subsidiary of the parent label Milieu Music, Recycled Plastics aims to release several side projects by Brian (such as Phe_, Bike, Troth and FX75B) as well as music by Brian's friends, including Wisp, Mrs Jynx, EOD, Ndru, Ourson, David Tagg, Fieldtriqp, Electricwest, SEAS, Casio Commander and others.

Name: Sharpedgrin Records
Description: Création, production et diffusion d'événements artistiques aux buts culturels, sociaux et éducatifs ainsi que la promotion d'artistes.

Name: Orchestra Teatro Giglio Lucca
Description: L’attività concertistica della nostra Associazione ha esordito nel 1984 al Teatro del Giglio di Lucca con lo scopo di dare alla Città un valido complesso musicale. Da allora l’Orchestra ha svolto un’intensa attività, non solo nel Teatro cittadino, ma anche esibendosi in numerosi Teatri e Festival italiani e all'estero sia nel campo operistico, sia sinfonico e cameristico. Notevole è la pluriennale attività svolta al Grande Teatro all'Aperto di Torre del Lago come Orchestra ufficiale, e  moltissime, oltre che apprezzate, le partecipazioni alla Sagra musicale Lucchese. Da ciò l’Orchestra ha potuto ricavare, oltre ad una vera specializzazione nel repertorio pucciniano, anche un’importante frequentazione di moltissimi importanti musicisti lucchesi, da Geminiani a tutta la famiglia Puccini, da Alfredo Catalani, ai contemporanei. Di tutta questa vasta attività rimane un’interessante discografia. Tra le varie formazioni ridotte, quali quintetti sia a fiato e che ad archi, importante è stata l’attività dell’Ensemble Liberty, voluto dall'Associazione, per dare nuova vita al repertorio musicale dell’Operetta e da Salone tipico della Bella Epoque, e in questo specializzandosi. Molti gli attestati di stima che l’Orchestra ha ricevuto da Direttori di fama internazionale, complimenti che si sono estesi, oltre che alle qualità musicali,  sopratutto al particolare e raro clima di collaborazione artistica ed operativa. Importanti le collaborazioni con istituzioni universitarie quali il Sant'Anna di Pisa per il progetto Hope, e con  il mondo musicale di Pistoia, che ha portato l’Orchestra ad eseguire, nell'ambito della Fondazione Marino Marini, la riduzione della Sagra della Primavera. Importante è la presenza al Teatro Manzoni dove l'Associazione ha riportato l’Opera dopo un grande periodo di assenza. Inoltre è ospite pluriennale degli eventi di fine anno nel Comune di Pistoia. Oltre all'attività concertistica, si affianca  anche un’intensa attività didattica per le Scuole Statali.

Name: Cantando Aprendo a Hablar
Description:
Cantando Aprendo a Hablar es un material audiovisual creado en 1989 por fonoaudiólogas chilenas para apoyar el desarrollo del lenguaje, tanto en el aspecto lingüístico como en el auditivo, en niños pre-escolares, comenzando desde la etapa pre-lingüística (primeros meses de vida) hasta la adquisición del vocabulario básico en español e inglés.
El material de Cantando Aprendo a Hablar se ha mantenido por casi tres décadas enfocado a las familias comprometidas con el aprendizaje y educación de niños y niñas, transformándose en una excelente alternativa para entregar contenido entretenido y educativo frente a la diversidad de estímulos que hoy están disponibles en la TV abierta y en el mundo digital.

Name: Diversity In Sync
Description: In the aftermath of the 2020 George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, and Ahmaud Arbery protests, many people jumped into action to make change within our industry for more diversity, equality and inclusion. This site and this volunteer group are designed to aggregate the wonderful and varied efforts that have popped up in order to collect and direct people to those valuable resources.

Name: Planeta da Musica
Description:
Blog de música. Lançamentos, novos singles, notícias, vídeos, divulgaçao de novos artistas e curiosidades sobre o mundo da música. Tudo sobre música.

Music Blog. News, singles, videos, new artists and all the information about music that you need. All about music.
http://www.planetadamusica.com/videos/

Name: 3voor12 Breda
Description: Local departement of VPRO' 3voor12 in Breda

Name: The Elementz Productions
Description:
The Elementz Productions are a UK based music outfit. The duo picked up their first significant national radio support upon the release of debut single "High Grade" featuring Skinnyman in 2005. They then went on to work with some of the UK's top rappers back then to produce "Crushmode" which was released in 2008. 

Releasing cuts on Mad Decent (along side South Rakkas), V2 (Red Snapper) and continuing to engineer in the studio for the major labels during 2012 led to a publishing deal with Warner Chappell

The Elementz enjoy regular spins on Radio 1 & 1Xtra including a Record of The Week feature. The pair have written music for Black History Month broadcast worldwide on MTV Base and are credited as being the 1st pro DJ’s to be broadcast on Channel 4’s Come Dine With Me!

Live support for - Ghostface killah, RZA, De La Soul, Zed Bias, Gemmy, Katy B, Roll Deep, Foreign Beggars, Roska, Gaslamp Killer, Toddla T, Seiji, Lunice, Shy FX...

Name: Muzzic
Description:
Tras varios años trabajando en el mundo de la música para eventos y realizando trabajos de música corporativa y producción audiovisual, decido emprender un proyecto global que sirva como nexo entre la música, el mundo empresarial y el ámbito social. Así nace Muzzic.

En cuanto a música se refiere, no he dejado de buscar a lo largo de los años otro concepto que no sea el de calidad. Estemos hablando de jazz, música clásica, salsa, pop o música electrónica, siempre encontraremos ante nosotros un rango de calidades que viene dado por la técnica, el conocimiento, la elegancia y el saber estar de sus interpretes o compositores. La buena música existe.

A estas alturas de la historia, es innegable la importancia sociocultural de la música. En absolutamente todos los ámbitos de la historia del hombre, la música ha estado presente. Desde el tam-tam hasta la que seguramente usted está escuchando mientras lee estas líneas. La música sugiere, la música persuade, la música ameniza, la música evoca…

La buena música existe, y puede formar parte de la imagen corporativa de su empresa. De su evento. De su vida.

Name: Basto Records Ltd.
Description:
Fledgling Record Label and Management Company based in Madrid, founded by hermanos Andrew Nocker, Daniel Rivarola & Bob Juburi.

Our aim is to invigorate the music industry in Spain, whose thirst for contemporary tunes is quenched too often from abroad for a country with such impactful and internationally acclaimed musical roots.  

We’re looking for artists whose work differs from the Spanish status quo, but has the potential to appeal to an ever growing market of listeners seeking the types of pop, hiphop, rnb and soul grooves that currently only exist abroad. 

We believe Spain is late to the party, and that it’s time to build on current momentum and give our artists the national and international traction that their music deserves.

Name: Babygirl Entertainment
Description: Babygirl Entertainment was founded 4 years ago as a record label intended to break upcoming independent artists. We’ve had the opportunity of creating multiple campaigns that have generated over 50 million impressions by working with impactful social media influencers such as Kristen Hancher, Salice Rose, Lani Baker and many more. We’ve also had collaborations with music industry professionals such as Usher, DJ Khaled, Meghan Trainor, Becky G and more.

Name: Mousikos
Description: Mousikos brings classical music to a different space and reframes where, how and by whom it is enjoyed thanks to an exclusive collaboration with Sofar Sounds.

Name: Chez Emile records
Description: Installé à Lyon en France depuis 2013, Chez Emile records est une place sociale de la musique électronique. Attaché au support vinyle, Emile conseille une sélection de disques issues de labels indépendants français et importés.

Name: DJ TILT ENTERTAINMENT
Description:
Playing a mash-up style of music, his mixes include everything from oldies, 80’s rock to the hottest hip-hop, R&B, Top 40, house, and everything in between. He knows what his crowd likes and he knows how to please their ear and keep them dancing until the wee hours of the night. 

In the past three years he has built a loyal fan base in cities like Toronto, Montreal, Vancouver, LA, Denver, DC, New York, Bahamas, and more. His wide music knowledge allows him to stay on top of current trends worldwide catering better to his growing fan base. His selection of music is enjoyed by A-list celebrities including Lauren Conrad, Chris Nunez, Brody Jenner, Joel, Kim Kardashian who attend his events regularly. Due to an extensive client list, Tilt’s resume as a DJ expands beyond the club as he provides services for companies including Google, L’Oreal, Ralph Lauren, YouTube, Skky Vodka, Diesel, and more. In fact on Tuesday, Jan 20th 2009, DJ Tilt spun at the Google Inaugural Ball for U.S.A. President, Barack Obama on his inauguration day. Among attendees were John Kerry, Jessica Alba, Ben Affleck, John Cusack and Jennifer Garner. 

Over the years, Tilt has had several residencies and currently holds down 4 of the hottest clubs in the city of Toronto. He’s constantly on the go, breaking international audiences as much as possible. Right now, he’s working on his 10th mixtape to date, titled “Party Life3.”

Name: MusicArtiste
Description: MusicArtiste is a music blog.  I will offer new songs, new artists, mp3s, album reviews, etc. through this site.  Please feel free to comment and visit my social links.  To contact me directly please send an email by clicking on my name below the contact heading.  Thanks for your interest!

Name: Dion Dia
Description:
Dion Dia is a minority-owned independent record label, management, and consultation company based in Gainesville and Miami, Florida. 

To us, being a “record label” allows for ultimate freedom and versatility in terms of how we operate. Instead of confining ourselves to the traditional role and image of labels, we’re out to change the narrative; change what a record label can be, how it can feel, and what it can do. Our current focus is utilizing music, art, and events as tools for community development and sustainment.

Learn more about our mission at diondia.com

Name: PURITY FACTORY
Description: PURITY FACTORY is an electronic music startup who develops as a EDM concert organizer, music label and artist management company. “PURITY EDM TOUR” was the largest-scale summer EDM events which focused among the international student community. It has traveled across five cities and attracted more than 5,000 participants. At the end of 2018, PURITY began to explore and sign original producers and was responsible for artist packaging, performance economy, music distribution and promotion services on mainstream platforms such as Spotify, Apple Music, QQ Music, and Netease Music. A year after its founding, PURITY has received fund from Taiyou Fund, Shenzhen Ali Ventures, and Silicon Valley's famous investor Mr. Guo Wei.

Name: Z-Town Music
Description: Z-Town Music is a network of musicians helping musicians with worldwide forensic publishing administration, management and video development and production. Welcome to town!

Name: Jazz Ireland
Description: Jazz Ireland is a dedicated space where musicians, fans and venues can connect. The aim behind Jazz Ireland is to list every jazz event and venue in the country in one place.  We promote Irish jazz content on the site through Social Networks, Search Engine Optimisation, newsletter campaigns, the Jazz Ireland blog and the shop.

Name: NW Youth Music Association Seattle Cascades
Description:
Helping shape the lives of more than 5000 young people since 1966, the Northwest Youth Music Association operates the Seattle Cascades Drum and Bugle Corps, the Pacific Northwest’s oldest youth organization in the marching arts, representing our region throughout the country for more than 50 years.  

Each summer, we travel more than 13,000 miles across the United States, competing in some of the nation’s most iconic NFL and collegiate sporting venues including Sports Authority Stadium in Denver (CO), the Alamo Dome in San Antonio (TX), the Mercedes Benz Stadium in Atlanta (GA), and Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis (IN).

The drum corps experience serves as a catalyst to help young people acquire the positive life skills and values that will benefit them and their community throughout their lives.  

Our educational programs are designed to:  Enhance life skills to become outstanding members of the community, promote dedication, responsibility and teamwork even under challenging or adverse conditions, offer opportunities to experience, develop and practice strong leadership skills, and provide a venue for members to perform artistically at the highest possible level

The Northwest Youth Music Association, is a 501(c)(3) Nonprofit Corporation, Federal ID 23-7411558

Name: Lake Malawi
Description: Lake Malawi are a self-published, indie-pop band founded by Albert Černý (lead vocal, guitar, keys) and Jeroným Šubrt (bass, keys) in 2013. The name was inspired by a Bon Iver song. They have played over 300 shows in the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Poland, Austria, Israel, Netherlands, Spain and the United Kingdom.

Name: Music Mentoring BCN
Description:
A non-profit organization that provides advice and support for emerging artists. Seminars, lectures and masterclasses...
Personalized coachings and advising/counseling sessions for artists and new professionals in music industry both in music production and music business: management plans, copyright and legal issues, contracts and negotiation, stepping out careers, steps to take as a new professional...and a broad matter of subjects within the music industry sector.

Name: Nice Rights
Description: Nice Rights is a sync agency based in Sydney, Australia. We represent a brilliant roster of catalogues for licensing opportunities in TV, Film and Advertising.

Name: Eight Tones Music School
Description: Eight Tones Music is a Chinese Music School and Store that teaches and sell Chinese instruments such as - Guzheng, Erhu, Dizi, Guqin, Pipa and Ruan.

Name: Learning Through Music
Description:
Learning Through Music is Adelaide's leading music school offering professional instrumental music lessons for beginners to advanced students at schools and in studios.

Lessons include guitar, violin, piano, drum, clarinet, saxophone, voice/singing, flute, and more!

Name: Akademischer Gesangverein München e.V.
Description: The Academic Choral Society of Munich is a place for music, culture, and community. Through shared activities, it brings people of different generations closer together. We are a musical student association—non-fencing, non-fraternity-colored, non-religious, and non-political. Our unifying purpose is to promote music and theater in Munich. Our club house, Scholastika, and our student dormitory in downtown Munich form the center of our cultural activities. Members and friends of the AGV have been living and contributing to the cultural life of our beautiful state capital since 1861 and look forward to welcoming anyone seeking a cultural environment. Our choirs, orchestras, (improv) theater groups, dance courses, and more offer you countless opportunities for creative expression.

Name: Carriage House Studios
Description:
Carriage House Studios is a premiere recording studio located in the countryside of Stamford, Connecticut. Established in 1980, the Carriage House has recorded well known artists like Diana Ross, Derek Trucks, Johnny Winter, Meatloaf, Rakim, Pantera, Ronnie Dio, Phyllis Hyman, Spyro Gyra, and The Pixies. 

The main studio used to be a horse carriage workshop. Our secondary studio is a small bungalow on the edge of the property. Both studios have been around for 30+ years and offer music professionals a unique creative atmosphere with the perfect blend of analog and digital.

Name: Trade Routes
Description:
We are a borderless arts presenter utilizing cooperative strategies to manage risk; support festivals and event activites; and showcase artists to new markets. We develop opportunities for international networking and presenter support, in partnership with industry leaders in the United States, Canada, and abroad. We execute audience development strategies for artists, and develop strong touring routes with dynamic, multicycle tactics in target markets. Our long term strategies for international marketing are customized to cultivate and grow audiences over several seasons.

"Trade Routes is an organization with a focus on developing tour routes for artists going across borders. The organization was conceived out of necessity, partly from trying to navigate crossing boarders as an artist myself and feeling as though there was no infrastructure to offer support and guidance."

- MICHAEL OWEN, FOUNDER

Name: Runout Record Club
Description:
Your monthly vinyl subscription service! 

Helping music lovers to expand their record collection, to learn more about the world of records and to connect with other.

Name: Northern Score
Description:
Paul Karcz is an American-born composer, producer and performer with roots in the Midwest and his hometown of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. With a musical background and love for the hard rock genre, Karcz enjoyed numerous years of success with his nationally recognized and multiple award winning band Spiral Trance throughout the 90's and 2000's.

Karcz first entered into the world of film score music with a chance meeting and a thirty second promotional piece for regional graphics animation creator Andrew Goodwin and the company Racing Snail. Soon after, he began a collaboration with producer/ director Rubin Whitmore II on the feature films Walk Away From Love and Professor Mack. Building on the success of these two films, more work followed, including a win at the Indie Gathering International Film Festival and his trailer score for Roman Citizen. With his career gaining momentum, Karcz formed his company Northern Score and teamed up with award winning filmmaker Jimmy Sammarco and his company Foundation Films to score his current documentary feature along with several video shorts. Further work included promotional pieces for Sammarco's latest project, and viral video,, Ashlin's Music Video - Best Time Ever for the Make-A-Wish Foundation.

Karcz is a four-time Wisconsin Area Music Industry Award winner, an Indie Gathering International Film Fest winner, a two-time ASCAP Grammy Showcase nominee, a UK Songwriting Contest finalist and a two-time Los Angeles Music Awards nominee. Paul lives in his hometown of Milwaukee, Wisconsin with his dog Milton and is currently working on new projects in development.

Name: 7 Notes - Authorized Yamaha Music School
Description: Authorized Yamaha Music School specializing in Yamaha Group Piano & Private lessons in piano, violin, voice & guitar, and Kindermusik along with STEAM Summer Camps and Corporate Music Wellness.

Name: Dot Time Records
Description: Dot-Time Records is a Jazz and World music label. Launched in 2012, Dot-Time releases feature exciting virtuoso artists, both established and newly discovered from around the globe. The branding of Dot-Time Records can be found in the creativity, artistry, passion and energy of these artists and musicians.

Name: Brandhed Music Group
Description:
BRANDHED is new. The music we provide is new. It’s all about new music. The new people on the scene.

BRANDHED care about great music and new ways of promoting it to the public.

Brandhed Music Group was founded in 2013 and is an innovative, vigorous, full service record label that combines the personalized artist attention of an independent label with the distribution and resources of a major label. We have in-house promotion, worldwide distribution and radio networkers in all major territories, management and tour agency in one power house.

BRANDHED offers a wide range of music and audio related services and our core business lies in creating professional music on behalf of the international music industry. We focus on creating music with hit potential, regardless of style or genre.

BRANDHED focuses in linking different advertising and business contacts, where music takes a greater part in the overall marketing.

Name: Garth Newel Music Center
Description:
Located in the Allegheny Mountains of Virginia, Garth Newel Music Center has been a premier destination for chamber music and the performing arts since 1973. We present more than 30 concerts annually, offering intimate, world-class performances that foster deep connections between artists and audiences.

At the heart of our season is the Garth Newel Piano Quartet (GNPQ), our resident ensemble, performing regularly alongside renowned guest musicians. Concerts are often paired with chef-prepared gourmet meals, creating a one-of-a-kind cultural experience. Guests may also enjoy cozy lodging in our historic Manor House, nestled on our 114-acre scenic property.

 Our Mission:
Garth Newel Music Center provides exceptional chamber music experiences and educational opportunities in an intimate setting rich with natural beauty, history, and hospitality.

 What Sets Us Apart:
• Exceptional Performances: 30+ concerts each year featuring GNPQ and guest artists
• Intimate Experiences: Personal interaction between musicians and audiences
• Educational Programs: Including the Emerging Artist Fellowship, Amateur Chamber Music Retreat, and Allegheny Mountain String Project
• Stunning Location: Mountain views, gourmet dining, and elegant accommodations

 More Than Music:
GNMC is also a unique venue for corporate retreats, weddings, rehearsal dinners, family reunions, and private events. Whether you're here for a concert or a celebration, our setting offers something truly special.

 Support the Arts:
As a nonprofit, we rely on the generosity of donors and partners to continue our mission. Your support helps us inspire, educate, and enrich lives through music.

 Join Us:
Attend a concert, support our programs, or host your next event here. Connect with us for updates, opportunities, and ways to get involved.

Name: Brickwall Audio
Description: Brickwall Audio is a boutique music publisher and sample library, owned and operated by Erik Ekholm. Featured artists are Erik Ekholm, Morbid Fears, Beat Rebel and more with a continuously growing roster of talent. The music is featured on television and cinematic productions and the sample libraries are used in many big budget productions of films and games. Mixing vocals, orchestral arrangements, electronics & guitars with edgy sound design, Erik's music covers a wide spectrum of contemporary styles. Recording several albums every year, mixing and mastering in the Brickwall Audio studio, Erik is in the top tier of Swedish composers and sound designers.

Name: Penya Africa / Sauti Academy
Description:
Penya Africa Mission Statement

Penya Africa, founded in 2008 as a company limited by guarantee, is a non-profit music label based in Nairobi, Kenya. At Penya Africa, we aim to be a sustainable globally- recognized authority on East African music. We seek to play an active role in inspiring and enabling local musicians to become influential agents of change at the local and international level.

PENYA AFRICA has three different departments:
- Penya Africa Label produces, releases, distributes and promotes music of its signed artists and assists managing their careers. We have previously released albums of Just a Band, Muthoni the Drummer Queen and Stan and are currently working with Sauti Sol, Dela, Dempsey and Elani.
- Sauti Academy artist development program reaches out to talented vocalists and offers them classes in singing, song writing, performance and music management. It also sources for new Record Label talent. 
- Penya Outreach programs bring music to children in orphanages/informal schools and inmates in prison. We recently started a program at Penya for raw talent; young vocalists who auditioned for Sauti Academy but who were not ready for the main program find a musical family here to share & grow with. The outreach programs are run by Sauti Academy students and aim for social change as much as musical development.

Name: Dutch International Tangoweek
Description: De Dutch International Tangoweek is het enige internationale platform voor Tangomuziek in Nederland. We organiseren Tangoclubs waar (inter)nationale artiesten optreden en waar bezoekers kunnen genieten van muziek, dans, wijn en eten van hoge kwaliteit.

Name: Chorale Bel Canto
Description:
Chorale Bel Canto was founded in 1982 by a group of Whittier College Choir Alumni who wished to continue singing after graduating.   Director of Choral Activities Stephen Gothold, himself an alumnus,  organized the recruiting efforts and the Chorale made its debut performance on Saturday, December 4, 1982 at the Whittier Presbyterian Church  -    a complete performance of Handel’s  Messiah.

Since then, the Chorale has sung over one hundred concert programs in the Southern California area.  The Chorale performed in Japan in 1994 and at the Hollywood Bowl in 1995 as it joined together with 1,000 singers from America and Japan to sing Beethoven’s Ninth Symphony. In 2001, members of the Chorale -- along with Whittier College students, alumni, and members of the Imperial Valley Choral Society -- toured Eastern Europe and performed selections of American hymns, spirituals, and sacred songs.

The Chorale welcomes new singers throughout the year,  interested singers should contact Dr. Gothold via the website links.   All singers are volunteers,  and come from all walks of life.   

Chorale Bel Canto is a not-for-profit educational organization,  chartered by the Internal Revenue Service.  It is supported by the Los Angeles County Arts Council,  private Foundations,  and individual donors.   The Chorale is affiliated with Chorus America.

Name: Variz
Description:
VARIZ.ORG is a Portuguese PROMOTER and RECORD LABEL based on both poles of the Lisbon-Porto axis since 2001, operating in the grey area between abstraction and the dancefloor. Its aim is to bring the newest generation of Portuguese media-art projects and producers into acknowledgement by a wider audience.

Promoter of many concerts by some international artists in Portugal, including: Above Smoke, Akufen, Andy Vaz, Andrew Poppy & Bernardo Devlin, BodyCode, Bruno Pronsato, Cluster, Curd Duca, Cylob, Discopunk, DJ Sprinkles aka Terre Thaemlitz, Fennesz, Frank Bretschneider, Ikue Mori, Jakob Kirkegaard, James Warren, Jerry the Cat, Kaneng Lolang, Kim Cascone, Lump, Neoangin, Nova Huta, Oriol Rossell, Omar Léon, Pete Herbert, Portable, Popnoname, Safety Scissors, Sebastian Meissner (Bizz Circuits and Random_Inc), Sutekh, The Activator. Co-produced the multidisciplinary project SuperStereo Demonstration, which occurred in 2002 at ZDB Gallery and in 2005 at Linhares of Beira medieval castle. Also curated the music program of two editions of the Número-Projecta festival and the first edition of VilaTone - Vilamoura Mixed Media and Music Festival MMVIII.

The label’s roster (10 releases) includes: Alagoa, @C, Migso, Lolly and Brains, Nova Huta, Projecto Fuzível, Tam and it has welcome contributions from the following visual artists: Alexandre Alagôa, Alexandre Estrela, Lia, Miguel Soares, Dora Sousa Santos, Luís Alegre, Miguel Sá and Rev Design.

Name: Caveau de la Huchette Club de jazz
Description:
Ouvert tous les jours et toute l’année, le Caveau de la Huchette offre le double avantage de découvrir un Paris inédit et de vivre une expérience immersive de Jazz et de Swing !
 Si « Paris est une fête », le Caveau de la Huchette en est le plus fidèle ambassadeur. Ses visiteurs ne s’y trompent pas. Les habitués parisiens y partagent volontiers leur plaisir d’être ensemble avec des visiteurs du monde entier.
 Tentez l’expérience de Paris la nuit dans ce Club mythique. Même Hollywood nous l’envie à en croire sa récente mise en avant dans le film La La Land. Alors pourquoi pas vous?
C'est Dany Doriz, vibraphoniste et ami de Lionel Hampton qui préside à la destinée de ce club mythique depuis 1970.

Name: Nürnberger Symphoniker
Description:
Künstlerische Qualität und stilistische Bandbreite sind die Markenzeichen der Nürnberger Symphoniker. Seit ihrer Gründung 1946 begeistern sie ihr Publikum mit zahlreichen Musikstilen: Oper, Operette, Oratorium, Film, Musical und vor allem das Symphoniekonzert - in all diesen Genres machen sie Musik zum besonderen Erlebnis. 

100 Konzerte - von Klassik bis Cross Over
An die 200.000 Menschen genießen pro Saison die rund 100 Auftritte. Bei den Symphonischen Konzerten in der Nürnberger Meistersingerhalle liegt der Schwerpunkt auf dem klassisch-romantischen Repertoire. Im hauseigenen Musiksaal in der Kongresshalle widmen sie sich spannenden genreübergreifenden Projekten aus Pop, Jazz, Film und Literatur. Im Dezember gehören die stimmungsvollen Adventskonzerte mit festlicher Barockmusik zum Pflichtprogramm vieler Besucher des Nürnberger Christkindlesmarktes. Hingegen steht während der Sommersaison im Serenadenhof oder bei Europas größtem Klassik Open Air im Luitpoldhain die ganze Welt der Musik auf dem Programm.

Wij zijn Mike Docters en Willem-Jan Hendrickx en vormen samen het duo VONK.
Het duo bestaat uit piano en trompet en is een ideale combinatie voor al uw plechtig- en feestelijkheden. Ons repertoire is zeer divers en wordt steeds op maat verzorgd. Dit kan gaan over huwelijken, jubileums, familiefeesten, begrafenissen...

Boek ons nu en dan bekijken wij samen hoe we jouw feest of dienst onvergetelijk kunnen maken.

Name: Pueblos Blancos Music Festival
Description:
Pueblos Blancos Music Fest #7 is July 25-28, 2024, in Andalusia Spain. 4 days of free concerts & cultural exchanges, featuring bands & artists from Texas, Spain, & all over the world, playing music in one of the most beautiful & unique areas on Earth; the spectacular, eons-old mountain-top villages of Andalusia (southern Spain); a magical area steeped in history & mythology, with amazing food & wines you rarely find outside the region! On wonderful outdoor stages in the magnificent ancient villages of Ronda ("The City of Dreams"), Montejaque, JimeRa de Libar, Olvera, & Cortes de la Frontera.  
 
In our 1st 6 years we have brought over 100 bands to the ancient mountain villages of Andalusia Spain (over 40 from Texas & others from all over the world. (musicians from more than 30 countries/6 continents.) We create cross-cultural connections that have created a world-wide family & birthed many international art projects.  We’ll also soon be announcing a film festival & a gourmet food/wine/spirits fest, centered in Spain. 
 
I refer to this and the other fiestas we are planning, as "Slow Fests" in that most visitors stay in areas that are not over-visited, for an extended time, so they can see some of the many sights & get to know the communities, instead of overwhelming the area with huge numbers of people who come for a very short time just to attend the concerts. I feel this model is more sustainable for the communities, has less impact on the environment & also works well in the era of pandemic. 
 
Also wonderful how visitors & musicians have come to see the area where our festival is held, as a home; many visit outside the fest dates now too. We also encourage international travelers to visit smaller cities; for instance, in the USA, we’re seeing many international travelers going to less-visited small towns because of the musicians they met in Spain at PBMFest.

Description:
Maandacht is een organisatie die als doel heeft een aantal creatieve geesten samen te brengen om culturele initiatieven te realiseren.

Name: Lark Street Music
Description:
Lark Street Music has one of the widest selections of  both acoustic and electric vintage instruments in the world. Everything from pre-war Martin and Gibson to D'Angelicos and '50s Strat's, Teles and Les Pauls. At the store, located in Teaneck, NJ, we buy, sell, trade and appraise vintage instruments.

Originally located on historic Lark St., in Albany, NY, the store moved to its current location in 1999. The store is known for its rare and vintage guitars, as well as the quality of the repair and restoration services offered under the supervision of owner, Buzzy Levine, who has been repairing stringed instruments since 1968.

Lark Street Music is also able to provide very accurate instrument evaluations, as provided to the Metropolitan Museum of Art, The Orion Blue Book of Vintage Guitars, and Vintage Guitar Magazine and their Price Guide.

Customers hail from across the globe and although many make the pilgrimage to Teaneck, much of the business is done over email and the telephone. Callers will speak directly with the owner.

Name: California Keyboards Music Center
Description: Founded in 1976, California Keyboards Music Center has grown to be the most comprehensive music store in the San Joaquin Valley. In addition to an extensive inventory of acoustic and digital pianos that feature the world-renowned Yamaha Clavinova line, California Keyboards Music Center offers guitars, percussion, band and orchestra instruments, music instruction, instrument repair and restoration, sheet music, lighting and sound equipment, and much more.

Name: Houla Entertainment & Event Planning
Description:
Houla Entertainment is an entertainment promotions and booking company. Houla Entertainment coordinates artists for the college/university markets, fairs, festivals, concerts, performing arts centers, cruise lines, corporate and private events. Our talented artists entertain audiences from the very small and intimate to the very large festival-type. These musical artists are from various genres of music and also represent variety performers that are based in various cities throughout the United States and Canada. You will be sure to have the best live entertainment for your event when you book with Houla! Houla Entertainment books only the best artists in the business! 

Houla Events is an event planning and production company. We coordinate events from the intimate event to the very large corporate event with national touring artists entertaining the crowd. We can find the right location and build your event from scratch or simply broker the entertainment deal.

Interested in bringing a national touring artist to your event? We handle third party buying for comedians, speakers, and musical artists. Take the hassle out of buying talent and let us secure the artist, negotiate the contract, and help you ever step of the way while saving you $$$.

Contact Houla Entertainment now to discuss our portfolio of artists to match your needs, browse our website, or plan your next event. www.houlaentertainment.com.  

Houla Entertainment is Where the Big Dogs Play!

Name: Verband deutscher Musikschulen e.V.
Description: Der VdM (Verband deutscher Musikschulen) ist mit seinen 16 Landesverbänden der kommunale Fach- und Trägerverband von rund 930 öffentlichen Musikschulen in Deutschland, in denen an bundesweit rund 21.000 Unterrichtsstätten über 1,5 Millionen Kinder, Jugendliche und Erwachsene von rund 37.000 Fachlehrkräften im gesamten Spektrum des Musizierens unterrichtet werden.
