Name: Alexandria Choral Society
Description: Alexandria Choral Society aspires to enhance the cultural life of the city of Alexandria by presenting diverse and engaging vocal music programs at the highest artistic level.

Name: Colla Voce Singers
Description:
Founded in 2005, and now under the direction of Aidan Coburn, the critically acclaimed London chamber choir Colla Voce Singers was created by a talented group of recently-graduated choral scholars, under the then musical director Lee Ward. Members are largely drawn from current and former choral scholars of universities including Oxford, Cambridge, Royal Holloway, King’s College London and Birmingham, as well as a number of London conservatoires.  Some of the members also sing professionally in churches and cathedrals around London. 

The choir rapidly grew a national reputation for “dynamic and passionate” performances, including those for audiences such as Pope Benedict, Tony Blair, and TRH Prince and Princess Michael of Kent, in addition to working for such great conductors as James MacMillan and ensembles such as the Liverpool Philharmonic Orchestra. International engagements have taken the choir to Latvia, Poland, France and Italy. 

The choir takes pride in the diversity of its repertoire, from 16th-century polyphony to contemporary works of composers such as Roxanna Panufnik, whose 'Love Abide' it recorded for Warner Classics (and who has recently been named the choir’s patron).  The choir is particularly noted for its performances of pieces from the Baroque era.  Colla Voce Singers also provides singers for corporate events, especially at Christmas time, and for weddings.

Name: Celobert Festival
Description:
Advanced Arts Festival based in Barcelona (Spain) which focuses on experimental & advance electronic music as well as visuals or any kind of art expression that connect these concepts. The aim is to bring electronic music close to everyone through cultural activities developed  at daily locations (such as a library). Also, we want to discover new  artists and their unique projects. 

We bet on creating a context of openness, connectivity and inspiration to prove that other  landscapes, other views, other ways of living and feeling the music  existed.

Name: Mercedes me Orchestra
Description:
“梅赛德斯me交响乐团” （Mercedes me Orchestra）是梅赛德斯-奔驰子品牌梅赛德斯me的一个重要组成部分，是隶属品牌旗下的一个非职业交响乐团，是奔驰在华大力支持推动文化教育发展的一个具体举措。

梅赛德斯me是梅赛德斯-奔驰其中一个子品牌，是该百年豪华车品牌在的生活方式、体验、创新服务方面的延伸。延续奔驰母品牌在华的系列推动文化艺术教育发展的举措，梅赛德斯me通过交响乐和自建非职业乐团社区为载体，为奔驰车主以及来自各行业的品牌爱好者提供一个源于车辆又超出车辆的、与生活相链接、亲密无间、追求更好的自己和团体的创新品牌社区体验。

乐团的成员由戴姆勒在华公司员工、奔驰经销商、奔驰车主、以及热爱奔驰品牌的各行各业的精英和音乐爱好者组成。

Name: Nashville in Harmony
Description: Nashville in Harmony's mission is to use music to build community and create social change. As Tennessee’s first musical arts organization specifically created for people of all sexual orientations, gender identities, gender expressions, and their allies, we're proud to bring a unique style and voice to the Nashville arts scene. We strive for musical excellence by selecting challenging choral literature for mixed voices. In addition to mastering that type of material, choosing music with lyrics that encourage others to make a difference in the world is equally important. Our youth chorus, Major Minors, is a group for people ages 12-18 to be themselves without apology. The chorus is a safe, welcoming, and accessible place for all youth that celebrates the joy, diversity, strength, and pride of today’s young people. Major Minors singers find their own voice and unique identity within a welcoming community.

Name: Spryk
Description:
Spryk is the electronic music & art exploration of Mumbai based Tejas Nair. Whether its immersive art installations, awe-inspiring Audio Visual Live performances, ambisonic sound for VR & video games, or club-ready releases, Spryk’s work is a classic case of electronic exploration that makes use of available technology while referencing that which came before it and does so in a sincerely human way.

His forthcoming studio album titled APEX is the result of a commission from the coveted Magnetic Fields Festival, asking Spryk to explore the relationship between Music, Technology & Humanity. The results of which debuted as a magnificent live Audio Visual performance at the festival in December of 2019. The show was rated as one of the top 5 key performances at the festival by Resident Advisor & Rolling Stone.

At the core, Spryk as a project and Tejas as a musician, DJ, curator and an multi disciplinary artist focuses on provoking a greater understanding of thought, action & interaction. This idea is pushed to new depths on his forthcoming second studio album. The last year has seen his work endorsed and supported by the likes of Red Bull Music as a key artist in the region and Sennheiser Audio as a partner for their immersive audio line of products titled AMBEO. He has also worked with and been featured by the likes of Adidas Originals and PUMA on various campaigns.

 ‘APEX’ is due for release in the latter half of 2020 via his own imprint Skip-A-Beat, which was launched late 2018 to release his debut album ‘Strange Movements’. The label found its roots in his online radio show that unearths the lesser-known plethora of electronic music talent across the Indian Sub Continent. The label is currently co-producing the Selector Pro - Visual Music Residency in collaboration with the British Council.

Programmation régulière de concerts et d'animations musicales dans les établissements de grand standing (Hôtel Villa Massalia Concorde, Casinos...) avec plus de 150 dates en 3 ans (Pop, Jazz, Latino, Variétés...)

Partenariat avec la fameuse enseigne GEBELIN PLANETE MUSIQUE

Partenariat avec le 141 STUDIO pour des projets discographiques de qualité

Une équipe professionnelle et expérimentée tant au niveau local que national ou international pour l'organisation et la production de concerts, de tournées, la programmation régulière de lieux culturels ou d'événements privés.

we breathe music.

Name: ISTITUTO DIOCESANO DI MUSICA SACRA - TRENTO
Description:
L'Istituto Diocesano di Musica Sacra è stato fondato da mons. Celestino Eccher nel 1927 per promuovere la musica sacra nella diocesi mediante la formazione degli operatori musicali: direttori di coro, organisti, animatori di assemblea, cantori. La sua attività è strettamente congiunta con l’Ufficio diocesano di musica sacra del quale è una emanazione. L’Istituto ha sede presso il Seminario diocesano – corso 3 novembre, 46. La sua attività è costituita essenzialmente dai corsi annuali di formazione che si tengono da ottobre a maggio seguendo un programma che comprende teoria e solfeggio, approfondimento di teoria musicale, esercizio di canto corale, pianoforte e armonio, organo, liturgia, musicologia liturgica, storia della musica sacra, direzione di coro, armonia, cultura musicale, canto gregoriano. Oltre ai corsi che hanno luogo nella sede centrale, di anno in anno l’Istituto ne organizza altri nelle zone periferiche rispondendo alle richieste locali o collaborando con istituzioni laiche.
info: musicasacra@diocesitn.it

Name: Old First Concerts
Description:
Old First Concerts, established in 1969 as a year-round concert series, continues to present an astonishing array of programs performed by outstanding musicians from the San Francisco Bay Area and beyond. Old First Concerts has a distinctive niche within the local musical community with a solid history of creating and programming an incubator space for emerging and established musicians and ensembles of all genres. The musical content (our curatorial mission) is artist-driven on every level, with no restrictions placed on the musicians' artistic vision.

The concert season is developed by Director Kathy Barr in conjunction with Program Associate Rick Bahto and an Artist Advisory Board of musicians from throughout the region, representing a variety of disciplines. Musicians and ensembles propose an evening-length program, which is considered and evaluated. The result of this approach is a series that features diverse and often unconventional repertoire that ranges from classical recital and chamber performances to blues, folk, avant-garde, and jazz, as well as multicultural and world music. The series presents numerous World, US and regional premieres each year, often by emerging or mid-career Bay Area composers.

Artists perform in an acoustically and aesthetically appealing setting, seating approximately 450 people, with a backdrop of vividly-colored stained glass windows, and an entranceway featuring an elaborately hand painted ceiling. The venue is an ideal median between the larger local performance and recital halls, and the smaller community centers and clubs. Pianists have developed a deep fondness for performing on Old First Concerts' excellent New York Steinway (circa 1980).

With affordable ticket prices Old First Concerts is dedicated to making a world- class concert experience truly accessible to the community and visitors.

Since 1996 Angela Rose White continues to serve as administrator / chief operating officer of the company. White oversees all aspects of publishing, including royalty analysis, collections, licensing, and communication with publishers, subpublishers, and co-administrators both in and outside the United States. A large portion of the income is derived from television shows which has resulted in an experienced staff familiar with TV cues, themes, etc. and collection by the Performing Rights Societies outside the U.S.

Much of David Rose's music remains popular today. Orchestras large and small around the world still perform Rose's music.

Name: Guitar.MarkBatchelder.com
Description:
GUITAR LESSONS BY MARK W. BATCHELDER
Over 40 years of experience playing rock, country, blues, and folk guitar.
Fort Worth, Texas
817-926-5555

METHOD: Learning to play the guitar should be fun! It's more fun to learn by playing songs. I teach adults, teens, and kids. I encourage non-playing parents to actively participate with their kid's lessons. My teaching style is to use patience and positive reinforcement - similar to Suzuki method violin instructors. I start with songs and teach a little theory all along the way.

TEACHING: I teach things I wish someone had taught me when I was learning: chords (simple, power, barre), patterns (solo, rhythm, shuffles), songs (accompanyment while singing, performing, improvising), useful theory (chords, numbers, transposing), and music reading. Lessons are usually
1 hour per week.

BACKGROUND: In addition to being a professional guitar instructor, I am also an attorney, a qualified mediator, a graduate-level mediation trainer, a member of the band-Panther City Rounders, a YMCA volunteer, a licensed pilot, and a devoted husband and proud father.

INFLUENCES:  My band is the Panther City Rounders. My musical influences include: The Beatles, John Denver, The Eagles, Hank Williams, Steve Miller, and many more. I have played rock, country, blues, and folk guitar for about 40 years.

STYLES:  I teach acoustic guitar and electric guitar in these music styles: rock, blues, country, folk, and Christian.

LEARN:  You can chose to work with me on any of the following: playing songs, transcribing songs, scales and exercises, guidance in equipment selection, music theory, lead guitar, rhythm guitar, vocal accompaniment, performance, improvisation, jamming skills, bass guitar basics, reading music, and more!

Name: Lolly Box Music Pty Ltd
Description:
We're an Indie Sync Agency for Indie Australian Music - seeking licensing opportunities for the music creators and artists that we work with while simultaneously providing music buyers easy access to premium quality pre-cleared content for their projects.

LOLLY BOX ACCESS
Lolly Box ACCESS is an entirely new approach to licensing music – making it seriously easy for music supervisors to find high quality, pre-cleared music to fit their specific needs. How? By providing industry leading music ‘Discoverability’ through super simple and intuitive search functionality.

By utilising AI technology to apply universal, sync-specific keywords and tags to our tracks, and then adding Lolly Box’s custom metadata fields and full song lyrics, we enable music supervisors to simply click on any combination of tags to instantly filter the Lolly Box ACCESS library. They can also search on any combination of keywords, themes or specific lyrics!

And importantly, it’s what Lolly Box ACCESS isn't that really sets us apart. Lolly Box ACCESS is not an on-line subscription-based music library - which are cumbersome to use and devalue an artist's music. Lolly Box ACCESS is a full-featured 'Catalog as a Service' built specifically to help music supervisors find the right track for their project in the minimum amount of time.

LOLLY BOX PRODUCTION
As an independent music licensing business we’re listening to new music everyday looking for outstanding Aussie songs to pitch to music supervisors in the US and Canada. And we know the global competition is tough – no cutting corners, nothing short of excellence. Our creative director Noah Shilkin has a 25-year pedigree as a record producer, and has the experience, skill and knowledge to help take your inspiration, creativity and incredible raw ingredients to the level it needs to be to get noticed.

Soundpark is a next-generation music label built for the modern era—where creativity, data, and brand capital converge to drive cultural impact. Our label infrastructure captures real-time audience engagement and transforms it into actionable insights, enabling us to fund music production, brand campaigns, merchandise drops, and marketing strategies in smarter, more measurable ways. This platform-driven approach gives Soundpark the ability to activate artist growth while delivering clear ROI to brand partners.

Led by a team of industry veterans from the worlds of music, film, television, and global brand strategy, Soundpark is not just a label—we are a launchpad for the next generation of creative entrepreneurs.

We believe in transparency, equity, and innovation. Artists retain creative freedom and access to their audience data, while also having the opportunity to bring in outside brand deals—with a structure in place that rewards initiative and protects long-term value.

Soundpark is where culture, commerce, and technology meet—on the artist’s terms.

Name: Iridis Chorus
Description:
¿Quiénes somos?
Somos una agrupación conformada por miembros de la comunidad LGBTIQ+, que pretende mediante la expresión artística y la música coral, luchar por el respeto hacia la diversidad, logrando así, derrumbar barreras de discriminación y actitudes de violencia e intolerancia en nuestra sociedad.
Creemos que la música es la herramienta ideal para luchar por los derechos humanos, buscando la adecuada inclusión en la sociedad; para de esta manera modificar la apreciación hacia el colectivo LGBTIQ+: Somos seres valiosos con deseos de divulgar nuestro talento.
Como proyecto pionero de este formato en Costa Rica, es nuestro deseo liderar y dar un paso adelante hacia la creación de un coro, cuyos miembros pertenezcan a la población LGBTIQ+ y tengan afinidad por la música; en un espacio artístico libre de prejuicios, donde no exista discriminación o segregación debido a la identidad de género u orientación sexual de sus miembros.
Queremos brindar a nuestros miembros una alternativa distinta, ofreciéndoles la oportunidad de enriquecerse a nivel cultural y personal, a través de una experiencia artística positiva, que, a través del lenguaje musical, puedan sensibilizar a la población en temas de diversidad, y fomentar una sociedad comprensiva y abierta, llena de amor y equidad, en la que todos podamos vivir en armonía y respeto.
Consideramos vital la creación de dicho espacio, donde podamos mostrar el lado creativo, artístico y cultural, que como comunidad le aportamos a la sociedad.

Name: Scuola di Musica Consorzio Concorde
Description:
L'associazione	
La nostra associazione musicale ha sede in Crema (Cr), in via Cappuccini 30.
Dal 2003, quando l'associazione è nata, abbiamo voluto creare uno spazio dove vivere la musica nella sua dimensione più umana. L'abbiamo fatto per mezzo dell'attività dei nostri gruppi musicali, della scuola di musica, dell'attività di musicoterapia, degli spettacoli che sono stati prodotti internamente, di quelli che abbiamo voluto organizzare nella manifestazione Perifonie.
Siamo Consorzio perché condividiamo la nostra sorte per un tratto di strada. E spesso il viaggio è più importante della meta finale.
Siamo Concorde perché all'inizio avevamo solo quelle, sei per ciascuno. Poi sono arrivati i tubi, i tasti, i soffietti, le bocche, i bastoni e un sacco di altri oggetti sonori, ma il nome è rimasto lo stesso. Ha un altro significato che è ancora attuale e questo ci piace.

La scuola di musica

Educare alla musica significa educare con la musica. Per noi, tutta la questione si riassume in queste parole. Non riusciamo a pensare che la formazione musicale sia qualcosa che possa essere scissa dalla crescita complessiva dell'individuo. Ecco perché, a partire dalla forma associativa pura, il nostro progetto didattico ambisce ad assumere un ruolo significativo nella crescita personale dei ragazzi.

Name: David Roddie Music
Description:
LinkedIn page for award winning singer songwriter David Roddie.

“My love for music started back when I was at primary school where I would involve myself in any musical activities that were available to me. For years I hesitated to release my music, just seeing my writing as a cathartic way to document my life. In my teens I was accidentally and reluctantly enrolled as the lead singer/guitarist in a band I formed with high school friends and as I was never keen on trying to emulate other artists or cover popular songs I decided I would have a go at writing my own songs. So I then became the main songwriter for the band and that's where it all started.

After several very enjoyable years, I stopped playing and performing in the band to focus on establishing a recording studio business venture. I opened recording and rehearsal studios when I was 20 years old and nurtured that business for over 10 years. In most of that time, I never performed live or wrote many songs to completion other than writing for clients of the studio.

Since I decided to write music again I have traveled throughout the UK, to Toronto in Canada and to Chicago in the United States to write with other artists and songwriters, I have completed a Master degree in Songwriting and Performance at the University of the West of Scotland and even won their prestigious songwriting award at the 2014 annual creative and cultural industries showcase.

After I decided to sell a large section of my business I found that I had the time to reflect on my current situation and I decided I wanted to pursue writing again.

Over the past year I have had the pleasure of working with some amazing musicians and songwriters including David Scott of the "Pearlfishers", singer songwriters Jo Mango and Becci Wallace to name just a few.

I am mixing and recording my debut album "Boy no More" scheduled for release Q1 2021

Name: Sound Fury Music Group LLC
Description: SFMG is an independent record label, based out of Charlotte, NC. All SFMG tracks are written, performed, arranged, recorded, and mixed, in house, by our master producer "Big Luke Hodges", and and our large extended family of seasoned professional "session" muscians.  We at SFMG view music as an "International Language" and powerful tool for promoting greater multi-cultural unity and understanding. SFMG believes music as an "art-form" should always take precedence over music as a business, and consequently, takes a family rather than corporate approach with it's artists and staff. Name: Blue Desert
Description:
Good music enriches your life. At BLUE DESERT we are passionate about this particular yet wide-ranging style of music we call West Coast Music. This site is a modest tribute to the music and the performing artists, who through the (many) years have given us – and continue to give us – endless hours of musical enjoyment.

As long-time fans we want to share our enthusiasm, experiences and views with fellow connoisseurs as well as curious newcomers. If we can do our bit to help promote this great music and all the gifted artist – well, then we have succeeded.

The past ten years or so have indeed been troubled times for high quality adult-oriented pop/rock music. The likes of MTV, radio stations and large record companies have in many ways damaged the conditions for this kind of music. The late seventies and early eighties are sometimes referred to as “The Golden Age” of West Coast Music, and the contrast to so much of what the nineties have offered us musically is remarkable. The music industry seems obsessed with the buying-power of youth, and the attention span is frightfully short. There is nothing reprehensible about a music industry concerned about making money, but when musical quality and artistic development are thrown out the window, then there is reason to worry.

But perhaps things are starting to brighten up a bit for us fans of West Coast Music – after all there have been many great album releases recently. But always remember: Continue to support the artists by buying their albums, requesting their songs on the radio and go to the concerts! Passing thirty years of age is no excuse to become lazy. If we would like to see today’s West Coast Music and the performing artists get a wider audience and regain some of the commercial success from “The Golden Age”, all of us fans have to help spread the word – sorry, music. More success means more available music on albums, on the radio and at concerts.

Name: BanjerDan
Description:
My name is Dan Mazer. Using the stage name "BanjerDan" I'm a banjo player/multi-instrumentalist based near Los Gatos, CA. 

My music is an Americana mix, rooted in bluegrass and branching out to include folk, country, blues, oldies, and other styles. I started playing Scruggs-style banjo in 1974 and earned a B.A. in Music Theory in 1984 from George Washington University. The banjo has taken me all over the U.S. and overseas, as a solo artist, as a member of bands, and in theatrical productions and orchestras, in venues ranging from street corner busking to bar/coffeehouse gigs, to children's shows, private parties and corporate events, to music festivals, Opryland, USA, and the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts. I've been a member of J.B. Beverley & The Wayward Drifters, The Jackstraws, D.J. & The C.B. Pickers, and Rockcreek. Along the way I've shared the stage and/or sat in with The New Riders of the Purple Sage, The Del McCoury Band, The Yonder Mountain String Band, Vince Herman (Leftover Salmon), Steve Key, and many other artists.

If you'd like to talk to me about booking BanjerDan for music lessons and/or live performances, please send an e-mail to: dan@banjedan.net, or call me at 805-538-4899.

Name: Kevin Curtis Music
Description:
Let me jazz up your next event with the music you love, with a smooth jazz twist.

As a jazz guitarist, I love enhancing the atmosphere of events of all sizes. As a passionate musician who runs a business, I know what it feels like to start a business around  your passion, and how much work it takes to keep it running. 

I also know what it's like to coordinate events through different cities, corporations etc, and just how stressful that can be.

As a seasoned musical veteran of over 50 years you will receive:

First Rate Performances – As a veteran performer with experience performing at 100s of private and corporate events, your guests will be delighted by jazzy and entertaining live music.

Sensitive to Your Establishment – Whether you want entertainment to be the centerpiece of your establishment or simply delightful background music, I adjust my performance to suit.


Reliable Through and Through – My top-of-the-line equipment and my professional approach to my performances ensure that you will have a positively enchanting experience.

That is exactly what you get when you have me perform: With my consistent promotion plan, I become a member of your marketing team to promote more business for you. My interactive performances keep customers engaged and staying for longer.
 At the end of the night, you will receive multiple compliments from your guests and some questions: when is Kevin coming back?

I would love to learn more about you and your company, and share my love and passion for music. So please call or text me at 972-285-1309, or jazzgitman@gmail.com

Musically,
Kevin

Name: Suicide Lemon Artists & Events Management
Description:
Suicide Lemon is a name that was born on June 3, 2009. This represented a positive insistence on a time of international crisis of 2009, which had been announced and initiated so far by the mortgage debt of the “Lehman Brothers” in large international banks.

It is conceived by entrepreneurs Michel Palazzo and Eduardo Ferreira, creators of the label URBR – Underground Records Brazil in October 2002, which together with other businesses, friends and hundreds of artists, the music industry was boosted and upgraded the national electronic music scene, through more than 40 releases of 300 national and international artists.

The experience builded since 1997 from DJ Michel Palazzo, surrounding in all Brazilian country, with the most top venues and parties, brings to our Agency intelligence, innovation and results. We build success stories with our artists, and a lasting relationship with satisfied customers.

Understand and focus on the real needs of the promoters, are part of our business of extreme excellence for all  parts involved. We would be suicide lemon?

Name: Pyramid Sound Recording Studios
Description:
Pyramid Sound Recording Studios is a state of the art recording facility situated in beautiful Ithaca, NY. Over the past 30 years, we have worked with many major label and independent artists world-wide, and we pride ourselves on our top rate staff, equipment and acoustically designed rooms. In addition to one of the best drum rooms on the East Coast, we have a well equipped control room featuring a Neve VR console with a full complement of modern and vintage outboard and microphones. This includes both analog and digital recording options. 

We offer music production services for the entire album making process including writing, recording, mixing and mastering with competitive rates that can be customized to fit the scope of your project.  We offer packages by hour, project, half day, and full day.  As musicians, we understand more than just the technical aspects and strive to make your experience enjoyable. 

We also encourage outside producers and engineers to contact us concerning rates and services.

Name: Sing Omaha Inc.
Description:
Sing Omaha is Nebraska's Premier destination for music training and performance. 

As a 501c3 non-profit, Sing Omaha provides the community with the highest quality vocal music instruction and performance opportunities.

With eight choirs in Douglas and Sarpy Counties, serving singers grade K-2, 3-6th, 7-12th, and adults, Sing Omaha is the best place for choral singing in Eastern Nebraska. Our K-12 program is curriculum-based, meaning that students are building skills (not just learning songs) that will aid them in their musical pursuits through their school years and beyond. 

Sing Omaha Studios offers lessons for singers and instrumentalists interested in a one-on-one experience, as well as musical theater and audition training workshops, summer show choir camps, All-State Choir preparatory camps, and other industry-specific instruction.

We depend on support from private donors, granting institutions, and advertising revenue from local businesses to help further our non-profit mission. 

For information about partnering with Sing Omaha, please contact the organization's founder, Dr. Matt Hill, at Matt@singomaha.org.

Name: The Marian Consort
Description: The Marian Consort is a Gramophone Award-nominated vocal ensemble, recognised for its innovative presentation of a broad range of repertoire. Led by founder and director, Rory McCleery, The Marian Consort performs across the UK, Europe and North America, and features regularly on BBC Radio 3.

Name: El Mico Entertainment
Description:
El Mico Entertainment is a spanish production company formed by people who love music and culture.

We are a company specialized in the organization and production of different group tours of the national and international scene, music festivals, concerts and performing arts as well as booking and management.

Thus, we have extensive experience in the music and performing arts sector:
- Production and infrastructure.
- Technical production and Stage.
- Control of gauging and security.
- Management and road support for national and international bands (Tour Manager).
- Graphic design and audiovisual production.

Regarding our professional experience, in recent years we have made over 50 tours of bands from around the world. In addition, we have organized the preproduction and production of numerous concerts and we have performed numerous performances of performing arts with more than 200 scheduled performances of several companies in medium and large capacity theaters. On the other hand, we have lent our services of production, stage manager and infrastructures in many festivals of the Spanish panorama.

Finally, we want to highlight one of our most special events. This is the Surforama Festival in Valencia, where, since 2003, we take care of the direction, organization and production of the whole festival.

Professionalism, involvement and proactivity are our hallmarks. Therefore, our motto is: "If you have a project, we carry it out, if you do not have it, we design it for you."

If you want to work with us, contact us through info@elmico.es

Name: Only Men Aloud
Description:
Only Men Aloud have been delighting audiences around the world for nearly twenty years. They were formed in the year 2000, with the hope they could inject some new life and blood into the Welsh Male Choir tradition.  

The men have become well known for their strong vocals and their varied and eclectic repertoire. A typical OMA concert will feature many different styles of music. Welsh hymns and folksongs, Opera and Music Theatre all the way to Swing, Acapella & Pop music. 

Twelve years ago, they were named BBC One’s Last Choir Standing and this led to an album deal with Universal Records. In 2010, they won a Classical Brit Award for Best Album of the Year. They have toured every year since winning the show, all around the world and have worldwide record sales of over 300,000.

Over the years, the hugely popular group has built up a strong fan base across the country and were honoured to be asked to sing at the London 2012 Opening Ceremony at the very moment the Olympic Flame was lit. This performance was broadcast to an estimated global TV audience of 900 million people.

Name: TrailerTrax Production Music Library

Name: housemagazine.cz records
Description:
housemagazine.cz records je české hudební vydavatelství, které vydává elektronickou taneční hudbu. Skladby z našeho portfolia najdeš na všech velkých platformách pro streamování hudby jako je například Spotify, iTunes, Beatport, Deezer, Napster a mnohé dalších.

Vydáváme skladby od talentovaných tuzemských producentů a snažíme se podpořit české producenty, aby prorazili do světa. K tomu nám pomáhá unikátní distribuční systém, kdy rozesíláme naše singly největším světovým DJským jménům a hledačům talentů.

Disponujeme originální grafickým provedením a snažíme se posunout místní taneční scénu zase o kousek dál. Určitě mrkněte na náš web www.housemagazinerecords.com

Vydavatelství je pak součást nejčtenějšího webu o elektronické taneční hudbě v ČR - housemagazine.cz

Name: Kolektiv 360
Description:
Kolektiv360 began as a talent agency with clients such as Buffalo Blanco, Melissa Galindo, Pit Moreno, Sussie 4, MC Davo and Becerros, and after a pandemic hiatus, it’s been relaunched as a music projects hub, working both on the live and recorded sides of the industry.

Our projects so far have had a wide span, working with talent, stakeholders and gatekeepers as well: Manchester alternative/indie trio Cassia, Mexican metal titans Resorte, multitalented content generator Cid Vela (Galatzia, El Ezequiel), drummer/DJ extraordinaire Derrick McKenzie (Jamiroquai), acclaimed Grammy-nominee jazz singer Magos Herrera; UK event and experience outfit Ridiculous Biz, global talent agency UTA, Mexican concert promoting giants OCESA (Live Nation), influential Mexican music conference & festival FIMgdl, and more.

Currently, Kolektiv is partnering up with boutique music festival Zapal that will happen for the first time in Monterrey, Mexico in the end of 2025 (after 5 successful editions in Saltillo, Mexico); is establishing El Music Business, a community for professionals and enthusiasts of the music industry in Latin America; and is developing a handful of special projects and brands within the show business.

Name: GruvIt

GruvIt is a Social Marketplace for both musicians and party lovers. Our mission is to create a platform where musicians and people meet and organize the next musical experience together. GruvIt's aim is to increase revenue streams for independent and unsigned musicians, while adding value to party lovers providing them with a unique experience.

It's now time: Turn your home party into a live concert!

Name: Melafrique

Name: Archi di Roma
Description:
Archi di Roma è un'orchestra senza direttore: la relazione, senza gerarchie, che intercorre tra i musicisti dell'orchestra permette la realizzazione di una profonda armonia nella loro produzione musicale.
 
Il gruppo persegue l'obiettivo di riportare i fasti del periodo barocco che fecero di Roma la principale capitale della musica del tempo, assieme a Venezia. Fondamentale, a tal fine, la ricerca di una perfezione tecnica e stilistica perseguita nella caratteristica vitalità ed energia della giovinezza. 

Obiettivo dell'ensemble Archi di Roma non è solo stimolare un risveglio sociale e culturale, ma anche provvedere ad una realizzazione professionale dei giovani membri che ne fanno parte: l'orchestra, non una semplice formazione giovanile, agisce come ponte tra gli studi accademici e la musica professionistica.

Name: Ceros Princeps
Description:
Ceros Princeps is many things. A unique multimedia experience which travels through the universe of my mind. Inspired by the vibration which travels through space and is felt in the soul. Original music, video, and a dabbling into photos. 
To teach, to entertain, to evoke positive emotion. Ceros Princeps: Inspired by the stars.

Description:
Mission
The Young People’s Philharmonic of the Lehigh Valley provides a supportive environment for young musicians to develop quality musicianship through studying and performing music with their peers.

Vision
Investing in a world where students find joy, value and pride in their musical endeavors, form quality relationships with mentors and establish lasting friendships with peers.

Name: Blue Rose Music
Description: Blue Rose Music is an artist collective that assists in the business and creative development of select musicians and projects. A portion of all revenue is donated to The Blue Rose Foundation, which provides pre-school scholarships to financially disadvantaged children.

Name: Yadaloo Music & Arts Festival
Description:
The Yadaloo Music and Arts Festival is a one-day event held on the shores of the Arkansas River at the North Shore Riverwalk Park in North Little Rock, Arkansas on Sunday, September 22, 2019.  

The mission of the Yadaloo festival is to provide national, top quality entertainment while boosting our local economy through a trend-setting experience that will build into state and national prominence. With Yadaloo we strive to create a new, one-of-a-kind experience that will capture the free spirit in us all.

IT'S ALL ABOUT THE ARTS!
In addition to our music entertainment, there will be areas and events set aside to feature all types of interactive art installations, which will nurture our inner child.  These activities will be hosted by local art groups.  Multiple arts and crafts vendors will feature their designs and products.  We will give priority to high-quality, contemporary merchandise with goods that are handcrafted, hard-to-find, or unusual items that are not widely commercially available. 

GRUB & GAMES
An array of food trucks and adult beverage vendors will be present.  There will be a dedicated game and activity area for all ages.   We will even have a designated dog park with dog vendors, a mechanical bull, a hot air balloon, baggo, yard pong, a kid zone and more!

VIP TENT
Limited VIP tickets will be available to our sponsors and attendees for the VIP tented area where there will be complimentary adult beverages and light food provided with a unique up close backstage view of the stage.  Possible meet and greets with the artists may occur.

COMMUNITY
The economic impact of the festival will boost the local Little Rock Rivermarket District and the North Little Rock businesses, specifically local bars, restaurants, and hotels, as well as our partnership with the nonprofit, Habitat for Humanity of Central Arkansas.

Visit:  www.Yadaloo.com
Email:  info@yadaloo.com 
Follow us on Twitter, Instagram, Snapchat & Facebook: @yadaloofest
#yadaloofest

Name: Traxploitation
Description: Consulting Services for Musicians - including advice on Royalties, Publishing and Recording deals, etc

Name: The Label Group
Description: The Label Group is a much-needed solution to an every growing problem. The music industry is and has always evolved through the years, creating opportunity for new innovative business. The Label Group is the next step in the evolution of the industry. Historically, major labels have maintained the only outlet for delivering music to market making it a seemingly exclusive industry. With the explosion of social media and mobile devices, the level of exposure has created an efficient vehicle to deliver music to market without the use of major labels. With this shift in exposure access to the music market boomed, independent labels were born giving more artists the ability to sell music. Recently there has been another shift in the industry, a more DIY approach to music marketing. Artists have taken on the daunting task of self-promotion, marketing, sales, touring, and so much more. This is a great option for artists who want to maintain control of their own careers, however it also poses an issue. Without a label, you don’t have a professional team to assist you in key aspects of running a successful career. Some of the key elements you need are: music distribution, music licensing, radio promotion, video marketing, press, touring, booking agents, management, online marketing, legal representation, recording, endorsements, and funding. The Label Group is the solution! With The Label Group, artists can maintain complete control of their career while having access to the best team in the industry. The Label Group is the next generation of label, the artists label, artists have the ability to utilize our professional relationships in the industry as well as our experience in the market. The Label Group is a seamless strait forward vehicle for artists to efficiently and affectively create exposure in the market.

Name: Savannah Jazz
Description:
Savannah Jazz, a 501C3 organization, has promoted Jazz throughout the Lowcountry for over 41 years. Our primary initiative is the Annual Savannah Jazz Festival held in late September featuring over 20 performances, most of which are entirely  free.  This is in the spirit of uniting all races and classes of people from all over the world.  

We also hold an annual concert series of 10 performances, 8 of which are free for our members. In September of 2022 we opened the Savannah Jazz History and Hall of Fame Exhibit in the Savannah History Museum;  it tells the rich story of jazz history in Savannah that is as old and important as it is in New Orleans but its story is just being told.  Our Hall of Fame member number over 40 and include such legends as Joe "Kind" Oliver, Johnny Mercer, Ben Tucker, Irene Reid, James Moody, Trummy Young, Jabbo Smith and Ben Riley.

Our educational programs include films, lectures, and interactive performances geared toward high school and college students and continuing learners of all ages.  

Memberships support all of our programs including two scholarships for rising jazz musicians in high school or college.  Join today or plan a trip to Savannah for our Festival and a visit to the Savannah Jazz History Exhibit.

Name: NOVA SALES AND DISTRIBUTION (UK) LIMITED
Description: NOVA SALES AND DISTRIBUTION (UK) LIMITED is a music company based out of 22 Isabel House, 46 Victoria Rd, Surbiton, SURREY, United Kingdom.

Name: Cape Cod Chamber Orchestra
Description:
Founder and conductor Matthew Scinto has a vision for the future of classical music on Cape Cod; by collaborating with local Cape individuals, arts organizations, and local causes, the orchestra aims to create a unique concert experience while providing high quality, enriching, and memorable orchestral music. 

The Cape Cod Chamber Orchestra was created in part to feature young artists, performers, soloists, and composers in our concert programs and to promote the future of these leaders of classical music. Featuring living composers is at the forefront of the orchestra's mission; bringing our audiences closer to the music of our time and to the beauty that surrounds us here on Cape Cod is essential to our audience's experience.

Read more about each of our musicians and be sure to join us in concert to see what we really are all about. 

Values:
1) A commitment to artistic integrity and excellence.
2) To be an inclusive and valuable organization to the community which we serve.
3) To provide programs that are artistically as well as educationally beneficial to our audiences.
4) An emphasis on championing the works of living composers, as well as the music of the classical canon.

Name: Quantize Music Group
Description:
Quantize Music Group (also known in the United States as Quantize Music Entertainment, LLC. and abbreviated as QMG) is an USA based Bengali entertainment & independent record label company founded by Tanvir Hossain TonMoy AKA T. H. TonMoy on 31st Dec 2018 & established on 14th April 2019 headquartered in Maryland City, Washington D.C along with first branch office in Nashville, TN.

Our goal & idea to start QMG is to connect with all kinds of genre loving diverse audience.  “There is no particular genre that works. People wants good music and that’s what matter to us. Be it Pop, Jazz, R&B, or Hip Hop/Electro-Pop, it should sound good.”

Name: XOXO AB
Description:
BOKA DJ`S, BAND OCH ARTISTER 
UTHYRNING AV LJUD, LJUS – OCH TEKNIK
FÅ HJÄLP MED MARKNADSFÖRING OCH PROJEKTLEDNING
ALLT FÖR DIN FEST, EVENT ELLER KICK – OFF

Vi erbjuder kompletta lösningar med allt från DJ-teknik, ljud och ljus, högkvalitativ musik och underhållning samt marknadsföring och projektledning. 

Med ett brett kontaktnät och lång erfarenhet erbjuder vi underhållning av högsta klass. Genom att boka Djs, artister, musiker samt ljud, ljus och teknik från oss kan vi som företag erbjuda helhetslösningar där vi skräddarsyr allt efter kundens önskemål och behov.

Vi har också rökmaskiner, rörliga ljussättning, strob, lasrar, mikrofoner och allt som täcker eventets behov. Vi levererar både i Stockholm och utanför.

PROMOTION!
Förutom spelningar jobbar vi även med promotion och lansering inom nöjesindustrin. Vi satsar på artistens musik och varumärke via olika PR – kampanjer och skräddarsyr efter önskemål och budget.

Varmt välkommen med din förfrågan!

E-Mail: info@xoxo.se
https://www.xoxo.se

Name: Acoustic Ross
Description:
ACOUSTIC ROSS is an AntiFolk solo artist, songwriter and music nerd. He creates solo acoustic music that isn't quiet, mellow, or boring, just GOOD: original music that makes you rock / laugh / cry / sway / all of the above / none of the above. 

“A smart smart-aleck... His friendly demeanor belies his acid wit.” – Tulsa World

In 2010 ACOUSTIC ROSS joined forces with Tulsa’s original sword-swallowing, knife-throwing, fire-breathing, snake-dancing carnival sideshow troupe, the Crispy Family Carnival, becoming its house troubadour, co-MC and stage manager, among other things. Since then ACOUSTIC ROSS has performed all over the midwest, and points east and west, with this traveling band of carnies, composed its official theme song, scarred himself on its weapons of destruction, and lots of things we maybe shouldn't go into detail about. Since 2011, the Crispy Family Carnival has been a featured attraction at Oklahoma's TRAIL OF FEAR outdoor haunted house.
 
“like listening to a Gahan Wilson cartoon” - Sam Jones, TV host

ACOUSTIC ROSS has released 4 albums, performed more than 350 shows & festivals all over the USA, and spent 4 years fronting the hard-rocking MATH LAB. 

Equal parts folk, punk, rock, blues, country, pop, with a dash of standup comedy to taste, ACOUSTIC ROSS assaults the stale & stagnant with intelligence & irreverence.

Award Nominations:
    Tulsa World Spot Music Awards 2002, “Best None of the Above”
    oklahomarock.com Music Awards 2003, “Best Singer-Songwriter”
    paynecountyline.com Music Awards 2005, “Acoustic Band of the Year”
    Tulsa World Spot Music Awards 2005, “Best Singer-Songwriter”

Name: Dfest Music Conference and Festival
Description:
DFEST CONFERENCE AND FESTIVAL:
Dfest Music Conference and Festival showcases 130+ artists of the best emerging independent artists in the country including Oklahoma, Regional and National artists over eleven stages in downtown Tulsa, Oklahoma. During the day, conference registrants learn and network of a full day of music industry panels, clinics, tradeshows, mentoring and artist one-on-one opportunities about the latest in the music industry at the Crowne Plaza Hotel. 

Dfest is also a tool for artists and business people to promote themselves. This can work on the level of unsigned artists looking for various kinds of deals -- record deals, publishing deals, agency deals, management deals -- up to more established artists who are promoting a new project. 

By selecting artists as widely as we can in terms of music genres, there's an audience for just about every type of music you can think of. 

The Eight Annual Dfest 2009. The conference panels, clinics and tradeshow will be held at the beautiful downtown Crowne Plaza Hotel. The festival will showcase over 130 artists in the beautiful BLUE DOME DISTRICT located in the heart of Downtown Tulsa and seconds from the hotel.

In 1999 OMiD Audiogroup opened the International Audio Academy, teaching Audio, Music Production, Composition and Music Business and preparing professionals to work in the music industry.

Name: The Octave Music Centre Inc.
Description: We are a Piano, Guitar, Ukulele, Music Lessons, Books & Accessories Music Store/Shop located in Guelph Ontario Canada offering an extensive selection of quality instruments and accessories. We stock the largest inventory of Roland Digital Pianos & Pramberger / Samick acoustic / grands & upright traditional pianos in Southwestern Ontario. Our featured acoustic & electric guitar brands include Simon & Patrick, Art & Luthier, Godin, La Patrie, Furch, Hagstrom, Schecter, Breedlove, Warwick and Washburn. In addition we often have used instruments for sale from brands such as Taylor, Martin, Gibson, Fender, Yamaha & more. We service the local area of Kitchener / Waterloo, Cambridge, London, Fergus and Acton Ontario. Our extensive web store services all of North America.

Description:
Ofive LLC is a sound-design growing company based in the United States that is changing the music industry with its digital products (sample and preset packs as well as project files) for music producers.  Ofive is currently working on expanding to the academy and courses side to reach musicians that are looking for a professional sound.

Our purpose is to bring the producers all the tools to develop their artistic careers. 

 |  Contact us: info@ofivesounds.com

Name: Brighton Festival Chorus
Description:
Brighton Festival Chorus is one of the UK's leading symphony choruses.  
Under the leadership of our Music Director James Morgan, BFC has performed with all the major British orchestras, including the Royal Philharmonic Orchestra, the London Symphony Orchestra, the Philharmonia Orchestra and the BBC Concert Orchestra. BFC has made 10 appearances at the BBC Proms and been nominated for two Grammy awards.
BFC is independent we develop our own creative programme which includes off-book, semi-staged, and dawn chorus events alongside live film performances & TV commercials. Our vision is to extend the breadth of our work and embracing new possibilities, through the passion and commitment of our members, the brilliance of the Brighton Festival Youth Choir and our outreach workshops and school events.

Name: The Guitar Medic
Description: The Guitar Medic is a guitar and bass repair shop.  We are the official guitar tech for Learn to Burn School of Music located just East of Division at 11 E. ROCKwell.  We take repairs by appointment only or you can drop off your guitar at Learn to Burn for repairs as well.

Name: Kulturbüro Grupo Sal
Description:
The Kulturbüro Grupo Sal has been working as a cultural ambassador for Latin America for over 40 years. We develop high-quality musical performances, concert readings, and events in cooperation with the Latin American music group Grupo Sal, based in Tübingen, as well as renowned writers, actors, politicians, journalists, and activists.

Each year, we jointly organize around 50 events across German-speaking Europe, most of which focus on environmental and development-related education. These events foster networking and public engagement, combined with sponsorship and fundraising activities in support of cultural work and concrete aid projects in Latin America.

Our productions are also released as sound recordings, primarily self-published, and distributed through our own channels. Upon request, we additionally act as an agency to arrange performances by other music groups and cultural programs.

Name: Piano & Music Society
Description:
We are a non-profit student run society established and based at the University of Melbourne. Our goal is to provide a platform for pianists and music lovers to collaborate, socialise and create. 

We have successfully received a reception of over 200 members in the first week of operation and hope to grow over the coming years. Hosting not only social events for members, but also piano classes, themed performance concerts and many more activities. 

Upon the completion of our first large scale event, the "From Classical to Pop" piano concert, we successfully filled out Melbourne University Conservatorium of Music's Melba Hall to a record breaking 300+ capacity. We plan to replicate this for our upcoming concert, the newest spectacle, the "Piano Battle Show", this coming October.

Name: Wilhelm Heckel GmbH
Description:
Seit mehr als 180 Jahren verbindet Heckel Tradition und Moderne im Bau hochwertigster Holzblasinstrumente. 
In unserem bis heute familiengeführten Betrieb in Wiesbaden fertigen wir gemeinsam mit 30 Mitarbeitern Fagotte, Kontrafagotte und Heckelphone, sowie die dazugehörigen S-Bögen.
Der Erfahrungsschatz der Familie Heckel – verbunden mit den neuesten akustischen und technischen Erkenntnissen – bildet noch heute die Grundlage für unsere Musikinstrumentenproduktion.

Name: Blues Peer
Description: Blues festival Peer founded on 15 juli 1985. Ever since Blues Peer has become one of the most valuable Blues Festivals in Europe. Each year a new edition takes place on the 3th weekend of July. People from over the world are coming together to enjoy the Blues.

Name: SEATTLE COLLABORATIVE ORCHESTRA
Description:
The Seattle Collaborative Orchestra (SCO) is a diverse, multigenerational performing arts organization dedicated to diversity in symphonic classical music.

  SCO includes approximately 80 professional, gifted community and talented student musicians who work together to create a unique and collaborative musical experience that includes a creative mix of traditional orchestral music, works by female composers and composers of color.

Name: Smooth Hot Jazz
Description:
For the very first time, the city of Madrid will present a major Smooth Jazz Festival. This variation of traditional Jazz is recognized for its display of great harmonic lines and a lesser degree of improvisation. Some music critics consider that this genre of music was created by artists searching for a deeper Pop sound, merging it at the same time with the roots of the American Soul and Funky music.

Experts place the birth of Smooth Jazz halfway through the 70’s, but its real peak took place during the 80’s. Relevant pioneers of this type of music have been George Benson (reconverted after some albums of traditional Jazz), Grover Washington Jr., Kenny G., Larry Carlton, Al Jarreau (RIP), Herb Alpert, Chuck Mangione, Gato Barbieri (RIP), Dave Koz and many more.

If you like good music, if you are an enthusiast of Jazz, Soul, Pop and Funky, you can’t miss this opportunity of watching some of the best Smooth Jazz musicians of the world playing live. Its melodic and vibrant styles will make you shiver in your seats.
